content: This is my favorite restaurant, hands down. The owner, Abe, is always friendly and welcoming and he remembers my favorites. I usually have a Gyro or Chicken Shawarma, or the Shawarma platter, which are excellent, and I'll also get a bag of chips and hummus. I also love how warmly the store is decorated.
Great service...meat tough to chew in nachos...could have been cleaner...had to clean seat off before I sat down due to pieces of food in seat

Check there health inspection reports before eating here! We loved this place when they first opened, but after they were shut down for ROACHES we could never bring ourselves to eat there ever again. Plus, after they were open for a little bit, the food wasn't as good as it was in the beginning.
This store is pure chaos and poorly managed. I avoid it when I can. Would prefer traveling hundreds of miles and avoiding this store.
Way, way, way too noisy to be able to enjoy a meal. Painfully noisy.
Branzino was great, steak was good, not a fan of the charging for the BYO cork fee
You know those places you have to drink your weight in margaritas to make yourself eat the food. This is one of those. Enough said.

This was a good find. It is an old style family run restaurant, but with good food and prompt service. They did have several selections of non-fried foods (broiled fish, etc.) It was not crowded (but not empty either)and we were seated promptly. If you are in the area eat here!
Too greasy, too fattening, too salty and too much bacon. But, it is an attractive place!

Amazing staff, and they have a amazing band come in calked Fast 4 Ward who play amazing country. A great environment for family and friends. Really easy to change a menu item if you are finicky like me.

Please tell your billing collector employee to stop harassing me. She has harassed me for the past year for a minimal co-pay balance. Went as far as contacting my friend for my personal information. That's HIPAA violation and I will be reporting it. I have paid the co-pay by the way. Life happens so please be more mindful

This place isn't clean. Went twice recently. Can't see evidence of tools being sterilized. Needs some sprucing up. Lots of competition around now. It's the cheapest around but you get what you pay for. Techs fast but average

Saturday lunch is brunch menu only, disappointment. Perhaps that explains why the place was virtually empty. Service was mediocre at best. Food was not impressive at all. Don't plan to return. Nothing about this place stands out!
The food was okay. They need a better ventilation system. We left smelling like fried foods! The waffles were heavy, not light and fluffy. The service was great.

Brian L. tried everything possible to resurrect my old phone. He was also super nice and respectful. Rec'd a few times already. They earned a customer for life. (Though I hope I don't need to use them!) :)
Not a fan of this stadium but came to see my SF Giants play the Rays. Like most ballparks everything is ridiculously overpriced.

I attempted to go to dinner with my husband and our friends last night. We were standing at a stand that said Please wait to be seated for about 15 minutes. No one ever came to us and when I found a waiter to ask, he brushed me off like I wasn't work his time. I won't bother coming here again.

This place sucks! Salad bar has not been restocked in an hour, I know that bc we've been waiting that long to get our ordered food. Floor is disgusting also. The manager should be fired. It's also right after opening and the place is a wreck. I wish I could give it 0 stars.

I went to Denny's and immediately smelled this odor like a grease trap needed emptied, or soured bleach water. I had to leave. I immediately lost my appetite. The floor looked like it hadn't been swept or mopped, my table was sticky, and when I explained there was a foul odor the waitress was dismissive, said well you're good to go bye. Bad experience.

My friend ordered a lemon drop and they left the fruit sticker on his slice of lemon. Then one of the waitresses cussed out her less experienced coworker for asking her what to do. This is just another airport hole where you go to pass the time between layovers. Don't come here for anything serious.

Okay I've tried this Waffle House several times and the fact is they cannot cook eggs without breaking the yolks. I ordered over easy and one egg was busted and the other was hard The service staff is great but they need to hire someone that can cook eggs.

Bought my first vehicle yesterday from them. Everything was amazing. Rolend was super helpful, the financing part was swift and easy, the car is amazing, and lanikah was great during our paperwork. 10/10 will buy from them again

Not sure why this place has really good reviews, came here with my boyfriend and had to ask to be seated and I had to ask to get something to drink because no one helped us. We ordered garlic bread and it was literally a hot dog bun with garlic on it. The pizza was alright but I won't be back.

Y'all need to update your arcade games guys!!! We had so many games taking our money & not reciprocating with games! The "carnival type" games are still bad ass though. So you made up for it! You could also get some better prizes when you turn in your tickets. But all in all it was good clean fun for a couple sober kids.

Saraga is the best international supermarket in Indianapolis! Almost any ethnic food you could imagine is there. We go to visit family every summer and winter, and we never leave without going to Saraga.
Ribeye was disgusting! Avoid this place and it's terrible drinks and service at all cost.

Wish I had checked Yelp before choosing to grab a table at Jet Rock while waiting for a flight. Staff was pleasant but I ordered a cider and received a beer, the salad arrived dripping wet with water and it took forever to pay. Travel is frustrating enough

The locals and vacationers all arrive for a great breakfast here, anytime of morning. I tried the Georgia peach Belgian waffle which was SO tasty! Others in our group joined in with a sausage Benedict plus their "special" which basically toast, eggs, a meat (protein), side order of potatoes , & this special is served with both juice and. Coffee for under $9! ..

Beautiful atmosphere, great happy hour specials and nice lunch. I did have a really bad entrée there for dinner last night though. It was lamb with pasta. All I can say is - Yuck. The sauces was super heavy and gooey and the lamb was crunchy and weird.
mediocre and not particularly veg-friendly. the food is generically "american", which translates unfortunately into uninteresting and bland food. hard to beat the location, though.
Zinburger is delicious. Kobe beef is so good! Service and food were both delightful. Brian was an angel, let him keep his beard!
Our first experience of gumbo in New Orleans. Great service, food was solid but didn't blow my socks off!

Highly recommend this place. We have an '89 VW Westy that needed a rear axle replaced. Exceptional customer service, they take pride in their work. They even diagnosed a fuel leak that happened as we were about to hit the road. We couldn't be happier with our choice of mechanic. Thank you RMF for taking such good care of us.
Awesome view but just average food. The side of pasta was far better than the steak or seabass. Worth one visit though if in Stl
Crowded but fast going through security. Very clean.
Sushi was flavorless and the portions were very small. Considering the price they were charging, the quality and quantity should be a lot higher. Go somewhere else if you have the option to do so!

I will never - NEVER - buy from Rooms To Go again. NEVER! The sales was great, the delivery was great, the quality was fair. But the AFTER SALES customer service is HORRIFIC. They will NOT fix something that came damaged. They take WEEKS to reply to email. They IGNORE requests to speak with someone directly. It is awful! AWFUL!
Wonderful nursery with all native plants and trees. They are very helpful and took us around looking for exactly what we wanted and gave us suggestions! Going back today for more!

This is my favorite 'fancy' restaurant right now. The chicken wings are so delicious- delicate and perfectly crispy and the sauces they come with are really tasty! Everything I've ever ordered here was tasty and beautiful. The deserts haven't been entirely impressive but it's not a deal breaker for me- I love this place!
The staff there is beyond rude to the patients and their families! We overheard them talking and laughing about a patient and their family. Such unprofessional behavior!

In today's Taproom game there is a lot of challenges. Bills Best nails all of them! Delicious beer selections, amazing pulled pork sandwich and a really friendly staff. Theme nights also to add fun to the evening. Thanks for a great night Bills Best

Your neighborhood bar! Good amount of t.v.'s, you will run into your neighbor, someone you went to high school with, or maybe even your ex. Bartenders are all female, the food is good, and ambiance is chill. Definitely a place where smoking inside is allowed. Air out your jacket when you get home. Prices are reasonable and making friends here is pretty easy.

The displays at whole foods simply make you want to buy anything and everything. The lunch buffet has so many options. And while some of the options are not the tastiest, there are definitely enough choices to satisfy any palate.

Waited 40 min for a table for brunch. Wasn't happy such a long wait since we were starving but it's a small place so not much seating. We ordered right away when waiter came. 40 min. Later we get r food. That was unacceptable to me. Food was good but my husbands eggs were cold. Ruined r first time experience. : (

We ordered "the fresh grouper sandwich" and got Talapia. It was good but it wasn't fresh or grouper. We told them and she insisted the owner states it was grouper. We eat Talapia all of the time and know the taste and texture and size of Talapia. We paid grouper price $14 for a $5 piece of fish. Wouldn't go again.
Great food for the price. Love this place for a burger or breakfast, and I hear so did clint Eastwood!!!
Food was good. Atmosphere was nice. But most of all our server Mary was excellent! We were glad we came here for dinner.

Didn't have the best experience with the new ownership. They managed the repairs needed both times we were in but we had to question everything and look over a few shoulders. If my husband didn't know so much about cars they would have taken my son for a very expensive ride. They made it right on the end but that should never happen!
I love their charbroiled chicken sandwiches. It's the only thing I eat there. hehe

Well worth the trip away from the beach! Starting at a condo on the beach. Wanted something different. Found this gem. Great gyros with the option of a lettuce wrap instead of a pita. Dolmas were excellent. And finish with walnut baklava. Highly recommend!
Minas used to be great. But lately the portions have got smaller, blander and more expensive. The Pad Thai i ordered the last two times were HORRIBLE!! It was devoid of any flavor.
I love to go treasure shopping. It's fun just strolling the store. Unfortunately some things can be pretty pricey. The workers are always very nice.
Awesome dr.nagao- luis-julie-glenda-everyone thankyou for doing amazing job on my dental work and always treating me like family -- I'll never go elsewhere

Best cheesesteak in this part of the city. Chopped meat slow cooked, fresh rolls, good service. Been doin it that way for many years. If your sampling the "best of" cheesteaks then you have to try this out. Go off peak if you want to relax and have some elbow room, otherwise its packed but in a hungry friendly way.
Solid breakfast. Super fast service, food was out just minutes after ordering. Good pancakes, cornbread, and sausages. Jambalaya was more soupy than I'd prefer, and a bit too spicy.

Yummy burger, fresh, with all the trimmings you love and then some. Fries are delicious! Free peanuts. Perfect meal if you are a red meat eater. Never a bad burger, not here.... Go get you one...... Surprised that you don't see onion rings..
Thi is among the best Chinese food in the area. We have been coming 20+years. It's so cool when they remember you and welcome you back. The food is great, never had a mediocre meal here!

My boyfriend and went into the corner pocket during Southern Decadence and it was such a blast, the drinks were well priced and the entertainment was a amazing. The boys were fun and friendly and weren't pushy to grab your money and run! Also, I love how the strippers are ordinary street boys rather than models. Can't wait to go back!!!!!!!

In my opinion, the food was tasty, However, in the seating area where there is a garage door, there was a cockroach crawling on the floor and on the ledge above the garage door was a rodent, either a rat or mouse, it ran from one side to the other by the security camera.

I stopped in on a trip and so glad I did. The items were unique, fun and affordable. The woman behind the counter was very friendly and easy to talk to. I ended up leaving with a pair of fantastic boots half off. If I ever make it back to Philly I will be sure to stop in. Thank you for a great experience!
On past visits we loved the Grouper here. Well on this visit my wife's was very good and mine was not, so bad, sent it back. Switched to a Cuban sandwich.
Hamburger was delicious, tea was good. Fries, average, shake average. I would prefer Culver's.
No BS, no pestering nor procrastinating: just efficiency, honesty, and quality.
We are from New Orleans and have visited here at least 5 or 6 times - very authentic cuisine. The shrimp tacos are THE best. The remoulade is to die for.

Great atmosphere, food hmmm a little on the bland side , given the nature of some of dishes at least get the seasonings rite, either to bland or too sweet not a good combo, mixed drinks no thank you too much on the sweet side
Very friendly owner/chef. The menu items are clearly marked as far as what is vegan, vegetarian, or can be made vegan upon request. The mollete made with soyrizo was absolutely delicious.

This is an excellent restaurant. The chef and owner, Danny, makes wonderful food. Everything he makes is out of this world! The restaurant itself is quaint and the drinks are fabulous. We'll be back again and again.

A good place to eat, especially in the area. Loved the sandwiches and the calzones, can't wait to go back and try the pizza. The waitress that took care of us was quite possiblynthe NICEST waitress I've ever dealt with.
No red meat Need I say more I don't eat seafood....I went with friends I ate nothing
Good cheap steak. Always loud. Beer and mixed drinks are good. Forget trying their wine selection. Floor is covered in peanut shells, sides are not great. Appetizers are meh.

The lobby is a little dirty. I ordered a Big Mac no pickles no onions. Some how I got extra of both and no salt on the fries. Yes salt on the fries. Saving grace, the people were very nice on fixing the order. We will see next time.

Today was our first visit there and of course the Groupon brought us in. The salad was very tasty and the pizza was exceptionally delicious. Everything tasted fresh and the service was beyond great. We will definitely be back for more. Great job you guys. See you next time!

As the Covid-19 pandemic continues on, there was no wearing of masks or social distancing by the employees. I really want to support local businesses and not big box retailers, but I would not go back into this store with little regard for the public health and safety during this pandemic.

Cheesy bread and pizza were decent. Nothing to get excited about. Service was decent. Nothing to get excited about. Tables were dirty, even though the restaurant was only half full and there were plenty of employees scurrying about. If we lived in N.O. this place wouldn't be in our normal family dinner out rotation.
Great atmosphere but the red solo cups served for over priced wine and drinks is too much. DJ is good and makes the vibe super chill. The wait to get up here was not worth my time.
We had crawfish omelets which were pretty tasty but could have been cheesier. Busy but efficient.
First timer; convenient spot, very neat place. Friendly staff! Good service. Will definitely return back. Not bad at all...

The hash browns are amazing. I highly recommend the cbh benedict it was delicious. I tried the bloody mary it was okay. Maybe mine was watered down but everything else was good. Good portion and the mini muffins they give before your meal is delicious. Great location in front of the beach too. I would come back.

Farm fresh- local, food was delicious, salmon crepe and goat cheese crepe were absolutely wonderful! Seating arrangements might not be for everyone, long tables, but still felt like it was private. Coffee good. Bloody Mary was average, but someone mentioned the mimosa was the way to go! Fun and hip!

If I could give 0 stars I would. Terrible BBQ. There are so many better places to grab good BBQ in Nashville don't waste your time here. I think I've had better ribs at a TGIFs. Mac and cheese, was terrible, beans were right out of a can and nachos with pulled pork were gross. Ordered a side of veggies...those were decent. Stay away.
Hands-down this is the best sushi restaurant in the area. Food is always fresh and delicious.

Custard takes the painful sting out of our annual tax fleecing appointment at H&R Block in the same strip mall. Vanilla custard is my favorite!! Today w chocolate sprinkles or jimmies or whatever you want to call it. Whatever you call it- their custard is rich, indulgent & delicious!
The best vegetarian sushi there is. There are so many options for vegetarians and it's very flavorful. Great if you love spicy food.

Just got the Frenchmen Scallops and Lake Pontchartrain Roll, the roll was pretty good but the scallops... were very tiny as you can see a water bottle cap for comparison. And were inedible, tasted like straight salt! I love eating scallops. I feel really ripped off with the scallops, very disappointed.
Poor quality. Overpriced. Tasteless food. Just say syinara to this joint. Something fishy is right.

I've started having breakfast here on a regular basis recently and I'm a big fan. The staff is friendly, knowledgeable, and knows my order before I even sit down. Best service at the terminal. Highly recommend.

So I have been here multiple times but this will likely be my last. I watched the wait staff eat fries behind the counter and the cooks remove food from one plate and transferred it to another plate. I am all for local and family ran businesses but I am not for unsafe food handling...
Tasty food, reasonable prices and their staff is quite friendly as well. We go here all the time and I've been never disappointed... must visit

They call this pizza? It's terrible. Thin, doughy crust, cheap tasteless cheese, barely any pepperoni. Cardboard tastes better! They don't take credit cards over the phone so they told me to go online and the system was down. It was an overly complicated bad experience. YUK! NEVER AGAIN!
idk what else to say. very gimmicky. the workers there are really nice and cool but the food itself? eh.

I ate a grilled chicken salad here yesterday for lunch, which resulted in food poisoning. I hadn't eaten at an Applebee's in several years, and only did so because I was given a gift card for here. Definitely the worst gift I've received. Won't be back, and am throwing away the gift card that still has a balance.

We went to the patio for Happy Hour. The staff was very unfriendly, the food was mediocre !! If you go just order a drink!! The patio and surrounding are beautiful. I think the food in the dining room is good, somehow it doesn't get prepared the same for outdoors!
We had Saturday brunch. The eggs were not prepared to order. Average meal for a high price.

Two lagers & a burger cost, with tip, $27. The TV's are poorly placed for watching sports--obviously no thought went into this. The beers were tasty and the burger & salad good, however the food arrived without condiments or even salt & pepper. Apparently this is one of those places where the "chef" decides what's best for you...

This was OK for the price, but nothing to impress you. We had to change 2 rooms until we got one without any issues. The breakfast was typical junk food you'll find in any hotel. Close to the highway.
Terrible customer service. Clueless sales staff. Nothing like the Jersey locations. One of the worst sales experiences of my life.

I bought an affordable pair of light pink flats for work. I did want to note that their thigh-high boots displayed under a table were super dusty and turned me off from purchasing. It took some time to get someone to come ring me up at the register.
Definitely one the cleanest locations in the Reno area! The staff is very friendly and helpful. I find myself visiting this location quite frequently to look for some great deals!
We set out for Bread Pudding, we found the best bread pudding in the country. It may not look like much, but I promise the taste will not be beaten.
I'm starting to think they serve leftovers. Some days the cupcakes are drier than others. When they're fresh and moist they're delicious. I'd buy them again.
Beautiful, majestic, soaring ceilings. The bathrooms are maintained like its a Philly train station.

Ordered online for carry out. Honestly wasn't impressed with the food. I had bacon, egg and cheese on an everything bagel. It wasn't anything I couldn't have made at home. Also tried the cinnamon swirl cheesecake muffin, it was good but I didn't get a big taste of cinnamon.

I love Jessie James Decker and her clothes. The store is sooo cute inside! I only give it 2 stars because the staff is so rude, they just talked amongst themselves and acted annoyed if I had a question. I did not feel welcome at all. I spent $188. If I wasn't such a big fan of Jessie I would've just left.

The cookies are a hit or miss depending on the flavor. I went here several times the ratio of good flavors to average is 65/35. Service part is super slow and there is lot of room of improvement. The app is pretty much useless and has a limit on total amount of cookies that be ordered for the day.
Good neighborhood Mexican restaurant! Finally a place with good tamales. Always good friendly service also.

The owners are there to make the experience extra special. The place is very clean. The food is wonderful. The menu has a very good variety. I have tried almost everything on the menu and have not been disappointed with a single bite.

Not as good as I remember. The first time I went it was phenomenal. I went again and got the same thing to-go. Wasn't as flavorful and the sauce was something I'm allergic too. I didn't know that sauce came with it. Nevertheless, I may be willing to try again. We'll see.

Well I've gone here before and they do a good job overall. Today I'm grumpy as it took 2 hours and 45 minutes for an oil change. I may consider a drive through oil change service next time, as they are generally in and out.

I bought a bathroom vanity with sink and countertop from them. The sink was mounted to the counter and doesn't fit on the vanity. The quality of the pieces is fine but it seems to me that the pieces should fit together. My contractor needs to modify the vanity to make it fit.

Have tried District several times and still unimpressed with food, frankly. It is hip and has ambience and big crowds for sure. Donuts are huge and over the top - not for me. Sliders are pretty good option. Food is better than donuts, and the pickled jalapenos are worth the trip. Mehhh.

My first impression of this place is meh. The chip had been good though the salsa tasted like watery tomatoes. El Pastor street tacos so awful, couldn't be finished. Carne Asada street tacos actually weren't too bad. Only plus side, the margaritas- delicious and unique.
Nice hidden Gem. Area is not so good but live band, bar and good drinks. I would definitely come back.
Average cuban food and horrible tortilla española. Visit Spain and have a real one. Please avoid this place.

Probably one of the best places I've ever been to. Everything is so nice. Friendly staff, clean floors, clean tables and clean bathrooms. Had to wait a little bit for the food to be ready but it was Worth the wait. Like the cook said, she has to make sure her food is good and she sure does an awesome job!!

I was raised going to the Original Gurst Haus since the 1970s. We took my Grandfather weekly for the Pig Nuckle and Bier. So I have great memories. However I have a daughter who was raised in Germany for 8 years. She hates their food! The last 2 times I went the meals were not eatable. The Schnitzel was very small and over cooked.
The Kitchen attendant was very rude she had a bad attitude acted like she did not enjoy her job The service is consistently slow here every time we come, 11 minutes to get a cookie off the shelf

Fun neighborhood hole in the wall restaurant with an extensive menu. I give it 4 stars mostly for the old style thow-back charm. I had the grilled shrimp salad. Skip that and go with the more traditional comfort food. My wife had the waffle breakfast and thoroughly enjoyed it

Had ribs, greens & butter beans. The ribs were pulled early so they could clean the grill, so they mixed their priorities. Delicious beans cooked with ham & the greens we're pretty plain. Found a free place to park. Very spacious, but noisy.

We ordered the whole red snapper. It was really quite bad. It tasted extremely fishy, like it was just starting to turn. I've had the whole red snapper here before and it was delicious -- mild, almost buttery. Unfortunately we got a bad fish this time around. Everything else was great (tuna tar tar, beans, shrimp toast, fried bread)

Be careful with early reservations! I had a reservation for 7am when the store was supposed to open, and nobody came to open the store until after 8. Luckily, I was not on a tight schedule. The fill-ins who came were apologetic and let me keep the truck out for a few extra hours.

BLACKS/AFRICAN AMERICANS not wanted at Charles P. Stanley. The owner condones POOR CUSTOMER SERVICE. I will spend my dollars were they are appreciated. I repeat Blacks are not wanted but accepted. #factsonly Mr Nice Guy

Totally overrated. Pork was dry and broccoli rob was tasteless. The sharp provolone was limp and stale. Bread was average at best. My buddy got the traditional cheesesteak and could only eat about a quarter of it. "Tasteless" was his description. Totally over hyped and marketed place.

Miserable service. Perhaps giving a condescending attitude works well in Orange County but it doesn't fly here. I'd much rather have Folgers instant coffee at home with lukewarm tapwater than to go here.
Unfriendly and unprofessional service during my first visit. Food was not impressive in flavor. With both said, cost did not justify quality of experience.
Trust the reviews- I didn't!!! Place is terrible. $18 for the worst manicure I've ever, ever gotten!

Love the decor. Unique menu items. Had the chicken and bisquit and it was pretty good. Also had a cappucino and hazelnut tiramisu cake. Nice place to gather with friends or family for a good dinner, but it is a bit pricey, so just be aware.

They really went down hill. Unless you are getting popcorn or fast food I wouldn't recommend them. Last time we were here they had great burgers....this time they only had a sesame bun and undercooked. Then they don't have items anymore that is still on their menus.

Pleased understand that I have been here over 47.74 times. We used to come here once a week. Not sure what happened but the food has decreased in its quality. Yes I know the whole world has changed items are short due to covid but damn

I have been to this location for over two years for periodic dental exam and cleaning. Cecilia was my hygienist and I can tell she has very good skills. Dr. Bortz is a great dentist as well and was able to provide helpful information. They never recommend any additional services you don't need.

Good coffee spot on congress the place is cool with two floors .After you get your coffee the second floor has some cool seats that will give awesome views of congress. Kinda wish they had more cold/ice coffee options the menu is limited on that but i like that it sells alcohol and food.
Dope spot to visit if you grew up watching Rocky, be aware there's long lines and parking sucks. But Over all I'm glad I stopped by.

This restaurant was OK... Nice water front views... They offered their "event" menu which meant they removed items that took a little longer to prepare. We questioned an item we really wanted and they agreed to make it. Not a bad meal, but not as good as we expected based upon many of the other reviews.
Incredible Ramen! I have the one that almost was more like chicken soup it was so incredibly good! The service is also very fast, which is nice. This is the place in Tampa for Ramen!
3.5 stars Stop right now and walk about 5 blocks from this bakery and go to Metropolitan. Le Bus isn't particularly awful but Metro has better French staples and pastries.

The Bartender girl really rude..(Inside).i don't know why she even works with people..She was mean and after she surprised not too good tip.She was talking about us to her co-wokers in front of us,and a next time when we ordered drinks she told us f@@K U! so i was a bartender before and i never had that bad experience...

Never a bad visit, whether you just have time for dessert or you plan on staying for a meal. Staff is always professional and engaging and I have yet to find a bad dish on the menu. Portions are generous, but beware some of the desserts are really large and meant to be shared (as if that's a bad thing).
Took nearly 90 minutes to get an 11 inch pizza. Food was ok when it finally came. Wait staff was awesome and the only reason I would consider giving this place another shot.

The manager Jill s very nice but the place is actually very dirty. The beds, walls, floors, radios bathroom, etc is filthy. They even have cords hanging out the wall in one of the rooms. This place could be really nice if it had a deep cleaning and it was kept up properly. DIRTY!!!!

We are from NY and came here to try this place recommended by a few locals...well it was probably one of the best slices I've eaten in a long time! And the garlic knots are amazing... a must try! Exceeded our expectations 10 fold and wish we could shop back a pie and a side of knots! Make sure you check this place out!!

The name may say Chicago's Pizza but it certainly was not a Chicago style pizza. We had boneless bbq chicken wings, pizza bread with bacon and deluxe pizza. The pizza was equal to a Red Baron frozen pizza. The bbq wings were okay but wasn't anything special. The bbq tasted like sweet baby rays. For the price we paid, I wouldn't get this again.

This place is great! So many delicious beers. They offer pints & flights. There's also sandwiches, pizzas, and some different appetizers. The vibe in there is super mellow and chill. Can't wait to come back!
Delicious Pho and lots of gluten free options. Ambiance is cozy and staff is very friendly and knowledgeable on the dishes. Groupon brought us here, but we will be returning!
Loved it so much came twice within 3 days. Once during a bustling night (sat at the bar with their hospitable bartenders) , next during the day with a great view and relaxing vibe.

Maybe I'm spoiled by Impact Thrift, but this place was very disappointing. I even took the time to dig, but nothing. Everything struck me as way too worn and dirty. I will give a few more chances though.

I came in at 4:20 on a sunday and i wanted to get a full set, she kept rushing me to pick a color and messed up my nail shape, she did my nails way to fast i did not like the experience at all! I wish they just told me to come another day instead of messing my nails up!
Never a dull moment when you sit back and watch the views from the street car. As your butt, and back take a beating from the hard ride. All you can do is sit back and enjoy the scenery.

We are new to town and were looking for a bounce place for the kids. This was a good choice and the kids were happy. We are used to a large open bounce house with 1 big room. This place has it split into multiple rooms. Doing a good job of not being as crowded.

The food was decent. Nothing special though. The margaritas were 2 for 1 at 9 bucks a piece. They also had a two dollar taco special. A buddy ordered 5 of them and said they were very delicious. I have had better quesadillas though but these werent bad at all.

Eh, it's OK. I wasn't impressed with the food menu or the decor. The beer menu is great, but they still don't have any of their own brews available - what's the hold up? Service was OK. Bar area a bit smoky. If you get a pizza, keep in mind that it's big enough for 3 to 4 people.

Soda Jerks is a decent burger place. There are so many options if you choose to build your own, and the soda selection is great. I highly recommend the Fentimans Rose Lemonade. I'm also in love with the chocolate covered bacon milkshake. It's delicious! The service was great. The atmosphere was average chain place. Definitely worth a shot.

I love this place! Inexpensive and delicious. Sometimes there's a big crowd at lunch ... a sign that others like it as much as I do too, so it's a good idea to go a little early or late if you want a weekday lunch there.
Okay hamburger. I went opening week. They might get better. I liked the cajun fries and the person I went with got a shake and she liked it.

Great experience with this company/service, had Bubba as the tow operator helping me out and he went above and beyond in terms of service and professionalism. Dispatcher was helpful and responsive too. Excellent customer service experience after having the tow request I'd placed dispatched to them.
This place is a wonderful little dive. The burger was awesome and the quesadillas were wonderful. The service was friendly and attentive.
I sat down, unrolled my silverware and it was dirty. I walked out. I really cant stand a dirty restaurant
Very rude front desk personnel. Checkin is at 3pm and I arrived at 3:30 pm and they told me they don't have any room available for me. Very bad attitude and unprofessional costumer service.

The people that work hear a real rude. And disrespectful to customers. It is not the first time I asked for the owners to reach out and was told the owners do not speak English. So any problems you have is to be taken care by the person that casuals the problem.
My First Time Visiting And Will Not Be My Last Came Up From Baltimore, Maryland For The Dau. Food Was Excellent!!! Our Waitress Was August Also Excellent!!!
Just tried callin for delivery . Got hung up on 3 times. I dont care if you stopped delivering DO NOT HANG UP ON ME
Amazing! Food was delicious, ambiance warm, staff friendly and inviting and more than fair price. Very very impressive. Best experience I've had in a while.
A very sub par dining experience. Food wasn't very good for the price, atmosphere wasn't relaxing music too loud. Drinkware was dirty. Do not recommend eating here.
Came here to get gas on the way home from a vacation...it wasn't crowded at all, I didn't need to go inside the mart. I just paid by credit card at the pump, self service. A-ok!

Been a fan for a decade- not impressed since the relaunch. Slow and rude service and food has become sub-par. Really hope they work out the kinks and get back to the fast service and food they used to serve.
Great late night spot to grab some cheap drinks. Not loud and raucous. You can actually have a conversation with friends at 2 a.m. without yelling or fear of getting something spilled on you.
Just moved down from Boston area, these are hands down the best sandwiches you can get. Plus now that I'm on Atkins the Sun In a Tub is great! Original Italian is the best
great drip coffee and sandwiches, but the space is a little small so it's hard to find seating sometimes. still a great place to study and get work done though!
Don't go here. The food is not good. The ambience is bad and the place is overpriced. Think of a bad chain restaurant, only worse. I don't know how this place has 4+ stars.
Best souvlaki you'll have! Try the saganaki.

I'll start with the pluses. Good prices. Nice ambiance. I sat outside in the sunshine and listened to some Mexican jams and ate complimentary chips and salsa as I waited. The fish tacos were not amazing. Just ordinary. My friend who had the chicken roasted vegi fajita lunch special said the chicken was over cooked. Still not a bad spot.

Was due for a refresh on my dip manicure but was hesitant as I'm not from Tampa and have a regular nail guy back home.. but Jen did not disappoint! The SNS options were INSANE. I've never seen so many colors in one location. Will come back if I'm ever in the area.
This restaurant sucks. All the people were so rude and snooty! I love Restoration Hardware but this restaurant is a bunch of people with their noses up in the air!
Food is great, would recommend to eat at the store because when I ordered takeout the food was cold by the time I got home (10 Minutes)
Two stars because awesome service , but food is a pass. Too many better options in New Orleans than to spend your money on bland , undercooked food.
Delicious burgers and cold cheap beer so this locals joint makes my boyfriend and I happy! We love to hit it up before or after a Rays game and the prices are very reasonable!

Service was great. Beef on wick was good. Pork taco's were tiny and not worth the price. I understand they were an appetizer, but that price for three extremely tiny taco's were ridiculous. Bad menu choice.
This place used to be good they changed the menu now it's just crap food, gumbo was like straight from a can not good at all
Dewey's is our favorite pizza spot in town. Staff are always inviting and helpful. Pizza is AMAZING... thank you for binging something fresh to the are!
I really appreciate the excellent service that I received during my last visit. Thanks!
Poke bowl was super good! The macaroon icecream was super delicious as well! People were super friendly and loved the atmosphere. Will definitely comeback for the icecream.
Nice people own the place. Food is always tasty and priced fair. I love the chicken parmigiana.

The food was just okay. Not much flavor. We ordered 50 wings, and had to pay for the ranch. This was a little foreign seeing that we were at a "wing house". Overall just mediocre, we visited from out of town. Definitely wouldn't be worth the hassle of going back.
nails look like crap after two weeks going somewhere else

Great Store! Helpful staff that really knows their shoes. Both guys that were in there were runners themselves, and gave me great advice. Tried on several shoes on the treadmill, and loved the first shoes that they brought out for me. Huge selection, and I see them supporting all the events in town. Will be back!
Had a birthday early dinner tonight. Food was great and service was great also. Everything was great.
Avacado Chicken Club sandwich and Red Velvet Cheesecake made an awesome lunch combination. Stuffed!
Food is not bad, but there is better even here in SB. The service is just AWFUL. Go to Saigon out by Kmart.

Good pizza. Taco Pizza has a kick and great flavor. Delicious!! Hawaiians was great too, however, there were onions on the Hawaiian pizza which we are not accustomed to and a family member gets very sick from ingesting any allium vegetables. Be surdcto read the ingredients. We were dissatisfied in the bar tender. Our waiters/waitresses were friendly and attentive.

Cute neighborhood coffee shop. There's not a lot of space inside, but the outdoor seating makes up for it. They've got the standard lineup of coffee options and tasty homemade pastries too and the staff actually seems happy to be there. A nice alternative from the busier places like Green Line or Gold Standard.
the pizza was fresh, crunchy base and simply delicious. I never thought I would give a chain rest a 4 star so there goes. My tummy was happy and my taste buds were quivering with delight.
First experience was good. We loved the outside deck! I had the tenderloin and would get it again... it was pretty good. Great atmosphere!

Great ambience. Upscale. Food is ehh. I've been twice and thought the second time might be better and it wasn't. I don't recommend the flatbread and the truffled Mac and cheese is just okay. Both very greasy. My stomach hurt both times that I've eaten here.

This is our go to for our Greek food fix! Never disappointed with our service or food. Restaurant is clean and always good quick service. Tonight we have Hilda as our server who is friendly and she is quick with our drink order and we look forward to another enjoyable evening.
Drinks are pricey! But they have pretty good bands. I wish they would get better djs! Better air circulation would help a a lot too. But some sweet people work there.
Best cafe au lait I've had in New Orelans (out of three). The seating situation is a bit wild because it's a small popular place but haven't had any real trouble finding a seat.
If it was possible to give 0 stars I would. Absolutely appalled at the experience I just had here. Will be updating review with further explanation shortly.

Great drink variety but the menu is starch heavy with appetizers that are good (for the area of town) but not varied enough. The kale salad wasn't what I expected however the calamari is excellent. The hummus plate is good, however the olives are Extremely salty!

As we walked in the door, we joked about service that defies physics, but the claim of "faster than the speed of light service" is close to factual! seated and served instantly, food was fast and delicious. If you want quick, tasty breakfast, try this place. you won't be disappointed .

Twice now I have gone there and had multiple staff members standing around talking to each other, not acknowledging me. After several minutes waiting for someone to show some small measure of customer service and being sadly disappointed, I finally left and went elsewhere for my dinner.
The food is OK not great, but the service is lacking. Went to taco Tuesday and ordered $1 pork taco. It was really dry, but it took over 30 minutes to get the order.

NOT Gianni's pizza anymore. Now Voorhees Pizza. Slices are extremely small and $2.35 a slice. We're out of Parmesan cheese. How are you a pizza place and out of park cheese??? This place is really junk now and people behind counter don't seem to care.
Good, casual sports bar basically on Butler University campus with good beer selection. Dill pickle chips are surprisingly good! Plenty of seating and good service.

I ordered #5 this afternoon, I think it was triple dumpling in broth. The dumplings were just fine but the broth was watery. I think it was better in the recent past...Also, kind of skimpy on the dumplings. Definitely need to add hot oil for the broth to have character. Kind of disappointed since it has been better....
Crappy is what is was. Hot beer in a plastic cheap ass cup! Grouper so tough like rubber! Nothing good about this place.
Great atmosphere(fireplace and very open). Obviously a large tap selection(hence the name). Etc etc I def recommend.
It's probably because there isn't a game going on next door but this place is really odd..
It's just ok, nothing to rave about. Choices of sides are lack luster. 2 for 1 Margaritas are all sour mix.
Very beautiful. Me and my kids loved just relaxing in the court yard outside this very elegant looking church.
The food was sub par at best... the service was about the same. The pork was 80% fat in the rice bowl. Not impressed, I would have enjoyed a ham and cheese sandwich more.
Food is always good and the owner is very accommodating. Never wait long to sit or eat and the I have yet to have to ask for a refill.

i'm in love with steel city. their coffees are HUGE and very tasty. they have live music most nights, and the artwork in there is always interesting. thursday night open mic is very popular, and is by far worth the couple bucks to have an interesting night.

Very much a stereotypical thrift store......jammed full, quite cluttered, not well organized and a mix of great deals and overpriced items. Not much in the way of furniture, and heavy on well-worn clothes and knick-knacks.

Our favorite sushi place hands down. Love the King Kong and volcano rolls. Dad makes the best rolls around!!! And son is a very close second following in his pop's footsteps. Lovely family. Lovely place.

Great Place to eat. Almost everything is made fresh on demand and tastes great. It can get busy during vacation weeks, but well worth the wait. The Pizza, Fetuccini Alfredo, and Baked Ziti were all amazing. We also had fries, borekas, falafel and mac n cheese which were good but not better than you would find at any other kosher dairy restaurant.
my wife loves having her wine pour into a smoked glass, wao, awesome idea!

By far the WORST breakfast sandwich I've ever had. Went through the drive thru and it took forever. Dry bun. Burnt egg. Burnt microwaved bacon that was like beef jerky and it big clumps. Tasteless. Had to toss it!

This location of A & W is acceptable. It's neither good nor is it bad. They got my order right last time. While reasonably clean, the decor is looking tired and could do with being refreshed a bit. All in all, it's A-OK. Three stars.
Slowest service in any airport restaurant I've ever been in. Unless you have a long delay skip it.

Had a taco with Jonah, it had Plantains in side the Taco not really how I feel about that inside my burrito. I like the sweet Plantains bye them self but not in a Taco. Come check them out for yourself's
Great Service Food was ok! Friendly staff good ambiance All in all this is a good spot definitely will come back for more
This place should have more stars... great food, drink, staff, & atmosphere. Price is right too.

This place is a bit far away but it's always worth the travel. The prices aren't bad and the buffet selection is halfway impressive. I have no complaints but nothing to write home about either. I'm sure I will continue to come back.
Extremely difficult to find and the attendant was remarkably rude. Cars were packed in- we felt lucky to drive our car away without damage. Strongly recommend avoiding this place.

Went to this piazza hut for dinner. The server was chewing tobacco at our table!! I then witnessed him take his chew out of his mouth with his fingers and throw it away. 5 seconds later I saw him serving food, I believe he never washed his hands. I complained and I never got a sorry or anything. Needless to say NEVER AGAIN!
Snooty service. Ok food. One of th employees peed and didn't wash his hands before leaving restroom. Guess motif is the big draw here

The food was amazing. The customer service w trash. I am not from here and asked a couple questions while a woman with the eyebrow piercing raised her voice at me and was very disrespectful. Won't be back here because of her. Again, good food though

Been coming here a few months & I LOVE it. The service is perfect! My nails are always perfect & they always last regardless of who does them. Everyone is really friendly also. The ONLY con is that it's typically pretty noisy in here. If you're looking for a quiet peaceful place to relax this is NOT it.

I've been here a few times in the evening and haven't had as bad of experiences as today - wasn't great, but wasn't terrible. We've been here for an hour over lunch and still haven't gotten our food. I'd say if you have a limited amount of time - like less than a couple if hours - then probably go somewhere else.

this time we went for lunch instead of dinner, a big mistake. our server was very laid back in approach and the fried chicken was not good at all. the red beans and rice with sausage was tasty. we are hoping it was just an off day or different cooks. might go back to dinner to see if it is any different.

My favorite place for sushi and all things Asian. The Karaoke lounge and private dining make this place really stand above the rest. Frequent flyer! Ps. Tuesday in the Lounge is an event to remember! ;-)
Ben and Arthur were great! great personalities that made a stressful day easier and great moving skills! Very pleased with their services.

I Just Moved here from out of state & Was Taken Aback that you have to switch to Human medicare advantage after a year which iuheard of in the Chgo/NW indiana area. Suggests they are working to get people signed up for that & work for Humana.

50% off ale doesn't work anymore and wasn't honored. Food was good but they should know how to remove coupon or give it to customer if you don't know how. 5 stars for food however since I couldn't even get the coupon that's why the 3.
They answer the phone and then leave me on hold for over ten minutes. It is not difficult to create a better system than this for pizza and managing the phone. This place needs some new management.

If you are interested in mediocre sushi and mediocre service this is your place. The food came out at 5 different times for 5 different plates. This included other tables being served in between. The food was not as ordered. Overall mediocre experience at best.

Excellent food and service! Had the grilled oysters and seafood po-boy. As my first food experience in New Orleans, I loved it. There was a small line-up around 5pm when we went. Not giving the full 5 stars because of price and the fact that Acme's not heads-over-heels better than some of the other joints we tried in NO. Nevertheless, its a can't miss!
Great food with a menu that changes with the season and special events. Solid craft beer selection that updates often. Specials and more. Top notch, fast and friendly service. A must in White House.
Flavors and variety on point. Nice selection of Thai food in small amounts. Make sure to order for a couple or single serving anything over that quality goes down.
Horrible service our waiter left us. Our eggs came out wrong I asked for sunny side up and the hashbrowns are rock solid and cold the only good thing was the pancakes.

Great service, but the food left something to be desired. Asparagus was burnt and heirloom tomato salad tastes like straight vinegar. Veggie ravioli was good. Pear and prosciutto appetizer was excellent.
Fantastic bartenders that have extensive knowledge in classic cocktails. Old fashioned and a cigar? Yes!
Great seats and it's nice to walk around and look through the hall of fame. However food was COLD, unseasoned, pricy, and the workers weren't friendly.

Well...I didn't think someone can suck this bad asked to clean edges not butcher them a whole inch in I even explained I'm doing engagement photos and I'm out of town please be kind to me hair cut total joke if you ask me there so in a rush for you to leave don't take the mistake off stopping by ridunculas

Your flower arrangements ordered for Mother's Day by my two sons remotely ( one from San Francisco and the other from Austin Texas) are starting to wilt after one week ; compared to the Roses I bought from Trader Joe's. I'm disappointed with the quality of your flowers. Hope you will do better next time. Our family wanted to support local business.

It was my first time having a Philly Cheesesteak and, I must say, I was impressed. It's in the tourist part of town so I'm no sure how authentic it was, but I would certainly recommend going. I went all out and decided to order the double meat cheesesteak with bacon, mushrooms, onions and cheese whiz.

Freshly baked Cinnamon rolls... with glaze? Perfect. Just perfect. So soft and flaky. Warm and gooey. Sweet and delicious. Go and buy yourself some cinnamon rolls- they are worth every penny. Thank you for the great treats!
Great pizza but the guy who was making it wasn't wearing gloves so he touches all of the ingredients with his bare hands. I will not go back there again.

I actually don't prefer this location at all. Another place that is convenient to where I work and only come here when I desperately need something. This Publix is so small and just awkward. I also hate the parking lot as it gets overly crowded given that it's in a shopping plaza with several other stores.

Great little place for food and drink. Double bonus if you also want to bowl before or after eating! New York strip was pretty good and well cooked, but the sides are canned veggies or lack seasoning. A step up from bar food, which is more than I expected from a restaurant inside of a bowling alley.
Ok tasting tacos. Service is friendly but slow with limited seating. Prices are reasonable

We ordered the Hawaiian pizza and wings. The wings were rubbery and lacked any seasoning. The pizza had 3 pieces of ham and a few pieces of pineapple. Barely any sauce and cheese. I am sad to say it was the worst pizza I've ever had!

Horribly rude! I've been here over 2 hours waiting for a friend who's getting a root canal and was told I'm not allowed to use the restroom, she said it's only for patients not their rides. The older woman at the desk was very condescending and rude about it.

Total hidden gem! If you're craving falafel this is your place. My go to is falafel with feta extra spicy with the works. The pickles veggies are clutch the hummus creamy you can't go wrong. We tried the pizza and that was not their strong suit. Definitely call ahead with your order otherwise you could wait a little while.

Restaurant opens right up to the beach. Monthly drinks and food specials are worth coming back for, $2 beers and tasty appetizers. I went with the Grouper Sliders and Grouper Eggrolls, plenty of food, wish I lived in Florida. 50 foot outdoor screen on beach is a nice attraction for MNF.

Don't go to the bar. Bartenders are not happy and do not want to serve u!!! It's the 4th time I've stopped by the bar with the boat and servers r terrible. Sit down and eat at restaurant, sooooo much better service!!!!! Great food and happy servers make me happy!

Just about anything outdoorsy, you can find here...in a clean, modern and reasonable parking lot size. Have visited the shooting club there a few times - well managed; friendly staff; GREAT prices on ammunition - $15/50 9mm (range load), vs. up to $22 elsewhere. Tip: To avoid waiting in line on Sat/Sun, get there 10 mins before it open, which is ta 10am.

Love this place! I have my own smoker trailer, love cooking old school Barbeque. The best stuff is always about 15 minutes off the Q, most people don't get that, this Was that! Everything was over the top , lots of it , great price, friendly people, messed up the order but the manager was super nice, can't wait to go back! Thanks.

Here visiting from Atlanta and there are no public bathrooms. This manager claims it's because of COVID but the employees encountering customers all day are walking in and out 711 across the street says they don't have restrooms at all which has to be illegal and a lie

Best sushi I've ever had. Excellent service. Reasonable prices. My only complaint is that the place is TINY, and I personally am not a fan of being seated 6 inches from a total stranger. If you don't mind your personal space bubble being invaded, however, give this place a try.
This site it's. really pathetic. Because the people make sandwich. It's. mad. I'm mad too never come back here need mor attention at costumer service.
It was busy, but still the bartender should be able to get to you in 15 mins. Put a second bartender on when you have a band playing, duh!

Everything I have ever had at Cheddars is good. My favorite thing to order is the chicken Ceasar pasta salad. However the last time I visited (April 2021) their menu was about half the size it used to be (darn Covid) and there wasn't much to choose from, that was a bummer.

Place is nice and food is fresh. The owner seemed like a very nice guy. Not many places like it on the island. Great for a small and light lunch not to mention the amazing frozen yogurt next door. A little pricey but enjoyable.

I haven't tried much on their menu because I don't order burgers out but theirs is absolutely fantastic, so i order this always! I love a good burger, just usually have to make it myself. Good beer list, great cocktails, and have always had excellent service to boot. Do try it!
Always great, but you can tell when the biscuits are not cooked enough or not fresh, starting to happen more often. Keep your standards high please. Food wasn't hot at all. Come on guys
Very good ! Long wait w/o reservation. Friendly staff, great lasagna, and good fedd Alfredo. Added shrimp too. For 6$ extra you got 3 shrimp.
Penne Carbonara -double yum. Crab cakes to die for. Was not overly impressed by my wifes steak, but, hey, it's not a steakhouse.

The ceviche was delicious. The service was good. The pescardo macho had no taste and the muscle where raw and gritty. When I brought it to our servers attention she said "well everybody else likes it". Not the answer we were looking for. Time to find another Peruvian restaurant.
Cute place kind of hidden away just outside the Starkey neighborhood. Food was decent, but somewhat forgettable. Hope to have a more memorable experience next time around
This apartment has a great location and ideal for walks near the lake and minutes to a the airport.
Prices are very high for what it is. I got a huarache and a coke and i paid 10.50. Not worth it at all. I wont come back
Went there for Sunday brunch, and it was amazing. The restauran is buffet style. The food tastes home made. Location is awesome and you feel right at home. I recommend.

Always gotten reliable service. Mark is an amazing mechanic, I've been going to him for about 3 years now and have gotten amazing service. Hit a cat in the road and Mark fixed all the dings in my car. So very grateful for him.

This place reminded me so much of Kobe Steakhouse in Orlando, FL. It amazed me how great the food and service was! I got sushi and a bento box and thoroughly enjoyed every bite! I'm definitely coming again and recommending this place to family and friends.
Came here for father's day breakfast. The service was slow. Two breakfast appetizers were never delivered. The omelette was not hot. It was tasty, but cold. The iced tea was nasty.
Very nice spa. Had my eyelashes down and nails. Staff very nice and helpful. I will be back :)

Came here on a Friday night and tried a handful of the tacos. The baja fish was the best one, but it wasn't anything special. We also ordered the skirt steak and it came out cold and not much flavor. They have good happy hour though. $2 beers on draft. But I've had better elsewhere.
Enjoyed the dessert and wings. The music made conversation impossible, but that's the point, isn't it? Fun experience.

A little glitch in ordering the food but it was worth waiting for. My Avocado Bulgari was delicious. The portion was a great size and I was certainly full when I was finished. For dessert I had chocolate banana chia. Pudding. It was worth every calorie. I highly recommend them for delicious food, nice size portions and very professional and accommodating staff. ENJOY

Garbage delivery.... Rings my buzzer and doesn't allow me time in the morning to put a robe on and sprint down half a flight of stairs. Twice in a row this happened with no note left. I'm really upset and I can't get in touch with the company. I don't feel a delivery service like this should exist in Philadelphia

If you go, stick to pizza. I ordered two salads that were awful. One was supposed to have strawberries & cheese. There was no cheese & strawberries were frozen ice cream topping that was tasteless & squishy Lettuce was brown. The other wasn't any better.

First tech that came out went above and beyond giving my ac a tune up. 2nd tech that came out a year later(the most recent one) seemed to upsell me by a lot. Quoted 3k to replace a case coil and got a 2nd quote for only $1200 somewhere else. Big difference.

A little off the beaten path but totally worth it! Went in around closing time so there weren't too many people left but the bar staff was very nice and friendly! Had a rustic feel about the brewery that I enjoyed! Indoor/ Outdoor seating with a large parking lot.
Friendly staff, and good food. Not amazing, but good and at a fair price. I came here for the Ethiopian food, so I can't comment on the coffee shop aspect.
Food too salty for my liking and for this price point I would expect to taste more than salt. Service great though.

Absolutely the worst Italian (?) food we've ever had. We could barely eat it. Lasagna had disgusting fatty and watery meat. Sauces were straight from a jar and with only 7 tables in the place, the kitchen and poorly trained servers could not keep up. Just terrible!

Loved the salon and the service! Van is amazing and so, so creative. The look of the space is unique and unlike the typical nail place - a lot of the materials were custom built and very creative. I highly recommend this spot!

Irene has yet to back down from a challenge. Everytime I bring in a crazy picture, she makes it happen on my nails. I'm constantly receiving compliments on her work! Very friendly cozy atmosphere, highly recommend. Call ahead just to be sure they're not too busy.

Maybe it was this visit, but the BLT and the Pastrami dog was REALLY SALTY, and that's saying something since I like salty foods. I liked the onion rings, they reminded me of jersey diners. Staff was nice, service was quick. Cost okay considering the portion size. I'll probably try it again. Hoping it will be better.

I don't normally leave bad reviews, but longest wait in a drive thru for only 2 cars in front of us. The reason why I'm even leaving a review is the customer service was just flat. The lady taking care of us should have a least smiles or something. We didn't get an apology or anything.

Southern atmosphere minus the southern hospitality. Everyone was friendly however the service was delayed. The owners personally greeted us - nice touch. Food was southern cuisine and most dinner choices were flavorful. Some dishes like the Mac and Cheese could use more favor.
Updated review: great beers, great food, and a lovely dog-friendly patio. The whipped feta & honey is delicious.
This place is awesome! Homecooked Hispanic food. Beef stew and rice is delicious. It's very clean. I'll definitely be back.
Stopped for early dinner and had a great time. Great prices during happy hour! Staff was very friendly and attentive. Food was good. We will definitely be going back.

Love the food here and great drink specials! However, their buffalo chicken salad has decreased in size by 1/2! I took this picture before I took a bite. And for $15, I would expect a little more lettuce.

They have no admirals lounge here and they're building a new airport and spending more money which is probably bad money which is stupid considering they just spent 500 million renovating the New Orleans airport and now they're going to spend billions building a new one across the street with eight less gates, not exactly the smartest decision

This is the worst shop I've ever seen. The sales in the store is very unprofessional, and it doesn't pay much attention to the guests. It will bring all the mistakes to the guests. It's a real regret for buying the car experience.

Nice decor and cosy atmostphere. Food was inventive but did not hit its mark. We had two appetizers, three mains and a dessert and we weren't overly enthusiastic about the overall meal. The best item was the branzino.
So fucking good. Got the pork sandwich and I feel like a better person. The sauce is off the chain.
Garbage. Take your money and enter the mega millions. You'll lose less and the odds are way more in your favor. Lol!

Surprise surprise!!! They now serve an artichoke pizza! . It's delish with olives, ricotta and caramelized onions. Emily is a good pour bartender too Nice place. Surprisingly, they do not offer spinach or artichokes! What? However, their toasted ravioli is very good.
Ehh...expected this place to have more than just hummus. Pita was ok. Overpriced. Happy they had good beer but again, overpriced.
I never had a bad meal yet. Friendly home cook8ng at a fair price. I love coming here for breakfast. Mmm whiting and grits. Can't beat it.

We have visited the Big Fish in Delaware and were very satisfied but our meal tonight was not that good. One order was the Mahi Mahi and it was burnt, Grey in color and over spiced. Our order of Salmon was extremely smokie and dry.

As far as Dunkin' Donuts go, this is my least favorite. I've been here twice over the past 9 years or so, and as soon as I bit into my stale-ass Boston Cream doughnut, I remembered why there was such a large gap in visits. For a location that is always busy, especially late during the weekends, there is no excuse for stale doughnuts.
The Porch bar is a great place for drinks and the food is good. Service can sometimes be slow if they are busy.
T mobile signal sucks. Coverage is worst. Internet connection is slow. Dont get a sim here if youre in philly
HOT sauce?!? My a$$ is still burning and I have been banned from the Sheraton - maid required a hazmat suit to clean the bathroom. Thanks Geno's.

Chris' is all about the sandwiches! They kill it in here. New menu is awesome. They really care that the sandwiches are the best quality meats and ingredients. Chris is usually here and the staff is friendly and fast. Nice place to sit and have a great sandwich.

Friendly baristas, quick service, and no complaints. Very convenient to the hotel I am staying at, and for some reason they can't figure out why I want to walk across the parking lot to Starbucks because they have free coffee.
Burnt fries and nuggets every time. Employees barely acknowledge your existence. Avoid this location.
Pancake pantry was worth waiting in line! Everything was so delicious, banana pancakes and hash browns are to die for. Emily was very sweet and accommodating. One of my favorite places in Nashville.

We had a party of 20 and they only had 1 server for our entire party. We had called ahead several days in advance. Food was terrible - oil that the fried shrimp and fish in chips fish was cooked in was old. 2nd year that my company has come here with a large group and the second year that we have been disappointed.

Went here for the first time for our anniversary. The pizza was extremely flavorful and tasted super fresh. Initially we chose outdoor seating but the table was wobbly and so we moved inside. Place could use some maintenance but all the credit goes to yummy pizza
Great meal. Not a huge selection available outside of pho, but what I are was fantastic.
It was really good. I had the spicy California Roll and some other card rolls. The staff was very nice!

Only gave them one star because there's no option for zero stars. Two public restrooms, neither of which had toilet paper in them. If this is how they care for the public face, how are they taking care of things in the back where the public can't see?
Made an appointment. Got a confirmation CALL. Came all the way here for them to tell me that they can't wash my hair and the stylists are sitting right there. Don't come here.

Management is great at this location, they greet and talk to you. The only problem is the constant breakdown of the frozen drink machines which is a corporate problem, so I rank it only 3 stars for that purpose...don't expect a frozen drink of your choice, you will be let down every time

Overall didn't have a great experience. The salon itself is cute, but I think I was just paired with the wrong stylist. It seemed rushed and my hair ended up not being what I asked for- so I had to redo it.

This place isn't really my scene, but decided to check it out w friends. I thought it was professionally run, well staffed (almost overkill), and is a big space w decent decor. They made me take off my lid, which is fine, but then I saw several guys w hats. So...I'd encourage them to have consistency w the rules.
Atmosphere, food, & service were all very good! Neat place and very busy. The Reuben was hand cut corned beef. We will be back the next time we are in the area! This was a great find.
I've had food from this establishment 3 times and their food is always bland unlike the PF Changs outside of the airport area and cheaper as well. Never again will I go.

In my 40+ years of eating bagels all over the world, I can confidently say these are the worst ever. Also, they have an electric ordering kiosk so you don't even get to order with a human being. Btw, this place is located on the 2nd floor of the building, up a rusty metal staircase.

I must've ordered wrong I don't know where the prosciutto was on the provo fries and cheese was gritty I then order hush puppies with shrimp Again where is the shrimp? Atmosphere good Bartenders wonderful And daisy drinks delicious Now I will try again
The Best Mexican Coffee. They are always sneaking in treats. Lentil soup appetizer, flan with breakfast. Real cozy place 4 tables.
Love their half twice baked potatoes, recently also tried their homemade beef jerky. Which, is different but also extremely tasty. Meat selections are nice and fresh.
Best cider I've ever had. Hail to the Hop cider is truly special. Staff is very friendly, and allow outside food.

I've been to this diner many times and have always found the entrées to be large any very good. They do have a nice salad bar. Nothing great but quite adequate. Very good presentation along with good service The only negative is because they are so busy during dinner hours you might have a wait to get a table.
This place is a dump. Staff and servers seem very unmotivated. Reminds me a of cheap college bar with the exception that we are not in a college town. I can't see this place making it long term.
Great place for lunch (downtown) but only if you have time. The Calzones do take time to make, it is worth the wait!!! I like taking my order to go and eating at City Garden!
As other reviewers have said, the food is good, but not great, but it's an okay breakfast place. My server was very friendly and the food arrived quickly.
Just takes way too long. No one was there besides my family and took over an hour and a half. Absurd

I called them and they were able to come out the same day. I was not financially able to replace my door at the time but the technician explained my options in detail and why the door needed to be replaced. The service call charge was only $19.00! Unheard of.
This is a really fun place to go for Karaoke. The food is generally quite good if you eat IN the restaurant, but the delivery is inferior. It's like it comes from a totally different restaurant.

I come here often for their Elvis Presley smoothie - peanut butter and banana, yum! The breakfast burrito is also the best I've had in SB. The owner and all employees are super nice and very friendly.

Ew. seriously, ew. Call me crazy but I usually enjoy my shrimp de-pooped before putting in my mouth. And while the complimentary hot tea is charming, on a 95 degree day, I do not think asking for water deserves a loud sigh and then a yell from your "waitress." This place was a biggg mistake.

There's never been anything I didn't like here. Their cocktails are great and their food is even better. I would recommend this to anyone looking for a restaurant with ambiance and a variety of selections! I recommend to go with a smaller party. They don't have tons of space and the last time I went they didn't take reservations on weekends.

Walked several miles to get there tonight, only to discover that they changed their hours via a paper sign on the door, but not on Yelp. Why even have a Yelp page if you aren't gonna update your hours?

If you are looking for a tourist trap, this is your place. Seriously, if you have the urge to say "I went to Tootsie's and had a beer", visit the airport location-less crowded, less dirty, better environment, but still expensive. Just don't let on your Tootsies was on the Gate C ramp and not lower Broadway.

It was clean but paid club level price for a 6th floor 2 bed room. Not cool. The food in the lounge (restaurant was closed on a Tuesday evening?) was fine. I had the bacon wrapped, goat cheese stuffed dates.

Really disappointed with the quality of the food. It was cold when we got it, like it had been sitting for awhile (mozzarella sticks were cold, the cheese had congealed). The pizza dough was undercooked but the amount of toppings was nice for the price. It shouldn't have been cold, though ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

Place seems really nice till they get you in there and raise your rental fee every 4-6 months my rent has went from $100 to $140 in less than 1 year. Go elsewhere, trust me, I'm moving my stuff out asap.
Love eating here! The surrounding BBQ places don't stand a chance. When I come into town from California I always reserve some time to stop by!
The food is okay but it is not made to order. You see piles of food sitting on the flat top already pre-made. Not what I expected.
This place is not what it used to be. The gelato is good but really pricy for a tiny cup. Service also still good and atmosphere too.

My favorite food is Thai. I was excited to go here based on the reviews. Unfortunately, I have to say the flavor was boring. I hate to say this. Even the Thai ice tea was just ok. I don't think I would go back. Maybe it was just me. I don't know. The service was excellent. Maybe the main cook was gone.

This place is just OK, from the food to the service. I've tried a few things from here, and all were pretty boring. The one thing that actually had flavor, which was a salad, was way too spicy. Just OK.
The bar was packed and the band was excellent. Also they have a bunch of cat decorations all around.

Met with some friends here for some drinks and food. The ambiance is good. Service is okay but they can do better. Food is average. The price is not that bad! I believe in second chances so this review might change for my second visit and I will update if anything changed!

No frills no thrills but you can't beat their specials and delicious seafood! It's the best seafood in the Tampa Bay Area. My favorite night is Wednesdays: 1 dozen oysters for $7. Come in before 6pm to double dip on Early Bird Specials like $9 blackened shrimp + 2 sides. And don't miss out on the smoked fish dip. Seriously crave-worthy!
Great food, delicious wine, I love the portions. But the staff can be friendlier or more welcoming.
I LOVE this location! Not only is it super convenient for me, but the staff is amazing! Always friendly and patient! Especially Megan! She is amazing!

Love bread company but this location is awful. They are ALWAYS out of something-every single time I come. They never update the drive thru menu with out of season or discontinued items, which then causes delays while you try to find something else with a line full of cars behind you. Terrible.
Great service. Hollywood was our waiter and was awesome. Great food, deviled eggs, shrimp remoulade, and wings were bomb.
My Mom loved this place. Every time I was in town we would go here. I plan to visit again anytime I am in the area. Good bar staff and good food.
Dirty. That about sums this place up. The movies are great, unless one of the employees forgets to turn the sound on (happened three different times). But hey, the popcorn is fresh!
Yay for being open late and having fried food on your bar menu! Nice digs, gorgeous windows. Sweet server and enormous portions.
Not a big fan of their food, but i love their tea selection. Good service, keep in mind it can get crowded
The fish and chicken were way over breaded, cooked, and bland. Wait staff had absolutely no customer service skills. This iconic Nashville restaurant failed in both entertainment and food.
Decent philly cheese steak. A bit overrated and only take cash. Try it once so you can say you have been there
I had done a quote and decided not to do it . I gat a call from them every day I am very annoyed. Do not trust this company look at the yelp reviews I will be reporting this company to FTC .

The show is pretty cool. It's amazing how the image was projected along such a huge screen During the end of the show they had a "snow" Machine going which my son loved. I wish there were chairs or benches but I know it's a lobby of an office building so it won't happen.
Late night drunk food factory is what it is...but I was able to fold all the meat on my sandwich into one modest half, an indictable offense of Subwayesque sandwich-making.

Great food, service, and atmosphere. Menu has good variety with tons of beer on tap. The bartender was very knowledgeable with the beers they did have, and suggested beers that both my husband and I really enjoyed. Would highly recommend!!!
Subway in Mallinkrodt building at WashU. Gets incredibly busy around lunch time every 30 min. Can order ahead of time and pick up your food through snap finger app.

All my neighbors were switching over to save some money so I thought I would as well. I have called several times and immediately put on hold. I started to try and email them and then thought I better check the reviews. I am glad that I did. They send mailers out wanting new customers but they wont even take your calls.
Love, love, love this place!! Wish I would have ordered an extra hotdog to take home for later.
Good sports bar. Came here for lunch got the chicken fingers and they were hot. Plenty of beer selections
I was shocked by the quality of hotel and service, at such a low price! The friends had an excellent stay- it was clean, staff were friendly, and location is opportune.

Eh. Phone didn't work, had to go ask for a space heater, kinda dirty, wifi didn't work...but we got a military disc. Idk, some of it was understandable, but the sink was loose, towels were rough. Desk staff was friendly tho.

We booked a 30-minute mini session for holiday pictures with our dog (who we can never get to sit still), and we were so happy with the photos Angela took. She made us comfortable taking the pictures and was great with our dog!

Half and Half's pricing is crazy! I ordered their buscuits and gravy and hated it, the taste was weak and the price of $11. Coffee was $4 and a side of sausage, which consisted o $ 1 patty, was $3. Crazy! The ambitious was clever and comfortable, service was neutral, but the prices were ridiculous.

I come to this place every time I visit Santa Barbara, (which is often). It's fresh fruit and healthy sprinkles of nutrition make hunger for it every time I visit. I wish all cities had backyard bowls. I only wish they were open passed 5pm.
One of my Tucson favorites! Excellent food and beverages wonderful view ambience and service

I feel bad-so wanted it to be awesome! As others have said the service is awkward-slow but they seem to be trying. Hoping they fine tune some things. Food was just good -not great-seemed fresh. The bill for the 3 of us was about 75.00
This was great place to go till you find meand p theree and support it by the staff don't go there worse place
