If you know who you want to cut your hair and make an "appointment", this may be an ok place. Prices are not cheap. I waited over an hour and, based on my observations, would have waited at least another hour to be seen. Maybe that's how they roll but not for me.
Good for the price. I am probably bias because I am a die hard Halal Guys cart fan, which is in NY. I guess I expected juicier meet with more spices.

Just had my nails done today charged $60 for gel manicure for two people. Never once asked for gel or realized that's what I was getting since I never get my nails done. Manicurist also had warts all over her hand.... Good luck if you go here.
The chicken, gumbo, and bread pudding were fantastic. The place is pretty small so it might take a wait to get into it but it was worth it to us.

Ordered take out. Got the orange chicken and the sauce was good, but it was very chewy, like it had been microwaved? Fried rice was good, but appetizer platter tasted super processed. I was just disappointed, but the lady working there was very sweet and kind!

The movie selections and the special events are the best in town. I wish they published more info on the upcoming special events. And I wish they coordinated better with their sister-theatre at Frontenac. If that improves, we'd be at 100% of the special screenings. The popcorn is always fresh and the other concessions offerings are improving regularly

Decided to try this place because of the good reviews. The atmosphere was nice and the food was average. But the service was HORRIBLE!!! It was the second worst service in my life, the first worst being a place in the Carribeans but at least they can plead "Island Time". Will never go there again due to poor service.

The Pimms Cup had nothing on the Victory Bar (Central Business District) and the Cheese Plate was a major slap in the face (pedantic cheeses presented with no care or joy). From this Yelper's eyes, the place is a tourist joint running on a reputation that's about as dusty and musty as the window decorations.

Unfortunate but really going down hill. The food was never great but now it's plain bad. The service has really dropped off too. I heard they might have new ownership. The last couple of times I've been there it wasn't busy at all so maybe they've had to cut back on staff. I hope they figure something out and manage to stay in business.
So far my experience has been amazingly relaxing. Prenatal yoga is exactly what I needed going through my first pregnancy. I highly recommend Art and Soul yoga

I ordered the Mild Chicken Pad Thai it was the least tasteful Pad Thai I've had but wasn't bad, I've had the dish from different states. The place wasn't well lit and and three of the table cloths had stains on them, they also serve their soft drinks out of aluminum cans.

The biggest issue with this diner is the service. Someday's you get a good service and somedays' you get a crappy one. It all depends on your waiter or waitress servicing your table. Good Job Giannakaris Owners for your racial and discriminating profiling! http://www.courierpostonline.com/story/news/2015/12/14/arielle-norton-peters-diners/77293776/ http://www.nj.com/gloucester-county/index.ssf/2015/12/woman_wins_case_against_monroe_township_diner_for.html#incart_river_home
Sushi was not fresh and tasted like it was pre made and left in a fridge. Soup was warm not hot. Like me in noodles $14 cmon too expensive
Don't get the oysters. I don't know if they were real, but I do know they were not edible. Seriously. Gross. The clam strips were ok. I would not go back. Ever.
I would definitely recommend. I got a handful of haircuts with Mark and was always happy with the experience.
We eat here often!! Never had a bad experience! Food is amazing! Staff is friendly! You'll always crave blue fin!!
Simply put, YUCK!!! This place is old, rundown with 1970's furniture and non-working plumbing. For the sake of humanity they should demolish the whole building.

My all time favorite burger is here, the NOLA Nica burger will be your new craving. If you want Latin food with a twist you must try them. Everything is delicious! The staff is very friendly and professional. One of my top restaurant food choices.

By far the best Taqueria in Atlanta. It is unlike any other Taqueria across the country. Sign up for their Chef inspired weekly dishes. Turnip Greens are amazing. My favorite is there chicken enchilada covered with pork green chili, and I always order it well done so that the cheese on top gets a little crispy

Food was great but service sucked!! We waited over an hour just to be seated because they kept changing the personnel upfront and constantly had to be checking in so people wouldn't be getting call before us!! They're unorganized during the most important time of the day!!

BBQ shrimp Poboy: Very good. Generous amount of shrimp. Seasoning and flavoring was spot on. Eat it with the hot sauce for even greater maximal flavor. French toast montechristo: Delicious! Comes with ham and American cheese. Eating it with the syrup was a nice touch. A good combination of sweet and savory.

I sat at the sushi bar as I was in own alone for work. My food was absolutely delicious and the sushi chef was very good. The only reason I didn't give five stars is because the waitress seemed annoyed that I was even there. I would go back in a heartbeat! Yum!
I took my wife for a mid-week lunch date. The Duke burger was awesome and my wife gave her Turkey wrap a 3 out of 4 but liked the pickle. The staff was friendly and helpful. we would go back.

Reasonable price, good hair cut and fast service. They offer military and first responder discount. Only request is they extend to service family members. It breaks my heart when people say only "active member" military discount. Our boys are "actively" missing their father during a year deployment. #Household6
Worst chick fila I've ever been to. Not only does this place have no inside seating but I've been here twice, today it took 15 minutes to get 2 chicken biscuits
Didn't go inside the structure but what a stunning site. Iconic as well as remarkable. Really beautiful.
What a great luncheon we just had at Sweet Lula's. They we able to accommodate our large group of 38. Every meal was delicious. Thank you for providing us with such a great venue for our event
Can't go wrong with Seoul taco!!! Their steak burritos are so delicious with all the sauces they put on it and they will fill you up. Add extra steak if you're really hungry. Feast on!
I got the beauty and the beast which was Oreos and fresh strawberry ice cream. My toppings were strawberries, mango, chocolate chips, and whipped cream. It was delicious. About $7 but it's pretty.

A cold refreshing smoothie on a very hot Reno day. Kind of busy with lines, as this Keva is located inside of the Meadwood Mall. I ordered a large berry, but it was a bit sweet so saved the other half in my freezer for the next day. Servers are friendly. Little bit of a wait since it was so busy.

Have been here several times for lunch and dinner and the food is always exceptional. Today, however, the first glitch. Without going into detail I'll just say that the waitstaff needs a little training on how to handle the iteration when a customer finds a long, black hair in their Pad Thai.
I usually love graze. This time it was a no go! We paid $40 for our pick up order. It was dry, missing items and overall disappointing. Not worth the price.

atmosphere is fun but the solo singer/guiter player was way tooooo loud. food was just ok, sampling of a prefab/frozen chain restaurant. kind of bland, not fresh tasting at all. i may visit again for a cold beer but not the food.
Disappointing. Very limited menu. Just a slab of meat that was just ok. Literally 2 very small bite sized vegetables. As in 1..2. I get high end food, but this was a joke.
I was traveling and stopped here for dessert. I got a chocolate covered piece of key lime pie. It was so sour. Overwhelmingly sour and sweet at the same time. Not something I would get again

First experience. Food was good. The spicy boil is REALLY HOT. The waitress was training and both her and the trainee were nice. Had a Shark Margarita cocktail that called for an awesome experience--gotta try it! Food a little pricey, but was totally worth it!
This place is a hole-in-the-wall burger joint. The food was okay, but with so many other great restaurants in the area, I would prefer to go somewhere else.
muffins are great..the service as great too ....I love Envie Expresso Bar.... i get muffins everyday...and everyone is very nice Joseph

Captain ended up offering another time after our company was leaving then moved it to tomorrow. He was apologetic, unfortunately our company leaves Wednesday and now they are quarantined to themselves due to Covid.

The food is ok, it's not the worst but the portions are waaay too small for the price. Even the pieces of chicken are very small, sometimes hard and burnt because there's like no meat. A corner store Chinese place is way better cheaper and you get more food.

Went here a little over a month ago to watch football since they have the sunday ticket. Food was decent. But four weeks after I visited here my identity was stolen along with two of my friends not from the area. Pourhouse was the common denominator. STAY AWAY FROM HERE! Multiple people have had their identities stolen from here!!!
This is a great spot for a casual bite. High quality food made quickly, at an affordable price, with a superb finished look in a clean, fun atmosphere.
Make sure to thoroughly inspect your dress. Mine has pockets but one was still seamed together. The attendants aren't very attentive.

Wow, well worth the 20 min wait for Sunday breakfast, had the Cuban Breakie with a side of chorizo, along with the sour dough bread. In addition to the Cuban my guest had the Broken Yolks sandwiches. All the above were ordered based on our server's recommendations, thanks Michelle. Thumbs up from everyone!
Terrible service as I walked up to order a drink after just checking into the hotel. My seat was taken by the manager. Terrible customer service
Got green tea rolled ice cream. Too hard and crumbly. Not worth $7. Can get better tasting rolled ice cream for cheaper at Chinatown. The cashier doesnt know anything and quite frankly kind of rude.

Clean, cute decoration, good environment, great and fast service, international soccer transmissions and good latin music at a very volume, and last but not least: delicious Colombian dishes as well as Colombian products! Loved the tostones soup !!!!!!! And they have Masato!!!! Will be back for sure!!!!

Mortys comedy joint is a shit hole that will kick you out for talking louder than a peep. They have over priced bland food and have horrible customer service. If you want to have fun don't go there. :(

The best part was dessert. Other than that disappointing bbq platter meal. Looked better than it tasted. Dry pulled pork and ribs. Not much meat on the ribs. Collards lacked flavor. The pecan cobbler dessert was good though.

The atmosphere is lovely....the girl I had wasn't very friendly...I feel like she did a rush job on my nails..mind you I did have an appointment....might try this place again just different nail tech.

First. Unless you are not afraid of dying go to another hospital. ER physician, radiologist and no-show ortho on call failed to diagnose a fractured hip causing undue suffering for days. Worst hospital ever!!!!

I got the biscuits and gravy which is supposedly a speciality there, except I didn't really like them that much. I felt as if some items were overpriced. It's ok. I just didn't love it. May give it another try in the future and order something else.

Don't go here for the food. It's pretty sub par. The drinks...I'm pretty sure you could light my mint julep on fire!!! I felt like an amateur complaining about a strong drink! . If you're going out for drinks, the Hurricanes I hear are the best. Cool atmosphere. It gets crowded later but it is a good time.

Again, I never write reviews so this says a lot. It took over 40 minutes to receive a small mozz, tom, basil pizza- I will never come here again. The first girl cash register representative was an absolute sweetheart... the second needs to be fired.
Quick and easy to get in and out of, not too stressful, with good food options, and ample seating! Hertz was nice and close- no crappy shuttle needed.
Me and my husband shared a chicken salad sandwich with homemade chips. Didn't care for the chips, too thick. The fried chicken looked very good, will try that next time
This place is huge. Has tons of seating capacity. The service at the bar was not great but for a mall Mexican restaurant, it is not a bad pit stop for some appetizers and drinks.

Was highly disappointed. Ordered online. Picked up and it had been sitting outside in the cold (it's 50 out). Tried a bite it was all cold. Crust was floppy and cheese was really greasy. Ate two slices and threw the rest away. May come try again but probably not stuff like that just aggravates me.
Great store, clean with a great selection. There's some other merchandise available too like books, tapes and indie t shirts.

The cappuccino is barely competent with sloppy foam, and the pastry tasted stale and like a refrigerator. This is the second coffee shop I've been in with video gambling hot spot. There is also a blaring television which ruins the atmosphere.
Diner 60 West is now CLOSED! It wasn't bad, but for what my fiancee and I got I might as well have gone to Perkins a coupel blocks down.
I love Super Nails. The Manicurist is always helpful, they do very good. work and the environment is clean and relaxing. This place is so great my entire family comes, including my father.

Came in with hubby after reading reviews. I was disappointed with the outcome of the food. My steak was dry, sweet platains not sweet at all. The waiter was very nice and apologetic. I told him not your fault but the cooks. He did offer to bring something else but I had lost my appetite.

Great mixed drinks and decent local beer selection. Beautiful location and decor. Was not impressed with the bar food, which was WAY overpriced. We ordered pretzel bites, when they arrived there were only 10-15 1" sized bites. We were still hungry after the first order so we ordered another, but they were very overpriced at $14 per small basket.

Delivery was quick through grubhub. Pricing was a bit high. Thai spring rolls were really greasy and I couldn't taste a single vegetable. Green curry was good. Medium spice was perfect. Screaming orgasm roll was delicious.

I came here for the highly-raved buffalo chicken cheesesteak. For a place in Jersey, it definitely hits the spot. The service is extremely efficient and the sandwich was full of flavor. The cheese was perfectly melt-y throughout. I rarely get a chance to stop by even though I live so close, but I'm glad I was able to. I wish it were open later!
Nice place to eat while you are shopping. Atmosphere is great, salsa very fresh but the bean burrito was the worst I ever had for $9 I will be back but will skip burrito

We have only ordered in pizza from here, but it was not good! I hope to try it again and dine in the restaurant. We are hoping that makes a difference! Our family and friends do like it and they say that the wings are great!

Sat for lunch at the bar, and I had the pork chop with sweet potato puree and spinach in a sweet glaze. The ambiance is classy and elegant, they had appropriately inspired live music in the main dining room, and the waitstaff is friendly and funny. I would rate the place a 4 for ambiance and service, 3- for food.

This is a great neighborhood spot on the Boise Bench. They have an amazing selection of beer and wine to serve or fill your growler. Their food selection is fine, a bit limited but I think it's due to the kitchen they have. The outdoor space is good too.
Stopped by to try it out when I visited my dad in PA and man this Chicken was Fresh and so was the fries.I would Highly recommend can't wait to try it again when I go back down there.
Not sure why only one entree comes out BEFORE the appetizer and the appetizer came AFTER the entrees. If you can't prepare appetizers first then please don't sell them. Otherwise the food was great.

Just don't eat the fish tacos. Just don't. They are completely tasteless. Verging on gross. Otherwise, I really like the atmosphere. I love cozy cushions to lounge on and I love patios, so this place is ideal for me. Also, happy hour on Wednesdays is a great deal. The pizza is decent. I heard the seared tuna was good.

I went for the burger since it was star at Brick and Mortar. Decided to come back another time for the chicken sandwich. Wife got the whole Mango Snapper as recommended by Dustin. Great daily specials!! Great wine selection for those who are above my paygrade! #budlight Covid compliant.
Very loud, small portions, however the service was good. Likely won't return as there are so many others to chose from in the area...Really a disappointment. Frenchy;s feels more like a chain now .
Nice neighborhood bar. Clean and friendly. Pool tables with TV's on the walls. Good prices on beer and food.

Wonderful owners and food!! Great add to the South Tampa community. I tried the crab fried rice, added shrimps and it was amazing. The steamed dumplings and chicken Thai rice were delicious also. We will definitely come back to give our support!!
Crowded bar. I like the girls but it seems to like they dilute the drinks. I don't know how they get away with this. Must be something they do with the owners.

Used to come here weekly but as I recall I stopped coming because they changed or got rid of the chicken ceasar salad I loved. Love the steaks, though--always juicy and cooked to perfection! Love the bread too. Solid steakhouse, one of the best in Hendersonville! Long waits on the weekends, I'd go during the week rather than wait an hour to eat.
Worst experience ever!!! From tasteless wraps to raw chicken disgusting. Thank goodness I didn't get sick. Will never go back there. They should change their name to acrapolis.

I only ordered the fried piece of pie with ice cream. I had high hopes but it was pretty underwhelming; the ice cream was way better than the pie. The peach pie was SO sweet, and the apple pie wasn't fresh. I will come back to try the bbq- but save your calories for dessert elsewhere.
Excellent and must check it out. Food was so good and fresh. Awesome staff, friendly environment and the selection is really good.

Tasty sandwiches! Love the photographs of local St. Charles places! Very clean and efficient. Staff attentive to order preferences. My only question is.... why don't they serve a pickle with the sandwiches at PICKLEman's???
I have taken my Hyundai Elantra here to get my bumper fixed and they did amazing work! They are very quick with the work and real nice workers. I definitely will be going back here again!

Casual Dinning in an historic blding what's not to like. Simple dishes prepared well with fresh ingredients what's not to love. Had the best ever spinach and artichoke dip. Also the chicken Caesar and Spinach salad both were delish.

The food here was excellent. I would definitely recommend the brussel sprout salad as it is enough to feed one person. It was so good. I had the chicken curry which was also delightful. The servers and shop are super nice and it's a great bang for your buck. I will definitely come back here again
Honestly their pizza taste under cooked. It wasn't the worse spot I've eaten at but certainly not the best. Westshore on Hanley Rd pizzais a tad better but their wings are disgusting.
Loved my experience here. My reservation was a little behind schedule so they gave us a complimentary bread which was so good! Great service, food, decor, and drinks!

Great environment, service, food, and drinks. But saw a small mouse scurrying around in the dining area... I'm sure there are mice in every restaurant but it was fun to see one just grabbing food from where we were eating. I wanted to take a picture, but couldn't grab my phone quick enough. 3 stars nonetheless because they were otherwise great

Food is about like any other Mexican place. My friends and I are trying to figure out what makes it so much more popular than other similar Mexican restaurants. The service is good, prices average but the chairs...very uncomfortable, For whatever reason, it seems to be the place where all the cool kids go to eat Mexican. "Lets meet at Casa!"
First time here. I was impressed. Went with a build your own with rice tuna and scallop. Very fresh. Good flavour. Would definitely go back and try other flavours. Great lunch on a hot day

Your sandwiches are more convenient than delicious but unfortunately you're tapping into your delivery drivers pockets when you charge a $2 delivery fee. I'm literally right across the street less than 2 blocks.

Line was out the door and only one person was at the service desk. In addition I waited for the bus for over a half hour. Just an update. I waited in line for an hour and five minutes at the service desk before being helped....

I looovveeedd eating here. One of my favorite places to eat and the food is always great. That is until I got major food poisoning:( spent the entire night and next day yacking up Classic dak-galbi. I'm so sad because I really loved coming here but probably won't be able to eat it the same again

Sat at the bar for dinner. The bartender was friendly and attentive. I ordered the eggrolls, they were pretty good. I also ordered the salad with blackened shrimp. The shrimp were pretty salty though they were well cooked. It was located close to my hotel so it was convenient and it was reasonably priced.

Eh is about all I can say about here. WAY overpriced for underperforming food. Everything is SO high in calories and fat here that it's scary! Granted, they make the place look nice, but it's to compensate for their awful food.

Pickup a sub steak to eat on the run I would not go out of my way again was terrible and expensive for that sandwich the container was the best I have seen they just need to put a great sandwich in it... my last time and I usually get 4 sandwiches per week for myself
Pizza is ok. Nothing special but pretty good. Above average but if you want REALLY GOID pizza, it's Holy Tomato Pie LaScala or Maninno. All wood fired
Great food, great service, great atmosphere, great location! I had the Redfish Pontchartrain. Good beer selection too!

The store is beautiful, parking is horrendous. Everything looks good but I'm inevitably disappointed. The sandwiches are skimpy. The prepared foods are tired . The service is positive but I have some stupid issue every time I eat here or buy stuff for home. I glad it's there but it could and should be so much better.
Menu is too much to look at. Food is mediocre. Ordered take out and they forgot some of the food. Order at your own risk.

Awesome and cheap Vietnamese food from the kitchen in the back. You can call in your order in advance too. Ask for the buy-10-get-1-free card if you're a banh mi Pham-atic *groannnn*. Also if for some reason "Sample every variety of Boone's Farm malt/wine beverage" is on your bucket list, get your ass here asap.

Just bought 4 cheeseburgers for dinner for my children... Two of them didn't even have meat in them. When I try to call and complain I got a fax machine as their voice number. Absolutely pathetic! I guess we have to start checking the inside of the sandwiches now when going through the drive-through.
Fabulous from the minute you walk in! Exceptionally clean, relaxing atmosphere! Definitely coming back!

I'm from out of town and heard wonders about this place. It's good, you can taste the freshness but I wouldn't go out of my way to come here again. Worth the experience but in my opinion, nothing spectacular.
Great place, A ton of things to do. Love going on rainy days.
Kinda dingy inside, not a lot going on in here. Food was pretty good, had the Mongolian beef and it tasted like they actually grilled the beef. It won't be a regular stop, but was ok for a meal.
Bad attitude. Long wait. Honestly the worst pizza place I have ever ordered from. A nightmare to say the least.
Waited 20min no one came to take an order 5 tables max with customers 10 servers just walking around. Service sucks!

These people are thieves. They will steal money from your credit card when you aren't looking. Watch out for the words "Top-Up retainer" in their agreement. Better yet, don't do business with a shady company like this.
This place is my new fave spot. Everything here is insanely fresh and delicious. I CANT wait to go back

I'm with you, Alexandra T. Their Draconian application of the late fee drove me away. Not even so much as a return telephone call to my explanation just a forty-buck whack. Must be a non-profit thing. Thanks gang.

You can never go wrong here. There's a reason it's been open for four decades. It's delicious. The food is above average and the owner, Mark is such a nice guy. Also, they offer decaf iced teach which is delicious. My family has been going here for the past decade and will always be loyal customers. Keep it up yall!

Watery egg drop soup. Cold and stale pumpkin/sesame covered puffs. Cold and mushy french fries. Cold pepper steak. Frigid and old fried ripe plantains, which they call "bananas". Bland, anemic fried rice. I had been eager to try this new buffet. Was very disappointed. Will not return.

I love the BOGO specials on meats especially! The staff is friendly & they are rarely packed! They are open until 11, which is great for New Orleans. I don't like having to drive pass two other grocery stores to get here, but it's usually worth it!!

I have been going to zest for a number of years. The food is good, but the front of the restaurant is run horribly. Bad service, bad hosting. Unfortunately, the good food can no longer overcome the bad service. I won't be back

If I could give 0 stars I would. This company is disgusting and their customer service is completely unprofessional. A complete scam and waste of time. If your tour guide is Brandon good luck because he might kick you off the tour for talking to your child.
Awesome vibe in the best neighborhood of Boise! Great service, food is fantastic, free refills on coffee. One of my fav local hangouts

Good but not great. The pancakes were very good, but the rest of the breakfast was just good. I would return, but there is nothing here that would make go out of my way. If you're close by, try it out. You won't go wrong, but you will probably not have a memorable experience.
Fish and chips last visit were great. Always a great meal here. Today is just a break and an opportunity to spend time drinking good beer with Ronnie and Phil. Love the vibe here

Went shopping for recliners today. Found what we wanted and the manager put them on hold for no money down while we went to get our trailer. Returned to find out one of them was not in stock. Nick helped us get another one (in stock) and helped adjust the cost. Great service and prices. We will be back

Marina Grill is refreshingly always the same. Russell's has some of the best bloody Mary's in the city and really good food. They recently redid the patio and it is lovely outdoor area. I highly recommend the chicken and waffles as that is my go to dish. Everything I've eaten there has been pretty good.
The doctors and nurses are fantastic, however the people in front desk are not friendly at all and are really mean. This is the reason why I'm not going any longer to nature pediatrics.

Been here many times between my car ' my husband's- Took Jules Special..here's my review A.) It didn't dry the exterior properly B.) It didn't clean the interior properly,like -you will still see the dirt. Staff are: Pleasant Friendly In short Customer service is GREAT. Will still come back and see if they take comments/suggestions seriously.
Autumn was in top form.... Danced her ass off and made us laugh. Dick's is still as fun as ever.

Okay, it has truly interesting and well made drinks with high quality booze. The decor and the atmosphere, however, look like something from Sex & the City where the Art Director was given carte blanche. It just isn't a place where you feel you can get comfortable and enjoy your well made drinks.
Very disappointed !! I'm a travel agent and would not recommend this place. They put us in the far corner unit , in the back. Saw one cockroach and the cupboards are full of dust . Just feel dirty

People were nice but who gives you a burrito with no rice and beans in it and I payed for grilled onions that I never got! The carne asada had good seasoning but the chicken was too dry. Lots of other people loved but it wasn't for me.

Went here with friends, the tacos were very good! Atmosphere was also great. The new girl kept saying "im new, i dont know let me ask". My only complaint is that they only gave me one slice of lime for my multiple tacos. I asked the guy who brought out the food for more lime, he said "more lime, ok" and never returned!

I've been to Tapping the Vine several times, most often for a lovely outside lunch. Very nice folks, very good food, and a beer selection that definitely needs navigational help from the waiter! It is also worth noting that they are VERY pet friendly; their outdoor tables are on good, clean brick, and they will bring water bowls, etc for your pooch.

Customer service is rude, disrespectful and poor. Most are teens who don't care about their job and others are sad middle aged people who don't care about you or what you need. The only good part is the food, good popcorn and tasty snacks.

nice location and comfortable small room. for the $350/night i would expect more i n amenities than some beat up beach cruisers. no hottub, no wine in the afternon, and skimpy breakfast of lox and bagels or yoghurt. The service was good but not worth the price

We were looking for a hole in the wall and this is it. Food was really good, service was excellent. If your looking for a good burger in Nashville for lunch, this is the place for you. I was disappointed they weren't open for dinner. Just lunch. But all in all a great meal!
Fast delivery, that's great. SOUR pizza. Tasted Sour. Literally. I'd give it less than a star if I could.
the food was flavorless, the meat tasted liked plain ground hamburger meat. The cashier was rude and kept speaking Spanish to her coworker. The entire reasturant smelled terrible like rotted fish
Great place good food awesome service. We went for Easter brunch and we had a great time.

Terrible, terrible, TERRIBLE service. They keep your car for HOURS and never call or answer calls for an update. Staff from managers on down are VERY short with patience and rude! Purchased a car from here and have had to bring it back monthly for repairs. If you can go anywhere else.. don't come here! You will regret any time spent in this place.
Great cheese cake!!!!! Service is pretty good and prices can be a bit on the higher side but it's not breaking bank.

5 star for service. Ordered the filet, good quality but not the best I have had. Veal was very thin and tiny amount of meat for the price. But good ambience. Of note, tried to go the day before at 9:30 with 10:30 closing time. Was told the kitchen closes depending on business. May want to check again if you're going late night.

King of wings has a big problem with their chicken. The fresh pressure chicken is way overcooked, always dry. Wings are no better. Fresh cut potato's can be good. For a chicken place, they should be delivering at a higher level.

I cannot recommend this practice. I have been here 4 times and I have never been taken in to see the doctor any time less than a full hour after my scheduled appointment time. It always takes 2-3 hours for a routine eye exam. Not acceptable. Never returning. 4:48 my appointment was for 3:00. I'm STILL waiting!

This was truly the best experience I have had all Christmas season. I did the buy online and pick up at the store. Turn around time was less than an hour. If this is how good they are days before Christmas just imagine when the demand isn't so high.

We frequent this restaurant quite a bit as it is across the street from the Blend. When we are at the Blend, most times they deliver which is very convenient. We think that their Spring Rolls and their peanut sauce are excellent. We will be back!

Very disappointed in their highly promoted pizza. We ordered their "signature" eggplant pizza. It was very soggy and lacked flavor. The edges were burned but the center was so soggy that it fell appart when holding it. Above all not much of a flavor.
Get the carrot cake pancake, easily the best pancake I had in my life!! Absolutely amazing!

I used to love their cheesesteaks, but the past few times I've ordered, the steaks have come bone dry with barely any cheese. It's almost edible. Just dry steak shredded on a sandwich. For their prices, and the fact they charge almost 2$ to add cheese, you'd think think it'd be a little more substantial. Bummer.

Nice location near Jackson Square. Main dining room has atmosphere, outdoor dining space has charm. Both chicken and seafood gumbos have good flavor and too much salt; both arrived Luke warm due to our inattentive server. Prices are reasonable. Solid choice for lunch only.
Excellent service and location. Different types of beer. Ask for Courtney. She is awesome!
This place is great! Authentic, friendly and quick. The only reason it isn't 5 stars is because I don't want to eat in. It's attached to a gas station- but I repeat- it's very tasty'
The SLOWEST pumps I have ever experienced. The interface takes forever to pay, select grade, get receipt, etc. Wow.

Service was excellent! I really wanted delicious beer cheese soup based on the reviews I read, and unfortunately I was disappointed. I expected it to be thicker and richer and what I got was watery and flavorless. Enjoyed the bitchin berry beer and the sausage sample was ok. Probably won't return.

Coming from New York, I've found VERY few places in Nashville that get close to true New York style pizza. I found this out-of-the-way place while I was in the middle of moving into the neighborhood and was looking for a place to eat. I'm glad I did. Great pizza, canoli's and other Italian specialties. Worth going out of your way for.

The food is always good. This is not about quality of the meal... we were there at 9:00 this morning and the place was packed. I was coughed on, sneezed on and crowded without safe distancing. I have been extremely careful about being exposed and this was terrifying. Florida is hot at the moment and this was the wrong direction. NOT Covid SAFE!

It is just ok. Service was very slow and the waitress had NO personality. The only reason why we went was because of the Groupon $25 for $50. Don't think we would go back again. Much better places to get seafood in Philly.
Great place for late night when nothing else is opened!

Most of the food was sub-par, they cut corners on their lunch buffet by putting "cheese" rangoons and other subtle swaps in food. The pineapple rind had mold on it, noticed after it was already eaten. Told the waitress, she didn't do anything about it and acted like I was lying, even though I was showing her. No apology. Will not return
The wings are always super flavorful, orders always accurate and done by the time I get there. The hot lemon pepper wings are the best!

The atmosphere was cool, they were good about not having the music too loud. Food was good, nothing to really shout about though, there was only 1 waitress for brunch so the drinks took a bit to come but the bloody mary was good.

Really grossed out to see staff with no masks. Come on people it's not that hard and it's not going to last forever - and at the very least it's a sign of respect to your patrons who are coming out and dining in a time that's hard for everyone.

So disgusting that we stopped eating after 2 bites and had to get food somewhere else. The orange chicken was soggy and tasted like it was leftovers put under a heat lamp for HOURS. No crunchiness and just disgusting. The veggie egg rolls tasted like old seaweed and I spit it out immediately. How does a chinese restaurant mess up ORANGE CHICKEN???

Stopped for breakfast. Had the sausage and peppers omelette. Love the open air sitting. We we arrived we were seated quickly, but there was a lint to get in as we left. Friendly staff. Little slow on the coffee refills, but otherwise a good breakfast place.

Pigs in a blanket from the Amish pretzel place. Do you really need anything else? Another Philly staple that I've been visiting practically my entire life, but they've been switching things up a bit too much lately. It seems like every time I come home on break, another one of my favorite stands has disappeared or moved...what gives??

Bowl of Chili didn't even fill up my 91 year old father. Absolutely tiny. Should be impressive since the restaurant is called Chili's. Nice college student server. Revamp the Chili so you can be proud of your signature dish!!
Vastly improved service the past six months. No longer do attach members test you like a nuisance.

Not too excited they didn't have anything to keep food chilled or protected from major heat as we were walking far to vehicles and super hot out. So wasn't able to take anything with. Recommend something even if could purchase for few bucks extra. Look forward to trying a pick up soon though. Will update from that
I'm so disappointed our Nachos were stale & tasted terrible they didn't send my burrito's and the Tacos were mushy

Slow service. All the employees working look like a chicken with their head chopped off. Waited 5 minutes just to take my order while nobody was in front of me. Horrible customer service. Girl behind the counter was texting on her phone before placing my order.

I love this market. Their marinated meats are excellent; my mother loves their flan. It amazes me how much stuff is crammed in such a small space and I always find something new. I wish it were closer to where I live.

I decided to try this company for the first time at this location and honestly, I really hope it's not that bad at every location. I went through the drive thru and it took forever just to get a coffee. The coffee was crunchy from just pure sugar, absolutely disgusting. Starbucks for me, I guess.

I waited for over an hour yesterday and the food wasn't great. I know think this place is overpriced and just okay. I really don't need to ever go back. Still suggest using the no wait app. Try this place on a weekday and decide if it is really worth an hour wait on the weekend. I think not.

Eso es una de las mejores restaurantes en Tampa . Hay muchas comidas ricas y auténticas de Puertoriqueña como mofongo, acapuria, tostones con mayo -ketchup , asopao de pollo , de camarones , chicharrones de pollos ,... Ambiente alegre y limpio . Me encanto !
Amazing beers and great people. If you are looking for the best "juice line" in East Nashville, look no further than Southern Grist brewery. A cut above the rest.
Great place for breaky. Everything is fresh and yummie. But i suggest to get their early. I'm 6'5 245 and getting there in the late morning...not a lot of fun.
The service was fantastic. Carlos was very friendly, helpful, and professional. He made us feel very welcome. We will definitely use Uno again and highly recommend them.

11/11/18 @ 5:48pm , bad host , don't know anything about hospitality , I asked how long the wait was and she ignored me the entire time I was speaking , until a good boy answered my question , I'm a host myself and it's disappointing seeing how ignorant another one can be .
The employees were very disrespectful for some reason when we entered the gym they were very rude and unprofessional.
This place is consistent and awesome. I love the number 6 veggie with sprouts! JJ is my go to sandwich spot!

I've stayed here 4 or 5 times. Cute, ideally located, clean, and affordable. Love the coffee and simple breakfast in morning, wine and cheese in the evenings. Front desk was very helpful when we asked for recommendations.
DO NOT GO TO THIS CRACKER BARREL. They are understaffed, and you will get poor service, and poor customer service. Management was not helpful in resolving my issues either.

The lady they had working the drive thru at 3pm today had a horrible speech problem and messed up litteraly everything with my order. I couldn't understand a word she said nor could she understand me even after repeating everything several times. She needs some help she seemed very overwhelmed. I will not come back
Very good The place is nice in the inside People are friendly and so far the food is good. The only bad part is they only take cash and they only deliver til 4pm.

I love The Joint! They have expanded in the past couple of years but still maintain the homey retro vibe that makes it so inviting. Three stars instead of 4 because this time the meat was on the dry side, but, still fall off the bone ribs and a great experience overall.
Wouldn't recommend this place. I got the crab roll for much and I got really sick after eating it. Not just that but the salad was not fresh and the fries were hard.

I had Samson burger. It was amazing. Our server was very friendly and nice. I also had a glass of hop cider. It was excellent. Overall, we had a wonderful dining experience. However, my boyfriend had fish and chips, which was very bad. The fish was so bad.

I disagree with some of the recent reviews about the food. Food is actually well done and definitely above average. Also a little creatively different from standard American fare. And the beer on tap, of which there are many choices, can't be beat. Service is good (something I don't say about many restauraunts).

Shayas new restaurant is just like his old. Delicious, interesting and pricey. Great for a special occasion! We tried a whole bunch of dishes. My favorites were the lutenitsa and surprisingly the chicken. I tend to avoid chicken at fine dining because it's boring and you can get it anywhere, but theirs was amazing!

Great example of why business gets outsourced. The sole provider of uniforms for the local school, embriodery done in-house, ran out of sizes a week before school and did not restock. The clerk told me not to worry, a lot of children won't be dressed properly. Not exactly what I would brag about.
This was a fun place for an easy early dinner meeting up with family in preparation for daughter's graduation from Penn the next day. All the Burgers and sweet potato fries were good.

Decent food and cold draft beer. Wooden countryside interior , lounge style sitting, plenty of TV's, free parking, walk in- you probably will find place to sit it is big enough. Outdoor fireplace with wooden sitting was great and nice to look at. We stayed for hours!
Good food but expensive and many strict policies. Party of 6 and wanted to get seated to have coffee but must wait for all of us to get here. Good service but always with a little attitude.
The Best Chinese Food In New Orleans. Must haves: Combination Rice, Egg Rolls, Hot and Sour soup.
Great food. Good service. Nice atmosphere. Squeaky front door an irritating distraction when dining outside. A little WD40 would be good :/
Great concept. But not near as good as genghis khan. Food quality was sub-par. Service was good. I will not return.
Sucks for veg options. And you can get better food at a cheaper place in Chinatown. So what are we paying for here? The actual Dynasty?
Ambiance is cool. Good happy hour with apps and drinks. Food is eh. Roof bar is crowded.

This is for the tire center. They rarely answer the phone when you call and when I finally did get through I received the run around and bogus info from someone who was either new or poorly trained. I don't want to pay $200 more at Les Schwab but I'm willing to just for their customer service alone
Went to McD for a special dinner instead of beans and rice, and they mess up the extra pickles. So annoying.
service was was great, always been coming here but the taste was lacking a little bit, but still great place
Been in line for 25 min. 6 people behind me and there is 1 person working returns. Unexceptionable! Management has been up and did nothing.
Good food, terrible seats that hurt your ass. Can't relax here. Other option is to sit on a wooden bench.... Not a fan.

I'm Korean but never been to a Korean salon before. My experience was excellent! They understood what I wanted and delivered exactly as requested. I have very thick curly hair and its hard to manage. They recommended the hair treatment and cut so I don't have to spend so much time every morning. Love it!
Always go to chipotle but this time we had a very unpleasant worker with a nose ring who did not smile or speak a word to us while ordering our burrito bowls. She was very rude.
Good place to live. Beautiful location n grt view. Nice n clean community. Definitely worth price
I was referred by a friend, however owner was not very nice so I didn't order and I won't be going back.
Expected something spectacular after the reviews of hot chicken. Had princess and it was just ok.

Pretty expensive for what you get and the beef sliders arent very good at all. I can find better value and quality at other fast food chains. The only thing worth buying here is the brownie or cheesecake on a stick, only a dollar and 200 calories for yum.

We had them come in and remove and protect against mold in our crawl space in 2013. Since then mold had been discovered in the crawl space. We had to hire another company to correct their improper job. They refused to fix it because they said it was not covered because a drain was not put in.

We were so excited for this to finally come back to Brandon. It's nice & clean on the inside, but the food had NO flavor at all. Very disappointing, planned a lunch for the family.. $75 later we were unsatisfied and in no hurry to return.
Very pleasant place and has a character to it. We enjoyed the place and the performance. We were sitting on the balcony and could see the show very well. Good design of the theatre.

Stayed 4 nights for business. The place is clean, in a decent location, friendly staff, and nice lobby/breakfast area. There is no restaurant in the hotel but there are some within walking distance. I thought the price was a little high for a Comfort Inn and if work wasn't paying I would have looked elsewhere. Otherwise the stay was good, no complaints.

They are a little pricey. The food was mediocre at best. It's not a place I would be in rush to to eat again. However, I would eat again because of the service. The ladies were very nice and engaging.
There's a bartender here named Buzzkill Blondie. He looks AND acts like a white-washed Ryan Phillipe. Tip him terribly.

Amazing food and service!!! If you like Mediterranean food or have never tried it go there! My husband and I usually get the manzel celebration combination plate for 2. The "awesome dude" and akbar mashdi' are our two favorite deserts. Everything is home made including the ice cream. No matter what your taste is this place will have something to satisfy you!
The man the I saw was just about one of the rudest people that I have come in contact with in a long time. He should be ashamed of himself to humiliate someone the way he did. Just awful.
Food was amazing! Neal at the bar was wonderful. .full of personality. .talked to every customer at the bar. I was do impressed with the quality of food and service. My new happy hour spot for sure.

Service was great. Restaurant was like dining at any American restaurant. Food tasted pretty good ....until it came backup. Got really bad food poisoning after dining here Jan 1 2020. Came to check reviews and saw someone else posted they also got food poisoning. Someone needs to sanitize the kitchen or check their food.

A go-to favorite that never disappoints for the delicious and creative food, friendly, attentive service and beautiful bay views. Always a wonderful meal. Brunch is too much food and a bit pricey for the Little we eat, but a groaning, massive spread of anything you can think of to eat if you're craving an all out extravaganza! Just fabulous.

If you like beer then put your shoes on, get in your car, drive here, and drink one because they have a lot of them that you haven't heard of. The bartender talks in circles and he's kind of a dick. The food isn't very good, I won't go back.

This is a bit of a throw back dive bar. There's cheeseburgers and cheap beer. I wouldn't come here looking for a massive beer collection, although they have a few imports. The menu is really small, which makes the few items they do serve great. My favorite part about the space is it's old school vibe, and did I mention it's cheap?!
Great food, I was surprised being from NY as to how good the pie was. Wing's, chicken tenders and fries we're all so great. I will definitely be stopping back next time I'm in town.
Food was delicious, staff was great and they accepted our expired coupon of one day. The only reason I gave it 4 stars is because it was a little too dark, but overall good experience!

New jungle fruit strain: looks fantastic. Smells and taste fantastic. Damn thing has seeds. My 1/2, maybe smoked an 8th so far. 5 seeds. Arghhhh... nothing worse than smoking a J after a long day and smelling seeds... disappointing with so much potential

Dairy Queen of course the ice cream is outstanding as usual. The customer service is ok but the problem is in the fact that you cam walk in to the restaurant 2 hours before they close and they have trays taped over all of the trash can but one because they are already trying to pre close while the place is packed.

This place is excellent. They are amazingly tasty little tacos that are served quickly and cost hardly anything. It's a stand, so don't expect an indoor dining area. The guy who took my order was super nice too, so it's all around a good experience. Not much more to be said, except that I will definitely return!
First time here and the food was delicious and fresh. Kai was our server and he was great!!! Will definitely come back to try more fresh seafood.

Solidly good food at pretty reasonable prices. Great, fresh beers (LOVE the Schuylkill punch - makes me happy). And a gorgeous, large deck with that is always a good place to hang out and always a good time.

Don't waste your time. Ordered online, arrived at the store with four online orders ahead of me and at least 10 people in line. Way understaffed, didn't even bother to make online orders. Canceled my order and they still charged me. Terrible customer service.

They can't answer a phone if their life depended on it. Husband left something there we live over 40 mins away so we called to see if they can hold it, and we come get it the next day. Nope couldn't even answer the phone kept getting hung up on.

Wonderful! they paid attention to detail. The foot massage was the star. They didn't rush and I really liked that. The oil massage was amazing. I only didn't give them 5 stars, because it was less than relaxing to hear them discussing potential employees during my quiet and relaxing time.
I am a local neighbor and bring anything we need framed. Always pleasant and very reasonably priced. Happy to recommend them to anyone.

Worst experience of my life! The waitress looked and acted like she hated her job. They were so rude to our kids as well. My cauliflower Was freezing cold, and she put burning hot grits in front of my 10 month old and he burned his hands. Will never return.
Parent Company has returned my daughter's money. However, I still can NOT recommend anyone to rent here for the poor, non-existent, communication and shady practices alone.
Only 2 stars not on the food , the driver walking up to me without a mask , wow !!! Hope the driver was virus free ???
Everything is very fine. Couch Tomato and Lucky's are in the same category for me. I just don't love them.

Although I loved coming here unfortunately I will now go somewhere else. Too many techs pretend to understand the assignment and so, it's been this what you asked for versus what you get that keeps happening. Time to Move on!
Cute hike!! Hard to find parking, but the drive there and views from the hike are gorgeous. Montecito is a beautiful area!
Unfortunately the worst airport food I've had. Biscuit was 1/2 way to the rock stage. Shrimp and grits had a total of 4 tiny shrimp. Server was polite, but inattentive.

Had the frozen custard cone. Decent cone and better than Dairy Queen provides these days. Still waiting to try fish and chips. Reluctant to do so since Tucson history on this classic item is less than stellar.
Fresh ingredients and small menu (seasonal they say). Plus they don't rip you off. Loved my slice of pizza and panini.

Wow, were we excited to try this place after reading the reviews. Didn't live up to the hype. Food was typical of a sushi place, not outstanding. Nothing particularly innovative on the menu. Service was average, and we were there on a slow night. Location is cool, inside ballpark village and a couple of blocks from the arch. So there's that.

The food is really good. The bread made me want to jump out of my chair and moonwalk. The only negative is that my wife and I had to wait about twenty minutes to be served. The waiter apologized.. I almost left but I am glad that I stayed. Next time I will sit at the bar near the fireplace.

worst taxi experience : walter is a crook says pay in advance ill pick u up later . he lies doesnt answer his phone and dont come back . this employee is a liablity to this company .lost out on $40. Hopefully people don't take his rides anymore and he looses more . WATCH OUT FOR WALTER
I came in and did not know it was after hours and I needed my braces fixed because the wire was stabbing my mouth and even though it was closed for the day they cut the wire for me. Very nice place.
Great place especially because of Christian our server, he really made it a special experience I would recommend anyone that goes here requests him! A night to remember thanks to my amazing server!

Lunch was amazing here. The service was on point. Food was delicious! Fresh and light. A must visit if you're downtown and want pizza! Great portion size too. The atmosphere was welcoming as well. Local artwork on the walls. Outdoor seating available. Good for kids too. Well priced.

Thank you Dutch Bros for my order of ice with a side of coffee..... A bit disappointing after the initial experience was great due to the staff being super friendly, but this cup with ice up to the lid was upsetting considering it was a $5 coffee and ended up being $5 for ice.

The worst Toyota dealership I have ever come into contact with. After purchasing two $40k tundra pickups from this dealership, it is impossible to get assistance. They are not honest, they DO NOT CARE about you after you purchase your vehicle. DO NOT GO HERE!!!

I love Cafe Ole and I always enjoy the the three combination plate. However, if you have more than 3 or 4 people, then eat elsewhere. This restaurant has ONE group seating area. If you go when another group is there, then you will have to wait over an hour to eat. I never had this experience at the location on Milwaukee in Boise

Super expensive. Got a regular full set for $60 just color!!!!!!!!!!!!! Guys this is a rip off I'm sorry but I've never paid more than $30 for a full set polish. But anywho learned my lesson. Way too over priced for nothing.
I bought sweet and sour chicken the chicken was raw the rice was hard and I order some french fries the French fry was still wrong the egg roll was so so
I read the reviews but I'm always gonna see for myself. The guy really is a douche, and all of his stuff is rusted junk.

This is mainly about the paint department. I went on a Saturday and they only had one person working. She was amazing but one person on a Saturday is ridiculous. I went back Sunday to get it and I stood for ten minutes and when the employee was free he completely ignored me like I wasn't even there. Never going back.

I was worried about the 3.5 rating but opted to stick around for dinner. Had the meatball appetizer, was very good. Marina sauce was light and flavorful. Meatballs were great. Had the top sirloin with zucchini with bean and rice. Split dinner with hubby
The hot chocolate was wonderful and filing, but the scones were dry, like two-day old sugar cookies.
This place is NOT family friendly. Very big on the bar and the customer service is very poor for the dinning area. Food is not the same as Louies, very much a downgrade.
Fries were cold, waiter was rude. Soft shell crab was good, but it doesn't worth $11 for just one crab. We regret that we didn't go to ACME since the line was long. Will not come back.
Food is delicious which keeps making me go back. Don't try to call in an order they don't answer their phones very often.

Fun place, and I like the concept of a bar/arcade with retro 80's games. However, this place isn't for dancing and it's hardly good for socializing. I wish the music was better. The drinks are pretty good though. The place gets really packed so they must be doing something right.

I had great hopes when it opened. The prices are reasonable, but the wait is terribly long and the food is not great. Everything is overly salted, and the veggies are over cooked and oily. I've tried a few times and the experiences haven't gotten any better. I'm really kind of surprised by the rave reviews.

I got take away here the other night my wife had chicken chow mien and I had beef and broccoli. It was the worst food I have ever seen or tasted, it was soggy and greasy, we paid $25 for this crap, avoid like the plague.

Won't deliver to a hangar on the west side of Indy Intl! Really! The manager hemmed and hawed about it and then after a few times on hold, came back and decided that even though I would meet them outside, they still weren't going to deliver! Wow!
This is my favorite buffet in Reno. Tony is my favorite server. He's efficient and friendly. Lots of choices and excellent food .

Nice-sized portions and great value. Features Greek/Mediterranean and Italian cuisine. I've ordered the Chicken Marsala (tastes similar to Olive Garden's, but better, IMO) and the Baked Spaghetti. They also do delivery within 3 mile radius i believe.

I got the SOHO basic açaí bowl. It was absolutely plain, and did not taste good at all. The best part about the bowl was the bananas, the açaí didn't taste good at all, and the coconut flakes had no flavor. This annoyed me because I spent a whopping $20 on two of these garbage bowls. Go anywhere but here.
I have spiders, worms with legs, multiple ceiling leaks have occurred, two and a half months with no hot water in shower. Popcorn ceilings with stain marks. That's the good part.

Always packed and for good reason. Really tasty crab and lots of it. Clam chowder is good too. Reasonable prices. I wouldn't go for a nice quiet romantic dinner though. It's cramped, loud, and a bit grungy.
This is a fantastic place! It reminds me of in-n-out on the west coast. Clean, quick, friendly service.

I wasn't even eating here but was out on the patio while the employees were SCREAMING at one another using the foulest language imaginable. N words galore, F bombs. And all next to a table of 8th graders from Lusher. Where the hell is management on this? Awful.

Please never give these people your money...they are awful racist people who are helping destroy the rich culture of New Orleans...they called the police on brass band musicians for playing music ON FRENCHMAN ST.
I can't help myself. I love this place. Great employess! Clean bathrooms are always appreciated. Drinks are sopt on.
Food poisoning... some of the food seemed it was steamed way earlier then steamed again. And some of the items didn't seem like it was cooked all the way.

Online menu about 2 dollars cheaper than the actual price, the old bait and switch, got me once will never go back, try and do and do the right thing by getting take out and help out and this is what they do,

Staff was ambivalent. Coffee wasn't that great, and kinda expensive. Maybe they should let the customers know beforehand that they are having church services in the place, complete with communion. I didn't feel comfortable sitting in there to have my coffee. The bathroom wasn't as horrible as some of the other reviews described.
We were thinking of taking our pet there. Seemed like staff was very busy. They may be a good place but too crowed and seemed like a little chaotic.

I decided to go here because the website had so many good reviews. The service was good but the food was just like any other "Mexican" resteraunt here in tennessee. So I'm not sure what all the rave is about. I guess people around here just don't know what it's supposed to be like.

Worst food I can remember eating. The workers barely speak English. The chicken sandwich I ordered had the thinnest piece of chicken I've ever seen. There's no branding on any of the cups or wrappers. There's only 4 sandwiches on the menu. You're better off going to In-N-Out.

I really LOVED going to Rejuva new you spa! It was a great, clean environment and the staff was wonderful! I got the lazer hair removal with Brianna and I couldn't be happier with my results! I can't wait to go back for more sessions!
Food was boring and bland. We required salt on almost everything. Service was poor. I would recommend to go somewhere else.

Not really a fan. Long line to put in reservation. We had a waiter who was way too busy. Food wasn't very exciting and was overpriced. The payment system of paying and tipping while the impatient server waited right there at the table was not great.
Brought my 3 kids in for breakfast today and we all had a great experience. Out server Devin's attentiveness and positive attitude was refreshing, and greatly appreciated.
Always get the mama's gravey or lasagne ( don't always have). Better than mine...rich sauce, and dense meatball.

Beautiful park with lots of water features and bridges. There is an abondoned building in the park, but it doesn't detract from the vibe. Interesting statues and fun pieces of history. The park seems under-utilized since only a couple of the entrances are ever unlocked. It can be a pain to get in/out if you've never been. Kind of a shame.

Went for dinner on a Sunday night. Tried the crab cakes & red fish oceana with garlic sauce. Both dishes are good, the garlic sauce is excellent. Service is quick and good. Be mindful of wait times during busy hours.

Love the ambiance! The staff was extemely helpful. However the food wasn't exactly what i expected. The fried pickles were seasoned & very tasty. The mac & cheese was good however it was cold. Unfortunately the chicken nuggets & Mother Clucker sandwich was bland & dry. Overall we spent over $40 for 2 peoplefor over priced fast food that wasn't very good.

If you like and enjoy lots of sodium and grease this is your place. I'm not sure but it seems they may dip burger in butter. At any rate flavor is filled with grease and fat. Homer Simpson would love this place. Fries were very saturated as well.

had lunch..2 of us ..food was great...bill came 2 47dollars..asked for refill of Arnold palmer ice tea..they said no refills..after 47 dollar lunch??? not good service...hope then don't got belly up for a dollar ice tea..
Super gross inside. Not a clean place. Roast beef was plentiful but it had a lot of gristle. Cheeseburger poboy sucked. None of the tables were wiped down. Looked like it had never been swept.

I had the fish tacos - very good. My husband had the enchiladas - also very good. Very small menu but based on what we had, we would consider going again. Chips and salsa were extra. Disappointed that we weren't given at least small bowl of chips and salsa.

Tried the brown sugar boba milk tea. Boba was overcooked, 2 stars. Brown sugar milk tea was okay, 3 stars. Store front is simple and clean, 4 stars. Might consider going back and giving it a second try.... try a different drink... maybe they just had a bad day with boba.
Food was just OK. Place was a little run down and didn't seem to be very clean. Doors were open to the kitchen and looked a little suspect.

Really nice looking place, really big. The beer selection was huge. The food selection was eclectic. And our server was a nice guy. Outside of that the entire experience was just OK. We had a gift card that we finally got to use, so can't really complain about a free meal.

HORRIBLE!!!! HORRIBLE!!! I never being treated so Disrespectful for being a woman, by the owner of a business. He even told me that he didn't wanted my business after I complained. ""If you are a woman that wants to get respect, never go there
Nothing special here. I cook a better brussel sprouts! Steak was ok. Caesar salad was ok.
Ian is very professional and clearly a great manager!!! He is a very trustworthy and honest guy!
Now it's going to my third week without a water filter in my freezer and fridge and Colleen says you want me to mark it down I said no I want it installed

Beignets. It's literally just fluffy goodness, I'm not sure how else to describe it! The downside to this is that it seems to always be busy, so finding a seat may take a while. Bring cash, it's much easier to pay because they literally tell you how much you owe as soon as they bring in your order.

Spent $100 there yesterday to be treated horribly by VERY rude, unprofessional staff. Their employee who goes by the name Winter has an attitude that will destroy this kind of small business in no time. Don't waste your time or money!

Worse customer service!!! Very rude!!! Went there to buy halal chicken for our guest. It was my first time to buy halal chicken. I was really confuse. I asked seller some questions , then he seem really pissed and annoyed, didn't wanted to answer anything .. Always busy on phone n rude!! No sense of customer service.
Music was loud and when i said it was so. Manager got offended. Will not be going there anymore.

I used to love going to Santos...until they changed ownership not too long ago. Management is erratic, refusing to serve people they don't like, closing at irregular times, and allowing people to drink too much. The food has decreased in quality as well. It is just not a pleasant place to go anymore.

With due respect to the other reviewers, Digorno makes a much better pizza. The server couldn't figure out what beer they served. And as it got dark out they didn't turn the lights on. Okay, the staff was genuinely friendly. But don't go expecting a good fresh pizza.

Great place if you like rotten tomatoes, shrimp that hasn't been deveined, low quality over-priced deli sandwiches, and don't look at your food before you eat it. At least the French bread was edible.

I love DD coffee. This place was small, but the staff were very nice and everything came out quickly. One thing - the guy taking the orders had a cold and didn't properly sanitize before going to prep supplies for sandwiches... We had coffee which another guy made, but I'd be leery of their sandwiches for a few days...
I had questions about service explanations but could not get a call back or even an email from service agents. How about this: hire more service agents!!!

Nicest staff. Weird decor/atmosphere tho. And the food was forgettable at best. I had wings that were dry and had a bbq sauce that was good but they'd be way better if rolled in it instead of on the side. My boyfriend's salmon was so plain. Won't go back.

I went here for a weekday lunch for a work function. The buffet wasn't very appetizing IMO, but the service was good and everyone was friendly. The orange chicken and rice was good. That's about all I ate.

I was looking for a Christmas present so I made sure to test every section of the store to find the best gift. The security guard followed me the whole time and was staring at me like I was about to steal. It was sooo annoying to be trying on makeup and having a man stare you down.
No excuse to have this many people in line when the store isn't busy. Something is wrong with their management. It's pitiful!
The service at this restaurant was excellent, but the food was horrible...I feel sorry for the non native customers who don't know how the real Ethiopian food should test like.

If I could give this place 10 stars I would!!! The only place I get my nails done. I go to Viet and he is the absolute best, always down to work with me to do whatever I want! Love love love him! Good prices and a family business. They give student discount and serve beverages (wine too) :)

Been only once, got chicken Lo Mein with a wonton soup and it was yummy. I find it hard to find good Chinese food restaurants, there are so many but a really good one is hard to find. I think I found my favorite. Planning on making it Chinese food night at least once a week. I can't wait to go try something else.

My mission in life is to eat in as many diners as I can... Well, this one is on the top of my list... I have had both breakfast and lunch and both meals were great... I have already started recommending Joe's to my friends...
It was acute salon. I felt like the boys fades could have been a little better. The hair dresser was super nice through!

Avo is a memorable restaurant: unique flavors, hipster ambiance, and an upset stomach to keep me thinking of my brunch for the rest of the day. Something about the raw/uncooked food concept is not meant for the modern digestive system. My cousin has dined here twice and I have once... and only once. Cramps and stomach bubbles for hours. Thanks, but no thanks.
My only complaint is that I didn't buy 2 brisket and cheddar subs. It's the best sandwich shop around. I'm always sad when my sandwich is over. Great service and can get in and out quickly.

Booooo. I came here w. unrealistic expectations - the food was too expensive and not tasty. I'm not hard to please when it comes to Chinese food especially Americanized Chinese food. I ordered the Crispy Beef and it was soggy! I don't know what happened here, but there are plenty of other decent Chinese restaurants in the area.

Short and sweet: you Outback fans don't have to run off to LA or the Bay Area for your fix... This place is located in the strip mall, so don't go looking for the the stand-alone building. I like the bread, salad and Victoria center cut fillet. My biggest recommendation: you have to get a Chocolate Thunder from Down Under"!
I've had the cheeseburger, wings and fries. Never been disappointed. Staff is very friendly and accommodating.

Service was very slow. Very inattentive server - we waited a long time to order and to get water refills. The food was good, but not great. The roasted beets were one note, and could have used some feta or some other complementary flavor. The scallops needed more of a sear, though the flavors were good.
Their lemongrass tofu was awesome! Would have given them 5 stars if it wasn't so spicy but that is relative.

Stopped here for breakfast. It had been almost 30 years since I was last at a Perkins. Pretty similar to what I remembered. My only disappointment was that they didn't have scrapple on the menu like they did at the Perkins I used to go to all the time in Pennsylvania.

Quaint. A bit pricey... Just Dreyers Ice Cream - none local. Daughter had caramel apple - caramel was bland as could be. The staff was barely interested in serving us - they were too busy paying attention to eachother. Just okay.
Had a cold beer...clean bar. Staff works hard to keep it clean. Good crowd throughout the restaurant. managemnet was noticable. very professional location...

Ordered a half dozen bagels and only got 5 bagels. Most of us assume the orders are correct so we drive off. I only counted 5 bagels. I called to speak to a manager and was told no one could speak to me because they were busy. Another thing I found a piece of lint on another bagel. Terrible.
Nice friendly people. Clean and well stocked. Close to major stuff on City Ave, and near 76. Very large outdoor cafe area.

Ordered for the first time using UBEReats. I was skeptical at first because it was new to me, but I knew it would not disappoint after reading the yelp reviews. I ordered the cheese bread and potato skins, two of my favorite appetizers, and they were delicious! I will give the pizza a try next time.
Best healthy on the go food spot I've been to so far in this city! Seriously so fresh!

We had a reservation for 7pm. At 815 we were still sitting at our table waiting for our food. Our waitress never came and updated us as to why it was taking so long. I'm guessing she forgot to put our order in or forgot about our table completely. We walked out without ever getting our food. Ridiculous.

Curt's Killer Fry Melt with beef brisket is out of this world good! ($8) Pretzel rolls are yummy. I got a really good Italian Surfer. We had great service too. Dog Friendly!! I thought it was a bit pricey. $9 for a sandwich, but they did have a good happy hour.

Just walked in, had a reservation waited to be to be greeted. A party that walked in after me was greeted and seated before me. No matter how good the food is...feeling invisible leaves a bad taste in your mouth!
Came in to have them "fix" a pedicure another salon messed up and she did a good job. Prices are good. If I was staying longer I would've had my,nails done also.
As far as coal fired pizza, this is definitely up there. Pizza was delicious, with good crust. Came out fast and had a good flavor. Drinks were well priced as well. Will be coming back here again.

Food and service are consistent and pleasant. Although, it seems to always smell like a dumpster inside. Especially by the bar area. We tried to go this evening and it was so bad that we had to leave.

Taco tuesdays this is the place to go. The pull pork tacos are amazing. I could eat 10 of them. Its not a fancy diner but a quick meal that is really good. the pulled pork casseda is good as well. Well pretty much anything with the pulled pork is good. Staff is up beat and friendly.
A violation of hippa is no laughing matter, staff retaliated and revealed reason for visit, choose wisely
Always a great experience every time I come here! I go to Annie for my dip powder nails and I am always satisfied. I go to any of the girls for pedicure they all do a great job! Highly recommend!
Delicious! Vegan options for lunch, dinner and dessert! I have heard great things about it for a while and finally came. Scrumptious latin american vegan dishes available along with meat options.
Staff is very friendly Live music on point The cowboy burger is tasty Very timely Well dressed staff Overall pretty great!

The staff is often very rude. For example, I tasted some ice cream that tasted bad after I had paid and they refused to give a refund in a very unprofessional way. Combined with being unhealthy and overpriced, I will never go here again.

I have been to various nail salons in SB and have yet to find anyone as good as Long at Modern Nails!! From length of time he spends with you to awesome massage, and his work lasts a super long time!! Thank you!!
Old tasting, over cooked, and very dry crispy wings. I really love KFC, and have been looking forward to this meal all day. So disappointed!!! I won't come back to this location - NOT EVER AGAIN!
Sweet place. Very small sushi bar and intimate. Happy hour sushi specials are great prices. Sushi was good, not great. It was ok.
Honestly disappointed. The meat was very dry and crispy. Quality control needs to be managed

This company has been known to take advantage of people, especially the elderly. In two years since having a new A/C unit installed (cost $6500) my grandmother has been charged $9140 on maintenance. This is a new unit that has exceeded the actual price of the unit in maintenance fees. Don't trust them! Many complaints on Better Business Bureau regarding the same thing
Good food, service good, just a little noisy when full , but all in all clean ,I will go back with my friends

In response to the general manager Chris from Courtesy Hundai... There is no need for me to contact you because my son purchased a brand new 2015 Kia Forte with an excellent warranty. So everything worked out for him. Funny enough..we went right down the street from your dealership to Century Kia and they got my son in his car without any nonsense.

If you're in the neighborhood and are hungry, I guess it's o.k. Not very flavorful, really. They don't even carry any quality beverages. I would have been much happier grabbing a slice at Rustica or Pizza Brain.
Loved both the wonderful breakfasts and lunches I had at this lovely place. The servers ere very friendly and accommodating!!! Looking forward to going back soon!!
If you have the chance, eat here! Food is fresh and so tasty. Amazing service. I have never done a review on yelp before. May not again but loved this place so much I felt compelled to share.
Great service! Found my contacts cheaper here than other retailers. Fast delivery. I will be ordering more. Thank you.

Neat place. Service was excellent , fried chicken skillet excellent , great mashed potatoes & green beans. Great beans were a touch under cooked, & just read from other reviews that they usually cook them that way, mgmt: just a couple minutes longer cooking please, but flaver is on point!! BBQ pulled pork great too. I'll be back!

Service was excellent without being intrusive. I had the Gnocchi appetizer, done perfectly with a Parmesan cream sauce and pesto. The main was scallops with the fried cheddar grits over blanched baby green beans. I highly recommend it!

I'm from NJ originally. Never been able to find good HOAGIES in Tucson. It's been one disappointment after another for 20 years. This is as close as it's ever gotten which isn't saying much frankly. Still, I'll go back. Life is full of compromises. Was a long line when I got there and the staff did a great,timely job working through it.
Avoid. It's sodium-flavored pig slop. It'll fill you up and taste okay, but you could do so much better. Try Yen Ching on Brentwood or Steak & Rice on Manchester.

Went here really late for drinks and desert. I'd love to check it out for lunch or happy hour too. It think this is my favorite of the commander's palace restaurants. It's more modern and urban with a really good drink menu.
I would like to say our waitress was wonderful. Other than that, I was not impressed. White sauce pasta was not good. The pizza was fair at best. I will not be back.

This place came highly recommended so ewe were excited to try it. However neither my husband or I were impressed with the food, especially for the price we paid. Overall it was mediocre and we will not be going back.

First impression was not good when the menu pages were falling apart. Food was decent, serving portion great for the price, place needs in depth cleaning, owners need to invest in fixing or replacing wobbly tables and chairs (rehab/reno please).

Not sure why the wait was so long when there were many tables open. Watched a few tables sat empty for 1/2 hour and the ironically we were sat at THAT table. IN regards to the food crab cake was loaded with crab, some of the other items were just to spicy. Don't think I will return. Also way too loud
