On a random Friday we waited almost a hour for our food around 11am. They don't have many tables that can seat more than 4 people so we also waited for a table. Waitress was good. Cash only. Seemed like the kitchen just shut down. Food good. Not many other options nearby.
Loved the loaded potato soup and ham and cheese panini. We also had the cinnamon crumb cake which had the best topping . I would recommend this great little cafe.

Regrettably my first time here was a disappointment. Expectations were admittedly high. It was loud, the bar staff seemed more interested in each other and certain guests. Drink was good tho. Prob will not return.

This was my first slice on this Tampa trip, and it was terrific with quality supple cheese, great crust, and good all around flavor. It was hands down the best of the 3 slices I tried in the afternoon, and a great choice for any NY pizza lover.

An Applebee's is an Applebee's is an Applebee's. But it's hard to find a non-chainbplace to eat at this time of night. Their appetizer special after nine puts every appetizer at $4.59 (used to be $3.99) and the shredded pork wonton tacos and the chicken quesadillas are both really good. Their 3 mini burgers with fries are really good on their roll-like buns

So don't get the lasagna, it's a ripoff, like comparing a McDonald's menu photo to what you get, except it's $14.95.... service was good, value not so much... the single lasagna is the same portion they show on the classic tour photo with chicken parm and fettuccine Alfredo for $4 more...

My original post was a negative review about bar etiquette but Zach, and Director of venue entertainment, impressed me by handling the situation quickly and taking action. This restored my confidence in Noto and made me feel my complaint was recognized and remedied professionally. I loved the scene and I will be back. Thanks Noto & Zach.
Very pricey and small portions... this is a joke. Warning for those ordering 'grilled avocado tar tar', you get half of a small avocado and maybe a tablespoon of fish... for $12!

If I could give a zero I would. Gave the guy thousands of dollars only to realize he is a scammer. Quoted my son $1800 for a repair that another mechanic charged $150. He is the quintessential crooked mechanic.

FYI, this company tried to get me to pay 250 dollars cash to pick a lock. When I said no, they took 100 bucks on a card. Extortion. I've used a lockout service many times, 250 to pick a lock is highway robbery.
Great hair cut for the price! I had a very nice lady. I paid extra to get my hair washed after the cut. They give you a hot towel wrap on your face while they wash your hair.

Service was pretty good - dropped off a bunch of clothes and got them all back in one piece. Wish they wouldn't package the dress shirts in bunches of 4 though (causes wrinkles to appear even after being pressed).

Wow, very greasy and tasteless burger piled with industrial seasonings. Very salty as well, in essence it's just another greasy spoon cheeseburger joint. Possibly worse than McDonald's. I cannot recommend this place at all. The interior is less appealing than the McDonald's down the road. Go somewhere else.

I had Gulf Fish. It was unnecessarily breaded and finished with a sweet something that ruined it. The room is elegant and there was live music which was very good. Service was very good. But food has room for improvement.
Let me start by saying the food isn't bad but not good enough to make me come back with such horrible service. The owner is a complete a-hole who runs that place like a sweat shop.
It looked and tasted like third world food. I do not think I will eat there again. -----------------
Food was great. I had the duck which was cooked to perfection and had a tasty sauce with it. Others in my party had the baked Drum and the steak. Everything was exceptional. Service was top notch.
I used to eat here when visiting a friend in the neighborhood. I've now moved to the here and it's my go to. It's just as delicious as it's always been. Keep up the great work!
Good, good, good! And the staff is friendly too. We ate there a month ago....so i don't remember what i ordered. Jambalaya i think.... i remember enjoying my meal though!!!
First time coming and the check in process was super fast! I was there for a standard blood work check up and was in and out in about 15 mins. Super nice and sweet ladies there.
Not the best for the price. Service is adequate but a little slow not a top spot. Food is however very good if you like to enjoy your coffee and a paper before breafast

Pretty cool space: Great bar and great patio area. Great prices on beers during Blues and Cardinals games. Bartenders are cool and don't dress too slutty which is a bonus in that you don't have gross dudes hitting on them constantly and therefor I get my drinks much more faster and much more comfortably.

Love it here! They give you enough food for your money and it's good, the vegetables are steamed/ cooked perfectly and they aren't super hard.. also the shrimp are peeled and cleaned unlike other places hands down a good spot to get food

Worst place to go for facials! Have one or maybe two people working in the entire place who rush through the job! And have no Customer service! They do terrible jobs for facials and my friend said they did a terrible job on her hair not even what she was looking for. Will never go back there

Don't order ANYTHING with chicken. It tasted rubbery and weird. It also took an hour and a half to deliver when it was supposed to be 45 minutes. Checked the food and they forgot the egg roll. The people were friendly but I would give it a pass.

This is honestly the best sushi place I have been to since I moved to Alberta and I've tried a lot. Highly the joe special rolls Only reason for a 4 star and not a 5 is because it can be bit pricey but if you don't mind spending 15 dollars for a really good roll then I suggest you try it.
Cute lil place a lil outdated but if you have small children it will entertain them .music and little toys for them.

Horrible service. My water was never refilled and waitress only came to take our order then checks. We had to ask to order and ask for our checks. The food took 40 minutes to come out and it was not very crowded. Food is the same as every Buffalo Wild Wings, but service is absolutely horrible.
Airport version ridiculous. Very limited menu. A burrito that is just meat in a wrap! And for $16
Great spot for a drink and a listen to live music through their closed circuit tvs. Great bar staff
Ordered their chicken fajita and fish chips. Chicken was really good, fish and chips not so much. Portions sizes were too little, for the price I would expect a little more. Drinks were alright.
Bourbon Cowboy is cool only because of the mechanical bull. Other than that, it is a typical tourist-trap Bourbon Street bar with high prices. Plus it's very small.

I was honestly not impressed by this place, especially being a Triple D joint. I got the burger with Gouda and cheddar mashed potatoes. Very sub par. The burger wasn't exciting. The mashed potatoes were very average. So dry. The drinks were pretty average also.

I was craving ramen and I decided to try the drive thru as I wasn't keen on indoor dining yet. I got the soft crab buns and ramen to go! Both were delicious and the noodles were a great texture! As for the drive thru - it does take about 20ish minutes but worth the wait IMO!
Beautiful restaurant, very good service, excellent food. Salt Rock is one of the more consistent restaurants in Pinellas County.

Walked in & someone greeted me right away w/ a smile. Explained what I needed & she walked me over & assisted me through my entire transaction. Easy in & out experience! Yay! Place was clean & tighty, employees I encountered were all pleasant. Nice uniform store.

They suck! They take forever to get paperwork done. They wouldn't let me choose the vehicle I wanted; instead they got me into a vehicle that is way over priced. On top of that they don't provide free service for their customers. I am really disappointed in them. I got a great vehicle but this dealership suck!

I think we made a mistake coming here and ordering entrees. The food was sub par at best. Would have apparently been better ordering bar food and sandwiches. The decor is awful. The service was slow but nice. We will give it another try since it is walking distance from home.

The owner and people who work there are nice and it's been renovated inside. I got a pedicure today and my ankle was rubbed raw, see picture. I didn't realize actually broke the skin until I was walking out. I didn't say anything cuz what could they have done?? I won't go there again.
Horrible! Shady all the way around! Tons of underage kids. Not worth the risk. Can't trust the staff or management. Save a life and don't go! Doesn't deserve any stars but I didn't have that option.
Always a Long wait. Doesn't matter what time you go. Will definitely go to one branch on Vista off freeway. Only 2 tellers here as usual.
I woke up this morning and had 25 different charges on my credit card for $335 total. I did not even park at a Premier Parking yesterday
The best pizza in Tucson. The pizza Bianca is to die for and the caprese salad is amazing!
The food is great, but if you have plans to do anything else that night, I would pass. The service is SUPER SLOW
Peg's was a great place when it had a New York flavor. Now it's just a generic coffee shop. Sure miss the New York sandwiches.

This place was nice. Equipment is showing wear and tears. Also, do not be tricked into signing up for a personal trainer. The contracts are not consumer friendly and the staff are unwilling to do anything. I'm very disappointed.
The place isn't too bad. You can chill, take advantage of some of their beer specials. Snack with some nachos and guacamole, be surrounded with great company, and you can't complain.

This is a great Nashville experience- highly recommend to start your evening here. Just don't sit too close to the stage as conversation will be hard... as it is in most live music venues. Service has always been great- food is a 4/5- usually good but not the best I've ever had.
It was good food. Service could have been better. Loved their caramelized pears salad.

Very nice hostel. It's only a couple of months old O believe so everything is quite new. The owners are very nice and helpful. The rooms are clean and there are private bathrooms. It's located next to a bus stop and 10 min from the streetcar station. Definitely recommend this place!
They really stepped their game up. I usually do curbside pickup. Everything is great. When there was a mess up the manager made it right quickly.
Tasty food, great burgers and fish and chips. Even on busy nights service usually keeps up. Expect long waits on weekends, but it's worth it. Fun atmosphere and family friendly.

Well. I should say maybe this place is amazing but the girl working the counter acting like we were a problem. This place provides the baked goods for French truck and French truck provides the coffee (they don't carry the same almond milk). Anyway-head to French truck for service with a better attitude to get the goods. Food options did look good though.

Seated at side tables on pseudo couch, not comfy at all. Food was average at best, seared tuna was not great and I have had much better. Mac and cheese was awful since it was bland as can be and not much cheese. Mixed drinks were not great and way overpriced. Waitress that we had was snotty. Overall there is 0.0 chance I'd return.

2nd time here on Saturday at 6. Reservations were for 615 seated at 7 PM. Hostess said 20 minute wait, significantly underestimated. Same thing happened first time around. Understaffed. Squeeze you in at each table.12 people at each table only room for nine. Not enough room for dishes and drinks. Food is good but everything else below acceptable.

Haven't gone back to try the food yet, bit i did receive a refund from management and supposedly have a credit at the restaurant for use for my last lunch experience so that is a plus. I'll update on the food soon.
Great interior decor with absolutely horrible service and quite pricey for what you get. It takes forever to get food.
Just stopped in for Pizza, which was ok. I'd try it again, but I like a little more crust.
Food is great service and friendliness needs improvement Greeting customers Thanking for coming Smile
Amazing creations. Great variety. Beignets are better than New Orleans. Make yourslef Vietnamese soup was a great idea. Service was excellent

I won't be back; food mediocre at best; burger was bland, fries were room temperature and unseasoned. Affordable prices, service was unremarkable; environment was typical cheap bar, clean. Poor temperature control compared to outside.

The chicken noodle soup cannot be beat!and not just in the winter! Good like gramma used to make. The fish sandwich is good quality and not greasy. It's a fave!
Good steaks good salad specials are good service is usually good a little on the small side and somewhat pricey with not much atmosphere

I've driven by a million times, stopped in and I'll be back. The staff is friendly and the food was good! I had just the eggs and bacon, but the cafe spread looked awesome! $4.99 for a lunch sandwich with a bottle of water....can't beat that. Don't let the neighborhood stop you....go in and check out the wide variety of hispanic food!
The Shrimp pad Thai was tasty, but the tails were still on the shrimp, which made it messy and awkward to eat.

One of the best bra shops in the country!! Not only are the staff cheerful and very helpful, Jay Ann also has a huge selection of undergarments to choose from! I highly recommend to anyone looking for a bespoke fitting experience.

They disappeared with my daughter's wedding deposit and other people too, they don't return my calls, they closed the business and now they hide like rats. I saw the owners hiding behind the windows with the lights off. it is a shame. they park their cars behind the bushes, so people don't see them.
Staff is friendly and attentive. The bathroom was really dirty with sticky floors and it was only 3:30 p.m. The food was good, but the role was a hotdog bun, so that wasn't impressive.

The drunken noodles were decent. They weren't spicy at all but it at least had some flavor. The penang curry on the other hand is a different story. Probably the worst curry I've ever had. It was very bland with absolutely no flavor. All I could really taste was the coconut milk.

Not very good...in a city full of great Mexican options, save your time and go elsewhere....the other clientele are on the rough side, even in the new location. I have had the mole enchiladas twice, leaving much to be desired. I do like the the beans are vegetarian. Oh, and the salsa is bad...how can you have bad salsa?!?!?
Got the alligator bites, gumbo, and oyster beignets. While the customer service was good, the food was nothing to rave about.

Mediocre quality and questionable ethics. Slapdash approach as to what constitutes a side dish depending on who's running the register. Even then, the cooks decide what they will or won't make. The menu is meaningless, with mysteriously changing prices - again, depending who's running the register. Used to be a decent place. Now, not so much.

Really love this place! I've recommended it multiple times... but I'm writing this review to thank them for getting my referral in within one day for an emergency cracked tooth pain... (bc we all know how painful those can be) thank you west side dental!

Nice location with big open windows. But my Caesar salad was drown in dressing so much I could only eat half of it. My husband had the pot roast poor boy. A little dry and nothing to write home about. His hurricane was sickening sweet. The service was good but I wish we would have skipped this place.

The food was ok...fried flounder had no seasoning no flavor and the fish didn't taste fresh. The mac and cheese isn't good. The broccoli was good had way more flavor than the fish. The sautéed shrimp was good...I wish I just got the shrimp with a side of broccoli. Long wait my food took almost 45 mins. I doubt I eat there again.
Unfortunately this place their quality. They used to be one the best British pub I've ever been until now, they changed the menu from a 5 stars to -1. Disappointed
We enjoyed a lunch there today. Food was excellent, service quick and the portions quite large. Bring your appetite. So happy to find fine Greek food just around the corner.

Came here while visiting New Orleans & had the roast beef po boy and this blue really yummy drink that I cannot for the life of me remember the name of but the sandwich was great, very filling, perfectly dressed with the fried onions and everything. The blue drink was recommended and amazing. Definitely a great stop!
Spoilt tomatoes and rice was probably cooked a week ago. Tasted like wallpaper......an embarrassment to Persian cuisine.

This establishment has a long history of selling outdated seafood both in their market and in the restaurant. They flat don't care if you get food poisoning or not. This place has the reputation of being incorrigible.
Great place for fish and chips and Lenten dinner. Not sure it feels like sacrifice though
Ordered thru Uber eats...COLD and LATE!!!! Very disappointed:( great pizza but needs to be hot and on time!!!
It took 5 people to tell me they were booked... This place sucks... The service is terrible.......

What a complete JOKE!! I have never in my life seen such unprofessional behavior!! A bunch of 20 year old idiot's on a power trip over thinking they're above you, because you are need of work. There generation at it's best! PLEASE DON'T WASTE YOUR TIME! Even on the phone interview. The entire process is ridiculous!!
Dark, dingy, and RUDE staff that come off like they are doing you a favor talking to you. With so many other good choices in the Village you should walk on by this hole.

Service was very nice. My wife's order was messed up and they corrected the problem. The portions are good the food quality is good. The negatives are how long it takes to get a burger, and the prices. For a burger you have to add cheese, fries, and drink at an extra cost. When your done this simple meal is now over $10.
Bonefish is the best. VERY Tasty food...wonderful staff. Open late. Free easy parking. Convenient to both Pinellas an Hillsborough counties. SEVERAL specials.

My father was buried 11.5 months ago and still no gravestone. The sunken areas that we asked to be fixed months ago remain in poor condition. It was very sad visiting my dad yesterday to see the grave in such poor condition.
Service used to be great! Took clothes here for 10+ years. New owners have increased pricing and quality has gone way down. Time to find a new place.
Second and third time ordering were not as good! Tonight was actually terrible!!! There was no flavor to any of it! We will not be ordering from this location anymore!

Terrible freaking service, over priced and freaking gross appetizers . Too over priced, would not come back for any reason whatsoever. The bathroom was dirty. The guy with the comb over was rude and didn't serve my party correctly. Really took a damper on my engagement weekend

This place was once an almost daily stop for me. The service has gone from neighborly, friendly & helpful to rude & dismissive. Still I try to support the neighborhood, but I just got in my car to discover my latte was barely luke warm. Hope the ownership takes notice quickly.

Maybe I went on the wrong afternoon! The young ladies had okay attitudes. The gentleman was HORRIBLE! Not accommodating at all to his customer,(me). Food . Rice & beans,(where's the beans)! Fried pork chops wound up being (1&1/2) dried up, un-floured chops!
Wow they have really raised the prices! And the service today was not good. It's no longer a good value for money.

Good food but the portion is small, was going to give 5 star if the portion is bigger and if the bathroom wasnt so unfriendly (if the portion is bigger I would overlook the bathroom condition). The noodle soup I had was a bit lacking in contents and the potstickers were small. Other than that I did enjoy the food.

Oxtails were sweet.. not what I'm used to. The Patty's were good however I also had curry chicken and was not impressed at all. I would only come back to get a patty. Still in search of a good Jamaican restaurant in Tampa.
Literally the worst place I've ever been. Took over an hour to get my cold food. Don't come.

This has to be the slowest most unprofessional chipotle in town. From the girl going to talk to other girls on their break instead of working the register while the line is outside the door to the one girl working the line touching food and the cash register without changing gloves. Super unsanitary and very ratchet. Go to a different location!

We were hesitant about trying this place after seeing previous reviews. We ended up having a great dinner! Service was great. We ordered several specialty sushi rolls which were good quality and delish. Got Bao buns, and the skewers. The skewers I probably wouldn't order again due to being a bit overcooked. Overall, would return here. Great variety of food and tasty!

A delicious, cozy BYOB - and the duck salad is to die for. My major gripe is that they don't deliver into Kensington, whereas many of the other restaurants in the area do. if they did, I'd be ordering from them every day!

Waited for ten minutes and not one waitress helped us.... Not much else I can say, we left! It was a Sunday and four waitresses working, not even a hello! This use to be our favourite OJ's, what happened?????

Rooms are big. Hottub and grounds good. Love the small golf greens. Problem :ANTS. got into everything. Room size was good. Location close to ucsb. Good news. Marriott did refund half the room charge.
Work here if you want to be treated like trash and have a owner who doesn't GAF about his employees. He's racist and behind the bar is filthy.

I dumped it in the trash. #disgusted #fakeassbbq I swear it tasted frozen and microwaved, to me at least. Insult to BBQ everywhere and I will NEVER go back. Feel like I was punked and ripped off. I don't get these reviews as everything was just horrid and devoid of flavor. #kitchennightmaresplease.

I didn't even get to stay there and I never will. Personal injuries suffered today prevented us from a planned trip to Tucson. Cancelling the reservation resulted in a 100% late cancellation penalty - period. No offer to do anything at all about it. They get paid whether we use the room or not and could care less how we feel about it.

Went here twice for weekday lunch buffet. Very spicy compared to other Indian places in the area, which we like. Excellent service, very good food, nice selection. Weekday lunch buffet only offered chicken as far as meat dish, but I understand that weekend buffet has seafood and other meats. Very crowded by 12:15 so go early or late.
Good and drinks were mediocre, but service was horrible...Will give the westbank location a try once they open....Never well I ever return to the Clearview location

There are many bad reviews for this pizza place but I had always had good service. I usually pick up and the pizza has always been just as I ordered. Today I used delivery for the first time. It was super fast and just as ordered. Give this place a chance!!

I ordered delivery which took about an hour and the food was cold when it got here (I was about 1 mile away). The Jambalaya was alright but pretty dry and bland. I also ordered the side salad which was just watery iceberg lettuce and did not have cherry tomatoes or croutons as the menu stated. I definitely would not eat here again.

Really good apps here, never tried the entrees, we liked sharing the beet salad, ceviche, and skewers. Plenty of food for two and reasonably priced. Some good local craft beer options in the bar area, place was fairly crowded on a Saturday night, service was friendly, fun area on Washington Street
If there were a zero I would have picked that. This is the worst taxi service in Philadelphia. It is also the only taxi service in the city. Try Uber.

My family has been eating at Shapiros for years. They have the juiciest corned beef in the city. It melts in your mouth. I am a true believer in the adage of "You get what you pay for!" and Shapiros does a great job of serving quality food.
This is a typical Starbucks but getting in and out of the parking lot is totally SNAFU. Yikes.

Attended the Grand Opening this evening. The ambiance was welcoming and the customer service was exceptional. We ordered the Carne Asada tacos and street corn (highly recommended). I would come back again!
Food is decent if they decide to deliver it. Pizza Hut in this area seems to be way more commited to making their customers happy.
Such a rip off. Tried to charge 100$ for a synthetic oil change and make up problems your car doesn't have.

Popeyes originated in Louisiana... and when in Louisiana, you have to get some Popeyes! This location is conveniently located on Canal Street which is amazing because drunchies. Their 2-3 piece meals are enough to feed 1 person. They move really fast too and there's an area where you can grab condiments and to-go bags.
Place is great.Just Andrea seems confused at best when doing cashier work.
Came out to look at house and never called back with estimate.
The review is based on the business hour. I came here and it was closed, even though it was not a holiday.

It seems Everytime I go here ..drive thru they literally ask me what I wanted like 3 times I say what I want. Then they keep asking and asking It seems like it's the same girl I was just there 450 today So whoever on the drive thru It's not fair to keep saying things multiple times over and over

My fries were stale :( I ordered boneless chicken wings - hot chipotle bbq- which reminded me of a lesser version of the Chili's honey chipotle chicken crispers. On the good side, good service and atmosphere. Fried pickles were also on point.

This is the best pizza in Tampa! Not only is the pizza super delicious no matter which pizza you pick but the service is great too! They are always nice, friendly and helpful. I highly recommend NYNYPIZZA!!

delicious but wildly overpriced. the food took 45 minutes to arrive. the interior is beautifully designed but the ambiance was ruined by the 14 unnecessary tv's basting advertisements. the folks at table next to us (who were sat after us) were looking at their bill by the time our food arrived.

A very pleasant experience, quiet and professional. I seldom get a pedicure so I don't have a lot to compare them to, from what I experienced- it's was very nice, reasonably priced, and plenty of fresh air- I'm not a fan of chemical/polish remover smell
Favorite thing on the menu is their amazing pork tacos and smother it with their orange sauce! They have amazing sauces! Love this place

We had planned a date night with dinner and a movie. Unfortunately, even though we had a reservation, we waited for 45 minutes. The wait staff was completely overwhelmed--- we know, because they repeatedly told us this fact. Our steaks were mediocre - warm but not hot and not a superior cut, something you would expect for the price.
Basic KFC fast food

Everything was great except the plastic wrap I found in my loaded baked potato. When I showed the waitress she got he another one but no apologies or anything! Very disappointed that nothing was offered or done.

Food is average service is good prices are high. Appetizer, burger, three beers $42 Plus tip! Hey Eagles fans, if you're going out to watch the Eagles game, Don't go to Almshouse because they will not put the game on for you!!!!!

Love, love their food....5. Service is great. I'm giving it a one star because the servers did not wear masks or gloves. They even used their fingers to sprinkle toppings on the food via the server window. No hand sanitizer available. All tables were available; no social distancing. I did question them. Yes, after Covid, we will return.
Over priced and my grilled gulf shrimp were rubbery

Never have I received such poor service. The lady working on my feet stopped after putting on the bottom coat to give a guy an eye brow wax. No excuse me. No apology. Just up and left me with the cotton between my toes without explanation. Then after taking care of him returned to finish painting my toes. What the hell???

Removed one star for poor service. their kabob, rice are great. but horrible service. servers are very rude until you are Russian. then the mood totally changes. agree with Natalie, Dimitry. blonde waitress has some issue. We have been there many times just for the FOOD and shut one eye for the service and enjoy the KABOB. kabob is better than other places.

Crummy store... they do NOT stand behind their sales... if anything doesn't work, needs to be returned or is flawed in any way... they tell you to get lost and call the manufacturer... that is LOUSY customer service! Prices are way too high as well... STINKO!

Great variety of tea but the hours are very limited and service is not fast. They were also out of several teas and a tea infuser that I wanted to buy. The atmosphere of the shop is good, but if you work a 9-5 you're going to have to buy a bunch when you can get here and brew from home.

Honestly I went in with higher expectations. Personally, if I could give 0 stars, I think that's what I would give. For starters, we ordered appetizers in which we did not receive. Secondly, our pasta came out cold. Our server, Megan, has good intentions but clearly serving is not for her. Will not be returning.

Overpriced, small bar, and their AC is shoddy. I was sweating the whole time. While their outdoor misters looked cool, there was already so much moisture in the air from the humidity I really didn't want to go near them and risk my perfectly coiffed hair * *j/k it looked terrible and i didn't want it to look worse.

I love blaze pizza but this location is not the best. I've been multiple times and every time the service is the slowest I've ever seen. I've also seen them burn pizzas and cheesy bread multiple times. It gets the job done but it's not great.
Worst service I've ever experienced. Turned in a prescription over a week ago and call them back to find out they have no record I ever came in and they are rude about it. Don't go here!!

I loved the pictures of dogs on the wall and really liked their fries. I came for the Good Dog Burger and wasn't disappointed: it had good flavor, a good bun and I especially liked that it wasn't very big. The selection of beers was good and so was the service.
We ordered Veg fried rice , but we ended up in getting the schezwan fried rice, and the rice for chk , lamb and the veg fried rice seems to be same, totally dissatisfied with the food
Overpriced beer. Chicken wings that taste like they came from the local high school. Best part is the local musicians probably singing for free.

Rude, poor service, went in to get a document bound & not only did they take twice as long as promised, they did it backwards the first time, then damaged the paper the second and refused to take responsibility. Do not use this branch

Go with a few cheese fondues, and then a dessert. The big night out and other main course meals are overpriced for what you get, are a pain in the ass to cook, and just not that good. Expensive, and you could do it at home cheaper, but if it's date night, it's romantic.

We got bagels here and they were disgusting. We have never had a more awful bagel. They were so dry they tasted like cardboard and just crumbled apart when you ate them. Frozen bagels are better. Maybe they had a bad batch but a good business would have thrown the batch away instead of serving them.
Really .50 cents for a kids refill!! Food is good but please don't nickel and dime your customers......
Excellent authentic Mexican food! Very affordable & verrrry tasty. We had the chorizo (with papas & egg) & menudo. We felt like we were back in Nana's kitchen (miss you Nana). Generous portions.

The cocktails were very good. Enjoyed the ambiance (could be a little less formal). The service was nonexistent - we waited a very long time to get our orders taken. I would come back but would rather serve myself.
Worst drive through especially weekends. Weekend staff is slooooow! They also don't make you on the go order until you show up which just defeats the purpose!
Organico is an alternative style establishments t offering healthy favorites, and your classic
If you want to walk a mile then wait an hour, then go here. There's no parking! The only places to park are the curbside to go. Five open spaces but you can't park there because it's curbside to go.
Used Jensen Movers in 2000 and were VERY disappointed. Many items were damaged, some items stolen, and a huge price bump from quote. They were not responsive to our needs. DON'T USE THEM!
Rude service, food was made wrong, and I thought soup was suppose to be hot not cold. I'm from out of state. California stores are nothing like this.

This location has been multiple business over the past 5 years or so. But this place will likely stick. Highly recommended to those with a more eclectic taste and enjoy fairly healthy options. Good value as well. Great atmosphere. For a local, this is go-to spot for sure.

Amazing food and drinks! I enjoyed the shrimp enchiladas and the passion fruit margarita i ordered with it was perfect. I'm always looking for new Mexican restaurants and this will definitely be a new favorite for me!

Not too impressed. I went to check it out because I wanted sushi and my friends wanted to play pool. Service was OK. The menu not very impressive. Nothing really caught my eye and the sushi left much to be desired and the prices are expensive.

8th street is pretty much the only full-service music store in the city. It's not the biggest, but you won't have to trek all the way out to a GC to get those last minute items a working musician might need either. They have a decent selection of working-man level instruments and amps, but not much in the way of pro-level boutique-y type stuff.
So ghetto. People jumping lines. Starting arguments and trying to instigate a fight over anything.
Good cheap wax. I am a peach card member and you can't beat the price. After my first wax hasn't hurt since.
Though the staff was nice enough, my gel manicure chipped after 8 hours. I've never had that happen before and I'm very disappointed.
Healthy low fat frozen yogurt with enough sugary toppings to give type II diabetes to a brontosaurus.
DELICIOUS! I will be brief because of previous detailed reviews but this place is just so scrumptious. We tried an assortment of cookies, cakes, and pastries! Try it! You will not regret it!

Recently just moved to tahoe and was dying to get my hair back to its normal blonde! After a lot of research I found this JEM of a salon in Reno ( worth the drive). The front desk girl is such a sweetie and my hair stylist Monique( Monica?) killed it! Would definitely recommend this salon to anyone, especially with tough blonde hair

It's a good place to stop for cheap, good food. It's far from a fancy restaurant but it defiant has a homey diner feel to it. Burgers are pretty thin but good. Fries are honestly never enough lol idk if it's because their thin or what. Catfish is pretty tasty. All in all a good lunch spot.
Don't get the cheeseburger. This formerly frozen, squished hockey puck like thing is nothing like what you'd expect in a good diner burger.

Would you like to get Covid? Come here! Are you someone who isn't "free" unless you're a selfish prick who doesn't wear a mask? Come here! Literally no mask enforcement. At all. I gave this gym a few tries but every time it's the same. A bunch of weak ass people who call themselves strong.

Not the worst experience I have ever had, definitely not the best either. I was in town last week for business, thought I should have some work done before the meeting, I went here out of necessity and geographic convenience. I should have shopped around, I definitely could have done better. Again, not terrible, but far from amazing.
HORRIBLE service!!!! Couldn't get seated, couldn't get waited on and manager was condescending.
My husband and I were visiting Philadelphia from California. We really enjoyed the overall experience of the tour. It is worth a try.
Great place to come in you just need a quick lunch. I saw many people in and out they provide fast service which is always a plus. Pizza is good not great but good.

Immediately put me on hold and then left me there for 14 minutes. I hung up and called back but their phone was still off the hook from forgetting about me. After 27 minutes I got through again and was met with "Oh so sorry, what you want to order"

Another chain restaurant to throw on the pile.... Overpriced, oversized, and overly unimaginative. If you are hankering for beer, probably a Solid choice. As for the food, meh. Especially unfriendly in the realm of healthy choices.

Read several reviews both positive and negative. First impression was at the door. Not made to feel welcome. I love duck and thought I would try the poboy. Menu says its dressed with a creamy dill slaw. What I was served was a dry, tasteless, skimpy portioned piece of French bread. To many great places to eat in NOLA to waste your time here.

Hotel is great. Quiet on level 2. Large 2 room near the elevator had no sound issues. Only issue i has was with the bar which charged $10 for a draft beer. Also, it was more than $20 for a beer and a shot of Jameson. More than airport prices. Go across the road and get decent costs.

I don't know why this place even accepts online orders. if it's never gonna be ready when you get there, why bother? This is the 3D time I've been here's and my food isn't even being cooked yet. Just pushed in line when I thought I was going to be ready
Quick and easy repair of my daughters phone! Painless. Great service and explanation of all of my repair options.
Stopped in on a recommendation while in the vicinity for dinner. Service was great but food was so so. Outside dining available.
Please reconsider giving your business to an establishment that expects their employees to commit unemployment fraud for FREE. And when they don't, they get cursed out by the manager.

Stopped here with a friend for breakfast - pretty darn good. But of an off color crowd and area is not pristine but the food was good - old style place and priced right. Want some good breakfast that is no frills - this is your place. Well done Muffins!
I've stopped in the drive through three times in the last month and was told they could not take any orders. Understaffed or whatever, don't waste your time stopping by.

I love their sweet yum potato fries and the atmosphere the place offers. I find their foods a bit heavy but certainly tasty. The place isn't very big and is always crowded, so I recommend that you make a reservation if you can.

The Hostesses were nice. Our waiter was okay. Now for food and drink, It's a Hard No for this Native California girl. The Enchiladas Verde were tasteless the rice and beans probably came out of some "off brand" can goods. The Especiale Maguerita was very weak. Very disappointed and will not go back. Do not recommend!
If I had another choice, I would definitely not use Cox. The service is terrible and they nickel and dime their customers. It's a shame that there are no other choices.
Service was great! Pizza was bland and boring. Great prices. Maybe it was off night.

I had 4 tacos (3 carne asada and 1 barbacoa) Phenomenal taqueria, amazing food, excellent service and felt great eating at a local family establishment! Go try it out, it won't disappoint for local authentic Mexican food!
Excellent Diner....I would stop here anytime. The food was incredible... The scramble bowl oh yeah !!!

Great pizza and still one of my favorite places to eat, but there is some false advertisement. I got coupons several times for the university newspaper and they usually work. However, me and my friend were unable to use the bogo even thought it did not expire yet (6/8/16). Why make coupons if they aren't going to be honored?

Great selection of beers and knowledgeable staff. If you're looking for something, they most likely have it. If not, just ask and they may be able to get it. Brandon desperately needed a place like this!

This is the cleanest, nicest and most AMAZING Jimboy's in Reno! Great and quick service so late I'm a weeknight with wonderful orignal beef and chicken tacos! Forgot how much I missed it and I'll definitely be back soon!
Not impressed with this place. I ordered a smoked sausage po boy. The sandwich was cold and the bread was hard. The service wasn't that great either.

I recently purchased their offer through Yelp to check out this salon. I had a company holiday party that I wanted some color for. The girl behind the counter showed me the various types of beds they had. I decided on the basic tanning bed which provided me with plenty of color for my event.

Favorite place for sushi in Arizona. Sushi is always amazingly fresh. I love that they serve edamame and miso to every customer. My only complaint is the the sushi chefs are a little snooty. You are in the customer service business - hello. But wait staff bends over backwards to make you happy.
Horrible service Had empty table but still made us wait and seated people coming in after us as they came in

Not the best Indian food I've had eating out in the city. I would give it a one star rating, but if you want to introduce someone to Indian food and they are a lightweight on the spice front, you are pretty safe trying here.
Menu is very limited, not too much to choose from on the menu. The food was good, not great. Don't think we return.
Nine Ting is my favorite hot pot and barbecue in center city. The food is great and the sauce bar is amazing!

I live in the neighborhood and wanted to love this place. However, the salesperson was so unhelpful, it actually offended me. When you're paying the prices they're asking, there should be customer service to match. I hope the proprietor reads this and addresses the matter accordingly. Train your staff!!
Breakfast salad, side of bacon, and coffee were all delicious!! Atmosphere was peaceful and relaxing. Employees were very friendly and attentive. Music was great :)

Tourist trap: the gumbo is slimey & the food was made with no love at all. There are much better and less expensive places to eat the same food throughout the French Quarter. Too much hype, not enough reward. -love a foodie-
Did a SHODDY job This company replaced my windshield: POOR QUALITY WORK. Take your business elsewhere. I would call my insurance company that they sent me to a SECOND RATE company!

Love the Columbia house in St. Augustine, so I've given this one a couple of chances. Love the vibe of the place and the Cuban bread! But after my last meal here, I won't be returning for anything other than the Sangria.

Came through Santa Barbara, saw some people on these and they looked cool! Came by and talked to Ken -- gave my friends and I matching blue buggies. IT WAS SO MUCH FUN. Must do! Then he gave us a two for one wine tasting voucher! THANKS KEN! You the best.

Good food, slow service. Took over 40 minutes to get served the salad and sandwich I ordered ahead for pick up. Staff didn't seem well trained or good at communicating with each other which lead to a lot of confusion about who was getting which order.

Incredibly good food and usually quick service. The only reason I don't give them 5 stars is because the last time or two we went the server was kind of terrible. I think this is because they recently expanded and had to hire more people.
This place is a must for coffee and beer lovers (pssst cold brew coffee IPA!), you can bring your own food or you can have one of their paninis or scones.

The food was amazing and presentation was beautiful! However, the wait was 2 hours (no exaggeration) for our mains. The shareable plate portions are also extremely tiny, I would recommend having a snack before coming. Especially if you're starving.

Came in super last minute before closing, but they were gracious enough to seat us. We Ordered the Super Original Grouper Sandwich and the Thursday night special- 3 Baja fish tacos. I had never had grouper before. Realize that I like it.
So happy that there are a variety of vegetarian tapas options. One thing though: the bravas just aren't worth getting. It's more like a basic tomato sauce than the Spanish bravas I know and love.
The salesmen are rude and condescending. The manager is a pretentious dirt bag. Don't waste your time trying to buy a car here unless you want to get talked down to and pay for an overpriced vehicle.

I am currently at the Steak House for 6:45 reservation. It is now it is now 7:45 and I am still waiting to be seated. They are overbooking the restaurant giving customers a terrible experience. Also they are not providing great estimated times for seating. I would not recommend this restaurant.
Okay, first of all. If this chicken, not bad. If it's fish ~decent~ Great meal and I had a blast, but what's the deal with all this mud under my food??
Ughhhhhh, gotta stay out of there...lol....I LUV Jilly's....especially the cupcakes have liquor, and the pink champaign sorbet is to die for....and always great groupons...$$

Service continues to decline shuttles! takes forever to pick up. Costumer service is rude and drivers drive off once you are in plain sight. Called the office and got a rude person who could assist or answer any questions.

The lobby is beautiful. Once you get into the room, it's a different story. There is a lot of "I'm sorry" from the staff and nothing changes. Need I say more. There far better hotels are in Nashville.

Your server Alex C. deserves a medal and a raise for being so professionally patient and accommodating to the most ridiculous customer I have ever "overheard" (not me). It sounded like he walked the customer through the ENTIRE menu and various options. He deserves a big pat on the back and a big hell yeah!

The best tacos in town.join us for taco tuesday all tacos except seafood two bucks.mix and match poek steak veggie chicken only $2 wash it all down with our signature sangrias or our maragritas.we have kids menu too so bring the kiddies.save room for dessert.try our deliocoys flan or churros.

WOW. Real Mexican (including no frills ambience) finally comes to Main Line. My son had the steak tacos and I had three different (shredded pork, sausage and chicken) and all were awesome. Go u won't be disappointed.
Food was good not used to salted pork ham. Husband had the peanut butter banana French toast another thing off his bucket list.
If you want a great sandwich, this is it! The service was fantastic. The free pickles were amazing. The salads were very high quality and the homemade Italian dressing is incredible!

Not quite the deal for the price. The pulled pork was good...not the best. The sides were not good. The beans were so-so, the Mac and Cheese tasted like it was cooked at 6am, and the cole slaw was not worth the price. We were hoping for a good BBQ close to our house, but this is not it.

This is based on at least 5 visits. Very poor service at the bar and at tables. Very overpriced food with little to show for why it is always packed. Interesting cocktails but again no ambiance and service is paltry. You can do better elsewhere.

I know this is a chain but the pasta is really good. The restaurant building is nice too. The price may be a little on the higher end for pasta but with their buy one take one home pastas, it makes it worth it.
Mini funnel cakes is basically what they really are. Which is awesome but I took a star off because they really are ridiculously priced for what they are. Seriously they're tiny & overpriced
Friendly staff, but they don't really salt their food or salsas.

6 months later, I waited 30 minutes for my curbside order to say "employee will be out shortly with your food" and then 5 minutes later walked to the door to go get it myself. I gave it another try but that was the last chance for me.
Good cheap lunch options from 11-2. I had the cheese calzone. Big and pretty tasty. $6 including drink but only if dine in. Average service speed. No wifi.
This place is amazing. Never disappoints. I recommend everyone needs to go here wether you like falafel or not. I've had the salads burgers and the pita plate. Delicious!

Awesome owner! We arrived at 5:01 and he allowed us to still shop around for 20 mins and $120 or so:-). He has been in business for 41 years and I can see why the yelp reviews. Not cheap but good quality gifts. T-shirts mostly. Oh, and he prints the T-shirts on demand - 1 minute each. Awesome!! And thank you!
Will never order food from this place. It was really nasty. Also a bottle of water for $3.00

Do not recommend this place !! Not baby /toddler friendly !! If your baby fussies a little they will start to completely ignore you and say your baby is having a bad day instead of owning up for their horrible service. Moms/parents should never have to feel uncomfortable while out with their babies!!

I've had better breakfast for a cheaper price. Under seasoned omelette and biscuit and gravy. Not a fan of the coffee either. Potatoes and egg sandwich was good tho. Would have been better if they had ketchup
One of my favorite places to eat! The food is freshand plentiful. We always have leftovers for lunch the next day! The service is great and very reasonably priced.
Wonderful hotel restaurant. Kids had pizzas and I had pasta. Wife salad. Lovely interior and very kids friendly
Not a bad place. You can get a yummy and fast dinner, it is much better than getting a fast dinner from a pizza joint or McDonalds.
The service here has gone down. We used to go here a lot but now we go to another one. The service was slow and forgotten about.

The worse customer service. Tried ordering from them twice and the customer service was so horrible that I ended up getting NOTHING. Reached out to them via social media and the only resolution from them was to try again. NEVER. I tried twice already.

This place drives me nuts, registers always closed, messy, alises always blocked by stockers, first world problems but the manager Matt needs to get his shit together sometimes this place is alright like 2.5 stars but most times I avoid it if possible and their theft protection guys ain't stopping shit Sam Walton must be rolling in his grave

The food here was delicious! Nice portion sizes with great taste! Wait staff is attentive but run more in the background then continuously checking in. Wish the brunch menu had a few other lunch options but overall great food!
Poor service, waited almost 1 hr for our entires to come on table.... $32 for a 14 oz Ribeye but tasted like Outback, but Outback is much cheaper

Good food. Open room makes it a little too loud for me. Service wasn't great. Tip: chill your water and refill frequently. I asked for ice and was brought a small amount. When we went through the ice it was never replenished.
On vacation and this place is close to where I'm staying. The atmosphere is great and very diverse. They have a live local band which is really good. Nice little local spot to check out.

This place is a disgrace. I had to visit Janeway a few times within a week and did not see one employee with a mask on. It's one thing to make your living off of fucking people over, but it's another to put other's health and safety at risk.

I love seafood, being from Louisiana, but this place has old seafood put on ice and sold for awhile. Not to mention way too much salt. Crawfish can be seasoned with citrus and cayenne but this place uses just salt that I can tell. I would recommend Bevi's if you really want some great crawfish.

I have raved about their amazing crumb buns in the past BUT within the last year the crumbs are not the same. They are small, not the legendary clumps. Maybe they have a different baker. I hope they go back to the old way of making them.

Meh. Had to do it because it is a legend in Nashville. Service was okay, drinks were a bit weak and of course it was a packed and kinda dirty bar. It would be a great place to get sloppy if you want to be able to say you did so in a landmark.
Yes, Sean, the leaking valve stem is what the tow truck driver spotted immediately after your guys sent me on the road with it.

Amazing crust! We tried 3 different pizzas... the Norma, the mushroom (a nice subtle truffle undertone) and the Great White. All of them were scrumptious! Quality ingredients and i love their choices of sauce. Next time we will try the calabrian chili honey sauce on something. Betting it's delicious! The take and bake option is nice too. Try it! Your tummy will thank you.
DON'T GO TO THIS LOCATION!!! All the other reviews sum this place up accurately. I will also add that the cleanliness is awful!

I order from them regularly and so far not disappointed in my selections. Have tried several menu items but stick to what you know and like best. Don't try to be too adventurous with this one. Food is fast and they are friendly when you walk in or call. Best advise is to go with the combos if you are not sure.
The atmosphere was extremely yuppy. Service was good. The food was very average especially for the price.

Awful pharmacy, forget the drive through unless you have a good book to read while you wait! Or how about when they tell you to come back in an hour and then they tell you they are out of the medication!

After almost an hour waiting, we received cold gumbo and an incomplete order of onion rings (11 instead of 12). The manager was non-chalant about how slow the kitchen was (she was busy sitting at the bar, playing on her phone). This happened in August of 2014, I work next door and I still have refused to return.

We just went here and we thought the place was very nice, the service was good over all but we didn't really love all the plates we got, just different u should try it out and be the judge of it just not our favorite but def okay to try.

Delicious food! Very large portions. The fruit they serve isn't canned gross fruit, it's fresh and healthy deliciousness! The staff is incredibly friendly. A very low key but great food joint. So glad we tried it! The only downside is that there isn't any outdoor seating.
Only reason for the one star is that it's closed. We pulled up and some guys outside the store told us it was closed and would be reopening soon as a landscape design biz. Bummer.
Burrito bowl with brown rice! The place needs to be kept in cleaner condition.
If you don't want your car broken when they give it back to you, don't go here. Management also could care less and seemingly makes up policies as they go. Thanks Pronto, you're #1.
This place is a crock. I was contacted after a botched procedure and then the girl disappeared when I followed up... twice. Go somewhere else for sure.
Great service....love sitting outside. Weak alcohol drinks. Good beer selection. Nice menu

They have some very good sales on beef and the staff is very friendly and helpful. The problem is that most of their meat has already been frozen and defrosted. So it doesn't always pay for me to make the 30 minute trip just to buy enough for one meal. It's too bad I can't buy in bulk and freeze it.

This place is very overrated and overpriced. The Salmon or chicken is decorated with tons of lettuce and corn husk and very little with meat. We gave this place a try twice and will not go back again.
Food was very bad drinks okay and okay service. Oysters were tough and shrimp were def frozen.
They were extremely friendly and paid very well attention to the details of my order.
Not known for their huge portions. Don't share with a toddler. Tasty though! Not much tofu in our veg dishes, dont skimp on the protein please.

Stay clear of this company as it's almost impossible to have a rep come out for repairs. We have been waiting for service and repairs for months and found out our blind was never sent to the manufacturer and was sitting in their warehouse. I will never use this company again.
Very hit or miss. The first few times I ate here the food was exceptional. Then it got bad then good again. I have had better, not bad for the area. Customer service is great!
Really enjoyed the atmosphere of being able to drink a beer and watch a movie. Service was good and quick, will definitely return.
Been working with Joey for the past few weeks. The problems I've had with my lower back has definitely decreased. Strength in that area increase. I always look forward to our Tuesday sessions!
Fresher orange juice ever! Everything was sooo good. Got the chickichanga, avocado toast and veggie burgers! Also must try the bread with preserves!
The service was great, no complaints. However, Parking is not too friendly, the lot is shared with other businesses as well as a hotel in the back.

I'm just going to list everything I love about this place. Chicken Tenders Crinkle Cut Fries Waffle Cut Sweet Potato Fries Cheeseburger Mini Cheeseburgers (Juicy Lucy's) Buffalo Chicken Quesadillas BEER BEER in a TABLE TAP Frickles Also all their sauces to dip your fries or chicken in are awesome. I love Drake's that's all.

Long story short, good concept bad service and food. Biscuits were solid butter, smoked pork tasted old with no flavor, and the eggs Benedict had no hollandaise sauce! Servers could of cared less about and any mistakes and didn't follow up after they delivered the food. Service was really bad and slow. I will not be returning.
Currently waiting over 40 min for a power bowl and 2 burritos because they only have 3 people on staff. The manager needs to hire more than 3 people in the kitchen

4.5 stars tbh. Great food. More than enough, always need a box. Fair prices- not gauging you like the diners in the area do. Not sure how I've lived in DH for so long and never thought to come in here! Beware- cash only. I had to run over to rite aid for cash back.

Walked in and sat at table. Could not get a waitress to come over and take our order. Had to go to the bar to get the drinks. The milk porters were very good. I do not mind going to the bar to get drinks but could not figure out why some tables are ignored.

My opinion with the wait staff has changed radically, they really seek to make you feel at home...and the food still stuns everytime! Can't praise this place enough. Go here and enjoy American cooking again!
Very deep fried and very brown. Didn't think much of the food at this place.
Great location next to TJ Maxx, Bath and Body Works, and Publix. Unfortunately they did not have what I needed so I did have to go to another Target, but no other real complaints :)

Food is excellent and consistent. My only concern is the service since they've gained a following and been more popular lately.. it gets awkward when they start to develop a wait. You definitely feel a pressure to move faster. If you want a little time to enjoy your company and the meal go during the week.
The service was good, but the taste lacked. My husband and I ordered many different rolls and the sushi pizza. Overall it was ok... And just ok. We probably won't return.

All I ordered was grilled pineapple and my tastebuds were blown. I have never had Brazilian BBQ before, so this may be custom, but it was shavings of rotisserie pineapple with spices sprinkled on top. Absolutely delicious!

I'm here for the New Years party and music sucks and overpriced for $120 pp. will not be coming here to celebrate New Years again. Waiting in line to get a drink was a disaster, took an hour just to get a drink.
Worst Halloween party ever, paid for tickets in advance to get in and then waited in line for 2 hours. Tin roof used to be so fun but it's gone down hill. Time and money better spent elsewhere.
The atmosphere is neat and certainly unique for the area, but the food was lackluster at best and a bit pricey for what you get. Customer service was meh.
Good beer selection on tap. Fun trivia contest on Thursday night. Decent hamburgers made to order.
Geno's wasn't to bad for a cheese steak. I had a mushroom cheese steak and it was Great!
Not only is the Shop close to my home, the work is impeccable! I liked entire staff! Keep up the good work!

Terrible pedicure. My feet felt better before I went in. The polish was fine and my toes look ok, but the tech left my feet feeling like sandpaper. And, he actually refused to do anything. He said, "no" when I asked him to smooth them. I've had a lot of pedicures and after this one I feel like I need another.
Assi is decent at best. It's labeled as a "Korean Market" but in terms of actual authentic Korean food it falls short compared to H-mart.
Well, the lustre is gone, the majority of things are not 99 cents only and the place is a dirty mess. Also be sure to check dates as many things have expired or about to expire.
Had the chicken sandwich on Texas toast and it came out on wonder bread. Jaeger burger is MUCH better

used living social coupon for facial. The facial was ok, the aestretician tried to make it relaxing but she basicallly did the same routine twice and unlike other facials, no gently exfoliation.The toner smelled like vinegar (ew). Might have enjoyed it more if I hadn't had much batter experiences in my former home town.

If I could give zero I would. Came with a party of 4 and seated. Ordered drinks and menu. Drinks were served, After 40 minutes of the bartender and waitor avoiding eye contact, we approached waiter and he said it would be a few minutes. After another 15 minutes he came and we ordered. We will defiantly not be back

Oh my god why does this place exist? Terrible burgers, worse than McDonald's. I can only assume that people like this place out of some weird nostalgic impulse and not because of the taste. This is not one of those endearing throwback burger joints. It's awful. If you want a cheap burger, hit Frostop down the street.

This company was highly recommended to me by a friend. I called several times, had a missed call from them, messaged several times via text as instructed and nothing. Wasted my time trying to chase these guys down. Went with another carpet cleaner in town that responded immediately, very happy I did.
I like the pretzels and the root beer. Everything else isn't bad but nothing spectacular. 31/2 stars.
Environment setup must be improved.. Teste wise it very good... Food quantity average.. Over all good..!!

Wow, wow, wow! Possibly the best pizza I have ever had. Thin, crispy, slightly burnt, Neapolitan crust with good chew, spot on. I had the broccoli rabe (would not normally order with pizza) and sausage with garlic oil. Pure, simple and so tasty. I could go back every night this week!

They have nearly nothing vegetarian. Seriously. The only thing I could really order was an order of fries. Really? In 2015 you don't have a veggie burger? Fail. I like Steak N Shake, but I don't like this location. Or the fact that there's no veggie burger. Won't be back for a while.
The food is nothing special, I say a difficult just OK. However we were there end of May and sat outside, the grounds and garden is beautiful.

A bit confusing bc there are 2 lines- 1 for salad and another for sandwiches. There isn't a big menu behind the counter which is the usual for solace like this. Ingredients in my salad were fresh but the chicken was fatty.

During the tour the power was lost ! The place was very hot but there was some good information given. The facilitator was not the most entertaining but did an ok job. It was a lot of talk about himself.... should have been more about the product and the production

Friendly service and awesome bagels! I used to stop here several mornings per week when I lived in the area. I've also ordered their salads, and they are awesome! Especially the strawberry and spinach salad.

This is the perfect diner after a morning of touring downtown Nashville! Fresh 6 oz. burgers made to order, friendly staff, quick service. We were starved, so this was great. The GooGoo candy Shop is right across the street. The Country Music Hall of Fame is a block away...how could we go wrong

Pleasantly surprised! The outside is deceiving. Had enchilada and chile relleano. Hubbie had a burrito. If you want extra chips and salsa, be prepared to pay for extra. The food wasn't bad. It wasn't spectacular either.
Great customer service! Awesome option for great food in Rancho. Can be a bit pricy for a larger group to eat. However love the atmosphere and staff!

Sorry, I think this place is very charming when you walk in and the beer selection and menu look great. I can't ever get anyone to ever serve me n there. Sorry- 0 for 2 is not good and I so want to like this place. If I owned this place, I certainly would want to know this!

Good ramen. Not the best. But good. Broth is mediocre thick. Flavors aren't strong. Noodle texture is nice and fresh. Shio ramen could be better with extra toppings. Hajimaru signature ramen is nice and real spicy. Love the egg. Not the fake kinda spicy. Yummy overall. But would not drive to Fishtown for this bowl of ramen.

Ok, maybe I missed it. But, the lot on Natural Bridge is apparently only for pick-ups. When going back to the airport, drop off our car by the airport. Should have been made clear when I picked up the car.
A good diner experience. The pancakes gumbo and burgers ate amazing! I had the pleasure if trying all of them. The perks of bringing your family to a family atmosphere as this!

Mi Tierra has your typical (Americanized) Mexican fare, but for the price you get a lot of food and the taste quality is about average. They have pretty darn good margaritas and you can get a really good value if you order a pitcher.
They tried to give me a ribeye that was 3/4 solid fat. Even the manager was shocked someone plated this mess. Ughhh chain restaurants.
One of the best bars I've been too for ambiance and aethtestic. However the service is somewhat lacking and it can take quite a while to get a drink.
Market salad with bacon & almonds - perfectly dressed. My new favorite salad!! Oh and did I mention the coffee- delicious!

We have been here twice and every time we go to staff is friendly and the food is fresh and absolutely delicious if you want something different this is the place to go pretty reasonable prices as well

I took several clients that were in from out of town to this place for lunch. Food was good, service was spotty, but the prices were stupid. If I didn't have clients in town, I would have walked out. Food was good, but not $125 for 4 people good.

I love this place but am not sure their hours are correct. My husband and I stopped by at 2pm on a Saturday and the door was locked. We're moving out of the area and it was the last chance we had to get a cheesesteak together at this location. I suggest calling ahead to make sure they're open before swinging in.
Very efficient, professional, and quick.My car wouldn't start due to my battery being out. Mavis had my car battery in stock, and I was back on the road in no time.
Good riddance this place is closed I hope the owner is happy with his poor decisions and his poor management techniques.
Not a great place. Good is below avg and the place needs a deep cleaning and disinfection. Won't go back

Food was okay, typical Bourbon Street place, across the street from the live sex show act, if you want to grab some food and a cheap drink before hitting that up. The bartenders were great, and just be nice and not a pain in the butt and you get a stiff drink.
Stopped in for breakfast. The food was good. It does get pretty crowded, but we were sat fairly quickly.

So we tried this place for the first time last night and drove 20 minutes to get there. The prices seemed quite high for the portions that were provided. The mushroom ramen was very salty and the dish my husband got had a ton of "pickled cucumbers" making the dish overly sour. Prob won't bother returning.

Dirty. Out-dated. Run-down. Definitely not 3 1/2 stars and not what I usually expect out of the Wyndham brand. Disappointed with this stay. Skip it if you're on the turnpike and keep going to Newark for better options.

Horrible. Had an allergic reaction that landed me in the hospital. They said there were no nuts in the dish I ordered but I took one bite and could tell something was wrong. I doubt they even checked. I'm not even that allergic to nuts, so traces wouldn't have caused that severe of a reaction.
Arrived super excited today to try this place. Called ahead and their voicemail was full. I arrive and it's closed. Please check your voicemail and let the customers know you will be closed. :(

Weekend night bartender not nice to younger women and needs some more training with customer service. Food okay burger's are the best thing on menu. If u go it can be fin but make sure u keep track of your tab so the bartender doesn't lets other people order on your tab.
Would give them zero if i could. They stole my $ on a reservation. Please please please be very careful when booking here!!! So many other places in Reno that are more understanding
Pretty done good Pizza pie not too many places have this good of sick crust and thin crust pizza other options on the menu pretty darn good as well highly recommend trying it once or twice
Great location. Wifi didn't work on 19th floor and elevators are absolute nightmare. Great location though. Not the best, not the worst. I wouldn't stay here again honestly.

Had a great meal here with 5 other wonderful women. Had the Linguini with seafood in a white wine sauce and lemon sorbet for dessert. Would have liked a little more attention from the servers but the food and company made up for it.

An update on my first review: AWFUL ! The groupon was not worth the service. We finally had a cleaning with them and they were terrible. Counters not wiped, cupboards smeared and floors not mopped. Our home is not very large. This is not worth the price and the hassle. Zero star rating again.

Not the bests tastes around.... Zin was the only thing I'd consider buying here..., and I didn't !!! Very noisy. Inattentive wine pourers; busy hanging with locals/friends. Minimal descriptions of wines being tasted, and short pours. Overall: Pass on by.

Pretty consistent place. I have been here 2-3 times with parties of 4 to 8. Generally everyone likes their food. Hard to go wrong on menu. Bartender was attentive and helpful with wine selection. Note to Seasons 52, duck wing lolly pops are tasty but too fatty to eat. Consider frying them to a crispier consistency, cooking out some of the fat.

I have been to this salon a couple of times and both have been great experiences. Nail techs have great attention to detail and prices are very reasonable. Great selection of colors for gel and dip. Very clean and relaxing atmosphere.
I wasn't a big fan of their food. I really enjoyed the spring rolls and the broccoli, but I didn't like my shrimp lo mein or steamed dumplings. It was just meh to me.

Today the food was excellent. We are seldom disappointed. The menu changes each Sunday. The tofu with mixed vegetables and the bean sprout fish were outstanding. Good service with a smile brings us back. I recomend this restaurant.

Decent enough selection, but prices were all over the place. One lady who seemed to be a manager was rather rude and cold. Tried getting specifics about the school in Haiti and no one seemed to know much about it. Alpha Thrift down the road is definitely still the best option; most bang for your buck and kind staff.
Our bartender Christa was very friendly from the moment my brother and i walked in ! She was very attentive (and kept a very clean bar) This has become my new favorite place in manayunk
Good selection of menu items for both vegan and meat-eaters. Be sure to go to website and check out the menu, it will save you time when ordering.
Good, but not great. Definately overpriced for what you recieve. It has a nice atmosphere and friendly staff.

I guess I got here at a great time last Saturday morning, as it wasn't busy yet, and I got my food fast. Love their breakfast sandwiches, and their unlimited tea. Good place to shop before doing the grocery shopping for the week!

Food was good but we were seated near the open kitchen and one of the cooks (or manager?) behind the line was screaming every order at the top of her lungs. It made for a very unenjoyable experience. It was distracting and shrill. We won't be back to this location.

Food was good but the service was awful. When I mentioned that I'd ordered sausage, the rude waitress grabbed the bacon right off my plate with her bare hand. It was so disgusting to watch, six people waiting for service left the restaurant.

Best Jamaican food I've had in the tri-state. The Jerk chicken, oxtails, and fried fish are good But the Mac-n-cheese is weak. It's watery and tastes cheap. They up'd the prices recently but it's worth it. If you make friends with the woman she'll give you free/extras sometimes too!
Yummy authentic fresh greek food, generous amounts of food, great customer service, absolutely delicious

We had a wonderful experience with Z, our sales consultant. Z asked us a number of questions to show us the best mattress for us. Never once did we feel pressured to buy a mattress. It was an enjoyable experience. Thank you Z. Highly recommend. Sleep well.
This is my favorite pub in St. Pete for just relaxing and playing darts and pool Amazing service at the bar!

Terrible service. I have never been treated worse in any other restaurant. We ordered about five plates, and the waiter directly gave me the check after we finished the first dish. Then our order just stopped coming. Please go to Acme instead, that one is just across the street, and much more famous and worth trying.

This is probably one of my favorite places to get bobba tea. Three different types of bobba to put in your tea pluse lots of tea to choose from and the service their is amazing nice people who are always ready to help out if you dont know what to order
Good food, good quantity, good price's and good service. Love the nostalgic decor. Wish they would open one by the Gaslight Music Hall.
Beers are good and food has really improved. Get the burger, you won't be disappointed.
Solid choice. Affordable convenient. Food is not fantastic, but very solid choice especially if you are near either courthouse

We just had my daughter's 3rd Birthday party here. The staff was great from the time we walked in til the minute we left. All the kids had fun and the pizza was decent. No complaints, very clean, great time

Came here from LA. Bartender didn't know anything about whiskey. Got there about 9:45 kitchen was closed. She called up to sushi restaurant so we closed out our tab and walked a few flights upstairs just to be told sushi bar is closed. Would not recommend it to anyone looking to have a great evening in Nashville.
Service was not what we expected. Our server wasn't really around to ask for anything. When we pushed the table button as asked he still would never come to our table.

Pros: very good pastries, an "institution." Drawbacks: however, possibly due to its "institutional" status, it's not cheap, has frowning service, and it's difficult to find parking close by. Also, I often seem to go there when it's closed (I'm a visitor so not tuned into its schedule, so like others have said, call ahead to make sure it's open).

Food is shrinking while prices are growing. The pulled pork nachos look like they have about 2 ounces of pork. Stop trying to be gourmet. You're applebee's. People come here to drink, watch the game, and eat typical American food. The atmosphere and what's being served aren't conducive.

The place is a little hidden, not located on Main St... so lots of first timers in Franklin TN, are not aware of this fabulous place. Feel like eating southern food, then this is the place for you... great staff, great atmosphere and great southern food. What more could you ask for ??
Have never had a bad experience. A gem in a well how do I say this nicely, shady area. Great pasta, pizza, nice wait staff reasonable priced. Good atmosphere my go to Italian restaurant.
Have had dinner and drinks here many times. The new owners have carried forward all of the good things while vastly improving many others. A place you can go and feel at home and welcomed.
Portions are generous. Order was incorrect but waitress fix immediately. Bbq was very tasteful and yummy. We can't wait to return again to experience their breakfast menu.
Ooh, what a charming sweaty dive bar this is. good drinks, and a long night full of instant new best friends as I recall.
This place is delicious!! Best kbbq in chinatown by far. Delicious, try the galbi, it's amazing.

These doctors are amazing. I am a complex case and they have helped me so much. Just today, I had severe ear pain when I woke up. Got an appt within the hour and my ear infection was looked at. The nurses, staff, etc are all super nice and I recommend them to everyone.
Average Italian food. Pasta doesn't seem to be homemade, which is what I'm always hoping for when stopping at a place like this. Server was great!
Ordered the bibing nengmyun it was really good. Authentic just like mom makes it. Def hit the spot on this hot day. A little spicy but just the right amount of spice.

This place was so good! The service was great and the food was excellent. Also the free sunny puffs with purchase yelp coupon was the icing on the cake. I didn't care for the loaded hash browns too much but it was still edible. Can't wait to go back and try more!
Yat Bettors All Cheer (Infield Small w/out Jazz Fest) Ostrich & Zebras #Haiku #NOLA_Haiku #FairGrounds #NOLA
Huge disappointment!! Ice cold muffuletta with no meat. Took it back they added meat stack with ice still on it. Bread stale. Never again

Amazing experience. I have to say Best vegan food in philly. Must try their Korean fried tempeh taco. Carrot asado salad was delicious. Gr8 service. Fair price. Take at least 4 plates between two people.

Being a horse riding novice we opted for the 1 hour walking ride. The scenery was beautiful and the guides were helpful when I told them I was very new to riding. The horses were clean, well groomed and well mannered. Excellent experience!

The Coastal Route apparently no longer goes to Safety Harbor, as it used to on weekends. Fares have been reinstituted: $2.25/$1.10 single ride/sr and $5/$2.50 all day pass. Passes can be used on all other PSTA buses and trolleys. Children under 5 free. Exact change and masks still required.

Great lunch, AYCE sushi and hibachi place. My son ate a ton and we are headed back for his birthday this weekend. I am not a huge diner and the endless food was lost on me but the deep fried banana was amazing! The soups and apps were great and we look forward to sharing some new menu items on our next visit.

Worst service I have ever had... End of story. Food was good but only after numerous complaints and corrections. Wrong food items, empty drinks, five different waiters, and endless confusion. Love to support local places but doubt I will ever be back
