Yuck. Food is marginal. Eggs are not real. Pancakes were tasteless. Need I say more? Yelp wants this review to be longer. Ok. The bathrooms were fine. Dunkin or Starbucks would be better options.
Good place to buy beer but there prices are though the roof !! Go buy a case some place else you'll be better off

Ugh never had a problem here before but this time we waited 45 minuets for food when there were only 4 other tables in the dining room. The duck salad was supposed to come with kale but they used arugula instead. Did was pretty decent otherwise.

I would post a photo but the food was SO delish I didn't get to it. I ordered the spring roll and hands down its the best! My husband ordered the honey garlic chicken with chow mein and rice and that was also very great. I will definitely be back!
Cheap decent hair cuts. Been coming here for years with my son. Everyone has always been friendly.

The outdoor patio is nice. But we were seated outside with no fan in 100 degree heat. The food was not great. The service was good. Our server was gracious. We had two entres neither were great, we were disappointed overall. Have had much better Mexican food for less money.
Such a good seafood place! The BBQ oysters were delicious! Kirkland & Gary were our servers & they were great! Looking forward to our next visit!

I went to the artbar for a couple drinks and something to snack on. I ordered crab cakes and they were delicious! I had the bartender make me a drink and I was not really surprised with that but it was all right. I will still go back to enjoy the crab cakes.

Not sure what we missed, but the food was ok. I had to continuously use hot sauce to bring out the taste. The service was very good with attentive wait staff. Will probably try one of the other CB Frenchys.

These guys opened at the start of Covid but they have maintained, and are killing it. Great staff. Great atmosphere and music. Prices are amazing. The food is absolutely stellar, get the shrimp taco. Beautiful work guys.
Really slow service. Luckily only 3 people in line but still took 10mins. God only knows what happens when they get busy.

Food was okay. Place was really nice, but awkwardly empty. Prices were a bit high for bar food, but worth it if you have a groupon or other deal. My biggest issue was that they charged extra for condiments and sauces, which I thought was pretty ridiculous. We will not return to Fallon's.

Happy hour. Innovative, creative spin on traditional Mexican food. The patio and viewed are beautiful. We will come back. Chef John Hohn is going places! Margarita was excellent. Service was very slow or they would have gotten another star!
Wow. I ordered soup because I'm getting sick and this was disgusting. My goodness. Glad I just wasted $5 on soup....

Normally I love this place but I think it was sold to new owners. We went last weekend and the toppings were not good. The fruit was old and looks like they had been sat out over and over again. We are usually big fans but very sad this time. We will try it again for sure.

On business in the area and stopped by for dinner with some colleagues. They were out of hoagie bread so we settled for a pepperoni pizza. The pizza was average at best. Very heavy on the cheese and a little greasy. Will be back to try the cheese steak which looked good ... for those lucky enough to enjoy one inside a hoagie.

Meh pretty much sums it up. Didn't really care for the lager I tried, but the tomato soup was good. Would've been better if it came with the pretzel croutons it said it would. Might be worth having a full meal here to tell, but the prices were too high.

Ordered via DoorDash, my food was still warm when arrived but honestly the only thing that really tasted good were the two shrimps and the soup! But they did make sure the bag, everything h was in, was stapled and I appreciate that type of food safety!

Disappointed, in food and service. The place is DARK inside and no hot water in restrooms. Food way over priced for the quality and service is unfriendly at best. I will never return to the Park Mall Yard House unless I just want to throw away $30 on two hamburgers with string fries.
Their customer service is the worst. I sat on hold for 20 minutes and was hung up on and now I am sitting in a chat queue and I'm #9. Hire enough staff!!!
Pretty good jerk chicken. A little "wet" and salty, but good balance of flavor otherwise. Inside is a little in the dingy side, and service was a little show considering it was about entirely empty.

Good food horrible service. Just moved to Tampa and was hoping this would be a go to. Drinks took forever no water. Side dishes came out before entrees. Some in our party got food 15 minutes before others
This place is wonderful. The staff is very friendly & helpful, great atmosphere & terrific food. We will definitely be back many times!
I make it a point to go here everytime I am in the St. Louis Area. Open Mic night on Tue & Fri. The food is great, staff is awesome, and the atmosphere is NOLA charm!
Good. Would go back. Small family owned place with decent pizza. Kind of hard to find but definitely worth the trip.

The meat is high quality and very juicy but has absolutely no flavor! I had to put salt and pepper on my cheesesteak in order to slightly enjoy it. Not sure if this is standard for the meat in a philly cheesesteak to be bland but I'm definitely not coming back here.
Great spinach soup, fish and chips
I've had some decent meals here. Service is a bit lacking but everyone seems friendly. Specials are pretty solid.

If you're looking for greasy cheap pizza, this is it! You get what you pay for....which is thin greasy pizza. Good for large groups needing to eat for cheap. However, if I want a real New York style slice, I head 7 minutes down Chinden onto Glenwood and go to New York Richies pizza. Overall, pretty decent for the price.

Visited the Centro Cantina while on Holiday in Tampa. Good service and overall fun bar. I ordered a Watermelon Mint Margarita and it was excellent. They also have a great view of Ybor. Loved watching the chickens run around in the road below us. Will definitely be visiting again.
This store is being way over worked by them closing the trader point store. Hopefully management will read this and learn it was a mistake they closed that store.
Food was mediocre. Atmosphere is quaint. Be prepared to take a shower after you leave. I had breakfast at 9am and walked out smelling like deep fried food----YUCK! First and last time for me.

Jared, our waiter, was terrible. The descriptions of the specials did not match what was delivered. I had the tuna, which was supposed to be blackened. Apparently that means no seasoning and overcooked to dryness. We will not be going back.

Mediocre at best. There are better oysters in the city than this place. The crab cakes were extremely dry! I could barely eat half of one. The crawfish on top was the only decent part of the entire meal.

The chips with the chips and salsa were amazing. Tacos were not that good and if you want a combo of chicken and steak for your 3 tacos they dont separate them and so each taco has both chicken AND steak... kinda gross.
They have a great happy hour deal and the bar is pretty nice. Great for margaritas and tacos!
Very mediocre park with a few flowers planted and redwoods. Does not worth the $12 per person entry fee.
Worst TSA precheck I've ever been through. Complete cluster and chaotic. We would have been better off in regular line. No order whatsoever.
Beautiful view. As an old WWF fan was fun to look at hulk hogans belts. The food was decent, got the ahi salad. Problem is the restaurant just feels a little unclean.

I'm a big fan of Petco in general and this store did not disappoint. The staff were very helpful, they had tons of toys and great treats - and we successfully surprised our friend who we were staying with, with a whole lot of great toys and treats for her dog and cat.
う〜ん。すすめられていったけど、欲しいものは見つかりませんでした。中古品いっぱい。野菜や果物はそんなに新鮮じゃないし。 駐車場に1ドル必要なんてありえませんでした。 もう行きません。
Live band music is very good today! Lots of people celebrating Labor Day weekend! Party on!
Good beer selection, but the waiters were extremely rude (try being talked down to just for staying an hour before they closed)
It's a good little place for breakfast

This has been my favorite local McDonald's for years. Don't know why burgers taste better here. Great staff ~ helpful, fun, experienced. Always leave with a good feeling. Restrooms are cleaner than most.
Chairs are broken, service slow Food is one step above Raman noodle. They also charge for tea.... freaking tea??? Really?
Best shrimp and fish tacos on earth. That is all you need to know.
I ordered the pAncakes today, from last time I ordered them they have gone down in size, also no nut topping or powder sugar. Please go back to the other way. Thanks
Gary installed our New dishwasher! Easy scheduling...plus he was very professional and had great attention to detail! Highly recommend!
Billows acts like they are doing you a favor by being in business. Arrogant showroom sales staff. I won't be back.
This place is awesome. Great burgers, stellar drinks, solid service, and reasonable prices. We've been here a couple times with fairly large groups and the servers are always attentive and accurate.
1st time here and ordered: thin crust pizza with sausage, chefs salad, spaghetti with meatballs. Each dish looked and tasted freshly made. Delicious and excellent deal!

I heard really good things about their Mac Mart truck that goes around. So I went to the restaurant when it opened up to try their Mac and Cheese. I got their grilled chicken pesto Mac and Cheese and I was actually pretty disappointed. I don't think I will be coming back here again.
The sushi is fine. The service is good. There is something off about the place though. I won't go back.
Wasn't bad. I like longhorn but was told to come here with a friend. Ok dinner nothing special. Wait staff was nice.

They twice have not given us our complete order and we went inside the manager is as rude bitch and gave a make up order of only the missing items and still messed up only got two shrimp and gave me a lot of crap i hope they go broke one girl is so slow ive never seen anything like it

We had a really good time at the tavern, sat by the bar and the bartender is something to be seen, he offered some options to my picky cravings and I sure recommend trying the gigantic oysters that were superb, the place is clean and the general manager is always open to suggestions, think of this cozy place as a must in Philly.

Ordered for pickup via GH. Order was processed and I was told food was prepared. Went to pickup Sat in front of restaurant for approx. 45 mins. Checked front and side entrances and got no response. GH Cancelled order and refunded money.

so I decided to give Anna's Bakery a try again after a long time and decided to pop in for a iced chocolate glazed donut. Well, it was very disappointing as it tasted day-oldish. So I'll pass on Anna's from now on.

This would be a great place with a few repairs, a lot more air conditioning and some air fresheners. It is very uncomfortable. The staff was not the friendliest. Marcellus was great, very friendly and accommodating. Very nice young man. For the price I expected more.

The food if you call it that is hard to eat. I kid you not. The pizza with sausage tasted like it had canned dog food in it. It sits all day and it looks nasty then reheated its just awful. Please Media get a real Pizza place by the slice.How hard is it?

I wish I could give 0 stars. I ordered 5 items. 3 of those items shipped to me, were the wrong color. They refuse to refund saying they didn't have the colors I wanted available. I explained that this should have been indicated when I placed the order, because I wouldn't order the colors that were shipped. They refuse to refund or replace.

I frequent here only because of location convenience. A lot of times i been here you end up waiting typically longer than usual for fastfood, i mean.... It is FASTFOOD but apparantly they dont live up to that quality.

Went there for dinner tonight and I must say the food was very good but service was not good. By the time we got our steak we were waiting almost an hr. Our server was so slow..or it was the kitchen I just don't know .
It's not a real Thai cuisine. We ordered pineapple fried rice and vegetables red curry. It looks like Thai's food but the taste likes Chinese food. Server's nice.

Good haircut. But have been here twice and left with a headache. A 20 minute haircut takes 40 minutes. The TV volume is on as high as it goes while the barbers scream at each other at the top of their voices. Barbers are more interested in watching videos and playing around than cutting hair.
Lame. Has been better in past years. Didnt even scare my kids. Save your money . Lame lame.
The food was absolutely perfect. Because I'm a vegetarian I only had sweet potatoes corn and cornbread. I hope they have other options in the near future. This place is worth it!

Pros: staff is friendly, decent sized parking area Cons: facility is kind of gross. The bathrooms were grimy. Thick coating of powder/dust everywhere and in the air. All in all, it's ok. But definitely not as clean as in the pictures.

Overpriced pompous wannabe experience. Just because you act like it's a privilege to be there - doesn't make the $14 overpriced 3 ounce cocktails taste any better. Speak easy connoisseurs look elsewhere and past the hollowness of this place and especially their service.

PSA: This place got rid of hookah! The food here is just meh, that's really all there is to say. Service is good enough, nice that's it's BYO but the draw for me has always been the hookah. Now that it's gone probably won't return.

We walked in to get some donuts and as we were about to order a roach ran across the floor. Not your standard typical Florida roach but the German roaches that are known for infestations. We turned around and left. Too bad as it would have been nice to have a good donut place close by.
No cover and great reggae music! (Friday night). They sell Mexican food (tacos, burritos, etc) in the back. Wasn't that hungry, so didn't try the food.

Their online booking is meaningless. Had a 4 pm appointment scheduled for a state inspection. Showed up 15 min early to have them say sorry they are too busy to do the inspection. Wasted my time scheduling an appointment online and wasted my time/money driving there.

Don't blink or you'll miss this little hole in the wall! The service was friendly and fast, but the restaurant is a little cramped. Maybe not the best place to stop in if you like to have more room while you eat. Other than that it was a great value breakfast and definitely worth the stop in!
LOVE. The food was immaculate and the service was nice. I enjoy the environment the food and the variety of options for pastries.

They have plenty of games, but in my opinion they are extremely overpriced... the games are normal games with nothing spectacular about them... they do have pretty inexpensive food and it's pretty good as well... so there are quite a few pros and cons. Overall, a decent place just prepare to spend some serious money.

Great property but rates are too low during the summer. Not the kind of crowd we want to be sharing the pool and facilities with. The low rates also made it very busy leading to poor service. Very disappointed, not a JW experience. Going to the Ritz next time.
had the Brunswick's Stew, very hardy but not enough ordered 1/3 slab of fabulous ribs

I can't imagine why this place only had 4 stars!! We went here on Yelps! recommendation on our way home from picking peaches, blackberries and vegetables at Eckert's and this is a 5 STAR place ... Most delicious BBQ I have had in a long time; ribs, pulled pork, chicken, Brussels sprouts OH SO GOOD!!! 5 STARS ALL THE WAY!

Seriously! 4.5 stars?!!!!!! I expect the food to be expensive in touristy areas. But this place is not worthy of more than one or two stars. Worst poke bowl I've ever had! Packed with fresh onions and cucumbers and the rice was soaked with hot sauce and it only had tuna. Avocado roll was minuscule and even the edamame was mediocre.

Awesome view! Blackened Snapper was good. Awesome View. The Coconut Shrimp was very good. Was here on a Saturday evening, with the view the place should be packed. But tonight no waiting for seating either inside or outside on the beach. Again - awesome view!
I had the two taco carne asada and it was extremely salty but I had guac and it masked the salt a bit. Other than that, it was good.

I just wanted to write to let other customers know that this company has corrected its wrongs with gaps in service. I was issued a full refund, that I truly appreciate, and sincerest apologies from Oron, the owner. I wish the best to small businesses and it seems like they have definitely corrected the situation so this does not happen to other customers.

Been dealing with mice issues for the past four years and had another rodent infestation at the beginning of winter. Contacted Pest Medics and Javan was very quick to respond. So far haven't had any mice issues. Super satisfied!

HIDDEN TREASURE! Much larger inside than it looks outside! CLEAN... spacious... WONDERFUL offerings, GENEROUS potions at REASONABLE prices!! Amazing customer service! I ENJOYED the Mullet Dinner...friends had Oysters and FISH & Shrimp Combo Dinner... I'm GOING BACK to try those too!!!
Woke up this morning looking for a new breakfast spot in Clearwater. After consulting Yelp dropped by. Very friendly staff and definitely felt welcomed. Good breakfast spot.
Beer is great. Food not so much. It's seat yourself so it can get a bit crazy and folks will hover until you get up. Awkward.

Gross. The worst sushi I've ever had. Every roll had that fake crab. The edamame was so salty, the sushi rice loaded with the fake crab was Sickening sweet. We got the all you could eat, I'm wishing we didn't because we would've left after the first Roll. We stopped eating and left rolls on the table.

OK Irish pub next to the historic Head House Square with good beer, great burger, bad coffee and authentic Irish breakfast. Overlooking the farmer's market activity at the square from one of the outdoor tables in summer is fun and convenient for great food shopping. TV's upstairs for the sports minded.

Really good pizza and amazing pasta. The owner grows most of the veggies in his garden. So you must go when the season is right. The jalapeños are perfect. I had the buffalo chicken pizza and I was stunned by the flavor and the fresh ingredients. It is also BYOB so bring your wine and relax with some good Italian food.
Crawfish are the bomb, large and very spicy with reasonable prices. Still have more to explore on the menu though

For what it is: it's great. If you want a well stocked, well organized head shop with friendly staff and cool stuff, jump in. I bought 3 tie dyed hippie shirts for my daughters. No bongs or vaporizers for me, thanks though. Go, it's fun

John was a complete horror. Save you time, money, bear buck's, just no! left is not the same as my right and bulky like Lee press ons!Do not waste your money here, from a professional nail woman.... No ombre, no coffin shaped, no nothing but disappointment!

Portions way too small for the price. The burgers are tiny. The beef and the fries are good but way overpriced. Same price as Red Robin but at least Red Robin has interesting shit on the walls to look at.
We normally love Chipotle but this one is NOT good! After 3 times we give up! The food is always cold, it doesn't taste fresh or have much flavor and the chips are very stale!

Always a good dinner like the fact the Mgr comes out when they are aware someone in your party has a gluten allergy to confirm their dinner menu. Steak is always excellent and of course the shrimp cocktail helps with any allergies.... Lol! Sunday 3 course meal was delicious!
yummmm....it's just like Yogartland. It's kinda of over priced but they've got to make money too. I was verryy satisfied.

This is an average second hand store that has went down hill over the years. In 2011 it was my favorite store but now I probably won't return due to this disorganization throughout the store. Upon entering you use to be greeted but that has to be "old" because they no longer acknowlege you.
Nice decor and service but the Nigiri was so small! But besides that it was quick and nice quality but I would go down the street to sushi Japan for all u can eat sushi for $20
Amazing meal.. One of the best we have had and that includes French Laundry and Gary Danko. We will be back again this week before we leave Santa Barbara

don't ask, just go. find some relief from summertime in st. louis in a chocolate concrete. its an institution for a reason, and it certainly hasn't lost its charm/edge/flavor. just thinking about it has me looking at flights to Lambert...

The food was good three of us had the sharebles, we really enjoyed, there are two negatives the menus are dingy, folded pieces of paper that is time to go in the recyle bin, and pull out some new ones, the noise level was high do to a large boisterous group.
i was very pleased with tria. wine and cheese are two of my favs and you can get little samplings of both.
Chicken breakfast wrap and craft beer. Very laid back compared to another brunch place that had 45-60 min wait at 1pm.
Fun little spot. Love playing pool and making a fool of myself. The food is surprisingly good here.
How is this place still open with Brooklyn nearby. Magpies is not pizza! Jesus!

For the prices portions very small... My chicken sandwiches well Cooked but the bun burnt... About 2 Tbsp of mayo on each bun... Bacon haphazardly tossed on.... On the plus side relatively friendly service. And possibly clean restaurant... Although in dire need of a remodel
First time eating here. I've popped in before for a quick drink, but I'm happy that I tried the food. I'm coming all the time now!! Perfect little Monday night dinner. Compliments to the chef!!!
Don't bother going 10 minutes to close....they will straight up turn their lights off with you right in front of the door.

The ramen was al dente, the pork tender, and the curry broth flavorful. Everything about the ramen was solid, but not extraordinary. The eggplant bun was not good- it tasted and smelled like overused frying oil and it was bland. The service was great- they were friendly and attentive. They even gave us free spicy paste!

These guys are great! My fiancé cracked both sides of his 2 iPhone 4's. They fixed both in 30 minutes at a much more reasonable price than other local shops. I'd highly recommend going here for a quick fix at a great price!!
Great new spot for BBQ. Don't skip on the Lou sandwich and the Texas Twinkies. Will definitely be back.
Great place for a professional consistent haircut. They are expanding their area this summer. Look forward to seeing a great lounge.

The best thing about this place was the service. It's a fast food type restaurant but the employees kept coming around asking if we needed anything. I had the hot dog and my boyfriend had the roast beef sandwich. Both were okay at best. Definitely not worth the 20 minute wait. I probably won't go back.

Just grabbed some dinner after a long day of work and before my flight home and the three of us all thought our meals were delicious and the service was great! Glad we chose this restaurant, you should too.

Good food and ok coffee. Drip coffee is overpriced. But the 2 star review is due to the slowest service EVER. I thought it might have been an isolated incident, but it wasn't. Every time was a killer. Speed it up, or forget it.
Best McDonald's I've shopped at great drive thru greeter and it was great food Thanks natural bridge
Service slow, messed up my order for food and still charged me. Can anyone recommend a decent place to eat out that won't break my bank?
Mary likes this. I enjoy meeting folks here for a working lunch. Good service. Isong introduced me.

Drove all the way across town just to discover the address is wrong and to find out that they also don't answer their phone. After the 6th call I was told they are not open on Sundays and Mondays. New address:1445 south 4th avenue, Tucson

Okay bar/pub for a simple Tex-Mex bite to eat. I knew not to have the tacos because I know that what Americans call taquitos here are what tacos actually look like. But I digress. I had a simple bite of quesadillas which weren't bad, including the sauce they came with wasn't bad.
Pros: Cheap drinks, great band Cons: Beards, suspenders
Food is delicious but they need some work with customer service. I understand that they recently opened and I'd be willing to give them another try later.
Good sushi. Very small. Best for takeout but very good prices and fresh ingredients. Definitely recommend.

Food was pretty good! I enjoyed myself . I ordered the fresh pasta Alfredo with peas and mushrooms! Salads were fresh and the employees and waiter was really nice ! You may wanna order extra sauce for your pasta. And bathrooms were clean !

Nice mix of locals and tourists inside. Waiter said they're famous for the fried platters. Tried the raw oysters - ok, but not worth the money. The fried oysters & fried shrimp platter was good. Overall, ok I guess.

This location made us wait in the drive thru line for over 5 minutes!!! Isn't this fast food?? It defeats the purpose of a grab-n-go drive thru. They also ran out of BBQ sauce. Lady was rude and did not care about taking our order.

daniel definitely is not nice or good at costumer service, one of the guys misunderstood what we said at the drive through and when we asked for a correction he said "should've thought about that at the drive through". the guy who made the mistake corrected it, really appreciated that. daniel could've just changed it but that's too much work
Great buffet for good price. Goat was amazing. Food is fresh and not dried out like in other buffets

Vinyl booths, black & white checkered floors, vintage jukeboxes (that no longer work) and Louisiana style art fill the restaurant, giving it an upbeat and casual vibe. Staff was friendly, the food was good, and the venue is unique. 18+ only, sorry kids! I recommend the blackened catfish po'boy.

I love nepalese food, and I found one restaurant in Saint Louis made me happy. For the last day of vacation it was perfect to meet all family. The really is delicious, nice place, friendly service, but you will wait a little bit for the food. Try momo, fish coconut and saffron rice. The price is reasonable, affordable!
Amazing food and service! The best Korean spot I've found! What a shame they closed. I really hope they reopen sometime.

Really good fried shrimp po boy! I got the full size (as opposed to the combo which is half a po boy and a side) and it was worth the $13. Plenty of shrimp. Bread was tasty. And I didn't have to wait too long.
the burgers and fries were pretty good, not super unique but tasty nonetheless
There is no one better than Dan Stokes for lymphatic drainage. The whole office is very professional and well run.
This place is nothing better than a glorified food court. It really works well for families with kids, but the food is not great at all . Evidentially I won't be back
The breakfast here is so good. The French toast bites delicious and the Eggs Cochon wow!!!! You gotta order it! I'm dreaming of it still!!
Waitress was so sweet. Pizza was disgusting. Order something else other than their pizza or else you'll be left with its lingering taste. Not fresh at all

Typically the friendly service here would've warranted at least 3 stars, but the fact that when asked what came on a burger and they left out mayonnaise, then served me burgers with Mayo that made me sick was a game changer. Bye Culver's
Sandwiches were great, we got a veggie and ham and cheese. It was the side of attitude that we didn't enjoy and probably the reason we wouldn't go back there.

Don't do it. When it is time for you to move out they will make up arbitrary fees and late payment fees to take your security deposit. Then like all of the faulty philly landlords, you will have to go chase them in court to no avail.

My first coming here was the best overall experience ever in a juice bar! Everyone was very friendly! I got a spinach, celery, ginger and pineapple juice, which was totally amazing!! I can't wait to go back when I'm back in town.

We've been going to the Maratina over the years and last night's experience was disappointing. The menu offered a small number of entrees to choose from. I didn't receive what I ordered exactly, the presentation was fair, the serving was small. The ambience was very good and the wait staff excellent. The value was moderate. I won't be in a hurry to go back
Very good food. Generous portions. Cooked well. Service was friendly and precise. Had a locally brewed light lager and it was so good. Atmosphere is cool. Plenty of space between tables.

Very nice place! Staff is very knowledgeable about their products and very friendly. High quality and delicious products! The bottles that you buy your oils are glass and come in different shapes and sizes, you can use them the next time you come to shop:)

Picked this up to go. The pad Thai with chicken was great but I remembered the Red Curry having more flavor last time. Will try again as service was much better than another Thai place I recently tried.

Don't go!! Stood outside for twenty minutes. No hostess came out. When entered to inquire, was told to wait outside. Multiple tables empty but dirty. The group waiting ahead of us had waited ten minutes longer and hadn't spoken to anyone!! I would give less then a star if I could.

Sal's Pizza is pretty decent. However good customer service goes a long way in bringing customers back. Sal's just does not cut it. The owner is extremely rude, both on phone & in person. Sure, Friday nights are busy but if you can't handle the pressure, have someone else work the counter who can!
Eh. Cool ambiance. Rude bartender. Okay drinks... maybe go on a busier night........ maybe.

This is my favorite place for lunch or to stop by for a dinner takeout order. Food is always fabulous with a good variety of appealing and healthy menu options. Can't say enough good things about this restaurant. All 3 locations are equally appealing.

Don't let the rather shabby exterior fool you, this is actually a pretty good place! We decided to try them after living here almost 2 years and had been going to the Chinese restaurant by Giant. The rolls were pretty good and the pork Lo Mein was WAY better than the other place. We will be back to try more of the Japanese entrees.
Staff is always great, but car may take extra work to get clean. Vacuums are ok, but they need some TLC. No towels provided.

My mother whom is elderly has been in and out of here. She loves the nurses, loves the hourly check-ins and feels like she is on vacation when she is in there! Sorry to anyone who feels otherwise! Bravo for making the most special lady in my life feel comfortable. Thank you.

A solid choice for a Target. Their recent renovation now includes a grocery section, which is a great addition to the store! If you're looking for the designer collaborations for clothing, the Super Target on 60 might have a greater selection, but for everything else, this location definitely gets the job done!

Made appointment for 11 year old daughter. Friendly stylist did a nice, 2" trim. Not so nice was the $40+ cost to trim an 11 year old's hair. In a strip mall. In Tucson. Yes, I should've asked. I'm disappointed nonetheless.

The furniture is very odd here, somebody wanted to make a fashion statement or something. Nothing is comfortable. The windows, looking out onto the street are nice but the service is lacking. Very disorganized.
I have only gotten some maternity shirts and things there. Way cheaper then new ($10-$15 jeans) but just like any other thrift store. No one was rude but no one was overly helpful. I'll go back

UPDATE: TO ALL ROAD WARRIORS don't bother coming here if you seek house wifi, they changed protocols last year, making service so slow and spotty that you will get kicked constantly- like minutes. And you'll lose work. I don't think it's accidental.
Do not stay here unless you want to wait 30 min for the elevators--particularly if there is a conference! Probably the worst, most inefficient elevator system I've ever dealt with.

It's ok. Was a hit when it first opened but seems to be on the backside now. Frankly I can't stand a bar that measures a drink out with a measuring cup. Really? Scotch runs $16 per ounce, accurately measured to the drop. Been there twice -- that's enough for me!
Was disappointed when I started to open what I was hoping to be a 1/4 pounder. It was dry and not good tasting.

I thought this place was fantastic. Not the best place for a tourist but I'd imagine I would be here a lot if I lived in town. I love that they had authentic pieces instead of corporate stuff. Staff was friendly too.

It's "Irish," including some of the bartenders' accents. The food isn't as bland as my Irish great-grandmother's. It's big enough to fit 2,437 leprechauns, and, get this, the pool tables have green felt. Erin go bar.

Workers here are so rude. There was no one downstairs at cash register so after waiting awhile I went upstairs to pay for my stuff and then after waiting up there I was told that I had to go downstairs (even though other people had just been paying up there 10 minutes earlier). The guy was dismissive and unapologetic.
The pizzas are awesome. I love picking all my own toppings, and nice atmosphere with friendly service.
This is a very nice park to have in the area. The trails are great and it's a nice escape from the normal crowds of West County.

Abe was on time and a complete professional. He did a bang up job on our 9 month old new carpet. He also had some recommendations for a few minor trouble areas. We have used them before and will again. Highly recommended.
Had a bad experience but management made it right. Updating review and leaving 3 stars.

got a pollo verde burrito the other day. was excellent. only reason for 3 stars is the prices have gone up since last time i was there. for the price of a burrito, you should at least get chips if not rice and beans. thats my only complaint. otherwise service and food were excellent.

By far my favorite burger in Santa Barbara. The pb&j burger was amazing, considering I had no idea what to expect. The American is also fantastic. They also have a great beer selection. Gonna miss this place.

Worst experience ever the lady that answered the phone was rude and got our order wrong, then forever later our food finally came it was raw!!! I had to put both pizza's back in the oven, so don't waste your money!!!

Large, beautiful garden with hundreds of Buddha statues for sale, succulents, bamboo, ponds, lotus blossoms, small pavilions where you can sit and get offered free tea. Store in center with antique and newer statuary, carpets, crystals, jewelry, incense, a divan the Dalai Lama sat on, Balinese temple umbrellas, spiritual books. Such an amazing special place.

St Patrick's night out to eat at the Blind onion on Victorian Avenue, and it was a fiasco with the service and the attitude. The waitress forgot our pizza and poor customer service has left me on a place that I will never bring my business here again.

I'm here for the Super Bowl party so I'm not gonna rate this establishment based on the nightlife. The TVs are mounted behind you in the upper level. Very annoying watching tv having to turn you neck or stand. The good.... D'usse cognac tasting tonight and the barmaids/waitresses are friendly.

We found this place here I. Yelp and we couldn't be happier with our meals! Started with the brisket nachos, guacamole and Buffalo wings. Then we had shrimp tacos fish tacos, Mac and cheese and a bacon burger.every dish was beyond delicious! Great service as well!
Very good food and promt efficient service. The food tasted very fresh however I felt it was priced a little higher that it should have been. I would go back however.

fabulous Saturday night dinner! Service by Carolyn was impeccable!!!! BBQ shrimp po boy and the crab cake melted in your mouth. The crab cake had no filler. The crab fingers were delectable. Highly recommend!!!
Very cute place with a fun menu. Just not as flavorful as i wanted. The chips and salsa are great!!! Wish they used a bit more spice and a lil salt.
Went there a few years ago, was alright. I'd go again.
Their meatballs were hands down the best I have ever tasted. My wife who is of Italian descent and very critical when it comes to Italian food just loved them.

Came here for brunch today after not being able to stop by for dine-in these past months (though we have been doing takeout). It seems the menu prices are increasing and the portions remain smaller than other places, but the food was excellent as always. I had missed the eggs florentine! The poach was perfect.
Best mine tour ever! Andre told us the back history of the town and the mines. He is even told us about Mark Twain how he started as a miner before he became a writer.

No idea what the hype is with this place. I had alfredo and it tasted average. Nothing special. They used an overpowering amount of garlic and the alfredo sauce was separated. The steak my friends got looked pretty good. Our waitress doted on the men at the table and ignored the women, unfortunately for her tip the women were the ones paying that night.

Food was ordinary & extremely high in pricing. Took 30 mins to get meal. Salad showed up after meal. Had to remind waiter. Was told bus boy left & forgot. Entertainment is for 80 year olds. Not worth a return visits.

Called in my order, and when I got there (one hour before their listed closing time) I was told they were closed. Excuse me?! The dude said it again, and apparently they were closing because "the cook was tired.". WTF? Seriously? Thankfully the tired cook made my food before calling it quits for the day.

I witnessed someone getting berated for asking a question. One of the workers there, Crystal, has the worst attitude. Please train your workers so they know how to properly speak to people. Also, why do you call people "honey" when they walk through the door? I ain't your honey.
Really cool breakfast spot in downtown Santa Barbara. I loved my breakfast bowl full of potatoes and eggs and southwestern flavors.

Great Sushi spot in Nashville. I've been going to Nama for years in Knoxville, and was really excited to see a Nashville location pop up a couple of years back. Great sushi and good atmosphere on the west side of town. Monday's and Thursday's have a half-price menu, combine that with happy hour until 7 and you've got a great deal!
Never gave us the bread we asked for and eggs were not done right. When we told the waitress, she just laughed & didn't offer to get other ones. Food was good but bad service

1 and a half hour wait for 2.2 mile delivery only to receive cold, burnt pizza and burnt fries (they were almost brown) with almost no cheese and topped off with the worst customer service $50 down the drain on food that sucked
Arrogance, rude, and unprofessional are three words to sum this dump up. Don't waste your time.

The food was amazing and I can see why they are rated so high. We ordered to go and the food portions were good, the food was fresh and exactly as ordered. I highly recommend the restaurant as the food, service, and atmosphere are all worth the trip. Thanks for a great experience.
Yuk. It has so much going for it but the food was just ok. Servive was S..l...o...w...and not because it was busy. Good luck.

Worst experience ever. Placed an online order for 11:15 and waited till 12:00 to get it. It was one salad with dressing on the side. Then I have rotted lettuce in the salad and got one chicken kabob. Would not recommend at all. Don't waste your time and money.
Perfect, delicious, crispy, flaky, fresh fried catfish in the catfish basket -- even on a slow Friday evening. Thank you!!

I love target in general, but this target in particular has Horrible managers who scream at their employees! I saw a manager (I presume anyway) yelling at a fresh employee for not putting items on the shelf and instead helping a customer.

Super convenient and not fast food. Not five star thai food but it is pretty tasty and the quality is great. The fresh rolls and my go to. The panang curry is by far my fav. I have only got take out so far but they have a few tables outside that you can eat at.

Best nail salon I have been to and I have tried so many nail salons in university city, fishtown, South Philly and northern liberties. Everyone is really friendly, the salon is very clean, it's so easy to make Apts, the service is great and the Polish lasts forever.

Characterful little place with decent coffee and a very friendly server. Lots of seating in and out. Interesting photos on the walls and a fun library of novels, etc. to relax with. I look forward to returning.

Yes. All the poke from here. Def one of my favorite bowls of poke that I have had anywhere. All the yum. In a city full of heavy meals, this place is your break when you need to step away from the Cajun/creole for a hot sec.
My new addiction. Great tacos with slow cooked meats. Incredible.

I must say that Ponzio's was better with the larger menu, lower prices and larger portions but it's still a favorite. The staff is Diner-Friendly and the food is consistent. A great place for weekend breakfast.
Just your typical Bourbon Street spot for frozen daiquries-in pretty large styrofoam cups!

Tea options are almost endless which is very awesome; however, our online 'quick & convenient' order is almost always late - long after those who've physically show up to order leave w/theirs! App is not a recommendation to use if you're in a hurry.

Walk up during any pandemic and get your snoball on! Such a great reprieve from being cooped up inside, I started coming here weekly. Unique flavors include spicy watermelon basil, earl grey, cereal cream, and cardamom. The ice is soft like snow and melts slowly. Get two flavors that mesh well so when they eventually consummate their relationship you'll have an awesome cold drink.
I think that Potbelly is a great place to stop by and get a sandwich. The prices are reasonable, the food is good, and the people are friendly. All around, a solid choice.

If I could leave a zero stars I would The food had absolutely no flavor the only good thing I can say about that restaurant was the customer service was OK I would not recommend it to anyone looking for any kind of Chinese food at all with flavor I will never return back to this restaurant again sorry have to be honest

Poor bedside manners. The room I stayed in was dirty when I was recovering. ( Silverman building ) Quality of service was bad..The nurse told me they were short with staff. Hush, rush and off they went.
This is our second visit to the Bierhaus, we're enjoying eating through the menu. Great Food, Beer and Service.

One day old full set. Already separating from my nail. Took off too much cuticle. They rushed the gel top coat and some spots are not shiny. The guy that did my nail was very rude and tried to make me feel guilty for changing my mind on the shape. I will never go back.
The food and service were outstanding. I was looking for a local spot to try will visiting the area for work. They did not disappoint.
Unfortunately I'm not from here but I had the most incredible gel manicure from Teresa!!! I wish I could take her with me back to Florida :( she is top tier!!

good korean style wings but no where the wings at dolsot in cherry hill. They use too much batter on the chicken. Flavor is medicore. place is very small and you can only order for take out. Call I'm advance because the wings and some menu items could be sold out. Staff is very friendly.

Man, this location just isn't great. Needs improvement in multiple areas. It's a bummer to obviously pay a TON more for things, and the quality is terrible. Luckily, Kroger/Vitacost has most everything for a lot cheaper.
I had the Chicken Egg Foo Young. It's how I judge Chinese food. This was a solid 4 Stars. Hard to understand their English..
Nice location. Staff was pleasant. I enjoyed my meal. The chicken for the buffalo chicken sandwich was great quality and tasted delicious.

I have always enjoyed Delsa's and we like to support small businesses. I went today and was saddened to see they are opposing the Boise mask order. When I asked why they didn't wear masks the answer was "because we don't". I'm not sure when I will go back (if ever).

I LOVE the food, the service, and ambiance. I bring my family here whenever they visit. One of my favorite things to do is order carry out, take it to forest park and have a picnic on art hill, bring my own wine- it's a perfect date!

Went there today and was very disappointed.Our server vas very slow l,food was good but portions were very small for the price you pay.They had no pretzels say d ran out yesterday.not sure I will try again.I will check future reviews to see if they get there Act together.

We went here on thanksgiving night, we are from Orlando. Overall it was a nice place very busy, which seems like they didn't expect that. We sat inside due to the cold. Our server Renee was great very honest! We both had the shrimp tacos and they were great!

Good food after mourning. Terrible machines. The breakfast I had today was the worst. Runny watery eggs, the potatoes had a strong aroma of rancid oil. One pad of butter for cardboard toast. Yet friendly staff. But cmon. That was just gross.
The crispy chicken salad was excellent. The tenders could be a little warmer. However my order was ready in 3 minutes so I can't complain. Over all it was very tasty with the Buffalo Bleu sauce.
Amazing! Exceeded expectations in terms of food quality and quantity. Well worth the wait.
Naomi is flexible with appointment scheduling. She's an awesome manicurist and her sweet personality is the cherry on top! Give Chloe Nails a shot.

Tried to do a walk in during a recent trip to the area but it is a small restaurant with limited seating so we had to leave with our party of four. We returned the next day to get a quick takeout for beef udon noodles which was fine. Recommend to call ahead to find out seating availability.
I wouldn't order the roast beef po-boy again. Meat is processed and rubbery. Swiss cheese is Kraft singles type and not real Swiss cheese. I'm pretty sure the gravy is processed also.

Update-- management has reached out and promised that they do not intend to operate this way. I am going to go up to 3 stars on the basis of their response and will consider revising up again after our next visit if all goes well.

Super upbeat and cute place to visit! Great music to put you in a good mood! Great find! Food was good and priced well - was a little disappointed they were out of biscuits so ordered the ham dinner and it was too Smokey for my liking. But we loved visiting and glad we decided to pop on!

We popped in because we were freezing and wanted something warm. We ordered both of the specials and were unfortunately disappointed by both. It's the first time in a long time I've tossed my coffee, but it was kind of gross. The service was also pretty mediocre as the barista made us feel like we were bothering her.

Cruddy bar, everything is over priced only accepts cash no charge cards nor debit either. As for me one visit was enough. I thought dumps like this were shut down years ago. They do have a package store attached. No reason to stop here unless you like high prices.
Not worth it. Service is slow even when it's not busy. Food is the worst of the places we've been to. Two for one beer is nice and the beers are good. Go somewhere else
Da bomb...Ditka would love this Chicago based joint. New manager had turned this place around!

best coffee i have ever had! The staff was so friendly, the chicken sandwich was amazing and the cheese fries are to die for! My sister and I are usually pretty hard to please but this is our new favorite place!
The shrimp and grits lived up to its reputation. The service was good. A really nice restaurant experience.
Love this place! It is so quaint and the food is wonderful. Love that they have plenty of GF options too!
Great bagels, but it is consistently the slowest drive through service all the time though :(
It took 30 minutes to get through the line and then when I got to the front the one employee in charge of all the food was breaking multiple food safety regulations.
Run of the mill Chinese food, carry out only. Not the best, but far from the worst. I had chicken with snow peas, $8 with an eggroll. Pretty good, I'll probably have it again.
Great food, amazing musicians and the best staff I've experienced in a long time! Go now.
Wish they had La Colombe close to me in FL.......been coming here for too many years to count. Great coffee, tea, vibe, best place for people watching. Wish it were bigger.

Really, really wanted to like this place but just couldn't. The service was great but the baguette made me keenly aware that I'm gluten intolerant which I was hoping to avoid at a gluten free restaurant. Maybe it just wasn't my thing, but I think they can do better.

This place is for little kids and grandmothers. We had salads and pizzas. The food lacked spice. The pizzas would be perfect for a six year old child's birthday,while the dressings on the salads were bland.

This place would be nice if it were in the city but its severely out pf place here. Over priced martinis that are not the best and the food is something that needs to we worked on. Found it to be overpriced....not really worth it

When you need wiper blades changes ASAP, Take 5 is the place. The tech had my new blades changed with 10 mins and cleaned my windshield without leaving a single streak. This is such a great service for those of us who hate to have to buy wiper blades and change them ourselves. Pricing is reasonable and once again convenient. No appointment needed.
Amazing chicken cheesesteaks and you can order them for delivery via popular food delivery services as Caviar or Uber Eats

One of the worst furniture buying experiences ever. Bought a new sofa and then they delivered the beaten up floor model. We refused delivery. Terrible customer service. They never made it right. Will never shop there again
The worse service , orders are always late and not correct - workers are rude about it being slow - app does not know the correct time your order will be ready

The front office staff is rude and unprofessional, especially Kim. I assume the manager must not be any better considering she lets her staff speak to tenants/guests so rudely. They are uninformed and have no understanding of tenants laws. I'm not sure how this place isn't swamped with lawsuits.

Stopped in for breakfast a few weeks ago. I had sausage and eggs, the boyfriend had 3 eggs and bacon. Decent food, nice staff, cozy spot. The coffee was good too. Seems like a reliable place for breakfast/brunch and coffee.
The views are amazing and the layout is really cool with the fire pits and the lighting. It's kind of expensive was the only thing. It has its own elevator to get there!
Older hotel not very clean or updated in bathrooms. Bay side view is worth the money however the shared patios lack the privacy to leave the curtains open.
We saw the review and gave it a try. It was disappointing, as the utensils were not clean and our waitress was not friendly at all. The food was alright.
Love Frenchy's on the beach. Get the view overlooking the beach. I hate paper straws!

Not vegetarian friendly and overpriced to boot. I have been twice and both times I ordered the pizza and salad because, well, because I pretty much had no other options. The first time it was ok....nothing to write home about. The second time, the pizza was a dry little chip of charcoal (granite?) and was inedible. Shameful for the price they charge.
came and waited 25 minutes on a sunday morning during memorial day weekend. shrimp & grits french toast awesome for both! don't know if worth the wait!

This will be a short review. The ambiance is awesome. Helpful wait staff. Comfortable seats. Lots of room. The food is pub style and not the greatest quality, but certainly not bad. Expect bar food, a drink or two (if that's your thing) and a movie of your choice. Bottom line, I will be back.
This is some of the best coffee I've ever had. Great atmosphere! Great location as well. The new hazelnut latte is awesome.
Was excited to try Homage for some time now. Unfortunately didn't get to, walked right out shortly after entering. terrible customer service

Found staff to be incredibly rude and disinterested in providing service. Upon walking in one employee wouldn't even get off his cell phone long enough to help me. The other came across as smug while providing no real information. I will not shop here again.

Overrated !!!! My waiter forgot to bring one of the appetizers and still put it on the check . Ordered the "Horiatiki salad " and my waiter told me they were out of tomatoes !! :O .... Ordered two side small tsatziki , only got one and just realized I payed for 2 . The worst place ever ! never going back !!!

This place does the trick if you need a Timmy's fix. It's not the best layout when there is a big line up and there is no drive through. They do have friendly staff, a decent amount seating and parking.
Music was too loud, I couldn't hear to order. When I finally got my unwhich it was all falling out, they didn't use enough lettuce.

Best food ever!! They always remember people by name which to me is always welcoming and quite honestly the reason why I came back a second time. The food is always on point and spectacular and they give you plenty. Tip; try the Nutella cheesecake.

My wife and I are regulars in Sundays for breakfast. We arrived on 12-13-15 for breakfast we were turned away due to a Santa something or other going on. Reservations only. This really rubbed us the wrong way today. We will go back but my thoughts have changed.

A bunch of miserable attitudes trying to outdo each other's rudeness so they can compare with one another. Damn shame that no one has called an end to this ridiculous form of customer service. Driving to another location is well worth it. Hopefully, automated systems will put all of these rude examples of customer service back into fast-food restaurants. Poorly managed for sure.

Nope. This is pretty nasty. The best thing about this place is the way the restroom doors are appointed. The hot table offerings are lukewarm. The sushi is gamey. There is a toilet aroma near some of the food. We were just passing through the area. Should have stayed that way.

I have mixed feelings about this salon. Some of the stylists and technicians are good; others are comparable to Supercuts. The salon itself is pretty, but it's pricey and the manager at the front desk is very pushy. Even though this location is walking distance from my house, I try to go there as infrequently as possible.

This store is an utter disaster. The inside is visually unappealing and there is never enough cashiers. The cashiers they do have are unfriendly and rude. I will never shop here again and will pay the extra across the street at Publix.
Delicious omelets, breakfast bowls, and waffles. Great stop on the way out of a NOLA weekend
Was first customer today. Ham and cheese omelette was lukewarm and I could barely see any cheese. Hash browns burnt to a crisp. Coffee was hot. Waitress was indifferent. Probably won't be back.

This place was pretty great. I had a Gogi Bowl with steak extra Seoul sauce. They move pretty quick too which is an A+ in my book. the ambiance was pretty chill and with the right group of people itll make a dope hang out spot.

Came here after visiting the Arch. We had the pretzels for appetizer and the beer cheese. Our group ordered barbecue chicken flatbread, chicken sandwich and chicken Cesar salad. All were very good. Favorite beer was the Honey Wheat
No annoying up selling here. You get what you pay for a quick professional oil change.

Cabana is always a regular when we're visiting Nashville. Hey pasta and steak issues are wonderful. We have gotten the cabana a couple times on special occasions but sometimes just sit at the bar and have a beer or a cocktail and enjoy a quick dinner or a small plate. Cabana is amazing you will not go wrong give it a try
The service was Ahmazing! The Meat burrito was delicious and served with great sauce!! The ambiance is real chill! I recommended this place to anyone visiting New Orleans or who lives in the city!
Super greasy beignets.. I would not recommend this place. Go to Cafe du Monde instead just a couple more steps away.. Its the original and so much better!

I've been here twice now and both times I've had a 5 star experience. Most recently my best friend and I came on a Sunday and had mimosas with the chicken and waffles and the veggie burger. The flavors were outstanding, the service was great, and the atmosphere was perfect.

this place had a good college coffee shop vibe with plenty of busy bees studying and people chatting. I like the Scottsdale location more, because they were more accommodating to personal request. Might have to do with the level of traffic each one gets. Still a good place for an espresso.
Store is very busy and not very clean. I stopped by a Frys in Yuma that was first rate. Why doesn't Tucson deserve that?
This is NOT. A place for parties over 4. No seating for large parties. The kitchen is very small. The poor staff gets no clear direction from the management. Everyone runs around in chaos
Went here for lunch and had an almost unremarkable experience. Didn't seem to be any different than say Whole Foods sushi.

This place is a legit old school Italian sandwich shop. Their sandwiches are big and good! And the workers def know how to entertain their guests! Hinter: Their sliced deli meat and cheese are sold by the pound and cheaper then the grocery stores! AND they only have Boars head!
Used to love this place when they first opened, but went to the new location on Speedway recently and was disappointed in the lack of service and the food. Won't be going back.
Great plumbers, come on time and very reasonable pricing. You don't pay the service guy directly, they send a bill. What a way to do business!!!

Tried this place for the first time yesterday and had their chicken tacos. They weren't that great and there were pink pieces in the chicken that I cut off but obviously didn't do a good job. I got very sick when I got home. We will not be going back.

Just revisted Oishi last week and reminded myself - I gotta get in here more often! Love their rolls. Always taste fresh and are well prepared. We usually get a selection of favorites - Oishi, Zen, Dynamite, and St Louis. Oishi Sushi - yeah, that's how we roll!

Large portions, carry out was on time and packaged well, manager brought my order to me. You could tell that he cared about his job and was very gracious for the business. Lacking one star as the mostaccioli was not a meat sauce. Probably my fault but anywhere else we get that it's a meat sauce. Salad was delicious

Fun place to visit, whether I will actually shop here is a different question. Like any other market, watch out for the tourist traps, have fun but be judicious. I agree with other reviewers saying that it is a much better market than Grand Central in NYC. A must-visit if you are in Philly for a visit, and even if you live there.

Bad food horrible service restrooms dirty, when we complained they called police and asked us to leave.The worst thing the rent a cops actually did ask us to leave or go to jail.Realy for complaining about the ladies room.Sad

I ordered the Thai Thani Salad, $8.99 It's just a house salad! Oh with a little special dressing, my partner liked the fried rice but wow $9 for a little salad. Everything is a bit expensive here but what a cheap looking salad

Had a blast at this venue for a LeCrae concert! The atmosphere was great, and although the line for entrance was crazy long we got in pretty quick. Sound was awesome, it actually brought to my knowledge how bad my phones sound recording is. But I'm definitely going back

its over oriced and not worth it delivery was 44 minutes thats no biggie i guess but. the food just was not good pizza overall find another pizzeria im from voorhees new jersey i like greasy slimy new york BIG PIZZA. and this was just not up to my standards

I know it was a holiday weekend but when I received my pizza it wasn't cooked all the way and had to put it in my oven to finish cooking it just in order to eat it. Not sure if I will order from there again.
Food was excellent and of course the music was top notch. Amazing to hear the songwriters sing their own songs!

Great beer selection but I haven't eaten there. Love the "pig-themed" decor. Try to get the lounge seating in front - comfortable chairs and couches with inexplicable kid-art and pig tchochkes abound. Last time I was there the bartender was really sullen to our group, not sure why. Can get crowded, making the bar hard to access.

This place is great! We made a reservation and were taken immediately. Our server was Richard. He was excellent. I would definitely want him as my server next time as well. Very prompt, friendly, nice and gave great suggestions! My recommendation would be the burrata salad. Amazing!
Great service, cute place, good food. Vegan Pho!
The bagels are pretty darned tasty, but they always seem to mess up at least one thing in our order (e.g. sausage in an egg wrap when we asked for no meat, the wrong cheese, etc).

Went there to get a fill and a pedicure massaging chairs squeak , over priced on pedicures. 30$ for a regular polish pedicure. Tran nails does the same thing they do for 20$. Poor acrylic work. Not happy.

Ben is one of the greatest artist, I have had the pleasure to meet. He is The best hair specialist I have ever encountered in my life. No one will ever cut my hair except Mr. Ben DeCordova. He also has a specialty men's grooming room, WOW,an experience that every man should make the time for.
Fuck uber bunch of assholes running the company to coward to respond to a bad experience
Had a great experience in the ER until it was time to sign out.....been waiting for a long time just to sign papers....waiting on a nurse???This is crazy...two hours waiting to sign a paper???
This place was great. The waiter Marco was the man. Great music were able to seat 10 people not all at once. Great unpretentious spot in center city

DO NOT GO TO THE ROCK HILL LOCATION. THE restaurant brought every dish out cold. This is my first time at this location, we usually go to the university city location on Olive. When I told them about the food being cold I could see him microwave the plates.

Robert definitely does his job right!!! He is very sociable and knows how to sell a good pitcher (or two) correctly. Overall, when I was here at least there wasn't much happening. It was very calm compared to the bar next door. I wish they had darts or something to occupy our time (maybe I just didn't see them).

I've been here before to use the driving range. Everything was fine. Tonight though,, they said the range was too wet to use. It didn't even rain today, but whatever. We asked to mini golf instead and they said they had already shut that down too. We called the Brandon location and they were open and running no problem. Is something going on?
Called to order two prime rib dinners to-go, but upon answering my call they immediately put me on hold. After 6 minutes (timer on my phone), I hung up and ordered from another restaurant.

Very good atmosphere, and food. We were a guest at a local hotel and decided to walk over for lunch and it was so good, we went back for dinner and breakfast the next day. Well worth the travel, food is excellent and the service was great, friendly and quick. I will be back

Based on reviews, I bought a half sheet chocolate cake for my youngest's first birthday party. It was $48! Meh. Cake was very dense, not fluffy at all. Frosting was too sweet. Cake was no better then genuardi's at half the price. Viking in Ardmore or any whole foods bakery produce a much better cake
Service was ok. I asked for a well done pizza. Everyone at my table got their pizzas overcooked except me. Taste was ok. Sadly, I've had better tasting pizza from the frozen section of the store.

Great selection of pet clothes out of all the pet stores I have been too including Target, Walmart, and Petsmart. We adopted our second pet from their adoption days in coalition with the Southside Humane Society about 2 years back and I have been very impressed. Our puppy was in good health and we received a coupon and lots of information.

before changing management, this place had decent food. now, my last 2 trips have proved to serve up some HORRIBLE pizza - sparse on toppings, thin cheese, thinning crust and that's on the sicilian pie which is supposed to have a thick crust. the new management is skimping on service and food and i will NOT be returning. buh-bye!

We had a very strange issue with our brand new 2015 Dodge Ram truck. They kept working at it until it was fixed. They are fantastic, great at customer service, and knowledgable. I highly recommend their service department.
Yuk yuk yuk! The fish looks dehydrated and didn't taste good. Can't believe how gross this place is.

Very glad to see this place open on this side of Greenwood. The have a huge menu offering of classic and unique subs and sandwiches. I mean, they even have the "rocky balboa".. How can you not like a place that has a sub named after Rocky. Any way, give it a try. They offer both hot and cold sandwiches, soup and salad.
Cheese steak is great, they literally take a fresh meat, and start cooking it in front of you! Great place to try a steak if you're visiting reading terminal!

Love the food here, very authentic my favorite tacos are the pork ones (al pastor).. the empanadas and tortas..it's always clean if you go early morning you can still smell the mistolin ..prices are fair, because the food is great

Good chicken.. the original sauce was great.. ordered 10 original and 10 insane.. neither really that hot but the original sauce was very good.. maybe fries could be better but I didn't come for fries so not a big deal.. 9/10

Restaurant #313 bought a shake and glass was broken manager offer to give me a half of shake because I had only a half left .not sorry the glass was broken I replace with new Shake not jack not my fault the shake glass was broken

The perfect place to go for a special dinner. The food is great and the garlic rolls so good. If it's a birthday or anniversary, this is the place! Atmosphere and service was great. Menu gigantic, something for everyone
Fast service but way too expensive and they try to up sell you on a MILLION different things.

Took delivery of my new GS today from Dave, wow what a good experience. He made things smooth and had most of the p/w ready when I got there so wouldn't have to get stuck in rush hour. I would have to say one of the best experience I have had buying anything.

Panera has a good combination of quality and quick service. There are numerous options for breakfast or lunch and the breads are rather delicious. I like the fact that I can get a breakfast sandwich here that actually has vegetables on it rather than just meat or cheese as options. The seating area was reasonably comfortable and not overly busy during my visit.

So, my family was so excited to go to Gabby's for a great lunch but we were let down :(. The burgers were over cooked and the sweet potato fries were a hot mess and way too greasy. Disappointed to say the least for the price. Average at best and in my opinion, not worth the visit.

Pros: The staff was attentive and friendly. The food was really good. Went with 3 other people and everyone enjoyed their food. Cons we had an 8:30 reservation and didn't get seated until 9. Understandable because it was NYE and there were heating lamps outside so it wasn't too cold while we waited I'll be back for sure!

Very friendly staff. They are professional. The massage was relaxing and well done. Not 5 star because I have had many massages over the years and I've had better ones. However, good experience and relaxing morning.

Some of the best wings in the area. They are bigger than most everybody else's. Wings also come with a side which is unusual and some side sauces. Only complaint is the wings are not very saucy and would be better if they were more wet
Its a diner. Its greasy, smoky and very dive-y. But that's sort of the pre-requisite to being a diner. The food is good, greasy but good. Seating at tables is limited to 4 people. Cash only!

Stopped here while traveling to Denver from Virginia. I tried to make it a point to eat healthy on the trip. I was very satsified with the Acai Bomb smoothie and the Tofu Wrap. I would stop here again if I'm ever passing through St. Louis again.

Burger was great. Cooked perfectly, but nothing special. Packed for brunch specials. Seem to have awesome election of cocktails and awesome bartenders. Was there for food, don't really drink. Def would go back. Atmosphere was great too.

Enjoyed lunch here today -- a veggie burger that was fine (definitely seemed home-made) on bread that was so-so. perhaps the bread was gluten free or some such thing and that's why it didn't taste good. Was a nice quiet place for lunch.

We had an excellent experience here, my boys loved the race track. The track area has seating where you can watch the cars and it does get pretty hot out there but there is also an inside lounge area that is well air conditioned and has drinks and snacks.

The reviews are pretty spot on. I will say the taste and texture of their pizza is similar to an undercooked Tony's Pizza. You know... The pizza we ALL had in elementary school. Just imagine that with over cooked/stale crust. Enjoy your drunk ness though

Love this place. Reminds me of back home. Good service, the portions are phenomenal, and the food is delicious. I can never be disappointed with this place. I mostly go here on weekends to relax and enjoy an awesome breakfast.

I would love to tell you how great their chicken is or isn't, but because they decided to close 30 minutes early on a night when I went out of my way to eat there I have no idea. If this is any indication of how they do other things I would stick with Princes: it always satisfies.
My absolute favorite shop in Nashville. I bought very unique earrings from a very unique store owner. Treat yourself next time in Music City by visiting Karma.... you'll it!
Food is very good but expensive. Could be a lot of fun with large group. Not all that much better than other sudhi places.
Awesome practice!!!! They are like a machine, all moving parts move perfectly!! You never wait very long and doctors give you as much time as you need!!!
Great selection of craft beers and well above average pub food.

DO NOT GO TO THIS BAR!!!! I was charged $20,000. Yes, twenty THOUSAND dollars and they will not answer nor do they have an answering machine so there is no way to get in contact with them which is by far the worst management I've ever experienced. If there were negative stars, they'd get 5.

Garbage skincare. The guy stands outside the store handing out garbage skincare samples in hopes that unsuspecting Americans will fall victim to their shady sales tactics. Don't be fooled. They sell trash skincare and research them online. I can't believe they are allowed to have a store on state st. They are like trap door spiders. PATHETIC!
No complaints, decent hospital, friendly staff. Some facilities are more modern than others. Parking spotty, but generally okay.
My friends and I came here for a quick lunch. The fried wontons that we started with tasted great. I plan on coming back with my family. Great place.

The care for my dog is good but the 9.50 PPE fee added to each visit is a bit insane. Curbside visits to mitigate risk, sure. The cdc literally says that the risk of animals spreading COVID-19 to people is considered to be low. The 9.50 PPE fee is another money grabbing scheme.

Went here for for the first time for Mothers Day dinner. Pretty nice inside. 2 out of the 3 items I ordered were unavailable (disappointed). A champagne drink and the pretzel. Waitress offered different item complimentary for other items not being available. Was pretty hot upstairs (no air conditioning). Overall ok experience.
Owner is awesome. Best place to get a great locally made hot wing sauce, Griffin's. So many sauces to choose from.

I was hoping that I would not have to replace my whole microwave. It stopped heating but was still coming on. Salim responded quickly and was here within 30 minutes if my first call. Within another 30 minutes he had disassembled the microwave and ran tests to figure out the problem. Then he fixed it, even going beyond. Highly recommend

Nice ambience, great service, but the food was not great. I ordered a savory waffle with granola & feta cheese which was not very good. My sister ordered the bird is the word which was very good. We had a chocolate cake & chocolate chip cookies for dessert which were good!
Food was pretty good for the most part. I had the chicken panini and the chicken was a tad bit dry aside from that it was overall an enjoyable brunch.

Food is almost always good, the reason it gets 3 stars is because the service is consistently bad. I mean bad over a span of at least 3 years. Waitresses are unfriendly and its almost impossible to get promt service. The only reason we go back is because the food is good.

Very disappointed. Not the place it used to be. There was only one vegetarian item on the menu. The salad was not tossed well and looked messy. The service was uncaring. Rolls and drinks and water were not replenished. We were seated at a table where one of our guests was constantly bumped by staff and customers.

Arrow came out the day I called and unclog my outside drain quickly. They only charged $94 with a 30 day guarantee. The guy was very professional and answered all my questions. Great company, I definitely recommend then for your plumbing needs.

Such a let down, mani pedi most expensive in area. I was rushed through. Woman just getting pedicure was longer than my 2 services. Polish was off in a couple days, worst pedicure, felt like a polish change.

Great place that is convenient, customer service is always too notch. I hate how they don't have prices posted anywhere for service. They can be a bit expensive, I recently had 1 paper notarized and 2 copies made and it was $17.00. Seems a bit high for less then 5 minutes in the store.
Went there last week and was very disappointed in their food. Very bland not to mention frozen shrimp. So if you order stay away from the seafood

Terrible service. Small sushi slices. Were out of half the specialty rolls. No waiters, chefs, people in the back wearing masks. Was a huge disappointment, but when our waiter started the night by banging his leg into our table and declaring that it happens to him all the time, we should have known. Strongly recommend you avoid this dump.
The place was very nice. We were interested in visiting because it is the oldest bar in the USA; candlelit. Visited by many stars.

For $10 the place is definitely somewhere you need to visit. Although it would be fun if they had a happy hour or something. It's interesting and just something you don't see elsewhere. If you have time, wander around the neighborhood to find more mosaics.

Great decor and attentive waitstaff. I had the shrimp and grits, which was delicious! The reason I gave one less star was because the portion was very small for an entree. There were 5 medium sized shrimp into of very little grits. On the other hand, my girlfriends got the vegetarian meatloaf entree which was a good-sized portion.
It's a dog track, but for $40 with cart who cares. A great place to get your game in shape before embarrassing one's self in front of one's friends.

The worst company I've ever interacted with. They lie on the airport's website and say they're located at the airport. Not true. You need to take a shuttle a while away to get the car. So that's bad. Just don't do it.
This gas station has the highest gas prices ever. They're alright as a convenience stop, but their gas is insanely high.

This place was a ton of fun. Reasonably priced brews and a somewhat oddball selection of eats. My sister-in-law loudly proclaimed should would bathe in the beer cheese dip; pretzel was to die for. Avoid the sandwiches; focus on the small plates. Lost a star because the video games didn't work right and the funky smell that permeated everything. But I'll be baaaaaaaaaaack
We went for the Lebanese fest Saturday night and I thought the food was great!!! The entertainment was pretty good although we didn't stay too long. I just wish that there was more stuff.
The team of doctors here have a huge knowledge base and really care about each of their patients. I always feel better when I leave this clinic. You have to check them out, it's truly life-changing!

I am so happy that my artist, Colt, helped me honor my dear friend. Colt, took the time to make sure each and every detail was there. The staff was attentive and the shop was in pristine condition. Colt will definitely be doing my next tattoo!

If I could give this place no stars I would. Sat at the bar and waited over 30 minutes for a Frisco that was somehow still cold by the time it came to me. The fries were horrible. Shake was pretty good. Watched as the cook threw food around on the grill. Won't ever be back.
I had the chicken sandwich and a friend had a burger. We decided to cut each in half so we could try both. Both sandwiches were good

Giving it 4 starts because of the amazing bread. My family had the lasagna and I had the chicken with rosa sauce. This was too salty for me and not enough vegetables. It was just okay. But I heard the lasagna was pretty good with a lot of sauce. Anyways my favorite part is the bread its so good to stuff my face with
I've never had to wait 45 minutes for lunch. Everyone around us is waiting for food also. The food was average but our server was good and super apologetic. Won't come back at lunch.

I really like supporting local small businesses, but I won't be supporting this one. Why would I go into a store where the employees are condescending and require face coverings? Pet People or PetSmart is down the road and worth the drive.

I love to play pool here. The games are only a dollar and they have like 5 tables. They also have shuffle board and the buck hunter game. Great selection of unique beers. I almost always go for the state street stout which is delicious. Come here for pool and yummy beer
General tos chicken was horrible... the driver that came to pick up was begging for more of a tip. Never again... fast delivery

Fantastic restaurant. The ambiance is wonderful, the live music is a great touch. Good place for brunch. Had the hot ahi tuna bowl and the spicy Brazilian, both delicious. Good sized portions and reasonable prices. Will definitely be returning!
