The food is always great. I've eaten here severL times. They have a partially open kitchen and you can see into the cooking area. This morning, I saw one of the cooks take a bite of food and then he went back to preparing my breakfast. No glove change, no hand washing. This is pretty gross for a commercial kitchen.

The Hampton Inn and Suites was a very nice hotel, actually more than I expected. It was clean and the staff polite and helpful. The complimentary breakfast was actually more then I expected, a nice variety of cereals, eggs, waffles, juices, coffee, etc... So if I ever go to an event to the Oaks Convention Center, I'm staying here.

Stopped at the Colfax location today! This location is super clean and the customer service is amazing!! The sandwich was the best deli sandwich we have ever had (and we're dinosaurs age wise)!! We will definitely be returning!!
Good for football/soccer. Nice food and really good bar - magners on tap and guinness.
Staff is not very responsive. Sat at a table and no one waited on me. Then went to bar. Got a drink pretty fast. Had to ask twice for a menu; then had to ask someone to place my order...

Terrible speed, quality and they had to remake my burger and the 3 customers behind me. The burgers are $8.00 for the same size burger off the dollar menu at McDonald's. If this restaurant want to keep customers it need to up the size burgers

Better than Neshaminy, but not by much. Their stores tend to be stocked well, and there's a good selection to pick from there. The design isn't confusing or tedious to navigate, so that's a plus. It keeps losing a lot of it's stores though, and the end near the closed Boscovs is quite depressing. A very 'meh' mall.
This place is great eat in nice and clean or take out really fast service one of my favorite places to eat the food is delicious... I got the steak fajita potato it's huge enough for lunch tomorrow

The owner, Fred Bullard is a crook and I would never support these shady, slimy and dirty business people! He left 20 people out to dry without a job and tried to scam us into signing a lease that was unconscionable! Stay away! Do not support these disgusting people and any of their restaurants or hotels!

Very disappointed with my visit to saad's restaurant. Order cheese steak and maroush sandwiches. Cheese steak has a lot of meat without any flavor . Maroush chicken has very rich tazaki sauce which didn't add a good flavor to the chicken. In addition to that the owner is very rude and not welcome at all. Never again
You won't be disappointed! Friendly service, fantastic fresh food. Our family tried a gyro, falafel salad, and the combo platter. Everything is top notch! We'll visit again for sure!

The bagels? Delicious. The schmears? Not so much. My lox needed more lox, especially since you charge more for it. And since you have all those Community Coffee varieties, get a dark roast out there. I have to drink that Cafe Special crap when my sister visits. Dreadful.
Since my last one star review "disappeared" he we go again. Food is lousy. Meat always overcooked.

I have been to several car museums across the country and this definitely is one of the finest. The collection is amazing, with all eras represented and finely curated. The condition of the cars was exquisite The layout of the museum was just plain cool too - I loved the flow and the historical scenery that was incorporated into the museum. A must visit!

This is just an average sushi restaurant...Nothing special. Been there a couple times and it was good...not great. I will go back again sometime though just because it's convenient to the hotel I typically stay at while in Tucson.

I stopped in here for lunch during the Gecko Fest. Sat by the window and had a water view. Service was excellent and very quick on drink refills. I only ordered a chicken salad plate, nothing fancy or cooked but it was tasty with the raisins in it. I saw some cooked dishes go by that looked delicious and huge for lunch time.

Nice staff nice atmosphere. However, for a deli my pastrami sandwich was kinda skimpy. The star of the sandwich was overshadowed by the bread and the slaw. Still tasty enough to eat though. Too much competition in this town to skimp.
Terrible breakfast buffet Shame on you Terrible DRY eggs No breakfast sandwich Worst WF ever
For a fast food place, they are really slow. The other night it took about 5 minutes to get a small shamrock shake. If there was another option I'd take it but in new hope, pa there is nothing.

I had a scheduled appointment for Saturday 12:00-5:00pm. They never showed. When I inquired about it they told me in so many words that they forgot to put me on the schedule. And wouldn't make it right either. Terrible customer service. Where do I send the work order information?
Love this store! Sherry is always so helpful with picking the shades to match the room. Relaxed atmosphere. Tons of wallpaper samples. Love Benjamin Moore paint too!

I made it to the shop 15 minutes before the place was closing. Donald was so cool and only cared about my tire fixed. I was there for 20 minutes while he not only took care of my tire, he helped two more customers. Very good experience.

1.5 stars for atmosphere. .Half star for food. I had the crawfish mac & cheese. It had absolutely no taste for flavor. Out of the box mac & cheese mix sprinkled with something red-I guess that was supposed to be the crawfish. I have been to the Franklin location and thought it was much better.
The cupcakes taste like store bought birthday cake :( gelato was yummy very nice atmosphere

Food is really great. Drinks are great. BUT had bison burger and added cheese. Really $1.50 for a piece of cheese?? AND a substitute of onion straws $3. Really? ?? Onions are cheap. I don't mind paying for extras, but really. Service is very good.
Plain and simple these owners are rude and obnoxious. No idea of customer service. There are too many places to eat. I'll take my money elsewhere.
Shop there often. If they really want to promote a healthy lifestyle a bike rack would be nice
The chicken and hot sausage sandwiches are good. The fries are tasty as well. But lord have mercy!!! Answer the freaking phones!!
Fantastic restaurant for couples and groups, but get a reservation if you can. Make sure you get the BBQ shrimp... It's beyond amazing & it's not bbq'd!!
Keep these fools away. They make black people look bad. Just standing around insulting people that pass by. Get a job.

Would love to speak with the general manger of this particular location. Service was great but there's a particular matter I'd like to discuss about the downright out of line attitude a certain manager presented

Very noisy my very small portion of pasta was far from being cooked properly. Poor Service. I asked our Server for some crushed red pepper and she offered me a bottle of olive oil with red pepper on the bottom. Not a good experience will not go back
Loved the spicy tonkotsu ramen! Pork loin was tasty! There was a good amount of noodles and broth. Can't wait to try other ones!

The last thing you want to do when picking up flu medicine is waiting in a long line but that's what happens. Cashiers up front are painfully slow. I prefer Costco pharmacy prices but it's close to my house and the pharmacists are nice.
I had a blt and my husband had a cheeseburger. Fries were old. Had a chocolate shake which was pretty good. Onion rings were pretty good.

Very sloppy with updating their prices in their scanners. Watch your receipt because you will find errors. Store employees have the attitude of a wet mop. Must not get paid much. Might as well go to Aldi or Walmart for bad service and low prices, vs Schnucks for bad service and high prices.

Ok I have to say my favorite place is still Tony Luke's. But TL is different. Now if you want a good cheesesteak this is a good place to start. But if you get here during certain times of the the prepare to wait a bit.

Absolutely NO BAM. We were a party of eleven foodies who had high expectations. Alas, were were sadly disappointed. I loved the ambience, and decor. But the food, oh, just meh on so many levels. I'm sorry, I wanted to love this restaurant, but no. Service was spotty, food I fear was misrepresented, and we asked for hot sauce!!!!
Terrible old and dirty, in a truck stop. Food was awful,....greasy and tasteless. Booth and silverware were disgusting.

Excellent food but should show as a 4 $$$$. Drinks and food prices were surprisingly high. I can get same quality dinner for $ hundreds less just down the street. Better make sure someone else is paying.

I would give a zero star if possible. We entered this Logan's and after waiting about 10 mins. (no others waiting) we were seated. We waited 30-40 mins. no one ever came to even take our drink order. People that were seated after us, in other areas were served. Someone missed out, we always tip well. Logan's Roadhouse has gone downhill.
We ordered the infamous cheese steak and it was subpar. We did come here during the morning, but still no excuse for the cold meat and extremely stale bread.
2nd time here Just average, disappointed that there isn't a good BBQ place in the area Service was excellent

Food is great and uniquely middle eastern with zaatar spiced potatoes, cardamom scones, lamb shakshuka, bourekas, and challah French toast. And everything is absolutely delicious plus all of the employees working here that I interacted with were very nice. Can't wait until my next trip back to PHL!

We had Sunday brunch , I'm sorry to say service was not up to par! We arrived at 11:30 And left at 1:30 All glasses were empty for quite sometime before we were noticed. Food did not come out together.

What a great little store! Lots of cool items and the best part - infant and toddler punk/rock onesies and tshirts (of which we now have 2)... Basically, a must stop for us every time we are in town..
We went to Pie Town Tacos on a Thursday and it was empty and I do not understand why! The food is fantastic, the staff are friendly, and the patio is great.

The food was okay but The store was filthy. Most of the drinks were out of the drink dispenser there was no ice tea available. The staff was rude not friendly. The trash cans were fall and every table with sturdy. We had to clean the table off R (Cell). I will not go back to the store.
Joanne is a great life coach, got me back on my path and then some. Best reading ever based on your birth name and birth date - Joanne is The Soul Reader!

First visit and was really hoping to find a salon close by where I could become a regular. Got there at 2 for a 2 o'clock appointment. It was 2:45 before they got to me. Then it took over two hours for a root touch up. Will not be going back.

I don't know why this place has 2.5 stars so far, it was really really good, we got some sort of shrimp pasta with cream sauce and it was out of this world. The waiter made me a drink that wasn't on the menu, Caesar salad was amazing, bread yum. Who could complain? Nice decor, never been to one before.

The service was fine but the food was just not good. I ordered a sizzling plate with tofu. Tofu was hard. Very few veggies. I tried to like the sauce but just couldn't. It was too creamy. Food seems very cheap. Ordered a dessert of mango and sticky rice for like $5. One tiny slice of mango... $50 for mediocre food.

We were greeted by a grumpy lady that seemed to be bothered that we didn't have a reservation. This place was recommended because we are from out of town and one of us is vegan. The menu was very small and they have a byob policy, which was a deal breaker. The dining room was small and left a lot to be desired.
Very nasty place to eat inside. Dirty, filthy, and very poorly maintained restaurant. Floors haven't been cleaned forever and all counters have food on it.

This place has the best Cinnamon roll I've ever eaten. Locally owned bakery with Freshly made sandwiches and breakfast choices. We also had a Bacon Jack breakfast burrito which was very cheesy and a smooth but strong Americano coffee. The owners are very nice too. Comfortable and cosy atmosphere. Make it a point to stop in here. It's worth it!

Where is the media coverage of border Patrol agents dying from covid? Guess the media doesn't care about the influx of covid coming across our borders! Biden created a crisis here and abroad. Bringing thousands of afgans and illegals into America, while Americans are suffering! Good bye liberal media. You suck as much as this adminstration does!

Been there twice. Might go back but doubt it. Menu is small and has not changed. Really loud for dinner. Service is so so even at lunch time when it was not crowded. Food is just average, not memorable.
Great salon, I always leave happy. The only place I will go to get my hair done, highly recommend.
The pizza is pretty good. But stay away from the garlic sticks. It's covered in Thyme, like three inch sticks of thyme.

THIS PLACE IS AMAZING! I can't believe i've gone so long without knowing about it. There really is no place like it. The atmosphere is super vibey and chill. It's a great place to grab food and hang with friends. I can't wait to go back!

I just ate here for the first time in years even though I live across the street. The pancakes were bad and the meal was over priced. Not to worry, if you are searching yelp you are unlikely to eat there anyway.

Spent 20 minutes on the phone to be transferred back and forth with 4 employees who have a language barrier. I literally repeated what I was requesting 5 times and got nowhere. Never using sears again
Dined inside, ordered ahead. Very good crust and quality cheese. Fast service. Many options of crusts and toppings. Sesame crust is very good. Price is a bit high.

I waited for almost on hour for my food. The waiter was very dismissive and served customers that came in after us. The food was not the best quality. , it would be easier to just cook your own breakfast at home.

Popped in today to paint something with my 10 month old as a gift for his grandmother. Sounds like a nightmare right? It was PERFECT! They were quite busy but certainly not too busy to help me and my kiddo. We were in and out and shockingly left without being covered in paint. I'm excited to make this a tradition with my little one.

Delicious! The food is so good we didn't even take pictures. The tater tots and sweet potato fries were amazing!!! Would go back JUST for that! Great service. It was a cold Thursday night, but the food and service was just as good. We really enjoyed it and cannot wait to go back.
It wasn't terrible, but I won't be back. We had house salads and three sushi rolls. Not very impressed with any of it.
This is such great food and the atmoshere is awesome...price isnt bad either for the amount of food you get...recommendation. ...have some carrot cake
Ordered delivery. Food was tasty and they were careful with our special dietary needs. We'd go back.

Nice place. We stopped by after going to the Sunday market. It's a new place and it has nice vibes. Nice decor and live music. We were not very hungry so we only tried the mushroom pizza( liked it but would prefer it without the dressing on top...), kale salad, coffee and lemon olive cake. Will try the dinner soon.
Terrible customer service!! I asked to get my ring finger sized & they said "come back later, we're on our lunch." so I went to tiffany's & they were superbly helpful!!! Ask for jeffrey.

Nothing too impressive about this place. I had a hard time finding what I wanted because it is enormous. The person that helped us was pretty pushy about helping. Very expensive for what you get, so don't expect to find Mazzoro's prices or their warm atmosphere. Pretty trendy if you are looking for that. The gelato was good and the free water too?

Good cocktails. Super friendly staff. Clean. Oh, and really good cocktails. I loved the New Classics, cocktails taken from famous bars across the country during the cocktail boom of the aughts. There are classics from Death & Co, Milk & Honey, The Clover Club, and many more. That is a great feature to the menu.

Stumbled upon this place while visiting the area and it was the perfect lunch in between shopping. Chipotle turkey, jalapeno chips and a pickle were all so good! I wish there was a location in Minneapolis!
Service was good. Caesar salad was already turning brown, and coconut shrimp was WAY over cooked. Not a great experience. Others at my table had ok lunches.

I know car lots can be stressful. I have been to several of them in my life. This one has been the worst. When you drive in, there is a group of sales people standing outside ready for you. All eyes are you on when you arrive. This is one of the pushiest lots I have ever been to.
Nice place,but really nothing special. We had the root vegetables (which were excellent) and a raw tuna appetizer (which was "meh") as well as one of the flatbreads (also just okay).
Drove all the way there just for the kid to try and be a rude jerk and tell me that they were closed.. they close at 1am anf it was 13 minutes until 1.. Ok kids

I have eaten here many times. Great prices on breakfast, but today my son and I stood waiting to be seated for 5 minutes and although eye contact was made no one even acknowledged us so we went somewhere else.
Yum, Yum. Good and fast burgers the way you like them. Fries are also delicious. But no desserts or milkshakes.

I usually like this Taco Bell. Short lines and they get everything right. Tonight I went through the drive-through around 11pm and the cashier said they were open for delivery apps only. So call first to ask if they're open for customers.

If you have any interest in beer, beer making or Yuengling, this is a good use of 1-2 hours. They have two tours every day that are free and include a couple samples at the end. The tour gives you a look at everything from the beer-making to the bottling and everything in between. It's free and definitely worth a visit.

I like the specials they offer through email once you sign up. Sometimes the dishes are better prepared than others. It really depends on how is preparing because we had some great food and then some not so great. Not very authentic if you are looking for straight forward Asian food.

Requested deck seating, which was available but the hostess ignored that and sat us on the empty side of the restaurant. The food is nothing special, I say skip it and go across the street to the breeze!

Okay guys... great coffee...legitimately great... if you drink it with 2 cremes, 3 eye roles, 5 passive aggressive sighs, a general lack of compassion, and endless bad attitudes... customer service is awful and sad yall...
I can never find what I need hear and honestly when you walk in you get this dirty and gross vibe. There are also frequently dead fish and it smells.
I got the spinach salad with blackened fish for lunch. The salad was meh and the fish was sadly over cooked. Def not worth the $25 I paid for it.

Best subs, best subs, best subs! I hear the wings are good too, but damn...those subs. There's just no contest - if you're in Tucson, these are the best subs you can get, and they can easily hang with their east coast brethren.

This is the worst company to work for ! They are racist ! They treat they're workers like crap ! Especially the Allentown division ! After forteen year's of lost time , my husband is leaving ! What a shame that most companies don't appreciate their workers like they used to !

Used to be pretty good but quality has really gone down hill. Fast service but everything was barely warm. Everything tastes the same. A broccoli cheese omelette shouldn't taste like it was fried in bacon grease! No wonder its so empty in here. I would have gotten better food at the IHOP down the street.

garden burrito & Chile rellano burrito, the garden burrito was chicken! I ordered garden, the restaurant is not being sympathetic towards my order, they claim it's not their fault... I've never had issues with this restaurant before it's always been good food but the moment I have an issue they are not being helpful in any way. Here are the pictures.
Great lunch and Dinner spot to pick up and eat. Especially Garlic Wings, Love them !!
Took my family there during a recent visit to St. Louis. Everyone enjoyed their meal and I felt it was reasonably priced! I'd go back!

Great American restaurant with nice decor and friendly staff. The menu had good options and everyone in our party was happy with their meal. Restrooms are down a set of stairs, so I don't think they are handicap friendly. Would definitely stop by here again.

The service is abysmal. The waitstaff and "one of the managers" both seemed to be confused as to why we wanted our salads prior to the rest of the food coming out. Children are running through the restaurant like we're at the food court at the mall. My calamari was okay as was the salad.

Booked this a couple days before my trip and I was so surprised! The hotel was in a great location! A quick 8 minute walk to the reading terminal market and only 20 to independence hall. Staff were all extremely friendly. We went to the bar to order food and drinks late night and don was great!! I will definitely stay here again!!

Last night, I stopped here with two friends. We all ordered the same thing, decaf lattes. The place has an industrial-modern vibe, not exactly cozy on a cold winter night. The coffee was fine, with some de rigueur latte artwork on top (a pattern made with the milk on the foam). All in all, nothing to complain about, nothing to write home about.

I remember when this opened thinking it was the coolest place. It's deteriorated during the years. The upholstery hasn't been taken care of since it opened, filled with tears. The service was slow on my visit. Restaurant was dirty, none of the many open tables bussed. The food was not very good. Will never go back, personally.
It's alright mexican food. Everyone's a bit slow but it's okay. The tacos are alright too.
The food is pretty good, but over priced, and the atmosphere is very crowded and noisy. I think there are better places in Webster for dinner and drinks for a better value.

After reading all the positive views, I wanted to try out this place. I picked up take-out and found the portion size was small. I tried the salmon teriyaki, Yaka stir fry noodles and sushi. All were bland. The sushi rice didn't have enough vinegar mixture and the salmon teriyaki was overcooked. I will continue my search for a sushi place.
The food is great here, but the parking is a nightmare, really wish they would relocate to an area with more parking.
Music was horrible. I also had a bug in my drink. We stayed there maybe 30 minutes and left to find another place to go.

Sad to say but I end up with food poison from the lobster bisque soup. I eat soups all the time and when I had food poison, I could not eat anything for more than 24 hours. I would recommend everything else except the lobster bisque.

Accidentally booked this hotel for the wrong night for my husband who travels for business and always stays with Marriott. He arrived one day later, but they refused (even after multiple attempts) to credit us for the mistake. Super disappointed about this negative experience.

Food just like your well-intentioned but senile grandma used to make. The toast is either not toasted at all or burnt. Mediocre but undeniably all-American fare. The staff are super friendly, though, and the restaurant itself is bright, cheery, and clean. Good atmosphere; average food.

Mmm delicious. Who knew that Thai Coconut Milk + Hazelnut would taste so divine when they melt together? Absolutely unique and delicious. The place is really nice. It looks like a froyo place but it's better -- BECAUSE IT SELLS GELATO AND NOT FROYO. :) Pricey, methinks. Justify it by trying several flavors before deciding on a piccolo :P
Went here to get a bite to eat and the cashier handling the money was also handling the food with bare hands. I told him that was unacceptable and walked out.
Always get my nails done here. Always a great job, exactly what I ask for with my gel manicure.

The food is really only 3 stars, but the great beer selection earns it a fourth. The beer prices are good given that they are high-end, imported beers. The atmosphere is very nice and the staff are pleasant. If you enjoy expensive beer, you'll love this place.

Great restaurant for a quick and delicious breakfast. The service was very professional. We went on a Saturday at 9:00am expecting a long wait. However, this was not the case, even though the restaurant was packed. We were seated promptly. Our order for 4 people took about 10 minutes to get out. Next time I'm in Philly I will definitely stop back.

Been here twice. Once for happy hour and another for a Penn sponsered event. Drinks are a bit pricey but they tend to be heavy on the liquor so it's a tossup. Large space which hosts many different bands regularly. Nothing amazing or someplace i'd automatically choose for a night out. I'd come again if I was invited I guess.
The Bacon and Arugula pizza is my favorite in Reno! The staff are so nice and accommodating. Its pricy but worth it. I def recommend.

Sushi was passable. Tempura was underseasoned but well fried. But the pad thai was the worst I have ever had. It was so unbalanced. Too sweet, not enough salt. The noodles were a little undercooked. The lunch specials are great deals, but I'd skip the Thai food.

Poor service, DIRTY BATHROOMS, the lighting is that of a supermarket, no longer dark and it's very hard to see the screens, the servers were not nice, and the food was not very good. I will never return to Buffalo Wild wings!
Best ice cream ever!!! Thick, creamy, and delicious! They make everything themselves, including the cones which were just as good as the ice cream.
Cute little BYO. Their veal is really good!
Tried this place for lunch and really enjoyed it. Loved the bacon, egg, avocado and tomato sandwich! The service was good and prices reasonable.

Had dinner went early to avoid dinner crowd. Got Harry's Rib Eye. Very expensive, would be okay if it was good. The salad was wilted, steak tough. Great service, left a good tip. Can't beat the wonderful atmosphere, full of history and happy people.

It's your standard fare. Nothing over the top. It's just super loud and you feel like you have to scream at the person next to you. Did enjoy the garlic Parmesan wings. I'd be back but not dying to go back.

I'd like to give it 3.5 stars. It's a solid place. Typical bar food that's pretty tasty. The service is terrific. Everyone who I've encountered who works there is friendly nice and helpful. Also one of the spots that isn't a college bar on Main St. Can't get pretty crowded on the weekends. Great place to do lunch. Decent selection of craft beer too.

What happened to all the servers used to work here? Penang is one of my regular stops. But the servers who worked here god knows how many years are all gone. The new servers don't seem to know the menu very well. I don't get it. The food is still good. But the servers acted like the food is new to them. Disappointed!
We love yogurt beach! Good yogurt and toppings and always a friendly face when we come in! Tonight was no different. Thanks for helping us end a crummy day on a good note!

Name ist Programm. Hier kann man die berühmten Beignets mit Unmengen an Staubzucker verkosten. Sitzplätze drinnen und im Freien laden zu einem kurzen Stopp während der Besichtigung des French Quarter ein.
OMG! I had an amazing time. Me & a group of friends went out to see the lantern fevistal & it was totally a amazing. If it is still there, you must go & see.
great delivery option - fast, healthy and tasty

Worst Burger King ever been too, waited 20mins for a hot dog, and then bun was soggy. Also a friend got a burger and hers took 20 mins as well, and there was so much grease and sauce it was non stop dripping, bun was also soggy.
The BBQ is awesome. You must try the cracklins. This was my first time eating here. I kinda busy around lunch time so go early
Love the pizza here. However don't try to order online as they don't check orders. I've made two online orders and have shown up to pick them up at stated time and my order wasn't started.

I personally prefer Lyft. The drivers are friendly, the cars are clean, and their service is dependable. I have never been disappointed. I was given a promo code for Lyft $50 in free ride credit that I will share. STEVE371855

Sometimes when a restaurant is so busy the people who prepare your food don't really listen (or care). Like when you're asked if you want sour cream AFTER they've already placed sour cream on your burrito... yea, that happened...

Came hungry, left hungry! Really poor customer service. While waiting for our food, they told us after 30 minutes they don't have vada pav. The dosas we ordered were cold. Don't recommend coming with a group, ask if they have the item before ordering. We cancelled half of our order but they still charged us for the full order.

AVOID AT ALL COSTS That is unless being ordered to "get the f*** out" by the owner is your idea of a good night out with your date. This for just asking a question! Verbal abuse and ownership are a toxic mix. Nothing special about the rest either. Iron hill is a nice alternative after your ejection.

Service was super quick and everyone was friendly. Ordered a small iced Carmel cappuccino. Unfortunately, it is the worst Dunkin' Carm. Cappuccino I've ever had. I do no typically dish out more than $2 for coffee (if ever) and decided to treat myself on a rainy Monday morning. Tastes like the Carmel was completely forgotten or just a splash was added.
Pretty overrated place. It is like a gourmet version of IHOP. Super greasy food, nothing special. The plus side is the food comes in HUGE quantities.

Well I moved back to this neighbourhood on the weekend and was excited to be back within walking distance. As I was unpacking I got a little hungry. I ordered the ham and mushroom and just as good as ever. HIT the spot dead on. Still good. Be there.
This inspector actually LIED about several things in our inspection. Left things awry such as opened drapes, blinds when he left.

Made a reservation online for a 7 seater. When it came time to pick up, the only car available was a 5 seater. Did not have any other alternatives or did not seem to care to try and fix the situation. Please go elsewhere.

I have bought and sold real estate for the last 40 years or so and this is the worst company I have dealt with. They priced my unit and listed it and then did nothing and never brought me ONE offer in 5 months. I always did whatever they recommended, but they did not put any effort into getting it sold
Marathon is a solid choice especially for brunch. The service is usually pretty slow though, even when it's not that busy. It's got a nice ambiance and the food is fresh and tasty.

First off, the place is in the back of a bar. Which I good. After I ordered I went and got a beer. I ordered the meatloaf po'boy. It wasn't cheap. You will be alittle po after you pay for it. But, it was delicious. I think I may try the pork belly po' boy next.

This place is decent. My first impression is that it's overpriced but in terms of the quality (not taste) of the food, drinks, service, as well as the overall decor, maybe its worth it. That being said, will I go back? Probably not.
Its over priced and not that great of food anymore. It used to be decent food and good service, but that has since changed.

Ehhhhhh. Nothing exciting. Expensive for what it is and why is there 20 people working and standing around in the kitchen but it still takes long to get your order? I'll take a wendys instead any day.
This is the best in Indianapolis. Quite possibly the best in the U.S. Great staff, amazing food, and one sushi chef who makes small tight rolls that explode with flavor. Two words: LOUIS ROLL.

Most certainly a little on the pricey side but decent quality....chocolates and pastries and sandwiches (which tend to go fairly quickly). I've tried to get a decent latte there but without luck. Stick with regular coffee or some of their other tasty fare
What a joke! Awful food... Awful service. I won't waste my time going back there.
Omg the red velvet cake is a must try!!!! I'm definitely going back to try the lemon. Drinks are great too!
Always clean and well maintained. I shop Kroger's when ever I can. I travel a lot and they are consistent in what they stock.

first of all, garret is wrong about "jerry the plumber". the pricing is all wrong and they have never in 33 years of business in Santa Barbara carried the home depot contract. perhaps garret means the other Jerry's?! check your facts before you post..jerry the plumber is honest, fair and great to work with...ya gotta hate internet slander!

K...the cream cheese is over the top expensive. The staff, not so friendly. Not rude, just maybe shy? The bagels terrific! Chewy and delish. No one says you have to eat the cream cheese or the staff. Just buy the bagels, maybe a cup of coffee and enjoy some of the best bagels around. Yum.
Good dessert option. Definitely differ than the average sundae. I dug the chocolate waffle.
Worst drive thru ever. I have tried to give them the benefit of doubt but they screw up every time. Stead clear of this location

The worst Steak and Shake ever. The got most of the order wrong, cold and milkshakes not made well no blended filled a 1/3 of the cup with whipped cream. North Myrtle Beach had an amazing Steak and Shake this one was soooo disappointing!
Went here for Valentines day. Food and service were excellent. My only compliant is that happy hour specials are not allowed outside of the bar.

Beautiful building in a central location in the French Quarter. We had tag-team service, which was pretty speedy given it was the day before Mardi Gras. Our friends raved about the raw oyster appetizers and the bourbon flights, but we were all less-than-impressed with our po boys and fries, which were all cold when they arrived.

Very nice people and coffee was great . I enjoyed a breakfast sandwich here. The service was very efficient and very friendly. inside decor was well kept and very clear. It's a terrific local spot in Philadelphia's Washington Square West neighborhood.

I visited the restaurant with intentions of grabbing quick food before I started of my night. The service is not super quick BUT the food is fresh! The fried shrimp po boy was decent and the grits were average.

The entertainment was 5 star! The service was excellent, but the drinks were made inconsistently, and the food was just ok. You can go online to purchase tickets ahead of time and save on the door price.

The sandwich contents are good, but the bread is just awful. Wonder Bread, stick to your teeth bread. It is a disservice to the excellent contents. The new building is sterile and institutional and completely lacking in personality. And: why does a restaurant that closes a 7PM have four flat screens?
Great night life! Fun band that had a great song set. Everyone was dancing and singing along. Cold beer too!

Sucks... Regular water smells like fish. The guy serving was acting as if he was an owner and he was doing a big favor to us by serving the food. Food was very ordinary.. Only pro is that it's on Highway and if you are coming back from clear water beach it's easy to get in...

How can a chocolate shop be bad? This place was pretty decent, a little pricey for what you get but then again, you are buying fancy candy! I was able to get a great gag gift here, surprisingly! I found some chocolate handcuffs that said "Prisoner of Love" on them...at Christmas time! You just never know what you'll find!
Not as good as the old goat hollow. High priced drinks. Domewhat of a beer snob attitude sometime you just want a local ale not an ipa

Love Kuramoto! Have been going here for years. The staff is super friendly and attentive. The food is consistently really good. The sushi is terrific. Love their Miso soup! All the locals enjoy eating here so it's a lively friendly atmosphere.

My family always has a great time here! My 5 year old has been climbing here for almost a year. He has enjoyed it since his first experience. There really is something for every age and every skill level. Ocean is always very helpful!

Had what seem to me a bait switch. Charged me for a totally different tire n they put a cheaper one on I called them out on it and the did make it right. I just called now for a quote n the guy was rude n their understaff I'll be going to Fairview from now on
Fresh..different...long lines.... price well....would go back....had peanuts butter...yummy...almond joy....good
Horrible staff, waitress was rude enough to find my Facebook account and harass me on it over a tip.

As a person who recently stopped eating dairy and gluten, a dessert place like this is heaven on earth. I sampled the oatmeal cookie cream pie as well as a chocolate caramel donut. They were incredible. This is my new favorite dessert store!
Rip off for a Mexican TAKEOUT. $11.49 for a two item combo with rice and beans. $2.75+ for each taco,with no rice and beans. Nicos needs to drop their prices!

Absolutely delicious!!! The bread and the dipping sauce were so yummy. I ordered the caprese appetizer, and I love that the tomatoes and cheese were placed on top of bread! My boyfriend ordered the cheese pizza, and it was the perfect mix of sauce and cheese! I would definitely come here again!

I flew in and out of PHL this weekend. I don't fly much often spend time picking up and leaving folks off. Signage is poor and it's easy to miss a turn. My experience with PHL staff was positive and the restrooms were clean.
This was such a pleasant experience. Friendly staff, delicious food, romantic ambiance. Wonderful way to celebrate our 27th anniversary!
The food at this place is amazing. The staff are all very nice to the customers. Only reason I didn't give it a 5th star because I was still hungry after I left.
My friend discovered tonight that the restaurant's last day was yesterday. No explanation given. This totally sucks!
Middle of the road pizza joint. Gluten Free pizza takes 40 minutes and only comes in one size (medium). Waitstaff was friendly.

Delicious, dedicated gluten free (and 95% dairy-free) fare in a town that's a little lagging in the "allergy friendly" category. Bringing in Daiya has bumped their dairy-free savory dishes to the same 5 out of 5 as their desserts.
Very good selection. We went during a lunch crowd so it was fast paced. Enjoyed the lunch special. Will try it again when I'm back in Nashville.
Meet was decent. I've never met a potato I didn't like until I tried their potato salad. Disappointed for the price point.

This is my go to ice cream place as it is right down the street from me! Staff is always pleasant as well. Their kryptonite ice cream is my favorite. Their other flavors are very good too. They have very very creamy ice cream
Beers are a bit pricey, famous brisket nachos contained big pieces of fat, and atmosphere was plain. Went back to World o Beers!

When I visited Nolensville Dog Park the first thing I noticed was that there was no creek, which I thought there was. The second thing was that it was incredibly small and there was only one other dog. I gave it 2 stars because there were toys and water. I do not recommend.

So disappointed in Yelp or the Distillery as the hours are not correct. On a Saturday night when the main area is in full force they close at 11pm. My husband wanted good pizza so I followed Yelps reviews to find out they are not open and staff would not accommodate us since it was 11:15pm on a Saturday.
This is a place u go to just to coat your belly before a night of drinking on Bourbon street. Not fancy. Not good. Just convenient!

This is the absolute worst bar I have ever been to. The employees are the rudest people ever and when I went to make a complaint their did nothing but shrug. I have never been to such a horrible club in my life. I suggest never going to this club ever. Customer service is horrible. I hate this club. They should close down.
Stopped here for lunch while visiting Cahokia Mounds. Quirky little place but the food was really good.
Just a regular Starbucks. Nothing special. I came here for a Starbucks mug. Paid and then left. Ok service. Starbucks is Starbucks

There was a long line but we were seated less than 15 minutes. The waitress was very friendly and made you feel welcome. The food was superb. This is a great place to go for creole and cajun food in the same place.
Been here several times for meetings and had breakfast. Good Diner breakfasts. Had dinner at a buffet for another meeting. Typical Diner food with super service.
Cheap Chinese food that delivers. You know the rest. Not much else to say. These places are more frequent than McDonald's anymore.

Nice very restaurant. Has a good choice in food. The bar in patio is great with nice views of the Catalina Mountain. Very sound ingredients are used on the menu. I enjoy a long dinner here. Please enjoy for yourself.

Well i called the store and was told they don't always shave the rotors . I am out of my money and had to spend another 120.00 to fix the problem... my lesson maybe next time i will try a MOM and POP shop..
Good food and reasonable prices. A nice place to eat near the beach.
Always have enjoyed East Beach Tacos. The family will take a road trip from L.A. to Santa Barbara just to eat at East Beach Tacos and swing at some baseballs at the batting cages on the same grounds.

We got snapper with veggies and potato. They forgot the potato and veggies were salty. The fish wasn't that impressive for a fresh wharf food. We also got fried calamari that wasn't really fresh in my opinion
Seriously, don't waste your money here. You will regret ever going to this salon. I had such a horrible salon experience here!!!!!!

Simple menu but the food lacks. The wings were dry and lacked flavor. The fries were soggy and bland. The cheesesteak was alright. The service was decent. Would probably recommend going elsewhere if you're craving wings.
Small plates! Some things are a straight up rip off! Three chicken wings in sauce with Shishito peppers: $17!!!! Be VERY careful when ordering. On second thought ... go somewhere else!

This is probably one of the best Indian restaurants I've ever eaten at. The food is fresh and so delicious and the location is beautiful, both outside and inside. I would highly recommend this place to anyone looking for very high quality Indian food. Also, the owners were very friendly. I would like to come back to Santa Barbara just to eat here.

This place blows. I was there at happy hour on a Friday night and there was only one bartender working the packed saloon upstairs. Also, the crowd was disgusting. I won't be going back there anytime soon.

When my parents moved to Fishers for a year, this was our go to restaurant. Everyone in my family always could find something to eat! I loved their sandwiches, but my favorite thing was their onion rings. So lightly fried and thinly sliced. YUM! If I ever make it back to Fishers I'll be there!
Tucson's best restaurant with Tucson's best waiter, Kamran. Ask for him by name!

Extremely thorough and helpful. I honestly think this is the most polite staff of any medical office I have ever been to. Dr. Woods is a very friendly optometrist and was able to diagnose my eyesight issues perfectly. I'd highly recommend Eye and Vision Care.
Online ordering system very flawed, found bug in food. I have posted a photo. Chicken Korma is good when it doesn't come with "extras" .

Farotto's food is below average. The wait staff is great, but cannot make up for the food. Their pizza is St. Louis Style, which I happen to enjoy, and their toasted ravioli is also a delectable St. Louis specialty. But these are the only two items on the menu worth eating. Everyone around me was disappointed with the quality of the food at Farotto's.
Greasy bar food. Ala carte menu makes for expensive meal. Old bay on soggy fries; what's the big deal?

A solid choice in the Comcast Center - but by no means a Holy Grail. Betetr than the sit-down Mexican Post locations. Meh-x-ican, I usually play it safe with beans, rice and guacamole. (Or a chicken burrito) Not bad - but not mind blowing. Fairly priced. QUICK service even during the lunch rush.

Love getting my nails done here...they do a great job and are very friendly! I also would get my hair cut or hair done here because of their great reputation. I recommend the nail salon here for sure! The only downfall is that it's a little pricey for nails....The staff is very respectful and courteous !
My husband and I just had breakfast at your restuarant. I had the veg omlete and husband had the hash. Not impressed and will just make our own breakfasts at home. Very expensive for cold food.

Nice little shop (104 st), interesting selection, but as far as the chocolates were concerned, not great. None of the flavours were as good as they sounded. I appreciate the packaging and the all-round presentation of everything but I think the majority of the recipes need a tinkering with.

Great goat cheese / tomato chutney app. I had the Ruben, which was awesome. My wife had the fish tacos, she said they were a little dry and only ate one of the two. Overall nice atmosphere, we would eat there again.

I have to update this review. A year ago i came here a put up with bad service to get the great chargrilled oysters!!!!!!!! This time still the Service was sloppy but more Important they changed their char grilled oyster recipe! Not the same. Not even close. Dragos wins so far.
Second time coming to this location in a hurry. Ordered a cotton candy coolatta both times and it was nothing but ICE! No flavor whatsoever! I will never return to this DD again!
Place is a mess zero organization no management if Gordon Ramsay reviewed pet stores he would shut them down

I never eat McDonalds but got duped into those spicy nuggets. Overall the food was decently prepared but they have me all the wrong sauces. Guess I'll have to go another 5 years before ordering from McDonald's again.

Even though we don't drink, we still stopped by this place to experience Nashville's nightlife. This place was packed on a Saturday night. People were wild. The live music was not bad but I did wish that the band member didn't come around with a tip jar.

Went here on a Saturday. Place was dead. Took almost 2 hours to get food. Waitresses were rude and snobby. I've eaten at fast food places that had better service. When our party wanted refills or some bread while waiting for food the waitresses felt like we were bothering them. Too much to list for complaints just simply go elsewhere food is subpar.
For a pizza joint in a strip mall, very very above average food. I've tried about all their different pasta dishes as take out and very good - comes with bread and salad and very reasonably priced.
Waste of time and money. Terrible to work with, and will find a way to not pay any claim.

Nice atmosphere. Make sure you pay in cash or save your receipts. This place may accidentally charge you a couple of extra dollars more to your credit card than you agree to. It happened to me this week, and to a friend of mine a couple of times.

Came here with some friends to have dinner for the 5th time and I have to say this place is amazing. My steak is always perfectly cooked and flavored very well. Our waiter was a lovely gentleman who was very attentive. They never fail to make our dinner experience satisfying!

This place displays a sign stating 2 for 1. This is a lie it only applies to the balcony bar. When I asked for the manager, I was kept waiting for 10 minutes and no one showed up. This is ridiculous and money hungry BS! I will be contacting the Better Business Bureau for fraud.

My husband got the steak sandwich and I ordered the chicken shawarma plate. The steak sandwich had delicious pickles in it. I loved the chicken shawarma plate. The chicken was cooked perfectly with a lot of flavor. The sandwich was ok. I will definitely go back and try their fatoosh salad and their fries. Customer service was great and the place was clean.
Cheese curds were BANGIN! GET THOSE! The trout dip was salty and not great :I wanted to like this a lot more for the price...
Gelato? More like a joke. Not authentic at all. All real Italians laugh at this place. STAY FAR AWAY!

This is super convenient for a busy week night meal that is more healthy than your basic fast food options. We usually get this placed delivered from uber eats. I highly recommend the pho and the pumpkin soup. However, I really dislike their tofu. I find it rather bland and flavorless. The other pho options (chicken and steak) and both great though!
What a piece of shit hotel and casino. You can't get room service and there are 3 casinos connected with a total of four restaurants open. Hope you aren't hungry!

Closing Wed March 9th so there is a VERY limited menu. No apps. No desserts. 2 hour wait. Short staffed. Sad. But hopefully they'll reopen better than ever. Just hate that they give up the building and history.

Char-broiled octopus delicious. Coconut shrimp was far from it. They were frozen from a vendor, with no shrimp favor. Server was a one and gone. I've always had no less then 4 star rating for this place.

Oh dear. Smoke everywhere and no ventilation. The stench was unbearable. Bartending was slow but probably not their fault. Too many patrons for 1-2 people. It's too bad because they get some great bands and have a good sized dance floor. I would go back if they installed some air scrubbers.

I wasn't impressed with the pizza by the slice. They take pre-baked slices then reheat. The cheese was warm but not bubbly gooey goodness. The crust was thin and lightly crunchy, sauce was average, cheese blend was average. Reminded me of frozen store pizza. Great location, staff was friendly.
My mother loved her gift. Thank you on the quick action on processing my order!! Will certainly be using your services again.
Chicken cheesesteaks from Tony Luke's make everything okay.

Food/drink selection is good, but our stop for restroom use was most disappointing. Ladies' room out of order and the men's was beyond gross. As another patron put it "I feel like I need a tetanus shot."

One of the best food I've had in Reno. 10/10 would recommend this to everyone. I'm moving to Reno soon and I found my new favorite spot. The employees here are really friendly and nice. Super respectful!!!!!

This is our absolute favorite "happy hour" restaurant in Idaho. We come here every time we visit. The staff is always so helpful with food and beer recommendations, and they are very attentive with each table. The food is amazing, and the 1/2 yard beers are SO great. I definitely recommend trying this place the next time you're in Idaho.

My Grouper Bites were super yummy...an appetizer that was literally a meal but my rice pilaf could have used some help....my pina colada was in a beer glass...a bit bummed about this.:-( but still delish ! Wonderful atmosphere !
Good Shrimp Po Boy with a variety of beer options. Boccie ball and Jenga for entertainment. I would return.

Ordered the pesto chicken macaroni. Took forever to get and then had to complain about the fact that the cook forgot the chicken! It took forever so I didn't want to wait for a new one. Next time I'll make the right decision and go to chipotle next door.
Deconstructed hash and eggs were amazing and service super. Nice views and comfortable
Alisia was awesome. She listened and made recommendations about my particular hair type. Her coloring was spot on and the cut rocks. I will be seeing her again.. no question!

This experience exceeded our expectations by far. Randy was our captain and it was his families property and business so he was very passionate about giving use a genuine experience. We saw alligators, fed alligators and held an alligator!! 5 stars all the way

The service was fantastic! Food was just OK. Hollandaise sauce on Benedict was served cold. Great grits, ordered Popeye egg dish, weak on spinich. Pricy for an egg plate. Adorable decorations, friendly staff. Worth a second visit!

Really enjoyed the truffle tater tots! I mean...seriously! If you only go there for drinks and tater tots you'll not be disappointed! But, we also tried several other dishes and didn't find a single flaw. Go there. Now.
Short and sweet don't waste your time going not anything to see or try food bad service worse

This is a life changing musical experience. If you even *think* that you might like jazz, you need to go here. It's amazing, it's pure. They don't serve food or drinks or anything, there's no photos allowed and they don't encourage requests. It's just great music, the way it used to be, no distractions. Sit down, shut up, and let it wash over you.

The worst. Not enough employees and few know what to do. Cashiers don't even know how to scan. It is so bad. They are extremely short staffed. Only one guy worth talking to- Jordan in plumbing. Avoid it! Drive farther.
Called ahead 20 mins early and got skipped three times like my time wasn't valuable. Very slow staff too.

Kinda pricey for the flavorless mac n cheeseballs. Had the inside out bacon. it was just ok . The roast beef though was delicious I'll come back for that .. the tator tots nothing special. Really smokey n hot inside akso..

I never had a problem with this place. I get in. I order. I eat. I'm happy and I leave. I stick to the basics of lengua tacos, a cocktail and some Spanish rice. With those three, it's always been consistent. Not the best in town but probably the best in the neighborhood.

Great little place, interior is nicer than most of the other Guatemalan places around. Portion size is excellent, nice flavors. Meat and chicken were both dry and a little towards overcooked. Kitchen was slow to produce food.

If you're looking for high-end dining.....this is not it. If you want great service.....you're not getting it here. Horribly understaffed and the waitress we had was horrible. We will not be going back.

Typical flea market. Free parking, no charge for entry. Not as much selection as the one in Daytona, but not bad. Everything was nice and clean. Not much in the way of food, but I don't eat at flea markets anyway. I would go again if in the area.

I highly recommend this establishment! They treat you like royalty! And the services are supreme! I'm from San Francisco and I'm here on holiday and The hostess feature at this nail salon one-of-a-kind!

This was my second visit and I was disappointed in the service and food which were great before. Love the beer selections though. Our waiter lacked any sort of social skills. We might as well been talking to a robot. My greatest disappointment though was the braised beef which was tough and tasteless. I'd visit again but probably not to eat.

My husband and I have frequented this restaurant since they opened in Bellevue. Initially, the owners were very friendly. However at the last few times we have gone, they are rude and irritable. The food is still good but I'm shocked by their attitude.
Good standard mexican fare. Huge portions. Very good salsa. Chili relleno was very good. Service was quick. I think they give more guac, tomatoes and cheese, than any other restaurant

The wait was an hour long! But that I didn't mind . Ordered the French toast with berry's It was crunchy. I have never had crunchy French toast even with syrup. Sent it back and had waffles. Was hungry so I ate it. Eggs and bacon were great. Staff was great as well. My family likes their breakfast but agreed wasn't the best.

Wings here are awesome but it takes a good 20-30 minute wait to get your order. Especially if there's a wait you can be there for awhile. Only negative part to coming here.. But would recommend if you don't mind waiting.

We ate there for a late lunch. The restaurant and the service was great. The pizza was ok but didn't remotely taste like mellow mushroom normally does?? We lived in Atlanta for many years and ate at Numerous location all over the city. Very disappointing.

I heard great reviews on this place but was disappointed in the food. It was just "ok". Best part of the dinner was the staff. Jason, our server was amazing. Unfortunately the atmosphere left something to be desired when there were "working girls" in the corner soliciting men. Would not go back based on the trashy atmosphere.

I stopped here over the weekend, the place was packed! the food is pretty good, excellent hamburgs. The only problem was that most of the people were ordering to stay while I was ordering to go. It seemed like those that ordered to stay were served first even though they ordered after us.
It's Mac N' Cheese on steroids. If you are ever out in the town late at night, you must end your night here. Friendly staff and great food!

I love coming to Mai lee. The traditional lemongrass soup is one of my absolute favorites. They also have a large selection of Chinese fare as well, which works great for us as my wife is not a fan of Vietnamese.

Fantastic food, terrible service. Once the food finally came the seafood omelet was fantastic, as were the feta fries. Just happy I didn't start choking because the idea of free refills or bottomless drinks only works if you can manage to get one. #NotEvenOnce
Would have loved to try this place called for delivery. I was told we don't deliver to that area. I put the address into my gps it's only 7 minutes away. I was staying at a hotel in the local area.

Maybe I just got "lucky". Thin walls. Screaming kids next door. Noisy hallways at 345am with people laughing and partying. A drain line that must be embedded in my wall making water drain sounds through he night. I stay in lots of Hilton Gardens, and this one is exceptionally noisy. Everything else is fine. Clean, decent rooms. Nice staff. Just really noisy.

The cocktails are overly priced and not very good flavor profiles. The views from the rooftop are gorgeous and I love the seating they have. I would recommend going just for these but they need to work on their drink menu!

Any Mexican restaurant with tacos al pastor is a win in my book! We had chips and salsa to start - the green salsa was amazing and very "lime"-y. The tacos, refried beans, and rice were also very good. Definitely recommend this place!

I'm a unhappy that they charge the same for a veggie burrito as one containing meat, and I sometimes find it comical how bad they are at rolling a burrito... but the ingredients are fresh and tasty, the shop is cute, and this being Philadelphia, El Fuego is miles better than the competition. Especially the competition right down the street...

Eaten here for lunch and dinner. Enjoyed the World Cup matches and EPL, CL matches. Good beer list, out door sitting and the menu is fine. It's no gastropub but it's fine and always had good service. It can be dark on the inside, especially in the Eerie lobby of the Phoenix.
The food is not good the service is ok. Don't go unless everything in the area is close

So many people I know spoke highly of this place but I wasn't impressed. I thought it was very expensive and the food was average. Their shakes tasted identical to a Burger King shake, which I could've bought for much cheaper. This was a one and done for me.
Called to receive a quote for a repair and whoever answered was extremely rude. Relayed they were closed and hung up on me.

The service was extremely slow when we ate here and the food we mediocre at best. I am a huge gumbo fan and this was the first place we ate when we got into town. What I got was like something out of a campbells soup can, watery and over salted, definitely NOT gumbo. This place was a real disappointment.

Razoo is the red version of Bourbon Street Blues Company. Crowded with sweaty tourists and crawling with shot girls, skip this unless you want to feel better about yourself. Not worth the time or tolerance.

I've been sitting here for 30 minutes waiting for beignets. Nothing more, just beignets. They cannot handle medium to large crowds despite being located in the French Quarter. Just go to Cafe Du Monde..
Amazing gelato with so many vegan options and owner was so friendly and welcoming!! The place is also very cute and clean and decorated perfectly.

We've been here multiple times over the part year. It was one of our favorite places to have dinner and get drinks. The bartender has recently changed and drinks are no longer the same. It's such a disappointment. We've been there twice over the part couple off months and won't be going back until the newer bartender gets the hang of making the drinks.
Toilet water. Mediocre pho. Strange tasting Chinese food. The only good thing about this place is that it's open late.

Gross. The Cuban is deli meat on a white roll with mayo. You could buy these ingredients at Publix and do better yourself. The place is filthy, employees dour. I enjoy a hole in the wall, but I was expecting authentic food, not a lunch meat sandwich.
Guy walked in my house thru an unlocked door I didn't realize he was there until my dog barked. He ran out the door and left
6AM oil changes Saturdays at Walmart Tire & Lube Thank you !
Three out of four plates were filled incorrectly. We asked for a box for the one plate. It was too small. Not worth the money given the poor service.
Absolute morons. Failed to show up for a scheduled pick up. When I called to find out where my cab was I was hung up on 3 times. Good luck.

Knowledgeable, courteous and highly skilled. They got my Jeep in and out in less time than expected, called and updated me when it was close to being done since they knew I had to walk to pick it up, and couldn't have asked for a better outcome!
We were given the incorrect color on the cake and the wrong flavor. They blamed us because we wouldn't wait 30 minutes for them to fix the color.

After stopping in the ups store I went next door to try some juice and the staff (Rae and Nicole) were great. I told them what i liked and they recommended the flu buster- pressed it right in front of me and it tasted delicious. Thank you and I'll be back.

I am highly disappointed this time with them. Today would have been the third time in 2 months that my family and I have visited and they have been completely out of prime rib each time. They have lost our business.

Was so excited to try this place! I am Jewish, my boyfriend is from the South, so the food theme here seemed perfect. We went to both locations and the people who greeted (if you can call it that) were so rude we turned around and left. Bummer! We really wanted to try it.
Love the cool finds that you can get. I love finding a great deal and this is the place to find one. Will definitely be back.

This location is sooooo bad. Every single time I go to the drive through I have to park in the reserved spot because something isn't available. Then I proceed to wait at least 10 minutes. Every. Single. Time. Plus the staff looks absolutely miserable to be there. I would expect better from the Casper's group.
I love they are open late on the weekends. Great quaint spot. So glad it's here when it challenging to find unique places outside of Starbucks.
I wanted to give 4 stars for the ambiance and service but for the food 2 stars are more than enough. I got badly smelled beans and undercooked rice. I have to think to visit again.
Outside bloody Mary's are smaller and more expensive than inside! Wait! Eggs Benedict (poached egg) was not even close it was basically hard boiled.
Good food and service, but little bit over priced. The salsa and chips were great. I ordered the carna asada chimichanga it was pretty good food. The only thing is it was over priced.

Was a victim of a hit and run....came to Nigro's. Domenico and Curtis are the best! They looked at my truck immediately, and fixed it on the spot. Saved me a lot of time and headache. Would recommend everyone to come see these guys absolute professionals.

Parked in their parking lot and walked in. Parked ourselves at the bar. Ordered several of their beers. All were phenomenal. The owners were both present. Both very friendly. Love the monkey theme. (Apparently the Mrs. Owner likes monkeys.) Fantastic all around. Love the building. Love the beer. Love the ambience. LOVE LOVE LOVE Try it.
Very good ramen & duck. But a veggie dish included little tofu and dry noodles. It seems items are inconsistent.

So we have been twice, the first one I would prob give a5 star! Food was great service was great. A little pricey for tacos but quite tasty and different so good. The next time food was cold and bland and very disappointing esp. for the price. Service wasn't great either. Blame it on covid? Idk...
Overpriced for mediocre good food!! Simple as that, besides that enjoyed the place and customer service was great cause she was able to handle me n my wild sister
The lady that did ny pedicure was good, but the lady that did my nails was not great. Did anyone experience their Acrylic nails lifting after a week. What a waste of money.

Devil's Den is a very chill place to go and grab a drink with friends. Great beer selection. Bar staff is great and happy hour is solid. As for the food... eh... the hostess was pretty rude, so we didn't even bother stay for dinner.

I usually go on Mondays for the $6 burger special, my personal favorites are the Tijuana Turkey Burger and the Rawhide. It's a good deal and leaves me filled but not stuffed. The beer selection is good and the happy hour specials are great.

This is without a doubt the filthiest Krystal I've ever been in. The fries were cold and the burgers are sloppily put together. No one was wearing gloves. One gentleman I saw handling cleaning products then money then food NO GLOVES. For a change the door was unlocked. Several times I've been there and the door was locked

Came home from Texas for Thanksgiving and my family told me about this place in KIngston Springs. I've had a lot of awesome pizzas in Nashville and this one was OK. The wait was way too long and we ordered ahead. The size was too small for how expensive it was. I love that the area has a locally owned pizza place though.
Food was great! It's on the pricy side, but great flavor. It wasn't too loud or crowded.

Home depot is in my experience the worst store to buy appliances from. The delivery service, on two separate occurrences have over promised and under delivered. Exceptionally poor customer service and the general Impression that nobody really cares at home Depot. They need to change their motto from morer saving more doing to over promise and under deliver!

Good service and nice atmosphere but the food isn't good. I had the Chicken Parm which they did grill for me instead of fry but the tomato sauce was extremely bland and generic. Also the "pasta of the day" made me think I was getting something special but it was just standard bow tie pasta with the bland tomato sauce. Won't be back.
Loved this place! Delicious, well-marinated meat and awesome sides! The msshed potatoes were chunky and delicious. My only complaint is they were a little bit pricey.
Good Service Department. Great Mechanics on Staff. The Parts Department is very Helpful. I would buy a car here. I just saw the new Cevrolet Volt there and it was cool!
Standard. This restaurant didn't blow me away. It's pretty mediocre. Atmosphere sucks and the food is "meh"

Tried gluten free...still need to work on this as not very flavorful and doughnut sorta heavy! Still think the maple pecan is my favorite so far! Loved the Rocket 88 coffee blend! Staff friendly and super patient! Cool interior space!
Always amazing food , very high quality. Also took my First and only sip of Louis 13th. Amazing well decorated place.

This place is amazing! Their muffuletta although a bit salty, is the best I've ever had. We also shared the daily special which was fried chicken, deviled egg potato salad and marinated watermelon. Also, rich and creamy key lime pie. Absolutely delicious food and wonderful people! Do not miss the opportunity to try this imaginative and innovative nosh!

This place can best be described as "meh". I could take or leave it. The staff is up and down (sometimes I get excellent service, sometimes the person is really short and rude). The food is nothing to get excited about. I think the best part is the coffee and tea.

I loved the entire experience while visiting this store. The owners are so friendly and knowledgeable. There is an excellent selection of books, gems, candles, etc. I am also looking forward to attending some of their events. I can't wait to go back.
Never ate any food here but I am a touring professional, and have played here on a few occasions. Staff and every is accommodating and this is a super dive and fun punk show vibe venue.

Run from this wawa. Dirty, not happy with the customer service. Selection is not up to par. Parking lot is an accident waiting to happen. Add the beggars they leave hang out front. Seriously fed up, I just want to be able to walk in a store without being hassled for change.
Who runs out of eggs on a Thursday at 9:00 am? This place is so poorly managed. Great food but so many times they are out of something.

A few years have passed since my initial review. My rating still stands. Had lunch again at King Chef again last weekend and it was still terrific. Taste, quality, portion size, and service was all on par.

This place discriminates Muslim with beard. Waitress refused to serve me. I will not come here ever again also will tell everyone. And I will hire a lawyer to sue them for the crime. This is a federal crime.
They served me raw chicken , I would like my money back . Never gave me a recipes to begin with so no way to follow up .
Amazing service! Waiters and waitresses were alert 24/7. Great food! Would definitely recommend to everyone!
Went on Friday night. Service was poor and slow! Food finally came and was extremely bland and chicken undercooked! Definitely not up to par like other locations!
Mediocre pizza for a mediocre price. A little disappointed here, basically a clone of AZP.

The one and only filthy WAWA I've been to! Manager could have cared less when I made a comment- NO eggs at 8:30, " they will be ready at 3:00"!!! Are you joking? Go elsewhere and save your frustration

Enjoyed the Holy Shiitake bowl for lunch a couple of days ago. No doubt it was good, fresh and I like to support local. For $12 I think the portion size was a little light, but maybe that is only me. My buddy had the Rollin Tuna Burrito and enjoyed it as well.

I am obsessed with this place !! It's the perfect fit for the neighborhood. So cozy, eclectic and a friendly staff. Coffee and baked goods are fresh and delicious and creative every day. This kind of local business really ads to the charm and local arts community in the neighborhood. I could go here every day !!

If you have DMO dental insurance don't go here. They will give you limited services and still bill your insurance. The dentist did not even look in my mouth and told me I needed 3 crowns. Then he billed my insurance for an extensive exam fee. The hygienist barely cleaned my teeth. Beware!!!

I loved Costa Deli. I took my then girlfriend their for her first cheesesteak. It's not as great as you'll find on South Street but you'll enjoy the little atmosphere. One evening we were their the family was arguing with eachother, I don't know to me it made the whole atmosphere that much cozier. I really miss this place.

Man that was delish. Dos Tacos is run by a self-described handsome man Hector, a Bronx native far from the place he grew up. But the Bronx's loss is Philly's gain. They have chicken, beef and deep fried mahi mahi. I got them all! Thanks Hector!
I have to say this store brings back memories for me. Not all good but, it's gotten a lot better. Salon staff is awesome and they love my Dory.

Lots of seating in the courtyard. The staff isn't that nice, a touch on the condescending side. The iced coffee was burnt. The beignets were very doughy. Personally I like the Cafe Du Monde ones better.

I've been very disappointed with Nelson's this year. I had cherry vanilla ice cream and it only had one cherry in it. Then I gave them another try and the mint chocolate chip was low on chips also. Are they cutting back to save money?

Service and drinks were great! Food was super tasty, a little too heavy for my liking but delicious. Comfy and welcoming environment. We were able to get a table for two on Friday right before the dinner rush!

This is the absolute worse dry cleaner in America. My tie looks EXACTLY the same as when I brought it in. I was told that ZIPS does not guarantee to remove spots and stains. This is the very nature of dry cleaners and why they exist. Avoid this place at all costs. It is not worth the time, money or aggravation.
This was my first time here. Initially, I thought it was great. Food was good. Service was so so. It is a bit noisy. If you are looking for quaint and quiet; skip this one.
Ordered a white chocolate mocha - was weak on all flavors, including the coffee flavor! Not sure how you can screw up coffee!
Hands down "THE BEST BYOB" in Philadelphia. My only problem is that it's become too popular and reservations are a must! Amazing!
Showed up last Saturday night for dinner and said we had to have reservations nothing to mention about reservations on a website. Drove all that way for nothing, denied entry.

First time visitor on the Fourth of July. Food was actually grilled on a propane grill outside. We both had the burgers which were under cooked. Had to get a paper plate and actually do a backyard style burger bbq build your own burger. For $26 which equaled two undercooked burger and two glasses of water I would go anywhere else.

A unique place for sure, not your standard breakfast joint. If you are looking for something different this is the place, everything cooked fresh and was worth the wait. The only thing i could say negative was that there was not a wide selection.

A delightful quaint little spot you can quickly fall in love with! The ambiance was casual comfy elegance complete w playing full length albums! The food was divine and the service impeccable! Thanks Jami! I returned for another visit and it was equally charming. LOVE this little place!

With sandwiches that mirror the size of the official NFL football and menu items that you'll have a hard time finishing, The Dill is a great place for value and quality NYC style plates. Try the matzo ball soup for starters and the yogurt marinated chicken grilled kabobs are amazing!

Wings were excellent. Bartender was nice but blah. Not that we're expecting him to entertain us, but have some sort of personality when you work behind the bar. The ladies bathroom was NASTY! Please, go in there once in a while and clean!

Really enjoyed it. Good steak and nice sides. Service was good. Be prepared for the little aluminum ancient trays for the steaks. Time to pivot on this tradition because the plate spins around while you eat! Place is nice and traditional.
It was just not good, the meat is very much not my type and even if the mac and cheese showed some potential it was flavorless. The restaurant and ambiance is nice though.
The spring rolls and ph combo hit the spot. The purest will probably complain about the lack of beef tripe but I'm totally ok without it. Solid all around!
My boyfriend and I visited on a Tuesday, and fell in LOVE! Really awesome sushi! Definitely a family oriented place, really small, but super friendly. Will definitely be back for more!
High prices, low quality.... that is what you get
Did a 3 order on the drive tru at this place. The guy said I only do 2 orders at the time. Not 3. Doesn't really make. Said in a rude tone.

Awful restaurant, do not stop and waste your money. Dirty restaurant, dirty bathrooms. Got our order incorrect, forgetting fries and forgetting a drink and gave us an extra burger. Food was awful. Cold fries, soggy toppings on the burger. Complete waste of money.

Came into town to see an old friend who is a stylist there (Katie). I explained what I wanted and a little bit later, I had the exact haircut that I explained!! If I lived here, she would definitely be my new go to!

I ordered a bacon omelette with a side of scrapple and for the price I've paid I must admit i am pretty disappointed in the portion sizes of my food. The quality of the food just looks horrible. Have your cooks take pride in making their food this is unacceptable I wish I could honestly give you zero stars

I was leaving the beach and walked through here thinking it was an exit. Decided to order an alcoholic watermelon frozen drink, it was delicious! Definitely coming back and would recommend this place if you're passing by or looking for a chill spot to have a drink and lounge.
oysters r good, service is attentive, drink pours r very very weak. get a beer and ur probly good!!!

I come here so often that they know my order, and I come so often cause it's simply really good Italian Ice. For picky eaters such as myself, I'd recommend the Oreo flavor. The atmosphere is nice and the 2 employees are always friendly. Will be coming back for years to come!
I bring my friends from out of town here. Solid Pad Thai. Not to mention the atmosphere of the public market, and it's right near state street. Great for tourists!

Ordered sushi Togo. The service was good and they made everything correct and fast. But the sushi was bland, the sauces had no flavor, what was supposed to be "tuna" looked and tasted like it got ran over by a car. Our hot and cold rolls were luke warm, and for sushi that grosses me out. Don't think I'll be returning.

My friend and I had the Reading Terminal on our "Philly wishlist" so we decided to share a bunch of food from different places so we could try out more eateries. We split a regular pretzel from here and it was pretty wonderful. :D (It was made even more amazing when we passed by a couple places offering free cheese + spread samples.)

Disappointing! I ordered an Italian sub. You expect a descent Italian hoagie when you order it from an Italian restaurant. The meat was scarce, no onions or Italian sauce or seasoning as it stated. Completely dry... don't plan to order from here again!
Meh. Wings over cooked. Calamari no good. Waitress was awesome. Go for the drinks, not the food.
Predictable Outback fare. Friendly service. Had the steak Salad which was pretty good but not exceptional.

We only gave two stars due to experience. We went on the brunch cruise. The food was TERRIBLE. Dry ham, cheese grits. No variety and they only serve water and iced tea; no coffee or hot tea. Live band nice but just ok. Not much ambiance. Kind of boring just seeing barges and skyline of city. Sorry but very disappointed.
Solid brunch spot in the rotation. Small but mighty menu. Space can be a little tight, prefer to go here earlier before it gets crowded.

Warning: multiple high pressure, predatory sales cosmetics stores have set up shop inside this mall. These stores have diminished the shopping experience and they prey on the elderly and the uninformed. I am disappointed that Paseo Nuevo has leased space to these predatory establishments!
Great food and decent prices, especially around happy hour. The atmosphere is very friendly and the service is excellent.
