What a fantastic mix of clothing, gifts, and, well, stuff. Cool stuff, mind you. Great selection of bags and jewelry for any occasion. I believe the only reason this place hasn't received a review yet is the regulars surely don't want anybody else to know about it. Also a terrific shop for outdoor cool stuff. Love this place!
Food was decent, but $11+ for Frito Pie? It's 1/2 bag of Fritos and chili....waaaayyyy too expensive.
The food and drinks are very good but are small portions and pricey. Minors are permitted in the dining room. Service is hit or miss, though they do try.
The food makes me nauseous, but we love throwing back a Wallaby-Darned
Pretty darn good bagels. Not as good as when they were on McCarran. Maybe it's different water or some such. Been going to these guy for years. Garlic bagel is my favorite.
OMG if you're at Reading Terminal you MUST go here. There is every kind of donut here you can imagine, and if you haven't -- they have.

This place just needs to be shut down. Yuck yuck yuck. Came in ordered dessert. How can this be messed up. Was severed a dry frozen piece of whiskey cake with the frosting topping broke up inside the container and was about the size of a biscuit. 9$ plus I tipped smh horrible
Do not come here. Always behind. Hour and half behind. 74 year old husband in pain. Terrible.....got here at 8.00. Took him back at 8.30. Doing the procedure at 10.00.

Came in on 9-27-15 I ordered the Hog Nose Snapper on recommendation of the waitress I should have. MAYBE STUCK TO MY ORINAL PLAN. or went somewhere else!! If I could go negative on the review I would. Please see my many other reviews, as I am very honest. Traded

We went there for Family Day. It was a lot of fun. My daughter and I had so much fun finding all the art works on the Bingo sheet in the museum. The museum is beautiful and the art is pleasantly displayed.
This is the second time I have ordered mozzarella sticks and only got 6 instead of 8 as pictured. Also I had to walk in (again) because this particular location doesn't answer the phone.

Great full gardens has been the place to go to every time I am in the mood for healthy delicious meal. I love their lentil soup and the bomb salad. It is very busy so I recommend to get earlier to reserve the table.

Absolutely love the Thai Eggplant with chicken! The sauce is amazing and I literally asked for an extra bowl of rice - just so I could finish the sweet, slightly spicy, and savory sauce. The Pad See Yew was solid, but the chicken breast was slightly dry so I will probably get the shrimp next time. Definitely worth a visit.

I have been going here for many years and have watched the quality of the food and staff go up and down. That being said I am happy to say that they are both on the upswing again. Boneless is the way to go here, honey barbecue with blue cheese... Both staff and food can be hit or miss here so be forewarned...
Super cool early 70s vibe interior. Latte was complex and smooth. Would've given it 5 Stars if it was a tiny bit hotter. Marren was friendly. Lids for togo cups fit very well.

Great hotel for great price. Very clean & friendly staff. I did have an issue with my credit card being charged when we stated we wanted to pay cash. They resolved the issue promptly. Will be visiting again.
Awesome awesome seafood. Get the whole grilled fish, the crab pasta, the Brussel sprouts, the desserts. Laid back atmosphere also presents a nice casual dining experience.
i called at the last minute for a brazilian and Jamie did a great job. she was very efficient. im hapoy they coukd see me on Memorial day

The tacos here are like flavor bombs! You can't go wrong with the duck carnitas, bursting with flavor with each bite that you take. Absolutely delicious. My favourite taco so far has to be the fried avocado, perfectly seasoned, and with the aioli you can't go wrong. The crab taco was a bit too salty for my taste. Their Elote is divine!

I was craving a Cuban sandwich so I found this place in Yelp and tried it for the first time. The Cuban wasn't bad but it didn't blow me away. I really wish it would have been made fresh to order, I think that would have helped the taste a lot. But it was still pretty cheap which really helped.

Great location and view of the bay. Came in for a late lunch and the food took so long. It was busy but well after the lunch rush. Food and prices food. Fish tacos very good. Won't be back because of service and slowness. Too bad had high hopes
I was very underwhelmed. I've heard good things and wanted to give them a try. I'll start on a high note: the hummus was amazing! The chicken Tawook was very, very dry.

Wait staff is nice but entirely overwhelmed. Although oysters are enticing and cheap, they aren't properly shucked resulting in small shell pieces in your dinner. Make sure you check before consuming!

It's no longs but pretty decent and they have Tiger Tail donuts! It is good to have another choice in the area besides Speedway, Krispy Kreme donuts. The girl behind the counter is always super nice too. It's a nice one stop for Saturday morning donuts and coffee.
They are great price but the quality is not so great all the time. I had to switch out my contacts two days after wear. Because they were ripped after trying to wear them the next morning

Excellent Blooyd Mary. One of the best I've had. The Cajun fries make for a good side here. I recommend asking them for more Cajun seasoning, and if you are vegetarian to make them skip the shrimp hanging off the side the bloody mary glass.

this is a great place for breakfast because they're the only ones who will give you a basket of mini muffins while you decide to order. parking can be a challenge here and i think this is a great place to take your kids because it is loud! good portions but a little crowded

Fried chicken fingers was over done and a little salty. Fries were crispy. Biscuits are made fresh, they were ok. The blackened chicken pasta was horrendously disgusting. The pasta was way overcooked and watery. The chicken was not blackened but looked like it was boiled.

SO GOOD!!!!! Usually with arepas people focus on the fillings but here the arepas themselves are the star of the show. They're so amazing I would eat one by itself (and I usually don't like anything with corn meal or corn flour). They're huge and definitely filling. I tried the cerda and it was great. The pink sauce is amazing and definitely worth trying.

What a delight to find AUTHENTIC Chicago dogs in Tampa. Paulie's goes the extra mile, using genuine ingredients and slicing the toppings to order. And Paulie himself... what a wonderful, nice man who you can tell loves what he does and is grateful for his blessings. Semper Fi, brother.

If you have the IQ of a stick , here's the place of employment for you... EVERY TIME, I go there, don't know why I do, they screw up my order... HOW HARD IS IT TO PUT STUFF IN A BAG?? Rob me every single time.. Place should be closed down... GOOD JOB MANAGER!! Morons!!!!!!
Nonexistent customer service and slowest shipping ever. Lack of competition let's this company run terribly. And who still charges for shipping anyway?!
Rude, not enough staff. I waited over a half hour with no one even coming to say hello. Lady walked out finally and said it would be another 45 minutes!!!

Literally one of the worst experiences at a restaurant I've ever had. Took 1 hour to get drinks, which the server messed up then took another hour for food. All in all we were there from 7:30 to 10:30pm on a Monday. Food was decent but I will never go back. Unbelievably bad...
Had to go back a second time as wheel alignment was not done properly. It was fixed the second time but cost me 2 extra hours of time.
The food wasn't terrible, but seeing that roach crawling around when we got up to leave at the end of our dinner was a little off-putting.

Reviews were high on yelp so we gave it a shot. The grouper sandwich and the Mahi were good. The sides were horrible. Kids ordered cheeseburgers and fries. Not great quality food. Place was dirty. Service was excellent.

Have ordered carry out 5+ times from this location, and the quality is always very good. Their family dinners for 3-5 people are a good value. Beef with Broccoli and Hunan Chicken are favorites in our family of picky eaters. Egg rolls / spring rolls / crab Rangoon appetizers are also really good.
Good BBQ. The jalapeño mac and cheese is tasty. The outside patio is nice. We came on a Saturday afternoon And they had happy hour and live music.
Walked in waited several minutes to be served today. 3 employees sitting at bar table never so much as said hello. Say down waited for service. Walked out
These sticky buns and cinnamon rolls are to die for. They're the gooiest most delicious buns/rolls I've ever had!

This is a great restaurant. Sizable portions and very good food. Staff is friendly and their daily specials are always wonderful . They also always have some vegan food. I am always amazed at why they don't do a better business for breakfast as I think their breakfast menu is unique and delicious.

Portions are small and prices are expensive. The quality is pretty good but when you consider how little food your getting for the price, you really should just go someplace else. What your paying for here is the view.
The best sushi in town! They offer half price sushi on Monday's and Tuesday's so expect to wait unless you are there right when they open.
Who would've thought that corner store food taste soooo good. This whole meal 10 wings half BBQ half regular with Cajun shrimp fried rice with extra green onion was 6.50 I am here for it all
Not impressed chicken parm was boring the cutlets seemed to be identical which means not fresh (frozen ) to much breading
I've been going here for years. Great sushi. Great drinks. Great DJ's. Just a all around fun atmosphere.
I always walk out of here happy and relaxed. Great job with pedicures & the best with acrylics! Wonderful customer service. Highly recommend!

Thank you to Dr. Smith, who helped my son who was sick with an ear infection. She was friendly, very knowledgeable, helpful. 5 stars for Express Care Rox Memorial. We were able to walk in, wait less then 5 minutes and were seen immediately. Thank you again!
Visited this location while on the Uptown Halloween Pub Crawl. Seemed okay. No egregious issues. Maybe one of the more raucous locations especially considering location and usual clientele.

Worst service I have ever experienced. Went in to have my Prius tires replaced and and an oil change. While they worked on my car they broke my rim cover and are refusing to replace it. Don't go here its worth it to drive to Oxnard.
Ordered a cappuccino and mocha. Solid on both fronts. Mocha was well balanced. Sweet and chocolate my without being overpowering. Service was fast and friendly!
Extremely nice staff and even better coffee and fro-yo. Highly recommend. It's my favorite in the area.
Mostly delicious fare save the dry hush puppies. unlike the usual sweet ones, these have no sugar to make them delicious.

I've been a customer for more than twenty years. Good institution but it's too busy too often. If you have plenty of time, come on by. However, the fees are incredibly low, in comparison to your average bank.
It's just not all that, pre prepared food that you can get of a grocery store frozen food department. I can make it at home for less then 50% of the cost.
Very nice folks but honestly the driest bagels. It tasted like they were stale. Wouldn't come again rather get one from Wawa for half the price and better quality

There have been several times in which our pets had issues and our regular vets couldn't see them for weeks. We called Boise Animal Health and Urgent Care and they got us an appointment on the same or next day. It's easier than WestVet and the 24/7 clinics, and the rates are really reasonable too.
Great bar, great pianos, great people. Spend mardi gras sunday evening here and a lot of fun with great people.
Only because my friend Bruce's dad works here and he's a cool guy. Other than that it's slow to get service from the genius bar

My experience was awful, food selection was miniscule, the restaurant itself wasn't clean like it should have been. Also a couple of the staff members kept coming up to me repeatedly while I was eating, it was uncomfortable and possibly racist because they assume I couldn't pay for my food. Well I paidnno issue and I will not eat there again.

fantastic. i got the classic but want to try the lobster salad version next time. i got the jumbo. i think the regular size would've been barely acceptable they give you A TON of fries. we're talking like mcdonalds super size level ORDER: at counter JEANS: ok by far

Very good salad. I ordered the Harvest with chicken. Nice portion size and good proportions of ingredients that blended well. Not sure why they are classified as Tex-Mex, i almost past them by because i was not hungry for Tex-Mex.
The filled donuts were always delicious. So many to choose from! They also offered bagel sandwiches and a variety smoothies along with a full espresso menu. Great stop for a quick bite in the AM.
Horrible. It is bar food so I assumed it wouldn't be wonderful but it was horrible, pizza and all. Bad service as well, won't be coming back

This place has some of the best food in the city in my opinion. I've been there three times and everything I had there was absolutely delicious! I got the fried oysters, gumbo, and crayfish etouffe. Best of all, there aren't flocks of annoying tourists there, it's mostly locals. Next time I'm in New Orleans I will definitely go there!

Based on the good reviews, my boyfriend and I decided to give this place a try. We came here at 1:15 and didnt get our food until 2. The place is not even busy, there is one person beside us. The food is average. Definitely Not worth the wait.
Had Fred Flintstones porksteak yesterday very disappointed over cooked and extremely dry even pour on sauce couldn't bring it back. Should of .been much better for 28
Good service, Nice and clean salad bar was clean and looked fresh. They have a gluten free crust you can order with your favorite toppings.
Best boiled shrimp and onion rings in town!! One of our favorites when we visit Nola!

I pretty much only use Lush products... and nothing else. Most of the time, I enjoy going into Lush on whyte ave... although have at times not had great customer service... Even though I am always satisfied by the products, I am not always satisfied with the staff...which is unfortunate, as it sometimes hinders my decision to shop

Had they been upfront and told me they were not in my insurance network, which is on the front of my card, instead of telling me they take my insurance I wouldn't be out almost $1000 for routine dental care! Their reply was it was my responsibility to check... cop out for what could have been avoided!
Visited this place twice. Both times the food was good and staff was awesome. Nothing jumped out at me to rate it 5 stars

I drove in the rain and the sign posted they would be back at 1130. It was 1050. I won't be back. Went to Brody's lamps down the street and they took care of it I gave it a one star and three stars showed up on review. I didn't do that
Alway have what I need .....Great for wigs and hair extensions for photos shooting a good price.

Do NOT use the Groupon for this event! You are shoved into a small room with little AC and a crappy show. It is not the same venue at all. It's a discounted show, discounted location and discounted food. Very misleading and not worth it at all.
I love all the food items and products for sale as well as innovative products they sell. Great customer service and delicious bistro. GET THE MEATBALLs!!!

Food was good and reasonably priced. I had a special, shrimp and chips the portion was oversized. My son had a chicken sandwich which was average. The soft pretzels were hot, and delicious. The atmosphere is a bar so it was loud. But overall not a bad place.

Local neighborhood spot in Rittenhouse Square that recently opened up. Very average fast Chinese. Notes: Uses too much oil, can skip the Scallion Pancakes, General Tso's chicken was surprisingly crunchy (in a good way), Wonton Soup is very watery. Conclusion: Too expensive for the food quality
Awesome crust baked perfectly. Crispy and delicious. Great staff. Very authentic NY pizza.

I walked in and asked for a caffe breve. My request was arrogantly denied, and no alternative or comparable drink was suggested. I didn't know the barista parlor's baristas were menu stricken. Quite a let down. I guess I've spent 17$ on worse less satisfying things, but still. Really?
The food is great. Try the tenderloin you won't be disappointed. Service is always friendly. It can get busy to be patient.
Very excited to have this place in Brentwood! Excellent Ice Cream & Service!

I mean, they're not the best, but they're one of the better in the Overbrook Farms section. The food is usually consistent with flavor and preparation. Portions and prices coincide very well. Now I do wish their wings were bigger, but that's always hit or miss at most places. Good for a carry out spot.

I've gone to Gloss on two separate occasions and both times left feeling underwhelmed. The atmosphere of the salon is upbeat and unique, but when it comes to a quality haircut/style you could find so many better options for a much better price. Honestly, I won't be going back here again.

As a family man, I cannot say enough good about this fantastic Fenton City recreation center! The staff are always friendly, and accommodating. The pools are clean and beautiful, and the lifeguards have positive attitudes and are clearly good young people. It's a beautiful place to get in shape as well as have fun with the whole family.

Just Ok I guess. It's Christmas Eve so maybe I can be flexible. After waiting 20-25 minutes for a burger to arrive not hot but tepid and limp fries is a bummer. I think it might help them if they would heat up the plates because the plate was super cold and eventually so was the food :-(

Not bad, nothing rated a 4 or 5 star. Service was ok, a tad slow. The food was ok, did not taste like authentic Mexican food. Tasted like canned or jarred with a lot of chili power added. The Salsa Verde tasted just like the red salsa that came with the chips, like chili powder, but not bad.

Best Walgreens in Tucson!!! Amber and Cindy in cosmetics are the best. Jorge in Liquor is an absolute sweetheart. Everyone in the store really care about their jobs and providing great customer service. Thanks for being so great!!!

They lost 4 of my shirts and wont apologize or offer compensation.As you can see from the pictures , the shirts are 36-16. I am a 17-32. A very tall thin man is missing his shirts now too. Enough said. Rip Off Artists!!!!!!!!! Stay away from this place!!!!

Hotel is currently under renovations, with work starting fairly early even on Saturdays. The gentleman checking us in was not impressed...by anyone or anything. However, the rooms are very nice and it's a convenient location right off the highway. When renovations are complete, I would certainly stay here again. Not sure about the breakfast, as we ate off site.
Quick service. Not the best coffee though. Tasted burnt. I had to ask for extra coffee to be put in my latte since it was 90% milk. Not the best experience.
Mal servicio al cliente, les haces una pregunta a los empleados y les molesta. La comida no está bien condimentada no tienen sabor a parte de que no tienen gran variedad en el Menú.

My bf and I came here to get hibachi. We ordered the hibachi from the dinning room. Now I have been to several different hibachi places; so I know hibachi. This place hibachi was terrible. My bf couldnt even finish it he threw most of his away. I wouldnt go back here. I only gave 2 stars for the cute interior.

Horrible front staff. I've been waiting a month for this appointment and due to an accident on the freeway I showed up 2 min late and they wouldn't see me with a couple broken teeth and me in severe pain. I wouldn't recommended my worst enemy to this place.

I had to downgrade my rating for a few reasons. The last time I went the employees were rude, lazy, and the area behind the counter was disgusting. They are not good about hand washing/wearing gloves. Haagen Dazs ice cream is still awesome it's just the teenagers working here that made me lower my rating.

Coming from a person who works at an italian restaurant, this place was BAD. Salad dressing tasted like it came from a bottle, garlic butter was sour, and both me and my friend's pastas were barely lukewarm. The interior of this place is cute, but I would never bring someone here, everything else is just embarrassing.
Ordered lamb tikka masala and mango lassi through door dash. The lamb was so chewy. Will not order from this location again.
Too sweet * Long wait * Pricy * Charge tax & Cash only!! Maybe will check back here another time.

Worth the hype. Whole wheat crust makes you feel like youre doing something good for your body besides consuming lots of processed carbs (youre really not, but thats hardly the point). The crust MAKES the pizza and they do it right here. A must do in Isla Vista between seeing drunk chicks boobs and avoiding STD's.

Three brand new pair of girl's jeans with tags and I received about $1.50 per pair. The one employee at the counter wasn't friendly in her response. Prices in my opinion are expensive for a used clothing store.
Not a bad place but yelp advertised as a buffet and it's definitely not a Buffet. Server wasn't super nice but what food we tried was pleasant.

This place is not bad. They got my order wrong and over charged me, but offered to compensate. If I want to get some Arby's I wouldn't mind going here, but it has a little room for improvement. Being I worked at Arby's in my youth I know what a great one looks like and I think this place can become great.
The hotel is an older property. I don't have anything negative to say. The positive is the location. It is 1/2 block away from State Street. The staff was friendly and professional.

So the' report got this thing called Mee Kra Tee and it's not something you find at all Thai restaurants and it is messed up awesome and tasty. Therefore when I think Moo Dang I think Mee Kra Tee please! They've got a pretty righteous lunch deal too.
Amazing food!! Went there a few years ago, and everything we ordered was delicious.

Perfect dinner. We got a volcano roll and it was amazing. Fresh and delicious. Our server, Mimi, answered all of our questions and was friendly but never disruptive. The place looked very clean and the food came out quickly. The house Cabernet was very light but everything else was great!

Horrible service from Charles the Finance Manager... they run people credit without proper signatures or notification. Some of the sales people are very arrogant.....theu want you to buy but all they dobos LIE!
Sonic is the best and the food here is fine.... just the slowest fast food around. I just got my 3 burgers in 28 minutes. This is The case no matter the day or time of day. Always understaffed

It's absolutely heinous how bad the coffee is here. It's close to my home, and the ambiance is "cool," but the drinks themselves are wholly inpalatable. In fact, I had the first date with the love of my life here and have *every* reason to attend for nostalgia's sake, but I literally cannot stomach it.
Hhjjgfhh

Really disappointed. I know what car I want just looking for clear cut inclusive pricing. I am a straight shooter and they refused to give me any written numbers for fear of a bidding war between dealerships. Wouldn't give me a price for my trade-in unless I wanted to buy. Stay away, Lehigh Valley or West Chester are better bets.

My family and I went for breakfast. Food was decent. However, the resturant was not super packed but food took a long time to bring out. Beware of the prices on the menus it is not accurate, the food prices are a couple dollars more than what it shows on the menu. We will not be coming back.
Burger was absolutely delicious and so were the garlic fries. You can really tell that they put a lot of effort into their food and it's a pretty good portion size (not too big, not too small)

Awesome bar that I will be back to next time I'm in NOLA. The bigger white comedian walking around with the microphone talking about everyone in the bar was absolutely hilarious. I was dying from laughter. The 3 for 1's were also a plus during their happy hour. Probably one of the best deal's on Bourbon.

Rita's is not as good as pops Italian ice on 13th and Oregon in South Philadelphia nor is it as good as Johns at 7th and Christian. They try their best it's just not as good. Wish they had real Philly Pretzels instead of those frozen ones in a heater.
Food OK, but didn't live up to hype. Wine very overpriced. Service terrible. Not going back anytime soon

Food: As a vegetarian, I feel like this menu is pretty weak for the neighborhood it's in. Only real vegetarian entree to speak of is the curry, and it's definitely in the bottom 25% of curries I've had. They don't have a veggie burger or anything. Drinks: Definitely a preferable drinking spot than eating. Service: Don't be in a hurry.
This intimate, dive bar is a gem in Wilmington. It may be the best bar in the city with a lively crowd, great music and fun bartenders. They don't serve food so get a bite before you go!

I can't believe that Target is closing!!!!!!!!!!! With all of the families in this area and the up and coming growth, Target "doesn't have the numbers" to stay here!! So much for caring about your customers!! I am done with Target! Unfortunately they care nothing about their consumers.

I went here today. Minimal wait time. We ordered the Crabcake appetizer, Jambalaya pasta and Mardi gras pasta. The crabcake was a disappointment but the two pastas were good. They honestly tasted similar so you can pick either or.

We have been here many times. The spaghetti and meatballs is delicious. Chicken spiedini was always tasty and moist The atmosphere is very pleasant suitable for casual or entertaining friends. It is nicely decorated. Wait staffs are always friendly and attentive without hovering.

I ordered mole...i was hoping it was good...but no it was way to sweet .....it didn't mention on the menu it was sweet...my son ordered Chicken tacos...it was so plain not even a pinch of salt...not coming back again....
Good prices, great food. A laid back Burger joint were you can enjoy a good burger and remember that a part of the proceeds go to a good cause too.

Your paying for location. It's not a bad place, but to pricey for what it offers. The beds were only full sized, not queen, in our room. The place has been updated some, but still shows it's age. Also, breakfast wasn't all that great and all the tv stations were snowy. That said, it is in a great location.

Terrible service, the food was a joke. Waitress spilled food on my lap, didn't offer to bring napkins... I had to ask! My fiancé and I could believe how terrible everything was... Go to Diegos instead

This is a great place to eat. U will never leave hungry. I always get chicken n' dumplings, fried okra, and green beans, and biscuits. Their dumplings are so fat and doughy. So tasty. It's also fun to walk through the store after u eat. They sell everything from candies and snacks, to clothing, candles, and home decor.

Ate here recently- not impressed. Ordered Chicken Tikka- was dry/bland and did not come with rice. Was charged $2.50 extra for a small bowl of rice. Disappointing. My wife ordered a vegetarian dish that appeared to have store bought frozen mixed veggies (like those from Costco) instead or fresh veggies. In all- we have eaten at far better Indian food.
Just had lunch at Bodega. Amazing remodel. Great music and service. And reasonable prices for good food with interesting choices. Will be really nice to sit outside when weather cooperates.

Food was great! Service was even better. And the drinks, well I feel that is the BEST. That is their specialty. Very delicious and fresh made Boba Drinks! Or like some would call them Bubble Drinks, Milk Tea with Tapioca like balls inside that taste fresh and delicious!
Too expensive. $250 just to come out? My plumber only charges $65 and good plumbers are rare.

My daughter's Subaru needed a lot of work. Eric gave me a thorough diagnosis of all the work that needed to be done and talked me through the repairs needed in order of importance. He was accommodating, friendly, reasonable and honest. Highly recommend.

Very yummy spot conveniently located in the heart of Beach drive. I had the egg and cheese croissant sandwich, a chocolate croissant, and a cappuccino all yummy. The croissants were good but not as flaky as I would have liked. They had lots of sweet treat options that I will certainly be trying in the future (including their wide variety of homemade ice creams)!

Great selection at the quaint little shop. I had a vanilla chai with almond milk, soo so good. Also had a slice of cherry almond pie with whipped cream and homemade donut. I wasn't a huge fan of that slice- the filling tasted a bit like canned cherries but I'm excited to try others. The donut was delicious!
Save yourself the disappointment and don't order the crab rangoon. Just a mouthful of cream cheese and no crab.
We love Harry and Izzy's! Prime Steak burger and Buratta and brussel sprout salad are fantastic! Service is generally good to excellant, and ambiance is great too!
Always too much food but it's great. Less atmosphere and better food portions would be my focus. Sometimes chains get too big and forget their customer service
This was a pretty basic breakfast joint. Nothing too special, and it seems to have a lot of regulars. It was good eating with a home-cooked feeling and the prices were very reasonable.

Really good water park. Took my 10 year old son here and Bush Gardens last weekend, and he likes this park better. Wave pool was overcrowded and seemed almost out of control, and but other than that, we had a great time.
The Peppermill is one of the nicer hotels in Reno. They have a good selection.of restaurants, however not happy with their high (almost $30) resort fee. Good gym.

The inventory is amazing but the workers ignore you and when you ask for help they just abandon you. Twice we asked for help with guitar strings and both times the guy never returned to say rather or not they found what we needed. They basically went to help someone else and completely ignored us. RUDE!
Best selection of power tools in Reno. Staff is knowledgeable, courteous, and prompt. Great place to get anything you need to build a cabin in the woods

The worst hotel I've ever stayed in! No hot water, couldn't get an extra blanket it was cold in the room. The room did not smell clean. Had 1 towel in the bathroom. Took over 45 minutes to check in. Elevators are very slow! Staff simply did not care to help fix anything.
The walls are very very thin and you can hear everything in the hallway. (From your room) If you want quiet, this is NOT the place to stay. It's horrible.

we had two choices in Tampa airport and ended up coming to this. Wasn't sure what will be great - I ordered a fish burger and side of tomato and cucumber. I enjoyed every bit of it and my two other partners enjoyed their food as well. Definately try the tomato and cucumber side salad.

The burger was good but it broke too easily. The staff was friendly and the atmosphere was a nice change of pace. It had a little Louisiana/cajun feel to it. It is a bit pricey though. Definitely a place that i will stop by again, but only once or twice a year.

Ordered 12 wings......delivered 9. Called to ask why and they were extremely rude. Wouldn't credit our account but did offer to deliver 3 wings. PLEASE COUNT WHAT YOU GET.... I'M SURE WE WEREN'T THE FIRST THEY'VE SHORTED. I'll never order from here again.

Used to like this place, but today the outdoor table cloths were disgusting. Why would they think it's okay to keep the filthy cloths on? Service was poor today, and burgers were so so. We were disappointed that it wasn't as it used to be. Sadly, we won't go back.
There's new staff here at this Great Basin Federal Credit Union location and sadly and frustratingly for me and expensively to me the customer service has deteriorated.
We sat there for 10 minutes and didn't even get a drink order poor service horrible Place decided just to leave

Worst ramen in town. Pork belly seams old just doesn't taste right. $5 side dishes so overpriced. Do not order liver and gizzards, uncooked, old and still has blood when served. Service so slow. Go ahead and give it a try and I'm sure you will never go back.
In town for an NCAA event - 1000% worth the stop. Right by the Omni hotel. Not to mention he used to live in Brooklyn!!!

Went here on 8/3/18 about 9pm. From entering the building, to leaving....I was absolutely amazed. Living in CA this yogurt place was out of the ordinary. The decor was beachy and comfortable. The yogurt (Cake Batter) was not only delicious, but savory. Not to mention the endless topping available. To top it off, the staff was friendly and attentive.

My husband and I were traveling to Chicago from Atlanta and decided to stop in Indy! Heard about this great burger place connected to St. Elmo's. Food was amazing but service was very poor. Everyone we met in Indy told us to try Burger Study but warned us to sit at the bar. We would agree! Awesome food but service is subpar.

They have a pretty decent selection of fish available. The fish we've purchased here have been healthier than those purchase at another local "fish speciality" store. The prices are a little higher than you could get online, but that's expected. The conscience factor wins here.
Went here for Sunday brunch. Everything seemed OK, thought the place could be a little cleaner but the food was decent. Place Needs updating and some repairs inside. Server was very nice.

Called to ask a question about the eye exams. Spoke with a lady who told me that she was unable to help me in anyway unless it was to schedule an appointment. Did not allow me to speak with doctor and ended the call by telling me to go to an eye doctor. Horrible service, no wonder your rating sucks.
It was ok, service was ok. But it ain't Texas BBQ, brisket was too lean, no mesquite flavor (or any flavor), but if you don't know the real thing it would be ok.
It was a very expensive $2 steamed bun. For that size, it should be $1. Plus there was more bread than filling.
My first visit: Loved Missy!!! Loved my haircut. Just counting the days until life returns to normal so I can get my haircut again. Nice people with a good vibe.
There soda was flat, completely got my order wrong. Waitresses were rude. And had to ask for multiple remakes
Found this place using Yelp. The service is excellent and the food is great. The menu had a great variety. I had Grouper that was very tasty and well seasoned. This is a must visit.

We came for a latin style breakfast. Ordered Ham Cachito, cheese empanada, shredded chicken baked empanada, pan de bono, cheese and ham cachito, and Café con Leche. Good experience this time, fast service, everything but the pan de bono tasted good. Myriam the owner greeted us, which is always nice. Well come again soon.
The food was ok. I think it's overrated, but I can't help and compare it to La Taqueria in San Francisco. I had to experience and taste the food, which I did. It is was just ok.
Food was top notch. Atmosphere was amazing as was the music. The service was a little slow, which was odd due to there being slow. Overall 4/5 and will come back. Did I mention the food was great!
Very unhelpful. Will say anything to sell you service and then not honor their word.
Delicious freshly made waffles and local ice cream served with homemade sauces. It tastes just as yummy as it smells! Owned and run by local family. Definitely recommend!
The sushi is delicious! Great shrimp tempura roll. However, the harumaki (spring rolls) and gyoza (pan fried pork) were unremarkable/disappointing.
This place is amazing. I loved the blackened crab legs. The grouper sandwich is excellent as well. My family enjoyed the experience as well.

Always satisfying. I love how you can pile on the toppings...for free! Who new they made great hot dogs too! They split the dog and pile on the toppings. My favorite: mayo, onions, sautéed mushrooms and hot sauce. Mmm! Not to mention, the fries. Get a small because they throw in an extra scoop of fries straight into the bag. :)

Awesome food and service. My wife is a vegan and we've been coming here for years, and it's one of our favorites. Their cookie dough is probably my favorite vegan dessert in the city. Definitely worth checking out.

I live less than a mile away and it took almost half an hour from when the app said the pizza left the store to get to my house. I love dominos but this location served me a pizza that legit tastes like a Totino's microwave frozen pizza. So disgusting. Choose Any other dominos but this one.
Nice place. Good food & service. Very clean. My wife had the Eggs Bene...very good. I had the strip & eggs...cooked perfectly. We'll be back since it's in the neighborhood. We'll even bring the boys!

We and my wife stayed here for our anniversary twice and the room we had was amazing. We had room service bring breakfast and it was good. The location is close to the Mall if you want to go shopping.

We stopped here while visiting Nashville! The ambiance was excellent. Service was a little slow, waiting about 10 min or so for our Bloody Mary and Spongebob Mimosa. But the wait was worth it - best Bloody Mary ever. We had the veggie omelet and meat omelet - both were excellent.

First time here. Place is packed which is a good sign. We were greeted right away and sat at our table in less than 10 minutes. Our server (Tiffany) was very prompt, courteous and professional. After ordering, our food was delivered very quickly, hot and smelling delicious. Everything tasted great, no complaints at all. I do recommend their smoked breakfast sausage! We'll be back!

I ordered a rum and pineapple and got pineapple juice. So I tried again with vodka & sprite. They gave me sprite. I asked for another shot and I got the exact same thing. Don't waste your money on booze here. I had a great time with my friends playing shuffleboard though. So that was good!

This place has a really cool atmosphere and the tacos were really good as well. I really love the set up and the location, but you definitely feel like you're eating Mexican food inside of a yacht club in Massachusetts.

This winery is one of our favorites. The wines are great staff is friendly and knowledgeable and the venue is quaint. They have a nice selection of wines. They even have snacks, jams, cheeses and other food selections you can purchase to accompany your wine.

The front-of-house staff at this restaurant is so abysmally terrible, it's hard to imagine staying beyond the first drink....if your drink ever comes. I don't believe I can recall ever being treated more rudely.

Wonderful experience at IndeBlue! A different twist than a typically brunch with its Indian flair. Our server Derrick was also very knowledgeable about the menu and incredibly pleasant. Overall the entire experience at IndeBlue will make this a place I stop by again next time I'm in Philly.

Jenniffer did a great job on my ombré nails! I love coming to Signature because of their hours (open early), and I have never had to wait to get my nails done and I've been here at least 5 times. They always do a great job and help me pick out a color hehe :)

Ugh, this pizza doesn't even meet my low standards. The sauce was way too sweet, the italian sausage was unpleasant little balls of meat and the smoky atmosphere was unpleasant. The chili fries were good, but they should call them "bean-fries" or something that better reflects the absence of, ya know, chili. Won't be going back.

Waited 55 minutes and gave up waiting. Terrible waste of time. They couldn't find my pizza and thought a card for one free slice of pizza in the future was worth my entire party waiting for nearly an hour for no food. Stay away from this place.

Went here for lunch w my babe. Been wanting to go here for a while mainly for the curds. Got a martini and the curds. A beet sandwich and a salad. Everything was awesome and staff was great. Def need more curds!
I LOVE LOVE LOVE this place!! Selena is great! She can do whatever you want FREE HAND!! Go to Venus if you want a BOMB A$$ Nail Tech!

Nice cozy bar. Great atmosphere. Guinness was well pulled. Service was good, easy going bartender. One draw back is they don't have a good menu. Only chips or nuts. All and all, a good place for a pint with some friends. The lack of food is the only draw back. Would come back.

These people are scam artists...agreed to one price and then charged for another. I got the run around - local referred my complaint to national office and the national office referred me back to local center. They "signed" a contract with the signature I used to agree to one time credit card charge. DO NOT TRUST...

Everything was too greasy, even for a hungover brunch. The service was decent, however. I would not rate the food over 5/10. The atmosphere was like a blend between a bar, a fast food restaurant, and a sports club.
Food:8/10 Food tastes amazing. Nothing to complain about really. Service:1/10 My delivery once took 90 minutes for one meal. Atmosphere:6/10 nice exterior OVERALL:5/10
LOVE THE FOOD HERE! Dinner, lunch or breakfast. If at all possible, sit out back and you won't feel so crammed in.

Best authentic Mexican food in the area. Very clean inside, employees very friendly and accommodating. I work in Pennsauken and this is by far the best lunch option in the area. Daily lunch specials as well. A++

Great spot to try a refreshing beer. They have some winners and don weird ones but great brews overall. Try their seasonal and the Dos Perros. With all the variety, you're bound to find something you like. The staff was quite knowledgeable and very friendly.

Oh those charbroiled oysters, a true miracle of butter, breading & garlic. Don't plan on any official activities the next couple of days. Service is trying, lots of people during dinner, overall cleanliness is wanting true to cafeteria style.

Horrible place. The owner is rude and only cares about talking on the phone with her friends. Had to wait 20 minutes while I was one of two tables in the restraint for a bottle of beer because the owner couldn't be bothered to get off the phone from the back room. Over priced and not worth the time or money.

Not fine dining but good pub grub. Had the fish n chips and my wife had the French Dip sandwich. Good service. The music was excellent the night we were there- just two pickers/singers, not too loud, enjoyed the music. Reasonable prices.

The money that is asked of you to pay is not reflective of the service you receive. Compared to other five star restaurants whose prices are similar, the presentation as a whole ( e.g. staff, table setting, dishes, ambiance) comes up short in imperative areas. All in all, the food isn't bad, just over-priced for the experience!

Am I to understand that because somebody had a pride flag in the front yard he would not take the screw that they had to get repaired? What kind of horrible human being are you? This is the most ridiculous thing I've ever heard.
Excellent pizzas and service was amazing by Sarah. Always a busy place but you never feel rushed. Gelato flavors are delicious and difficult to choose.
Excellent spot for Taco Tuesday! $1 tacos and great margs. Our server Taylor was killer, he kept us entertained for the whole two hours we spent there. Definitely coming back soon!

Ordered a Latte with a double shot of almond and this has to be one of the best Lates in the city. They also have a nice small but unique and eclectic selection of items in the store to browse and shop.
Went for lunch and had sandwiches. The burgers and fries were very good as was the pulled pork sandwich. Staff were extremely nice but service was just so-so and prices were in the high side.

I see many great reviews and I ask myself how? I've been here twice - first it's pricy $13 for a Greek salad add chicken or $14 for a wrap. Second I find the vinegarettes very flavoreLESS. I didn't even eat half of my $14 wrap today.

I regularly visited the shop rite in Sicklerville on Berlin cross keys road. There sea food department was always a great value. I have visited the Shop rite in Marlton HORRIBLE!!! The seafood department is over priced and the shrimp selection is overpriced. The service is poor and you guys need to Sicklerville and see what they are doing.

Such a waste of time. I loved the old Red Robin but the service here was terrible, the seating was crowded and the food was not the same, smaller portions & mediocre taste and the wait is insane!! I'm so disappointed.
I eat here about once every month or so. Not amazing but the best Thai food we've found in the area. If you have the craving, this is definitely worth a try.

The Galley has an amazing array of food. You don't think food when you walk in, however the superfood bowl with chicken I had was phenomenal! It was initially a bit awkward, due to this couple arguing about absolutely nothing, but thank goodness they left after about 10 min I will be back next time im in town.

It's ok... undercarriage wash bar hasn't worked in over a year even though they still charge for it. I pay for it stupidly hoping they fix it but no go. Crucial this time of year with road salts. Can't wait for new Cloud wash to open in Sewell!

I am so bummed. I heard great things about chicken salad chick. I drove from Carmel all excited... And they didn't have any of the salads I wanted made. They said that because it was Monday it was rough... And I get it but what a disappointment I left with nothing.
Lunch at Besito today. Chose "spicy" guacamole, which was completely mild. Tortilla soup did not taste "Mexican". Forget Mexican food, this place is not even close to Tex-Mex.

The food portions were simply amazing And the atmosphere is great. A little mad that take forever bringing the alcohol beverages. In fact...my food arrived before my margarita did. The decor is wierd with the devils and naked women everywhere. Real devilish but the food is off the chain.

What a cute little place! We got the mini pancakes with Nutella, strawberry and whipped cream! It was great to share with our little family of 4. They made the mini pancakes fresh, they were fluffy, warm and sweet! Service was great, the place was clean, fresh and cute!! A great sweet treat!
Great location - just across the pier. Service was great and the corned beef hash I had was delish. Prices were really reasonable too.
Hidden gem with great service and great food! Would like to go back and try the wings.
We stopped by here after the beach.... lots of fun foods, tasty and reasonably priced. Even had the alligator!

Food was good. Nothing special compared to others in the area. When we asked the price for our drink (sunburn ) she told us $6 or 7.99 and our bill said $10 each. We weren't going to order the same because that's just too pricey for what you get in plastic.

Our dinner here was terrible. People having dinner with the coats on. Doors opening and closing and freezing air kept coming in! We couldn't enjoy our dinner and can't say if it was good or not. But it was cold.

Delicious seafood! The place is called Legal Seafoods. The menu has many great selections. The service is fantastic. Come a few hours before your flight so you can relax to enjoy the food and ambiance.
You can't go wrong with Ihop. The food was good, the restaurant was clean, service is okay, in a prime location.
After waiting 20 min. to get our drive through order. There were no utensils ( I ordered a salad). No straw for our drinks and 2 chick-fil-a sauces when we specifically asked for 4.

While the food was good, the tables, floor and surfaces in general looked dirty and greasy. This was OLD dirt so a complete scrub down is needed. The service was also a little slow, but that may be because they were short handed.

Called to get makeup done. The gal said Sunday 10am we can get it done no appointment necessary. We were at the door. It wasnt open. There was someone in there and she said maybe noon there would be someone to do that.. Really sucked because I couldnt get makeup done for my bff's wedding. Would not recommend. Service sucks.
Excellent food... Can't go wrong! Decent well rounded beer list that even includes La Fin Du Monde.

Fantastic food! I really enjoyed eating here and would highly recommend to anyone wanting delicious fare. i really loved the poke bowl. They have a unique menu and a really primo spot on 4th Avenue. The ambience is mellow and feels good to hang out. Go check them out before the place becomes jam packed all the time!

This is my "go to" restaurant when I am craving a juicy hamburger and shake. It is so satisfying and the food is always consistently good and served piping hot! Would rather eat here than one of the "chain" burger joints any day!!

Very friendly staff! I would say that it was a bit overpriced, though part of that is because I ordered a holiday drink. The decor has a modern rustic feel (if that makes sense). I enjoy the ambiance in here. I ordered a peppermint mocha; it is very rich and tasty. And the foaming was very attractive! Definitely coming back!

I've never written a review of this place although it's on my regular rotation. I really like this place overall. Reasonable, great pedicures and fast service. It looks a bit ghetto inside, but don't be scared, check it out.
My buttons from all my shirts keep getting broken off. I sent in a message, no response!

A little pricey but to be expected. Disappointed because the market is open at 8 but none of the eateries are. Wish the website had listed all the shops and their hours. Was hoping for breakfast but had to wait till 9.
Everyone at this establishment was professional and informative. I really enjoyed my experience. I would recommend Dr. Feinberg to anyone.

I have been getting powder dip manicures every 3 to 4 weeks for the last year and they've always done a beautiful job. Susan is great and does my nails most of the time. Also Mi is very good as well. Vey clean nice salon
Cheap beer but sub-par food. Mahi mahi sandwhich was not fresh and had no flavor even with it blackened. Stick to the greasy fast food here.

Had delivery from here today....i was not impressed the black beans and rice lacked flavor ....the cuban was a big no like they use process cheese and not real swiss....and the potato ball had and aweful taste like old meat and stale potatoes....the whole meal was gross and i will not order again

I work down the street from the place and have called in orders for lunch multiple times. The service is fine and the food is delicious! No complaints besides a little longer wait times than I've hope for.

Patrick and his crew were absolutely fantastic. I was on a tight schedule to Georgia with a boat and trailer and it blew the entire hub out on the passenger side. It needed a completely new axle and Pat worked overtime to get me back on the road. Can't say enough positive about them!

Definitely a must to do in New Orleans. Food is fresh and always very flavorful. If you like watching football sit at the bar. Especially if Donnie if is working. Wings are sauced with their bloody Mary mix and to die for.

Service is great! Walked in to a friendly gal who got me in right away. Kim, the technician, did a great job and suggested a color other then what I chose and it ended up being a better choice. I will be back for sure =)

My dog has been going to Camp Canine for nearly five years for daycare, boarding, training, as well as grooming. Dogs are their passion and their life, they clearly love what they do and it shows everyday. I trust them completely with my fur baby. They are simply the best, love Camp Canine!

Love this place! their prices are amazing and so if the sushi. My favorite roll is the hawaiian roll because of the delicious mango pieces in top. and of course nothing beats a basic shrimp tempura roll

I'm sorry. I have yet to try your allegedly delightful desserts... but for a place that says it closes at 7pm on a Saturday, you were closed at 4:30pm? Because you were sold out? Bake more!! Fail. Will return another day.
The food is great but the staff if the bomb... sometimes you need to be waited on and the young lady that waited on us is worth coming back for. Outstanding job Kristie

Drink prices were reasonable. The compliments end there. The water tasted funny, the food was average at best and the prices for food were at least a couple bucks too high per plate. Of course, the views are great and close to hotels (especially since we were here with a convention and were limited on how far we could go).

I would give them 5 stars if the service were better. We love coming here and grabbing a quick healthy lunch and it's always delicious, but the service is ALWAYS bad. They never have the food ready to pick up when they say and never apologize for delays. There are plenty of people working there for this not to be an issue.

Don't bother, just a waste of time. Had Scott to my house to give an estimate of pressure testing a radiant floor and re plumbing a small bathroom. I called three times over the following weeks and while his office staff was friendly and apologetic, I never got a quote.

The restaurant has a quiet, intimate feel. We sat at the bar. Our bartenders were wonderful. Kayla made delightful drinks with thoughtful ingredients and layers of flavors. The steak was delicious although mine was cooked slightly over. The dessert cocktail I had (see:espresso martini) was precise and delicate.
Place is garbage. The food was probably worst in New Orleans and service was close to worst also. They closed down but reopened with same managers and cooks.

Great little coffe shop! Coffe is good and the breakfast are very well prepared and you can tell that they take pride in their establishment. I come here from time to time and would definitely recommend it. I think that they should keep doing what they have been doing... You have a great place!

Had the roast beef sandwich, their claim to fame. It was good but not worth driving out of your way. No atmosphere to speak of. Service was below average, and not a smile on on a single servers face. Wings appetizer came about the time dessert would have been served if we made it that far.

Decent sushi (not the best but pretty good) and some of their other dishes are good as well. I enjoyed their nabeyaki udon and my husband is a fan of their beef donburi. Service is always good and the restaurant is very clean.

Seriously, a flat rate charge in "a triangle area?" I went 1.8 miles/10 minutes from the airport to One Century Place Conference Center and paid a $25 charge. That is excessive and unreasonable. Shame on the BNA airport for not alerting customers prior to cab entry and the city of Nashville for not regulating these fares more fairly.

Very popular tourist spot. It's a little hidden on the north side of the bottom of the steps, so don't walk all the way up and be disappointed like many of the tourists I saw. Still, you need to run up the steps. You just need to.

Family oriented old style Italian restaurant on the very trendy but Bohemian Fourth Ave downtown Tucson. Not fancy but quality home cooked dinner or lunch. We had meatballs and pasta, excellent red sauce, first rate lasagna. Very young wait staff. Reasonable prices.

Waitress was too busy smoking to get our food. After waiting for over an hour, she came out with our food smelling like a wet cigarette. The food was decent. We had to wait 15 minutes on the waitress to pay our bill.

it's a pizza place, it's fine. friendly and fast service, nice clean place, pizza is decent and the cheesesteaks are above average. salads are typical pizza-place salads and the entrees are hit-or-miss (you have to know what to order). a good place to bring the kids or grab a pie, but don't expect to be blown away or anything.

Went there on very high recommendations. As a lifelong Philadelphian and bit of a cheesesteak connoisseur, I was very disappointed. There was not enough meat in the steak, and the meat that was there was tough and chewy. Won't be going there again unless someone is buying me lunch.
Came here for the first time for my sister wedding dinner food was amazing. Had the flounder and mash potatoes so yummy would def for again

Not a safe park. So many homeless people laying everywhere. Not a place to go to especially with children. I get sad just driving by seeing people sleeping everywhere. Please do not take kids near there.
The sticky buns are to die for. The best. And they even make a cake our of them! The butter cake is out of this world. The workers are super nice.
Recently purchased a BBQ pulled pork sandwich and it was outstanding. Be sure to take a number, step up and you will not be disappointed. Their sides are also very tasty. I highly recommend Zook's.

Good food, nice atmosphere, my only issue was that most of the games had something wrong with them and it was hard to not feel out of place with all the bachelor parties going on. Parmesan sandwich and fried pickles were pretty good and well priced.
Absolutely terrible customer service. Just rude to be honest. I won't be back to this location and I love Jersey Mikes.
This is the most fun club I've been to in a long, long time! Love it!!!! There is a really fun upstairs dance room/bar along with two other bars downstairs! Fun & awesome employees as well

Complete waste of time. Looong traffic lines into town leading to absolute nightmare parking. 30% of the vendors featured handmade items. The remaining 70% was total junk (knock off t-shirts, sheets, shoes, Oriental Trading Company resellers). The only portion of the festival that featured apple butter was one small pavillion. Everywhere else it was like a flea market with carnival food. Never, ever, again!

I can't believe this is my first time here! Items are a little over priced but selection is decent. There's a full service cafe serving sandwiches, smoothies, soups and salads. They also have an organic co op every Wednesday for $25, which alone is worth a stop in.
Love the Little Brick only a nasty virus like covid could keep me away. Often crave the breakfast options and warm seating areas. So happy they ate located in my neighborhood...see you again soon!
Easily the best quinoa burger I've ever had, and the sweet potatoe fries are unreal. Definitely worth a shot to give this place a try.

Wish I could give 0 stars. They do nothing but harass and try to trick and sue people. Customer service stinks and can't wait to move out of the house I have been paying a mortgage on for 8 years. Horrible.
Haven't even been there but I know I'm going to go bonkers if it's at all like the Nobu in Tribeca. Presold!
My meal was amazing I had the lobster pasta dish. My friends weren't as impressed but I would return

I showed up to Schwarmageddon a while back with my friend when we got some late-night craving for a good pita sandwich. There was no line when we went in, and I got the falafal which turned out super crisp and amazing. Definitely recommend to anyone who likes a good schwarma

I don't know if this place is going out of business or just uncertain about what's next. There is very little left in the store but everyone keeps talking about their next shipment. Not sure if it's worth a visit until they figure out next steps.
Cheddar's food has changed. It no longer is a place that I will choose to go. The waitress was not attentive. Too many other restaurants to choose from to not be a good experience.

Service was okay. Waited for an hour and a half for my girlfriends food (which was her birthday by the way) just to be told that there "pasta station" isn't available. They didn't comp the meal, they didn't comp anything for that matter. Her birthday was ruined and we left hungry. Cheesecake wasn't even special. I don't recommend this place to anyone.
nice location, and only place that I had abalone at and was like damn that some good abalone.

The food was just okay, which was the general consensus from my dining companions as well. The tables are a bit crowded together, so get a booth if you can. It's a decent sports bar type place, though definitely not my favorite. The waiter was very friendly and flirty.

Really enjoyed the atmosphere. Duck spring roll appetizer delicious. Service was excellent. Fish and crab dinner tasty and the rice it came with was SO good - unlike any rice I've had. Really good. Like a lot of good places in NOLA still seem prices were high. Service was really very good too.

Have not had a burger like this since I was a child. And I'm ancient. Quality is the word for this place. Who gets full on a burger these days? Most places use fillers, not this place. Zero fat in the meat which was cooked to perfection.

I used to be a huge Sonic fan, but lately they have been sub par. The food is over priced for the quality. The past five times I have gone and ordered an unsweetened tea, a sweetened tea was delivered instead. Literally. Five. Times.
Worst customer service ever!and no knowledge !luckily in the area the best selection for our different pets.

Flavourless!!!! Rice was mostly white rice with nothing in it. Chicken was chewy and saturated with sauce. Dry ribs were like store bought with no flavour. Only thing that was decent was the beef and broccoli. The spring was the size of my pinky finger. Positive is it was very quick delivery. I will not order here again.

We heard they had the best tacos in town. They were very mediocre. Ordered refried beans and rice. The beans were just okay and the rice was cold and hard. They only brought out one meal (there were 2 of us) and did bring our other meal out fairly quickly but still forgot an item we had ordered. Very disappointed.
Too much hype for what it is but overall very decent. Tip: go during lunch as dinner is ridiculously booked for months!

Drove 1 hour to come see an Audi that I called and spoke to inside sales rep Jasmine to confirm availability on. Had an appointment, arrived for appointment and was told it was sold 2 days ago. Don't waste your time with this company.
Boneless wings are my favorite. Bit on the pricey side but we only come here on occasion. Wait staff is friendly and attentive. Always right there to get you a refill on your drink. No complaints.
Lamb gyro was very good as well as the baklava for dessert. This place is a must try if you enjoy Greek food. Friendly staff and quick service as well.

Customer service is bad. The guy that helped me didn't say that the registers in front were closed and not working so buy the time i go back, there are two people in front of me. When i got there i waited he didn't even say ill be right with you. I may not return here.

Good selection of colors and the nail tech I had was knowledgeable and super sweet but they charge $5 extra if you want one finger on each hand a different color. I've never been charged for that before and this reason alone I won't go back. If you don't mind just one color then it's not that bad....

Service was good, most the food was good, but the lamb, the most expensive thing on the menu was pure fat! Completly inedible! Complained to the server, he asked the chef about it and the chef apparently knew the cut of meat was poor.. If it's poor quality dont serve it! Nothing was done to accommodate. Overall, pretty good but don't get the lamb.

Parents had new patio doors installed about a month ago and they haven't finished not do they call her back. She's calling everyday for 3 weeks. DO NOT CALL THEM. Any positive post is probably from employees or friends of the owner. These guys are scam artists
Omg worst place!! Service SUCKED, the worst food I've ever had. Finally, my credit card was charge twice for a meal I can't believe I even agreed to pay for. Staff was very unprofessional.

The food was so good that as soon as we finished eating, I called the restaurant to thank them! If their takeout is this good, I can't wait to eat in once that's allowed again. Stuffed flounder and stuffed shrimp were perfect. Thanks again!

We're not really fans of chain restaurants, but Mitchell's is definitely one of the better ones. This was the first time we've had dinner here, but we would definitely go back. Good food and good service.

Great ice cream, great atmosphere (loved the early 1930s? decor and staff dress), and lots of choice...including non-dairy, sugar free, and coconut milk ice cream. A medium cone, although pricey ($7) was huge. Had the Cherry Bomb float...was great. No indoor seating and they only take cash.
Paper plates, had eggs Benedict no sides 1 tablespoon of hollandaise and bloody marry was weak with no garnishes besides lime wedges.
Jenna is best bartender around! Super attentive and easy going. Just love her! Best wings around as well.

We've been back three times in a single week. This is 100% the best Mexican food in the Providence area, especially if you're used to west coast. Oscar's in an officially on my family's regular rotation.

I love love Jamaicain food. Jerk chicken, rice and peas, plantains and more and I can get a delicious fix at Boswells. I love to come for lunch and get all my favs on the all you can eat buffet. Been coming here for years and don't plan on stopping anytime soon!

One of the best venues in the St. Louis area! I was almost late to the show because I was exploring the place and having drinks on the lovely balcony. Sneak a flask or snacks in, the food and drink prices are a bit outrageous.
This place has not had maintenance in years !! It's so run down that you can barely play. And the people that "work " there are unbelievably rude.

Probably one of the worst Krispy Kreme's place I've ever went to. The service here is very awful and also the employees are a bit rude and do not care about the customers. Employees here are lazy and are unwilling to work.
Their veggies always seem to be old and rotting. Perhaps convenient for processed foods.

I decided it was time to get my first tattoo. They were amazing with scheduling and prediscussion when it came to getting a tattoo. My friend and I were able to book a double appointment for our tattoos. Our tattoo artist Elizabeth Avila is an an amazing artist and did a great job with our tattoos.

The food is great but it has become overpriced because they purchased new boxes and now the serving size is very small for $14. Unfortunately, a weekly staple will now have to be replaced. A chipotle will be opening on 202 by Silverside which will become my new go to at a better price.

My partner was in the town visiting from Orange County and I decided to take her here. This was my favorite to-go breakfast place when I was living on the east side. I ordered pancakes and a couple eggs. My partner had a breakfast burrito. They were delicious. The prices were reasonable, but expect a surcharge when you get the check.
The beef pho was very good. Portion size was good and was more than enough but no extra to take home. I would get this again.
Wonderful customer service, great food. Huge wine selection. Albeit a Steakhouse, the seafood is darn good too. Definitely pricy, but well worth a special occasion.

I have been to a ton of aquariums. This one was nice but a little underwhelming. Still worth the price of admission--goes to a good cause anyway--but not as large or inclusive as I would have thought. That said, some of the larger tanks were truly awesome, and I didn't know turtles could get that big!

HIGHLY recommend!! The seafood was delicious and very fresh. My favorite was their pasta dishes and the crab cakes are a must try! I love how large the restaurant is so it is friendly for large parties!!
Neat little dinner like spot right near the beach. No frills food, but still good selection and resaonable prices, especially compared to other places on the beach in Clearwater.
Service wasn't good and we waited a long time for our food and it wasn't even that crowded. I ordered a "medium-well done" burger, and my burger was "slightly-burnt".

Policies exist for a reason, failure to enforce leads to terrible situations. Teach your staff that being "friendly" should not be at the expense of protecting someone from credit fraud, identity theft.
Do NOT let these people touch your hair. Idk how they hire these "stylists" but you'd be better off letting a 3rd grader try to give you a cut than trust this place.

My first sandwich here was good, today I got one the same way I ordered it last time, with extra bacon, I hey home and the bacon is on the side in another bag. I thought the whole point of this was so I didn't have to make my own sandwich. Other than that, this place is cool. I recommend.

Called these guys to do some yard cleanup...I came home to a yard that looked exactly like it did when I left, only to be told that the work was done. I was charged several hundred dollars but had to dispose of yard waste and re-mow my own lawn. Awful. Do not use.

Still not impressed. Had a terrible experience years ago with the service. And tonight after $50.00 worth of food I came home with 2 soggy under cooked pizza and cheese fries with not much cheese and completely soggy too. YUCK. SO glad I waste my hard earn money on this crap.

Adorable spot but I really don't like taking cold showers. The room was small & cute. There was a microwave & fridge but no coffee maker. I'd stay there again for a night as long as I'm mentally prepared. Another thing, my 10 year old was too tall for the small second bed. Then there was this strange white noise all night.
Holton, he was a great guy. Had excellent drink recommendations and complimented our table with sophisticated pleasantries. Also helped us tourists find a great place to play pool.
This place has some of the best breakfast food I've ever had. Not to mention the burgers or the Philly cheese steak which are both to die for!
Pretty good bacon cheeseburger but definitely not worth 8 bucks for a burger only. Keep the free peanuts.
My car looks like new!! Herb was super nice and did an excellent job. Prices very reasonable! Thanks for a great job!
Patio is pleasant- bar man friendly suggested nice beer. Happy to be here. Good vibe.
Just ok! I like the salad and fettuccine , but no the pizza...And the bread which they serve is too hard, it doesn't tests like fresh at all

Enjoyed a wonderful meal on a nice Sunday evening in Carpinteria. Started with Kumamoto oysters, then enjoyed the sea bass. My wife and daughter loved the margarita pizza. Ended our meal with tasty, refreshing gelato. Service was excellent (Summer was great)! Looking forward to returning soon!
I tried this new restaurant was very happy with I the Singapore rice noodles and all the egg roles were the best in delve. I can't wait to try the whol
Love this place. Excellent food. Try the eggrolls and the fried rice. Excellent food!
Great meatballs. The Mac and queso are sooo good. It's all I come for. They get backed up when it gets busy so order some apps and hang out.

Recently returned a few items that I purchased online to the store. The staff was friendly and store seemed nice enough. However, when my refund processed it as $12 short of what I paid with no explanation.
I'm not a fan of the atmosphere at Scotty's. It feels too much like a college bar. However, the food is usually pretty good. Service can be hit or miss.

I went here on a weeknight with some colleagues. The restaurant was empty except for one other table. The sushi is so-so and they put a lot of unnecessary sauces on their rolls. I'm amazed they're still in business.

Went here with a friend for some drinks and great wings and got exactly that! Had a wonderful server named Kimberly who was extremely quick with orders and making sure we had everything we needed. Great and friendly staff, with above standard service, would highly recommend to anyone!

Ordered thru Ubereats, being new to Reno I was looking for a good Thai place. This is not it. I got the pad thai and the flavor was very bland. I also ordered the Nevada curry, same with a bland flavor. I was hopeful for the sticky rice and mango, it was very mushy. Altogether I'm sad I wasted money on a disappointing dinner.

I just called and was told they don't do delivery anymore......pretty disappointed since I just spent 20 minutes online deciding what to order! Just saying, info online should be updated since it's the #1 listing on yelp for chinese food delivery in St. Petersburg. =/

I was so sad to find out that you closed your door forever! Thank you for all the great memories- my daughter's sweet 16, Mother's day, birthdays, on and on. I will miss the great food, the 'porch', the ambiance, the great service. What a loss. We will miss you!!!
Enter through the Tardis; keep watch for Daleks. Great spot to down a pint or two while watching Champions League football.

Another great Shake Shack location. On my most recent visit, I ordered the Shack Stack (cheeseburger + shroom burger) which was delicious, cheesy, and indulgent. The fries are not my favorite part of a Shake Shack experience, but still a necessary accompaniment to a burger. I loved the upstairs seating area - it feels secluded and like a little escape amongst University City.

Enjoyed a delicious lunch special .Angry Princess (chicken).fresh ingredients., spicy not too much heat.it came with a bowl of miso soup.very delicate in subtle flavors.The youngman who took my order wasn't very helpful in suggesting anything off the menu.
Excellent fresh food. The owner was very friendly and she came over and told my son he had a nice hair style. I like the paintings there also. I would recommend coming again.
They were entirely out of chicken when I was here last. How does that even happen? During a dinnertime rush, no less. Generally great value (as toppings are endless) and quick turnaround time!

This is a good, solid middle eastern joint. I had good hummus, baba ghanoush, tabouleh and rice. They suffer a bit by their upstairs location and slightly unappealing (to the Nashvillian eye) decor - a bit dark and seedy seeming. That said, the food and service was good.

This is by far the worse company i have ever worked with. They will not assist you to put the site together. No phone support. Its seems like a one guy operation. I wouldn't go back if you paid me to. Stay away.

I've heard about Naked Pizza for a while, always with salivating taste buds and awe at the mere idea of what I was hearing. Then I tried it. and then I thought, "really?" I tasted no difference. I don't know what else to say. I was heart broken. Regeneli's is much higher on my list of good pizza.
i went here a long time ago and wouldn't go back. the food wasn't good and the decor is insulting.

Super cute, neighborhood gem off the beaten path in South Tampa. For the time being they cannot sell alcohol, so your first glass of wine is free, or they have a corkage fee fee if you would like to bring your own bottle of wine. My last ravioli was delicious. The service was great! Can't wait to visit this place again in the future.
Tried the gumbo. It was watery and had little flavour. The service was also unfriendly from our waitress (Caucasian female with light brown hair). I wouldn't recommend it!
Favorite pizza place by far. Can't get enough of their wings! Service and atmosphere are great.
The food wasn't bad but the restaurant is dirty. The silverware was tinny and uncomfortable in the hand. A bit over priced for the atmosphere.
The food is consistently great. Prices are very reasonable...great value! My favorite restaurant!

Not sure why this place is so popular- the steak was not good quality, there was too much bread and not enough filling and the cheez wiz turned into cheese water when it warmed up in the sandwich. I don't recommend, I'm sure there are better options for a Philly cheesesteak.
I love the gluten free options but I didn't think my food was as amazing as other reviewers. But I would suggest going if gluten free and wanted to try creole/Cajun cuisine.
Eggspectation is fabulous. The food is delicious and fresh and The atmosphere is cozy and service is great.
SUPER quick response. They were at my house in less than 2 hours. Knowledgeable staff and honest, upfront price information. Thanks for coming Hawthorne Plumbing

just as i thought this is really tasty pizza, my partner in crime said i don't care that much for it, that's how different tastes go we had the Chicken BBQ on Thursday the staff is delicious, i mean helpful & courteous

I wasn't getting any of my order nor help from the staff. I left after waiting for the food for half an hour. I did call to talk to the manager but they were cooking on the line. I will not go back to this location again because of this.
Thankfully something delicious landed in this Westchase spot. Scratch kitchen, brunch on weekends and outside and indoor seating options. Specials during week...food is amazing!

Wow, what a find. We were going for Mexican food, but decided to try Stafanio. The portions are incredible. Each plate had tons of food and the prices are great. The food tastes great and the wait staff was nice and polite. You need to come here, what are you waiting for!!!!!!
Terrible customer service. The nicest person working here is the black cat that naps on the counter.

Limited menu, Chicken Capri was dry, pizza was uncooked.. We are staying in the hotel and were too far away from other restaurants and this was the only option... We enjoyed our second meal, Caesar salad was fresh and the chicken was perfect, the dressing in the side was good.

I brought my family to Oceana Grill on their first visit to New Orleans and they absolutely loved it! They have amazing oysters and I love their Redfish Pontchartrain. Their crab cakes are also delicious! We will definitely be returning.
Loved it really nice atmosphere. I've tried the shrimp pasta and the fish and chips and both weree very good
Amazing food. Somewhat fast delivery. The only down side is that hours are not earlier. Like for lunch. I had to change from 5 star to 4star. Cause they don't open till 4pm. So screwed for lunch

Worst customer service ever! I've given them multiple tries because i live so close but the food is not great mix that with such horrible service and i would much rather spend my money other places (there are many to choose from around here...jotos has been our new go to)
This was the final straw. Sick of paying 5$ for half a salad when it's literally ROTTEN. So done with Panera.
The employee collecting their donations that they sell for 100% profit shouldn't be miserable with poor people skills. I'll take my stuff to a church or Salvation Army next time.
Very fresh, beautiful new concept. I love their French press coffee amongst other things. Their juices are fresh. Highly recommended for brunch.

doughnuts were heavenly, but they didn't have a lot to choose from at all, and the girl taking the order in the drive thru was so rude and coming at me sideways the whole time, practically through the donuts at us.
