It's a little hole in the wall restaurant. Quiet not crowded. Service is ok. Food is great!

Incredible food. Scallops tasted like candy they were cooked perfectly. The sable fish was exceptional as well. Great service... Beautiful patio to sit outside and look out over the river valley. What more could you want?

Enjoyed checking out this place last night. Got the beef teriyaki bento box. It was pretty good! Wasn't terribly busy and the staff was very friendly. Next time I'm going to try the all you can eat sushi.

my first visit here was for a patch job on a tire. the guys were very friendly and sent me on my way for about $25. Today they tried to charge me $50 to change headlights! Two stars b/c the manager deducted the charge from my bill when I complained. I get better treatment at the dealership.
Michaela was a great server. The buried treasure was phenomenal. And the eagles won. Overall a great experience

I dislike rental car companies in general, but chose Alamo because it has a Skip the Counter service that allows you to proceed directly to the rental car kiosk and pick up your car. It takes about 5 minutes and is wonderful. Our car wasn't the best, so I would say don't get a Kia Niro. That was not a great car.
Delicious food, adorable atmosphere and so-so service. We were forgotten a couple times by our server, but the food was definitely worth it. We will definitely be back.

Overall, nice place. Service left a bit to be desired. Good selection of baked goods, bread was great. But for a place that tries to beat you over the head with their french-ness, they make a terrible omelet (really watery, bland, and very overcooked on the outside).

Had a good experience. The service was fine, but the waiters were rushing my party to leave the restaurant even so it wasn't crowded and there was still time before they close. There is a minimum mandatory amount to spend per person, what I think does not make any sense.

The best breakfast spot in the city for sure. You definitely get the most bang for your buck! The staff & environment is very welcoming! I would pay a visit on my next trip for sure! pancakes are soooooo good!

I originally gave this place 2 stars but quickly realized it was only to do with the stylist I had that day. The customer service and quick responses are exceptional. Glad to have had a chance to chat with Tatiana as she referred me to a stylist working there and was able to change my mind about this place! Will be returning.

I was so excited to finally have a smoothie place so close to home. The smoothies are delicious but the service stinks. There supposed to be open until 9:00pm and my daughter went to get us smoothies at 7:15 and the girl behind the counter told her they were closed. They need to hire more responsible people not kids!
This place is horrible. Unorganized. My father in law have a 9:30am appointment .. an hour later still waiting. And i work in the health field. No excuses for the lack of customer service

Had high hopes, but this burger buggy must have been a F.O.R.D. -(found on road dead) Their food truck was at an event in Flourtown tonight. The guy taking orders was a grump, the burger was almost cold and kind-of raw inside. The "tater-tots" were OK. $22 for two cold burgers. Just sayin... will avoid in future.

We love chicken salad. The very best and such unique recipes to try each time. Clean restaurant, fresh chicken, vegetables, dressings and wonderful bread. Ohh that bread! Just wonderful. Great pick for lunch. Nice service as well. Never have to wait long. Delish.
I wanted to like the bar but Jamie the bartender was insulting and ruined our nashville experience. Even through the check at us.

All I wanted was a hamburger. Took them about 10-15 minutes to actually call my number and have my 1 hamburger done. Horrible customer service! This specific location wasn't to clean either. Not pleased at all
Lots of food choices and friendly service, but food ordered was bland. Maybe give it another try down the road. Ugh....

I can not reccomend unless you are happy to spend a few hours at your appt. I have no respect for Drs. offices that cannot schedule appts correctly. Clearly there are very few emergencies, so what is the reason my appt was scheduled for 10:35, it is now 11:50, still waiting to see the Dr.
This bank branch has problems..been banking here for 10 years and it still smells like stinky feet when you walk in. Always a line inside..i stick to the atm much as i can

Service and food was very good. We were there for breakfast. I ordered sausage with mine and got bacon. I got the sausage as we were ready to leave. Saw someone getting a burger - it was huge and looked awesome. Next time. Yes, we will go again. Would have got 5 stars had I been served the sausage.

Food was great, but the service was seriously lacking (to the point where we had to go up to the front to pay because our waiter never resurfaced). We went on Christmas so it was definitely busy, but it's not like they've never had a busy night before. We'll likely order again, but do take out.

Trader Joe's is amazing! The staff is friendly and the store is clean and organized. The store just opened so they are struggling with keeping the needed inventory levels and getting enough staff to handle the volume but overall doing a great job.

Nice place nice and clean fast service good food. Nice sandwhichs. Would come here again with my hubby next time . Told him he has to try this place out. Lot of people at this small place and everyone enjoying the food. Service is just okay
This is the worst Walmart I've ever experienced! It's picked over and a mess! The staff are rude and and inconsiderate.

May want to check on re advertising their hours for food. Stopped in for bite at one of our favorite places to eat and they had already closed the kitchen at 8:30pm. Don't posted your hours open till 11pm if your not going to be open!
Delicious--the "Death by Chocolate" is super chocolatey! The person behind the counter said they use chocolate, cocoa powder, and "cocoa rouge" from Italy in it!

Had hubby pick up cheesesteaks since I saw some really good reviews online. Our cheesesteaks were really light on the meat. So much that we took off the top layer of the tasty bun because the bread was just too much. Disappointed so probably won't be back. :(
It's McDonalds , it's fast food. Always a good experience. No complaints . Not a bad place for when you are in hurry and need to grab something quick.
I never have trouble getting an appt. We use parkside as a vet and as groomer. We love it and so does our border collie

Seriously? Who rated this place 4 stars? I'll tell you who. The same basic millennials who shop at Target with their parents' credit cards, while maintaining they're so special and unique. Which is, non ironically, a perfect description of this place. Uninspiring menu, service and decor. Just another "Nashville Restaurant Kit" establishment.
This place use to be really good when Maggie was the owner. But now its new owners and it's not as good and service has gone down. Still better than 777, Asian Noodles, and Golden Flower though.

Poor service .slow (why do servers not write orders down)... food got Ultimate pork plate..taste fine but food not warm..not a fan.....this chain has gone down hill...coupon brought us in ...but won't be back....our app of bacon was good but got after the entrees since not written down

Came here on a Saturday night at 12:45, hours state open til 2:00 am EVERYWHERE. Doors were closed and locked at 12:45. Went downstairs to Spirits bar they said "yeah it was slow so we can call last call early." Total BS. If you advertise open til 2, don't have your doors locked at 12:45. Don't count on this place for late nights.
I rented a Nissan and transmission was acting weird luckily I was driving locally
This place is the worst hour for delivery no utensils no dressing on salad and cold !! Call somewhere else !

Nice hotel that offers a nice quiet stay for either a short or a long stay. I have stayed her before and this visit was very good as well. Kitchen area with large refrigerator so you can store and prep foods. Staff is friendly and helpful.

Love the team and love Dr. Liz! Finding a good Chiropractor is not always easy, but Dr. Liz and team is great. Dr. Liz explains what is going on and how she can help. If you are looking for a great Chiropractor, give Dr. Liz a try, you will be glad you did.
Expensive lunch with stale bread. I ordered a club sandwich and a soda, and this cost $14! And then the bread was so firm and dry that I couldn't even finish it around the edges.

Waitress was bother by be asking questions abount the menu the menu had no prices bad idea waited 25 minutes for dinner it took 20 to get check waitress was nt pleasant at all she needs patience prices not all are too high

Great go-to restaurant for a quick and inexpensive meal. The menu is extensive, it's so hard to choose because every calzone sounds amazing! Big fan of the Carmen. They also have a good selection of local beers.

The price matches the quality and presentation of food. It's not an authentic Japanese establishment. Fish is not the best quality, but if you want cheap sushi, come here for sure. Lots of food for little money. I just expected more quality based on the reviews. The sushi chefs are extremely fast and attentive though. The wait staff, however, not so much...
Just watched a worker run his hands through his hair for the forth time and then handle delivering food. Best part, standing next to his supervisor who does nothing.
Total waste of money do not come here!!!!!!! It is horrible! Not sure gow they are still open!

I try to go here for lunch on the weekdays. Delicious sandwiches and wine options. I really like that they give you a side of their aioli with your sandwich and fries. Never have had a problem with getting a table quickly, and being able to go back to work on time.
Great!

The food is overpriced, under flavored, and crazy expensive. Been here twice and each time sucked, I'll never be back. The crowds are unwarranted and obviously the people of Wayne are desperate for more restaurant choices, so they settle.

Real Italian food is hard to find but Mama Mia's has got you covered. When you walk in you get that aroma of freshly grated Parmesan cheese and real Italian sauces. It is a cozy place and is the epitome of comfort food. This is not a chain and you can tell everything was cooked with care. Now this is Italian - be there.

I had to wait over an hour for a scheduled appointment. No one along the way ever mentioned that the Dr was behind. When I mentioned to the Dr. his responses were snarky and unprofessional. If you like long waits and unprofessional behavior this is the place to go.

Good tasting food but tore my stomach up . Thai never does that to me . TOO EXPENSIVE ! Chicken fried rice is $ 15 !!! Drive a few miles up the interstate to Peter's Thai and Sushi in Brentwood behind Chick fil a .Way Better and 1/2 the price with no gastric meltdown ! I am still suffering 12 hours later !!
Marci consistently brushes and vacuums my pool each week for a pristine looking pool!

Cash only. They include a gratuity - be aware. I've gone several times in the past and it was always so good. This time all the food was over cooked and dry. I was seated near the entrance and every time the door opened it was so cold. Not sure if I'll come back.
Incredibly rude and unhelpful staff. Inconvenient to get to rooms (takes like five to ten minutes once you're in the lobby). Would not recommend unless you're desperate for location.

Went there for lunch after visiting WWII Musuem. Way too pricey - which would have been okay, but nothing was cooked as we ordered. Sent food back twice, I am the one who never sends anything back. The service was mediocre at best for the price. A disappointing way to end a day.
Had a radiator leak checked out in Jan. They replaced the radiator. Now it's losing coolant in June.
There are zero pumpkins at their "pumpkin patch." Seriously go somewhere else. All they have is bounce houses, which are fun but not really a Halloween thing

Great pizza! We ordered some pizzas and garlic knots tonight for delivery. Although the delivery took an hour (busy night), the pizza was great. I have had a hard time finding a Margherita pizza that is just GOOD chunky sauce, fresh mozzarella and basil. I have finally found my pizza place.

I had a little problem with finding a new accountant but they were exactly what I was looking for. Everyone was very professional and knowledgeable. My taxes never looked better and I definitely recommend coming to them for any and all advice.

Do not eat here. My husband and I use to come here frequently. Tonight while waiting on our meal to come A cockroach ran across the booth we were sitting in and down my shoulder. We got up and walked out after letting staff know. We will never eat here again and this was one of our favorite places to go.

Just tried this cozy restaurant. The staff was super friendly and the food was very tasty. The chef was extremely excited that we knew of this wonderful restaurant. I ordered the crazy noodles with chicken and was not disappointed. I love that I could request my heat level. I will definitely come back for more.

The burgers are GREAT!!! Must try the sweet potato fries AMAZING!!! Our waitress Marisa was FABULOUS!!! McKenzie was so sweet and helpful about Nashville. We're from Louisiana and we will be back!! Thank y'all for the AMAZING food and AMAZING service!!

Very good food, service and decor. The service was actually slow but matched the vibe and zeitgeist of the restaurant so no complaints there. I had the lemon corn cakes, sausages and decaf (the espresso machine was broken). The coffee was really poor but the food was quite nice. Nothing about it was great/special but all very good, four stars down the line.
Service was very friendly, the food was eatable not 'bad' but wouldn't go back there. Expected so much more from the Embassy Suites since we have stayed there several times before.

The iced chai I had was fine. I guess if I worked at Touro I'd come here for a coffee every now and then. But the barista couldn't have been less friendly if he tried. There's tons of great coffee shops in the city so I can't imagine coming back here.
Coffee is fine but you have to order online and they sit the order on one of a bunch of tables... People are vaccinated - it's time to open up for a bit of joy.

The store is always clean and organized. The staff is very helpful and friendly. I generally shop their clearance items and find AMAZING deals! If you sign up online they email you coupons very frequently so it makes the deals even better!
The staff is friendly and the treatment is fast as long as you brush your teeth often. Has TVs so you're not bored. Also very decorative.

I wouldn't water my time if things were good. This was a nightmare. The owner keeps changing his reply over for the past several months. Simply was a terrible business man and disrespectful. Called and left vulgar messages and told me he didn't care if I were a bad review. Thus, I did.
Best coffee place on earth! I live in Las Vegas and want Thomas Hammer every morning! Try the Fire Ball it's what the morning coffee is all about!

One of our favorite places to eat! I agree with a lot of the other comments about their buffalo cauliflower now being unrecognizable as cauliflower and more hard chunks of something fried. Disappointing as it used to be a favorite.

This is your average Mexican restaurant. There is absolutely nothing wrong with it. However, there's nothing spectacular about it, either. It is inexpensive, clean, the food is satisfactory, and the service is speedy. This is a great choice for a quick sit-down lunch.

My boyfriend and I went for breakfast and were disappointed. We both had omelettes and they were flat and small. The home fries were sliced potatoes with little flavor. I had hope with the Beignets, but they were something I would make at home with canned biscuits. Hopefully, we just ordered the wrong thing or caught them on a bad day.
Food is good but I've been a couple times and customer service is slow and you constantly have to ask for refills or even silverware.

The smoothies are great! They have the best avocado toast. I usually get the caprese toast. I've ordered from them about 3 times. However this time...my smoothie had a piece of label in it. I thought it was a piece of kale until I spit it out.

Ok .... it's Chili's, your typical chain restaurant. My avacado burger as ok. Nothing to write about for sure. What was so great about this particular visit was our service. She was phenomenal. I honestly cannot believe the difference in attitude in the south in general.
Not very good food but fun scene and good scenery
Good food. The customer service was outstanding! Scott at the register was very friendly!! Great time!!

Best burger I've had for my $ during my time in Philly. Docked a star for cashier aggressively calling me and another female customer​ "baby" and "sweetie." Stop. It's 2017. If it were somebody's Grandpa behind the counter, I'd give you a pass. However, you're in your 20s and know exactly what you're doing.

After a lot of soul searching, European Market and Deli has become my go to gyro restaurant since Super Gyro's and More shut down. The sign say's 'Best gyro's in town', and while I admittedly haven't tried every gyro in town to confirm that, I think they might be right. They're delicious, filling, and a good buy at $5.99.

The man at the register was very rude and had no customer service whatsoever. He also audibly said "I hate this place" when something wasn't going his way. Very immature and gives the business a bad look. He acts like you are stupid if you ask him a simple question and they were out of multiple things at 5am.
Carnitas that will make you cry real tears. Or maybe that was the hot sauce. Either way, this place is seriously on top of the taco thing. Believe in Milpas Street.
fantastic museum that's full of rich history! i love how you can download a Barnes app to your phone to get a guided tour in several languages. i highly recommend a visit!

Great service and hurricanes. We arrived early before the crowds. Shrimp and grits was delicious. The waitress recommended three desserts (not the chocolate) and they were incredible. My friends also loved their dinners. Good salads too, a rare menu offering in this city. Would definitely return.

Very friendly staff and fabulous food! This was a little piece of heaven that Elvis sang about I think....exquisite food :-0 we liked it so much we have come back again and again for more...seems to have an after taste...tastes like more !! Highly recommended!!! We'll definitely make this a regular occurrence :-)

Slightly disappointed with our last visit to the place, usually a go to for good BBQ, however; with 30-45 minute ticket times and not much attention to the customer it's hard to give this visit a 5 star review.

This place is a joke. The cannolis are so weak! Just look at the pictures they aren't even full. Such a rip off. Especially for the price. Also I I've had a tons of cannolis because it's my favorite dessert and these don't even taste good either.

Decided to check it out as I've driven by multiple times. Super peaceful inside, which us exactly what I was looking for when I study. Coffee is okay, but the baked goods are superb. I'd definitely recommend studying here, or coming in for coffee/tea and a good reading session.

This location changed their meatballs to some turkey mixture and they are terrible now! Used to be fantastic but now the flavor and texture are not good! I love the baked spaghetti but if you want fantastic meatballs with it, go to the Eagle location!

I was in town for a wedding and needed to stay over and I found this hotel. It was cheap and convenient to the wedding venue I was at. Overall the hotel is run down and I don't feel it's that clean. The room smelled terrible and WiFi wasn't good!
The lamb gyro used to be one of our favorites, but stopped by today and the ones we got were dried out and hard and the lettuce old. I don't know if they are under new management.
$5 for a cafe con leche that was small and just OK. Wasn't even sweetened. Had to add the sugar myself.
Stromboli was good. Stuffed shells were tough and overcooked. Service was quite poor.
I had a delicious medium pomegranate smoothie here yesterday. The employees were nice. The only downside is that $6 to $8 is a lot to pay for a takeout fruit drink.
Closed went there this morning June 3rd there's a sign on it that says available for rent and it's empty on the inside

Yuk, Yuk and Yuk!!!! Here for Mother's Day. The buffet was $40. It was catered by the Gourmet Food Work. Food was either over cooked, under cooked or cold. Nothing tasted fresh. Probably cooked the day before. I will never go again!
I called and spoke with a guy who didn't seem to care at all in helping. Sounded like a typical lackadaisical millennium who hated life. So..... on to the next one.
Nicole Verno is the best! Pushes my limits daily and is always super motivating. Sticks up for her clients if the need arises and is always reachable and as flexible as her schedule allows!
This place is soo good!!! Thank you Melva for making my experience more than expected!!!
Once again the whole fish was delicious and so was the veggie curry and drunken noodles. I do notice though that they have cut down on portion size.
Service was not the best, staff was nice... Just slow. Food was not that great. Had the Colorado and I didn't like it. I don't think I'll come back.

I was sent here after I broke my ankle last Easter. I walked out with a splint and a script for PT. Nobody told me that the splint wasn't covered by my insurance then when i did pay the $70 ( for a splint !!! ) they sent my bill into collections anyway! Horrible! just simply horrible!!!

Great place to go on a good weather day to sit at the bar outside, GREAT bartenders good burgers decent overall food I just don't like that they try to make everything spicy... But I love this place I frequent at least once every 2 weeks.
Service is deplorable. Food meh. Sorely disappointed. We are staying in hotel. Food particles left behind on seating. Poorly cleaned table surfaces. Poorly trained service staff. Just bad.

We were in town for a volleyball tournament. Mark and Jenn fed our girls lunch three days in a row. They were unbelievably accommodating and flexible with our wonky schedule and last minute order changes. Every girl got exactly what they ordered and on time every day. Thank you so much for taking good care of us!!! GO WAVE VOLLEYBALL!!!!

Food blah, waiter slow and unattentive. Overpriced. Didn't seem like anyone cared because 18% tacked into bill with party of 8. Brisket sandwich was horrible, au jus had no taste. Tourist trap for sure. $11 for a small house margarita. There are many, many better places to go. Should be no stars.

I was good but not to have a 5 star and was Mexican with a touch of Honduran roots. I was looking for something more Mexican than Honduran food. But still good but like I said first not for a 5 star. They need to improve the service on the waitress a little more faster with taking orders

I love this place! The falafel burger is so good. I want to try some of the other choices but I can't get past this choice. The cheesy jalapeño potatoes are awesome too. They roast the peppers so they are not too hot. $2 happy hour beers are also a great bargain!

The Scotch Egg starter was great and the Meatloaf sandwich was tasty. If I had to compare Hamdogs ro anything I'd say taste and portion size is similar to Claim Jumper, however the prices are considerably more favorable at Hamdogs. Service was friendly and prompt. We ate at 7pm on a Wednesday. It was moderately busy. I would recommend the Scotch Egg.

If you want to pay twice as much for alterations of a clothing item than you'd pay for the same item brand new, then Nora's your woman. Overrated, overpriced and over my dead body if I ever go to Nora's again.

I've been here once or twice. The pedicures are kind of rushed and the nails tecs do not even look up or smile at the customers. I was not walked to the drying station, the tec did not even say goodbye or thank you. The customer service is terrible.
Another visit and this time was very quick and efficient. Moved right up to a three star.

The Riverside has reached out. Removing review for now. Depending on how the conversation goes with Managment I'll determine if I will post my initial feelings on the hotel or if an updated review is in order. Sometimes the best way to determine a business is when something doesn't go right or off from normal and change is made. Thx Wendy
Cannoli looks like vomit inside, veal picata was thick, and tough. Called to complain about it, management was douche. Don't waste your money here.

Whether you're looking for Chinese or Vietnamese cuisine, this is my favorite spot on the Westbank for either! The service is always great, and the food is always fresh. Current favorites are Rare beef Pho, General Tso's chicken, shrimp fried rice & Pork dumplings!

Amazing waterfront views. Kid friendly atmosphere. We saw dolphins from the deck. Our waitress Chelcie was wonderful. Luke, the manager, went above and beyond to make sure we were comfortable and had the best meal. Cannot wait to come back again.
This place is ok. Food and drinks were alright, decor was festive and fun - gotta love the black and white photo booth. I may go back.
Super awesome staff!s! 11/10 negatives are that this site rarely has flower, seems to be especially afraid of sativa flower as seemingly always hybrids....and, well,, lacking variety in general.

Extremely thin crust, so thin that the vegis made it impossible to pick up. Another pizza we tried - the Covaccino - was a ridiculous mound of greens, some prosciutto, and so much unmelted shaved parm that we left a mound of it on the pan. No one could fathom eating it.

We visited here in Oct '13.This place gets busy during lunch. The workers are friendly. I had the ribs and brisket with potato salad and beans. Food came out within ten minutes. Ribs and brisket were okay, I prefer a stronger smoke flavor. Potato salad was very good.

Two different cars and four washes total yielded varying scratches along the rear bumper and side of the cars each time - some will and some work buff out. Quick and easy if you don't care about your paint and need a wash.
Meh. Had the "seafood" gumbo. It was mushy shrimp and rice. Not very good. The remoulade with the fried green tomatoes was pretty good.

Not a good experience. Food was OK. Service was deplorable! Would NOT go back again. The place was EMPTY...and still NO SERVICE!!! I did mention to the woman manager on the way out how disappointing the experience was with service and warm, not hot food and her response was "OK".

Cafeteria food. Previously frozen french fries served cold. OK meatballs. Decent fried fish special--cod. The owner was there. Makes me think he is aware of the execution and thinks it's just fine. Wine is ok . Nothing spectacular. Good price.
Zero stars this drive-through always takes 20 to 25 minutes
Terrible service. Ok tacos. Took way too long to even get a menu to look at. The bar was empty too. Time for an employee meeting on customer service BC management..
What happened? This placed used to be good. The Cod was terrible. The Service was atleast sympathizing to the fact we did not touch our plates...

I needed to print labels for invitations and I was not sure how to do it. I went in and Lori B. was super nice and very helpful! She took her time and got my labels perfect!! Thank you so much Lori B. YOU ROCK!!!!!!

Best place in university city for dinner!! Great drinks, delicious food, and fun atmosphere! Drinks: highly recommend the passion fruit mojito and margs. Food: chicken fajita is AMAZING and the Al Pastor Tacos are tasty. I do have to say the service is very slow, but I went with a big crowd (they can accommodate large groups) so understandable.

I was in the mood for Mexican style food and I came in to try Capital Tacos. I had the Carnitas and pork Burrito and the chips. The chips were a little fried. There was nice decor here and I like the fact that they accommodate to everybody. The texture wasn't just there.
Worse customer service when you want to return item. At least 30 minutes wait . Last time I will shop here. Don't want to hear they are lacking employees. Pay more.
Wonderful food and nice teas. Waitress was very energetic and informative along with good communication skills.
I was disappointed in this pizza. The dough was full of air holes, and the toppings were very few and only covered the center of the pizza.

This place has great service, beverages, and really inventive dishes. We tried a variety of potstickers and they were all good. Highly recommend the Vietnamese and Mexican potstickers as well as right now they have a pumpkin one with bourbon caramel sauce. We will definitely be back!!

Chicken wings were over cooked. Paella had salmon rather than chicken... no taste of saffron detected. All the fish in the Paella was over cooked. Food came in a tri-foam with cheap foil so every bite carried the fear of foil against filling. First & last time for restaurant which is in the neighborhood.

Braised Short Rib Pizza. If that doesn't intrigue you, then I don't know what will! This place pushes out great pizza and truly hits the spot every time I'm hungry for a slice.. which is all the time. Definitely check this place out for quick slice if you're in the area.
Some things are good to get, some are not. But overall it is an okay place. I was able to get what I needed.

Best guacamole ever! Fabulous margarita. No skimping here. Online reservation make it easy Wish it had more vegetarian choices. They seemed willing to accommodate. Would have had five stars if they had had more choices. But lots of fish for folks who like that! I very much recommend.
Would give 5 but it takes so long to get drinks and God at this place. Food is good.
Always fresh and delicious, love the chips and salsa, they have nice selection of tequila as well

This is without a doubt the slowest, most unorganized, and inaccurate Starbucks in St Louis. No line in the store, and a short drive thru line...took them 15 minutes to get my order ready. Horrible service
real cute girls serving good coffee. I just wish there were a place to sit down and and talk to them and enjoy the show.

The manager is a fat oval-shaped racist and Trump supporter who throws people out if he doesn't like them. He is a frumpy poorly dressed guy who has nothing going on in his life except engaging in petty authoritarianism. Stay away from this place.

Burnt popcorn, very "dated" facility, sound and lighting not on par with any competition. Staff seemed to work hard behind the counter, but clearly short staffed. Not somewhere I'd probably frequent to watch a movie.

First impressions didn't give me any confidence in this restaurant. Table was still dirty when I was seated, and the floor was filthy. Honey bbq chicken bites were rather good not something I would reorder though. Onion rings were amazing. entree was a bourbon chicken and shrimp, very full of flavor and delicious, will certainly come back again for it.

My son's car had a cracked muffler, and Danny at Goleta Mufflers and Brakes was fantastic- he gave us a very reasonable price and did the repair very quickly. Highly recommend using them for muffler repairs!

This is my local to go for a fast food Chinese take out spot. Food has always been consistent and pretty good. Simple and to the point. Even when you call in and order the lady taking the order is very quick and to the point. Reminds of Seinfeld's "soup nazi" but she is very nice. Affordable and pretty good.

I came here for vegetarian soup dumplings but didn't have them tonight. I settled for mapo tofu and scallion pancake, both are mediocre. The fact that the mapo tofu is vegan is nice though. Cloudy Days in Chengdu cocktail wasn't good. Service is good, price is good.
Options are limited when its late night, not too many places open all night in the area. Food wasnt what I would expect from a bistro. I remember when this place was called Exton diner.
I rarely write bad reviews, but couldn't avoid it this time. Had the worst food poisoning of my life after ordering sushi out from this restaurant. AVOID!!!
Food, good. Beer, better. Service, awful. Enough said.
Awful food, worse service. Avoid this place.

I'm giving 5 stars for the lemon pepper wings alone.. So good! I have tried a few different flavors of the wings and they have a delicious selection! Don't get mild, not a fan! Mozzarella sticks are tasty also. They have a decent selection of beer, seems like a nice place to hang out tho I usually just do take out. Tip: cash only
If you like expensive pizza on the sweeter side you may like Greek's. They run coupons on Groupon which seems counter to a true 5 star Yelp rating. Not my kinda place.
Food sucks. Only go for the Mongolian BBQ buffet AT LUNCH. cheaper than dinner. Worth the price during lunch!

This place was ok. Music is good, drinks are really cheap, kind of waterd down. Staff was nice, big dance floor. I went a few times and the place was half full. A lot of tourists come to this place but all in all very friendly people. Id go again. It just looks like a hole from the outside.

The closest thing to New York pizza you'll ever have in Florida. Staff is great. A little pricey but you have to remember, you get what you pay for. We order at least 2 times a week. They really know Italian food.

What kind of post office doesn't have a machine to buy postage? Seriously. I fought my way through Bayou Boogaloo traffic to get into the driveway of this post office, so I could park briefly and buy postage. Much to my chagrin, there was no postage for sale. Gah. Not a fan. Sorry.

The food wasn't bad. No real complaints except that the prices are too high and the portion size is too small. $14 for a tiny piece of lasagna which came with bread and nothing else. If it were a better value we might go back.

It's McDonald's. Love it or hate it. Can't go wrong with some chicken nuggets and a whopper. Special invention my buddy made if you're super hungry. I now introduce to you the McGang Bang. A Cheese burger W/O bun in between 2 Spicy McChickens. Knock yourself out!
Terrible service! 2 meals came out and were finished before the other 2 meals even came out. Manager said he would comp first round of drinks and only comped 3 of 4

Look-it; I don't smoke cigars...but when I do, I smoke here. I saw a chick share looks of longing love through the humidor room glass- guess she doesn't smoke but her man did- haha. Welcome to the neighborhood Montecristo.... your clean leather smell melds nicely with all of these SOHO royals like myself. Great people watching spot too.

My brother and I were downtown, and decided to get some lunch. I ordered the chicken salad, and it was served in a half-pineapple. It was delicious and fun, and if I hadn't been wearing a tie, I probably would have gotten more of the pineapple.

We were waiting for an hour to be seated. And said they would call us on the phone when they had the table ready. They called saying it was ready but they couldn't wait 3 minutes for us and they gave the table to someone else. They sounded annoyed on the phone when we called back. Screw this place. Wont ever come here again

Food selection is limited but it's pretty good, the boba is ok/good. This place is especially good for lunch because they are so quick and you can have a sit down experience and still be out the door in 30 minutes

Definitely a "Must Do" if you like history...Not a great idea if you have little ones. My favorite was "Charles" he was the narrator, (if you will), and gave an amazing account of Hurricane Katrina. I could have listened to him a few more hours. Great job!
Grievances: $11 for two Dos Equis Boring tiny chicken fajitas Ditto with the once amazing rattle snake tacos of the day
Nice quiet place to sit and enjoy some great PHO. Wait staff was kind, prompt and tentative. Great place to eat.

Got a specialty coffee and it wasn't disappointing. Prices seemed about average and the staff was friendly. It loops around so there's space. It was fun to browse the little "shop" they have, supporting local artists.
Next time I will just order from Papa Johns. The crust was thick and the pizza lacked flavor. The wings were ok.
Staff very unfriendly, wings were good if you think hooters is edible. Beer got me drunk so that's a thing. I'd go again in a burlap sack against my will.

I've gotten #To-go orders and this week was spot on! My Lobster Tail was cooked just right I got lots of Broccoli and Rice this time they gave me the Walts Shrimpnot the kids shrimpI got last week. And dem BiscuitsI cant wait tor this to be over so we can dine in

My server looked like Lily Sobieski in her prime. About the lamb chops - I ordered mine medium rare. They came out perfectly grilled, charred on the outside but soft and pink in the middle. The portions were humongous, it's good for 2. I would have ordered dessert but I was already full.

In my first telehealth appointment the Dr. barely made eye contact, was more interested in payment and what I wanted prescribed, and there was no follow-up support. Felt reckless and irresponsible. BTW- they could/should have also referred to Santa Barbara Mental Wellness Center. A better place to start as they care about the the people, not the revenue.

This airport has been and continues to be awful. Rude employees, outdated facilities and late flights rule the day. Security here is awful, give yourself and hour at least. If you are pre-check, give yourself 20-25minutes. Bags take forever. Avoid this airport at all costs, unfortunately, I am not able to.

I'm not sure what has changed here, however, the last two visits we have waited well over an hour for our food. It was never been like that before. The first time we thought it was a fluke...but it happened again. We are going to go elsewhere next time.

Very delicious food and I am just thrilled to have an Indian restaurant on this side of town!! The guys working in there are very nice. Weekend buffet is a good deal at $9.99 all you can eat. Everything I've ordered off the menu has been great.
Great views with a relaxed atmosphere. Got the chicken wings extra crispy and they were great. Good place to relax with a few drinks and a bite to eat.

Eleni is the Very Fun and Knowledgable Salon owner and stylist. She has really helped my hair improve in quality and structure by the outstanding products that she uses in her salon! She has an excellent eye for color and design while also being a kind thoughtful person. I have used her talents and advice for six years and I wholeheartedly recommend her.
Great place for brunch! The french toast looks great, but I usually just order an omelette which is really good. Great for vegetarians as well.
Delicious food everytime. Bandeja paisa and fried fish filet is our favorite. Portions are VERY generous!

Worst service ever! Took almost 10 minutes to get a server. Then we had to wait about a half an hour for our breakfast of eggs! We only got them the because we asked how much longer it would be! The place wasn't even busy since it was 8:30 in the morning.
Boats are nice and clean Crew is very friendly and helpful BUT they do NOT follow their own schedules We could not use multiple trips due to no boat Waste of money
Excellent covered patio with misters to help cool off while watching the sunset. The food is always quick and accurate when it gets to the table to enjoy with cold refreshments.

I love Panda Express, but this location consistently serves entrees with hardly any sauce. I often get pieces that aren't covered at all when ordering the orange chicken and honey walnut shrimp. The service is always good...it's just the food that's not up to usual Panda Express standards.

Small shop on bourbon street. Lot of things to see but damn costly. I would say they are priced at-least 3-4 times costly. Any kind of photography is not allowed but you can visit one time for the experience. They have some great collection related to voodoo stuffs.

Seriously this is mediocre Tex mex at best. I am so surprised by all the glowing reviews. I certainly can't tell you what to like or not, however if you have ever had good mex or TeX mex. You will recognize this be to be lackluster at best.
Since when was this a full glass of wine? Her hand was just a wee bit light tonight. Do not order wine here. And don't have the blonde girl pour

Such a colorful when inviting shop. The sales woman was super friendly and knowledgeable. My fiend and I both found things to buy. Prices were reasonable. I bought a handmade 60's long sleeved dress in a mod print, finished with pearl details. Perfect for a girls' night out or date night, even a wedding! I'll definitely be back next time we're in West Chester.
Very affordable and good quality for the price. I liked their build your own topping choices, and I got a great veggie pizza for much less than other places.

My first reveillon dinner. Not impressed. For $50 not a whole lot of food. Then get bill and find an $8 music charge. Band played, thankfully, only two songs while we were there. Onion soup was really good. Could've had more than a 1/2 cup of that.
No Surprises here. Exactly what you would expect from this chain. Great place to get a breakfast burrito any time during the day if your in one of the hotels around here.

Excellent beer, excellent atmosphere. Great crowd. Service folks worked hard, but had a tough time keeping up with the demand. A little overpriced, but worth it as a treat for cool, refreshing beer with fiends (and you make a few new ones as well) on a nice weekend or after work. Drink local, support your local brewer and they will support you! Cheers!
Worst coin shop! Owner is so rude! Low ball prices!! Everything is overpriced and just awful!! Don't go here.
Terrible food and customer service. I would not recommend this place unless you like soggy crust pizza served with an attitude.
Saturday brunch was great. Can't go wrong with steak biscuits and bloody marys. Service was lacking, but overall a great experience.
Cute items although there was only one box of sugar free pralines and it was wrapped in a huge gift box already

They have expensive menu items that have no flavor. If you are going to drown you selection in chili paste or hot sauce you might not notice. The sign on door says "Masks Required"; however, the staff does NOT wear masks. The place seems dark and questionably clean. There are better option in Tucson!
Really liked my Chicken experience here yesterday that is why I went to another branch in Santa Barbara. Their chicken is tasty/flavorful- jus the way I like it!!! Love it

I attempted to reach out MULTIPLE times about catering for my sisters wedding. I've called, emailed, messaged them on Instagram and even spoke to someone on the phone once. Who insured me they would get back to me. If you aren't catering, totally get it! But at least acknowledge the multiple messages I've sent you and let me know that.
Good food good environment and really cool place to eat highly recommend woohoo go eat there yeaaaaaah oh yeah go eat there my mom said it's good to just like my roommate neigh neigh
Closed as Acapulco....re-opened as Chile's with similar Mexican menu and prices.

My new favorite place! My brother in-law gave me a gift certificate to Harmony for my birthday. What a great gift, I was so happy with my facial and brazilian wax. Cheers to being clean as a whistle!!!

The food is good. I like the atmosphere in the restaurant. Good prices and the fries are good. The location is near the movie theater and Skyzone and Bowling. Good to hang out with friends m. Staff was friendly

What I ordered: Gyro I ordered it with extra sauce and light onions. When I got to work, there was barely any sauce. They guy who took my order repeated "extra sauce" 3 times. I won't order this anymore.

Surprisingly very good food and impeccable service. We had the Lobster Taco's (Tortillas were handmade), Caprese Salad (Mozarella was made in house also), Lobster Dinner which was flawlessly cooked. The only bad experience was the seating, hopefully they get it all worked out being a new place.
Three cheers for Chaucers for being a great local bookstore, and the continuously reigning champ in SB.

Tried today for first time and loved! Lots of choices. The pimento cheese sandwich was amazing! The simple salad was anything but simple. Very good. Had the wasabi ginger dressing & loved.. would get the dressing on the side next time, was too much dressing for me. Can't wait to go back & try more things. Staff was very friendly.

the service here is top notch. our waiter was very helpful and on top of empty glasses all night. i'm not the best at these reviews because i usually like everything and don't remember any of the names. i do remember the bill being quite expensive for 4 people but that didn't deter from a night of great food.
Wouldn't order again. Crab Rangoon wasn't good. Vegetable egg roll was decent. Hunan Tofu was just gross. :(

Solid good basic breakfast menu items. Ordered eggs, biscuit and corned beef hash. All were cooked well and tasty. The buttermilk biscuits were a little too hard for my taste...makes me wonder if they were thawed (chewy). The flavor was good/spot on and the portions decent. I would recommend for good location, fair prices, good service, and solid food options.

Stopped in today for my first time. i ordered the beef basil with fried rice and a spring roll, All food was fresh and very good. large portion size as well. Foot traffic was a little slow so we need to spread the word. i will be back!
Food was good. Service was great. Beer was cold. I would go here all the time if I lived in the area!

I really wanted to like this coffee but obviously I didn't. The location was nice and had a parking lot which is important because parking in the trendiest area of Santa Barbara is a b*&%$. The vibe was typical coffee shop décor and the service was good. I just couldn't get over the finish or "aftertaste" of the coffee.

Love this place! Had the British pub trio of scotch egg, fresh British crisps, and baked Brie and all were fantastic! Also tried the chicken, Brie, and leek pie which had huge chunks of tender chicken, wonderful sauce, and a flaky crust. The owner and chef personally made sure everything was great. Highly recommend this place for both lunch and dinner.

We have gone to this restaurant twice in the last month. First time we would have given it 5 stars. 2nd time 0 stars. Couldn't believe we were at the same restaurant. So, I guess you roll the dice and take your chances.
Terrible barbershop. They took forever and my hair is still shit. Ill never be back. The shop is dirty.

Food was good- service was great - but the manager ruined it by asking us to leave after an hour and 10 minutes because there were 5 people waiting supposedly for an hour (by the way there were empty tables and tables that had been there longer than us)! Probably won't come back because of that.

This place is pretty meh. Good for boba, but not much of a cafe like it's advertised. It's chilly and not super comfortable. Their pastries are average and so is the coffee. Pretty mediocre for a boba shop.

Our service was great, we made reservations online and the hostess staff were a little less than friendly but our serving team was great!! Food was delicious. If you have kids who are foodies, like mine, avoid the kids menu, the food from it was a little on the bland side.

Good bagels, good spread selections and good service! My husband and i always come here and we love it. I love the texture of their spreads. They have other options on their menu not only bagels. Love their onion bagels with garlic herb cream cheese! Definitely worth it to check out!!!!!

I was delightfully surprised at the quality and value of the breakfasts here. Skillets were perfectly prepared. Some of the other breakfast offerings were average but not bad by any means. A great option especially if you're staying or playing at the Peppermill.

I didn't even eat here tonight. I can in without a reservation and the lady at the desk was extremely rude to us. One of the other waitresses was a little nicer but we elected to leave because of the horrible reception.
Buy tickets online or stop and buy day before because its assigned seating. Great Recliner Chairs
Great place , but the staff wasn't very friendly (one person in particular) wish I got a name .. I was given an attitude. Otherwise I love this place

Ok, upon a few other trials of the dry cleaning, they are officially hopeless. Just terrible. Takes forever, the attendant is an unpleasant woman. The prices unjustifiable for the shoddy service. They cant even get a regular laundering of a collared shirt right. Just terrible.

Quite dissappointed in this location. The kitchen staff and take-out cashier had two verbal altercations while I waited for my spinach sandwich. The sandwich had potential had the actually put spinach on it. Each half ( at least 5 inches of bread,) had 4 leaves of spinach, so it was pretty much a bread sandwich!
Terribly disappointing quality of food compared with all the hype. Overpriced and mediocre.

Wow, very impressed from a food court restaurant. I tried the corned beef special with thousand island dressing, and coleslaw on rye bread. It was fantastic! I would definitely go there again A little pricey, but you get what you pay for.
Trash on outside and bathroom disgusting , floors dirty inside . Not the usual standards for a Wawa
Pho was ok, not the best around but easy parking.

Love ittttttt! The staff is so kind and helpful, waffles are amazing, and the coffee will fulfill any coffee lovers dreams. I bought two coffees just cause the first one was so good! Thank you cafe vino
Saw one of the pizza makers go clean a table with a dirty rag, go to the computer, then go back to making pizzas without washing his hands.... Disgusting..... And we already ate
Good place for a quick breakfast. Parfait had virtually no yogurt. Don't be surprised if random street musicians come set up to play in the marble hallway where the seating is.

It was just ok. For the area I expected better. Flavors were almost there. We shared shrimp scampi bruschetta and chicken carbonara. The service for us great but table next to us we finished eating before their order was taken. I noticed food under hot lamp there before we sat and after we left. Hoping they are not serving it

I can not say enough great things about this vet. We love Dr. Martin and all the staff. I have all my cats and dogs being taken care of here. Someone recommended Adobe years ago, I am so glad I listened.
Just awful. The store is so dirty and gross. Our sandwiches were disappointing and really expensive. Not giving up on Primo, just this location.
Very poor customer service. I asked to have a billing supervisor call me and still haven't heard from them. Beware.
I normally get in and out fairly quickly. It's nice to get in there and use their Wi-Fi while enjoying a cup of their delicious Sweet Tea.
We had a great time at Mocha Nut. Sitting outside on the back patio. The beverages were delicious! The service excellent & everyone was very friendly. Try it!

Do not use these people if you life depends on it. I called them because they were the first guys to show up on a google search. All I needed was a dishwasher repaired. They misses multiple appointments and caused weeks of rescheduling. Cost me $140 and two appointments just remove a piece of plastic from the drainage pump.
Basically hot dogs wrapped in bread, occasionally with some cheese or jalapeños thrown in for good measure. It's just not that good.
Worst food ever. Over salted everything. Dried out chicken and overcooked prime rib. She was rude and obnoxious. If I could give zero stars, I would.
Best late night food and drinks in the St. Louis area can't beat it two dollar tacos two dollar tequila shots, Go!

The peanut butter burger is honestly the best in the house. It shouldn't taste good but it is so sinfully good that you will want to come back for more. Lauren then bartender was awesome and helpful!!!!
Excellent food, beer, service and atmosphere! This is one of my new favorite go to spots for a great meal!
Amazing food, hats off to the chef. Needs more work on the drinks but overall great restaurant!

The chicken was fried to perfection. I got hot and my boyfriend got extra hot. The hot was perfect if you like really spicy food, the extra hot was too salty and you could feel the grainy texture of the spices on the outside. the pickles are the perfect combo with the chicken.

Great Caesar Salad dressing. Most all entrees under $20! Portion size may leave you with something to be desired-pasta, medium size; chicken a little small; veal good sized. All in all we'll probably stick with the other Italian restaurant down the street in Flourtown.

I've been looking forward to trying this restaurant for so long every since they first opened. I was very disappointed . Service was nice, curry mussels watered down... no. Curry shrimp was just ok. Very small amount of food for $28. The sorrel was yummy...
My wife and I enjoyed dinner here tonight. The food and service was great . We will be back !!!

Meh. I've had better. This restaurant makes only four depressing waffle options that are extremely overpriced and only puts on a stingy amount of toppings. There was no pizzazz about them at all; sure it may appear aesthetically pleasing, but the taste was bland and the texture became soggy within a few minutes. These waffles made me and my tongue feel sad.

The house singer is really good. It's a lot of fun and I am really not a karakoe fan, but when you are buzzed it is cool to scream your lungs out. The major bummer is that they don't allow you with your drink inside. C"MON NOW
Food was ok. Although the french onion soup seemed as though it were from a can. Beer was not as cold as I would have preferred, but tasty. We'd try this place again.
I feel like there are no books here. Honestly all the saint Pete libraries have about zero selection. Bummer.
Went there last weekend service fantastic food I had to Ruben little greasy not terrible just okay my nephew had a fantastic Burger will I go back there again yes probably
Mediocre grub at a not-worth-it price. No matter if it's the owner or an employee, it seems like every day is their first day working there.

Cozy enough place. Food wasn't terrible but not worth the money. Service def could have been better. The reason I will never go back: I got REALLY sick to my stomach after that meal- something was def off with the food. Should have gone to Tijuana Flats next door instead.
I came here for lunch yesterday roughly after 3, order the Jumbo chicken meal , the green beans wasn't very good and the wedges as I order fresh was not . I worked for a Lees You can do better !

We sat at the bar and had a beer. Atmosphere was good. The bartender was relatively friendly. We both ordered the lunch special with traditional wings and Caesar salads. The wings were excellent. The salad was so drenched in Caesar dressing that the lettuce was soggy.
Very loud....and a lousy draft beer selection. Keep on walkin' by. Service not great either.

This was the worst service I've had at steak house!!! I ordered a 16 ounce prime rib medium rare it came out cold tough and tasted bad. I took two bites of it and sent it back because it was horrible. The bill comes and they still charged me for it. My family and I will never go back again!!!!

I'm pretty excited to have this place in my neighborhood. I had the Mexi crepe and it was really delicious. It had a lot of cheese, more than expected, but I'm certainly okay with that. The rest of the filling was great and the crepe itself was topped with some sour cream. The coffee was stellar. Can't complain about that!

I ordered through Grub Hub. Grub Hub took almost an hour and a half to deliver our food- estimated time when I ordered was 40 minutes. El Limon managed to get all 4 of our orders wrong. I will not be using Grub Hub again, nor will we be eating at El Limon in the future. What a disappointing experience with both businesses.
Overrated. Waited about an hour to eat salty tomato soup in a cast iron with a fork. ‍

So amazing.. not only is is creepy amazing that it is on a ship in the harbor, which is awesome enough to walk through at night but the haunt was so scary. Pop out after pop out when you least expected it!!! Worth the money. Go!!!!
Great food, the portions are huge but they still taste. We did have a little wait and the order took awhile but it was worth it.
The have great two peice bands on Friday nights. With my favorite waitress Sabrina. The have great select of food on there menu. You got try for yourself

Awesome experience! I came in when it was slow which is surprising when I read the reviews. Owen greeted me and gave me a tomato bisque sample! It was amazing and then he recommended the pot roast and that sealed the deal, I will be back!!

The name is good but the experience was not. The people are friendly and attentive. The Cuban sandwich was so-so. Ropa Vieja is not very good. And the cafe-con leches is not authentic. It's a good sandwich and breakfast place.

Clean lobby and room. Clean sticker on door. No breakfast or pool but same price. Hot coffee in lobby. In wall AC units run by wall thermostat worked fine but was extremely noisy. If we stayed more than one night, we would get a new room.
It's a grocery store like most. Great selection of liquor and fruits. Decent deli, although usually grouchy. The store is ALWAYS FREEZING!!! Bring your down jacket if you plan on staying a while
First time visiting, had the green smoothie. Very good, great service, Courteous staff.

Green juice was watered down.. Guy was friendly but not very knowledgable. He was willing to make me exactly what I wanted though which is nice. Think they need more ingredients plus green juice that's not full of apples or fruit to bulk it out. That's a lot of sugar.

OK place, though not all employees seem knowledgeable enough to provide quality service. Moreover they said glasses will be ready in 45 min, instead took 1 1/2 hr. It's like the Applebee's of eye glasses.
The food was okay the service wasn't the best. They kinda acted like we were a problem. Not sure why but the acted l it.

Love the food. The waitresses are the worst, especially the red head. If she comes to serve you either move to another spot or go to obradys! Went there on Superbowl. Had signs all over saying drink n food specials. So we asked about them and were told they didn't have any? Huh!

Wow. The drive thru was crazy long and there's very little parking. I parked and walked in can can't believe those people wait in the drive thru that long. I think it was a bank a long time ago. Shared with Jimmy John's.
What a shame! This course used to be in great shape. Now that it closing they really let it go and still have the guts to charge $40!! I won't return!
Not a pleasant experience at all. Poor business. Poor people skills. Poor communication.

Jolly Brothers, here in Santa Barbara is a fantastic service. They are professional and willing to work with my picky tastes. Their food is delicious and I can't recommend them enough... A repeat service for sure!
Terrible service that took much longer than initially expected. Had to call regularly to get any updates and lucky to get call back from any service person. Definitely not recommend.

Horrible service!!! takes forever to get waited on. Don't go if your are on your lunch break because you have to get the food to go and eat it at your desk. Not sure what the problem is ?? C'mon Stefano's get your act together you have great food....

The owner of Woody's is a nasty horrible person and is rude to his customers and employees. The restaurant is over priced, has unfriendly service and has dark and unkept interior. I would have given it no stars but was not allowed to. Don't waste your time and money at Woody's!

A central location in the heart of Trolley Square is the only thing this ACME has going for it. Limited selection, unappealing presentation, and a general rundown atmosphere make this a place to avoid. A quick run up to 202 offers a much better ACME, in addition to superior grocery options such as Giant, Trader Joe's, and Shop-Rite.
I'm one hungry lady okay? There's like 4 people in here besides myself, and they said the wait would be 25 minutes.. okay that's fine. BUT ITS BEEN 50 AND WHERE IS MY SMALL PIZZA??
I got the shrimp po'boy and it was good. Yes it was good not great. Airport food is what it is... Airport Food. They had live music today which was very nice.
Great service, juicy chicken, delicious greens!! Waffles are on the thin side but good. We'll be back for sure!!
Always decent sushi. We get their party platters often when we go to friends houses and have to bring something.

Horrible experience. They accepted my Valentine's Day order, took my money then leaves me a message later in the day saying that they can not deliver my gift. The message instructed me to call. The line is busy. I will never use this location again.

Awesome spot on state street for a drink or meal. Seating took a while but it was busy, they have a great system with the hostess leading people into the outdoor seating area. Food was pretty delicious, different Latin flavor styles on modern cuisine. Loved the vibe and ambience here. Great for groups.

First visit to Mill Street Cantina. The food was delicious, not sure it was authentic Mexican, but I don't believe they advertise as authentic. Food was fresh and choices of drink were great. What I did enjoy was the atmosphere, Tim, the owner, came out to greet us, so that was a nice touch. Definitely will visit again!! Keep up the good work.
It was ok. Late night at work. Got to bar about 9.30. Not bad. Sat at bar. Nice bartenders. Had much needed beer in no time. Order zinger salad. Very good. I'll be back when in these neck of woods.
Star bucks is always good. you just cant beat them.
Absolutely amazing Smoked wings, Ribs, Bread pudding! Definitely recommend Bodacious Pig! Service is beyond nice, place is super clean and most importantly, everything we ordered was delicious.

Open? Nope! Was really disappointed to see that they were closed when online it said there were open! I understand some people are nervous about the virus going around but if that is the reason they are closed, a sign would be appreciated or an update on their hours online so I don't have to drive all the way there just to be disappointed.
This place is the worst! The guy cut my cuticles so much that my fingers wouldn't stop bleeding!

This is a sloppy seconds choice for breakfast. If there is a line outside, it's not for the food. The sausage gravy tasted right out of a can. Any restaurant in the south that can't make good sausage gravy from scratch should be ashamed.

avoid. they dont keep appointments. had to leave at 1245 after being told my car was next. hadn't been seen after 2 hoursv and 45 minutes. avoid. told appointment would go ahead of walk ins. not true.
Nice building and nice people but no Automated Postal Service machine. They are all I use anymore since it keeps me from having to stand in line. This place needs one.
Excellent experience, adorable winery, cool owner, great wines. Our crew had a blast!

It's fast, friendly, and always open. I mean, club douche bags need to eat too, right? So why end up eating a small mediocre sammich when surrounded by so many other places? Because the man said so! Thats why.
I got the salmon chirashi. The salmon is markedly mediocre (texture is a bit too chewy), and for some reason they throw a ton of salt on top of it. Would not recommend
Squeeze In gets a B. The food is fantastic. Definitely pricey. The wait staff is friendly. The atmosphere is cozy eclectic.

Was overall very good; my sweet potato gnocchi with kale and prosciutto was delicious. My son had mac and cheese, which I thought was good; he believed it was "too cheesy." French fries were delicious, and the service was friendly and efficient.
Had a cracked screen on my iPhone and Daniel fixed it in 15 minutes. He had very reasonable prices. He also fixes IPads, PC's and other cellphones.

Sandy was awesome! The tour was very informative and fun. We learned so much about the history of New Orleans: the French, the Spanish, and other groups. Again, so much fun, informative, and Sandy was a real trouper despite having a sore throat. She really brought the history of New Orleans to life.

The lemon ricotta muffin and frozen coffee (coffee, ice and coffee powder blended to impossibly high speeds, then served straight with a straw plunged in -- or with whip and flavor, if that's your bag) are enough to transform even the most underorgasmic among us into sloppy wet rainbows of gratitude.

Our favorite dinner spot on Broadway. Our go-to is the Hot chicken sandwich with Brussels sprouts and Mac-n-cheese. We've tried others but this is the best around. The rooftop bar is large and easy to get service. Look forward to our next visit.

Not great at all. I was craving a fresh and refreshing açaí bowl and this was neither. The bowls with granola toppings are pre-made, and the fruit was nothing to write home about. The bowl tasted frost bitten unfortunately.

Visited UPenn with my friend and had lunch there. Because it is in the Christmas time, there weren't many people, and it didn't take a long time for us to get meals. It was great to order yourself. The garlic noodle was great except for that it was a little salty. Overall, a good place to have a lunch!

Favorite place in town. I go here every weekend. Their tacos are fresh, homemade and by far the best I had. And what a neat location. If you are having a rough day and want some affordable food to cheer you up, go here. Top it up with delicious watermelon juice!

Rude server wouldn't accept clipper coupon said only certain items can be selected lunch coupon also needs to be used between 12 and130 they don't even open until 12. will not go back very expensive no drinks just tacosalad and fajita Bill 29.00 dollars with out tip

I was very happy with Wingate Associates as my management company, but unfortunately the company was bought by Condominium Associates and since that time the management business went down. I will give this company a zero rating for the bad experience I had with them.

Alright I don't normally leave Yelp reviews but I feel like I'm saving humanity. Got 2 slices to go and the pizza was GARBAGE. Literally tasted like dollar a slice back in college. Couldn't even finish it.

We had 25+ pies delivered for lunch, that arrived exactly on time and very hot. This is the local favorite of our office. The pizza and the customer service is much better than the other, more popular places in Pennington. We will definitely be ordering our pizza from here in the future.

Must try mac n cheese! Great mason jar drinks and music! I had the hot chicken pizza and my friend had the burger, both great choices! Sat next to the windows, which was great for people watching! They also have upstairs seating! Enjoy!

Love their food. I always get their bbq nachos with bbq chicken and it is divine. Sometimes it's a bit slow but it is never extremely crowded. Their servers have always been very pleasant, never had a bad one.
BEST cheesteaks EVER. I live in Philly, i've tried them all. And this place hands-down is the best place to go for a "philly cheesteak."

Love this place for so many reasons... I could easily eat 10 plates of the duck confit and although im not a vegetarian i cant help but love the veggie flatbread. Those smoked tomatoes make it. Very friendly and thoughtful staff, too!
Fantastic food - have not had one thing that we have not enjoyed on our many visits. The service and ambience would benefit with some warmth.

This place has horrible customer service. They charged extra to wash a small SUV and don't notify you before they hand you their ticket. When we approached the owner, he was very rude and said I shouldn't come back. I have never been treated like this in my life.
This is by far the best pizza in sb. I don't know if they still have it but the FT special was amazing and cheap.
Good restaurant. Nice atmosphere. Huge portions just got an appetizer and salad and was plenty
Well played, Baskin Robbins: spend your money HERE and tell your guests to pee next door
I came as a walk-in and was serviced promptly. The staff was welcoming and all of the facility was super clean! I'm happy with my pedi!

Great find! The drinks are great, voodoo fries are the bomb and our server Johnny was AMAZING!!!! Whatever they are paying him is not nearly enough....we will be back again and again for the delicious drinks and wonderful service.

Ordered a sweet potato roll and a Philadelphia roll. Sweet potato was not cooked all the way and they don't put avocado in their philly rolls. I honestly don't recommend this place. Service was good though if that really matters.

I stopped in for lunch yesterday for my first visit . I bought the Big Thai chicken wrap. The thing was massive! I chose the spicy cucumber salad for my side. I loved every bite! I should have stopped half way through, and saved the other half for dinner. Problem was, it was so good, I just couldn't stop. I will definitely return.
TV didn't work in my 1st room so was moved to second. Super nice employees, but the lack of hot water in the 2nd room made me think twice about my decision to stay here. ;(

Guests are treated differently if you bring a pet, which they CLAIM to be "pet-friendly". Shame on the management for the discrimination they show to pet owners. They are absolutely not pet-friendly at all. We have a complainer next to us. Our dog is not barking!
Barbuzzo: small, cozy place, but BIG on FLAVOR!!! The pizzas, salads, entrees, dessert, any and EVERYTHING is rto die for. RUN, don't walk!!!!

My wife and I went to Mi Tenampa on December 13. It was terrible. The chips are very thin and not very good. The green sauce was too spicy and had a funny taste . Overall nothing special and really below par for Mexican restaurants on the northeast side. We won't be going back

I couldn't justify giving this five stars due to the fact that I have been here twenty times and only ordered Burgers and Monsoons. But the burgers were just a hot mess that made me very happy. Also love any place were grown grisly men guzzling fruity punch looking paint thinner is standard operating procedure.
Waited one hour past my appointment time for my 1st visit. I left. My time is just as valuable. I will not go back.

I love this place. I've tried many different nail spas, but this one keeps me coming back. The staff is super sweet, they are never rushing to get you done, my polish always stays on a long time, they always use the best smelling scrubs and creams and they massage your arms and legs really well.
Expensive. Food mediocre. And I don't drink. Wish it was better. So close to where I live.

My 'hood fast food french bistro. I'll eat this over Mickey D's and anything else. I love the hot croque missouer. (totally butchered that), pair that with a cup of tomato basil and finish off with a mini fresh fruit tart. Sit out on the patio on a beautiful weather day and watch the streetcar pass. Lovely.

Asked for their parmesan-garlic chicken cheesesteak. Got a regular steak sandwich with some chopped, grilled garlic mixed in and topped with Kraft grated parmesan cheese. Not quite what I had hoped for. The pickle chips that came with it were nice and crispy, though.

Not a typical menu, but a lot of good seafood offerings. Had he Atlantic Char for dinner. Was good, but not great due to the overpowering garlic crust. It was fresh and the bartenders are very nice and helpful. Service was a little slow with food delivery, but could've been busier than I could observe. Would return again.

There's nothing special about the coffee shop or the coffee. I have tried their muffins and they're not anything special either. I would rather try some of the local coffee shops rather than this one.

Visit the Pier for spectacular view of St Pete and the water. They have an aquarium, shops, restaurants and bars. Something for everyone. Come rent a fishing pole and fish for a day. If biking is for you then you can rent a single double or a bike that will fit a family of five.
Best manicure and pedicure in South County. $32 for both. Includes great massage and paraffin wax. Also very nice!

This place is great, food is amazing, calamari is done the right way. Pasta is all good. Its enhoyable to sit at the bar with wine or relax outside under cover. I wish I lived closer, this is a St Pete favorite.
Pizza was good, wings An Stromboli also! Also had a steak an cheese that was good!. Def tell it's local an ur the newbie when you walk in an everyone just stares!

They did not seat us even though they did have an open table for us...they were so rude! We had 6 people who could have been seated at an open table at the restaurant....I will NOT be returning here. They came to our table and gave utensils so we were ready to order, then they didn't even serve us.

Good priced food and solid menu. I got the mac and cheese burger where the mac and cheese took over all flavor. The burger was well done and not very tasty. Still a good experience and worth trying something new.

My whole family came here for an after funeral luncheon. Most of us ordered the daily special which was the fish sandwich- HOLY COW it is freakin H U G E. I only ate 1/3 of it. It was ok, but needs more seasoning in the batter Chicken wings are fab, tangy with just right amount of heat.

Food is good service at the bar. Is the worst in any place I have been. Rude always crazy rude. What do you want two seconds to take order. Never come back to ask and now left shift and no one take take our payment dishes have been sitting in front us for 15 minutes. And still no one to pay.

Always real good BBQ. Went up there this evening (6:30pm) to get a tasty chicken platter and they were closed. Sign on door says starting March 1, they are closing at 3pm instead of 8pm (Tues-Thur). Very disappointed. Please update hours on website. Why have a website showing your hours if it's not correct. Smh!!

Nice atmosphere. Good location. Weak drinks. Ordered Chicago Oysters. I was starving but those oysters were definitely starved before being served. Not worth 14 dollars. The meat from all twelve could fit on one tablespoon. Hog fish sandwich was also small but tasty. Good service but the food or drinks were not worth the money.

Amazing as always been coming for a few years food is always outstanding but the service is always impeccable especially when I am graced with one server in particular aka Eric terry so knowledgeable on everything and super attentive makes the experience over the top each time kudos to you finch and fork

The food was almost too quick to arrive, but quickly i realized that the burrito i ordered had been sitting for quite some time. The burrito was barely warm to the touch and extremely soggy. I've eaten at many mexican restaurants but this is definitely one of the worst. I would not recommend anyone go here if your looking for good mexican food.
Stopped In while out of town on business. This was a fascinating breakfast. Enjoyed every bit of my humongous dish. Definitely recommended!
This place is excellent. Coffee options are unique and tasty. Food is ready promptly! Scrumptious huevos cubanos. A great local find.

Fun hat store! The prices are high but so is the quality. The staff takes their time to help educate and share fitting and style tips. We had the pleasure of working with Bobby, who was absolutely fantastic.

Noisy, hustle-bustle, lunch crowd makes for a fun stop for a slice or 2 and a coke. A little greasy for my liking, but all and all, good stuff. I've been here a few times and it is consistent. You place your order, then wait to tell the cashier what you ordered, then wait for your name to be shout out. Classy !

It's a pretty average Thai restaurant, the reason I'd say that is because nothing stands out, nor did anything really disappoint me. Amongst the many dishes we ordered, the black pepper shrimp is a must try !
Good pho! They have a large menu with tons of good options. I always go for the delicious soup and a good bubble tea!! They have many flavors of teas available.

Drinks are way overpriced and half full the glass. Our party of 4 had steaks but the steak was just ok. If you think you are goingto get a great steakhouse steak,look elsewhere. Definitely not char tasty. They also got rid of the opentable1000 point reservations which just gave us all another reason to look elsewhere. Just disappointing.

Basically come here for the view at sunset and the atmosphere. We stick to appetizers and drinks. On two most recent visits, there appears to be a lack of servers, and poorly trained at that. I'd still come except the quality of musicians has was so poor I wanted to give them a tip to stop playing. I was embarrassed bringing oot guests .

Just went to CPK for lunch yesterday and overall had a pretty pleasant experience. I ordered the full roasted veggie salad and was extremely pleased with the portion size. The wait staff was really good and the restaurant was very clean. Although I think CPK is a bit overpriced, it is very yummy.
Had lunch here Saturday at the bar. The bar was kinda dirty, with crumbs. The barteewas not friendly. The food was below my expectations. A wateredd down iceD tea was $2.50. Too many better choices.

This place is called Pho Ta now. It's still only the 2nd best pho in the neighborhood but it works. There's also this massive shrimp crepe thing you can get that you'll want to go ahead and get. Also if some in your party don't want pho, get the vermicelli bowls which are delicious, especially if you concentrate on the grilled-pork ones.

It was alright, but nothing special. Decent size tables, free wi-fi and pretty well placed plugs. They only take cash and don't have a huge selection on the menu, but it did the job and gave me some decent people watching on the street outside.

No stars took my dog here once and after she was lethargic and scared of her own shadow it's like she was mistreated . So I took her back to her usual groomer which she loves she would not stop shaking out of fear . So needles to say this place mistreats animals possibly abuses them .
Veal was too salty and tough. Cannoli was filled with whipped cream not ricotta. Exuberant Service but acoustics make this a loud gamble.

Our groomer did an excellent job on our dog Scotch. He listened to what we wanted and did an excellent job. The girls were a great source of information too for pointing us in the right direction for food & shopping! Thank you!!!
