I like the home shopping network, they have some very interested useful things on it! I bought one of my favorite kitchen gadgets, the ultimate chopper, form the home shopping network. It's lasted for years! I love it and use it for baking and cooking all the time!
Worst. Rib. Ever. Over-seasoned and over-cooked, these ribs are an insult. Even the texture of the meat was a disappointment. At least the waiter was nice.

I LOVE LOVE LOVE the idea and concept of Strange Donuts, but unfortunately there are much better donuts floating around the STL. Even though there are better donuts around , I'll keep coming back for the excellent coffee and anything coated in peanut butter.. stay strange.

Lolis has the best authentic Mexican Tacos in town! I can't believe it took me so long to find them. They have now become my number 1 Taco place. The staff is amiable, and their service is superb. Also, their menu is the tastiest you would ever try. If you are craving for Tacos, this is your go-to place. Five stars!
Great book selection. Easy and fun to navigate or reserve them online and they will get them for you. Avoid the bathroom on the 1st floor. There is a guard outside to make sure nothing crazy happens.

The grilled wings are a must, they fall off the bone. Unfortunately smoking is still permitted, so it's not the best atmosphere for dinner. Thursday was ladies night, 2-1 beers, I'm not sure why they brought them both at the same time so the second one wasn't as cold, but still an amazing deal! Great sports bar, tons of tvs.
This restaurant is big disappointment. We love Mediterranean food ,unfortunately the chef doesn't have idea how to cook good Mediterranean dishes.
I'm super dissatisfied with this particular Haverty! Customers services was horrible taste.... had they disclose that again furniture has been delay

Will never be back. This place has gone down hill and is not worth our time. Sad to see this happen. Used to be a great place to have dinner with friends. Poor service, inattentive staff that didn't care for our business, slow as can be with an empty restaurant. Just unacceptable.

The space was nice - could get a little noisy but the music was good. Parking is a problem unless you live in walking distance. Salsa was good but the italian ham/cheese appetizer not so much - too salty and a bizarre texture. Nice wine list though.
Forgot to mention it's cash only.
To properly celebrate my 300th review Off I went to Olde City Tattoo Clean and friendly Quick and gently I have something I'll never show you.
Food quality... mediocre Value... expensive Portion... Don't be too hungry when you dine there. Overall...Another junk food restaurant

Food is always amazing. We eat here about once a month. Not once have we had a good server. Its hard to get refills on drinks and frys. If we are going with a big party we will go to the sparks location as their server's are excellent. Maybe have sparks train the servers at this location..?

My all time favorite restaurant. Even after living in LA for 5 years wildflower is still the best. I always get the lobster salad. Calamari is amazing, cheese board, roast chicken, artichoke and salmon are all to die for. We celebrated our anniversary here tonight.

Been going there for 2 yrs and never thought to write a review but they deserve one because they do a great job! Kelly is my girl and she has my nails down pat! I know she'll always do my nails the way I want them!
Overpriced and underserved. Pasta was great but price and portion size sucks. Very limited seating. Staff was nice.
Not enough merchandise in this store to merit browsing. Maybe good for site to store purchase, little else.
For a Walgreen the place is not bad unfortunately there's a Woman in the pharmacy she comes the window chomping on gum it is disgusting!!! Every single time. Management needs to say something.

Really great place if you're looking to get Covid-19 and treated condescendingly by staff. I especially loved getting threatened by the employees after asking for some water with my order. Would highly recommend if you're looking for mediocre food, power-tripping workers and unsanitary kitchen conditions.

What a difference from dinner to brunch. Mother's Day brunch was horrible. No specials for mom and my biscuits and gravy were cold. The sever came by a few times but we couldn't seem to keep our drinks full. Even our water bottle went dry half way through the meal. I won't be back for a meal.

I was told this would be a great place for my boyfriends birthday dinner. I was impressed with their phone ettiquette and prompt responses to setting reservations. However, the service was lacking when we arrived and didn't stay attentive. The food looked great but seemed bland. I don't think I'll return.
Great food, great ambiance and great service! This one's a winner! I'm excited and can't wait to taste the coffee! The huge coffee roaster is impressive to see!!

The experience I had at Suntrup Ford was the best one I have ever had! They did what they could to make my payment work and get me into the car that I wanted. Timothy was a great salesperson and the manager was very polite and helpful. I would not recommend any other car dealership and I will never be going anywhere else again!

Came in for an estimate on a paint job and the man I spoke to wouldn't even come out to look and just said it'll be about 10 grand. Without even knowing what type of car or any information on the job. Very unprofessional and rude. Would not recommend this shop due to the attitude displayed towards a potential customer

Meh. Nothing special except the prices (not in a good way). $54 for one small gumbo (literally one piece of chicken and one piece of sausage in the gumbo), short rib entree, a soda and a sparkling water. Should have went to the butcher side. To top it off, our server had a stinky attitude.
very generously stuffed sandwiches at a really good price. the fried chicken is excellent.

Their cheesesteaks are the BOMB. There is always a line - but it moves quickly. The staff is neither "warm or engaging" - but in all fairness, I'm not sure it's *purposeful - you don't know, what you don't know. If being polite isn't required, why would you "smile & be courteous"? This not withstanding, their food is yummy!
Just had an awesome meal with my wife. She dry aged steak and I had sea bass. The sides of Brussel sprouts and green beans were excellent.

Never disappoints. Worth crossing the bridge for. Parking can be a pain, but again...worth it as long as my companions have some extra time to spare. Try a weird cocktail or drink if you're looking for something fun.
Staff is nice. Eggs were cooked properly. But hollandaise had a funny taste. Some spice that didn't belong in...food. English muffin was burnt and Canadian bacon? Thin slice got lost.

This place is a corner shop and easy to find. I ordered the duck and roast pork noodle soup. It's delicious and authentic. To take home, I ordered a whole duck and while ginger garlic chicken both $20 each. If I'm ever I'm the area, I'll definitely be back.

Absolute trash! Found a hair in our appetizer and they took it off our bill like they were doing us a favor. The manager did come by and apologize and totally made us feel like he was hooking us up by taking it off the bill. Not good business! Still paid $50 for lunch. We won't be back!
The pizza was topped with sugar...and the delivery driver didn't have change for a 20. Worst pizza I ever ate in my life. I'm absolutely disgusted. Bury your pizza in your backyard Jess.

Large food selection but the meat quality is not the greatest so I was shocked how many reviews this place had! It's a mix of hot pot and Korean bbq owned by Chinese ppl so definitely don't get the full korean Bbq experience. I was also surprised they don't have beer or soju because that's part of a bbq spot.

We recently had our windows cleaned by Squeegee Express and were extremely happy with the work. Our windows looked great and the price was very reasonable. We will definitely be using them in the future.

We had been looking forward to trying this place but I don't think we will be back. The restaurant was full and there was only one server, so the service was slow (she wasn't very attentive and seemed to not be paying attention to customers). The antipasto salad was pretty good but the spaghetti sauce was not that great.
Uptown Stadium Neighbors Wail, Green Wave Fans Cheer Olive & The Blue #Haiku #NOLA_Haiku #TulaneHomeField #YulmanStadium #Tulane
three for one happy hour hello. Yes its a cheesy karaoke bar but myself and everyone in the place had a great time. went there two nights in a row its a must see if on bourbon street.
Great service, but steak was undercooked. Asked for med-well, got closer to med-rare.

Very disappointed. Food was boring, waiter was wearing a dirty untucked shirt, no decent beer or wine. The most basic "Mexican" food gone wrong! No wonder we were only 1 of 2 tables in the whole restaurant.
A great place on the water. Great food and drinks and Tyson was so friendly and pleasant this will be a regular stop on our annual girls trip.

it was ok. i had a burger, everything on the menu seemed to have chillies and i know it is southwest but it does'nt have to be all chillies does it? umm it was'nt bad just ok. people of st louis kinda have a tendency to give 4 to 5 stars to any new restaurant that comes around.

The food here is so-so. It's cheap but you get what you pay for. The service at this restaurant is subpar. I felt like the waiter didn't care so much about his job and it impacted his quality of service. If service is not a huge factor in deciding where to eat, this place is just acceptable.
The job got done but they are definitely on the higher end as far as price. Cost to repair my appliance was initially almost close to the cost of a new one...

Very nice!!! The hand tossed pizza was very nice and flavorful. The service was excellent!!! We had the jalapeño cheddar sausage, the wings and a flight of beer. However, they lost me with the $1.50 extra for Parmesan cheese for the pizza!!! Being from Chicago that was a bit much. However, if you want extra Parmesan, BYOP!!!

Bad Luck to when there i took my mother there on April to had a nice dinner there but it make me feeling bad that we got a cold soup/ cold entrees / and no refill for our soda i knew that i had a new server and our section had to wait for the foods so long time. Im so disappoint that night.
our waitress Megan was awesome! the food was amazing and we definitely would come back ! great service (:
This place sucks absolute donkey, I personally saw my waitress drop my burrito on the ground then pick it up and serve it to me, NEVER GO HERE, I wish I could rate it below one star
2nd time here to get their chicken on a stick and that was good. Just $1.25 never tried the other food.
u call that b b q . told the manager , did not seem to care. could not eat the sides. will never go back. maybe after u get drunk b4 u order the so called food.

Fire alarm went off while we were there strange lady came up and was playing with my daughter's hair food was not all that it's cracked up to be for the price and with every single inconvenience you would think that offer a discount or something and they did not I probably will not be going back there

The sTaff here is so incompetent. It takes 20 minutes for them to ring up a coffee. It's really bad. They need training desperately. A rest stop is supposed to be quick...not a 30 minute sit down ...they are losing money because people just leave the line.
By far the best Pho I've had in Florida to date... This is my goto spot for Vietnamese... The shrimp & pork salad is also one of my favorites... I find that the regular portion is just fine...

Today I visited this place with my grandchildren. First they brought out the wrong food for my grandson, then my granddaughter's pancake was not done. My Belgian waffle was horrific. I didn't even finish 1/4 of it. The entire experience was a waste of time and money. I will never go back.

This is a very decent local joint with solid seafood....very similar in motif to Rusty Bellies in nearby Tarpon Springs...but I would give the nod to Rusty Bellies which is on the water and is a bit better in every category.
It was very nice in there. They got me in and out, which I greatly appreciate, and did a wonderful job on my nails

There are a ton of dining choices on State Street, but this is one of our faves and if you're craving tacos definitely give it a shot. The staff is fabulous and the location is shaded and comfortable, and both are dog friendly! See you next time!
Rancel followed up with me after a previous review. I would just recommend timely communication.

Kitschy little coffee house and creperie. I had the Ham & Brie crepe served with Fresh Tomatoes & Spinach - $7.25, and enjoyed it. A tad expensive for a crepe, and waited a bit, but was worth the wait. I'd go back again!

Aside from them slicing the brisket WITH the grain and the meat being dry (had pulled pork and obviously brisket), the experience was ok. Sides were pretty good - although also dry. I just couldn't get over them slicing the brisket wrong... if I wanted stringy pot roast, I would've gone to up-chuck-a-rama.
Caesar salad is my favorite. Service is amazing. Tall tables only though...but Barbie rocks!!

Outstanding! Excellent music, delicious cheese, perfect wines. Casual, affordable, high quality and yummy!! Cannot recommend highly enough. You choose cheeses and they make up a delicious platter for you with olives, bread, spreads, cornichons etc. We had an excellent Bordeaux French red wine, pork shoulder, pork belly, calamari, mussels, cured salmon, blue cheeses, and more. Delish!
I went to this place 1 week ago.my only concern is the price. For a plain Christmas tree ball cost $12. I chose a mug for $35 . The staff was great and helpful.

The outstanding feature of this location is the helpful and friendly staff. The majority if machines work and the prices are a little high, but not overly outrageous. That said, the place needs painted and the flooring replaced. I don't think it is as dirty as it looks but the place needs work.
I love Popeyes, especially their spicy chicken sandwich. The workers are very friendly and the chicken is great. Much better than KFC
We dont get it. This place is always packed but the food and service is sub-par. Stale bread, brown mold on guacamole. Dont waste your money.

Went back recently and the service was below par. My manicure was applied with old, gluggy, dried up gel that cracked and chipped and ruined my natural nails. I would probably go back and give them a chance to redeem my last experience.

Been several times and have yet to find anything on the menu that I would order again. The people who work there are nice and I always ask for menu recommendations since I'd really like to find something I enjoy. Panera has them beat hands down
Every time I give this place another chance. There is always a wrong order or things missing for my order!!!!

Friendly front desk staff and professional waxers. I typically frequent the Cherry Hill EWC but came here for the Grand Opening and was pleased with my services. I felt welcomed and very comfortable and my wax was just how I like it: quick and thorough. Great location in Collegeville too!

Wow the staff here is a joke... my family stopped by to get some pho because we were hungry and saw that there were some good reviews. We were greeted with an annoyed face and a free serving of attitude. I would not recommend this place to anyone, unless you want a rude Asian lady yelling at your face

Online registration is cool Small class size is cool Totally respect that they moved to the grove, haven't checked them out there yet but plan too Classes have yet to impress though, therefor the three stars.

Pretty good burger joint! Variety of menu could be a little better, but it is of course called Mesa BURGER. Sweet potato fries could be crispier, but they are really hard to get that way. Regular fries are the way to go, tasty. Get the house burger and regular fries, best combo and deal!

Dont go downtown the lines are ridiculous but this one is near the airport and there were no lines at all. Yummy lots of powdered sugar but fair warning it will get all over your face. Very soft but not very sweet. Served fresh and hot. I had some once I arrived and right before I left.
Nice new store, but good help is hard to find I guess... bad service, bunch of kids mulling about, but only two really "working"

Great service!! Thank you Tyrell - he was extremely professional and called in advance to let us know his timeframe of arrival! I would recommend this Company highly! Helped us out of a really bad situation! Thank you very much!!
Good NY STYLE pizza. Friendly staff. Love the whole concept of working with disabled. Next is my cannoli
The shepard's pie was good and reheated nicely. I'm not really a beer guy so I'm way outside this place's target audience.
Great place!! Great Hookah! It's clean and the atmosphere is amazing! I enjoyed my time there with friends.

Ordered speghetti and meat sauce and a baked zit with a side of meatballs. Delivery came, no meatballs but we're charged for them. Ate the food sauce was very sweet. The segment and meat sauce came cold and the sauce too was sweet. Took the speghetti back to the store and received a refund for it as well as the missing meatballs. Very disappointing.

Excellent experience when replacing the brakes on my BMW. I also mentioned a problem with my driver's side window which several German car specialists hadn't been able to diagnose or repair for several years. Willie's crew knew exactly how to fix it. I will definitely return for future maintenance and recommend Top Shop to friends and family.

Overpriced, mediocre, and poor customer service. I have ordered from here a handful of times and 2 of those times they confused whether I was picking up or having it delivered. I've waited for almost an hour and a half before calling to discover that they screwed up. No apologies are ever offered. I won't be back.

Rosalita's Cantina has a prime location in the heart of the downtown Washington Ave district. The food and margaritas here are good but a little on the pricey side. I've only been here twice and got the chicken quesadillas both times. It tastes good and is a large portion. The service is average, not bad but not the best. The outdoor seating is nice.

The price point is high but worth the trip up Route 202 for the Excellent Customer Service and professional fitting. All the sales associates are professional, my favorite is Liz! They also keep a sales & size history for you. They have a purchase incentive plan, purchase 10 & the 11th is 50% off. They also maintain a "wish list" for you.

Had been wanting to try for a while. Service was nice. The ambiance - Decor - is very charming...comfy, very north eastern. Food was average. Definitely lots of comfort food on the menu. Would like to try the high-tea next time.
Very eclectic market, arrive early for best selection and to avoid the crowds.

This used to be a reputable bbq establishment, but has gone downhill. I ordered a sandwich and only received half of it. Not to mention, the restaurant was empty when I showed up, which should leave little room for error. They did get me a whole new sandwich, so that was nice. Tip: stick to Mexican food when in SB/Goleta.

Cool store. It's weird to me how people working in a metaphysical store don't sense energy all that well. It was very uptight and lots of stress radiating off everyone working there. I felt like I was a nuisance and kinda felt like I was being watched. Uncomfortable enough never to return.
Went for lunch here during our girl's day out. Service was very fast and they were very friendly. I recommend getting a side of corn cake with your meal!

Prices online are very misleading and do not match the actual price of the car. They make the cars look cheaper than they actually are and then pressure you into something more expensive than you can afford. It's amazing that during a global pandemic they still can not be honest salesmen. Do not go here!

Everything about our breakfast was perfect!! The service was great and it was a welcoming atmosphere. We were recommended by many to try Biscuit Love and it was not a disappointment. We also managed to get there fairly early enough to have not have a wait, which i highly recommend!!!!
the food is ok, the service is bad. It's hott & there are plenty of other places with bar food
Cold, tasteless burger. At least, the fries were hot. Raw chicken was served to one of my friends. The wait was extremely long for a few burgers. I hope St. Louis has more to offer than this place.
MEDICARE FRAUD-GUILTY!!! http://m.stltoday.com/news/local/crime-and-courts/shoe-store-owner-gets-probation-for-falsifying-records/article_3b3b5d68-af01-11df-b3a8-00127992bc8b.html?mobile_touch=true

Took a while for table even with a reservation. Server was in the clouds. When we finally got the crab cakes app it was full of crab she'll. Ya you heard me, crab shells. Almost cut my tongue. Swapped it for salmon which was fine but was drowning in teriyaki. You would of thought they would of at least comped something. Ugh....
Great beer and great atmosphere. Large open space with plenty of seating. Some groups brought kids with them. Other folks playing games. Really cool vibe.

I'm going to start but saying we went during a busy time and it was pure pandemonium from the moment we walked in to the moment we left. But the food was bomb. Wish they would update the seating requirements though.
I really like the owner, and Becca gave me one of the best therapeutic massages I have ever had. She focus on the troubled areas real deeply. I also had cupping. I highly recommend them.

Dont order off of Yelp for delivery A VERY rude person called and said they are not bringing my food and I need to cancel. After they already received my payment. I live a block away. This place needs to go out of business.

Sticky tables, poor quality food. Looks like packaged ramen. Miso soup=bad broth. Restrooms are messy-no soaps or towels in dispensers. Don't bother-empty on a Friday evening-should have just walked out!
Excellent place! My mom and I enjoyed it tremendously!! Nice restaurant with friendly staff and the manager is cute too!
Only chicfila that that be jacking it, forgets your sauce, no cracker for ur soup, be forgetting my vanilla creamer, be giving me bbq sauce instead of buffalo

While we were waiting to get into Goldy's Breakfast Bistro they sent us to the corner for coffee...which you pay for and then can bring into the main restaurant when your table is ready. Which was perfect.....a nice place to sit while we were waiting and plenty of people just grabbing coffee and other light breakfast baked goods.

Everything is reasonably priced, home-made, with an eye towards ingredient coherence. This place is wonderful. You cannot go wrong. I strongly suggest going with the gentleman owner's recommendation re what to eat.

The line took a bit so by the time I got up she said they close in 10 minutes - with that being said they gave me 3 frozen orders of hash browns & bagels with nothing on them. Hash browns were completely frozen Very rushed & wouldn't recommend this dunkin

Sandwiches are good, and it always amazing to see how fast they serve you. This store gets very busy at lunch time, with lots of deliveries. The staff really hustles to make sure everyone gets good service. That was impressive.

Do not get the po boy here. Does not even look like a po boy that you get at other po boy places. Poorly constructed. The other food looked good that I saw on other people's plates Also, a older gentleman was not waited on right away and he complained. Hey st Charles tavern, remember who's name is on your paycheck. The customers name
Huge portions and the food is pretty good...variety of typical New Orleans favorites in Italian and seafood dishes...The Who Dat burger is excellent

People be careful when you bring your animal in here for grooming. Second time there and both times they threw on the 25 buck spa package without me even saying I wanted it or asking. Thought I would be paying 52 bucks for the groom but I walked out having to pay 80 bucks plus a tip...wow....never again!

Pizza was pretty ok and big for the price, although it was pretty thin. However, for old city, I'm not complaining about the price. I was able to customize my lone pizza slice with my own choice of toppings so that was nice! Obviously family business, cashier was an elderly lady with a harsh demeanor but it's not a big deal. Would recommend!
Standard and clean. Nothing too fancy but nicely modern and good crowd. Food available.

I got the Engineer. Turkey, mushrooms, lettuce, tomato and onion. I ordered the small and boy was it small. Even though the sandwich was tasty I feel for 6 bucks it was a poor value. 5.95 with tax but rounded up to donate. I admire the % that goes to firefighters but just can't justify the size/value for the price.

I really want to like this place however the food is extremely expensive. Think $45+ for two people for breakfast. For that I expect to get good service but instead the staff has an "I don't care" attitude. Really disappointing. The food is really good.
Queued for 40 min to get a table. The oysters is fresh and sweet. Jambalaya is average at most .Definately not the best in town.
Love the food, but waited 25 minutes for a take-out stir fry at 5:30 on a Sunday evening.

Nice staff. 80% of the appetizers/entrees were mediocre, 40 minutes between appetizers/entrees. No time to consider desert / coffee as we had 1 hour 50 minutes in at that point and had to leave for 8PM show. Couldn't recommend, too many less than desired aspects.
Went to this "soccer bar" to watch El Classico. Missed the first 20 minutes while watching a waiter struggle to connect a reddit stream before deciding to leave.

Perfect location to take in the Arch and downtown Saint Louis. Great restaurants and helpful staff. I especially recommend the Brewhouse restaurant. It has great BBQ and serves local microbrewery draws, cans and bottles. The hotel is right next to the Arch and Arch excitement.
I love this restaurant and go weekly. I highly recommend the homemade onion rings and that's cajun seafood stuffed artichoke with dill sauce. The seafood and the bbq plates are awesome!

Easy to find. Right by Lakeside mall. Impressed. Our waiter was very attentive, which is awesome! Ordered edamame, calamari and combo 2. Edamame came out and it was definitely hot and fresh. Lover said calamari was great especially the sauce! Fresh meats, veggies and more! I would definitely be back!

Very laid back, live music venture. Sandy was very friendly and kept checking back about how we were doing. Had smoked turkey sandwich which was excellent. Live music was nice to listen to and the song writers/performers kept patrons engaged. Good afternoon killer.

Ripped Off - Traveling from Charlotte Pike turn right into garage, got a parking ticket, shopped at Whole Foods, got ticket validated, exit garage, won't take validation, 20 minutes parking charge $10, told sign was out front Look at overhead signs say retail parking, an smaller sign saying leading office On exiting the back of that sign said no Whole Foods parking validating

They're not the cheapest, but they do a good job, and they do it quickly. I've been coming to this dry cleaners for seven years and they've been consistent throughout that time.They're conveniently located right next to my grocery store, so I'll be coming back as long as I'm in the area, I'm sure.
Better experience then the last visit. But a long wait..what is it with this complex and the long wait times?? Strange. Staff seemed happy and that's always welcoming to me. Nice job guys.

Did a family pizza bundle and we were pretty disappointed. Pizza was chewy and no one was interested in second slices. Garlic knots with cheesy sauce was a nice option, and the salad was fine. Kind of a "meh" experience though the carry-out process was smooth and the servers were perfectly nice. Food just wasn't very good!

Not impressed with Bike Stop. Four out of the five times I have been here my order has not been correct. Get rid of the microwave and read this article: There's no actual veggies in 'Veggie Straws': suit | New York Post https://www.google.com/amp/nypost.com/2017/07/06/theres-no-actual-veggies-in-veggie-straws-suit/amp/

Fun experience. The entire location is cute and have a great ambience. There was some wait in the morning on a sunday, but go early to put your name down then walk around the area. Great selection of southern brunch items. Staff was attentive. Would go again for the amazing biscuit and jams!
Nothing to write home about. Good simple made no frills burgers. 1 Beer, burger, and fries 11 bucks.

I recommend the gingerbread cookies. They are amazing. Paying 1.75 for a cookie is a bit much, but they're pretty big. I'm not sure how their hours are on non-First Friday days, since that's the only time I get cookies there, but if you're in the city for First Friday, you should definitely stop by.
One of my favorite local dive bars. Very reasonably priced drinks and a diverse crowd.

This place should be serving Mexican food. There are no Asians around making any food.The fish was dry and the roll's were not cut into the same size pieses.All the sushu is very inconsistant.The new location is huge but the food is no good. No disrespect to Mexicans because Mexican food is the best.

Had an OK experience, they definitely are more friendly with their regulars. With it being Sunday, had quite a wait, but it took a long time to be even acknowledged by any of the 3 servers while waiting for the first come, first serve tables. Food was good, except for the side of bacon (received 3 undercooked pieces for $3.25)

Never ever ever ever coming back to this place in my life an I will tell everyone how bad this place sucks.. sat their for 25min with a menu on hand no one ever came to our table.. I was so embarrassed with my guest.. ..
Great place to get a salad, seriously. If you're a salad eater, you know you want somewhere with a lot of choice and Marathon delivers. I really like their Greek Salad with Shrimp. Hits the spot.

Terrible inconsistent pizza these days! Burned twice with 2 pies to go. Almost no sauce and chewy crust. Tried a second time and even after a conversation with the owner about the prior sh*t show, got served the same garbage! 25 year customer- never returning!

Nothing special at all. Rather disappointing as a matter of fact. Fajitas were over cooked. Served with a thin slice(?) of tomato, about 5 strands of lettuce and no cheese. Asked for cheese and lettuce and was charged extra for both. Portions were small and the place isn't very inviting. We won't be rushing back anytime soon.
Waited for 2 hours to be sited(with reservations), waited for 1 hour to get actual dinner. No apologies, just rude stuff and ignorance. Horible, never agian.

Went here with my mother-in-law, not impressed. The only thing that saved it from one star were the great appetizers. Our meals were bland and lacking seasoning. Waiter was nice and wore a mask. Host did not have mask.

It is freakin awesome. I've only been once. I can't wait to go back. I had the pork and ramen. The Cuban buns. The spicy cucumber on it was a welcome surprise. Not your typical ramen. This is the shiizz bizness.

I'm currently eating the brunch at this place, and I'm extremely disappointed in the quality of the food. The cocktail sauce is like tomato juice, all of the food is old in the hotel pans, and the a fruit tray and cheese tray are both empty. I would never come back, and I strongly recommend everyone else do the same.
Still not sure how f they are using Louisiana Catfish THEY WONT ANSWER MY QUESTION. Otherwise great staff and atmosphe

This business was previously Sushi Fune owned by a Japanese couple from Tokyo who sold to the current owners and returned to Japan where the family lives. The menu has changed somewhat with the removal of some of the mayo heavy Tokyo styled offerings but the quality happily has not suffered. Quiet and a nice place for lunch. Sadly no WiFi...

The staffs' service there made this an enjoyable experience. The rate that our food came was in a timely manner, the pho broth was delicious. They also have a big pho challenge there, so those who are up for a challenge. It was definitely interesting to see the size of the bowl they use for the challenge.

I had the typical dishes, general tzo, shrimp toast, and szechuan beef. Awful. The chicken was mostly a batter, tasted old, no flavors in sauce. Shrimp toast was literally dripped in grease and burnt. The bee smelled funny and chewy. I just never had this kind of bad food. It's not even average tasting.
Best Hyundai pricing I could find between Orlando and Tampa. Contact Jeena Verdelotti, Internet Sales Mgr. Up Front, no Bait & Switch, Easy.
Other posts about this property are on target. Dated, musty rooms. Inexpensive, but there are better options in the area.

Have been going to this place for awhile now. Love the service and end look of my nails ! I get a pedi and fill in every time. They do not rush on you! Always go during the week though. I was hesitant because of reviews but honestly it's all good, we're all human, sometimes there's mistakes made.
Furniture is mostly contemporary. Showroom is nice (don't let the empty parking lot scare you away). Salesperson was OK. Large selection of outdoor furniture too. Did not buy anything.
They are incapable of handling long line let alone a close to full house of crowd. Very very slow, empty tables remain empty while people waiting inline... Doesn't make any sense
The movie I saw was good but the theater needs to be updated. The upholstery on the seats are worn. The rows have no letters to let you know where your reserved seat is located.

I had a good ribeye and the potatoes au gratin were good. Not great, but good. I seem to remember this place being better in the past. The service was courteous. The atmosphere reminded my wife of the steakhouses in NYC. For this price, I want a very good experience, and things were just "ok."

Couldn't love this place more. The maxmosa served in a fishbowl for $6 is my favorite, the service is always speedy, numerous amazing menu items, hot n crunchy tuna bowl is by far my fave. Long wait for a table but totally worth it.
Great place to watch sports. At least 10 different TVs all playing sports. Watched the Wimbledon live.
Excellent food for the price. Cajun creole inspired, but have anything to suit your mood or taste. They even have an idk option for when you can't decide so they do for you!!!!

Very nice outback steakhouse. Prompt and attentive staff. Food was cooked well. My medium rare prime rib was a bit dry but one of the better steaks I've had at an outback. I would come back here again.
Its good when you want some heavy taco shop food. The portions are good and food is decent. Forget about the service, they are not known for their service.

Solid, legit 5 - Stars for service, friendliness, & samples so you're not stuck with a flavor you don't like....even though, all their flavors look delicious! This was a pleasure to do business here. They made it very easy. I can't wait to go back tomorrow for the banana gelati.
Small place, maybe a quarter of the size of previous location. Hard to find and inconvenient for folks using public transportation. Not as much inventory of course because of the lack of space!
Big burger, perfectly prepared. Place has a neighborhood feel, weeknight conversation at the bar made it clear, the regulars are friends and enjoy being together. Very good tots, not a skimpy serving
OMG! The WiFi sucks so bad here. Coffee is good and I liked the outdoor seating. But come on man. So frustration to have slow WiFi at a coffee shop.
went for the all you can eat sushi (which was fabulous) but tables are NOT 6 ft apart from each other. the man behind me wasn't even a foot away and we were seated at tables with chairs, not booths
Great restaurant. Relaxed atmosphere and good service. I had the carrot cake pancake. Wow! It was much larger than I thought!

I drive an extra 30 minutes PAST Pundmann to go to Dave Sinclair in South County. This company is, essentially, built around customer service....so get some. Your service AND sales people are rude and "bothered" by having to do work. I WILL CONTINUE to sway from your location and I influence people to head else where.

I love the simplicity of the restaurant. They don't need to serve a ton of sup par food. I loved every burger I have had so far. Their fries are awesome. If your a milkshake fan they have one of the best in Tucson. I always come back when I have a chance.

A word of praise. I got Acetate progressives and they didn't fit properly. Switched to Titanium and they replaced without charging me for the more expensive frame. New glasses are perfect and I'm very happy with the experience. It's not like going to an upscale Optometrist and getting expensive progressive lenses but for the price the glasses are more than acceptable.
Awesome place, laid back atmosphere, great tequila selection. Service is excellent, especially that handsome devil Trevor. Only complaint is that they don't salt their chips. Pico is awesome!
Amazing hangover cure! Food is so good the line is usually always out the door and down the block. If that doesn't speak for itself I don't know what will.

Highly recommend this place if you are looking good Chinese restaurants compared to other Chinese cheap eats. Prices are reasonable and food quantity is good as well. On the downside, staffs are not friendly.

Took a day trip to SB and had a late lunch here. The food was OK, but was pretty bland and not a lot of flavor overall. Great portions for the price, but felt like spices were missing. Could be a lot better.
Great place, been there for both lunch and dinner and both were great. A good, varied menu, not as devoted to meat as the title might suggest. The pork chop is particularly excellent.

Great sushi and good service. The place is small and the parking can sometimes be tricky, but the food is worth it. The Good Time and the Baked Salmon Rolls are wonderful. All the standard rolls hold their own as well. The Hibachi is well done and the portions are a good size.

This place was just meh. The taco's had a bland, unseasoned fast food quality. For being so close to authentic mexican food on 9th street and 12th and fitzwater, it makes zero sense that it is this bad. The service was meh and the place looks like a refurbished taco bell. the food is genuinely not worth the price they're charging.
Awesome facility and people, bad cancellation/freeze policy which causes it to be very unfriendly with military. Its easier to return a lease than to close an account with these guys.
The Fleur de Lis drink is the best thing here! Hendricks gin with muddled cucumber- perfect for a hot day!

Quite authentic diner atmosphere, friendly staff, maybe to much backslapper. The burger are nothing special, rather boring. For the quality a bit too expensive. And finally: they tried to cheat me and put 5 USD more on the fair tip.

First, the service was not the best. Second, we got the spinach and artichoke dip and it was burnt. I got the turkey club and it was not good at all. My husband got the roasted chicken and it was very good. I wouldn't recommend this to any one.

Sweetwater kayak rental gave us a nice day out on the water. Weedon is a great place for beginners to relax and learn to maneuver their kayaks. Austin gave great instructions to my granddaughter who chose a paddle board. Myself and 2 other ladies that were 1st time kayakers had a wonderful day.

Nice furniture just don't get it delivered. Furniture is very delivered on time if at all . Customer service and store manager were not accommodating to get my furniture delivered after I called and complained that it was not delivered.

Slightly hesitant because of past reviews, but I can say my experience couldn't have been better. Very friendly and organized staff. They've had recent office management change and their operations have improved significantly.
Ok experience. Cornbread excellent. Food was good but expensive for quantity. I ordered a piece of chicken for my dog and was charged $12. Service was slow if sitting outside.
Cane here for my friend's birthday and it was okay quality. Nice location and interior. As for the boba, it wasn't cooked enough and gave me a stomach ache.

The bartender that was at the outside bar literally refused to serve water to people. We actually couldn't believe it. Multiple people came up and asked for water and her response was "no" and she'd walk away. One group asked for three waters and she said "no I'm not giving you multiple waters, here's one". It was definitely busy but that's kinda crazy!!!
Good service, food was okay but it didn't live up to the reviews in my opinion.
Nice hotel but the night front desk lady over this labor day weekend was terribleeeee. No manners and rude as hell. Wish I new her name. Stank attitude and a terrible wig!
Tasty tacos however terribly overpriced. Small menu, limited choices. Clean, well maintained establishment.
Extraordinary property. Excellent guide. Marvelous experience. Hadn't been there in 40 years. It's just as breathtaking as I remembered.

My daughter fell in love with a gold dress while at Formals Xo and when it arrived at the house it was a disaster. The fabric was messed up, it looked cheap, and it was a completely different color, it looked like a light pink, not a gold. Shop somewhere else for a dress, it will save you a lot of time and stress.
I was here yesterday for lunch buffet. Food is awesome and reasonable pricing. I liked their Chicken Tikka Masala. Good ambiance. Nice service & friendly.

Worst service and atmosphere I had in years. Bartenders were bickering with one another, everyone had a pissy attitude and we could not get waited on. Waived the menu like a flag finally and still no attention. Had hell even getting a check for the one drink we got. Don't waste your time, patience, or money on these hacks.
This place is PACKED every time I go...BECAUSE IT'S SO GOOD! They have plenty of options, and all of the classic breakfast staples you would expect. Hungry in the morning? They'll fix that!
NOT covid19 compliant!! Workers not wearing gloves..... that said we sat on a cute picnic table outside, had a few beers and delicious pizza!! Large veggie, thick crust!! SO GOOD!!

NEVER GO HERE!!! I mistakenly put a Hughes car wash token in the Em's car wash machine and it became stuck, by design. The owner refused to open the machine and retrieve the token for me. He gave me all kinds of attitude about how it was too much trouble for him. Complete jerk!

Went to Charley's because of the reviews being great. Personally I found the place too dark. Maybe I'm old but I couldn't see anything. I ordered the Strip steak. It was cooked perfectly but the piece of steak was gristly, it was tasty but not worth the cash. Other than those complaints the experience was acceptable.

The cutest! Tiny and quaint like cake bake. We stopped in for a place to do our gift exchange. Complete with champagne and dessert! We had the Kir Royale and the Lavender Prosecco champagne cocktails along with the puff pastry dessert. Service was good. Restrooms needed attention.
Okay beer list, no salad dressing on our Cesar salad, kraft mac was better than their gouda mac. Never saw our server again after she dropped off our drinks. Disappointing.
Iconic spot for sure. But the lunch is lacking. Shrimp and grits were ok. Winter salad...I guess. Bread pudding REALLY good. Yaay for a .25 cent cocktail special.

We have eaten at the buffet at this buffet a few time and enjoyed it very much. However the breakfast buffet was basically the same food as the night before and there was almost no breakfast choices. The breakfast was just eggs, bacon, sausages, and some fruit. No waffles or french toast or pancakes. Could have saved money at IHOP.
Terrible venue for a fight unless you are sitting down in the orchestra or stage. Would not recommend this place at all. Plus Parkin is not great.
Good atmosphere. Great food. Awesome customer service. The sushi is pretty good here and the hibachi is a must do if you're in a group!
It's good. We got a deep dish, and it was pretty good. Prices were reasonable, and service was great.
I called this morning and I had an appointment today..... Did exactly what I asked for! Very pleased, will go back!

Think coffee shop atmosphere with great beer. Comfy couches/chairs makes you feel like you are back in college. The staff is friendly and you can't beat the variety of food provided by the rotating food trucks.

They are honestly the worse! Took a month to get my results back, after having to call them numerous times. While I was at the place, they forgot to check me in. I was waiting for an hour as everyone else got seen. The doctor does not do a good job of making you feel heard. I don't recommend.

Highlights: -bright, colorful interior -free chips + salsa -semi-addictive queso -reasonably priced lunch specials -substantial portions -quick service Still, it doesn't outweigh the fact that the food flavors are pretty elementary. This would be a safe option for someone who doesn't like going out of his/her comfort zone or believes that Taco Bell is true Mexican food.
Didn't like the food at all. They should stick to Chinese food. Thai and other Asian food is terrible.

This is my second time buying the Emily Merlot set from this awesome small business! I highly recommend them. The big boys are overcharging you! I highly recommend you come check them out before swiping your card anywhere else. The pieces are visually stunning. Come in and see Victoria!

Avoid this place! We brought our 3 Golden Retrievers over from St. Pete to swim at the beach, and we were so disappointed by this place. The water is black and full of a goopy substance. We spent the whole afternoon trying to get the dirt and goop out of their hair. The smell was unbearable -- a mix of rotten eggs and sewage.
Solid German bar serving solid German food and steins. Always try to stop here during all of the festivals.

Good spot. Great patio. Roasted chicken entrée wasn't my favorite...a little under seasoned but their steak salad was incredible. They reseated us but accommodated us by covering the drinks that we had just ordered. Well done :)

Had a decent experience coming here. I came around sunset, so the view was very beautiful! The food was pretty tasty as well. However I expected A better ambience for the price I was paying for my meal.

Charro Dell Rey, nice establishment great atmosphere, highly priced food with poor quality/taste. I myself enjoy seafood but Don't get what I ordered the shrimp cocktail is an utter disgrace. Your better off going to Red Lobster. Although I was satisfied with the desert pumpkin tamale.

Love this place!! It's close to my new apartment. The food is great and the price is just right! Portions are huge! The service is spot on and you get the feel that you are in a small neighborhood diner. Note. It's very crowded on the weekends. Plan accordingly

Solid leadership is what makes the Boss Plumbing team so efficient. They're responsive to communication, and upfront about costs and time. I'd recommend these guys and intend on using Boss again when future issues arise.
This M make totally burned my Chesse burger.This M make totally burned my Chesse burger.
Had brunch here, Cuban sandwich was delish. My girlfriend had the chicken salad melt and she loved it. French fries were awesome too!

Cheap, quick way to get from the airport to/from University City at $10. I haven't had any problems with the drivers being rude or late. Much easier than taking the train and much cheaper than taking the taxi. It's a great deal to me!

Yes indeedy, Mamas is comfort food at its finest. The falafel sandwich is fabulous, and the fries are crisp and tasty. Oh, and don't overlook the pickle bar--it's the icing on the cake. An added plus: the staff is courteous and efficient.

The wings were great, the pizza was good, the service was pretty poor. On top of that they automatically add 15% tip to all checks. I could understand if they were short staffed or packed but that didn't really seem to be the case. The waiter didn't seem to care. Next time I'll just get it to go
Witnessed a drug deal and prostitution go down tonight. Lady at the front desk did not care, she must be apart of it. This place needs shut down. The owner Nick must be unaware
I'm on a roll! Another cheesesteak spot that is official and well worth the money they're knocking on the door for top five for me. salute to this beautiful Cooper sharp cheesesteak
This is my go to place. It is so good. You should try their spicy noodle, golden rings, and penang curry. It is BYOB as well.

I think I can safely reduce this experience to 2 (generous) stars seeing this restaurant purports itself to be one of the finest in the city, if not the country, and our legitimate well-articulated review of our mediocre experience was 100% ignored. No problem. Many other places vying for our disposable dollars.
I love the clam chowder here but the service is usually really slow and I think the atmosphere could use some updating.
Food is delicious and reasonably priced, staff is always nice. They have a variety of toppings for your pizza, and they also offer some good desserts.
We just went tonight it's our anniversary the waiter was very nice but the food sucks And expensive I think it will be our last time going there we will be looking for a better seafood restaurant
Clean room, nice breakfast variety and friendly staff. The room was fine and this location is close to downtown Tucson. Solid!
For what looks like a dinky neighborhood Bar it had excellent food add good prices! I really enjoy it cause there is never too many people there when I'm there.
Business is closed permanently as of August 29th. Do not bother coming here. Empty store.

We had an extra long wait since the buzzer the host gave us was apparently broken. But we did find some good mojitos at the bar with some nice live music provided by a girl and her guitar. Once seated, we noticed that much of the seafood was fried. however, the food and service were both good.
Great flavors and topping options. The customer service and cleanliness were also top notch.
The chicken is over rated. It's better from Acme. The donuts, even the fancy one's seem plain.

I'm so glad that Indiana has Chatime! My favorite is their pudding milk tea. Passion fruit green tea and Jasmine milk tea are great as well. If you've never had good boba before, you need to try this!!!
Wait times are terrible even when you call in. Staff was unprofessional and nonchalant. I didn't see the kitchen staff using gloves either.

Food was ok. Guacamole tasted like wholey guacamole. Ordered steak stocks medium and they were burnt outside and almost raw inside. Charbroiler to hot maybe? And bartender has no personality nor do any waitresses we encountered. I won't be back.
Meat lovers paradise. GofortheirMeatplatter, Don't waste your money on the less than average fries.

It's not my favorite Indian in the area, but it's definitely good. I am concerned that they lack of business is effecting the quality of the food. Too many times I've been here at 6:3007:00 during the week for dinner and been the only person in the restaurant. I hope they can turn it around. The service is friendly and accommodating.
Expensive! Don't order a soda if your thirsty. I received a little 8oz bottle of sprite with a glass of ice bigger than the bottle. Bread was ok.
I only get one thing here, and it's good. The steak and cheese sub. Not like what you get in Philly, but decent for Tampa. Definitely ask for extra cheese.

Came for dinner with my in-laws, sister and her hubby and our boys.... loved it! Service was great and food was fantastic - mushroom risotto and steak was delicious, lamb shank special was perfect comfort food, capellini with shrimp was perfect and my son's stromboli was the "best ever". We will definitely be back to explore the menu further.
Ordered delivery. Pizza was burnt. There was barely any sauce on the Alfredo. Won't order from again.

2 stars because the food is actually good. However the drivers are always hassling for a tip and gives you dirty looks if you don't have cash on hand. This happened to me 3 times since i started ordeing food here and it's a major turn off. What kind of customer service is that? They need better delivery drivers asap.

If you're looking for banh mi that isn't very typical, fixed this place a try. I recommend getting the grilled pork (#3). On the outside, the roll was fresh and tasty. On the inside, the pork was very warm and flavorful. I would definitely get another one.
The cheese Louise pizza was scrumptious! Also had a house salad that was pretty standard. Nothing that great. Our waiter wasn't the most professional in the world. Seemed very indifferent.
You cant get a hometown restaurant that is better. Cool place to enjoy a meal that's affordable and delicious.

The worst.... slow service, overprice meals, not clean...sneaky service (automatically included 18% tip for 2 people) ready to pay for 100$ meal that taste like 20$ meal... Sushi from supermarket taste better. Please do not go.
The staff was great. However the food was average. Additionally, the location just re-opened from a re-model and still only has 2 stalls in the women's restroom which then leads to lines.
The doughnuts were solid -- more chewy than I typically prefer, but still good. Maybe it was a fluke, but the background Jesus music was off-putting.

The Service was Excellent .. Unfortunately the Food Didn't match !! I ordered a Combo Plate and the Beef was not Seasoned AT ALL .. and the sauce on the plate tasted like a sauce out of a RAGU or other Spaghetti Sauce Jar !! SO DISAPPOINTED in the food !!

Yeah, this place is DEFINITELY not worth the money. Our experience was similar to other reviewers - rooms badly need updating, big charge for internet access, and housekeeping threw out my husband's $500 custom mouth guard and stole my iPad charger. Front desk made ZERO effort to make it right when these missing items were raised, not even an apology. They were totally unconcerned.

Posted hours say they close at 11 on Saturdays. My mom was in from out of town and we walked in at 9:30. There were a few tables of people there. The hostess and manager told us they just made last call and were closing. Really disappointing and unclear.
Cute place and deliciously fresh fish for a very good price($5-15)! Highly recommend that you try it out.

Rather than drive to Bala Cynwyd, my husband and I decided to order nova & bagels from Mrs. Marty's Deli as it's closer to our house. The food wasn't bad, but for $10 per sandwich, we were expecting better. All of the veg was cut entirely too thick. Next time, we'll just grab nova and make our own sandwiches.
Good food, fine music. Had founders dirty bastard, HB Hofbrau Dunkel. Fries were crispy. Shrimp was good. Marissa served our table, she was awesome. Would go back for music and service.

Walking along the touristy part of downtown we walked into this place to check it out and catch a quick bite to eat. Def very greasy, oily and lots of friend options here. The restaurant wasnt very clean either but then again, this clearly caters to the tourists in town. I don't think I'll be back.

for food and drinks inside - not worth writing anymore than this.... unless you are like some where anything above McDonald's is gourmet and Bud lite and 3 other beers on tap is a "good selection". Website menu sounded great but website photos were VERY deceptive. It actually makes it look like this is a place that has an interest in dinner service.
It's acceptable... But smells like either natural or propane gas downstairs where most of the theaters are... Like, smells BAD.
This was an awesome place to eat. Although the food was amazing the waitress seemed to be rushing us to get out of there. She kept trying to bring our ticket every time she came to the table.
The outside may look deceiving, but the food was really good and the service was great.

The main reason to go here is the stunning view! It's one of the best (if not the best) you can get. Their drinks are pretty limited but they do have a decent selection of rotating crafts in the summer. I recommend going sometime during that fall/winter for the spiked hot drinks-delish!
Company advertises on local radio about half price....then they come out and quote me triple the price...what a joke!

Food was excellent. Wait staff not so much. We were there during happy hour and one waitress offered everyone in the room the specials and the $1 sangrias. When we asked our waitress she said that was not an option and then proceeded to argue with us. Of the wait staff that evening we drew the short straw.

No frills, dart throwin, dirty ass, smokey, beer stained dive. This is my kinda place. It seems like the dart throwing that goes on here is pretty serious business. I'm not from the area so I can't say if it's a regional thing. Don't expect to go in, pick up cash unless you are 1. good or 2. really lucky.
With the price I paid for a burger I was expecting a lot more. I will not be back, noisy and slow service.

Horrible service. Every single time I come here I'm forgotten about. I have sat here for two hours and when I said something all I got was your food is coming soon. Fuck the staff they are all drunks and don't care about their customers.

Meh.... the food quality is not that great for the price. My steak was over cooked twice (sent it back the first time). The bread pudding was hard like it been reheated more than once. The service was extremely slow...

this place is full of crap we were treated horribly the service is so bad 0/10 i would not return here if i was paid the big guy was being rude to me and my friends like all night and we were just sitting drinking calmly i did like the employees AT ALL

DINNER: Went back for dinner, friendly but horrible service in that it took us two hours to get cheesesteaks and a kid's meal. We don't think it was the one server's fault, we think it was the inability of the kitchen. No apologies, just sitting and waiting on our part for HOURS. We'll will not go back at dinner time again.
The chicken hor fun is amazing! I've ordered it maybe twenty times, it's my go to Chinese take out place.
They have unreliable opening hours and don't seem to smile much. I am going to only go to the other downtown location on Tucker/12th at Olive. They smile more and are always open as scheduled.
Awesome pizza, casual ambience. Pizza came out fast. Do yourself a favor and order the Rotolo. Convenient for large group work lunches.
The sushi was delicious. The place doesn't look like much and the service is top notch, but I enjoyed my food.
Good basic food at great prices. Homemade desserts can't be beat! Phoenixville needs a place like this-- hope they stay.

Insane price for disappointing pizza. It has always been a deal getting NY style pizza for round 10 bucks for 18", kinda the whole premise everyone gets them on the east coast...guess being this far from the big Apple s gonna cost ya!

Great pizza and subs! They have a very large delivery area. Pizza -Crunch and doughy crust at the same time! Sauce is good not sweet or has too much oregano. Tons of choices or build your own. Subs are good hot or cold. Try their entrees they are good too!

I have no idea whether this is a good place or not. We made it to the hostess and asked for the wait time. "15 minutes to 2 hours"!, as she snarled at us as if we were from a different planet. This may be a great bar, but if you are turned off at the front door by bad attitude why bother.
Came here for Valentine's Day. Had the shrimp po boy, which was just OK. My wife had the chicken salad, which was also just OK. Nothing too special at this place, unless you like just OK food.
What a fantastic evening! The food was amazing and the staff was even better! We came for my husband's bday and they made it incredible! We will be back for sure

4/5 early discovery came here for a work-related meeting once, it's such a cute little box surprise in the middle of the neighborhood. it got great light and had vibrant colors, i'd happily work here again. they have a spread of items, but so far i've only had the iced coffee which wasn't bad.

We had a great time tasting and enjoyed the short tour. One criticism I have is that the owners were having a loud conversation in the front area while we were trying to hear the bartender explain the different spirits. The drinks were good, but we decided not to buy anything.

Been here several times - never a bad meal. Love the wine tastings as well. The pork belly nachos are a must order every time. Some Friday nights are standing room only- be prepared for over an hour wait. Was here on a Tuesday night this week- and it was packed too.

Worst Thai in Clearwater and in the runnings for worst restaurant period. I've tried them several times and still they totally fail. I got a hunk of metal in may food on the last visit, cut my mouth! I am NOT joking. Avoid this place like herpes.

Peter is an amazing individual and owner of this shop. Very helpful in pricing and buying my coins. When you meet him, you can feel the trust and knowledge of the industry. I will be returning for future business.
This place is great !!! Love the food and the staff- farm to table , homemade mozzarella :) delicious- Must try - great atmosphere

Thank you Shelbie! We spent hours trying to make a change to our account, and we're told the change had been completed. Went into the store to verify only to find the change was pending. Shelbie called in on our behalf and finally was able to get the task completed. Thank you for going above and beyond and helping us out!

The menu is small but interesting. I got a grilled chicken caesar salad. They grilled the romaine which I thought was a little strange. It tasted just okay. I was really in the mood for a cold, crisp salad. The beers were excellent and I'd give them another try.

Extremely disappointing. The food is not authentic. So much for claiming to be a Mexican restaurant. Didn't get to try the margaritas, but hope that can save this place from receiving 0 stars from me. If you like bland food, I guess you would enjoy eating here.

There are 24 beers advertised on tap. When we got there, 13 of them were out (see picture). The bartender did not make any eye contact with me for 20 minutes as I tried to order food. Altogether an unpleasant experience
Very good selection of calzones and beer. If none of their specialties are of your taste, you can build your own.

Did not get a chance to try the product (nor will I ever) because my 4 year old daughter and I were told to leave the outdoor seating area - the owner is a first-class jerk and doesn't understand that there is no difference between a non-customer today and a potential customer tomorrow.

Relaxed vibe, beautiful view of the water, everything we had, clam chowder, Bloody Marys, steamer clams, Buffalo Wings, all was great. Waitress was cool, attentive and friendly. We were there midday on a Monday, very quiet, not as crazy as the weekend. Lots of room inside against the windows and outside on the patio. I'd recommend this place.

I went here with a group of about 12 & most of use were terribly disappointed. Watery, cold omelette, painfully slow service, parking was a nightmare & several orders were wrong. And when I mentioned it upon paying, the cashier literally laughed. Never went back.

I live a block and a half from this little gem! My husband and I shop here for all of our LP needs!!! The owners are very helpful and completely have a passion for what they do. Every record we have ever purchased was in very decent condition and was priced really well.

what a waste of time. Stopped in for the brew and burger on Wednesday, just a couple of people in the place. Sat at the bar and nobody was behind the bar. Waited about 10 minutes and then flagged down a server. Still nobody at the bar. Don't know how they are still in business, seems they are not going to be open long.

Crab bites were good the flavor reminded me of a deviled crab. Beets and goat cheese salad was surprisingly my favorite. They used this dressing that had a nice kick. Seafood Alfredo was good, classic. Also had the baked shrimp and potatoes au gratin. Anything with melted cheese is a hell yes from me.

This is the best stop en route from Princeton, NJ to DC...clean, convenient and with lots of snacking options! Other service areas are cramped and old but this one is new and well-maintained. Just keep in mind it veers to the left of the highway unlike most that fall to the right!

I agree with Cody K. This place does not accept walk-ins, is really rude about it, and the people that work there are sarcastic and demand the last word. They should change their name to "Beauty Shop." It would better match their reservation policies and their bad attitudes. How do they have four stars with all these 1 star reviews? They don't deserve it.

Forgot two white rices from both of my entrees. All chicken wings were over cooked and dry. General tsos chicken was almost rubbery. Only ordered from here because Jade Gardens delivery guy went home early day before Thanksgiving. Wish I had just went and picked up from them instead.

Olive Garden must of had a off day today. Food was not great. My veggie panini/quesadilla was not good and it was kinda soggy. My moms Alfredo looked dry. These items are on the lunch menu and came with salad and breadsticks. Which when we asked for a salad refill to took awhile to get it.

I'd probably give the food 3 and a half stars, but the service here was slooooow. The food itself didn't take too long to come out, but no one took our order for at least 15 minutes after we sat down. Maybe it was just an off night.
I ordered a half caesar salad with chicken. got home to find most of the lettuce was bad, very little chicken mostly croutons. Second time i tried Panera won't get anything again.
Most amazing Russian food in Reno. A definite must!!! Can't get enough of the scrumptious peroshky. Wow!!! Love this place

Pretty hip place. Went there after visiting Drexel today, and was pretty cheap, cool atmosphere, and super fast!(which is all I really care about)... Just remember you're going to a NOODLE house so get something with NOODLES.
Thus location isn't a crowded as other QT's. They still have friendly service, and a wide selection of goods compared to non-QT convenience stores. :)
Noisy room and poor customer service, absolutely no follow up. Poor amenities with limited hours of service. Will not return.
Love the stromboli and mozzarella fries. My children enjoy the wings and banana pudding.
Ekta ALL the way. Sorry Tiffin. 2 stars for the Onion Bhaji and the ambiance.

First stop for me in New Orleans. Great place with a lovely atmosphere and service. Tried the Jambalaya, Creole fish and a couple of cocktails. Really enjoyed everything we had and would return if I had more time in the area.
I had a terrible shrimp meal. They were cooked so hard and one shade from burned. I was so disappointed when I got home. I.usually.have good luck but not today

I hate giving crappy reviews, but hey... they started it with the crappy food! My food was cold, salty and tasted almost like the ingredients were frozen. Service was sub-par. Come on Casa Blanca, if you want to play with the big boys in Santa Barbara you are going to at least have to give a little effort!

It was ok. The service was good and people were nice. The hummus was bland and needed something else. The pasta was cooked well, not over done. It doesn't really seem Mediterranean, it's more Italian. Wouldn't recommend it but I also wouldn't discourage people from trying it and forming their own opinions.
Ok at best. Line is hideously long. Service is patchy. Food is ok. Good lively atmosphere.... Other than that I can't think of many positives to say unfortunately.

Nice service, mediocre espressos. Muffins look like Costco or Publix brand muffins. Not a lot of seating, two tables with two chairs each and four bar stool-esque seats. Maybe their normal brewed coffee is better? I won't be returning to try since it doesn't meet my needs for an actual coffee shop.

Tried the Brunch Buffet last weekend... Bloody Mary could have used a tune up, a little blah for my tastes. Food was replenished generously, however not much of a selection. Might stick to Azie for later day festivities... drinks, apps and dinner.
Awesome if you like to support puppy mills. As of this review they actually have a sign out front telling people NOT to adopt because shopping = no dogs needing adopting. Seriously.

Staff super nice, helpful, accommodating. But for $175, it should be a descent night stay. The carpet was very stained, moldy grout in bathtub, walls are super thin, and there was no mini fridge which helps keep things cold that we travel with. They do allow small dogs which is nice. The lobby was pretty.

THANK YOU Dr. Musick and Klaich receptionist (I wish I got your name; young gal with long light brown hair). You helped out with Kaipo the other day, making a very painful situation a little less painful.
Seem like a nice friendly place I didn't only had a drink a the front bar and it was early in the night so it was quiet but I would come back to have another shot

Went here twice, the first time was amazing and I loved the food, and then the second one was not as great. However, still good food and it's a great place by the water. The staff were friendly and had great recommendations. I had the pulled pork, which was amazing.
Stopped wearing masks and my go to place here is gone now. Great group..just wonder why.
The food was great. We had the fish tacos. They were great. Plenty to eat. The service was prompt and Alex was womderful. Loved the location right on the water. Fun drinks.

Sweet spot, especially on a nice day when you can dine outside and people watch. Our server was very warm and friendly. Seafood salad and porcini and truffle ravioli were delicious. The place is tiny and can get really packed, I recommend going during the off hours (mid afternoon) so you can relax and your server can be attentive.

Natalie set to the tone for a incredible evening at Tilted Kilt. Food was excellent and service even better. Owner and his staff stopped by table to make certain it was a fab dining experience. Thanks to Natalie and her fellow servers the evening was better than our high high expectations. Continued success.

We went to the Christmas festival in Love Park. It's nice. Lots of vendors and lots of people. But during normal time, I don't see why people would go there? just to take picture with the LOVE statue?
12min on hole to get someone to check for a gas leak. too many phone prompts and holds. budget billing is a joke. you end up paying more.
Nothing like seeing workers with no masks and one making food wipe her nose with her gloved hand and go right back to handling food. Truly disgusting. This is my last time getting food from here.

The food here was outstanding. Probably the best restaurant we tried on our trip to New Orleans. Fried green tomatoes were delicious. My chicken dish was artfully spiced and delicious. Our waitress, Darien, was knowledgeable, personable and attentive. It was a great experience!

Fantastic visit! We came in at about 8:30am and they were fully stocked. Tons of different doughnuts to choose from and honestly, ALL the ones we got, were great! I like the fact that they don't sit heavy on your stomach the way some doughnuts tend to do and the store itself is spotlessly clean and staff is terrific. Love this place!!!

Dr. Lang is absolutely wonderful. Too bad some of the girls that work for him are rude, condescending, and completely unprofessional. I highly recommend Dr. Lang, but highly advise you try and stay away from Rosie and Wendy. I am sad to lose Dr.Lang, but I just can't stand to go back there. That's how awful those girls were. Good luck.

We came at 2:30 on a Saturday and it was dead so service was snappy quick. We had chicken Tikka masala (spicy) and pickled chicken entre, which I'm now obsessed with because the meat was so tender and flavorful. The naan and rice were also solid!

The chicken kebab I had was rather bland and didn't have much flavor. The flavor it did have was not that good. I really didn't enjoy the meal at all, and it was almost impossible to eat since it was so sloppy. Will not go back. Personally, am not a fan of the food.

Very good experience! Owners were professional courteous and quick! I wasn't sure what to get they explained it to me and I was very happy with the end result! I would definitely recommend based on the customer service and quality work.

Never stay there again had roaches and got woken up at 4am to people being loud no consideration for other people that are trying to sleep I will never stay there again and don't recommend it to nobody

They have a cute selection of clothes (albeit pricey). One of the sales people was really nice. The other one was not polite, so she gets one star off for overcharging me, and one star off for not apologizing. It wouldn't kill you to say "sorry for the inconvenience" or something of that sort.

Standard messaged me saying that they don't normally have West Coast brews for ecological reasons. My mistake. Nevertheless they still always have a solid tap list and great food. Stickin with my guns on that one. Please don't take away my ROTD!
For people visiting and people that like good food there are much better options for brunch any where in Nola than this place. There's a difference between hash browns and breakfast potatoes.

Don't waste your time nor money. Worst Popeyes ever! I wish I could give it zero stars. Terrible customer service, order took way too long, and was wrong when I actually received it. We have frequented this location because it happens to be near our home. Never again! Take your hard earned money and time to an establishment that actually cares for its patrons!
Awful bread was hard not good at all...driver was late I won't be doing that again... I'll go inside

As much as I hate to do this, I have to. I got the half chicken and it was not cooked well, when I pulled the leg from the thigh, there was blood. Meat did not taste smoky or have a grill flavor, skin on chicken was Gummie or soggy but the side of baked beans and green beans were ok. Damn!!!

So I was craving a Reuben for my lunch today and found one at this place... Big mistake as what was delivered was not a Reuben sandwich . I will try these guys again but I will never order the Reuben again ! Take it off the menu - horrible! The side salad was yummy tho

We were very disappointed with this place. I ordered the chicken and waffles. The menu says Belgian waffle. Don't kid yourself. It was thin like a Waffle House waffle. My wife disliked what she had and the bloody Mary was just ok. We won't be back
Long waits at drive thru and employees display terrible attitude. Should receive 0 stars.
Went to this jack in box very poor service takes 18 min to get our food. All they would say is were short on help very rude
Worst pizza joint in the area, don't waste your time.

Nice service, fast pho. The pho ga was actually very flavorful fresh and tasty -- and same size as pretty much all the competing pho places. But the price, yikes! $10 for a bowl of pho. I had a great meal but this is a little too high for Pho in my opinion
What an amazing dinner! Highly recommend the oysters on the half! The escargot with Roquefort was amazing! Entree portions were extremely generous and cooked perfectly! Can't go wrong here folks!

Great selections and really satisfies that sweet tooth. Came here with friends and all our donuts came out hot and fresh. One of my friends couldn't decide on a flavor, so one of the servers recommended & brought to her a new flavor to try on the house (thanks!). Sweet donuts, sweet staff - you can't go wrong.
Yes, I'm still going here like a fool. The food is delicious. Service, well, try not to annoy them okay?
Very average!!! They are so busy and could do soooo much better. Large portions of starchy food. Probably the better of most places in Tampa will not go back.

Stopped by here one night after a long conference day for some froyo. Mostly went to walk a bit with a friend, not intending to buy. Service was exceedingly friendly though and talked me into some samples - before I knew it I was buying a small froyo (delicious flavor) with tons of available toppings. Would definitely come back for the service alone!

I tried the volcano roll, citrus roll, California roll, Elle roll, and something else. Nothing was outstanding. However they did have very good crab Rangoon. I'll be back to try their Thai since it seems to be really popular and update the rating
As always the food is delicious, but the service was terrible. I was rushed though out ordering my food and the older woman who was checking us out was SO rude and condescending.

My girlfriend and i stopped at Lolita for drinks and apps only. Staff were nice but our waitress just would not smile and seemed grumpy. not a fan of that. Its your typical Americanized Mexican food. Probably would just stick to apps and drinks
The food here was great! I got a larger salad and flank steak. It was soooo good. I LOVED this salad.

Boyfriend and I stopped by here while visiting Philadelphia on my birthday trip! Bartenders are first class, easy going, they'll always attend to your needs and suggest divine cocktails. We got few drinks here and some appetizers. Drinks are an experience!!! Seriously! Shrimp satay was horrid (too salty) don't get it!

I just tried this cleaner for the first time using the groupon deal and they did a fantastic job! They came in asked exactly what I wanted to be cleaned, brought in all their supplies, and went to work. They took 2 hours and everything was spotless, I don't think my house has ever been so clean. I will be using them again.
please read....please read. i don't know where to begin. worst company. the home i rented i can't even described how nasty it is. in a month the lease is up and trust me, we are out
A little bit of a wait, but no biggie. That's the deal at most brunch places. Delicious and healthy, which can be a hard combo to come across. Very family friendly as well.
Andy custom made my engagement ring - and it is stunning!!!! If you can dream it, he can make it!!! Highly recommend him.

The decor (after the front of the place) is great - straight out of a scene from Pulp Fiction. Beer selection is okay - the standard "cool" beers list that has become vogue as of late. Food is good, but pricey for the portions. Worth checking out once.
Employees are extremely rude ruin the whole experience they need to be trained on customer service a "thank you" or even a "hello" goes a long way
