Mixed feelings. Love the food. Horrible customer service. Lady needs to work on her communication skills. Guy at the grill is great. Hard working. It's like a love/hate relationship. Love the empanadas and sopes. The service- not so much. Reminds me of the Seinfeld soup guy episodes.
The food was good. If you want hot Mexican ask for it. Otherwise your getting the same food at the grocery store.

Having time to kill before the Museum opened I went for a walk and came across this place. Thoroughly enjoyed myself here having good beignets and coffee. It's unique and the wait staff were prompt and courteous.
Food was great. Only real complaint was the shrimp tempura was bland. Cucumber lollipop rolls are great.

Agree with the nice IHOP explanation. I thought "ooh a fancy Denny's" when we first walked in. Food was okay. Coffee neither special or standard diner, something inbetween. A lot of strange people both working and eating, so the Denny's part stayed true.

Waiting for my flight and thought I would try this place! Disappointed by the person at the cash register, very rude & unwelcoming. Food was alright as well. Definitely would recommend eating elsewhere at the airport!
Only reason why I go there is it's the only bagel shop around. Service is poor! The manager is a foreigner, and has no concept of customer service.
I got the empanadas from here and THEY ARE INCREDIBLE! The food is so hot and fresh and the boxes that they use are great quality and cute!
Nice, full, exciting place. Played in a Sat tournament and it was very enjoyable. Weather was great. The environment was vey inviting. First time here and I really enjoyed myself.

Props for the pong tables. More venues need that. Beer selection is ok, not much variety from one visit to the next. Biggest drawback to this place is its popularity. It's pretty much THE destination in Fishtown, and on any given night is overrun by jersey boys in their flat brimmed backwards ball caps. Intolerable on a weekend night.
Good service and food - a lot of seating so didn't have to wait at all on a Saturday afternoon

It's an ok hala food. Lots of rice not seasoned not that much meat. White sauce was ok but the green sauce made up for it. Waiter have a bit of an attitude. It's ok I've had better but guess it would do for Saint Petersburg.
Everything is clean and looks nice. The internet is very slow which is bad if you're staying here on business. Its far to slow to do any video conferencing.
This place is a total cliche of what bad auto repair places are about. They wanted DOUBLE what the dealership would charge with no warranty or guarantees... No thank you!

I had never attempted to order a poke bowl before, but once I tried I really enjoyed it. I wasn't sure what to add to the bowl, but you really can't go wrong with sushi. I would definitely recommend giving it a try if you are curious... you won't regret it!

Love it! Great new pizza joint- The wings were savory, crispy bacon tater tots and the trolley square pizza with blackened chicken. Wait staff were fun and attentive - and loved the ambiance of the space. Will definitely visit again.

This store is dirty and gross. Employees are rude and I even saw water leaking from their ceiling onto their coffee machines for hours. Dirty!! Onto their drinkAVOID. Go local!!! So many other cheaper and better local coffee places within the same block. Update: their management is horrible and they're inconsiderate to their neighborhood

SLOW. This is place to dine, not eat. In 1.5hrs my wife and I got 2 breadsticks each and 2 water refills. We had to request our order be changed to "to-go" to accommodate our baby sitter. The food was good yet colder once we got home. Will only attempt again as a "to-go" place

Overpriced beer for Nashville. Killians at $3 or $3.50 a pint is the only exception. Although, some of the apps are decent. Live music occassionally. I prefer Red Door or Blue Bar...or even JJs Market. This is totally a case of paying for the crowd.

Chicken salad was bland, lacked seasoning. Too much fruit mixed in with all the other ingredients. My son ordered a chicken sandwich, received a grouper sandwich instead. Santorini grouper had no seasoning and came out cold. Excited to try this hyped up place, not sure what all the hype was about.
Great Mexican! Salsa is delish. Chicken burrito was outstanding. Huge servings. Service was very good.
The daily specials are great! They don't serve the greatest food I've ever had, but for the price it can't be beat. The inside tends to be a little smoky for me, but it is a bar!
Not very good. I have tried this place for lunch and dinner and it has been terrible both times. Poor service and badly executed dishes. Please avoid this restaurant at all costs.
oh how i miss the museum of art since moving away. gorgeous art, beautifully curated & maintained, incredible exhibitions, and such a fun building. if they'd let me, i'd move in.
Place went downhill fast. Never worked out their kinks and service steadily got worse. I don't even remember this place exists anymore. Far too many better sushi places around the area
Tough to find but nice guys inside. Small room located on 3rd floor of the OMNI hotel.
bbbm pl m mm m m m mlmmmml ml mom lmlmlml ml m Lola ".oihghuhhhiiihuhuyuyua. L M popular within
Latitudes is a great place to get gifts! They have a huge jewlery selection and the prices are very reasonable. Their card selection is also great..very unique!

These guys are SCAM ARTISTS . Tried to get me to pay $1038 for work I DIDNT NEED .. went and had another estimate done.. they said I didn't need half the work Midas recommended . I'm going to be paying $261 now . liars

Spent a fair amount of time here when in high school and was never a fan. Was just in recently at about 2:30 in the morning and loved the remodeling, which was probably completed 4 years ago at this point. The nachos was super delish and our waitress was a gem. A fine place to go when the bars close.

H.H. has really gone downhill over the course of the year. Selection is poor, and some items we purchased seemed to be well past their expiration date. The prices are also astronomical, even for a health food store.
Service guy is rude and they are not efficient or reliable! please do not waste your money at this business it's u deserving !

Came across this restaurant while searching for FOOD! While the food was nothing to speak of (both of us had the burger it was too greasy). The atmosphere was AWESOME! We sat up stairs in the swing seats! Other than that nothing exciting to speak of this place. Ohh the fries were good...
Delicious food!!!! Fresh, authentic and so so yummy!! Great seasonal craft cocktails, too. Check it out!!!

This target is large and has a fairly good selection. I was, however, obviously followed by staff throughout the store. One older female employee followed me through 3 different sections and up to the registers. It was obvious what she thought I was doing. Made me extremely uncomfortable and I will not be returning.

This place is absolutely horrible the workers will look at you through the window and refuse to serve you. Almost always out of meat and every other thing. 0/5 don't wast your time here the owner is also a racist.

The food is ok,the cashier and cook were RUDE.I told her it was for dine in the cook THREW my burrito on the counter,then the cashier ROLLED HER EYES,went to the back,got a empty plate,and said Here.The customer before me they garnished his plate was kind and sent him on his way.I will NOT BE BACK to this establishment!

Really weird interior, they have an outhouse right in the middle of the restaurant and next to the salad bar. The BBQ was ok and in SB county it might be considered good but there is many places that are much better in terms of BBQ.

Got a European mount done on my mule deer harvest last year, and man, this guy does some phenomenal work! Pretty short turn around times compared to many other places I got quotes from. Looking at all of his work in his shop, the 5 star reviews are very well deserved. I'll definitely be coming back in the future, and you should too!

Disappointing despite many good reviews. The service was horribly slow, over 45 min wait. Some of the food was cold by the time it arrived, and it was not even good food. We had been meaning to try this place, and now we have. The end. Two stars because the staff were polite.
My money's no good here I guess. 4 visits and absolutely atrocious service while being followed around the store on each visit. I'll spend my money elsewhere.

First time visiting. Service was good. We got two of their basic burgers. Both were dry and crispy around the edges. Fries were okay but underwhelming and under seasoned. The vibe wasn't super exciting. However, I do like the open kitchen. Probably won't return.
There sandwich ok despite so much advertising, but they are close to the university and gets a lot of hungry university students during lunchtime
Great food and service. Very accommodating of our large party on short notice. My only complaint would be the limited beer selection.
DC is the bomb.com. I had a deep conditioning treatment today. He was personable and knew exactly what to do.

Cute for a nail spa the owner is really sweet and allows my son to play after his pedicures. If you are looking for a great technician here Kelly is absolutely amazing I love here she does an awesome job and is a really sweet girl! i highly recommending her if you ever go!
It was good. The garlic honey wings were A1. I would give it a 6 on my scale. I thought the fish could have been fried crisper. It had a good taste, but they try to fill you up on the fries.

Called because there were items missing from my delivery order. What wasn't missing was the nasty roach that ran out of my sandwich. Owner couldn't be bothered wasn't at all surprised He didn't even care. DISGUSTING DIRTY NASTY.....ENJOY!!! Should have checked the board of health report card before ordering rather than later. Would have saved me time and money.

This rental company is absolutely horrible they do not respect your privacy nor your rights . My recommendation is please find someone else to rent from, there are plenty of other companies that are friendly and courteous and take care of you as a real client.

Dined there twice: once for Saturday lunch and once for Sunday brunch. Wait staff on Saturday was friendlier than on Sunday (server was cold and stiff). Food was excellent both days and the Jazz Combo on Sunday was excellent too.
Ice cream good, value for size (based on cost - single scoop) not so good. Not enough parking. Very busy, so be patient when you arrive.
Charbroiled oysters definitely lived up to their reputation, and the grilled shrimp pasta was a nice choice. Service was excellent... highly recommend.

I came Saturday, late at night... we stopped in for some delicious shots, and found the staff friendly, and the decor cute... but I thought the crowd was skeevy. The DJs were awesome! But it was really slow, empty, and... skeevy. I stayed all of 15 minutes. Oh, right... and I even spent most of my time in VIP.
small and crowded place, good noodles and small dishes

Convenient, but if a price seems to good to be true, check the exp. date! I have bought dairy that was bad or went bad quickly, I am not convinced that it is stored properly. You do know that this is just another Roberts. Their prices change frequently. Check price and dating and check price again at the register.

Nice spa with many services. The facials are on point! The relaxation massages are amazing, and you can add wonderful essential oils for an even better experience. They offer champagne, and light snacks while you wait.
Please don't waste your time here. They are horrible in every aspect. Their customer service is sh*t. I've never dealt with more incompetent people in my life.

It have limited Seafood and they don't bring out enough crabs. Usually they bring out enough for one plate and grabbing all of it is rude. The food is decent but very limited in selection. You can probably get a better deal at other places for the price they charge you.
Really good food and fast service. Whether it's takeout or eat-in the food is quality. It is in a business mall type of location

I love eating pita jungle, now I will not be ordering from pita jungle and I will tell everyone I know not to order from there. I remember when the food was very tasty,now it taste bland and boring it was disappointing.

Best specialty pizzas around: chicken caesar, popeye and red veggie are delicious. And niw they have a cauliflower crust available in persal pizza sizes....does NOT taste like cauliflower (bonus). It's a thin, crispy crust. But the Sicilian and cheesesteaks are great too. There are tons of full dinners and alot of salads too. Large menu. Always has a good crowd.

I love this place. I go here at least once a week. The drink specials are cheap and the food is always good. They have specials EVERYDAY! It's awesome! I gave it 4 stars because I think they could use a patio. A patio would be AWESOME!
Awesome cheese steaks and great customer service, but the people in the kitchen need to wear gloves when cooking.
We've enjoyed many of the concerts they have here with the Florida Orchestra. Doesn't seem to be a bad seat in the house. Small and personal venue.

This is not a review about the food as I have just arrived, however they did not turn the waiting list on so yelp does not know there is a long waiting line. They really should turn it on and not mislead the clients!

Go there a few times a week. They never get my order wrong, no BS drive thru drama. Ive only been inside a few times but its never messy which is unexpected considering the location. Open late till 2 most nights, 4 on the weekends.

Absolutely disgusting kitchen. Trash overflowing, trash and filth all over the floor, and the employees just ignore it and make no effort to keep the area where they prepare your food clean. It's a shame because their food is actually quite good but I'm not coming back here until they learn basic sanitation practices.
Great place to live!! Awesome location with everything surrounding it within walking distance.
Good food and atmosphere! Cool beer selection and they have the appropriate glass for each beer.

After seeing a whiny "local" (who isn't even from New Orleans) trash these guys online for not having vegetarian options (ZZZZ), I felt compelled to visit this place. Hey, if the whiny losers who actually use this site hate them, they must be awesome. And sure enough, they were as good as I assumed they'd be. Awesome joint. Be sure to stop by.
We went for the brunch. Service was slow and one of our orders (breakfast frittata) was so bad, we couldn't eat it. Coffee was mediocre. I'll never be back. Save your money - go somewhere else.

Great place to stop after work. The food is good and the service is fast and friendly. The bar staff is experienced and they have a good selection of top shelf liquors. This place is a little off the beaten path but worth the trip.

Crust was great, toppings good, service was very slow. Only half packed. Trying a crepes. It looks really good. Can't wait to try. There was about 15 people here and all were speaking French. So a good place to try and explore a different culture.
They have such great coffee. But why are they always out of ice? This is the 3rd time I've been in and they haven't had ice!

Went for dinner and didn't get to order. Manager told another customer ahead of me and myself they would be with us in a moment and that moment didn't come around. After about 10 minutes of waiting in line to order we realized it wasn't going to ever be time so we left.
The street of this museum and the front of entrancy museum smell so bad .... plenty of hangover not super cleaning after the wild night.
Went here for lunch today and I will never go back. Super duper slow service. Only one waitress who was too worried about being cute.

This store is great. Friendly and helpful staff. Fresh produce, good selection of meat and cheeses. I love stopping here, it is on the way home and cashiers keep the lines moving fast! Also they have all the items that a natural sistah needs for her hair! Yeahy!

hmmm sadly to say but this time all the food that i order taste no taste...i mean penang used to be better :( i had 3 order that i ussually loved much..but i think compare to banana leafs penang far behind..just saying they teach the amigo to cook now...you know its not authentic no more..different hand different taste...asian and mexican??

Here's something really special! Light, tasty, and delicious, Okie Dokie consistently delivers a fantastic product. With gluten free and vegan options, you can make literally EVERYONE happy. They have pick up locations all over the city at really nice venues, and they are doing pick up and delivery. Definitely follow them on insta @okiedokiedonuts for menu updates and whatnot.

Dined this restaurant with a large group and the service was great! The food, notsomuch, but the bottomless mimosas made up for it. Servers did an amazing job of refilling our glasses. There is also a nice outside area.
Tried going to this location after work 3 times now, never are open when I get there... I guess they make their own hours...
Slow bar tending service and payed full price for a beer that was already poured in the fridge.
Horrible service. One guy was rude and wouldn't even quote us a price. I don't recommend this place. Discount tires right down the street is way better.
This place is really good. Had the special shrimp PO boy-awesome. I enjoyed the red beans, bread pudding and etoufee sides. Very cool place.

We ended up going back for dinner and we were extremely disappointed this time. We started with the cheese plate appetizer, and after that we decided to leave. The few pieces of cheese and the second rate prosciutto was overpriced and just plain below average. Service by our waittress was great, however.
He called after the appointment to cancel. Booked with clean image instead - highly recommend

Got a couple of plants. Watered them exactly how they recommended. Plants died two days later. The lady there kept saying "they didnt get enough water". Eventhough I kept saying I followed the instructions they gave me. NO refund or any type of help offered. I do not recommend this place. Customer service was horrible
This place never disappoints. We take our kids there and our 2 hear old loves the jenga blocks and the outside area. Wings were phenomenal.

Yeah no. Just, don't. Hummus was ok, but got the lamb for dinner and it was dry, didn't taste fresh, and the tomato sauce is was served in was too salty. I'd say skip unless you're really dying to hit a DDD Nashville joint out of curiosity.
I ordered food from here through bitesquad. The food was so nasty i literally threw it in the trash. You are better off dumpster diving its about the same quality.

Huge selection of tables and chairs. They were very helpful and knowledgeable of their products. Willing to customize to suit my needs. Check out Greenwood Dinetteland before purchasing anywhere else. Highly recommend.

Great food and nice outdoor dining area. Love that the owners stepped-up during the pandemic and provided meals for first responders and healthcare workers. They also offer a dog-friendly menu which I have never seen anywhere else. It's gestures and out-of-the-box thinking like this that keep us coming back and bringing people who have never been to experience it for themselves.
Food was ok service was terrible. The waiter was super sour and we all felt really like we were not welcome. Will not go back.

I thought this place was extremely classy, I could have dressed up for such fine dining. The menu is fantastic, very extensive options of all my favorite authentic Italian food and even our waiter was named Frank! He made our night! Loved the wine!

We ordered the meat lasagna and spinach lasagna with garlic bread. The bread was just that hard old bread chunks...no garlic anywhere. Both lasagna's were pans of mozzarella cheese. We found one noodle in each pan buried under gum chewing mozzarella. Sauce had no special taste it was closer to Ragu or Great Value sauce bland!!! Extremely disappointed and will not return.

Went to the upstairs bar, has dive bar prices without the divey atmosphere, the place is actually relatively clean and nice. staff are friendly, there seem to be a lot of regulars. Pretty diverse crowd, I really like this place as a chill hang out bar.. pizza looked decent but I did not try.

3.5 Stars Come here hungry? You'll defiantly leave full. I love Pascucci but the food is too rich. I had the Ravioli Carbonara, and it was so rich that I regretted having a side Caesar salad. Garlic bread was delicious. Caesar salad was ok. The environment was welcoming, that I loved. Not a good idea come here unless you haven't eaten in days.

I've gone at 7am and the bagels are too firm. I expected them to be softer. We also noticed when they opened that the breakfast meat is microwaved. It's generally good so I wouldn't say I would never go back. The employees are sweet.

It's not the best hotel you can stay in. Items left in the room after check out seem to magically disappear because retrieval isn't happening. The restaurant there is awful so make sure you get out to experience good food. It definitely won't happen at Crabby Bill's.
This BBQ joint ain't so bad! Had a rib plate and they were so juicy and delicious! Not too shabby for CoMo! Their garlic bread is divine! Definitely coming back!

One of my husband and I's absolute favorite places! I found a pearl in my oyster here! Really! The food is great, we love all the seafood options and the steaks, and the service is impeccable. We also love the bar here. They have amazing home-made cocktails. The desserts are amazing as well.
Went there and had the seafood platter. Service was excellent, food was great! Would definitely recommend! I will be going back!
We stopped in after a 4.5 hour drive from Shreveport, staying the the Hilton. We could we have walked here! What a treat the female bartender was and the food wasn't bad either!

Good food. Certainly better than some of the other Chinese food in the area. The restaurant was clean and the staff was friendly. My food was ready on time and the price was quite reasonable. I'll be making Super Wok my go-to restaurant for Chinese take-out.
Excellent quaility food- fast. Good as it gets with the service and staff. Old-time charming lunchonette. My daughter loves to sit at the low seated counter and watch her order being cooked.

My soup was loaded with salt The calamari was terrible The valet situation out front is ridiculous they hold up people from entering or leaving and don't have that working at all It's a shame a lot of work went into this place Hope they get it worked out

One of the best restaurants in the area, and in a foodie town like Boise that is saying something! Have never had a bad meal here and tried many different dishes. King Salmon, Butternut Squash Ravioli, Spicy Chicken Sandwich, Butter Cake, all unreal! Must eat when in Boise.

Love their Sue imperial porter--very rich, with slight chocolatey notes at the end. Only $4 or so for a 10 ounce pour too! Their pale ale is not my favorite, but I liked their darker beers. Also, cool ambience with lots of indoor and outdoor seating.

Parx casino is what you'd imagine a casino in bensalem would look like. The clientele in the building aren't very lovely to be around. The drinks are expensive and the 360 club is pretty lame. But if you're looking to gamble it's nice that it's local.

Went for lunch meeting. Service was great! Good was delish and great tasting. We each ordered from lunch menu. Parking is a bear as it's a shared lot with other businesses and is corner lot. Also had a bug climb thru crack in wall. It's a good location for accessibility.
I visit 1-2 times per week. You cannot beat the hot chicken and kale salad!

The workers aren't very polite, and the service is slow. Halfway home, I realized our order was wrong, so we drove back. They replaced the order but didn't apologize. These burgers and fries aren't worth the hype! I like 5 Guy's way better!
Sometimes the service is decent and quick, but for the most part it is unorganized and extremely slow. I would search for the next closest Manhattan bagel before coming to this location.

If you are looking for a nice juicy burger and some delicious crinkle-cut fries, this is the place for you! Though it can get a little crowded/busy the service is outstanding. The SmokeShack is my personal favorite. Applewood smoked bacon and chopped cherry peppers. Yum!
We ordered online/the app and it took an hour for our order to be ready. People came in, ordered, and got their things before they even started to make ours.

Lovely staff, great drinks but just ok food. We ordered a pork po boy and the meat was kind of dry and the sandwich over all was pretty unremarkable. I would come for the drinks and to check out this cool building, but maybe skip the food.

Sadly, the food here is not particularly consistent. Sometimes it's delicious, most other times it is chewy, rubbery, bland, or lukewarm. There are better places in town if you're looking for good Greek food.

The food is good, the atmosphere is fun but the service is something to be desired. The staff are arrogant and not interested in doing their job or being personable in any way. They can never seat you in a timely fashion and are continually 20+ minutes late seating you from your reservation time. This will be the last time I eat here.
Very good authentic Mexican food; jovial atmosphere. There was a performer singing and playing guitar and the decor was very festive.

The is the one of the last book stores of its kind. A place where I can come, pull some used or new books off the shelf, have a free coffee, and sit at a well lit table and read. I love this place. I always will come here before I go to B&N.

Picked up two burritos to go. One al pastor and one chicken. Not bad for the price but there are definitely burritos with more flavor at other spots in South Philly. I may go back for something else as this is close to my workplace.

Yummy beignets, like the smaller bite-sized puffy lovelies. The chocolate beignets were interesting to try but the original is best. Expresso is nice and strong. Friendly service (not abundant in New Orleans).

Amazing food especially the tacos. Always fresh salsa, you never have to ask for refills and the service is amazingTheir prices are great as well, I definitely would recommend inside for a date night or outside if you're having a party.

I just needed a quick little breakfast place by the Metairie work office. Nothing special. Had the scrambled eggs with bacon. the best part was the croissant with their little cups of jam. Not sure if its homemade jam, but its pretty tasty.
The BBQ beef and chicken katsu plate is the best! Get the full size. Half never fills me up. You can get double mac if you don't want rice.

I have been searching for a pizza joint that has similar flavor profile as back home and this place is great! The spicy chicken/paneer pizza/cheesesteak is amazing at this place! The masala fries are also highly recommended.

I love love love Adolfo's upstairs for dinner but the worst part of waiting for Adolfo's is having to deal with the assholes downstairs at the bar. They treat customers like cattle and have no regard for the fact that people are waiting for the restaurant upstairs.

The burger was okay, the service was dreadful. My waitress forgot my drink, forgot the appetizers, and was extremely rude. My burger was supposed to be peppercorn crusted, however, it came out just a plain sirloin burger with no crust. Overall, not worth the pain to park or the long wait.
Their cannolis are the best because they're piped to order! You will never have a soggy shell. Secondly, the filling is my favorite, it's so rich.

We had a great visit when Chewy and Jugs hosted our friends' wedding. The hosts set everything up well, and the evening was well orchestrated. I'm not into the bar scene but I liked how classy they made the wedding. It seems like a good place for a drink and some grub.

This restaurant is horrible. Not sure why is it so busy. Service awful didn't even wipe off the table. It's a sit down fast food place that takes over an hour to get a salad and wings. I wish we had better choices in for restaurants. I know it's cheep but I'm done here NEVER again.
It was disappointing. The service-- was slow on water and coffee refills. The waffles tasted a bit sour and soggy. Davids eggs were over medium and they were easy. It was soggy but not greasy spoon.

Missed the bartenders, the wings, the crabs...the happy hour specials :) (which btw last til closing not just 2 measly hrs!) only disappointment today was our loaded fries, they just weren't the same...but the wings and crab were good :) and of course bartenders and waitress were great wings + crabs + fries + blue moon = $8 per person :)
We were there March 10, 14 and food was tasty, but a little pricy and food was not very hot so somewhat disappointed. We will probably not go there again.

This is my go to place. Ladies are great. They do a good job. I get my legs waxed here too. There's always great movies playing on the tv. Never had an issue with nails lifting. Shellac pedicures lasts for ages!!
Awesome choice of beers and great service! My new favorite hangout place. Good atmosphere compared to others.

I found it to be kind of gross. The drink was very good...I ordered a Hurricane. My teenage boys love the ambiance and orange camel toe....I had the buffalo chicken salad and immediately started sweating profusely after eating. Then...had to make emergency runs to the bathroom at King of Prussia Mall. It was expensive and not that great. Meh...
Super fun, super loud eclectic live music. Many places on Broadway to stop and listen, but on both a Thursday and Friday night this place was wildly enjoyable.

Every time I come here my experience always change the cooks all cook different there is only one cook I would only let prepare my meal this particular time the service was horrible I come here a lot an they will no longer have anymore of my services I'm not hard to please customer service is a must.
Store just opened for day and the two lady's working behind the counter are very rude. Can you imagine how they will be for the rest of the day
Food is okay. Prices are reasonable. Sangria is delicious. The tequila coffee dessert drink seamed incredible but the sangria may be responsible for an extra star. Get the sangria!
Got delivery from here. The mango and sticky rice makes it worth it. I see other reviews about quick delivery, but mine was about 1.5 hours.

Lots of facilities. However, far too expensive for individual membership. Staff does little to help in gym, members camp out on 5 machines simultaneously to create their own "circuit" blocking out all machines till they finish, camp out on a single machine for 10-15 minutes web surfing, whirlpool is frequently dirty with mold on edges. Management isnt paying attention

Beautiful neighborhood bakery with a delicious offering of baked goods and breads. Probably one of the most buttery, luscious, perfectly filled Almond croissants to ever cross my lips. So good I forgot to take a photo before we dug in. Everything we had was immensely delectable and we will be back!

This is an awesome restaurant! Great music and the levels are just right. The music is clear and loud enough to hear to enjoy but also not so loud that you can't talk to people at the table. I really like the design of the place and the staff is friendly. I can't wait to go back!

I and my friend throughly enjoyed our experience here. Fresh warm bread, delicious steaks, and good service. The wines we had were nice as well. The parking situation is a bit odd/a bit of a hike from the restaurant, but we made do.

Old mill is my favorite restaurant in the area. Food is amazing staff is excellent and gracious.the atmosphere is romantic and also comfortable for families.I love sitting on second floor where I can watch the kitchen.eggplant lasagna is my favorite entree and I always look forward to their amazing homemade desserts.
I found this place on Yelp and have been popping in for Cubans once or twice a month since. It's a killer sandwich. Do it!

Iv'e never been to a Taco Bell that has the drive thru closed on Sun night-Mon morning (about 1am). If anything the inside should be closed right? Oh and this location almost always has a broken freeze machine. One time when I did get my freeze, it had a weird chemical taste to it. Yikes!
Heaven on earth! My family and I have been coming for years! Love that the business was passed down to the daughter, wonderful family! Chicago loves the Mint Fox
Pat's will do. Good press to keep the tourists going so long lines aren't a problem at the real fantastic cheesesteak spots!
Food is Ok, pricy. I ordered Fish tacos and I was very disappointed! There was barely any fish and the slaw looked really sad. Cheese dip is tasty. Nice decor in Brentwood
I loved the ambience, but found the food disappointing. Cool place, so I'll try it again in the hope that it's improved.

I love this dental office. They are always professional...always timely...always take time to offer alternative care without being pushy. My fiancé goes to the other Brentwood office and has experienced similar care. This is our favorite dentists in the Nashville office for both of us.
Went to CineBistro for an event. Excellent food, great staff & the theatre was very clean! Will definitely return. Highly recommend for a great evening out!

Enjoyed brunch and tea while we talked and relaxed. I love the wall of teas to take out take home. I always end up finding a new one to taste in a cup and take home to enjoy. Come in if you are a tea lover or simply tea-curious.

This place is clean, but the menu misrepresents the food. My wife had a SoBro burger with no beef. I had Nashville Hot Chicken biscuits and all it was was Tyson chicken tenders with cayenne peppers sprinkled on. My sweet potato fries were cold. Two tiny biscuits for $11.

The wings are good, unfortunately both times management failed PR. He offered everyone complimentary drinks except me during a prolonged delay, last time the Parmesan cheese was missed and when I returned no consideration other than a sorry.
Great service, bartender was very helpful. Crab cakes were a perfect combination with fried shrimp.

Nice parking although it's 38$ per day. Room was fairly clean and just ok but for over 200$ per nite felt cheesy. Bathroom was tiny. Oh and it was a little uncomfortable hearing the conversations of patrons in both of our adjoining rooms bc the walls were so thin or lacked any sound proofing.
Stopped in for an afternoon latte. I was impressed that they had gingerbread syrup, but the latte was just ok.
Went here for dinner a few months ago and had a great time. I got the fired chicken and waffles and loved it

Not sure who hates their life more, Bill Cosby, or the workers at this bar. Each request was greeted with an eye roll, not once did I receive a "you're welcome" or anything of the sorts. Very frustrating.
Eating here is like rolling a dice if the line doesn't detour you the slow and unenthusiastic staff members will. Better off going to then other location in Willingboro on Route 130

Homemade breads and pastries so delicious. I order the almond chocholate dipped crescent moon but can't finish one.. Cause I don't want it to end onr of my first Germany bakery visits when I moved down here to the bay area.
Location is great. The price is too much. $4 for a small waffle cone. The ice cream was not good at all, I've tasted better ones.

The sushi is really good. I always get cooked sushis. Lunch prices are better. Lot of sushi for a good price. Gyoza/dumpling is really tasty as well. Lo mein is ok. Nothing special. Our second time is here, and will come back again for gyozas and sushi. Clean restaurant, friendly staff

Great local Greek restaurant, came b/c saw belly dancer would be present. I'm sure it gets more festive as the night draws on. Great sangrias. Ordered the chick kabobs and fries. Good for the price, the flaming saganaki is a pass. Basically grilled cheese lol

I love getting to go to this festival and try new foods and watch performances, but the actual festival could use some works. The booths/lines aren't organized well and I'm curious how it's been going on this long without anyone addressing those issues.
No communication for 2+ weeks after making an order, turns out item was on backorder, another 10+ days to process a refund - never order from this company.

We had lobster tail and clam chowder...super yummy! I would rate the food 5 out of 5 I have a 4 based off of a super awkward server that made both my fiancé and I feel very uncomfortable. Otherwise it was stellar! Food was fast and amazing!!!

This practice is unprofessional, rude and unaccommodating. I've brought my son here for several years but I refuse to give them another dime. I am actively looking for another pediatric practice, one with high-quality care and professionalism.
Great food, service, and atmosphere! Drinks were amazing too! Only downside is that our parking validation didn't work for our whole party. But other than that I highly recommend. Maybe just Uber
Not bad typical applebees they're open late food is good servers are friendly the toilet smell is an occasional issue its hit or miss...

I am writing this review as we are waiting for our food. It's been an hour since we walk in. There are people who got here before us and still waiting for their food. How long does it take to fix eggs and pancakes?
Ordered the nachos and every third chip tasted like a spoon full of salt, server got my sons order wrong. Just an all around poor dining experience.

We originally used this company when it was Placer Appliance Repair and Kenny was alive. Kenny was amazing but passed away around 2 years ago. I have not used the company since the new people took it over and that's why I've give. It 3 stars.
Always fresh and fast! Ten minutes for every order. This family run business is great. Fast, fresh and friendly.....definately a great place to get your chinese grub on!

AVOID! Dr.J isn't there any more. The new operation is all about overcharging you for services. I had to pay out of pocket for a cleaning. I had to pay out of pocket for x-rays. I've never had to do either in over 8 years with the same insurance.
Thanks for your concern kim, but we are very happy with our camry that we got at conicelli. I hope Ted is happy with his sales this year.

I went to this place couple weeks ago for brunch. The service and the atmosphere just like any other buffet.. nothing special. The food.. also just like any other buffet same variety Chinese food / sushi.. They are ok, couldn't expect anything from $10 all you can eat buffet... You got what you pay for :)
Excellent quick service on our single axle trailer. Flexible with drop off and pickup and had it done by the date we requested. Fair price as well.

Champagne for lunch?? Yes, please! This restaurant reminds me of everything I love in Paris. The service was great and our waitress was very helpful and attentive. We sat on the patio and I recommend doing this if it's available. My salad was delicious and the savory chicken crepe was great also. We will definitely return here!
It's sad that this place has good atmosphere and great food. But the staff is slow and unconcerned about their customers.

In the area and looking for a lunch spot. Not many choices. Found Bowld to be a dirty little nondescript strip mall eatery. Green chili bowl was alright, but generally underwhelming after reading other comments. Service was good and cheery. First and last trip here for me.
We had the salad and two of the quiche of the day. All bland. Quiche dry and flavorless. Coffee is so so. The gazpacho was good. Service was ok. Not too attentive. Casual.
We were there early for dinner so there was no wait for a table or anything. The service was over the top and the food was great. We all had a great time.

I didn't like my experience at all ,rude people Don't get order right didn't want to fix it just want your money all young employees don't care bad attitudes food sub par management not available for help or explanation gross management never going back and will advise people not to go to fire house subs unacceptable
This party city isn't the best if you have the time I would recommend going to the Pottstown store

Hate and obscene messages abound at Columbus flea market. Giant flags with the F-word. Don't bring your kids or you will have to explain why grown adults act so childish. Management does nothing to remove these signs. Makes you wonder.

Great place for cheap drinks and fairly decent food. I know media tends to be pretty trendy and I would describe this as a "delco" bar. Those who are local know what I mean. That being said, they let you stack drinks at the end of happy hour and it saves some cash. Great place for endibg your night.

I was craving tiramisu one night and came here because it was one of the few restaurants open late. I ended up getting soup and tiramisu. The soup was decent, the tiramisu was ok, both were overpriced. The decor is very nice and romantic and service was decent. I wouldn't come back again just because there are better Italian restaurants in Philly.

Stop #6 aka 'A place to crash in SB other than a cardboard box'.... Negative: No A/C, bouncy beds, super-thin walls, dirty rooms, stains on the carpet, I felt like I was staying at the Sahara in LV. Positive: Raided the free continental breakfast at 7am, room prices were cheap for a holiday weekend ($120), decent location, it beats a cardboard box.. just barely.
Straight up dim sum. We only waited ten minutes to be seated. Everything was tasty, no fluff just good food.
Apparently this McDonalds only stays open until 10:50. Don't bother coming here close to closing time.
I really dislike potbellys. They don't have a large menu. My sandwich was small and I satisfying. I went once and will not be returning.

Only tofu house in Nashville. Rather shady part of town but it's all right. The ban chan is decent and refilled frequently. The tofu with pork and kimchi is spicy and ok flavor however there is too much tofu and not enough soup or meat. Service is good

The pastries always look much better than they taste. A recent purchase of their tiramisu cannoli tasted a bit sour. We have tried Cosmis multiple times, usually as a matter of convenience and have never been blown away. The service is cordial at best. There are much better bakeries in South Philly.

I was at the restaurant in Reno, me and my fiance ordered a BBQ chicken pizza and the Cajun Pasta. It was amazing! Server totally knocked it out of the park. I recommend this location to anymore, best spot in Reno for a nice pizza!

I love this place. Food is great... when you can get it. I was looking forward to feta sticks and the pita platter with spicy feta... both of which are out of stock. This isn't the first time. My recommendation would be to monitor your stock more closely and order when you're running low. Extremely disappointing.

If I could give them zero stars I would I waited three hours and 40 minutes and they still didn't show up after multiple calls to nationwide for roadside assistance they finally agreed to call another company to assist me. They never called they never even answered my call they actually hung up on me once totally disrespectful and totally unacceptable
Being from Jersey, it's hard to find great pizza outside of the Tri-State area, but Pizza Consegna did it. Yum!

This place wonderful! The best ice cream I've had in a long time. I had the Rocky Road. It was rich, creamy, not too sweet, with chucks of white chocolate chips and walnuts...so delicious! I'm going back to try a different favor!
Ever since this place was remodeled around a year ago, it is completely changed. It has a European feel to it. The food is fantastic and the wine selection great. Great breakfast as well.

The Shrimp & Grits was delicious and I'm generally not a fan of grits. The banana pudding looked like nothing like your typical banana pudding and was also delicious. Sat at the bar and service was friendly and fast. Highly recommend the place.

We ordered from here in January for a group of about 13 people. We enjoyed everything especially the burnt ends. The chicken was a bit small but good. We ordered for the second time yesterday, a pound of burnt ends and mac and cheese. The ends were just big chunks of brisket. nothing burnt about them. Not worth the $25!

I have to give this florist 4 stars ! Would have been five but we received communication that the arrangement was already delivered, but it wasn't , anyway the arrangements were beyond expectations a beautiful center piece - from my daughter and son

This place is amazing! We get all of our olive oils here and some vinegars as well. The selection is outstanding. You can sample everything. The owner was extremely helpful and offered suggestions for both cooking and paring different items together to achieve a certain flavor. The garlic olive oil is one of our favorites, and the strawberry balsamic vinegar is amazing on salads.

Barbara is the best stylist and colorist in the city, hands down. Aside from being a master of her craft, she is one of the sweetest women you will ever meet. I would recommend anyone to her. Her assistant Nicole is equally as good. I have been going to them both since they were over at the Bellevue. I would follow them anywhere. Bravo!!

Disappointing. Literally the worst service I've ever had. Not only did they not refill drinks, walker by 3xs with the water and didn't stop. It took over 30 minutes to get our check. I have never had an experience where the waiter completely ignored our table. Not recommended. Go to Pias.

Same complaint I'm currently stuck in the drive thru been waiting for about an hour and it's too late for me to pop the curve and leave. But this is not okay. Get your sh*t together. I should have just gotten Taco Bell, but my need for variety got me to pull in. The wait will never have me coming back.

Omg this is by far one of my favorite pizza. So good! there pizza store is located in mt. Holly. I tried 3 flavors already been going there on Friday's when I had college. Awesome taste to their pizza (even the aftertaste). I would totally recommend.

Bad service , worst bartenders , meh food . worst place to go on fridays and saturdays (good luck getting service) . T G I Friday's [which happens to be across the street] is an alternative . I will not recommend this place .
I honestly like dollar tree better. The selection in five below was not that good I jus thought it kinda sucked. Maybe I wasn't looking for the right stuff but did not impress me.
Even for an IMOs and a college area restaurant this is a very loud shouting. If you want your food right and a quite place to eat try anywhere else!
Great food! Great atmosphere! Live jazz!! A real brilliant gem of a place. A must when in NOLA!

Short and simple- I've come here all my life. The donuts are amazing and that give them the 2 stars. Everyone is rude, they have messed up my order several times before, and I never have a good experience. Just go to the wawa.

The place is a hole-in-the-wall. If you are squeemish about seeing a dirty kitchen, phone in your order from home. Good donairs, good pizza and great spring rolls, made in house and full of tasty pork. I have had Roadrunner several times over the last decade or so, and while it hasnt ever been the best take out, I've never had a bad experience.

Don't go here for the wines. You can get much better wine for the same price elsewhere. The food was decent which is why it earns 2 stars. The waitress was pleasant but couldn't answer basic questions about the limited wine selection and had trouble uncorking the bottle, If you call yourself a winery - you need to have better wine.

Delivery time was shorter than I anticipated. However, I ordered medium spicy General Tso Chicken Combo platter. I swear this tasted like sweet and sour chicken, no spice whatsoever.The color wasn't even like that General Tso Chicken. I would've asked for a refund if I hadn't been so hungry. It didn't taste bad, just wasn't what I ordered.

I feel like I just got unlucky, but my cheese pizza was very undercooked. This pizza was all dough in the middle, I imagine because of the copious amount of cheese and thick crust it is difficult to cook all the way through. I'll probably give it another try, but it was disappointing. Don't forget to ask for the USF discount!

I mean everything is alright. I rather spend money to buy desert at Paris baguette than here. It's pretty expensive for the desert and it wasn't taste that good. The decoration on the cake is pretty .

Two stars because the service was good. However, I ordered a 6 oz. "Victoria filet" and it came out looking mangled and with quite a bit of fat on it. It was $20 and hardly edible... I was able to pick out two small bites, and had to discard about 5 oz. of it.

This place is conveniently located, and our bartender was friendly. I'd just stick with drinks though. The food was pretty uninspired, and there are so many other delicious places to eat in New Orleans. Do your research on Yelp and Trip Advisor and make reservations so you don't end up settling.
Reasonably priced, convenient to downtown and right behind the excellent Jack Cawthon's barbecue. Good for weekend visitors.

Came in for an adjustment, they got me right in, within 10 mins. Knowledgeable staff and very friendly. Great introductory rate. They tried to get me to sign up for monthly contract, I chose not to do that, but if you were to come back often, it would save you a lot of money! Thanks for relieving my pain!
good food, big portions, good prices, and friendly faces. lovely place for a quick bite to eat!

Went for the Halloween family night. Our first experience volunteering with the food bank. Me and my three kids ages 8-13...loved that it was located in a well lit area and inside the facility was extremely organized and clean. Makes you feel like what you're doing is really making a difference. We will def be back to volunteer more. Love the causes they champion.
Use to love this place... but it's changed. Good food, terrible service. Borderline rude
An unusual local bar with lots of character, a decent menu of standard American choices and plenty of beer choices. Good for lunch.
Worst place ever don't go !! Horrible low grade staff, slow service, horrible trashy people
Best burger in St. Louis! The fried pickles are awesome as well. Matt is the best bartender.
I'm five minutes away and it took 30 minutes to get my sandwich. I could have walked and I called back to see what's taking so long and the young man answered the phone clueless.
This was my go to place . Great good and great staff but they took the chili chicken off the lunch buffet which is highly disappointing.
The Calamari appetizer it's one of the best I have tasted and the coconut rice is really good too. They had a live band playing Jazz music and the service was pretty fast too.

Just had the worst service at the parts counter! They have the rudest woman working there, she has to be related or the owner for them to keep her. She has a condescending attitude & just rude!!! Not helpful or willing to look up a part so I could buy it! Wow, you just lost a JD customer.
It's not that I'm too picky but they can't even make a roll. When I picked it up, the rice dropped everywhere... I mean...
Highly recommend Jessica and the great work she does. She listens and has great skills: what more can you ask for? Always happy when I leave.

STOP . Overpriced. Go there and check out what you want but then GO online and you'll find it for half the price. LITERALLY!!! They sold me a pocket scale for $35 and online "same one" was $14. Save yourself tons of money. Or while there, do a price comparison, you'll be SHOCKED!!! If you don't believe me, TRY IT.

Payments require cash or check - cards accepted through their website for a fee. Each month I'm forced to take time out of my day to deliver payment in-person. We're living in the twenty-first century - why doesn't SWBNO offer a paperless option? Truly backwards. Let's not forget about those "boil water events."
Had a lovely experience there. Patti is one of a kind and her store has beautiful things. You cannot beat the level of attentiveness and customer service thats provided there.

When you need crawfish but it's not crawfish season, come here. According to their staff they fly in live farmed crawfish from California in the off season, so it's there for an option. Get the blended flavoring, it's tasty!

They don't deserve black customers. I was followed the entire time and made uncomfortable. I am not ghetto an I dress well by the way. Go to Hafiz Hair Store black owned with amazing service. Put money back into our community since the asians want our money, but don't treat us right.
best dive bar in town, cheap drinks, get there early it gets packed!

We always have good experience there. However, no employees was wearing face coverings after all the restaurants were allowed to open at 25% capacity. I felt a little uncomfortable. Probably will not go back any time soon. Not until there is a COVID vaccine since the employees do not wear masks.

The food was horrible. That's not Asian food at all. It's an Americanize attempt of Asian food. The ramen didn't have broth with it and it was greasy. The orange chicken was gross. The veggies was still cold. It was my first and last time going to Pei Wei.

The food is pretty tasty, but the fact that they add a 15% gratuity to every check is a bit excessive. I usually have the same server, and while he's nice, he wasn't excellent. Overall, it's a decent place to go to if you're not expecting too much.

Yes, their margaritas are good - strong, nice sweet and sour balance, inexpensive. Good guacamole, love their cheese enchiladas! Tres leches cake and fried ice cream are nice for dessert too. Service is really hit or miss, but everyone is always happy and smiling!
Food was not very good. Pork chop was raw and you couldn't even chew it . Atmosphere was nice and people who worked there were nice

I've recently realized that this is actually the worst Taco Bell you'll find value-wise. Their Value-Menu is limited and much smaller than other Taco Bells, and I'm not even sure if they have the $2 meal specials going currently at other Taco Bells. If you want to head for the border, go far away from this one to another Taco Bell in your area.

Mediocre at best. Over priced for what they offer. Hostesses are like dead fish. You can go out and get way better food for a couple of bucks more and not have to deal with the whole lower clientele bs.
Always wished about purchasing a 911; they are quite obliging about allowing test drives and "talking cars"

Aggressive staff. From management down, this place is not worth your money. There are too many pizza places for you to choose from to deal with these people that do not deserve whatever they are being paid. I hope this place closes down soon. Who needs another bad pizza joint?

This place has a huge employee and manager problem. There were employees up front who weren't caring to work just lazing around. The manager was trying to expedite orders but was obvious he was not real familiar with how things should work ley alone have the ability to take control and make his employees work
All I have to say is they even have live music in the airport!! Welcome to Nashville!
Patties were over cooked! Left my cheese off! Not worth the wait. Fries were okay. But just not like I remember from when the chain first came on the scene. Patties are small and hard.

Worth the price. With so many gyms competing to have the lowest prices they are missing the quality that healthplex holds. Every different option of class, great staff, always clean and a positive environment to work out in!

A little mixup when seating us in the bar since the table wasn't cleaned yet and the menus under the table were never removed. The waiter was great and remembered all four orders without missing a thing. The food was good and cooked to our request.
The pizza here is always delicious, chicken scallopini, and the mama Palma special are amazing, and who knew polenta could be so good. I love this place and the homey atmosphere.

Ordered 2 chicken sandwiches. The first bite was weird. I noticed a couple bones. Second bite I spit out and realized they put bone in chicken breasts that you would get from a bucket in between the bun. Very easily could have choked. Worst I've ever had an order from any chain like this.

Ordered a black bean chalupa box.... Ans there's hardly no filling! There's like 3 pieces of lettuce ... like 2 tomato cubes. Total trash. I also ordered onions on it and there are none... and the beans don't even fill it all the way. To make it worse... the shell was soggy. Pure trash. For a new location they're already a dump.

Love this hotel and staff! Have clients that I host here a couple of times a year and we will continue to stay at the Conrad because myself and my guests feel extremely special and taken care of at this establishment and the location is hard to beat! Love the amenities and decor as well.

I recently found Lilian Tran after 2 years of looking for a great nail tech, shes awesome, i come from carson just to see her every 2-3 weeks. I've brought guests along too and they are always happy w the outcome.being a server I like to keep up on my pedis, shes really does the best job in town, and is so sweet.
Awful service. First of all it was empty but they made us wait to seat us. And then the waitress was super slow and got confused with our orders. She didnt even apologize

Slowest service ever! But maybe I came at mid night... it took 10 mins for the waiter to come get our order and waited 30 mins for our food. If you're really hungry at night, don't expect ur food to come any sooner than later.
Excellent breakfast place! These corn tortillas were so crispy they crunched in your mouth till the last bite. The service was fast and pleasant. Highly recommend this place.

We went for lunch, and the asparagus salad and house cured grilled ham were standouts. The speck and egg pizza (which we got topped with black truffle) was also very satisfying with its airy breadlike crust. The portion on the cappelletti was tiny, and the bucatini cacio e pepe benefitted from more pepper and could have been more al dente.

So disgusting. These are photos of my salad that had dirt and a bug in it. These photos are from the second make of the salad when I complained there was dirt the first time. They drowned it in water without any real washing of the leaves. Never eating there again.

Very good steak tacos! Reminded me of some Mexican taco's with authentic spices that I once had in California. Service is not the greatest as they could use another waiter during lunch hours but it wouldn't stop me from eating here again.

After watching this come go around my neighbor hood today I have to say I'm not impressed . Door to door scare tactics and the fact that they don't respect people homes enough to mail out a respectable flyer I would not recommend service with them .

My barber recently changed to this facility to where I can set up appointments which makes thinks a lot easier for my schedule. Ask for Marcus if you ever stop, he does a great job and you'll definitely come back after he cuts your hair especially cuz he'll actually take the time to make sure it's a good job!

This is a favorite for most people but I can never find a healthy option here. I have ordered various salads but they haven't hit the spot. Not the place to go when you are dieting. Lots of comfort food.
Seems to have all the books I could possibly need. They sell starbucks brand coffee and cheesecake factory desserts in their cafe. Yum

Food here was fine. That's about all I can say. Prices are reasonable and you get good portion sizes for the platters, but taste didn't really stand out to me. I didn't try the paneer masala roll, however, so maybe I'll need to revisit.
I waited 45 minutes to have a seat. Place is overrated under employed and has tasteless food. I took my guests there and I will not go back
Great margaritas! Very good service always. Wonderful menu. This restaurant has been a favourite for over 15 years!
Just finished a fabulous lunch from this place. Had a nova lox bagel was great . Not able to eat inside so took it home. Staff and service really nice. Got to do this more often.

I still can't believe in this day and age Hotels still use tube TVs. Rooms are spacious, clean. There was an ironing board but no iron. Called front desk to have them send me one up, it took two repeated calls. Beds were not bad. The waffle maker was broken. Breakfast was meh. Next time I'll spend extra for Hilton or sheraton.
Been frequenting this place for years. It is a generally good store with mostly friendly staff. Can't say much for the owner/management and their business practices though.
This place is such a joke. Apparently they only take blue cross insurance and won't let you pay out of pocket. Found this out after arriving for my appointment. Such a waste of time.

What an incredible experience. First and foremost the customer service was impeccable. Brian, our waiter was active , gave good recommendations , and promptly answered requests with attention to detail. The view from the top balcony was pristine. The food was fantastic , cooked well and was full of flavor. Overall 10/10, especially for only being open for 1 week.
This is an Awesome diner !!! Food is good, price is good and they give you so much food !!! It's clean, organized and well managed. Service was seemless and friendly. Big Fan for sure !!
Wait time is ridiculous good doctors but up front Dess scheduling and nurses service is bad habit here for many years and no matter what staff is hired they still can't get the scheduling together
Nothing I had really stood out to me. Def over rated. Interior is cute. Bathroom was disgusting. Service was slow

Their delivery driver laid on the horn when I took too long at a stop sign.. then proceeded to give me the finger and exhibit road rage toward me when i tried to get their phone number off the side of the delivery van. Probably the owner of this cut rate dump.
Great place and great people. They haven't missed a beat during the Covid crisis. Love their coffee!
The guy I saw is not passionate about doing his job. Very careless. Will never go here again.

Great breakfast. I love the standard bacon, eggs, Cajun potatoes--tasty with a bit of zing. Huge dropped biscuits. Coffee that wakes up up--what more do you want? Ah yeah--reasonable prices. And friendly service. Certainly true here

Absolute garbage. You want horrible service then come here. Not a hello welcome or anything. Went to sit outside, employee came to close the door behind us. First time to the area, I'll make sure to tell others to not check this place out. Awful.

Pipeline helped us with the transportation needs for our daughter's wedding. They did a great job! They were prompt with clean vehicles at a reasonable price. I would highly recommend Pipeline for your transportation needs.

Open late, even on week days. Delivers late. I was starving and craving pizza. Ordered a veggie. It was ready for pickup fast, the service was friendly. Wasn't the best pizza I've had and it wasn't the worst. Would have made another choice if something else was open.

If you want a clean cozy spot to curl up and enjoy your favorite coffee, look no further. Caribou's is a well-known spot on IUPUI's campus that serves perfect coffee. The staff at caribou's is never short of delightful. One of my favorite quick stops for certain!

My best friend and I were excited by the other reviews we read, but were pretty disappointed. Neither her pedicure or my gel- mani were what I would call inexpensive. The prices were average at best. My gel mani started chipping and cracking within a few days. Was not pleased with the product or price.
Awesome food and service ....just treated our office to happy hour I will definitely patron with family and clients in the future!
Excellent choice of IPAs today -- thanks gang! It was pleasant sitting outside today in your patio, now that Reno has fresh air again. Will return soon!
Dr Novak is at Ludwigs animal hospital. Will visit soon They don't care for exotics but my dogs will see him soon
This is the closest dive bar to Columbia Village i love the vibe and screened in patio....east boise has the best views.....this place is something to crow about thanks Ben

After tasting the deliciousness of similar macaroni-centered restaurants across the country, I was a little disappointed in the quality of even their original Mac n cheese. While their creative flavor combinations are a plus, they are no substitute for a quality base.

We had a really good meal. No complaints at all. This place gets busy but service was excellent. Our waiter was very knowledgeable and gave us some good recommendations. The Moscow Mule drink he suggested was great. We will return.

I have loved Lions Choice for decades but the service at this location has gone down hill quickly over the last year. If you want pay for food you don't get in your bag in the drive thru and if you enjoy watery drink because the drink machine isn't maintained appropriately - this is your place! I would avoid this location!
Very good cocktails, fun good-looking crowd and amazing food when you want to pay the money.
Went here using a Groupon. Had some interesting eats, I will admit. Enjoyed the cut of the fries and the Guiness bread pudding was delish!

Super slow waited 30 min to get my food after my table mates got theirs. Old lady working hardly actually cleaned the tables just spritzed it and wiped half it off no more effort than that. Food was good tho
The food is amazing but please people the cashiers have absolutely no customer service skills please work with your staff to smile a little my food is not free so all I ask is great customer service.
Really cool unique spot. Amazing gourmet dogs, nice bar, solid draft list, a pool table and baggo/corn hole for entertainment. Hope this place does well.

I great place for Sunday brunch especially with bogo drinks. It's your typical M street restaurant and this is their take on an American pub. The food offerings are generally swanky offerings of your average bar food or on Sunday brunch foods. I wouldn't come here with the bros, but it is a good win win for a meal with girls.

Not many vegan options for a Mediterranean restaurant. However, substitutions/removals can be made so you won't go hungry - thought not as tasty. Won't be coming back any time soon. Not hard to have tasty vegan options on the menu if you're a Mediterranean restaurant.
A total waste of time. The Lantern was great. This place is not worth the trip over to Columbia. Food is lousy; service is lousy.
I did a gel manicure and it was really thick and started lifting 3 days later. It was so disappointing.

I tried three cheesesteaks side by side. Geno's, Pat's, and Jim's. All three were good. Pat's had good flavor. Amount of cheese was on the lighter side. Not my top choice but a solid choice nonetheless. See my reviews on the other two.

Seriously? it's a sad state of affairs when other yelpers comment that "it's a post office----- what were you expecting? fast, friendly, 5 star service?" EVERY time i've gone there it's been because Ive had the dreaded pink "we only try one time to deliver a package" slip. Oh! and dont try to verbalize frustration. They will only move more slowly.

Best food, hands down, that all of our party ate our entire time in Nashville. From the apps to the desserts, none of us could stop talking about how everything was so delicious. I'd come back to Nashville just to eat here!

I had the chicken chimi and the chicken tasted like it came from a can. My friend ordered guacamole. She said it tasted store bought. Giving 2 stars only because their salsa is delicious. Very expensive for what you get. Chimi with nothing else $8. Will not be back. Good salsa is not worth going back for.
Decent and affordable wine pairing during the dinning week. However I got very very sick a few hours after the tuna tartare and spent the rest of the night in bed feeling nauseous and weak.
I guess I understand why some people like this but it just doesn't cut it for me. Take your grandparents when they're in town. They'll love it.
Love the crested chicken Parmesan. Service is hot or miss but atmosphere is good for dates for two or larger parties.

Waitress is an idiot. Never in my life have I argued with a middle age woman about something as dumb as "are you sure you order food"? Wasted time, money, and did not even get everything I ordered. It's really sad when Taco Bell does a better job serving food.
Good food, costumer service is trash. Bad vibes here. I'd rather drive an extra 3 miles for BK's Tacos.
Was extremely rude, found a piece of PLASTIC in my food we told the server and they ignored us.
Best sports bar in South Philly! Couldn't get into Xfinity, line wasn't moving, decided to give Philladium a try, blessing in disguise! #winning
I always go here with my friends and the waiters/waitresses sre so nice and the food is always delicious. highly recommend the paradise roll with the fruit on it. SO DELICIOUS!

Unpleasant experience with the owner. The employee was efficient and did her best but when she referred me to the owner for questions about fireplaces, he seemed impatient and said he had no time to answer my questions. Both the employee and I felt awkward. I cancelled the service appointment and will purchase my fireplace somewhere else.
Never had a bad experience until today. They are overpriced and rude. I will never go back there.
Been here twice and I must say the Larry bird sandwich is the way to go ... They make potato chips in house they serve with the sandwiches..

Great Indian buffet, Authentic flavors, often multiple vegetarian options, meats all well prepared & seasoned. Owners are warm & accommodating. Would definitely recommend! Fair pricing, and easy parking too.

Great place. Super helpful sales people for the cigar novice. Nice ambience to hang out with your friends and enjoy some cigars and some BYOB drinks. Total Man-den for those who don't have one in your house. Good ventilation so you don't sit in a cloud of smoke.

Bumping up to 3 stars because my husband ordered himself pizza and fries for dinner tonight and he said both were good this time. Maybe it's just a hit or miss type place. They don't have mozzarella sticks which was weird. The lady who answered the phone was a pretty rude though.
With a few exceptions, good luck finding someone to assist. The store is lacking in staff. Not good. Home Depot, come to Quakertown and show Lowe's how customer service is done.
The most amazing red velvet pancakes! And their delicious and fluffy frosting.... The breakfast burrito is very good and very filling too. I'll definitely go back for my next trip to Santa Barbara.

WOW! Great beer. I had four different beers and they were all fantastic. This is a good example of how you don't need a heavy stout or ultra-bitter IPA to enjoy a great beer. Food was excellent. I had the tilapia. Fresh flavor, not too heavy on the cream sauce. Service was excellent. Had dinner at the bar, my glass was never empty.

$10 for salads and it literally was a breast of grilled chicken on a TON of lettuce. Barely any cheese at all, or anything else for that matter. Never ever going here again. I have given this place way too many chances.

I was looking forward to going here but I felt a little disappointed. It feels like an outdated museum. There is alot of reading to see what the specimens are and alot of the tags are too small and hard to read. We went on a Saturday, and with the crowd of people, getting close to the glass was hard.

Numerous attempts to get an appointment set up. No response and multiple calls never returned. The worst in customer service I have seen. Stay away because they are a complete waste of time and energy.
The Cuban sandwich was awful. It only had chicken in it and none of the normal ingredients, like pickles. The worse part though, was the microwaved bread. It was cardboard an inedible.

Clean. Lukewarm at best shower, and that was at 430 am so not because too many people at once. Threadbare thin towels. Not very comfy bed. Gap in door let hall noises into room only partially hidden by African Queen thrumming of the refrigerator.

We had been to the restaurant for dinner and had an excellent experience. Recently, we decided to try their brunch and the experience was antithetical. The service was extremely poor. When our eggs Benedict arrived an hour later they were cold. To their credit management comped the meal.
This place is not a restaurant anymore...they only do catering
Innovative dishes, eclectic menu, always a dining experience. This is the place to bring your foodie friends! Incredible food without the pretentious ambience.
The only pizza I specifically crave. There will be times I crave pizza in general, but then there are times when only this will hit the spot. Love it!

Cons: Creepy dolls behind glass that may haunt your dreams Rushed unfriendly service that will have you clutching your half-full beer as they breeze by. Pros: on Wednesdays... 2 dollar 16oz bud bottles Delicious 25 cent fried pierogies. 9 pierogies and a bud please. I'll take the nightmares to go.

In love with the Vietnamese hoagies there. I usually order the chargrilled, tofu, or the roast pork hoagie. They are all cheap, delicious, and very filling. You can call in and place your order for pick- up. It's also a mini market so you can buy other things like drinks and snacks while you're waiting for your food.
For a non vegan eater I give 4 stars. The seaweed salad was especially delicious. The garlic vinegar dressing made it. I recommend the summer rolls as well. Nice environment and friendly service.

A picturesque promenade right next to the Mighty Mississippi. Lots of benches, good people watching, the only thing that would make it better is something to eat and drink. You can even watch the steamboats on the river and the ferry leave from the adjacent pier.

I really wanted to like the food here as the menu looked really appealing but the homemade checking fingers were lacking the... chicken, the spring rolls sort of tasted like they were from Costco and the fries were soggy oily. Maybe just stick with the counter pizza I'm guessing? Probably won't go back.

Storage is not inexpensive. You look for access, security, lighting, and cleanliness. This place provides good marks in all of these categories. Nothing against this business or any real complaints but it is difficult to go beyond three stars for a storage room.
Duke energy of north Pinellas has awful service with regular power bumps and outages. Ridiculous and their services are not cheap.
Horrible, they did a half ass job of vacuuming the inside. I came home and did the inside. DON'T WASTE YOUR MONEY.
Not a good Chinese restaurant. Won't go back. Food was not very fresh looking, many empty trays on the Buffet line. Lacking a variety

This food was the best meal I have bought since moving to Tampa a year and a half ago. If you want some truly amazing and yummy ramen get it here! The pork was delicious the chicken was amazing the soy egg was melt in your mouth good. I would 100% recommend the Black Garlic addition to your ramen.
The guy behind the register is nice enough. The barista making the coffee, not so much. Was not a pleasant experience. Fortunately, there are other locations. I'll try the 5 extra minutes next time.
Food is great, the wait staff is very friendly. The service is good, it is a little slow at the tables and very slow at the bar.

Front desk was nice ... Definitely a hang out spot for addicts smh. There were people banging on the door next to my room which woke me up multiple times smh I just wanted to sleep. I tried to call.the front desk and there was technical difficulties lol.
I'm disappointed that I was told I would receive 20% off and was never credited. My girlfriend and I paid $114 for 2 pedicures without tip. The service was good besides the price.

Why are you reading this--get in there! We loved everything! Cocktails--yum! Oysters--perfect! Fish sandwiches, fish tacos, burgers--amazing. We tried all the desserts and they were fantastic! Don't miss the Apple pie with cinnamon ice cream! Robert was our server and he loves this place too.

Snow bird dumplings might be worth the visit, everything else was basic and nothing that made me too over the edge excited. The curry was standard and almost lacking that deep rich flavor in most curry dishes. The price is a bit high for what you are getting. Pad Thai is good but nothing to rave about.

If you ever want to use a temporary hiring agency, please don't go here. They are big time lairs. Their employees have a hard time getting paid. It's always one excuse after another. Robin doesn't give a care as to what happens to the employees as long as she gets her paycheck on time.
I found the nachos incredibly disappointing. The service also wasn't the greatest. Just not a fan of paying $12+ for chips with melted store cheese on them and not much else...

I'll keep it short. Food: it was ok. Not bad not the best. Place: small, gets crowded and stays crowded. Service: kinda slow. They need to hire more people to help. Price: reasonable It's CASH ONLY BUT has an ATM inside with a ATM fee of $3.00

This was recommended as the best burger around. Unfortunately, we didn't think so. It was average. The loaded fries were the highlight of the meal. The service was slow for the time of day and number of people in the restaurant.

What a crapshoot... They STALK you around the store until you buy something and then when you finally do, they cant even get it to you. Our couch is 3 weeks late and NOW they are saying its on backorder until next month. I think I'll go to Macy's... or anywhere else for that matter. Idiots.

Cute little diner, clean . However the food was horrible. Pancakes we dense with no flavor also came out cold. Butter tastes stale and old like it had been sitting unopened in the fridge. Chicken tenders fried and not fully cooked . Sausage not fully cooked . Service wasn't they great either won't be back

The food was cold, and we ordered a steak that was well done when we ordered it medium rare. Instead of recooking a new steak, they just kept cooking the same steak. We had to send it back twice, and when it came the third time, it was barely medium rare. The drinks were fun but the food and service was very lacking.
Average burger joint. Worst honey mustard I've ever had.

Came here and got cocktails and dessert. Their cocktails are amazing! Highly recommend. The desserts are okay... they are from gallery pastry bar. I hear the main food is amazing tho and can't wait to come back and try it.
