Stopped in on a chilly late Saturday afternoon. Nice atmosphere. Place is large but felt warm and cozy. Moderately crowded when we arrived and filled up by the time we finished. Friendly servers. I'll keep it very simple. We enjoyed our dinner and drinks and we'll be back!
Guacamole was fresh and flavorful. Chicken in burrito was dry and scarce. Taco salad was what you'd expect with the typical fried shell but same dried out meat. Will be trying Romi next time!
The veggie Philly cheesesteak was way too spicy for me-no where on the menu did it state it would be. The waitress was not helpful at all.
Saw 2 up armored combat roaches on the stairs but ignored them because I thought the food was gonna be fire.. food was not fire.

I've been a couple times. The drinks are good, the food is delicious, the service is speedy and nice, and the ambiance is lovely. Kind of a hipstery southern food, usual gastropub plus vegan options vibe. I recommend if you're in the neighborhood!
This restaurant is closed permanently. Too bad it was a good outside restaurant. COVID-19 did the restaurant in. It's gone.

This is why MOD Pizza continues to "NOT" be my favorite pizza place. 12 ounce can of wine $7.95. Choice is limited to typical Chardonnay or Rose. I can think of at least 2 better places for tasty thin crust pizza and a good glass of wine in the same price range.
Always awesome. Pam, Doc and the whole crew treat you with such respect. They get to know you and treat you great! Thanks to all.
The food came fast, I hope the botulism doesn't arrive just as quickly. Ya feel me ??
It's not bad for decent food inside a mall. We ordered shrimp po boy $12, it's a bit pricey but the portion was huge with good fresh shrimps.
Our server was lovely, but the kitchen certainly did him a disservice. Our food took entirely too long. However, my steakhouse salad was well worth the wait!

Cozy, friendly, neighborhood cafe. Crepes were okay but not the best we've had, and they weren't very liberal with the crepe fillers. Another downside was getting charged full price for a coffee refill.
The food was good. Very fresh. However as a birthday party guest, extremely disappointed with the service and attitude presented towards my party and I. I would recommend an attitude adjustment.

To be honest I did not like the way my nails came out! I did them last Monday they are chipped, cracked and now have to get a new full set again! The guy who did my nails was nice but I'm not happy with my results!

Well, I can't believe it. I've been suckered. Not only did the the finance screw up my y Ade in adding almost $1000 die to over 30 day late payment. They still haven't completed my registration and plates. They are horrible.

Good food and great service but big hunks if chicken cartilage in my food is not appealing. If they would have just cleaned the chicken properly this food, although not Cajun at all, would gave been totally crave worthy.

Can't believe I haven't reviewed the AMC Elmwood yet. Definitely one of my favorite theatres. Comfy seats, giant screens, an excellent sound system, and pretty much every new release to choose from. I saw a screening of Alita: Battle Angel here a couple weeks back. Fun film, cool event.

A night out in Philly isn't complete without a stop at SOHO Pizza. There's always a line but they move fast and have absolutely delicious Hawaiian and buffalo chicken pizza. The crust is thin and delicious and the slices are HUGE! There's no better way to end a long night at the bars!

Food was really good but the service was horrible ... took 20 minutes to get our drinks and 35 minutes for water to finally get to the table and also never had no silverware till we asked .. it's a shame but won't be back
Oh wow got my delivery order and I order Wings and a Chicken Wrap combo with fries was the worst ever... DELIVERY CHARGE IS 5 BUCKS WTF the wings were fked up sigh.....

This place is great. All vegan. I had the Vge burger as a rice bowl and cream of kale soup. Very tasty. The service is quick and friendly. I liked the fact that the disposable utensils were biodegradable instead of plastic. The decor is warm, but very casual. The food was excellent. Great portions, fresh tasting. I will definitely be back.
When I ordered delivery tonight, it gave me a 35-45 minute delivery time. The pizza arrived 70 minutes later. The pizza was cold and looked terrible.
Dan Was extremely helpful getting me m.y galaxy s4 He worked with my wife while I was in jefforson hospital She said he made the transition from my old phone to the s4 painless
I stopped in when I heard this new location had opened, and they did not disappoint! Wonderful coffee and scones, and a super friendly staff. Definitely coming back soon.

What a great spot. Well lit, open space, welcome atmosphere, great service, and awesome open Mic night. Came to this venue during a visit from SLC and so glad we came here. DELICIOUS HOT COCOA and a yummy NUTELLA LATTE. Would love a place like this in our neighborhood. Will definitely come back the next time we come visit Boise.
alligator and shrimp Gumbo had good taste but.very soupy. Redbeans and rice good.but looked like refried.beans. catfish very good but small portion for the price. Would not go back.

Decided to try as I was in the area. Ordered a 2 meat platter. Pulled pork and Texas Brisket. Pulled pork was juicy, but not much bark or flavor. Brisket was typical Texas brisket. Nothing good or bad to say about it. Mac and cheese was good. Baked beans too. Price is a bit high. Close to 18.00 dollars for plate and soda.

As a 21 year old couple, we were the youngest people there on a Friday night around 10pm. However, I still enjoyed the throwback songs from the DJ once in a while! The service was excellent; however, I wasn't expecting it to be cash only so prepare yourself

Average place. If u r looking for the view - there is none (construction going on directly across the street and u get a view of a giant sand pile). Service average and so is the menu. The dinner menu is kinda pricey, but u were able to also order from the lunch side of the menu.

My absolute favorite place to eat in the Tampa Bay Area. Highly recommend the oysters, clams, fried pickles, peel and eat shrimp, and crab cake dinner. Always make a delicious martini and good beer selection too.

The only good thing about this location is their location. Always bad customer service and negative attitudes. Last visit i waited 10 min for my food (it wasn't even very busy) and my bread was hard and barely wrapped in the paper.
Awesome lamb shank. Great chicken kebob. Small inside perfect for a quiet meal. Cake was delicious.

My colleague and I decided to check out Seasons 52. The decor, atmosphere and staff were pleasant and friendly. Prices were reasonable but the food was mediocre. We had the fish (salmon and trout). Both were over cooked and dry. The sides were okay too. The dessert was the best as they had these small rectangular glasses. Overall, my experience was above average.

I visited her for a simple annual wellness check. I got a bill $450. Time spent with doc is not more than 5 minutes. She asked few questions, checked heart beat and done. That's it. And her front desk staff aid her in this cheating business. Don't ever go there..
We were in from out of town, just walking around downtown, decided to stop in and it wasn't bad but I probably wouldn't go back.
I was impressed. It appears to be a nice store. I just needed to run in there for a few things on my lunch break. Easy in. Easy out. Just like I Love It!!

Fun place for happy hour. Great craft beer selection and good food! Devin took great care our party of 7 even though we were there several hours and were all ordering food and drinks at different times during the evening. Loved the cheese balls and thai chicken flatbread!

I've eaten here a few times and I never disliked what I received but was not blown away either. I would have given them three stars, however, anytime I eat anything raw from here I get sick to my stomach. This only happens when I eat raw sushi from here. I've never gotten sick from seafood of any kind before.

The prices have really gone up since Amazon got involved,plus to get any discounts you have to have the app...and even that's only for Amazon Prime users. Doesn't seem fair. There's a Sprouts store that's opened up in the area, but not too convenient to get to if you're not heading that direction..

I actually would give the rep I spoke to last 10 stars but I need to wait and see if she really was able to fix the colossal problem countless other reps (and a supervisor) created. She really seemed to know what she was doing so my fingers are crossed that I won't have to call again.

You guys really need to add your menu on line for those who want to do pick up! Pictures of your menu are not enough as your sushi menu is not fully represented. Gave my business to another restaurant last night because of this. Make it easy for your customers or they will go elsewhere.

This place is like watching an episode of Kitchen Nightmares live. We came for dinner, but after seeing the chef and bartender yell at each other, and our bartender take a shot right after, we took our drinks to go.

Perfect breakfast after a a late night. Unusual entrees such as an egg sandwich on a doughnut with sweet savory bacon. Only complaint was lack of items left. We all 3 had to choose other items than what we wanted. But everything we substituted was delicious. Try it ! Great coffee
awesome place for bands !!! the staff is awesome and the food is awesome too !! the girls there are very friendly and awesome....stop in and have lunch...they will treat you right !!!!
Absolutely terrible service. After 2 hours and 3 phone calls...no food. Excuse...very busy.
Clean and nice facility. They did a great job on my pedicure. Will definitely go back!

Decent place for a slice or two of pie. Had a slice of the BBQ chicken pizza as well as the spinach ricotta pizza. Both were ok, nothing spectacular here but not bad either. Service is ok. There's a few tables inside with a minimalist decor.
Wow... hole in the wall place with authentic, delicious and inexpensive fish tacos. Amazing choices at a great quality and price. While eating you can watch the batting cages.

I've drove past this place a ton of times, and after my first visit I will continue to drive past it to the better places in the area. It's a dive I get it, but the bartender is senile or bipolar and the staff is rude. Go somewhere else.
Great location and great potential. Pretty awkward ambiance, no music or sound to TV's which doesn't fit the "lodge/garage" building...high prices and cheapy baskets for food.

These guys are always helpful, and honest. Four stars because you better plan on dropping your car off. The 30 minute wait time is unrealistic, and you will be waiting at least an hour, if not more. The longest i've waited was three.

Pretty simple. We were having a great time. 2am came. The bouncers came and said "this is the last song." We switched to another song as the last song. They shut us down with no last song and threatened us that we had to leave. Fuck tango.
This is a busy, noisy fun place for breakfast. Some of the best pastries, coffee and breakfast around. Try the tamales and the steamed eggs.
Ordered the veggie explosion (I ate some before taking the pic) but this roll is literally just fried sweet potato with veggies thrown on top, so it's super hard to eat and not very flavorful.
We had a great time...lots of Vaudevillian fun...great magic...delicious dinner...and surprises. The country club is fab...overlook of Tucson city lights. Ross the magician is fab!!

Not very good. Food never really tastes right. I've ate there a few times though and it's always just been ehhh but the last time I went there me and my mom both got extremely sick and I refuse to eat there again since

My family and I love Dante and Luigi's , feels like you are eating home cooked Italian food, always fresh, go with an appetite because everything is delicious. We love Angelo he's amazing. We always go monthly and if not every other week ! Great service

This former favorite has gone downhill dramatically in the last year. Portions got smaller, ingredients aren't as good and prices went up. I hope it's temporary during COVID, because there are lots of better options right now for similar diner fare in Media.
Really friendly. Serves the typical ihop breakfast joint food. Good food no complaints. And they have crepes at this location!!!

As a Dental Hygienist myself, Dr Wallace has been our go to oral surgeon in SB. Three sets of wisdom teeth and one complicated implant, all without a hitch. Pleasant atmosphere as staff Hopefully we won't need an oral surgeon again, but if we do, this is where we'll go again.

Stacked Pickle lands at 3 stars for me. They are consistent, and good... but nothing worthy of more than 3 stars. I'm a fan of going for lunch on Mondays because they have $5 burgers. The fried pickles are a must try when you visit. Good food. Consistent service. But definitely nothing worth bragging over.

Heard that this place got a new cook Tryed good again this new guy has a chance to turn things around was told he cooked for chickie and Pete's Enjoyed everything that I tryed here Amazing food can't wait until this week to go try lunch here Very Good Food
Only reason to come here is if you want a burger with a fried egg on it. Good stuff...other than that, it's just a typical burger joint.

We are regulars at The Cheshire Cat and keep coming back. The Inn is beautiful and immaculately maintained. The gardens are peaceful and restful. The rooms are very comfortable. The breakfasts and afternoon hors d'oeuvres are delicious. The staff is friendly and accomodating. The location is walking distance to State Street downtown, but the Inn is in a quiet neighborhood.
Amazing service and food. The view is really one of the best views in town. They a good variety of beef cuts. Also they serve you the meat they way you love

Moved to Wayne two years ago and just tried Minella's for the first time a couple months ago, now we go every week! The staff is friendly, service is always fast and food always very good. Don't be discouraged by the line, it moves fast, and totally worth the wait!

These cookies are top recommended from others but they're more just ok for me. The building was super clean and everything was fresh and organized. Order a chocolate chip, raisin oatmeal and snickerdoodle. I did not like that the chocolate chip and oatmeal had almond toffee in it. Just killed the vibe of a good cookie for me. Otherwise good!

The location is great. Parking free. Nice pet friendly, beautiful beach. People watching good. The restaurant has nice ambiance, views of the beach. A cool thatched rest area for dogs adjacent to the restaurant. We had a nice ocean view table. Oysters good. Whiskey clam chowder good. Ceviche good. Fried Calamari not so good, over done. Would do again.

Sooooooo good! I'm so sad that they closed the Sparks location, but am delighted that we still have a Spicy Pickle in town. Great menu with quality ingredients, wonderful service. One of my favorites!
6 star Mexican breakfast , I can't wait to come back.. Nice atmosphere, pleasant staff, with good service.

I got the black dog, and I enjoyed the sandwich but it was nothing to write home about. I also got a nice big dill pickle and an okay potato salad. I'll definitely come back again and try something else, like the Italian grinder. Maybe the black dog just wasn't for me..
This might be the best chicken sandwich i've ever had! Tons of sauce choices too! This might be the best chicken sandwich i've ever had! Tons of sauce choices too!
You created the perfect drink: the Hand Grenade. Each sip tasting of Ecto Kool-Aid and Everclear. Delicious! I'd pour it in my cereal if I could.

The food was pretty good. We got the biscuits and gravy which did not disappoint. The service just lacked soooooo much. We waited for 10 minutes before someone ever said anything us, then we got thrown in a booth and forgotten about. Would not go back.
Clean and polite staff. Portions are generous, steak quality is mediocre at beat. The rolls are great and red beans and rice.

Quite a few variety of beers although not very impressive. Most of them taste similar (i.e. watered down). Also had brisket sandwich which had very thin slices of brisket topped of with cheddar which seemed a bit strange to me.

You need to know if you need a slice of pie at 11 at night this place has a slice of pie little on the greasy side but hey you're down on Bourbon Street in New Orleans full of all kinds of liquor and a greasy piece of pizza is just what you need

On a recent trip to NO, we stopped in at Houston's on a busy Saturday night without reservations. The staff was very friendly and efficient, and we were seated in a very reasonable time. The service and food were fine, but the real highlight of the evening was the live jazz band. A very pleasant New Orleans experience that we would recommend to anyone.
Delicious Grouper fingers, and fun atmosphere. The view is very nice in the evenings.

Worst pizza I ever had. Ordered delivery, arrived ice cold. Box not even warm. Bland, tasteless pizza. Crust tasted as if it were made last week. Bought a root beer and still had the label from Harry Potter Festival over a month ago. Bottle water was opened - as in not sealed. Not sure how places like this stay in business.
The food was good and the cook was sweet. He ended up bringing us our food and checking on us because our waiter was on the phone. Aside from the cook the service was horrible.

One of my new favorites. Great dining experience start to finish. We sampled way more dishes than we should have after two visits and each dish was uniquely flavorful. Textures were greatly paired with each dish as well. Presentation was great including decor. Parking can be tough at busy times generally in the midtown area. I've recommended this restaurant to quite a few people.

The food was delicious and pretty affordable! It had plenty of seating, looked very clean, and the staff were nice. I felt bad for the waitress who was the only one waiting tables during a lunch rush. This is a great place to go for lunch but I'm definitely coming back to try their dinner and great sake offerings.
Mattress pad smelled of urine. Rooms are small and clustered in a way that increases noise between rooms. Gotta be a better hotel nearby.

My first experience here was great - it is very clean and I had a perfect manicure/pedicure. Unfortunately, my second experience was the opposite. There is so much paint thinner in the gel polish that my manicure is still translucent and sloppy after a color change, three coats, and a very patient technician. I am so disappointed.
Really not the same place - new owner. Tastes like strip mall food. Not the atmosphere and lost that special flavor.
Took my mom here today for Mother's Day brunch and I loved it! I will definitely be back! Pleasant people wonder food and a great atmosphere!!!!!!!

It was okay. Had much higher expectations from the commercials. Got the deep fried stuffed mashed potato. It was warm not hot. My husband got the chicken fried steak and the breading feel off. It took a while to get our food.
I went to Jacqueline for a color correction after months of trying to achieve a neutral bronde color. She nailed it after ONE visit. Forever thankful for her talent. I love my hair!

For this place to be a franchise with good reviews its mediocre. The food is ok. The kids liked picking their own ingredients however they didnt finish the food. I would go to another place before here.
Not the best but far from the worst. No 10% discount any longer he just opened Abington and gas to pay rent up there so the other two places suffer. Menu too large and had gotten pricey.

Second time coming here. Nathan is always very nice and helpful for what services I need. I don't feel like they are pushy about things (which is great because most places will try to screw you). He even spent extra time trying to reset the gauges on my complicated volvo. Thanks!
I like Thaitanium but the phone number on this review is incorrect . The correct phone number us 3176861848
Fun museum filled with stuff for people of all ages. Doesn't take more than a couple of hours. Highly recommend.
A wonderful neighborhood creamery, both in LaFayette Square and Clayton. And the ice cream combinations are really creative and delicious. But be for-warned: the "naughty" flavors pack a punch!!

Just kind of blah. Nothing special about the food or the service...it wasn't bad but there was nothing that will compel me to return either. I had the beef dos tacos...big but short on meat. The wife had a beef burrito which was lacking on overall flavor. Also, the nacho chips were not very fresh or good tasting.
Cutting a celery stick in four thin slices is cheap azz. Spicing the chicken up with sauce instead cooking it in spice is cheap azz.

Used to be my go to sushi but the new owners do NOT provide a tasty bite. I recently got some plain rolls, just tuna, AAC, spicy yellowtail- everything wrapped in seaweed paper YUCK YUCK YUCK. This place used to have a yummy middle and a very thin layer of rice. I won't get that nasty sushi again.

Showed up at 3pm, and was told with a straight face their next available table is 930pm. Haha.. let me just wait outside for that? Also, confused because there were at least a half dozen empty tables within eye shot. Strange business practice ... but the ambiance seemed nice.

Went here for brunch with a some friends today. I just love the interior of this place. It makes you feel like you have left Philly behind for some exotic locale. Their brunch selection is pretty good especially if you also look at their lunch menu. Prices are reasonable for loads of food. I also love their cocktails, so yummy.

I'm surprised at the negative comments about this McDonalds. The staff was extremely sweet, attentive, and my food was hot and fresh. Although I only went through the drive thru, it was a wonderful experience!
Portions has gotten smaller, rib tips not as tender as before, Meat has no seasoning, maybe they just season chicken

Been here 5 times and its hit and miss. The first time was pretty good, second time was ok but the last 3 times have been crappy. On one occasion they were really busy so I'd give them some leeway but the sushi is very inconsistent from visit to visit. Good value for lunch but not for dinner.

I don't even know why we bother coming here.... Every Friday we come here, and for some odd reason they always skip us and leaving us wait for more than what they had told us! We love yard house. However, their seating system is disappointing!

I had the top of the line detail done by Terrence and it was the best detail job that I have ever received. He and the team took care of every little detail that I brought to their attention. The best experience possible!

Nice concept, cool to watch the rollers at work or sit at the open front window, drink a beer, light up and watch the Quarter rats and tourist enter and exit the Quarter. But this place isn't for the true Affectionados because I'm not sure that they age their cigars long enough. But still three stars for the atmosphere.

The hotel is pretty and the staff is ok. The room service menu is extremely limited and breakfast starts at 0630, which is a problem for business travelers. A nice upgrade for the rooms would be some type of premium coffee and tea offerings. I was expecting more of a boutique hotel but I don't find that this is.

First time eating at the Mission BBQ...Food was good, especially the Turkey, but what impressed me even more was the overall patriotic spirit of the place and the Manager was probably one of the most outgoing people I've ever met. Showed up after noon, so didn't get to witness or participate with the playing of the National Anthem. Next time!
She is amazing. Goes above and beyond. Asks me questions that I didn't even think of. All for me and my family's well-being is what Tiffany is all about!

I am a lover of FOX restaurants, but I didn't feel the need to return to this one. With more Mexican restaurants in Tucson than you can shake a dozen sticks at, why go to this one? I couldn't find a reason. Nothing disgusting here, go ahead if all you need is something to fill the pie hole.

Not sure why everyone raves about it, even my local friends. Eaten in three times and ordered out pizza delivery on a few other occasions, but I've never been impressed. Everything I've eaten there has been mediocre/bland in my opinion.

It's been quite a long time since I've eaten at Steak 'n Shake and oh how I remember how darn good their chili was...with an emphasis on "was." Not only was the cup portion not an actual cup, the flavor was horrible and inedible. I also had the garlic burger which was good so an extra star for that.

Have done take out for 8 plus years. Unfortunately the quality has dropped significantly. I would prefer an increase in price to maintain quality and ingredient ratios. It's ok that the pies are smaller but the crust and tomato sauce are lacking.

I usedd to think this was THE venue in Philly. Then they webt through a name change, reverted back to the TLA and just started sucking in general. The VIP area is bot worth it. The acts they get are subpar. And the ticketing/greed system is abhorrent. I will only go if it is and act i cant see anywhere else
Not great. Brisket was dry, probably from yesterday. They don't sell beer. Sides were ok.

To commercialized was better when it was a mom and pop store ( Chippers) the young kids do a nice job but there's fifteen kids when there use to be three and they where just as fast if not faster gone are the good old days

Great views, great rooms, the restaurant is wonderful, very friendly staff, unlike some other resorts i have visited in tucson this one had close parking to my room, very nice when in town on business to be able to get in and out quickly....only complaint is that room seems to run out of hot water very quickly....not sure what that is about.....

Here I am finishing my reviews after 3 month lol. Thanks yelp for reminding me. Well this was our second visit...the only think we like here was the cheese boards. Oh those were delish. I wasn't impressed with other dishes but I will give it another try someday.

I've been here a cpl times now to get blond highlights. The stylist done a great job, much better than the last place I went to. Their prices are a bit to much though. $135 for highlights & trim is a bit to much.

Terrible chipotle Trash outside all the time is chipotle wrappers and never clean Very slow service Inadequately prepared , for example, I waited in line for ten minutes and they were out of pepper and onion fajita mix - then I was told I would have to wait five minutes for it Adios Never going back

Slow service, cold food. The only thing that was good was the $1 margarita!! Ordered a chimichanga, it had tomato in it. It should state that on the menu. I told them no bells because it said it had them.
Tasty. They take real care with the flavors and presentation. Great drinks too!

This review is for the mini-golf course. It's literally the worst course I've ever played on. The greens might has well be concrete. There wasn't any grip so, because of the lie, all of the balls would typically just roll to the brick lined parameter. Kids are going to get bored and frustrated on this course. Come here for the bowling, skip the mini-golf.

Burger was fine and so were the tater tots--but I didn't think it ranked among the best burgers & fries around town. HOWEVER, the cookie butter milkshake may be one of the best things in town. It was delicious and I plan to go back for that alone.
This place is a joke. They stubbornly refused to serve me. Hey but I got a 20 minute look at the menu.

A fantastic brewpub located in the heart of Philly. They have a very large selection of beer, including a wall where you pour your own drafts. The service was good, and the food was excellent. Overall, I'm glad I found this place, and would happily return.

This place is okay for the parts me and my experienced. It can use some updating, we haven't tried any of the out door activities yet. Once we do some of the outdoor activities I will update my review.

We haven't eaten there yet. They don't take reservations for dinners after 6pm so we rushed over there. There was a table for 8 available but we couldn't have it because someone made a reservation- wth??? I think it was because we had a 6, 4 and 2 babies with us
Very fun place, But like every place else too many rules which takes the fun out of everything. Just let people and kids play and have fun. People get hurt and things happen.
The Cuban breakfast sandwich was so good! But they do not have skim or 2% milk for lattes which was a real bummer. But I tried my husbands caramel latte and it was very good.

I want to sell leased car to Cavana because we don't need 2nd vehicle. I call multiple times and submit contact-us for pay off quote, but they never call back. I believe they are so busy only to sale cars and don't know how to satisfy by other service. I won't work with them any more.
There are two things I always receive while visiting Circles. A delicious meal made fresh inhouse by the chef/owner and some of the best service I have had.
One of the best Greek places I have ever been to, at very reasonable prices with fast service. The Pork and Halloumi were the real standouts for me.

I love my bdubs and this location is just as good as any other. We were seated really quickly and got really good service. Our waitress was accommodating. I did go during Mardi Gras where they do have a shortened menu, but the choices seemed to include most of anything you'd want! And the BOGO Tuesdays is fantastic!
Visited on an off night, not busy at all, service was slow. Hamburger patty was raw inside. Ordered the Buffalo chicken dip and the cheese was burnt on top and was disgusting. I won't be going back.
Very slow bar service , Inattentive bartender. Drinks were however delicious. The restaurant is beautiful, but it's really loud, overall am not impressed.

Stevens always does a great job for us. We have a HUGE Live Oak over our house and I have to trim it ever 2 years. If I have concerns, Chuck and his crew will work it out and trim what I need without harming the health of the tree. Total pro and good people! Thank you Stevens Tree Service!
High End rip off. Their pricing for their services are through the roof. I would never use them again
Had a sun dried tomato bagel. With cream cheese. Tastes like pizza. In love....with the bagel.
We had breakfast at the Sea Porch and it was fantastic and the service was even more superb. Great outdoor dining poolside with a view to the beach. Have the johnnycakes.

I can't believe this hotel was given a single star. The accommodations were disgusting I'm seriously baffled by some of the other reviews. I could not bring myself to spend a single night at this place after I checked in. This is not OK! DO YOURSELF A FAVOR AND STAY SOMEPLACE ELSE

This property is horribly dated. It's like a set from Miami Vice that never been remolded. Disgusting baby crap colored couches, ugly paintings. Points for having pretty grounds and easy assigned parking. But the worn and dated units need a MAJOR demo and remodel.

My experience was horrible. The steak was burnt, the ribs tasted frozen, all of the food was cold. They also forgot to give us our soup which we paid $5 for. We ordered a milkshake that they did not blend, it contained full ice cubes. The fries were completely over salted. If i could give less than one star i would. Y'all suck.

we had the pad see ew, the yellow curry and the garden rolls. all were fabulous! particularly, the yellow curry was incredibly flavorful and the sauce with the garden rolls was stellar. coming to pennsville as a through stop on a longer journey to florida we weren't expecting much, but we were very, very impressed by sang tong thai!
Truly the best Middle Eastern food I've had. Excellent, quality food with delicious seasonings. Don't miss this place!
Great variety Busy but they move you through in timely fashion. Bakery department has many choices and the Ciabatta is awesome!

This walmart is so bad I literally drive extra 10 mins to the Cinnaminson one, but you actually end up saving time because you will save at least 20 mins from waiting in line and navigating through the store!

The worst place I have worked in my life. The owners are money grabbing ass wholes no wonder they ran out of business. I used to work valet here. 8hr straight they never offered food or anything. One time I asked the bartender for a glass of water he told me he was busy. ass whole spaghetti eaters.

It's ok food but there mimosas are an joke. 4 dollars and this all you get and they don't even fill the cup it's like a shot of a mimosas. It literally takes 5 second to top it off with orange juice. Usually there drinks are worth the price , but there mimosas are an joke.
they got my order wrong. I've had better veal. Service was friendly. If I ever go back I'll try the pizza.

Seems like they have a brand new menu. They need to educate their servers and management about the new options and what is what, they were very confused and just need to put time into their new spin on the food. Fried balls of cheese smothered in marinara are not "four cheese gnocchi in pomodoro sauce"!

My experience was okay. But the food wasn't that good. I had a chicken Caesar wrap that was mildly over priced and the chicken was dry and it was missing the taste of Caesar dressing. It was bland and I was very disappointed. Doubt I'll ever eat here again.

Terrible experience at this location. They gave away my sandwich to another customer and after informing them that I had not received my sandwich 10 minutes after getting my coffee, they showed no urgency and took another 15 minutes to put my sandwich into the heat....
Simply outstanding! The food is great, the ambiance is cozy, and the service is fast!

Holy Mother of Monkey Milk! What awful service. There was a young girl with purple-ish hair who was on her phone behind the counter. She was so rude & she wouldn't get up to serve us sample cups. She then proceeded to SPIT at my friend. Totally not coming back here; Sweet Cece is rolling in her grave!!!

Very frustrating to work with these guys. Bought a new home from them. Jared, the owner, can't even give a return phone call. If you buy a home from them, take off 10 percent in anticipation of fixing things that they will promise to do under their own warranty (and won't). Jared just doesn't seem to care.
The curry here was delicious. A little sweeter than I prefer but still good. Had to drop a star based on the price. Pretty expensive meal for a Chipotle type environment.

The service here is awful, the servers are rude and inconsiderate of customers. However, the food and drinks are reasonably priced and very tasty! The boy thing that really keeps me coming back. Must try: the nachos!

Dive bar, with the bartender that was slower then molasses, but he was a cute little old guy I guess it would make more sense if it was a speakeasy or something, but nonetheless a new experience . My girlfriend plays darts there so I usually go and watch her and have a couple corona's, lot of elderly people but very friendly :)
They did a great job on my brows and would have given 5 stars but I noticed staff walking around with either no masks or masks pulled down.
Dinner with wife and 2 8-year olds here last Saturday. Barely O.K. No value whatsoever. Will not be back.

This restaurant is very good! Try the clam chowder as it will not disappoint. The key lime pie is quite amazing! I do not like receiving my bill before I am finished and for this reason I rate my experience a 4 instead of 5.
Emergency Room Balance Billing is no longer allowed in California.

Delicious, but we stopped going last summer, my partner hated the tiny plates many dishes were served on, not sure if they are still doing this. But many items would come on awkwardly small plate just large enough for the portion and he hated it!!!

Oscar our waiter couldn't have made our experience any better. The Seafood Risotto was delish as was my husband's Sea Bass. The Creme Brule was to die for and might I suggest a blended magarita from the bar, the Patron made the cocktail a decadent treat.

Don't get me wrong, Doma is good. Unfortunately I'm spoiled with Umai and I didn't feel that the sushi was comparable. My girlfriend agreed--the sushi is good, it's just not the best in the neighborhood. I will say that the place is really cute, much more spacious than I would have guessed, and the service was top-notch. It's definitely a good second choice.

Popped into this place right off the market and it was sooooo entertaining!!! The one guy was constantly raggin' on everyone of the employees there, it was nice to see them talk smack back once in awhile. I had the turkey burger and sweet potato fries which were delicious!!! My sister had the seafood gumbo which was spicey goodness. This place was great!!!
That Sonoma chicken salad I loved so much has changed recipes and is now god awful. Now, the only reason I come here is for their spinach tortillas. Pathetic, I know.

Horrible customer service. My flight was canceled and I had to drive from Tucson to Phoenix just to make another flight home. Furthermore, they refuse to help me pay for the rental and anything else that was a result of their cancellation. Plus, they lack people to talk to. Never will I fly U.S. Airways again!
My favorite brunch spot so far! The Pom mimosa is the best!! The food is always fresh & a great price! I try to go every Sunday
Food is always cold. Wait time for food is insanely long. Usually have all six waiting spots outside full. Don't go here. You will regret it.

so im here to pick up my site to store order theres a line for it but no one handles it I waited 10 mins to be serviced only to be told I had to go into the other line nothing else to say this is the worst place ever
This location is great and the food is pretty good. We go every time we visit St. Petersburg and will continue to go back.
Great theater but a little too expensive for my taste. Tickets and light refreshments for two can start at $60 for the night.
The lobster pasta was absolutely fantastic. My fiance and I had a wonderful experience. Great atmosphere, the ricotta app was TO DIE FOR.

I ordered Ruth's Crab Benedict and it was delicious but oily and gave me really bad heartburn right after. The person taking me to seat wasn't friendly at all either. The decorations of the place is really cute and the waiter pouring water work really hard to make sure I have enough water and I like that very much.

Great office. Everyone was friendly and welcoming. Abundant street parking (at least at 9am on a Wednesday). Dr. Michelle was efficient and friendly and made a tedious process relaxing and comfortable. I require high index lenses so am not a good candidate for cheaper retailers. Loved the customer service here. Will update review after I receive my glasses.
Guess I'll never know. After being promised to be seated in 15 minutes gave up after 30.

Owner was EXTREMELY RUDE. This was the worse place ever. I will never go back. Came to get my car cleaned and left with it STILL DIRTY..... how is the even possible at a car wash??? Will never recommend this place to any of my friends.

Super disappointed in this bar- it was my second time there, and out of our bachelorette group of seven, two girls had their phones stolen on the dance floor. Avoid if you like to retain your belongings.

Waited 2 hours for a reservation of 12 people to only be told they could seat 6 and the other 6 would have to wait another hour for a table somewhere else. Then the seating staff told us they never promised anything. Really? Nice way to appreciate customers.
When I needed to use the service was perfect. Clean car, nice driver and good fare. I will use again.

Had the $7.99 large pizza special, thin crust, today November 3, 2019. The service was good, pizza was horrible. Don't know if it was bad because it was thin crust, but had no taste. No more Pizza Hut for me, I'm through!
Enjoyed my first visit. The place was hopping and the food was great! I'm looking forward to trying more dishes
Standard issue diner with a little bit of a 50s vibe. Not bad but a bit overpriced. On the plus side, a side of bacon gets you a LOT of a bacon.

This was one of my favorite spots in the area to visit. The menu is creative, unique, and the food & coffee were delicious. If I lived in this area, I would be a frequent flier here. The staff was friendly and patient despite how busy they were. The food was prepared also very quickly. I will definitely visit every time I'm in town.

This place rocks! A true mom and pops pizza joint. I love the owners sign that says something to the effect of - friends don't let friends eat franchise pizza. the chicken dijon garlic is my favorite. The business owners give back to the community too.
Amazing food and cocktails, but tainted by the horrible waiter... Such a disappointment!
The owner and head chef is absolutely amazing! He brings his middle eastern Flair to a classic Italian menu. The combination is absolutely delicious! Service is always great!

I'm not sure which is more frustrating: the store layout or the parking lot. The store is a tight fight so do plan to go during the day in the week. The only employee interaction I had with was our cashier who was very sweet.

You wouldn't think that a simple box lunch would be worthy of 4 stars, but this one is. The upcake desserts alone are worth driving there for. They're great for group lunches too. You can't go wrong with the Thanksgiving sandwich.

Very cheap, I will give them that and if that is your biggest qualification in making a choice on what to eat... you are all set. I was not sold on the food though. It was average at best. I think I could have made better pizza at home with a frozen shell.

The place is very modern. Simplicity of decor adds class. Staff is very friendly and atmosphere is hassle free. Drinks are very creative with a breath of freshness and there's NO soda available in the restaurant, which made me very happy :) The food was off the roof! Taaaaaasty! Yum!
Family tradition since my grandmother. Brandy Alexanders at Arizona Inn. Mother's day 2018
Always a good deli meal. Be sure to try the shrimp louie. consistent, clean, friendly, good food

two stars basically for terrible service. The waitress really had the nerve to say "relax" to my friend and she was "too hyper" just because she was speaking fast. Absolutely unprofessional and plain rude. The sushi was ok, but the green salad was inedible. such a strange chunky dressing and bad lettuce. Overall i'd go somewhere else, not worth the money or hassle.

They have live music and a nice patio. We had a few pounds of crawfish and a few sides of gator and fries and other things and they all were served really quickly. The crawfish were super delicious and so were the sides. The waitress was very friendly. Had some drinks and they were pretty strong and fairly cheap.
I've been to Akar twice and had great experiences both times. Intimate atmosphere, excellent service, and phenomenal food. Tons of vegan options!

Repeat guest. First experience great. Second was a miss. Room had no shower, whirlpool that was impossible get get in and out of. Fixture was broken and spewed water everywhere. Also room was next to pool and hotel bar where we heard folks most of the night. Nothing like we had asked for and received text confirmation. Leaving dissappointed.
For all my pescatarians out there: do yourself a favor and order the tuna melt sandwich amazing!!!! I love the dirty funky fusion chips to go with it as well. Always so good.
Heavenly... The Tom Kha soup is so flavorful and aromatic. We shared the Red Curry and the Pad Kee Mao, both amazing dishes. Our server was very helpful and descriptive! Worth it.

Was not sure what to expect at a Mexican restaurant in NOLA, but the food was quite tasty, the service great and the atmosphere fun. Great for families. Used the Yelp Check-in for the discounted Top Shell Margarita - just tell your server up-front to make it easy.
Great quick authentic Mexican food. The tacos are delish and pink sauce is a must try. Delivery is always hot and fresh.

I ordered the ribs, they were horrible. The mashed potatoes and sides were horrible as well. The only reason I'm giving them two stars is because my girlfriend got the burger and it was good. We also got the cheesecake and it was the smallest piece of cake I have ever seen and it was the worst cheesecake I have ever tried
It's one my favorite places to come and enjoy a burger. They have a good selection of items on their menu. Friendly, quick staff! Next time ill try something different for sure!

Gooey Butter Cake! I don't know if you can get a food wrong with those three words. they were successful. I had the Rockey Road which was topped with a melty marshamallow. Delicious. I had the orginial. Solid! If this is wrong I dont want to be right
Not spectacular, not terrible. Pretty average but I live super close so it's convenient.

This place is horrible!!! I got the steak tacos and the streak tasted soo bad I hated the flavor, next I didn't get any of the sides I ordered or the guacamole. If I could leave negative 1 Million stars I would
You get what you pay for! Great place for a cheap, fun night. However, the place is in pretty rough condition. Nonetheless, I love coming here with friends or on a date night!

Don't bother come here. There's like eight ppl working but no wanted to service me until I got up to leave. A woman came after me and got service before me. I don't know if ethnicity played a role or not but that is how it looks. Unfortunately I will not come back
Best food. Best service. Best staff. Come here and get the specials. Chef Josh and Austin have you covered. New menu too. Coconut curry sauce is where it's at........

Needed to stop in for a quick drop off. Had to wait about 20 minutes since only one staff member Assistant Manager in store was helping another customer with a complicated shipment. AM was as helpful and friendly as possible given short staffing and I appreciated it.

We may go back perhaps for the poutine (brown gravy on side was pretty nice) and choice of al fresco dining and people watching. But as for the burgers, not so much. The bbq bacon and veggie burgers we had last time just didn't quite make a mark.
My 2nd favorite station. Some of the sh_t they play is sucky pop punk/rock ,though. i'm pretty sure Tokio Hotel was one one night.
The food was delicious, they had generous portions, and the service was excellent and we will definitely be returning!!!
Extremely unprofessional. How do you expect to run a business if you are always closed for "breaks." Must not care for sales or their customers.

We came in with a big group of people and all ordered the breakfast special. It was a great deal, but our orders got confused and took a while to get it right. However, it was pretty clean and the waitresses were nice.

The macarons were just okay here. I wanted to try some new flavors, but the Fleur macarons tasted like soap. The other desserts were just okay and overpriced for the taste and flavor. Kind of disappointing. I would go again when they had more desserts to try something else

Had used P&R in the past and can't recall any major problems. Recently arranged for a quote, had person come to property, waited a week, emailed for status, then estimator finally told me P&R did not want to do the work due to concerns being able to satisfactorily complete the work. No problem, call Arbor Bay Tree Service.
Great reasonably priced, family friendly, large portion breakfast and lunch spot near Clearwater Beach!
The food is good tasty, the restaurant is clean. Good for family and friends. The dissert is delicious

Only good about here is the Coffee Cake. It is not better than Pegs and shouldnt even be mentioned in the same sentence. My omelet was horrible tasting, cold and runny. I am happy that I had a living social coupon or I would have been inclined to give a 1 star
The matcha latte is was so delicious and being able to shop for plants is a very nice touch. Also, loved the avocado toast, it tasted so fresh!

We went here 3 times during our visit and tried their shrimp po boy, gumbo, red beans and rice, jambalaya, fried white fish and banana bread pudding...all of which were AMAZING! I would suggest sharing their portions are HUGE!

Delicious Mexican food! The Chicken Tortilla soup was the absolute best I have ever had, and the unique mix of tacos on the menu ensures that everyone in your party can find something they like. Fun atmosphere with great drinks and a nice outdoor patio area.

Really nice people work here but the store is mediocre. The vegetable section was plentiful but the meat section was extremely lacking. I had to go to a butcher for my meats- there was no prepackaged meats available. Prices were supposed to be $$ not $ for this place.

I recently leased at 2016 Q5 from Reno Tahoe Audi. What an easy experience! Micheal and BJ were a pleasure to work with. I actually did all the communication from New York, Flew in and picked up my new car. Very professional and Courteous. This is my new go to Dealer for the Tahoe area! By the way, Love my new Q5.
Normally the line in here is pretty long. Add to that USPS completely overcharges on bike shipping, $20-30 more than FedEx and UPS!

If you want to live anywhere near here...Be aware that the city lets Roosters run all over the area, waking you up in the morning. It's not cute or interesting, it's a health hazard and pest control issue. Tourism and locals drive in excessive speed throughout the area Blasting loud music from 6pm till 3am daily.
To be honest it was mediocre. I got some pizza slices which were ok I guess. I also got some chocolate milk which was really good! I guess this place is a hit or miss depending on what you get.
My expectations were low as we were at the airport looking for something to eat. I was surprised, it was good. My husband had the Cuban and I had the traditional Gyro.

My daughter and I love the white cheese pizza- no sauce on it. It's excellent! Only drawback, this restaurant is EXTREMELY expensive, but if you don't mind spending the money, it's worth it. For four people it was 30 bucks. Just for slices of pizza!

Eegees is a Tucson classic! Great sandwitches and my fave degree is july 's flavor of the month: watermelon! Any other month I get strawberry lemon. Im addicted to their house dressing... I recommend the turkey grinder! THE FRIES ARE FANTASTIC! voted "best fries" two years in a row!

This is a super clean park, great rec room with pool table, compact pool, friendly staff and all round great park. It is a great location for seeing the downtown sights. It's a small park and we loved it. We will stay here again

I received a fruit basket from the florist family for my birthday and it was absolute garbage. It was not edible and went straight in the trash. This fruit must have been sitting on the shelf for months. No one could ever look at this mess and mistake it for fresh fruit. Really putrid.
Stopped in for lunch and sat at the bar. No one would help me so I left. That shows extremely poor service. I do not care how good the food is, you lost my business forever.

Came here for brunch and ordered the cinna-roll stuffed toast. It was nasty. I can't place what was disgusting about it, but I could barely eat half. My mother was dining with me and agreed that it was not good. I will not be back for brunch, but I have heard good things about lunch/dinner so perhaps will give this place another chance.

We are not Arizona native, but this food was very tasty. This is not a fancy restaurant, however the wait staff was friendly, happy to explain and give it vice, and the food was good. I was happy with our experience.

This place is kept very clean . The staff are all very friendly . The food was priced a little high and Tasted average . I enjoy all Mexican food so I gave it 4 stars as there was nothing offensive about this place :) pretty decent all in all
Make sure u have an appointment before you can even think about coming here. It's fine if you live in the area but if your a out of towner who needs a dog visit go some where else.

I'm not sure if things changed, but the store didn't seem cheap to me. It seemed expensive. There were a lot of unique, interesting pieces but they were out of my price range. They had a lot of furniture and some house wares. The store was set up nicely and easy to browse.
Really good subs. All of the ingredients are very fresh, delicious, and generous portion sizes.

Pizza not great, owner is rude. After reading what they did to the students at VFES, this place will not get my business, and I urge others to do the same. There are many other pizza places that are far superior and actually CARE about their customers. Peace out, Sal's.

I like this Meridien better than the other ones I've unfortunately had to stay at. The location isn't as great as the Westin nearby, but it's not that far. They are definitely trying to be very W-like with the same furniture and rooms, which is nice but trying too hard.

Quick and simple- reading terminal is finally upgrading, bringing in new amenities, and they have some great new storefronts and eateries. The good places are even getting better. I can't wait to see what else they have in store for 2013!
the inly PJ left in town without a fully automatic espresso machine. please keep it this way, otherwise i will be forced to become PJ-free. very friendly staff and very nice and confortable setup.
Fast and friendly family oriented and sweet people. I would definitely recommend women for hair colors by Shelly Wells thank you so much for my color and style. I've had many compliments.
I ordered bagel and lox. Salmon was flavorless and everything bagel too salty. I ate it but wished for better.

Room had roaches, bed area needed mopped, damage to outlets and furniture, requested towels never came despite 2 requests. Not what I hoped and obviously not well kept up for the past several years. Lobby even had spider webs on the ceiling.

Don't waste your time or money. Got acrylic with gel. They left acrylic all over the cuticle. Left them thick and unshapened. I had to go somewhere the next day to get them fixed and the other salon people were like horrified
Terrible service, nasty attitude, and I haven't even gotten my car yet. Go anywhere else but here.

Tried this place out while visiting this past weekend the drink special was watered down the scallops were the size of small pearls definitely not what I expected the catfish tasted as if it was thawed refroze and thawed again
Warmly toasted and eaten on its own, the Philly muffin is simple and satisfying bread.

Not good. Ate there when new and was ok. Went tonight and ordered the shepherds pie and the mashed potatoes were not baked on the pie but rather a scope of mashed potatoes. Very disappointing. Nothing authentic at all about this place plus not the cleanest place I've been to.
I had the toasted ravioli for an appetizer and the roast beef with au jus for the main course. Both were cooked correctly and appropriately seasoned. Very good and satisfying.

This hotel is dated but the staff are very nice and helpful. Rooms and furniture is really old and needs a refresh. Morning complimentary breakfast includes hot cook to order items and is great. Free WiFi , nice small (but dated) workout area with good equipment. Free parking and proximity to Vanderbilt make this a good deal.
Sexist, the worst dealership experience I ever had. Manny is the worst. Sales manager. I went to Porsche instead. If you want to get treated fairly, make a u turn.

I absolutely love this place! I really love the new outdoor seating, perfect for a nice dinner or lunch outside when it's not too hot in NOLA. The crawfish fried chicken is so yummy, and I love the crab beignets! The vibe is nice and country chic. Everyone should give them a try.

I've been looking forward to returning to Hershel's since first having a Reuben here in 2007. This time I had a pastrami Reuben, and I was not disappointed. The food is great, and the staff is very friendly. This will be a staple each time we're in Philly.
I have enjoyed their food the couple of times I have eaten here. The atmosphere makes your party feel secluded even though it has an open floor plan.
Welcome to Meridian my old friend. Came in to try the place. The first thing I noticed were that the high ceilings made it incredibly loud in there. The sound was v
None of the staff wear masks and their primary clients are children who can't get vaccinated. Stay away from this place.

I was very disappointed to see the quality of their croissant . It is the worse I ever eaten.The plain one has no taste or color, the almond one, tasted stale. They claimed its fresh. The cappuccino is nice.

This is a go to place for us as the location and decor are fabulous. The service is usually amazing but last night the service was okay - just okay. We tried to lighten up our server, even the water person, but something was off. It's such a great place and we will be back but please remind your staff to SMILE!
Awesome service, posh ambiance, but pricey Chinese food. If you want a more upscale experience while eating Chinese food, this is definitely the place.

More than Disappointed by the shrimp PoBoy, Dry no taste, the bread was 4 times the size of the shrimp that was in it. The burger that my son had was better. I would not try it again since the disappointment of the PoBoy. Old and dirty especially the restrooms, nasty!

Do not arrive at what they say is closing time. I was rejected for service as I entered the building one minute before the posted closing time. Customer service is not what it used to be. So. If the say they close at 4PM they really mean 3:50. Food is however good.

I really enjoyed this place. The wings were solid. The Black & Blue Burger was excellent, although the bun was somewhat uninspiring. And they even had a few craft beers on tap -- including and especially Triton's Railhammer IPA. Overall, it was a good experience. People who say there's nothing good on 86th street haven't been to Taylor's II.
The guy who collects the cover on Thursdays was very rude! Ruined my experience.
I can't wait to go back! Such a nice place and ambiance. The food was scrumptious , very tasty. Good selection for wine and their bread was fresh and soft. A good way to end a Santa Barbara trip!

I don't have any pictures but I confirm what many are saying on here. They did not fill the sandwich up. Skimpy and all bread last inch of the roll on both side! They need to change the name to Skimpy Louie's! This was the newer place in Deptford next to Sams club.
What happened to this place?! First, lousy service; now, terrible, tough, dry bagels that fall apart like a stale dinner roll. The grocery store now has better bagels.

Went there on 12/1/2014. Like others had said. Food is great, but the service is lacking. Most of the time the servers stay huddled in the bar area and rarely venture out into the restaurant. You only catch them if someone is being seated and then you have to flag them down.
Best authentic Italian food! So yummy ! Cute atmosphere on the second floor ! Great customer service !

Ate dinner here my last night in town. I wasn't sure what to expect, but boy did it blow my taste buds out my mouth! The nachos were bomb.com and the tacos were so delicious. I definitely recomment eatting here atleast once!

Not sure about service, but went to pick up a rental van for the weekend. Photocopied all my stuff, then said "have a seat we will prepare your rental contract, we'll call you in 20 minutes". This is on a reservation made 4 days in advance. Van was in good condition.

The staff here is very nice and friendly. Four stars for that. My cashew chicken sandwich was just okay. Not much flavor to the cashew chicken and the bread didn't seem the freshest. I like the selection of drinks, though. It's a good place for sandwiches but for me there's places that are better for the same money or a little bit more.

The beer is excellent, the food is good if you get what you ordered. We've been there twice and my wife ordered the same sandwich both times. Both times they brought the wrong food. No apology, just an acknowledgement it was wrong. No offer to make it right either. Disappointing since we are big fans of the beer and cider.

The food here is so delicious and so are the sweet treats. I highly recommend the chicken and waffle sandwich. You could skip the cannoli (I've only ever had good vegan cannoli from Vegan Treats in Bethlehem), but everything else I've eaten from Batter & Crumbs is delicious. I wish I lived closer!

Love the layout and general atmosphere at Mission Taqueria. Its second floor location gives it a hidden gem feel in Philly. The nachos are my favorite thing on the menu - definitely get them to share as they're legitimately huge.

Hickory has been our go to vet for "way serious" issues for 20 years-from surgeries, to serious diagnostic quandaries, to the sad days when we must bid a loving pet goodbye. We count ourselves so fortunate to have doctors and a facility of this quality within just a few miles of our home.
You have to be very desperate to order from Domino's. Low quality food with the cheapest ingredients. If they trim the number of wings per order what do you suppose they are doing with with quality?

This is by far my favorite Mexican resturant. The food is delicious every time. I got mole enchiladas and they were to die for. It was a big meal so the rest I took home abd ate for dinner. Generous portion, and super tasty. Their salsa is non of that weak tasteless salsa. If you can't handle the heat get out the way

Clean. Friendly. Good and fast food. All that I expect in a fast food place and it delivered. I will be back especially for the breakfast platter... That's a lot of food for $3.89! Today I had the Sourdough Patty Melt... Very good and perfectly crispy fries!
Excellent food, simple decor, LONG wait time. If you're not in a hurry, any of their eggs Benedict are worth the wait.

3 stars is deserved because I've been coming here since Raining Berries opened! With the atmosphere still being nice, the service has dwindled greatly and turnaround time has increased. 6 managers later and the work ethic is decreasing. Love getting coffee here but I don't love the direction it's headed.
The quality of the espresso here and the hipper than thou vibe of the employees, along with an air of strong BO coming off many of the guests just turned me off
feeling like constantly watched and rushed is nooooot good. I went in yesterday and they were on me about things. if I need help I'll definitely come up to you and ask.
The food was good nothing bad to say about the place or the people I see why someone said the place looked dirty I thought it was just dark in the place they need to up date the place

We found this little gem the other night. We got the meathead and it was so delicious.I love the thinner crust! So excited to hear there is one even closer to my house that I didn't even know existed. We'll def Check it out and visit this one every chance we get.
No menu. Seating is at large shared tables w/family style passed dishes. Nothing lite or low cal here. Endless Southern food.
"Food 2.5, atmosphere 4. Nice outdoor seating with tvs. Good service. It's just a sports bar, people."

Was there on the weekend and it was good, but took a friend on Tuesday and it was awful! Wings had sauce poured over them instead of being tossed which made them too sweet and hard to eat. Salad was wet, and much smaller than before. For the price I expect better. Won't be returning any time soon.

Late night stop for an after-concert bite to eat. Friendly staff, even though it was an hour to closing. Had a burger - rare- as requested. Juicy and tasty with bacon and cheese. Fries were crispy and fresh. Nice selection of tap beer. For a chain and location, it was good.

"Mexican Chili" was neither mexican nor chili. Prime rib sandwich was almost, but not quite, entirely unlike prime rib. The lingering impression to walk away with is "inoffensive". Which is not really what I'm looking for for $30. Take your culinarily boring Moms and Aunts. It's very safe.
We purchased an apple pie for a dinner party. Customer service was very flat. The pies are very expensive. The apple pie was indeed good, but it was not worth the price or effort it took to get it.

The prices aren't bad and the quantity of food. However that being said the food is not as good as what you could make at home. The service is VERY slow I waited an hour for a salad. The shepherds pie had no flavor at all.

Billing department is horrible they won't give you any information on who you can speak with in financial services. When u make a complaint with the Human Resources department the lady does nothing to help. Supervisors don't talk to anyone there never available. Er drs have different billing than the hospital.
This is a great day place for a sub. The associates always have such fun while building a fresh sandwich to your specs. Mike's way is the best way!!
Chris and team did great job fixing my Infiniti. Easy to get in and get estimate and he fixed car quickly and on time. Let me leave my truck in his lot a couple of days. Would use again.

Been there about 10 times, most times including this time service was good, food is not great but good, but this time left a bad taste in our mouths. ..its one thing to pay $20 for a tiny pizza...but i always ask for a bit of marinara to go on my nomad....bill comes and....im charged $2 ...shame as we wont be back...

Solid steak and hoagie shop. Italian hoagie is very good. Not Primo good buts its a couple bucks cheaper. Steak sandwiches are pretty good too. Definitely an every day shop and a vast improvement over Wawa and Subway.

Service was slow considering there wasn't many people in the restaurant when we went. Food was tasty! I liked the taco salad. Loved those thin chips and great guacamole!! Drinks are good! Would have been nice if the service kept up with the refills. Everyone seemed happy with their chosen entree. Wish they had a location in the county.

At my son's suggestion, my family decided to try Meskerem. We got two combination plates and the shrimp dish. The food was fairly good but not really mine and my husband's type. I liked the chicken thighs best - more my kind of food. My daughter and I didn't like the bread - too "doughy" with a weird taste.

Got it as takeout. The place can have a pretty long line so plan for that. It was a good cheesteak and fed me for 1.5 meals. Only concern would be the price. Not crazy but not cheap. I would definitely eat here again.
Solid breakfast spot. Go all out for the chicken and waffles, it's high quality. Great coffee, from Little Buffalo Coffee Roasters. Super friendly staff too.

Sad to say I need to update my previous review from almost a decade ago (see below). The pizza here at Gianfrano's has lost its previous 'magic' and I've stopped going here. I'd love to come back if they can fix whatever's wrong.

Great place to see and play with puppies. No pressure to buy and they let you play with any puppy you like. Place is very clean and smells good. The puppies seem very happy and well taken care of. Gave them 4 stars because the prices are a little high.

Customer service, zero stars. Chai tea, 4 stars. I get that this is one of those hipster places, but there is no reason to be rude to someone dropping $15 in your store when they haven't been rude to you. Get rid of your attitude!
Ordered 1 cheesesteak and 1 order of fries and over an hour and a half it still had not been delivered. They also told me to call back and then never picked up. HORRIBLE service.

Perfect for people watching and a few drinks. The fru-fru drinks were very reasonably priced ($9), but the apps were pricey...around $14 for nachos and the same rate for dumplings. The food was good as was the attentive service. I will definitely be back.
I have eaten here twice - in March and Sept. Service is terrible. I will not go back. I complained to the mgr and he just laughed.

My favorite restaurant in Philly. Problem is I've been there enough times that the menu is starting to look too familiar. Great sushi and sake selections. Just be sure to save your money as Morimoto is great at two things... Fish and expensive dinner tabs.
Horrible service. Waited over an hour and a half for food and it came out cold. With so many places I would recommend trying some place else
Super hot inside I don't think the air was on. Floor was super dirty. Food wasn't bad. I guess it's similar to New Orleans dirty and hot.
Lots of fried food and not a ton of healthy options. Great view of the sunset and free beach chairs!
The coffee and atmosphere are great! I only wish the wifi and outlets were more conducive for getting work done.
7-18-19 at 2:34 am I pull up to the drive through, the man that spoke to me repeatedly said "I am closed" I just wanted some fries u kno:/ so I thought id write this to improve your staff performance

Vintage, I really want to like you. You're close to work/home, have a great wine selection, and nice outdoor space. I just can't deal with all the people past 7PM or the lackluster beer list or the hit-or-miss service. This is a great spot on a slow night and the $15 flights are pure marketing genius. Otherwise, tough to enjoy.
Interesting concept but a bit pricey per small slice (a little over $3). Tons of veggie options, some very unique. Brooklyn and Margherita were both good.
It's a wonderful and tiny place to enjoy some delicious coffee, food, and reading. It can be VERY busy on the weekends, but their service is so fast and friendly.

Both the times I've tried the sushi here the fish has looked disgusting. The salmon was almost grey. You'd expect a place with sushi in the name to have fresh fish for sushi. The only reason I'm not giving one star is their teriyaki is actually decent.
Love! Nice cafe with friendly staff, and great/chill vibe. Outdoor seating available too. Good selection of drinks. I had a delicious Italian soda! Will definitely come back if I'm in the area!

This is not an authentic Thai restaurant.Nothing special foods except flavor is not greasy. Really disappointed with the Mango sticky rice. The real sticky rice should be soft and glutinous,and the coconut milk is not different from those in market. A white lady's service was nice.

I love this place! I got married last summer and was able to get all my candy selections for a candy bar. It was cheaper then doing wedding favors. Also I have rented cake pans from them. They by far have the greatest selection for all your baking needs.
Beautiful and a great price. Stayed in a balcony room overlooking Decatur for our honeymoon and it was absolutely beautiful. I'd recommend this Hotel to anyone!!! Staff was so friendly!

Absolutely love this place. I never ate real mexican food before going here a few years back and I was wow'd by it. It's funky and fun. The food and service is second to none but the wait can test you. Don't go if you can't stand waiting. Call ahead on Saturdays to be safe.

Expensive, the deli food is over garlicky and the store merchandise is slim. Terrible wine selection and the people are not the most welcoming for a little mom and pop store. I was hoping it would get better but it's just gotten worse and it feels very dirty! Too bad!

Excellent dogs friendly staff if you miss an good Italian beef Meaner Wiener is the place to go. The good thing about Meaner Wiener is if you don't feel like to eat hotdogs the menu has many other items jut as good

I've been coming to this bar for almost 4 years now. It's truly one of my favorite spots in Reno for atmosphere, time with friends and beer selection. They carry a variety of local/localish brewers and even have tea, cold brew and soda if you're not a drinker. The variety of games is truly unmatched and the bartenders are knowledgeable about what's available.

Not pleasurable. They canceled the first trip due to not enough demand for that trip. Scheduled it on our last day so we couldn't go back and see things. Caught in traffic most of the trip, cemetery closed. Should not offer trips if the parade interferes. Just out to make money off tourist
Great food and really nice people who work there. The platters are the way to go. So much food I couldn't finish it.
The worst breakfast in a long time. Service was terrible poor attitudes and the food was a mess. Just alot of hype about this place. Good Luck Yuck!

I went here in December of 2009 and I was not impressed... completely. The food was pretty good, but the price was not. I had a chef special of scallops on rice with grilled asparagus and it was very tasty. So, expect good food but also expect a bill on the high side.
Amazing food with large portions at great prices. The servers was incredibly nice. We will definitely go back often.

This store is the only furniture as far as I'm concerned to purchase quality furniture. We never have had an issue with service we received or delivery. Everyone that works for Copenhagen is polite and wanting to provide the customer with the service that makes you want to come back.

Only good thing about this location is the staff. They are very good at putting toppings on the sub the way you ask, bread was under cooked, ask for it to be toasted but the meat was basically still frozen after, cookies mostly raw, ect ect ect.

The place to be on a Saturday morning! Fun breakfast menu. Friendly service but a little slow because it was so busy. Unfortunately meant we didn't get to sit back and enjoy as we were on a timetable. Fruit options were good. Cappuccino was just average. Overall though would go back as a good family option.

This place is a cluster fuck, we paid for 3 races and waited 2 hours to race, pretty much because we complained. It was very disorganized and no instruction on how long it may take or how anything worked. I would possibly go back, but go to a different location.

Retro Diner style cuisine...for double the price. Food was good, drinks were a bit pricey, service was friendly. Still...retro diner style cuisine...for double the price. (Note: I took an international executive chef who didn't seem impressed. Bring a date or a family. I am sure the company will enjoy.)

#1 favorite restaurant in St Louis before AND after I went gluten free. Freshest of the fresh flavors, gorgeous salads, friendly and knowledgeable staff. I've hit all the hot new best-of spots in the past 7 years since we moved here and Katie's is my #1.

A little eccentric this deli should fit right in with an artist metropolis enclave can be found in the University area of Saint Louis. The food is upfront and decent. You'll feel healtheir with this as your balance to all of the Dunkin' Doughnuts you've been stuffing yourself with.
What a refreshing stop for us. Everything vegan for sure, but wow. The things we tried were amazingly delicious. Pizza roll Breakfast sandwiches German chocolate cake. Thank you!!
Some of the best wings I ever had! They typically do catering, but they're open for lunch during the COVID-19 quarantine. The service was really good. Overall I highly recommend a place to eat
Very friendly and everyone was wearing masks and social distancing! One of my favorite brunch places now! It's amazing! HUGE portions! Took half of this home!
Love, love, love it. Go. Now. Eat. Enjoy! One warning: their aqua fresca is quite addicting...

My favorite spot in Reno, NV. I definitely will take any of our guest from out of town here. We enjoyed breakfast, lunch and dinner here at different check in's. This is our go to spot when we can't decide on where to go out for a meal. Thank you for great service and delicious food.

When I am in town, this is a must stop for me. I can't get enough of their salsa. It is sweet and a little hot. I always biy sone to take home where it doesn't last long. The tamales are sweet enough for a dessert. I have tried everything on the menu and have yet to be disappointed.

Music was incredible!!! Loved the show!!! There is a $15 minimum for F&B...which is ok. For the best experience...order 2 drinks after seating because you're not likely to see your server again. Eat somewhere else...we were a group of 6...all thumbs down on the food...
A place is only as good as its staff. Walk-On's in Baton Rouge provides consistently good service. This one in New Orleans has horrible staff. In attentive to the patrons.
Halloumi, artichoke tacos and the steak salad are MUSTS. Love the staff, the drinks and the vibe.
I'm giving this place a 4 star rating for a few reason. It have a great staff and food. But they don't have anything spicy for the people that eat tons of spices. They also didn't have chill oil.

Wow! I WAS GROSSLY OVERCHARGED for a spay of my cat! I was charged $325 for an uncomplicated spay. It was my fault for not checking. Steer clear as I learned that an average spay should be between $100-$200. Not happy!
I wish I had gotten a little minced pork on my pork chop rice platter, but otherwise it was tasty!
I ordered a brisket burger onion rings and a diet pepsi. $42 and change. I got double cheeseburger onion rings. No change in price. I just dont get it.

I was very impressed by the gorgeous cake Rascia created for a baby shower that I was hosting. It was beautiful, well detailed,and absolutely delicious.The guest and mother to be raved about it.I was extremely happy with her work and I will definitely be referring her to friends and family. Tiffany
Best workout ever. Facilities are clean and well kept. Trainers are knowledgable and encouraging. Highly recommend this gym!
Horrible customer service. Whoever the lady running is a rude bitter old lady who yells at her customers. They messed up my order multiple times
If you're looking for vegetable pho this place is without a doubt the best in the city. Their menu is enormous as well and will satisfy a wide range of what you're craving.

This is the baby of the Saver's family since it is the smallest store. Everything about price, how nice the staff are and everything still apply however it is a much smaller store so you can get through it kinda quickly.
Another incredible meal!! Get there!!

Absolutely the worst customer service I have experienced at a high end restaurant. Hostess was incredibly rude when we arrived to grab a drinking the early evening. No one was in the restaurant except for staff, yet we were told that they had no tables open and that we could not sit at the bar. We left and took our $200 elsewhere.

If you really want to see dolphins this is the boat to go on. They are used to the engine noise of this vessel and will come to it without being scared. Just come 45 minutes early to find parking as the pier is cordoned off for renovation.

In a word: underwhelmed The atmosphere was more canteen than restaurant with the lights far too bright.
