We chose mac n' cheese with hot chicken which was processed not freshly made and after 5 minutes congealed. Having been to party fowl the hot chicken was terrible - fatty, dry and the crumb was soft. There are many better places just down the road
Not bad. Empanadas are inexpensive, cute, pretty good. Entrees are a little pricey for my taste. Great people and nice service too.

Delicious menu at both the original location in Sparks, and now the new location near Smithridge Center in Reno. Love the edamame and gyoza here - both are much better than average. A hearty bowl of ramen with the broth of your choosing and a small beer for right around $10. You can beat it! Great to have here in Reno now.

Greg and all the staff are the most professional and efficient people around. I got my wiper fluid hose and exhaust gasket/manifold fixed. Both were done in one business day. They even applied an employee discount. I will definitely come back if I have any further car problems!
Same reason I didn't like it in the beginning, had an appointment at 12:30 ended up waiting 2.5 hours I just walked out

Wasn't a huge fan. We went when they first opened and it was a disaster, even the rice was horrible. Went back recently and still wasn't impressed. They also charged us for chips for take out which I thought was a bit crazy since we both got full meals.

Hotel was ok. I've stayed at much better Marriott's but I have stayed at worse hotels as well and this one was clean. The off-putting part of the stay though was the $15 charge for in-room wifi. If even most airports can do free wifi now, I would assume a nicer hotel I am paying $200 a night for can do it too.

I loved this place so much that I actually left my salon I'd been going to for 6 months to come here and drive about 30 minutes just to get my nails done. Nikki is absolutely amazing and is extremely attentive to detail so my manicure is always perfect.
Great friendly place, just love the entire experience from the bar to the dinning rooms for dinner or lunch, try the fish and chips!
Not helpful. Shrugged off by an employee for a simple copying job I've done a dozen times at different kinkos. Had to go to university copy center instead, which is much better.

We had the lobster bisque, for starters there was no lobster in it and it was very spicy. Not your traditional lobster bisque.The macadamia nut crusted sea bass redeemed everything. It was delicious. The coconut rum sauce and the mango salsa was wonderful

Worst place ever if you have kids don't even go here. The guys were very rude they asked me to take my daughter out because she was loud. The kicked us out of the place in a very rude language. They don't deserve any stars they really lost Business because we had a big family
We had a local cheese and charcutrie platter followed by a small portion of short ribs and it was scrumptious from start to end. Make a reservation as it's pretty popular.
The BEST spot for nachos and tacos!! I always leave here satisfied. Can't wait to come back soon

I have visited this resturant 2 different times. Both times the food was horrible!! The food looked like it had been sitting for a longtime before served. It tasted like it was heated up, not made fresh at all. This happened on both occasions we visited. Service was good. Food was Bad!!

Not my favorite nature preserve/trail I have ever been to. Thank goodness it is free. Most of it is smelly swamp area, not much to see/do unless you have a kayak. If you live in the area it is worth checking out once, but if you are from out of town don't waste your time.

ScanCafe won't address the issues we had with our order. There's supposed to be a guarantee??? Hmm. Seems like a scam. They shouldn't take sooo long to complete their job and if they do they should make it more apparent and charge less. Don't trust them!!

Tried a couple different options and they were very good. Will go back to try a few more flavors, like the lemon. Went late on a Saturday morning so the selection was not as full as it would have been earlier in the morning. Will try again earlier in the day to have the full flavor options.
I ordered through door dash. The food was alright just disappointed that I pay extra for brisket when over half of what I got was fat and not meat.

A well managed Qdoba. As a vegan, I like the naked veggie burrito piled high with black beans, guac, pico de gallo, lettuce, and corn. Hate it when the store manager makes my burrito and is stingy even with the pico de gallo.
Rude Staff/Agents, aren't assistive & attentive, try elsewhere if you know your worth.

Loved this place! Great atmosphere and wonderful service. Everything we had was really amazing. The pastas were all very fresh and delicious. Dessert was unique but wonderful. Would definitely recommend and will be coming back!

Small, delicious slider burgers and donuts the size of a buicks! Sometimes backwards is better! The waffle fries are to die for. Good daily selection of delectable donuts. I'll have to wait until after the wedding to try them all!

Great place to avoid the crowd , and actually get to enjoy a except for a few new releases i would rather go here than across the street actually. and definately kid friendly.. i havent had to do this yet, but if your kid gets broed you can leave, because you didnt have to mortage the house to buy the tickets !
We go there often, the food is good and service is so friendly! They make fresh salsa at the table which is awesome! They also offer pitchers of margaritas. Highly recommend!

The concept is ridiculous. I ordered a roast beef and cheese. Two huge slices of bread, a lot of fries, bland shredded cabbage and very little beef all between the two slices of bread. Decided to try the place for my first time despite poor public reviews...I understand why the restaurant was empty.
Great food, quality ingredients, reasonable prices, and great service. Even the kid chicken tenders were real breaded chicken. Two thumbs up.

Don't come here if you want anything with ice cream. Their machine broke and they didn't fix it for at least a month. We went back repeatedly for a shake and were told every time that it was still broken. Won't be coming back given there is an issue every time we come.
Lovely atmosphere and helpful staff! The chocolate is rich and delicious and the food is fresh. 10/10 will be coming back with friends! Try the Mexican hot chocolate, it's like a warm hug in a mug.

Service was really slow and forgetful. We had to remind them of our appetizer which ended up coming after our meal. The food quality was subpar as well. We were there for lunch, so no music to enjoy unfortunately.

This place is a small chain but it is not the same as other chain restaurants. The food is actually good, the setting is romantic and with a decent menu selection it will accommodate varying food tastes including the pickiest person.

One of the best boutiques in Reno! They always have the cutest clothes, no matter what occasion you are looking for. They only order so many of each item, so you are always finding something new when you go in there! I love following them on Instagram because they always show the cutest items they have in the store!

Came here for a Burger cause most places always got a good burger but I was wrong the burger was Pretty plain. Here what we order The fried chix Pasta And Burger The food looks good but don't taste good. If I ever come back here think I'll stick to French toast or pancakes or maybe just a good ol Eggs and bacon breakfast.
Always fast and friendly and the "Monsoon" wash does a great job. We own a black vehicle, which shows everything, and it comes out looking great in the end.

We were In the area for an appointment and hunger struck. I launched my trusty Yelp app, searched for Italian and Fat Tomato came very well recommended. The Restaurent is quant, clean and well decorated. The appetizer course was Bruschetta and buffalo wings. The main course consisted of a pear salad and a chicken parm sandwich.
Horrible customer service except for GM Will, he's the only one who gets the job done fair and quickly. They rip people off and have no filter with degrading customers.
I was seriously impressed with this place and will be coming back. Clean and very friendly atmosphere.
Might be a chain, but it does things well. Lobster roll is great, chowder is flavorful and location is cozy. Great place to get some seafood!

Make reservations! Long line without. I had the verde salad with chicken. The dressing was so good, lemon olive oil and salt. So good. Everyone else had the tagliatelle bolognese and loved it. We also had the bruschetta and garlic bread. Very good!!!! Great service too!

Cafe Ole is the only place that I will leave my apartment for in the rain. Their iced tea is like a ray of sunshine on cloudy day...a shot of raspberry flavor, a sprig of mint, and a big slice of lemon? Yes please. p.s. it's even better on sunny days.

Positives: We had the gumbo and fresh gulf fish--excellent. The veggies were perfectly cooked (my wife still can't stop talking about the brussel sprouts). Negatives: The waitress was in a bad mood and my seat was right under the A/C vent. I got so cold, I sat on the bench seat by my wife and another diner. Food: 5 stars Service: 1 star

Had the Scrambled Eggs with Smoked Salmon (w/ cream cheese, capers) there recently and it was delicious. Perfect way to start the day. And while the freshly-squeezed pineapple-mango-orange juice was wonderful as well, $6.15 for a large glass seems expensive!!!

At first it was cool that they had iPads at each seat. That's where the cool factor pretty much ends. Would be nice if the iPad menu would open up so I could've gotten some breakfast before my next flight. At least they were able to get me a beer. I'll try again next time if I pass this way again.

Great places to go and get your nails done in the city. Fair prices and easy to find parking. I would definitely make a reservation if you plan on going in the evening. If you go early in the morning, you can usually be taken right away. They do an excellent job!

very good, off the beaten path a little bit. We were in there early, like 7pm, so not sure how it goes later. good service, good wine list. definitely not tourisity, which is so nice when visiting NO. Check it out.

Horrible... we used to love this place .. we went no ac .. it happens .. we looked past that ... our drinks were 15 minutes late and the food never came .. server lacked knowledge but was kind ... sad that one of your favorite places became your least favorite...
I've had better. I got the Taco Salad... nothing great.
I've eaten here once and would recommend....good selection of foods for those of us that dont like raw selections. Ample seating and friendly to those with kids.
The worst experience ever. We are waiting for the first table available and they sat everyone ahead of us.

Convenient location. Easy to get a table - cause it is fairly empty. Lackluster at best. Beyond Stale chips. Okay pizza... service needed more training and some enthusiasm. There are better locally owned pizza places near by that will give you a much better experience. Will think long and hard before I return.
worst music selection ever and they put cheese on my bagel that looks like the orange/yellow kind you see on a McDonald's cheeseburger (gross!)

Ordered the large veggie pizza for delivery. The variety of veggies were nice however some of the eggplant was undercooked and crunchy. The sauce tasted fresh but was a little thin. Otherwise a decent pizza at a decent price.

The young girls working the floor and register are awesome, but the managers are the worse!!!! They never have the customers best interest in mind, can never answer questions, can never plain help you!!! I've had 2 horrible incidents in there where I walked out of there furious and frustrated!!!

I wasn't impressed with this place at all. My food took forever. 45 minutes for fried rice. Bland fried rice. The blandest fried rice I've ever had. I understand everything is cooked from scratch, but obviously they are understaffed. I won't be back.

Tried this place with a friend looking for an alternative to Starbucks. +Tables outside are a great place to sit in the sun. +Frozen coffee, usually not my thing, was delicious. -Service was surly and curt, even on a slow afternoon. -Latte was not good... something about the espresso was off. -Chocolate croissant was about the consistency of a brick.
Eggplant basil & mozzarella appetizer is delicious. Would definitely go back. Good idea to make reservation though. Small restaurant.

A pretty authentic Chicago hot dog shack, with an especially tasty "Nashville" dog (coleslaw, mustard, pickle and cucumber) plus a few other satisfying varieties (all steamed or charred). Long lines on weekdays, much faster on Saturday, only open 10 to 4 (you don't want to be in this neighborhood at night anyway).

Went with a large party. Between appetizers and mains only half of us were satisfied with our meals. Dont order fried oysters. They tasted like breaded fried cardboard. Dessert although very good the portions were small compared for the high price they charged. Drinks were great but they had New York prices. I would go again but not for dinner.
Lovely brunch spot! Definitely prefer the Ironworks location but all of them are amazing

Super cozy breakfast spot, friendly service. I ordered Bangers n' Mash and it was DELICIOUS. Such great flavours, the beef reduction was a bit sweet & salty. Eggs were perfect and definitely organic. I would eat here again and again. A bit pricey for breakfast but worth it.

The service was great and so was the food. They call it a hole in the wall and it really is. Took one star off for the smell inside the place. It didn't scare us and we ate on the balcony. Would definitely go back
Got the geisha, fancy and kampai special rolls, and all 3 were great, we couldn't reach a consensus on the winner!

Great food and priced just right. Our waiter Mike was charismatic and had the ability to find something to relate with all his guests as he worked his tables. With so many restaurants to choose from this is surely a place that stands out once you have a bite!
Ok, only one thing to say don't come to Costco on a Friday!!!! Unless you want to wait in long lines!! Once there I realized it is Friday ughhhh!! Friendly cashiers but long wait!
Forget Pat's and Gino's! This place is the best! Hands down! Great location too! Walking distance from Penn's Landing. This place never disappoints!
Horribly cramped seats. If you're 6ft or taller you will not be able to sit comfortably in the seats. Don't even bother wasting your time here.
They are way overpriced, inexperienced and unknowledgeable. Owner would not admit to their mistakes or make them right. They also think you're going to pay to redo their mistakes!! Horrible.

I liked the decorations, its a nice atmosphere, the food is good, but I wouldn't call it great. It tries to be fancy but its not! the service was great though... I have been here 3 times and I havent been disappointed
Went there Thursdays April 30 got food poisoning really bad put my aunt in hospital for 5 days DONT EAT THE COLESLAW

This Frys scares me. The one in Oro Valley is much better..everyone seems happier up there too. I try desperately to not use this location, but sometimes it just can't be helped. One time I stopped just to use the restroom and thought some middle school girls were going to mug me. Good times!
Terrible pizza. Xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxzxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
Love everything about this place the food was wonderfully seasoned and portions are great.

I posted earlier about a exchange without a receipt. I located the receipt and it clearly states you can exchange without a receipt. This manager and store owner are violating the law and there own policy. Beware!!!!!

Very nice cemetery. There's a lot of Asian tombstones here and they allow the burning for the ancestors. I come here couple of times a year for tomb sweeping day and the Double Ninth festival. It's quiet and very peaceful.
Damn Good! Best fried chicken I've ever had!!! Stayed hot through the last bite:) Peach cobbler was so delicious:P Lots of food! Stuffed!
All u can eat including worms! Mgr said it was broccoli, didn't want to refund me, & offered a gift card. No thx!
It did not seem right that you came to buy this store that is an hour from my house and turned out to be closed at 6pm which was the reason who knows?
Took forever to get my bagels which were not very New York, and didnt taste very good either considering I paid $15 for 2 breakfast bagel sandwiches

Alligator bites are a must for those just wanting to give them a try. :) My Coterie burger was good. French fries maybe a little overdone. Husband had a mixed platter with gumbos but it had a little too much salt for those on a low sodium diet. Would probably skip for a lower sodium place but tasted good.

Very good service, and the dim sum was pretty decent. I was particularly impressed with their spicy soup dumplings--which were spicy enough to be surprising. Good cocktails, too. It was also quiet enough to talk to my dinner date, so that was nice.
Amazing coffee, and sweetest baristas. The outdoor seating area is very busy, but worth the wait.

3.5 stars. Great location, very good selection on wines and margaritas. Overall, the food lacked a bit of punch for my taste and was a bit on the sweet side. The signature guacamole, the shrimp tacos and the short ribs were all ok, but not memorable. Nevertheless the location is great and the personal amazing. Go there for a drink and to relax!
Food is great, beer is great, atmosphere is great. One of my favorites. Order the sexy fries, you won't regret it.

I visited Azie for the first time alone - and it sure won't be my last. Expensive - yes - but I had impeccable service on the (now open) rooftop deck and tried the delicious (and huge) Chicken Noodle (rice noodles) soup. Simple - but great. Good selection of cocktails, too. Can't wait to come back and try more.

Thursday night I ordered the Caribbean Chicken Taco Salad. The menu indicated it was "jerk" but there was no seasoning on it so it had no taste. Was not impressed by the food; the view was great because it was on the water and you could see the sunset. I did try my friend's clam chowder and it tasted good.
Good rolls, we enjoyed a tuna lover and a Mexican roll. Mexican was the better of the two. We will be back!
The best thing here is the gin and tonics... food is less than mediocre to say the least. I had hoped that their food game would be better but unfortunately it's not.
Excellent Nudy's food and service as usual. Parking lot was a huge plus!

Another dive bar on South Grand. PBRs are their specialty, which isn't really saying much about the place. The biggest draw is their big (yet totally empty) dance floor complete with DJ and house/hip hop music. Drinks are cheap...other than that, not much of an ambiance.

Wow lot's of mixed reviews. I've been here three times, some of the food was excellent (Thai fried rice, boneless ribs) while some was so-so, nothing was bad as to warrant a negative rating. Service was good, place was clean but not fancy, prices are reasonable. A-OK.

Food selection and service was good. The food took too long to arrive at the table after we ordered it. My meal was warm not hot as was the other 2 people I was with.The flavor was great but it was rather unfortunate the food was luke warm. I have a feeling it sat awhile as it got busier. Might try again, might not.
Great food great service and very reasonably priced. The breadth of menu and the quality is awesome.

This is one of the better places I've been to in LA for a good meal. Prices are reasonable and the staff are friendly. Happy hour specials are really good. I had the creole trilogy it is very good. Give them a try I think you'll like it.

I have dined at State and Fig twice...really good. Third try was beyond a BUST From start to kind of finish, staff was rude and indifferent. I waited 30mins for a table and 15 mins was waiting for the table to be cleared. I finally gave up and went to Anderson's and had great experience

Went there and had a dip nail service. Tech was balancing 3 people and my dup peeled off within two weeks. I imagine this would be okay for a quick manicure or pedicure but any other nail service will be extremely rushed and any designs will become expense quick.

Stopped into this place off the beaten track. Excellent meatball sandwich. Excellent deal, sandwich, chips, drink and a cookie for less than 13 bucks. Sat at a table under a tree with my dog. They even brought out some water and some little ham slices for my dog. I suggest giving it a try.
Close quarters, quaint... AMAZING. We had the sheep's milk ricotta app and then the fideua and octopus mains. Incredible food. I almost went back an hour later for another portion of octopus.

This location is right in congested center city, which is notorious for no parking... and sure enough it was wall to wall packed. I'm not screwing with fkn parking around here... now I have to wait until I'm near another location later this week, thanks a lot.
This is the SLOWEST drive thru we've ever been to! So much for a quick drive thru on our road trip. Unacceptable! Been waiting now for 10 minutes!!!!!!!!!!!

Finally!!! I've been looking for decent Mexican for awhile and Senor Tequila doesn't disappoint! The server was great and our food was fabulous! We had he Enchiladas Supremas and the Enchiladas Verdes. They were both excellent. I can't wait to come back!

I came for a business trip. The hotel staff are wonderful. The food and snacks were great except the smoothies. The rooms, meeting rooms, and public bathrooms were very clean, and staff always had smiles on their faces. The only thing I didn't like is that the rooms are NOT equipped with refrigerators or microwaves.

The sandwiches are good here, the only thing is issues with business hours. FB, google, website indicate the store opening at 8, however no one there till 9:15, even 9:30. If you don't open at 8, please update your information so we don't call or wait at your cafe.

Kinda upset when i got my food honestly because they didn't give me what i actually ordered and i live to far to drive back, and the wings aren't all they're hyped up to me, the fries are great tho chips and salsa take it off the menu pizza is great tho
Slow service and pizza was so so....waited for 15 minutes before we had to get up to ask for a waiter.
In the land of hoagies EVERYWHERE, its hard to stand out, but these guys manage. Generous portions of quality foods and good prices is why its worth a drive past a dozen other hoagie joints.

After a lengthy discussion on the telephone regarding what was wrong with my truck (fuel lines) i was assured that they could fix it. two days and $50 later - i get a phone call telling me otherwise....friendly enough service, but i'll never take a vehicle to them again.

Absolutely terrible !!! They have a sign for a special when you walk in the door. Crawfish $3.99 a pound. They forgot to mention its Chinese crawfish!!!! The fried oysters have so much batter ya can't find the oyster

Hands down my new favorite Breakfast spot! Great selection, excellent healthy options. Super fresh ingredients which the chef and cooks make magic with. Fresh juices made on site are a MUST HAVE, refreshing! Love the modern farm chic look of the restaurant, and enjoyed the friendly smiling staff I will be back for sure!
Visited 2 months Beautiful locale Service was a bit inept Food was fair at best Prices were outrageous
Fast, reasonably priced, delicious. I will definitely be ordering takeout from here on the regular.

Now that the newness has worn off, i went again to Cheddars with a friend that used to work there . I had the benefit of knowing what to order this time and it was a decent meal. Again, hard to avoid the fried foods and the cheese... however the service was good and the atmosphere better than before.

Sushi is not fresh. Rice does not have good taste which every sushi fan knows rice is sometimes what makes or breaks the sushi. I've tried this place three times cause I love sushi and live in LV but this place is not worth your time.

Bathrooms are nasty. They have a pit area for your animal to pee or poop, comes with fire hydrant and fake grass, it was cleaner than the bathrooms; I was thinking of doing my business there but didn't have any baggies.
Simply amazing. The grilled oysters were out of this world. Don't miss this place if your in New Orleans
Went to see DL Hugley. The comedians were great, opening acts too. Service was great. However, the hamburger was a soybean patty with no flavor at all. Drinks were good though.
Carol is amazingly talented and an incredible soul. I'm so grateful I had the opportunity to have a facial with Carol!

I am definitely very fond of this place. Nice location with outside seating by the waters. Beautiful view of the ocean. Friendly, knowledgeable service from waitstaff and good food! I like my table side sangria as well. It was fun to watch someone making it right by your table despite it being a little light on the alcohol content.

The mocha is good. It really is. I wanted to get one of their fancy flavored coffees but was in a rush and their drip brews take 15 minutes. I'm excited to come back and try more of what they have to offer. Like everywhere in Nashville, parking sucks.

The main courses, drinks, and desserts are all great. The service is usually average and the wait time to be serviced sometimes takes longer than average. My ex-wife really liked this place so I'm giving 4 stars instead of 3.

Waitress was really nice and funny, shot out to Jayme. Oysters were extremely fresh. Bloody Mary's were bottomless and some what decent. The other food was alright. Nothing too special here but I'd you're hungover and need some food to get you through this place would suffice.
As usual, the appetizer order totally sucked. The server was sweet and attentive - food mediocre at best.
We came in yesterday for lunch. Tacos were great! Our server Zoey was super sweet and accommodating! Great experience!
2 day stay and the place was nice enough. However, service was spotty. Towels were missing, robe was dirty and ripped. Someone is missing the attention to detail on this location.
It's honestly a hit or miss with this restaurant. Either your bowl turns out amazing or mediocre.
So professional! They were great at communicating with and had the best rate! We stan Bronco towing!
I downloaded this app just to tell everyone not to come here. Just please save yourself the time. This place should be shut down.

I want to know what the post offices policy on mail carriers smoking in their delivery vehicles, yesterday I received a package with my prescription from the pharmacy and the stale smell of cigarettes was nauseating to say the least. Is this allowed by the post office because I think it's terrible for my medicine to smell like stale cigarette smoke, does anyone know?
Another great night at House of Brews after a Lake Park hike! The outdoor seating is a total win!! Our group enjoyed dinner under the stars with great food and company!
I found myself an interesting variety of quickly fried Indian flour goods. I chose Chakki Fresh Chappathi Atta. Baking is a science while cooking is an art. Maybe I am better at science.

I don't mind a pricey burger but they have no life to them ! They're simply average burgers. Iv tried this place twice and left unimpressed and disappointed. I have thrown in the towel and will not return!
This is our first trip to Nashville. The music playing was great, the bartenders were awesome. They were on it! Keeley and Chad were awesome!!!!! They made the evening. Thanks again.
Atmosphere was decent but very loud. The price for drinks was pricey (beer & shots)! Seems like it would be okay for happy hour.

I like coffee. I like good coffee. Ritual? Great. Blue Bottle? Phillz? Stumptown? All good. This is not. Like, it's really bad. But I'll give them two stars for friendly service and a tasty beef empanada. But man. Don't do the coffee. It really is quite terrible. Like, remarkably. You've been warned...

The service is impeccable. The menu is a direct representation of having specialty items and doing them well. I eat and could eat one or more everyday. I love the Sweet potato currry and the veggie curry. I have half of my work going here. It's by far the best truck on the strip. It's always jumpin, and the prices are fair.
Nice tasty sweet home-made sauce with apple in it. Generous portions; a local historic institution! Oh. My. Check out their peach cobbler. They make all their own Goodness.

Tried this new peruvian-style rotisserie chicken place, and was very impressed. Chicken was tender, fantastic flavor, great sauces, and an excellent value. I only wish they weren't so skimpy on the sauces - the little cups weren't enough. Will just have to order extra the next time. Overall, highly recommend.

My husband and I avoid this store, only using it for last minute items. We much prefer the Giant shortly down Baltimore Pike, or the Giant on Township Line Road. Produce selection is limited and poor. Often our produce is damaged or rotted. Limited organic selection, with limited non-dairy creamer options. They recently removed self check out lanes, so lines are often longer.
Staff seems pretty incompetent. My lid was super cracked and so I spilt hot coffee all over my shirt. I would go elsewhere. Save yourself a stain.
The food is what it's supposed to be but my god do they get my order wrong almost every time I come to this location. I don't know if it's a faulty speaker or the employees but it's so frustrating.
Excellent food. Fast friendly service. Platters are big enough for two people to share, even if you are moderate eaters. Custom spiciness on some dishes.

Decided to eat here because everything in downtown Kenner was closed! I had a salad which was good. The ladies working here were super warm and nice. The black coffee was very watery and I asked them if I can have another cup. The second one was still watery yet it wasn't as bad as the first.
Pretty good food and nice scenery. The food is a little over priced for deli sandwiches. But other than that I enjoyed m my visit

Been coming here almost since they opened. Movie theater improved, but the rest of the place is stuck in the 70s. I really wish they would improve the food court. 2 Chinese, 2 pizza and a chic-fil-a do not make me want to stay and eat. Lots more options across the street in target and Wal-Mart shopping centers.
Food was terrible. Literally tasted like they opened some canned Food and put on plate. No flavor what so ever.
Let down! Over priced and not worth it. There is much better local coffee in the area. $16 for 2 Americanos and two bakery items and it was all mediocre.
Usually the pharmacy staff is very well organized and pleasant. They are knowledgeable and friendly. The rest of the store is fine as well. It's hard to screw up that up. Usually has sufficient staff

Really expensive for a noodle bowl, buuuut, it's also really really really good. Atmosphere is a bit meh as it feels like you are in a garage, and I hope you like loud hip-hop while you eat, but again the food was awesome. Really small menu which is fine, but the cost of adding things to your bowl is way overpriced.
Love having beer and wings but not so crazy about the food. Service is always decent, I really like the idea they have good spaces for larger groups.
Avoid! Avoid!! Food was decent service from hostess was horrendous!!! Our server was doing the best he could but if it's a busy night stay away they obviously cannot accommodate or handle crowds.

My friend had the gumbo and I loved it. I also had the stuffed crab which felt reheated and overall cheap like I could get it at a fast food place. Even though the fries were good. It still felt like leftovers.

Just got the worst super nachos I've ever had at this location, asked for no olives, got a shit to of olives. Sat in the drive through for 10 minutes, such a waste of time and $$$. Do yourself a favor and go to Super Burrito, bigger, better and cheaper.

Great experience with CertaPro! This past year they painted my complete exterior of my home and a few of my rooms inside. Sean and Paige were great to work with. They were able to work around my hectic schedule and answer any questions I had. The painters gave quality work and cleaned up after themselves. Will definitely use them again!

The Bellemeade location is constantly understaffed in the AM. The line is usually out the door around 7am. Don't go if you are in a hurry. There is typically 1-2 people making the food and running the register. Foods is good if you are willing to wait a long time.
Awesome little diner& cafe !! The Tesla breakfast was soooo good. Mild chorizo sausage w/ homemade Russian dressing the best!!

Received my sons's school picture from them. He had tomato sauce all around his face from lunch. You think they would have had the decency to tell him to wipe his mouth first. Just terrible. What a waste.
Exquisite cocktails (The Future Ball) plus a delicious steak. Can't go wrong.

The line out this place always astounds me. I've given this place a few chances, and the food just fails to impress. It's just one of those places that people think they're getting a good deal at, like it's a thing. It isn't.

Ah, Nicole-- it saddens me to see you don't apperciate the deep fried taco. For godsakes-- its a taco deep fried (lettuce, cheese, and meet in all!) If it werent for Jack in the Box I probably would have died a few times Minus one stay because its very existance encourages drunk driving.
This is an updated review after trying their gluten-free shroom burger and fries. The gluten-free bun was thick and soft, but a bit crumbly. The fries were very good. Overall great GF burger.
Food was good table side salsa was good server was cool but the 2 girl hostesses were rude

Sat down at the bar to watch the Sunday night game and was virtually ignored by the bartenders who were preoccupied with dividing tips and b.s.ing with co-workers. Despite a near empty bar I had to go out of my way to get their attention when I needed something. Too bad because the food was excellent.
"I have more beers than I am out of" best quote ever! If you want a drink stop in but it is a hole and it is meant to be a hole.
Horrible service and extremely rude staff. Food was ok at best. Definitely will not return or reccommend

We got our wedding cake here and it was half frozen, very dry, stale, and ugly. My husband wanted to take it back as soon as our reception was over while still wearing our wedding clothes because NOBODY would eat it. We paid $300 for it and ended up throwing 90% of it away.

Great place with amazing music playing all the time and good chill vibes, always fun to stop by. The kava and Kratom are awesome! Not to mention they also have a very cool CBDoobie which I have never seen before! They are only open till 9pm though so watch out, the hours on here are wrong.
I am not sure what the draw is for this place. It's kind of a crappy roast beef sandwich. The fries were at least decent. I could never eat there again and be just as happy
Ordered takeout for breakfast and it was great. Potato's with the pepper and onions were awesome. Haven't been there for lunch/dinner in a while but I remember it being just ok.

I went here for my sociology project and I tell you its disconcerting. Within minutes of arriving I'm swarmed by their campus ministers, trying to get my phone number, touching me (without my permission) to pray for me. Go for a laugh leave before they get you.

October 21, 2016 We ordered pizza from the Red-L. When it came to paying for the order we asked for the bill to be split in two. Red-L refused. Apparently what every eating establishment does with out a blink-of-the-eye Red-L will not do. Shame on you Red-L.
Chef Geno Betz is very talented young chef. If you have not tried his cuisine, I highly recommend a trip. Cocktails are spot on with great balance. Their selection of whiskeys and bourbons is a plus.

Nothing really special here, but everything is decent. Decent food, decent draft beers. They have cheap pints on Thursdays, which is a great value. They also play the sound for IU basketball games, which is never a bad thing.

Major fail at the Delta marketplace this evening nothing like paying $50 and having your food look like this when you receive it. See the pictures. Better off going off premise for food or ordering delivery late night. Panini not even cooked and pizza toppings just thrown on.

Mediocre accommodations. Bad service. I waited for over 20 minutes to check in because they had 3 workers with over 25 people in line. Room service was horrible as they gave me an expired soda and when I complained they sent another soda up...EXPIRED!! Managers were less than willing to call back to deal with the situation.

Good coffee and a nice, relaxed space. Very friendly staff. Not the cheapest but they have specialty drinks and they donate their profits. Rather spend money supporting a local company that gives back than Starbucks or DD.
Empty shelves and trash bags for bags. It looks like they are closing their doors. Maybe they are but if they're not the store is in horrible shape.

Great food, awesome service. In the heart of fat city in a colorful building. I originally thought it was the lame hot dog place that used to be there, but upon closer look, I realized it was a new place. Very highly recommend!

Service is NO service. Was taking over 2 weeks for them to get a standard part in. They kept stalling and giving excuses. There was no attempt to keep the customer informed. Had to go with another repair service because of a loss of confidence in the ability of this company to repair our washing machine.
I watched a server pick up pastries with bare hands to bring to the main restaurant. My service wasn't great. Slow and he seemed annoyed.
Yuck, yuck, yuck. Gross food, gross bathrooms, gross dining room. I like Taco Bell but visiting this one was regretful. At least the staff was polite.
The name says is all. Overpriced. They have cute stuff, but all out of my budget. Even the sale items. Staff was nice.
Amazing! Probably the best grits I've ever had. My husband had the beef tenderloin and that was amazing as well! We'll definitely come back to New Orleans just to eat here again!
Wow! Great red sauce. The Nero pasta is outstanding the sauce is made with squid ink and has amazing flavors. We will return here again.

Incredibly speedy breakfast service: Seconds over two minutes from order time to being handed my meal at the drive-thru window! Naturally, that means there was no one in front of me. However, coffee creamers were out of stock, which meant black coffee (who can drink that stuff?), and napkins were forgotten (how does that happen for a take-out order?).
Excellent food and amazing service. Diverse menu with lots of delicious options to choose from.

I really wanted to like this place. Atmosphere was great, nice staff, good wine selection. In fact, i recommend coming here for a drink - just don't bother with the food! The cheese plate wasn't bad. However, everything else was below sub-par. Not good. Bland. Overpriced.

I've only ordered delivery a few times and take-out once. I have had a few of their chicken dishes and they were all solid but not spectacular. The food neither dazzles nor disappoints; it is standard tasty Chinese take-out. I have not tried their sushi so I can't comment on that. I do like their decent prices, speedy delivery and good service.
Ok place to get eyebrow threading, had only one person doing eyebrows and there were people waiting. Take the time and go somewhere else if you can.

This location is awful sat in my car for 40 min before they even started to bake it took 70 min to get notified order was ready but was then told by store my order was not ready. Don't use this location
Just went through the drive thru and ordered 2 buttered biscuits. When I got home I discovered that I had two plain biscuits, NO BUTTER.

Parking is additional cost. Wifi is additional also unless you're an Elite Marriott Rewards member. You have to drive into the airport to get here. I guess for people who are going to fly with no cars, it would be ideal. There was also no fridge.

This place really sucks - it smells it is falling apart. This should be an embarrassment for the Hilton chain Attached is an example from my room. The lining on the floor is coming off. Very disappointing

Everyone who works here is on sedatives. They're all completely useless and being paid way too much to do a mediocre job. Never had more packages lost in transit after being sent from this branch. They should be investigated.

Really bad costumer service, but ok food :/ Girl was not smiling and really not welcoming. Overall some of the workers were nice and didn't have an attitude but I will definitely not be coming back as i didn't feel welcomed at all.
Nice place but unfortunately their song selections Is 4 pages. Very disappointing. Never been to a place that didn't have more than that.

Whoever is managing the store is not doing a very good job. I came in for the buffet and there was no pepperoni and everything else was half gone and 10 minutes later there's no pizzas and we're still waiting for for new ones to come out
I've been coming to this salon for years. Staff is quick, thorough and conditions very clean & sanitary. I only use this salon.
Excellent Caesar salad. The waiter was respectful and professional. Food was on time and fresh. Had a blast for lunch with my Queen.
Amazing food!!! Great ambience. Great service!!! We will probably go here every time we are in the Boise area from now on. The wonderful waitress recommended our meal choices & they were fabulous.
No more delivery.... Was told as I ordered.. Fine.. Ordered from another place... Guess your slow demise has started

We went for the first time over the weekend. We had the 4 course tasting menu with wine pairings. The food was unique, inspired and delicious. The tables were spaced far apart, so the dining experience felt private and intimate. Ruben is clearly passionate about his restaurant and would definitely recommend.
The food here is so good. Huge portions and great prices. I will definitely be back here!! The cheesesteak is my favorite!!

I travel halfway across town every time I need to have a duplicate key made, because I know they will get it right the first time, unlike the big box franchises. (i'm a realtor and so I need duplicates often)
I got a chicken salad there the other night got it home and discovered that the lettuce was brown and dead underneath the chicken and the vegetables. I was very disappointed.

Service was great. My Shrimp and Grits were pretty tasty although I'd rather had smaller shrimp verses the monsters that were served. My wife's salad was very average. The chicken wasn't served as how it was described to her. Atmosphere wise, the place had a pretty cool vibe.

Why did I order turkey with cheese when they only give a tiny, and mean mean damned tiny sliver of cheese? What there'll did I pay for? That wasn't on one sandwich, but two. This place gives the bare minimum of ingredients on a sandwich. I feel so ripped off. Only good thing was the fries. Won't be back.

Came in right at the end of their buffet time, however they let us use the buffet before breaking it down. The food was okay. My friend said that the chicken curry dish tasted like Chef Boy R Dee ravioli sauce. I sort of agree. The garlic naan was really good, and the tandoori chicken was decent.
Food was ok.. staff was condescending and seemed annoyed. Sorry for showing up wanting to spend money... you'd sell more beer if you knew what was on the list

Overpriced. There was nothing special about these tacos. You can go across the street to Chipotle for cheaper. A tiny little side of guacamole (maybe 4oz) cost 3.00. You have to pay for all the tiny sides. My husband asked for hot sauce and they didn't put it in the bag. I won't be back.

Customer service person on the phone seemed so uninterested in helping. She mumbled so I could barely hear. Their online appointment schedule system for servicing does not match how they actually schedule and charge for services. Because of that phone conversation I am taking my business elsewhere.
Great local brewery with friendly, welcoming staff and a nice selection of beers. Food was yummy and quick. Would recommend doing 5oz servings of a few different styles of beer.

A friend and I went back yesterday - and I had almost the exact opposite experience. The girl helping us was bright, cheerful and very helpful and got me to try a peanut butter ganache that was fantastic. My friend had the pumpkin cheesecake and said it was passable (she's a fiend for that stuff).
Excellent Pho, great service, lovely family run byob. I prefer my food with more spice, but would still return .

Just moved to the Kennett area and was hoping this would be a good go to for Chinese. Second time here and average at best. Crab cheese wonton way too sweet. Boneless ribs almost candied. No shrimp toast. Bourbon chicken and house special lo mein bland. General Tso's chicken good flavor but not spicy. Food is only warm. Still looking...

Food is usually pretty good. Had reservations for several people for my daughters birthday party. The day of the party NOF&S called and cancelled my reservations. They said because it was "Martin Luther King" day. They were opened but wouldn't allow my reservations. Needless to say it was a little late for me to get anything else set up. Extremely disappointed. Keith
Super cute donut shop and great selection! Took my toddler here and he loved the sprinkle donuts...We will be back!
Beer specials are good. Bartenders are attentive but the servers are terrible. So my advice is sit at the bar for quicker service. They have really good hamburgers as well.
Fish and chips tasted like grease. Lovely location but can't eat the ambiance! I had a chicken cashew salad which was pretty good.
i tried the jerk chicken. not my favorite. i think the macaroni had a mustard taste. considering the fried chicken in the future.

Great addition to the neighborhood! Family friendly, great customer service and delicious pizza! We tried the Meat pizza, the Veggie, the Buffalo Chicken and the Cheese pizza. The dough is really good and it's cool that you can completely customize your pizza. We will definitely return for more.
Color changing souvenir cup! the pretzel was AMAZING, must have. The Miami Vice was so sweet and refreshing. I suggest sesame teriyaki wings my wife said they had the best fish tacos in the area!
It's really alot of fun, but is a busy place. Not really a hike per se, more of how much work out you really want to do. Views are just crazy good.

Sure it's cheap, but yet the chicken was really dry and the rice too. My whole family ended up going to the bathroom late this night. They also need to fix their microphone because they can barely hear so I had speak super loudly.

Delicious meal! A little pricey but the food was pretty decent. It is right across the street from the Hyatt Regency where my group was staying so it is conveniently located, also near several other large downtown hotels. They have an area in the front of the restaurant over looking the street for group packages.

This place is awesome! Alan runs a very clean, respectful, fun place. All instructors and fellow students are welcoming. I dropped in a year ago and decided quickly that I was in for the long haul. Very thankful to have such a fantastic place to train on the southside of Indy. Highly recommend!
If you like uppity attitude, not alot of food, and no flexibility with their dishes, this is the place for you!

A neighborhood "gem" with lots of potential. Dive bar at it's finest. Drinks are pricey for a dive. Lots of games and a pool table. Smoking is still allowed so not the cleanest of places. The crowd is all regulars and some obnoxious characters. Good place for a snow day.

This restaurant has changed. The dining experience was less than average. Although the food was good and the service was reasonable. They ran out of Cutlery and dishes and several other things very disorganized and I would not recommend

This is a good enough local place to get drunk at. A nice place to blackout at. But not a 5 star place. Have realistic expectations. That's not to say it isnt fun, but miller lites and darts is what it is. Cheers
Eat here all the time, great prices, sometimes the food is great some times its not. They are a little unorganized when busy. Main reason I go here are prices.
Jeff from Safelite replaced my windshield last Saturday. He was pleasant, personable, and professional. Someone who enjoyed what he was doing. Jeff/Safelite comes well recommended!

The donair pizza is delicious, and I love the people working there! Even if I buy just one pizza, they give all four of my kids a slushee. How nice is that? Not much on ambiance, but I'm getting the pie to go, anyway. Nitza's is always our first choice for pizza!

Food was excellent but when asked to honor their yelp offer of 10% off our bill for checking in and reviewing their business, We were told that they would not honor the deal until our next visit even though the yelp countdown said we had 4 hours to redeem the deal. Great food, but bad business practice :(

I would drive 100 miles to visit Crust. Consistently finger licking baked goods. Some of my favorites: the pistachio cardamom bun is outrageously tasty and yet so delicate. And the cranberry coffee cake bar is the breakfast treat I've always dreamed of. The absolute winner is the oatmeal raisin cookie. Cookie perfection. Only a fifteen minute drive from central Philly. Go! Go!
They contacted me and provided a refund. For this reason I have adjusted my review, since they are attempting to make things right.

Just not good at all. Crust was dry and tasteless, toppings not very good and kind of sparce, not much cheese and the pizza was undercooked. Inwanted to like this place but was majorly disappointed and wouldnt give it a second chance. Santa barbara needs to step up its pizza game

Excellent lunch buffet with many great veggie options. The food is fresh and flavorful and the price very reasonable. The owner is a nice guy and is committed to giving back to help others as well as providing healthy meals to his customers.
Outdoor patio is great, bartenders and waitresses during Saturday shift, excellent. They were very busy, food was great and nice atmosphere and clean. Will be back.
I thought this place was gross. I like GOOD pizza....
Tiramisu tasted great!... Until my friend and I really had to go to the bathroom. I'll just leave it at that. We aren't lactose intolerant either.

Its an OK place to meet for happy hour after work. Other than that I wouldn't recommend it. The drink prices are ridiculous and the food is not that great. If you get happy hour drink specials its a decent bargain but other than that way too expensive for what they are serving.

Trash. Woman working the food truck was ignorant and rude. We asked her questions about her menu and she said "you should have looked up the trucks before you came". No wonder a lot of people stayed clear because of her negative attitude.

the food was okay. I ordered a vermicelli platter, which is $24 on the online menu and it's came out $34. The tofu is kinda dry. The waiter is not really pay attention to the customers. Will try again and hoping sencond time visit will have a better experience

The s/o had the hot chocolate signature martini and I had the milk chocolate martini. They were both quite strong! I didn't finish mine :( it was delicious though... We shared a cheese plate... truthfully, you pay for the ambience. It is so romantic and quaint. Great date night.

This was my first time getting my nails done in Manayunk, so I wasn't sure which salon on Main St to choose but I am so glad I picked this place! Mary was my nail tech. She took her time and was very sweet. A week later and my nails still look awesome! I'm hoping my next visit will be just as great.
Adorable atmosphere, great selection, and yummy food! Service was also friendly and phenomenal; so glad we found a new breakfast/ lunch place!

Very good food, but equally long wait. Arrived at 6:40 and seated at 8:15. Great place for hang-out-at the bar drink and eat crowd. But we were table-4-2 and wait was really long. Clam chowder was ok, but not in my top ten.
Nice menu. Fun for families. Fun choices. Great service. Much nicer restaurant environment than stony plain road location and much better service.

Been twice, both times I didnt care for what I ate. Sesame chicken isnt sesame chicken at all. Its a full chicken breast coated in sesame seeds and fried. Served with lemon dipping sauce. Sitting ontop of some super mushy vegetables. It was gross. I won't be returning here.

GREAT fast food. Went to the one on Ina & Oracle last night with my daughter. Very reasonable mexican food. McDonalds no longer hs an interest in the company and maybe that';s why it seems better. Great value!
Got a tuna hoogie, it cost over ten dollars. It had hardly any tuna on it the tomatoes were horrible.It was a five dollar hoogie at best. I'll never go back!!!!!
This place is awesome! They're Hot Salami Sandwich was amazing! Great prices and great food! Also loved the location!
Good ambiance. Very busy bartender but as attentive as possible giving the sitch. Food was ok but just apps so I'll review if I have dinner here.

It is great that this place is open to allow people to satisfy their drunk food cravings. The problem is that the pizza is terrible. It tastes like frozen pizza, and in fact I have had frozen pizza that is better. Would expect more from a place in New Orleans.
Good place for food and drinks. Atmosphere a little depressing. Beer is a good choice for Reno and food is good but can be inconsistent at times.
Very good food !!! The serves are greek and had to repeat what they said so I fully understood
Thanks you for being inclusive and having a wide variety of gluten free options! Several of my family members have celiac disease and they have such a wide variety to pick from here!

You can buy a sandwich here! I got an egg and cheese biscuit and it came wrapped in tin foil! I liked it because if you only open the tin foil half way most of your crumbs will fall into the tin foil and your car won't get so messy!

Exactly what you'd expect from a place named Mother's. Heaping plates of good food, local favorites, and originals (like the Ferdie). Lines are always long and the ordering process is pure chaos. But the food really is just like a top-notch version of your favorite dishes growing up.

This place is falling apart which is a shame because it has so much potential. Our chef did absolutely none of the cool fire tricks that the kids love :/. Food was decent but our waitress was horrid. Bathroom toilets moved back and forth an inch and had water seeping out underneath. I'd stay away from here.
Nice environment and good service however food as nice as it looks wish taste as good. Way overpriced

Loveeeeeee! Cute lil store wih unique items...everything from clothes, glass pipes, incense and everything in between. Only thing, the associate behind the counter (hipster guy with plugs,) not polite! Clearly didn't want to be at work that day. Regardless, the girl that rang us up was more than helpful and it is a great shop! :)

Used them for a large order of cupcakes for a corporate event. Everyone I spoke with over the phone through the process was very friendly and customer oriented. The cupcakes themselves were AMAZING - moist and the perfect texture/sweetness/amount of icing. Would certainly recommend to anyone and I plan to use them again!
Food 85%, Service Vibe 100%, Food Wait: 70% I had the Pineapple Fried rice, my wife the chicken hibachi; IMO the chicken on the hibachi should be more tender. Def coming back.

Dr Chen was fantastic throughout the whole process. He is a quiet doctor but is very meticulous and doesn't "sugarcoat" stuff in his practice. Hospital staff talked really high of him- I would recommend him to anyone looking for precise care.

best little market in the hood! all the employees are so sweet. they make some fab sandwiches and salads at the deli. and the breakfast sandwiches are perfect and cheap. they carry alot of my favorite grocery brands. a bit pricey, but what you expect from a small city market. i love Palm Tree!

Great food and atmosphere! We really enjoyed the food! Reasonably priced for the location and quantities! We will definitely be back on our next trip to Nashville! And goo goo shop is right next door!

Hands down one of the best sushi places I have been to. The only reason I didn't give a full 5 stars was because it took quite a bit of time to get our rolls...having said that, they were totally worth the wait. I will certainly be back.

I enjoyed the meal. However, for being in a out of the way strip mall it was very pricey. I felt like a goober because I dressed casual and they appear to appeal to the executive class.. I should of read the reviews on Yelp first otherwise I would not of stopped.

WARNING: Avoid combining with a heavy night of drinking ahead unless you want to spend the next day on the toilet. Got the Hot spice level and still recovering. The chicken itself, really good though.
The beers ok but really hate a short pour. 14oz in a pint. I mentioned it to the bartender but he said it was a proper pour. You can judge this if you stop by.

I've dined at York Diner many times and have always enjoyed it. Their breakfast is my favorite. Always delicious. I've also enjoyed lunch and dinner, with their extensive salad bar and outrageously delicious Matzah Ball soup. Worth giving a try for a quick meal with good service.

The food is very good, but takeout is ridiculously slow. Also, take note that if you are planning on using a coupon they offer on their Facebook, you must print it out. No exceptions. This was very surprising.

Really did not like this place. It was entirely too crowded and the air conditioning was not working properly (it was actually nicer outside in the August heat!!). They do have a good selection of German beer, but I don't think I saw much of anything else...

Food is good cuz it's primo, but whoever the regular cashier is: douche-bag. Perhaps dont insult your customers when they order something simple, like meat+bread, no toppings. It's not a "kids meal". Have some manners.

Tried this place tonight, will not order from here again. General Tso chicken had no spice at all to it, same with the Szechuan Chicken no heat to it, it was all sweet tasting. Mixed veggies has no taste What so ever. Will be returning to my original Chinese restaurant, GINGER GARDEN IN SILVERDALE, this place is worth the extra time to travel to.
Great food! Great service! The French Toast is Whew!! This is my second time here within a week. This will be one of my go to spots. Cool atmosphere too!!

We get takeout from here at least 2x a month. Always on point. Took a group there for the first time and we should have listened to the reviews. Service was incredibly slow. I had to find someone 3x. Meals came late, overcooked. So disappointing.

Absolutely amazing. Sweet ladies to help you out. Best donuts my three teenage boys had ever had. TONS of variety, something for everyone (adventurous or not!) The whole place smells like the best bread you can imagine.

Poor service and food that lacks flavor or freshness. Most nights they have loud music or are busy playing trivia, this packs the place with many locals and causes getting a seat almost impossible unless you are one of the regulars.
Horrible service. Online order was not ready when it was suppose to. They did not even do our order next. Did ppls order that was in line before ours
Trash! Terrible food. If you down to order some row fried chicken from a late night menu that's your spot!
Jody did an amazing job with my hair! She was incredibly nice, listened to what I wanted, and my hair cut and blow dry came out great! Thank you! I will definitely be coming here regularly :)
Great Mexican food, exceptional service... been here a few times and have never been let down.

Make reservations!!! Super busy!! I loved everything about this place! The decor was great...service was great and informative. We orders several dishes and I loved every single one of it. There was a dish with pork and cabbage and grilled oysters was my favorite dish! I will return!

Hotel is not all cracked up what is...rooms need an upgrade...how does the rooms have no microwave and refrigerator! I mean really...do better! The walls are extremely thin... You can hear everything...

Terrible house keeping. There was no paper tissue or body wash in the room. Housekeeping knocked at our door non stop (until we opened it) very early in the morning to clean it. The hotel said they would issue a $50 discount to the bill for our troubles but they ended up actually adding $50 to the total (rather than subtracting).

!!!!!Bed bugs!!!!!! Checked in, checked right back out. Also had a roach in the bathroom. I've stayed at some seedy motels in really bad areas that weren't this nasty. His is actually the first hotel I've ever had to check out of. I should've listened to the other reviews!

Small and very limited selection of stuff. It is not a supercenter as the title says. It is not even a full Walmart. It is more like half of a Walmart. It would work in a pinch, I guess. I would probably try the target nearby first.
Great oysters. Long line but moves quickly. Kind of a dingy place but that's part of the charm well played Felix's

Was brought here by a friend and I must say, amazing place and the decor was obviously really nice. Thinking of throwing my birthday party here next here. Great staff, nice drinks and good tasting good.
Didn't think the taste of the ice cream was on par with my benchmark ice cream eatery. Service good.
Pretty much awesome. Great people serving scrumptious pastries! They have something for everyone, from vegan options to piping hot soups. Fun little spot in my 'hood.
Almost perfect. Great food, great service... But guess what, it's 2017. Get rid of the smoking on the patio please. Two more stars if you do. You would not lose a cent of revenue.

Easy, convenient Korean restaurant for Tampa Bay. Menu is what you'd expect for Korean restaurant in the states. Sadly true Korean BBQ is not served here. Prices are expensive for what you get and the service is consistently not great. Tip: Seafood pancake is top notch!
For 60 years I have loved this NOLA institution. Today it is filthy. Beignets in a bag. Coffee in a styrofoam cup. Cafe Beignet is much better. Execution, product and friendliness. Sad.

I've been there a few times and food was pretty good each time. We went this weekend and just had a couple appetizers and beers. The chips (potato wedges) and curry sauce was amazing and the red pepper hummus with pita chips was outstanding (although it was not as hummus-y as I'm used to).

Love this place for chicken; however, my last order of "catfish" was not catfish at all. I'm not sure why so many restaurants have moved to swai or whatever and think their customers won't know the difference. Sad....

Mediocre experience at best. Arrived around 12:45 and were told we couldn't have coffee because they close in an hour and don't want to make another pot. Then found that breakfast is only available until ten thirty. A disappointing experience given such positive reviews. Limited options average service and slimy turkey. Won't make the same mistake.
The donuts are not fresh at all...they are frozen for days..you cant eat right away..and each donut is 4 bucks..and the donuts are superweet....spare yourself some time and skip this place

This was the 2nd time we came. Both times it was the same. The service was slow, the waiter was nice but slow. The sushi rolls were small for the price you pay but this being a resort you can expect higher prices, but give me a bigger roll! Otherwise clean and pleasant to sit.

If you like old school diners with original decor, equipment and possibly waitresses ...then here you go. No theme just noises from the kitchen and forks heating plates. I had breakfast which was good for the price with minimal portions. All-in-all not a bad place, but keep in mind...it's diner food.

Great sandwiches! This place is legit european and full of imported goods. The sandwiches are delicious and cheap at about $6. Will definitely be coming back to try more. I ordered the Mary which came on a criossant. Best criossant I ever had it was so flaky and a hint of sweetness. It is really REALLY good you must try this joint!

Customer service is alive and well at this Starbucks location. I had a problem with my Starbucks reward card and went to speak to the manager on site, Felicia. She took care of me very kindly and graciously. Apologized for the mistake. Wow... This doesn't happen now a days. Love their service and coffee. They will have a loyal customer here
This place is a landmark for the natives. For years, they have served the best lunches and breakfast sandwiches- and just super nice people.

I loved my nails and jimmy does a great pedicure. However..this place is very unsanitary. It's not worth the risk of getting an infection or even covid. They don't wipe down anything. It never smells clean. They only care About money. So unfortunate but I can't spend money there anymore. It's that bad. Nothing gets wiped down or sanitized. NOTHING
Great Chinese food! Best in the area by far. Family run, authentic. Regular visits and I've never had anything bad.
nothing special. the margaritas were okay

Someone needs to get the young man with blonde hair behind the counter some help. He was stoned out of his mind. Good ice cream but very odd checking out with someone who wasn't mentally present. Was not clean, all the toppings were mixed together. Need new staff.
Service was great. Food, not bad but no anything special either. Would I come back? Maybe...
Nice, but too expensive for basic Korean . When u pay close to $100 for a dinner for 2 with a couple of drinks. Way too much Korea house is better
This place was busy during lunch time. Had to wait 10 min or so for my order. The burger and fries were usual. Parking is plenty and near other restaurants.

Overpriced dog food! What a joke. This place make Red Robin look like 5 star dining. I can't believe I just paid $15.00 for that; a word to the wise, don't order onion rings unless you like raw onions. I brought it to the counters attention and was told, "that's how we make them here!" Ok, I'll be sure to remember that!
I absolutely love harvest! The food is incredible and the drinks and atmosphere always amazing!
Don't go here . It took them over an hour and a half to serve us . Food was cold . Ridiculous .

Honestly the worst sushi I've ever had. I was so disappointed not sure if it was because I went an hour before they closed but the sushi was not fresh at all. I ate 3 pieces of the sushi rolls and I had to stop. I ordered to go so I really couldn't do anything about it.
I wish I could rate with zero star..... But there is no such option. THE CUSTOMER SERVICE is SUCKS. !!

Lots of sweets, massive sizes. Looks delicious but way too big for the avg customer. I got a regular coffee which was disappointing. Actually, I had coffee at 6 different places in Broad Ripple (Monon, Perk Up, Rise and Roll, Einstein Bagels, Hubbard and Cravens) and thought they were all awful.

I live close to here so I go to brunch here on Sundays 1-2 times a month. I get the Belgian waffle with all the toppings. It's delicious but I really haven't had a bad Belgian waffle anywhere. It's always a zoo, packed and loud on Sundays but the line still moves fast.
Kids loved bowling at Woodland tonight. They provide a positive environment. Wish we could go all the time.

Charles Bradley killed it and nothing can ruin his show because of his big, beautiful heart. But. The sound on the horns was excruciating. Horns are supposed to sound like the badass, sassy angels that they are, not knives driving into your scull. Even the sax, the chillest and smoothest of all the angels was killing me. It was a pretty big disappointment.

Busch stadium is a good facility with a less than great concessions company. I'm not sure who sets the prices but everything is much higher than most other parks in the country. To Delaware North's credit, just when I thought nobody cared about the customer, they did everything they could to make it right. I commend them for this.

The salon is clean, comfy massage chairs with a edgy city feel. I have been getting pedicures for about 1 year here. I always have a pleasant relaxing experience. My pedicures are with Savon. She is very sweet, attentive and gives you an excellent pedicure.

We will never eat from this place again!!! Spent $60+ for lg. Flounder sandwich that was frozen deep fried dried out, couldn't get fries the cheese potato skins & burger was dried out as well. The food is GOD awful & overpriced for what you get!!!

Stay away from these guys. They will approve you to put you in a sale that you can't really afford just to meet their numbers. They low ball your trade in as well! Highly don't recommend. I've also called to get service done and they never call back. Had to take my vehicle to another GMC dealer to get it resolved.
Meh. I miss Genaurdi's... This is basically the same thing as the old Genaurdi's minus the community/ family feel to it. No personality... At least they were able to keep Chet :)

Over all service was okay but the nail tech did not understand what I wanted so I kind of left unhappy still trying to find a place in Nashville for my nails prices where okay but I hate leaving unhappy or like I'm the one to blame because you don't understand what I'm saying
This place is crap! Worst service ever! Rude server, and took forever to get food when there was no one else there! Never again! Food wasn't even that good!

Delicious, fresh, crunchy on the outside and chewy on the inside. There's no toaster on site but these bagels don't need one! I live close by so I know the times to go to avoid long lines- weekend mornings are obviously the busiest. The people that work there are friendly. This is one of my favorite spots in Fishtown!

Really well done homemade food. Really nice people. Clean country bar kind of look. Catfish very well done and really nice portions. Ribs were lean and tender. Beans and collards were tasty and freshly made. Cornbread was the only disappointment, it was two tiny cubes.

Love this place! Crawfish omelette was savory and delicious. Then for something sweet, the beignet's are sumptuous, a bit of beignet's dipped in coffee is heavenly! The cafe is tiny but quaint, reminded me of little cafe's I had been to in France. The outside patio sits under a huge magnolia tree and is a great place to sit and enjoy your morning!

In this day and age I cannot fathom a reason why this location has no wifi! Not only that but when I questioned the staff on whether this may be available in the future, a staff member recommended that I change internet providers!

If i could give it less than one star, i would. French fries were burned and cold. Hamburger tasted funk and it was cold. They actually ran out of salt. No sauce fir the chili. Should be closed by the health dept. disgusting.

There's almost always a long line at this starbucks and it is usually packed. Because it is so packed, it is not the cleanest or neatest. In terms of drinks, they are usually good and consistent. Service is typically friendly. Sometimes there is a bit of a long wait for your drink.

This is the first time we checked out this restaurant. Kid friendly and decent service. Food was ordinary and my biggest complaint would be spending $6 on an 11 ounce craft beer. Same beer at Bru Burger or The Pint Room would be $6-$7 for a 16 ounce pour. Also the burgers are beer at the other to places I mentioned.
Great food, very different. I had sweetbreads as an appetizer and whole flounder for the main dish.

Fabulous breakfast on Easter morning. We were visiting Philly and wanted a nice breakfast for five. We called about 45 minutes in advance for seats. Stuffed French toast was huge and delicious. Will definitely stop by again when in town by Drexel/U Penn.

Decent Chinese good but like most people the crab rangoon is great! I would just go to eat that alone! But portion are large and service is fast. Expect to wait during their peak times even if you order to go.
Good selections. Reasonably good quality salad bar. I was on a business trip and this store solved my need for fresh fruits and salads. Very helpful staff.
This is a great restaurant and great owners. My husband was impressed with the food that we ordered from take out while we were out of town. They can accommodate to vegetarian which is wonderful too.

Lauren is amazing and cares so much for my dog Sugar. She is caring, professional, offers caring suggestions, trains well and is all around the real deal. I know she cares and loves my dog just as much as we do.

Seriously some of the worst service times I have ever experienced via a drive-thru. I am sure it is partially due to the layout of the drive thru ordering screen vs. The window. They can only take and prepare one order at a time. The inside of this location is greasy!

I get a great haircut here. Haircut is 5 stars but owner is not a St. Louis Cardinals fan. He turned OFF game 5 of round 1 playoffs in the 1st inning cause he doesn't like Baseball. It's not about YOU. It's about your customers.

Based off of my first and only visit, arrived at 12:30pm on a weekday, got piping hot pepperoni and sausage slice. It was exceptional, crunchy bottom layer, soft in the middle, and not too dense. Perfect combination for Sicilian style and reasonably priced.

A decent place for true Indian food and sweets. They are a bit on the expensive side. The atmosphere is very basic with a few TVs playing Indian programs in the background. The restaurant is on the small side, but clean. I would definitely go back.

Needed an old Takemine repaired after some fret damage...Thanks Jeff for doing a great job with my AE--you turned the job around in less than a couple of hours with an honest and professional up front--will certainly bring business back to you guys for sure! You guys rock Corner Music!
Solid meal. Got half a pound of crawfish (lots of flavor), fried alligator, and crawfish pie (Cochon is way better). Great service! Loved the guys at the bar.
Nice spot to hit if you're in a hurry. Pastries are decent. Espresso based drinks are bland, and the milk was too hot

looked here for our rehearsal dinner. food is expensive, and not as good as it should be for the price. Service was only ok, servers were pretty unresponsive to our needs. Restaurant was pretty loud. They didn't seem at all like they cared to put in any extra effort to become our choice as a rehearsal dinner venue.

Omg Michelle!!!!! She literally is an artist with scissors! I've been trying to get just the "right look" for over a year now and jumping from salon to salon. Thank the heavens I found Michelle! Not to mention, an extra expert with curls (hard to find). I'm so so happy with my recent first two cuts by Michelle!!

Today, Tuesday, July 8. Well, I didn't even get past the order for a cake! The man waiting on me was so rude!! He obviously didn't want to help me or have my business. When I asked specific questions he was very curt with his answers. So...I moved on and they will NOT be getting my business ever!!
Food was not so good and service was even worse. They got our order wrong. Even after repeating it back to us. The food was overcooked. And tasted like it had been sitting for a very long time.

I take my 2 year old here for haircuts and Rich is great with kids. I've gone to several places - both barber shops and salons, and the haircut here has been the best. $18 seems a little high for a kids haircut, but they're the only place that has given him a great cut!
Boiled crawfish was not well-seasoned and tasted pretty fishy. Doesn't come with corn, potatoes, or wipes, and service was so-so. The other food was good though.
Food was fresh and lively with great use of spices. Staff was very nice and hospitable.
Overpriced, brunch food mediocre. Might be worth it to pop in for the $30 bottomless mimosas, otherwise a thumbs down for me. Overrated:(

We stopped in for lunch during the COVID crisis. They had every other table set up. I had the chicken and waffles and my wife had a burger. The fried chicken was good. Burger was average. Good stop if you want a quick meal.

Very, VERY tasty! Great stop on a date. Yes, the ice cream is $6 and you may have to wait a little for your order, but it's totally worth it. Your ice cream is made by hand after your order, and watching the process is very cool as well. Can't wait to go back.
Great place great food and everyone is so nice . Never had a bad experience and it's own by a women and she is super nice
Bad customer service. The restaurant is below subpar. The bartender is disrespectful and a bigot.

If your entrée comes with two sides, the daily vegetable is one of those sides and they don't let you sub them out. What?!?! So if you don't want them, too bad. You're stuck paying for them. So, that's a reason for me not to go back.. Also, the Keylime pie taste nothing like Key lime. No flavor. Pass on that too
Absolutely the best Chinese Restaurant in town! Great food and fast delivery. It seems that they really care about the quality of their food!!

Rainy day. Stopped in right at 530 p on a weekday. Thought they had good happy hour specials. Had a nice raw bar as well. I didn't see anything special but wasn't bad either. The punch drinks were good but had too much ice.
Great. Clean well staffed. My dog likes stuffed toys. All sizes are $1 there. Many are brand new. Kind of on the small side.

If you want REAL coffee, not watered down, tasteless stuff, stop in & see Adrian! The sandwiches will NOT disappoint either! We had the made as ordered chic salad, it was amazing, the coffee rich & totally satisfying!! We will try the Cuban sandwich & more coffee perfection tomorrow!!!

Rip off! Just received a large(?) plain pizza and two Caesar salads for 45.00????? The pizza was cold and mediocre at best. The "Caesars" were nothing but cut Romaine in a plastic bowl with obviously commercial dressing. 10.00 for a small salad???? The best part of this experience was the pizza box....it was very pretty. Unfortunately, after that, what a disappointment! Never again!

I love this place! Staff of super friendly and helpful! They were kind enough to explain the whole menu and suggest their best items. Their fried chicken is so juicy and all around yummy!! Let's just say we weren't disappointed in any way!! A must try!
