They were positively slammed busy because someone didn't show up for work, but the girls there still rocked it. I know they were overwhelmed but they remained friendly and efficient, despite constant questions and requests from customers. And my chai latte was good, as always.
I've been going to Landis for 5 years or so now, almost always get the same thing - Mr. Jim's Special. Corned beef and coleslaw with russian dressing. Fantastic!
味道不说 这里的两个女服务员跟顾客欠她钱一样，我和我朋友去了好几次了，每次脸都超级臭，是老板给工资低了还是怎么样？ 特别是前台的那个女生，服务可以打负数了，这种人自己去开店吧，做什么服务员啊
After 2 weeks of waiting for a refund i was promised I have yet to recieve the refund as my order was not prepared correctly. such a shame bc the food was amazing.

Do not eat here. They have roaches. Several inspection violations. Read more here. http://pa.healthinspections.us/bucks/scores.cfm?ls=0&hs=100&zc=18940&rel1=organization_facility&rel2=organization_facility&rel3=organization_facility&kw1=&kw2=&kw3=&maxrows=10&search=active&advanced=advanced&form=form&sd=12/01/2015&ed=12/22/2015&id=295600
Very good tour company. We did the St. Louis #1 cemetery tour. Our tour guide was great. He was very knowledgeable and interesting. Oh and I forgot to mention the by 1 get 1 free hurricane.

Stood at the host stand for almost 10mins while being ignored by young children running the front of the house not giving a fuck about the customers. Lost my business for good with that one! One was on her cellphone while taking a to go order and the other was talking with her friend.......
Cryo works. I have some relatively severe orthopedic issues and this really helps with the inflammation and pain. I wish there was a closer option though.
Pricey but decent. Comes with a side (fries or tots). They're very drippy, but have decent flavor.

My husband had the sliders. He felt they were dry. I had the chicken sandwich and which also seemed overlooked. The server seemed preoccupied and not sure where she heptachlor disappearing? Got friendlier at tip time. Not in a hurry to rush back . Too bad because we have enjoyed it in the past.

Good food, cute place, reasonable prices. I went for brunch and my waffle was pretty awesome. The homemade sausage was also very tasty. It's a little cramped inside but that's ok. I would not bring a big group here.
This is a great wawa, w friendly staff and always very clean, even though it is pretty old. The parking lot is crazy, so be careful when you enter or exit through one of the three entrances.
Pretty nasty food. Apple pie was good though

I'm currently making my way through the bar and restaurant scene in Seminole heights. I have to say, Ella's really surprised me. The menu is simple and offers a variety of dishes even vegetarian and gluten free. Food presentation is beautiful and the drinks at the bar were amazing! Check out their bloody Mary's! I need to come back for brunch!

I enjoyed the food and things seemed great until I paid. They charged me 30.00$ for a soup that wasn't listed on the menu. They were unable to explain why I was charged extra and charged me anyway. This really didn't sit well with me and I will not be back.

Food was good, but tiny . Don't expect to eat a lot. Service was slow, and honestly he didn't even the drink special. However, I'm just want to be critical and he was a nice man, it was just a busy night. The price wasn't bad, I mean it's not the best deal around but the atmosphere was good enough to justify the price.
Ordered takeout tonight. I really like their thick crust.
any time i've dined in, i've had a great experience but my latest encounter with santucci's was via delivery. the pizza was sooooooooooooo dry and just generally not tasty.

Have loved Albasha's Baton Rouge location for years now & was happy when found out a Metairie restaurant would be opening. My faves are: hummus, spinach & shrimp, chicken shawrama & moussaka. Pleasant atmosphere.

Ever since Peter McAndrews took over the menu this place jumped up a notch. Food is definitely 5 stars considering you're at a small neighborhood bar. However the beers are overpriced and the bar can get cramped which keeps us from coming often.
Very good and very fresh! They make everything there. Friendly staff. Veggie dumplings, yummy! This is our go to take out!
Never go back again the chicken parm was dry over fried house salad dressing was terrible ...you can get a better tasting sauce from a jar...nothing authentic here.. Pizza was somewhat tasty

The meat selection seemed slightly less than Fogo and some of the meat was a little over cooked for me but overall I thought the dining experience was quite pleasant. The service was amazing! And we will definitely be back. Hoping they will open for lunch in the future. Would highly recommend trying if you haven't already :)

Whoa expensive. I like to pride myself on knowing the prices of groceries, and this place is sometimes 50% more expensive than other places (think, whole foods). Every once in awhile they have good deals on things (2 for $5 arnold bread) but most of the time you're better off going anywhere but here.
Avoid this place at all costs. Everything you want from a hotel will be compromised and you will leave miserable. I don't have time to list all the things right now but stay here at your own risk.

I dealt with these guys' Calgary branch but it's same company as the number that kept correspondence with me had a 780 area code. They quoted me $2388 for a keypad deadbolt and push button door knob that another company charged me a total of $475 for. Yes, you read that right.

Another stop that was a requirement for me. I love the novelty of Lucy's "Shark Attack." I've had the drink on a previous trip to NOLA, and I remember liking it better but for me, the experience of watching the bartender fill a plastic shark's mouth with grenadine and plunging it into my drink, was still worth the walk.

My kale salad has sand in it. Now I am worried if they even wash their vegetables. The pizza is not as good as Zavino's. The service is average. Overall, a very average experience and won't be going again.
This is a fun place to get drinks but I'm not crazy about the sushi.

The best things on the menu would the wings, fried rice (on sale on M/TH), Katsu and the teriyaki chicken. It's always been consistent when I come in and the staff is friendly. Fast and casual and when the weathers good the patio is great to dine on.

You've got to be kidding me. Need a mask and temperature check at the front desk, turn the corner and no one has a mask. Almost like protect the staff and the rest of you go infect each other. Social distancing was not possible. I thought these people actually liked and cared about me. Unbelievable
I got the shredded chicken burrito and it was the most tasteless burrito I ever ate. There was absolutely no flavor to this burrito, it was like eating just a mushy soft cylinder. Yuck!

This place is amazing. I went with a bachelorette party group for brunch and was not disappointed. The atmosphere is so cute and inviting and the food was amazing. I had the crepes with blueberries and peaches. The fruit was FRESH! Everyone at the table was envious.

Do not use!! My neighbor just used to these guys and they charged $400 for one hour of labor and $10 worth of parts!! When they complain, they were told "they charge a flat rate". Can you say RIP OFF!!
The food was good...I was surprised that they were still open, we would eat here in our clubbing days.
They did resurface the drums, made the grinding go away, but the car still does not stop right, and the fuel gauge is not fixed, but parts are on order
good burger. good location. long lines in the summer. if you're in carpinteria give it a try

This is definitely the biggest and best asian market in Boise. The owner is vietnamese but it has little treasures like sichuan peppercorn!! I am from Sichuan, China so I was thrilled with this. Has fresh veggies and market style meat/fish every saturday which is very very busy. Prices somewhat expensive but not rip-off bad, as good as it gets for Boise :).

Food is delicious I give them that but a few workers broke the rule during this pandemic. He made my food wearing no mask at all. Highly dangerous with this Virus going on and health department will know about this matter.
The work was done and they were on schedule. I feel $260.00 to clear a bathroom sink drain was excessive. The tech was here about 45 minutes and 10 of it was spent retrieving tools from his truck.
Just changed their hours to evenings only, 5 days a week. As I was there to try the lunch menu I am pretty disappointed.
This hot box pizza has the best place for a after bar skipping snack lol. The bread sticks are very salty but I still ate them. The workers were friendly and fun. Go have a snack :)

Some good brands and good deals. Picking over the rack can take some time but everything is conveniently organized by size. Watch yourself though. You may have expensive taste. Some items can be 50-90% off and still 100-1,000 dollars! If bargain hunting is your game, this is a fine stop.
My pizza arrived luke-warm and the crust was rock hard. I was pretty excited for this pizza but quickly let down.

It's been a long, long time since I've had a Rooty Tooty Fresh 'N Fruty at IHOP and you know, I'd been missing them without even knowing it. If anything, it's better then I remembered. The coffee was fresh too and the service was very good. The only downside is, wait, there is no downside. For breakfast, this IHOP is the bomb.

My refrigerator stopped running during the latest heat wave. Mike made time for me same day even though he was very busy. Ordered the correct part came back the next day and fixed everything as promised. Can't thank him enough for his service and will definitely keep his number for any additional appliance issues.
This place has definitely changed for the worse since new owners. Very slow and increased prices. Took almost an hour to wash my car and it wasn't busy. Very disappointed and not sure I will return.

Just had a really horrible lunch it took 50 minutes to get two very bad salads and a pizza so loaded with cheese there was no way to eat it. Seriously more than 50 dollars for lunch I am grabbing a sandwich on my way back to work. This place has really gone downhill.
Great place. French toast with fruits, eggs, bacon, toast, and Gouda grits were great. Plus coffee for two. All total $25.
Why this place is still in business is beyond me. They have a hunch of fucking idiots working there that don't care about anything!!!!!!
Very very very expensive and its not wow or yummy its very regular the taste bad and the portion very little comparing with the prices

This is not a fancy place, but it's a very friendly and comfortable. The sushi is fresh and tasty and reasonably priced. And they don't mind if you come in alone--they'll still give you a table and not rush you.

The staff was very friendly. I love the atmosphere around the restaurant. My dinner was ok I got the ribeye. I wouldn't order again. The cannoli I had for desert was great would come again for the deserts. Lovely atmosphere would try something else on the menu.
Went here for dinner, wasn't very impressed, a little over priced for the ambiance and actual menu. Food was ok, but for price could have went somewhere better.
Decent bottled beer selection, but the draught list is a bit underwhelming.

I really enjoyed the zucchini blossoms and their ricotta. The ordering and pick up was simple and easy. My husband did not enjoy his food however. I think they might be using a beyond burger meat and it's just not our taste.

Tried to use a Marlboro coupon at the gas station that on the coupon it had the gas stations address and store number and I had used the same coupon 5 times previously and was told by a low employee that they do not accept them. Haha DO NOT ever use this gas stations it is ran by the taliban

Great food, terrible choice if you want to have something delivered. Ordered via DoorDash and was expecting at least 4 orders worth of food and only received 2 and a half. Please, have people who will pay attention when putting a delivery order together. DoorDash delivery guy was fast, the lack of attention to detail in the order itself was extremely disappointing.
Delicious! What a great selection of cakes and desserts. Ordered several dozen for a party and they were all eaten and enjoyed by all. They are moist and tasty with that great cream cheese frosting.

This taco bell has the worse service. I was there at midnight and they were out of half of our order and they were very slow. They messed up our order and over charged us for things we did not even get. Worst taco Bell experience ever!!

2nd time here and I loved my nails! They take good care and pay attention to detail. There's plenty of people working here to make it go smooth. There was no wait on Thursday around 2pm. I got dip powder this time. They have soooo many options to choose from. I love their selection. They do all the designs and arts.
Antipasto salad was very good really liked the house basalmic vinegarette dressing....however I am not a fan of canned mushrooms and they put them in the salad and our pizza.

Great place, great looking flowers. And customer service is amazing. I've ordered flowers for my girlfriend plenty of times. I always ask them for recommendations on what to order, I always like to surprise my girl with something different every time. As stated, customer service is the best, and that's what's most important to me.

Definitely nice to receive a comment on here from management but when a email is sent and no one cares to reach out the lack of concern has definitely showed and speaks for itself and management. Again I would not suggest this place unless they are trained properly and have management who care instead of commenting on Yelp and doing nothing about the situation.

It was average BBQ. It took too long to get anything. Service was good, it took over 10 mins for an app and almost 45 mins for food. The BBQ itself was not hot by temp, therefore did not feel it should have taken so long to get to us. We may try it again on a slow day compared to a Sunday....

The quality of the food is not at all worth the price. I had the grilled cheese & the tomato soup which was $12. The options on the menu sound great, however, the food tastes more like mediocre diner food.

Completely and utterly overrated. Drove completely out of the way to go here and cannot understand or fathom why the line is so long. The pancakes were so small I left hungry and had to eat when we returned to the hotel. Save your time and money and go to IHOP.
Food tasted good but both food and service were very slow to the point we almost did not leave a tip and we always leave a tip.
I had my hair cut with Cindy and she was just great! My hair looks good and it was a very enjoyable experience. I will use her every time now!!
They discriminate against dogs based on breeds without even asking or considering their individual behavior.
Steak was tasteless. Nice asian guy at counter very jovial. But steak was not too good. Shady area. Guys making steaks seemed nice enough. But for sure, not best steak in Philly.

I LOVE LOVE LOVE this place! And I love the gals here! I always find something great! And I always get tons of help! I have many sexy outfits from here! It is NOT for old ladies as one reviewer claimed. Im far from an old lady! : )

Arrived by boat. Great atmosphere and river view dining outside. Excellent burgers and sandwiches. Drinks were okay. Our server was not attentive, not efficient. Other tables around us seemed to have a better experience with their servers.

They treat you like a criminal, as if they're doing you a major favor by selling you a car. There are other places that treat you with respect but this isn't one of them. It took them 5 hours to complete a sale. Way too long and I already drove 2 hours to get there. Don't waste your time.

Finks is definitely a place to check out if you are in Tacony looking for a good hoagie. They have a great selections and not afraid to alter their options to fit your needs. Everyone is very friendly. There is a reason they won best sandwich. The only downside is that they are not open more hours.
Food was delicious and our server Korey was even more amazing. Attentive, sweet, and very on top of it. She made our experience so enjoyable, and we can't wait to come back!

If you are looking for some shopping, I'd look elsewhere. Very limited selection of shops, and the food court was pretty bad as well. I will say many of the stores appeared to be non-chain which is a plus, but over all they stuff they carried was too touristy to be useful.

Year round snoballs? They're not as good as Hansens or Plum st, but for the convenience, they're welcome in downtown. I got the kiddie size for $1. If you're from out of town, give it a try, maybe it'll convince you to head to other well renowned snoball stands.
The Ogelsby and Stefan II are our favorites but you can't go wrong with anything here! One of our favorite sandwich places, just need to try the pasta now!

They try to up-sell and if you bite, they try to up-sell even more. They told me I needed brake work within a month. Luckily, I was not pressured and took the car to a dealer who said that the brakes were fine. No more United Tire of Southampton for me.

The service here is top notch! Our burgers, however, were overcooked, and slightly overpriced. I still might be willing to pay the price if the burger is cooked properly. If you want fries, tots or onion rings, you're going to have to pay. The burgers do not come with sides. Although, some of the burgers do come with tots on them!

I'd never done anything like this before. It was fun, nicely paced. Very clean restaurant. My only issue is that the meats tasted the same: all the chicken, all the beef tasted like another. Sauces were okay. Staff were amazing, with prompt service and very friendly.
Called to order takeout and I was placed on hold for about 5 mins. I could hear the women in the background just talking to people. After awhile more, I hung up and called Buckingham pizza.
The best place for holiday candy. It's a must stop for Easter. Don't be discouraged with the lines because you'll be happy with waiting.

Do not go here! Rude, condescending manager. They are extremely unprofessional. I made an appointment three days prior, showed up and they told me they were totally booked. I would literally go anywhere but this dumpy place!
I accidentally forgot my wallet at an event at Lucien's, and when I called the next day asking about it, they were quick in finding it and sending it back to me. The staff was very professional.

The food was amazing, but the service was so bad, can I even say service was bad?? Not even because there was no service at all. The server just dropped off our food and left; did not ask if we need anything else or refill our drinks.

I have a Lennox unit. The told me as soon as I asked for a quote that Lennox units have a specific authorized dealer and that they would have to mark up the price for parts, and advice i go straight through the dealer themselves to make it cheaper for myself. Really appreciate the honesty.
Pretty consistent Zaxby'a food (a good thing) But UNBELIEVABLY Slow service. A lot of restaurants have been in the location, and if they don't get their act together, they won't last long either.

The place is clean but it unbearably cold so bring a sweater if you're dining in. The food was warm and tasty. However the noodles were kinda dry and crunchy instead of smooth. The orange chicken was great though; had a good taste. Wonderful service too! They are quick and friendly. I appreciated that.
This was good. The food was fresh and not salted down. I would tell anyone to go and tell them (Fred's) to build a larger location. Hmmmm, good!

I had Hanover Floors, install new tile around the fireplace and Coretec floors throughout my home. I am very happy with the tile and flooring as well as the installation process. Allen was my salesman and was very helpful in my selection.

We have only been there once and the service was impressive and most of our food (including lamb osso buco) was good. The only exception was an oyster appetizer that was served on tortilla chips and was dried out....
April the bartender was so awesome and sweet she is always so attentive when I come in and makes great drinks

The gumbo was very . The fired shrimp platter was delicious as well, but the portion-size was too small for the $18 price. However, I look forward to returning in the coming months to see how this newly opened restaurants work out some kinks. #goodfood

Disappointing overall. The service is bad! Took forever, brought wrong foods, ravioli was so undercooked (not al dente, just raw), costly meal, very loud and uncomfortable. This is the second time there, went for brunch before. Food is too rich. Cool hip place but between the food, cost and mediocre service, won't be going back. Much better options around!

Got to try this place outside of Cigar City Brewing company. It was amazing! Had a Bap bowl and Korean Tacos, both were excellent! We had awesome service from the guys in the truck as well. Highly recommend
Cozy cool vibe, great cocktails, and friendly staff. We shared the meatloaf dinner (which was yummy) and still had leftovers!

I do think the food is amazing, however we were way over charged camparing the menu to our bill. If the prices have changed then they need to update them if not I want my money back. Also I felt rushed on ordering and enjoying my meal, which isn't right considering they weren't even that busy tonight.

The automated wash is pretty good but can get pricy ( tops out at $16). There are a set of guys ready to yowl dry your car and they do a pretty through job. There is also a large do it yourself side if your trying to save money.

Ate there during a trip to Indy and was very impressed. My wife and my sister also were very happy with the food and service both. Staff very friendly and helpful although they seem to have a difficult time understanding the concept of HOT (not lukewarm) coffee. Will absolutely return.
Excellent BBQ! Haven't had better in the city. I had the sandwich that was brisket, pulled pork, & chicken...very excellent. My only frustration is that they don't sell their sauce bottled.

The prettiest Copeland's I have ever visited! Food is always good. Got Seafood Gumbo and my wife and I split the Crabcake and Shrimp Pasta. Very good and good service. Only issue is that I had to ask for bisquits which normally they bring out automatically. We are Copeland's fans.

I can't say going to the DMV is ever all that pleasant, but in comparison to all the nightmarish experiences I've had in different cities this one, is not all that bad. You can even have coffee while you wait...and who doesn't love coffee?!?
Excellent good, good portion size, decent prices. Lobster pizza and pork & yellow rice was amazing. Chill spot to with good music and bar.

Great food, great atmosphere. We've eaten in twice now. Once for our anniversary and we're treated to live music across the lawn from the patio. We've been there for oyster happy hours (yum!) and have ordered their pizzas to go many times.
Despite the invitation to address the concern, I have still received no resolution and they are unresponsive to my attempts to follow-up. Unfortunately I'll have to start over at another dealer.
Is Ok, good sweet tea. watch out for those cavities! the staff/service is great!

Horrible service. Uppety bartenders. Only one at the bar and get ignored! Go to Johnathan's, they have friendlier staff and better specials! I'll never come back to the goat, this place sucks!!!! Bartender cares more about socializing with coworkers than customers....sucks

Food was delicious!!! Came in town for a work conference and this was the best place I dined at. Bartender was very friendly, excellent service from beginning to end. Can't wait to go back and eat there again!

I'm not sure why I bother to come here. I keep thinking my experience will be different, but it never is. Never once have I been greeted by the staff. Never have I been spoken to unless I've made the mistake of asking a question. I've found items I'd consider buying, but always reconsider when I am either ignored or snapped at.
Yes! I called Matt when my kitten locked itself in a room and he got her out and fixed the door within 40 minutes from the call! I will definitely be calling him again. Rescue Matt!
Ate breakfast there today. Wait staff was very nice and helpful. Restaurant was clean. Everyone enjoyed their meals except mine. I had the breakfast sandwich and it was super greasy.
Meh. Touristy and felt treated like cattle. Food was mediocre, including the famous 1905 salad. Wouldn't go out of way to eat there again.

Staff was very friendly and my nails looked great when I left! Unfortunate that they only lasted about 2 days until the paint literally started peeling off...Not sure if that only happens with their french manicure, but that wasn't great.

Good for a family outing. We used the groupon special and it was a great deal. Some of the slides need repair as quite a few kids come out with some scratches and cuts. Overall a good way to entertain the family!

Ordered 6 pieces Oyster started my 4 hours waiting at airport on my way back SF. Then, it's Lobster time. LOL man, that was a LOT of food! Damn, I was food stoned after all. Especially, plus two glass Champaign cocktail. Long story short, sea food was pretty fresh. Service is very friendly and helpful, I didn't waste any time on waiting. Nice spot!

I'm just surprised for the good reviews for this place. Somebody recommended this place to me so I gave it a try (one is enough). I ordered a half duck for takeout, it was just tasteless/not enough seasoning and it was not fresh.

make sure you order a bottle of beer rather than a pint or you just might find some "prizes" in the bottom of your filthy glass. and one of those rip-off digital jukeboxes that no good bar would ever have.

First time customer here and I will be back again. They were able to create an assortment of cookies for my graduate just like I asked for. I got several compliments on them. Highly recommend using this bakery for all your bakery needs

Health dept shut them down for 2 days. 37 validations. Flies and roaches. No soap at the sink. Screen door broken. Was written up last time for the same thing. Come on amigo, get your shit together. Or are you just closing and open up under a different name DO NOT EAT THERE
The food was good, felt fresh but there wasn't much too it. The sandwiches lacked product. However the salad and smoothies are very good and filling.

My group was unanimous in thinking the Food Was bland.... Nice view though. Maybe a bad night? If I give them another try I will update this review. And who does an upcharge of $5 for Caesar dressing on salad? All 6 of us did it without knowing. At least disclose that when customers ask. 2 stars are for view/Tiki bar.
They won't install parts you already have. I think this is ludicrous.

First time at this place and hated it from the jump. Waited ten minutes for a waiter. The food didnt come to the table till 6:15pm when we got here at 5:30pm and the place ain't even crowded. Won't come back.

Noisy and tight but good food. I had the fish tacos. Very good with a generous portion. Side of really good guacamole mmmm! My sister had the mushroom tacos. Very very small portion-wise. She wasn't impressed with the flavor either they were just ok. Next time I will try something more adventurous. Maybe even the crickets

Just ordered in the drive tru. Two crave boxes and a number 7. Sitting here at home with my friends eating dinner and crunch. My chicken burrito with uncooked rice broke my front bottom row tooth. Now I can't eat this nasty food and I have to figure out how to get a new tooth. Thanks
Iced coffee was watered down. cappuccino was alright. the two of them were $5.00 together. Atmosphere was nice.

High expectations after so many 5 star visits to Conshohocken location. Ordered takeout at 5:00. Entire order was wrong. No salsa for chips or burrito. Ordered and payed for 3 tacos , but received 2. Paid for extra salsa , and got none..not even for the 5$ chips/salsa .. horrible experience.. guess this location needs training

I think he either change location or stop his busy. I have try to catch him for the last month or so and there was no sign of his green truck. I have been going to his hot dog truck for over a decade now, he will be miss if he contemplating retirement.

Perfect addition to the neighborhood. Have you seen their menu?! They have the coolest coffee drink options. This place reminds me a little of the Central Perk in friends. The owners have a lot in store for this place, so buckle up. This will be the go to spot very soon.

I think this shop does a good job at an average, competitive rate, but the downside is that they are not especially friendly when you come in, and the shop is pretty run down. I think I will try some new places.

Below average pedicure for an above average price. They were really nice but they we're trying to get through the pedicure as fast as possible. The polish coverage isn't even, parts of my nails are not covered at all and there bubbles in the top coat. I won't be going back.

I left a message a week ago to schedule an appointment and they have yet to return my call. I have tried to get in touch with them multiple times and they don't answer. I'm very confused. I guess they just don't need or care for new business!!

We were invited by two others who cancelled. We were party of 10. It's quaint not much ambiance. The food was good we had the 5 courses. It's definitely not worth $90 per person would never have thought and had I known prior to we would've gone to city and ate at Barclay Prime, Davios or another 5 star restaurant in city.
Hattie's makes a good bird! Solid fried chicken. The hot is hot, you've been warned.

A very nice staff but the food is really hit or miss. Their food tends to be sweet for my liking (yes I know parts of Thailand cook their food that way). If you stick to standard staples (pad Thai) you can get a good cheap meal.

good szechuan spicy food. the spicy fish is on point and very tender. I like to get the chongqing chicken, has a lot of flavor as well. My favorite is cumin beef, very good flavor from the mainland. also good atmosphere. good service. prob my favorite restaruant in bretnwood to be honest

No craft beer, sticky glasses. Standard pub fare. We had the fish and chips and prime rib sandwich. Not great. Heavy handed seasoning salt killed any flavour in both the yam and regular fries. The fish was mush on the inside, and the outside was fried to dark colour in an oily heavy batter.
Yummy!!!! Who does not like a warm cookie - right out of the oven. On a recent trip, craving a sweet, this was the place to go. Love the idea of free delivery until 3am.
Great atmosphere, but kind of a sketchy area. I was followed in last time by a creepy guy who was soon removed from the bar by the manager...watch out for your friends!

Great service and good food. No MSG with brown rice option, how can you not treasure this? It may not be the best taste, but it really is good. Their beef with Chinese broccoli, mooshu, and hot sour soup are all very good. We go quite often and good quality control with consistency.
Cool lowkey spot..went here on a Saturday..nice staff & byob they serve no alcohol..5$ cover & the hookah was pretty good(mint I had)..the music was cool even though it was Pandora..I would go back

Party of 5 crammed at a 4 top for an early dinner. Bland bruschetta, wet lettuce on tasteless Caesar salad. Entrees were okay but server hovered and we felt rushed. Manager rude when we sat to finish our Byob wine. Will not be back!!!

we used these guys for a prewedding party for 60. they showed up exactly on time. the crowd loved them and Eliot was great to work with......even long distance with me in california. oh....the food was delicious.
Do not recommend. Messed up my wedding cake. Also messed up a king cake order twice. Hard to get in touch with
Everything about this place was great!!! The whole grain pancakes were delicious, the turkey BLT - OMG! 5 stars-great experience.
First time here to try the chinese handnoodles#101（The magic）taste classes,togo order Shanghai shou mai n crab meat pork soup dumplings、#110（magic beef stew）
Placed an order to a teacher's lunch. My Apple Walnut salad was missing walnuts and no dressing was provided. Also given the wrong cash change (shorted us $8) Would not eat/order again
This is the SLOWEST poorly run location I have ever been to. I waited TWENTY FIVE minutes for my food. The workers were rude and disorganized.

If you are going to go to an Ashley HomeStore, I would highly recommend the one on Manchester. I felt like I was a bother to the employee helping me at this location. 2 stars for the good deal that was going on.
Coffee is SUPER yum, and breakfast is delicious. Fairly priced and a great feel to the restaurant!
Love going here on Sundays for breakfast. Food is great Joe the owner is very nice and friendly. He personally greets you and sits you.
We had a party of 8 here for Easter Sunday and our server, Lisa, was great. Very friendly and helpful. First class all the way.
Service was not great wasn't to friendly The restaurant was a major disappointment the service was bad the food was not great I don't recommend this at all to anyone

I love the pulled pork and the cheese grits are wonderful, but my favorite things are the green beans and the fluffy biscuits. Just like my grandmother's! It is worth the wait, but you can call your order in and have it ready for pickup.

Food pretty good, service awful. My friend is fighting cancer and we try to get together once month to support her. This place isn't the place to do it. Here's a thought, if you're going to follow COVID rules regarding number of diners at table, try sanitizing the bathrooms once in awhile. Yuck. Won't be back.

Ordered a matcha latte and dirty chai with almond milk. After waiting for over 10 min finally got our order, the matcha latte had zero matcha flavor and the chai latte was made with whole milk. Will not be returning.
Service was spotty. No one, except the bartender, even tried to crack a smile. Food was so so. We had the grilled salad with pork chop.

Easy to place an order and service was fast and friendly. Lo mein had a weird flavor but it was still pretty good. Thai tea bubble tea was overly sweet and took away from the flavor. Tapioca balls were good texture snd flavor.
I went for lunch, their lunch combo is just ok....worth a try but will not go for the second time.

This is perfection in Mexican food! The salad with mango's and oranges was incredible. Homemade tortillas with shrimp & that fantastic salad with rice was my choice & my Beloved had flautas. There's no table service nor actual liquor but for this creative, healthy quality food, I can let that go!
Good food, good selection, good service. Went on a Saturday night and was surprised there was no line. Everything I have had here has been good.
The atmosphere is whatever, but the food is what's up. I got the haddock sandwich Andy boyfriend got the meatloaf sandwich- both were delicious. Loved trying the different beers on tap.
Great customer service, friendly staff and store is so clean. Drinks are absolutely delicious. Freshly made! Pearls are GREAT! I come here everyday.
Today was eat at diner days. I had breakfast here and lunch at Empire Diner in Yeadon. Marlton Diner is ok as far as diners go, good friendly staff

Disappointing....that's all... I asked for my food to be suicide hot and there was absolutely no spice to it at all. I asked for extra sauces on the side also there were none. It came with one fork I guess I should've asked for chopsticks. The spring rolls all be it delicious look like a nine-year-old had made them.... just so so food sadly...

Here on a Friday afternoon with the 3 rascals. Fast and friendly service today. The staff were attentive and jovial. My spicy burger was good. The boys' chicken strips were a smidge on the iverly crispy side but they didn't seem to mind. Nice no frills burger joint for quick simple meal before a movie. We'll be back!

I should give it a 3 1/2 or try it again. The impossible burger patty melt was quite delicious. They had some good beers and cider. Fries were cold and not very tasty. The vegan seitan wings were good but not the best. I would definitely come back for another try. But would leave it up to a 3 1/2 at this point.

This has been our Go-To spot for Pho and Bahn Mi for a while. The food is really good and the staff is friendly. The restaurant itself is nice and they keep it really clean. We usually order to go and it's always ready by the time I get there.
Very disappointed to see that they found it necessary tO cover up and blank plate every single plug in the place. Never have I run into this issue at any other Starbucks.
My first stop in Tennessee. I really enjoyed the vibe. I wish the tortillas weren't so soggy but overall, it was delightful.
If you want to wait for over an hour for a chili rellino and you really the taste of velvetta blanco then this is the place for you. If not then keep driving.
We ate at Molaniars about four years ago and it was a super good Italian Restaurant. Ate there about six months ago and, well not near as good this time.
Sushi isn't bad, but don't try for delivery. Wouldn't deliver three miles away. Lazy. Won't go back.

This a quick drop in place where you place your order, pay, and they bring your food to the table when it comes out of the kitchen. The menu is pretty standard for a cafe that serves breakfast and lunch. It was a little limited but you get to select up to three ingredients for your omelette. Overall, not a bad stop.
Purchased a ticket online and was denied entry when I got to the concert because the bouncer claimed I was drunk when I was not. I asked for a refund and was denied. Classless venue

Nice place but unfortunately we got scammed last night when we ordered the NUDIE steak. It was NOT on the menu, bartender recommend it. This 26 oz steak ( which is was not) cost 100$!!! Nice piece of meat and presentation but def not worth the price. Oysters were on special which I enjoyed but won't be returning due to this experience.

Wanted to try this place since their location in Aberdeen MD was awesome My roast beef sandwich here was rare... perfectly cooked. However there was enough chewy parts of it to make me not eat about a quarter of the sandwich. Not so much gristle, but just needed to be over chewed
Great food, fast service, typical diner feel. I would place this diner above the other diner down the road in taste and quality. Very well run.

I don't ask for much out of my room just some complementary coffee and cable tv. Well they only got half... Not only was the cable out but i couldn't even pay for a movie! Wtf i just wanted to relax. Anyway never coming back.

Filet was very tough but we'll prepared. I expected better for $51. Salmon was ordinary, potatoes au gratan not as good as Costco 's, asparagus were just okay. Service was excellent but we won't return because of the food.

First of, they are not Indian they are Bangladeshis, don't lie to people about what you cook. They don't know what Indian food is. I am an Indian, have had Indian food all my life and can vouch by my Comment. Take any Indian to this place and he will point out the low-level ingredients used.
Not thrilled with the first meal I had form here. Rice and beans were good though.

Teca seems past it's prime. It's like a promise not kept. It needs a deep clean and someone who's paying attention in the kitchen. Grit in the salad, sometimes less than fresh veggies in the ingredients. Wait staff seem distracted at best and uncaring, truth be told.
Food is mediocre. Kitchen extremely slow. Service is disorganized and inexperienced. You want cheesecake fine. Anything else... Skip it. Would not return.

Normally I don't give 5 star reviews to restaurants without a changing table in the rest room but I'm making an exception for this place as it was THAT GOOD! The food and service were both amazing. It's easy to find something that's healthy, flavorful and different on the menu.
Love the food. There are lots of veggie options. Coffee's great with a large selection of different lattes. The people are fantastic. What more could you want?
We found this place on yelp. Loved the chocolate and almond croissant. Egg sandwich only ok. Service was only on but with COVID everyone is just a little off.
Staff was fantastic. Super friendly and food was excellent. Great vibe. Highly recommend.

On a business trip, I was also able to get together with a couple of friends, so we headed downtown. Alcatraz has a good selection of beer, but the menu is more like a typical tourist trap. It's not bad, it's just... could be better for being in such a good location.
A large albondigas has three meatballs.... what a joke I'm sure the small is just made up of broth... portions are a joke.

This location is just down the block from my house and because it is open 24 hours, it is a very easy choice to go to. I usually go late in the evening and order breakfast :) Staff is courteous and the restaurant is very clean looking.
Location is closed, but they haven't updated any of their online presence to reflect this.

This place was amazing! My husband and I chucked as we read through the "vegetable side" offerings: baked apples, chips, baked beans, mac & cheese..." If you eat here, find a seat upstairs as there's much more elbow room.

Scheduled an appointment and was seen promptly by Dr. Vacharakiat (Dr. V) and Kristine. They took excellent care of me and gave me extra attention to make sure my root canal was as comfortable as possible. I truly did not feel a thing. I hope I never have to get another root canal but if I do, I know who I'm calling
This place has the best ribs I've ever had I just wish they were in Philly so I didn't have ho to NJ to get those ribs.

I usually enjoy this place. But the host was very rude and the place is extremely dirty. You can tell quality has gone down. And they are worried about COVID? Lol I would worry about getting a tetanus shot after walking into that place.
I loved their food! Their service is great! I go every time I go to Philly! I highly recommend it.
Great family style restaurant. Good prices, choices and service. Crawfish pasta is fabulous and you get 2 filets of fish with it and a salad fir $10 on friday

Wasn't really impressed with this place. Food orders did not come out right. One member of our party got their food so kkate we were all dOne before she got here. Management didn't coMe around cHecking on us even thoough i thiNk he was walking arounnd the restaurant . Definitely NOT worth the drive or the money spent. Will not go back.
Above average food taste with generous portions. Very clean and friendly atmosphere. A little pricey, but overall very good!

Had a nice breakfast here this morning. I can't wait to try more of the menu. I enjoyed my "Cuban breakfast"....they do a great job pressing the bread. I am definitely going to stop by here for lunch soon.

Great brunch location. Inside is small, but they have a huge patio. Try the biscuits and gravy or quiche of the day- they are always a hit! We waited about ten minutes for a table of 6. Service was prompt and polite. We loved it!

Very tasty pizza and great service. Recent visits to some of the more popular pizza spots have been disappointing to say the least more from customer service, but also bad pizza. Tonight was a wonderful surprise. While nothing is fancy about their location, their pizza busted with flavor. I highly recommend and will be back.
Food was okay. service is quick and okay. Good if your starving. Overall experience, okay.
Music was way to loud. Just went for wings with some friends but we had to yell at each other. Wings were excellent though and good priced for beer
Server was great. Chili Arellano was soggy. Fish tacos and shrimp tacos were bad. Rice and beans were cold. Habanero salsa was awesome and they had just made it. Tortilla chips were just ok.
Ambiance an atmosphere of a place should always equal the price of items they are selling...it doesn't here

I was not impressed with their food. The wonton tasted pretty mushy, noodles were overcooked. My friends got dumplings and they weren't happy with theirs either. An extra star for their decorations and service
The credit amnesty/ dime program is a complete joke. Wasted my time even after explaining over the phone

I really used to love this place, but it has gone seriously down hill. My tacos were good, but the ambience was terrible. The menus were sticky, the booth had bottomed out, the chips were stale, and the beer selection was terrible. It's too bad; this used to be a regular spot for our family, but now I don't think we'll be going back.

We get takeout from here all the time. Really great food. My favorite is the Gyro Greek Quesadilla, served with tzatzki on the side. Also recommend the Chicken Souvlaki Sandwich, Greek Salad and the Tabouli & Hummus Sandwich
Cool shop. Trendy. Neat outside garden. The food, however, is TBD. Our sandwiches were smothered in the sauce. Gyro was also OVER cooked. yikes. Kids liked $3 hot dog.

Visited during happy hour. Drinks were good; however meal was so so. Catfish po-boy was all bread; the bread was the highlight. Crawfish Etouffee did not have Crawfish, had some bits of sausage and was barely warm. Asked our server and they made a new batch, no sausage but barely any crawfish. The sauces however did have good flavor.
I would not recommend this hotel as my experience here was not the best experience as my room was accessed and items stolen. Not a safe place to stay!
Halloween 2021. I'm trying to call to order a pizza. Someone keeps answering the phone and hanging up.

Unorganized to say the least. They didn't alter pants like asked and did not include a vital part to my order.. ruined our pictures. Went to return the rentals and the man did not record what was being returned only to say we never took our rentals. So unprofessional and ridiculous. Choose elsewhere

Maybe it's because I'm an old school stoner but I didn't like this place at all. I don't want to buy my weed from a place that makes me feel like I'm in the Apple store. This place is bougie AF and reeks of insincerity.

I was hoping the divey atmosphere meant that they were a hidden gem, but unfortunately- it didn't. The pizzas crust tastes like cardboard. The pizza'a flavor was okay, but the crappy crust combined with the average service is why I gave this place a below average rating.

Two stars because the server was awesome. But the food is absolutely gross. Breakfast burrito is sloppily made with zero flavor. Fell apart the moment I picked it up revealing none of the Tillamook cheese they advertised, no sausage I added to it, burnt potatoes. Garbage.

Stevie did an excellent job and my hair is beautiful! Super efficient but took her time and I was able to get a cut/balayage in under 2.5 hours which was great. The blend is beautiful and my hair just feels fresh. The salon is also beautiful and the separate wash/rinse room is very relaxing. I've already got my next appointment booked!

Incredible experience here at the wedding studio. So grateful for the help received from Angie and the rest of the staff. I am over the moon with the service and the help to find my perfect dress! I highly recommend to any bride searching for the perfect dress!

Wait time was about right with approximation and service was quick to take order and somewhat quick to deliver. Food was mediocre, some things weren't so fresh. I think menu can be freshened up with more flavor. It's all about the atmosphere, family friendly and eating seafood on the beach.
Awful customer service and food is way below average. They have no customers on Saturday night and that's for a reason. Stay away!

Enjoyed the meatball po boy and the big easy po boy. A little pricey but that's expected for their location. Murray, It was my pleasure, and we're so glad we stopped by. I'm from California so I'm definitely not local. Wish I was... I'd be in all the time :) Take care
Probably the worst movie theater in Cherry Hill area. It might have nicer seats and show more movies but it is always crowded and many times it's a bunch of kids who are entirely too loud....
Beer and bourbon selection ok, beef nachos when you need a spoon to scoop up the crumbs of nachos that is unacceptable .
Very unprofessional, Very unsanitary Customer service has to be the most horrible experience ever.
Express Flooring touts their referral program, but don't refer anyone based on just that, as they don't honor the referral incentive.

Went today for the first time. I had the crabcakes which were phenomenal. My husband had the turkey pesto sandwich. The crabcakes were cooked to perfection. The homemade pesto on the turkey pesto sandwich was amazing! Can't wait to return to try the pizza... Great selection of wines!

Closed on 12/28/2019 (Saturday) at 4:36pm!?!? Website "snowbliz.com" does NOT work. Waste of time taking an Uber all the way down there try their sno-balls. Apparently, you should call instead of assume it's open based on their posted business hours (based on Yelp).

Went a couple times , drink prices are Acceptable However the ambience is equal to a white box. If you're not a sports fan and don't like karaoke there is not much to do at this establishment. In closing not bad for a south county bar.
This is a great club. They have a full bar with complimentary cocktails and the Delta representatives are very helpful and friendly.

The burgers here are super good. Good beers on tap as well. I came here in July when places first opened from covid. Only 1 other table had people. Server was friendly, place was clean, and I will be back.

The lasagna was pretty good for the price. Large enough for two people and the pasta was nice and soft and a great price. My son didnt like the crazy sticks, but I loved them, they are on the chewy side (aka high gluten flour) but thats how I like them but not good for kids lol. The pizza was decent.
Very pleased with Dr. Smith. I am truly going to miss him when I move out of state. Staff very friendly, and works with you to fit you in.

I avidly eat pho, and I can say that this experience was not authentic. The spring rolls were not fresh at all, the pho was subpar, the ambiance was below average, and the service was slow. Won't be returning.

3.5 ~ Overall for Food & Service MENU *Sandwiches = 3.5 (good) *Bread = 3.5 (good) *Fruit Juice = 3.5 (good) *Cinnamon Sticks = 4 (very good) *Hotdog & Cheese Rolls = 3.5 (good) *House Coffee = 3.5 (good) *Scones = 3 (ok) *Cookies = 2.5 (I prefer softer) NOTES *Check the Daily Bread Schedule Online before going...
Even though I didn't buy anything, Jake with State Far.... I mean... Shell's Feed was very knowledgeable and helped in making a decision for my household pets. Will be back. Thanks Jake!

Ordered on doordash. The food was awful. Dry and bland enchiladas. The rice wasn't seasoned and just odd! My gordita was completely missing the meat and my huarache was tiny and was missing the avocado. So disappointed with this place. I would never order from them again!

Shoddy customer service, at best, with little to minimal communication with residents. Managers don't step in when there's an issue, allow inexperienced 'leasing agents' to take command in the office. So far, not so good.

This hamburger was terrible. I got the triple double with bacon. My wife and I live a minute from this location. By the time got home, the burger was cold. The bottom of the bun was so soggy. It felt mushy. They show a picture of this big luscious hamburger on menu but it's so small in reality. I will never go back.

We switched to UpRooted over a year ago after having issues with a another company and it has been the best decision we ever made in regards to our yard. Artie is friendly, knowledgeable and really cares about what she does. She takes her time and does a thorough job every time. Highly recommend!
Reasonable food and prices. The bartender was really nice. Be sure to try the stinky burger.
Cool place to go I remember going as a kid. Wish they would've had woman's pink camo stuff though!
Airport is ok and has plenty to eat and easy to navigate but the rental car return is ridiculous to get to if you really don't pay attention to 1 turn.

We were out of town and we stopped in here to grab some dinner. The service was mediocre and the food was even more mediocre. Seems like a cool spot to go to and have some drinks at the bar and order something quick, but we weren't too pleased with our food. It wasn't terrible, but it wasn't great either.

(3.5) ~ Good overall food & service. OUR MENU: * Water(tap) = (4) very good...must be filtered;) * "Amazing Tuna Roll" = (3.5) good * Nori Crusted Filet = (3.5) good * Coffee = (3) ok NOTE: The food is served Tapas style.
Fried corn on the cob and burnt ends are the bomb!! Spicy sausage is ok but overall it was delicious!
This is a popular spot on university. I've been many times. But the last time I went I got sick and shat myself so I won't be going back for a while.

I was here for an event during the week. The bar staff continuously tried to dodge acknowledging our presence by avoiding eye contact. Simple questions about contents of happy hour specials were met with inarticulate evasion. And this was for a charity event where donations were being sought. Needless to say, we left after paying for one drink without contributing to the cause.
Ribs are good egg rolls were a little sketchy love the noodle dishes ribs were somehow better than most places I've had would go again

Delicious pho close to the center of Nashville! Pay at the front, or they'll just let you sit there. The pho was great as were the spring rolls, and the sauce that came with them. Plenty of fixins to go with the pho!
Wasn't impressed. Not the greatest service and the acai was so watered down an soupy, I couldn't even eat it.

I only had 1 item here: thai peanut sauce sandwich. The peanut sauce was very bland, and there wasn't enough sauce in the sandwich. And not enough meat in the sandwich either. The other stuff looked good though. I'm not sure if I'll go back though. I'm sort of a pig, and I like hefty meals.

I drive past this place daily and have been wanting to give it a try. Went there at 2:30 pm Saturday- place is closed and completely dark inside. Says they're open noon to 9:30 PM. So we went to Sa-Wad-Dee instead. I guess this place didn't need our money. Sa-Wad-Dee was absolutely fabulous!
Came here about two weeks ago and service was great -- bartenders were friendly and quick to make drinks! I had a great time and came back this passed weekend. Love the Moscow mules!

Five points Pizza is one of the highlights of the Five Points area. It is a little tough to find parking, but everything else was great. The service was excellent, food tasted amazing for everyone. I got the meat lovers Stromboli and it was absolutely amazing, probably the best Stromboli I've had in town.
Good food that is unusual and healthy. Really good service, I've eaten there twice for lunch and once for dinner. Fair prices, smaller portions so you can try two or three different things.

Not authentic but decent for what it is and where it is. If you don't know what authentic Taiwanese or Szechuan is, then this is a place for you. Best option for it outside of Chinatown. Portion size is small for the price. Nice ambiance and solid service nonetheless. Pro tip: $2 minced pork over rice. Can't go wrong.

Tasty salmon nicoise, crisp vegetables, plump olives...just overcooked salmon. I think the visit would have been better if service was present. I'm well outside lunch hour and have to ask for service and water. The waitress didn't wait for my second bite before dropping off my check! Message received, I'm done at Pearl's. I appreciate the fresh salad though.

Great find in IRB. Nice place, friendly people, great food and drink!................................................,................................Yelp is silly and won't allow to post this short but sweet review so I am typing more so these nice people at Salt Public house can get the 5 star review they deserve even despite Yelp. Can I leave Yelp a 1 star?
Service is very slow. Waitress never came to offer more drinks. Food not cooked an d no one apologized.
It would be nice if they stopped catering to the lower income individuals. Please start carrying higher end products.
They changed their debit card hold on an account from $10 to $15. Why should I have to have a hold on my card for $15 when I buy a $3.50 car wash! Won't be returning until this is changed.
Was in Philadelphia on business and found this spot. One of the best coffees ever and the sweets were excellent.
Even when I stop in late at night after work to get a quick salad, the staff is always pleasant and the chicken on my salad is always warm. I would recommend over McDonalds any day.
Appears to be a great place for inclusive gowns. I've been married 35 years but if we decide to renew our vows we will see what you can do for us.
Sam is the best. I sometimes go to Badar's but the girls there are so inconsistent. With Sam, I know my eyebrows will look great no matter what!

The service I experienced during my visit was not as bad as other reviews state, the ladies that helped me out were very nice! I will say though that the food here is extremely SALTY. I couldn't tell if it was only one item or just everything. I could only eat half of my bowl before I couldn't take it anymore.
They are trying to charge 39.99 a tired for balance and rotation straight thievery! I hope no one goes here.
grossly overpriced with mediocre food in my opinion
I'm not really sure why this is even here. For me, it did not live up to expectations and the "stars" need to be reinstalled or better laid and cared for.
I enjoyed a scrumptious Double Down sandwich in a heavily plexiglassed environment. The men's room was suprisingly tidy, until I finished my Double Down sandwich.
If you don't come here, did you even go to Nashville? read my full Nashville review on my blog: https://reagans-reviews.blogspot.com/2021/11/i-went-to-birmingham-and-nashville.html

They did look at our cat but prices are crazy and since not life threaten. Took her to a locate vet for blood work. The wait in this place is beyond ridiculous plus you have to wait to pay almost a half an hour got there at 8 and did not leave until 1030 crazy. Plus the girls up front are not very friendly.

I usually have a great time staying here when I visit New Orleans. But next time I will not be staying here anymore. Housekeeping kept waking me up before check in and there was so much confusion at check in. The 1800 reservation line tells you one thing, the hotel has different policies and prices.
I'm not always sure I got what I ordered, but what they deliver is always good! They deliver quickly.

There aren't a lot of quick decent options in Soulard especially ones with a quick soup and sandwich. Unfortunately every time I come here the service is always terrible. Either the order is wrong, the expectedly hot sandwich is cold, it's poorly assembled and I have resemble it when I open the bag. They are ok in a pinch but don't expect anything memorable.

A bit bummed... My husband and I used to frequent this place and/or would buy it at Whole Foods; however, we bought two muffins today and at $5.69 a piece we won't be buying them any longer. $12 for 2 muffins is steep... The product overall is good, but I can't in good conscious spend almost $6 on a muffin.

Never again! Start to finish disappointment. We kept waiting for the experience to get better, but all the way through to overhearing the hostess who had been rude throughout our nearly 2 hour wait declare that she couldn't wait to get off (which was quite apparent), Old Spaghetti Warehouse disappointed.
Always amazing fast dependable service !! This is the second time we have used A-American Self Storage we can also count on them
Food was ok, wine was good (red wine was ice cold(?)), service was fine. Hostess was rude. It left a bad taste in my mouth. Meh

I'm going to say what I am so you know where thus is coming from, I'm Hispanic fellow from phx, omg for me and the wife 30 bucks that's for chips and salsa, 2 tacos each, 2 beers, horrible plain taste, I got ripped off , I can blow the seasoning away with salt, pepper and lime, , so plain for 30 bucks,
I enjoy this place. You must try the avocado margarita. It's made out of avocados obviously but it's a taste you've never had before it's a must try.
Él área de juegos tiene para niños menores de 3 años . Buena atención de parte de los empleados

Best place to watch football, baseball and UFC in the area. I usually get the boneless wings with a few different sauces. Not gourmet food, but that's not what I'm coming here for. Big TV's, tall beers, great service and almost always a place to sit.

I went here to get balloons for a birthday party. A employee named Jonathon and another cashier was helping me with the balloons. When they finished Jonathan walked away without giving us the balloons even after we purchased them. Customer service was very poor but other than that it is a pretty good place to shop for party items.

No beer on tap. The bartenders seemed unamused to be there and the band was so so. He bathroom is super tiny and there is a guy that gives you a towel for money. Normally that isn't a big deal but the room is so small it's almost creepy.
Very disappointed. I had catfish dinner. Cole slaw was good. Catfish and fries not so much. Will not go back.
food here is absolutely amazing wings are so good pizza is very good
How can anyone can an alligator of that size in such a small container?! Absolutely horrible! These people do not care about the well being of any of the animals here. Will not be back again ever!

Went here on Saturday night over July 4th weekend and it was raging. My friend said they usually have tables out but those were gone. Good vibes, ok music, and good bar service. They had some decent drafts. Easy walk from Queen Village/Pennsport. I'll be back!

Atmosphere is nice and the sangria is ok. We had the wrapped asparagus and that was good however the paella was far from good even further from authentic. Tasted like they had poured tomato sauce over the top. I will not be a return customer.

The food was absolutely adequate. The service was dreadful. My drink took 25 minutes and no accommodation was made which is questionable in this price range. I assure you, I'm not a particularly demanding consumer.

I was assaulted during their White Linen Night event. When my group notified the bouncer "Mike" he said there was nothing he could do as he wasn't official security. He did not ask the offending party to leave, so I was forced to have NOPD intervene. Tomas Bisto's management was extremely negligent in not staffing proper security.
The meat pizza was terrible. Actually was disturbing to look at old bacon piles of meat I guess it was meat . Thankfully the waiter took off our bill . Won't go back too bad !!!
Pretty clean store besides the restroom (disgusting). Getting some one to help you is pretty tough. Once you do they badger you to purchase "protection plan", they do not understand that no means no.

This place was awful. At least the Sheeben section. Service was absolutely awful, and could've been a lot better. Servers were not friendly and messed up our orders. If I'm paying money to go out to eat, I expect good service & food which didn't provide at all.

The good: the baked beans. Everything else needs work. Not that everything was bad, but mostly "meh". The fatty brisket was a tad dry and chewy, ribs were mediocre in taste and texture, and the chicken was dry with rubbery skin. The two other sides, greens beans and coleslaw, while not bad, were forgettable.

I was drawn to Tom's work by his great Yelp reviews. However, I've left three voicemails for him over a two week period and I've received no response at all. Poor communication can invalidate a lot of hard work.
Always good .This trip had the laxy mans cioppino...crab ,several types of fresh fish and clams.. shrimp.garlic toast .very very good ,huge bowl.really nice waiter.been a fav for years.

Small no-frills diner style restaurant serving all foods all day. Pizza is huge for $8.00 and taste is quite fresh and crispy. Was a good stop off while I was in the Piazza/Liberty Walk area looking for a decent pizza. Staff and restaurant all very friendly and inviting. Good hot meals for under $10
Good and warm rice. Just need a little bit more vinegar. Beer was icy cold and perfect. Air conditioning is perfect too.
Can't Go wrong with choosing this Italian eatery. Service was thorough and the staff very friendly. The atmosphere was warm and inviting.

They did a terrible job washing my car. This was my first time there. I will not be returning back here again. They do better job washing car at Valet Auto Wash in Cinnaminson. Their prices over at Cinnaminson are cheaper than this place. Dont waste your money here.

A large beer selection here, but deciding from a haphazard menu chocked full of loose leaf paper on a clipboard doesn't help matters. The taps also don't help since they are literally all have the same handles. This is just another run of the mill dive bar that is ubiquitous throughout New Orleans.

This CVS looks huge from the outside, but is the same size as any other one once you go inside. I guess that whole back part is for storage or the pharmacy... Anyway, it's a typical CVS, but it doesn't have SELF-CHECKOUT. I haven't seen that like... ever. So 2 stars for you, CVS. I don't want those cashiers all up in my purchases.

Thanks for your response, Scott. It sounds like your heart is in the right place. We have always been happy with your wait staff, servers, & bus boys. Maybe a little re-training of selected personnel will go a long way. For now, mostly because of the virus surge, we are cutting back drastically on going out for lunch.

Horrible!!! Called in an order and went to pick it up... Waited in line for 30 minutes and asked twice about how much longer. Then they finally told me that they sent it out on delivery to no address. So I left without anything. Worst experience ever!
I fly quite often and philly it has yo ve the most disgusting airport I've ever been from shit on the toilets to no toilet seats doors broken and garbage all over the ground.

We tried Yo Nashi for the first time tonight and WOW what a great dinner. The restaurant concept is Omakase, which is a chef's tasting. We were delighted by each course. My favorite was a scallop, egg, and pork belly combination. Delicious! The cocktails are also inventive and unique. We will definitely be going back! Highly recommend!
its close, convenient, and they take everything.. i like clearing out clutter and down-sizing, and feeling good about putting recycleables to good use.

Complete disappointment. I ordered munchkins and they were crumbled/crushed and wrong flavors. My chicken croissant sandwich was still frozen and pink looking in the middle. They were out of several types of donuts. I have zero desire to return to this location.

Food was okay but they served my Caesar salad with the lettuce still on the husk so I had to use a knife to cut thru it. The lobster bisque soup was good but the prices were a bit rich for me however it was New Year's Eve.
The best Asian veg food in yeg! So delicious! Always craving it! Curry chicken is delicious!
Way better than it looks on Yelp. It's a very nice market however the set up is very inefficient.
I much prefer the East Alton location. This one is ok, but you can tell it's getting older. The men's locker room is about the size of my bathroom at home. Could use a renovation.
I would NOT use this company. Numerous problems, unprofessional, and not a quality job.

I brought in two pieces of jewelry. A Cartier love bangle and gold diamond earrings. The man seemed very disinterested and told me the bracelet was a fake and offered me $20 bucks for the earrings. I left and paid to have it appraised and received over $3,000. If your looking to sell here it's unreliable and unreasonable. They don't know anything about jewelry.
Nice ambience good use of the space. Tried renting a video and selection was very limited. No bluray or dvd only vhs.

I love the fact that they source local and the food is good. It is not over priced but it pushes the limit for what you get. I just wished they would expand the menu. I feel like I always just settle on something because there are not that many choices.

Absolutely terrible customer service. No one answers the phone, hopefully this means that they cannot afford a receptionist because if they have one, she should be fired. I got a Groupon for the business, which was only available with Christina, who is only available two out of seven days a week. Just awful!!!

Friendly staff and open early. Always welcoming and home style cooking. They got to know my wife by name and when she's in town visiting she makes sure to stop in to work and have breakfast and coffee.

Absolutely terrible workmanship. I had leather coming up on the heels of an expensive pair of shoes that were otherwise in perfect condition. Rather than gluing down the leather, the shoemaker nailed them down. With big nails. Unbelievable. When I complained that this is not what we agreed upon, he got aggressive with me. The shoes are ruined.
Cute ambiance, was seated very quickly, our waiter was super attentive and sweet, pancakes and coffee were delicious.
This last trip to Taco Bell was much improved. They improved their speed of service and customer service. They also served breakfast until 11am!
I'm kind of addicted to academy! The prices are so good it's hard not to love this place. It's a go to for press gear. Employees in the hunting section are always knowledgeable.

Great food, great service, awesome daily specials. Right on the water, huge banquet rooms and stages. Finally a place in Pasco that has team trivia night!!! (Thursdays) all you can eat crap legs on Wed along with karaoke, Monday 2for1 drinks and hospitality night!! Check out the new Dockside

Unfortunately I read the reviews and was excited about my order. However, the pizza that my partner and I ordered was extremely greasy and tasted funny, and we ordered mozzarella sticks that arrived cold and hard. I emailed Zesto to talk to them about the awful food, and thought maybe I just got a bad batch? But I never heard back. Terrible customer service....

The kids working are always working hard and polite. It seems to be very slow service though. Both drive through and inside takes longer to get the food than any other chick fil a I've been to. Food is always great.
It was just too dark. I mean, I get it, but... we left after only 1/2 an hour.

It was really good food but the lady behind the counter wasn't much help when I asked her questions and no one else was even in the restaurant. Other then that the food is great and comes out quickly. Thanks the great tamales!

We've been eating here since this place opened, both in the restaurant and for take-out. Recently, though, we've been chronically missing items in our take-out orders. As much as I like the food here, and the people on-site are nice, it's not good enough to collect the entire purchase price and provide only part of what I've paid for.
I absolutely love hot yoga here! I especially love the instructors, they always make you feel comfortable and beautiful- even though deep down you are super hot and sweaty.

The family and I came to smokey bones for the first time and our minds were blown away by the service and the food. It was amazing, broccoli was the best I ever had the proportions were great for the price, we will definitely be coming back.

We've been here a couple times during 1st Friday. It gets very crowded and there isn't really anywhere to sit. First come first serve. There really isn't enough bartenders working to accommodate the crowd. Took awhile to get a drink. Food is decent there. Nothing spectacular but not horrible for this type of establishment. I may consider going there on just a regular night.
Pizza baked on a tortilla dough. Good ingredients, alittle pricey, more room to sit outside than inside. Crude daytime barkeep.

Service was slow, they brought me the wrong dish, but the food was pretty good and portions huge! I would say this fare is typical to American-Italian food that you could find at most places, but for the price and portions it's not a bad dining experience. Just be prepared to wait a while for your food.
Great food, so so service on to go order, asked for ranch and didn't receive any condiments
Received tree braids from this place and they came out the same week. Braids are expensive and for them to come out in a week I was very disappointed. I will not go back.

Friendly staff, fantastic service, and great selection. They made our beautiful wedding bands and, seven years (and two kids) later, they are still our go-to jewelry store in New Orleans. I recently worked with Anthony to resize a watch but really everyone I've ever worked with has been great. They staff is knowledgeable, welcoming and highly skilled. Love this place.
The donuts are never fresh and ALWAYS taste stale. I come here multiple times a week to get coffee and the coffee is decent.

Mom & pop diner with overpriced menu Waiters were really nice but seem overworked $8.50 for a tiny bowl of gumbo with 4 small shrimp- very disappointing as it was suppose to be seafood gumbo Food was ok, order came out wrong, I didn't say anything Felt like owner is not a good employer... energy was sad in this restaurant

Michelle is the man. Legit the best, most informative buying experience in a Tampa vape shop. Bought a tobacco vape, Michelle walked us through how to use it, and hooked us up on a grinder. I will 100% be back. Thanks for the help, guys! We need more shops like this.

I was not impressed with the menu or the service. My daughter & my wife ate at CC. My daughter & I were finished our meal before my wife got her food, lousy service. I was not impressed with the pasta. Luke warm.. The servers were constantly bumping into my chair. Don't think I'll be back
Love this place! We come all the time for Mike the bartender, he's our favorite in St. Pete!

Good burger but could have had thicker or more cheese, great beer selection. Lisa was great at bartending. Great chips but no dip, would have liked some french onion dip w them. Lots of seating, cool outside seating too. If the crowd is big need more than one hand dryer in Men's room.

Friday afternoons, only a few people inside. We got a table immediately. A nice waitress took our order. We got drinking. Unfortunately, we waited for food very long. In the meantime, we did not get any chips or bread. Finally when we got food, the portions were not large, the taste was very average. It was not a successful visit.

Staff is incredibly friendly which you hardly see anywhere anymore. Simple menu (as BBQ should be). Wish they had bbq sauces available to put your own on your food but they do it for you behind the counter. The hot bbq sauce was a great pick with a small kick to it. Will be back.
While the doctor is extremely nice, the glasses selection was pretty minimal and the support staff wasn't overly friendly or helpful.

Pizza is a solid 4 stars for NY style pizza that can be found in Saint Louis. Problem is, they are always slower than what they tell me over the phone. If you hear "ready in 25 minutes" that often means 40 minutes. I haven't been going as regularly because of it.
Great atmosphere and our waitress was very kind and funny! They were very respectful with social distancing protocols. We recommend the butter cake! It's amazing so leave room for it
Best Thai food in Reno Especially love the garden fresh rolls, crab fried rice, lemongrass salad, soups, and curries. Friendly service and good beer selection.

This place has extremely uncomfortable chairs. My back was aching for 3 weeks after my visit. My girlfriend actually left because of the decrease of sexual activity... over all the food was good I suggest the pasta.
Excellent pedicure. Vivian really took her time and was so much more thorough than in other places. Definitely recommend

This was my favorite tour we took while in New Orleans. First, the guide was dressed like a pirate! He was great! He was informative, funny and enthusiastic. I learned a lot about New Orleans pirate history. I highly recommend this tour for anyone who is interested in learning true pirate history.

don't mistake blind onion and wild garlic, because they are worlds apart. wild garlic is freakin good. full bar, really nice staff. seriously though, don't go to blind onion instead. you would be disappointed
Food at this place is excellent Problem is the dumpster located in the alley near the front door stinks so bad as you walk in it ruins your appetite.
Excellent Latin chicken. Does not taste like fast food. The plantains are very tasty and done right. The menu has a nice selection. We will be back when in the area.
Very delicious Arabic and middle eastern food. Shakshokah, liver, and fahsah are perfect.

I came in last night to pick up a to-go order. And I couldn't even walk in the front door. People are standing in the way. My order wasn't even in the system. Seems like total chaos in the dining room. I couldn't tell who was a server and who was the bartender. Nobody knew where my order was. Very disappointed.
Great margaritas and service! The habanero sauce is amazing! Love the bean dip and salsa. The staff is friendly and wants to connect with their customers

Seemed ok. Portions very small. The veal and shrimp dish was was over priced with 2 small sized pieces of veal and 3 tiny shrimp for $29.00 Nothing special but we tried it once. Large cafeteria style dining room . Great service but at the prices they want and the value and quality was not there.
Fun cocktails coupled with hit or miss foods. Bakery items are expensive for what they are, amateurish at best...
acceptable food, acceptable service. a beer menu with beers on it they dont have, and live entertainment that is not what it says on the website. so take your chances.

Oh my God! You haven't lived until you have eaten at this restaurant. I had great service totally worth any wait. Bobby was awesome!!!! He helped me with my order and was so amazing. I love this restaurant.

Food was good, went on New Year's Day so it was busy. The waiters didn't speak full English so it was a bit hard. Very small seating areas, cramped eating. Food portion are small. Presentation was not great and the waiter moved slowly.
Crawfish étouffée was very good. Tasted a cup of the chicken andouille gumbo. Not impressed. Others in my party had crawfish pasta really good and shrimp creole was wonderful.

Breakfast: good portions, and good service, but hide that salt from the chef. Lunch: good portions, and good service, you did not hide the salt well enough!
