After eating lunch and dinner the same day I had to flush my system with water and take an extra blood pressure pill. My doctor has band me from eating here again!
New Years Eve fixed menu...kinda blah to be honest. Food was a bit tasteless. Servers were polite and accommodating and the place is tastefully decorated and beautiful.
Showed up at 10:15 - sign says closed at 10:30 and we were turned away. Awful customer service and false advertising. Just say you close at 10 if that is the case

Back again. We love the atmosphere and outdoor area. Especially during the Covid crisis. Plenty of outside tables and spaced out great. Service is always good and the owners are friendly. This time I had the steak and it was delicious.

They have great toppings. Always have to request a double cook of their gluten free pizza crust. We indulge once in awhile and have the breadsticks. They are my favorite style. Not a huge fan of their salads. Not many dressing offerings.

This is a great candy shop in the King of Prussia Mall. There are many options from candy sold by the pound to international candy. The people who work there are very friendly and helpful. They will assist you with trying candy from the bins. I definitely recommend Lolli and Pops for personal treats as well as gifts for others.

Good food for the money. Had the "deconstructed guacamole salad" and it was delish. They have a full juice bar if you are in to that kind of stuff. You don't feel as guilty eating here either because they list the calories and protein content. Atmosphere is ok. Loud but they have more secluded tables.
Extremely crowded but nice to sit outside Everything needed more seasoning and beignets kinda refunded me of funnel cake

I don't understand the hype about Philly cheesesteaks. I have been to a few different ones and it seems to be the same thing. Don't get me wrong, they are tasty but to say one is better than the other.
I stopped in one day very hungry and one of the customer suggested I get the salmon and rice that comes with a salad and a soda. Delicious
This place is a little gem. It is a small place but they have courteous staff and are quick. Hopefully the gel polish will last for 2 weeks.

Great simple sandwiches when you aren't in the mood to cook. My personal favorite is the buffalo, but I've had just about every sandwich on the menu. Just be ready to wait a few minutes, the service is a tad slow...

Don't ever come to this racist place. They are okay with white people waving guns and threatening people but then throw out the colored people. Fuck all of you. It should read, not a place for colored people instead of kids.

The first time I went, we happened to go when a lovely jazz singer was doing a set. She was fantastic and the place was beautiful inside. Simple decor but very modern and clean. We were there with a 6-year old and His food was not good- spaghetti with plain sauce. They didn't really have a children's menu. But my mussels were delish!

Emotionless and poorly run. A tourist trap filled with the old and out of state. Spend your money elsewhere. Edit: Cynthia, our driver was extremely rude and unsafe. Several people fell down the stairs due to ignorance. She moved the bus even after they made an announcement to get off.

Awful building, cramped waiting room (I'm standing), staff bickering, dirty, and very slow. I will never come back to this location. They cancelled my two previous appointments. As I think of it, I can get the same treatment as I seek here at USF health which is far superior.

I do not recommend visiting this center for care. My first experience was showing up for my 8am appointment, and the office wasn't even open. The PA showed up at 8:15 to let me in. Then, the entire experience felt like I was being treated by amateurs. I expected much better considering it's Santa Barbara and they charge a fortune.

Always a yummy meal for my family. We have our favorites, like their blackened fish tacos, but nothing has ever been disappointing. The service is usually very prompt and super polite. We have brought our son since he was about 1 year old and the staff has always been accommodating and friendly.

The sushi is always fresh and taste good. However we found hair in the food one time and another the rice was dry and when we called they said it's just because they were busy they didn't have time to pay attention to the quality!!!!! When it's good it's good and when they mess up it's crappy!

Pros: Atmosphere ,menu,price, Cons: Poor service ,the waitress forgot to take the entire order from people at my table ,forgot to bring our drinks ,drinks were watery and when complained the manager was rude about it .will never go back .

Pretty good food. Absolutely rude about mask wearing! I was corrected and over educated on my mask and I was wearing it correctly. I was told where to go to the bathroom how to move about the establishment in such overabundance I just wanted to leave. Very uncomfortable. They also were incessant about cleanng right where we ate. Wasn't worth the trouble.
Tiny little spot. Lovely people working. Guacamole was absolutely delicious! Portions were quite large. Definitely recommend!!
Fun place with lots of cool rock memorabilia. Great staff and service. A bit pricey but hey, its Hard Rock! Great burger, fries and drinks. Definitely a revisit when we return to downtown Philly!
Very happy about the new location at the Summit. Great burgers. Definitely a nice new option.
Chinese food is great, sushi could be better. Also they have a great alcoholic beverage selection! Orders done on time, never waiting around.

AMAZING food!!! Very cute and quaint type of place. Very homie and country style diner. Food was soo good! Portions were huge and everything was under 15 dollars. Location is a little tricky and it's pretty far from the heart of bourbon but it's worth the walk!

No idea why this place has such great reviews. Breakfast was terrible today, the benedict had cold eggs and cold fried chicken (the Hollandaise sauce was hotter) and $2 for sliced avocado which was literally 2 tiny slices was just insulting. Place is a rip off.

It's a good place to go if your a broke college student like myself. But other than that I don't recommend it for anything else. I never knew about this place until one day after I finished class and was in need of a cheap snack. Sad to say my expectations weren't to hi that day.

This is probably my favorite Cake shop! I'd consider myself a cupcake connoisseur and I'd recommend their famous chocolate cake ( the one they are known for) and this caramel popcorn cake! The cake is overpriced but the gorgeous interior makes up for it
Loved it - cute decor, two rooms and great coffee make for a great experience. I don't have much to add that hasn't already been said! Would I recommend: Yes Would I return: Yes

Seriously the ONLY place you should be going for coffee in the city. You can feel the love and passion and expertise quite literally poured into every cup here, and while waiting for your perfect latte you can nip into the grocery store next door and get the best bread in the city. What's not to love??
The worst service out of any Las Palmas I've been to. Luckily the taco tuesdays and happy hours are good deals or else I wouldn't come back.

So glad to have a place like this in Mt. Airy. I just tried it for the first time a couple of months ago and wish I had gone there sooner! Their Southern Comfort Chicken Sandwich is one of my favorites. Reasonably priced & friendly staff. They don't serve pork products so all their cold cuts, bacon, etc is turkey.
What a shame Ray left, these guys can't retain customers with there take on Big Rays food.
Last Sunday, I went inside this restaurant and their decoration is so plain and old furniture. I feel unwelcome. However, their foods are good especially Samsoa and curry goat!

The place looks amazing But the food was a big disappointment we had the crab dip for starters and tasted nothing like crab Order Scallops The scallops where cooked well but also nothing special Fried chicken was ok
It was interesting, but small and cramped. It was one of those things where you're glad you can say you did but probably won't need to go back.

I received the most beautiful flowers I have ever seen from here. My daughter who lives in CA ordered from here. I will only use Posh Petals going forward. They are the best. I can't say enough about the gorgeous flowers I received. I highly recommend them!!!!

Don't go to Vito's if before the Fox. This is the second time we had reservations and stood in the lobby for 30 minutes. They way overbook reservations before the symphony and theater events. We arrived at 5:45. Had 6:00 reservations. Got seated at 6:25. Food still hadn't arrived at 7:10. We paid for drinks and left. Extremely poor management.
Great carne asada tacos! Wonderful customer service. They do not have rice or horchata though. Don't judge this place by the outside and give it a try.
Went here with a large group. The food was cheap and fine, but the drinks were a bit too sweet. The atmosphere was pretty standard for Chinatown.

Vic's Sushi has a awesome menu. I love sushi and this place has lived up to the reviews it has received. They are expanding this location to add more seating, they are currently doing pick-up and door dash.

The chipotle shrimp salad with walnuts and goat cheese was very tasty. The pomegranates were a nice addition to the table-side guacamole, but the guacamole itself had too much garlic and jalapeño. The service was spotty. Not a bad experience, but I don't know that will make a point to return soon.

Started to be a regular, lost me. Sour spoiled biscuit gravy for my self and another customer, stomach hurt going home. Funny, I wanted to eat biscuits and gravy so badly. No discount after the fact. Just offered another plate of same value. Zero customer retainment, skills. Revenue munger.. :( Sad wanted a place to return too.

Carlos, owner, is a good guy. This place has a bunch of history in NOLA. The current iteration is just fine. Nothing earth shattering but it does have a nice ambiance and good drinks. I like taking in a spring afternoon (Jazz Fest was fun) on their outside patio area with Guac, Chips and a Sangria/Margarita!

Causal and fun diner. Good for breakfast or brunch. A combination of American and Mexican flare. Come in. Seat yourself where you see an available seat. Juice tastes freshly squeezed. Coffee is hot and the refills keep coming.
I had the shrimp and linguini delivered to my hotel yesterday and it was hot and soooo good. The alleged French bread was a slice of cheese pizza. *side eye*. I assume they ran out of French bread?
Stumbled upon Pulp & Grind looking for a quick breakfast, and it's quite good! The coffee is good, the iced tea is good, and the bagels are actual bagels, which isn't always the case in New Orleans.

My favorite date restaurant. Environment is dim and perfect for an intimate dinner. I have been here several times and every time the food, staff, drinks and dessert are excellent. Fish tacos, shrimp, flatbreads, steaks are my favorites. I've been with a friend to sit at the bar and have a few drinks as well. Will always go back and continue to eat here!

My daughter went in late at night around 2:30 am.... She stood at the register for 10 minutes before someone came up to the register, there was no bell to ding and no employees in sight. Finally someone came up and rang up her purchases... No apologies for having to wait. Not the service we are used to at this location.

We were excited to go out on the Kai Lani; however, our trip was cancelled so we opted to go the next day. The team "drew" was very friendly and helpful. This trip comes highly recommended. We had fun!

Good if you're in the area, not worth going out of your way for. Tastes good, fairly pricey-- a 20 oz mocha will run you $4.75 (about the same as Starbucks). If you're going to this location, enter heading East off of Chinden or going South on Linder.

This dirty, dark little store off South never has anything you are looking for. Not only that, but the 'help' would rather watch you be run over by a truck than help out. But I suppose if you're looking for music in a store with a huge poster of Marilyn Manson in the window, you're not exactly going for service.

The latte was fabulous and the French toast with strawberries and ricotta were superb. The line was to the door but our order was taken within ten minutes. About a thirty minute wait for the food but completely worth it!

We used to really like this place. Now that it has moved out of the food truck, it has changed for the worse. I used to recommend this place to my friends, but now it seems they don't care about the quality of the food. Don't waste your time.
The food wasn't all that great. It wasn't hot enough and just not the best quality for the higher prices.
Terrible service waitress we only saw twice , food average, very dirty restaurant 18$ for a salad do not recommend so many better choices in the quarter

This place could be successful if the employees did a bit more. Aka, sort and size the clothes correctly, pick out the obvious damaged/no sale items and trash them, keep the floor vacuumed and changing rooms clean. It really just needs an organizational overhaul and some new donations and it could breathe new life into the place.

The customer service is aweful! Anything to make a sale. Yes, in the beginning they are nice to you, to "make that sale" then after the sale, you might as well kiss great customer of service out of door. My husband spent thousands of dollars on my ring and you'd think spending that much money you'd be treated like royalty.
Exactly what I was looking for-cool corner place. Breezy with outdoor seating. Near Faulkner's house (now a book shop). Perfect afternoon Absinthe to break up my Quarter tour.
I'm finally in the chair 1 hour after my appointment time. There's a lobby full of distressed people waiting a long time. Avoid this office at all costs.
Great locally owned business for over 12 years. Friendly and good

We were disappointed in this place. It feels more like a corporate owned wanna be deli market than a locally owned establishment. It's over priced and the service was mediocre. If you're gluten-free, you pay extra and you'll get an eye roll - the woman ahead of us did anyways.

I am female and I was interested in buying a motorcycle here. I went and looked and when the associate asked for my cell number for events I gave it to him. Later that afternoon he texted me sexually explicit material. Needless to say Im never going back there to buy. And may stay away from the brand

This place is just fantastic. Excellent food, excellent customer service, lots of great, fresh options. Salsas made in-house self-served from a bar. Don't miss it. It'll definitely become a go-to for me when I'm in the area. A hidden south Nash gem.
Great food. Only last few times I've gotten food to go they forgot to put the potato salad I ordered and paid for into the order.

Very good service! I was the first of the day and was upgraded upon check-in! Friendly staff a s clean rooms is what you will only see here. I was very pleased with the wifi at this property too! Thanks Hilton!!

How is this place in business? Does St. Louis not have restaurant inspection? Health department ? Lord please forgive me but I ate the food Against my better judgment! ( I was a lil tipsy) The food was not bad but I'm thinking I might have salmonella. The silverware was filthy as was everything Else. Gross. Never again.
Terrible manager and service. I feel very sorry for anyone who goes here. I worked as a server for five years and this was terrible service. I would find some other late-night place to eat good luck
Found on Yelp. Amazing food, no kidding. Great service. Good prices. I would definitely try it again.
I'm having trouble finding this store, I tried calling but it's disconnected. Is this store still open?

Brand new hotel that is super clean and super modern with a super friendly staff. Convenient and safe. It has super comfortable beds and all the conveniences of home. An excellent gym and free laundry and bbq grills. Super quit at night. I would definitely stay here again. The best hotel in this

I really don't understand how this is the "best of Montco" at this point I think it must have been paid for. Food was burnt and when we brought it to the managers attention there was no apology but a "what do you want me to do about it". First and last visit.

Breakfast at 10:30am on a Tuesday was meh. The biscuit, the hash browns were not hot, the hashbrown was greasy. The salt shakers were all plugged up so I couldn't really doctor the flavorless eggs over easy. Disappointed. There are better places to eat. Maybe they are better during a busy time of the day. Waitress was very pleasant.

I have been a regular orderer here for years. Usually once a month or more. It is consistently good pizza every single time. The owners are so sweet and always greet me with a smile. Great pizza, great prices, great people.
Pasta soup & clam chowder , Caesar salads lasagna, crab cakes with angel hair light & delish! all 9 family member full & happy

We were so excited to try this place out after hearing great things. What a disappointment. Food was very sub par for the price. New Orleans has tons of restaurants better than this place worth trying. We left feeling very disappointed and unimpressed. Oh and icing on the cake, the service was poor.

If you want to try WW, I would avoid the traditional sushi rolls when ordering. I tried the Spider roll, and it was incredible dry and odd tasting. I looked like the ingredients were days old. I will say the Bolgogi was good. Overall, paying for parking makes this place not worth a second try.
Great all around--meat, sides and service. Brings family and out of towners here and everyone loves it.

Gumbo this trip was awful. Ordered the crab salad as well and was incredibly lackluster. My fiancee ordered the shrimp and sausage po'boy and that was a mess all around. The service is poor and it is unfortunate because the museum itself is amazing and gets better with every trip...
One of the best steakhouses I've ever been to. Upscale and little pricey.. But it's worth it.

Best Thai in Reno. Consistently good food. You can get different levels of spicyness. Thai ice tea hits the spot (get the to-go version, which you get twice as much for the same price). Great service.

I'm a local and the food was ok. Not much flavor and some of the food came out cold. Service was good and dining area was very clean. Southern Bell drink was not good. Too many other good place to eat in the Big Easy.

My restaurant policy: If I leave your restaurant hungry, I will never return. It doesn't matter if your food is great (it was mediocre at best), or if your service is spectacular (which it wasn't). If I have to go home and eat chips after paying $100, I will not be a happy camper, period.
No parking, no breakfast and no drinks! Stay elsewhere, you have been warned. Spent three hours lokking for parking one night. Not good. Motel 6 is better.

Last minute walk in gel mani today. I ended up getting the owner (pure luck) who was great! He was quick, but still paid close attention to detail and was friendly. He also knew exactly which color would look good on me when I explained what I had in mind. Left super happy with my pretty nails!

Not terrible, but I definitely left dinner hungry. Quick for sushi and a sit down dinner. Very fast service just not a fan of any of the flavors utilized with the sushi served. Very attentive wait staff throughout the meal.

Tucson Tamale was at one time my favorite place in Tucson. After ordering a Tamale and receiving 3 replacement tamales, all were mush. Although the employee tried to make it right, the consistency of tamales were far from normal. Since the expansion of Tucson Tamale, the quality has been less than great. I am extremely disappointed with the quality and taste.

I moved from out of state and signed up for a membership about a month ago. I'm Very pleased with this gym. Great machines, machines that I've never seen at my old gym. The bathroom/locker room is always clean. The only con is The parking lot is a little small other than that great gym.
For lunch the food was bland and after we got our food the service took forever to check on us, bring us the check, and return the check. Not going back for lumch

My Indo buddy and I would frequent this place all the time back in college. Decent food, large quantities, and cheap prices. It looks like a run of the mill fast food place, but it's pretty good, and not fast food. Service is quick, and the chicken was always fresh. Recommend this place.
Nice but slow. Stay down middle in bar food. Salmon average - won't get it again. Service ok. Not spectacular. Potential atmosphere cool. Liked motiv. Signs banners and hanging keg taps.

Eh. Sonora Burrito was okay. I was kind of excited to eat here, but I couldn't deal with my burrito a stuffed with gamey fat rather than carne asada. Maybe I'll give this place another try in the future.
Sub-par, med-grade Japanese ish menu. We just waited over 45 minutes to receive a basic 3-roll sushi order, with absolutely no apologies.
Impeccable service! Sublime steaks! I love New Orleans, and Dickie Brennan's is one place I will definitely return to!
Extremely noisy. Service slow; food just average. Salmon very dry. Slice of dessert tiny! Would not return.

Booked via Expedia for a great deal on 2 rooms. Great location. Very clean. Super helpful and friendly staff. Amazingly comfortable, adjustable beds. Climate was awesome. Didn't try the food. The only bummer was that the pool was closed. Huge disappointment for the kids. :/

Super-fun ambiance-- each room is dog-themed in the most hilarious and unexpected and creative way. It felt welcoming and silly in the best way, not hip or self-conscious, and the food was great. But it was really the environment that sold us. Nice waitress, too! We will go back when we return to Philly.
This place is just ok. I don't really care for it that much.
For Sonic it's acceptable.... First time I came here my food was cold. Next two times items were missing, but at least things were warm. This is pretty much what I expect from sonic.
Even though we had a reservation we still waited 30 minutes to be seated. Thank goodness our waitress was amazing. We will not be back anytime soon with a large party.
This is the worst McDonald's around. I have never gotten my complete order. The people that work here don't care about anything and are incompetent.
Amazing food and customer service. This is a must visit when in Nashville. See pic. Do I need to say more?

We have been here quite often for quick dinner and now and then with friends. Aside from the fact that the wooden bar stools and benches are hard and uncomfortable, the menu is large but honestly just average bar food.
This is a tourist trap. If your goal is to get shuttled in and out quickly with a mediocre meal, this is the spot!

The soy garlic and honey bbq sauces were good. The mango habanero didn't have much flavor. The actual wings themselves were neither crunchy nor very tender. The fries and onion rings were decent. The meal as a whole was underwhelming and overpriced for what was received.

The sooner this location closes, the better. never has chicken done or the pieces you want. shorts you on drink. fast food doesn't take 15-20 minutes. staff is rude and unprofessional. D- experience and that's stretching it

Love the concept of basically making your own pice. Just a little pricey for what you get. Doesn't mean I won't be back, just not as often as I would like to. My wife order a pizza with whole cloves of garlic on it. It was delish not overwhelming at all. All the ingredients where fresh. Definitely will be back.

I met the owners. These folks can cook! Everything is fresh. It reminds me of a typical local bar, but then you get this incredible food served on nice dinnerware at stupidly reasonable prices. From deli sandwiches to dinner specials, this food is tops. Can't say enough. I'm quickly becoming a regular there.
I am happy that I was able to go this place, the people are amazing and very thought full I like the food and the service

Went their for lunch on a Sunday. Had the RJ's Bologna sandwich and the wife had the Collard Green Melt sandwich. Surprisingly flavorful! I thoroughly enjoyed the sandwich - multiple flavors and very fresh tasting. Give this place a try!

This was the worse dining experience ever. Service was crappy, the food even worse and they had the audacity to serve this moldy strawberry to my son. And the manager or head could whoever he was could learn some manners and some professionalism. I would never eat her again

Called to ask how the plantains are cooked and the lady was very rude and hung up on me twice without answering my question. It's a simple question so I'm very confused. It was extremely poor costumer service and I will not be dining here.

I like Honor Bar. I really do. But it always seems to be 20% too expensive. And there is just something wrong with not having anything sweet. I mean, couldn't you just have cookies? Macho Salad is first rate. French Dip is worthy. Parking at lunch can be a mess.
if you like dounts, omg this is the place they are huge and sweet and yummy but you better get here quick because they sell fast.

Interesting atmosphere however upstairs music was too loud. Bar crowd is right there by the seated diners and the later it gets the noisier and rowdier the crowd at the bar. The oysters were great and the whole fish very fresh (we had it grilled not fried).

Another great experience at Mellow Mushroom. We asked for Kristen and she had just left for the day. Mercedes On the other was Outstanding and very kind and always happy. Mercedes was very prompt in finding out what other beer was the local beer and I give her a perfect 10. As always I look forward to my 8th visit.

my boyfriend had to get a financial calculator in a hurry and future shop or best buy didn't carry it so we headed to staples. they had the exact model he wanted and the staff was extremely helpful. i would definitely recommend shopping here

I love the store and the people that work there are great!!!!! This is one of my favorite places to hang out. I've found some great things through the years.... including a cashmere Banana Republic coat. If you have the patience you can score!

A tie for my favorite restaurant in Philly (with Amada). I had the oysters and chef's sushi tasting menu. Fish was the freshest and cleanest taste my mouth has ever held. The oysters were...ungodly- I highly recommend them and they were probably my favorite part of an already impressive meal.

A couple of fairly recent visits have me changing my previous ratings - not because of the building or service. My personal rating changed because of a lackluster lunch that came at a higher price tab that I thought and my realization that the brews offered do not excite me and I'm trying to unify my ratings on all my brew pub/brewery experiences
Order here on Sunday weird just one of my burgees was cold and the other one was hot didn't expect that but I won't be dining here .
Pretty good selection for a small neighborhood hardware store. Well lit and staff was extremely helpful in finding things.
Food was descent. A lot of it was extremely dry or undercooked. Our server was swamped couldn't blame it her for us waiting an hour to get water to our table. Overall, I just had way better food.
Brought the car in for an oil change at 7:45 am... it's currently 9:15 and I'm still waiting here. This is absolutely unacceptable..
Incredible food and coffee. Have only gone for breakfast so far, but looking at the lunch menu and I will think I will be back soon! Great addition to the Webster Groves historic business district!
took the 101N and ended up not being able to resist stopping in - what a treat!! great service and super friendly. not so much the food as the cozy and homey feel that warrants the 4 *s

Salty. That sums up everything we had tonight. Service was good. It looked like someone was training in the kitchen and was referring to notes while cooking. Just an unlucky dining night I guess, but probably not trying again anytime soon.

This Restaurant is not good AT ALL the waiters managers are very rude they wouldn't give me any paper cups n plasticware they was very mad for some reason the food isn't good it was so bad I Threw up that how bad the food is only thing that was good the cakes so basically if your looking to eat somewhere don't come here
4.5 stars is overrated. I was probably at 3.5. Friendly staff but frankly I get better oysters at home. My wife liked her meal a little better but it is safe to say we won't be going back.

The tacos are great. I order them all the time. The guacamole hardly has any avocados-- it's mainly tomatoes with cheese and onions. It's tasty, but needs more avocados, less filler. They also deliver them on the chips, making them soggy. Who does that? But the tacos are delish!

Horrible club, find better looking woman in a grocery store, Instead of a awesome night, be prepared to be marketed to like you was in india in streets..give me dallor..give me a dallor. Tons of woman, but for coverage charge, could go to park and see better walking around.

"Heartburn B's" Maybe I just don't understand the hype, but I've never enjoyed a meal here. Using way too much spice doesn't quite mask the terrible quality of their chicken (tough and stringy,) and I've never been impressed with their side dishes. Not a fan.
Had a great time! Thriller is a great way to see the beauty of Clearwater while grinning from ear to ear with fun!

The service was excellent. Absolutely no pressure. Very casual atmosphere. Great music in the background. We ordered like 5 entrees and all were fantastic. We all really enjoyed everything. The flatbread with apple cinnamon and cheese was a pleasant surprise.

Yellowtail has GREAT eel. I live right around the corner, so they're my go-to sushi place. Very reasonably priced and just overall great place. I've never seen it terribly crowded in there either, a great place if you're looking for sit down or take out.

Very sad to see that they closed - windows papered over, sign 'coming soon" new restaurant. They never seemed to get a lot of customers, despite having great food and service. The Rev. Dr. Steak is in mourning.

Food tasted absolutely wonderful. The tacos were amazing and the portions were very large. After eating about 2 hours I felt sharp pains in my stomach. The next morning I woke up, nearly blacked out and threw up everything that I ate. Yes the food was great but it gave me food poisoning that ruined my entire weekend.

Came in on a Sunday afternoon and the two women working behind the bar were great! They were friendly and attentive. My favorite beer was the Holly Jolly Winter Warmer. The bartender by a cinnamon sugar rim and it complimented the beer well. The beer and atmosphere were excellent. Definitely recommend coming here!
Best sushi I have ever had, also best priced sushi I've ever experienced. Our server was very helpful and kind and we got our sushi very quickly after we ordered. New favorite sushi joint by far.

I am a huge fan of meatballs! I like this place because they have a wide variety of style and spices. However, their flavors and texture of the meatballs are not always consistent. I have been here several times and my experiences with the food is always different. The staff is nice and service is fast.

This Chipotle will only take orders from customers who use a smartphone. The customer must provide their name, address, phone number, email, birthday, a difficult password and their credit card information. This is a bit much to buy a lunch. I won't go there with the present set up. If you don't have a smartphone they will not serve you.
Cinnamon and sugar bagel, fresh out of the oven I would like to add, topped with the berry cream cheese...delicious. It was the perfect chewy texture that I expect.
I got a pedicure. They took all of 15 minutes and it was $25. I don't want to be sitting in a chair for an hour but this was a little too quick. Looked only ok.
Best Jewish deli around. Free pickle bar, fast service, great food, reasonably priced, well stocked beer store. The grilled reuben is just so delicious and I've never had a bad experience here.

Management team can be very rude. I recommend Phil to work on your car - he's knows what he's doing and takes the time to explain things. He's worked on my old Scion and now he works on my Nissan. Honesty if it wasn't for him I wouldn't come to this location. But finding a genuine & honest mechanic is hard these days.

Kay Lighting, you should have returned my repeated messages and called me to discuss, rather than charging me without my consent. In fact, you have my number and you could still call me to find a compromise, rather than charging me so much money for work that was not approved.
The decor and environment is very nice, and the food was pretty good. However the service was awful!

Everything about this place was amazing! I highly recommend it! To start, I need to praise our waiter Drake. He was amazing, A++++ service for him! We ordered a bunch of different cocktails and entrees which were all delicious! The highlight of the night was the bananas foster! They make it table side. Drake nailed that too.

Pretty disappointed. This place used to be my go to and then I moved to California. I searched everywhere in San Diego for Chinese food that compares to No. 1 China. I came home to visit and first thing I got was No. 1 China and it was awful. Nothing like it used to be.

My first time on US Air/American since they merged and demoted us Star Alliance people to a class lower than baggage. Ugh!!!! Like flying with all the legacy carriers, I'm sure it's pretty good if you have enough clout to get a few perks, but it's pretty demeaning for everyone else. :(

This place is pretty decent. the owner/operator is friendly and stuff is easy to find.. points off for selection though. Most of the figures/collectibles are Star Wars related or just old.. There doesn't seem to be a decent amount of newer stuff, but the prices are relatively low and there was a sale on graphic novels when i went there, which is plus.
Yall need to quit breakin my damn heart. You leave the taco out of the meal deal on the regular. Im gonna keep comin back just stop breaking my heart and put the god damn taco in the bag

I like their house special fried rice (aka the works). It is good and they put lots of beef, chicken and shrimp in it. I've had other stuff there but this is what I go for. I am not a huge fan of Chinese places, hpwever this one seems clean.

This is an awesome store owned by a few awesome burners. They have a great selection of goods to enhance your experience. I will say that their prices are kinda high, but I like the variety of trendy hippie wear.

I ordered a sandwich 9/1/21 at 5:55 pm. Sandwich NEVER came, but I was immediately billed for sandwich. On 3rd Call to location I was told the driver was stuck in traffic. (2 1/2 hours - to go 10 blocks). At 7pm, the store phones were never answered again.... No contact whatsoever from (notso) Primo

Matador is a great go-to spot. The Mexican food is good and consistent. House margarita are delicious, great tequila and mezcal selection. Some of my favorite chips and salsa, love all the garlic that is in the fresh salsa. Some of my go-to favorites. Taco Salad, Grilled Carne Asada, Street Tacos, and Habanero steak burrito.

Decent food. What really rocks is that they are open 24h. Even though Nola is a 24-hour city it can be hard to find diverse late night bites. When your late night cravings hit and you're sick of bar food, this place is a welcome break from the late night greasy monotony.
Teriyaki sauce just tasted like soy sauce and the chicken was dried out. The sushi was average

Word of warning - eat before you go! Filthy theaters. Dirty tables, chairs and floor. Staff is usually very nice but I wouldnt recommend this place because I cannot abide the terrible service. God help you if you order anything with ice cream. Enjoy your milk.

Ted Drewes has always been a favorite since I was a little kid. Since we got a chance to bring David and Molly here we got to share some of those memories with them. The ice cream was very good this time around 8.6/10 thank you and we will be back soon!
Delivery was fast and fresh. Food not greasy and reasonable portions. We will definitely order from here again!

Dooley Groves was a really neat place to spend a couple hours. We didn't pick many oranges because we are flying but the ones we did pick, are delicious. I highly recommend the pineapple oranges. So sweet and juicy!
the food is fresh and good. the guac is amazing. i like the salad bowl, and the limey salty chips are really great. the people that work here are typically pretty friendly.

We had a reservation for 4 on a Friday night and had to wait for about 45 minutes, without a great way to order drinks or apps while waiting. Service was good. Food was good (and could see why its a NOLA staple). Seems like it would be a lot better with a thorough inside cleaning and better management.

My regular drivers are great. However, in December they had a substitute driver, and I ended up with damage to my yard from the truck driving over my grass. This isn't the first time. I emailed Hudgins, complete with photos of the damage. Never heard back. That's really poor.

I was skeptical to even step inside. No lights were on except the "OPEN" sign. A creepy, middle aged man greeted me and was the only worker. I left right away because it was one of those cheap places. A bunch of massage chairs were crammed together in the place. Will not go back here.

had a mid level tequila on the rocks the other day. a very short pour for $15. 2 or 3 small sips-GONE. I hate that!! our octopus tapas was pretty good but IMO over priced as well. my advice - pour a real drink or lower your price. I guess I'm done with this place.

Was not impressed with Hyde Park. It was a premium priced chain steakhouse but the food was over-salted, the wait staff fell below the caliber of all of the other Indy steakhouses, and the steak was just "ok". While we were excited to try it out, we won't be back. Tony's, Ruth's Chris, and St Elmos are all better options by far.

Waited half an hour for my appointment, and most importantly left with a small cut on my face I didn't have there before. Clearly my extraction was way too rough, and I now have two areas on my face that are beginning to scab. Otherwise, location was nice and staff friendly.

I hate it when a Yelp check-in offer is questioned. I love the wingie specials and the Chili-infused vodka is to die for, but like I said: I hate it when a Yelp check-in offer or deal is questioned, and that's my only grudge.

Wow this place is special. The atmosphere is top notch and the service is excellent. I only had coffee and pastries but they were memorable! Definitely try the spanakopita, or take so home for later. I live out East but the next time I'm in Tampa I'll definitely stop back into PSOMI. I just hope I'll be able I get a table!
BRICS I have no bad words! I did switch from my normal Yellow Cake Batter. And I got Birthday Cake won me over! It was so good.
Best pizza in Yardley. Maybe PA and USA.

Fantastic food, especially for a lunch. Very light, but full of flavor. A great place to go with friends. A bit expensive, but worth it once for the dining experience. Three stars due to a bad experience with the server.

Don't understand all the hype. Expensive, average-tasting uninspired sandwiches. Baked good were good but also pricey. Staff was polite and efficient. I just don't understand what people rave about. The Market at Hopkinson House makes better sandwiches. I suppose all the rich people who live in the nearby condos have the wool pulled over their eyes. Fancy presentation/store must =good. Lol
Poorly executed food. The chicken fried steak is just tossed in a little flour at best and fried in very stale oil.
This place has great food and great service!! Spicy pork is to die for. Everything here is delicious. A must try place you got to visit..

They should get no stars. We got seated, waited 15 minutes, no waiter showed up. We left the place and went to another restaurant. This happened on a Monday night when they only had about 5 tables taken. We will never go back.

Terrible experience. Drinks were made incorrectly and the bartender had to make them again. We were told the bartender would not make them again and not to order them because they wasted too much alcohol already. Unpleasant waitress and bartender. Too bad. We were prepared to stay, eat, and spend money. Will not go back. The only positive was the music.

The salt & pepper shrimp is simply amazing ... the filling in crab Rangoon was a little to loose for my liking but still tasty. The dinner menu is a la cartel and the serving sizes were more than enough to feed 4 hungry adults so that's a plus too! I'll definitely be back.

I ordered the tropical duck to go and was very disappointed. Ive had duck curry many tjmes in different places and what they served me makes me question who was cooking. Overall the curry sucked and was way spicier than what I ordered and lastly very expensive. Not sure what happend the other food and reviews look good, perhaps it was bad luck.

Always missing something when I order to go or Grubhub. Because the food is good, I order often. However, there is ALWAYS something missing in my order. If you ask for anything added or removed, it won't happen (even though you will be charged for extra). Double check your bag every time!

I frequently visit the one in Jackson when I'm working there. This one is larger, nicer, the charbroiled oysters were even better here. I had 2 dozen myself. The bread was awesome. Service was quick to have such a large crowd. Our waitress was Latrisha. She was excellent and one beautiful woman I might add.
Sadly nothing has changed here. This place has the best bagels but absolutely the most horrible service. Imagine what kind of business this place could do under better operational management
Hilton needs to tear out all the carpeting in the rooms because of the mold. They also need to wash the bedspreads if they are meant to be used as blankets.

Pork vermicelli had perfectly seasoned meat. Their vermicelli and fish sauce is served with a bit of red chili pepper to give a slight but not overwhelming spice. Always excellent quality food and comfortable atmosphere. Free and easy parking is always a plus in the city.

Our family has eaten here many, many times and we always get a great meal. Love the food and the service (Alex is great). Where else can you BYOB. Thank you Polly for keeping up this wonderful tradition for many people in this area. Aloha!!
Overrated, overpriced, check your receipt to see if the numbers add up. Very awesome and friendly staff though.

While I give them props for upgrading to stadium seating they still have the same old dingy bathroom that looks like it belongs in a 50's diner that hasn't been cleaned since poodle dresses were popular. It also seems to be permanently kept as the children's theater because the movie selections rarely leave "G Rated" category.
Good food and drinks. Service is slow. Friday night with one bartender, not acceptable.

Have been to this location many times and it is normally good, however on this occasion the salad we received had rotting lettuce throughout and Portion sizes for main entrees were greatly reduced from what they used to be. Service was good.
Good food, unfriendly service regularly. But we keep going back cause the food is good. So there you go.
Came here on a Tuesday night. I had the AYCE crab legs. Fiance had pasta. We both loved the food. Service was fantastic.

Got takeout from here- great samosa chat, suspect it's even better when eaten fresh. Little bit heavy on the chickpeas though. The puff was also really good. So many great options, can't wait to try everything else, especially the pizza
The style was pretty cool super cheesy Florida mermaid style. The drinks are bad. We got a margarita because the bartender says that she makes the best margaritas. It was super bad !!! And bitchy
Great food and fast service. I had the chicken pho great broth but next time I will leave the chicken out.
fantastic food. great service. the in house salsa is full of flavour. reasonblable price. make reservations there busy.

Service was ok, but the food was excellent. Nothing against our sweet server, but she was alone on a 20 person table - really? I completely blame that one on management! Buffalo cauliflower was awesome and the chicken skewers were so so good! Everyone had a wonderful time! Ambiance was so fun!

I wanted to like this place but I'd give it zero stars if i could. -Schiefers Staff was very rude and just threw everything into the bowl. When they said it was create your own i didn't actually think I'd have to assemble my taco on my own.
Buffet was good. A lot of variety. 2-3 chicken items, 2-3 vegetarian gravies, 2 desserts. I highly recommend this place.

My wife and I stopped here on a monday night in the summer. They have a nice bar area and nice out door seating. The food was good. I had the fried chicken. I enjoyed it very much. My had a salad and she also enjoyed her meal. Our waitress was very nice. We will definitely be back.

This was a good choice. I was back home visiting Philly for a conference and wanted to get my scrapple fix. Molly's had it as well as some other nice breakfast items and some quite tasty bloody marys. Adequate beer list for the venue and very friendly service made it a worthwhile stop,

I was skeptical about this place due to the last owner of the buffet business in the same building. I ordered the half duck, fried pork chops, Korean ribs, and fried ride. The food was good. The interior is new and looks very clean. I give the restaurant 4 stars on cleanliness and design, 3 stars for the food, 4 stars for service.

Had the pit boss Burger is was meh at best , the chilli wasnt hot and had no flavor and it seemed like the burger wasn't seasoned! The service was good but if you're going to pay 15 dollars fora burger it better be damn good unfortunately it wasnt!

This was my first visit here. I was referred by a friend. I had the Build-Your-Own Pizza. It was delicious!! The toppings I put on it, plus how it was made, enhanced the whole experience. I will become a regular.
Good place order the chicken sandwich if u black u not gone like the chicken cause of season but everything else good lil gem downtown

Totally agree. Merchandise is lacking. The one I go to University Town Place in / Sarasota. I find much more merchandise same in Tampa. I don't know why this is I like the Robert Graham shirts but this selection in Clearwater is lacking. They do have very nice sales Clerks wish they had a better selection of mens clothes .

Daniel is incredibly knowledgeable about the Philadelphia real estate market. He makes himself available for questions basically 24/7. He is kind, open, and flexible. Highly recommend to anyone looking to buy or sell!

It's a cool spot but the food we had was just okay. The pizza was not great and very high acidity. I'd try something else as they have a great draft selection to go back for but I wouldn't get the pizza again.

In the midst of a pandemic, none of the employees were wearing masks and did not practice social distancing. This is the only retail business that I have seen that has not required masks. They have a plastic shield between the customer and the cashier but that's not enough when employees on the floor don't wear masks. Very irresponsible.

Harlan and his team are awesome! They did an excellent job painting everything on-time, at a reasonable rate. Harlan was able to send me pictures with status updates when I couldn't make it to the site to see myself. I can't speak to outdoor painting as I only had interiors, but would definitely recommend for someone looking for an interior painter.
Typical Village Inn. Nothing great but the speed and the price. At least it is clean and the food more than just edible.
If I never see the likes of you again it will be too soon, oh my local store in upstate NY I heart you.
I asked what was on the Greek salad & they said "whatever comes on the Greek salad..." Really bad service
Good food and great environment. Have had the coffee but I don't remember it being one way or another. I must have liked it though because I drank it all. Can get packed.
Cool place! Lots of great choice on their menu. Everything we tried was delicious! Pizza, burger, tots, ice cream sandwiches...all great choices! Service was fast and helpful.

I Made appointment over the phone, but the person whom took my info did not log it in. Got here 8:20 in the morning and my appointment was not log in their system. The guy at the front desk customer service was below average. I would Think before making appointment here or make this place your last choice.

I give this place 3 stars because the food was good and so was the service. The owners wife was very unfriendly though and a bit rude to the staff. Not what I like to see in a local establishment. Disheartening.
Sometimes when I'm falling asleep I think about how I would love to get a basset hound and name him George Washington. The chicken is decent.
Great food except the kitchen staff is wearing their masks below their noses and chin. No thanks on the side of COVID. Won't be eating here until after the pandemic
Great service and efficient. Best price in the area with lifetime warranty. Completed in an hour.

I loved this place when it first opened i used to go for their breakfast sandwiches i think they changed cooks and now the sandwich is super greasy and the bread is Big and bulky its like eating a burger for breakfast i am really dissapointed.
My boyfriend and I love Señor Taco! We frequently split a California burrito and carne asada fries! Sooo delicious and great prices! If you haven't had the carne asada fries, YOU NEED TO TRY THEM!!!!
I love this place so much! I've had three 60 minute massages here and I plan to go back! They have great massages and reasonable prices.
The food is excellent - but wait times are egregious. If you order an hour in advance, give it at least an hour and a half to be ready.

Place looks simple, but food is exceptional! I had shrimp and crab burrito. Absolutely thrilled. Big plus- everything is freshly made, and literally taken right out of oven, even chips were hot. It's very important for me, since I'm allergic to onions and food has to be made freshly without onions. Majority of Mexican restaurants have everything pre-maid and so I can't eat there.
Great food and atmosphere. Service could have been better but there was a party of 10 women that decided they wanted to separate the bill so our poor waitress had to deal with that. I'll be back.

Dropped by for a turkey sub. I think it takes longer to get in and out of this location since they went to a single counter -- it used to be split with two order stations. Sandwich artists aren't very friendly, either.

I order a steak chimichanga with rice and beans In my steak chimichanga burrito I found a toothpick And when I ask for refund the manger was so rude and said there is no refund I would not recommend anyone to go this place

We all really liked this place. The burgers are just pretty darn good and affordable. The pork sandwich was also good but could use a little more sauce. The milkshakes were good as well. Just a pretty decent burger place.
Loved their crawfish and spicy tuna rolls! The dynamite roll was ok. Overall great little sushi spot uptown. The wait wasn't too long, service was good. Will definitely be returning.

I am updating my review of O2's Taphouse & Grill because of my displeasure with the '...mens urinals shaped like womens lips...' This type of sexism in what is supposed to be a family friendly establishment is unacceptable, however, the service is on par with other pubs and the quality of the food is about average.

Stopped in for a drink on a Saturday afternoon. The bartender was friendly and attentive. We ordered two Manhattans which were a one-and-done. Had the appetizer it was pretty basic bar food. Overall nothing spectacular and overpriced- the appetizers were the same prices as the entrees.

It is a tourist trap, but their gumbo and seafood etoufe are good. I also have had their fried oyster po-boy, and their shrimp po-boy and they are also good. Their featured roast beef and ham po-boy (aka - Ferdy) was dissapointing; the meats were dry and the debris (sort of gravy) was thin and didnt add much taste to the po-boy.

used to love this place, we came here for games and dinner for years...but we tried to go a just the other night and they completely changed the menu and it is basically an overpriced pizza place now. PLEASE bring back the old menu.

I was not at all impressed by the food. The bacon was extra crispy and not tasty at all. American cheese (gross) in my unimpressive omelet. The staff was super friendly though and was the only good thing about it.
Yummy breakfast food with an adventurous edge but I need a refill of coffee with my breakfast. One cup is not just not enough for a complete breakfast.
Food was great. Bartenders were rude and dismissive. I'd order good to go if we were back in town but I wouldn't eat inside again.
My roomie raved about this place.... I thought it was just ok. I expected something a little fresher and less greasy. The waitress also got our order wrong. I do recommend the teramisu.
Good cheap car wash but the people at the beginning of the wash are rude. You can expect everyone to know what to do in a car wash. Especially if they never had a car.
Nice atmosphere but wasn't impressed with the food. I had the hot chicken, which was over cooked and mostly breading. The fries were also overcooked. Beer was cold, recomend the Chicken Scratch!
I highly recommend this place! For coffee, lunch, dinner, dessert, great every time. The baklava is mouthwatering.

No reservation nor call ahead sitting. We came here with a party of 4 for lunch on a Sunday. The hostess takes our name and cell number and texted us 20 minutes later. We ordered Margherita pizza, Renato pizza (white pizza) and Cruto pizza.
I can take it or leave it sometimes. I dont come for the atmosphere like some do but they do make a great Jalapeno Margarita. Go for happy hour the foods pricey.

Very close to my hotel, I chose Kingdom as my dinner palace on Friday night. I walked in, was seated immediately, and brought water & tea. The food was deelicious and I definitely enjoyed the reasonable pricing. Service was fantastic. Definitely would go back on my next trip.

Excellent food, do yourself a favor and get the Honey Bee sauce. The fries were a little salty but I like that so it's not a problem for me. The place is kind of run down and could use a good scrubbing but didn't feel overly dirty. My table was a bit sticky. But all in all I definitely will be back.
The foods ok but the atmosphere makes me want to kill myself !

Called in a order for delivery of a large cheese pizza (well done) on a Wednesday night. Asked them to have the driver call, he didn't. The pizza arrived and was very hot and fresh. It was VERY well done and somehow still doughy. The pizza was extremely greasy and seemed like it had extra cheese. My friend and I did finish the pie.

Solid restaurant in Edmonton's downtown. "Funky", kitschy decor. Decent vegetarian food offerings (I think I tried the shepherd's pie, which was tasty). Big portions and reasonable prices. Service was friendly, laid-back, and they don't rush you, but you might need to do a bit of flagging down for bills, water, etc.

Loved this rooftop bar. Just not a whole lot of selections in terms of food and alcohol. Basic other then the view. Still a great place to hangout and watch the Cardinals play in moor comfortable seating

I order a chicken quesadilla to go. Once I got home i saw the lettuce was so brown and wilted I wish they didn't even include that. The quesadilla was good but very greasy because the way they package it. It's been like this for years. I wish they could pack it a different way so it stays crispy.
Tried the satay, mango chicken, roti canai and ginger chicken. Awesome food, good atmosphere. Will be back..
The menu choices, the preparation and presentation of the food, the service, and the outdoor-dining setting were all perfect!
Restaurant looks pretty cool, but service was not great on Christmas Day. Super slow. We repeatedly had to ask for bread. The server never came by to refill our waters. Pretty disappointing.

Excellent customer service from the time we walked through the door until we left! The food was really good as well. The only thing i would suggest is to include eggs or meat with your kid meals. My bill was a little pricey as a result. I would definitely dine here again though.

Was promised air miles, not received at the time of sale and repeatedly put off when inquiring about them... Too busy and did not return calls or texts. Once you pay, then this bunch turn off and want nothing more to do with you. I should have bought a Lexus...
Not good in my opinion...burgers are subpar and the milkshakes suck. They don't even use real ice cream in the milkshakes. Every time I've had a milkshake it's riddled with ice crystals.

No issues - although i tend to visit the Giant on Twp. Line more - this is actually the closest major supermarket to my office so it's handy when I need food (frozen meals or snacks) or bottled beverages.

We got takeout last night from catering menu. The Moussaka was delicious. Same for Kritiki salad. Really fresh. Portions really large. Our family of 5 will get two full dinners and some lunches out of our order. Very friendly staff. Even helped carry one tray of food to my car a block away. Will definitely be back soon.

WOW! Best spa in all of Santa Barbara. The place is super clean and very reasonably priced. I had a Vichy shower massage (first try) and it was AMAZING! And then a 90 minute massage. Lauren is fantastic, making sure that I was comfortable. They are open until 10pm and can accommodate same day appointments. Parking is easy.

Pretty dang good dive bar! The staff at the the bar is friendly and provides super service. The owner is a bit abrasive but it reminds me of the east coast and he's on top of everything making sure customers are happy. My only concern is the bathrooms they are filthy.

While I've never had a problem with the food, and find it to be a great, diverse menu, the service has always been a struggle. Despite always having a reservation, I've never had an experience where I didn't have to wait to be seated. One one occasion we had to ask for to-go boxes because we could no longer wait to be served.

Terminal C is the La Brea we stopped at. It was nice, fast, and tasty. We both ordered coffee, and I had a slice of their lemon poppyseed bread. It was moist and delicious. Prices are what you would expect froma n airport. Would go again!
Food looks good. Wouldn't know since it didn't come out. There's a pizza place next door and down the street. Save the hassle and $$ and try those.

Wanted to like this place as it is close and convenient to my office. Sorry, but the BBQ is just not very good. I would put it on the level of grocery store prepackaged, warmed up in the microwave and no better. Sides are straight out of a can. No imagination whatsoever

This place could be really good but we never got the chance to place our order. We walked in and weren't greeted by the staff. There was someone in the drive thru and all three members of staff were talking to them and never acknowledge us standing at the counter. After waiting for 5 minutes and not being talked to we left.
Delicious, fun and creative menu. Friendly owners with great customer service. And they have a patio in a city where your always going to want to eat outside.

Decent store--crowded but organized. I sold some things recently and felt okay about the service. It took much larger than anticipated (told me it would take an estimated 30 minutes and took closer to an hour...However, I did have 2 big bags of items). Staff seemed rushed and uninterested but it was also a busy Saturday.

We sat down and ordered our food at 7:30 pm. The first bowl of noodle was brought to our table at 8 :45. The taste of the chicken appetizer was so so. The ramen tasted OK. Is it worth one hour plus of waiting? I don't think so.

Came here on a double date with our friends it was awesome! The ambience was great, service so friendly, and food was outstanding! The wine was great as well I have not one complaint. We look forward to coming back !

Burger was pretty good. On the smaller side. So many toppings to chose from. The fries were really the best part of the meal. I recommend going at lunch. Under $8.00 for a burger, fries, and a soda. Waitress was great.
One person working during a packed out Sunday. Horrific service. There is nothing else to write. Customers walking out because of outrageous wait.
Took one bite and found a surprise. Paper that separates the cheese and burnt bun. Called and was told "I'm sorry I wish there was something I can do." Fries and Mac and cheese bites were delicious.

I love Panera and I eat there regularly in Texas. But this was the worst experience I've ever had at any Panera. Took over 25 minutes to get two orders of oatmeal. After 20 minutes we went to ask what the status was and the employees laughed as they told us they forgot we were here and had ordered anything.
Worst Pharmacy ever!! Never have the meds in stock and you will sit in the drive thru forever. Switching to another CVS.

Terrible car wash! I paid $14.99 for a.deluxe wash and my car came out dirty and wet even after going through the dryer. In addition, their brushes scratched my hood. Don't waste your money on this place..... Got their response unfortunately we were just passing through and left after the wash..............still no excuse for the results........baaaaaaddddd!

My first disappointing burrito. The servings were smaller than what I've been used to throughout the years I've been going to Chipotle Nationwide. Rice and chicken were served tablespoon size. And the chips weren't cooked all the way. Some chips were soft, didn't have that crunch to the chip. All for a $10.99 price tag?
With the right people it's a great place to hang. Lots of screens and plenty of beer. Nothing very notable otherwise, but right across the Egyptian Cafe, so works for me!
The food is bland compared to other locations. Honestly, I was extremely disappointed. I gave 3 stars due in part to the large portion and our waitress who was super nice and very attentive.
Our son loves Hoosier heights! He plays their frequently in their kids club, loved the ninja course and we've had two great birthday parties there! Love it!
I don't understand how its barely 12pm and the chicken nuggets are over cooked and look like they were from yesterday. Thanks guys my kid was in a great mood

MY TUMMY WAS LIKE OH OH OH OH OH MY GOSH LOL The New orleans seafood is my favorite !!!! spicy grilled tilapia topped with shrimp covered in parmesean sauce, grilled asparagus, and cheddar mashed potatoes with a red rum runner martini ... I was in heaven. The waiter was nice, and pleasant and most important he got our food to the table quickly
The app and website says parties will have 1 seat on either side to establish social distancing. That did not happen. In fact, there wasn't an empty seat on either side of me.

Mark does great work, love to support a local small business. He reshafted my 6 iron after the head had snapped off. He was able to put the proper shaft on and take off my old grip and reuse it. Great work would recommend.

Sapori makes you feel like family. It's small, cozy and makes you feel at home away from home. My favorite dish I've ever had here was a special; Papperdelle noodles in lobster sauce featuring a lobster tail and crab meat. A must have for any seafood loving Italian! Sapori NEVER disappoints.
They refused to call my ophthalmologist to get my prescription for the frames I had bought. That's fine I'll give the frames back.

This is so freaking random. It's pretty cool to just walk around and pretend you're in Greece. Maybe I can trick my friends when they look through my pictures. "Oh, I didn't tell you I went to Greece for the weekend?"
Loved the outdoor eating and the Philly cheese rolls. The Chicken Caesar Salad was delicious and will be back.
Went back 2 more times - burgers were just as good and service was great too

Antique Archaeology is for visiting as an attraction, but not for shopping. Prices far exceed market value and the cool stuff isn't for sale. If you like the show, t-shirts and coffee mugs it's a fun time.

Stay away!!!!!!!!! they lie...... we ordered a mattress from the prince store location they said the mattress would be in the following week im on the 3rd week no mattress!!!!!! there phone system is the WORST !!!!! can't get a sales person on the phone they screw you around omg!!!!!! trust me go take your money and go somewhere else!!!!! not worth the aggravation

I must not have the palate for dim sum, because I found the soup dumplings and the crawfish and crab bao to be incredibly bland. The sesame chicken was good (and as other have noted, less greasy than other Chinese restaurants), but not good enough to warrant a second visit anytime soon.
Been to Murphy's Pubhouse South many times. Have always been met by friendly staff and efficient service. The food is classic pub fare and they have an excellent thin crust pizza.
There was hair in my hot and sour soup....food was bland and unimpressive. Online ordering is always a great thing and the food was delivered promptly.
Great beer menu but the food was not good. Went with some friends and all got different things. None of us were very impressed.

The atmosphere in this old converted home is warm and inviting. Whoever came up with the too-narrow-to-ever-be-comfortable bench seating in most of the place should probably stick with serving the beer. But if you can land a couch you're in for a fine evening of tasty libations and relaxed camaraderie.
Found a hair in my fries. Absolutely disgusting. Have some pride in what you do. Also wear a hair net .
The pizza is half decent but $7 for "garlic bread" is an insult....don't waste your money.
Food portions were great price was ok . I enjoyed the service. I love the spices and flavor , this is the spot for some good seafood
What a great find! I had a 90-minute massage with Pamela and it was incredible. I highly recommend this spa and I highly recommend you asking for Pamela as your therapist. you won't be disappointed!
Had a very nice dinner with friends Saturday night. The service and food were excellent. It was a little noisy, but overall an excellent evening
Comps and payouts are limited to high rollers only. Little guy playing penny and nickel machines....forget about it. Rivers Casino is where you want to spend your $$$$. Decent payouts.
Great ambiance, great drink options. The gnocchi is sooo good and is a great vegetarian option. Kale salad is simple but is also very good. Great outdoor space.

The place is really clean, food looks and tastes great until I realized there was a long hair in my soup. I used to work for restaurants, I know things like that happen. It was kinda uncomfortable because the place was really nice and cozy.
This place has the best sandwiches, great beer selection and also live blues music Thursday evening and Saturday afternoon. Enough said
Packed, stressful, not enough seating, food is mediocre. Go early or pass it up if you've been to something similar!
After an 8 hour day of travel, don't use this service! Paid $20 a person and sat on the $&@$!!!! bus for half an hour. Take a cab for $45 instead.
One of the worst sundae i had. Fairly new business. For the brownie it had some cheap packaged cake which ruined everything about my dessert.

Ordered a Greek salad with chicken via drive through. Got home and it was a handful of lettuce mix and some chicken. Nothing else in the salad, just lettuce mix and chicken. Not what I expect out of a Greek salad. Was super disappointed. Pita was good though.

Customer service is terrible. Purchasing was great when they want your money. Once that happens, it's a terrible terrible experience getting your furniture and having 5 different associates tell you 5 different things. Still trying to figure out how to get my chairs. They expect me to drive 500 miles to get them.

This restaurant is in a gorgeous French Quarter building, open to the street outside. Inside, it was crowdy and noisy--almost a little too Bourbon Street for my taste. We had a delicious BBQ Shrimp appetizer. The shrimp was very fresh and the broth was nicely seasoned. Our entrees (Jambalaya and Muffaletta) were OK but not great. Service was friendly and attentive.

Good food. A little bit of a wait for my burger, but i wasnt sure if it was the kitchen or the waitstaff. The waitstaff only takes care of food orders and dropping off food. . All beverages need to be purchased by going up to the bar. Want a glass of water? You need to go to the bar and get it.

Are you drunk? Are you hungry? Are you tired of Jimmy Johns? Are you starving like marvin grrrrrl?! This place be off da horn! Crispy and chewy bread. Philly cheesesteak is the way to go. Good sauce, cheese and enough steak to feel satisfied. The reuben was alright. Good stop for a quick bite in StL

Love to have a pizza by the slice option, 2 slices and you get a free drink. They have outdoor seating when it warms up. My only complaint is I wish they would crisp/warm the slices in the oven before serving it.

Had my wife's Birthday Party there with a few friends. The service was terrible, food was cold and meals were very expensive. Even when we notified the manager the service did not improve much. This used to be a great place to eat and meet up with friends, not anymore. They have really gone down hill. Would not recommend eating here.

The food was good but the dishes didn't really stand out. However, the dessert is definitely worth the trip. They had amazing service and a lovely patio seating area right in the heart of the central west end.

Fresh bread makes the difference. The cheesesteaks are quite like Philly, but let's be honest.....how hard could it be? Fry meat and onions, add cheese. Salt to taste. They close at 6 on Sunday so we had to visit for lunch on Monday. It was a good choice.
The food was good. But the kids got milkshakes after their meal was done and over with. Not the waitress fault. But really come on. But a nice place to eat.

Damn. Not an option to try. Few things management should consider. First is aloo kathi roll is literally aloo curry and roti where are flavors of chutney??? Second, I tried kala khatta and it's bull$hit please remove it from the menu.

Why does it seem like every Steak N Shake is filthy? Probably because they are. Sticky floors, fries under the table, dirty tables. Food is pretty much par for the course. Basic eggs, bacon, pancakes at breakfast. Nothing you couldn't make better at home.
First time visit I had the meatball garden salad. It is amazing! The meatballs are not as soft as some best ones I've had before but super yummy w the fresh parmigiana cheese.
Not very vegetarian friendly but what they do offer is pretty awesome. Fresh tortillas are worth coming back for. It hit the spot! Definite worth returning.
The taxi I reserved showed up twenty minutes late with no apology at all. Halfway through the ride he informed me that he was only accepting cash today. Id avoid drive Cornell Carter if you can.
Worst experience ordering and waiting for food I have ever had Unorganized and for all the people that work the service is incredibly slow Will never go back

Disappointed. Drinks were poorly made, we have been here numerous times and they have always been spot on...Tonight was a disaster. Took 15 min to get a drink, it seemed all drinks had peach schnapps in them??? (we ordered old fashioned). Food was amazing! Came out really quick and delicious. Two stars because of the food... Drinks were not good at all...
Great service and food. I came here with my family and we had a wide variety of food and drink options. The staff was amazing and attentive, plus provided some great recommendations
Solid everything. Excellent beer list, and great food and pizza. More vegetarian options would be nice.

Went here with my friend. The staff was very nice. Order one pound crawfish garlic butter and one pound crawfish Cajun. The garlic one was nice, fresh and flavourful but the Cajun one was over cook and the crawfish was tiny. Don't understand what happened. It's like hit or missed

Mac n Cheese tastes like kraft. I paid a ton of money and my order was very wrong. I asked for a sweet italian beef with extra mozzarella. I got a spicey italian beef without mozzarella. I asked for a root beer and a sprite, I got 2 cokes.
Disgusting. Horrid and screwed up my order twice. This food is almost inedible. You could not pay me to eat here again.
This is a great place. We have been going there for years. We usually get take out.
It was simply ok. The service was ok. The cauliflower appetizer was very good; however the BBQ shrimp was at best average. The entree was the market fish of the day was again, just ok.
I had pedi care done there a while ago. Most people there speak different language and I didn't feel comfortable with them spoke different language out and loud. The setting was not that clean.
Awesome Venue, great staff, the layout of the Casino is Beautiful and we've had an amazing experience here! Also shout out to the Cafe Milano for great food!

Crispy duck pad Thai for the win! (Dinner) Generous portions, clean authentic restaurant and fast service servers! Little on the pricy side but the taste made me feel better about the price. Otherwise would have 5 starred the spot!
Customer service fantastic. But the prices are flat out to high. $16 for a pound and quarter of bulk candy is insane. It is price gouging.

It was empty on a Friday evening. I don't see anything wrong in trying something new. Though to set customer expectations, at least for those from India, it would perhaps help to qualify this as 'South Indian chaat' (in quotes) so people can opt out. The pastries were dry and unpalatable to us, maybe we didnt get their good batch.
I can't complain about anything... the food was ok the service was good, but nothing exceptional. It was a little pricey, but if you're just looking for some good food, this is a decent choice.

I haven't been able to log into my account now since 11/4/16 to pay my bill, and their phone is busy every time I call it. I have been calling it all day Friday the 4th, and all day yesterday, then several times this morning, busy every time. WTF
I've honestly never had anything to eat from here that blew me out of the water. Food is simply mediocre. The upside is the waitstaff is always great and happy!
Good service, great drinks, followed COVID rules perfectly, BUT a very disappointing amount t of general tso's cauliflower - 6 bits of cauliflower for $7. Ridiculous.

This is one of the if not the best sushi place in Tucson. Not only does the food taste amazing but if you stick to the half off rolls like my family does you can completely fill up 5 people with sushi no less for around 50 bucks.

Unfortunately, this location doesn't quite live up to the casa Mexico on Fairview. We live in eagle and pass this location to dine at the other. My biggest complaint is the chips and salsa aren't very good. The chips taste burnt here and I miss the pebble ice that the Fairview location provides.
Can be very good but sometimes misses. Absolutely beautiful building. Great drinks. Great waitstaff.

Marginal breakfast food leaning on the processed side-but decent lunches. However the service is very fast and dependable-something of a novelty in Pinellas County. If you want fast service and just the basics this is the place.

We wont back again!!!! There was our favorite place. But couple last time we didn't have good experience! Poor food and poor service! Waiter didn't care about us . We were waiting for 15min to get a check!!!!!!!They were good, but now! Ha! NO! Disappointing! Hopefully we have many choices in BELLEVUE!
nice big sized gym, never usually have to wait for the use of equipment, unless its 6pm lol clean enviorment friendly staff. and its really only $10 a month! good deal!

This is my favorite place to go! It is absolutely adorable. I come here with my family all the time and with friends for a nice breakfast or brunch. The food is delicious and there are so many gluten free options.

I am extremely disappointed in this Hooters. While the women looked the part, they certainly did not have the enthusiasm to be a waitress at this fine establishment. I stated MULTIPLE times that my friend had a birthday today. I told them on two separate occasions, both with replies of "I'll be sure to get everyone" Nothing was ever done. Shame on you Hooters.

Not overly impressed. Burger was very dry, fries were ok but only given half of what my dining partner was given. Ice tea was not that great. Staff walked by at least ten times while drinks sat empty. Was excited to try it but once was enough.

We should have checked yelp first !!!! This dining experience has motivated me to post my first yelp review to agree with the previous posts that this was a bad experience. Yelp reviews are mostly accurate and on point! Always check !
So overrated. I love chargrilled oysters but these were not edible. The bread was bad and bbq shrimp not good at all. I was so disappointed.

This place has gone downhill!!! The Sushi just doesn't taste fresh and the chefs are lifeless. One of the great things they used to have was fresh, great tasting sushi and friendly chefs. As for now. .. I'd say skip it. You have dozens of choices in this town and Hiroba just doesn't come close anymore

Slow service, currently waiting an hour for our dinner. Refreshments were refilled once every 30 minutes and we barely saw our server. We complained to the manager but he didn't really seem to care. Last time we come here.
It is comfortable and clean with plugs foe your cell charger. Really should be 3.5 stars, but there is no great last taste of New Orleans.

First experience here as it's close to the office downtown. Got the noodle bowl with spring roll and 2 types of meat. Good price for meal. However spring rolls were a bit uncooked for all three of our bowls.
If you are interested in having a holiday party here - don't! Especially avoiding dealing with the manager who just lost out on a 14 top.
Having been using them for many years . The best cleaners . Always on time and best service

Have been here many times for beers and each time it's like the bartenders are just too cool to be serving. No smiles, no hellos, etc .
