Only reason I go is because a friend likes to have a few beers here before starting our night. She moved so no need to go back. A smile goes a looooooooong way folks.

Always loud, always busy... Great selection of beer, but the bar setup is untenable for the number of patrons they have... you're always pushing your way in if you want a drink and there aren't enough bar-tenders... it's just impossible for them to add more.

Honestly I love your pizza, its fresh its smooth down the hatch it is always warm, and its not expensive. If i could pick one pizza place to be sponsored by it would be you guys. So you should give me my own pizza called the pizzanator, please!!!!!!
Really unprofessional manager managing the store this morning. The employees running the drive-thru window very uneducated. left me frustrated ended up canceling my order.
Starved rite now 10 30 they r open 2 1100 keep getting disconnected not 1100 yet live on the ridge. B there in 2 min they went answer. Dont b hungry n call them

A tad hard to locate, at first, I found this cheery French inspired cafe at the end of a strip mall. Enjoyed a cappuccino with a sweet amount of foam and a crisp on the outside, melt in your mouth almond croissant.

It's been awhile but I figured I should put this up... the service here is horrible.. I was there with my 2 children under 5 and they could not of been more slow... simple things like getting kids good out quick did not happen.. drink refills were non existent just overall not good and food was ok... I might try again but highly doubtful.
Possibly the worst Thai food we've ever had. They used fettuccini noodles for the Pad Thai. Vegetables over cooked and slimey. This place needs some work

My family has been going here for 15+ years and the experience has always been amazing. I don't trust anyone else with the care of my vehicle. I appreciate how honest and upfront they are with what care you need. You cannot find better service anywhere else.
Love going here. I think the staff are wonderful - with a big shout-out to Pat, who is the rock star of the Print Centre. Thank you for all my help!!!

Five stars for the pizza and service, only gave it four overall because they sit on the Monon and the patio was closed on a Saturday night. When we tried to eat there Memorial Weekend it was closed then as well. Not sure why you close out tables with such a prime location but it's a disappointment.

Very nice decor, delcious food and moderately priced helps Chi give me good Chi about their restaurant. I recommend the cashew chicken and for dessert the green tea ice cream with almond cookies nom nom nom.

This place was great. The drinks were a bit weak, but tasty. The cactus salad was something different and I definitely want to get it again! The prices are reasonable, flavors are good, ingredients are fresh. I will be back!
Such fantastic food and always friendly and excellent service!! My favorite place to go, to dine in or carry out. Go back every week!
I'm so excited that Saint Petersburg has now opened an cool, eclectic, new Speakeasy! The Saint has great atmosphere, delicious cocktails, and tons of dinner and desert options!

They sell express overnight guaranteed then don't deliver they should be taken over by fed ex or ups because the post office SUCKS! We don't need to pay their big benefits and retirement monies! Try sending $10 thru mail hardly gets thru as well!
Bebe is so sweet and does stellar work!!! I drive all the way from Wesley Chapel to get my nails done here!!!
Sushi was sub-par. One of the yellowtail rolls we ordered smelled/tasted foul. Wouldn't go again for sushi - there are better alternatives in the area.
For a vegetarian this was a horrible spot my quesadilla came with little pieces of meat, would not return

Great sushi. Can top a local sushiya (still, we are in boise...) Great entrees and good service. Avoid the banana dessert (with rum!?) - the only thing I didn't like in this place. Everything else is always delicious.
Best breakfast sandwiches. Best quiche. Best PIES! Staff is friendly and very helpful. Don't miss this gem!
Pizza was good. Everything else is basic. Doesn't matter, they closed down now so good night basic Italian place.
Mediocre at best. Stopped by for lunch on Sunday afternoon and left disappointed. Small portions and high prices. Will not go back.

This probably one of the worst Starbucks I visit. They are so slow with getting the orders including the mobile orders which they claim never prints. I'm sorry but what good is the mobile order service if it never works?

Great balance of flavor. The falafel was enough to fill me up, but I'm always a sucker for a good salmon salad. Next time will probably just get as is because the falafel was very flavorful & fulfilling.

Every time we come here it takes 30 minutes to order a donut. This is even when no one is in the store. They have the wrong management, wrong employees, all of it. They need to clean house and start over. I wish corporate would get involved.

Was here about 7 months ago & had a specialty dish with sausage in a sauce, rice and beans, which was tasty. Cactus was interesting (in a good way). The tacos (pork) were just okay, though -- meat seemed overcooked. I wouldn't mind going back to try more dishes. It's a BYOB.

Unfriendly. You are already going to urgent care in an uncomfortable situation, I almost felt like I was treated like an animal or just a body and not an actual person. Talked at instead of talked to and like I was inconvenience to everyone there. Will not be back.
Great happy hour! Drafts were $3-4 and snacks were half price. The chicken wings were hot, fresh and super crunchy!

I love Wendy's but this one is disgusting. I tried it three times thinking that first two times maybe it was a bad day for them... Fries are always soggy and old... Burgers old... The food has never been fresh but has all three times been cold and old... Never will visit again
Consistently below average. They've gotten our order wrong multiple times now and the chicken wasn't fully cooked on last order. Never returning.

Total jerks abundant! Rude as hell and very unprofessional. I guess they must think they're the only game in town. Ha! They aren't! I'll take my vehicle someplace else. Customer service is KING! They are simply the court jesters! Don't waste your time with these clowns! Hate your job? Find another line of work.
We had dinner here as a group of friends and we had a great time! The food is pretty good but the service is spectacular. The Cavatelli Bada Bing was the star of the show - must order!!
Great place for a delicious and inexpensive meal. Place has no decor but fast service and good food. Wonton soup is great here.
what can i say? it's a walmart! however, their deli is the slowest place on earth!! be prepared to wait & wait & wait some more...absolutely the slowest!!

YUM. The best pre-marinated meats to grill. I have never had anybody say anything but "Holy Smokes this is good. How did you do it?" My reply is " Go to El Herradero Carniceria." Simple as that. So good.

This place was bomb! Really authentic taste. They had a lady in the kitchen hooking it up with handmade tortillas. I recommend the tamipueña plate and the Chile verde burrito. The food came out super fast and the portions were large. Plenty of outdoor seating as well.

This place's "Wing Specials" are really something special!! If you're tired of the same old buffalo wings and the countless variations offered by your run of the mill establishments, look no further than Reale's for that authentic Frankford Ave flavor!

This Starbucks will make you late for work! I've spent as long as 20 min waiting in the drivethru. I even tried going inside since there weren't too many people. I walked right up and ordered and it still took 15 min. Leave yourself plenty of time or find another Starbucks.

Fantastic food, quick, reasonably priced, fantastic drinks we will be back. Did I mention the food is really good and the restaurant was packed I have no idea why someone would give this place less than four stars!
I've tried a bunch of the meals on the menu and everything has been great. My favorites are the Greek salad and Aegean chicken. They have a very professional and efficient staff.
Awesome view, service, and food. Blackened tuna and stuffed flounder were awesome.

It's a hard nope from me. The location is too small for what it is. It feels like it belongs in a mall. Lots of kids. It was loud. The burger was par at best. The fries were alright but I never got the mayo I ordered. The milkshake was ok. Not sure I'll be returning. Glad I got one burger free.

I am not a fan of this salon. I've had my nails done by way too many people to tell who I like or what I like. Both times my gel polish just peeled off the next day and that was never happened anywhere else. The salon is pretty and clean though which is always good.
Delicious!!! We had wings and burgers... everything was cooked perfectly and such a fun and cute atmosphere. Loved it!!!
the employees were super friendly and helpful. The place was clean and cute. The food was just ok . Best thing about my burger was the bacon. Probably wont go back.

Lunch at Riviera Maya. Enjoyed Cancun enchilada. But even more, enjoyed a yummy peach margarita. It did not come from a machine as evidenced by the chunks of ice and brain freeze!! You also gets chips and salsa. If not careful, you can fill up on chips. Has a very large menu. https://www.rivieramayamexicanrestaurant.com/fishers-indiana/menus

It's my birthday and we went inside. We came from Thailand so we're eager to try. We looked at the menu and then the attendant went out and never came back. We waited for about 10 mins or so and nobody came. There was hardly customers, it's almost 6pm. We left. Poor service. Not recommended.

Always friendly service and great, fresh foods. Laid back atmosphere that's perfect for lunch or a lighter dinner that leaves you full but not miserable like most restaurants. Try the meatloaf panini with roasted red potatoes and green beans! Delicious!
Ordered the lamb and it was perfect. We had a fabulous business dinner here. We will return next time we are in the area. This is a must visit.

Had a super fun experience here last night with a group of friends. Even during a pandemic this place was safe, clean and organized. They played awesome old school 90s jams where everyone was singing along! We were allowed to bring our own food and wine and Bridget was a great instructor! Highly recommend this place for a good time with friends or family.

Great wigs. Mediocre customer service. Bought a wig here a few years ago. Stopped in to have it refreshed for this Mardi Gras and was told that their cut off was a "few weeks ago" and that I need to wait after Mardi Gras. No "I'm sorry"....the snooty attitude bothered me more than the fact that they won't refresh a wig in 6 weeks.
Good service and nice ambiance. We come in with a Groupon, so got an incredible deal!

Stopped for lunch today with my wife had the St. Louis ribs, cornbread, coleslaw, and a pork belly taco. All were excellent and place is super clean with a helpful staff. You might see me back for dinner tonight, a place you have to visit.

I heard good things about this place, and I love crispy pizza and their slogan is great food, crispy pizza. So finally got a chance, probably the most soggy pizza I've ever had in my life. And they cut a circle pizza like a square with some slices huge and some tiny

do yourself a favor and just go to Publix across the street. This store is usually unstocked with what you need, salad bar closed, no one at produce, unorganized and just overall not very friendly or helpful. It doesn't seem like anyone enjoys their jobs very much or cares. Publix from here on out.

Coming from California it's been hard finding authentic Mexican food but my search is over. This place is delicious I live far from this place but it's worth the drive for sure. Everything on the menu is good! Plus the service was excellent unfortunately I didn't take pictures because I was hungry and the food looked amazing lol next time

The monopoly on Fairmount coffee shops that Mugshots has is ending and so its mediocrity is being exposed. I still visit here frequently, our of convenience purely, but the coffee and food is sub-standard and the prices are too high. Much better off going to Rybread. I like the Girard location more, for the record, and would give it three stars.
The station wasn't so clean neither was the restroom which requires a code by the way. Don't know if it was because it was the weekend and almost 7pm but the staff wasn't too friendly.
Ashleigh was great! She recommended the chefs special red fish and also the shrimp and catfish po boy. Loved it!!

Great chicken wings! Good beer at a fair price; in fact when I received my bill and saw I was charged $8.00 for two beers I asked "are these happy hour prices?" Also good service and welcoming atmosphere! G

Third or 4th time I've been now, and they never disappoint. You HAVE to dry the duck wings, they're amazing. I got a prime rib this last time. It was slightly warm, and looked old....still was amazing!!!
I definitely had better pizza but you can't beat this at 3am...Thin crust, a bit chewy, but it's HUGE. The price is reasonable at $4 per slice!

Delicious is an understatement when it comes to these hand-crafted, gourmet sandwiches. My mom and I shared the Chicken and Walnut Pesto and couldn't have been more impressed. So much so, we were back the following day and each ordered our own! Personable, friendly, and knowledgeable staff. Great find!
Stupidly over priced. Walk away people.

Fun spot. We noticed this place while walking State Street looking for a place to eat. It was drag night and we weren't disappointed. Service was friendly. Drinks were good and the dance floor provided some great people watching. Will definitely check it out again.

We went to IHOP on a Sunday around 10 am. We were seated quickly. Our server was attentive and friendly. The food was good. There was nothing bad about our experience and nothing spectacular. This is an ok place to get breakfast.

Fun little ice cream parlor! I had the lavender coconut ice cream and it was a nice balance of both flavors! The texture may not be as creamy with the pieces of coconut mixed in, but it wasn't off-putting for me. Pricey for ice cream, but hey it was worth it.

Blue waters was the best place we have ever stayed. Was very clean. Very cute decorations. Everything fully stocked in the kitchen. Close to the beach. Animal friendly. I would recommend this to everyone. Thank you Blue Waters for making our vacation great. The Anderson family.

Service was good. I liked the Rice Vermicelli Bowl (V1). The meats/proteins were well-seasoned. I just wish there was more meat (especially the springroll) in the dish. Fresh rolls were indeed fresh and delicious. The fried dumplings were flavorful. The pho was a little bland for my taste. The lemonade lacked sweetness. Overall, I liked what I ordered.
Really tasty food! Nice service and good drinks! Good for a night with friends, it's pretty busy and loud on a Saturday night.
First time- amazing service. Second time- super ehhhhh. Really good apps and drinks. That's about it. Pho isn't too great and is suuuuuuper overpriced.
Simply gross. Rooms are musty and dark. Pictures are not like the real thing.... spend the extra few bucks and stay at a Starwood property....

Awesome place. I got the Goonbah burger, which was so bomb! and they have chicken tenders that aren't on the menu. Just ask Nick and he'll help you out. Great service and food. Nick always keeping me coming back.
Famous fish and chips we're outstanding. Great outdoor seating. Flatbreads, fish, and beer all done very quick.

We visited with family because our relative is reading the Lewis and Clark journals. Dear Husband and I are from Portland Oregon so both ends of the historic journey represented! It is very youth oriented while being detailed and informative. The museum staff are lovely. It's a bargain at $5 entry fee. I'm a High school chemistry teacher and loved the showcase of minerals.

Horrible customer service from the general manager (Tracy burns) food is late no text update....Tracy did not want to give me her name either kept asking me what my name was Very rude. An hour later we still haven't got our food
Yum. All-around good burger spot. Love the sweet potato fries. The aesthetic of the place is really cool as well.
Fast friendly service ... Food was good and fresh , store was clean and workers where pleasant

Delivery driver called three times because he was lost. Pizza arrived undercooked and tasteless. So undercooked that we threw it away. Wings were cold and fatty, also no ranch or bleu cheese. This place is now on the do not call list.
The best cheesesteak around here there breakfast sandwich is amazing too can't go wrong with this place great staff great food
Delicious authentic SW cuisine. A casual neighborhood experience that is a must for any dining tour of Tucson. The bacon wrapped cheese stuffed shrimp are are a treat.
Expensive mediocre Mexican Food. Would not recommend this place.
Gave me defective bed and now having problems getting my refund. Stuck with no bed and no refund. The worst.

Love this place!!! I don't live in Reno anymore but I sure wish I did! This place has a Very friendly staff and really amazing trainers and teachers. Thankyou for the fun and I will see you the next time I'm in town
Jasen and his staff are extremely friendly and very caring about any and all your car needs!!

This location is constantly packed and incredibly busy. Don't expect the lines to be short, the drive thru is even worse. Still the service is pleasant and the food is delicious. I always feel the sandwiches are small and I can't get enough of the waffle fries.
Did a good job, but pedicure was kind of short (25 min) and they weren't very friendly. $30 was a good price, in my opinion.
Wonderful service! Waiter with the large beard made it very apparent that he liked us, as tourists, in Nashville! The Original Legendary Burger was fantastic!

So bomb! The crab cake eggs Benedict was ridiculously delicious! This place can get crowded abs have a bit of a wait but it's so worth it. Seriously I would go to Santa Barbara just to have breakfast here.

PROS: Pizza is good. CONS: Cash only, opens at 4pm (good luck getting food for the 1pm football game), closes on Monday's, they don't sauce pasta correctly, rolls are always stale, can't go when it's busy because quality goes down. There are plenty of other local Caln/Downingtown options with better food and are much more accommodating. We won't be going back.

I had been hearing about how great their coffee is for a little while, and so I decided to go grab a tea for breakfast. The staff is so kind, respectful and attentive. I felt safe with their Covid regulations and I would definitely go back again. Dog friendly patio!

Not that great. Beans salty, big chunks of boiled chicken in the enchiladas. We were excited to see homemade tortillas, but the grill they cooked it on made the tortillas hard. Sauce tasted like it came from a can. Too bad as they concept is great, just need better execution.
Wow amazing steaks. Very cool atmosphere and knowledgeable waitresses. Locally grown veggies as well

After waiting for one hour, they finally brought the cauliflower appetizer. They should have also brought the pizza by that time. Instead, the waiter had not even ordered the pizza yet (good thing - he had the wrong order) After having this be a go-to spot for awhile, I will not return.

Had an awesome time yesterday on our tour. The open top jeep was a fun way to explore Santa Barbara on a beautiful day! We went to four wineries. Bridlewood was my favorite :) Todd was a great driver. Would definitely recommend doing this on a trip to Santa Barbara!
Worst staff in the state of Indiana. Beyond rude. We will never go back. Cooks don't wear gloves either which is absolutely disgusting and should get fined for that.

Horrible service. I never saw a place not crowded and workers lounging around on tiers while you have to pull teeth to get assistance with an item. In all you must go to customer service where they are actually working.
Very delicious mexican food, authentic too! Cool that Guy came here and visited (his stencil is on a few things) I thought that their torta was delicious and the prices are fair! YUM!

Bouncer told me it costs a hefty $20 dollars to get into the party and entry/bar only accepts cash. If you spend $100 on hookah, they accept cards tho. They have an ATM at the door, but it's dumb not to allow cards for everything. Music was decent (baltimore club, dance hall, and twerk hip-hop). Seems like a place you'll get shot tho.
Rice was reheated and burned and pork seemed it had also been sitting there for a few days. Black beans had no taste. Ended up not eating it

OMG, this was SO amazing and delicious!!! I only regret that there isn't one closer to us in WA. Otherwise, it was DELICIOUS!!!!!! You won't regret it, I promise. You'll hate yourself if you don't give it a try!!!
Never had a bad meal. I also like that on Sundays they have a buffet breakfast. I've never had to wait for a seat.

Their brunch selection was delicious! They had a huge selection and of course took our requests for add-ins without a problem. I had the California Omelet with their freshly-squeezed lemonade. Wait time there was about 5-10 minutes for our food. Will definitely visit again.

I wanted to give it 4.5 stars since overall I was impressed. The chicken tenders were big and juicy, the biscuit was good and the cajun rice tasted pretty good as well. Not bad for a $3.99 deal with a coupon.
Meh. I've experienced better. What, not long enough? How 'bout now?
Great sushi and great price too! Staff very friendly and helpful and bento box is a great deal!

So glad to have another place for lunch! And who doesn't love pasta?! I went this week during their soft opening. The cacio e Pepe was very very good. The pasta was cooked perfectly, and I could have done with a bit less sauce. Meanwhile, my friend wanted more sauce her bolognese. I'll definitely keep coming back for my cheat day meals!

Amazing French bistro-esque spot for cocktails and delicious, fresh food. Happening bar scene-make sure you ask for Katie-a lovely and knowledgable bar tender. Great, friendly, upscale crowd that is welcoming and jovial. Fresh raw bar, and very good food.
It was a very nice Hotel and the staff was so helpful and friendly.We had a good time.

Meh. Pizza was not that great. Bland, very, very, hard crust. Obviously it's a sports bar, lots of TVs, pretty loud and I'm sure it gets much louder when there's a decent game on. Waitress wasn't as attentive as I would have liked.

I met some friends here for a work day lunch. Swanky's is much nicer than I expected - I guess I was expecting something like Moe's or Chile Burrito. I had the grilled fish tacos and they were awesome. They came with chips and salsa as well. I love the atmosphere and comfortable seating. I'll be back!
Normally we have a pretty good meal here. I usually order my filet medium rare. Tonight I ordered it medium and it came out well done. Told the waitress and we were offered free dessert.
The food is ok. I had a steak burrito the meat was very salty. My spouse had a chicken quesadilla is was fair. You might as well go to Taco Bell to eat Chipotle is 10 times better than Taco Bus.
main courses are not that good that will not try second time but the appetizers are amazing! Recommend: chip&dip.
The worker opened my package before shipment, watched her to see what was inside. Would never go here again. Also lady had a awful attitude

I like some of their food but nobody in the kitchen is wearing a mask. That bothers me. Customer service is lax. They do their jobs with little enthusiasm and the service is slow but it's a fast food setting.

Besides the fact that the price is right this facility is clean, well-maintained and secure. Seems like they have cameras everywhere. For the most part I personally find most storage places a little creepy but I feel perfectly comfortable having my stuff here. I also like that it's temperature controlled.

If I could, I'd give this place 3.5 stars. I saw some bad reviews and have to admit the general tso chicken which is usually decent at most places, was not so great here. We do really like their chicken teriyaki appetizer and shrimp Singapore noodles. It's consistently fresh, trasty, and plentiful.
Good experience and bed was comfy. Kerry the hotel's shuttle driver made this a memorable stay with for me. We laughed so hard and discovered new local spots while on our shuttle rides.
Disgustingly rude. They got my take out order wrong, then accused me of being at the wrong restaurant.

We stopped in for a late lunch. The tavern food was very good, very tasty. The service could have been more attentive. Loved the garlicky buttery crispy wings. You have to get the eggrole sampler. Nice variety of beer. I would definitely dine here again.

i had the bbq chicken, and the crab and the apple pie. All I can say is A M A Z I N G !!!! I am going this afternoon to get some apple pie and bring it as a dessert. This is probs gonna become a favorite place to me!!! ^ five!!!
Amazing coffee! Hipster chic atmosphere. Limit menu, but very specialized. Records spinning blast cafe music at a comfortable level. Great parking area.
Fantastic service , friendly staff, delicious food, generous portions. A+ We dined on the patio on a beautiful October evening. Our server, Jackie, was simply the best. We will be back.
Decent coffee but garbage prepacked pastry and overly slow service. Not worth a second visit
This has to be one of the worst places I've ever tried to eat. Poor service, tasteless food and it just didn't even feel clean. obviously I won't return.

Upon first try, I thought Blaze was impressive mass produced pizza. Maybe it still can rise to that quality when dining in, but after getting take-out (with a less than five minute walk) straight out of the oven, the crust was soft doughy and thicker than I remembered. It was so unimpressive that I'm not likely to try it again.

Good friendly service from friendly and efficient baristas. Don't want to sound non pc but all outdoor tables were taken by homeless many without a drink. Seems management could help a bit. Love the upstairs area.
Staff needs to be better trained. Forgot to bring out parts of our order and then it took forever. Could be a good place but this visit was not good. Pancake Pantry across the street is much betTer.

Not the best diner food in the world, but very good baked chicken. The knock on the food is that it tends to be over-cooked (especially the veggies). They load you down with food and the prices are very reasonable. If your on a budget you could do much worse. Desserts are very good.

The service was fine but I think they get their meat from an old leather shoe that is sliced up in a meat-like fashion. Their meat was so dry we had to pour chili juice on it to make it edible. The bread was soft but doing that to cheesesteak meat? That's a crime.
We enjoyed our visit so much we made a reservation for Saturday. Great food and service
No mask or social distancing on worker who helped us. Inexperienced and unprofessional. Won't be going back.

I'm sorry but something changed with the new owners. I won't say the Pie was the best I've ever had because it wasn't. The best I'd had in Boise in recent years, yes! I'm not sure what all has changed, but the flavor just isn't there anymore. I should say if it makes any difference, I get mine on State Street.

This used to be a great store. Now it's just sad. Shelves are not regularly stocked. The personnel are untrained. Especially in the seafood department. No one there knows where anything is. I will not go back.

I had a great time a Deanie's! We had the half fried seafood platter, and it was excellent! I also got an extra fried soft shell crab for good measure! I will hit Deanies up every time I'm in New Orleans!

Had their steak tacos and some cocktails to go and they were super good! I would love to update this review once I dine in and don't just do takeout but I would highly recommend this place! The food is super fresh and delish!

Follow up review! I've been back to three moe times and their subs have been awesome. Their fountain drinks at atrocious. Nothing tastes like its supposed to. Not Pepsi Max, not Coke Zero, etc... Get those fountains fixed and work out the kinks and this will be a five star in yelp!
Quick and easy emissions and state inspection. I had a light out and they replaced the bulb. It was somewhat pricey, but everything was done very quickly.

We had the half rib slab and a pork sandwich. Both were ok. For sides we had French fries, coleslaw, potato salad, and baked beans. We couldn't eat the coleslaw or potato salad. Really bad. The baked beans were below par. French fries were OK.
A friend of mine told me she waited 35 minutes for her drink earlier today. Didn't think that was possible, but I stood in line for 25 minutes at 1:45pm on a Sunday. STAFF YOUR STARBUCKS BETTER.

Amazing experience for the cost! Beautiful decor, great restaurants, friendly and helpful staff, luxury room, large selection of amenities. I'm impressed and will be back! (I wish it was a non-smoking environment)

Really relaxed and laid back spot in downtown St. PETE. A lot of daily reoccuring specials. Amazing selection of beers on tap with really good low prices per ounce. Ping Pong and spread out seating. 30+ beers/wines available

A crook owns this place. I booked it 4 months out. 2 months prior to my party date I hade to cancel due to a family illness. They refused to give my $125 deposit back. I have 3 kids under 5 and I promise I will never go there again.

First time here, found it on Yelp and tried over the summer but the place was closed due to kitchen issues. Tried again after hearing positive reviews from a coworker. Very small and quaint in a nice neighborhood. Had a home cooking everybody knows everybody feel. Food was good with the chicken soup being especially tasty. Will return soon.
Service sucked. Food was bland. Place was really dirty. Do yourself a favor and go to Carmalitas.
Doesn't always feel safe walking in the parking lot late at night but always a fun time
Today's meal was really good our waitress Brandy did a great job!
Great little place on central. Great for a random outside beer or a couple of shooters with buddies.
Great carryout spot. Pizzas and cheese steaks are fantastic. Stromboli's and pasta dishes also. Always on time and courteous customer service.
Wouldn't give this place my business--owner keeps his dog out in all temps and weather. Inhumane. SPCA has already been out there several times in the past few years.
Bobby was the best! Really cared about the stories and great historical background. Great that it started at a bar with two for one hurricanes!
Solid french specialties (croissants are as good as you'll get in Paris). Their King/Queen cakes are just mediocre though.

Great burger, garlic fries, crab sandwich, fried green tomatoes, sweet potatoe creme brûlée and chocolate peanut butter pie! Drove 10 hours and got room service. Very delicious and not overpriced like most hotels!

My girlfriend and I decided to give this place a try. We we not impressed. My girlfriend order card cakes and was more bread than crab. I ordered a burger and it was adequate. The fries we indeed very good. Very noisy. Will not go back.

This place sucks. I don't know why I keep coming here. They are always short staffed, the employees are useless young unreliable snots. Sometimes waits can take up to 45 mins. They get the orders correct about 10% of the time. This place has so much potential and they fail more than succeed.
food was decent, a bit pricey. 4 dollars for a side of bacon, which contained 4 slices. about 4 dollars for an 8oz glass of orange juice. much better options in the area.

Best Pizza place in Apollo Beach...Way ahead of their near by competition. Why? 1. Better Bread 2. Better Sauce 3. Better Ingredients 4. Friendlier, outgoing staff with aim to please the customer In Apollo Beach this is the only pizza place worth visiting & the food is delicious!!

Had a great meal at Grace Meat+Three! Service was quick and the staff was friendly. I had the fried chicken, mashed potatoes and corn bread; I would definitely go back for another meal as well as suggesting this place to a friend. Their seasonal Moonshine Highball drink was delicious. Cheers!

Was here a few times. Think the food is great. Had and pretty good bartender one time and a really horrible bartender the 2nd time. But overall I give this place a thumbs up. More for the older crowd. Seemed clean and comfortable.
Nice atmosphere, we were able to take our puppy in the courtyard area for lunch, which was great. Beer and wine were well priced. If we are in Tucson again we would probably come back.

The bad reviews about service here are warranted. Each time I've come, no one was at the front desk, and it took several minutes for someone to come take my order. Tonight, I opened up my to-go order to find a stack of overcooked pancakes. I will not be returning to this location.
Good meat and three. One of the best in donelson that I know of. Service is always good too. Meatloaf!
Such great food and friendly service! This bustling spot is a must if you visit Edmonton!
Great food an service! Pretty cool place because of the family atmosphere there. I deff recommend the fish tacos!
Decent food, cute counter help but way too costly. Another cash only business that likely is under reporting their dollars.
selection is pretty good, but just as the other reviews mentioned, the vibe is less than welcoming, even though the staffs are professional enough and helpful.

Great selection of music,. Found two Art Garfunkel albums in excellent condition. My only complaint is the guy working the register seemed annoyed that he had to stop eating his cookies and ring up my friend and I.
GM of this course is a jagoff. Course is nice but pricey. Expect to pay $80 for a round, however they give you free range balls to hit, I guess that helps.
The floors are paper thin so if you don't mind having Godzilla living above you then this place is great. Amenities are wonderful
Ambiance is typical Mexican Restaurant. Service is very good. Food is tasty & the margaritas are from the machine are always good. Good place for a bite. Parking is ample..

Definitely not a $$, but more like a $$$. Not very kid friendly (they will split an adult meal for a kid, but no kid menu). Added a mandatory 18% tip on to a family of 6 - too bad the service wasn't worth it.

The outdoor area was unfortunately understaffed and we waited a long time between each visit from our server who was doing the best she could. The food was actually very good and we would have stayed and ordered more drinks but it just took too much time to try and get anything.

This place is horrible even for a cheap noodle company it's bad. Was served old clumped up noodles, chewy grissley meat and the whole meal was just unbearable, will not being trying again. Not to mention the bowl of "soup" which was a few noodles and mainly greasy water.

Found this gem via Yelp and now I know why they have so many reviews .... Staff were overworked and hustling the entire time ... the steak and the loaded mash potatoes was worth it .... Hard pass on the salad and the soup

It makes me really sad That I have to give this place 2 stars because I am actually a huge fan of your concept. ( I LOVE BULLA ) I've been to two other locations and this one is my least favorite. The bartender was super rude The food didn't have the same flavor profiles either... not impressed

I don't like battered fries at all, prefer regular fries but forgot to ask what they served when ordering. As I was leaving I saw that some people had regular looking fries on their plate. Do they serve two different kinds of fries? If so, I think customers should be told that when ordering.

YUMMY, just got my food delivered and it was warm and tasted fresh. It was even early! I ordered the miso soup, crab ragoon, and two rolls. All there for me. I just feel bad my dog wasn't warned about the food! Sorry delivery driver!
They are commonly called Cecil Mismanagement. Rude staff and unprofessional. They are inconsistent in replys and never have the right answers.
Excellent service and Bandingo was lots of fun. The Reuben roll appetizer is delicious. The back room was perfect for our group.

Really fine kitchen. Lunch menu smaller sized plates all the famous ones are super delicious my dining companion raved bout the oysters grilled with tons o flavours. My catfish platter was EXCELLENT. 65 bucks for a smallish meal only one drink between two persons so on the high end price wise. QUALITY in Metairie

This place was awesome. The third cheesesteak place I have been in this neighborhood so far on my trip and BY FAR the best. If your choosing between this place and other cheesesteak places in the neighborhood (which shall not be named), go here. YOU WILL NOT BE DISAPPOINTED!
Food was good, woman at the front for pick up was pretty rude but I like to think she was just having a bad day. My opinion is better Chinese food on state street in media.
Great coal fired pizza. My hubby's fav is the meatball and ricotta pie. I enjoy the baked wings topped with grilled onions.

The shows are always very good, but the food is not so great. It is often made to sound amazing on the menu, but when it arrives it is not what you expected. I think that you pay way too much for below average food.
Not a bad place to kill time at the airport. The food was adequate bar food! The line was very long to get into but they handled it well and had the turnover move quickly!

Just about to sue these guys for bad faith. Raymond Kiker continuously ignores my calls and it has been several months since I had a flood in my house. Additionally, they made up a lie to terminate my policy. Terrible insurance company. OG Franklin would be ashamed, they nickel and dime you at every opportunity. They put the Con in Contributionship.
Super slow and unprofessional. Don't be in a rush when visiting...AND make sure you see them wear gloves or wash their hands because they scratch their heads and other body parts.
Fantastic Columbian food, especially the bakery items. The Almohabanas were simply amazing

Appointment was at 1000. Came in 15 mins early. You have to sign in at an electronic kiosk, there are no people at the desk. Was finally called back after 40 mins and asking about my appointment. Apparently the kiosk never checked me in even though it said I was confirmed.
Over-priced for average food, and small-ish portions. We were really disappointed. It's worth driving a little further downtown to PF Changs, and skipping this place.

This is honestly just a personal preference but I didn't find their pizzas to taste that great compared to the hype I saw on Bazbeaux. The fresh mozzarella plate appetizer was just OK but not great. I found their flavors to be underwhelming. However, service there is fantastic!

I work right near this chipotle. Practically eat here once a week. I don't have a bad thing to say about the food or the crew here (a bunch of friendly hipsters). They are very generous with the meat scoop if you know what I mean... it keeps me coming back. I love this place.

Sushi is pretty mediocre, Ive had better. I do like the dressing they use for their salad. I'm also a fan of the seaweed salad. I think the music is annoying and way too loud! BRING BACK THE WARM TOWELS THAT SMELLED LIKE DOWNEY!

Pho is decent. Prices are kind of high. Service was slow and the waiter didn't check on us once. Only to take our order and then with the check. For what it is, the price isn't worth it. They also forgot about my smoothie order so I just cancelled it. I probably wouldn't eat here again.

Definitely ordinary. The current iteration of Fuddruckers is nothing like the original. There are no displays of fresh meat or deserts. The condiments are skimpy. The burgers are "okay." The prices aren't great. Why go there instead of Burger King?
This place makes up in part with their atmosphere. The dishes themselves are pretty good. I just love the layout of this place. I met up with a friend after the ballgame and it's easy to find.

After the initial call we had to wait over FOUR hours for a guy to come out and unlock the door of our car. However, once he got here, he was very speedy and respectful. Took about 15 minutes. Would give more stars but the wait time was so long.

Servers didn't notice we even came in for a good 10 mins. Had drinks, burgers, and garlic fries. Garlic fries were so good! Burger's bun was a bit dry. The vibe here wasn't so bad, TVs everywhere you look. They even have a lil arcade corner. Pretty kid friendly.
Wonderful breakfast and lunch spot! Had the turkey savory buckwheat crepe and a side of grits - absolutely amazing!!! Service was great and quick!

This is the worst service I have encountered at a fast food restaurant!!! They are rude and take forever to get your food ready! It's such a shame bc there isn't much to choose from in this area. Please bring raising canes to this area!!!

We stopped in for an appetizer of stuffed crab. It was very good as were the roasted potatoes that came on the side. Bread was average New Orleans french bread. Our server was Akua. She was very sweet. The atmosphere is fun but a little corporate. I'd recommend Desire across the street instead for a more authentic New Orleans experience. Decent prices.

I never write reviews because it's usually not that bad enough to make a statement, but this was legitimately the worst poke I've ever had in my life. The rice was mushy and clumpy and totally inedible. The fish was suspiciously warm and fishy tasting. I didn't finish my bowl and I still feel sick

The clam and chorizo appetizer was good. The southern burger was extremely disappointing, the bottom of the patty was burned and the entire thing was saturated in grease. Service was okay at best but it was a Friday night.

Every time I go it's always something, yesterday my mom picked up her coffee to drink and it was half Empty. Almost as if we got someone's left over coffee. I also had to remind the lady to give me my food she seemed very disoriented.

Went yesterday for lunch and hookah. Found that 20% gratuity was automatically added to my tab; there was no sign advising that gratuity was automatic, especially for a party of 1. I was annoyed. Food was decent but the hookah was great. Probably won't return.

Love the food, love the service. If I could change one thing and I know its a stretch I'd change the seating style. It's OK anytime except dinner ours. When more people are staying then leaving your literally standing their holding your food looking for a table. Pondering sitting down on the floor. However we love the food and keep going back=}

They need to change there hours. Love there food but walking in at 845 and they said we closed the kitchen at 830 is ridiculous. Change your times on your site so we don't have to scramble for dinner plans
Food was very good presentation wasn't though I received this plate full of seasoning

We go to Ready Set Yo every morning that we're here on vacation. Our cold brew coffees are usually delicious. Today they tasted like water. They're typically dark colored and today they're very light. Would not be as big of a deal if it wasn't almost $10.00 for 2 coffees. The shake we ordered was pretty good!
Dry, burnt fried chicken with zero flavor. The pickles taste like cloves. The cauliflower app was cold and came out soggy and looking pretty sad.

Jim's once again another great Cheese Steak place... it is hard to find a crappy one in this town. If you are looking to do that, read my review on Tony Luke's... that may help you in your quest. This place is very good. Not my favorite, but still very good.
Absolutely horrible my mozzarella sticks were basically raw and the chicken wings are bland and splashed with a strange hot sauce, not covered SPLASHED!
Extremely rude and unorganized. A simple return took over 15 minutes because the lady didn't know how to transact it

Well I , how can we messed up a simple ceasar drink ?! I still believe that any bartender should have a minimum knowledge no? Well now it's look over quality service ! It's unfortunate that owners disrespect the industry this way ,and after all , it's only a arcade I guess .
Pretty quick service, friendly folks. A bit expensive, 50 bucks for a basic oil change, but liveable.
If you are ever at Solvang, Sevtap is the place to visit. Ertugrul, owner makes you feel comfortable as if you were at home. I can't wait to go back.
Bone marrow was delicious. Rack of lamb was well prepared and tastefully seasoned. Ribeye was underwhelming. Wine list and bar on the pricier side
Went there for a couples massage a few years back. Very impressive. Great ambiance, professional staff, very polite, and personable. I would highly recommend it
Very limited menu. Great views and service. Nothing much more to say. We were there 5 nights at the Ritz and the fire pit was never working, so it was cold.
I Ordered veg pizza, hardly can see the toppings. Looks like a cheese pizza. Not worth going to this place.
Very high quality ingredients, every dish has been great. You can feel good about eating the food here. The drinks are decent, only get the mojitos in the summer.

Worst venue I've ever been to. Want to get ripped off for every single thing? Come here. Then half way thru the show they escort every ticket holding person into a cramped little room with their food venues Def breaking fire Marshall laws for no reason but we need to check tickets again

Aaaaand we're back down to only one passenger elevator. After multiple emails over the past three months promising the other three elevators will be fixed "this weekend" the building manager has completely lost credibility. Thankfully I'm moving out in 4 months. I pity those I will leave behind.

Pretty good lunch buffet but not my favorite in town. I came here on a Monday because my usual go-to was closed. The food is good, but I think the flavors are better (and the naan) at Flavor of India!
I hope you win 2017 Tucson Iron Chef :) tasty food, fun drinks, great local art, and friendly staff.

Is it possible to give a zero star rating? Place was filthy, the woman's bathroom was foul( enough said). Ordered a soufflé, they said it would be 10 min...it took 30 and then they said they only had ham soufflé ( I'm vegetarian). Go anywhere else. The filth alone should be reason enough.
Best wings in the area. Bar none! Food is also good and portions are massive. Fantastic value for the money. Area is sketchy and building is falling apart. Time to move?

I would recommend not giving this place any business. The workers were very rude and bot willing to help in my situation. I had made a reservation to rent a car and when I came to pick it up they said they had no available cars... when there were cars visibly available and said that my reservation meant nothing.
If I could give less than 1 star I would. My nails looked terrible. They weren't filed evenly, they were all lob sided, the white line was uneven and lob sided. Do not recommend at all.

I have been here a few times and I have never had a bad experience with my order or the service. The inside is always very clean and the food cooked very well. Mac n cheese and mashed potatoes are great.
I am not sure what is with you guys. Slimy lettuce in salads, and ranch dressing that is turning sour. C'mon! You can do better!

The restaurant had a nice atmosphere upon entering. The fish tank was really cool. The wine list was nice. Our food was cold on the first order, we sent it back. It was warm when they returned but it wasn't that good. Overall it was okay at best. Wouldn't go back.

Jamaican restaurant with no cabbage! The restaurant is expensive. For that price you'd think theyd give you water in a glass cup. Instead it was small plastic cups. The napkins were paper napkins instead of cloth like a real restaurant. Needs dramatic improvements to charge as a high class restaurant when the restaurant isn't high class at all. Food was great.

The Reno Rotary Mardi Gras party is one of THE premier events in Reno's year. I have been three times now, and this year's was the biggest and best YET! The team-up with Yelp! and addition of so many great local food and beverage providers really made this a phenomenal event. Already counting down for next year!
Food is delishous usually order a meatball sub w/side greek salad n share w my hubby. I will say that the place can use a facelift inside n out. But can't beat the food for flavor and taste. Enjoy
Once again, Rocco's comes thru with outstanding Pie; order the kitchen sink deep dish, you won't be disappointed. One suggestion: Cornmeal to the bottom of the pie tin.

The Carousel Bar is located in the beautiful Hotel Monteleone in the French Quarter. It was a fun way to try one of New Orleans famous cocktails (which were outstanding!) I highly recommend their Pimm"s Cup! We had to wait about 10 minutes to get seats in the slowly revolving Carousel bar. Much nice atmosphere then Bourbon Street bars.
Holy margaritas! This place is bomb.com. Street tacos are amazing and the melted cheese was delicious
Not good grouper especially for the price, Terrible service as well. Definitely a tourist trap!
Front desk not welcoming at all when u are brand new doesn't even say hi welcome and doesn't even give u eye contact . Poor front desk never going here again

I'm a fan of the clubhouse. I used to think it was a place that just had take out beers but I stopped one night to grab a drink and they have a very nice outside sit down portion of the bar. The staff is kind and the food smelled delicious. I need to come back and try their wings.
The brisket and barbecue pork dishes were amazing and the service was fantastic. Good choice of taps in a great atmosphere!

Still asking why booze in PA should be private and not state run? I have a one punch knock-out answer for that. Walk into ANY Total Wine in the country. Game. Set. Match or you could go with the Chris Tucker "YOU GOT KNOCKED THE #@$% OUT!!!!!!".

My wife and I have lived up the street from this place for awhile but for some reason we hadn't tried it until today. We popped in and each got the chicken tacos and thought they were really good! They were ready quickly, service was great.

Our Appetizers arrived after our main course. The quality has gone down a lot too. There was also confusion with the wait staff over who would take our table. It looks like two waitress got into an argument over who would take our table. It was awkward.

Zero pretense here, just great food. Obviously, the tomato pie is the staple, but the baked goods will not disappoint, nor will the pepper pie or Stromboli. If you know, you know. If you don't, check it out.

Generally I love Costco's but tire center refused to check the tire pressures because they are real busy with other customers! Estimated time 3.5h just to check tire pressure. I am hitting the road to San Diego with pressure light on! Beautiful h*les running the tire center. Come see and experience with your own eyes. Thanks Costco
Great food, great service, very quick and friendly! 2nd time being here, always forget about it as its kinda out of the way. Same quality as fat burger, but less coma. Great value for your money!

Really nice nail salon, great customer service here. I gave 4 stars though because when I went with my boyfriend to get a pedicure they used some type of callous remover on him that chemically burned his toe
The fish tacos are amazing! Tasty sauce and the fish melts in your mouth. They gave us house gorditas and tres leches cake for free. The Tortas are great too. Can't wait to go back.
Perhaps the worst unit in the Nashville Division. In dire need of a remodel and renovation

I have enjoyed coming here my whole life, but the recent change to the restaurant and the menu are not for the best. I have never seen on a menu a two egg omelet. Sad to see something that has been around for so long take a turn that's not the best.
Went to Beach Snoballs and it said it opens at 12. It's was 1:45 and no one was there or working and the doors were locked. Unimpressed.

Gabe was awesome, and he did a great job on my tattoo !!! Prices were also very reasonable without sacrificing quality. Everyone there just seemed super friendly and chill. I would recommend Bay City !!!
The pharmacy is a 5. They always work with me to help me save, go above and beyond making sure I get my medications
A good diner with a surprisingly varied pancake menu. The decor hasn't changed since Nixon was President, but that's part of the charm.
First time here. I was the 3rd car in drive thru line & waited 17 minutes after placing my order...not sure, but you might get better service if you park & go in.
I would give this place zero stars if I could. The manger wouldn't give me a refund after they burnt my pizza. The cheese and crust was black. Absolutely ridiculous. I called on Thursday

Stopped here for lunch randomly... Boyfriend got a quesadilla mixta, I got the arepa mixta-- let me tell you.. AMAZING!! Owner was so nice and friendly, explained a lot of the platters to us and helped us pick out food and drinks... We also got the mango and mora drinks and those were phenomenal also!! Can't wait to return here soon!!
The reception was so rude she hung up the phone on when I called for COVID-19 result!
This pizza is thicker crust and it doesn't taste fresh. There was barely any sauce and that didn't taste fresh either. I ordered mushrooms as a topping and it was $6 extra.
Nice atmosphere, food is good and service is fine. Wish parking was better though. Not their fault.

Absolutely horrible service! I ordered cheese fries along with my order but never received them. When calling to let them know they forgot my cheese fries the man proceeded to argue that I never ordered them and then hung up on me. Never going back.
I don't pay a $10 tip to have to walk and pick up my food from an ice cold lobby. Walk it back next time...
Very friendly, knowledgeable and helpful staff. They have fixed several of my Apple products quickly and without issues. Thanks for your help!

Have to run the gauntlet of aggressive charity's! They usually have a table set up at entrance ! Twice now have experienced negative comments when I do not donate ! Advise to management , be aware I can get my prescription and groceries were they are not annoying the customers

I take my car to Sparkling Image at least once every three months, whether it needs it or not. You get the picture. One dirty car, both inside and out. $21.00 and a $5.00 tip later, I am driving a car that sparkles. Staff is courteous and professional. My go to car wash.
Great food and amazing service!!! Everything was delicious. Best Mexican restaurant for miles. Definitely will be back.

Great hangover pho! No complaints on the taste, but nothing outstanding either. The pho took forever to come out though, which is extremely rare. I think we waited more than 20 minutes to get our pho. That's a record!! Most pho places I go to bring the pho out in less than 5 minutes!
Terrible management! Rules are never enforced and many residents take advantage of this.

I walked into the coroner expecting a cute little bistro with a small menu with great choices on it. What I was met with was overpriced food that was okay at best served by a rude waitress in a small, dark, cold , unwelcoming room.

Very slow service. The waiters/servers don't go around our table often enough for us to place our orders for the all-you-can-eat sushi. The sushi comes at a reasonable speed since I understand that it takes awhile to hand-made them. However my biggest complaint is the speed of the service itself and how often they come around.

I still am impressed by their service, surprised many people say otherwise. Years ago when I was a kid this place would get orders wrong so often we almost expected them to happen but they have gotten it right with me everytime nowadays. Good food and nice spot to relax and hang out if you want to.

Went to get my glasses adjusted. The chipped a lense and scratched it up. There is a notification on the desk saying that they are not responsible for wrecking your expense and necessary glasses. Had to back to my last pair. Won't ever go back.
SUPPORT THIS LOCAL GEM! Never had a bad experience here. Get the pork tamale!!!! Omg so good. Literally the queso is... chef's kiss. I love taco son! Take all new tampa people here. :)

I ordered the Kang Karee with chicken from the lunch menu. The flavor was excellent, serving size was good, and the service was friendly (Marie). My one complaint is that the menu said there were peanuts in it, but there were not. When I asked, she said it was an old menu. Quite the bummer for me, because I ordered it for the peanuts.

What happened to the original staff? I bought a half off depot deal and tried several times to use it, but to no avail. On my second trip here, the service were not as nearly as good as my first visit and the place could use a deep cleaning. Def went down hill
Gave this place a shot. Super easy and fast with reasonable pricing. I had a blast with my girl and we will definitely be coming back.

Much better drinks than earlier in our day. Appetizers were great too. Small, chill spot. We did laugh when a friend ordered Merlot, & our server said they didn't have it. So we pointed to the menu & she admitted they she had never heard of it, saying "most people order moscato." They also have hookah. Ok experience.

I remember this being good Chinese food years ago but was super disappointed by the fishy shrimp pad thai and the wonton soup that had no meat in it at all. It is affordably priced and was delivered quickly, but I guess this is a case of getting what you pay for.

This is a very good restaurant we love to sit by the bar in the booths. Portia the bartender was very knowledgeable on the drinks to pair with the dinner the prices were reasonable and we love the atmosphere
Over-rated, over priced. $9.40 per pounder for boiled crawfish. Dandy gritty oysters with cracked shells. Very weak, very dissapointing.

A solid Meh. I can think of 4 or 5 other sushi places in Reno that, instead of leaving you disappointed, leave you over the top happy. Rolls fell apart, tempura shrimp was rock hard, every roll tasted the same, limited items you can order for lunch, mussels came out of the shell and were dry and hard etc.

Wings weren't cooked in the middle, food was mediocre, burger was burnt, prices are high for what you get. Beer pretzels are literally dough. No salt no taste. Been here once and gave it a second time. Not great. Won't be going back. Really disappointed.
Not a great meal tonight. Stone crabs were below average quality and advertised as colossal but were barely jumbo. The prime rib was overcooked even though I ordered medium rare at 6:30 pm.
I didn't get the right order, but the staff was still exceptionally friendly despite being slammed and I appreciate that!

Mr. Rooter's call center receptionist Chelsea was extremely rude and patronizing over the phone. She is obviously not educated on what customer service means. Had I not needed an evening plumber, I would not have used Mr. Rooter. I was happy with the plumber who came to work on the plumbing problem; he did solve the problem.

This McDonalds has the worst drive thru service in town; they are slow; they get your order wrong; and the food is cold by the time you get it. And!...when you bring these issues up to them there is never an apology, but plenty of attitude.

Absolutely the WORST customer service. Will NEVER return. Also, my daughter had her nails done and it legit looked like theybdupped teaching her fingers in glue, and they refused to clean it up. Awful all the way around.
Fuck been in the drive thru for 30 minutes and still no food! What the hell are you doing inside there??? You'd think they are Altai g the cows and making the ice cream homemade!!!! Wtf???

I recently ordered food for a house party. The food was horrible. There was hardly any meat in the goat korma, the chicken tasted sweet and the mixed vegetables was overflowing with oil! This is not the first time I ordered from here and the previous orders have been ok....however we were very disappointed with our last catering order from here.

One of the best gyros in town and super ladies serving! Although the wait is crazy but it's comforting my food is freshly made. The falafel is awesome, wings to die for.. I would say this the best place to be in Halloween?? They are across the cemetery.
Had the shrimp poboy and potato salad. Food tasted good but you only get about 4-5 small shrimp. Overpriced and I left hungry
Terrible terrible piza for the price We ordered 4 pizzas And no one was please Heard this was A good place in sparks Not my experience!

Think twice before venturing here. Very expensive despite tiny screens and also they have taken it upon themselves not to admit teenagers to R-rated movies even with parents present. Parking is usually a nightmare, congested with automated pay machines that at best are incredibly slow and often do not work.

It was ok. I had the seafood nachos which were piled high and an m IPA for happy hour. I'm not impressed or dissatisfied. The service was a bit slow maybe it was a new waiter but not too bad. My friends got sandwiches. I tried the BLT and it was ok.

The only thing I liked was the fries with ranch dressing. Bought wings and they weren't even cooked all the way. Customer service could be way better. From Cali and love their wing stop. Came here and won't be back

First, sushi was good. If that was the only thing we had ordered we would have been pretty happy. Sadly, we ordered steak from the hibachi and it was HORRIBLE. I mean the worst. The meat was tough, fatty, and was covered in what looked to be barbque sauce. Save your money. We certainly won't return.

Kinda tiny inside but it was very nice. Surprised to see that the prices were not that expensive at all. The penné pasta dish was so delicious and hot. Also appreciated the BYOB aspect. Cute place for a date or nice meal out.

So I'm updating the review to notify you that Kagel did try to make me a happy customer by adjusting the price for when they came out to fix PSEG mistake. I'm still fighting with PSEG in order to get Kagel their money owed. What a nightmare.

This was the worst experience.. ordered a drink, never came... ordered a salad... never came... waited over 25 minutes between courses and we had two waiters!! Steak came out rare.. extremely disappointed since all I wanted all Day was an incredible steak!
This place is just plain terrible. They give you hot water and meat with no flavor. Do not go here and save your money!

Excellent happy hour, wait staff alerted us when it was 15 mins to show time so we could close out and get in to the theatre on time. Lively atmosphere with artists stopping in for a bite and a drink as well. Will definitely go back.

this place is really not good. some of the meat tasted like it had no seasoning/gamey. rice is horrible and bean is gross. food came out slow and seemed like the man that is at the register hate being there and does not seem to be friendly. wont be coming back.
Very friendly and classy place. It feels and looks like the fifties. I love this Barbershop and the people that work there.
Wings are the best! But service is poor. Always sitting waiting for check or waiting on more water, however food does get out fast. Would come back

Absolutely fantastic customer service. The ice cream for me was nothing special, a bit more of a novelty, and fun for young kids to watch. Toppings were standard and a small cup was $7. I would not return.

Tomadachi to hiru gohan iku, shucho shimashita. Maguro to Unage suki desu. Alaska roll o tabemashita. Totemo oshikatta desu....It's always nice to drop by here for lunch, for a one day biz trip, right before visiting the big customer up the road. Yummy!!!
Amazing food for a great price and service. You'll get ranch sized servings and great ingredients.

After being an Enterprise customer for more than a decade, I am now totally disinclined to give them any more of my business after my experience with this location. Don't take anything they say to/assure you at face value. And don't expect the normal courtesy in tone and fact.

I waited an hour for tacos?!?!? The food is good but not amazing. The jamaica is 90% sugar. The cash only thing is a bit shady...especially when they add up your order 'wrong' the first time then come back and ask for more money! I know the kitchen is tiny but it can be more efficient! Next time I'll return to Los Agaves instead.

Pho soup is average at best, but perhaps on the better side compared to what's available around this side of the woods. Staff is very courteous and will also walk you through the menu if you don't know what you're looking at.
First and last time...ordered the burger. Stale bun, greasy patties no flavor cold hard bacon and hardly any sauce...no thanks! Fries were good. Go to five guys if you want a good burger

We ordered charbroiled beef vermicelli and chicken curry soup with vermicelli. The chicken curry is what most people ordered, taste good, but takes a long time to serve, if you are on your lunch time, you might want to order something else. The charbroiled beef, taste good but the beef is not tender and takes along time to serve as we'll.

Tuesday night wing nights!!! I enjoy most of the dishes that they serve here, but they make a truly delicious chicken wing. The only reason for losing one star is they sometimes are extremely chintzy when saucing the wings, but only on wing night when they have more customers then they can handle. The staff have always been friendly too!

If I could make it 0 stars I would... food was so bland had to drench it in different sauces service was even worse, it seemed as if everyone but the young lady at the register was high and couldn't focus. Just shows you don't eat Asian food from a place where the only Asian is on the register
Had the fish tacos with fries. Food was good but a bit sweet for me. Outdoor seating but shaded and plenty of fans.

We showed up for the food trucks and Robert Randolph and the family band. We got there during the second half of the event and half of the food trucks were packing up for the day. They said they had to get to their next event. I was shocked that they wouldn't be there for the entirety of the day.

Good beer. Good food. Friendly staff. What more could you want. We got the Korean bbq wings and the meat trio pizza. Great wings the pizza wasn't the best I ever had but it was a solid slice. Would recommend.

Rating the food this place gets an easy five stars. Shrimp poboy was excellent. Fried chicken was incredible. Baked Potato was amazing. Overall the food was better than I ever expected. Can't say anything about the jazz room except I'm not going to pay $25 to see someone play I've never heard of before. Plenty of free music everywhere else.

Had the 3 fish taco lunch today. These tacos were ok at best. The seasoning on the Korean and Pacific tacos was overpowering and took away from the fish flavor. The owner came to my table to say hi and make sure everything was ok. That was nice but the tacos were meh.
I love Dollar Tree. Just not this location. I will drive across town rather than go into this one. It's very messy and not well stocked. One bright spot--Cashiers are nice though.

Had our gutters installed at the end of July from this company. The price was competitive and the quality of service was great! The installation team was punctual, professional, and completed quality work in one day. We really like the addition of these gutters to our home and have received many compliments already. Highly recommend this company and their awesome team!
Excellent spice level and great taste. Wonderful service and nice atmosphere! Definitely recommend and will be back!

$2 for sprinkles topping? Either they accidentally charged me a 2-scoop price for the 1-scoop I bought, and wouldn't admit it, or the pricing is sky-high crazy. Certain cashier's service can use some improvements.
Small portion size and skimpy on the meat on an almost $10 box. Can get much better at H mart. Taste was mediocre or average. I guess it's center city.
Excellent food and service. The food presentation was very well done. Open kitchen organized well. Staff excellent at helping each other.
One aisle of alcohol. Mostly seemed like a convenience store. Maybe I missed something.

Was here as part of a foodie tour. Red beans and rice was really good. Service was lacking though. No water was served to the tour. They "only had $2 bottle water"; while the group behind us had big glasses of ice water.
I been taking my Persian cat here since we moved from Hawaii. Loved my groomer there and never thought she could be replaced. Tiffany proved me wrong, she is very good with my old grouchy guy.
My second concert here to see Keith Urban. I enjoy this venue and they seem to run a safe outdoor venue. Staff was very helpful. Great venue to see a concert!

This is an amazing collection... I have visited several times & each time I see something new!!! Make sure you take advantage of the audio tour!!! Dali is hard to understand, I learned so much listening!! Also, stop by on Thursday evenings for a discounted visit!!!

If you want to go to the only bar in SB that has a cover and sit outside with drunk people smoking while sipping on your expensive mixed drink or dancing to extremely loud music, then this is the place for you. If you are over the age of 25, I would think twice unless you are looking for "hot singles in your area."
Great price and honest salesman! Shopped lots of paces and mattress firm was the best!

4 stars only because it's so dang expensive in here!!!! I bought a pecan turtle it was 8.99 but it was a good size piece of candy. This place smells so good when you walk in.They sell fresh ice cream,fudge,and all kinds of candy!!!! When in Clearwater beach you must try this place.

Review based on wings only. I Ordered the whisky rubbed wings based on reviews. Good taste but wings were too chewy and fatty to really enjoy. Because it's a rub it cooks fast so the rub almost burns before the skin can get crispy.
Could have been wonderful wound up inconsistent. Fantastic Friday night band, nice salsa, food OK, margaritas good, terrible wait for service.

I've been to this restaurant multiple times & I like the food here the staff is also nice I have not had one bad experience since I've been here the bathrooms are clean so far this restaurant is great from what I would definitely come back in the future
Nothing special. I liked my egg roll vermicelli but I get more egg rolls in it at other restaurants. My mom didn't like her crepe. She said it's much better at one of the places uptown

We preferred Turkish restaurant and we thought that it would be better,but we will never prefer again. Falafel was tasteless, grill was also cold and untasteful,too. It was bad hospitality. disappointing!!

DIRTY...Ordered a turkey hoagie and the guy started making it.. WITH HIS BARE DIRTY HANDS . Didn't even attempt to wash his hand before touching anything. Laughing touched his face and then the sandwich. STAY FAR FAR AWAY
Pizza was way under cooked and didn't taste very good. Why cook with fire if you aren't going to use it right. Employees were friendly and helpful.
Yummy Thai food in a very clean, small restaurant in Clayton. Really good curries and appetizers. Very friendly wait staff. I will be back.
Always disappointing? Why when the restaurant is half empty do they insist on putting you at a table next to other tables so you can't hear the people your with? Best to leave the booths empty right?
They made us a fried tomato po boy since we're vegetarian! They were very accommodating and it was delicious!

Kenny was amazing. Wonderful customer service. Kenny took his time with us and listened to our needs. He did fantastic work. On next trip to New Orleans I wish be visiting here again! Thank you for the amazing service and perfect tattoos.
This place was fantastic! It seemed to be more 'family' friendly than other bars in the area. It was nice and big so you had space to move.
Olney, North Philly My quick spot located by Central High School to grab a slice. Quiet when I go there. Chill spot.

Great service. Mediocre food. Soup too salty. General Tso too sweet. Egg rolls and spring rolls were too greasy. I really think the shrimp and krab hag some imitation flavor added. We didn't have to wait too long for the food. Seating was quaint but not too close.
Bad management. The employees constantly say that the system is down constantly throughout all different hours of the day even though the website says they are open 24/7.
Service was nice and the place is nice. The food is just average. My chicken was dry.
My first Gyro ever, and it was excellent! I loved the flavors, it was filling and refreshing, and the service is outstanding I look forward to exploring the menu on future visits.
We went to this place to try out the wine flights and were not disappointed at all. Very nice red flights and price was very reasonable.
Arrived during happy hour. Great menu and assortment of adult beverages. Pizza was very good! Service was great in spite of the place being packed.

This should not be classified as an aquarium!! We paid 65 to enter expecting large enclosures, but all we saw were little swimming pools. We understand that this is a rehab center, but this place should be advertised as so! Not worth the 65 admission fee. False advertising..
I love this place. Good meat, good sides, good bar.... what else you want?
Great view of the water, and a very nice walk from the Hyatt hotel. Prices are high and service is friendly but slow. The fish taco's are tastey.
For real, y'all, why are we even talking about this place that has: * Horrible Service - Waitress was very inattentive * Horrible Food - Basil chicken should have been called Basil Chicken Soup

Dr Hargrove is one of the nicest people I've meet. She's been my doctor for a long time and will continue coming to her office. The staff is always pleasant and will get you an appointment as soon as possible.
Inside ambience is beautiful. Service is good: They change utensils and clean the table between every course of meal. However, the food portions are small.
Terrible service. Terrible food. You'd think they could serve good mahi. Nope. Chicken lettuce wraps were flavorless. Spent 52 bucks and totalling unsatisfied.
This place is full of hippies. I bet they have patchouli. I buy a lot of sesame seeds here. I can eat about 100 thousand of those things in one sitting.

I was going to order 7 meals but they won't substitute noodles for rice and wanted to charge me $7 for noodles. This is hard when you're allergic to rice. They won't be getting my business anytime soon.
Consistently good burger at everyone of this chain I have visited, lots of toppings to choose from but the price is a little bit expensive so I don't eat there too often.
I have been to this deli several more times and I added an extra star. Their hoagies are very good and they make a lot of their other menu items from scratch.

So, this cute place is perfection! Toni went above and beyond with my color treatment. The whole salon has a great vibe, friendly staff, and convenient hours. I love my color and cut. Highly recommend.
Good bubble tea, fun and casual atmosphere, but our apps were very slow to come out, and seemed to come out in random order.

Lance is an excellent , engaging tour guide. Very knowledgable and candid. My family thoroughly enjoyed the tour. We did the 7:30pm time frame, and it was perfect timing with dusk just beginning, and by time we were done, it was pitch black. Perfect evening. Lance knows his stuff!
Great burritos Wish they had Coke or Pepsi products. They have the new hope soda. Not a fan. Would have gotten water if I would have noticed before.
I wouldn't suggest karaoke here as the system isn't a true system. Had a good time here anyway and they tried to make it up to us!

Went a few times. Each time I was not overly impressed. Their bbq selection was a bit dry and it is so loud that at times you can't even have a real conversation. Since the first time I went the prices have gone up in their meat platter to share.

The food is okay. The service was not friendly. The people behind the sushi bar were pounding something loudly through half of our meal. We asked them to stop, and they continued. The seats are very hard. We thought we had found a good place to go, but, because of the issues, we will not be returning.
Well they don't have the boneless bbq wings. I'm really bum about that. The drive thru is very slow so expect to wait 8-10 minutes for your food

The chicken Pho was excellent and noodles cooked perfect. The restaurant was clean and service was quick and actually pleasant. This place is ten steps ahead of Pho Cali so do yourself a favor and give it a try.

I have eaten here before with my children, and even though the waitress are pleasant, the service is slow the food is good. However,I am disappointed and concern to see drastic decline in cleanness. I have left the place because of it.

Not bad, but not great. We sat on a balcony overlooking Bourbon st. The food is largely forgettable, but the service wasn't too bad and it was a nice spot to spend some time for lunch. Try the Voodoo Punch.

One of my favorite bars in Nashville! Prepare for something a tad different than most bars you saunter into- hip hop music, woah! Very spacious, 2 floors. Upstairs you will find the mechanical bull. Definitely a "must-do" when you're out in Nashville. Very cool place!

Awesome food. Old fashioned nice Italian restaurant. Great service! Waiter was awesome. Pizza bread to die for. Nice homemade meatballs and the gravy is excellent. Must try. You won't be disappointed!
Stopped in for a burger and onion rings, both were excellent and priced right. Fast and friendly service! Will definitely return!

First & last time to Jersey Mike's. Ordered Original Italian. Meats and Provolone cheese sliced tissue paper thin. Their regular size is between Subway's 6 inch and foot long. Not worth the effort let alone the $8 price. To top it all off in their cc card software they have the balls to ask how much you want to tip!

This place rocks. Anywhere that can successfully combine fresh ingredients, generous portions, and alcohol has me sold! Cool atmosphere and great for lunch or dinner. Plus, they have a solid Yelp deal of buy one, get one free beer. Now that's not something you find everyday.

this is where the senior citizens hang out. Poor video poker paytables, much better at Peppermill and Atlantis. locals don't hangout here, because there's much better machines away from downtown. try western village, in Sparks.
