Went there for lunch on Saturday and it was okay. We avoided the massive dinner crowd and sat at the bar. The sushi was okay and the sushi chef was very nice. The visit was eh and so was the sushi. Eh..

This is a very very casual restaurant with few tables everything is fresh made to order so takes a little bit longer owner is super hospitable big with the locals very well priced shrimp are excellent and fresh seafood
Red lentil soup? Yes, please! I don't lie--always get The baba ganouch. It's not as busy as the one on Frenchman but the food seems to be the same.

I'm giving this place 5 stars because the cheese whiz philly cheese steak is awesome. Not nearly as good with any other cheese. If you go, be sure to get it with cheese whiz, I know it sounds weird and gross but it really makes a difference because the meat doesn't have a super strong flavor.
My family has come here for years! Food is always the same and taste amazing! Super friendly and welcoming!

Shelby was amazing! we came here for New Years & she made it worth it!! & She always kept a smile on her face while she was dealing with a-holes! That says alot about a server or bartender i think, shes great at her job thats forsure!
Call restaurant for specials. In house specials are better than those on line. I over paid for a one topping pizza. Could have had two toppings for less.

I got take out from Tazia. The sesame chicken was alright, but not great. I will give them another shot though because the do have take out beer for purchase, which is important to know for this neighborhood.

"Can I get a coffee please?" "Our coffee is self serve it's over there." Sorry, but when I'm at a restaurant I don't like to have to get things myself. I'm pretty sure that's why waiters exist. Other than that, I really liked my Moroccan frittata!

Highly recommend to any guy looking for a quality cut. Old school barber shop with out all the gimmicks other places are throwing at customers. It is reasonably priced and Joe consistently delivers a flawless haircut. All of the barbers there seem to takes great pride in what they do.
Whew! Barely made it before noon but well worth the rush. Breakfast burrito wonderful, coffee exceptional, people beautifully friendly.
Service-3 average service. Food -5 I love their spicy beef noodle soup, very flavorful and unique taste. I also tried spicy bean curd noodle soup as well. All noodle soup dishes were good.

We have been here 3 times so far. Great Culver's double with everything on it. The onion rings are delicious. My husband had a vanilla shake and he said it was ice cream not a shake. I have tried the salad and it was quite tasty. We will be back.

DO NOT SHOP HERE! Marcus is a liar. He gave us a quote on a family plan, then changed the pricing for the contact without our knowledge. He now refuses to honor the quote. This is bait and switch and fraud. We are perusing legal action against this store and him personally.
We had a delicious meal and our server, Lulu was amazing!!! We will definitely be back!
I'd love to say that they make delicious pizza, but frankly, have only had their fried chicken. It's the only thing I get there because I LOVE it!

This place reminds me of my childhood... Walk inside and the nostalgia hits you across the face. It took me back to the neighborhood pizza place that I always went to as a child. The Greek salad is gigantic and pretty good. the pizza is not bad at all either. It was nice to dine in and feel like a kid again.
Lacked in flavor. Asked for spicy and didn't get any heat. Spring rolls lacked meat. Service was OK. This tea was good.

I love Ulta but this location on 1/7/17 had very little customer service. We walked around looking for help. When we got the help, it was not like the experience we have had at other stores. Brentwood location is our favorite! Ulta offers an abundance of products. Haven't tried the salon.
Being an ex-NY'er I value great pizza. This place is the best I have found since I been in the Levittown/Bristol areas. Excellent!

The service at this location has gone progressively downhill. This Saturday I placed a to go order at 4:46 pm. I finally got it at 5:22. Also, the hostess had breath that smelled strong fly of alcohol. The restaurant was more than half empty, yet people were being told it would take 10-20 minutes to seat them.

Randall's has the best selection of alcohol I've seen, from liquor to wine to those fun little bottles by the registers. Great place to buy party libation supplies. Parking lot could be in better shape. No public restroom.

Brisk service, tasty nouveau-Southern cuisine. You won't eat anything ridiculous or too trendy, just "new American" upscale dining with the slightest Southern gestures. Duck and salmon both very good. Moderate portions. House salads are very good and come with everything.
DO NOT USE UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES... cut me... put my fingers in water that was way too hot... got an infection... awful. And they seemed not to care. They should be put out of business.

Very clean space! Smaller so it's more personable. I love that they use Natura products because you can't find it anywhere else in the city. Luckily I went for my manicure when they just opened part of their boutique so I got some Christmas shopping, and something for me, done!
Love Foon Ying. Being eating there for a while. Very good food and nice portions.

This Dollar Tree Store is remarkably similar to all the other Dollar Tree stores. It is perhaps a little more rundown than most. But offers lots of candy, decorations and made in China junk to accessorize your life. :)

I bought a Groupon here for my husband. I called to make an appointment per the instructions. My husband arrived and was told they were closed. He was told the barber with the Groupon wasn't there and he could wait but there were 5 customers in front of him. The place was dirty and they were rude. Groupon gave us a refund.

First time here. Service was good and pricing was really good. Ordered the Oreo shaved ice and it was delicious but the shaved portion could have been smoother and not as hard. Love the tables and the size of restaurant was decent. Overall if you like bubble tea and shaved ice can't go wrong here.

I love this little shop! I always seek out small, local coffee shops. French Truck was great! Awesome latte and Americano. Wish I could give 4.5 stars...the only shortfall was STEVIA! YUK! I have an love of Splenda...not available. Coffee tastes WAY different with Stevia. GREAT SHOP though!
if you are looking for cheap furniture to furnish your double wide.... this is the place for you.

The owner was ver friendly, I stopped in from out of town and she gave me a salted Carmel cheesecake, which was awesome!! I did not have time to eat but if the rest of the menu is as good as the cheesecake I am sure it is good! Thanks again for your hospitality. Jeff from Michigan.
Best ice cream ever!!! A must go in Santa Barbara - best flavor is the peanut butter cup.
Hot chicken and crispy pork tacos. These tacos were incredible, some of the best I've ever had! Also the street corn is a must try!

Wanted to like it more, but New Deck is more interesting and a whole lot less bland...decent for happy hour and brunch. The menu is a bit pricey, even for the PENN crowd, so unless budget is no concern...I'd go elsewhere...like "44". Just remember to bring a whole lot of friends...it makes it less stuffy, especially after the Irish pints get passed around. :op
The food and service was very good. The enchiladas and burritos were very tasty. The beef and cheese nachos were also good. I would definitely go back.
The food is good, but the service isn't that stellar. It's nothing too fancy, but a relaxing atmosphere. The wait is never too long, either.

Being an Indian, and having tried so many different Indian restaurants , I would say that this is an OK ( .....if I stretch it) restaurant. People there are nice which makes it a nice place. But they can really work on their food!!!
Superb Nachos (Mama's Nochos) Good Wait Staff. No hassles and a nice place to be on a HOT!! Saturday afternoon.

This place is very understaffed and results in a very unorganized and scattered serving experience. We got seated relatively quickly (one reason we decided to eat here). However, waiting and nearly an hour and a half for a decent burger and mediocre fish tacos is very off putting. We should have kept walking....next time Sabrina's.
Really Friday night and NO draft beer... Mr manager you are letting the side down. Sorry ppl we will move on!!
Paying to park is crazy, 2 exhibits are closed, no kids show and no shopping carts when school groups are present... Smh... Won't be back... Very disappointing

Needs more seasoning tbh. Food was bland and soggy, but maybe that's because it's catered towards the predominately white Belmont demographic. I guess for TN standards it's good, but if you've had any of the menu dishes at an authentic place then prepare to be disappointed. Their boba slaps though.

Employee became argumentative over weather we ordered punch or Coke. I (as a paying customer) took the punch because it was clear they were ready to argue and be confrontational over this minor issue. Last dime they get from me.

I had the Lafayette special and my husband had the sloppy joe. They were both different from usual brunch items (especially the sloppy joe) but in a very good way. Freshly squeezed orange juice and pumpkin spice latte added to a great brunch.
Expedia deal, central location, standard Sheraton... not much to say except their parking garage is one of the most cramped I have been in for a hotel and they charge too much for it.

It's a burger and fries. Nothing special. Kids bugged me to order this. Delivery fries aren't good from anyone so the stars are just for the burgers. But skip the fries. The cookie was actually 4.5 stars.

I don't have any problem with the employees but the company Nissan is the worse car ever the make Nissan Sentra with bad transmission and they want me to get a new one for 4200 after I pay 14000 dls for the stupid car do not buy Nissan car

At some point, this place is going to have to decide whether or not it wants to be a serious electronic music venue. At some point, the owner is going to do whatever it takes to get a liquor license, boot out the drugged up 17 year olds and turn it into a classy 21+ establishment.
I wanted to like this gel mani but it ended up destroying my nails. They were too aggressive sanding my nails down and most ended up breaking. The polish didn't last either

The drinks are top notch and tasty and what I want. The pre-made food looks scary and I wonder who would order that. Considering the store remodeled a few times and is shrinking. I imagine sentiments are the same...

Was really excited about this place, but left feeling a little unimpressed. My biscuit was dry, which considering it's a biscuit speciality place was disappointing. Next time I'm in Nashville I probably wouldn't go back.

Burnt toast, forgot parts to order, and had to return to our table multiple times through service and even reheated a plate of hash browns! It was my first time here and I was disappointed. Server was unmotivated and disrespectful. I won't be returning. Gave a 3 because the pancakes were good and checkout was easy.

They are the best! Started taking our cockapoo puppy there since October. We made several visits so the puppy could get used to being groomed. The staff is very warm and caring, in addition to doing an excellent job in grooming. Another plus . . . excellent prices.
Go to Collegeville. Each one is run by different people. Wayne's manager, Matt, is not customer focused.

Hands down worse airport I've ever been to. The customer service reps for American Airlines were way to rude for this early in the morning (5am). What a great way to start off the day! And they charge $130 fee for my bag being 4 pounds over weight, seems a little ridiculous. I'm going back to Southwest from now on.
Worst Pho restaurant. Service was horrible. They could not even get our drinks right. We waited 40 mins to get our food. Its just a bowl of pho. they don't even have napkins at the table.

This is the worst chipotle I've ever been to. I've gone several times to give it a chance and every time it's a bad experience. The food is always dry/cold. The customer service is always sub par. I'd like to contact the franchise to make them aware of this location.
Everyone here is very friendly and provide great service. The location is very clean and there isn't typically a long wait.
Authentic dim sum in a fun setting. The Shanghai soup style dim sum was amazing. Restaurant was a great value for excellent food. We came back twice in two days.
My family and I really enjoy eating here. The salad with scallops is amazing. The cocktails are great along with the service.
The worst whataburger imaginable. I went to the drive through and ordered 5 items and 2 of the items were missing, and they charged me for them.

We were there for lunch and not much of a crowd and thought the counter ordering system was slow. Can't imagine what it's like when it gets busy. Food was so-so and pricey for what we got. Probably won't return.
It smells sooo good in here. Everyone is super friendly. I always get the same thing... I think it's their morning glory muffin? Vegan Vee is a really hard place to drive past every day :)

Would love to write a review, but we waited 39 minutes completely ignored by the wait staff and then decided to move on to the Armature Works. M- Bird was phenomenal for drinks and sunset, Steelbach was great for dinner and craft cocktails. BTW, the Sheraton Pool Bar has instant service, a decent Old Fashion and complimentary snacks.

Got to enjoy this truck in Sahuarita on the 4th of July!!! They have a great selection of hotdogs...we got the Tony Bologna and the Chicago Dog....both outstanding!!! Even though they were really busy, all the trucks were, they were friendly and took time to answer our questions. Keep a look out for this cute little truck and their yummy hot dogs!!!

I called looking for a groomer to bathe and file the nails of a rescue dog I am fostering. She came from a shelter-and was very stinky! They got me in quickly, sent appointment reminders, and were very friendly and helpful. This is the place I will go for my foster dogs' needs. Thank you!
Nice atmosphere. But busy. Never got our food. Nice bartender but don't come eat here unless you don't want to eat. Basically because my bartender was so nice I'm giving them a one. This place sucks.

Excellent wait staff, very kind and helpful. The food was so good that I had to say a line from the movie "Terminator"......."I'll be back!!" Nothing is better than having a meal that is full of flavor!! Did I mention that Thurs nights are 1/2 price bottles of wine!! Doesn't get any better!!
I'm really happy to have place like this close to my house. Last minute spot with fresh pizza yuuuuuuuuum. 5 star for the old dude who are making our pizzas in a middle of night.
Annual rate increases of approximately $3 with no upgrades or notice! As of late have been experiencing increasing problems with service

To start off I'm not a St. Louis native so I'm not fond of St. Louis style pizza. dominoes in this area is the best delivery I have so I'll give them four stars for that. and the pizzas always consistent. The app makes it easy to order.

Excellent service and very perceptive to each persons diet and preferences. Claire my hostess was fabulous and gave me the spice level I desired. Cozy little spot in good ole Conshy! Will come back again in the future.

I am a regular there & i love it! The food/drinks, the staff and the ambiance are always on point. Ive been coming here for years. Try the trifongo with shrimp in white sauce, quesadillas or the anything in menu. The night life is my favorite in Trenton.

Horrible place.... we got water after waiting for a half hour then had to tell them 20 minutes later we were ready to order. They never came to the table. they only take cash? What?! Welp won't be going back.

This is a cute little restaurant and the food was just okay but it did seem like it was a hotel's snack shack from the location of it. It's in a condo complex and not a typical restaurant. The staff was very nice and it was cute however I felt misled after finding this place on Yelp.

Acme is a tourist trap. My problem is not that there's a line, but that the food is bad. Parts of my seafood etoufee was hot, and other parts cold, which leads me to believe that they've microwaved this dish. My rice was also hard and undercooked. And chargrilled oysters was beyond greasy. Even if there's no line, I wouldn't come back.
It a great place to get Brophy Bros fish and chips on the go, if the wait at Brophy Bros has is too long. Just somewhere outside and enjoy the view.
Service was terrible, but we overlooked that because the food was actually pretty good. I mean, that is, until I got food poisoning 30 minutes later. DEFINITELY not coming back to this place.

Haven't been here in years and was so happy they are consistent with their burgers. Bobby Blue is the best!!! Crunchburger is also very tasty. Their fries and milkshakes are awesome as well! It looks like the prices went up a bit so it was $30 for two. A bit pricey but worth the money!
We use this restaurant frequently for pizza and cheesesteaks. Delivery through Grub Hub, service is ALWAYS fast, hot and food is consistently excellent

We were looking for a dinner alternative so we went to Mike's. The line was not terribly long which was great. Ice cream was yummy! It was not as creamy as I had hoped - almost a little crumbly until it melted a little. I loved the red velvet and mint white chocolate Oreos. I would recommend trying.

Visiting from Ohio. We always want to try a local eatery. Did a quick yelp and found Quinns. I had the German brat. Awesome. My wife had the California Dreamin burger. Great choice. Spoke to the owner, friendly, and from Ohio also. Definitely give Quinn s a try.
Very polite and detailed I've been their customer about 10 years so 's feels like a new car when i leave

This is from the consumer perspective (not professional): nice clean lumber yard and generally will have what you need in stock. But lumber prices for consumers are exorbitant - 50% to 100% higher than the big chains. I'd rather shop local and would even pay a bit of a premium, but it feels like gouging here

Great service. Great atmosphere. Absolutely the best calamari and one of the best Caesar salads I've ever had. My much harder-to-please parents also loved it and declared it "our St. Louis restaurant" and said we will always come back when they visit. Highly recommend.
The most disgusting guacamole I've ever seen. I guess you can't order anything to go with confidence they will give u the best quality.
We had a great day with Tracy. She was knowledgeable, fun and flexible. She was able to customize our trip to our needs.

Rancid food. Waitress was friendly but not a very good waitress- how do you serve someone a can of beer with no glass? Fried pickles were gross, that was all we dared to try. We were in and out in 20 mins.

Food here is decent and the servers are extremely friendly and welcoming. Its not the best Indian food I have ever had but I would come here again. Not to expensive. A little heavy on butter in certain dishes.

This place was great! Very accommodating for our large party and everyone was very professional. The location is really nice and doesn't smell like a nail salon which is my favorite! I took my family and bridal party here to get our nails done before my wedding and it was perfect :)

Wonderful find! We were in town for the weekend and happend to walk by....glad we did. Home made noodles, great pineapple chicken (with organic chicken), great service, and you can watch them make dumplings and noodles. Kids loved it. We will be back next time we are in town.
Noah and Dan are great! Great attitude and service. Always keeping busy. Much better customer service than the chick-fil-a at 19 & Irvington.

Friendly service, but the food is only ok. Had the fish and chips, nothing special (although it's almost impossible to find a good version in St. Louis). I wanted to like this place, but from my one visit i can't say that i do.
I thought the food was ok. But appetizers were actually better than the main course. Food was over priced and under portioned. But the service was excellent.
Would not deliver to my address even though they have before at the same time of night ... Pizza is great but not sure how I feel about consistency of service
This the best place in Indy to eat, and the atmosphere is amazing. Love the real meatballs they put on their subs and my wife loves The Mess sandwich along with their chips.
One must try Spicy Rock Sundae. I liked their bluefin sushi, Shumai too. Service was promt. I didnt like Spider Roll and Spider Roll.

Pizza is fantastic some days.. other days less than average.. seems to depend on who prepares it.. Recently bought a whole pie and they put it in the box without wax paper.. Called to ask why no wax paper and they hung up the phone on me.. not the greatest customer service..

Very great and ethnic food. The place environment is beautiful. However the service was very slow. We had to get the waiter attention multiple time. It took them at least 40 mins to get the food including the appetizers. At the end we had to walk to the cashier for the check cause they took forever. But the food is worth it.

Overall, good. Had seafood gumbo and the catfish/shrimp combo. Wish you could sub the fries on the combo with something else. Food was pricey and if you park across from restaurant, expect to pay $10 in parking alone! $3.25 for a kids Lemonade was also expensive. Best catfish I had though!

Solid Tex Mex addition to downtown. Only complaint I have is the salsa. It taste like tomato sauce and nothing else.. I always order a side of pico and add some pepper. I menu items are hit or miss. Service has always been great. They have a bar and also have a few tvs spread throughout.

Not impressed used a shop vac pretty much just wiped the outside cover of the vents. Cleaned the dryer vent?? Knocked the connection off the dryer so now I have to deal with that. Didn't really clean the ducts
Hit the roulette table for a few mins after dinner. Casino was good looking and had plenty of areas to gamble
Awesome! Went tonight with a coworker. We split the sausage sampler platter. My entree was the blackened salmon. The food was out standing!

I saw Stephanie for a color correction basically, and she exceeded any expectations I had. It's beautiful, and I couldn't be more satisfied with the results. A bit pricey if I'm being honest but I'd pay it to have my color done with her! Thanks Stephanie!
Overpriced. Had to ask for food menus after 30 minutes (the place was empty). Was asked to move when a bachelorette party walked in. Will not be back.

Still the same. Why do I even go in here? The warranties are still useless. You can't even buy a floor model half the time, but you can ALWAYS find a salesman under the stairs watching TV. To be fair, some of the people work hard and are kind, but my impression is that the company just doesn't care about customer service.
Went down hill FAST! Food isn't what it use to be. Says it's under new management, could that be why?

Nice atmosphere, good wine selection. I had the halibut special. It was tasty, but very dry. It was cooked to death. Not what you would expect for a $45 entrée. The waiter was initially very attentive until a party of 18 arrived then you couldn't find him, I don't think I will return.

I take my cocker spaniel here to be groomed. When she comes out, she is always happy, healthy, and ready to play. She is persnickety about groomers. She even growls and snaps at them. She likes everyone at the spa. That's good enough for me. They do a great job. Can't recommend them enough.

Staff was nice and friendly Roast beef was a little small for the price They hardly put any cheese on the sandwich Rolls were stale Fries were not good at all Onion rings are good, but they hardly give you any in an order I used to go here a lot I don't think that I will return

First of all, our waitress was great. She was very helpful on recommendation. I saw her asking a customer if he needed an Uber. Our food came out quick and I would definitely go back next time I'm in town.
Really good bagels and very friendly staff. Small portions and wished I had got more food but overall good quality. Would definitely come back for a quick bite to eat!

Had heard such wonderful things about this place. Went here one night with friends from out of town. Sadly wasn't what I had expected. My expectations may have been to high from all the great reviews. The parm fries is what ruined it for me. Better luck next time?!
1 star for paper straws. Unproductive virtue signaling does nothing but make me spend money on plastic straws to keep in my car.

Most place in downtown Boise were closed on the Sunday night we were there but Cazba was open we had a wonderful dinner in a great atmosphere. The Turkish coffee and Baklava was phenomenal. Ill go there again any time I am in Boise.
Absolutely filthy. I saw a rat under the ice machine. Chairs and tables old a uncomfortable. That used to be my go to place. Not any more. Also people smoking when we ate
great breakfast food. we came with the kids, our food was great, and the kids food looked far better than we expected and the childrens portions seemed to be about the same as an adult one!.
Really love their sushi, but am I the only one that's really annoyed that they don't have a menu ANYWHERE online?!

Consistently terrible, I have no idea why this place has 4 stars. Even after a long night of imbibing the pad kee mao is a let down. I live close by and will always take a short drive to get decent Thai. Avoid if you can help it.
We wanted to try this place out, but sadly, it looks like they are now closed. Menu looked like it had good options. Maybe they will reopen in the future.
Decent pho spot in the neighbourhood. Employees are very friendly. Have eaten the vermicelli bowl and beef pho. Decent size portion for the price.

Dis bish was slow AF! 11 people in the restaurant and it took 20 minutes to get food! Whaaaaa is that!?!? This was ridiculous like a cat on a unicycle. To put the cherry in the Sunday, once the food came out she forgot my friends food! This was terrible, one star and a thousand tears.
This was a great place to sit and have a beer and listen to some live music. The food was just ok and the fryer was broken when I visited for lunch. The beers available are of a good range.
Got forcibly thrown out because my friend got sick. They hurt my wrist, still hurts. Police came, I'm filling assault charges.
Waited 30minutes in line for snacks, missed the first 10-minutes of movie. Saturday afternoon and two people working the registers. Never again.
The food was heavenly. I had the gumbo and a po boy.

The grilled steak was great. Very tender and flavorful. I wish I could say the same for the salad, lemon chicken soup, and grape leaves but they were all horrible! Waste of money so I will never go back. The restaurant was clean and the people were friendly. I've had really good Lebanese food but this was not it!
los betos would be a first choice, but viva makes an effing good breakfast burrito.

Been going here for 10 years. Great food. Usually always busy....never waited longer than 20 minutes for a table. Tables are crammed together....lots of family groups/kids.....but it's on the water and the food is very good. The crab soup.......nice! Def. worth the stop if your at the beach.
Cute space, with alcohol and coffee, or mix the two Iced coffee cubes to keep it strong in the Florida sun. I wished I had tried the orange latte, but I'll be back.

Was shocked to see so many negative reviews. Other than the occasional warm soda goPuff is amazing. Great selection of ice cream and candy, rarely late. Usually here early or within 30 minutes. The people rating it one star, clearly don't order it often and it was a fluke. - coming from a regular gopuff user
Tourist place, there are better options I think. Food was ok but not what I have experienced elsewhere. Line to get in was not worth the wait. Try Ed's oyster house 5 minutes away.
Great breakfast! Pleasantly surprised by all the great mexican breakfast dishes...very tasty! Homemade salsa was excellent...
Unfortunately, they closed ;-( but boy was it good. Hopefully, they will reopen. I'm keeping my eyes open on Olive.

AYCE hot pot or kbbq or both! I got the hot pot with spicy broth. Each person gets their own little hot pot and can re-order as much as they want. I ordered the shrimp dumpling four times (it was on a written menu on the table, separate from the hot pot menu!) - mmm.

The Pho was good lots of meat that's the shinning star of their menu. We didn't really Like anything else we tried except the Thai Tea the home made type was really good maybe the best one I've ever had.

Just ordered the Chicken Bruschetta from here via UberEats and I must say it was amazing! The only thing was that it comes with fries and since it was delivered in the same box as the pasta. The fries were a tad soggy. Other than that, the pasta and the fries were well seasoned and delicious.
It was a cheesesteak, so I will give it 2 stars. But tasted like it was made for Ben Franklin...dry as all. Skip the line and go to Sonnys a few blocks away..

5 star for food. 4 stars for service. The French toast are very average, not sure why everyone raves about it. The biscuits and gravy are phenomenal. Omelettes are also delicious. Beware of sitting in the very far back of the garden. Lots of trees and we were shat on 3 times.
Shrimp egg rolls zero shrimp. Quart of shrimp fried rice has 4&1/2 minature shrimp. Chickn lo mein very little chicken.

The old man working in there was condescending and a douche.. Funny how he told me which racks were suits multiple times like I was as dumb as he was. Even funnier that I was ready to buy something nice but left cause some old, ugly, pretentious, deadbeat, working-in-a-clothing-store-at-an-age-he-should-be-retired man offended me. Suck it buddy. There clothes are still nice though.. hahaha
I think I ended up ordering the wrong kind of cheese on my cheesesteak which made it not as good as the rest of my groups. Worth the experience but get cheese whiz!

I was really surprised to get the worst dim sum I've ever tried after all these good reviews here. No complaints about service but the food was just awful. I ended up throwing away almost everything I bought. I ordered several kinds of dim sum and buns with pork - all ranging from not tasty to disgusting...
Burgers are mediocre at best. They would come in dead last in a contest for the restaurant with the best fries. The shakes are good tho
no courtesy call or contact to let me know they were going to be very late. then said it was common practice to be late. i cancelled and went with someone else who doesn't stand their customers up.
Best hot chicken ever. We want every night. Only regret was I didn't buy a shirt. Ugh. Next time cause I will be back.

I love Bellevue Diner. The staff is wonderfully polite. The food is always hot and tasty. They are accommodating to your needs. Plenty of seating and parking. Great place to get a quick breakfast or lunch on a Saturday!

Wonderful place for brunch. Outside seating sets a great city atmosphere. I ordered eggs Benedict and it's was absolutely delicious. Waiter was very pleasant and helpful. Will definitely visit again for a mimosa or two.
Requested they pick up my mower to service it. Guy said they would pick it up that night between 5 and 8. 8:30 still no show or no phone call. Sad customer service.

The atmosphere is too crowded. Plus on my burger, I asked for medium-well with no cheese. They gave me rare with Bleu cheese. Then they gave me a burger that appeared cooked, but it was redder than a ladybug on the inside. I vomited after only one bite. Would not recommend Billy G's!

Really decent sandwiches. Good seasonal sandwiches too. I had turducken sandwich during thanksgiving which was rocking. My other favorite is 50/50. I still think Paesano and dinics is better but they are too far and too crowded respectively. So this is a good option that is more accessible to me during lunch time in center city.

Thumbs down. The people that work behind the deli counter couldn't possibly be more ready to let you know that you are a bother. Lines are long at check out. Cigarette smoke permeates much of the staff. The place just makes me sad that my neighborhood doesn't have a better market .
Reasonable Sunday breakfast/lunch prices on limited menu. However, food quality and service average at best.

Staff were so very sweet, however the sandwich(s) we ordered were marginal at best. Similar taste to Jimmy Johns. I would not eat here again. They should consider a garlic pesto, perhaps some cashew cheese spread instead of Swiss. The potential is limitless!!!

After my 3rd visit... I really feel like this place is overrated. The concept is good, as is the variety.... But the quality is just not there. I typically order sushi and a few appetizers and I just prefer to eat at a smaller, more authentic sushi restaurant. You also get charged for sushi you don't finish- so beware!

Yum! Food is Delicious! Great simple menu, perfectly cooked meats, specials are always delicious too! Service is always friendly, and helpful. Recommend it to anyone. Wish they were open later on Saturdays, would love to take friends here dinner on the weekends.

It was great eating on the beach with my toes in the sand. Coconut shrimp was great! Sunset was great! Only bad thing I can say which is not them was people were smoking.... they did move us and it was better. Great place!
Its pretty good and very fair priced..Not the best i ever had,but i like their egg rolls and hot and sour soup..90 cent egg rolls..

Tourist trap. Over priced crap food. Fried pickles have a pound of salt in them. Could not finish. Blackened Ribeye overcooked and bland. Could not finish. Green beans and peppers overcooked and mushy. Hot chicken just ok. Out of half of their on tap beers on a Tuesday night!

Ordered on grub hub Driver said there was a 90 minute wait to get in I had the grouper And it sucked Mash potatoes were ok Wedge salad was kind of warm and I couldn't eat it Bread was actually good I won't eat here again Bye
I've been here about 10 times and 0 out of those 10 times have I ever been helped. Also, when a lady was almost dying in a wheelchair, all of the nurses walked by like nothing was wrong. So yeah.

Sorry to say this but this philly location was terrible. Wait staff was great but the salmon and amberjack sushi was so disappointing. I can get better grade sushi in the Bronx. Love love love the NYC location.

Poorly managed, starts with the owner. They barely function and it's obvious there's no accountability. Customers are ironically a pain to them. Not everyone who enters your door is a desperate college student.

I went with my mom on a Tuesday. Service was amazing and the food was great. I got avocado toast and my mom got an egg toast item. Both were great. I ordered a berry smoothie as well and it was delicious!

Great place. We sat at the bar and the place was full. Cool crowd. Service was quick and friendly. The food was good but nothing special. I was hoping for special. My friend had the biscuits and gravy and said it was awesome.
Service was slow at 2:30pm. Waited for nearly 10 min. dine in. Finally received order and both where wrong. Order was corrected but my angus burger was lukewarm at best. Would not suggest this place.

Little Pete's is great! I got the two eggs with sausage and everything was cooked perfectly. The coffee is good and the servers are nice and attentive. Plus, this place is open early so when you take a red-eye flight in from Phoenix and all you want is a hearty breakfast at 7 a.m. - Little Pete's is there!

Our complaint is that the walk-in vaccination clinics only do a certain number of animals. (No sign-up slots and it's a mystery guess as to the magic number). Today we were sent away after a brief stand in line with many other people. This is not advertised and should be. We took time off work- unpaid of course!

Everything was sublime, from the chicken and biscuit sandwich with a tobacco honey sauce (me), to the avocado toast (much healthier-eating wife), to the banana bread (who eats dessert at breakfast you ask? Come here and find out for yourself). Also the cappuccino with oat milk was very tasty and woke me right up. Go!

The ice cream probably would have been really good but, unfortunately, they only take cash. I walked out extremely sad and wasted a perfectly good scoop of mint chocolate chip. I hope I can actually enjoy some of their ice cream one day.
Worst Chinese food ever!!! If I could,I'd give zero stars. I got food poisoning the 3rd time I came here. Awful place.
Must say, the staff there is pretty awesome. The aesthetics are very nice. And most importantly the coffee is great!
I love Charlie Browns since the first day I went there. Always on point with their prime rib!

This place is one of those hidden gem type restaurants. Be prepared, they do not, or did not, have air conditioning when we were there. For a country food eating hoss like me, I fit right in at this place. If you like real, country food, you'll love Glade Diner. Good service and prices.
My albondigas meat was raw. And also my moms menudo meat was raw. Do not go there. It is not worth it.

If I could leave a "0" or a negative score, I would. My packages are consistently late by 2 or more days. I wish major companies would use ANY other service than OnTrac. I think a 3 year old on a trike could deliver better on time.

The service is very fast and the staff on the drive thru windows are always polite. The only issue is the inability to not put ice in my drinks when requested, which is every single time. Otherwise the service is on point and the food is always great.
What kind of restaurant dyes corn chips to make them "blue corn chips"? If you're hurting for a meal that will turn your poop a radiant blue, look no further than Kite & Key's nachos.

Stopped in for lunch based on the yelp rating. Extremely disappointed. Food was overpriced and frankly no different than Mexican food you can get anywhere. The atmosphere was horrible - it was so noisy I couldn't hear my dining companion without her shouting. Basically rubbing elbows and banging chairs with the tables 2 feet away from us on all sides.
Love the brunch here Sunday morning. Too bad they have smoking section. 4 stars if the smoking would go away.

They got the hipster decor right, but food is terrible. Ordered some kind of special breakfast that sounded delicious. I got overcooked eggs (literally cooked through sunny side up) over raw vegetables in a puddle of water- for $13! There were other ingredients that were just left out of the dish. Don't waste your money.

Placed a gift order for my aunt on 12/15 and never arrived. When I called, there was no contrition on why it didn't ship, and there was no consideration given due to the fact that it didn't arrive before Christmas. I will never order from them again!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
One of the best customer service experiences in my life. Helpful, gracious and honest. Thank you, john!
food is pretty good if you stick with basics such as pulled pork, black eye peas, greens, grits and cornbread. Not too salty or greasy.

I'm new to the neighborhood. Went in to check it out. Wow! Trinette was a great bartender and the patrons were awesome. Very welcoming. A great place to get your first or last drink of the night. But you can stay in between too! Bar B Que shrimp? Amazing!

I love Chick-fil-A restaurants. They are awesome everywhere I go. Except this one. It's terrible. Slow service, long, long drive thru lanes that move slowly. Left there frustrated more than once and canceled my last order and went to Popeyes.

Terrible food here. I'm from New York and this place is a disgrace to Italian food. Also they include a tip when you swipe your card and it's difficult and annoying to remove it. Restaurants need to understand this, when people pick their food up they don't want to tip!! I definitely won't return.
It's basic. Expect no more. Toasted Bagel is really just warmed. Butter tastes like a blend, bummer. However, if you want an inexpensive, filling breakfast, this is the place.

Absolutely fantastic food! A Taste of Thai has been one of my favorite Thai restaurants since it opened. Pictured here is the spicy noodle. It is so yummy! Perfect crunch of peppers/onions with the delicious Thai seasonings. Friendly service and delicious food!

If you've never had hand drawn noodles, made fresh, check this place out, and you'll understand what all the hype is about. The soups are all that and so are the stir frys (or fries ;)... They are not mess'n around! :) :D

Delicious food. Had the pulled pork and fried okea. Line a was bit long, especially at 230 pm on a Sunday. Finding a seat was a little bit of a challenge. But that shows how good the food is. Highly recommend this place for bbq... but I would not come by if you're in a hurry. Would give 4.5 stars overall.

Went to the Mallory location after eating at the Westhaven location 3 nights in a row. The food was NOT edible. Westhaven: DELICIOUS EVERY TIME. Mallory location: mostly rotten avocados, scorched cheese dip out of microwave, and a steak taco that almost made me...___ up. Yuk.

Decent size portions, but the oxtails were not Jamaican style oxtails. They were soul food style, and not that tender. The service was prompt, and I really enjoyed the rice and cabbage. I would go back, but maybe for the jerk chicken or beef patties as other people have recommended.
Overpriced. I could of made better microwave food. I wasn't impressed and neither was My Husband. We were hoping it lived up to at least some of the hype but it just let us hanging.
One of the best quesadillas I have ever had-chicken and broccoli. Caesar salad with chicken was loaded. Great meal.

Very professional install, I searched online as well for ship direct closet systems with several companies including IKEA and working directly locally with closet trends was more cost effective and included install for less than I was paying to install myself. Would use them again.
Helpful staff, competitive prices, and a wide selection of ales & spirits. Just wish I didn't live so far away from it !

Bagels are ok. Prices eh. Wait is quite ridiculous. Ordered one bagel lightly toasted with cream cheese & waited over 20 minutes. And there was barely anyone in the place.. found out it was given to someone else instead. Service is definitely lacking

Unbelievably RUDE lifeguards!!!! Inexperienced kids who just blow the whistle all the time making family swim not enjoyable at all. Parking is a mess. Gym is overcrowded too. The facilities are top-notch.

This is a great stop for a cost-effective gourmet treat! My kids always get the not-so-hot-chocolate, and I love the toasted coconut. You can tell that they use quality ingredients. I look forward to trying new flavors!
Clean, healthy food with a great atmosphere! Able to eat indoors or on the nice patio outside, outline of park setting. Ordering to go on the app is super easy and efficient for pick up. We love it!

The wait wasn't too long and the service was great. Our appetizer of the pretzel and assorted cheese dips wa SO delicious, but everyone's entrees were underwhelming. I may return for a quick app before the next stop.

Ok geno's is just another cheesesteak place in the capital of Cheesesteaks.... If you want something that is decent and the lines are not long like the ones across the street at Pats. I will wait in the lines any day to get the cheesesteak from Pats over Geno's.

Nice restaurant! Family friendly. Great wait staff. Probably one of their more famous signature dishes is their guacamole. Their Sea Bass is very good with tasty risotto. While pricey, the food is fairly good. Not awesome but good! Great to try out if you are looking for guacamole!

I would have given them a better review, but I am in total shock that this is a house salad for 11.99. It reminds me of a store 711 deli salad.. Wawa have them beat for 5.99 I am so disappointed in Carrabbas please do better!

The restaurant itself is cute and has a hipster vibe to it. The food is a bit expensive for what you get.. literally about 4 dollars for one small taco. Very spicy and unique flavors. The service was fine, no big problems there. The food and prices here are not my favorite.
Food is so-so. Except the pizza is pretty good. It's the ONLY restaurant in the area. Service is not consistent. We find it's usually worth driving a little farther for better food and service.

This used to be one of my favorite spots, however, my last few experiences have not been up to par. The rooftop patio is sill great, but I am not a fan of several changes that have been made to the menu. Bring back the scallops, asparagus and quinoa!
This place does not disappoint me. Quality of the fish is top notch, and staffs are attentive and professional. I wish they serve hot sake as well. Get a liquor license already, will you?
Absolutely awful. Over a 40 minute wait for food. Sit down restaurants are faster. Close it down and open an efficient restaurant.

Very great place. I got gel acrylic nails and I love them. The salon is small but the women who work there are super sweet. One downside is that they don't accept card. That was the only thing that made my experience a 4/5 but other than that it was great! Definitely will be going back!

We love this theater but I want to write specifically about their youth classes. My son is having a very positive experience here and the level of instruction is higher than all of the other suburban offerings we have tried. They have a wonderful program!

Ordered flowers to be delivered for my best friend. Owner was incredibly nice and helpful. My best friend received her flowers in a very timely manner and she thought they were beautiful. Will definitely be using them again
Everything was SO good. Need to go back and try the fries ASAP!!!! The chicken was amazing, everything cooked fresh and the biscuits! Ugh take me back.

Super great burgers, hoagies and cheesesteaks and they have falafel which is awesome. The pizza used to be bad, but they changed it and it's very good now! Maybe that's why they got such bad ratings. Also, in the past their staff was pretty often not courteous.
the simpsons on a plasma and good beer on tap... what else does a bar need? ...oh, yea, how about tournament rps?

Was really excited to try Weber's. Was really disappointed. Felt major pressure to eat and get out fast. My sons burger was small and dry. My chicken was the same. Prices are high for what you get. Tony's next door is amazing. Skip Weber's and go there. Trust me.

Such a great place for pizza. We've done carry out twice. Both the thin crust and deep dish are great to go. The sausage in the deep dish is spread out like a hamburger patty; such a great presentation. Restaurant is great for hanging out, Sunday football, or a night out. Great spot in the restaurant go-to, Germantown. Ordering tonight again!!

This was very, very bad. Worse than Chuckie Cheese and CiCi's. I ordered two slices. It was very greasy, small, and microwaved and tasted cheap (I got through a slice and through the rest out). I usually love small family places, but I honestly was really shocked of the poor quality.

Stopped by here for lunch on a Wednesday afternoon and sat at the bar... The bartender was attentive enough to make it comfortable. The gumbo and jambalaya risotto were both delicious! It was also cool to see the oysters being shucked right there at the oyster bar. Overall, I was very pleasantly surprised.
All the food was very good. But the service was very bad. We waited 50 minutes to get the food. The chairs in the private dining room felt like you were going to fall through the bottom of them.
Had the ahi tacos on a Tuesday, threw up all night long until Wednesday... Would not recommend.
Great place , nice patio , cold beer and great friends met a new buddy casper will defiantly return

Great local spot in the Village. The owner, George, is very friendly and always present. Bagels, sandwiches and milkshakes are the fare- and they're fantastic. You may have to wait in a bit of a line, but trust me, it's worth it! PS: They cater, too.

Such a cute market/ spot to grab lunch. Food was delicious and they have a fantastic selection of meats and cheeses. I was able to walk next door and get a wine recommendation to pair with the meat and cheeses I purchased. Faire & Girard are so convenient with helpful staff.

We come here all the time but tonight I have to wonder why. Love the chopped salad. My drink had no liquor in it. I hate spending all that money for just a sweet drink. My filet had tenderizer all over it!! I'll be back because are family gave us gift cards.
Not enough staff. 2 registers open, felt like Black Friday shopping with not enough employees to check out. Line spread half way through the store to check out. No thank you.

We were the first to apply. They took 5 business days to get back to us just to let us know that the person who applied after us is the person they chose. Every time I called they were out of the office.
Fast friendly service on a busy holiday afternoon! Thank you Anna! She was able to find an economic option to add cable to our home.
Unfortunately if you go out the walnut side entrance, there will be people asking you for money and homeless people sleeping.
Below average foods food is completely tasteless very low quality product They cook burgers over cook There's chicken taste is not enough seasoned Why they are busy I don't get it
Ordered wings to be delivered. Received 1/3 of the wings . Was charged full price . Wings were okay . Nothing special.

The food and service can be good if the restaurant staff/chef/kitchen help pays attention. Sometimes, the desserts are not fresh as they seem to sit out for awhile. I keep visiting, though, and hope they will keep trying to improve.
The portions are large. The plate of fries are huge. Never eaten dinner here, usually come for cocktails and a snack.

I had high hopes for this place, but just wasn't up to par. I got the Tampiquena, for the price, the portion was very small. I gave this place 2 stars one for ambience and the other for good margaritas.

The retail part of the store is fine-- it's a Walgreens, it's the same as any other large Walgreens. The pharmacy is generally woefully understaffed, though, so give yourself a solid 30 minutes to pick up any prescription. The staff is nice and I feel badly for them. This is a management issue.

Not everyone is famous! A little annoying that is said every time someone walks in. The bbq was not fall off the bone and the sides were mediocre. The atmosphere was ok and the locations is good. All in all 3 stars and I'm not sure if go back.

My son and daughter in law had their wedding at Knowlton Mansion in December 2017. What a beautiful time of the year to get married at Knowlton Mansion. The staff was amazing as was the food. I highly recommend!
Food was below average. Tables were not exactly clean. Only one overworked waitress trying to cover the entire restaurant at lunch time.

Yesterday, Dropping off a Return for Amazon. The UPS worker was not wearing any protective face mask or using any precautions to protect customers needing to enter the store. This occurred at 11:45 am. Beware. UPS owner Take Corrective Action!

Great new addition to Spring Hill. Good food and excellent service! They really go out of their way. And fun... They set up a large table with about 20 or so saki bombs, then invited everyone interested to come do a shot together. Really recommend!

Comforting and Flavorful. Pizza is one of the few foods where I admittedly come off as a snob, but when the mood strikes for a comforting overabundance of cheese, Midway fits the ticket. The flavors on the Kingpin delivered, and the crust was a decent enough vehicle. The space was one of the most casual and enjoyable on Freret, and I'll definitely return.

If you are concerned about COVID-19, stay away. None of the employees were wearing masks. Tables are not spaced apart. My daughter found a hair in her roast. Fried chicken had no taste. This was once a family favorite, but we are never going back.

Extremely rude, extremely over priced, charged for an unfixed heater, would not recommend this company, really confused as to why right out of the gate they were extremely rude on the phone even the women answering there phones to make appointments.
We enjoyed another good dinner at Wine Bistro. Highlights included the beet salad and bass baked in parchment paper, OK was the meatloaf. Drinks were weak.

Large salads always fill me up. But I have to ask for extra dressing. Not an issue. There can be a line at times because this place is reasonably priced although it could be less. Typical wait has been 20 mins max for us.

I have been to Racks in other cities. The merchandise does not seem Nordstrom quality. The display is chaotic. The lines - at least in the Seattle downtown store-were long. In short, there are better options. The media hype in Indy was unbelieveable-especially on Channel 59-about the opening.
Okay service. ..very runny nachos, not much cheese...had enchiladas..cheese not melted. .didn't like Brown sauce and lukewarm at best. ..Won't be going back...
We wanted the love this place, as we waited for it to open. Food is good, but drinks were weak and over-priced. Wish I could give it better, as it is a nice addition to the neighborhood
The food was ok but the dessert was excellent. The server was extremely slow but glad to see a restaurant open and have staff during this pandemic.

I know its a Walmart and all, and I can't blame them for the clientele they have, but they could try to keep the store clean and organized. every time we are there I see stuff scattered all over the floors and the shelves in disarray.
The beer selection is great, but the bartender was unpleasant. He seemed more bored and aggravated than anything. The music definitely didn't set the mood. We left after our first drink.

Was looking forward to trying this place, I ordered a Italian hoagie for lunch Hoagie had Great flavor BUT what's that good of saying Where's the beef? Well it basically was lettuce tomatoes and onions with a side of 1 slice of cheese,ham and salami Add a little more meats and this place would be a 5 star

uhg unfortunately 6 months in the box spring broke and mattress has a huge sink hole in the middle...I should have paid the extra $100 or so to get a name brand mattress. Other than quality, the customer service and delivery were great.

We really enjoyed our lunch, seven of us and all our choices were good. Fried items were a bit on the chewy side. Save room for the bread pudding, the rum sauce is fantastic. Our waitress was a jewel.
I will no longer come here until this issue is rectified. Spread management owes its employees more than $186,000 in unpaid overtime fees. PAY YOUR EMPLOYEES FAIRLY YOU SCOUNDRELS

Most trusted car shop I ever found. They provide excellent service with affordable cost. I live in city but I still manage to bring my car to this shop for any required service. They are always honest to you and don't change parts on your car if it's not really needed. I highly recommend this place.

Way to put up a big ole billboard right in front of my house where you DON'T deliver! I'm in-between Cloverdale and Five Mile which is like a 0.25 mile dead zone for you guys right between your Milwaukee and Eagle Rd stores. Just extend it by that much. Please. I'm frickin hangry.
absolutely the best in Tucson. Gorgeous out door setting, fabulous drinks and apps! than you!!

One thing I really like about this place is that it's a drive thru. Since I live so close, we do takeout a lot. Their pastas are good portions and their pizzas are okay. I love their cheesesteak egg rolls!!!!! It's so lo delicious and crispy. We always order cheesesteak egg rolls with whatever we decide to get here!

I have gave these guys so many chances, finally willing to call it quits. Even though their pizza can be quite good, have gotten a pie on numerous occasions that is falling apart from the dough being so flimsy and uncooked that the pizza is inedible.
Good food at a decent price. Got mine to go and found the service very fast. Tried the pad Thai twice there now and has been consistent and honestly the best pad Thai I have had in Edmonton

it's byob! We didn't even order much but It comes with so many sides. Nice ambiance , friendly staff. 100% would recommend and go back. Food was really good, tasted fresh. I have had better but this feels like the perfect home cooked meal.

My wife and I went there for the first time tonight. Very nice place and the food was outstanding. She had the eggplant dish and fried rice while I had Mongolian beef and hot and sour soup. I have to say that was the best hot and sour soup I have ever had! The Mongolian beef was tender and flavorful.

I've tried this place because it's close to my parking garage. Every time I go they are too busy for a mani/pedi even though the place is empty. Today I made an appointment. After arriving and being ignored for 20 minutes I left and went to another place I've always had good experiences at. I won't bother trying Hera again.

PVMG has been open for 2-3 days. This rating will be updated when I have tried it several more times. First impressions were excellent. Service was super-friendly. Menu is broad and many items look delicious. The food the four of us at our table had was all excellent. The salsa isn't our favorite. The price was reasonable. Looking forward to this becoming our go-to.

I've been on a biryani kick so I decided to try this place. It's not bad bud it should have been better as biryani is in the name. If you want to give your taste buds a real treat drive out to the new biryani city and I promise you will send me a thank you note.
this is by far one of the best restaurants in jersey. they have the best carrot cake, their salads are amazing, and the food is mindblowing.

Terrible....and inhumane.... would not give pain pills for kidney stones. Instead told to take AZO which is for UTI and Ibuprofen. Also, advised to see Urologist to get pain meds. Also, my husband's blood sugar was 438.....no cause for concern? They sent him home. Awful.
food? Delicious. I don't normally review restaurants, but the service faux pas of the service staff was offensively bad. I'm no stranger to bad service (I mean, who is), but this was egregious.
Very enjoyable to be out on the water. Got to know Tampa Bay from a different perspective. Interesting stories along the way, and the price was reasonable.

This place was not we we expected unfortunately. All the meats we tried were so over salted we wouldn't even finish our food . What gave it the three stars was the salad bar and drinks as well as the customer service .

The good: Nice atmosphere, decent color selection, free drinks to feel pampered The not so good: price!! $50 for a refill???!!! And it chipped within hours after I left!!! I asked for a French ombré and was told they couldn't do it. Guess only the basics here!! I probably won't go back considering all the other local options

My son and I stopped in for lunch today - trying something new - and we were not disappointed! He had the lunch special: 2 cheese slices and a fountain drink; I had the meatball parm sub and a drink...food was delicious! Great portions and great flavor! We will definitely be back and bring my wife to try out this local gem!

Service was really fast....our waiter was very welcoming and good at suggesting plates that we would love. I had the bacon and cheddar crepe with a side of biscuits and gravy, delicious! The menu is very simple and the details on the items are listed.

Bad service, carne asada tacos were cold and flavorless. We have been here several times and I always want to try again because it is close to our house but it always disappoints. It just feels like no one in this restaurant cares about the customers or the quality of food.

Just called to inquire about installing a GPS unit on a motorcycle. After explaining my need, salesperson asked if I could stop in. I asked for address and he told me to "Google it". Sorry, if you can't take 5 seconds to give me an address, you can Google this!
Friendly and clean - located in a strip shopping center. Food quality good. Service is sloooow...

I do not like having to bribe DJ's to not wait an hour to go to the mike. The bartenders could not keep track of tabs and they seemed very disoriented. If you are looking for a true Karaoke bar, its not terrible. But for anything else, there is far better options available.
Up over by where the St. Charles streetcar turns Uptown. Great beer selection, good food, lots of TV for games. Coupla doors down from Uptown Tattoo, funny how I end up there after Cooter Brown's.

This place is horrible, had to send steak salad back as asked for med and it was barely cooked. Wife had chicken salad ate a couple pieces and sent it back and they only refunded 4$ what a joke! Stay away from this smelly hotel and dinner !

430 in the morning. Shuttle buses have been running since 330. And economy has ONE bus running. Waited almost 20 minutes. Which means that we were full by the second stop (402). Ridiculous. Bad show BNA. This puts everyone late going through security. They couldn't pick anyone else up. Had to exit the lot without any pick ups at 403 or any other stop.
great to exercise, relax, collect your thoughts, bring the family, playing, walking the dog, all of that.
AHHHHHHHHMMMMAAAAZZIIIIINNGGG! The food is ridiculous good Super burrito is my favorite thing Management owners staff are awesome
Quality of food is bad, fries overcooked and hard to eat my jaw hurts from chewing them. Burger bun dry and meat lukewarm.

My sister and I went they said 5 min and they weren't packed and they left sharp edges on nails. Was the worst pedicure ever they don't know how to massage. My sister was waiting over an hour. They are unfriendly and they price gouged us. Not to mention they lied about wait time
Features TONS of powder dip colors. The powder dip lasts longer on my nails and doesn't make them as brittle as the gel. All the employees are really nice and do a great job.
I've only been here a handful of times. I've always used their online shopping. I've never had any problems with it.
David was hilarious. The experience was great. Ask for the head chef lol. Super fun. Highly recommend

HA!!! I didn't even realize this place was an Ethiopian joint. When I walked in with friends, it was nothing but a bar, and a good dive bar at that. It was Kareoke night, and the DJ was a tad painful, but the drinks were cheap and the dive was just divey enough.
Good food but bad service. And that is what makes or breaks a business. Won't be back.

4071 UNION ROAD SAINT LOUIS, MO 63129 (314) 892-4336 is like a monkey screwing a football... Toni (the shift manager) comes up to me after 15 minutes waiting for my order only to tell me THEY ARE OUT OF F'N CHICKEN!!!

Terrific downtown place on the water with plenty of outdoor seating and bar. Coconut shrimp very attractive and tasty. The lobster roll was mediocre, the shrimp scampi had a different flavor but was well prepared grab some little oil. The pastrami hamburger was tasty.

This place is slow and not worth the wait. Over 20 min, the line did not move and myself and at least 5 other people in line all walked away. I went to sno-la, literally across town. I waited the less time with a line out the door and down the street for a far superior snowball.

Two stars for the service, since our server was attentive. The food was meh and left much to be desired. Our appetizers and entrees were bland, so didn't enjoy dinner very much. Wanted to really like this place based on reviews, but won't be coming back.

Staff don't seem to care. Rude and chat it up all day to their buddies while people wait on line. Manager needs to raise standards or let the lazy ones go. Cooks are good. Register and drive through staff are not.

Take First Watch leftovers, reheat them, remove anything that doesn't resemble eggs, sausage, bacon, and waffles, add a diner atmosphere, and you have Waffle House. Competent breakfast food. If you can cook eggs, and have Eggo waffles at home, you can save time and money by staying home. Service is quick, but who isn't when making simple cafeteria style food?

ive had hurricanes before and got turned off by them due to the absurdity thats in them, but this place changed my mindset. The piano bar is such a great theme. I had The Pirate whiskey drink. definately keeps the feel of one of the oldest bars ive ever been to

This place doesn't have much to offer considering all the other places to go in town. The food is OK, but rather expensive for some reason. We ended up spending $35 for two people. When we asked for the check the waitress slammed it down, hard, on the table and left without a "thank you" or anything.
Mediocre food at a high price. Cheap bacon, super greasy bread & cold fries. I was not impressed with Americana Cafe. I don't think we will be back.

Not what it used to be. The lunch buffet is overpriced and the selection is very limited. The chicken tikka masala is low quality and the other stuff is just average indian cuisine. The service is a bit subpar as they want to fill your drinks too quickly
This place was amazing! I wasnt sure what I was getting myself into at first but the food was off the charts. Will defiantly be coming back soon!

The most horrible dining experience I ever had!!! I always go to Roys in Orlando and I had a dinner party for my sister and I found a piece of plastic in my food!!! The service was was 1 star and they made me pay for my food that I didn't even eat!!! Don't go here! Waste of your time and money!!!

It's a total dirt hole. The entire restaurant when I was there was nasty. The food was gross. The staff was terrible and had no clue in how to do their jobs. Don't go to this place ever !!! It's dirty , it's nasty and you'll just waste your money.
The place smelled dank and musty. AC barely working. Ate breakfast. Eggs were overcooked. Service marginal. Here for the week and was really looking for my breakfast place. It isn't here.

Tourist trap. The line is too long and the food is not worth the wait. The oysters weren't bad but the entrees were tasteless, potato salad was horrible. Best thing there was the cole slaw. Skip the tourist trap and try Deanie's or Oceana. Both have better selection and way more decent desserts. Trust me.

Beautiful location, but shady staff... Right on the water so it can be very relaxing during the week. Weekends? That's another story all together! Be careful with your bill and be sure to destroy your copy of the bill. We were there last week and there was a $42 tip added to a $30 tab. Not cool at all!!
This is my favorite stop for NY pizza and wings. We normally get delivery and it comes fast and fresh.

Apparently, this gym doesn't want you to work on programs such as p90x. They will want to pay the trainers and do very similar exercises. They recently posted a sign in the gym saying no p90x. If you cant do a workout program in the gym, where else would you go. Avoid this place at all cost.

Ordered ubereats, got the Cobb, was a very dismal salad for $16!! There's like 2 pieces of chicken prob less than 1/8 a lb of meat in there, the bacon is precooked bacon bits you'd find at a sizzler salad bar. It didnt include a dressing, not sure if that's their fault or Uber eats. 2/10 would not eat again

This is the worst credit union there is. You are better using a loan shark. THREE times I tried to close my account and reps. told me they would send me papers .A group of very mentally challenged people trying to run a business. In Stay away!

Thjs place has great coffee, best I've had at a diner (and I'm a coffee snob). Our food came out fast and was good, pancakes and French toast. The only bad thing was the server never checked on us again after we got our food. The food is a little overpriced. The natural light and cleanliness of the place was great! I'd go back!

Where do I even begin? The milkshakes are pretty, but they taste like clumpy cream. The bathroom was filthy, the tables were filthy, EVERYTHING WAS FILTHY. Not to mention the staff was rude. The only good things were the toppings. Don't waste your time

Officially my forever salon! Dolcie is THE first person to ever cut and style my hair exactly how it's supposed to look! She's amazing! Her staff is amazing! I will for sure be back for more services!
What a fun place to try. Loved the food! The service was great! The price was ridiculous! I would love to go back, but even with a coupon, it was way more expensive than the experience was worth.
Great calming yoga studio I go to Monday at 5 class which is a great way to get ground for the week

Great place to see great bands. They are nice and there are two bars. One downstairs and one upstairs by the balcony seating. They balcony seating is awesome because you can see everything and the acoustics are great. I've seen rock, edm, rap, and indie shows there. I would give them 5 stars but the sound guy could be a bit better.
Best Bakery in Nashville. Everything was so good and fresh. The staff was friendly and professional.
The price and amount of food you get this is a great place. Service was great friendly waitress and nice environment. We will come again.
Vibe is super cool! Nice place to take family and friends. But the food sucks!! Lol like all of them! I've tried pretty much everything there at this point and I am not impressed!

Tres bon! Party of 7 at dinner rush during parades the week before MG, seated immediately with no reservation. Impeccable service, perfectly paced. BBQ shrimp, brisket, filet mignon, pan seared drum, bread pudding, cheesecake, pecan pie -- all cooked to perfection. That filet. Wow. Second oldest restaurant in New Orleans? Go. Now.

Very nice park with many different walking trails you can take. There is a boardwalk with a lookout tower. I wish it had more signage directing to the trails and parking areas. My first time here I had to drove around the whole park to get oriented and then go back in and park and randomly lck a spot to start my walk.

Good place to sit and have a few drinks before taking a ride on the Algiers Ferry to the French Quarter. It's not the best food but its better than average. Considering the relatively low prices and the location its a real gem.

Love their 50% sushi menu. The hibachi noodles are also delicious here. It's BYOB which is a plus. This place is huge, so there's never a wait. We've never done their hibachi... but the sushi is the best in the area.
Local bookstore stacked to the ceiling with amazing books. Celebrating all things local with a flair for great authors.

went tonight they are closed down ? we were jsut there 3 nights ago for dinner and sunday for a burger .. never mentioned that they were closing up but they are out of business.. been nice if they told us before we drover 16 miles to get there tonight .. thanks frank
Clean, cute and comfortable. The food was appealing and delicious. The freshness was so apparent. Just what we were looking for!

We had delivery today. We ordered the combination dinner for 2... I have never had Chinese food so bland. Just terrible. We both had one bite each of the items and I threw the rest in the garbage where it belongs. So disappointed and still hungry.

The Gumbo at the one by the race track will make you cry ..it's that GOOD!! one of the freshest, best Gumbo's in the city w a half oyster Poboy on the side... + Ice cold Dixie in a frosted glass... Love this restuarant..sit at the bar for a great staff and lots of laughs... XoXo

Decided to give it a second chance.... kind of sorry we did. The $16 burger was yummy. Haven't seen our waitress since we got here other than to take our order. The cook brought our food out.... after dropping the people next to us order on the floor! Hello!! Need our check!!!! Where are you???? Anybody here???

Stopped by for a tray full of meats and tasty drinks. Was not disappointed. The server was kind and thoughtful. The biscuits were soft and buttery. But the real winner was the pork belly. I still think about it.

Everything still broke. Worse place to live. Gate just wouldn't open again....still no laundry cards available...last time I used one of their complimentary kayaks it had a hole in it (Bet it's still not fixed lol)...and nothing is new. Smh....

I orderd from this restaurant because my co-workers told me they love it. The food is okay but I would not order again. The potato salad is very salty and the trout is underseasoned. Very disappinted.

Love their chicken plates. Service is usually quick - They are often busy. I've been a customer for a few years and eat here at least weekly. Great chicken flavor due to their open grill cooking. Seems family run, so casual atmosphere. Can eat in or take away.

OMG they are ridiculously SLOW!! Where is management to oversee the inefficiency and speed of service here?? They do a good job of washing your car but nobody needs to wait 45 minutes when there are 2 cars being washed. NEED NEW MANAGEMENT ASAP.

Ordered 2 steaks medium well and they came back well. The service is slow. The waitress hardly ever came back we had to find her to fix our steaks. She forgot my salad. We finally got our steaks fixed, but when it came to pay they mixed up our receipts too. Food was ok. I won't be coming back

pizza was pretty burnt but ok in taste. definitely not worth $13 for a personal size. we also were not offered any drinks other than water and alcohol so I assume they don't have soft drinks of any kind. won't be back.
It's Cold Stone. What's not to love? I mean really? The ice cream and toppings are good and the place is always clean. It's a little pricey but it makes a great treat.

We heard Guy Fieri had been here a while ago. We got acheesbuger, chicken salad and a Reuben. All of the selections were amazing. The place is not much to look at but this truly is a hidden gem. Can't wait to make it back there! Come on, you really need to get there.
The Walmart is disgusting, it smells bad, it's run down and the staff are not friendly and unsure of what they are doing
it's a novelty, but with overpriced drinks, and it can get very loud after a while. I couldn't hear myself think on the other side of the hotel lobby, for it was so loud, a couple of times
左边是宫保鸡丁，右边是京酱肉丝。分量很足。味道还可以。但是宫保鸡丁竟然是甜的，味道和京酱肉丝差不多。一道菜十二三刀左右，素菜和荤菜价格差不多。服务员很nice。貌似是可以免费续杯可乐？但是我们喝不下了哈哈。

The food here was pretty good but the older lady who was working was pretty rude when I first came in because I was asking questions about what they had there since I had never been before. After I got done dealing with her it wasn't so bad. Didn't like having to buy refills either but that's just personal preference.

Been going to Buenos for years! Service is always great and the food spot on. My go to is the Caesar Salad with the Del Mar Salmon added. Great neighborhood restaurant and the owner are active community members. Love supporting a local restaurants with good food and even better owners.

The clothes I like though often imitated by competion (ala Hollister). ... I do like the look & feel of the store (also copied by Hollister). I will copy it at my next house myself (brown ceiling, black walls, battleship gray floor). ... I keep coming back though & sometimes buy something. Oh yah, the cologne is actually top notch!
One of the best curries I've had! I didn't realize that rice doesn't come with the curry so make sure to order it if you want it. I look forward to coming back.
Been here twice, several months apart. Underwhelmed both times. Sure, the Bang Bang Shrimp is good. That's about it. Spend your hard earned money somewhere else.
This place has the best pulled pork we've tried since visiting Nashville. Drinks are $6 which is awesome! The only knock could have been a larger portion. All in all awesome meal!

Peculiar place with a peculiar smell and lots of peculiar stores. I once purchased a sage stick that literally burned through like a cigarette and singed my window sill. Fascinating location, fascinating workers, fascinating time. Certainly the place to visit if you wish to bargain and people watch.

I love Hardee's, much higher quality food than McDonalds and any other fast food type of place. I have dined here several times, most recently before game 6 of the 2011 World Series. The service was quick, food was good. I would return again.
Honestly, I had a coupon for a free pizza which is what led my try it and I was pleasantly surprised. It's pretty good as far as fast food thin crust pizzas go...
Really not what I'd call BBQ.. brisket tasted like beef jerky. Potatoe salad was pretty bad. The fried corn was good. Very long line to order food, felt like a waste of time.

What outstanding food! As the saying goes, you get what you pay for, so brace yourself for a little sticker shock. But if you're in the spending mood, rarely will your pallet be so pleased. The service is good, and the space eschews the stuffy atmosphere often found at other fancy Italian joints (I'm looking at you, Tony's).
We have a team meeting is at prep and pastry the service is wonderful and the price is great please suggest if anybody wants to have a team meeting or get together for breakfast this is the place

Getting a little petty on the coupons they send out in the mail (one per table, not one per check), charging for extra butter and dipping sauce on a $30 steak that they don't even cook is more than a little ridiculous.

This place is more of a converted office lounge and real lounge. It feels like you've slipped into some old movie with after hours corporate slaves who have finally decided to let loose and get weird. Kinda a weird vibe overall. The drinks were ok but I felt super weird being here

If you like living with tons of roaches and frequent power outages then this is the place for you! Rude, nonexistent management. They talk a good talk until you sign the lease. Seriously, look to rent elsewhere.
An amazing small, local diner. Fantastic bloody mary. The staff was fun and friendly. Highly recommend.
Went for Mother's Day lunch/brunch. Although the LUNCH menu you see online featured two breakfast specials, we were disappointed to see that is was a DINNER menu at 11:15 AM. REALLY! Rip off alert

The atmosphere is nice and the hookah is nice, but if you are going to charge 17 dollars for a plate it would be nice to at least have the illusion of fresh food. The eggplant was covered in a layer of oil and tasted days old. pita is fresh and hummus is good but very disappointed by the food
It was fast service. Sesame chicken was over cooked though. Overall, prices are affordable.
