One of my favorite restaurants in mid city. The fish is as fresh as it gets and the staff is very helpful.

Sunday night, not busy. Waited 10 minutes to be sat. After being sat we were ignored for another 20 minutes until the point we had to get up and tell the hostess we were leaving. They did not even care to accommodate us after we were upset. We will not be returning.
Best Chilaquiles I ever had. Definitely home made red Chile sauce on it. It looked fast foodish to me at first but don't let that dissuade you.

We stopped by for a quick lunch while we were in Philly. There was no wait time which was amazing! The inside was SO AESTHETIC and peaceful. Everything was served in disposable plates/bowls due to COVID. Overall, the food was pretty okay but honestly nothing too special! The pork buns were kinda sad though :(

I would give five stars to their tortilla soup alone, but my husband was pretty unimpressed with his assortment plate. But the tortilla soup....I dream about it. It's ridiculously good - buttery avocados and a rich, gorgeous broth.......YES.

Just went to Pollo tropical on North Dale mabry received the worst food ever the plantains was dark as night as if sat in a food warmer all day. My food was cold.and when I call to let them know about my service they never picked up the phone I'll let it ring for a good 20 minutes. Never will go back.

It's Starbucks so what are you really expecting? It's the customer service that makes the difference at each individual location. What I really like about this location being next to a Dutch Brothers it's typically pretty easy to get in-and-out of quickly. And you don't have to listen to the music blaring & a conversation about nothing when all you want is COFFEE.

Very friendly staff; you can only order from the side window right now due to Covid. We ordered about 6 drinks, but none of us really liked any of them (might be just preference). But it's a bit overpriced and definitely has a strong tea taste, if you're into that! Tapioca bubbles don't really have much flavor.
The good part other than the diet coke? The servers, bus kids, hostess etc were all very pleasant.
Pretty fresh fish for Reno. Portions of toppings are a little off, but won't stop me from coming back. Staff was friendly and the service is quick and clean!
I wanted to like Wild Eggs but it just didn't do it for me. There are so many other brunch spots to check out first. A good option to have but would be second option for me.
Loved the concretes. So many choices!!!! Worth the drive from Ohio and then the wait in line......even in the rain!
Came here with a friend to study on a nice Saturday..! The environment was so nice and I have to say I am a huge fan! :)) the milk for the coffee A++!!
Had a shrimp po boy. Gave me stale shrimp n soggy bread. =( Had better po boys before

Good bagels and cream cheese but bagels were SUPER TINY! I live on the East Coast where the bagels are amazing and huge, so I think I may just be spoiled. Coffee was good! Not hipster, which I loved! The prices were also fair.

Stopped by the Chart House while visiting the Tall Ships. My friend ordered the Paneed Chicken. It was worst than a Swanson Frozen Dinner! A Sprite was ordered and the waitress brought a water! She was not attentive and took our orders on the run! Terrible food & service. We will never go back!! Will spend our hard earned money at a different restaurant.
$5.00 cheesesteak on Wednesday. Excellent. Potstickers are the best. Staff is friendly and professional
one of those family kid friendly places -- almost a prerequisite. commercialized dishes, nothing extraordinary. cool interior, liked the antiques.
My favorite Chinese food in Mount Juliet! The sesame chicken is out of this world! Restaurant is always clean and staff is always friendly. Highly recommend this place!
Where is this place ? Apparently no longer on belcher road address on yelp Please update address

so much food!!! yelp steered us to this restaurant as our last meal in NOLA and boy were we not disappointed. the fried pickles, fried alligator, boiled seafood, fresh oysters all tasted great! definitely would recommend to anyone looking for a solid seafood place around the area or on the way to the airport.

Loved all about it. My kids loooooved crape, they didn't want me to taste it... get your own mama! My crab Benedict was great, my husband ordered quiche, we loved them all. Outside seatings have a lot to look at, loved the vibe. Coming back for sure.
Entrees are generally too small. Pai Thai tastes too sweet, and Yakiudon did not have flavor at all. Not satisfied.
Bar Harbor bake,Ultimate Feast,Fire grilled lobster ,shrimp and Salmon those are the food you guys need to try..service is good.....

I had a coupon for two free tacos and they were strange though tasty. The onion rings are quite crispy and made with real onions. The bacon cheddar potato wedges were piping hot and the addition of taco sauce made them even better.

The first disappointing meal and experience we have had here. They personnel are fantastic but they shrunk their portions, my wife's black spaghetti dinner was smaller than usual and doused with too much sauce and my carbonara was way too salty.

Bad service. Owner did not care that we waited over 40 minutes (from time of order) for 2 breakfast items and then we were told it would be at least 20-25 minutes more. Not worth it. We left. Avoid this place.

This place is a good place to sit down, relax, and drink wine with a nice outdoor patio. Their burgers are good, but can be a little soggy because they are sooo juicy. My fav burger is the mushroom one. They have amazing fries here as well. The albacore salad is my fav.

This place is absolutely terrible. The old ass gypsy woman who "shaped" my eyebrows, in actuality waxed them nearly completely off and I've been praying for them to grow back for over a year now. Don't go here if you have any respect for yourself.
Food was great. Really loved the potatoes and tomato jam. Looking forward to going back.
Food is really good but the manager at this location is kind of rude. He takes his authority way too seriously. This is Santa Barbara, dude, you need to chill.
Their pizza is the perfect crust thickness and consistency. Try the buffalo chicken pizza!! Seriously the best pizza I've ever had.

Just recently ordered a second pizza from Tino's and it was just as good as the first. The tomato sauce and crust are perfect. Who would have thought you can find consistently good pizza in the desert southwest? Definite a really nice find.
The food is delicious and the price can't be beat! The crab rangoon is the best I've ever had.
This place is amazing!!! We had a blast. The beyond all boundaries movie is definitely worth the extra money.
Great burgers! Everything tastes fresh, cooked well, and full of flavor. A great change for a local burgrer
Wonderful view of the ocean, nice service. Good proximity to downtown and butterfly beach. Our room was strictly okay.

Went to bobs on 19 today I can say their sales person didn't seem like he was even interested in helping us. I will not be going back. They seriously think about customer service training. I hope we didn't inconvience him to much today.
Very good Gulf fish special though a bit rich and salty from the crab. Disappointed with the BBQ oysters- no oyster flavor. Would recommend. Very good service.
I agree with the previous poster. Nice little motel. New owners that go above and beyond to make your stay great. Free wifi. Would stay here again.

Porto is a Portuguese / Polish / American brunch spot. It's BYOB too. It's a newcomer to the Philly brunch scene but it is killing it right now. Must tries: - Yo Cuz: Fried chicken sandwich in a waffle - Polish breakfast: eggs, pierogies, kielbasa - Smores French toast They bring you 4 hot sauces for your food too. Definitely a must try place.

spent a few days in st. pete's with my daughter at an air bnb... trip's was close enough for us to walk to from our house and it was well worth it! nothing fancy but the food was bangin! servers were awesome and very reasonable!

Tire still has the same nail in it. The low pressure tire light went back on after a day and the same nail I knew was in the rear left tire is still there!? I won't be goog back to this location anymore. Dobbs lost a customer in Highridge, MO. Very unhappy.

Cool/ trippy atmosphere. Aside from all the other reviews I think this place is cool. The owner is really nice. I was a little skeptical with the location on Haley but it ended up being a fun and cool atmosphere to casually hang out with friends!

Second trip not as good as the first try. Won't try third. Couldn't eat the personal lasagna and they forgot to give the salad for a pick up. Sausage, pepper and onion sandwich did not have any sauce on it. The people are very nice but food wasn't worth $40.00

Staying at the Hyatt in which this restaurant is apart of its grounds? The food is okay but they are not accommodating... had two kids and there were many open tables, the hostess just was adamant she could not accommodate us.... never again for us.

Bagels should be boiled so that they are chewy on the inside. Thankfully, this is how they are prepared here. All varieties are excellent! Make sure to have a breakfast sandwich,when you pick up bagels.

They don't even deserve a one, waiting for tv delivery, 12-4,at 5:00 no delivery. I have been on hold for over two hours and no one answered the phone. I have been disconnected two times. Very frustrating

The grounds are not flower-laden, but focused on native plants. So, there isn't a great diversity of vegetation. The site has plenty of well maintained trails and it's really nice to walk along the creek in the grove of shady trees. The Mission Dam and remains of a little aqueduct used to supply the Santa Barbara Mission miles down the mountainside is a highlight.

There was a bug in my drink (a scotch on the rocks) and when I sent back the drink they returned the same glass to me. There were little bugs everywhere flying around this place and it's a shame. The food was substandard, overpriced and the service was unforgettably awful.

We went for dinner late Sunday evening. The service was good,but we thought the food was mediocre. The corn muffins were too sweet. The brisket was slightly dry and had little flavor. The barbecue sauce was also not very flavorful. Overall we were disappointed.

Food was so sub par. Only thing good about it was the view. We had limited options because of COVID but honestly I'd rather spend my money elsewhere next Time. We ordered the mussels, shrimp cocktail, oysters, swordfish and fish and chips. The only thing worth getting again was gosh and chips but that's standard and you know what you're going to get.

The food was ok but I could not overcome the horrendous odor coming from near the soda machine. It smelled as if something sweet had been there for a while and spoiled. They also had a storage room door open and I noticed some food product that was on the floor. I hope that's not how most of their product is stored.
Sushi and appetizers are pretty good, can't go wrong with the AYCE, kids meal also great value.

Wasn't impressed by the crazy long lines and only 1 person working, took absolutely forever and was definitely not worth it. The food was terrible and so was the coffee. Definitely wouldn't recommend this place to anyone.
Been here twice- good menu, great service-good sanitation practices. Great outdoor deck on the canal.
For some reason my wife order the chicken tacos platter. It came out with ice crystals still in the rice
Pretty nice place, pizza and stromboli are soooo good, probably one of the best in the area. Prices are very reasonable and owner is super friendly. Will go there again!
I originally rented from tampa airport which sucked but returned in miami fl. they were so nice and helpful asked how was the car any problem asked about my trip and were so courteous

Made reservation several weeks out. Saratoga then moved back our reservation due to a scheduling overlook, then all together cancelled day of because of another scheduling conflict, at least that's what they told us, poor management!
Great food! Great variety of items and all the items seemed fresh. Will definitely be back!

My friends and i go here to hang out all the time. Drinks and burgers. and amazing sweet potato fries. I love their veggie burger, I get it almost every time I go there, so I highly recommend it. They also have a lot of space which means that its good for big groups.

I used to love this place. First time back in a while, and it's really gone downhill. Rainbow roll was TONS of rice, and tiny bit of crab inside, and non-fresh fish/shrimp on top. Bad color and no flavor--not fresh at all. And tons of rice. for $12? No thanks. This was my final time there. Sorry

Such a cute place! I could spend hours sipping coffee or tea here. The couple things we ordered were yummy and the staff were very nice. They have everything your sweet tooth desires plus amazing looking cakes. If you are ever in the area,I highly suggest stopping in.

This place used to be great! It's a shame just how downhill it's gone. Disgusting bathrooms on Sunday afternoon when there are literally 2 other tables in in place is unacceptable! Especially when your lunch is 100$. Our mussels where extremely over cooked and our server seemed very uneducated on the menu. Anyone who thinks this is fabulous food is obviously not a foodie!!
Stopped by on a whim, just had drinks, but service was great, especially for a busy Saturday, and the drinks were great!
Service was great. The bushwhacked were good but not as smooth as other places. But hey, the serve Yuengling beer which is a great thing!
They have the best icecream in town, I like the salted caramel, pistachio and huckleberry as my favorites. It would be 5 stars but unfortunately not everyone behind the counter is wearing masks.

Their food used to be great but i don't know what happened. I Went and got potato greens, it was sooo disgusting! Tasted like frozen spinach with water. And to add to that the food was spoiled so I just had to throw it away. This used to be my fave African spot but now I will not be returning.
Took my car in for a check engine light. Couldn't get an appointment for two days. Then after almost five hours and almost $400, the check engine light was still. Can't recommend this one.
Nice local spot! Trendy vibe beards and hipsters welcome! Great food out back!!

Have always been treated courteously and promptly with offers to help me as a beginner to make the most of my collection! Brett is a great Experienced and knowledgeable collector and eager to help! Thumbs up!!!

Fantastic dining experience! Service was attentive, ambiance intimate and cozy. The 6 course meal was satisfying from small beginning bites through main entrees. They accommodated my pescatarian request by changing meat to fish (also, BYOB!!) Highly recommended
I wanted to like this place as it looks cool on the outside but the drinks are terrible and food is sub par. It's another typical Edmonton pub nothing special...

I was pleasantly surprised how good the pizza is. This was a quick stop for a slice after dancing and cocktails in the French Quarter. Share a table with a stranger and maybe you'll hear a good story or get a recommendation for a local fav.

This souvenir shop is a way better compared to other souvenir stores on the same street because it had a lot more items such as legit masks and tee shirts, shot glasses, a plethora of ingredients for cooking, and many other typical souvenir items. I'm just saying out of all the shops, Gumbo File is more established and most importantly, CLEAN!!!
If you like entitled, drunk hipsters who would rather die than be polite to someone unlike them - this is the spot for you. Awful !!!

One of the better spots in Philadelphia. Starr continues to class up Philadelphia. The ravioli is better than most of the Italian spots and the duck, foie gras for dessert was delicious as well. 100% need to try.

Guilty pleasure, gulab jamun. I go here for the lunch buffet every now and again. It's indian buffet, which I'm pretty sure is previous night's dinner buffet reheated. Nonetheless, I go for a quick buffet and a few (or more) gulab jamuns. It's definitely not good indian food, but it's convenient.

Great atmosphere! Added ourself to the waitlist on the app and checked in. Great drink list, food menu, and service. We got the house salad, French dip soup, and Rueben. SOOO good. Would come back sooner than later!

It isn't a bed and breakfast. It isn't a hotel. It's a worthless place to stay. Couldn't get the television to work though it was hooked up to cable. No one around to ask. There is a dead bolt on the door which is the only way to close the door. The only reason I stayed here was someone paid for it.

Service and ambiance is great, chargrilled oysters were great. The rest of our meals was mediocre and lacked flavor, definitely overpriced for the quality of food we had. We will not visit this one again.
Definitely underwhelming. Slow service. Food was very meh. Two stars are for the location and ambience.

The pizza was awesome. Very cheesy and good. We had a supreme pizza, and it was quite tasty. The 4 of us devoured a 14" pizza for lunch. We had a good time with the juke box and it is a very kid friendly place, which my son enjoyed. We will definitely be back!

Checked ed on yelp got a free $10 appetizer !! Wohoo then I got the peel and eat shrimp. Place was packed so we all sat at the bar and the service behind the bar was the best. The guys were awesome shucking the oysters so friendly ! Peel and eat shrimp was pretty good too.
I am always up for a good mongolian grill. The service is great and the available ingredients promising, they just need to do better job with the grilling itself.

The food was ok, our server was awesome as well. When you present your yelp coupon for a free glass of wine they will tell you it's not valid lol, just a heads up if you try getting a free glass of wine.
It literally smells like dead corpses in there. I walked in and I kid you not there were 3 hobos. One was sitting on the floor.
Got the Crab Cake Dinner. It was ok not the greatest. Probably would get something else if here again.

This place is really shoe-horned into its location, wish it were in a better spot, would go more often. Fun attention to detail, such as straw wrappers that say "open in case of thirst." Dining room temperature was too chilly. Food a tad on the pricey side for the portion sizes , but definitely delicious. Would prefer self serve beverages. Cute kid meal toys.

Met a girlfriend here and took home lots of goodies. The blueberry pound she should be rationed. Took home a spinach-mushroom quiche. We got breakfast sandwiches and they had lots of social distanced tables. 4-stars...the yogurt shop next door left tables messy sticky and staff came out and cleaned tables after we asked. Dog friendly

Nice place to open up a real bar... Poor service and food is terrible, the only thing that comes out well is the beer (most of the time). I go because my son loves it but it's like an expensive McDonalds with TVs.
I love this salon because they have OPI colors and other places do not. Usually busy but always accommodating and professional.

Salads were good...a little over dressed so got soft fast. Sandwich bread was good. Seeing a man step on the counter barefooted to drill a sign during the middle of the busy lunch hour and laying the drill down next to food was surprising and off putting. Sanitary conditions...hhmmmm??

Really loved this place, food was just delicious as were the cocktails and the atmosphere. Fresh and flavorful I'll thinking of this food and drink experience for a while. Staff were friendly and service was efficient, I fully recommend it!

Stopped here for lunch while out of town on business. Do yourself a favor and come here for lunch instead of the typical restaurants in Reading Terminal Market. It's an extra 5 minute walk for outstanding, inexpensive food. Had the slice beef noodle soup. Broth is delicious, the noodles are fresh and hand made. The beef is great, too. Under $10. Cash only.

Just wanted to update my review here. First time I came was amazing, been back 3 times since and while the food was still good it was not nearly as impressive. First time I tried the roast duck here it was cooked to perfection, but every time since it has been a little dry

We really enjoy coming to this restaurant for Mexican it's the only Mexican I can eat that doesn't upset my belly. I always order the fajitas because they're so good and I recommend them to anyone that likes fajitas. They have real good selection and it is authentic so check it out when you're in Downtown Dunedin.

We were in town from Michigan. Found this place on Yelp. The sampler platter is great. The crab rangoons are some of the best we've had. We had the lo mein, green curry and the TNT roll. All were very yummy. Seems to do a rockin' take out business. Decor was modern and upbeat. Would definitely go again next time we are near Nashville.
Service was horrible, the men never made eye contact with me, it took them 10 minutes to get to me when there was only 3 people in the room. I did however get a good deal on my tires

When I order take out, I'd like you to make every effort to have it ready when I get there. I showed up and nobody was around and , It wasn't busy and the manager made the salads while I wait. Why order ahead of time? Come on guys!

Delivery was wrong and online menu not accurate. Tricked into ordering sides they charge you for. When I called to complain, Theresa the manager gave me a 5 dollar credit for a screwed up 23 dollar order for 2 friggin sandwiches. Done with this place.
Food is bland. Employees are not customer oriented. No value in the meals: quantity vs cost is a ripoff.
If you like Thai food and/or Sushi you'll love this place. My wife and I have been going here for over 2 years now regularly and everything is amazing on the menu
Call me crazy but it seems everyone raves about this place, I've had better it was A-Okay
Even on a rainy morning John and his team arrived on time and did a professional job. Would use them again.

Been here handful of times since moving from San Francisco. Good service. Pho 3/5 stars, Bun Bo Hue 4/5, everything else 1/5 stars. Last meal I had here was the shrimp with lemon grass and their egg rolls. One of the worst viet meal ever. Prob not going to come back for a while.

Came here late one night. I usually go to the Hash Houses in Vegas. Portions are still huge here. Service was nice and place was very empty. Drinks were never empty. Had my usual, smoked applewood bacon burger (solid choice). Place is very clean and quiet.

We were seated immediately with a reservation. The food was good, but there are lots of places for good seafood in New Orleans. Despite having two servers I felt like there were long periods of waiting to order, waiting for our drinks, waiting for the plates to be cleared. For the price, I just wanted more.
I now realize why everyone is only so-so about Sugar Mom's. The one other time I've been here, it wasn't crowded. This time it was. So much spiky hair and eyebrow piercings.

You guys need to pick up your game. At Cigar City and ordered a couple sandwiches for delivery. We had to wait just over an hour for delivery and you guys are minutes away. We were almost ready to call you and cancel the order when your delivery person showed up. Freaky fast, my butt.

Not sure I'd eat here again. The service was amazing and the atmosphere was great but the food was nothing to write home about. The chicken fried chicken was super salty, the green beans and mashed potatoes were salty. The fried green beans were amazing! The fried brownie was not something I would eat again.
Asked pleasantly if i should seat myself. Sat down. Waited 10 minutes or so while all those arriving after me were served and i was ignored. Got up and left. Terrible service
Cool place, not very big, but the menu is interesting and the simple fact that they support local farms is a big plus.

Kinda mismanaged, even assaultive in the office. It has been few years but wife lived there before we married. Hope they are better. Honestly it was a few years ago. Overall a decent though not at all special, dwelling situation.

Way overpriced for a bland bowl of Ramen noodle soup (~$13). The Lychee Oolong tea with boba (~$5) that I ordered was very watered down and overpriced as well. So plus tips, it will cost you about $20 per person. I think I would rather drive a bit further to U. City area to have some real delicious Chinese food.

High Quality food in a very casual atmosphere. The only negative thing I can say about Rx is that the chocolate chip pancakes had their chocolate chips embedded into the heart of the pancake rather than evenly dispersed throughout the dish. The French Toast was ok .

First time here for after office drinks. Place looks pretty cool. I'm told it is jammed on fridays. Aand the music is decent. Mostly a pool place with some nice tv's too. Food was just ok. We had flatbreads, quesadillas. Th chees and jalapeño ones were good. I might come back on a friday to check out the crowd. Bye

Let's keep this simple: Slow & smelly! I don't particularly like eating at this location and today was no exception. The drive thru was twenty (20) cars deep, so I went inside and was hit in the face with the fetid aroma of the subway.
Unfortunately, I've had better PoBoys at other restaurants. They weren't bad, but Ive had much better at lots of other places. Not worth going out of your way. Sorry

This business is a shame to humanity. NOT wearing masks for food prep during the COVID pandemic, kicking consumers out of your business, calling them names and making threatening statements, with intent to intimidate!
Took over 30 minutes to get my food on my Lunch break six people behind me got food before I did. Staff didn't apologize for the wait overall terrible experience.
Went to Bub's with my family and watched 3 families be seated before seating us. Everyone in the facility walked past us trying to avoid eye contact.

Shuttles continuously running, really friendly employees. My go-to parking when I go away. Never had a problem, I probably park here about 6x/year. I've always parked valet but I know other people who have done the self-park and have had a good experience.

First time here, it was great, why you ask? Because there's no cover charge here unlike everywhere else I've been to. It's a bit loud, it's a bar after all. Service was excellent, the bars here open until 3am compare to some other big cities that only opens until 2am or earlier. Will definitely come here again the next time I visit the city.

The food was very good and the service was very good. No complaints there. I found the gentleman walking around doing balloon animals and magic tricks a bit annoying, but a couple of families with small kids liked it. My boys had no interest in him.

It was one of the only Asian food places in IV for a while. Whenever I would go I would end up regretting it. The only purpose it served was to get rid of my Asian food craving when I was too lazy to leave IV.
Great place for lunch. Went back in the evening and tried a few of their brews. Good options with their porter being my favorite.
Pretty overpriced and if you do 30 minutes of research you will actually know more than the employees do. They sound like they are experts, but they constantly say things that aren't really true.

Nice atmosphere, good server, delightful French Onion soup. The best I've ever had. The steak was tender & easy to cut. The only complaint I have is the excessive saltiness of the steak. It was so salty!!!! I've heard the salt rub is a signature thing here. Why, I have no idea.

This place is near where I just moved to so I was excited to try it. Service was very good. Food very blah. I tried the daily special which included fried rice,sweet and sour chicken, and cashew nut chicken. Nothing about any of these dishes was special or even very good. Was very disappointed

Their new no-contact/order-yourself/no-front facing-staff- system is highly flawed bc I've been here 5+ times since the name change, and every time it takes 25-45 mins to get your drink. Even if you order ahead be prepared to wait and wonder what on earth is going on in the back for it to take this long. The drinks are very good though
Great service, beautiful, delicious food. Short on atmosphere/decor but it doesn't ruin the experience. Big menu too!
Good selection, staff can be hard to track down at times, but when you get one, they are very helpful. Prices are good.
Great eats, delicious guacamole!!! Drinks as big as your head. Free dessert for first timers, what what!!!
Nothing at the airport is $3. Except these pretzels. I picked up a cup of pretzel bites in the early morning hours and they were not up to snuff - a mixture of hard and overly soft nubs.
My first time here today and the woman working the counter was really nice. They have an awesome selection of cupcakes. Definitely will be coming back here.

Had the beer sampler (blond, hef, pale, stout, porter). Didn't like any of them, the stout was ok. Had the Bob Marley pizza, nothing special. Place was as bright as a grocery store even though it was 9pm. Clean, fresh, and good service, but over priced for the quality of food and drinks. Would have given two stars but the place is very clean.
Very poor BBQ. Brisket was dry. Meager portion and I got an end cut. Pulled pork ok but not interesting. Potato salad tasteless. Fritters good. Fries good. $46 terrible value
The service was incredibly poor and treated our table in a horribly rude way. I will not be returning in my lifetime.
Prices went up, then the guy tried to charge me an extra $10 fee for having an SUV. $60 for a vacuum, exterior wash, and some armor-all? No thanks.
I've eaten here a few times. It's just been ok each time. Food comes out quick, but I'm not a fan of how they season the food I've ordered, mainly tacos and burritos.

Nice atmosphere. I had the duck soup, steak wedge, and Brussels sprouts. My fiancée got the chili and we ended up switching half way through (it was delicious- he loved the duck soup too). Salad was good, sprouts were just ok. I'd come back to try more!

This place is good when they have staff who actually cares about what they're doing. Sadly, they seem to only hire people who'd rather flirt and lallygag around then be efficient. No matter how many times this place reinvents itself or decorates, the product is going to be the same if they don't learn to hire a more mature caliber employee.

While it is a quick place to grab a bite during the week the prices are simply not worth it. For the same $8 i could have grab a larger sandwich some place else. I wouldn't recommend anyone go here for lunch. There are better places close by.
I have eaten there twice, both times the service and food were very good, but the prices are way too high for lunch.

Quick quality pizza shop. The pizza was not as good as I was hoping. Maybe it had been sitting out for too long. Of course as soon as I bought my slice a new pie went in the oven. The fresh to order garlic bread is a MUST so amazing. Employees were very friendly

One would assume that an empty bar would = quick service.. No, not at gunners.. Ever. 5 minutes to get greeted and handed a drink menu, then another 5-7 minutes to be asked what I'd like. The bar tender seemed to be on another level aka fucked up on something and just frazzled and rude
Seriously awesome. We had several different dumpling and noodle options and they were all amazing. Particularly recommend the Dandan Noodles. It was our favorite.

Been to Panera countless times and never had the poor level of service that we received today when ordering from this location at work. A coworker was receiving our order and before she could even pull a planned tip out, the delivery girl said "what, no tip?" For that? Nope! Don't like to be petty but that was just plain rude...
Food was good and service was welcoming and professional. They turned music on for us. Good restaraunt if your visiting.

I have purchased two used cars here. I have had such great experiences each time! I also get my vehicle inspected etc here and have NEVER run into any issues. I am beyond pleased with their work and thoroughness. If you are looking for a professional honest mechanic or used dealer you've found your place!
Rainbow roll and raw shrimps are really good. It's probably the best that I've had in St. Louis area. However, I wish they have pictures on the menu and also descriptions of what's in each roll.

We ordered chicken Alfredo, grilled redfish and the red beans and rice. All of it was excellent. The restaurant is in the Doubletree Hotel. The food was fresh. The mashed potatoes were fantastic and real (not instant). The crab cakes has plenty of crab too.
Disappointed with this restaurant! Not only is the gluten free pizza crazy expensive, but they also deliver your food late and don't care. Will never be eating here or ordering for delivery again.
Great cinnamon buns w/ bad coffee. Love the vibe but breakfast isn't worth the price with the exception of the cinnamon buns. I'll be back for the buns!

This was a very average your we stopped at maybe five places? Although this was a decent value, there were lots of kids and I'm not sure it was all that kid appropriate. The highlight was the drinks at the voodoo lounge
Came here for happy hour and not worth the wait for the line . Instead my friends and I went somewhere else since the line wasn't moving.

The beer is average. The food is not good, especially the new menu change with no tacos which is the only thing I liked there. We have been quite a few times and have given the food many chances. Very salty, very overpriced.

In my experience, it's been difficult to find a good, honest mechanic that operates his shop with integrity and professionalism. The hardest part of moving to a new community was leaving the mechanic we trusted. Shortly after moving to Kirkwood, we found Combs by a recommendation. Pleasantly surprised to find these guys so quickly! I think these guys are solid.
I got the chicken shawarma. The presentation and quantity was fine. However the chicken was bland and I personally didn't feel like there was any flavor.
This was the best brunch I have ever had... steak and eggs was on point. Highly recommended

Broken equipment, frequent plumbing problems, and a lot of staff turnover - not sure if they will be able to turn this around?? GYM is generally not crowded and you can usually find available equipment. Watch your monthly fee charged to credit cards. This will increase without notice, generally just before the annual fee is charged.
This was amazing, Greg Marsh Cakes knocked it out of the park. I could describe but the pics say it all. The cake tasted just as good as it looked. Wonderful work! Thank you

dont delete my post.the chinese woman is racist against blacks and keeps denying my ups packages and her husband just smiles like an idiot and play the dumb role like he knows nothing.dont expect my help when place gets robbed.best to have someone in store legally armed for protection that used to come often.now your own your own.bad karma

Getting real sugar is difficult. They want you to shoot the corn syrup into your coffee. Otherwise it is fake sugar. Espresso Machiato was awful. Luke warm, watery with little or no froth. Seems like a franchise. Electrical outlets are hard to come by as well. Won't be returning. Two stars for location and semi-descent scone

My family and I were only in town for about two days, and we walked across this gem! The atmosphere is unbelievable!! The bartenders and staff were kind, knowledgeable, and approachable. I can't wait to plan another trip to St. Pete, just to visit them again. Shoutout to Max and Nick for making our experience so amazing we went back our second night!
This HG is getting worse by the day I found a shrimp shell in my stir fry that was disgusting also the broccoli was chewier than a twizzler
Convenient, close, delivery, and not bad for fast chinese food. Prices aren't great, this is totally mid-week, I got home late from the hospital food.

We visited Lisa's for lunch one day. The place was dead. Food was pricey for what it is. Service was alright. Burgers are very good here, salads are okay. Overall, food was good but not worth the price. For the three of us at lunch it was around 60$.
Me and my brother went here for brunch and I ordered the Crab eggs Benedict and it is so delicious. I will definitely come back here.

This place is a joke. I spend $130 on what I though was going to be a beautiful arrangement the photo they have online was extremely misleading. They deliverereceived this pathetic arrangement, I was extremely disappointed.

This was a nice hidden gem on my ride down the shore. Was heading to another place, but they were closed. Had a cheesesteak and it was pretty good. This place seems like a very good neighborhood place for ice cream. One thing though, they could upgrade the port a potty. Haha

This organization promised us an incentive and now that we have our system, they are refusing to give it to us. Scam artists! Our account was sold to another organization and they are great! It's just the people who run Code Green don't keep their promises.

Nearly everything sushi roll on the menu is made with crab salad. That disgusting artificial crab mixed with mayo. Super disappointed in this place. The fruit flies and the weird odor was a turn off. The food over all was mediocre. Would never go back.

Fresh, local, seasonal ingredients with the menu changing fairly frequently. Nice ambiance and friendly staff. Unique fusion style. Try the watermelon, which is comprised of ahi panca, lime leaf, shiitake, and mango butter!!! The unique taste is definitely worth a try and don't forget to eat the lime leaf with the watermelon!
Ordered a beer and got a very obviously moldy lemon slice on the rim. Really turned me off. Will not be going back.
Hello kitty kareoke room is the best and the staff is super friendly and accommodating ! Can't wait to keep going back . Next time I'll try the teas for sure :)

I've been eating at this specific location for years, usually Order on their drive thru. The staff is always nice and the orders are always right. I am a big fan of their Eegee's, specially the strawberry and piña colada(mixed) but just recently discovered a new favorite mix Watermelon and lemon, im sold.
Loved how they offered beverages upon arrival. However, my wash and blowout was not pleasant. My stylist was super rough with my hair to where it was painful at times. Probably won't be back...
Wednesday night. Great live music and cocktails after dinner at flor Fina. Great vibe.

Dont think I'd spend money on a hotel room here, but they're always giving away free rooms, so what's the harm? I think they're remodeling, so maybe the rooms will get better with regard to decor. I did win some money off the slots, so they actually paid me to stay there. Nice

I agree with another reviewer the BBQ is OKAY. The place a so much potential yet seems to lack in management. Seemed a little unorganized. One gentleman was very willing to help us get the best bang for our buck yet another woman wanted to charge us a dollar for four pickles.
No working dryers and no management on site. First and last time will I ever come back to this establishment. The carts needs fixed and upgraded badly same as this establishment and management if any

MOIKE'S SAUCE! I like heat and this spicy diced red pepper in EVOO condiment is delicious. And although I've never had a true Philly cheese steak if you get the Wit Wiz with grilled onions and add that sauce this is a darn good sandwich. FAIRLY REASONABLE: a large is 10" (one sauce comes with) & is a big meal, $9.75.
This is our favorite sushi in the green hills area. My son orders yellowtail nigiri and philly rolls; I get the volcano roll... always a quality spot to eat!

Really enjoyed the pizzas. They were delicious and very creative options. The servers were very friendly, but the service was not the greatest. It took quite a while before anyone waited on us and it took at least 45 minutes to get our pizza and we were one of only a couple of tables there.
Went here for Sunday brunch not realizing it was a buffet style. Food had no flavor, very bland. Service was somewhat slow. Would not recommend.
Temple ready care actually followed up with me about my original yelp review. I'm impressed and pleased with this level of attention to detail and concern for the customer experience!

Make a reservation! This is a staple brunch spot in Tampa. They have amazing breakfast and serve brunch all day on the weekends. Favorites: coffee: caramel cappuccino, breakfast: any of their benedicts, fries: sweet potato with paprika aioli, tea: turmeric ginger.

If you are going to sell wings..then sell WINGS!! Charging as much as you do for wings,one would expect more then the mini wings you sell..your logo is "it's all about the sauce" yet those were the the driest wings I have ever had. Not impressed with paying close to $20 for wings and then leaving hungry.. Extremely dissatisfied and disappointed with this business!

Yums. Seating seems pretty packed in here, but it's comfy enough. Ordering process is pretty streamlined, same affordable quality sammies. I had a five dollar coupon (meal deal), so hello turkey sandwich. Downtown/uptown locale offers good people watching. I chatted with some students from EF, who were from Belgium. Pretty cool.

Ah-mazing!! Seems like an odd sort of dive place, but the food is next level. Great service too!!! We had the special of the day stuffed trout as well as the fish missy- sea bass. Sea bass was bomb!! Oh, don't miss the eggplant and oyster apps. Num

Ordered a pupusa and tostada combo and only got a pupusa, it was for takeout so I didn't notice until I got back to the office. I called to ask for a refund 5 times WITH NO RESPONSE. No one has answered the phone. Very underwhelmed I wish I could've liked this place but never going back again.

Most disgusting sanitary conditions. This is like a third world country. It would seem as if they cater for animals. Check for expired products . Not sure why they are still in business. How difficult is it to keep their place clean .They just don't care . Maybe they need some competition
Hair in my food. Horrible service. Everyone that worked there was stoned out of their mind. Minus the hair, the food was flavorless.
Sushi as good as it gets. We have been here more than once and sushi is always fantastic. Service and atmosphere here is great.
This used to be an awesome DQ but since it has changed hands, it is always dirty, items are out of stock and looks like no one cares.
You can smell the smoked meat down the street. Damn good. I'm shocked this place wasn't packed on a Friday night. Great music in background made the mood.

Simone's, you were very cool for giving free beer samples today. Your lemons, as well, are an excellent deal and I was pleased to find that you carry my favorite brand of natural ramen. I'd have given five stars but for your radishes; they were rubbery, and that it something no radish should ever be.

Excellent food & excellent staff. The chicken florentine is my favorite. They have a delicious and different house salad with fresh greens and cheese. The prices are also very reasonable with wine being the exception to that. Pasta awesome!!!!

My favorite food truck! Their margaritas are so good! The lemon lime I had tonight was just as good as the mango one I had a few weeks ago. Love that they change the flavors! The guys who run the truck are super nice. Worth a trip to Feed the Camel to just have one of these margaritas!
Unsafe! !!! Had a shady individual follow me to the elevator No lobby security or employees up front. Room was not clean.

Great customer service here! Our server Brittany was great. So friendly and quick! She was like Houdini on the Shirley Temple refills! Next time we're in Tampa, I'll be back! Magnolia our Platinum Host was pretty awesome too! I think she was even smiling while doing paperwork. This one is almost identical to the Alpharetta, GA location. Auto balls, really fun atmosphere.

Really incredible. If you're a South Indian novice like me get the lunch combo special. There were a bunch of different things that I never had and never heard of that were outstanding. Best way to try a new cuisine.. just get the special. May not go back to North Indian cuisine!
Avoid this restaurant! Employees do not respect their customers. Keep driving down the beach where your business will be appreciated.

This place is GREAT!! We usually sit at the bar. The drinks are strong and the food is tasty. What more could you want!! The pork wrap (with the slaw on the side) and macaroni are delicious. I really like their meatloaf too. Will most definitely be back!!
Simply put: food is ok, portions are huge (i.e. we had 3 people we order 2 entrees and an appetizer and were full) each entree comes with a salad, friendly staff. It's nothing spectacular

Yuck. It was literally the strangest thing ever.. It reminded me of those clubs that you went to when u were underage. It was smelly and people were so sweaty and gross. However the scene was really diverse and the music was def that which one could get "jiggy" to haha ...
Thieves. Bought a groupon and they closed a couple of days later. I will now research any salon I go to and I would definitely not go to Phoenix if they re-open.
Really good burgers, my favorite are the sliders. The green Chile one is so flavor and not to spicy. Fries are real good.

You'll love this place if you don't mind all the staff yelling for each other throughout the store, tromping as hard as they can as they move sporadically through the damn store for whatever reason or the incessant dinging of their cell phones. Can you say anxiety? The clothing was boring and not worth the price.
The fishing ships are decent here I didn't really enjoy anything else besides the beer And drinks espresso martinis were water down.

Honestly.........i do not recommend this place at all. Though the service was fast and the watermelon daiquiri was good, the boiled seafood was not seasoned at all. I should've known the price was too good to be true. If you want flavorful food, please consider going elsewhere.
Good food but the wait is too long, especially if you call ahead. If I preorder my food, I shouldn't have to wait an additional 30-40 minutes to get my food which I arrive.

They used to have great food here but they recently changed their menu to a decidedly low brow basic food/snack menu. Their amazing Cuban sandwich and pulled pork are gone, so I'll no longer be going there.
While checking out a cashier was eating and licking an Oreo cookie. Gross!!! Teach your cashiers the proper way to handle themselves.

I've been eating breakfast and purchasing yummy pastries and other desserts at the Jeannines locations in Santa Barbara for many, many years. SO happy to welcome the new location in Goleta, closer to where I live! Food is excellent and service is outstanding.

Poor menu Not very many choices. Staff is over at bar reading newspaper instead of working. "If you got time to lean you got time to clean" Place could use a new menu new service and new look. Wouldn't be back. To many other better places for better / less price.

Fast casual sushi joint. The sushi is ok, prices are decent. Its BYOB which is a plus and the inside looks nice. Mostly a take out joint. Conshohocken really doesn't have a lot of sushi options so it fills a need.
Please dear God help this airline. I don't understand why they have so many issues. They used to be an awesome airline. Hopefully the partnerships with Alaska will help
thanks to hca she passed away in feb. 3 days before her bday and the day before my husband's... (her son)
Never ever go to this restaurant. The guy is rude and does not care of his business. Never ever seen such a Indian restaurant. Beware of it. Go at your own risk.

So far this is the best pizza I've had in St. Louis. It's amazing to find Chicago quality deep dish pizza in St. Louis. Might even be better than Chicago! My wife really enjoyed the salad as well. Can't wait to get back!

This is a Playland for adults! Been coming here since it's been open and the beers have gotten even better! I love being able to play corn hole, chess, shuffle board, ping pong, among other games while drinking. Bands and food trucks on the weekend! This place just gets better and better. Staff is always nice and helpful

Got pho here with a friend. The pho was pretty standard, the service was incredible. The price was fair, could've been a little cheaper. Overall, not my favorite that I've been to, but gave an extra star for the great service.

Food was ok. Not authentic as advertised. The loaded burrito had more cheese than the small spoon size guacamole it's advertised. Cash only place. For the price and quantity not worth it. No refills even if dinning there.
Food was not fresh and was stale . I have no idea why this place was rated high , I came from Chicago and I have had food 1000 times better there. Disappointed ! :(

G is a great spot for dancing and bottle service but beware that the VIP bottle service includes an 18% tip when you get your bill. This was not disclosed to me in advance and the bill wasn't itemized so we ended up tipping twice.

THEY WILL SCAM YOU. Absolute avoid this place. This place is the definition of a scam. They intentionally get the orders wrong and bring out a insane amount of food and make you pay for it. They do this all the time. AVOID AT ALL COST.

Always a good Saturday lunch place... staff is nice, food is good with a large variety. I've had some old fries at this place tho' hence the 4-star review. Still a regular customer tho' and will keep going everytime we have a hankering for asian food
The ribs, brisket, and pulled pork managed to be dry and slimy/fatty simultaneously. The service was slow and the attitudes terrible. I won't be back.
Bummed is an understatement because this business closed. :( it was absolutely fantastic and I crave their sweet soy dipping sauce.

I was the only customer, I ate one dish and ordered 3 more to go. I'm trying to be a vegetarian but I was surprised they didn't have much vegetarian choices. There wasn't much vegetables on any of my order, so in conclusion, I find them on the expensive side. I went 5 days ago, Tuesday, I think
mmm.. Although i've been to marathon many times and return because of the fresh ingredients and creative menu this visit was just very average.
EDIT: UPDATE No longer as good as it used to be, probably 4th or 5th overall, wouldn't recommend anymore.

By default, the best place to get takoyakis (octopus balls) in Tucson. Very flavorful with authentic Japanese flavors. They also sell Katsu curry items and other Japanese street food fare. Those sweet milk tea sodas are also sold. They are consistently located inside Davis Monthan Air Force Base on weekends.

Terrible service for such a well known place. Forgot our desserts then messed up every check for a table of 9. Took an extra hour to leave. Food was excellent. !! Such a disappointment !! Had a new waitress working our table. Not a good idea!
Husband and I got severe food poisoning here. Suspect it was mayo. If you eat here stay away from salads using mayo. We won't be back.

The menu was overwhelming! We really enjoyed the French onion soup, and a filet done medium. We also got fettuccine Alfredo as a side and chocolate cake for dessert. The cocktails were made well also. Worth the visit!
A new favorite! It's great comfort food that is always hot and tasty. Can't wait to eat my way through the menu.

They do a great service but holy cow have their prices increased. Almost double from a few years ago. They are very friendly and helpful and do a great job with the service and pets. Sorry to say we won't continue using in the future just due to price only.

If you want free refills on soda avoid this round table. They told me because of COVID they are no longer offering free refills, so I said can't you just use a new cup? They said no. I will never come back. The best round table is on Mae Ann.

Nothing quick about this place We arrived and were the only ones in line. No one ahead of us waiting for food. 25 minutes for food. Two happy meals, a burger and a cone. It still wasn't right. Never again!! Go to Jack in the Box next door.
Great for a quick lunch! I went with a pizza and salad combo. I'm going to try a sub next time! The staff is super friendly and helpful.
I ordered the curry noodle. It tasted so good but the portions was really small, half bowl. I was still hungry after finished the whole thing. For $15 I expect a bowl that will fill me up
The sign clearly stated that the hours of operation is 24-5, yet at 5:55am on Friday, July 9th, THE DOOR WAS LOCKED and Woody gave a bad attitude.
Outstanding, giant slices, some of the best I've had in the area. Great flavor, perfect structure, good balance of cheese, sauce and dough. Nice and crispy too! Definitely worth checking out.

We had dinner reservations and were seated right away. The decor of the place is very cute. Our waitress was nice but not overly friendly. However, the food here is very good. For dessert, I ordered the creme brulee and it was delish! Everyone in my party was pleased with their meals and we will definitely be coming back here again.
The food tasted fine but I was very disappointed that my gyro meat was not off of the cone but was instead pre-sliced meat.

The food wasn't bad, local crafts were fine. The reason for poor review is because of the general manager, short, young gal. She was rude to me and my family, the staff and other customers. I'm in town for family weeknd and we didn't feel very welcomed. I won't be back. Check yourself "general manager"

Good mussels and fries- plus I love the dirty ho! Good selection of beers so be careful of piling up the bill when you order all those bottles. I like this better than Monks because it doesn't get as full and crazy (except on the weekends when everything is). Wish the staff was a little more attentive, I'm sick of being ignored!
I ordered a beer flight and an app of pretzels and ale cheese dipping sauce. I liked everything, a lot! Prices are good, cool decor and reminds me of New England. I will be back!

In case you forgot a few items needed for your Christmas dinner, or some ice or some fine hot black beans.....the Teresita bodega is open today and doing brisk business while all the chain groceries are closed.

If going through the drive thru make sure you have a full tank of gas. There is slow and then this place. Employees seen unmotivated or perhaps incapable of any form of customer service. Don't expect and courtesy like thank you - apparently this was not something taught when they were growing up.

My family loved it here but I was super sick afterward.. salmon lobster dish tastes amazing, fresh-made salsa is warm and made my stomach gurgle. Something's off.. I want to love it but can't. They have a great mariachi band!!! And parking!!!
Pretty standard brunch place. Waitress was sweet but reeked of cigarettes every time she came to the table. Welcome to Florida.

This Starbucks is Great! The employees are so friendly and attentive and very competent. You get your drink fast and perfect every time. Maddie, Stephen, Drew, Stacy, and Brad are the best!! This store is a neighborhood staple. We have been waiting for it forever. Yay!

It fits the sterotype of a banquet hall. Andre's has two large rooms with low ceeilings. The food is ok... Every time I've been here it seems that the same meals are served... a STL style salad, pasta con broccoli, and chicken breast with a marasala sauce.

I ordered the beef Manhattan. The sauce was on the side. The mashed potato was hard and definitely needed the yummy beef gravy. The beef was okay. The bread was just plain white bread (not even toast) sandwiching the beef. The mac and cheese was no big deal to me. So the best part was the gravy.

Not CampCo. 3/5. Good wings tho. Hxhsys hsvdvhs she should she she dvdh svshs hd do you know that you are the best way I can do to help me with any questions please o ya I'm getting a little bit about me myself but I have a nice day of the best regards John John Carroll o to the right now so

this place is a real disappointment old and tired looking dark and dingy hallway carpets stained rooms neglected you get what you pay for its a far cry from the harrah's in vegas hard to believe it's the same company

Edible, but nothing special! Similar to the quality of Dominos pizza. Not the worst meal ever, but definitely not worth the money. California needs a good pizza kitchen! If your getting pizza, I suggest otherwise!
For a small Super Center, it was actually very well maintained and had a very good selection to choose from.
One of the worst Chick-fil-A's I've ever eaten at. Service is awful employees are extremely rude. Line for the drive-through is wrapped around the building. And the bathrooms are disgusting.

The chocolate cake was not satisfying at all and the margaritas and mojitos were way too sweet. I asked for a water, it took awhile and when I finally received it there was a fly it in. I didn't bother asking for another because I knew it would take another 20 minutes.

Tried this place 3 times..tonight was the last time..worst Chinese food i have ever had..dry..almost choked on my general Taos chicken..greasy eggrolls..flavorless food in general .i do Not recommend this place by any means..sorry to be so harsh..but i speak the truth

I'll get straight to the point. Coffee 2/5 Beignets 1/5 Other breakfast items 4/5 (omelettes, pastries, croissants etc) Staff 100000/5 Open area with plenty of seating. Line moves fast. Super disappointed in the beignets. Thick, not fluffy and borderline burnt. Would come back for everything but the coffee and beignets. Food comes out hot fresh and fast. Staff is the greatest.
Yummy....ate here a while back and started writing the review but forgot to finish it. One of the best roast beef po-boys I have ever had. To be fair I was starving, but nonetheless it was GOOD.

Really cheap BYOB Chinese food. Noodles are fantastic. Menu is huge and has a ton of options. There are surprisingly many veggie options which you don't see often in Chinatown. Service is exactly what you would expect in Chinatown and the location is great for large parties and celebrations.

My Kenmore Elite Refrigerator went our but was under warranty. I used Sears and what a mistake. Paid $700+ had 5 service visits and 3 no shows. They dont even call or text nothing. Asked a manager to call me and nothing. This service is the worst. Run away very fast!

The service was fine (thanks JD!) but the food was bland and overpriced. I ordered the American Breakfast. The scrambled eggs were a little runny and bland (ask for salsa). The potatoes weren't bad but there weren't many bell peppers. My SO had the Southwest Scramble was ok , but again, needed some salsa.
Your compressed meat makes me want to jump off a plane without a parachute. Do not spend $9 on this garbage burger.

Very nice place to eat. I had the blackened catfish which was the best I've had. Service was excellent although our waitress had a bit of attitude. I figured out why when we received our bill and her 20% gratuity was already included so her attitude didn't effect her tip. I definately would eat there again however. It's a fun atmosphere.

Have only had coffee and cake from here. The cake is good most of the time. All the baked goods look good, but never gotten any. The people that work here are not very friendly, no smile, no thank you, nothing???
Recently, the airline is having to much delays. The bar in the back of the terminal has really good service.
This place is super chill. The pizza here is great, you get honey as dip. Great combination. Have been coming here for years whenever in Reno.

My dog's leg was ripped open on the fencing at Brandon Puppy Palace, and while they initially accepted blame and offered to pay for the vet bills, now they are refusing any help at all. They maimed my 2 year old dog, and they have no sympathy. I would NEVER take another pet there again.

Food is great however management seems to be lacking at this location no one seems to have much clue what is going on. Also sign on the door says they take credit cards but always seem to have some problem or another with "internet connection" when you go to pay.
Overpriced and under-performed. Two bad haircuts in a row. Go to Moxie Blue!

Not a fan. Not as nice as Opry Mills and a thousand times harder to get to (and to leave when it's over). It's fine, but if you aren't catching an indie at Belcourt, the drive to Music Valley is worth it.
Wine in a paint can. Need I say more? Sweet, immature, metallic tasting. If you like wine, this is not the place to go. But if you want to drink and get drunk, maybe.

I think this restaurant along with yard house is nothing more then the opening of the village and the hype. I've eaten here twice now and have yet to be impressed. Sushi rolls were disappointing. One positive is the service was very good.

Everything I said was indeed factual. The only thing worse then your food is your attitude. Instead of spending so much time being rude to customers you should invest some time in your kitchen fixing your menu. Got to love people who shouldn't be in the hospitality business.

For the chicken enchiladas which were alright but by no means $19 good. To make matters worse we had ants in our chip basket that started crawling all over our table. I found it rather irritating that the staff made no effort to at least offer a complimentary meal or beverage. Definitely will make no effort to come back here.

Simply stated: Overpriced and food was seriously mediocre. I ordered the chicken and strawberry salad and it was bland at best. My friend ordered the caesar salad (added grilled chicken) and she was not a fan. Atmosphere is nice, so I might stop by for a drink sometime...but will order no food!
Agree with Scott M. Looking for French, go to Deeters/Glass Chimney. good try, but the food never justified the price. Closed.

Very nice park to take the family. Plenty of room to let off some energy! We didn't have much time to check it all out, but the parts that we did see was very nice. Definitely lots of greenery to enjoy!

Ethan was lovely. I got the exact drink I was looking for and all I had to do was mention the liquor I fancied. Can't say enough great things about this place. Perfect vibe and good people. If you're looking for something low key with a classy twist, this is the joint! Ten stars to the good lion!
Just go to any other gym. Thats all I can say.
Adrian set my heat n told me deal with it or get out and also told me he would tell his boss it was a accident but he exactly knows what he did.

If you like a really strong, really cheap drinks made by odd bar tenders, come here. It's a cools place, strange but cool. Also if you trip over the awkward step at the door, they won't let you in, you've been warned

Be sure to bring your own blankets and pillows! "Non-smoking" room had an ashtray on the night table. There were so many cigarette burns in the bedding that we ripped it all off and used our own. Lots of carpet stains. . It is what it is and at least it was a cheap place to sleep even though the room stunk.
Great bagel place. Almost NYC quality. Extremely nice staff and owner. Love their bagels.

Simply put, the food I ate had zero flavor. I was not impressed.....especially with the hush puppies. The beans smelled like dog food. The wings were bearable but only with the bbq sauce. The deviled eggs were slightly decent and the fries -no comment-...........Everyone should try it at least once to gather their own opinion about it though
The Press Room used to be connected to the News-Press building. Now, it's a soccer (footie) bar that smells as it should. Cool bartenders, but don't expect to watch your NFL team here.

My friend and I just had drinks at the bar, but I'd go back here for sure. The bartender was friendly, and upon hearing me remark upon the fruity drink my friend ordered - he served me up the leftovers from the shaker in a small glass. I thought that was a nice touch. Good bar atmosphere, this would be a nice neighborhood hangout.

Not worth the price. The pedicure cost an additional $20 because I had gel removed and reapplied totalling $45.00 for their basic pedicure. He painted onto my cuticles and left points on the corners of my nails. The shop was clean and everyone wad polite and welcoming which earned the two stars given.

Jim's is a pretty standard sandwich place tucked into the Bywater. It's a little pricey by my standards, but the food is delicious and the service is friendly. My favorite dish is the Loaded Grilled Cheese with french fries, which are some of the best around.
Breakfast was marginal and overpriced. Much better breakfast spots like a Rodie's and Athens at reasonable prices.

We stopped here to get a quick snack. They only had 2 partial pizzas made on the counter and they heated my slice My husband refused to eat the pizza stating it looked dry and old lol It was ok definitely reminded me of a costco pizza slice, except overcooked Would not go back
Over rated, nothing too special. Friendly staff for sure. Huge cones but My favorite is still creamistry!!!

Beware! Do not do business with this guy. He is rude and has no business sense. I would highly advise to shop around and find a professional company. You are literally better off picking up a day laborer at Home Depot if you want to go the unprofessional route. Don't sell yourself short and deal with this guy!
Ordered bourbon chicken. What is this? Delivered. I called Ivan the manager and was told they use the same sauce for spare ribs. Saying I want free food.Disrespectful! Horrible customer service.
Good service, sweet tea was good, baked potato was ok - everything else was horrible. I think the steak was old and microwaved, no flavor, tough. Reminded us of Ramsey's kitchen nightmares.
Very slow service, dining room was clean but the place had a weird smell when I first walked in.we waited a good ten minutes for food, fries not very hot and they forgot my frosty.

So I was there for the top price new years party. It was okay. I don't think I'll be returning though its just more of an older crowd.. Older like above 50s honestly. Food was good, cold pasta though yuck. Drinks were strong though but simple. No Jager, red bull, margaritas etc... DJ was average.
The rajas tacos are amazing! Expect a long line for this place-the food is worth it:)
We had a truly 5-star dining experience. They served what were perhaps the best steaks of our lives, and the service lacked nothing.
It wasn't a great sit down place to eat, the restaurant has old oil fragrant.

Do order drinks, seasonal cocktails delicious Don't order enchiladas, uber dry tortillas lightly sauced & no flavor. It was legit horrific. Do order chips, tacos, burritos, quesadillas. Not authentic but tasty. Do tip your waitress.
Great cheap eats in S. Tampa. If you're in the market for no frills diner food, as I was, this'll do the job

Had eaten there in the past Was the go to place for cheese steaks and hoagies etc.. Last time order was all screwed up Called and no one could speak English So pissed off have not returned in over 2 years The Boss

We tried this restaurant for lunch and to satisfy our curiosity about Peruvian food. It did not disappoint! The food was wonderful and the service first rate. Our waitress recommended the two most authentic dishes which was helpful. Great place!
Very helpful and considerate folks at the reception always willing to help and keep customer happy. I like their well behaved demeanor and friendliness compared to other service centers.

I will start with the standard...Food - AWESOME. Second - Service. Blown away! These guys & gals treated every customer that walked through the door with great service. It looked like a manager, got us a high-chair for our son while we ordered. Then asked if we wanted crayons. We have been back & will continue to come back over and over!

Riley's, you may not be much to look at, but you sure pour a damn strong jack and coke and know how to have a good time! This isn't a fine dining establishment, but a great spot to have a few brewskies and fall off the grid for awhile.
Delicious food. Excellent, genuine service. Delivery took as long as they said it would (45min). Highly recommended.
Shuttle in non-existent. Wait an hour to be picked up from the airport. Look elsewhere.

Roasted veggie Caesar was good. Pizza is essentially the same as dominos, except way overpriced-around 30 bucks for a pepperoni. Under-seasoned and lacking flavor. Overpriced, overhyped, underwhelming.
General Tso's Chicken was excellent. Not so happy within the steamed pork and cabbage dumplings. The chicken satay was tasty.
They are having issues and couldn't let us rent a car for a long time at the airport. Avoid them at all costs. Wastes your time.
Bad,bad,bad experience ....for one order of $11.02 yesterday ,Stephanie charge me FIVE times.Never be back.
Reminiscent of England at a recent World Cup - the odd moment of interest but ultimately bland and disappointing. Maybe we caught them on a bad night.

This place is very strategic with how the food is portioned. The special comes with little meat to force you to pay for extra meat. When I brought it to the owner's attention he dismissed it. Of course he's not going to stop the scam for little ol me who he still received a profit from. These ppl are very greedy.
One of the best burgers ive tasted in a while. Bobby can cook for sure the atmosphere is pretty cool looks clean and feels like a 50's burger joints must go im def coming back here!!
We really love this place for a date night. Their wine is great...join their VIP group! Food is pretty good, as well. We always have steak when we go. Haven't been disappointed!
Excellent service experience. Vince has been very proactive and incredibly helpful to take great care of me and my family. Thank you

Expect to pay more for a small "custom" braid! Service was good, got a blow dry and small side swept braid in my bangs. I was surprised to be charged $10 more for the small braid and unlike other visits there was no product applied to my hair other than hairspray. Please advertise in your menu that braids cost extra!
First stop off the plane. We were dyin for something quick. They had delicious oysters and great service.

We used the Polish as a venue for our wedding reception. The space is large and versatile, including a kitchen, bar, and stage. The staff was extremely helpful in assisting us in planning our event. They coordinated with our caterer, baker, and DJ seamlessly. I was also very pleased that they are LGBT friendly. I highly recommend the polish for your next large event.
Got put on hold for two and a half minutes; hung up and called back to learn they don't even offer the delivery that they claim to have as a service.

You know I have been eating for years and have always liked the food. But the new higher prices on the food, higher prices on the delivery charge and the raised minimum delivery amount (from $15 to $20) have made me no longer order from here. It's a shame that have priced themselves out of getting delivery food.
Evening visit.. my ribeye steak was great, waitresses were nice ...but 2 gal's for bar n grill...ummm no... not their fault, I know.

I started getting pedicures to ease my foot pain. My toes were killing me and the overall appearance of my feet were borderline disgusting. I have been seeing Tina for a over a year and she is my miracle worker. As long as I do my job of showing up regularly, she does hers to make my toes happy. Nail Pro screams clean!
great local place with outstanding service & delicious food. A little on the pricey side, but worth it for a once in a while meal. Highly recommend!

Probably the worst meal I've had in Boise. The amuse bouche was drowning in thousand island dressing. The burrata was easily the worst I've ever had, it was also drowning in thousand island dressing, and accompanied by terrible tomatoes. The gnocchi was over-cooked and had a tasteless sauce. I don't know why people would dine here.

Ordered Shoyu and the kyushu ramen the The broth was amazing a full of flavor and the char siu was perfectly cooked. The shouyu had great umami to it without being salty, my only recommendation is to get the curly ramen for the kyushu for a better contrast to the hearty combination of broth and char siu
Nice burger place- we all got bacon cheese burgers. Bacon was nice and thick. Fries were great too. Love the old fashion soda. Delicious all around
Ok. Hot and fresh but nothing to come back to eat. Better than Jim's on south street for sure.
Everything was as ordered. The Pajeon Pancake was pretty greasy, but overall,the whole meal was definitely satisfactory. I'd recommend the Shrimp Bokeum Bap!

Pizza was delicious. Great crust for the Chicago style. Just a note, the sauce comes on the side for some reason. I didn't realize that so it was strange adding it on top. Also it was very expensive. But tasty

I ordered 10 mild wings i barbecue wings and only three wings had barbecue sauce on them 1/2 of the wing the mild wing didn't have any sauce on there at all it was all dry. I guess they just threw anything together because they were about to close
I was very disappointed in my cruise aboard the Brilliance of the Sea.. The food was not good and the activities sucked.This is my second Royal cruise and by far this was the worse cruise

Car was clean and well kept. Good service, however, the charges were unclear and I ended up paying $200 more than I had booked for online. There needs to be a better breakdown of charges from the company. I'm very unhappy with the hidden fees I was charged and not informed about when I books the car online.

Been to a few theaters in the Reno/Sparks area that have better accommodations but this theater is just not been updated, like the Seats are just noisy, the prices are fair, and it's just not a place I'd recommend to most.

Yum!!! Nothing like a RAW quarter pounder! What a mess. Not the first time at this location. Save ur money, folks! Called to let them know, and no offer to reconcile, just a quick, annoyed "thank you for letting us know." Also- the fries were maybe half full, none in the bottom of the bag. Gross

Service, quality of food, worst of any Mugs N Jugs ever. 66th st location before 08 was best ever, recipes and consistency not like before became franchise. Hopefully can get back to ways of ten years ago.

One of the best acai bowls I have had yet. The berry bowl had the right combo of toppings and base. The portions however are HUGE. I got the small bowl and couldn't come close to eating it all, kids size for sure next time.

Had a great experience buying tires and wheels here. Sam helped me out and made the entire process seamless. His attention to detail was helpful when it came to deciding which wheels, lug nuts, and tires to go with. I'll definitely be coming back to him in the future!
Didn't even make it to the food. Came here to meet up with friends afterwork. My first drink had fruit flies in it the remake drink had fruit flies in it. Enough said

Standard Cracker Barrel. I had an egg sandwich on sour dough with hashbrown casserole and bacon. You can always depend on Cracker Barrel for a tasty, consistent meal. Good service. Always love the country store theme.
First and foremost, the ambiance is FABULOUS in Spring, Summer & Fall, dining outside, overlooking the rocks. Some great picture opportunities here! The food - so-so, the drinks are better!

Tried a chocolate covered cannoli, it was incredible!! Had the signature powdered sugar cream donut- delicious donut with lots and lots of icing! We have yet to try our remaining treats of a churro donut and a chocolate brownie but we are very excited to try!! A nice afternoon treat, not to mention the prices are great!
Very disappointed in my husband's haircut. Also, Dani charged him the full amount, refused to give him the senior discount, even after it was called to her attention. He would not go back to her.

Pizza...OK. Customer service...Horrible! Gave them a number of chances but their rudeness and lack of customer service have turned me elsewhere. Since there are several pizza places in the area, if they don't changes their ways...they won't be around too long.

First time checking it out first breakfast as recommended by a friend! Service was quick and friendly. It was a busy Saturday morning but we got seated right away. I loved the veggie omelette with fruit and rye toast. Overall good selection to fit anyone's tastes. Reasonable prices for the amount of food. Will be back again!

I called and placed an order for pickup. After coming in the order was still not ready, so I waited a total of almost an hour. I couldn't wait any longer so I ended up canceling the order and leaving without my food. Absolutely unacceptable!
To die for food and service! Leave your comfort zone and venture to Gentilly, you will not be disappointed!

Thought I was gonna get a spectacular surprise, sizzling chicken skin... Pretty good though. Cold fries. When it comes to high and consistent standards, that buttery biscuit is a wham bam home run! The line is v confusing to order- the staff are wonderful
This is our go to Chinese spot. The food is always great and you can tell it is fresh. They are also priced fair and you get a lot of bang for your buck here.
Friendly staff. Fast service. Food just ok. Breakfast subs in the morning and regular meat/veggie subs served all day. I definitely prefer their regular subs over their breakfast ones.

This place is delish! We decided to try it one day and can't wait to go back. The brisk it was amazing and the macaroni and cheese was to die for! The only reason I gave it 4 stars and not 5 is they could use a bigger selection of draft beers!
While we were waiting for the take-out, there was an alive roaches crawling along the window area??
Literally my go to place. Crab Rangoon is my favorite. I go here way too much. Can not get enough. Also they are always super nice. Can not go wrong

This place is the worst place I've ever been! I wouldn't let a rat stay there! The place is very dirty no blankets or linens on the bed. Couldn't trust the lock's that were on the door to keep the people (for lack of a better word) out. They overcharged me what the advertised Booking price was! BUYER BE WARE!!!

Came here with a couple people, there was barely anyone here. Plenty of people working, but the service was horrible. My friend ordered a margarita, they didn't put a lime in it, they didn't have salt for the rim, the counter was sticky. The place is very sparsely decorated and just seems very odd. So awful.
We ordered chicken wings that were very good. The restaurant was clean. Service was decent
