Small place near hotels on canal Lackadaisical staff and food Ok but not exciting. Like the gumbo, though. I will try again. Open 24/7.

The pancakes were amazing!! Super cute and waiter was so friendly!! We had no wait, and sat upstairs. It would've been lovely to sit outside on their balcony but they were full..still cute inside though!! Pretty fast service, especially for Easter sunday!

Our first time here. Service was good, food was great. Hummus was delicious, falafel fries were interesting. Chicken Shwarma, Burger and vegetarian burger very good. Lamb Shwarma was a little chewy. Vegetarian appetizer was delicious with a generous amount of pita. We would come again.
Home Depot is where the heart is! I absolutely love this place. A great source for home projects and household items. They have everything from flowers to fences. The staff are always helpful.

I ordered takeout from here once. The food was good but it was definitely pricier than your typical Asian sitdown/takeout place. I did like that the Mango Chicken was served in the cut out mango peel.

The "OPEN" sign was on and a male was sitting at a table inside, eating. I walked up to the door and attempted to open it but it was locked. I saw a woman working behind the counter who looked at me and shooed me away. Either you're open or you're not. Turn the sign off if you aren't open !
I ordered the shrimp and fish basket. It was delicious. Large portions. It came with onion rings and coleslaw.
Good luck getting someone on the phone . Their communication with their corporate offices is terrible.

Counter staff was courteous. Fries tasted frozen. If they weren't, they were definitely nothing to be excited about. Not worth going back for. No vegetarian options (besides the fries). Maybe if they added an awesome veg steak I'd feel differently.
Stay away. Hires rude teenagers who containment the food. Plenty other local places to eat.

Food - very good Service -OK Ambiance - shithole! we were stuck in a back room with peeling paint and a view of a storage area. really?. they could do so much more.plus, the place was ridiculously loud. Poorly managed and not "chic" at all. would try again on a weeknight, i guess......
Food sucks. Music is awesome. Food is truly terrible, no seasoning, over priced. Staff is great tho!

We love this place! Food is excellent, staff and owner are warm and friendly and the atmosphere is great. Our favorites are chicken chimichanga, chiliquiles, and the yucatan. Chips are fresh and the salsa is fantastic. They can handle a crowd and you won't feel rushed. Our favorite Mexican restaurant in STL!
Service was slow. I received a cup with a bent rim. A bent rim equals a spill on my suit, shoes and car cup holder. Bad way to start out the day. Thanks Starbucks.
This store is poorly ran. The women on day shift is always loud and rude. Restrooms dirty and stink, people hanging out in store all times of the day. Store needs to shut down!
I really like the cheese steaks and the french fries I do find it frustrating that each time I've ordered there they have "" lost my order but regardless I will still continue to go back

Stopped in for dinner over the weekend. Overall our experience was okay. Our starter came out with our entrees which was a bit odd but not a huge deal. The calamari was very good, and the pizzas were okay. Our waiter was attentive. I would say maybe other entrees are more tasty and worth a try, but the pizzas were pretty average.

We ended up here through serendipity... White Horse (also amazing) recommended it. So charming, so much character, such sweet people and incredible history. Oh, and the wine is very good too! They say the reds are what they're known for (and they ARE good... the cab is amazing), but we loved every single white.
Ordered $65 of sushi, made one simple request, provide a small container of eel sauce. MIKIMOTO is apparently too cheap for that, will NEVER order from you again!!!
not bad at all!
I think that all casino buffets are meh..... Don't know why I kept going to those casino buffets?????
Loooove their chips and salsa, they have huge water and soda cups, amazing virgin frozen margaritas, and the best Chile rellenos and hard tacos.

Great lattes! Cute and modern decor. Had the smoked salmon lox bagel plate- delicious. Went as a group for a double baby shower. They were very accommodating and understanding. Friendly and prompt service. Worth the trip especially if you can get good parking

Ordered two bowls of soups to go. Got home to discover I was given cup size portions even though I paid for bowls. The crazy thing was I had to wait for the server when I ordered because she was taking a call from another customer who received an incorrect order. Soup was just ok.

The sauce of the rib is good, but I think the rib itself is just average. Too many people and the service is horrible. I understand the waitress need to take care of too many tables, but the attitude is too bad to me, unsuitable to this environment.

A nice buffet with a nice assortment of Indian Classics. The Goat & Tandoor Chicken was moist and flavorful. The NAAN bread could've been better. Nice Atmosphere with EXCELLENT SERVICE. The host was kind and accommodating. I would go back if in the area. A little on the Pricey Side for the buffet.
This gym is legit and I enjoyed my trainer but don't buy into a training contract. YOU WILL BE LIED TO JUST LIKE ME AND EVERYONE ELSE.

Refused to do tattoo after looking at one reference photo and without talking with the customer about their full idea. Clearly didn't want the business. I have been tattooed here before without issues by a different artist, so I'm left wondering what has changed. I have also recommended this shop countless times and that will now stop.
Sandwiches are good, although unhealthy. Environment is nice. When I went, it seemed like they were understaffed. The food took a long time to come out.

Came here based on the great reviews and wait in a long line outside, but was really disappointed. I prefer small oysters and the oysters here are HUGE. Like, massive. Definitely not for beginners. Chargrilled oysters had an outrageously delicious sauce, but had so much sand in them. This place definitely doesn't put any effort into giving you a clean oyster.

Came here from Philly - my wife loved the place. Great selection of machines- from beginner to expert. Super friendly and knowledgeable staff. Huge selection of fabrics and nice selection of classes. I loved that my wife loved it and the fact that we could have beer and some great sandwiches at the Brickwall Tavern right around the corner. A win win for sure,'.
Wan gets it done!! His services are fast, professional, and incredibly affordable. We love our floors. Thank you Wan!
Outstanding and great service. Very accommodating and excellent selections Our server was amazing and great personality !!!

Every Subway I've ever visited had had fresh bread until now. This location made me a sandwich with stale, tough bread. Blech! It's basically the entire sandwich! There are other Subway's nearby, avoid this one.
Perfectly fine, clean, good mattress, good value. Not the most interesting neighborhood, but easy to drive around. So-so breakfast buffet.

I haven't been in awhile and it could be hot or miss but tonight it was a definite hit! I got an order of fried dumplings ( ok, not great) and an order of Kung pao chicken. It was perfect! Nice and hot, perfectly spiced and delicious! I could easily crave this. Keep it up China Spring!
Everything is horrible. I lose internet more than I have it it seems. Its ridiculous. The app was working when I needed to reset it and now the app doesnt want to work. Sigh. Sigh. Sigh.

I've rented from Budget dozens and dozens of times literally all over the world. I got a great experience as usual. Fastbreak reservation - which meant I just got to skip the line and walk upstairs and get a car. The person who handled my pickup, Lowell, served up some great and friendly conversation while my car came around. Thanks, as always, guys.

Rip Off - 13$ for a Lunch on a weekday. Vegetarian all that they had was roti and 2 curries and a biryani. All 4 of them tasteless! No spice no flavor - was not fresh neither authentic. Do yourself a favor and go to other restaurants in Philly which serves lunch for half the price and double the taste.

Typical bar...im not from the area, so the one thing that i thought was outstanding was when someone asked the bartender to have 12 40's to go...that is unheard of in NY. I thought it was pretty cool that you can go to a bar and order a 40 oz beer to go...

My first Pho experience and it was great! Spring rolls, Beef Pho and an Avacodo Smoothie made for a great meal! The meat was tender, the broth was extremely flavorful and plenty of noodles. Will definitely be going back there sometime soon!
Holy moly! Absolutely amazing. Best Italian Restaurant since moving to FL. Service was awesome. Food was awesome. Ambiance spot on. Our new go-to
Great place for breakfast, absolutely everything on the menu is good. May require a wait before seating, but definitely worth it. Great bloody Mary's!

Menu has shrunk considerably and eating in sun is not ideal. I guess it could be good lunch takeout? Idk. All I could think eating my barely palatable vegan sandwich in heat was try not to barf try not to barf
It's ok for a Chili's not my favorite one. Service is hit or miss but food is standard and good for Chili's.

Went went to lunch after church last week and had a wonderful experience at the Cool Springs Cheesecake Factory. We were a party of 3 and sat down immediately at at high top in the bar area. Great Meals and even better Dessert! Love the red velvet cheesecake!

Healthy and delish, who knew. Needed a place to meet a friend for dinner and b good fit the need. We both ordered a kale and quinoa salad. Mine with grilled chicken. Fresh, yummy and a huge portion. Plenty of time to chat....no rushing. I will return for more fresh goodness

Came here after flying into indy late on a Friday night. The waitstaff was friendly and attentive. The wine was good and there were many different choices. The small plates we ordered (hummus and chicken skewers) were ok, but not memorable. Would have liked to have a server who was more knowledgeable about wine and a more warm, inviting, and unique atmosphere and design.
Authentic Italian! All pasta is made in house daily. The bucatini rigati with lamb ragu was perfect, just the right bit of spice without overpowering the flavors.

Had heard some good reviews of this place. This will NOT be one of them. The food was terrible. My fish tacos were so fishy tasting I couldn't eat them. My daughter felt the same about her Caeser salad. Dressing was fishy, strong anchovy taste and not good. Will not return to this place for food. Bar looks fun though.

This place is awesome. From the affordable prices to the friendly service and the really tasty, authentic Greek food. Oh, and the service is fast too! Everything about this place is great. My go too for Greek food.
First I should say that the service is excellent here! And if you're going to pick a week night - go for Tuesday, which has happy hour all night at the bar! $5 champagne pours!

I liked my poke bowl but, the bar was closed at 2 pm because the one bartender goes home. Also, the owner was cagey. First she said she wasn't in charge then finally said she was the owner. And, we mistook the manager for a homeless person. Not sure what's going on but, won't be returning.

First time at Basso, let me say the atmosphere is very very nice. I absolutely love the ambience. But here is my complaint, they have brought us out cold fries 3 times!!! I don't understand how or why they keep giving us cold fries. VERY DISAPPOINTING

Chicken sandwich had no taste; spinach artichoke dip was not much better. Sushi was pretty good though. Took forever to get our check. Overall okay for a hotel bar/restaurant but there much better options close by.
The service here is aweful! The blond haired barista with the crazy dark eyebrows is a total witch... I think she forgot the customers, like me, pay her rent....

Great arena to watch a hockey game! Most of the time it's easy to get in and out. Almost all of the seats will provide a great view of the game. The bathrooms are clean and the people working the service areas are friendly.
I am still just so disappointed with this business, do not take your expensive car here for any major issues!

This place is empty for a reason the food is horrible I do not recommend anyone going to this place. I've been keeping an eye on his place and I've never seen it busy and I just figured it was a seasonal thing. So my fiancé and I tried it out and it was the worst food I've ever had! The worst!!!
The store itself is ok but the pharmacy is terrible. I've stood in the line for up to 45 minutes. No one ever gets back up and there is always 1 cashier. Go to CVS. Great customer service!!!
The feel of it (location, design) adds to it all. Steaks are top notch, maybe not tier 1a of philly cheesteaks but definitely 1b. Specialty fries are good too!
For a mild taste of Tawainese food, this place is very reasonable. People should not compare them to Cantonese, Shanghainese, or Hunan Chinese food.
GREAT EXPERIENCE! The food was AMAZING, the serves was GREAT, and the ambiance was very elegant. Highly Recommended.

Ran into this place by accident when my mom, sister, and I had some time to kill before a show. This place was AMAZING!!! The hole-in-the-wall atmosphere was too cool, and the service was perfect. Our waiter knew what to recommend, was friendly, and was very very attractive. That just helps. Food and big range of beers were fantastic. Can't wait to go back.
Food warm-cold... maybe you can use Insulated bags on delivery orders It may help retain heat during delivery

The employees seem motivated to do provide customer service, which I appreciate. I believe they make an effort to remember individuals. I had some serious problems opening a safe deposit box...but it was resolved to my satisfaction. I question a lot of bank charges in general...and I think with good reason, but I don't think WF is any different.
Just getting started so there are growing pains. Food good and staff is learning. Let's hope they are a 5 in a few months.

Thank you Kevin Gavin！You and your partner are very professional. Now, it seems that I got brand new sofa and rug. Also, my bedrooms look very clean. I will use this company for my future carpet cleaning.
Excellent salmon but not good ahi. Decent service. Ahí didn't have much flavor and we do eat sashimi a lot
I just can't go back. Service at the counter and in the dining room has declined in the past year. Food is still good, but it's just not worth the wait and service treatment.

I went to this place long time ago before their second opening. Maybe they have improved better ever since then. When I was there, we were quite disappointed about the wings because the quantity did not correlate with the price we paid. But their service was okay. I would give another shot some other time.
Dramatically understaffed. Color selection is full of old, dry polishes with limited selection. Nice ambience, but slow slow slow service.
Everything was delicious! We got the tofu hash, biscuits and gravy, and cheese curds. The cheese curds were my favorites, and I highly recommend them. :)
Went in for my hair appt, doors were locked. Lights off. So I went over to Tullia Salon and Spa next door. And had my hair done. AMAZING!
Average food, even by airport standards. Not bad if your really hungry and need food before a flight. Margaritas were good!

I love the juices here very tasty and freshly made! I ordered their Caesar wrap and it was very disappointing, very garlic-y and also not the best portion, it's more like a snack. If stay away from the food and stick to the juices!
Really good carnitas ANYTHING! The chips are good and guac is always fresh. I love the horchata.

I have lived here for two years. Great esthetics, but sometimes landscaping lacks. Management is friendly. Unless you pay $25 for a covered parking spot, you'll likely have to walk a bit to your place. Overall, well maintained and great residence.
This is the perfect time of year to come to Velvet Cactus. Good service. Really good Rita's. Great special taco tonight - fried crawfish tails. Yum

Very disappointed. The environment is the worst. There is a fly around our table, stopping on the food. Very annoying and disgusting. The waitress are not nice at all, didn't take care of us during the dinner. The seafood soup we ordered is very small and not fresh at all. Anyway, the food there is not deserved the high price.

Took 1.5 hours and asking twice for our appetizers. Meal was finally delivered close to 2 hours after our order was taken. One (of four) orders was messed up, meals were mediocre at best and not worth the wait. Other tables came in and were served ahead of us. Believe they forgot/missed our order. Would not bother going back
Horrible service closes at 12 but stop answering they phone at 11 have u waiting for hours then sends the wrong order but it's no way u can even call to let them know
Turkey, bacon, and cranberry mayo. Go there. Eat one. Everyday. Snag a latte. Do some homework. Talk to Omar. Run from Omar
Great for breakfast food. My cafe con leche was delicious. Cuban toast just how I like it. Grumpy service.
Very poor customer service! Deception bait and switch. I would not recommend to anyone. Poo poor customer service. If I could give a negative rating I would.
If you are paying $7 for falafel over rice and you get half bowl full, then I would rather go to the halal guys.
Prices were good and the portions are large. Ordered the dumplings, chicken lo mein and general tso. General tso was not spicy at all and rather sweet. Everything else was mediocre.

Clean restaurant with industrial decor. Service staff was helpful and polite. Menu offered minimal choices, however each items was homemade with healthy ingredients. Crab cake appetizer was tasty as was the chicken-n-biscuit sandwich. Neighboring tables had burgers. Specialized cocktails are an option at approximately $8 each. Great place to meet friends for a beer and shared appetizers.

Great bar to visit in the winter... Perfect for a happy hour or casual date. We ordered a delicious pizza (the McDowell?) with squash, speck, honey and fontina - highly recommend! The calamari was great, too. Love the ambiance and fireplace, but the TVs give it a non-pretentious vibe.
Sonics in place of McDonalds used to be how I could tell I was in the boondocks. Not so much anymore. Honestly, I think Sonics are a step up. More varied menu, and breakfast any time they're open.

Came in at 1:40 on a Sunday. Asked what time lunch service started and was told 2. Mentioned to both bartenders that we were waiting for lunch. Asked to order lunch a little after 2 and was told that lunch service didn't start right at 2. We left and went across the street.

Came to this place after all the recommendations online and was a bit disappointed. The food is ok but no $20 a plate good. Service was quite slow and the ambience felt more like an old place than a cozy place. Nothing really impressed me and probably won't be back.

I went back to Duafe since thhe moved to their new location. I was thoroughly displeased with the service received. I was so displeased that I wrote a blog post about ithem to complain. In short, the stylists are not professional, and when someone comes in for a trim, you don't cut their hair and charge for a cut without consultation first.
Food was great, be warned of the spice level...whatever your normal spice level is, take it down a notch! Nashville hot needs a waiver before eating bit absolutely great stop
I ordered a latte and wow it was good. The froth was good and the coffee taste wasn't over powered by milk. Perfect balance b/w coffee and milk.

Never again! This is not authentic mexican style food at all. Even the street corn, the corn itself was dried up. Horrible. Barely any cheese sauce on a huge burrito . My friends and I were so annoyed.

Had number 16 and agua fresca sandia. Drink was pretty good but the rest was not worth the long wait (over 45" on Monday 2 pm). I had better home made tortillas at La Cubana Venice, CA and Pacos (LA on Centinela). Very friendly staff but not worth returning.

The jaeger burger and sweet fries are par. Tasty onion bread but the hamburger is somewhere between a drive up and real beef. Quiet atmosphere in a nice shopping center. The staff is very nice. Don't get an old-fashion burger unless you have an appetizer appetite.
Overpriced food that wasn't very good. Beer was average and only filled growler halfway.
I arrived near closing time due to the rain and roads. I was greeted and felt welcome. Very helpful and exchanged my HID lights with no problems. Fast and easy service.

Small zoo. Some exhibit or a few are always closed. The giraffe was cool and so was the baby lion. The giraffe is dead and the lion is grown up. This was my haven when I had to drag the kids I babysit around. Maybe I'm spoiled because I live near the LA ZOO.

I went in and wanted to buy a glock 19 cause they do the blue lable program and I'm military i stood there for 15 min at the gun counter and did even get acknowledged I will never go back in here and I will tell anyone I know to stay away from this place!!!!
Doctor is a good one, but does seem very rushed. Also not a fan of the waiting time when I clearly have a scheduled appt. Wait is usually anywhere from 30-60 min wait.

Thought I'd run the car through the wash before work, after a weekend of camping. The car ahead of me slowly pulled through the wash but it never activated. She came out the other side dry and drove to the office. I tried to pay for my car wash, but I couldn't get the machine to accept payment, so I left. Waste of time.
Honestly, we were so excited to come here....So wrong. The food was bland and boring...No flavor. The wait staff seemed un-interested. Really this was, shall I say, a waste.

Easily the best cheesesteak in the area. We've been waiting for a good steak place to open around here and this place does not disappoint. Word must be getting around too because it's starting to get packed so leave yourself some extra time or try to plan for an early dinner or on an off-night to avoid the crowds.

I have given this place several tries & well., The meat is always dry & tasteless.The prices are crazy high for the taste. People are friendly to bad they are serving nasty food. I did give them a fair try 6 times we tried.. 6 times we left hungry cause it was un edible. Even with a coupon I wouldnt eat there. Pass
Not only is the company scandalous, but the 5 star reviews here and on many other sites are faked by hired people!

Great local pizza place and I think one of the best pizza places in Metiairie. A family friendly owned restaurant with a good feel and food. The have all kinds of options for different platelets. My favorite is the Samuel Clements. Note: bar is limited beer and wine.

My favorite place to eat ramen... I really don't care for the sushi here.. if I do I would only order the eel roll. Simple but really delicious!!! I have tried a few of the special rolls and I honestly don't care for it.

I've thought about eating at Harold Seltzers for a couple of years. I did last night. Hate to say it, but reminded me of Ponderosa. Food was fine. Plenty of food. Price was really reasonable. It was not an exquisite dinning experience.
Still enjoy restaurant but for the last couple of weeks no air conditioning. R u kidding me what a joke sitting in a hot hot restaurant. Will not go back until its fixed. Shame on the owners

Wow! Every bread they make is fantastic. I especially like the morning bun. The ham and cheese on a baguette is perfectly toasted with a nice balance of cheese and ham. For me, the bread is the most important ingredient in a sandwich, and they do it right at this place.

My unit was opened. Robbed and re-locked! I have no idea when they stole my very expensive collection of sports memorabilia. Regina told me there were a lot of robberies on the second floor 2 months ago! I was on that floor! NEVER once did they sent notifications of that! NO SECURITY AT ALL! DO NOT TRUST THIS PLACE!!!
They took forever to serve us and I felt like they were ignoring us. The food wasn't even that good we waited for an hour for our food and they weren't busy this has happened multiple times. 0 stars

If you want delicious Indian food, you want Ekta. Seriously good food. The saag aur paneer, the cheese dumplings in cashew sauce, the lamb rogan josh, and the plain naan were all big time hits. A little pricey ($11-$16/item), but more than enough food. Ordering in is a special treat.
Quick drop off and pick up from the airport. Nice clean vehicles. Friendly staff. You have to wait to check out if you're using a coupon which can take a few minutes. Great location.
I love the good but the young waitress is very rude and doesn't seem like she wants to be here
Sorry but $6.50 for one slice of Sicilian with one topping is outrageous . Come on now, pizza pretty good but 13 bucks for two slices and no drink is way to much. I won't be returning..
called us idiots. we're extremely rude and racist. went to have a good time but clearly i didn't.

Great service!! It started pouring outside and I realized that I needed new windshield wipers. I stopped in and was immediately greeted by someone who was helpful in finding me what kind of wipers I needed. As I checked out, even though it was pouring rain outside, they also offered to install my wipers for me. Highly recommend this location!!
Horrible!!!!!!!! 900 people exact!!! Not even standing room!!!! Huge rain storm everyone packed in the dinning room wet and soaked. Super miserable!!!! Over BOOKED!!!! Aug 5th 2017!!!
Our two night accommodation was nearby so we gave it a try. It was so good we went there three times! The taste of the top quality produce really shone through. The meats were absolutely delicious.

Stove and Tap has an awesome atmosphere and very kind employees. I think the food is a bit overpriced but it was good food. The roof top deck is a nice place to sit and enjoy the view and weather. I would recommend making reservations here. Once again, can't say enough about how nice and polite staff was.
A horible store. A guy who was wrking at register was stonck on alcohol than he ovre charge me.

We have been going to this outback since it opened its doors and often. Since the change in management it has gone downhill. They no longer have my wife's wine, White Zinfindill, no longer has asparagus even though it was on the menu. Service was bad. After years going here will will now have to find another place. It's definitely going downhil

View was great but the food was not worth the money. Please work on the quality of your food. This will be a one time in my life stop instead of an every time I'm in Florida I'm coming here stop on my list of things I want to do.
I love getting my nails done here!! They're very fast, and they always last a long time. Plus everyone is super sweet
Recently visited with family, just very disappointed you no longer accept dogs. I know a lot of families travel with their dogs and unfortunately we can't stay at this hotel anymore.
Fresh and delicious savory bowls, blended fruit bowls, juices, and smoothies. There's something for everyone and you can't really go wrong with any of their offerings!

My food came out with cold grits and my wife was cold as well. And I went to pay and cashier and her coworker are having a whole conversation. Didn't even knowledge me just took my payment. Bad customer services here. I have to go back To Cherry Hill. Everything great over there
I'm disappointed in how the night staff treated me but my strawberry sunday was good so I guess it's okay:(

Great food but it is a little touristy. I am spoiled because I am a local and go to the spongedocks a lot. If this is your first time in the area, Hella's is a must. Even if only for their bakery. If i could write a separate review for bakery, it would be 5 star

I find that Tim Hortons is hit or miss when dealing with them. They are a company that needs to get back to the basics of what made them one of Canada's great businesses. They are changing and launching things no one is asking for. If they listened to their customers and gave them what they wanted they could be great again.

Always good food. Today all the servers were at the hostess stand talking. Didn't move out of way so the hostess could seat us. I know it was slow in the restaurant but couldn't they have been cleaning or something Bourbon Mahi Mahi was to die for Daniel the server was excellent

Needs work Never got to order. Stood waiting for 10 minutes, probably longer while the foursome in front of us tried to figure the menu out. We got a nod from the server but that was it. Left and went to get food somewhere else. May try it again sometime but not in the near future.
I had four recalls on my Honda and they fixed them all! And my Honda is a 2004! Plus they even fixed the seatbelt switch and paid for my rental car! Thank you Betty Mantz for a painless experience
I grew up in Chicago and was a weekly patron of Portillo's. I was hoping to capture that magic at Bono's. I found the menu to be more expensive and lower quality ingredients than what I experienced.
WARNING: Spending over $300.00 per night and the rooms are extremely dirty..... Not to mention the Terrible customer service!!!! If your looking for a clean hotel this is not the one for you!!!!!
They ALWAYS forget to put chips in my bag when I order via the mobile app. Real buzz kill when the coworker comes back with all the meals and the chips you paid for are never there.
Always nice people Always consistent Coffee never bitter Nice option to sit from time to time and get get the day moving forward.

First time being here I must say I was impressed with my meal. I had the beef spendali which was cooked perfectly and a small pasta dish on the side which was very tasty. Topped it off with a free gelato, which was cookies and cream. Would go back again.
All we wanted were some good happy hour oysters. Takes way too long for naked oysters. Better off going somewhere else

Completely unprepared for the weekend rush. Outdated facilities, cramped quarters. This facility makes me grateful I don't live in Santa Barbara. My local urgent care clinics (wellstreet) blow this place out of the water.
Cashew chicken & foil wrapped chicken apptzr are our favorites! Super nice owner & very clean dining room! Minor drawback is the tiny restrooms down a little hallway but it's ok. Just not fancy.

Best frozen yogurt I have had in a long time. They had many of my favorite flavors and toppings. Pretty much is your typical frozen yogurt place set up. The decor is very plastic, but sitting outside is really nice. I savored every bite! I will be back again and would recommend it to a friend.

Great place, close to my home and fair prices! However, they need to hire more professionals. Twice I came I got the same professional with poor profession skills. Dirty nails, sweaty and kept dipping his fingers in the water dish where I was soaking my nails. The other professionals are wonderful and skilled.

I ordered from Grubhub. I ordered 4 cupcakes for the family. They were out of two of them and only sent two. They could have called and made substitutions. Instead not a peep. Grubhub did send me an email after the driver left. Pretty disappointed and will never order from them again. Horrible customer service.
Great steak sandwich but my problem with this place is that no one wears gloves. They handle your food with bare hands, kinda nasty !
Good food, good atmosphere, the only reason I knocked it a few stars is price. Though the menu has depth it's overpriced compared to other restaurants of equal quality in the area.

Burbon Room switched it up a while ago & its just not the same. The quality of the food as suffered, the drinks are less boozy, and the servers don't have the same personality they used to. I keep hoping it gets better but I'm thinking sadly this is the new normal.
Great mechanic yesso and china. Helped me with my s10 and my brother's charger. Good guys I like ....
There was an underwhelming selection for a Japanese restaurant. Food was mediocre and service was terrible. The atmosphere was severely lacking.
Food was good...waiter was good...great atmosphere but, the price for drinks are steep!! $3.79 for a diet coke! $8.95 for sangria! (Which was just ok).
I come here religiously. Not for the food but for their coffee. They adhere by my rules for on the go coffee: cheap, consistent, and close by!
Recently enjoyed a bit pricey but fabulous chicken fajita salad.
You don't get much choice here. Big fatty lamb shank and french fries. Thanks for going all out. Epic fail. PASS!
This place blows. Was given incorrect information by the staff. Staff was rude, short, snippy, and stand offish. Switched to Verizon who cut our bill drastically... couldn't be happier.
The food was ok. The waitresses were a little bit aloof. I think it was because the restaurant was really busy? The environment did not meet my expectations.
Speakers aren't very good, could barely hear the bands voices. Nice seating arrangements.
Mediocre. Expensive. No side order with burgers, side order is a la carte. Atmosphere and a/c is very good.

This place is the worst I would rather stay at motel 6 rust all over the shower tape holding the light in the bathroom, crap service, the room stinks, $140.00 for a room they should Not even comp. I will go somewhere else next t
Average seafood, high prices. Heavy batter. The service was terrible on the very slow afternoon we ate there. I will not go back.

Gave this place three shots. Not impressed. I Don't get the hype. It's hard to make an appointment and then when you get in all you get is the bare bones. One time my technician gave me lotion to do my own hand massage...
Yikes!!! So very expensive! 36$ for two people to share a lane for 30 mins??? Took longer to check in than shoot.

I love chipotle but this one isn't managed well. I hate to say it but it's true. Especially after reading the other reviews, I know it's not just me complaining. Le sigh...at least it's a chain. I can take my business elsewhere:)
Easiest and most painless Root Canal I have ever had!!! I drive over 110 miles now to this DR. I will never go to anyone else. Not only have my RCT lasted me 10 years he is amazing!!
Kind of pricey for a hookah place. Went on a Tuesday night to unwind. Got a lemon melon flavor, it was good. Didn't burn out fast. But I paid about 20 for it. Wasn't worth that much.
Everytime I come here it is terrible food. I really dont understand how they are still around

We sat in the high top area on the balcony... no live music playing. Food looked great tasted average. We went around 2 pm on a Saturday.. expected more received average. It seems like more of a tourist restaurant that gauges you for money with subpar food. Probably won't be back
I was under whelmed. Expected more. Not bad by any means, just expected more from what I read. Not a big fan of the science class decor either.

I was so looking forward to eat Ethiopian for about a year. It was a pleasure to have my first Ethiopian food experience at Kaffa. I got Misir Wot which was very very good! The spices were just enough, nothing too crazy and the texture was just as perfect as i imagined. i can't wait to try more of the menu.
terrible service. wouldn't reccomend, very rude to us and their methodology of seating people is not good. there's way better places out there.
The credit card I left on file was charged for more than 1,000$ of unauthorized expenses. Stay at your own peril.

I called today to try to set up an appt to see Dr. Guggino. The rude receptionist informed me that it was now Newsome Eye Center and that he no longer practices there. I asked if she had a referral number for patients still wanting to see Dr. Guggino and was informed point blank that I could call information. I'll be going else where.

While traveling and passing by the city, I placed an order by phone. I was ready in 15 min as I was told. Their food is very tasty but I hope they offer their sandwiches in flatbread as well. Their prices are fair and responsible. Highly recommended!

My mom and I had breakfast here Christmas Eve around 10:30am. It was packed but we were seated within 10 minutes and the food did not take long at all. I had the veggie endico and hash browns and it was awesome! The hollandaise sauce was on point. My mom had an omelette and also enjoyed it very much. We will definitely be back!!

Ultimate comfort food at it's best, meatloaf, mashed potatoes and peas is entree special today but doesn't matter if it's comfort food, beautiful entree salad or a classic isn't always so good here. Bright and immaculately clean with a friendly staff and always present owners, who treat everyone like good friends, this is a must for a good and stress free lunch.
Great venue for music. We chose to see Elton John here in this smaller arena rather than in a huge stadium in So California. It was a smart decision! Almost cozy by rock concert standards!
If you are into Cantonese style food, this restaurant is not for you. The price is moderate. The parking is terrible.
We stopped in on our way to D.C. What a wonderful surprise!! The food is awesome. The cheesesteak was superb and the bread!!! I highly recommend.
House Italian salad is reliably delicious. Can't go wrong with menu items, service and speed are always great. Perfect casual lunch spot.

Let down. Old school - we were asked if we had a preference in our waiter, wow. Food is average and service was average. Definitely better places to eat around. Had the turtle soup and boulibase, flan, and a glass of wine.
Absolutely great place to go to. Such a wide variety of burgers to choose and its all delicious. Highly recommend going. Also, a large variety of beer, absolutely love it.

Foods good, not great. The ambiance is good, not great. Location though is great. I'm not going to rate it up with the best of the available restaurants in downtown Reno, but it is one of the better ones.
Shameful, this is not a steak house, ScamTown. The fly's really topped it off. I do need to say the young lady who waited on my table was the only up side to a bad experience.

The ambience is everything! And the staff goes beyond to make sure your stay is lovely. Poindexter Coffee will get you going and if there are any issues, the GM Greg will fix it right up! Can't wait to come back to visit again.
Weirdly hostile people here. If you're a minority. I would advise against this place.
Just waited exactly 28 minutes for a chicken burger! The manager needs to solve time management problem

Service wasn't great but we normally go here for good food at a good price. Unfortunately, on my last visit, I found that the quality of the food wasn't up to par. Also, it seems like the portion sizes are getting smaller. Finally, the cashier was really rude. I'll re-evaluate on my next visit...
Super cute area, the people were very nice and friendly. The idle summer was delicious, the others I was not a fan of.

The service was great! The appetizers and wings were delicious. The main course for everyone in my party the general consensus was "bland". The descriptions on the menu make the burgers sound amazing. I had the Wagyu Prodigy burger from the menu and recommendation of the waitress that it was the most popular. Let down!

One of the dirtiest, most rundown McDonald's I've ever been to. I don't ask much from fast food restaurants, but c'mon guys. The fountain drinks were behind the cashier counter toowhich was annoying. Update: They've since renovated the building - interior and exterior. Much nicer!

We came here around 10:15 , and been waiting for about 45 minutes , still for our food . And yes we're still waiting ... it's always packed . Even right when we walked in about the time they open. At 10 and they were already packed . Smh

Excellent staff and a nice, big room, BUT we were there to eat breakfast. The potatoes were frozen cubes, the toast was mediocre at best and the eggs...meh...They have no interest in fresh food, local or much of anything having to do with a good breakfast. Give the cooks and the great employees something to work with....

It's ok but not really for candy more for trinkets and cheap toys. Not impressed for candy options at all unless you need to color coordinate for a shower. I have a list of candy stores that me and my nephew are checking off so we visited this one but won't be back. They were nice but not really a candy sweets store.
Wait staff was more interested in their personal conversations amongst once another than tending to their guests. Food was very bland lacking in bold flavor. I will not be back out of choice.

After 30 minutes of waiting, I checked on the status of my order. After 40, someone came out to ask me what I had ordered. After an hour, they brought my order out and gave me a full refund. It was a nice gesture, but 4 hand rolls aren't worth an hour of my time.

The mall is dying but I did find a cool comic book store near Dillards, so many others ones are closing down, it's like walking through a ghost town, I wonder how long this mall will survive? There are only 2 places left up in the food court. Sigh...
Was not impressed due to very slow service. The food was also overpriced for its quality. It was a lower tier version of Bakersfield and probably won't be returning.

Cool establishment with lots of seating. This brewery felt like the spot for locals as many brought in their own snacks. I was told this place is similar to the weyerbacher brewery, but did not find the resemblance. Lots of sours and IPAs with limited darker beers.

Loved it! When I went, there were people of different ages and everyone was very welcoming. I believe it's also a gay friendly place which makes the bar even nicer. The server was very sweet. I had a delicious IPA beer and my friend got a cocktail which she really enjoyed. Definitely recommended. I'll come back.

Monumental selection of donuts. Appealing display case. Rushed service, which appeared to prioritize efficiency over customer experience. Increase in prices of donuts (one dozen is now $13.95). All of the donuts in the box appeared smaller than a few ones purchased individually.

Excellent stop! The food was great and the atmosphere upbeat, but the outstanding feature is the service. Trev the bartender took care of us and made our visit memorable and Yelp-worthy. This hidden gem is next to the ballpark-you can't miss it!

Really good Puerto Rican Fusion cuisine! Appetizer platter was a great way to start. Mofongos are legit...take it from a Dominican-American! Make sure you try the cilantro/jalapeño sauce on the table!!

Close to home with the cheapest gas and a very good carwash! Buy the carwash at the gas pump and get additional 10 cents off per gallon. Love that there's a Little Caesar's express! Plenty of pizza to choose from.
Food is good, good service. Very disappointed they don't use the Yelp wait-list like the other locations.
Great food the baked pasta is delicious. Doughnuts are great. Unfortunately they we out of lava cake :(

Worst customer service ever . My family and I went here for dinner one evening and they got our order all wrong and we had to wait over 20 mins just for the waiter to take our order . Horrible experience
It's okay, one trip is worth it. Nice to go to the vistor center and get some coupons for wine tasting, etc.

These guys are pretty sloppy. I generally have liked my experiences at various Five Guys but this one is not great. They consistently mess up orders and it just doesn't taste very good. Service is slow.
My son and I stopped by for happy hour. We are very glad we did! Presentation was excellent, sushi fresh, fast and Delish! Our new fave!
Amazing lunch. I work around the corner and have passed it a millions times. Co workers all said they were going and had to go. Got the Cajun Love Sandwich Boiled. So yummy. Will be back.

The food could be good , but we will never know. Got seated, the place was empty except for one other table. Got our drinks, and delicious bread. Then the waiter disappeared. We tried to flag other waiters but nobody cared. After waiting 10 minutes we left. Don't recommend.
Decided on Shrimp PO-boy. The PO boy is average nothing special. The wait staff was slow and inattentive. The restaurant is beautiful though.
A non-descript little hidden gem on Main Street. Very friendly staff, everything that we ordered was very good! The portions are satisfying, we even had leftovers to take home.

Let me start off by saying that I found this place through ClassPass and I fell in love ! Having tried out a lot of the studios in the area I must say this one gave me the best workout- I even bought an unlimited class membership!

I've been to many a smoky bar in my day, but this one takes the cake. Barney's is one of those smoky bars that has no escape for the smoke. Walk in & gag! Low ceilings, fractured layout, sort of pub meets ranch decor. Not loving this place. It is a 3AM bar and is open on most holidays.

This is definitely one of the nicer parks in Tucson. I've come here on multiple occasions just to sit and eat take-out because it's such a beautiful park. It's usually not too crowded and there's plenty of parking.
I never write reviews, but this is the slowest Chick-fil-a I've ever been to. Went at 9:30 at night and waited 20 minutes in the drive thru line with only 6 cars in front of me...

Upon entering the establishment it has came to my attention of that the have not followed the ADA requirements for handicapped folk. But the food was good. I was feeling a little western today so I got the cowboy burger and my girlfriend got grilled cheese with tomato because it was the cheapest thing on the menu and she looks out for me #wifeygoals
Love everything about! Nice friendly staff. Affordable prices and tasty food. Just a really great place

I called twice. The person on the phone acted like I was bothering her. No one could answer questions I left a message both times and never got a call back. Found another company and had my fence installed within two weeks. Bad news...this place.
Great tasting ice cream and treats!!..but ur ic experience will vary depending on the "greenie" or expert serving u behind the counter:(
Since you advertise delivery yet tell people to go online and order through a third party website you get 1 star. False advertising.
Great atmosphere and nice view. Great place to be ignored. Sat at the bar for lunch and was ignored for 15 minutes. Bad 1st experience left without eating.

One word: ghetto. Never open, despite times being displayed and it looked like a mess inside like someone was living in the store instead. Toys all over the floor. Unprofessional and unclean looking. Hopefully some people will be able get an actually good chamoy business running and successful in Tampa because this was a pathetic excuse for one.
Food was good. Fresh and tasty. Cocktails and service was very poor. Disappointing because I've heard a lot of good reviews.

This place only takes care of animals when it's convenient for them, they told me today if they are given a baby with its eyes closed they euthanize it. Last time I was there, there were small baby animals that were all on the ground outside. If something isn't in perfect health then don't bring it here or it will die.
Ask for Tom. He's nice, patient, and not pushy. I felt like he really wanted me to get a great deal. Ended up buying a Hyundai Elantra and love it.

Be sure to check your pizza to make sure it's actually cooked and not half baked... disappointed they really don't care when you call and tell them other than, uh, sorry well check our oven, next time specify well done...well done how about just done period...go elsewhere not here for your pizza.

I love Starbucks. I get coffee about every other day. Never have I had to wait 25 minutes for my coffee. 15-20 people behind me got theirs before me. This is after reminding them twice. This store needs to get it together.

Very popular place to eat in downtown Indy! The shrimp cocktail was delicious and very spciy - great if you need to clear your sinuses too! The filet with green beans was delicious too. Decent service and nice, old school steakhouse atmosphere.

The wait to seat was much shorter than other spots in the area. Our service was excellent and the food was awesome! I can recommend the Trio without reservation! Reasonably priced and clean - we will eat here again.
It's ok It's not anything like having Johnson's or Fischer's. The caramel corn is good but not excellent. Will we get it again? Probably if we need a quick snack.
For real, there are better food options right next to this place with better reviews. Don't settle for less!!! You can go here if you want an angry grandma chasing you for tips

Uggghhhh....... Needed a place to stop for a quick bite before going home. As with most of these type of chain restaurants your expectations should not be too high. Nothing about this Applebee's should ever be rated higher that average. Service- pat Food- sub-par Atmosphere- sub-par They do have a nice patio.
Very good and cheap. Everything was fresh and half the price of many similar places. It's not a fancy place by any means but good. Great find. I will return.

Salty salty steak, sauce...everything was too salty. My hubby and I've been here multiple times and each time left something to be desired....the sides were salty, everything was overly seasoned. It ruined the experience for us. Not going back ever.
Got there at 1130 and had to wait until 12 to get chicken. It was very expensive and came out half cooked. Over hyped.

When you need Mexican, the type with hot rice and beans this is your place. Otherwise, the food is overly cheesy, and just okay. The queso dip is so boring, don't recommend. Lots of cilantro in the salsa. The Michiladas are pretty basic, but hit the spot. Convenient being in the neighborhood.
Fantastic food ! Great drinks and fair prices ! I had the Captain Morgan Halibut salad and it was fantastic ... kinda a locals bar but overall wonderful

Seriously, it's not pizza. It's a flatbread. This is a spruced-up fastfood pizza joint. Nothing homemade about it. The style is a bit original but it doesn't impress me. Go up the street for better pizza-- Alessio is a block away.

I ordered pizza from here for the first time today and was pretty disappointed. My Margherita came with no sauce on it whatsoever, the crust was alright though maybe a little on the burnt side but without sauce it was bland and barely edible.
*Great selection. *Over priced everything. *Wretched customer service. *Never buy silver from here. It's cheaper online.
Our first time so we got the CEO burger. It wasnt better than shake shack and my boyfriend who has a pretty solid stomach ended up getting sick half way through eating.
We were looking forward to trying a new pizza place. Unfortunately it was very disappointing. The crust tasted like it came out of a frozen pizza box. And the next morning was not pretty.

Really good food and a great beer selection. Most importantly it was reasonably priced. We got the jalapeño Poppers and the waitress was telling us that they are made fresh daily, so some are super spicy and some are more mild. They were delicious and quite plump. My brisket was really good too.
Food is good. Employees weren't wearing masks despite Governor Newsom's orders to wear masks through June 15 2021.

I placed an order for delivery on a weekday afternoon. This was first time trying this place out. I ordered a burger, loaded mashed potatoes, and a slice of carrot cake. The burger was average. The mashed potatoes looked juvenile. The carrot cake was ALRIGHT. Super average food. It is extremely likely that I won't order from there again.

...the staff were sweet but very buried... this during Covid-19 era... so my tip is to use the touchpad order system like I did... so your order is sent straight to the cook... I'm unsure if I actually got the gf bun I ordered, & I got 2 meat patties vs just 1 I ordered... but the avocado was delicious & staff was friendly

Nothing special. Food at most average, not worth the wait. Service super slow. Interesting to watch servers / slow/ touches food / bus boy on his cell phone / stuff passes tables and won't pick up dirty dishes if they table "isn't mine" Not going back
Went the extra mile to help us when we needed a sewer clean out installed. Made sure to communicate effectively and got everything done in a reasonable amount of time. Would recommend them for sure.
Guy at the front has a bad, very self important attitude and -whatever you do- don't ever go in there for waxing. You'll come out looking like early 90s Vanilla Ice.

I been coming to this place for so long I told the owner we had to wait for 1.30 min . She told us if we don't like the service we can get the F...k out of there . This was the worst attitude from a restaurant owner I have witnessed in my whole life. This owner don't deserve one customer.

Spaghetti and meatballs. Peanut Butter and jelly. Lamb and tuna fish. A lot of things just naturally go together. Some people say Saturday's are for the boys. I say Thursday's are for $1 Miller High Life's at the Drake. At least they used to be - RIP.
Just a good ole burger joint. I am a fan of good ole burger joints. Seriously, not much to review. Solid.
Food is always great! Small but cozy atmosphere inside, well designed and very neat! Always a pleasure!!
That was the best shrimp and grits I've ever had. The grits were perfect and the flavor was phenomenal. I would make a trip to St Pete just for this breakfast. Stars aren't enough!
Yes! The Taco trifecta was good. Spicy pork was awesome. I'll be back for that thing that has an egg on top. Good stuff!
Fairly quick, reasonably priced Chinese food. It's not going to rock your world, but you'll get a decent lunch with plenty of seating.

It was 8:30 and I said I'm gunna wait 5 more minutes and if my food isn't here I'm leaving without paying for drinks. It's currently 8:39, I'm still here, and I've settled for giving this place a 1 star review instead of dining and dashing. Edit: the food was good moved to 3 stars.

Brent and the crew are super helpful and very nice. Came in to replace a gasket, spark plugs and tranny fluid and they got it done in 5 hours! Price was super reasonable and now my car runs super smooth. If you need work on your car take it to these guys.
Really simple menu and easy to order. The food was really good and inexpensive. This restaurant puts me in the mood for my upcoming trip to Malaysia this fall.

Expensive and tired rooms in bad need of a update. Unlike some if the commits post, I found the front desk staff and the valet to be very helpful and friendly. Will try another hotel next time in Santa Barbara but I do tend to be a room snob.

Hands down the rudest host I've ever interacted with in Santa Barbara in 10 years. I will never, ever visit this place again or recommend anyone go here. The food, service, and atmosphere are mediocre at best. An insolent host is just over the top. There are dozens of better, friendlier options within two blocks of this disgrace of a place.

Good work, mostly timely and Steve is a lot of fun. BUT, super expensive. For the most part, it's worth your money. But sometimes the sticker shock is considerable compared to other places. In my mind though, worth the expense.
Thanks for a great meal and friendly service. My burger was dressed to perfection and our fries were crispy and not greasy. We will absolutely be back soon!
Great selection, helpful service, and decent prices all made my running shoe buying a very positive experience. Unfortunately I doubt that my jogging will go so well but that's another story...
Great vibe, great drinks. Try the Only Child, a fancy take on a rum sour. Menu looked good but I didn't eat. Wish I did though...
Sorry to hear of the closing. I went to Chris Specialty Meats in Lakeview and all I can say is WOW!
Quite and no wait time. Great selection of food. My favorite is beef throat and angus fatty beef. Another nice hot pot place in town!

Got there early on a Sat night. Food cold. Waiter was Hispanic attempting to sadly impersonate an italian. Wine good but that has nothing to do with the restaurant. Everything tasted precooked and heated up in a microwave. Also food was cold coming out. Ok for Smyrna I guess! WAY overated by folks. My mom's Italian and I'm from Louisiana. Food snob!! Not good.

The reviews are so glowing here I was excited to come. What I got was more Tucson Mexican mediocrity and somehow ridiculous pricing. None of the food has standout flavor, only standout prices. Come here if you can't be asked to go outside of Congress to eat and have a hole in your wallet.

Portions are large but it is pricey. The meat comes smoked and very dry. There is an assortment of bbq sauces that are complex and all a little weird. Sides are all great but i wish they offered meat that was smoked wet and a more simple sauce option (nothing wrong with bullseye bbq sauce)
Geri is horrible and extremely rude. Avoid her like the plague. On the other hand, Amanda is amazing and she's super friendly and does a great job every single time!

Everytime I come to this eegees they are always dragging. I came in today to order 2 eegees and there were only 2 customers ahead of me. The first customer ordered a fry and eegee, the second ordered 3 eegees. No exaggerating whatsoever I stood in line for 20 minutes waiting. Don't come to this eegee unless you plan on staying overnight.

Awful. Rude. And low quality food. I will literally go out of my way to not eat at this location, and you should too, but entirely your choice. McDonald's good and service can be good, but never here.

Definitely a must eat restaurant. Very good eat all you can hot pot and Korean BBQ. Our server AJ is very attentive and always make sure we are taken care of. He takes time to explain everything and make sure our dining experience is truly enjoyable.

Needs a lot of work and a staff that can at least meet basic standards of Marriott brand. Staff has no enthusiasm. Worst M Club we've been to. C'mon Marriott, you can do much better! Should have known not to come back after a similar experience last year. Oh well, live and learn.

Mmmmm I love this place!!!! Everything is reasonably priced, they always have yummy specials, and I love that they send you a text message when your table is ready. The food is consistent and really good!! I have to try the "kitchen sink" which seems to be the ultimate breakfast served in a skillet. Order the cheesy grits for the table...you won't regret it!!!!

Surprisingly good. I got a meat omelet & it was the fold over kind. I called in my order & it was ready when I got there which was awesome. The hostess was kind. It was surprisingly empty in there. Overall I would go again.

I came to Nevada Retina Associates with a torn retina. I was seen quickly, and had the repair done the day I was seen. Follow-up visits have been quick and easy. No complaints. Thanks for the quick, professional care!
Always great service! I usually come in with more artful requests and they are always happy to try and create the look I'm going for.

I was very excited about this place. We now live in Florida so I wanted some Chicago style pizza! The salad was HUGE and the house dressing was so yummy...... the pizza not the best. It was very over cooked. I was so sad at this because it was something we all talked about, but it tasted ok other than that.

For a small place it's very cute. Bathrooms smell and honestly need a deep cleaning. Ordered some brisket and rare beef pho. The broth is not actual broth and is a generic broth you can purchase at the grocery store. I expected more from the ratings but I am honestly disappointed.

Although Ruby Slipper is a bit of a crowded tourist trap- the food was outstanding! I also recommend the Bloody Mary! The peacemaker brunch item allows you to mix and match their bennys. The food is GOOD!!
Not great... we were expecting this to be legit but it's very mediocre at best. The mole as too sweet, the salsas don't have much flavor to them, etc.

Kei Sushi has the most unique menu in all of Reno. There are many great combinations of fish that provide delicious flavors. Many options provide a fun experience while dining AYCE. The staff is very friendly, but the service is a tad slow. Otherwise the quality of the fish and ingredients is second to none in Reno. Definitely check it out!
Stopped for coffee & to use restrooms on way to the each. Most filthy bathrooms I've ever seen in a McDonald's!!

I usually go to a different salon everytime I get my nails done but next time I'll be returning to this place! The service was great and my acrylics look gorgeous! In past places I've felt like my finger tips were just about to be ripped off while I was getting my acrylics shaped, but I didn't have an issue here.

A large screen with leather couches, a nice bar & lounge in the lobby, and upscale bowling in the basement. Does it get better than this? Seating is unassigned, so bring friends and get there early enough to grab a drink, hang in line, and grab a comfortable couch.
Had a beautiful afternoon until my car AND My Husband's car were towed from the Publix parking lot.
We went for breakfast and had delicious food. The staff was also super friendly. No complaints!

Service was wonderful. Atmosphere great. I ordered the shrimp and grits . The grits were out of this world . The sauce on the shrimp was good but there was too much sauce and it took over the entire plate. I would give 5 stars if the sauce hasn't drowned everything else out on the plate . Over all was a great experience!

The atmosphere is nice. The best value is the 3 course for $38. The jalapeno margarita is boss, and the parmesan truffle fries left me underwhelmed. The server though, Paige, is awesome, sweet, genuine and just great natured.

Came here for lunch at 11:30am. Door was closed but there's staff inside, they didn't even acknowledge us even though they saw us standing by the door. One of them was eating and was laughing. Im not even gonna try to eat here. Bad service already ‍

This used to be a nice place. Today was the final straw, hence I'm writing this in an attempt to locate a witness to a man violenly shoving me this morning. Please look at http://tampa.craigslist.org/pnl/atq/3467009769.html for details and conact. Thank you

Aquafinz is a great value spot if you are looking for decent seafood. The portions are big! We had the ahi tuna, fish n chips and Macadamia encrusted magic magic & the all were tasty. Service was a little slow, but not bad. The wait staff was friendly and attentive. We'll be back.
The freshly ground burgers were pretty good. Though the burger seems to let the freshness of the meat as its primary seasoning, the burger was under seasoned

Very attentive staff with great food. My husband and I were happy with everything. The staff was good at explaining choices we didn't understand. Nice casual setting, very clean. Fast service as well. We will be back!

Thank you Starbucks for making my low carb Venti iced coffee PERFECTLY! I've been to a ton of Starbucks in the city of Chicago and not one has mastered my order. Shame I have to drive 5 hours for a good low carb coffee. This made the end of my weekend in Edwardsville. Thanks baristas at this location!

Super friendly folks. I have been here a number of times and I always find what I'm looking for. While looking around the store I find bargins and hard to find items. Sometimes, I come out of the store with more than what I had intended on buying. It's always fun to shop here.
I don't know why this place has good reviews. Coffee y bitter. If I wanted burnt coffee, I would go to Starbucks. Food is subpar.

Not impressed. Cauliflower steak was a hunk of raw and cold, it was half the head, instead if sliced thin and grilled. My salad had ingredients in it that weren't on the menu. Fish and chips were soggy with more breading than fish. Mom enjoyed her pot pie. Better places in the area to eat. This one was a miss, we won't be back.

The three little pigs would be my death row meal...and I grew up with an Italian grandmother that made home made pasta and gravy. Go there and tell them you know Taco the Dog and tip them for the amazing food they make
Sonic car hop is great. Fast friendly car hop servers on roller skates!!! Love the rt 44 sweet tea and they have Great chili dogs. A enjoyable family feast and fun everytime!!! Save room for dessert!
This boat ride was not only a waste of money, but also a waste of time. Spent $40+ per person for a boring time and a dirty place. Don't bother wasting your time, effort, or money going.

They are under new ownership. Nails by Tiffany. If Tiffany is a very anxious man in a suit berating his employees and looking sorry that he ever got into this whole mess in the first place, he might want to rethink his business strategy. Very awkward. And my nails chipped less than a week later. And so my quest continues.

The food here is delicious, I LOVE the green beans and sometimes I gotta come here because I crave those alone. Fries and burgers good as well. Service is always easy and quick, I only give it 4 stars instead of 5 because it is a little pricey and they took away the impossible burger :'(. However overall one of my favorites.
After 2 weeks most of the hair is back as well as painful pimples and multiple ingrown hairs! Will never come back.

The food was horrible, the service was so completely rude. I have never been treated the way I was in this restaurant! Waiters that WORK at the restaurant got my phone number and started texting me vulgar disgusting photos. Overall extremely disappointing and dissatisfied. DO BETTER!!!

I gave this place another try. I just walked in and placed a to go order. they always act like they're busy. but I've never seen more than 3 tables full. my lunch arrived and I went home to eat it. generous portions. good food. this isn't china town but it's ok.
Couldn't get the order right. They took my receipt and asked me to pull up. I waited 10 min until someone came out. Wrong again n since they took my receipt I gave up & left.
Management will not give you ice water. Pho here has too much MSG which makes you thirsty. So you are stuck.

Jack if all trades, master of none! Should have realized with a menu so varied that the don't specialize in anything. Steak chimichurri wasn't really good . Chimichurri sauce was blend and lacking the flavor, brightness it should have. Sides of green beans, overpowered by garlic, and bland roasted red potatoes were barely passable and certainly not memorable. My husbands grouper was overlooked.
The Famous Veggie was great with delicious flat bread. They provided fast and friendly service, too.
The food will not disappoint. I had the stuffed fish and chargrilled oysters. I think they have the best chargrilled oysters add crawfish to it. Very delicious! I advise you make a reservation.

Love love love Capogiro! I would highly recommend any of the following flavors: Champagne Mango - made with ataulfo mangoes Bacio - tastes exactly like a Ferrero Rocher! Avocado - oh so creamy, yet fruity in flavor Pistacchio Siciliano - rich and nutty; a must-taste for pistachio lovers

One of my girlfriends brought funfetti pamcakes cupcakes to dinner the other night as a special treat and I can easily say they were the best cupcakes I have ever had! They were amazing!! I can't wait for my next special occasion where I need a dessert, because I am definitely going to get these again! Thank you!
Fun place today stop for a couple glasses of wine. Try the cheese tray but not sure what the issue was with the Brie if it had been frozen but caution there.
Very cheap; the burrito bowls are quite good and healthy. Steer well clear of the cheese.

SO GOOD! The artichoke dip is phenomenal, the grilled cheese is amazing, the mini side salad is delicious, and I haven't tried a soup that I didn't like! Oh, and the staff is always very nice. 5 star for sure.

I like this location, it is easy to park and the lines tend to move quickly. Also, BIG PLUS, they have an automated machine in the lobby that you can use to weigh and post packages, etc with a credit card - usually no line at this machine. As far as Postal employees go they are just about as bad here as everywhere else.

I wasn't too impressed with the staff there. Our waitress was really nice, but I noticed workers not helping customers and playing on their phones. Also, every time I go there something they serve is always broken or out. It's not just one time, but every time. Food was good though so that's all that matters.

Gotta love a Wawa. I'm originally from Philly. The state of Pa would shut down with out Wawa. Need I say more. 22nd ave store is great. Friendliest people working. Pat... my Philly homegirl... see you tomorrow for coffee!!!

The food was pretty good, but would not come back solely based on the service. There was no sense of urgency from our waitress or any of the staff. Food took forever to come out and we were one of two tables in the whole restaurant. Even though we liked the food, probably would not come back based on the service alone.

Oct 10, 2014 I loved the decor and energy of this place. The food we had was just ok. I'd probably go back, but this place wouldn't be on my "oooh, let's eat at___" list... The salted caramel ice cream was very good -- a little goes a long way!!
Delicious!!! The Dixie barbecue sauce is so good!!! Everyone super friendly. Highly recommend! Can't wait to go back.
Loved loved loved this place! So secret, So hidden, honestly could not find it for 5 minutes. Drinks are fabolous! Try the sky pilot, sooo good and sooo strong!
Amazing food great service for just opening very few glitches. Will definitely be back soon
Service was poor. Table kiosk kept shutting down and rebooting. Other tables had similar problems. Menu not as good as it used to be. Very disappointed

The place looks like a dungeon and the food order was screwed up. This is one McDonald's to avoid at all costs. Such a shame they'd allow such a horrible store to function in such a prominent location.

Absolutely incredible!!! Service is so wonderful and the food is even better! I ordered the Cesar salad and polenta fries which were amazing! The owner of the restaurant came to the table and made sure i was happy with everything and even brought out a Baklava desert on the house for traveling from Miami to try the restaurant. Highly recommended!!!

This is just a quick note for those parents out there: The inside has a wonderful rustic feel; looks and smells good (small plates) BUT the tables did not allow for our Chicco tabletop highchair (the base/legs got in the way) and they had no highchairs to offer so we did not stay :(

Terrible terrible experience, never recommend anyone going there. Instead go to the 4th St Trek Shop with much better employees who are knowledgeable and friendly. Every time I visited the bike shop I leave with the same problems or additional ones. Terrible experiences.
Been there twice. I suggest trying a few locations/doctors to find your best fit. My first visit was to light and didn't do much. Second visit was better and I got popped where I needed it.

Disappointed, plants are great...Customer service is severely lacking... went in to see about having an arrangement for Christmas...only one person in front of us...when we were finally waited on, we were told that someone else would have to help us,five minutes later we were asked if we were being helped Bythe same person....she hadn't asked anyone else to help us, so we just left.

Somehow our AirPods and a silver bracelet was missing out of our home and they deny it of course. Do not trust everyone. Do not pay through zelle and certainly do not use them. They could've easily refunded us the value and wrote it off since they have insurance but instead they want to pray for us. Wow and Beware

"Hoagie Bowl"....!! Love love love that they added a little healthier option to there menu. It taste great to me! Especially since i have a allergic sensitivity to gluten... But i still hate their bottled drink selection and that their lotto machine that seems to never work, uhhhggg.......

Was a five star place until it switched ownership a couple years ago. Food is good but just seems to be lacking something. Or maybe it is all the annoying hipster morons that invade it every now and than.
Love these guys! They were super fast and friendly and did a great job! And they are VERY affordable!!Highly recommend these guys! Use them! You won't regret it!
Outstanding burrito with great service . I did the veggie burrito but they have an large selection. Will be back
The DJ is awful! No soul no rhythm no music. Everyone is literally standing around the dance floor.

I expected more during our first experience at Carlucci's for dinner. Service was sub par and the indoor space is a little outdated however, comfortable. Food and drinks were OK but nothing to remember because it seemed overpriced.
I gave three stars only because the servers were very friendly but the food wasn't that great. We ordered Kathmandu sekuwa but they served small pieces of tandoori and it wasn't flavorful at all.
We thought it was a great hole-in-the-wall place, breakfast was good! We loved our cook singing while he created our food- thoroughly enjoyed chatting with our waitress-

I have eaten here several times over the years and have never been close to disappointed! Had their veal saltimbocca last evening. Excellent! Veal was tender, gravy succulent. Love the atmosphere and the wait staff attentive.
Staff is friendly but food needs a "lift". No beer menu ... but the draft I enjoyed was good.
The service was good and friendly, but wow do they use a crappy grade of ground beef. More suited to dog food. I won't be back and I really wanted to like this place.
Good service. Excellent thin crust pizza. Salad and cheese bread lackluster so stick with pizza. Kids menu with pasta, chicken fingers, pizza, etc. Clean dining area and bathrooms. Service was good.

Frequently go to Maison when I am out on Frenchman. The music is great, the food is decent, and the drinks are cheap! My type of place! The only downfall and the reason for 4, instead of 5 stars, is that it can be quite loud. They could work on the volume control and it would be perfect!
Wow no apology from Debora. D huh, guess I'll keep waiting for that one.
Hotels Is ok, it could use a little remodeling, breakfast is not very good holiday in express is better. Lots of other breakfast places nearby.
Pizza has been inconsistent in my experience. Sometimes it is very good, sometimes very bad. One thing that has been consistent is the gruffness of the staff. They barely acknowledge your existence.

Cream Chip Beef over hashbrowns: good! Side of Scrapple: tasty! Coffee that was sorta pushed on me: delicious enough I got a second cup. At 7:30 in the morning I had not issues with service or the friendliness of the waitstaff.
I'm giving 4 stars for customer service by Chris. Kitchen was real slow but Chris went out of his way to make us feel better. Communication is key. Thank you Chris!!
For $15 you'd think that they would be able to not put bacon on my sandwich when that was my only request. Unfortunately, that was not the case so I couldn't eat it at all. SMH

10-13 dollar pricing for banh mi is just a sadistic, and bold move towards me and my wallet. "Pan-Asian" concepts like this need to be driven out of Tampa. You get half the food any normal Asian restaurant would give, for double the price. I'll be sticking with Saigon deli on that note, even with the hip atmosphere of The Hall.
Food is ok mac & cheese is ok veal usta be better good atmosphere portion size went down price went up. I rather Tonys if I can choose, but try it at least once.
Hadnt been here in a while. It was pretty good Had nachos. Love the different salsa choices.
My son says 4 - I say 3. Is deep dish always on the oily side? I wouldn't rush for it again. He did, however, have the pepperoni with garlic crust and I had the traditional with olives
The stopped selling the best thing in the store - the Only 8 soft serve!! Boo! Now they only have one no sugar added flavor for diabetics and no non-dairy ice cream like the Only 8 was.

They closed 1 hour early and would not let anyone in. The sales associate had an attitude when we walked up to the door and yelled at us and stated "we are closed!" They had no hours on the door and was not curious with explaining.
this place might be good for locals, but if you're interested in a quick slice, go elsewhere. N O S L I C E P I ES is it that hard to cook a pie and leave it sit there? really?

Drink machine broken, no avocado, stale croutons, and the baguettes were out. 15 minutes later, they "found" some baguettes. They were hard and not warm. The worst experience I have ever had at a Panera Bread.

The food is pretty good and the service was friendly, though a bit slow. The poutine is really good and the gravy is fantastic! Great place if you're a beer drinker because they have a pretty good selection. Overall a good place to eat and have a few drinks.

Went to La Scala on work mates suggestion to celebrate our 30th anniversary. Restaurant decor is lovely and there are tables outside. Food was fine however our server was not very attentive. Tables around us were receiving better service so maybe our server was having an off night?

This hotel is a bargain. Clean room, large TV's, large rooms, pool, free WiFi, and convenience to downtown Nashville are some of the things that make this hotel a great stay. The price for the rooms and the staff compliment what was already a quality experience.

Very disappointed. Bread and butter was the best part of the meal. Steak was ok, crab cakes tasted like they were frozen, mushrooms from a can. Ordered a salad, never got it. Server was very nice and tried to make things right, but to little, to late.

Stayed here after Burning Man so I might be a little biased, but I thought this place was great! Quiet, comfortable, well maintained...lots of bars, restaurants, gambling, all a stroll down the hallway...what more could you ask for of a hotel?
Stupidly good homemade ice cream, but you pay for what you get: This is definitely the most expensive ice cream per scoop in Old City!

Wish I could give zero stars Just waiting til Google gets to my neighborhood. ATT absolutely sucks. Pay for 100mps, often get less than 10. If you just moved to Nashville, welcome! Let me save you some trouble, ATT internet sucks!!!! Go with anyone else, they lie, they degrade their signal because they can't service what they sell.
Well I don't recommend room 111 (King) as I can sum up my experience with a single word Raggedy. I expect better from a hotel at its price point.

Fun place! Great music and the staff is awesome. The food: burgers. Really good burgers. Don't expect a quiet experience.
