This is a place where you will be lucky to find a seat at the bar and enjoy your greasy burger along with some live music. As far as your options on the strip, this is probably the best.

Terrible service! Waited 5 minutes to be seated. Waited another 5 minutes for a drinks. When my Dr Pepper comes its flat. Waited another 5 minutes to get a food order. They were understaffed and it was during NFL playoffs. Finally got up and left without ordering food.
Place is very disappointing anymore, staff is rude along with the old man who delivers very rude....every time you order I guarantee they mess the order up!

Cool atmosphere, giant jenga, corn hole, pool tables, lot of room to move around. The service was quick and we enjoyed a flight of 6 beers each. I really enjoyed I Yam What I Yam, Dolphin Drool, and Aqua De La Noche.

Cozy. Server was sweet but the food did not wow me as I expected with the rating it has. The pumpkin curry soup was very good. The salmon cake... not so much. I love Brussels sprouts but they managed to make them sweet. Just not for me. I have had much better food in the French Qtr
This small park has a few trail it is dog friendly. Don't expect to see to many people here, it's just u and Mother Nature

I've tried most of Triton's beers and they have all been good. I lean more towards IPAs but I thought their wheat (field house) beer was really good. Great atmosphere in the Fort area. I've heard they are putting a location in the Broad Ripple area too.
Would expect a good coffee:-/ but our mocha was really sad. That's it! The crossiant was ok.. The muffin was ok..
Cheese sauce is boss. California burrito is probably the best choice. It's huge, and absolutely delicious. Come with an appetite. Definitely will visit again.
Recently tried for the first time. Portions were large, prices were too, and my gyro was so dried out it curled into a cup. Too close to Fronimo's to ever return.
One of my favorite spots. Can't beat $1 taco night. Try the garbaccio... it's not on the regular taco menu.

Horrible quality of food. Tomatoes on omelette were expired, had to send it back. Place was very dirty inside. It seems like the place has not been renovated in 20 years. All around it was not a pleasant experience. Not going back.

Beefcake Burgers has the potential to be so much more. The burgers aren't anything to write home about. Topping selection is meh at best. Sodas are self serve. The ice cream is overpriced. The fries are the battered, pre-salted variety like Burger King.

Bad really BAD customer service !!!! Staff very RUDE , management unhappy and unprofessional team . Very slow day ..... 20 minutes waiting for 2 bagels and one oatmeal !!! Definitely we're not coming back to this location :/

Terrible employees don't help nobody was inside no one to help place is trash just like the no good lazy completely useless wannabe workers!!! Lazy people like the workers at this location is the problem with the world!!! I bet even though they can't or know how to work and do there job they still want a paycheck. Lazy people

The regular size acai bowl is about 9 bucks and it's good, not omg or anything. Hold the honey drizzle (bc yuck bee vomit) but the rest of the layers of fruit, acai & granola make for a filling, fresh snack. Great customer service, very helpful in explaining the menu items.

The cruise on the river was nice and relaxing. Don't buy the meal ticket, not worth the money. The Buffet served dried up egg along with okra, smash potatoes and fry catch fish. And something that look like bread pudding. Food not up to NOLA standard.

The cauliflower tasted like candy. Super sweet and inedible. The Brussels sprouts was ok. What had me writing this review is the suggested tip percentage. See the picture and judge for yourself. 20% of 32.64 is $6.52 not $8.13. And 25% of 32.64 is 8.16 not 10.16. To me that's sneaky to get a couple dollars extra tips with lies.

This was a 100x better than I expected it would be. The atmosphere was nice. It was packed. I had the veal wrapped in prosciutto and stuffed with cheese special and my friend had the stuffed grouper. Both meals were superb! The waiter Brian was excellent. I will definitely be back and I will bring my friends.

The service was great like always.This is the stuffed French toast. Not a fan at all. The crust was great but the texture of the bread inside was too soggy. The toast wasn't cooked long enough and the filling completely ruined it.

I suppose I ordered wrong since who the hell comes to Chickies and doesn't order crab fries, but the chicken tenders were gross and definitely seemed pre-frozen (which, after some reflection, doesn't seem all that surprising).
Best roast beef/gravy po boy in the world ! Jambalaya excellent .
Cool little spot but was disappointed by an extremely dry brisket sandwich and so-so service. Don't think well go back.
I went swimming only 3 times. No one. No-one would make eye contact, say hello or show any sign of friendliness. Pool schedule hard to understand. Not a friendly environment.

I still do not understand why this place refused to accommodate my request for honey instead of simple syrup as a sweetener. Your tea isn't THAT good to require THAT degree of quality control. Tea should in fact be experimented with, and your lack of accommodation is, in a word, silly.

This review is strictly my opinion and my love for thin pizza and very thick pizza. I don't like "in between" thick pizza or Pan pizza. The banana peppers were delicious and the speed in which it was baked was great. If you like normal pizza with no pizazz then come on down...

I had really high expectation for this place but it was just kinda Meh.. The boil crab was not fresh even tho we paid $35 for it. altho the pasta and soup was tasty. but the crab just ruined my mood to enjoy anything else. Maybe it was a bad catch and I just got unlucky?

Excellent products, excellent help! Not for locals only, while there saw pilgrims from many lands scooping up new gear - all things skateboard and sweet tees, caps, shoes, stickers, patches, etc. it's all good.

The food was good once we got it. Ordered a burger and asked for mustard and had to wait forever to get it. The rest of the group was halfway through their meal. It was a long wait for drinks, food, condiments and bill. We were thinking they forgot about us. Atmosphere was typical chain restaurant, nothing special

The ice cream is my favorite. It rates a 5+. The service is not good at the Factory which is a shame. When my husband questioned the server, she had a bad attitude. It think these young people need training on providing good and polite customer service.

Love their ice tea! I've only had one tiny problem here with their prime rib, but every other time I've been here I was completely satisfied! Great steak salad! Awesome fish dishes! And great customer service! Recommend for anyone that loves art/antique objects floating around you. Such a neat little place!
Good food.. fresh baked goods. Not a lot of variety when it comes to choices though.
Fresh, unique and flavorful. The wings were a 10 and the tiger shrimp salad was big enough but needed a little more spice/flavor. Margaritas were ok real heavy on ice.

The employees are treated poorly. The Company's hiring tactics are " We Are A Family ". Night shifts are poorly staffed and Money is The Company's main concern. If you are against Puppy Mills, then stay away.
Servil service for only a few customers. The fish was dry and over breaded shrimp the portion was also on the small size.
Sea bass had great texture, taste and was well seasoned. Oysters were a bit small for the price. Amuse bouche was nice. Eclectic decor. Excellent service.

This place was great. Cozy with great colors lighting and general ambiance. The meal I had was excellent, fresh and flavorful. I loved the creole potato salad so much I asked for the recipe and everything was perfectly seasoned. Also, their mission is wonderful and it is worth every penny you spend- no matter how many pennies you may be able to spare.

I would rather claw my own eyeballs out with a spoon than be a verizon fios customer again. If my next apartment is only set up for fios, I will literally MOVE OUT. It's not worth it. You've been warned.
Food was fine, nothing special, but the service was absolutely awful. One refill, waited 15 minutes for the check and another 10 for our receipt.

Positive first. Kelly is a great bartender. Service was excellent. Nice variety of spirts and a decent wine list. Avoid the Grouper Piccata, Fish was dry and very little flavor on the pasta. Chocolate lava cake tasted like it was right out of a box. Beautiful restaurant and great location...maybe stick with the steaks!
Outstanding coffee every time. Their cappuccino is perfection. My daughter said her cafe au lait was the best she's ever had.

Awful experience. Two hours to get into park. 30 min wait for restroom. My guess is that they sold way too many tickets. No police were helping direct traffic or manning parking lots. Will never come back!!!!

This place was awesome, I'm not from around here but wish I was! There are fans of every team yelling talking S and having a great time! There are TVs everywhere most games are on. The food is great (tri tip nachos) and I saw a lot of people ordering pizza, must be good. Ask Marcelo how much the wings are!

This location usually has an extremely long line but thanks to being early wait time was relatively short. All the folks behind the counter were friendly and energetic but they don't have any breakfast sandwiches.

We stopped for lunch here based on good reviews. We got the Brussels sprouts which were just ok, crab Mac n cheese same, and the pimento burger was pretty good. They had the music too loud for dining and the service nothing special. Beer wasn't available due to problem they were having so bummer. Nothing here to make us wanna come back! Good Luck
Dr. Woods is amazing. He has a passion for his work and has worked miracles on my back.

Maki motors did a fantastic job on my daughters car! It is 12 years old car and now looks brand new! Everything is so convenient because he comes to you. He is very reliable and meticulous with his work. I will use him for our other vehicles and would highly recommend him to my friends! Awesome!
Got my butt kicked.... I'm going back for more‼ A bit crowded on sundays - they offer a limited amount of classes this day.
It's OK. New York style pizza which, admittedly, is not my first choice. But it's a nice addition to the Bywater and so glad to see it's doing well. But pizza, like burgers, is not this city's forte.

Why is loud the thing now when you go to a restaurant. To me and my friends it is not very appetizing and I do not like going home with a headache after going to a noisy restaurant. If that is your thing, this is the place to go.

Horrible experience, after 7 years of doing businesses with this store , they ruined two suit pants. The method of compensation was to blame it on the company that processes their product. I was offered 40.00 for the two pairs of pants. Consider using a reputable vendor

We've had po boys and they were great. Today we tried off the dinner menu. The large gumbo had 5 very small shrimp. A remoulade salad was a bowl of lettuce with boiled shrimp, period. There was a container of remoulade sauce on the side. No flavor basically. No french bread. No butter. The shrimp appeared to have been just boiled in plain water
First time dining here Chrissy was our sever and the service and food was amazing. I'll definitely be back and recommend to my friends.

Love it here!!! My co-workers go for the drinks. I go for the fun and karaoke. The menu items are pretty good as well. I often order from the bar, it is easier for me. Good menu, I recommend them. Friday's is karaoke. Be sure to have fun and enjoy yourself.
Food was 50% oil but other than that it was fine and tasty. Will not go back though since I care about my calorie intake.

Went here for the first time about a week ago, week ago (HAHAHA) Anyway I loved it here. The music, the atmosphere. The old Playas I can deal with they give you the sweetest compliments. It's small and quaint and it was definitely a good time! I will definitely be coming back!
really unexpectedly delicious. was a little bit hesitant at first but wow. great oysters, the bourbon glaze chicken was sweet and tangy. will definitely be back again, soon!

Poor service. Had to argue to get my bill. They did not even give us our carry out order. Excuse was she had another table of 15 people? Really you can't handle more than 2 table ? Water refills took 30 minutes. Will not be coming back here.

This review is for Thai chicken with basil only. I was very disappointed with the flavor of the dish. There was very little basil in it and the dish was lacking in flavor overall. As this is my favorite Thai dish and the only one I order I won't be going back.
loved this restaurant. until they booted my friend 3 seconds over her payment. wont be coming again.
This is a study hall Starbucks. Always full and busy. Like all Starbucks, good coffee. But like all Starbucks in Santa Barbara, the atmosphere is bare bones.
I got an atrocious haircut here. Very nice staff but I could've done a better job myself with a pair of safety scissors.
I received graduate psychology degree online. School offers excellent coursework but human interfacing is minimal except negotiating financial issues. Somewhat pricey comparatively!

We ordered two pizzas from here last night for takeout. First time here. We picked pepperoni and ham/pineapple. They took 15 minutes longer than promised. Also, they tasted pretty good, crust is excellent. But - and this is a BIG but - both pizzas were extremely salty. We were all downing glasses of water all night. I wouldn't go here again.
Worst internet service you could have in the Treasure Valley. I loose connections at least once a day. You have to go and unplug your router for a minute then plug it back in to get service.

The pictures and media lured me in, but I doubt I'll visit again. First, my piece of chicken was almost nonexistent compared the the other sandwiches coming out...not a deal breaker though. Then I tasted the food...NOT worth the hype! Super bland bun/slaw and the chicken tasted off -- maybe it's old oil like other reviews have suggested??
Waiter was inattentive. Service was extremely slow. We received our order incorrect. Everyone at the table agreed the food was bland. Won't return.
Food was decent but we've had better fried green tomatoes as well as gumbo from New Orleans. The service was so-so... Rate between 2-3 stars

While Nutt's remains a solid option when trying to decide on something good and close to home, I have to knock a star off as they have gotten stingy with their pizza toppings over the last few pick-ups. Everything else is as good as always and I am excited to pass along they are now offering BENEIGHS on Sundays.
Very disappointed. There was NO crab stuffing in the crab Rangoon. Pad Thai and Panang curry very bland and not fresh. Would NOT recommend!
Ordered a burrito and hot dog. Tasted good but it took 20 minutes to get the hot dog after asking the counter person

They have turkey hot dogs!! And they are AHHHmazing!! I like the Boston dog and the New York dog. The service is always fast, the staff is uber friendly, the prices are cheap, and they are by far the best hot dogs I've ever had. I've made the trip on numerous occasions from Murfreesboro to Nashville to get my turkey dog fix!
Beautiful historic building. Total tourist trap. The kitchen isn't trying because they don't have to. Sad. Food seriously mediocre. Service provincial. Way overpriced. A joke really.

We have always enjoyed Main Street Burger, but the last two times we have ordered the burgers are below their usual quality. Burgers are undercooked, rare, and the last time I had a dark brown hair in my cheeseburger. Main Street Burger needs to " up their game" in the quality department. Sorry, we will find another favorite burger place.

Ordered on door dash. At 9:00pm received a confirmation of a received order and delivery estimate of 9:50pm. Received an email at 9:43pm stating that my order had been cancelled and my money was refunded. No other explanation. I've always loved this restaurant, but this was extremely irritating.

Completely uninspired. Although this is the table-service restaurant, do not expect relaxing or expedient dining. The staff seems stressed and disorganized. The bar was out of stock on several items (no light beers, two red wines). The food is just thrown together and nothing special.

I dined here on February 13th; not only was the food mediorcre to poor, I got violently ill shortly after eating there. In retrospect, the place did not look clean and the cook looked clueless. I am following up with the Board of Health of Buck's County.

well, i am not a seafood person. BUT, my travelling partner is and he LOVES this place. Its a must on each New orleans trip for him!! I love their Po Boys, delicious everytime! The wait staff is funny and the food comes out quick and amazing!!

I found this place on yelp and the menu seemed impressive. It was a Saturday and they happened to have the few weekend special. I had the goat biryani and the country chicken curry. The biryani was decent but the chicken was a big disappointment. It tasted very ordinary. The service was very good and quick. Probably won't be back....might stick to Anis!
Great folks. Extremely knowledgeable and attentive! I haven't been to a dentist in a couple years and they have been nothing but accommodating!
Bloodshed Farms offering 4 different scare scenarios, that are exciting and adventurous that meet anyone's expectations. Very well done having screamed for more.
Went there once for lunch and found it decent. Liked the atmosphere and service. Glad they are a mainstay in the 'yunk.

Ok service. Everything was fine until a manger came up to me and told me I had to put on my mask between sips. And I had three beers in one hour. So I was basically told to put on my mask every 5 seconds due to my constant drinking. What a waste of a place. Not going there anymore.

Just one word- amazing! My 9 year old wanted to make sure they got 5 stars! My entire family (including 3 kids who are picky eaters) loved this place. We had the Nutella and apple jam crepes, and the Aztec panini. All delicious. The owner (didn't catch her name) was super sweet and awesome. Definitely will be back!

No need to get verbose here. It's a chain. If you've been to one you've been to them all, right! Almost because this one is better managed than most. The facility is a little cleaner. The salad bar is a little fresher. The wait staff is a little friendlier. If you visit you will have a little better time than other locations.
Waited 15 minutes while burger sat not being served. They boxed up several orders that came out after mine then finally handed me my one Burger. Was no longer hot. Very disappointed.
I could've save that $140 and did it myself. I wasn't happy at all I won't be using this service again.
Staff-Absolutely amazing! Overall hotel: -Seems safe and low traffic. Close to the main police station. -A little outdated and has a stench. -The room was comfortable, but outdated as well
Food and price were good, in fact taste was above expectations for a 24 hours restaurant.
Today I had the pleasure of meeting Jenna and trusted her to cut my hair. It has been one of the best decisions I have ever made. #inlovewithmyhair Jenna is the best.
Love this quick hike with the furry ones buried between the beautiful homes in SB.

CraZy long waiting time and super slow service. Not happy at all!!! The food is ok here (not so good but not bad also). However, oh my god we waited more than an hour to get the food. We only ordered appetizers. I can not believe that we wasted so much time in this Restaurant. Not happy.

Definitely a must if you are visiting Edmonton. Lots of great shopping and some cute attractions--waterpark, sea lion show etc... The one warning is to NOT go on a long weekend. It's like a zoo then. I love shoppoing and I could not handle it. Also, parking will be hard to find.

Rooms are very neat n clean and the towels are very clean. Will like to stay again in this hotel. - Also the morning breakfast is very fresh and healthy. - cheap and convenient way to stay at this place rather than wasting money at big hotels spreading nearby.

I will never buy from Popeyes again long long time customer. I usually get the manager's special 10pc spicy tender with a large red beans and rice and a orange drink. Use to cost 20$ but now cost 27$ get bent pooeye
Seriously the worst experience ever. It's so hot in there and after 8 pm they only make pepperoni, cheese and sausage. Seriously? You close at 11 pm. Worst customer service. Won't be coming back.

Gotta knock y'all down a notch because of the cold stale waffle fries that you insist on serving that most people I see end up throwing away. The spicy chicken sandwich was good not great would have been better off with the burger.
Don't go to this hospital. As a previous employee, I can tell you they are discharge-driven. They work their hardest to get patients out, and the CEO is a megalomaniac.
Eat before you get there. Trust me on that one. Beer was warm. All of it. Brian James and the Revival were awesome. 5 stars for music. 1 star for food and beer. 4 stars for ambience = 3 star average.
Empty restaurant takes 30 minutes to greet you, completely unacceptable!! The managers were just as rude as the servers! Don't worry Copia, you achieved your goal, we won't be back!

Checked out this new place last night and I really liked it. At last a nice place around Tampa that serves pretty good Mexican street food. They also have a bar and the food is great too. A must visit eatery. Liked the ambiance and the place has a really good vibe to it.

Been here twice... fries are awesome... not overdone but very crispy. The first time I had the Italian sub and it was great. Next I tried the Italian beef... never had one before so nothing to compare it to, but to me a bit bland... but the hot peppers were great!

Food is decent. I ordered mixed taco (3 pieces) with soft corn shell. The shrimp, chicken, and carnitas were cooked just about right. They were quite tender. The corn tortillas was a bit to "cornice" and not soft enough. Chips were a bit too thick and not fresh enough. It's a decent place for lunch.

No hard copies of the menu available and our phones were unable to open the app. We left. I called another Chili's to ask if it would be different there. They said it's Chili's policy not to have menus available for customers. We went to Texas Roadhouse instead.

Service was pretty good. Food was generally tasteless. 3 different soups were cold. Steamed pork dumplings were extremely bland. Scallion pancakes were good. Rather than remaking a dish that they messed up, they just added some hot sauce and jalapeños. Cramped seating. Very Americanized. I won't be back.

This brewery was okay. We didn't order food, and tried a flight. But they didn't have many options. Two of the picks we couldn't tell apart. Stouts only in the fall? I did enjoy there IPAs and I am usually not an big IPA person.
awesome crawfish meat pockets. This is what I ate because I didn't want the runs driving from new orleans to atlanta GA. The price is $3, I bought 4. I say I could use some meat pocket for dinner.

Ordered delivery from this location and the chicken came a bit soggy which was disappointing. Even though the exterior was soft, the meat itself was dry. I know delivery and transporting the food makes it not taste as great, but last time I got Crown Fried Chicken from another location, it tasted much better and fresher.

Not a pleasant experience, I'd rather use LA Fitness. Better machines and facilities including a pool and sauna. Chuze Fitness is cheap and it feels like it! If the price is a major concern then it's okay. Better than no exercise at all.

I don't know what kind of language you have to speak when phone ordering. The girl seemed to speak English, but didn't seem to have a clue as to what their menu offered. She played stupid with us and we finally ordered our pizza elsewhere. Yeah, these people deserve an increase in minimum wage!
Been there twice and hated it. Avoid their super GREASY fried brussel sprouts! I know bbq is very subjective, but this food was just yucky!
Good food for a sports bar... the hamburger was very tasty. The soup was not spectacular but it was hot and acceptable. The service was great. Love the outfits!

This location is right in the middle of bourbon street hustle. Great pizza by the slice and fast service. Perfect to have once you are tired and hungry from all the bar hopping. Pizza is 3.5 star compared to NYC pizza, but if u are wanting pizza at 4am on bourbon street, this is your place.

My go-to place for sushi right now, enough said. Has the best sweet potato roll by the way. Their 3 roll special is the same price as many other sushi places but has much larger portion of the none-rice part and also fresh. Also, Veggie tempura killed it!

Friendly service when they got around to greeting me. Took my order efficiently, asked if I wanted ketchup or fry sauce when I stated fry sauce there was an upcharge for that no where on the menu does it state fry sauce is extra. My meal came out within accepted time amounts overall just okay service
Recently have noticed a number of times where the pies toppings are a bit skimpy. We usually get a half and half and the end up being 1/3 and 1/3 with a bare space in between. Go figure

Different atmosphere than the (regular) Cafe Poca Cosa, but it provides a nice contrast! The food is just as good (which is really saying a lot), and quite similar. Great music! You can go here for breakfast and head to the regular Poca Cosa for dinner. Put some $$$ in that jar by the kitchen, it goes to a very worthy cause.
Well good food never got my bread with my meal not a happy camper the girl seem have forgot and then
Great selection of local beer. Wait staff were extremely nice. Great food decent selection. Plenty of room to spread out. Inside and outside dining also available.

Environment looked good, but the food was lacking. The chips were stale, it was hot in the restaurant. Chicken chimichanga was not hot, the cheese dip was not plentiful at all, however the sour cream made it palatable, but would not return in the future.
The store is actually pretty decent. Good selection of healthier foods. Seafood department and beer selection isn't bad. The worst part about the store is the other patrons. Most wreak of weed or BO.
Aperol Spritz is my favorite drink and hard to find. I will be back. Bar foods during Happy Hour were excellent. Staff was very enjoyable and knowledgeable and sweet!!

Great business district restaurant, you'll find better restaurants if you wander away from the French Quarter. Most people think of New Orleans as just the French Quarter, believe me there is much much more and this restaurant is proof.
I heard its a million Midtown downtown however this is the only one I ever been too. It was very dirty and the food wasnt all that good....

I found the woman behind the desk to be helpful and friendly. It's a great library, sunny, bright and clean. Best place to pass a few hours getting work done. Thank you Andrew Carnegie, your legacy lives on!
Weird tasting nuggets, uncooked fries, rude customer service. Manager lets employees curse about drive through people while just standing there. Will not ever go to this one again!
I tried more than once to like this place. The wraps are very light or dry, sometimes both. Where is the sauce? Disgusting!!
Had the poca cosa plate a sampling of three different entrees you could definitely share this between two great variety good service nice ambiance

Good food, and REALLY awesome staff and management! So nice and accommodating when you bring kids in. The kids got a little loud, and when we apologized, they thought nothing of it, and said they just hoped we were enjoying ourselves. Thanks for being so cool guys! We'll def be back.

The decor at Shangri La is adorable. I just love it. But the food was lacking. It reminded me of cheap, frozen meat-substitute items from the grocery store. However, I admire, and greatly appreciate, their effort to cater to vegetarians. I plan to go back, and hopefully write a better review.

If you are hungry this is an ok place. The pizza we got 1/2 cheese and the other with bacon. The cheese is velveeta... so not on my list of favorites. It worked but not that great. The staff was nice but forgetful.

Had lunch here today. Great atmosphere with good food. I had the steak tacos they were pretty plain nothing real special about them. My friend has the steak and shrimp fajitas which were also good but nothing different than any other Mexican restaurant. Chips and salsa was refilled and the wait staff was attentive.

Service was OK. Beer was good. Food was horrible! Out of coleslaw for the BBQ pork sandwich. I didn't think it was possible to overcook a hamburger as much as the one they brought to my wife. Do yourself a favor and eat elsewhere!

I am at the olive garden on cityline ave and i ordered the shrimp fresca and there was a damn rubber band in my food. What the hell! Who knows where that came from. The mgr took the price of the entree off but that's it. It's a given that place is disgusting im not going back. Yuck! A rubberband... really!

Who are the yelpers for this location?!?!?!? This place barely had any selection to be call a dimSum place..more like a fast food chinese restaurant. The service was slow..the pan fried noodle had spam like meat..and 5 spice noodle broth was flavorless. How da heck can this place have a 4.5 rating at this point..I'm shock and truly disappointed in my fellow yelpers.

I will never return to this subway location, and advise you to do the same. These people were so rued when you asked a simple question. Rolled their eyes, talked crap about the customer in the back OUT LOUD. Have no kind of respect for the costumer only their to milk the clock,no guest service skills. Very unprofessional. Management needs to step up.

Nice environment, friendly staff, great presentation, but really the food isn't there yet. We had the sauerbraten (bland) and butter chicken (without curry spices also bland). Those dishes should never be bland. I suggest someone in the kitchen find a spice rack.
Had a great experience, both food and service was excellent. Salsa is has a great smokey taste and we will be back.
Love the white pizza and Peroni Beer. Nice neighborhood eatery in the Westchase area. Good place to bring the family.
Great for a happy hour sushi, they were kind and the food was pretty good- wasn't wow'D and for being the only person there our service and food took quite a while.

Do NOT stop in here while waiting for your plane!!! All staff was rude, stressed out and outwardly huffing as they moved about the restaurant. We were walked by 5 times at an outside table without being acknowledged even once. After 20 mins we headed back to Bardenay where we were greeted immediately with a welcoming smile and served withg in minutes.

This restaurant is new and small. Yet, the food is VERY good. Make reservations.. grab a bottle of wine (this is a BYO).. and settle in for easy parking in the neighborhood.. quick service, and GREAT food. They serve the Indian classics, prepared skillfully. and as spicy or mild as you want. Good food, good time, go now.

Bill Cawthon is the chef. He came out to our table and made recommendations. There were six in our party and we each ordered something different. Everything was AMAZING. I highly suggest you try the pimento cheese appetizer. Everything was delicious. Great prices and comfortable atmosphere. 5 BIG STARS.

Really like the food here, and the mixes for tequila are great. However, the service has really slipped. Used to be fun and attentive. Now it is somewhat condescending, unattentive and erratic. Hopefully the place will focus on the issue so that I can go back to loving it, but that won't be anytime soon.

Food wasn't that good. The rice was very dry and the lamb chops were sweet and sour which I didn't expect from this place(not what I ordered for a Mediterranean place) . Love the hookah but I won't be ordering food from here! Seemed like they just heated it up.
Solid brewery. Came here in the afternoon on a Friday--laid back, not too busy. Good service. Liquid IPA is a gorgeous amber color, clean bouquet, and one of the best IPAs I've had, anywhere.....

I went here for lunch recently and tried the popcorn crawfish, and shrimp po-boy. Gf had the blackened salmon. Popcorn crawfish, their signature appetizer was good. Shrimp poboy was good too. Gf loved her salmon. Service and ambiance was excellent. Great music (oldies) playing in the background was a bonus, being a music lover myself. I would recommend.

nice outdoors area where you can hang with big groups. felt a bit awkward at night though.. because there were so many kids around. good place to go during the day for a chill afternoon/ evening. lines were super long to get any drinks and food, and was a bit crowded.

Great location and potential for something good but if you're from out of town, do yourself a favor and go somewhere else like Big Rays for authentic FL seafood. Our service was good but food was nothing special and priced as if it was.
Ordered a spicy ramen. I felt too hot to enjoy it's taste. Maybe other type will be better.
Under new management. Great father and son duo. Food and service is a plus. Also enjoying listening to the music they play!
Poor service, late last night of Mardi gras. $20 cover for 5 into an empty restaurant. No go.
Outstanding food. Excellent service and quality ingredients. Good price for the amount you get for in house and take away. Highly recommended!!!!!!!
The service we received today was absolutely horrible. Treated like we were not Important. Will not repeat.
The drinks were good. But when you order and are charged for a venti I also expect the cup to be filled more then half way.
Headquarters is the best. Tiny coffee shop serving delicious coffee and great vibes.

Seriously, if you haven't been here you are truly missing out! The food is phenomenal, the beer and cocktails are incredible and the staff is absolutely amazing! Check out this spot for fun times, great people and awesome beer!
Slow service but good steak. Not busy at all service so slow took an hour to get food.
This is my first time here but I absolutely love it! The coffee is delicious & the waffle sandwich is amazing! Highly recommend!

Staying at the Hilton hotel across the way. We walked over the bridge to get here. Hamburger was great & chicken skewers was great, what was even better is our waiter, Logan. Refilling our drinks without asking. Great customer service & good food. Worth the walk, worth the wait

A total ghetto dump; Constantly odd or questionable looking meat selections, and that's when something is in stock. Nasty, tired, lazy employees from the management on down. Have been here several times and last night was my final visit to ACME supermarket.
Good place to eat and great service. Kinda expensive, however, and I thought food portions were slightly small for their price.
excellent! Fried zuchinni......to die for.... Butter cake for dessert 6*stars.....
Super underwhelmed... spring roll was tiny, shrimp and broccoli was ok but didn't taste like traditional shrimp and broccoli. Only positive was delievery was realitivley fast.
Staff is friendly, food is good and service is quick. Great place to grab a quick good burger.
This is my favorite Thai restaurant. The food is absolutely delicious and the service is great! Can't say enough good stuff about this place.

It's a very nice place, I got almost everything I wanted. It's very close to my house so very convenient for me. I got everything I wanted, vegetables, dry fruits, indian spices, grains , all kind of ready to eat food.. there is a separate section for meat, all fresh cut goat, chicken , lamb and beef..highly recommend!
Good burgers. Good place to bring kids. If you use a credit card, they will force you to use the terminal at the table and charge you $2 for using using it.

Wow Is pretty much all I can say. The place was a mess, like they just finished a rush. But was slow when we got there. Every single table was dirty, the floors were disgusting and the food was burnt. Have given this White Castle more than one chance. Will not be back.
Good food (closer to 4 star)....jambalaya was tasty. Their wines are always enjoyable. The cost warrants good food and good services. The server lacked personality.

$5-7 a pint. The 3 I had all had a cider type taste. I described it as a beermosa/mimosa flavor and type. I had an American wheat and 2 IPA's, so wasn't exactly expecting cider fizz. I'd say 3.5 stars but I'll round up because it's beer

The wait was ridiculous, but we had a large party (10) and they really did all they could to accommodate us quickly. They just need more space. The food was unbelievable. We all tried something different and nobody left hungry or dissatisfied!

The place is beautiful unfortunately the experience was ho hum. Food took 45 min to arrive and the place was empty. The 3 Ways salmon was ok. Only came here for my sister in laws Bday. Cheesecake factory prices are similar with better food.

Desk very helpful. They explained they were doing alarm test until 3pm but they went until 4pm. There was a toothbrush under the bed a charging cord and garbage by the chair in the main room. Garbage under the other side of the bed. And a fairly noisy hotel in general. Ok in a pinch but I would not recommend.
Food and service was GREAT ! Best place for a New York deli sandwich with super delicious fries!

What a fun bar! Dueling pianos were Great and my husband said the Gumbo was delicious! The resurrection drink is nothing special at $15 it is very sweet and strong but the cup is pretty cool and worth the money especially when you get a refill for $9. The bartender Ahli was Sweet and so down to earth. Gotta check this place out!

We went on a suggestion of a local. Small place-very crowded. No real atmosphere But the food is great. I had the chicken Marsala , he had the steak . All was cooked properly nice n tender lots of flavor. I would recommend .

This was such a great find while visiting Boise. I had the curried egg sandwich on gluten free bread and it was so delicious. The staff is super friendly and service was really quick. I will be back the next time I'm in Boise!
Worst customer service I've ever received from a hotel/ motel. Not worth the hassle- stay some where else- seriously, anywhere else!

Barney's is the last stop for a night filled with so much drinking that you have taken up smoking, gotten in touch with country roots you didn't know you had, and started counting out pocket change to buy beer. A friend said of Barney's, "If you read reviews, you don't want to go here."
This was the second time eating here. The wait is a bit long but the food is worth the wait. Definitely a must go for breakfast when in Santa Barbara.

Fantastic dining experience each time we've been there. At only our second visit, the server recognized us! The employees seem genuinely happy and this makes the dining even better. Food great, the sangria is THE bomb!
Good selection of foods. Pizza and service was great. Good quality meal and friendly staff. No reservations so if you end up going around dinner time, you may be in for a wait.

I've been coming here for years. Nay, decades. My husband and I had dinner tonight and it was just as good and lively as I remember. I had fried calamari with capellini and he had the gnocchi. Both delicious. The bread and house dressing are an institution. BYOB. Can't be beat. Looking forward to coming here again and again for years to come.

Wow what a disappointment..... I was once a fan of Jack's... Service is still good but food was mediocre at best. And for mediocre food it was WAY overpriced. It's gonna take a lot to get me to go back. Jack's? PASS!
Brisket dry and flavorless. Fries were not good. Spare ribs not cooked well. First and last time coming to mission bbq.
Attentive service and very good food in particular the kimchi pineapple, fried chicken, we had both the wet and dry variety and finally the Dan dan noodles very tasty

I went recently and the space is cool and the bathroom is neato in decor (tiny corner sink). I like the benches and above table outlets. I didn't find the staff overly friendly. I had hot chocolate and a pastry and it was adequate.
The drive through line was incredibly long so we decided to go in to order directly. Standard cheese burger, fries, and a milkshake. No complaints here.

It was a good thing that my honest review Received a Profesional response from The Grand Sierra Resort They have a nice property, It would be too bad to not have the right management and products in place in all Dept and levels to not delivery a customer satisfied experience

Waited for a looong time to get our food and ice cream and we were the only ones in the restaurant. Esquites were super disappointing no liquid, a big scoop of mayonnaise and a bit of cheese no much a flavor. Se tardaron muchísimo tiempo para servirnos la comida! Y como 15 minutos para el helado! Los esquites nada más sabían a mayonesa. :(
Great Meat Lovers Mac n cheese. It's really good with sriracha. The sriracha sauce takes away the greasiness of the Mac n cheese. Love it love it love it

Very disappointing. Tasted like stake'um with cheese wiz. Anyone who can even cook just a little can make a better Philly at home. I just don't get all the hype. The owner was very rude. He has lost his passion if he ever had any

Lotsa food for reasonable prices. Very, very helpful and friendly staff. Family owned and operated for years. Authentic Mexican fare. Guacamole is fantastic. Salsa is fresh and spicy. The son took over for his mom and trys very hard to keep going in her tradition. You won't be sorry you visited.

I spent 50.00 on the doughiest soggy party pizza and wings .. very disappointed in the pizza it was almost inedible and very hard to remove from box .. the wings were okay .. the meal was definitely not worth 50.00 ..

Cool place to eat, I go here lots. French fries are awesome. Lots of vegan options for pizza. You can get vegan cheese added for 1.50. The service is overall decent but could be better. Kid friendly and not that expensive.

This Wendy's was very nasty! Look at the photos! We arrived at 715 pm. There are 5 workers present and not one has attempted to clean! You can smell the stench from the trash as you walk by. The floor was in desperate need of sweeping. My husband said his hamburger was hard and overlooked. Would never recommend this place.

What I can remember through a haze of debauchery is that this place was decent. A big open space, good loaded tater tots and edamame. Service was very good. Looks like its a young twenties kind of hangout a little bit to much of a meat market for me but all in all an OK experience.

A must visit. Everything was purfect, except.... Got the wagyu flank steak. The meat was amazing. However, it was a bit too flame licked. It was like eating ash. The worst part is I hate sending things back. You only have one chance to make it purfect, and you didn't. Too bad it was a fail. Turn down the flames, please.

The cheese platter is delicious, and if the duck confit is available get it. Avoid the steak salad, the meat tasted "off".... Good Pinot noir, although skimpy on the pouring. Live jazz Thurs, Fri and Sat until 11pm if you like that. A little pricey too, but good atmosphere.
Quick hamburger fries quick fast food. A place to go if you want to fill your belly cheap.

This place is whack, my friends and I were starving so we stopped in and it was very ghetto. My steak was undercooked. Not sure why there are good reviews for this establishment. This one star goes out to the server who was pretty friendly.

While I hear that their bartender is aaamazing, the restaurant itself is just OK. When you dine here you're mostly paying for their rent, not incredible food. The servings were small, and I'm not a fan of people forcing you to "save room for dessert." Maybe it all would have been better had I ordered a drink...
Love coming here! There Tom Kha Coconut soup is my favorite, so savory and tasty. Their drunken noodles + fried rice are also delicious. Definitely worth a visit!
Come in Sunday... Football day.. And they are all out of wings and park and tons of beer. Really? Not impressed.

Place opens at 10:30 (according to the sign). Ordered my pizza for 11:05, I showed up at 11:10, the lights were out and the door was locked. Someone showed up about 10 minutes later and my pizza wasn't ready until 12.
clear communication, fair and comprehensive price quote, timely arrival, quality work and clean-up

Two hours for delivery on a Monday night. Two hours. And this is the third or fourth time I've ordered delivery, either through the restaurant directly or Grubhub. TWO HOURS. WE LIVE TWO MILES FROM THE RESTAURANT. Food is good but very expensive for Chinese food. Also, TWO HOURS FOR DELIVERY. Go elsewhere, please.
Mango margarita was delicious. Should have had another one because it would have probably helped the carne asada Angelina taste better. Meat was extremely tough.
Even though I believe it is the same owner as banana leaf, I like penang much better. Their food is pretty good and the waitresses are nice. This place can get pretty busy. But it's a must try!
Haven't been in a bit, won't be going back.piss poor service with only 3 people there and still waited 20min. and for what half burnt pizza !!
I like this restaurant, I go there from time to time. It offers very delicious mediterranean food such as Kabab and Falafel.

Best price for a Brazilian in the city. Gloria was great and put me at ease. However my appointment was at 10 AM, and the receptionist didn't show up until about 5 after to unlock the doors. I was still out by 1030 AM.
Ive still tried to get in touch with the owner still will not return my calls the receptionist gets smart every time i call
Great place for cigars. Always look forward to the monthly specials on cigar purchases. Great value and always have my favorite cigar in stock!!
This was a great spot for breakfast! The service was fast and the food was great quality (and inexpensive)! I definitely recommend this spot.
This is a nice, clean, and spacious airport. I enjoyed the jazz influence! But there were not a lot of food options.
Food was GOOOOOD! Crack fries is like it says... CRACK!! Recommended to everyone to try it...

I love this place, the steaks are always perfect, every time I ask for a different meal I never get dissapointed, the service is amazing always and also the cheescakes of course. Also the prices are good. The only reason about the 4 stars it's because they didn't have spanish menu like in other restaurants and because the sangrias are kind of bad.
Not bad Chinese food compared to other local establishments. It's the closest fix I can get compared to what Chicago offers.
I was helped by Katie! She os great at what she does. I saw her multitask while help me with my complicated situation. She took my flags off and I was out the door!!
Service was seamless and easy and you even get a nice bag to put your clothes in each time you send them your clothes! I will definitely be using this again!

My visit to Mahoneys was average. The service was good. The fried green tomato sandwich was super bland. The shrimp po boy was good, the shrimp were tasty but needed some salt. I would visit again if someone I was with suggested it, but I don't know that I would choose it.
We went to Thai Phooket for dinner; The thai coffee there was a winner; If the wait took much longer; We'd have died of hunger; So three stars for this contender.

Great casual place near convention center. We were recommended Zios by the Hampton Inn. Sicilian and white pizza with spinach slices were awesome, so was the chicken parm sandwhich--great bread, and not too heavy on the sauce. The service was wonderful. We topped off a dinner that hit the spot with some great canolis.

Really good food! Great Korean BBQ was delish and staff was very friendly. Interior decor was a bit older but clean (which is the most important). Prices are decent! Will definitely come back to explore more of the menu.

The Service: Eh.. Also, I am not sure why the Sweet Tea is $6. Way too expensive. I have also tried to call them to arrange a birthday dinner, but was told that they could not do it. I don't get it. Probably will not be back.

Just stopped in for a quick sandwich. JJ is my go to out of all the chains. Never stopped at this location before. My bread was cut all the way thru so everything slid out of my sandwich and the lettuce was very bitter.
Poor service. Waiters didn't even acknowledge us on an evening when it wasn't busy. This has happened to us several times. Food is pretty good but it takes a while to just get water!

Reno in general is not like I remembered. This bar restaurant set up is quaint and nonassuming. We were here for dinner only, no drinking. The tapas are decent, perhaps don't rival the best I've had, but still very enjoyable. No view of the river like I had imagined being so close to it. Great location within walking along the river and the downtown.
Smokers heaven. If u like cigarettes, you may like the smoky atmosphere. Dirty floors and tables, meanwhile stuff sits outside and smokes.
Hotel is dated and find beds uncomfortable WiFi is slow and non existent For them to call this a Crown Plaza hotel it really needs to be updated and have more staff working
I like the pizza. The owners need to get a clue about service though. Not sure why they opened a pizza place ....
My burrito was bland and boring. Service wasn't very friendly. Overall, not a good time. I wont be back.
What kind of Panda Express doesn't have straws ? Felt like only one employee was working her ass off while the rest took there time
Great service, not too long of a wait. Love their garlic fries with lots of ranch. mmmmmm Thank you Red Robin!
We have gone to Iron Hill Brewery several times. The food & atmosphere is great! The best part of the restaurant for me is that there are latex free!
Walked in, seated myself, waited seven minutes, and left. No drink, no waitstaff, no menu. Maybe they need some help. Pretty much sums up my experience here.
Korean tacos tonight w Irene as our bartender. Good times!

I have been shopping at WinCo, so when I came here to get a few things for dinner that night I was shocked by how expensive it is. The store is very clean and large so it doesn't feel crowded, but the amount of money you are spending for such a little amount of groceries does not make it worth it.

First time going to this frozen yogurt place and I was surprised on how much it cost. I thought $.49 an ounce is good but once you put everything you want it gets a little pricy. They didn't have that many flavor and the toppings were regular
Said Yelp check in offer is no longer valid. As I showed it on my phone. Awkward. Food is still decent but primal will skip this place for a while. Too bad.
Last time I was there I saw a cop kick a bum out. They need to do a lot more of this because the place is infested with bums and crackheads.
Maybe almost 3 stars on a good day. Consistently is one of the main problems. Was at one time one of the best burgers in town. It helps that that many items are cooked on real oak grill.

Order here twice and disappointed both times.. first time they sent the wrong food and the second time I had to take cancel the order after the told me it would take 1.5 hrs to deliver ****Don't order from here ****
Store was very busy with only 1 employee, makes buying stuff take too long. The store has a groupon available but will not allow you to combine the store discounts with the Groupon.
The washer doesn't do a great job and the staff isn't overwhelmingly helpful like other self serve drive throughs.

Food is really good, but, take out orders called in usually have an error. We placed large orders and have found portions of the order missing or wrong items being sent. Shouldn't let kids take such large orders to go. If it weren't for that, I'd give it a 5 star.
Dungeness Crab Cakes Summer Squash Forest Mushroom Ragout Local Black Cod Scallop Trio Strawberry Shortcake

If I could choose 0 stars I would this is the second time I've gone to this Dunkin donuts and the donuts were stale, hard and as if they were from yesterday I will not be going back to this location ever again!! I'm very disappointed

3 stars for the sushi and 5 starsfor the service=4. The owners are not Japanese but they are very entertaining and engaging and recommend the right dishes based on your appetite. The presentation is beautiful.The ambience is cozy and perfect for the date night. The Kimchi fries appetizer with potatoes is sooooooo good!!
Awful customer service. Never again! I weren't allowed to exchange a too small pair of shoes for bigger ones. Only 5 min after buying them. Made this account only to let you know.

guac was great! i got the carnitas tacos, which i thought was a bit salty and a bit small in portion. I wished they had more sauces/ condiments with the taco. otherwise, the ambiance is great for big groups, and their drinks were decent.

For the life of me I cannot understand the appeal of this place- overpriced mediocre food. $13 for 18 clams boiled in water, not even served with a side of butter. The "famous" crab fries are a mystery to me- frozen fries with old bay and American cheese sauce. 2 orders of crab legs and a burger. $100. Outrageous.

They do a great job but the time required is insane! Drop stuff off on a Saturday and they won't get it back to you until Wednesday. My previous cleaners in a different state would get my clothes back the next day after 5 pm! They also act like its a huge surprise that you want them earlier! Need to find a new place!
My daughter had a mani/pedi and I had a pedicure. Our nail technicians were wonderful. They were very nice, accommodating and personable.
Just good - I think it was called the Traditional - but barely warm when the delivery arrived. I can't say if they would've done anything about it because I didn't call to complain.
Food tasted like it was microwaved. The meat looked like left overs from smash burger dry and bland. Went in with high expectations but left highly disappointed.
They wanna sue for a real review I'm not removing it jack ass , they lie saying I'm lying I have proof of all text please take me to court so I can sue you !!!!!!
I find $19 for chicken soup to be absurd. I can understand paying $19 for lunch when the meal is large enough to take home for later. This was not the case with this $19 soup.

The Dark Horse is a nice place and interesting from an architectural standpoint but the food prices are absurd. Isn't bar food supposed to be a loss leader? My table had a lot of fun reenacting that Wendy's library commercial, whispering "$8.99" over two miniature tacos.
It keeps getting better! STILL one of my favorite places to go for great smoothies and awesome service!
Great place, relaxed, good service and great food! Salads are huge and the calzones are great!

This is not a gluten free facility it is vegan. It keeps coming up a gluten free and recommended. For those who are gluten free, celiac or gluten allergy there are no options. This is a. Great place for vegans. For those who are celiac or gluten free try Soy Cafe or Dolivia

I was super excited to try this place out. Got the cake batter ice cream with the birthday cake cupcake on top. It tasted pretty bad, to be honest. Tasted very artificial and left an awful taste in my mouth. I would give it 1 star but I'm going to try out some more items and hope that's their worst flavor.

I love this place so much. I'm obsessed with ice cream, & I love the unique, homemade flavors they have! The Creole Cream Cheese is my favorite go - to flavor for sure. I do wish they accepted cards as it can be inconvenient sometimes. But the ice cream is great nonetheless!

If you were also disappointed when St. Louis Bread Co. discontinued their sun-dried tomato cream cheese, for their asiago bagels, you'll be pleased to learn that Einstein's pairing is as equally as delicious... or arguably better.
This place has great salsa. I just wish it was never ending as it's a small serving. The staff are always friendly. The acrobatic show is pretty cool too.
This place is one of my favorite places to go in the city because ive met lots of girls here ...the dress code for guys is bad you cant even have your necklace hanging out ...

Greasiest burger I have ever had. I mean, I wasn't expecting much from a chain place in the airport but it still was bad. Could have changed the oil in my car. My brother's was greasy as he'll also. French dips turned out ok. Only plus is that service was good and fast.

Steak Sandwich, turkey club, caesar salad... there is nothing here that isn't good. Definitely worth the price you will pay for this place! And the atmosphere is amazing. Be sure to snap an insta pic. Phone eats first you know.

Passing through and stopped by for dinner. Super fast service and friendly staff that seemed like they really cared. Ordered a chicken bowl which was overflowing and tasted great. Didn't expect this experience from a fast food place but was pleasantly surprised.
The weights are too heavy here. But seriously, the club is out of date, and seems too small for the amount of people that frequent it.

Very DISHONEST business. Before having a stress test I called to ask how much they would charge me for the test. I was told it would cost about about $220. After the test they sent me a bill for $2,000!!!
Two stars for a good happy hour with tasty drinks and apps. The dinners in our party of 7 were bland and disappointing.
If you have nothing planned and aren't in a rush then this is the place for you. Food is fine but dear god why does it take a 1/2 an hour for two bagels ?!?

The food here is healthy and absolutely delicious! This is something that is usually found together. I tried the cocktail that they provide you based on answering a few questions about yourself. An easy hit or miss concept but they were spot on! I really liked the cocktail they put together for me. This is a must try spot!

It's a jersey diner. So that covers most of it. The folks working there are great and so are the waffles. I think that most of the sandwiches come open face so if you're not a fan just ask. The Reuben was my favorite. Make sure to hit it up if you are in the area.

Always great service , always great food ! I love the beignets - I usually ask for some sort of chocolate sauce to go with , yum ! The huevos rancheros was a hit , crawfish étouffée also good , I enjoy the mimosas , yogurt with granola and oatmeal topped with fresh fruit.
Awesome Beer Selection! Good happy hour too. Food was descent nothing special. Good times for some local brews though.

5/5 Prices, service, and portions 4/5 Flavor 2/5 Meat Tenderness The options on the menu, as well as the salsa and cheese dip were excellent as well. The killer was the chewy, much over cooked chicken and steak.

We booked Burgundy Blue for a family photos during our stay at The Ojai Valley Inn. We can't speak highly enough about our experience. The team was able to manager our large family and completed the photo shoot in record time. The pictures are beautiful- we can't wait to print them!

Not a fancy restaurant, but the bar-b-que is very good. A bit pricey, but good barbecue usually is because of the time it takes to cook. It is certainly worth a try. Parking is very limited, and the restaurant is small.
Good food and great service. Did not get 5 stars because I feel the prices are a bit steep. We will return for special occasions but not on a regular basis.
Cleanliness, trained staff with great attitude and webcam available for viewing my furbaby while at daycare. Great hours and accomodations. My doggie came home happy and content!
Craving donuts stop by this family owned business all passing through town and the lovely Owner:even gave us extra donut what a sweetheart. Good donuts
Clean and tidy most of the time, manager needs to make frequent round during busiest hours to make sure the appearance is kept up or the mess gets out of control.
Just ok. With Tamaki, Margaret Quo, Azie and Tekouku in the immediate area, I see no reason to return here. Average sushi in an area with superior choices.

It pains me a bit to write a 3 star review for Tre Fratelli, because the staff is SO friendly and accommodating. Unfortunately though, our latest visit resulted in a meal full of overcooked seafood, dry chicken and sub-par appetizers. I would probably give the food 2.5 stars but the service, atmopshere (and dessert) 4 stars, so I've landed on 3 stars.

Was just forced to pay $5 for a cup of yogurt during a flight delay. I always except higher prices at airports but this is nothing but utter theft that they get away with because of their monopoly in this tiny airport.

The service was good but the food was just so-so. If you want to get some real Chinese food, I won't recommend this restaurant. You know what was funny? I ordered a tofu soup, but there was no tofu at all. The waitress said they were sorry coz the chef forgot to add tofu this time !

Great place for breakfast ! Steak and eggs and french toast are delicious! The homemade berry syrup is what makes the french toast so good. The restaurant itself is so adorable. The times I've been here have been during the week so I havent had to wait in line, but I could see why on other days there could be a wait time.
The filet mignon is good. Always cooked well when I order it. The banana foster is also very yummy. They cook it table side. Overall, not a bad place.

Been using J and J for years and will continue for years to come. Professional staff and service. You never have to worry about getting added unnecessary service-- Butch would never stand still for such shenanigans --
3 stars for being closed on Mondays :( Be sure to adequately plan your visit next time, kids

In order to get to killer po boys you have to walk to the back of the bar. Once you get there you can order your po boy to go or to eat in. I had the shrimp po boy which was very good. The ingredients were extremely fresh which really made the sandwich. I highly recommend this place for their po boys.
Very good pizza! Lots of cheese and delicious taste at an affordable price! We were impressed! Highly recommend
Simple menu (not as many selections as traditional Thai restaurant), but overall the food is flavorful and ingredients are fresh.

Trying to evacuate from Hurricane Irma, we found this place online for about $185 per night. Not even an hour after I booked, a friend tells us they have room at their place on Nashville. I call to dance expecting to pay for one night and instead they won't refund any of the three nights. Greedy.

one extra star for the name. i have seen many pubs but none with a unque name like that.. A worthwhile stop on a 7th avenue bar hop in Ybor city. this bar has a lot of foreign flags in it. i guess they must cater to cruise passengers as well.

Incredible food! Great service, friendly staff. Delicious pisco sours! This place is definitely worth trying. My husband and I have eaten here 3 times this month already. Just took the in laws and they loved it too! Highly recommend.

No idea how good the manicures are but definitely not reliable. I walked 20 minutes to get here and they had for no reason sent everyone home and were closing 45 minutes early. They were not helpful or apologetic at all about this. I would not try to go again.

The food was ok, not the best i have had. I am glad it wasnt my first time going to cracker barrel , i would have been disappointed... the food was bland ...When i went it was petty crowed, the staff were nice;they even attemped to say my name....
This place is pretty bad. The drinks had little alcohol in it and the sushi tastes like old super market made... It's just terrible.. Although service was nice but I didn't enjoy the food.
Food and service were great. The place is small so it can get noisy on a busy night. I'll be back.

This particular Walgreens is the worst! I'm switching my prescriptions to another pharmacy, they completely ignore customers at the drive thru & it's even worse when you go inside. The staff is always so depressed (or atleast they appear to be).

Would not recommend this company to do business with ever. Had a home warranty and my hot water heater went bad. Thus is who my home warranty uses for their plumbing, will cancel that service also. They used ever excuse to deny my claim. Didn't even wait to talk to me when i was minutes away. WORST Plumber ever.
Nice looking place but the handwritten sign that said "no waffles" defeated the purpose for me.

Honest, responsive, inexpensive, job done right!! I requested a call on Mother's Day, got the call, texted several times in the evening with questions, made the appointment for the next morning. Was told he'd be at my house between 8:30 and 9 and was right on time. Again took the time to answer questions. Great service by a true gentleman!
Service was so so and the food took a while considering the restaurant was not very busy. Waitress was friendly
WARNING! Terrible service! If you're good with waiting 25 minutes before anyone even acknowledges you're at the bar, then by all means...

Stopped by for a quick bite and few beers. Our waitress was friendly, prompt, and kept our glasses full. I had the classic upland wheat, an old favorite. I tried the hummus sandwich and it hit the spot! My friend had the nachos and it was a huge serving, definitely enough for a few people!

I had the best experience with Brice. On time, polite, and intent on correcting any problems we had with our windows and doors! If I have any concerns in the future, I'll be asking for him to make the service call! Great job!

Came in today with my brother and cousin and a gentleman working by the name of Alex (I believe) was super helpful in helping us choose what to order! Had fun conversation and made very good coffee. Will definitely be coming back here for the friendly faces and for the excellent coffee!

My experience here was a pleasant surprise. The staff was super friendly and professional. The atmosphere there was calming. Everything was new and clean. The women who did our couples massage were good and used just enough pressure. I would definitely return.

I love the Starbucks on meridian road. They always provide great service and make yummy coffee. I really like the new remodel and the feeling of the environment. I have never had a problem with this location! Thanks for everything!
Had the Stuffed Sopapillas today at Arroyo Mexican Grill. They were definitely not something you would normally see on a regular menu. Very good!

Decided to get my pedicure while waiting for the bf . Walked in and was seated immediately. Everyone greeted me and service was fair. She did an 'okay' job but def need to go harder on the foot/leg massage! Get in there! LOL.

Worst company and customer service I've ever experienced!!! Tons of hidden fees and charges. Was charged over $200 for a two day rental. Have been nothing but nice to them and they are RUDE AND A RIP OFF STAY FAR AWAY!!!!! Would give 0 stars!
Just had a really good burger on a homemade bun- crunchy bacon on top with really good fries. Service was excellent. We'll go back!

Totally OK bowl of ramen. The Ai was about a million times better than the Spicy ramen, which tasted like a package of Top Ramen with spicy oil mixed in. A good option for fast casual lunch in Center City.
Amy's was fantastic the first time I visited and rather unfortunate on the second try. Since I live on the same road, I'll try it a third time in hopes to have a better experience.

Awesome location and atmosphere. Romantic and/or cool! The best rosemary fries on the planet! I frequently crave them. I'm not a huge fan of the other food so I simply order fries and a bottle of wine and I'm all set.

Didn't have vanilla ice cream, incompetent staff, no line and still took 15 minutes to make two simple milkshakes that weren't even good. We were told it was taking extra long because they were "getting chewed out by their boss". Recommend going to a different Baskin Robbins on Old Hickory or the one near McGavok Pike in this area.
Great happy hour just because they have the best martinis! Fun and festive place to go with friends. However, not at all impressed with their food or happy hour food selection.
Wow!! So much to see & do. We greatly enjoyed the interactive exhibits, play areas & art projects. We will make sure to visit every time were in reno!

Great natural grocery store. Has a large selection of natural groceries and nutritional supplements. The food they prepare on site was awesome. The environment was extremely inviting, the staff in the nutritional supplement section were all very knowledgeable & great to work with. They had good suggestions & really cared.

Mediocre food, poor service, but beautiful setting - the room and the views were spectacular. The food ranged from great (octopus) to awful (fish); with most food somewhere in between. We had an 8pm reservation but weren't seated until 8:30, and service was slow and poor. Only the gorgeous room and atmosphere saves this from being 2 stars. Would not recommend.
Worst place ever. Didnt give me my toast. Didnt give me a drink. Food cold af. Fries burnt af. Yaz got his meal 20 mins late. This would never happen at galantes house. Overall a dusty establishment.
We love this place. It's unassuming and unpretentious, but with some of the best bar food around. I've been coming here for years now and I have yet to try something on the menu that didn't kick *ss.

Horrible experience. Food was bland, waitress was ditzy and overall overpriced. I've had better food from Trader Joe's frozen meals. Party of 6 and we all left feeling sick as well. I highly recommend saving yourself the trouble and just avoid this place like the plague. Extremely disappointed.

Used jeans cost $24.99 and they're not even a designer label..fitting rooms really nasty. This place has really gone downhill. Charging new Prices for used clothing probably isn't going to help the reputation much either.

Finally a coffee house in Old Town Goleta. Great atmosphere relaxing. My daughter and I came in got drinks and relaxed with our laptops. Plenty of plugs. Great WiFi. Big patio in the back with ping pong and corn hole. Very spacious.

We waited in line since 8:30pm, at 10:00 pm they decided to stop taking orders. I understand they're extremely busy but store hours are store hours. The older short lady who said she was the manager has a nasty attitude! Hire a better manager because that store is going to be a shit show.

I was excited about a new coffeehouse opening in my work neighborhood. Then found out it was Swedish,better yet. But, the espresso wasn't strong, smooth or spectacular. It was to-do tasting. I thought workers very nice. They also have pastries that looked good. This is tiny, corner spot with no tables but two bars with a few stools.
Excellent food. Exterior doesn't do it justice almost drove past it due to the look of the outside. Glad I didn't. Friendly staff! We will be back highly recommended

There are not a lot of Indian grocery stores in the area. This one is decent and has most if the stuff. Only issue: once I got rice from them... When I opened it, it has worms eeks! Do be careful what you buy from them.

We got bean salad, lunch special (soup+fresh non alcoholic drink+short rib beef taco) and corn . It was for 2 people, and we were pretty full after this. It was pretty good, chilling atmosphere and perfect for eating lunch with group of friends!
What a joke !!! They open then closed a couple days later, having us and a lot more people fooled waiting around at the door on Monday 1/20/19 with no explanation.
Good food but nothing compared to Cafe Poca Cosa and it's impossible not to compare. I suppose it's good if you want a quick casual version of Poca Cosa. Quaint little restaurant.

Always delicious!! Drinks and food. But one star off for no real bagels!!!!! (Their bagels are really just rolls...) And one star off for always crowded and somewhat annoying clientele. Would still recommend to a friend and do go once every few weeks.

Love the Dr. very nice, took a lot of time discussing things with me. However 20 units was not enough to do anything. I'm going back tomorrow and will make another review after. Love the staff and felt really comfortable here!

An eager-to-please waitstaff working in pleasant surroundings is let down by a slightly overpriced and underwhelming menu. In my humble opinion, the kitchen would do better to offer fewer items and do a top flight job executing each offered item. But that's just the opinion of this reviewer.

Came and checked pool because water was not clear. Sold us chemicals but they did not help. We decided to replace salt cell and called and left several messages but never got a call back. Call another pool company and they were there next day to replace salt cell and a circuit board in the control box. This company missed out.
Very nice staff but the pastries aren't usually fresh and hard to find parking at times.

From Wine to Beer Jake knows his stuff! I love this place great to hang out talk with friends. The Staff is always helpful. It's a wine bar that removes the pretentiousness. "Belgian Beers taste so good when they touch the lips!" I wish I could keep this a secret, but it's too good, I have to share.

The Perk is "everyone's favorite place," in Perkasie!!! From award-winning burgers to pasta, steak, and seafood there is something for everyone, and you won't go home hungry! Their portions are very generous. We love this place for its cozy, friendly atmosphere.
Delicious food and a very nice staff! First time trying Jamaican food and I will most definitely be back!!! I recommend the mild boneless jerk chicken. Best EVER!

There was no host or hostess to great us. After about 8 minutes a waiter came out and sat us down. He was pleasant and courteous. The food tasted like it came from China 3 months ago. It was bland and slimy. The patrons that were there must have been regulars from the restaurants hey days. I would not recommend this place.

I really used to love Hart's. We used to go for Sunday brunch most Sundays, and dinner a few nights a month. It's really gone down hill the past 6 months. The food is inconsistent and we have to send it back at least once each time we go. The service is slow and the customer service is lacking.
Convenient, clean, and safe. I never worry about my truck when leaving it in this garage. All major credit cards accepted. What more can you say... it's a parking ga
Good BBQ got the pulled pork just a little heavy on the sauce, mashed potatoes were spot on the sweet potato casserole was passable. Super fast service and excellent staff.

Best beer selection in Philly, fantastic food, consider this your hot wing warning. They're throat burning, eyes watering, nose running hot (not recommended for a first date, unless you're into that!)

This place has so much potential being that it is on the top of the St Pete pier with rooftop views of the city. Unfortunately, that is the only factor that kept us here. The food is average, the restaurant was a little rundown and dirty. It's just 'ok' here, and again, GREAT views.

(+) Thai tea. Fried rice. Satay chicken skewers were cooked and seasoned just right (not dried). The shrimp in the Tom Kha soup very tender/flavorful (not like rubber). (-) too much onions in Tom Kha soup. I'm used to having it with only shrimp, mushrooms and lemon grass. The drunken noodle was over salted/very salty.

Meh. The crab Rangoon was super delicious but I was not impressed with their bowls at all. If choosing the nori rice option, you get rice and whatever meat you choose....that's. It. The fried rice gives you a LITTLE more variety but not much. The pork ribs were also pretty tasty. I also must say that the staff was SUPER friendly, helpful, and accommodating
Came here one night and they said they were out of taco meat?!? Don't even think about going to this Taco Bell. Look at the other reviews. Disgusting.. close this place down

I am always disappointed with Ceviche staff and customer service. I started up at the bar for happy hour, but was charged full price. When I asked the bartender, it was nothing but bad attitude and I you're wrong. Previous visits lead to servers just dropping off food at random times to random people at the table.
We ordered to go. very quick and very good. Ordered half bird with hot sauce and dark meat with medium sauce. So juicy and crispy. Definitely recommend.
Do NOT submit ANY personal data to this organization. They are anything but a securely grounded financial entity. AVOID as others stated. Regards -
The food is average but the prices are over the top. Not sure why they feel the need to position themselves as a top restaurant on NYC's Manhattan... it isn't working for them.
Food was great. Abalone and wife had halibut. Both delicious. Great place would definite try it while in town. Located in the beautiful bacara resort

My friends and I went to So Crepe for a birthday celebration. I love So Crepe and have talked about it since I first went last year. They were thoroughly impressed. The crepes are thin, i.e. perfect, and the toppings are well prepared. It's like being in France while in South Philly.
My wife went for take out and it was horrible. The crabcake sandwich was undercooked and made her sick and hte bang bang shrimo where so bad she thre them away

Visited St. Louis and stopped in here nightly for a Guinness, never ordered food. Great place to watch a sporting even good quality TV's and signal. Good service. Lots of people but plenty of tables. Very friendly.
Underwhelmed. Too loud for a so called intimate setting. Food is just ok. I would've expected fresh made bread.

Well the wait was incredibly long [30 min longer than they said]. The food was avg at best! The portions were ok, nothing special, there was nothing on the menu that did not have a new age twist to it; in other words not authentic cajun/creole food!

I have always enjoed dining for lunch here but recentl sadly ro say the quality of their steak has gone down. The steak tidbits were tough and varely chewable The replacement also not up to par Sorry However the service was excellent and quick May give them another chance

I ordered an Lombardy Paninis to go. Yes, there were turkey, salami, pesto Mayo, provolone cheese in the press bread . It tasted good but wasn't anything special compared to other Paninis I got from Panera Bread or other sandwich shops. The staff was friendly.
