The flavor of the grilled oysters was as good as the Metarie location to be sure, but they all (2 dozen between us) had shell chips in the oysters and the service was disinterested to say the least. I know it's the day after Christmas and we all would like to be off... but I expected better.

By far the worst pizza I've ever had in my life. lil ceasers is so much better for so much cheaper. This place truly sucks. When I went to pick up my order they hadn't even started it. The pepperoni was way too salty and Terrible I asked for light cheese and I don't think I got it. And the dough was eh. Horrid.

I have always liked going to MacKenzie River. We always split the Cobb salad which is so good. Then we share whatever pizza on the menu sounds the best that day. You can't go wrong with their pizzas. They are all awesome. We've also split their nachos before which are very good too. We will continue to come back!

I'm sure they were understaffed, I think they usually do better on their PoBoys. I ordered via DoorDash and the sandwich came bread and shrimp only. No condiments whatsoever. Made for a pretty dry lunch.
Normally love CFA. This one screwed up my simple lunch order literally three ways. Not impressed.

Comfy room for the price and the one night stay, but didn't seem like we were welcomed when checking in. Tried to give us a room a mile from the lobby, but did let us relocate to a closer one. All in all, it was okay
What a wonderful place. Delicious and convenient. The waitstaff was great and they have A killer fruit bowl. Gosh. Delicious. The best thing in the menu? The ratatouille.

Staff seem nice unfortunately the food just wasn't as good...fish is not real catfish Cajun rice was somewhat dry yet spicy, with no season, fried shrimp was ok potato salad was large potatoe chunks decorated to look appetizing... hot sausage was some type of home made spicy meat. It just wasn't worth the price! We won't try again sorry just giving my honest opinion
Well, i was scared of coming here because of the bad reviews. But I am glad I did. Food was very good, fresh and good price. And I got a free glass of wine just by checking in on Yelp!!
loud. noisy, crowded. unpleasasnt

My boyfriend dressed decently before I met him, but being in the design world, I wanted to take him gently to the next level. I sent him over to Commonwealth Proper and...he's now always the best-dressed guy in the room without being over-the-top. They struck a great balance with his clothing of it being fitted but also natural. Thanks guys!

Went here on a date (third date, his suggestion!) and had a very good time; lost of food options and super fast service. I loved the addition of the tea to the meal as well. Definitely would go back, it was busy but not overwhelming

Had a really nice lunch here. Stopped after a bike ride with a friend and my parents. Two of us got the Mahi Mahi Sandwich with salads and other two got the tuna melts add bacon :) with French fries. Everything tasted good and no one had any complaints. Our server was great as well. I would come back.

Pretty good coffee; However, they recently stopped providing sleeves as they 'don't do sleeves anymore.' so now I have to double cup my piping hot coffee. Seems like a waste (money wise and environment wise).
Unfriendly uninterested people behind the counter, over priced in an overly dull area...pass

I leave The Eagle and always leave feeling much happier than I was prior to entering. I'm not sure if that's because the food is just so comforting or the server was really just the cherry on top. Anyways, I look forward to being able to physically dine in again soon!

Great yeast donuts, but no cake donuts! Why? I prefer a cake donut, but with that being said these yeast donuts are fantastic. I'd recommend the cinnamon, chocolate covered strawberry, and the crunch. Bonus, you can also pick up a jar of pickled beets.

BBQ is pretty good but the service is slow. They didnt refill my water and didnt bring the extra side dishes I asked for. I order pork belly and sliced beef for BBQ. They are great serving with house special sauce. I also ordered the spicy chicken wing. This dish is a highlight of this restaurant. Pricing: overprice for BBQ.
From the oysters to the rabbit with dumplings, everything was interesting and delicious.
The sushi is good and the environment too for a couple of drinks or a date. Although I wish the yakitoris were more generous.
This is a very nice hotel. It was my 3rd time staying here. I love how the rooms and beds are really clean. Their breakfast is also really nice and so is the pool.

Um.. they didn't know what a taper or a lineup was. Both my 18yr old and 6yr old sons had uneven haircuts. We weren't pissed. Just should've asked if they knew how to cut textured hair.. We real life had to find another barbershop to fix their hair. Definite No for us Didn't even clean off their faces... pictured here. That fabulous line up..

The atmosphere is nice and it is quite overall. I had a flatbread cheesesteak pizza that was honestly subpar. The bartender was more interested in chatting with his friends than serving us. The cleanliness could be improved in the bar and dining area. I would not recommend this place at all unless you enjoy a bunch of old prissy men sitting around.

I went and got my hair done a few weeks ago and was very impressed! I got the "Beachy Keen" (I think that's how you spell it) hair style and it came out gorgeous! I wish I could remember the name of the young lady who styled me. She was very sweet and accommodating. I just I'll definitely be back! Thanks guys!

As a visitor to Clearwater Beach, did a Yelp search and found this place. It was a great find!! Awesome seafood, great drinks and reasonably priced. Loved it so much, went back the next night. Alex was our waiter both nights and he is the best. Friendly and great service. Will be back again next time we are in Florida!
This small family owned restaurant has fresh made to order food and it was delicious! Thank you
so expensive and the portions are a joke. you can't really beat it to watch a sports game, but other than that, this place is no good. only bright spot is the service.
Pricey food, long wait, but friendly service. The Cowan turtle sounded exotic, but the taste was average. Gator on a stick was not bad.

I purchased my microfiber couch at Rothman's about a year and a half ago and it is sagging, creaking, and squeaking like I've had it for twenty years. Looks terrible, too! I won't ever buy another thing from them. Terrible quality furniture.

Super fast and good! I am giving them 3 stars because compared to my favorite falafel place, this is not that great. However, their platters are really big and you can sub hummus for all the sides, which is a gift!

One of my standards for judging the quality of a roaster &!the subsequent coffee produce is how smooth is the does the brew that results. Ordered a latte and it was perfect! Didn't require any sweetener to offset any acidic tones. Also had a whole grain croissant which was on point also. Service was delivered perfectly also.

Slowest cashiers in the world. I've been in line twice as long as it took me to find the 10 items on my list. This is not an isolated event. Every time we come here it's an ordeal to get out of the store in under 10 minutes.
The bagels are great! But employees touch their phones/faces while they make your bagel. Even saw one girl cough in her hand then proceed to make my bagel..
I thought it was amazing even while suffering from barely any taste cause of covid these still filled me up and tasted good! Give em a try!

Love this place best chargrilled oysters in the city....I love sitting in the bar and ppl watch and interact with the staff! Yes their is always a crowd but stick to the basics and it's soooo worth the wait!

I don't get it. Small selection in stock and a lot of things are very expensive. Narrow aisles and too many posters. Not impressed. Was visiting from out of town and I thought to myself, "I hope this isn't the only music store in Santa Barbara?" The only time in my life where I wish I was at a Best Buy.

Love this joint. Used to be a post office back in the day, but now they sell the best and most unique cheeses in the area. My personal favorite is the White Fox cheese. If they have it when you go, BUY IT. It's totally worth the money.
Everything is always delicious and flavorful when we order from here. I saw their special on their Facebook page so I had to stop by to try the birria tacos as I've never had them before.
Typical bar food and drinks. But they are a master if sports and entertainment.I am from California and enjoyed eating them boys the warrior playing.
Your typical tavern. Just had some drinks. Relaxing and watching the rain. Beer prices were high. Had a cool local feel for a pub right off of market.
Good pizza. Other than that, not really suitable to come in with small kids, better as a delivery or a takeaway.

Came here to grab some grub with the family and took 5min for someone to seat us (wasn't busy) then after 45min of waiting for two wing baskets we decided to leave. It wasn't the wait it was the fact no one came to let us know that food will be out shortly nothing so I won't be going here again
Food was tasty, but you can get just as good other places...for much cheaper.service ok...
Place is very clean, nice decor, nice atmosphere. The food is very bland, at least when I ate there.
I came for an emergency since my nail chipped and I'm out of town. I saw this place had better work than most around here. Wasn't bad but it wasn't good either. Paid $47.

we went here for oysters. nice and fresh and not too pricy. yummy! didn't really try anything else other than a grilled fish sandwich which was decent too. but def try the fresh oysters next time you stop by. the magarita was just okay, not my favorite. could probably do without.

Rude and unprofessional staff. I called today to find out if they had availability over the Thanksgiving holiday and the staff was short and basically said no then hung up the phone. I will take my business elsewhere.

Looks can be deceiving. Dry, bland cheesesteak. So dry; it felt like someone chopped up roof panels and put it in my cheesesteak. Not sure how this place has that many good reviews; they just have posted it before even tasting it.

The food was just okay, nothing special. My friend's chicken sandwich was way undercooked and the waitress was not apologetic in the least, extremely unprofessional. The place would get two stars, if not for their delicious crepes and pastries. Also, a place that positions itself as a 'European Cafe' should have whole-leaf teas, not generic teabags.
If I could give this 0 stars I would. Was served raw scallops and our dinner was extremely salty. The veal was mystery meat.

coffee was not good. small latte, milk was over heated and scalded. couldn't even taste the coffee. ended up filing it in #13. they did have a great quiet open space for studying with ample seating though
Delivery driver didn't bring entire delivery, said he would go back to store to grab it and didn't return. Store refused to refund money!

Our party of four went during lunch on a weekday. The place was near empty yet our food took extra long to receive. It was a nice location on the channel. They need to find another way to bring in more people and get the kitchen moving up to par.

I just picked up my pizza and it was the worse pizza I ever had in my life. It taste like card board. I drove 15 minutes to get my pizza and this is what I get. My entire family was disappointed. We will never return
Breakfast Sandwich I ordered was OK. Place was packed with customers. Service was a bit slow.

I love Ihop. This one had just opened and was extremely busy, but the waitress was nice and did the best she could. Food was great, like at all Ihops. Would like to back now that the new restaurant rush is over.

I don't understand how this chain is still in business. They're a relic of the 70s and 80s that somehow continues to survive by people who think it's a landmark and collect t-shirts and pins. I'm not a collector of anything, so I just don't get it. And my preference leans toward mom and pop non-chain establishments.

This place is terrible. The prices are high, the ordering system is stupid and slow (write your order down on a clipboard? WTF?) and the food is terrible. The spicy lemongrass soup tasted like sour piss and hot sauce. This place SUCKS!

Great great auto shop! The guys there were super nice and informative! Awesome customer service!!! Quick workers! Inexpensive services! Thank you, Big O Tire. Will be back and definitely will recommend them to others!

Stopped by to grab white rice for family dinner (we had forgotten to start the rice in time). Nice people. Fairly quick. $6 for three portions of rice seemed fine, until I opened the containers. Not even a full scoop of rice per order. All three orders fit in to one side container.

A wonderful birthday dinner. (We had a total of six at the table).The atmosphere was relaxed and inviting. Our server was attentive and funny. (So nice). We ordered five different pizzas. Every pizza was wonderful, fresh and authentic! The cannoli were semi-sweet and so tasty. Soft live music was a plus. I look forward to returning.

Great, healthy gluten free Vegie place. Everything fresh and full of flavor. We would definitely go back. Especially loved the lasagna. We will try the pesto and pad Thai noodles. It's off the beaten path, funky location is the only downside.

Great deal on the food lots of it and delicious. We had the blackened fish tacos large & in charge The seafood Cobb salad was a meal for 2 lots of lobster scallops shrimp. Bonus 2 for 1 happy hour 11to 7 daily

We have had Indian food from all around the world and everything we have tried here was great and very authentic. We were excited that it was a BYOB and was able to pair one of our favorite reds with the tantalizing spices. We look forward to returning and also sharing this establishment with friends.
I. Soo glad one original location is still there at Lacumbre Love th we ir sales QE quality clothing & more

Food was overcooked and dried out. Service was very slow. Waitress never came back for refills or to check on us. Over priced for the service. Also, not handicapped accessible. No access to the bathroom for wheelchair or walker.

This is one of my favorite places to eat. The food is always very good and the staff is very friendly. I would recommend the golden chicken strips, and the sweet potato fries are awesome. However, sometimes I find things are missing from my order on the weekends, like an entire order of fries. Overall great place though.

Every time we take our pup here she comes back smelling so nice and clean! They do a great puppy cut, trim her nails, give her a new bandanna and this recent visit she received some treats and a Christmas card!

VERY slow! Don't expect to be seated right away, don't expect to be served right away and if you order takeout-expect to wait even longer than they told you for your food! Bad bad bad! Food is great once you get it though!

We are loyal Hampton fans but this is one to avoid. The common areas are filthy - carpet stained, chairs in dining area heavily stained, elevators slow and dirty, and coffee so weak It's the color of tea. Breakfast area dirty, tables not cleaned, trash not emptied counters covered with food. Room is ok but toilet runs and AC is noisy.
I've eaten lots of food. This is among the worst. The kitchen was visibly repulsive. I do not know how they pass food inspections. I only recommend you eat here if you won't remember eating here.
The fries were good. food was ok. I had the pork chop. Very salty. My wife had the Angus burger. Service was good

My favorite dog groomer! My dog is hyper but Amy is so great with him. She goes above and beyond to make him look and smell great! We wont go anywhere else. Great service and reasonable rates! Thanks for the great service
It scratch the car and the parts flew out And the wipers was broken in there and when I ask them for a pair they told me they're not responsible for any damage of the , it happens with 2 of my cars

For the price you can't beat their deep dish pizza, it has become a guilty pleasure for my gf and I. As far as their regular pies go I'd steer clear I've only tried one but it had the consistency of cardboard.

I am a West Chester native who frequents many restaurants in town. Fiorellos is the place I go to for a predictably consistent Italian meal. Everything is fresh, as advertised, generous portions. Classic Italian. The one slight I have to offer is that their specials are pricey, so be sure to ask for a price before you commit!
Amazing place. We have been here twice. Always friendly stuff, affordable prices and great and clean SPA. There is a nice restaurants and also playground floor with a lot of machines.
This is our go to spot for dinner! I've tried almost every dish on the menu and all are my favorite!! However, I have been known to order only the banana bread pudding, OMG it's good!
This is a pretty solid breakfast/ sandwich spot. They do omit roasted pork from the Cuban sandwich and add turkey instead, which is a bummer, hence 3 stars instead of 4.

This place's food is great! However, we've driven here from Sahuarita on MULTIPLE occasions for dinner and they're closed after we checked online if they were open those hours or days. This is the reason for the two stars. Highly disappointed after it happened again this past week on Sunday. MAKE SURE YOU CALL BEFORE YOU DRIVE THERE!

Horrible service! Nobody say a word, just sitting and waiting, and then we left! This is a place where food is amazing, but let you know, we payed $70 fir breakfast last time, me and my husband. So its not cheap! I want a proper service for this price! What do you think??

Typically Sunrise makes a great breakfast. This morning was a huge disappointment. Overcooked, exploded "poached eggs" were served up to me after they made a mistake on my eggs Benedict. The waitress credited our order. Disappointing response by the kitchen staff.

Been here about 5 times now and it seems like the last 2 times service and food haven't been good. Last time I had the BBQ pulled pork meal it had more fat than meat, and now tonight I had the meatloaf meal it taste as bad as a frozen banquet tv dinner.

Cinco de Mayo major fail. Short staffed. Staff there inexperienced and sweet but not too effective. 5 of us all left saying too salty, refried beans in the tostada are chili bean style...rock hard unripe tomatoes...terrible grocery style taco shells...couldn't get water after 20 minutes...helped ourselves. Had been there for lunch and it was **.5 but won't go back.

Ok selection. When I asked for a particular cigar that they didnt carry I kinda got snuffed at. No one really asked to help out or make a suggestion based on my preferences. Spent 50 bucks but it will be my last time back.

The food here is good, but not great. The Pork VeraCruz sandwich I had today was good, but small for the price. It's made with processed meat, not fresh, and for $8 it was not worth the money. I left hungry still, since I don't eat the chips they serve it with. See the pic and judge for yourself.
Jambalaya is mostly rice, with some sausage, forget about vegetables. And rice tastes like Uncle Bens... What a waste of my brunch hour
THE FRIES are THE BEST!!!!! Parmesan wings are so SALTY. BUT the fries make up for it. I can see myself taking a trip just for the fries.
I love the Lola Bean. It's a sweet quiet place where I can hide with a cup and my laptop. I feel at home here. Plus, the owners are so kind and personable!!!
I miss this place. Wish i could go every week. I enjoy their meatballs. My husband had this burger with peanut butter it was crazy good!!

Once they got it right it was ok, ham, bacon was good, toast for me and others was like crutons , it is very outdated...disappointed, , just trying to find a good eggs bennidict, ,, by the way, the bill was also not right
Amazing drinks, ok food. Would love to see more diversity of their menu. Great location by Curtis Hixon in d'town.

The wife and I just came here for our anniversary and it was great. And when we got the bill we were very satisfied with the quality of the food and atmosphere and a cheap price! Will return here again.

Loud. Loud. Loud! Medium rare Kobe came out bleeding. Étouffée was quite good. And the wine list was fun. I've never had a red that was "slapped with leather". Please realize we went two weeks after Mondo opened

I am very picky about the quality of Indian food that I will eat. This place is not perfect, but the food is great and reasonably priced. The naan comes out flaky and fresh. The portions are a little small, but the service is pretty good and the owner tries very hard to make your meal enjoyable. I will be back and often!

The flavor of the Barbacoa was extremely bland. What makes this place a skip is the wait. As you can see, the line is endless. The wait, anywhere between 20-40 minutes just to order and pay is not worth it. Sir at On the Border. Not as trendy or healthy but saves you half the day.

Housed in a tiny old garage on West Passyunk, this is as intimate as a brewery can get. Often times your bartender is your brewer. The beers are wonderful and varied, the prices reasonable and food truck rotation is perfect. Might be my favorite place in the city to disappear in for awhile!

I am a diamond honors , hotel staff would not honor upgrade in a low season and would not grant late check out ! Reach out , in vain .... the staff answer was "just deal with it " this is my first time being serviced in such a way !

Delicious pizza and huge slices! Really good cheese bread too. The only downside is that they never have any cheese bread ready. We always have to wait, and we always wait a lot longer than the time they give us.

"On our recent trip to Philadelphia we stopped by yogorino. We have sophisticated yogurt tastes and high expectations. This place did no disappoint. Their tart yogurt was refreshing and creamy. We might be back one more time!"

Wow--I was pleasantly surprised with this place. I expected what you'd get from a basic modern American bar and grill chain, but their food was actually pretty darn good. I will definitely eat here again in the future.

We love it here. Great atmosphere! But last night we didn't feel like going out and wanted to do take out...they don't deliver BUT do through grub hub! Food still got to us in a good amount of time and was delicious! We are happy to know we can order delivery!!!

The best phone house in Edmonton!!! Pho is good and the spring roll are the best yet. They put water chestnuts in their wonton, which I love! Have never seen anywhere else that have water chestnuts in their wontons. It's personal preference i'd say. Check this place out, you won't be disappointed.

Great Belgian beer selection and charming, cozy subterranean atmosphere make a serious case for four stars, but charging $5 for a sample of cheese the size of a postage stamp could not be overlooked- three stars it is.
Myself and a group had brunch at Saint Anejo and the food was exceptionally good. Taylor H. was very helpful in giving advice on what to expect when ordering certain foods. Will revisit someday

It is a terrible place they treat people very badly with bad manners, the young woman who is in customer service is terrible and the taste of the food is terrible, I prefer to go to THAI HOT or CHINA 1 in brandon here the food is EXCELLENT...
So this is a normal stop for us. It's pretty cool. I really only go for the Gyro platter when I come here and I really enjoy it.

FINALLY A FILIPINO RESTAURANT IN TUCSON!!!!! Everyone needs to come and try some Filipino food! Today I got their combo of pancit and beef steak with a side of rice! Delicious!!!! They're out of lumpia right now but will have some on Monday lol :) def coming here for lunch! Update! They just made me some lumpia!! They're so awesome!!!

Caitlyn, the manager is Super Delightful. She makes your shopping experience fun. Whether you are 18 or 80 you can find what you need to put the Spice backin your bedroom. Please make the Chocolate Walrus your Love Connection.

On a Sunday morning stumbled among this small cafe. Ordered the eggs benedict florentine and a signature sandwich. They were both delicious. Not much of a coffee selection. A cafe con leche is a necessity in Ybor, no?

I love this place so much! They are much, much better than Panera. The bread is delicious and home made even on the sandwiches, and the tomato soup is amazing too. Everything is homemade and the red velvet cookie was out of this world! Definitely would recommend.

The location is to die for but the room was a little on the tired side. Wallpaper was peeling in the bathroom, the wireless was $10 a day - Marriotts is free and technology and plug-ins in the room were old. Again, you cannot beat the location but the room itself...ah, i've had better for the price.

I order parts from here that should have been easy to get within a couple of days. After waiting two weeks I had to go into the shop after 4 phone calls to request for my money to be refunded. I took that money and spent it on a great locally owned shop with complete satisfaction.

We went for the lunch buffet. We were given water with a frown and never asked or told about the buffet. It was not busy and we had to flag someone down to ask for na'an and a tea. The buffet lacked in the flavors and spices we typically associate with good Indian cuisine.

They green dip served with corn tortilla chips was delicious. Everything went downhill from there. When server brought entrees the plates were stone cold as was all the food on them. Any restaurant worth it's salt serves food on hot plates. Plates can easily be heated in an oven. You don't have to buy an expensive plate warmer.

Ordered for the first time and had to wait an additional 15 minutes at pickup. Great first impression. Pizza was actually decent and there was a good amount of toppings. Customer service needs work though.

The staff is awesome and the food is delicious. Everything is so fresh and you can taste the quality of the products that are used. I ordered the shrimp burrito and it was packed and very filling. I like how you can completely customize what you want to eat.

Took my girlfriend there on our first date and we had a great time. We went back not too long ago and were disappointed. The food was average and the service was not that great, Really like the location and atmosphere but it seemed like none of the wait staff wanted to be there. Big contrast lately..

I went here twice in the first month they opened. It's a great place to bring someone who is visiting the city. The oyster appetizer (forgot what it was called) was the best!!! The duck entree was definitely finger licking type of food.

I am moving...,you guys are horrible! I have eight cars parked across from me and barking dogs on each side of me and you gave me a citation for a small hole in my fence. I have lived here for 23 years and it has gone downhill every since. HRHA should be prosecuted for their activities.

Horrible experience and horrible food and worst serve with the worst attitude. Went here for a friends birthday and was highly disappointed. Took 45 minutes for a soda. And another 3 hours to get our food

Incredible pizza! Ordered a small build your own with traditional crust, red sauce, sliced tomato and spinach. Cooked to perfection. Fresh ingredients perfectly proportioned and the sauce, omg the sauce!!! First time here, a wonderful community feel pizza joint that also offered trivia tuesdays! Also dog friendly, great draft beer and wine list! So pleased, just may go back before the week is over!

Delivery. Straightforward, tummy-stuffing chinese counter. Other reviews' pricing not accurate for dinner delivery. Paid $20 for full order of general's chicken with crab rangoon with delivery tip. comes with steamed rice; TONS OF FOOD. typical communication difficulties with phone order; food came when promised and was hot! perfect to satisfy the i'm-not-leaving-who-is-fine-seeing-me-in-my-PJs-with-pinot-grigio-in-my-hand-craving that I only get once a year or so.

Service was good. The manager was fun and very friendly. They are not kidding about "freaky fast". Make sure that you know your order before walking up to the counter though! Sandwich was ok, nothing special. If your looking for fast and fairly in expensive this works.

Nothing wrong with this place, just nothing great. Service was very good and food was very good. Dining room was large and menu was similar to other casual Mexican restaurants. Not bad, but wouldn't drive out of the way.
Sounds like it's past time for a class action lawsuit on this company. I'm still waiting after 7 months and now I doubt I'll ever get it. Who wants to join me?

Waiting 30 minutes for grocery pickup two days in a row. When asked why, rude comments. Asked for a manager and was transferred to a line that is never answered. I HOPE you contact me for follow up. Crappy location

Horrible management No napkins Food was cold It took a while to get the waiter to the table No silverware was given at any moment Not a place I would recommend to go eat at If you're going for the arcade I guess it's ok but not to eat

I'm a fan of Ted's. The bison burgers are really delicious and not necessarily easy to find anywhere else. I can't come here without ordering the onion rings. One time the service was really bad, but because the food was so good we gave it another chance. The next time the service was much better (I would recommend going when it's not busy).
These are some of the most helpful and friendly bike shop folks I have ever met.
One of the worst bartenders in the world. She was,so mean and rude. Was not happy. Maybe it was a,bad day. So I understand. But she should have taken the day off.
I am a business owner in the party industry and found that they had a decent amount of party supplies at pretty decent prices. I will use them again for some things in the future.
The most arrogant people on the planet. I haven't been to the place for 30 years.Guess what. ..a new generation of a-hole, I will never walk in to there again
Zero customer service I needed a washer dryer and fridge plus need two reclining sofas Zero service

My boyfriend and I went today and it was amazing. We order 3 petit fours and a chocolate ball; all were amazing. I ordered a mule cart to drink and my boyfriend ordered a margarita. Both drinks were awesome. What was even better was the service! Our bartender, Kylie, was the greatest of all time (the goat)! I will definitely be back!
Poor customer service. Bouncers don't know real IDs from fake IDs. Very bad experience.
Dive bar! Fun place to watch the parades. Food was good. Drink were good. Local color.
Clean / Friendly employees great food & service gas price is cheap plus always open 24 hrs ......
sexy atmosphere, transport yourself to an elegant, modern night spot with lounge music. fun drinks and if you join the members email you'll get bonus deals (Veteran's day deals), etc.

The customer service is not great during the afternoon and evening hours. Whenever I go, it is the same young lady working and she has a poor attitude. The tables are often dirty. In addition, the hours are not as advertised.

Went to Star Nails for a gel manicure. The staff was friendly but nail stations and the tools used on my nails were very dirty. The manicure doesn't look good... they cut my nails very short and polish is on my skin around my nails. I wouldn't recommend Star Nais. Update: the gel has started to peel off after 5 days. Very poorly done.

Great breakfast spot on the beach. Everything was good. The kids had pancakes.. Hubby had Banana fosters waffle.. It was really good I had the mushroom omelette. It was massive Service is good and fast.
I called yesterday for colon hydrotherapy the lady I talked to so so rude. I used to work there right when they changed ownership. I just can't believe I was treated so badly!

Had dinner at Blue Tavern last night and like our last visit the food is excellent. Our disappointment was the haphazard way our food arrived. Ordered two salads which arrived 10 minutes apart. The sides arrived long before our mains. Drinks took way too long. Better kitchen management seems to be needed.

We ordered food and I was really excited about the food after reading the reviews. To start with we ordered Tom yum, spicy Thai fried rice and Vietnamese fresh spring roll. I loved the Spring Roll but everything was very sweet. The Tom Yum was so sweet it was not edible. Well all in all I am not
They are complete scam. Try to stay away from this scam company.

Stop here on a regular basis, three Spicy pork tacos, jalapeño and some of the best fries around, only down fall is they close early on Sunday. Burrito bowls are also very good. Definitely will be back

The best winery in south jersey in my opinion. They have space heaters for the cold, amazing food, and amazing wine. The whole vibe they create really works for them and I already want to come back and I was just here on Friday!

Awesome ice cream!!!! My favorite is the cookies and cream (it's the best)! Make sure to go and check that place out they are awesome!!! Oh, how could I forget they always have free sprinkles!!!!! Rainbow and chocolate!!

Although I have had a nice experience with the veterinarian, I am very frustrated with the front desk staff. I have had two consecutive appointments where I have shown up to find that my appointments were not put into their schedule.

The menu is simple to order from and the food comes quick and hot. I don't know how true this place is to honest Thai and Indian food, but it sure looks authentic and the tastes are unique. Very nice, quaint restaurant that is reasonably priced.

Love the pear and gorganzola flatbread and went there tonight but um long longer on the menu!!! So sad!! Please bring it back!! Ended up getting the crab and artichoke dip which I do often but today it was not fresh and the bread was so burnt. Might not be back for awhile. Service was excellent though!!

Another neighborhood place that's always good. The food is good, my favorite is the blackened fish tacos! The service is good at the bar or at a table. On Friday and Saturday you can sit out on the deck and enjoy some live music.
Well, as of Sep 24 2017 they no longer have NFL Sunday ticket and the wifi still sucks. Rather disappointed because the staff and food are good.

Overpriced mediocre food compared to other options in the area for food. Food is comparative to Cheesecake Factory quality but with Cajun/creole cuisine instead with less options. No reason to go here when compared to other options. Only redeeming factor is the atmosphere.

I should have read all the negative reviews before, I considered dealing with Lexus of Cherry Hill. I will try the dealership out side of phila.. or Wilmington. I notice most of the negative reviews were by women. I can't believe that they still have this attitude towards women especially with women's buying power is at an all time high. Get with the times.

We have made a reservation 10 years after first date. I was amazed by the same excellent food and service. The gentleman who was assigned for our table was extremely knowledgeable and sweet in the same time. The meal was excellent before our Hamilton experience

This place has been around since I was in grammar school. They have the best burgers and hickory sauce. My husband and I come in from time to time because we get a craving. That is what happened today. So here we are, the only reason for 4 stars is that the a/c was not working well.

This place is real authentic Italian style food. My favorite is the margarita pizza. If your into marg you will love this place. The employees their are very nice the owner actually comes out and greets all the customers. The seating kinda small and the pricing is a little expensive a beer and a pizza is going to run you about 20$.
Great selection of colours and good quick service. Ladies are nice.
The salad is always good but it stops there. The pizza is so salty it is hard to eat. I won't be going back.
My eyebrows look great, but the woman who did them seriously finished them in 2 minutes. Would be nice if she would take more time as I felt rushed as the customer.

I strongly suggest anyone interested in purchasing a pet from here do your research and READ REVIEWS. Comments and stories circulating on Facebook reflect horrific animal situations here. Overall feeling is this place needs to be SHUT DOWN. Gave this place a one star just so I could provide cautionary review.

This place never disappoints, I've been here on several occasions and never wrote a review until now. If you're in Sparks an really wanna get some great treating breakfast or barbecue lunch/dinner then this place is for you. From their delicious ribs to their omelettes and their array of side dishes is spectacular and if you haven't been there, I highly recommend it.
I had the fried catfish, greens and Mac & Cheese. It was exactly as I would want. Tasty food and a great price.

Who puts Jack Daniels in a margarita? Who?!?! That is just down right dangerous af! Best Mexican food in all the land! Amazing customer service. Raul is excellent eye candy. Over all I highly recommend this joint. Just not on a work night! Don't say I didn't warn you
Too much money for the same service of other less expensive security companies. I cant wait until my contract is up. I will be switching. I would even get a home camera included, now, I dont
Beautiful new spot in the French Quarter with a cozy, intimate environment. Food was delicious with a spin on some New Orleans staples. Recommend Grit tater tots and the redfish!
Great experience!! And an AMAZING massage! Jaime was so sweet and took time after to explain what she had been working on, while also recommending a treatment plan! Will definitely be back :)
Bad service. Bad price. Late on time. This is the worst dry cleaning place. After i take my clothes, i straight went to different dry cleaning. It was so bad.
I was just there and bought a big box of tomatoes for a really cheap price I paid $12 for like 15-20 pounds of tomatoes But when I got home I found a cockroach in them and larvae

Please people don't believe this is real Mexican food, it is bland Americanized sorry excuse of a restaurant that would put any true Mexican to shame. The queso and salsa are good if you are looking for Tex-Mex, as far as the food goes it was all a huge disappointment.
I was in the mood for some really good water ice, this just want it! The consistency was off, a bit too watery.
I'm a little on the fence-LFF recently got bought out by LA Fitness. No major changes have occurred yet, there are rumors the changes are coming.
Decent, simple food for a quick meal that the whole family will be happy with. If you like you food fried, this is your place. Very nice people working there and nice selection of wing flavors.
Awesome choice of gumbos and jambalaya. The service was great. The only reason I gave it three stars was because it need air ventilation or AC. Once it get pack heat start to build up.

Upon arrival you will see nothing but cowboy boot wearing country folk and famous murals upon the walls like a mini museum. This is a very nice airport with plenty of restaurants, fast food, shops and even massage & nail parlors! Clean bathrooms, clean terminals, and it looked like everyone that worked there liked their jobs so that made for a pleasant atmosphere.
You wouldn't think this place would have such good food since its in the middle of a mall, but you'd be wrong! The food is fabulous. Always fresh and cooked perfectly. I love it here!

Me and my better half love this place. We go here at least once a month. Their burgers are awesome and they have a great selection of different types to choose from. The service is decent, depending what time you go and what day of the week it is. They have a nice patio. I am a fan!
Not bad. Let's put it this way- it's a step up from taco bell food. Friendly staff. Clean, well kept resturant. Nice patio for out door dining if u choose.

Sunday Brunch review: The prime rib was great! We all went back several times just for the prime rib. The eggs Benedict was a winner as well. Decent spread. Selection included traditional breakfast and lunch items. Salad options could be better. We would return.

Came here for dinner and got crispy Brussels sprouts, sushi, tofu tacos and soup. The Brussels sprout and tofu tacos were incredible. Sushi and soup was good and comparable to many other places in the city.
The service is terrible. We waited over an hour to be served our food. The food is not worth the wait and the service was worse than awful. Won't go back and I live walking distance to this place.

I've been going to Nicole for about 2 years and she's great. She will give me her input and opinion when I ask, but she always cuts and colors exactly how I decide. Friends is pretty reasonably priced and I know I'm getting a good cut every time.
Thanks for screwing up a simple order.. terrible 16 dollar burger.. will never order from here again!!

It is difficult to write a review when you don't get seated. Arrived 10 minutes before reservation time and 30 minutes after reservation time and still not seated. Suggest you be prepared to wait or find somewhere else to dine.
We had a Brisket sandwich and BBQ chicken. For the price portions were a bit small. Beans were yummy Mac and cheese was standard. Will try other menu options again though.
$27.50 for two watered down mojitos. Should have stuck to beer! Staff was friendly but the specialty drinks suffer.

Foods decent, a bit over priced for some of the delis I have been too, and the cashier lady is rude. I have been here multiple times for lunch and each and every time this lady has a smug attitude. Probably will be my last time buying lunch from here... learn how to be nice and accommodating to your customers!!!!
Employees are less than helpful, and the ones that do offer you assistance, don't listen, they just want to sell you the most expensive product even if it's totally wrong for you.

Wait time was about 30-45 min to come in around 8:00pm. The service was great. Molly H. was our server she did a great job. Very attentive and kind. Place is clean decoration is awesome atmosphere is okay. We had the Buttermilk Fried Chicken and the cheese bites. Both dishes were hot and delicious. We would come back maybe for like a special occasion.

Ordered this on Uber eats . Terrible . I should've saved my money . I ordered the steak . The food is bland & the portions are small . The steak was not seasoned & there were about 8 little cubes of steak. Majority of it was salad . I love Vietnamese food but this was such a disappointment . Never again .

Even the brews that are not my typical style were amazing! I was pleasantly surprised by the Butternut squash beer! It was so good! You will not be disappointed ordering their flights. We had to get two, and even bought some bottles to take home to family.

This is my first time at bonefish. I had the shrimp for an appetizer. The sauce it comes with is amazing and highly addicting. I ended up getting the tuna rice bowl. The tuna was cooked well and I enjoyed the sesame coating it had. My friend got the tilapia fish with cheese it was delicious I recommend getting that instead.

I ordered the New yorker and definitley felt it was not worth the price. The flavors were almost there and the amount of meat was skimpy. I also had the potato salad. It was absolutely the blandest ive ever had. This was my first visit from out of town. Not a place that would excite me to re-visit.

I really loved Chipotle until this place. They are rude and its always so messy seemingly dirty in there. They really need to step it up, I would be so happy when a Qdoba opens around here until then... Ill just have to look else where....sad!
Great food good price .... get there early to avoid the crowds if you are IOS user Kiosks will be a breeze but wait staff was great with helping other customers ...

The shrimp and grits is delicious! The Finlandia Fresca was also yummy X2!! Hubby liked the crab cakes and the remoulade was like liquid coke slaw. (I think that's good!?) seasoned rice was average and the hush puppies a little dry. Did I mention the shrimp and grits were awesome?!
Cool late night hang-out. My bf enjoyed his burger and beer... I had a weird drink and was ready to go to standard tap. Lots of out-door seating and trendy dance music... it's fun.
Took a bit longer than I would have liked but they were busy. Job completed no surprises
Quick service, good clean food. Very fair pricing. A must try at the beach.

I don't gamble....I did once here....just not my thing. But I have eaten here and the food was awesome. I had the prime rib dinner. It was delicious. I have also had a few drinks at the bar. Best drink there....strawberry daiquiri made with fresh strawberries. So good!!!!
Service here is usually terrible (inattentive, slowwwwwww with drinks) and drink prices suck (even "happy hour" prices), but you can't beat them for cheap sushi.
Yum! The calzone grilled cheese and the Mac and cheese grilled cheese sandwiches were big hits in my family. The staff were very nice too.

This was the second time we have had a bad experience. If not for my server Armon and the Manager Ben. I don't think I'll be back, but because they were quick to solve my problem I MIGHT give them a third chance. I hope you know that these two man are an assets to your company.
The food was ok... Came here since I live down the street. Would have to say I would rather drive the extra mile to get better sushi.

Not impressed. The drive thru experience was difficult. I had to repeat the order numerous times. I felt it was overpriced. 2 burgers and a order of fries for over 13 dollars. The burger was not nearly as good as its competitors, however the fries were ok. My curiosity is over. I will not be back.

Not the best, not the worst. The Pho and meat were ok, but the vegetables were wilted and sad looking; like they had been in a bag "condensating" for awhile. Tables inside were cramped. Nothing to write home about.
Excellent Coffee! Excellent Food! Highly recommend it! Pan de Bono is amazing! Food is fresh and absolutely delicious! Great service and I simply love supporting local businesses!
Came for a business reception, staff was friendly and extremely attentive. Had finger foods so I didn't order from the menu but I would definitely recommend the coconut shrimp of they are on it.
Lovely litte restaurant - I had a scrumptious lunch here and would return again.

The car was washed nice but was left a little dusty inside. This took a good 30 minutes and we were not happy after the long wait. They were quite busy and I get that it would take a little longer. Don't come here if you don't want to wait!
This place was my pre work breakfast spot. No longer :( it's like this place just stop caring about the quality of the food. I miss the old shop!!
No lo recomendaria porque la comida no tiene sabor, en especial el burrito de asada lleno de arroz y la carne solo un poco y simple .........
Good southern meat and three. Not many of these left. You won't be disappointed. Just make sure that check their hours before you drive out there, as their hours are very limited.

This place is very meh in my opinion. They overdo it on the rice and their specialty rolls. I've had the blackjack roll and a couple others. They just put too much everything. I like my sushi to taste like sushi not some sweet mushy mess.

While I love their bacon brussel sprouts and shrimp Maria, the bulk of their menu is salty and just not very good. The bread is very poor quality with weak taste. Overpriced for the quality. The quantity of the dishes are good, but the quality preparation is lacking. There are better Italian restaurants around the Treasure Valley that deserve our business.
Tasty food but a little pricey for quick service style restaurant.

This place has a nice atmosphere but the food is absolutely disgusting and inedible. I ordered the carnitas enchiladas and the carne asada tacos. The pork and steak were so tough it was impossible to chew or cut through. Stay away from the food here. If it was possible to give zero stars I would.
Something is off with the cheese today...it is runny and weird!! They sent us a 2nd pizza but still weird, runny cheese.

Mediocre and overpriced. We ordered 2 bacon cheeseburgers witb fries and onion rings for $27. The burgers were mediocre at best. They were no better than Burger King and about 3-4 times the price. The onion rings were very good but there was about 6 small onion rings in the order. I drive by it on a regular basis but will not return.

Seating for $100 ticket was awful, very tight uncomfortable and I admit I'm 6'1" and 250lb. In any case the space was poorly ventilated and the temperature very warm. This is nothing about the performance (Shen Yun) which I personally found disappointingly amateurish and boring.
Best pizza I have ever had in my whole life! Such cheesy deliciousness! Sauce had amazing flavor and pizza was cooked perfectly. Can't wait to go back again!

Such a great place. Order at the counter and find a seat. Be prepared to clean it off yourself. The shrimp was perfectly cooked and the best French bread I've ever had. The sandwich was big enough to split if you just want to try.

This is my second trip to Beefy's The first time I just checked in and neglected to leave a review. If I had reviewed I might be able to remember what I ate. I do remember that I wasn't entirely happy with my meal. This time I ordered a Ruben sandwich, usually a safe bet for me.
Huge portions and good flavor. It is more American style. I wasn't a huge fan of the sweet and sour chicken but the sesame chicken was great. The food comes quickly and the servers are nice.

I went there wanting their famous fried chicken. When it came out 4 minutes later I saw that it had been held under a heat lamp and it tasted that way. You can get better chicken at a gas station. When it came to pay my bill I had to look for my server who was in the back room in a team meeting!

Fine for a quick bite. But nowhere near authentic. The lamb was tough in the lamb curry. The chicken was too dry, other pieces seemed almost uncooked. Garlic Naan was the best part of the meal. It was warm, crispy, and buttery. Wait staff was a little too eager, attentive but they were very nice.

...VERY glad Meatball U. opened in West Chester!...GREAT service, ambiance and, of course, the food...enjoyed two different versions of 'Meatball Sliders'...fantastic choices, will be back with friends!...

Pretty straight forward Big Box Home Improvement/DIY store... you already know what they carry (freakin' everything) and you already know what you'll pay (too much)... but they are friendly and my very long line moved quickly. Crap, I forgot potting soil!

What to say? Pretty good. It helps that their mixed drinks are served in small buckets. Our asparagus was severely over cooked on our last visit. My steak was awesome though...cooked perfectly. I love the au poivre sauce!
This place is a gem in a sea of really good mexican in the immediate area. Food is dynamite, it's byob, wait staff is on point, food is fresh. They are the best around
Called 20 minutes before the store closed and was told they couldn't deliver. I also could not pick up the pizza because "everyone had gone home"...

Food was good. We are on the hibachi side. One of us ordered the spicy tuna roll which wasn't super great. The tuna was kind of mushy but ok. The teriyaki chicken was good. The vegetables and rice were amazing. We would visit again.
THEY MESSED UP! Needed measles, mumps, and varicella titters, Got results for rubeola and mumps... WTF! The dr's order were definitely MM and varicella!

Same as any other Panera. Fresh, overpriced food. Usually hit them up once a week. The downtown Indy location is horrible at special orders. The staff either can't read or do not understand the word "plain" 50 percent of the time. Otherwise good location and quick service.

I ordered the chicken pesto ravioli presentation was great taste was good but it was cold my server took it back, and she brought it back it was hot but the flavor wasn't there anymore. My daughter got the kids pizza I gotta say her meal was so much better then mine

Stopping in on my way to work, and I was surprised on the small portions I received. This was a take out meal, the food was tasty, But as I said, very disappointed in the portion size For the price. $$$

Wow do they give you a lot of sushi! Everything was fresh and the portions are larger than you get at other places, while the prices are about the same. I only wish the tea included a pot for refills and the menu had a larger selection.
I love love love this place. Food is always good. The only negative is when you get the pitcher of Bloody Mary it is only 2 glasses. It says 4 but it was not.

Nice, small town bar with cheap beer and greasy food. Used to come here a lot, so it is comforting in a way. It is cash only so make sure you come prepared. The staff are friendly if you treat them with respect. Do not expect really fancy, expensive cocktails here.
I have only been here for brunch once but the food did not disappoint. The shrimp and grits were amazing. I definitely want to go back soon.

A. Good spot for wine and cheese B. Good spot for a relaxed convo C. Bartenders knew their cheeses and were pretty helpful, I tipped well D. Forgot that there were 2 locations and missed half of the squad who were at other spot, eh, got drunk anyway and met up with them at Irish Pub afterwards Will hit many times more.

As previously mentioned in other posts, the service at this place sucks. It took a while for our waitress to come to our table to get our drink order. We asked for menus and after waiting a while we decided to just get up and get them ourselves. The food was edible, but it wasn't anything spectacular. I would not recommend this place.
I'm a burger lover and this was one of the best burgers (maybe even the best) I've ever had. Very high quality, thick burger that was so friggin' juicy. The fries were also top notch. No complaints.

I absolutely love, LOVE this place. My favorite sushi place in Tampa bay area. Great atmosphere and independent. Support the locals :). They have a great lunch deal and you cannot beat the watermelon drink. The sushi always tastes fresh. This place is becoming a once a week happening. I definitely recommend checking this place out.

Fresh sushi, clean establishment. Service appropriate, nice pour on a glass of wine, decent beer/wine selection. A bit pricey for some of the apps and dinners. A few sauces a bit to sweet. I will return
Has gone down in quality and service. Food is tasteless and the service is like watching ghosts delivering your meal. Used to be a regular...not anymore.

3.5 stars HOT TAKE: I like Cafe Beignet better. They are a little lighter than Cafe Du Monde. Quick service, yummy beignets, cheap prices, and open all day! We also got two hot chocolates that were good and not super rich so they accompany the beignets well.

This is usually a great sushi place but the last couple of times I've been in recently, has been horrible!! I found a hair in my sushi roll, my beer glass was stained with lipstick from the customer that had used that glass before me. Service was not okay and very very slow. Won't be coming here again.

Very disappointed with this location. I've lived in the community for 13 years and go there about once a month. I also frequent Pretzel Factory locations in Abington. Well because I didn't have enough stamps from their location on my "free pretzel after 10 stamps" card. I was denied a free pretzel. Really? Is that how you do?

This restaurant is one of the very few Indian restaurants that we have tried so far and I should say that it's the best taste by far!! The only concern we had is their spice level was too high. Other than they had a great taste and creativity in making modern Indian food.

After sampling dozens of fantastic pizzerias in Chicago, New York, and Boston I know I'm not supposed to really like this place. But somehow, I do. Don't get me wrong, its not the second coming of Giorodano's or Patsy's or anything, but its good stuff and makes for a great beach pizza
Great donuts, extremely expensive though. Went first time during free donut day and enjoyed.

Carmine's has been around for quite a while. I love the Ybor City location and the lively feel inside the restaurant. It's a convenient place for lunch or dinner. I think they serve average Cuban food, not the best in town, but very passable. I do not care for the deviled crab, it has too much bread stuffing for my liking.

We got nasty service from a waitress with yellow tacky hair and heavy eyeliner. She was extremely rude and didn't come to our table to ask how everything was. Very unfriendly woman who made my first time there horrible
Absolutely authentic street tacos, great value and a terrific Taco Tuesday. The location is of the wall but the food and service make for a great experience!
Super cute ! Must stop! Not to mention the donuts were fantastic !!! The bacon maple glaze was so so tasty !

Worst vegetarian options ever. I settled on one of the two options, grilled veggy tacos. Here tacos came out with lettuce, tomatoes, and a sauce, no grilled anything. Horrible. Their beer was good, they should stick to that.

Love this gem! A fun yet relaxed atmosphere with a great variety of coffees. I personally enjoy their java chip frappe. It has more of a milky texture/taste than many of their competitors, which I find very nice.

Honestly, the food isn't that great. I feel like it's more of like a hangover spot in my book since it has a great lunch special price wise. The restaurant is cute and has a lot of anime decor so it would be fun if you're into that. I got sushi and it tasted like cheap sushi, but it was.
If this is four and a half stars you should eat at home. Nothing outstanding. I was very disappointed.
Goldie is everything! Last minute grooming after a few rainy, muddy days. My shihtzu, Lucia was not only beautiful, she was happy! 1/2 the price and twice the service of my normal NYC groomer.
Great Food! Add Garlic their toppings and sauce is the best in the area. Good Price too!
The picture I posted says it all about little beefs. $10 for a Buffalo chicken piece of bread! Pathetic
Ordered thru app. Reserve coffee I had ordered thru the app was out of stock. Informed only when I showed up. No phone call, message or email. Ended up wasting 20 minutes.

Little deli place that has a wide variety of options. A little hectic trying to order food and check out. I recommend taking your food to go because there is not really good seating. Pico was amazing and I highly recommend that!
Went for lunch on a Saturday. Really relaxed atmosphere. The hardest part was deciding what to eat as everything on the menu sounds so good!!
I love this place, but I bought flowers for my mom for Mother's Day, but within 24 hours they are completely dead!! We were both pretty disappointed with the experience

Worst food I've had in a dinner. Hamburger meat has no taste. Chicken fingers were mostly bread and the pies ( pecan, cherry ) were terrible in taste and presentation. Service was ok and shake was good.
The chicken salad is very tasteful. Location is clean & well lit. Our server Tasha was great & efficient. Absolutely going back to this
The inside of their cheeesecake factory was beautiful and I love that it's in international plaza! The food was great and our server was wonderful.
Food was pretty good. Decor very cool and Mexican themed. Service was very slow and lacked importance with staff.
We just stopped in for breakfast, never having been in before. The food, service and ambiance were all top notch. We will definitely be back!!
Great middle eastern fare finally comes to Reno. Falafel is the best.

This a very nice restaurant conveniently located at Julia street during the art days. The service is nice and friendly. Somebody needs to go back and learn how to make risotto. It lacked the creamy texture and the taste was bland. Unfortunately, taste was overcompensated with heat salt on the otherwise delicious buttered bread. I want to give them a second chance.

I genuinely am not a fan of their food or baked goods. I feel it's overpriced and the quality falls flat. The decorations are beautiful and the feel of the place is very fun but unless you're just there to look around it's not worth it.
ABSOLUTELY AMAZING!!!! We took our son down for his birthday and it was awesome. The staff was friendly and the volunteers were well knowledged. I will be making a return trip

I just left there angry earlier today. The girl working the drive thru line was very rude and angry. I just asked for the drink I paid for and she was so upset about giving it to me she almost threw it in my car. The food isn't too bad but this experience kinda ruined it for me

Hidden fees. Dealer fee outrageous!! $2000 pinstripe and car wash fee!! What?? Absolutely disgusting dealership with no values or integrity . Avoid at all costs. You have been warned. Avoid this place like the plague.

The atmosphere is so cool, open, and bright! But the food is not that great. I love my food to have flavor and this restaurant lacked in that department. But the drinks were delicious! Try for yourself ?

As Yogi Berra remarked about a different place; "nobody goes there anymore, it's too crowded". Maybe a little too successful for its own good. The last time we ate here it was packed, there weren't enough waitresses, and my food came out cold. Don't overwork your waitstaff, they make or break a restaurant.
Great employees! Best brisket I've ever had! Would totally recommend if you are very hungry-- portions are big... definitely wanted to keep eating after I was full!
It's a pretty average sandwich to be honest. I did not understand the hype. Maybe its historical background is what makes it famous
Good breakfast and great service. We enjoyed the food. Staff keep coffee cup filled at all times.
Simply average , nothing special but at least it's here. Very very expensive. Nice selection of hard to get items. Understandably it's reflected by their prices
Just okay...i got my order 1 1/2 hr after I ordered. The food was just warm and tasted awful. I will not be ordering there again...very dissapointed

I wanted to love this food. Instead.....eh. Hamburger interesting but prefer the old fashioned kind. Dumplings are too dumpling if you know what I mean. Hot dog? Again, interesting but I'll take a Portillo's over this. Yes, it m a simple man, but I'm trying. Just make tastier food!

We showed up 10 minutes before closing, and there were still people dining inside. The doors were locked and we couldn't get inside. All we wanted was a small pre-made dessert. I have been there before and I didn't expect this kind of treatment.

I tried this place recently for the first time and was disappointed. I found the food to be bland and mediocre, as well as overpriced. I also found the restaurant to be sort of dark and dingy. Service was OK.

In response to Steddon's recent comment, I wrote this review in 2012. I have since moved two additional times with much more professional movers. I stand by my original review. If you could give zero stars, I would.
Horrible service!!!! I would not wish this service or food on my worst enemy. So bad it makes you not ever want Italian food again. Sloppy, flavorless and disgusting. Worst I've had in my life.

Music was excellent. The service was prompt and well done. We got the French fries with the special dipping sauce which was very good. The artichoke dip was also very good. The desert was three "cookies" the oatmeal was not bad but the marshmallow one was not edible and the chocolate one was stale. Good place to relax.
Very good food and service. 4 stars as we had to wait for a table to be cleaned and the item we ordered was not very well described. Other than that, the food was very tasty!
fresh ingredients, good service and great food. Have great options and an expansive menu for brunch, lunch, and dinner.
It's the typical outlet mall. The H&M store has the same clothes in Tampa Fl... nothing special in each store. There's is a Dave& Buster's and Movie theater attached and multiple restaurants.
Honest business and will go again. I brought two phones. They fixed a water issue and replaced a charging port. It took two visits to for charging port but they made it right. Good people.

The Injira was cold, as was the room (freezing). They were out of a few things. The waitress wasn't familiar with the menu and couldn't describe the difference between dishes. I used to come to Ethio at this location, but had not been to this establishment. Same menu, but what a big difference.

Cute place. Friendly service but very slow the three times we've been there. Overpriced if you like traditional pizzas such as pepperoni, etc. Good place if you like specialty pizzas. Have lots of veggie options and good sandwiches too. Also have a patio overlooking back parking lot.

Typical bar food. The servers don't care. They take your order and have someone drop it off. There is no personality to the food or service. Blank commands get issued and blank items show up. Deep fried and go. The fries suck. The beer selection and specials are good but then again it's old city.
The eggs I was served messed up my whole breakfast I asked for scrambled soft they were rock hard and appeared to be green. Won't be eating here again.
Small bar with some weird interior stuff. The staff isn't very attentive and the drinks are just okay.
Food was hot and fresh! First time trying! Fast service and open Sundays now! Wanted drink with no ice she got me new one with no ice with no problem.

Stopped in last night while previewing for my birthday. The bartender made a great fresh margarita. He knows what he's doing. I just wish he was a bit friendlier. By the end of our drinks he did warm up a bit and gave us suggestions of other great bars to stop in.

Ok...I will definitely be back but I need to see someone who actually listens to what I ask...I want the person who actually does all the offers you have and someone who really knows how to do a great pedicure as well as a great refill and actual CUTICLE maintenance..Who do you recommend????!!!
I took my daughter here for an electronic free day trip and she had a blast learning, discovering and playing. This place is awesome.

Customer service was not the best. Crawfish definitely was under-seasoned. A lot of the crawfish tails were mushy, some of the tails were missing, and some of the crawfish were dead before cooked. I'd love to be able to say it was good and I plan to go back but I can't.

At there for the first time on Mothers Day. Sat on the deck (be sure to ask for a table with an umbrella because it can get hot). Canal view was nice. Not as nice as the Gulf but nice. Food was great. Service was great. A bit pricey but worth it.
Everything is covered in margarine. The food quality was poor. They think a chicken fried steak is a deep fried hamburger. Not recommend

They have the absolute best bread ever. I can eat these bad boys nonstop! They serve Cajun delicacies such as turtle soup, gumbo, etc. I absolutely adore the ambiance and the southern hospitality here. The only downside is that their appetizers are better than their entrees.

The service guy drove his van into a parked car and denied that he ran into the vehicle. The owner is unprofessional along with the staff very unprofessional that they would cause damage to property and refuse to have their insurance take care of it.
I'm confused on why put a rating when it gets deleted. Must be a money thing. This Yelp is fake reviews. They remove the real honest reviews.

small cramped joint with good food and fine service. roof fell in over a year ago and it was rebuilt and redecorate - yes, this is the improved version. still a joint. food combo of tex-mex/louisiana is strange but it works fine. kitchen is in dining room or visa versa.worth a visit.

This is our 4th dinner at Crawfish! Food was outstanding! Had 1/2 roast duck (juicy succulent, and crispy,. Then, the best Mongolian lamb ever, followed by salt & pepper prawns!! Yum! Service was fantastic, and cocktail sublime!! I say it's the best of show in Reno!!
Save your money! It was good but not great. Too expensive for what it is. They put too much pepper on the oysters. We did love seeing them pick the herbs fresh.

Staff was really nice, but the game was not good. My friend and I have done multiple escape rooms from different companies and this one was not a puzzle. Some of the clues you had to straight up Guess, not solve or figure out. It didn't feel put together and there were some clues that were only possible with help. Would not go back.

They were at TGM Bay Isle tonight. Complete waste of money. Taste is mediocre at best. Wait time was more than double what was quoted and it was not busy. Lobster bites were more like crumbs. Gumbo is almost all rice and shell. Very little actual gumbo or meat. If I paid after I ate there would have been no tip. Never again.
I went in to sign up and waited over 30 min. I left at that point and never saw the account manager. Place looked great from what I could see from the lobby and the front desk staff was nice.
Knowledgeable and friendly staff, great selection of plants. Love this place and I will be purchasing plants from them as long as they are here!

Currently sitting in the corner when a giant bumble bee came and ate my food. I asked if I can get something else but they said not unless I pay. Unreal- I would never recommend this place to anybody. And even if this bee incident didn't happen the food sucked anyway

It's a safe option specially cause you can dine in. Good prices,good flavour, good portions and their sweet and sour soup it's my favorite. The beef is great and the egg rolls still number one. Their fried rice has shrimps and pork slices,delicious
The green Chile hollandaise was phenomenal. I switched the cornbread for and English muffin and it was the most amazing take on eggs Benedict I've ever had.
Seemed to have gotten better. Friendly much more efficient staff. Go in there daily

The hotel was about half full, with a lot of rooms. It was a non-smoking hotel, but there was a twinge of smoke smell in my room. Continental breakfast was there, but no fresh fruit and we had to make our own coffee. Wi-fi quality was actually pretty good!

I had the Creole Queen and my husband had the BBQ Beeph...OMG!!! Both of them were AMAZING!!! Great customer service as well! Definitely going to try the other ones when we visit again. You get 2 really big overstuffed beignets, could only eat one and nibble on a few of my daughters fries! Can't wait to try the others!
Was checked in quickly and waiting area was clean. Had an oil change, shot of coolant and tail-light replaced. Was in and out within 20-30 minutes. Everyone was very pleasant.
A little bit of everything to cook but.....not much of anything "healthy" to eat, fast !
skinjoy.net has AMAZING products to benefit any type of skin. They have natural and healthy solutions for all ages. If you want glowing and radiant skin check them out. Www.skinjoy.net

We went for lunch and the beer was great and the food even better. Mac and cheese with a cheese burger. Great atmosphere. Other reviews around this day are not so good but I guess as a new business they are working out the kinks. I'd give them another go.

Still very average unless you get a burger & fries. $14 Cobb salad with no blue cheese or any cheese and small plate with hardly any dressing. Asked for more dressing and was brought Honey Mustard Dipping sauce.
The food is very bland. For aThai place the pad Thai was not that great or flavorful. And messed up the order.

Meh. Service and food were all good, but the place just didn't have the classic Applebee's vibe. Decor was way off. It felt more like a sports bar. I'd go to a sports bar if I wanted my eyes abused by Bucs and Rays murals. LOL We still got and enjoyed the half-priced apps.

Service lousy! The food is typical Applebee's! I been here several times & my food has come out cold. No lie cold!! If you love Applebee's food the one in Fishtown is a mile away from this one. The service here comes with no smile & a lot of eye rolling at customers.

Very interesting* meal. Anyone going here should know that the omakase is only available Tuesday through Thursday. The standard 7 course meal is decadent and meant for a very adventurous eater. There were some shining bright spots (uni was amazing, scallop was amazing), but it felt more like we were fighting through the extravagance than enjoying a meal.
The place located inside lovely hotel. Atmosphere inside is very good and happy hour is amazing. Highly recommend it for great quality food.

AOK! An inexpensive, clean place to stay for a night. Spacious rooms with decent amenities. Comfortable mattresses and soft pillows. No complaints or gripes. Microwave and refrigerator included are perfect for restaurant leftovers. A good place to get a good night's sleep before hitting the Sponge Market and Dunedin. I would stay here again if I come back this way.

Came here with two friends and we each ordered 3 different burgers and split them into thirds so we can sample the burgers we selected. Honestly, is ok but not one of the best in Philly. It was pricey for a burger and it did not come with fries.

It is worth the wait. If you go at 11 or 11:30 you'll beat the crowds. A muffaletta from any other place is not a muffaletta. There is a reason why everyone compares theirs to this place. The stuffed artichoke is also legit
I waited 1 hour and 30 minutes for takeout . A lot of confusion with the staff and orders were incorrect . The food is good , but the customer service is horrible .
This was a great RV park. The management was very friendly and helpful. Restrooms, showers, laundry were all very clean and nice. We would definitely stay here again.
Absolutely everything they have on their menu is delicious. Must try the chai latte "to die for"
Since Mark Estee turned over ownership, the place has not been the same. Still a solid place with respect to environment and vibe but it has lost all of its charm and authenticity

This place is not worth. I usually eat at my local Chinese restaurant, but today this was the closest thing I had. I don't know about other Panda Expresses, but the portions here are REALLY small. If you can, small Chinese Ma and Pa restaurants!!
Great atmosphere, excellent food, great presentation and wonderful owners! If you're looking for a great steak, this is the spot! BYOB only adds to the greatness that is bom dia grill!

I've always enjoyed this place, but over & over they disappoint me. Over a 4 hour wait for a party of 9 on a Saturday because reservations aren't allowed. Ridiculous. Then to make matters worse, we waited 45 minutes in the to-go line for 3 pieces of cheesecake! 45 minutes! Insane. I won't be back.
It was okay. Not much in terms of style, quality or service. Pretty average Italian restaurant.

Had drinks on the rooftop bar during Labor Day weekend. Nice view of the lake and of the other buildings around. Service was excellent with friendly staff. Drinks were overpriced and my specialty cocktail was unimpressive.
The food was ok the prices were too expensive for the food you get. Ybor grill blows thhis place out of the water

This is clearly one of those places that if you drink enough, you don't mind the food or lack of sanitation We got a veggie pizza. Smelled and looked like vomit. We got medium well burgers that were bleeding We got silverware with crusted food Once we got ourselves unstuck from the filthy chairs, we left Never again
close to home, we enjoy going. the food is good and pleantiful.

Poor service, ordered from the kiosk and it does not have the option to select water in place of a soda. Ask the lady at the counter and she responded that we cannot do that even when the water bottles is next to her. Would not recommend this location, too bad there is not a zero rating.

The drum is definitely delicious. Pork belly is a must and surprisingly light. Great oyster selection and cocktails as well. The ceviche was nothing special. Overall, great food but left debating whether the overall experience was worth the price. Probably a 5 Star happy hour spot
I hate this place... it is worse than Chucky Cheese!
The meats were good! The salad bar weren't good at all.. rice was raw, beans were dry !! I personally won't go back. The service sucks. Waited so long for my drink. Very disappointing

Food was mediocre and the mixed drinks were terrible. Not sure if the bartender was having a bad day. Service was a bit slow, appeared the server was either tired or miserable. Won't be back anytime soon.

Always clean and staff is always kind. Food is great as usual? But I noticed that the prices went up a bit here. They used to have a special where you can get the half sandwich and half salad for under $8, now it's about $10 :/ I can't complain since they did give a good amount of food.

What a disappointment! This was the first restaurant we tried when wandering the French Quarter; it looks nice and the sweet potato fries drew us in, but the food was mediocre at best. My Po Boy was mostly bread. Given all the wonderful restaurants in New Orleans, I don't know how this place stays in business.

Ok...so the crab cake burger was a bit over rated, but I really enjoyed their fish tacos. I didn't think anyone could make fish tacos as good as my husband, but On the Alley can! The only negative is that the fish is fried and a bit too greasy for my tummy :0/

I didnt think much of what i ordered. Actually it was below aveage but not awful. The dumplings had the thickest dough i've ever encountered. The scallion pancake was thick and soggy. And the shrimp and broccoli wasnt as good as others i've had. Not terrible, not great. Gets two stars.
Highly recommend this parlor, the cleanliness is impeccable, service was outstanding. The artist was on point and extremely talented.

My wife and I shared a dish of ribs and pulled pork. Service was aweful for a thursday night. Eventually when the food came out it wad cold. Didn't want to send it back as it was already too long to be there. Food was tasty though.

Bad selection and bad customer service! I would rather go to Federhofer's. Also, there is no room to look at the selection because the space is so small. No place to sit and enjoy the snacks purchased. This business doesn't fit in St. Louis Hills.......maybe try the Central West End.

My husband and I was looking to check this place out. We live in the downtown Belleville area and we love BBQ. We ordered the Cuban sandwich and waited forever to get service and then waited forever to get served our food. Sandwiches were dry and pretty boring and very overpriced we probably won't go back!
