Terrible pizza Tasteless Dough is the worst. Really need to change the pizza dough. Need to use better quality ingredients. Perfectly acceptable for an Arizona pizza but not for those who know better.

The beers are okay. Bands are usually pretty good. The guy who waits on people outside is always very nice. The bearded guy in the Hawaiian shirts has been an unprovoked dick on three occasions. I sit order, am polite and tip well and he is just randomly an asshole.
It's my first time here and the food is not too bad. The place looks nice and clean and the waitresses pretty attentive with free Wi-Fi.
Ok service, ok food nothing special just another Irish bar chain. Not worth another visits especially with $ 4.75 beers
this place used to be better and needs better management

The food here in The Cup Cafe is excellent whether you go for dinner or lunch. I was there two days ago for lunch and they served me some exquisite butternut squash bisque. Been there for dinner as well and have yet to have any disappointing food, this is one of the better places to have a meal in Tucson.

I was recommended by a friend who is a local from Philly to try this place while I was in town for the weekend and I am very pleased that I did just that! The Paesano sandwich is so delicious and messy! I wish I had the stomach capacity to try all the other sandwiches in one messy sitting!
5/5 stars for downtown Saint Petersburg Karma location... travel there if you want better and faster customer service.

The food was okay. The spam appetizer was the best part of our meal. I would recommend that. The chicken on the chicken sandwich was good but the roll wasn't as soft as it should have been. The sweet potato fries were good with the pepper sauce. The steak was flavorful but did not provide the desired variety in the dish.
Great coffee shop to hit driving from the north side of Nashville towards downtown. Staff was very friendly too.
Love this salon. Megan is amazing and was able to make me the perfect shade of blonde. Everyone there is super friendly and goes out of their way to make guests comfortable.

Got the lemongrass tofu..the tofu itself really tasty! They gave a pretty big portion of the vermicelli noodles and vegetables. The dish however somewhat bland as it was just the lemongrass tofu, cooked noodles, and vegetables. I added yellow curry to the dish at home and it was the perfect compliment!
Super place 4 Fun Family Ice Cream and great food the manager Meagan is really a great lady.... she made our experience really really great

I've had this place twice and both times I'm beyond underwhelmed. I love pasta and this place is just a disappointment... but the atmosphere is nice, I'll give it that. I recommend going to the Hill or getting Sugos, won't be trying this place a third time.

Service is lacking. I asked for water&& he never bought out my water. I reminded him again. NEVER came back, he was too busy walking around doing nothing. I had to ask the bus boy to bring me the water. If you can't do your job right then you shouldn't be a server. I don't care how cheap it is. I would never return.
Pleasant surprise to see a Ramen place at PHL! Good ramen, may be better than one in Chinatown! Staff is super friend. Sushi looks fresh. Nice gem!
They do great work. Always a very long line though. A little pricey, but what can you expect these days. Friendly staff!

The gal at the Estée Lauder counter lied about the costs just to make the sale, it cost more and then she convinced me to ding my credit applying for a card that I didn't get which I knew I wouldn't. But I DID find a pair do Levi's for 9 bucks!
straight garbage I hope everyone that works there gets eaten by crocodiles or poisoned
I like it, plenty of TV's, beers on tap, liquor, and you can smoke your cigars here. Ohh and some gambling. Next to the Hilton Garden Inn, so I dodge the over priced beers.
Grilled Oysters. Great. Ettouffee. Good. Food: 4 Service: 5 Atmosphere: 5 Value: 4
Literally the rudest employees at a store I've ever gone to. I talked to the manager about it, who was actually one of the rude ones! It's worth going somewhere else.
Solid Greek restaurant, authentic, fresh food. Salads and apps-- excellent. Fresh fish and lamb are big winners as well.

It was a eat place inside and very clean. The food was very good. Had the Chicago beef and fries. Had the chili for an appetizer had a unique flavor but very good. Can't wait to go back and try some other things on the menu.
Burger did not thrill me. Not nearly as good as Village Whiskey. Good quality meat, ordinary roll and ok. Lively atmosphere with a really good bar.
Service felt rushed, tried to take my plate while eating. Food was not spectacular either. Lots of better places and not worth the price. The ambience was nice though.

Went here for lunch today, there was only one other table with people in our section. It still took forever to get service. 20 minutes before we even got a glass of water. The food was awesome as always, but if it weren't for the food I wouldn't god back.
Ox bones anyone? I really enjoy eating Oxtail and it's hard to find a restaurant that serves it and even though the oxtail was delicious it was more bones than meat.

Wouldn't go back there. Located on bourbon street, you can get a great view of the constantly passing crowds, but that doesn't make up for the fact that everytime I've gone. I have been disappointed with every meal I've had.

Great place for picking-up a can of coldbeer, while out for a bike ride or evening walk. Just don't try to eat here ! I can't figure how this place ever got such a good, but seriously erroneous, rep for Po-Boy's. Rick

We purchased a two hour ice skating session on Groupon but the place was packed so we only stayed for about an hour. Lots of kids but the rink was well kept and the skates were comfy. Overall, decent experience.
If your a girl don't bother the hostess will seat u in the back and no one will come over. Horrible service we left
The bartender, Ian, is an absolute gem! He was so kind to our group. Super prompt service, and amazing happy hour deals! We will definitely come back soon!

Just had the best experience! GABBY is an amazing bar tender! The food was amazing& just what we were hoping for! The specials are on point& they have a couple nights where they do cool ass trivia like rick& Marty, GOT, check this gem out!

I was craving Mexican and decided to give Nico's a try. Got a takeout order of the Cheese Enchiladas with rice & beans. Not bad for a little takeout shop in a strip mall. Their rice was really good and the sauce of the cheese enchiladas was just about perfect. Not to hot, but with just the right amount of zip to it.
This place still BLOWS!!!!!!!!!! Food is overpriced and just Sucks they should turn that place into a WAWA
I guess I had a different experience than the other individuals because the woman who ran the place was downright rude. My friend just wanted to buy a newspaper and we ended up going elsewhere.

Bar: I like that it's laid back and divey, but it's WAY too smokey. In the summer they have an awesome outside patio, though, with bags and washers and plenty of seating. Food: the fried chicken is REALLY good and cheap. The rest of the food kind of sucks.
This is a good quick soul food fix. The food is good, not to die for but does satisfy the craving. I had the fish (which I must say they give you your money's worth ), Mac n cheese , greens & yams.

Solid late night choice. Can't go wrong. Plenty of traditional options and fast service. Our waiter was soooo nice and polite. The wine selection isn't great, but I think most people in New Orleans are there for the liquor. We did have to stand in line, even at 1030 pm on a weekday, but it moved quickly. Fun atmosphere too.

This place employs the biggest set of retards I have ever seen. Do not ask someone what would you like to order then go oh you need to wait a minute. You know what fuck you I will wait alright I'll never go back because every time we go you fucking screw shit up. So

I had the medium style tenders with fries and apples. The chicken was really juicy, but the chicken was too hot for me. I wish I would of started with the mild. The apples helped with the heat. The fries were seasoned with some heat. I wished they were plain. If you love hot chicken this is a great place to try.
Worst customer service and god forbid you fly regional. You will miss your connection if you have one no doubt about It. Plan ahead people!
The best italian stromboli wre've ever ate. So full of meats and cheeses. Add the sauce on the side. DELICIOUS!
Fast food in 45 minutes, serve it cold and "burnt" or at least over cooked and you have our Lunch. Good luck eating there. I hope it is better when you eat there.
The food was good but the place seemed to be trying to hard. The service was not great, seemed to be too busy for us although it was lunch and maybe 2 other tables there.

I mean... it's a Panera. A pretty standard Panera with a decent seating area upstairs (pre-Covid) and lovely little ordering kiosks bc some days we really be out here tryna minimize human interaction, you feel? Anyways I got a blueberry bagel and it was fine.

Great evening start to finish! Temp check at parking engendered a sense of security. Everything followed in suit after that. Amazingly curated wine list with help from Kate, Interesting and well prepared food.
Best prices best product they're quick as hell great for my vegan needs and I can pay on CashApp. Thank yalllll

Anyone that has anything bad to say about the pizza is clueless. If you want a great slice deal or an amazing pie...you won't be disappointed. Try the huge one :) now why not 5 stars..customer service they are the best and they know it...really dont care....think Seinfeld Soup Nazi
Great place! Awesome staff!!! Very convenient location, right next to interstate 275. No bells and whistles with this place (old building) what you see is what you get. We'll be back! Thanks!
Very disappointed with the quality of tacos and pho noodles . i am a vegetarian so expected it to be good based on the reviews however it wasn't as great as expected.

I liked it. The food was good, not great. The poughboy could use about twice as much spice. The portions are tiny which I guess is normal for tappas. But, the prices were high. Very high. 1 beer, $10. 1 ounce of pork belly, $14. The atmosphere was nice as the service was respectable

Good Mexican food. We had the Chimichangas with chicken and barbacoa (shredded roast beef). Both were quite good. The salsa is ok, based on oregano, chili's, tomato sauce and onion. Most meals are around $10. Service was excellant. When asked what their barbacoa tasted like, they went to the kitchen and brought back a sample.
Come here at leat twice a month. Disappointing that when I needed an extra hour in the room due to having health issues Atlantis just wouldn't oblige.
Get #18, trust me it's really good. Good customer service as well, don't understand why it only has 3 stars.
They suck! My fiance got really bad food poisoning from an ahi salad. We're never going back.

Looks like a decent place. Went in for the first time with about 6 people....3 people working behind the counter...guy was on his phone didn't even acknowledge us....Walked right out. A lot of other places who are willing to greet the customer. Was my first time there won't be coming back, Chewys is down the street and they will be taking my future business

This place is a typical lower Broad tourist trap with a twist. They beat their customers. I'd stay away if I were you. http://www.tennessean.com/article/20120919/NEWS/309190181/Doctor-sues-Rippy-s-over-bar-fight Always full of ugly people in bermuda shorts. Food is pedestrian, but it does fit the crowd.

I love Syberg's! I love the chicken wrap with their signature wing sauce, and this time I went I tried their pizza, and it was so good. they have very good lunch specials. The service is pretty good. I think lunch time gets a bit busy here. The bar area is great, also plenty of big screens for any game.
Terrible. Wont write anything else. But hey its west main in belleville. Enough said...

the experience was below standard. Doubt i would be back. The food are in large portions but large portions does not mean the best food. It was busy when we got there. Maybe thats why it took over 30-40 minutes for our food to come out. I think, or it had seemed that long. not great in my book.

The food is good, not exceptional, but solid. However, the manager running the pace is so rude and unpleasant, goes around micromanaging employees that are actually doing a good job and speaking of customers (like me) as if we are stupid and could not hear her. What a horrible service. I live in the neighborhood and I am not coming back for a while.
I've eaten here a few times, the one in Feasterville is way better and nicer. The food didn't taste as fresh, the service is kind of slow and I wasn't allowed to bring a small stroller in.

Look, I appreciate an allergen friendly place. But the cost for one small plate of food was $18. I found the menu confusing and misleading. Food was good-- but certainly not worth that much money. I live in NYC and I even had sticker shock at the cost of a lunch. And that's saying something...
Superb food! So awesome. The wait staff is wonderful and attentive! I can't say enough good things about this restaurant.
Not gonna go on about the 1 Star rating, so here's goes. Don't order the beef sliders. $14 for 2 tiny bite size ass burgers. Do better Brew Brothers.

It was a great place for lunch as it was my first time trying it the flavors were new for me. I did not know what to order, I end up ordering what my girlfriend order. Great flavors, great price, small place
I always get the same thing--grande caramel macchiato. This location skimped on the expresso. My drink tastes like hot milk.
Servers really need to step it up from the hostess to wait staff. Place had at max 10 tables and could not manage. We had our dinner serve an waited for another wait staff to get us silverware!

Was excited to try this place out based off the reviews. The interior design was nice. However the portion sizes of the rolls were completely lacking. It's basically a half sized (maki) rolls for a full priced roll. The flavor was all there it tasted great but overall it was disappointing.
came here after class and the person who made my food was super nice. i had a tofu rice bowl and he totally made it fresh. i'll be going back again, but maybe to get my usual quesadilla.

Went there around 3pm on Friday. Not many people inside. We ordered couple of salads. The food was really good, the reason i'm giving this place three stars is the service. Just meh, servers were more interested in talking to each other and the place just did not have a very welcoming vibe. A lot of potential, but service needs a lot of improvement!
For the price the food was mediocre. The meat was so dry and tasteless. What a waste of money.
This theatre is very nice. The only concern is the area where you make drinks is never clean. I've been here 15+ times & cleanliness is the only complaint.

My second visit was today. Everyone is pleasant from the door. The front desk, the nurse, the doctors and the people at patient check out. Very imformative, seen at your appointment time and really helped me with everything I needed help with. This was my second visit-both great.

This isn't about the food so I can't give it five stars cause that just wouldn't be fair. But did you know you can "rent" books on tape here? Awesome!! Buy the book and then when you return it at any Cracker Barrel, they will credit your account minus the $3 it costs for the rental time. Sweet!
Crew was very thorough with 3 of our vehicles. These guys spent hours and delivered a great product. Highly recommend.
Delicious, filling, excellent upbeat atmosphere, authentically friendly service. I highly recommend this place.

I took my wedding dress here for alterations, plus a very difficult bustle. The work was amazing and very affordable. I will take all my future alterations here. To add to my experience, the owner is such a sweet and amazing women with an incredible life story. I loved her work, but also loved her a person.

A fuji apple chicken salad is made with more than lettuce, tomato and dressing. Maybe if the girl behind the counter would stop making eyes at the guy behind the counter with her I would not have had to ask for them to fix it. 3 stars is only for the fact that they made the salad again for me the right way.
Just had the worse cooked chicken ever...salty beyond belief. Called the store and they said will refund me but I will NEVER buy a cooked chicken there again!!!

The food is delicious which is why I've continued to return; however, the service is sooooooo sllllloooooowwww and never that friendly. They consistently have one individual attempting to bartend while waiting on all the tables. This will be my last visit which is sad considering I live less than a mile from this place.

Mama Palma's is delicious, gourmet pizza. They have so many options- toppings, cheeses, salads, and pastas. Everything I've tried there is delish. Also, the atmosphere is much nicer than your average pizza joint.

It's very charming. We did a tour the other day, but couldn't stay for a show that evening. The staff was super friendly and very excited by the restoration. The history is fasinating. Thans to all who are working to keep it going!!
Solid, fast and fresh place to have lunch. Cafe atmosphere.
Beer is pretty good. Stopped in and had a flight of 6. Sat at the bar, wasn't busy and service was fine. Food was okay. Just has a very "chain" feel to it. Not bad...just not great.
The best! Dr Polo is very caring and staff is too Always take good care of my dogs and cat. Gives treatment options so you can decide which helps with the pocketbook

The food is good but not amazing. Causal atmosphere and outdoors seating. Their margaritas do not even have real tequila in them. But I know a lot of my friends like it more than me when compared to Lilly's Tacos.

Ate at National Mechanics last night. This is the 2nd time that I have eaten at this restaurant where I ordered a rare hamburger and it was cooked to medium well. I should think that a rare hamburger should be the easiest item to cook on the menu. Sent the hamburger back.

The food was ok. Tables were really sticky. The beignets were really good-although I have nothing to compare them to...these were my first! I got the breakfast sandwich and I didn't care for it. The Cajun hash browns were good but a little salty.

Quality of food was better than most Chinese Food takeout places. My only beef was that their dishes did not have enough sauces and were somewhat dry. I ordered orange chicken and General Tsos and both were dry without enough sauce to put over top the rice & chicken. The hot & sour soup was the bomb!

This place is a joke. Been in here multiple times to get pricing and all I get are insultingly bad numbers. They're located off Route 3 by some strip mall. Not the best land rover dealer I've been to I can say that.
Love it here on weekdays. Spent 20 minutes in line on a Saturday and moved maybe 4 spots. Place cannot manage a weekend crowd as well as other Starr spots.
The food is great. I just wish they would give the place a much needed cleaning. It is really getting skeevy.
the only person better than Tony himself is Bonnie. A true gem of a manager.
Have ordered from here a few times at night after work and they have not put the protein on the sandwich. How do you build a club and not put the meat on it?

One of the best places for home decor from around the world - rolls of Ikat fabrics, Chinese wardrobes, Moroccan lanterns, Japanese fabrics, and so on. Reasonable prices. Authentic stuff with great ambiance like free coffee and varied music from 99 Red Balloons (Starlite Singers) to world music. Only wished I lived in Philly!! Great staff, stress shopping experience!!

Good car wash, worth the money... Only complaint is that the hours are till 4:45 and today I was there at 4:05 and they were closed. Not the first time there were closed well before the posted hours... I go out of my way to go there, so it's a big inconvenience....

Some nice flavors but I don't approve of the giant cup sizes for the serve-your-own pay-by-weight system. X-large and XX-large only, a prompt for my children to fill it too much, which of course they did.

My husband took me here for my birthday and we were not disappointed. We got the penne pasta with white burgundy as well as a few different cheeses. All were phenomenal! I also loved the cozy atmosphere.
If you want to be certain you'll wait for hours, then this is the tow service for you. Don't ever use them!

nice food, loves the menu, original and well presented plates. BUT the service: how many times can you interrupt people conversing to check that "everything is all right?" !!!!!!! Stop doing that! It's rude! I was so stressed by it, I left after the entrees to go elsewhere to discuss.
Wow! Amazing flavors and treats. Haven't had the salted caramel croissants but I hear they are AMAZINGLYGOOD! Next trip, and more happy calories. And more running :o( Highly recommend this place

Little place with good real hand made food. The pizzas all hand tossed with real quality ingredients. I had a ham and brie sandwich on this super good chewy bread. Really great service too. Would go here again.

Went twice was so irritated with the sales guy the first time. He made it quite obvious since I wasn't spending $1000's of dollars ha really didn't want to help me. I tried a product I thought was right anyway. The cashier was quit polite when I brought the item back and attempted to help.

The mussels have absolutely no taste at all. Very poorly made. Service is excellent however. If they're reading this, it's important to cook them with garlic and a good white wine and saffron. Among other herbs and pepper :)

Excellent service they have provided the two times that I've been seeing there one for, xrays and the second time for a MRI..also I requested a copy of my MRI and my medical records to begin send them to my doctor,and they were very pront to help 9out with both requests..Thank you very much

Hey Uber, you need to train your drivers better. I hopped an Uber to the NOLA airport with my husband yesterday (8.3.2019) and the Uber driver took off while I was trying to get into the car. Fortunately, I still have all of my toes.
Love Heather. Always leave looking great! Top notch service. Don't see myself going anywhere else.

I use to frequent this Hawaiian themed burger hut back in my UCSB days; SUPER friendly service, best onion rings I've had to date, fun atmosphere with patio seating (too bad it's in a strip mall.) Great value, tasty food, good times...THX.

We went in for dinner on 8/12 and had a great experience. JJ is a wonderful waiter. Food good. Had an issue with steak being tough but the manager got us a different steak. The manager checked on us several times and even had us pick out a dessert of our choice. Will gladly return!
Good food, good portions, good service. Go early or there may be a wait. Added cost to share your order. Nicely decorated. Adequate street parking.

Overrated, in my opinion. Too much emphasis on televised sports, festive cocktails, and the whole gimmicky thematic aspect of the establishment. It's been my experience that quality of service tends to suffer with this sort of distraction filled atmosphere. The burgers weren't bad, overall, but the buns were dry and flavorless.

I love everything I bought from them. This is the biggest art supply store I've visited. They have large selection of colors, painting tools, canvases, etc. The price is a bit higher than Michael's but you should give it a try.
Not a bad buffet. Food was good, service was mediocre. I had to tell the waitress to fill up my glass 3 times which was one time too many. The best thing on the buffet are the vegetables egg rolls.
Tour was in the rain but we prevailed. Our tour guide was ok. Wish it would of geared alittle towards the 3 kids we were with.
You can't go wrong with Cinnabon! Taking extra precautions in covid and still delivering delicious treats!
When they are fresh and hot, the beignets are really good... they just taste like garbage when they are cold and stale.
Meh, food was so so. Service was poor, but we were a large table at the end of the night. But the server really couldn't have put in less of an effort.
Sat on the patio no problem with the service, nice relaxing place to watch the world go by.

Awesome! We stopped here on the way home to New York from DC, and were super glad we did! The atmosphere was great, the bartender was super friendly and the people were so nice. Glad to say we made some new friends! Drinks were stiff, too. :]
These little donuts were adorable! The staff frosts and decorates your donuts to order so everything is super fresh and delicious! They had so many fun options! We will be back!

Pros: Easily accessible based on location. Chill lunch spot. Nice atmosphere and staff. Pizza is good. Cons: anything not pizza is not good. Air conditioning was turned up to make it warmer inside. Got pasta and it was layered with salt. Overall:Still not impressed

Moved to my area 2 weeks ago and they delivered to me with no problem.... now I call to order delivery again and they say they don't deliver after dark! SMH... losing money and customers.... clearly won't be ordering from them again.

Decent burger but not nearly as good as Red Robin. VERY noisy environment. Their real specialty is beer, not food. Red Robin has the best burgers in the area. Chili's burgers are good too. Both are better than Stout.

Loved this place. The Dollar PBRs during happy hour were perfect. I had the black and gold burrito with the extra point (queso) and it was amazing. I didn't think I'd finish but I plowed through until I reached the climax. Loved the laid back atmosphere, will return if I'm ever back in NOLA.

One of the best places to get a poboy in NOLA. From Shrimp to Surf & Turf to grilled Italian Sausage, it's all good. Really good sweet potato fries and lots of condiments. Be sure to make up a good name like Cap'n Crunch or Saggy Bottoms so when they call out your order you know it's yours!

Horrible customer service. Self checkout was a joke. I had to go to 2 registers and had problems with both. The employee that was supposed to help was so rude and whispering under her breath about me. I couldn't even speak to a manager because they were on registers. This place was ridiculous. This was my first time there.

This location is one of the best! Ive been to a couple different wax centers and between the Mount Laurel location and the Marlton one, they are seriously THE BEST! Staff, customer service, and the wonderful work they do. I will never go anywhere else!
Not a thing to complain about. Guava and cheese pastry was fabulous. I don't recommend grabbing the frita burger to-go. It's a heap is delishy messiness and very dangerous to eat in a new car.

As Shelter has recently opened in downtown Reno, I did expect more specials and gimmicks. Nothing. The place is kinda hum-drum, but I'm optimistic that it will improve. I go there on Monday Nights to place cards against humanity. The place is big enough to hold our ever-evolving group.
Ouch higher prices. Plus our favorite sandwich changed. No more Yoga Instructor: No more Alex
I understand now why there where so many bad reviews but you can't see the sheer numbers till you scroll down

Facility is super nice, clean, and easy to navigate. The staff were friendly, helpful and efficient. Doctor Hannaway was awesome. Explained everything and made me feel at ease. Was in and out in under and hour. Definitely recommend!

My buddy says this is the shit, i assure you it is not. Little compassion for customers that order the hot stuff. Inattentive staff, rude hostess, can't find water or napkins on an as needed basis. Wasn't even busy, too bad. Don't fall for the hype from the pedal tavern!

I didn't have to wait long at all. They did however, charge me a $3 fee to use my card to pay a fine. I would have appreciated it if there would have been a sign on the door or something to let me know.....would I have gotten cash, probably not- but still! No one likes surprise fees

Pat's or Gino's? Pat's - hands down. Pat's has more cheesesteak options on the menu, better quality meat, and way better fries. Other than that, the setup for both the places is almost identical. Counter service, outdoor seating, and the cheesesteaks show up moments after you order them.

Worst service ever an hour and half after we ride they call and say they are out of chicken!!! An hour and a half later!!!! Terrible service! Terrible service!! Why would you not say you were out of chicken when we placed the order?!? Terrible service!!!!

Absolutely excellent service!! Big shout out to the service department. Thank you Will and Danny! During this time of COVID19, they went above and beyond with phone calls, good deals and even picked up my vehicle so that I never had to leave home. Car drives like new!

I gave it two stars as the server was nice and they were quick to exchange food. Disgusting old grease was used and all the fried food wings,fries,fish was inedible. The rest of the food was so forgettable and bottom notch. I am surprised this franchise is still operating with the product they provide.
The service was good, but my food was horrible. I have the roast beef panini. It was flavorless. My wife stuck with breakfast and had a somewhat better meal. I didn't finish.
Best place on the West Bank to get Chinese food Try to boneless chicken chili then of course lo mein is greaterBoneless Fried ChickenBeef and BroccoliCantonese Crab Corn Soup is awesome Yep yes yes

I got a mango mousse and palmier. The mango mousse was a bit dense and hard like it had been sitting there for a while. It had a funky taste to it as well. But the palmier was great and the staff was friendly! The mango mousse was just disappointing to me.
Great service, great food, great price!! I definitely recommend!! The mahi fish sandwich was awesome!!
On the 14 around 12 I had chicken sandwiches. The food came out kind tasting reheated and just wasn't right. The next day I started having bad diarrhea. I would never reccomend this place.
Just want to give a quick shout out to Ty. I was indecisive and basically a bit of a pain in the ass but he was really helpful. Thanks!
I ordered one Chicken biryani and egg biryani and food was prepared fresh and taste is good .
Ordered out from this place tonight. Ordered a lasagna and medium pizza. Paid almost $45 for it. Was not worth it. Won't be ordering from them again.

Staff is courteous but they always find a little extra wrong with the car, costing $100s more if I agreed to it over the phone. Was sold a preferred oil change that included a tire rotation...however for some reason they couldn't rotate the tires but still still charged me full price just to top off fluids.

Great place for the younger set, looking for cheap beer, beach atmosphere, and fellow partiers. It's a shacky kind of place with a great outdoor seating area and view. I prefer it for lunch, with the sober crowd and more tolerant wait staff.

I stopped in for lunch yesterday and had an awesome blue burger, beer, and sweet potato fries. I ended up spending $20 (not including the tip). I will be back to try the pizza, which looked really good, and a milkshake, which also looked amazing - according to the 3 boys sitting at a nearby table.

The got the order wrong, but more importantly was how rude Saad, the owner was. He told me the Min to change on credit card was $30. I suggested that the sign indicating that should be more visible. He got indignant.

Service was good. The steak tasted of vinegar(horrible). The mashed potatoes and chicken soup were pretty good. The chicken noodle soup was delish!! My husband enjoyed the chicken pasta.(I think it was the Chicken Carrabba).

Just another local chain, nothing fancy. Service was slow, food was overly salty and for the price you can get much better in the area. For being a brewery, their beer is very disappointing. NO flavor! And who wants to pay $30 for a growler? Not this girl. Much better places to spend your money and stomach space in my opinion.

This restaurant is off the main path. The food was not very good, specifically the crab rangoon. We couldn't even eat it. They did take it off the bill though. Unfortunately, I think their location will hurt them, especially if the food is below average.
Disgusted food brought out with piece of grill brush on my steak. Poor service and disrespected about situation will never go back to that horrible place again
overpriced. Squid tempura cost $17. specialty rolls cost around $15. Food doesn't taste good either. I Would not recommend.

Have been a long time customer, but on 10-5-18, my wife and I ate Chicken Taco Salads, we contracted Salmonella poisoning. Very, Very ill for (8) days. Contacted the manager who laughed at my complaint! So I also filed a complaint with the health department.

The baba ganoush was the star of the sampler platter. It is smoky and so flavorful. Their hummus is also very solid. The falafel was very dense and dry so I suspect it was made ahead of time and got a bit cold but otherwise good. I will definitely sample more of their menu in the future.
Definitely on par with the food choices at the City Market. I've usually hit the line as the lunch rush is stating to wane. Bring your patience and your wallet, but the payoff is good.

I was taken to a private room instead of being out there among other customers. I felt the service was very professional and relaxing. I was given before and aftercare instructions. I also got a follow up text to make sure I was doing ok after the procedure.
So far so good Very good value very Courteous and professional :-)

Kwoks is legit asian food. DO NOT pass on the potstickers. They are amazing. And the general chicken was great. Light and crispy with a delicious sauce. Menu doesnt say it but dishes are served family style for sharing. Staff is super friendly and attentive. Some of the best chinese in the city for sure.
Fantastic lunch! Excellent service. Especially enjoyed the Greek salad with jerk chicken. Huge portions and would return next time we visit. Causal dining and we liked sitting outside.
I love this restaurant. It is from another time and cozy with very affordable food, with portions that are not huge and a nice waitstaff. It feels like a neighborhood place.

Really a hidden gem in this area. Some of the bowl options sound crazy, but they work like a charm! Live music and Bloody Mary weekends as well as nice and friendly staff. This is pretty close to a 5 star stop for me and those do not go out to often!

I didn't know this was a gluten free bakery until I went inside (I am not gluten intolerant) but everything inside looked amazing so of course I had to get something. The cheese danish was delicious and the day old cookies were a fun add-on. Their coffee menu looks great so I'll definitely get something to drink with a pastry next time.

I have been foolishly continuing with this company for six years, getting almost no reimbursement for regular veterinary care. What is worse, though, is that processing time is now regularly taking well over a month. It is pointless trying to call them, as they will put you on hold for over half an hour and then just give you ever longer projected processing time.

I bought a Groupon from this company and contacted them to schedule a cleaning. After some effort, I finally got an email from them telling me that the earliest they could schedule a cleaning was several months later, and that I "had better take it" because their next available time was much later than that. Fortunately, Groupon refunded my money.

I had lunch here yesterday with two friends. We shared a bell pepper beef and a crispy fried shrimp plus steamed dumplings. All pretty good. But we didn't try the house specialty, which is of course the fish.

Blah. How can you screw up breakfast food in New Orleans of all places?? Microwaved bacon, ice cold biscuits and Hollandaise sauce from a can? Come on, have some pride in that kitchen. Just plain lazy.

I was a fan of Nora Lee's when dining there for the first time. They have great cosmopolitan flavors! We ordered the crawfish appetizer, and I ordered the meatloaf for my entree, which were all very good! They also have a nice Nola theme/decorations inside the restaurant.
Went here for appetizers and drinks. Service was fast, the food was different... more for a sweet and savory pallet, but was still enjoyed.
a must have for locals. the decorations are nice, the meals are better. try the beans!

By far my favorite place to hang out in the Conshy area. Great food and beer selection and awesome people. The owner is also very accommodating for private parties and charitable events. Come check out half priced menu on Tuesday's or free breakfast on Sundays!

This place is amazing! Great atmosphere and awesome drinks! All the workers are so great and super friendly. Dean is the best when it comes to being attentive and making sure everyone's drinks are full!
Pulled Pork was not at all what I expected from the menu. I'm a more traditional person so didn't like it because it didn't seem like it had hardly any sauce. The sweet potato fries were really good.

Not sure what all the hype was, and is, about El Limón. After having eaten here a few times the service is mediocre and the food is average. Shrimp tacos are ok but guacamole and chips and other dishes are just blah. Not worth going out of your way.

Airport food, not much else to say. However, it is a little better then other options for the morning meal before your flight. Coffee is fine, juice is there, along with fruit and pastries and bottled water. Prices are a bit high, but not unreasonable for an airport eatery. The guava juice is okay but not as good as Hawaiian Sun.

Used to love this place and eat here at least once a week when Gwen and James were managing it. After they left, the new manager was a total....not so great person. Haven't been back since. I take my clients elsewhere.

we used Alert Transportation on recommendation by our wedding venue. They were very flexible and worked with our many many questions and concerns, eventually curating a ride that worked for our group. They did have a snafoo due to Mardi Gras and did their best to fix it, and we do appreciate that. They are easy to work with, clean and very reasonably priced.

On Tuesday's, Blue Oak BBQ has their spicy chicken sandwiches. I got one with a side of potato salad. The potato salad was so creamy and crunchy at the same time with a little kick to it! The sandwich wasn't the best thing I've ever eaten but it was juicy and crunchy.
I seem to always find a steal here. Just got a pair of never worn $350 Kenneth Cole boots for $60!

Ordered takeout - pizza pie was plain cheese and average. Also ordered the Marco Polo- A chicken cutlet with spinach and provolone cheese, which was terrible- I think I was sent the wrong sandwich because the "spinach" definitely resembled overcooked broccoli rabe- I would not eat there again.

Well done bar food but this is a smoking allowed bar. Knocks it down by two stars. The outside area is great when the weather is nice but they need to consider getting rid of smoking. Very annoying and obnoxious.

The lady that helped me on the drive thro was super friendly and helpful about what comes in my meal. I got home my food tasted fresh and got different types of condiments to try, will definitely go back.!
Great little dive. I love stopping at places where the locals hang out. This is definitely one of them. Red beans and rice were very tasty. The staff was entertaining!!

We waited nearly two hours after speaking with both Josh and Jacob about pricing and specials. They were both excessively rude. It took a long time to get our food. But the owner completely engaged when our experience was poor. He went above and beyond to make it right

Came to New Orleans for my best friends birthday and wanted to try out the Royal House Oyster Bar. We were recommended to try out the chargrilled oysters. The oysters were AMAZING!!! The oysters are the only reason why I'm giving it 2 Stars. I then ordered baked shrimp tortellini... I've had wayyyyyyy better.
Service wasn't the best. Wings were amazing but Bloody Mary had to be sent back to the bar
good wash-not the best-not the worst very expensive wait time wayyyyyy to long Plan at least 45 minutes, & often longer
Not impressed! Super fun atmosphere but better breakfast/brunch places all over Nashville for a better price.
Horrible. Stay away, unless you like paying for cold, tasteless food served by slow disinterested workers.
Terrible, terrible, terrible. And they wonder why the CVS is opening a block away to the delight of all forced to use this craphole of a store.
Used to be quite good, but new owners are cutting corners I believe

Service was very great and attentive. However the food wasn't what I was expecting. I got the slinger and it was very soupy and unappetizing. My friend got the corn bread Benedict and it lacked flavor. Food wasn't hot and we waited a good 35-40mins for it. The cafe mocha was good. I wouldn't come here for food again or maybe try something else.
$38 for 2 hours of fun for 9 people (6 adults 3 kids on a double surrey)...doesn't get better than that! Bring a bluetooth speaker and spotify for a rocking good time!
The men's bathroom was disgusting. Toilet was dirty. Floors were wet. Makes you wonder about the cleanliness of the kitchen.

My husband and I had a couples massage. We showed up early and they were able to accommodate us. The massage was nice. The mimosa was warm but who really goes to a spa for the mimosa? This was my husband's first massage and he really enjoyed it. I would rate it 7 out if 10 on the massage.
We orderedh several bowls. My coworkers and I thought they lacked flavor and the chicken steak proteins were chewy and possible old. Not a fan.

Meh. Not that impressed. The beer is one of the only things this place has going for it, although the prices leave more to be desired. It is run like a downtown St. Pete club. What happened to the traditional vibe? $13 for a pretzel? Save yourself and trip and go to Mr. Dunderbak's in Tampa. You'll thank me later.

This is a good place to shop cheap non-organic grocery. They do have some organic stuff, but very few. I only saw the canned organic black beans. It's a good place for you if you aren't looking for fresh organic produce or bulk dry goods.

Soso at best probably better for large groups...waiter was great but kitchen confused everything...sampler was awesome...filet very grainy..sides paired with wrong meals..bar, too much tonic in my Hendricks :(....
My king crab was cold and very very small! It was the same size as my boyfriends snow crab. I got gypped. I will never go again.

We moved to Tucson and we received several recommendations from friends that we should go to Char's Thai. Friendly staff! Food is bland, little flavor/spice. We have tried the place several times, and at varying times of the day. It's always bland.

Very pricey for what you get. Egg rolls were very greasy. Teriyaki chicken was all rice, one carrot and one broccoli and very little chicken. Ordered Pho and haven't tried it yet. Staff was pleasant. Place was clean.

This place is only good if you live near art Museum. I went here from Chinatown and between cab fare, sitting in traffic on a Friday night, and just ok sushi, I could have just went somewhere in center city and paid the same
We enjoyed baked good and coffee. It's perhaps not the best coffeeshop in this coffee-rich neighborhood.
Not terrible, a little over priced for a simple breakfast joint. There are many other places I would rather go than here for a good homey breakfast.
Better to order from regular Carrabba's portion sizes cut in half. Will never order again from this location.Soup was was two bites.

Awesome environment. Very welcoming and homey! Sound is on point and is a great place to play and enjoy music! Staff is super friendly and helpful! Would for sure recommend it to others!!!! Check out the open mic nights Wednedays at 7!!!!
Really slow poor service and we couldn't tell the difference between blackened fish and the chicken tacos which seems to sum it up

We finally tried this place and what a disappointment. Their tilapia dish was tasteless and their oriental chicken salad was simply mediocre. Save your money and head to Fry's deli or Subway down the street
I purchased a ice cream cone today! The service was good. The photo gives a visual reason of why I only gave two stars

Deliciousness all around! We were greeted by incredibly friendly staff who were kind and thoughtful. Love the story behind the restaurant as well. Who gets fish for breakfast/brunch? This girl did because it was a local fish, highly recommended by our server and it did not disappoint!!! Friends ordered other dishes and everything was superb. You really can't go wrong here!!!

She closed the store taking everything with her. Owing money and merchandise to those who consigned with her. She did not honor the contract, nor did she contact the consigners. We trusted her and she failed, Bad business practice! This leaves a bad taste in my mouth regarding consignment!!!

This was the only IHop I've been to where I had to pay before I ate. No sign or anything posted stating a particular reason. Do people dip on the bill in the middle of the night? Probably. But what does that have to do with me? I hope they've since changed that policy.

Went for lunch with a friend. The outdoor area is nice with fans and shade. The servers were friendly. The food was not so great. Ordered a chicken sandwich for $13 bucks and got what was basically a large chicken nugget and not a filet. It was greasy and tasteless. The fries were good. Won't be back.

A hell of a chilled low key place ,quick service ,the mango mamosa was my personal favorite drink ,food comes in a efficient time waiter was a new. Girl but she was on it shout out to her btw this is a.place full of good vibes honestly

The seafood was good. However the service was sub par. Our order was messed up and it seemed like they had no solid process of getting orders out of the door in an efficient manner. The shrimp was really good but the mussels we got were cold. Not a bad spot but service could be better.

Really loved this place. Definitely coming again soon. The honey chicken and the beef and broccoli are both delicious. Prices are also great and the lunch specials are every day, including weekends. The family who owns it is also very sweet and were genuinely happy when we told them how much we loved their food.

Order came fast but not as ordered. Got a tomato pie and buffalo tails with ranch. Pizza was mediocre. Ordered buffalo tails with ranch and were sent with blue cheese. Ate without dipping dressing because I hate blue cheese and they were pretty dry.
This Casino/hotel is mediocre. I like the downtown location because it's close to everything you'd want to do in Reno.
It's s nice place to set and the service was great but the food was missing flavors . They need to improve the flavor of the meat and apitizer
Always good. Great carne asada tacos and beans. Fast service, even with a line. Love this place, one of two favorites in the city!
Our Raider is not a groomer friendly dog. They had to have the patience of a saint to deal with him. He looked great after his first grooming at SSGS. Will definitely be returning.
Guess you have to be Caucasian in order to get service at this place. Haven't experienced this in all my life. Oh well there loss. What ashame the more things change the more they stay the same.
i had just came in sat down and ordered off the ngiri i had two orders of what i ordered and it took the person way too long to make it -.- too slow!
Tuna burger taste like cat food ,the burger was overcooked And charcuterie board was more like aPickle board never will go there again
Great burger, try the Cracka- fried green tomato, pimento cheese, and southern sauce. Awesome!

Terrific coffee bar in a nice neighborhood location. Lots of gourmet pastries and breakfast items and great coffee. Went there twice in three days even though it was a fairly long hike from our hotel. Friendly staff, cool vibe, and plenty of indoor and outdoor seating.

The food was good quality, but nothing that can't be made at home. I called ahead, the host advised me it would be 20 minutes. I arrived in 15mins, I still had to wait another hour. The food isn't enough to take me back to this place.

This place was recommended to us by several locals so we walked down to try it in the afternoon. We had great service and they were very gluten free friendly. The food was AMAZING! We talked about it the whole rest of the day. Definitely should be on your short list if traveling to NOLA

I have been going to the jug for years. The quality of the wings are good but they are not consistent with the hotness. I just wish that when you order hot you get hot as you did on your previous visit.

This place is dirty, cluttered and unfriendly. I live in the area and go in for a latte. For a local place you would expect friendly. I tolerate the bad service. They have an interesting coffee menu though.
Food is good. Service sucks. Very understaffed. Never got water for first 15 mins. And then had to ask for it twice during dinner. Won't go again.
Sometimes gas prices are lower than in town. Good spot to sit out front and drink coffee. Friendly service!
Don't eat breakfast here. Brick biscuits inedible. Eggs fake. Yuck. Break a tooth trying to eat their new breakfast offerings. Stay away!
The milkshake was very good however we waited for over 45 minutes. Not worth $20 for a small milkshake with a long wait.

Had quick service and breakfast that was good not great. I got the bacon scramble which was scrambled eggs with bacon, tomatoes & cheese. It came with fruit and toast. I definitely wish there were more eggs but you get a decent amount of food for a cheap price
FUN FUN FUN! Nicest staff ever. Great views! Affordable drinks, go upstairs. Went there several times. Wonderful views!

I was really blown away by this restaurant. Outstanding food. I had heard good things, but wish I'd come sooner. The decor is upscale, the service attentive and friendly. I had the El Patron, but can't wait to get back to explore the very clever menu.
Burgers were crazy good and French fries were great. Service was great as well! Love all the decor on the wall and the outdoor areas was awesome
Great food cooked fresh to order. Good service. Cannoli are my favorite and I was disappointed. On the other hand I don't usually care for tiaramasu but this was excellent.
Business owner (Ian) seems like a nice guy but is not good with customer service and caused me great harm in business dealings with me.

I went for a few drinks after work. Great beer selection. Friendly staff. Our server answered all of our questions. Margaritas were pretty good. Pumpkin beer was amazing. I would recommend coming here to try it.
Decent food ang good prices all round. The bread and cheese/olive oil combo to start is amazing.
Excellent atmosphere, food was good but not great, service was great. Simple when in town will come back to dine but have had better quality food in other big cities.

We love Indianapolis! Hanging out in Indy after a conference, just taking in the sights. :) Found this gem based on reviews and price. The service is exceptional, the atmosphere quirky and charming, the tea is fragrant and calming, but the food!! The food is AMAZING!! We had the place to ourselves on a Saturday afternoon. We greatly enjoyed our experience!

This place is amazing. We were visiting from Florida and saw this place on yelp and decided to give it a try. What a cool place! The vibe inside is so cool and the beers are great! The wait staff is super nice and the food was incredible!!! They offer complimentary sparkling water, which I've never seen at a restaurant. 10/10 would recommend!!!

For the tab they leave on the table, this place just isn't worth it, especially for lunch. We've been here a few times, thinking it would be better. But NO, the portions are just too small. We feel like we have to get something to eat, right after eating here. Nope. Chang's is a no go for this family.
Food and bloody Mary's were great. Wait time wasn't bad especially joining the waitlist on here. Took long to get our food but it was also very crowded.

While visiting Palm Harbor we went to Johnny Grits and food is great went twice for brunch, the service was good coffee isn't good very flat and bland (a bit like dishwater) sorry but that was the only bad thing pleasant atmosphere people very friendly will defiantly go back again
Not a fan of this place is all. Weird service and mediocre food. It's hard to describe the experience...there was a balloon artist. Won't be going back.

I would give no stars if I could. AAA has horrendous customer service policies. They'll take your money, but they don't provide. There are too many other companies out there now. Go elsewhere. Repoting to Better Business Bureau.

A great please-touch museum. The Black Hole "movie" in the planetarium was fantastic and worth the wait. Great exhibits on space, trains, electricity, and nature. Now, if it weren't for all of the screaming and crying kids! Bright idea: They should have adult only nights.
Waiter Mia was rude and never cane back to check on us. We had to wait forever to order and get the cheque. So the service was really bad. The food was decent.

Positives:Lots of old timers chill here. Fishing. Running. Walking. They camp out and just sit and relax. You can play tennis, golf, soccer, baseball here. Or skateboard at the skate park. Negatives:Game day tail gaters do try to park here for free. Trash cans get overflowed quickly. More portajohns and service would be great.

I really liked this place until they changed the menu. The pasta used to include more seafood, but now it's just mussels, a scallop and shrimp. They also no longer have take-out which is strange. Not sure how long they'll last, seems like cost cutting may get them like so many other restaurants that start off great, then go downhill.
Andygator and Strawberry Canebreak on tap = Awesome!! And amazing booze not named beer
I didn't know what I was expecting but was definitely pleased with order selection, quality of our drinks and food.

We used to love this place. Healthier options than most fast food. Tonight was the last straw. Bf got the tiniest, wimpy burrito ever. It was 9pm (they don't close till 10) and we were told we can't have chips and queso because they're out of chips. How unbelievable! And then the manager comes in from smoking as we're walking out. So lame.
Went in for a iced americano. Tried to order a large but was told 14 oz was the only size. A 14 oz cup filled with ice doesn't leave much room for $5 coffee. I also found it bitter.

Just went in for a simple manicure, however the manicurist, JASMINE, who "has had a very bad week", was unpleasant at best. No pleasantries and would roll her eyes and snicker when I would answer questions regarding my nails. Awful.
Love the curbside service. Didn't have to get out of the car. Rolls were very fresh. Price was reasonable. Will def be going back

Food was pretty tasty. Nothing extraordinary, but good. However, the liquor prices are the reason for the lower review. $46 for a very mediocre pitcher of margarita is utterly ridiculous. I mean seriously.

Told me three weeks to replace a throttle cable. 5 weeks later the work is still not done despite being told a week ago that it was "on the bench". Multiple false promises to call me back to let me know it's done.

I had brunch here a couple days ago and although the food was great the service was not. Our waitress was pretty unfriendly from the moment we sat down. She made our group of four ladies feel so unwelcome and uncomfortable that it soured the experience. Even though we enjoyed the food I likely won't go back or recommend to others.
This is a typical Outback Steakhouse chain restaurant. However, location is great just minutes off the freeway and staff is excellent - fast, friendly and efficient.

Wonderful fresh pasta, excellent red wine. Servings are smallish, fig bread pudding desert was really good, service was good, ambience was good, all seating at bar and chefs table was taken (even though it was Monday night).
Good food, but overpriced for the amount of food that you get. Limited vegetarian options..l the building is small so during busy times it feels crowded.
It's good, but I just came from Italy so hard to compare. There are lots of flavors, so choice can be hard to narrow down, but for the price, anything more than 2 scoops is too expensive in my book.

I waited 49 minutes before someone even bothered to ask me if I had been help or to be seated. Several of the employees looked directly at me and didn't bother come by to say hold on a minute. The restaurant wasn't even busy, it was only 1/3 full

Read some previous reviews and was a little apprehensive. This Hotel was just fine. Front desk was helpful. The doors and people talking in the halls a little loud but no big deal. Still under construction but no big issue
If you have read my past reviews you should know that Walgreens is not my favorite drug store. Not a bad place to get your passport photo taken, it was quick, easy and around $10.00
I've been to a Waffle House or two. This one is clean with a super friendly staff. Raisin toast and burnt bacon baby. 4 Stars = What I Expected = What Was Delivered.

Always way too packed with bros and basics. Food is okay and drinks are expensive. Service is always a little pretentious too like they are doing us, the patrons, a favor by pouring me a $8 beer. Thanks but no thanks

Healthy tans in Cherry Hill is great! The staff was very professional and informative! I was a little apprehensive with getting undressed for the tan, but the staff made me feel so comfortable! My tan looks awesome! I can't wait to go back!

All I can say is wow..... so first off the prices were NUTS! Donuts were $1.20 which is normal but a $1.99 wake up wrap was $4.99 and normal breakfast sandwiches were $7+, coffee... usually cold brew $2.79 was $3.99. Unbelievable!!! Then to top it off they did not take Dunkin's mobile app so you better be ready to pay a different way.

Definitely recommend this place. In town for work and came across this little delight. Sat at the sushi bar and was absolutely entertained. Ended up getting three different roles and left stuffed! Very reasonably priced with good quality.
Chips and salsa are good . I always ask for the hot salsa . Yummm .Lunch menu is very reasonable and the portion is perfect for lunch .
My favorite coffee shop for coffee, because they make it right and with a smile! They also have dog treats, which is great because I'll go anywhere that's dog friendly!

Burgers are just about perfect every time. The fries are pretty disappointing. They have a sauce bar. A SAUCE BAR. Ketchups and aiolis and mustards and all kinds of home made condiments. I've been here three times, and it's always a treat. I'm also a big fan of sauces.

Excellent. Always very accommodating with our baby and dog and delicious food. Great location. Very child friendly with bread basket and lots of menu options. Loud enough that kids don't disturb the environment. Friendly staff and good service.

Had the Oyster plate and a side soft shelled crab -the crab was phenomenal and the oysters were very good crispy outside soft inside - even though the fries were good I.gladly passed on them for the oysters

I had a breakfast seminar here this morning. There were no signs pointing us to the direction of the conference rooms. We did not have enough utensils for everyone. Third strike, this was a meeting that was going to last all morning, and the coffee was only served in to go cups....Not what I expected from the Sheraton.

Customer service was pleasant. Place seemed clean. I was a bit disappointed that only 2 of the 5 burgers I ordered were correct. Tried to call and number went straight to a voicemail that wasn't set up.

I don't know why people like here! It's the worst korean restaurant I have been to. Everything here is not fresh. I am not picky, the food here sucks, compared with traditional korean restaurant in Los Angeles.
One of the best Breakfast spots in town. Its awesome to see a restaurant doing outside the box stuff!

Fun boat ride started in the back of boat and we got soaked due to the wind and tide but no big deal towards the front after we saw a dolphin and it was a pretty cool thing to see the dolphin swimming with the boat toward the back.
John was able to do a quick adjustment on my pistol! Great service! Excellent attitudes and fantastic supply of firearms...Nuff Said !!

Mediocre granola and fruit, mediocre burnt coffee, expensive. They use yogurt with sugar in it and granola that has the dried fruit version of rocks. Plus they don't serve anything in actual bowls. Everything goes in a to-go wasteful, hard to eat out of cup. Never going again but annoyed enough to leave a review.

My friends and I came in tonight for a girls night out. The food was great! The zippy chicken tacos are delicious and the Pablo honey was a great addition! All recommendations from our wonderful server Caitlin! Will come again!

Bought a waterpipe and it broke after one use (not my fault- faulty/cheaply made) and they were such jerks about it. Sold me a crappy piece. THIS IS THE SECOND TIME THIS HAPPENED. Most of its stuff is over priced and not the best brands. Will never be returning.

Fast friendly service and fun atmosphere. Chesapeake omelet has tons of real crab filling but eggs were from a mix I think - kinda weird and rubbery. Coffee is excellent. If we come back I would not order an omelet again - the "real" eggs and sausage the folks at the table next to us are having looks much better.
Some of the most polite and nicest employees for a McDonalds. How did New Palestine get so lucky???

Great look and feel but the pork and ribs lacked flavor. The sauces are not good either. The building and process to order are why I didn't give it one star. There are a lot better BBQ options in town.
solid meats and potatoes. but the place is super expensive and the service is OK for the price you pay.

To be honest its not that great. My brother came during the summer and told me it wasn't good but thought to give it a try myself with my husband since everyone has different taste . The food Has no flavor. French Fries are all soggy. Environment is clean but food blah... wouldn't recommend trying save your money.

This used to be a goto Mexican eatery, but prices have been increased so much it's no longer worth going. All of the quesadillas prices are way too high. Sadly won't be coming back because there are many other more affordable options. Update: food quality is ok at best. And you don't even get normal sides.
The rental experience was enjoyable right up until...trying to be nice...I returned the car 30 hours early and was charged a moronic "Early Return Fee of $25.00.
Boise Fry Company has good food typically, but I was underwhelmed by this location. The customer service wasn't great, the employees weren't good at their tasks, and the fries I received were burnt.

wish i was closer to Roy Pitz. spacious and clean. excellent beer and bar food. friendly attentive servers. location makes it a nice place to go before a show or meeting up with friends from out of town.

For under $20 you can get a nice wash, inside and out. My stops usually take between 20 and 30 minutes. The staff is nice, they do a nice job drying the car when it's over. Pick up a Cardinal card and get it punched each visit. I think 10 washes gets you one free.
One of the best bbq joint I have ever been to. Food is tasty and the pie is out of this world. We will definitely come back when we go back to visit.
Only go here if you're reeeeeaaaaaaallly drunk or craving greasy and mediocre fried food at five am. Otherwise you'll notice the filth and oldshoepuke smell and feel kinda dirty when you leave.

Usually great food! Ordered tonight, burgers not cooked well, think they changed the buns. The chicken Caesar salad was welted due to hot chicken being placed too soon on lettuce. Ordered fries crispy, soggy.
They don't use real eggs in their breakfast sandwiches. I hate places that are bagel stores and they don't make the egg. "Ehhh" at best
This place is a butcher shop. Unprofessional mercenaries entirely lacking in compassion. If you love your pet, don't even consider it - there are plenty of good veterinary hospitals open after hours.
Visited this little place tonight and I'm in LOVE! The Pho is to die for. I also got the calamari and coconut curry chicken, SO DELISH!!! Will be back next time we visit Tucson.

Live locally. 5 straight Fridays at 6PM and hostess is telling everyone "we just sat a large table and it will be a 45 minute wait". Bars on all levels empty and dining room 2/3 empty. At least be honest about the situation and we would be more supportive.

Outstanding fried chicken. Probably should be clear that no checkin free ice cream except in evenings. But we still love ya!! Good lunch specials. Not open for breakfasts on weekdays despite time listed. It's a corona thing I'm sure. Outdoor sitting nice

each article of clothing you get dry cleaned is at most $3 thank god i have my car so i can drive here, because all the places in my neighborhood are $5-6 per piece. super fast and friendly group of people. i have never had a problem with them :)
This salon is ridiculous. I couldve definitely done my hair 100 times better myself. I left the salon looking like an afro puff. For the snobby atmosphere, they shouldve at least had skills.

They were only doing curbside pickup so I got their sprouted gain English muffin sandwich. It was ok but I think too much mustard and the turkey sausage tasted too much like pork sausage to me. My wife got the combo breakfast sandwich and liked it.
I have now been waiting an hour for my food when they told me 20 minutes , again shitty service Idk why I come back hare

I was skeptical of this place, but it did pleasantly surprise me. Beer prices are surprisingly reasonable. The atmosphere is fun and colorful, and the drinks, while expensive, do indeed pack a wollop. Beware the two piña colada hangover!

We purchased a Whirlpool dishwasher. Our salesman, Rob was very accommodating, friendly and professional. Our installer, Fred couldn't have been more polite, knowledgeable, neat, and quick. We highly recommend Famous Tate for future purchases of our appliances! Thanks, Bob

I loved the vibe of this place! I tried the Beef Tenderloin Pizza (Excellent), Elk in a blanket (Good), Shrimp and Grits (Wow!! Fantastic! - The brown sauce was out of this world!), Apple Tatin (Amazing!) This would be a regular spot if I lived nearby!

Called in the morning to get my brakes done and they said they couls fit me in no problem... waited at the shop over 6 hours while they worked on them. Outrageous, just to get rear brakes done.. ill never go back!

First time here. It was a miss/toss up. They forgot to pull up my window so water got all over the driver's seat and floor mat. On the plus side, they washed the affected areas and vacuumed out the water. Overall I thought it was a decent job, hence the three stars.
Horrible!!! Fish is probably fresher in the LA aqueduct. Returned food and walked. Cashier shrugged it of as it was common place.

They have good food. I made the mistake of going in hungry. The small ravioli portion left me lacking. Guess I'll go grad a Mickey D burger to tide me over to dinner. Taste great just small and no bread. I would eat there again but not be hungry.
We have been ordering from Fuel for years. Two recent bad experiences. We will not be ordering again. UNCOOKED CHICKEN!. Completely raw in the middle. Thai chicken wrap. Nasty.
Fun and interesting course. It's busy all the time so you must be patient when playing. There is even an area where you can feed the gators. Very much fun, well worth it!
Wife loves the bikini, but she said it's VERY skimpy. So, she recommends that you order a size or two larger.

I've had both the chicken shwarma sandwich and the platter. Both are delicious. I also love their hommus. I eat here almost every time I come to Philly. Service is average, decor is dated, but I come for the food and leave satisfied.

There is nothing not to like about Civil Life. Friendly bartenders, low key crowd, darts, that old-timey-exposed wood look, board games and more seating upstairs, not to mention some of the best locally-brewed beers in STL.
The Sonora dog was very good. The chipotle ketchup was excellent. Sadly the beer selection was regrettable.

Beer was the only good thing here. Service couldn't have been worse. The food was hours delayed, the staff was oblivious and didn't give a shit. Honestly would never give a bad review but this was so bad I felt like I had to warn others out there considering going to this place.
Very tasty food, very friendly service. Definitely recommended.

The worst dealership around! All promises and no delivery! Chris the finance manager is a big time scam artist smooth talker and is horrible to deal with! If your searching for a car don't let him work with you he will mislead you and do anything he can for himself to be if it and cause issues for the customer!

Took my Dyson Animal Vac in for repair. I barely sat down before it was repaired! Turned out to be a hole in the hose. Seriously amazing service! I wish everything were as easy as this! Highly recommend this location.
This place is so much fun. I love the atmosphere and vibes. The food is fresh and tasty. The chef's are really creative with their cooking show. The sushi is pretty good too.
Food was good - restaurant was empty and the waitress was none attentive. Pained me to leave her a tip, service needs improvements if they are going to survive.
It was ok. The rock'n chicken sure didn't rock my socks off. But I was hungry and my boyfriend was annoying me.
Good miso soup, great unagi. What more can you ask for?

Walked into store looking for 1800 s.f. hardwood flooring. Received dirty looks from 2 employees leaning up against the wall. Another employee said hello. I replied and said we are looking for flooring to match the cabinet we had a shelf of. No reply, no acknowledgement, no offer to help. They missed out on a large sell.
I stopped in here and received such a warm welcome from the happy couple behind the counter. They served up a perfect espresso and had many cookie and cake options available too. Very cute spot.
Pricey. But good service. Fancy food selections. It's ok had grouper bites and a hamburger. Prices are on the high side. Sat outside it was nice

Trash ass tacos lol $3?! These are truck tacos,where I'm from, these are a dollar per taco,fuller,and taste better...this close to Mexico and this is the best you can do?lol sad. Don't let the line fool you!

I got take out here and it was okay. Dan Dan noodles were okay, I've had better. Han Dynasty Dan Dan noodles are far superior. Same goes for the spicy cucumber. Good place to grab a quick lunch. Friendly service,

Wonderful meat flatbread and delish salads. Split both and had large portions. All were very well seasoned and pretty to look at. The flavors were all very good. Had a specialty drink, kind of weak, but tasted refreshing.Would return when in Nashville. Great food and reasonably priced. Try it!
Its good for a normal outing with the family the place definitely has its atmosphere, hope the restaurant keeps striving.

The food was really good! I'm only giving it 3 stars because it took an hour and a half after we ordered to get the food. Sounds like the wait is only typical during the weekend. Highly recommend the eggs in a pan.
Came here for coffee and they said they have no milk, the people in line with me were all pissed out. The manager can do better. Run across the street and buy some from the convenient store.

I came here mid-day on a Saturday. Drunk hooligans were everywhere. One guy was wearing a t-shirt that read 'Party With Sluts'. This is not an appropriate place to bring a family. (The hooligans did not seem satisfied with the experience either.)

Ok food, meh service, terrible wait. The food is pretty pricey for greasy, butter-drowned seafood. There are several better options for seafood right around the mall. Every time I've been here, the food takes an obnoxiously long time to come out. I've given them a fair shake, but overall the place is just substandard.

I had just landed into Philly, needed something to and eat and this spot had great reviews. Unfortunately, my experience didn't live up to the expectations. Server was really friendly and personable, but the food (rice with chorizo, tacos) were underwhelming- all in all, I'm sure there are other places in the City with better Tex-Mex.
1.6/10 flatbread pizza 3.3/10 latke Beer is good though Siri Siri can you hear us Siri

If I could put zero, I would. An employee sexually assaulted a woman, and the owner sided with the employee. Then said if it happens again he will do something about it. Absolutely disgusting, and appalling behavior.

Simply put...not really fond of a seemingly new Manager. I get it. The pressure right now is very high. Kindness should be the rule...not mean, un friendly & unkind. Coffee is good. Counter staff...awesome. Maybe he was having a bad day...most of us are having those.That is why we treat ourselves to things like Good Coffee.No excuse for rude. Nope. Zero. Nada.

Thank goodness! A great place to take my kids after dinner in quaint Phoenixville. Store is beautiful and clean! Staff helpful and they actually smile! Yogurt has the best flavor of any of the frozen yogurts I've had! Toppings are fresh and plentiful. Thanks for coming to Phoenixville yum yum!!!!!
Breakfast super weak and super slow I'm sitting here watching these cats cook in slow motion

Food fine but for this pharmaceutical dinner program I had the most piss poor excuse for a filet I've ever seen. It looks like the "steak" should have been placed on top of a ritz cracker rather than be an entree. Pretty egregious fail at $125 a head.

We are from out of town, and had to try the world famous restaurant!! Fast service, nice atmosphere, and good food!! I really wish I liked the gumbo better. I prefer the thick, spicy, real down-south type gumbo. I loved the complementary corn bread and the staff was really nice.

Awesome place! Very new and up to date. Parking is easy enough to find in the area generally if you get there before doors. Not much else you can do within walking distance. But the place is very nice and they book good acts. Upstairs bar section is amazing.
Had a phenomenal meal there along with good drinks. The pasta was fire as was the burger.

This is the best place to go for snoballs. We have been going here for years. They have the best flavors. Also you need to always get it stuffed. In my opinion there is no better place to get a snoball!! Once you try a snoball here you will not want to ever go anywhere else.

Meh about sums it up. I will say that when I went I did not have a margarita, and they looked,really good, but the food was not great. I did love the modern decor though. I may give the margaritas a try and update the review.
Ordered from this dominoes plenty of times. Service is good and I've never had any problem with the food.
Not much of a red meat eater but the awful awful burger is so delicious ! I usually get it to go, charging 50 cents per to go item doesn't really toot my horn.
Open really early! Great place to sit back and relax. By far the most luxurious cigar bar I have ever been to.

Beer is the name of the game here! Yummy beer, my favorite is the oatmeal stout! I got the plate of swine and it was OK. Deep fried bacon was over battered and my pork chop was over cooked. Service was excellent.
Terrible seevice. Waited almost 2 hours. Front desk ladies don'the know what they need to do. The location is Bruce Biden Down. Never ever recommend this place.
Nope never again.... 5 scallops for $27 and sooo salty waitress tried and agreed....offered a dessert and didn't remove from bill... ...not the Charley's I knew and loved .....

Fun place, a lil over priced for the quality. More geared towards college n party crowd. One of the cooks was amazing and better than any I've ever seen even at Benihana's and unless he was our cook again I'd pass on going again
Off the beaten path joint and worth the relatively easy search. Blackened grouper stands out in an area with this dish on every menu. Wait staff fun and added to the energy of the restaurant.
Solid egg drop soup. Good shrimp lo mein. Average general tsos chicken- thick, breaded with a more sweet than tangy sauce and average egg roll.
Amazing coffee and atmosphere, but even better people. Pirates blend was great...even got bag of beans to go. Can't wait to come back! Wish I could give 6 stars ()!

Very neat place with a fun atmosphere, but the food isn't up to par for me. Great place to get drinks with friends, but would pass next time on the food. Staff wasn't super friendly either but that can happen anywhere!

if it wasnt for the company of family & my hilarious nephew this would be 0 stars..i admit im not a fan of red lobster but thats what the k-garten graduate wanted lol food is wack & service was horrible!!!!!
Not happy with my takeout order of jerk chicken. Chopped chicken full of tiny bones. Tons of spice. Can't taste anything else. Good portion, but all the bones is a big turn off. Never again.

Group of 17 seated immediately on the patio. We had world class service; drinks came out quickly and frequently, chips and salsa stayed stocked. The food was just as easy. The meals were hot, fresh and very well prepared. The prices are very reasonable. We will be back!
If food is as good as services it will be grate %*) !! Not normally into Bar dinning. This meets my expectation %*) now time for baile. !!! Under 20 $ sweet

This place is a chain restaurant?? Yup but the food is awesome! I didn't give it a five star though because sometimes the servers are a bit slow at getting your check out to you and the establishment does not allow pick up orders???! Yea, I don't like THAT either!

I give this place an extra star because it's so UN Montecito. The other two because I have fond memories of this place from my childhood, it includes my dad ordering me a burger (they use Shaloob's if memory serves well), and then him getting pissed and starting arguments with other drunk locals...good times.

Excellent food. Everything we ordered was great overall really impressed. Love the atmosphere too they have a real nice up scale bar and large windows that overlook the mall and let in a lot of natural light.
It takes about ten times eating here before you learn how to order. Very confusing to me...there's no easy button or pictures. Having said that, the chicken flautas were great.
