Solid pizza, a bit fancier than your average around the block pizza but has good vibes. The staff is very friendly, but the pizza lacked that extra flavor punch. Would recommend for dessert the Nutella calzone-type option...it's quite the experience!

Amazing food! Definitely try the soup dumplings. They are a must. Perfect place for a large group because it's really easy to share and BYOB makes everything more economical. You can get in and out for roughly $10-$15 depending on how many people are at your table. Great service and laid back atmosphere as well.
The brisket tastes like the brisket you get in Texas. The pulled pork could use a little more flavor but it's cooked well and has a good smoke ring. The ribs pull off the bone like a competition rib!

Not a good experience at all. Got chaat as a appetizer- there was nothing holding it together. Butter chicken was subpar and naan was very oily and stale. To top everything off there was a fly in our water.

This review is for the grounds only. We did not stay at the Gaylord. Even so, the staff was more than happy to direct us around the resort. We visited during the holidays and the decorations were are amazing and worth the visit.

This place gives Gino's and Pat's a run for their money. Steak sandwich is off the hook here, the bread is yummy the meat is also delicious and they use provolone and the famous whiz so don't expect it. Great place I recommend. Hole in the wall place is the best spots let me tell ya.

Typical Starbucks. Good coffee lousy food. Staff was a little more friendly than most Starbucks but I couldn't help feeling I was in a corporate conglomerate. Place was clean overall. Will be back if I'm needing an afternoon jolt.

Very good Green Risotto! Family mention very good burger.Service good, but they forgot my Caprese salad as appetizer. Music was too loud for us to talk. I would definitely come back for the Green Risotto!!
Dunkin donuts had fresh donuts but not a great selection in the afternoon. I love the maple bars, Bavarian cream, and glazed. My husband still likes dough boy donuts better. I will be back for sure!
Over priced. Slow and who ID A 53 year old for anything. Bad policy and moving my meds to somewhere else because of it.

Came here for dinner for a coworkers birthday! It was the perfect place for a few people to relax and have a few drinks and a low key night! The food was so good and with so many choices I didn't have to stray from keto at all either so bonus points for that!
My kids discovered trash under both beds, and i was unable to get a correct cable lineup while i was there.
Great local brewery and love the vibe and food. Only downfall is slow inconsistent service. It's great they are always busy but think this is where they can improve a bit.
Staff here are pretty giving people attitudes! I don't think they ever like their job! Poor customer services!

The beef sammich i ordered was great! Will go back and try the dinner selections. The breakfast sausage i purchased was different. Maybe i'm just used to preservatives and stuff Mr Dean add to their sausages. Bought some hamburgers as well. Looking forward to those. Will be back for some fresh butchered meat.
Wish I had checked reviews before I came. Expect to wait a minimum of 2 hours. Thats right, 2 HOURS! No matter what you come here for.

Looks nice from lobby and pool area, but rooms desperately need updating. Not super clean and there was only 1/4 roll of toilet paper in the bathroom. Room was super hot and stuffy. Never got below 75 degrees. Probably would not return.

Blatant refusal to follow Pinellas County Health orders. Seating guests on top of each other with no social distancing. Quality restaurants have been able to increase capacity without illegally putting their patrons at risk.
Good food, I ate here a couple of times. Just don't show up 15 minutes before they close cause they won't let you in regardless of how many times you've been here.
Taylor was the best server ever! So friendly and cute and she suggested the perfect beer with my Napa burger. Will be returning!

They originally did our HVAC install and did a good job....but after that, they are unreliable. They never filed a permit for the install. Another example, we had a recall work for our A/C. Never returned our call. Third example, we were under warranty when our A/C stopped working. Called them again and never returned the call. Buyer beware.

The food is good but you risk having your car broken into while dinning. It seems the apartments behind the restaurant are housing some thugs who are breaking into cars daily. Olive Garden does not seem to care enough to do anything about it. Bye bye Olive Garden.

Everyone here is very nice and helpful! Easy and painless experience. Was able to get $10 off my oil change and $10 off my alignment with an online coupon and I was eligible for their credit card which has no interest for six months. 10/10 would recommend
7th street the place to be, love the service and the food. Close to my moms cooking this is the next best thing :D
worst customer service , the employees are ridiculous. please find better employees . that's just sad .

This isn't an actual review, it's for the Car Dealer. These reviews are important. Soon peole aren't going to come to your dealership. I know I won't with this many bad reviews, and you don't ever post a comment that you're trying to makes things right for people. You can't just keep selling people bad cars, and not do anything about it.

All pizzas here are great! The staff is nice and the music is great. This is a great place for a date or for a large get together. I would recommend all of the Theo's locations, as they are all great! I
Menu online is out of date and they removed the good burgers. Very disappointed. At least keep your menus current online.

Wow. Deals to be had at this joint. They are a little pricier than goodwill and such, but the value for $ is still well represented. They had a number of new with tag items and it's just the kind of treasure trove we hunter-gatherers live for. Worth the visit. And they take visa/ mastercard.

I was really hoping to love this place since it's in my neighborhood. The woman at the front was rude and so uncomfortable to communicate with. The price point was also exceptionally higher than other groomers in the area. They did treat my dog well, which I'm grateful for.

SPOILED FOOD. I ordered delivery and the chicken was spoiled and made me very sick. The rice tasted like soap. The owner was unapologetic and WOULD NOT offer to comp for the meal even though I payed a total of $30. Extremely unprofessional . Total trash run of a business and absolutely unacceptable and unconscionable serving spoiled food.
I had the duck it was really good, service was good and friendly, just had a one bad thing my wife had a hair in her food.

Every time we order from here, there is something wrong. They have lost our order on more than one occasion. Then they either forget a part of the order or something is messed up. Sometimes it's both. I suggest checking over your take out order prior to leaving because you can't rely on them to actually get your order right.

When we walked into St Joseph's "St Joeys" we were greeted by a large crowd at the door. However, we were immediately welcome by a hostess straight workin so low ride jeans. We waited about 30 minutes for our table. A little more than we hoped but well worth it.

Mobile department lacks knowledge and dont care about customer. Took an hour to exchange a phone and was credited $200 short. Rep argued even thought she was wrong. Phone was handed over without activation and i walked out of the store with a non working phone for an additional hour while i put on the battery myself and blindly go through the activation process.

Good enough food, but very poor service. Been to this fast food place a few times, as well as other locations. Invariably the same issue, order is always incomplete, always missing items. Word to the wise check your bags and containers to verify order before you leave.

Very much comparable to Applebees, TGIFs or Chilis. I expected a lot better when it came to the menu. Highly overpriced for basic sushi rolls, pasta dishes, etc. We did't even get passed our drinks due to there lack or variety in the menu. The ambiance was more of what attracted us. The servers were friendly. BUT was't impressed at all.
Very helpful people. Fun store to explore in a great neighborhood. They know what you need before you do. No reason to buy on line when you get great direction from the owners!

Course is way over priced for the quality of golf. Fairways were horrendous shape. Greens were the only acceptable part of the course. The hotdogs were cold. The cart paths were actually nice and so were the fountains in the water hazards.
I would recommend this office to anyone. Staff was friendly, knowledgeable and showed genuine concern for my needs. Glad to have finally found a dentist I love in town :)

I don't even know how this place is still open. Ordered through Grubhub and the enchiladas meat was supposed to be chicken but almost postive it was turkey. The burrito made my dad throw up for 6 hours stright. The verde sauce on the enchiladas was so tart and disgusting. Wasted my food and money.
No, they are not there when you really need them the most...they actually told me to call Lyft...thx for the tip! Joe is the only good driver left if you must use them.
Food always great. But, today really wish seating social distance and outdoor seating would begrrat
Easy over the phone service. Speedy and great quality. I order the Jewish Coonass for the first time. Not only does it look great but I was absolutely delicious. I'm so happy I work in the area
Gross. Syrupy toppings and cheap tasting fillings definitely come out of a can. Workers had no idea what was in anything. Just no.
Outstanding .... Now to be fair I haven't had their sushi but the curry I ordered was amazing.

Worse cleaners in the city, liars & thieves, I had my shirts & suits cleaned they came back smelling like Cigarette smoke, they denied it was them, my wife Had a BCBG dress "lost", my wife confronted them that someone liked the dress and stole it & they did not denied that happened. Don't use Whitman Cleaners 1530 Packer Ave near Chickies & Petes.
They don't come when they say they say they are. They lie and say they came. They don't honor their warranties. They are a big ripoff.

DON'T COME FOR THE BLUE CRABS. I haven't had anything else on the menu but based on the garlic blue crabs I'm disappointed. The meat was OVERCOOKED and MUSHY. And worse than that it tasted like it was days OLD and not a fresh catch. I'd be willing to try something else on the menu but not if I'm paying for it.

Long time customer(over 20 years) but today I ordered springs rolls and four of the six tasted different and the sprouts were all black. The other two were fine. I contacted the owner, Tonny, to share my experience and he was indifferent to my concern that something might be wrong with his food.
WHAT TASTELESS MEALS not to mention WAY OVERCOOKED SEAFOOD (RUBBERISH TEXTURE-LOBSTER & SHRIMP)!!!
Food here is rubbish. We've recently moved from London, this is definitely not proper pub food or proper pub atmosphere with the music pumping on a Saturday morning. The manager is very rude as well.

Awesome country bar however don't ask for a water. They will charge you a cover then refuse to give you a glass of water. They require you to purchase a bottle. That is the most tacky thing I have ever herd of. If they are pinching pennies that much they have bigger fish to fry. Very disappointed. This is unsafe.
My spot! I love the food and the staff. My present boyfriend meet here and shared our one month anniversary which was Valentine's Day here. We may marry here!

This place is really good - I was flying back home and wanted to avoid airport food so I swung by here and picked up a pad Thai with chicken to go - enjoyed it at the airport and will keep this place in mind for next time.
Way overpriced. If you go to the original it's a lot cheaper this place is full of crap
the wonton soup is super dees when hungover. Otherwise the noodle dishes are a lil too sweet for me taste. Friendly service.
The staff is super nice, however they use the live stream tellers, and it takes longer than actual tellers. It used to be quick but takes so long now.

Had the Red Wine Campanelle. Was about 1.5 cups of food for 16 dollars. Food was good, but stick to the pizza at this joint, which the rest of my table enjoyed. Table service was okay. Bar service was 4/5. Probably too much good stuff going on in this town to take me back.

Great place for lunch, I'm sure for happy hour also. Everything is freshly prepared and delicious. A must repeat. The spicy tempura shrimp tacos were very flavorful with a lil kick of spice. They are topped with spinach, pico de gallo & jalapeno aioli with a side of rice & beans.
Nabruzzi's food is great, but the noise in the restaurant is so loud we could not even have a conversation. It made for a very uncomfortable evening. Our ears were ringing and I had a head ache.

The manager at this place was exceptionally warm and welcoming. He even brought a water dish over to my thirsty dog. And the wine is good, too. I especially enjoyed the orange muscat dessert wine. Get a 2-for-1 tasting coupon (it will save you $10) at the SB visitor's center near the bottom of State St. (on Garden St.).
Great food, grey price. Bit annoyed at the lack of options for substitutions on sides.
While a fun and cosy atmosphere with decent food, skip dessert. The chocolate cake we ordered had been sitting in the fridge too long and tasted like, well, fridge.
After waiting an hour for food 5/9 dishes we ordered were burnt. Atmosphere was good but I wouldn't come here for food ever again.

Seriously! F' this place! 3 weeks in a row i walk in. Told over an hour wait. No one besides me oin there, two stylists finishing up their customers...zero customer service, poor attitudes. I will gladly give money to another business! How does this place stay open...
good option. not your regular mexican restaurant. lots of Peruvian choices AND they take amex.
The food is fine; however, it's the staff that I have an issue with. The hostess was so incredibly rude to me and talked to me like she was above me.
Horrible service and they park 90% of the cars that come through the drive thru. Don't recommend this "fast food" restaurant if you're in a hurry.
Super expensive for smallish portions. The food was good, but not great.
This place takes 45 minutes to even order lol. No sense of urgency and expect $15/hr for the service....
RE: sandwich/wrap counter Extremely unsanitary. It's a shame that the standard for this location is unsanitary and inconsistent.... this location is NOT living up to the Whole Foods standard/brand.
The environment is awesome. It's a very cozy wonderful environment especially on a chilly day. The drinks are great and the food is awesome. Very rich flavors very homey.
Food good. But just a bit pricey especially seeing you get a teaspoonful of grits for $2

Tastes like a really great fast food burger, like 5 guys, in n out burger, etc. It's a great place to go when you're craving a burger and want it fast and cheap. Their fries are also very tasty and yummy.

Long lines to check in..... no ones at the check in desk seems like this might not be providing good service, at the start of your stay. ! Nothing wrong with being busy But have the needed employees to handle the busy times....

Our favorite so far. If you leave here hungry it would be a shame. Food was great. Great selection of meats. Gauchos were great as they explained each cut of meat. Great selection of salads and sides. Top sirloin was our favorite. Tender and cooked perfectly. A must visit in Nashville.
Sorry, I just don't like their rolls. They are hard and just don't seem fresh at all. If a great hoagie is what you want go about a quarter mile down Evesham Rd. to that little deli.

I was excited to go in here as there is always a wait, I assumed it must be good. To my surprise, it wasn't. I ordered the corned beef Bennie and it was cold and there was a shell in my meal. So that was great. Not a great experience and I don't recommend. Tons more breakfast places, with better food in the area!

Takya G. and Brittney F. were working close to closing on 2/5/19 and they gave us the most excellent service. We bought some cute purses because of how much we liked Takya. We were going to buy a small purse from Michael Korr and Coach but prefer the representatives from here. Wie will be coming back seasonally if the service is always this nice!
If I could give a zero star - I WOULD. Nashville, TN Cool Springs Jos. A. Bank is THE WORST. Do not buy anything for your wedding from them!!!!!!!!!!!
While not the case for every item I'm sure, but everything I buy is cheaper at Total Wine. They do have great beer tastings here though and great beer selection.
Did it won't do it again. Service started strong than fell apart. Food was salty and under cooked. For the price you would expect a table cloth instead of bare metal table.

Food was okay. The pork chop, spring and summer rolls had flavor. However, we ended up feeling sick after eating the chicken. My wife and I were the only ones to have the giant piece of chicken breast while everyone else had the other items and they were fine. If you order from here avoid that one item.

I have always liked this tea place. Service is either okay or great. But the selection is killer. I love that you can get any tea prepared pretty much any way you like it. Most staff are knowledgeable and willing to talk about the tea with you. Great little place to grab tea in the area.

Returned for a lunch visit. Our lunch specials were good even tho my accompanying fries were cold. The soup I ordered with my lunch special- mushroom/sundried tomato was TERRIBLE. Had no seasoning--tasted like hot water with a few mushrooms thrown in. Avoid it. More attention to the details makes customers happy.

Don't do it. One star because I have to. I went here today. I wasn't more than a minute down the street before my stomach started hurting like crazy. Trying not to be too gross but let's just say I spent some significant time in the "library". BTW- I had the #9 on wheat
Come try their buffet. It's simple spicy and good! Consistency makes me come back year after year. Try it you'll like it!

Rude employees I called when they apparently were closing and they hung up with out saying anything. Called back guy said we're closed and hung up. Why even pick up at all? Called a few weeks back and they don't pick up the phone at all during open hours.
This place was great! I got in late but they accommodated me perfectly. Super clean and comfy bed. They said my single room would be 70 but it was only 63! Nice stay for a hostel!

Great vegetarian option breakfast and lunch, little long of wait, good coffee, board games if you have time to play and reasonable prices. Would recommend to eat or to get coffee. Simple sandwiches and food made fresh.
This place is below avg first off. The food didn't live up to the reviews I read here. However, I appreciate the vegan options available but the potatoes come out room temp, and sour.

Not a bad little place. Food is good and the service was better than most alike restaurants in the area. I liked the eggs Benedict breakfast I had the last time I visited. Lunch specials are good and the prices are just right. I wold recommend.

Loved their pure açaí bowl and vanilla charcoal soft serve. The staff was very friendly (especially the cashier) and the portions were perfect. They even let us sample, which was super helpful as it was our first time. Plus we were able to bring our dog since they had outdoor seating! Will definitely visit again.
This salon isn't very clean, it is very hot. It seems like the A:C was not even on the day I went. The staff it's OK. The prices are very reasonable.

Used to love this place but now you have to wait in line to order food. So I have been waiting in line for 30 min now and my movie is starting. Unfortunate decision by AMC to do this. This became another run of a mill movie theater..

Terrible service. Wait was way too long! Finally brought us some bread and our food arrived right afterwards. We ordered a piece of grilled chicken for our little dogs but I it never arrived. Waited 20 minutes for a box for our leftover overs.
Food was terrible. The lady who was our bartender was very rude. We ordered an appetizer and an hour later she tells us she forgot and did not even apologize.
Progressive Business Publications is shady, shady, shady. Sent our company an invoice for $299 for publications which were never ordered or authorized.

This place is the real deal. Best brisket I've had in the Northeast. Super tender and flavorful, with a beautiful black bark. Sausage is excellent too, and the Mac & Cheese is great. You won't regret giving this place a shot.

The concept is great. The chai tea selection, fresh naan, and veggie dishes were good. The beef, lamb and goat curry all look and taste the same. The place is clean (used eco friendly products) , and the staff takes time to explain and sample the dishes. If strategically located, i would come back.
Overpriced for what you get. The salad was disappointing. Very little lettuce and toppings were little as well. The salad wasn't even filling. The drink station was not clean.

Kind of a dump. The doors are disgustingly dirty and the men's bathroom had no paper towels. I doubt it has been cleaned in a while. These are classic signs of lazy management. There is no excuse for this, this location is hurting the Olive Garden brand. The food is OK, very similar to all other olive gardens.
Barbuzzo was my most favorite restaurant in Philly. Now it's mediocre. And the service went from amazing to below average.
So great I enjoy the all you can eat crab on Sunday's is so good! The also have the most friendly staff and a very cool atmosphere. The patio seating is our favorite!
This is my favorite breakfast place! Finally, a place that knows how to make great grits! The service is great! I am a regular! I would definitely recommend this place.
This is a chill spot! I'm part of the girl jam meet up group that meets there twice a month.
the superindendent of this course must be a hack...where did he learn his trade?...frank's nursery?...greenskeeping means keeping the course in good shape...make note of it

Free scoop on your birthday. Ordered the chocolate chip cookie dough. Tasted kind of freezer burnt. With options like coldstones or Dairy Queen I'm not surprised this ice cream sits and gets freezer burnt. At least it was free.
Best carne asada burritos, for fast food. A little more expensive than Los Betos or othe fast food mexican restaurants, but usually worth the price difference.
Good food but not a pleasant surprise in my salad 2 hairs lost my appetite they took care of me and offer another plate I'm hesitant to take it now
I love this place!!!! You can't beat the price for the great job they do on your nails and it always lasts!!!!
Absolutely Love the guacamole it is amazing. Tacos are teeny tiny but still Delish. Drinks AWESOME
Great spot for lunch ... Don't mind the negative reviews as this spot gets busy and you'll be waiting if you didn't order ahead.
Colombian, Cuban, Latino-Caribbean restaurant. Lovely people, great chemistry. Great music, great ambiance, great food.
Millennial hipster hell hole. Fidget spinners on the bar should never happen. Food appears inedible and the sangria would drive a Spaniard to join AA. Not a place for adults.

If you like overly peppery food - this is the place. They put white pepper in Everything. The "Open Kitchen" is deafeningly noisy. Our meal was delayed for an unexplained reason. Waiter was quite indifferent as we had complained about the white pepper.

I had order for here during the pandemic and fell in love with this place, but there recent changes have left a little to be desired. My last order (chicken rice bowl) was bland. I was so disappointed.

Good food in a fun, family-friendly atmosphere. The booths made from vintage car seats and the hula hoops kept my little guy intrigued during dinner. Live music on Saturdays complete the experience at this neighborhood bar & grill.

Honestly, not that impressive for a burrito or for street cart food. I opted for the vegetarian (which was probably the difference between me and the people who gave this place 5 stars), and it was extremely mediocre. There's just nothing worthwhile for vegetarians: that's my main point. Carnivores seem to delight and they are more than welcome to continue doing so.

Alas Mikes is no more. I think the odd hours may have done it in as they were freindly as far as service went. Food was just ok but I hope he is retired or on to bigger better things and wish him the best!

CAPUTOS!!! (anyone who has ordered delivery knows what I'm talking about). This review by the way is completely based off of delivery... The pizza is good, which is an accomplishment in Philadelphia. A wide variety of speciality pies & generally fresh ingredients appear abundant. Delivery is painfully slow though. Usually an hour. Minus one star. Still recommended though.

Came in with friends not too long ago. Had the arroz y pollo with sweet plantains. Very good, however the chicken had a bit of an older taste to it. Still the black beans, plantains, and moist rice made up for that one mishap.

Whatever bike problems I have had, this shop solves them efficently and affordably. The owner, Jeff, is always there to help you figure out what you need and make sure that you get it. The mechanic on duty is excellent. They are the best in the city for affordable service and a good product
we went last night after Butler won, so it was rowdy and packed, but a fun place in general! im not really into sports but if i was, there were lots of tv's

Food meets expectations but the customer service sucks. The customer service person we placed an order with made us feel *very* unwelcome. He mumbled in asking us our options, didn't answer when we asked questions, and made it clear he was not interested in talking. Very very rude. I wish I had complained to the management right away. Oh well. Won't go here again.

It's 2:30 pm, not closing time. Out of brown rice and ice tea. Also out of one other item they announced that I can't remember. This isn't a start up, it's a chain. Shouldn't they have this figured out? I saw this in other reviews as well. Hmmm. Also had to wait for the cashier who was then in a hurry.

Viet Pho is a small restaurant that has about 10 tables. Staff is ok but one of the waiters is a bit impatient. The food here is ok. The soup is fantastic and the broth is so flavorful. The curry tastes undercooked and the flavor of the turmeric overpowered the curry. The sandwich is really tasty but it is soggy.
Well, they are nice people.... But dang - shipping UPS has gotten expensive.... ouch. 50 bucks to ship two boxes. Granted, that included packing, but - ouch again.
The Maui Maui and shrimp with rice and vegetables was so yummy! It was so fun to watch all the fish swim by as we waited to eat! I don't think I stopped smiling the whole time!

Food - 1/5 Service - 2/5 Wine glasses dressed with someone else's lipstick? Check. Leftover, stale Philadelphia Pretzel Factory pretzel bites with grainy, chunky cheese butter "dip?" Yep, they've got 'em. They didn't even offer to take the wine off our bill. Will never go back.

Amazing oysters, cocktails, and brunch food. Wonderful atmosphere too. We attended drag brunch with Cookie Baker and boy was that a treat! The service is fab and the outside seating is lovely on a cool day. Def worth a visit!

Had a quick delicious dinner including beef bibopbim, stir fried clear noodles and spicy chicken with rice, all recommended by the server. All were delicious. Added sweet spicy sauce to the rice noodles and enjoyed by my 6 year old and us adults. Hit the spot on a cool summer evening.

The pizza here is absolutely delicious. Every time I come, I get the 14 inch pepperoni with extra cheese. For an appetizer, try the Garlic Parmesan Bites. They are incredible as well. The staff here is really friendly and checks on your table frequently. Definitely a 5/5!
Saw it on yelp. Walked in, confusing as hell. Wasn't sure if they had table Service. It was a land grab at the counter so i left. I guess locals only . No soup for you

Everyone has their own pho place they go to and this is mine. Fresh and delicious every time I go. I wish they served it with more vegetables. The portions are nicely sized. The parking is very small so come at a good time(not breakfast) if you don't want to wait.

Can't beat the crab fries. I was hungry at the airport and stopped here for a beer and the crab fries. I hate airport beer prices and the lack of space for bags. But it's still a pretty cool place to hang out. The real Chickie and Pete's bar is amazing. Everyone should see that. This is convenient though.
Today wasn't their day. Everything was completely bland. And I'm pretty sure my stomach pains are from that earlier meal.
We recently changed units within Metro, Matt was extremely helpful with everything. He helped make this experience easy and painless. I highly recommend dealing with him :)
taco heaven!!!! The cook is cool n friendly and the waitress is beautiful. The food here is authentic and full of flavor . I love the pozzoly

DO NOT BUY THE TAKE-OUT BEER! I jut got ripped off $15 for a sixpack of Prism's Bitto Honey. I think the bartender just didn't want to spend the time looking for the right price. I might stop by for a quick beer but I will not spend more time (or money) than that.
Very friendly atmosphere including bartender, waitress, and some nice customers...I enjoyed their Cheese Steak very much...

I thought this was the bar from the Bar Rescue show but it wasn't- that's it's sister bar. Staff is extremely friendly. Also, being from Vegas... The drink prices are GREAT!!! I recommend (if you'll be going out a few nights in a row)get the $8 Turtle tumbler and use! Bathrooms are nasty!

Would give it the extra half-star. Great cozy romantic little date spot, nice rustic feel, tucked away in a little spot of philly. It's BYO! an important point. The food is delicious, definitely need to come back here again. Went here awhile ago, pretty sure I got the rigatoni.
Convenient location but super crowded on weekdays during the lunch hour(s) as a result. I got in and out fast. THANK goodness they had what I needed.
Good as usual. Pretty packed as usual. You can't go wrong here. Its no comparison to anything in San Fran, but its the best you can get for Tucson.
Decent pizza that came out quickly but the waitress was completely clueless and the carafe of wine we were served was from a bottle that had been open to long

Horrible place. I have nothing good to say about this place. Typical, high pressure, extremely rude service. I HATE buying a car and this place did not make it one bit more enjoyable. I really have nothing more to say. Look elsewhere.
We went there the other night and everything was just average. We have gone there every week for some time but the food quality was not great.
Just had my place cleaned by Tom from Santa Barbara Carpet Cleaning. His work has always been excellent and with his new equipment it is the best yet. On time and fair price too.
Like a cross between a Halal cart and Eyes Wide Shut.

Great place for good greasy food. We stopped here after a trip to Walmart. I was craving some good greasy food and was not disappointed. We came with our kids and everyone was satisfied. We left feeling very full and ready for a nap.
We both had filets that were cooked perfectly. There's a wait, but nothing a bottle of wine couldn't help. Delicious off-Bourbon steaks!

Waited over an hour for my boyfriend to get a simple cut and they not only did it wrong, but thier utensils were dirty and unsanitary because my boyfriend got a nasty blister only hours after. Owners a creep.
Yes they do not have chicken on the menu. But amazing Mac and cheese ,bacon salads etc etc. Service is out of this world do check it out

The Loxsmith was solid though there was not that much lox in it. Got mine with whitefish salad, which was tasty. (I imagine a regular loxsmith would not have been as good, though I haven't tried it.) Bagel was chewy.

I love this place. Sushi in general is expensive, and this place is no exception, but they have a happy hour where u can get $3 sushi rolls. Plus, there food is really good. They can customize any roll, and will make u what u want if it's not on the menu. Very fresh fish, even my kids eat it.
Less expensive places abound in the area. Too busy and not a pleasant experience at all. Some of the staff is really great.
I really like the bowls here. The mole isn't authentic so don't be surprised if it doesn't taste like the mole your mom used to make but it's still good

Deluxe pizza 12" awesome flavor toppings piled high, great choice in toppings..baked perfectly!! Fried cauliflower very good..great craft beer selection Bare hands Westy IPA was a great choice!! Awesome service!!

Attempted to call and place an order for close to an hour during regular business hours last night. All I ever got was a recording that was looped over and over again. Nobody every answered the phone. If they treat all their phone customers like this I don't see how they stay in business.
New to the area and our friend recommended this vet. We were very happy with them. They are on time, friendly and don't try to up sell you on services or treatments.
Dont judge this place from the outside, with its simple sign and plain appearance. Huge beer menu! Tasty grub!

Just moved to the south side and am a huge fan of Vietnamese food, Thai food etc. I was super hype when I found this place. The restaurant is always hoppin'. The quality is awesome and the prices are reasonable.

The first margarita, good. The second margarita, bad. Inconsistencies in bartending are not good. BUT, the Chimachanga was a winner. It was big and full of shredded beef. I would totally order that again. Overall as a Mexican place, I've had better, but we don't really have good Mexican places in Hawaii so this place would rate pretty decently.

Terrible experience. Staff mislead us on price over the phone then brought a "manager" over who said we were wasting their time. Ownership should know how much business these guys are chasing away. We went half hour away and bought same car for the price Fred Brans had promised us.

This is my favorite rolled ice cream place ever! The staff is super friendly and entertaining. The service is quick even when the line is huge. The prices are great for the quality of what you get. The location is nice too. What else can I say? I love this place!
Good food, great prices and friendly staff. Pho Satay and char grilled pork rolls are

I ordered Gyro and fries. Generous portion but a bit high priced for fast food ($10+ for a combo no drink). Way too much sauce and only a small amount of tomato and very little onion. Service was speedy if you are in a hurry and looking for a lot of food.
They have insured our wrong car, wrong home, and have failed to send us our insurance cards in a timely manner. I would not recommend this agent.

Had a very forgettable overpriced sandwich and washed it down with an overpriced tea that was probably powdered. This place is not a restaurant you'd ever want to frequent. I'd put it into the category of "have to eat" and not "want to eat". As in the zombie apocalypse has started and they might have some canned food in the back. Hard pass.
New owners, the store looks nice and it's clean, but they have gotten rid of some wines and charge a lot for what they carry. Next time I'll just go to Winco and save $10.

Woah! We were looking for something quick and didn't really have any expectations going in but were pleasantly surprised as soon as we walked in! There were so many delicious looking options. We got meat lovers, chicken bacon ranch and lasagna pizzas all by the slice. Each of them was AMAZING. Definitely know where we will come back to when were around again!
I had crab eggs benny with asparagus and shared an order of Nutella French Toast. Both were divine. I enjoyed the cold brew also. The prices are fair, the quality is good, and selection is massive.

This place is cool. It is a good place to run in for a great sandwich to go. The people are very polite and work hard to give you a great sandwich in a timely manner. Do yourself a favor and try the fries!
Good prices but I thought the food was cheap- ice berg vs. romaine or green leaf on my salad. The decor is tacky & the wait was long. I like trendy, but this missed the mark for me.
We had an excellent experience tonight. Food was amazing, quick and our server Debby was exceptional. She anticipated our needs before we had to ask. 5 star service and food

This is the option for those on-the-go who don't want to blow all of their calories on crap or Chipotle. I can get a large-and-in-charge bowl of spicy lemongrass soup, and it'll fill me up without guilt, making the decision to get a cookie later completely justified.

Stopped in for breakfast and was met with great service and engaging staff. I had to go with something that had blueberry, so after mulling over my options with the server, I chose the blueberry pancake with blueberry glaze and a side of hash browns. Good portions and it was tasty. Couldn't finish it all. Recommended
Came here the first time today. It will become my go to spot. Friendly and accommodating staff

The scenery is very nice and the restaurant has a great vibe. TV's and music add to the ambiance. The food, not so much. I went for a birthday dinner and we were disappointed. Wouldn't even let us cut the cake b/c it was 15 mins til closing time while others were there still drinking. The food left a lot to be desired.

Omg i love cribbean food their is this place a few doors down from were i work call tropical rhythm,they have awesome food, ,i think they are jamican,if you are looking for good Jamican food come on down to this place i recommend my friends and family to try.
Skip and head straight for Sitar, about a block and a half East. The only plus if you get dessert included, but the actual meal in itself is more pricey than Sitar and never as good.

Such good ramen, can't stay away. I like that they offer chicken instead of pork. Broth is on point, and noodles aren't overcooked. Patio is dog friendly. visit if you're in town, you will come back. Thai tea in a can is good too.

I don't care what anyone says about this place, It's very good for what it is! It's open 24 hours, they have awesome, giant burritos, 99 cent tacos and really good sopes. They have a little cold bar filled with limes, marinated Jalapeno & Carrots, radishes and two different homemade hot salsas. Their Horchata is the best I've had. Bottom line, cheap and Delicious!

After placing our order we found in the fine print, along with the already increased prices, a note that we will be charged a 3% surcharge to help provide the same quality of food and service. WHAT?! Read the fine print people. They get you coming and going.
I went there in it's have great customer service and cheap prices and a great atmosphere
Cullen was great! I was very down and he turned my mood right around! Very nice guy and great food

I had a 2014 Kia Optima and had my engine replaced here. Got my car back in January and had to take it back a couple weeks after getting it back because my car started smelling like gas. They replaced the high pressure line and Friday 2/15 my car caught on fire while i was driving
Great ambience. Cool drink selections. I just wish I loved the food as much as the interiors.

Travelling here from Australia, I was really excited to order Chinese food. I've waited years. Food's taste was not great. I could have done better cooking from a pre packaged bunch of stuff from Walmart. So sad and dissatisfied. Spent nearly 50 bucks. Just sad.

Ordered taco salad; food was cold, meat unappetizing and it was missing beans! Who makes taco salad without beans??? I do not recommend this place unless you like to waste money on overpriced mediocrity.
Our experience was great, Carleen was very pleasant! Not very pushy. Great experience walking in. We were helped from the beginning. Overall great store
An old warehouse converted to a dining space style. Good quality tasty foods. Apparently currently understaff. Good restaurant in the night live area and not recommend for family with children.

I was not impressed with their Cuban sandwich. Maybe I'm spoiled after eating awesome Cuban sandwiches in Miami? The bread was cold and the meat just warm and dry. Not much flavor/seasoning in the meat. I definitely won't have another sandwich at that restaurant. Also, they badly need a good interior decorator!

I went with a meet up group on a Sunday for brunch. Very attentive service and a friendly staff. It's new in town and I hope they make it. A great deal for carnivores but for us omnivores it was just average and a bit pricey.

This location is so much better than the other locations. Clean, plenty of parking, wide menu selection, and reasonable price. My favorite is Chicken with Triple Mushrooms. I also like their Shrimp with Lobster Sauce (Lunch Special $6.95). So, why only four stars? Well, service is not the best. Fast service but where's the people skills? A little smile would not hurt.
Honestly so clean and polished compared to other places I have taken my husband in Tucson . Quick and it's nice that they focus on the customers. This to mean is a standard a barber shop should be !!

I have only ever gone for the buffet, it's really close to my work. Every time I drive by I notice it isn't too full, which blows my mind. All you can eat for $11.99, and it's really good food. They have a different selection every time I go. Never had a bad bite, chai tea is the best I have ever had.
Great place. The baristas know what they're doing here. Nice selection of beans for sale, too, by roasters I was unfamiliar with (Panther, French Truck, and their house label).
Always consistent. I've ordered a variety of coffee and they always make it well. They are pretty quick too even when the lines are long.
Delicious taqueria. Apparently fish tacos are only sold at dinner time :/ Nevertheless, got the burrito with steak and yuca - pretty freaking good. I'll come back for the fish tacos.
Their food and service are great, the place is clean but I wish that they make some improvments to the decoration I think that will be a big step forward for this wonderful place.

Basically a someone over price and glorified Denny's I really can't believe that anyone under 80 still eats here. Many years ago I really like the steak burger but it seems nothing of its old self. If that wasn't enough they have that super annoying Outback Steakhouse style service are the server sits at your table
WALMART on Berhman highway, New Orleans, One of the worst managed in the city....never have enough checkouts open...by time you reach register your milk could be spoiled!! A very poor experience! !

The appetizer bread is delicious. It tastes like soft donuts. The butter has orange flavor, which is very interesting. The weekend brunch is overpriced. They taste nice, but no any surprise. The restaurant environment feels slightly too dark. They have parking place which is very convenient.
Great sandwiches! Our go to place for lunch at the park. They have a variety of items and the sizes are large!

I order the ribs, and it's terrible. The server is terrible too, he get us a long wait to order and he did not bring us the bread. At the end, he even get us the wrong bill. Also, they change decoration, the plush koala bears were gone.

1st n last time. They made us wait 25 mins for a table n when we sat the table was empty the whole time so why did we wait. Waiter had no clue in serving he was nice but dumb. Salad no dressing nachos no sides food came out separate. shame cause drinks were good but not good enough to return.
The food was good not great. The waitresses were cute and friendly. Rachel, who I assume to be a manger of some sort was rude to her staff but very nice to the customers.

Good spot if you can go in the middle of the day during the week when few people are there - hard to do because you should probably be at work. Service is tough and usually takes forever to get a drink. If you are waiting, it is hard to justify the time wasted when 1205 Distillery is a block away.

Went here this August for an anniversary dinner. Tipped our waiter 25%. Found out a few weeks later that they added $80 onto our credit card and we are now pursuing charges with for credit card fraud. Beware!!!!!! Will never go back and will tell everyone I know to never go here again.
This place is eh and relatively dull. The WiFi stinks and the crepes are so so. I miss the food and vibe that mugshots had
Went for play off game. Waiter great. Food mostly meh.... Got tailgater sampler platter all food except wings tasted mediocre. Wings were good. Bar fly's were gross. Most likely won't go back.

Food is decent - better than other Indian restaurants in the Chestnut Hill / Mount Airy area, but also more expensive than their competitors. The space hasn't changed much since they took over from Heirloom and is VERY loud when busy. They've been open for a couple of months now and the service still seems disorganized and chaotic.

I'm soooo sad! This place used to be amazing, and now I felt like it's just ok. I had some sort of vegan hollandaise dish. There was nothing wrong, it was just OK. I love that there's an entire vegan list though - major props. The seating and atmosphere are both nice.

Passed by this location for who knows how many times. I never knew it was called the Friendship gate until recently when I had to meet with friends there for the Mid Autumn Festival and realized that it has a name. I always called it the Chinatown gate. *Shrug*

36 hours with no power the coldest days of the season. Entergy stated all power will be restored by Wednesday....today is Wednesday with an estimate of restored power Thursday at 8pm. As far as the view outage map it shows our address green, wow what reliable information information.
Don't waste your time or money took 35 minutes just to get a sandwich that wasn't even that good
Its closed again.... neither the web site or the phone message indicate this.... meh!
Great food! Great service! The Greek salad with chicken and chicken soup are the best in town.
The place looks cool in a Hawiien theme like, it was clean an the food was good. A bit pricy but overall I'll give it 6 out of 10
I came into this salon with a happy attitude but left disappointed because the lady that did my nails was rude to me and didn't do a very good job on my nails.
Great local spot. They serve a few sandwiches, pastries and lots of coffee and tea beverages. Great vibe
Very poor service - fastest manicure (standard manicure, not express manicure), no attention to detail, rushed & not relaxing - would never recommend. Already chipped 2 days later.

This place was terrible. The SUSHI tasted like days old Publix sushi. The salmon was cooked and sprinkled on top and the tuna was nonexistent. The waitress was sweet but untrained. She was forced to also be a bartender and she was unprepared for this. But the fodd was really really bad.. no wonder it was empty!
Fantastic burger. nice enough staff. They were slammed, yet still took care of you well, and a few were downright fun. Beer selection is amazing. Want to make it a life goal to get through it!

I do not recommend bathing your dogs here. They only give you two towels, the hair dryers aren't strong and the room itself is filthy. I cut my finger trying to fix the drain as it was clogged up to two inches in the tub. The only merit to this place is that it was $10. I will never be going here again.
Went here back in the days after Katrina. Even in a world with no servers, they managed to offer impeccable service and amazing food.

I'm really not a huge fan of macaroons (probably because I've only had bad ones) but I was really blown away by the rose lychee macaroon I had today. If you are in the area, do try to stop by and you will be happy you did. There is a decent amount seating and the coffee is excellent as well.

It's just okay, nothing super out of the ordinary here. Been to other city markets where you can't wait to throw cash at the vendors. Didn't find that to be the case here. On a Saturday some vendors were closed, fair enough. Like I mentioned before, other cities have more vibrant and better food options.
Pretty good place if your looking for breakfast/brunch. Very modern and clean. The sweet crepes are good I would recommend.
This tour sucks. The guide we had was not that great. She talks while the whole group was not there. And she is not very loud. We left half way because it was a waist of time and money.
Had to travel for a project to Philly, came in for dinner one day, staff was really nice but the food quickly made us take it off our list of places to try.
Horrible customer service. Spoke with the manager about it and all I received were excuses. This was my first time at this location and I won't be visiting this location again!
Great ambience, food, and service. The raw oysters were huge. Crawfish etouffee was very good.

They take walk-ins, but once you find an artist you like, I recommend making appointments. Each time I walk in, they are quite busy, unless I go mid-weekday. Their service is excellent, prices are average for the services ($25/pedi), and the techs are very friendly.

Not good for larger trucks. I have a stock f250 4x4 and it would only go in the touchless wash and it only got my truck moderately clean at best, I chose the best wash they had for $12. Won't be going back!

I have always enjoyed the Capital Grille but this visit had a table of really loud and obnoxious drunkards yelling at each other during our entire dinner. the staff did nothing about it. If I wanted to eat in this type of environment I would have gone to a dive bar.

I been in shops for much of my life, but I witnessed and received some of the worst customer service at my last visit. Hey guys: you work in a bike shop; you're not the most powerful people in the world. First and foremost: take care of the customers.

Great place to have drinks on the patio and people watch! If you're sitting on the outside part of the bar, it feels like you're pretty much sitting in the sidewalk. I love saying hi to familiar faces passing by while I enjoy an ice cold beverage. I love hard cider, and their price for a pint is $6! Not bad! :)

Nice quant restaurant downtown. The food is good and a nice unique fusion of choices. We ordered the pad Thai and a panange curry. Very nicely done. They have a nice outside area. It's a popular spot so be ready to wait a bit for a table, but well worth it.
We use to come here all the time and it was great. They have really taken a step back. Food was board line but editable. Wait stuff was average at best. Atmosphere seemed depressing.

Wish I had read the reviews before I started my maltese policy because they are stating that she had symptoms before I start it! They denied my claim when she jumped off the couch and hurt her back right leg! Sorry but it didn't start before that happen,I see they use pre-existing conditions a lot so they don't have to pay!
The decor is blah, but the food is pretty good. Definently authentic. I really like their beef Panang. Really hits the spot. And their Chicken Satay appetizer isn't bad as well.

Great gem in PHL airport! Lovely selection of world wines, tasty food,everything reasonably priced and very well presented. Very pleasant staff. Wish I had found this place before Jack Duggan's disgusting establishment in the same terminal where everything was inedible....
I had the chicken sandwich, which actually turned into just chicken because the bread was inedible. The service was terrible...I was extremely disappointed
Tried it twice now. Underwhelmed both times. Bland, heavy on rice and potatoes. The lunch buffet (which I didn't have) looks very sad.

This food is disgusting. I am unsure what my margarita was made with but it tasted like it was Sunny D. I had a cheese quesadilla that tasted like a college microwave special. The service was super nice but SUPER SLOW. I gave it an extra star for how nice my server was but I think he may have recognized me from the neighborhood.

EXTREMELY unsafe. 16 units were broken into and robbed and management has yet to acknowledge it. There is no working elevator and there has not been on for months. High levels of mold and zero security.

My friends and i went here and food never came! Staff didn't offer to rush it or anything. They were unapologetic, nothing was done to remedy the situation other than refunds after we waited for two hours.

The service was quick and friendly...the quality of sushi was what you would expect from an all you can eat, with one exception...they make everything to order. They offered mackerel as sashimi, that was a pleasant surprise. I'll go again.
Not good. Beer is bland and gross. Pasta is watered down:( worst thing is they offered my teenage daughter a child's menu and she said no thank you, and they still gave her a "spill proof" drink!!!

First time here. They were a little tough to locate because they are on the back end of a business mall. THE WERE WORTH HUNTING FOR. THEY ARE AMAZING!! Great people and great food.Good quality and awesome tasty. Would absolutely recommend them.
Slow service and food was bland. Burger was too small for the bun and way too much cole slaw on the side.

A quick in and out drink. Tried to hit up all the bars on the block for a drink at least. If it was good we stayed. Had one drink and listened a bit and moved on. Nothing horrible but nothing special either. Was nice that they had the windows open. VERY small bathrooms.
This place is gross and dirty. Dust and smoke ash on everything. Bathrooms are unhygienic. The food is the greasiest bar crap around.

It's a cool spot to stop in and grab a daiquiri, but nothing that I feel like I would crave and have to have if I visit Bourbon Street again. The service was ok. The drinks are premade in slushy machines. They don't really have a kick to them, but they are cool. Maybe it was just the way they were made that day.
Order was incorrect, refused to fix the order. Manager had an attitude and said I can either eat it or leave.
Had lunch here today and it was delicious as usual. I had the beef shawarma, and my friend had the gyro. All was delicious. I also spilt a side of Greek fries which were very good.
The bourbon hot wings are excellent The Philly cheesesteak isn't half bad either And you can't beat the drink prices!

The last time I've been here was for the brunch buffet and that was amazing but recently I've come here to just hang with friends during happy hour. I love their wings! Full of flavor and very crispy. The staff here is also very attentive and friendly. I definitely will be returning to post up on their outside bar, it's very nice and clean.

Horrible service. You have waitress talking to there friend instead of doing there job. Always take long to bring the food out and then on top of that food taste cold and nasty like the pasta I order no sauce on it just pasta and water.

Located in the heart of Ybor (...kinda), get your ice-cream fix here! Lots of flavors and lots of combinations. Choose from the list or make a signature mix, its up to you. Great for the family or a date night, god service, good fun. Enjoy!

The customer service here is beyond terrible. Was very good when the older gentlemen owned it but has gone down hill since his son took over. Products are good but I can't deal with how bad the service is. No one knows anything and the person who owns it is cocky beyond believe. Won't be back

My boyfriend bought tickets for my birthday. He spent over $70 for the both of us. Although the lights were pretty and unique, we walked through the lights in 10 minutes. He bought me a hot chocolate because it was cold and the hot chocolate was $6 and it tasted like powdered hot chocolate. I would suggest not spending the money.
These guys were great! We are travelers who had brake problems, they fit us in first thing in the morning and did a perfect job even helping us get a hotel for the night. thumbs up!

Took my wife and mother-in-law there for Mother's Day. The buffet served was quite nice, but not worth the price we paid. Service was friendly but nothing special. My review only pertains to this one brunch experience. I suspect they do a better job at dinner since they're new to the breakfast thing.

Soooo disappointing!!! Refused to deliver to us. We live off of Symmes road. We are 7.4 miles from them. They say we are at 8 miles and that it is out of our range. I call BS!! You lost a lot of great customers here in this community. Too bad.

This Sonic Was Rude And Had Terrible Service. They Made The Slushies Very Watery And Made An Excuse Of It Being Too Many Flavors But When We Go To Other Sonics, There No Issue. Plus They Couldn't Complete The Order When It Came To The Food

Strange little place. At least the times I went there, the owners never asked me to pay - I guess their custom is you pay after you eat. Others have correctly pointed out that the place lacks ambience and is probably 1-2 employees short of being fully staffed. Don't think the owners know much about running a business, but the food is pretty good.

Least organized grocery store I think I've ever experienced. They removed their sunscreen selection by the end of August, during the biggest heat wave of the year. Aquafina water bottle was $2, what? I did interact with a friendly sales associate which is why I gave the place 2 stars.

Don't know about their food (just had a couple of drinks) but this place is very nice. It is just the ideal spot to grab a beer with your friends or your date. Located downtown the place is very spacious, cool vibes over there!

Yuck! Me and my bf's food arrived very watery and in a cheap aluminum container. It was so disappointing and not edible. The delivery man was incredibly late, and had terrible phone etiquette. It was on the pricey side too, what the hell? I could have gone anywhere else and it would have been better. Never again.

Dirty. That's all I could see from walking up the front patio to sitting on the back patio. Cigarette butts all over the ground...like no one thought to power wash once in a while. Not a go to place for me.

It's a bar...if you're looking for high end, inventive food, don't go to a BAR. It's a good environment, very open and family friendly. They have some awesome sandwiches like the EJ the DJ and the rise and shine burger. We love coming here for football games. All the bartenders are great and very friendly.
Chaz rocks as a colorist. Nice to come in this salon and relax. Everyone is very friendly.

We showed up just in time for the guided tour at 1pm. I highly recommend coming for this, it makes the whole place come alive. We didn't stay for the whole thing, but if you're looking for some educational content during your day, this should be on your list.
Ambiance is nothing special. Feels dirty when you sit down. I've had better sushi. Won't be going back anytime soon.
The beignets are better than Cafe du Monde. The park is beautiful. Come on a weekday.

Cool: The food is simple and rad and the employees are fun. Not cool: Always packed. Weird: Hostile looking people will be watching you while you eat, hoping you get up so they can have your table. But go. You'll dig it.

Took a short trek from Fairmount to East Falls today for brunch at Milo. Pleasantly pleased with the chill atmosphere. Thrilled with the menu variety. Really enjoyed, ok loved the food! Can't wait to go back again and again to try the entire menu.
Still the best pizza in town! Chef Alon is a master at what he does, and they just opened a new location on Magazine at Robert Street.

Delivery was quick and that was about the only positive. I had the two pasta and the Mariana sauce tasted old bitter and disgusting. The Calamari separated from the breaking and was burnt. The chicken Marsala was ok. Nothing to write home about. The pizza was bland. Maybe from the vinegary burnt taste of the sauce. Won't eat here again for sure.
Got the oyster Po-Boy and was kind of disappointed. Not much flavor. We got the fries with debris and the debris was barely warm.
Skinny brittle alcapurrias cheap sandwich should've went to "Freddy and Tony's restaurant" is the only best Spanish food place Go to Freddy and tonys instead if you want quality Spanish food not this

My Chickie's and Pete's experience: entered the establishment to the smell of an odor of a moldy sponge, accompanied by ignorant employees. Needless to say the weird Japanese Restaurant a few gates down obtained my business.

First time coming here! I ordered the Chicken Pho, super good and fresh! I enjoyed the broth a lot! The sweet ginger sauce for the chicken was good as well. Food came out fast. Place was very spacious as well, easy to get to and located inside a plaza. I would come back again, my new go to pho spot for sure in Philly!

It's always been a pleasant experience but today was frustrating. The website and door says that they are open until 2am but we were kicked out at 11:30. If your hours have changed, this needs to be changed online and on your building. Or let your guests know ahead of time.

Great food and service. I ordered the Pumpkin Ravioli and it was wonderful. My husband ordered the Mushroom Polenta and it was outstanding! We typically go downtown for good Italian food. It's so nice to find one close to home now. We will be back again for sure.

I went in really excited, having seen them in TV several times. The poboy that they are famous for the as kind of bland. The homemade ham lacked any flavor. The gumbo was not that special nor was the red beans. All in all the most disappointing meal of my New Orleans trip!
Shuttle driver horrible - wild ride. Waited 45 min inside for car- only 2 employees long line
Worst customer service ever. Do yourself a favor and travel to the next closest saladworks location.

Service was bad slow. Food was mediocre at best. Bread on my poboy was hard enough that i just ate the ingredients. Mixed drinks were ok. Bottom line, NOLA is filled with great places, Mannings will have to be better to survive. On a positive note I enjoyed the memorabilia and environment.
You see the majority of patrons sitting at the tables outside within close proximity of each other not wearing a mask. We're in a nice neighborhood but still have a lot of dumba$$ people around.

I waited longer than I should have for my vehicle. The receptionist never notified we when my vehicle was done and when I asked about my car she told me it was parked to the side and they didn't let her know it was ready. I'm not happy with the service provided because it looks as if it wasn't even washed.
A great change of pace for some quick and tasty take out. It will fill you up with out any of the gross greasy feeling of more traditional take out.
Went for birthday dinner had lots of Mexican restaurants in reno growing up so must say thought it would be hard to beat some of them but maria,s blew the out of town

Great option for quick, fresh lunch takeaway for workdays (I live around the corner and work from home). I haven't tried the rest of the menu (or eat-in or dinner) because I'm happily addicted to fried rice and kung pao chicken. The portions are big enough for a few meals. I'll be trying the rest.

Food is great,place was to cold,kept hearing everyone complain...I overheard a cook tell a customer "they should stand behind the counter,if it was any warmer they'd be sweating" overall I liked it,and will come back

I had been doing construction on my house for the last 2-1/2 months, and made it a personal challenge not to shave or get a haircut until I was finished. Well, I succeeded in my goal and my girlfriend, friends, parents and co-workers couldn't have been more unhappy! The haircut was average, but the straight razor shave was excellent. Really cool atmosphere and owner.

This place is more of a social swing club. It doesn't really get that intense sexual energy that is required to kick things off. It is though rather huge, with many different bar areas and atmosphere rooms. Relative to its size it doesn't have that many private play rooms and has no open group play rooms.
I have always liked the wings. This hooters is clean and they are very nice to you here. It's a pretty cool place to watch a game.

The food was excellent and deserves 5 stars but the service and friendliness of the staff was a bit lacking. The place wasn't crowded at all so they could have been a little more attentive and less uptight and smiled more. I loved the meal and the space was amazing.
Really decadent brunch items that are sure to fill you up. The biggest negative about this place is that they are cash only and their atm charges a pretty big fee.

Urgent care places are hard to judge because they have no way to guess the number and severity of cases. This place was great. We were seen quickly and kept informed of what to expect. Also, the doctor was superb. Quick, knowledgeable and nice. The ability to get the meds directly and immediately without hassling with a pharmacy was the cherry on top.
One of my favorite restaurants. Great, unique menu and absolutely beautiful place. Nice bar and lounge area if you just want drinks.

Such fun! A real carousel where the bar turns around.... bartenders have to climb over the bar to get to work! It's historic, beautiful and exciting. Unfortunately, all those qualities make it Very Very Popular. It was always busy. They open at 11 am, so I suppose we should have tried it then. The Monteleone was great, Aviation not so much.

Horrible service. Took 30mins to get up to the lady at the counter and there was only 1 person in front of me.. then another 40mins to wait on a car. Many ppl in line and sitting around waiting on a car as well. The agent at the desk was rude.

Food was good and came out so fast but nothing was hot. It was kind of warm but just like it was slightly reheated. The meatballs were the worst as far as temperature but flavor was good. The cheese and charcuterie is very good so would definitely be back for that.

Great place. Pleasant surroundings. Good service and good food. At the moment, they were selling 12 different pasta dishes for $6.99. How do you beat that? Mine was great, as was the cream of broccoli soup. Good and warm bread came with it.
Best tanning place in St. Louis. The staff is amazing and the prices are very reasonable for such high quality beds.
The lady in the front had an attitude the whole time I was trying to order. I asked for a plastic bag and she rolled her eyes at me. Don't recommend this restaurant at all.

I can't tell you the amount of disgust I feel when I even hear the company name. We had service for years but they have gone to garbage. All 3 door blinds broke in 3 min of them cleaning my house. DONT HIRE THEM !!!!!!
I love eating at this place! :-) they make us feel like FAMILY every time we come here. The staff is friendly and inviting, and the food is awesome!!! :-) I recommend this place!

I really liked the food and the price but they took quite a while to take our order and I left hungry still. I asked for tofu as the protein in my coconut soup but it came without any. Soooooo would try again but did not feel this was 4 or 5 stars tonight.
Food is fresh .. Great service .. The only kind of chicken thats cooked to perfection!!

The patio is very good their servers are very kind, and drinks are really good. This place is very good if you want to have fun and drink with friends. I would say that it would be better if they improve their food menu.
Restaurant is closed. Legal document on the door showing arrears. Neighboring businesses heard it had been sold.
Tooo slowwwwwww. Saturday night gotta beef up staff. 15 min wait for hoagie is too long! Way too long.

You can't go wrong with delivery or pickup here. All the specialty toppings make this place stand out in the neighborhood. Although wait times are sometimes long and prices are a little steeper I have never been disappointed with the pizza.

I have only been here for the Hurricanes and I have enjoyed myself every time. They aren't the greatest drinks, but they get the job done. Check it out if you are looking for a cool courtyard and strong drinks in the French Quarter.

Omg! The worst experience today. The actual owner of the store was incredibly rude and unhelpful. In the past I had good experience with other workers there but she was horrible!!! I will never be going back to that store and I live in Haddonfield!
Food was not bad. Not overly impressed with the service or the atmosphere.
The lunch buffet is a pretty good deal but otherwise these pizzas are pretty damn expensive.
It seemed like most of the staff was inexperienced. Not rude or anything, just timid and a bit slow. Fish tacos were mediocre.

Horrible service- my husband was ignored by the employee standing at the register/ another employee finally came over to take his order. Waited over 5 minutes for an iced coffee/ no additions. I took a drink once we had started in our way - horrible - it looked like coffee/---tastes like spit -not sure what it is - tossed it .
When I walked in it was so quiet and casual but their food and service is yummy and super affordable my best part is I do not like spicy food and they were super accommodating
Not sure why this bar has good reviews. Been here twice and disappointed both times. Rude, unfriendly and unhelpful bartender and a bland vibe.
Good food. Rude service. Don't go near post lunch closing time(2pm). I won't be venturing back. Can get a cheaper burger elsewhere downtown during the lunch hour.

AWESOME. I'm not vegan and this food is GOOD. My usual is the Mac n cheese, yams, sweet heat cauliflower is amazing. And on Saturday I get white beans and corn bread. It's a great atmosphere and friendly and helpful staff that let you try the food first, and don't rush you to choose. And the serving portions are huge! Give them a try.

I've been here several times and had decent service and food... but not today. The wait staff was all over the place! It took forever to be acknowledged, the food wasn't quality, and when I tried to get assistance, my waitress was short with me. Disappointing....
Overpriced for what we ordered. Nice change, will probably give it another try.

Friendly staff, but problem rooms and horrifying coffee. WHY do these redesigned hotels insist on installing sliding bathroom doors that don't actually close, and with a glass door? C'mon. Really? Also: nice continental breakfast had the most awful coffee I have ever had in a hotel. That bad.

Great food! Very filling and heavy. I had the crab cakes and gumbo! It is a busy place and there was a wait time when we got there. The only thing that would make this place 5 stars was just customer service. The people were not the most approachable and friendly.

The cupcakes and ice cream are fantastic but best for take out. They have plenty of area to sit but is awkwardly quiet and uncomfortable in there. The place has 5 or 6 cameras but no speakers for some music.

Had the drip coffee this morning at the truck. Good stuff, friendly service! I tripped on the bolted down platform in front of the truck and almost broke my ass on the way out - just didn't see it in my non-caffinated haze. Other than that I was really happy!

Simply stated: dont do it! Long wait for the shuttle Long wait at the counter Car we requested was not available Car we received was extremely dirty inside.. trash, dried fluids (?) On the interior, and most telling - no one seemed especially surprised or upset by it. It ia NOT worth the small savings.
We always stay here or at GSR when we come to Reno. This time we had an exceptional experience with Karma of the Atlantis Spa. We appreciate her being so accommodating to our personal needs.

this place is nasty, i can't count how many roaches i've found in our rooms, pantries and showers! the leasing office is full of rude staff and there's always crazkheads walking around!! do not recommend
A member for more than 6 years. Sick of trying to get an appointment to fit my schedule a month out. High turn over.

Our apartment complex catered food from Bodega for our Grand Prix watch party on Sunday. The sandwiches and salad were absolutely delicious. We'd been wanting to try this place so we were very lucky to have a preview! It's definitely moved up on our foodie destination list.

The Carmelita's chain is my favorite place to eat. Too bad this newest Carmelita's doesn't measure up. The food just doesn't measure up to Carmelita's standards. Way too bland. No zip. I much prefer the New Port Richey Carmelita's!
Delicious experience! We will be back!!! Everyone must try it!!!! The milk tea is our favorite.
Blown away by the flavors they offer and the different flavor combos you can create. Nothing like a cold boba tea on a hot AZ day. It's so good I'd still take one if it was negative ten out.
Car & driver to airport for the same price as a cab. Clean car, courteous driver. That sums it up. Will use them again for sure.

I love to find awesome treasures here like a cool jacket or nice shorts. However, there is only ONE RACK of men's clothing out of the WHOLE store/boutique. I really feel uncomfortable with asking the staff of all females for sizing and style. It would be amazing if expanded the menswear and have at least one guy to help me in the store.

After reading the great reviews on Yelp I had to try the spicy ramen. The broth was very flavorful and just the right amount of heat. The only reason why I did not give them five stars is because I had ramen in New York. Definitely the best place in Tampa for ramen.
Amazing food! Fried Chicken was perfectly cooked and seasoned. Okra was the same. The restaurant is small and very clean. Wish I lived closer closer to make this a regular stop.

Mei's is a hole in the wall that's so delicious! We didn't go the pizza route and instead went the authentic route and ordered their beef noodle soup, dumplings and scallion pancakes. The service was wonderful and the food was delicious. The noodles are also handmade. Simple and tasty.

Very below average food I had the BBQ Pork and Chicken sandwiches. Bland no real flavor definitely not soul food that I wanted to experience. The music saved this from being a 1 star cause my bartender was rude and seemed angry that I showed up in the first place

Well, you know how it goes.... once you throw one good Halloween party, you have to top it the next year. :-) This store always has the funnest seasonal stuff, I usually find something here every year that is new and interesting. Thx for helping me keep my guests on their toes!
This place is ok, bartenders are friendly enough, the food is ehh ... The only downside to this is the crowd that attends here .... It sucks ! A lot of old men who creep on young girls. Gross !

My husband and I have been here a few times, we stopped dining here simply because the sushi was only prepared freshly during Friday and Saturday. We ate there during the week and it was not good at all.

Food is OK but management has gone downhill. I made a large pickup order for my family. When I got home all the sides were missing, although I had been charged for all of them. They couldn't do anything for me except refund the price. My family ate half a meal... And in the end they didn't even do the refund. Pathetic.

I had the falafel bowl and it was pretty solid. the only thing keeping me from going back to this place was the portion size. i feel like the price did not do justice to the amount that i was given if this was changed i would definitely go back in a heartbeat

First time here!! Such a darling place....the cups and spoons are a cute touch. They have a great selection as well. However only 2 choices for non dairy ice cream (sorbets) makes me sad :( It's located in Lenox Village with all the other cute stores :))) Prices go by weight so they can be a little pricey but it is so worth it!!

Food was good, so was the service. The only negative I have is after a thirty minute wait they brought us to a community table without asking if that would be ok but they did quickly rectify the problem and we were seated at a table for two.

First time at this pizza place. Online order was confirmed for a 30 minute pick up. All good! Arrived 10+ minutes before pick up time. Doors locked w/ note "out for delivery". Seems severely understaffed. Pizza mediocre. Will not be back.

Had very high expectations based on this being the number 1 ranked restaurant in St Louis and wasn't very impressed. It was middle of the road for me. Best thing was the pulled pork. I tried brisket and ribs as well but the pulled pork was the best.

I came to Sun Ray for happy hour with a group of friends and it was a perfect evening to enjoy on the patio. The drinks were great and prices were decent. The only complaint I have it the wait staff rushed us a lot and were not patient as we ordered our drinks/food.
The food is alright but the wait for the food is super long. They have people making food with their masks at their necks and talking over the food that is being prepared. Lost our order twice.
Will try again. tried two different phos and the fried egg roll wrapped inside a fresh egg roll. this was good. good price
If I can give this a zero I would. Made an appointment and he never showed up. Contacted him and claims he lost his phone. Made another appointment no call no show. Save yourself the headache

I have mixed feelings about Sup. This was my first visit. Tomato soup was amazing but sooo disappointed in our salads. Where was that sea food? Excellent greens but $13.00 for greens? Come on! They are using quality ingredients. I would try a sandwich next time but there probably won't be a second time.

The location is great, the rooms are decent, the parking is over priced and God forbid if you have a customer service issue. I tried to move an incidental charge to a separate card and the lady at the front desk couldn't help. I had to call numerous times and got the runaround. You get what you pay for.
This is a good local sports bar with good food. The have the bes wings in the Hamilton area. They have a good beer selection. Its kind of tight in the bar area.

I grew up going here. Best meat counter on south side. But cashiers are rude and are more worried about chatting and playing amongst each other than checking customers out. Cussing and throwing things at each other. Not professional at all. Repeatedly not setting prepaid pumps only to go back in. List goes on. I will never go back.

Good atmosphere, the Grouper sandwich was ok. Minus the American cheese, it would have been a winner. The Grouper itself was fresh and tasty. Service was fun (in a good way).
