The wait staff keeps things real casual, but are attentive to their customers as well. Great place for a bite right across the street from the beach.

Great service, but my French manicure doesn't look as nice as it has when I've gone other places. The white line is way too thick and pretty uneven. I'll probably come back here, but I'll just stick to colors instead of a French.

Jeni's is always my favorite place to grab a sweet treat. The unique flavors are endless and I never get bored! I can honestly say that I don't dislike anything jeni's has to offer. Definitely try if you love ice cream!
We enjoyed the food and the service was great but the mandatory valet was stupid. We had to tip the valet to get our car that was 15 ft away from the front door. I won't be back

Disappointed this visit. Service was extremely slow. We just stopped by for apps and drinks. We ordered the nachos. They were ridiculous. For $9 There were 7 nacho chips and when you tried to pick one up off the plate what little topping there was on it stayed on the plate.

Fantastic views from the patio, service is always pretty good, food is good too. They don't have a great selection of beers on tap, no Tucson craft beers which is unfortunate since we have so many great brewers here. No IPA's the day we were there and if they do it is canned. Neighborhood place, we will be back.
I got hair in my Blue Ribbon. My ketchup exploded because it was moldy. I am never going back to Tom Jones "Family Restaurant".

Changed my mind about them. Extremely overpriced and boarding requirements are outrageous! OST more to board there than my entire 2 week vacation. Also all that answer the phone talk over you and only care about getting out how much everything is goin to cost. MONEY DRIVEN ‼ Goodbye won't be back.

The pork is good here but the slaw has no flavor, nothing but cabbage and lettuce, and it's so wet it makes the sandwich soggy. I'm from Memphis and certainly know good BBQ. Beans taste like Bush's. They serve plenty of meat on the sandwich. They missed an opportunity to be great by cutting corners on the slaw and beans.

If you want your security deposit back do not rent from this place Place is broke and has resorted to renting their units out on airbnb so expect random people to be in the building throwing parties every weekend

This place is absolutely amazing. Everything I have had from PANA has blown me away. The boba tea is perfect. Smoothies are amazing. Breakfast sandwiches are super good. Especially the jalapeño jam and cheese. The pastries are epic. By far the best donuts in Indy!

Kenny hooked my nails up...he took his time and is a bit of a perfectionist (which I really appreciated) I found my forever nail spot. He's very confident and knowledgeable about his artistry...I suggest you call and schedule an appointment if you don't go mid week which I always will cause I hate waiting...

Husband made an appointment, even received a reminder call. Showed up for the appointment, and he wasn't on the schedule. Staff was extremely rude, claimed that they used an answering service and there was nothing they would do.
I asked for just a little bit of half&half (COVID-19 era) my cup couldn't be any fuller . It tasted more like half and half than coffee.

Always Fast efficient service.The biscuits & gravy r lite & fluffy. Gravy is perfect. The Cow Girl breakfast is the best if ur hungry. If u go after Church, it's busy but you can ALWAYS get a table or sit at counter. Yum

We love coming to this beach it is difficult to find parking because it's always busy. My dog doesn't run off but it's nice that we don't have to leash him so he can relax. Beautiful beach. Nice weather. We stop by every time we drive to Santa Barbara.

X1 is actually pretty good, but my bill is outrageously high and Comcast keeps raising it every year. I don't watch 99% of the channels but there is no option to take them out of my bundle. Comcast has to be the worst value of anything I've ever paid for.
food was nothing special. i suppose you are paying for the ambiance and the service. this was to be expected at a stephen starr joint

A friend recommended me to Steven earlier this year and I've kept going back ever since. Steven is an amazing stylist with profound intuition when I comes to cutting all kinds of hair including CURLS! My hair is soft, very short, and very curly. I always leave his salon feeling like he accomplished exactly what I wanted but better. I get SO MANY compliments!
Great atmosphere, location will fool you (next to Burger King). Delicious sprouts, drinks and pho!

This was an alright place for breakfast wasn't quite what I hoped for. Maybe I'm not a New Orleans breakfast person. Staff could have been a bit more attentive. Also location is small not much seating.

My family's favorite place in the whole valley. My father loves the panang curry, my mom loves the yellow curry, and i love pretty much any of the noodles. Decent prices, adequate portions, kind and quick service. You can get almost any item here and you won't be disappointed:) we love thai cuisine!
Hard to find the location (doesn't look like a coffee shop). Service was not friendly, coffee was pretty weak, even with an extra shot, and my extra how latte wasn't. Don't recommend.

All I ever want when I stay at a hotel is quiet, comfortable bed, and cleanliness. This hotel was clean, but the pillows were bowling ball shaped and oober uncomfortable. We also heard a lot of street noise through our window. The temperature in the room also did not adjust properly. But it was a good location.

The donuts here are pretty good. Unique flavors, but get here early. We've missed out on great donuts due to us getting there too late. Everything is baked and not fried. The biggest problem is trying to choose which donut you want to eat.
If you aren't basic, then this place is every person with long hair nightmare. What is it with stylist and cutting hair super short? Just wanted 1-2 inches cut off, not 6 inches.
I wouldn't even give LunaBella a star they did t even have the decency to get back to me I left a phone message a text and a message on yelp and no one responded I would not recommend them to any one

This has to be the slowest popeyes on earth. The staff is hit or miss on customer service. I do love the chicken and the food is usually on point. If they could speed up the service and at least have some sort of customer service it would do wonders for this location.

Decent food, but the prices are outrageous for what you get. I feel like they take advantage of the fact that they are the only Mexican food restaurant in the area. Close to $20 for most dinners and you get the same thing and same taste as you get from Los Betos on kolb/golf links
The staff were some what friendly and there service was okay. The place is clean except the men's bathroom seemed like someone took a bath near the sink. The floor was all wet around the sink.
Had done two of my cars. Quality work, much better than the shops in town. Comes to your house. Very nice, always accommodating, will be using for every future vehicle 100%.

Lasagna was awesome. Matzah ball soup was good. Service was average. Pricey and that's where I have a problem. My buddy ordered the burger but for $19 it better be a damn good burger and it was just average from what he said. Overall it was good but a little too expensive.

The food was good, the workers looked sloppy, I asked for hot sauce, didnt receive any. The worker that waited on me had her mask on half way. No napkins. They didnt say thank you and come back or any thing. That store may need some social training.
It was ok. Left a weird film on the roof of my mouth and my daughter said the same thing. Now called the Roly Cow.

I only know of one location and that's in the French Quarter. I've gone there 3 times now and the food is mediocre. In all fairness, I've only had the oyster plate and the seafood plate. Both were 6.0 on the scale of 10. Just my opinion of the limited dishes I've had therr

Bought a brand new car few months ago . And tire got flat . I was told that next appointment is available after 2 weeks to fix flatbtyre. Super rude people at the service department. Even my friend experienced the same thing.
As always skyline was great. I had the chili cheese sandwiches and the funnel fries were amazing. Funnel fries are a must try. We had excellent service, definitely asking for Izzy again next time.

Haven't had the bagels, but ordered pretty much the rest of the menu. "Meh." The food was well better than the playlist... jason mraz i'm yours nickelback how you remind me hoobastank the reason maroon 5 this love avril lavigne complicated snow patrol chasing cars PTSD flashbacks to those early, early oughts.
Gentleman that assist me Wednesday afternoon was very rude on explaining how to Order and explaining the topics never go back there again I felt discriminate.
Everything is mediocre... At best. The Jazz Brunch is nice, yet a lunch not a brunch as THERE IS NO BREAKFAST FOOD at a brunch buffet!!
This place treats their employees AWFULLY! I will never step foot in there again. By FAR one of the worst places in PA! Sugar House and Valley Forge are what's UP!

Large portions, cheap, and pretty decent. Had the pho, kinda oily but better than most places in the Lou. Egg rolls were solid. Service is friendly and prompt. Would go again to try some other dishes.
Sunday brunch. Waited for the server to acknowledge me and take my order. Waited quite a while for my adequate food. Waited for my check. Won't be back.

Tried to purchase a wedding band 20 mins to closing and was told everything was out away so they could leave at 6..... So I guess they would rather me spend my money at another establishment. Kinda sad
Cute place, only $2 and the ride lasts for like 5 minutes!! You definitely get the old school feel for the carousel. Not too far from the pier...it's a good 10 minute walk.

I've always had good experiences here. The food is creative and tasty and the house wines are decent. Their cocktails are well made but small. I've never had a problem with service but also haven't been here during a super busy time. The patio is a great spot to hang out with friends.
Great burgers and they have a $6 lunch special. Their fries were extra yummy. We had a good meal.

Worst haircut color ever. Overcharged for color. They had two different stylists cut my hair (lost 6inches). No style and no direction on how to style my hair. This was a Christmas present and it turned out disastrously. Stay away from Calley and Liu

Would be nice to have larger women's clothing selection. I like the houseware and linens sections. I like the rotating inventory selection. This is a great location. If you can't find something here to suit you... Go next door to TJMaxx! :)

I've been here several times and could not be more pleased with their service. 3 years ago my iPhone 6 got really hot and then went black. Nothing absolutely no response, Power, nothing. A friend from NY, on Facebook, told me about them and they were open on Sunday. 3 years later I am still using that same phone because of them.
It is usually is busy but the food is absolutely amazing! I usually get the veggie omelette and grits and it's perfect every time! Love it!
The sushi was good, but not the best ever. I prefer the Franklin and East Nashville locations to this one.

Great location, nice bed, friendly staff. The room was small and a bit overdone, but otherwise very nice. Great fitness center and the shower was frickin' amazing with two body sprays along with the overhead shower head!

My wife had the fried shrimp and I had the Four Kings platter. The fried shrimp taste like it came from the frozen food section from Walmart. The only food on my Four Kings platter that I enjoyed was the scallops. I wish that I could find a good seafood restaurant at Clearwater Beach.

Mediocre. Not worth the walk from French Quarter and the wait. The service was sub-par. The food was hit or miss. At least I knew my scrambled eggs were from real eggs, since I found pieces of shell in my eggs. The same is true for another person at my table.
Great breakfast. Call in advance or list on website. They are always packed but worth the wait.

There are certainly flaws in their customer service.. for example, I had a large bowl of 80% food left, and when I asked for it to take away I had gotten only 20% back. What happened to the rest of the 60% God only knows? I wouldn't come back even if it's cheap food.

The woman behind the counter was completely rude and actually swore at another employee, right in front of me. Gave me the wrong change on purpose and proceeded to tell me that they couldn't give me the exact change because they can't open the register. The sandwich wasn't much better then a subway sandwich.

The service here is horrible, and this is not after a one time visit. The wait staff are slow, and appear completely uninterested in making the experience wonderful. The reason for the two stars instead of 1, is that the food is always spectacular. Just do not go to this restaurant if you are in any sort of a rush.
Food was fabulous. Visiting from out of town with a group of 4. Everyone enjoyed their selections.

How terrible could an effing grocery store be! Damn bad! Terrible bakery workers, and frigging self checkout. The son of a bitch who runs the self checkout rings up sale items full price! Ask for it free it works. The customer service has lousy kids who run a stupid unloyal Acme. I will be back 3-6 times a year!

One night in Carmel for business and did we get lucky to be in walking distance from our hotel to Mimi's. I was skeptical at how a restaurant could be based around meatballs until I tried one...then two...then three. Sincerely the best meatballs I've ever tasted. Service was fantastic along with a great, causal atmosphere. Do not pass this place by.
The best brisket i have ever eaten. Their service is awesome. Everyone is very nice and helpful.

This Olive Garden is by far the worst Olive Garden ever. Came into the restaurant and was told by the host that their is ten minute wait. All servers are filled. Including myself there are a total of five tables taken through out the restaurant. What a joke!

If you like your ice creams then this is worth a look. The choice of flavours is awesome and they do taste sooooo good in either a dish or cone. The only mistake I made was picking two flavours, by this I mean the scoops were large but guess what I managed to eat them both
Great spot for a group business meeting or just popping into the bar. We took over the bowling for a small company function and it was a great night. Very cool retro spot.

Food is really good, but place is packed and expensive. More than $10 for a sandwich is crazy no matter how good the sandwich is. Decor is unnecessarily odd and staff (as busy as they are) can seem rude.

Not the best place, I read Google reviews and wanted to try them out. I can. Agree to other yelp reviews on here. I probably wouldn't take my car here to get detailed. There was still wax dried and left on the outside of my car. Octopus car wash isn't the best either but the detailer did a better job over there.
Awful customer service by the OWNER!! Food took too long to be served and was wrong when it finally got to the table. The owner argued that it was our fault. We won't be back.
Meh. The food is disappointing here. Not flavorful. Sides do not include green veggies unless you pay extra.
Really only love their lo mein. Ordered on Grubhub, where it's still delivered by the restaurant. Ordered over an hour ago and it's still not here. I just live downtown‍
What an incredible meal!!!! We had the gumbo du jour, peach and grape salad and redfish. Unbelievable!!! Everything was stunning
I love this event!! Always been one of my favs. A whooole lot of people there this year which is good to see. Don't advise bringing your furry friends tho it's a pain in the butt lol

The grouper platter was just ok. Grouper was very thin and not much taste. When I ask to substitute fries for the rice they refused. Had to pay xtra for fries and they didn't include the rice even though we paid for it. Price is very high

Our sales associate told us it would take roughly 20 minutes to go through our bag. An hour later she was finally finished. The associates are slow and take there time with each activity. They are inattentive and not ready to help. I would not come back.

Terrible experience in the grooming department with Autumn she was very rude and did not provide all of the services that were requested and paid for. She has zero customer service skills we will not be returning to this location ever!

Good but you can tell the microwaves in the kitchen are getting a workout! Food was microwave hot and had a taste of being refrigerated and reheated. Big eaters go here for the Buffet. Left me wondering if there something better!

Always love coming here cause the food is always great. Pizza... delicious! Pasta... delicious! Fried zucchini... ehhh ok. First time at this location. Service was pretty slow and the entrees took a while to come out but the waitress made up the slow service with her kindness. Overall great experience.

It's not a matter of "if", but more like "how badly" this chain will try to ASS RAPE you! ALWAYS attempting some frivolous upsell on air filters, transmission flushes, etc To top it off, my tire gauge light is now on and their compressor isn't working (allegedly) and they can't re-set my MAINT REQD light Stay away from these thieves
Perfect place. Great pizza. Didn't wait more than 5 minutes. I like that I can choose what I want on it.

0 stars. Horrible customer service at this Mac. I wanted to do an exchange in Studio Fix that was sold to me in an incorrect color. I asked for N5. Was given C4. They would not do the exchange even though it was their mistake. I had not even opened the package.
I had the grilled fish of the day - Have. Fish was cooked to perfection but no taste. The avocado crab sauce was good but lacking any real distinguishing flavor. Staff always excellent here!
Food was hot & fresh, our server however took almost 20 minutes to greet us, she seemed like she had been using .

Food was delicious, the experience was even better. We got our meat cooked the Moja style and it was soft and yummy. The dessert literally sent my taste buds out of control. It's expensive, about $90 with drinks but so worth it!!!

Always a yummy breakfast/brunch spot- the wait on weekends can be pretty intense, and cash only is not super convenient l (they do have an ATM though). The food is always good and service is great, but it can be a little pricey- and sometimes I just want a simple breakfast (rather than pancakes that should be dessert).

Delicious! Food and aguas (fresh juices) were sooo good! I love their yummy burritos so big u can only eat half and save the other half for later! Only complaint would be that it's a shame they don't have a bigger space with more seating! Staff is also always friendly!!
Guresu has changed names to Diversity. Same location and still a sushi place. However the food is a bit different and so is the pricing.

Just went to try and get a haircut. On the door it says appointments for Sunday and Monday but I came in on a Saturday and they said I couldn't get a haircut Because they are "short staffed" even though there was three people working and have to have an appointment.

Stopped in for a late lunch after visiting my husband's mother. Sat at the bar- the bartender was very friendly and recommended the burgers. They were amazing! There is also a very large selection of beer on tap, which made my husband very happy. We will definitely be back.
Better than any of the stale chains. The donuts are good and better than anything around. They have a good variety offered in the store.
My coffee has zero sweetener after I requested it. The location blows and is impossible to park unless you want to pay or get towed. My frozen drink is liquid. Never again.

What are you doing wine tasting in the Funk Zone? Get outta there! El Paseo is where the best wines in the area go to be sampled, and no one does it better than Grassini. Family tradition and years of expertise meet criminally underrated viticulture for an exceptional experience. Oenophiles, skip Kalyra and hit the real juice at Grassini!

Fairly standard and bland...no taco sauce to be seen although badly needed...food even at that is better than the employee attitude. Some guy cleaning tables was kicking chairs noisily back under that tables. It was nerve jarring...and his cleaning skills were a poor reflection on his mother. The place is cold and uninviting.

I love this store! Local and. Full of some of the most amazing book choices on the planet. Went to buy a sons friend a birthday gift and absolutely fell in love with the place. If your looking for a good read, this is the place.

Stopped in to grab yellowfin and pink shrimp but wasn't even acknowledged while standing at counter for a good bit of time, figured they were too busy for my business. Key is if there are more than 3 cars parked out front drive right on by. I will from now on.
Went for lunch with colleagues and would definitely return for lunch or happy hour. Excellent food at reasonable prices - a fun addition to University City.
Slow to take food order...slow service...32oz. mini pitcher $10 not a good deal...didn't get sour cream but got charged for it...food was average
Very friendly service! We stop in for lunch, and enjoyed the lunch combo specials. The prices were great and the food was fresh!

Extremely disappointed in the quality of food here. "Best" should not be in the name of this place, terrible food. This was by far the worst pizza I've ever had and for the price it was no where near worth it. I will never eat here again.
Food was good and fresh. Bar service was quick. Overall a nice place for a late night meal and drink.
I came to have my watch battery replaced. I walked right in, was immediately greeted and helped; it took less than 5 minutes and cost $8.64. He was the nicest guy ever, too.

Sears Home Services: After 45 minutes on the phone and after being transferred 9 times...it turns out I would never have been able to talk to a technician about repairing our Kenmore Microwave. That's because they don't have Sears repair people,they contract out everything. So I will find an independent contractor and never buy a sears appliance again.

Food is terrible except the chips and salsa. We ordered a quesadilla, the beef in it was not edible. It overlooks a courtyard where there is music almost every night. It is worth sitting outside and order beer and chips.

DO NOT COME HERE FOR A MILITARY HAIRCUT. I asked for a medium fade and just a little off my almost three inch top and ended up looking like a guy named Kyle they drinks monster energy drinks and failed the asvab! High and stupid and lined up my front like I was a Dominican gangster.....

I choose Target Optical because they took my insurance and was not disappointed! They helped me pick a frame and ensured my glasses worked for me (even with a really high prescription). Staff was so warm and friendly and remembered me when I went to pick up my glasses. Highly recommend :)

Not sure what the hype is about for this place....you get pretty sizeable portions of food which is great if the food tastes good. Not sure if I went on two different bad days but I pass this place all of the time and just keep driving.
Food is delicious. This is kinda like fast food. Service is as to be expected from a somewhat fast food restaurant.
Very friendly, brand new car was offered car wash with 2nd oil change but never got the car was very upset to come back to my car after saying they took it through the Carwash !!!

It was decent. However lack of variety and lack of space in the store and lack of a great location which isn't a good area to get specialty food items. Also it seem misplaced to have cupcakes in the store as well. I don't think it will last long.
It's 'OK' at best - certainly not worth the wait on a Sunday morning, especially if you do not want to come out smelling like the place afterwards.

From looking at the photos you would think this place would be pretty amazing, but it surprisingly wasn't. The hotdogs were pretty difficult to eat due to all the toppings and the hardness of the meat. Everything was falling apart. The homemade sodas were very watered down and severely lacked on carbonation.
Sorta expensive for what you get. But really good bagels. Tastes like a baguette in bagel form.

Food was just so-so. The employees were very friendly and were all wearing gloves, which would normally be a good thing when preparing food. However, they were also taking money, wiping counters, refilling salad dressings, and more with said gloves on. Perhaps management needs to review safe handling procedures.
Really weren't that great.. Fun experience & donuts, but not super delicious. Glad we tried them though. The fat Elvis donut is really good!

Wendy has been doing my alterations for years, she is amazing at everything she does! She is currently altering and adding to my wedding gown. She is altering my bridesmaids and Fiancé stuff as well. Highly recommend!!
Great atmosphere and clean shop plus they do an amazing job cutting hair. Finally found a good barber after moving to Florida which too me 5 months to find one I want to go to.
This place is alright with me. Good Po Boys and tabasco sauce!
Great location for drinks with friends!!! The food is also very good, I usually get the grown up grilled cheese which never disappoints.

Over rated. The staff was nice and the facility was bellow average. My husband thought the French toast was bland. My croissant sandwich was stale and it looked like the just threw pesto at it. I just picked my meal apart, the fresh mozzarella cheese was good though.

Outdated exhibits. Broken or missing pieces from learning stations. Over crowded. Way too overstimulating for my 3 year old. Not enough staff to keep exhibits organized so children waiting to play don't have to wade through a mess. Very disappointed!!
Very good seafood. Be prepared to wait for a table, but its well worth it. It is a small but cozy place.

Such a wonderful experience. I haven't ventured out in a while due to Covid. I was greeted by a very nice women Anna. They check temperatures and they are clean!!!! Thank you so much Sophia for a wonderful reflexology spa pedicure and gel manicure! I will definitely be back!!!

We came in here because my friend loves Tabasco sauce! I was actually surprised at how much they had in this store. Great branding throughout! You don't realize how many everyday items you use have association with the Tabasco brand. They also had samples of the sauces. Yum! If you're a Tabasco lover, stop by!
ATM works great. But banks just suck in general anymore. I'm surprised I haven't been charged for giving them a review. And it's just gonna get worse and worse.

That was the biggest display of incompetence I have seen. Driver flat out lied and led my wife on the side of the road for 4 hours and put her to the back of the line when the driver didn't show or call. Why even bother? This is a paid service- not a freebie. Absolutely horrible
Chocolate malt. Yum. Time frame to acquire said malt? Not yum. Still it was a great malt and I enjoyed it. Next time, I'll allot more time for such adventures.
Great place, my tattoo come out amazing, it was my first time tattoo but this place make me feel very relaxed, and the prices is very reasonable, definitely recommend
Decent ice cream. The girl helping never smiled or said a single word. Customer service, it counts!!!

This place is amazing. The food is incredible, best cacio e pepe in town. Also, the service is top notch, we were seated outside and my fiancé accidentally knocked his appetizer plate over onto the floor, and not only did they help us clean it up but also brought a new appetizer out for him without being asked. So kind, and unexpected.

Never can go wrong at coldstone! Ordered the love it waffle cup with French vanilla & oreo cookies! Line was short & quick! Friendly girl behind the counter took the order, paid her... she even sang when tipped. Would definitely come back! Very clean store!!

Service was awful. Food was mediocre. Bad music. Dessert sucked. Owners are douche bags. Much better FAMILY FRIENDLY places in Tampa. Bartender outside Thomas was outstanding. Managers and owners are rude. This place kinda sucks.

They said they were out of the good Galbi so I had to order the LA Galbi. The flavor is amazing! The service and food was great however.... make sure to take a Korean speaking friend. It will just make everything way easier. You also receive 10% of your total if you check in there.
This was like eating mall pizza horrible service was great but never again just like most of John's pass crappy food.
Prices are not bad. But the guy that did my nails and toes painted same like he was in a rush. I got there at 2 I was done by 3. I didn't like my nails. Lesson learned
Delicious beignets! Oh, and the Cafe au Lait was awesome! Not a huge deal but for those looking to do some work or cruise the web there is no WiFi available.
Best Gyro in Nashville and Top notch service!! I've ate here over a hundred times. So I can definitely recommend this place to others.

We recently returned to McNamara's, and I'm happy to report it seems the restaurant has worked out the kinks- added additional staff, improved the level of service, and even improved upon the food! I'm happy with the improvements, and look forward to visiting again soon!

Had lunch here today on our tour of food in Nashville. Great experience. My favorite was the linguini appetizer with two fried eggs on top - it was so delicious and the noodles must have been homemade. Also shared the Group sandwich, which was also delicious.

Very delicious bagels, super fast and friendly service, and a cool rewards program! What more can you ask for? The only things negative would be that the restaurant has a weird odor (I just associated it with being in an older building). And the hours are very short. Other than that, I will be a recurring customer!

Had a very subpar boring pork roll, egg and cheese. Home fries had no seasoning and seemed under cooked. The server never came back to ask if everything was ok with my meal, only to bring the check so I cannot say that I would eat here again.
Staff was nice food presentation beautiful, my husband and I got burgers, the meat was over cooked hard like a puck covered nicely with the cheese and condiments, my girls salads were amazing.
Our fav. weekly "hang out" place to wait for an hour when my daughters have piano lesson! Nice store, well kept & nice staff! We'll be back next week!:))
They changed their fish n chips to cod, but the baked haddock is terrific and large! The pizza sauce has been tweaked to be a bit stronger, and better!

After hearing a bit of exhaust noise, I had a free inspection done. Pipes were ok but it needed a muffler. Their estimate to replace the muffler was $363. Autozone sells .. retail .. a lifetime muffler for $85. Needless to say, I declined. The only reason they get 2 stars and not 1 is that the inspection was free.
This place failed to move me. Everything was just OK. Our server was nice, the food was pretty good, the outdoor patio was alright, but nothing wowed me. I want to be wowed damn it.
Stopped by today and got a salad sampler. It looked good but all the salads has the same spices. The best part was the feta, everything else was over spiced with the same spices! Won't go back.

As a family we were a very large group of six people. Everyone was pleased with the service (tea glasses were filled fast), and the food was great! BOTTOM LINE: If i'm in the area, and I'm hungry...I'll eat here!

Good: A couple of the staff can speak English and are very friendly. Bad: MSG-rich food (my mouth and lips get really dry after eating the food), service level is of what you can expect from a Chinese takeaway.
no customer service whatsoever no one welcomed me said hi or anything.. too busy smoking cigarettes out front..
The unlimited is a joke!! We're supposed to be on the 29.99 plan and every month they take a different amount out of my account.

This is probably the best omakase you're going to get in the New Orleans area. Grab a seat at the sushi bar and let the chef do his thing. It's always a fun experience and the fish is so fresh!! They get uni from Hokkaido (if you're lucky!) and Santa Barbara. It's priced per piece so it's very affordable. 10/10 highly recommend.

Cool atmosphere and decor on the inside. Ordered the Thai tea, cucumber salad and Dan Dan Noodles. All were good but I especially drooled over the Thai iced tea... we ordered two each. I definitely want to try the dumplings next time but they didn't have a lot of vegetarian options if I remember correctly. That'd be my only complaint
I LOVE THIS STORE!! They always have the best service and customer service. I have ordered many cakes and they always make sure they look and taste like perfection.

Meh. They have a very simple menu and we got a blended mocha which wasn't on the menu. It wasn't too sweet which I like but it seemed watered down. Maybe they used a cold brew? The baked goods were good and they have gelato and a vape lounge...odd.There are better places out there.
Kept the line moving, good muffins, nice people. Could use a clean up, paint job, and rearrangement. Overall really good.

Very pleased with the service at our HOME. As a result, I purchased service for my daughter's home in Indy and switched to Guardian on my business too!!! Would highly recommend them for your security needs.

About a year ago I got my eyebrows done and they were messed up. showed the owners but they didn't seem to care. I shouldn't of had to pay for it especially since I walked out upset with my eyebrows screwed up. was told to color of them inwith pencil so they looked like they matched! Were they on crack?

Pretty terrible. Slow service, the fries and bread were soggy, the salad was overdressed and made with old lettuce, the broccoli was barely cooked, and everything was lacking in flavor. Even for an airport restaurant this was awful. It's a good enough atmosphere but I really wouldn't recommend unless you're looking for a place to drink beer and watch TV.
had eggs sauage coffee juice. plate was cold so food got cold fast place was cold had way better will try lunch or dinner but for me breakfast is out .

My wife and I ate here a few nights ago and it was very, very good. The service was excellent, the manager was friendly and made certain we were pleased with everything. They have a great sauce bar where you can formulate your own special sauce or go with one of the many they have available. It's a great spot.
Had the worst service there,had to wait an hour and a half for 2 burritos so to make our services better my date and I walked out on those idiots....one star for the drinks
Came right at the end of lunch. Very relaxed atmosphere. Service good, hibachi decent, sushi decent. Not dying to come back but would. All around average Japanese place.

Music blaring way to loud and the girl who waited on us was more interested in cleaning up and going home than Helping us. She was talking a mile a minute - I do remember what it was like at the end of a shift but it didn't seem as good as chipolte usually does

Big servings of bland food. Despite the fact that they've painted their wall saying they are open 24 hours Thursday through Saturday, this is now apparently not the case as a server just told me. As the only place around that server real food at around 4 am, this is a huge disappointment.
Everything about this place is awesome. The sandwiches, pasta, real deli, bakery. I haven't had a bad thing here.

Terrible customer service! Do not recommend or value a company that fails to see the value of making a client happy. Will never return due to their treatment. Save yourself some money and learn from my lesson, do not shop from MF.

Jimmy's is like being in SoCal getting tacos near the border, except Ybor City's charm is all around. Had the carne asada and al pastor and both were incredibly well done. Will be back for the barrio tacos next weekend.
When you are eating here watch for the little green worms in your mealHappened to my 24 year old grand daughter and they didn't comp Her full bill!!!!

So so slow. They always seem surprised that they're busy. You sit at the speaker in the drive thru in silence for as long as 3-5 minutes. Last few times, they've been out of sleeves for hot coffee cups.

Cool Asian supermarket. It's a huge store and they carry a wide variety of foods that are hard to find in your typical US grocery store. Prices were fair and not overpriced. Enjoyed browsing and tried a few new foods!

As far as Airport food goes, this place is pretty good. The service sucked, but the food made up for it (as far as airport food goes). I shouldn't even review this. It's not like you run across terminals to find something Zagat rated. Carry on!

Tip: -metered parking is enforced on the weekends -come on wednesdays for 99c double meat Service was friendly. I like how the guac and hummus are at your disposal at no extra cost. I added banana peppers with my gyro and that didn't pair well. It masked the flavor of the gyro meat. Don't think I'll be back for a while.
The Sukho Sampler was great. Rad na noodles, larb gai and Shrimp with Kaffir Lime leaves spectacular. Service with Colin whom proved to be as nice as he is beautiful! Must try!!

Stopped by here on the way back to LA from up North and was craving a hearty Pho. Left here disappointed. Broth was pretty boring and the toppings weren't as fresh as you would expect. If in the area again I would try someplace else.

This has been my favorite Resturant since I can remember but lately the quality has to more miss then hit . Bland mash potatoes etc. I never write reviews but today just was the last straw . Not sure who's in the kitchen but this has been on going with the lack or quality and taste with the food

Very intimate music venue...as in very tight space. The acoustics were great but there is literally no space. Overpriced and water-downed drinks. If it weren't for the great entertainment would never come back.

The food was okay. I only ordered the jambalaya and the presentation was beautiful, however the taste was subpar. The seating in the restaurant was horrible, nobody wants to sit directly in front of the entrance..
Burnt oysters, soggy shrimp, overpriced small portions and tacky staff. First fine dining turned tourist trap for me in my many trips to New Orleans. I invited my family and was embarrassed.

Grifols Reno recently increased their payment amount for new donors only. This means that new donors get $20 more per week than returning donors. grifols is making more money off of return donors than new donors. This is totally unfair to returning donors! They need to change this! Why penalize returning donors, which is exactly what you're doing!! you should treat everyone equally!!
Winner for NOLA East! Beautiful interior, could easily be dropped onto Magazine St. Lovely staff and amazing energy! Of course, the coffee is great too!

Buffalo fries for appetizer was a great choice! Ended ordering mahi-mahi tacos , quesadillas and pulled brisket tacos for lunch. All were very good. Our waitress was helpful and friendly. Overall a very good lunch with great views
They did serve me a Stella when I checked in before closing the bar so something is working right.
Unique and fun live music venue with a view of the Arch! Great sound and a great patio. Very good prices. Staff is friendly. So great St. Louis has this venue!
So good! The best buffalo Mac and cheese I've ever had; hands down! I go here all the time for brunch and dinner. They have very creative burgers.

So rude. So condescending. Kelly is an awful human being. I can't imagine her in a car on the road. Up to this point in life I've never left a negative review. Kelly has neither the intellect nor compassion to be interacting between people and their healthcare.

Great place for a casual breakfast! The menu had a lot of options, but not overwhelmingly so, and the restaurant has an open airy feel. Our food was good, and beautifully presented, with good portion sizes.

This place is awful. Yeah, it looks nice, but the coffee is watered down, the chocolate beignet I ordered was raw, and when I asked the barista if the heat could be turned on, she said, "I don't know. It's not my job." What a waste of a beautiful space.

When it first opened was my favorite place to eat. Went and got the gift cards stocked up. However as time rolled by it's becoming a disgrace of a restaurant. The knives are never sharp. The food quality dramatically changed and it was not worth it. Use to leave happy. I recommend this place when you are in another city. This one no

The Yutacan shandy was a really tasty drink. The variety of 'high end' guacamole's is pretty intriguing. Didn't enjoy the house made salsa all that much as it is very watery. Shrimp and chorizo quesadillas were pretty average and the timing and delivery of food to the table limited the ability to eat a variety of options at once.
The best laundromat I've ever been to! Super clean and very friendly helpful staff. Great machines both large and small. Can't go wrong here!
Dennis from the West, the only Mexican named Dennis you'll ever meet, is the most generous friend you could ever meet at Fiesta! Viva la!

Food is good. However, I have no idea on how they control the spice level in the kitchen!! Probably different people depending on the day. Medium spice on one day could vary from zero to unbearably spicy the next. Get control of that or your going to lose customers!!!

Stopped here for lunch after a group bike ride. The outdoor patio is very nice with a mix of sun and shade. The one waitress covering the patio seemed spread pretty thin. I had boxcar burger which was on special. It was flavorful but a little tough. The ranch potatoes were really good.

Are you a high school student looking for inspiration for a creative writing assignment and need to people watch on a Sunday afternoon? Go here. Are you looking for a bright store with good prices, a large produce section, decent organic options, craft beers, abundant sales and many available check-out lines? Go to Giant.

Your review helps others learn about great local businesses. Food was descent , but service was slow . I think they were busy . We went on Saturday night So maybe that is why . Please don't review this business if you received a freebie for writing this review, or if you're connected in any way to the owner or employees.
Great food, service, and atmosphere. Thanks to wonderful staff on duty. Awesome place did not disappoint.
Service was good. Food was okay. Had gator bites and stuffed mushrooms. Place is small and only views are of road and dumpster. They have a couple of window seats with views of bay. Wasn't impressed
We had a group of 13, got sat immediately, service was great and the food was even better!! Highly recommend and we will for sure be back!

The food was good, but the service was not so hot. Our group of four was passed around between servers, all of which were forgetful and super slow. I'd recommend trying Rosalita's...just not on a weekend.

I was very appalled by the service my friends and me received. We were not checked up on or given drink refills. When we had a question about the menu, it went unaddressed with an eye roll. The waitresses were super rude! The food was good, but the service is what will make me not go back.

Very cool and unique hotel. A little hard to get around the hotel's maze of wings and floors. Staff is friendly but could have more employed/working because when we asked for sheets for the hide-a-bed, it took about 45 min. for someone to deliver them to us. Fitness room is very good!
Excellent spaghetti ! We did have a little problem with service, but she was relatively new. Prices very reasonable. I will definitely go back.

Courteous, professional and careful team. Great experience. Easy scheduling of pickup, called when close, timely (short window). Picked up Member's Mark 8-foot, stainless steel grill with oven. Very cautious removing from deck and incredibly reasonable removal price.

Awkward room with mediocre sound. Great bar with a cool vibe, however, and it's adjacent to the Mercy, which is awesome. Click the link for a more in-depth breakdown. http://www.examiner.com/nightlife-in-nashville/moe-review
This steak was charred pretty awfully. I used to recommend all of the people I train traveling to STL to go there for steaks. Now I feel stupid for doing so.

Dining out at it's finest. The Verbena experience is one to remember. The Tasting Menu is a journey for the palate. Scott is a true artist in his craft. Do yourself a favor and book a reservation now.
I got an iced coffee & an almond croissant. It is clean, and has a pleasant staff. I will be back!

We came in and we were seated right away. Over 30 minutes goes by and not one server stopped at our table. They would walk by and look at us but never stop. Not even a drink order. SO disappointed. We won't be back.
Great way to spend an evening, however get there early because the lines get long and parking is rare.
A resounding meh. I always thought this SB was well run and had good service but today the service seemed to fall apart when the restaurant was just a little busy.

The food is OK. Not as good as other Indian restaurants farther away. If you need to get your Indian fix, this place will do. It's expensive for styrofoamed fast food and the service is usually pretty poor. Tables could be cleared more frequently, especially around lunch.
We ordered the deep dish pizza, well this is far from! Crust taste good but I didn't want a saltine cracker pizza! If your going to call it deep dish then make it thick.
It was okay. Maybe I'm not a fan of traditional Thai but I thought is was weird they only carried golden bobas.
Pros:Great food (try the grilled octopus or lamb!), friendly service, BYOB Cons:Cash only, can't get an itemized receipt, parking can be an issue, kinda pricey
The meat is low quality. The fries were crunchy and greasy which I didn't mind, but I could tell the grease was old/used. Wouldn't recommend.
7 employees working a few customers and not one clean table. In addition to that there is a nasty odor that make you want to leave. No excuse for this!
Cracker Barrel has gone down hill . The casserole is dry as the biscuits are smaller than they use to be . Over all Cracker Barrel become horrible disappointment !
Nice, clean and great drinks. 40+crowd and great live music. I encountered a couple racist sick perverted pigs there however l can't blame the bar for these old guys rudeness...

Way overpriced (both food and drinks). Ordered salmon to add to my kale and brussels sprouts salad. It was the size of a postage stamp for $10 (in addition to the salad). Order came out wrong as well. Pretty restaurant. Outside seating.

On the water which is awesome! The deck is small and a little bit crowded. Great if you are just coming off the beach. Nice Service. But the food was not to good I ordered sautéed veggies and got over cooked corn and Lima beans. The breading on fish & chips was soggy. But other wise great location and pretty view!

For a place that does have vegetarian and vegan options, it was surprising to find that the fries are fried in beef tallow. I'd suggest having a label on the menu of what is vegan/vegetarian, or simply finding an alternative frying method.
Totally proficient, inexpensive- but a bit bizarre that the TV was blaring. Reminds me of visiting a retirement home. Not a warm and fuzzy vibe but I don't need that.

Seriously are the portion sizes getting smaller here or what?! I'm gonna leave this place still hungry again! How sad and far Qdoba has fallen. Portion sizes and terrible attitude from the employees is driving me away. Btw I ordered the bowl and it's half full.

Really disappointing. Food was just decent, there was a bone in my taco salad, and the service was just slow and terrible. Worst part is that management didn't seem to care in the least when I complained. Won't be back, which is too bad since they're so convenient to my office.
Simply stated, there is no reason to pay $25 for chicken parmason (how do you spell that) when there are so many other good Italian restaurants in the area. Everything is wxpensive
Easy airport to navigate. Food options stink. Be prepared and bring take out from town for your return trip home. Love New Orleans but airport is a mediocre experience.

Solid tea shop with so many to choose from. Decor is modest and perhaps less inviting than many other competitor tea shops in this area, but we appreciate the casual vibe. Friendly and quick service, modest price, and consistently good drink.
One of the best sushi restaurants in south tampa!!! Daniel is an amazing sushi chef!!

Only thing wrong with this place is the prices. If you don't find a special when you order then you're going to spend $15-17 for a large when you can go down the street to Pizza Hut and get a large unlimited toppings for $10. This place does have better ingredients, but not that much better to make you want to pay that price.
The original place on 39th and Chestnut is better than this. Their sundubu at this location lacks flavor.

If only I could give ZERO stars!!! Walked in and a family was already waiting ahead of me. There was no host. The waiters, waitresses and bar tenders all looked at us but showed no acknowledgement. We continued to wait but still they provided no response. The family ended up leaving and I left shortly thereafter. They should change their name to LOOSERS!

Well it's free and it shows the only part of this zoo I enjoyed was the alcoholic strawberry daiquiri and the elephants. Barely any animals, I just walking around for no reason. I wouldn't go back even with it being free.

An average bar meant for chilling with a live musician in the back who's not always good. Depending on your style, though, this place can be appealing. The area is in revival mode. Some food avail. Inside with dance music and maybe some random dancing.

I had the biscuits and gravy with the home fries. The potatoes were excellent, the gravy on the biscuits was extremely salty. I make it a point to patronize the business's that are not downtown, and that are independently owned, so I will probably be back again, but I'm not sure when.
I love this place soooo much. Its a little pricey, but you get a lot of food. The only catch, is the drive-thru SUCKS. ALL LOCATIONS are SUPER slow in drive thru.

Stopped in for brunch while in Philly for Made in America festival. The food was awesome & so was the pitcher of strawberry lemonade (with tons of vodka). We got there right before it got crowded. Once it got crowded out waiter seemed a little overwhelmed. So, I'd beat the rush if you're gonna do brunch here. Otherwise great food, drinks & service.
rude staff!!!!!!!!!!!! awful set up & lay out!!!!!!!!!!! terrible food!!!!!!!!!!!!!! took 3 hours to get our appetizers!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! 10 of us, none of which will ever be back again!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

This place sways between a 3 and 4 for me. Most days the service is good, but usually adequate even on bad days. The food is almost always disappointing, sounds way better than it looks when it arrives to your table. Drinks are strong and tasty and they offer lots of specials.
Terrible customer service. Not friendly, no pleasant. 3-4 hour wait to put a battery in and not nice about it. Never again for anything.

Wow that was gross. I had one of the rice bowls and the rice had no flavor whatsoever. Veggies were plains steamed then a sauce dumped on top. Perfect for college kids with no income and a less than discerning palate.

Ate here with friends Emily and it was delish. We split a bottle of Meiomi and had dinner. I had a special which was delish - cauliflower pizza crust with beets, peppers, mushrooms, mozerella and honey. It would have been excellent with sausage. I thought it was a bit pricey BUT not a city person ....
Hailey was wonderful and was able to answer all of our questions. We can't wait to get the pics of the future smile. It's worth coming in and checking it out.
Mediocre burger. The all you can drink selection is standard. I only went here because they were open late and Graze burger was closed.

I usually order ribs and baked beans! Service is awakes friendly and fast. I have never had an issue with the wrong items in my order! Great Saint Louis bbq! Love being able to call ahead! FRIDAY WINGS are a treat and sell out fast! Slab of Ribs

It's a roller coaster park on top of a zoo, I do miss when Budweiser owned it, I miss free beer. Incredible amusement park definitely get the season pass and go in the afternoon you can hit the rides one after another no line.

Horrible! Italian hoagie meats taste so old and processed. Steak sandwiches are okay but nowhere near the quality or size as the voorhees location on burnt mill rd. Would love to make this a neighborhood fav since I live nearby but can't.

Today was my first time in and il be back without a doubt. I absolutely love this adorable resale shop. Il forever come back for the jewelry, it's super cute and priced right. Can't wait to show my mother and aunt this shop. Great place to get lil gifts for the girlfriends :)

This place was nice. It was a little difficult to find but the cupcakes taste great. I have never taste icing that good. I do wish they were a bit bigger but maybe that's a good thing! I would definitely go back!
lab dads sandal is an anagram for sad, bland salad. shoulda gone for the pita. salads are, as I've mentioned before, both sad and bland, and also $9 which is silly.

First their customer service is rude. They change everthing in the store to make you go through every aisles and they never have anyone to help you. If they put a Coscos they would lose me as a member

Need retail items for your grocery store/restaurant/deli etc? Jetro has cases of it all. More industrial warehouse than BJ's or Sam's Club. It's busy crowded and packed in the afternoon. Come in the early morning for a shorter crowd. My visit here on Thursday pre lunch was stress free.
The lesser of two evils, as they keep the xenophobia to a minimum, and they don't suck off the cops like Geno's.

Our waiter informed us they were out of the burrata appetizer when we ordered. We we had a reservation just after 6 p.m. on a Saturday. I couldn't believe they were already out of the cheese appetizer option. The food was mediocre. The atmosphere is great and the service was good.

This place is a joke! They do not accommodate any order, like adding or taking anything off a sandwich. They have a take it or leave it attitude! Reno has too many options to accept this from any establishment! Prices are ridiculous! Owner very rude also!

An hour and a half wait for delivery is just ridiculous. Honestly, I am still waiting for my order and if it doesn't arrive in the next 10 minutes I am cancelling. It's hit or miss anymore with these guys. I knew I should have just went and ordered Franconis.

This is the only place I will buy black coffee. I love Chick-fil-A's coffee. I like the mini chicken biscuits too. And I used to love there mac and cheese but after tasting a competitors mac and cheese Chick-fil-A is second runner-up. I wish their hash browns came in a larger size.
This my favorite place to eat in the mall , nobody have an Hawaiian Club that taste this good . Thank Y'all !
This place was the best We ate a ton The waiter was funny The food was to die for We got the huge platter that had it all
Great pizza. I like the fact they do not drown it in pizza sauce . They have a great variety of pizza . I choose to get mines well done. The Greek salad was very good as well.
Excellent mussels, great crab cakes and a nice relaxing patio with a waterfall trickling down. Yuengling as well.

The music is great, however I have noticed a decrease in the quality of drinks. I have been going to Bru the past few years and my most recent experience has led me to probably to never go to the bar again, due to a lack of quality drinks and red bartenders.
Came in for my lunch break from work ordered a burger and french fries fast service they were very friendly order with me to perfection got me out of the nick of time to make it back.
Sunday lunch buffet for 2 was $23! Food was excellent, clean, good service! The curried goat, chicken tika masala, were our favorites! Can't wait to go back!
I didn't think this place was good at all. The quality of the fish didn't seem sushi grade since it was rubbery
Good location. The average food and average customer service. Went for bruch during busy time but didn't have to wait too long.
This Kroger is in need of major updates. Good for a stop on the way home but for full shopping needs I go to the Kroger on Southport Rd.
Food was ok. Beer was kind of flat. After noon sun heated the place up but they didn't seem to care at 6 p it was pretty warm.

This is a very underwhelming restaurant with pretty mediocre food. I came here for an anniversary meal and the service was pretty good. However, the sad part is that the best tasting course we had was the sangria and plantain chips. We had the ceviche appetizer, a seafood special, and flan for dessert. The flavors are mild and nothing special.

The parts representative was lazy and rude on the phone. Eventually gave me the info I was searching for .Then just hung up the phone. Never caught his name because he never said it. In need of serious customer service training

Went to o2 last night with girls, okay place not too impressed. Food came very late but was tasty. I would definitely go back to try again, last night either I was too hungry or they were out for lunch. I just wanted to eat quick and leave. My girlfriends love the place not sure why. It's close to m

Stayed for 4 nights. Our room was a little small but that was expected and we didn't really have much of a view. The location is awesome you're right next to everything. Only cons are no free breakfast but they don't have a kitchen. It's a nice place to stay I would stay again.

Save your money. Basically an overpriced Wendy's. This place is overrated and just not that good. If you are looking for a good burger in Nashville avoid this place and the Pharmacy and instead head over to Gabby's!
Got my oil changed here. There was too much upselling, and my oil light indicator came on 1500 miles before my next oil change was due. After a quick check my oil was burnt and thin.

Food is very mediocre for diner food. With very limited competition for diners in the area I can see why they stay open. Coffee was hot but tasted burnt. Eggs were under cooked. Pancakes were tasteless and hard. Breakfast is hard to mess up but this place needs some work.
interesting place pizza was good but dinners were small and contained a lot of garnish especially the shrimp scampi. it is very loud inside.
The prices are great the regular pedi is like a mini spa pedi. I was not happy with my gel mani it only lasted 2 days. I should have gone back to complain but didn't have the time.
Ambiance is great, drinks are amazing, food tasted good! Do wish menu had more items on it. Service was very very slow pace.

I had the best omelet I've ever eaten this morning. Our service was slow and our waitress hates her job but the food was good. *Don't order a water with no lemon. She will bite your head off saying we don't give lemons without you ordering them.
Servers confirmed my suspicion that this owner is the type of person that was very glad to not have to pay St. Louis' minimum wage of $10/hr anymore.

Don't be deceived by the long lines outside. Unfortunately, we live in an age where the opportunity for a cute pic on social media trumps the quality of food. Overpriced, and I had a better breakfast sandwich at Denny's.

It was OK, not great, not awful. I had the shrimp PoBoy, and maybe that was where I went wrong. I was looking for something lighter than the traditional Roast Beef. I should have gone with the Roast beef.

Hmmm saw the reviews and decided to give it a try. Love the inside of the place. Service was good. Food just wasn't imo. Maybe I got the wrong things. Got the queso. Just wasn't a fan of their take on it. I usually can't stop when I start eating. Took 3 bites and passed. Had the ahi tuna tacos, just have had better.
The place looks cute, but the service and band were awful. We didn't stick around long enough to try the food.

Came on a Monday night (crab special), they were out of crab. So I decided to get oysters, none available as well. Went with the admirals special and it was delicious. Food was good, staff was friendly, and they have a really nice bar and cool fish tank! Just can't believe they didn't have crab on a crab special night.
Excellent place. The owner Salvatore is wonderful to work with I've had several parties there including showers always very accommodating and easy to work with along with serving excellent food!

One of these opened not too far from much home, but apparently it takes me traveling hours away to stop and try it. A great little place! Clean shop. Friendly and knowledgeable staff. Lots of plant based healthy options. Only reason for 4 stars instead of 5 is the price. $9 for a smoothie is pretty steep.

I love coming here! I'm new to the state and needed a new salon and scheduled an appointment. I scheduled with Catherine and she gave me a beautiful trim. Nice and clean salon and friendly staff! My new go-to hair salon. Definitely recommend!
Service was amazing, food was outstanding and much better than expected from a sports bar.
Ordered two medium cappuccinos dry, received very weak espresso with a lot of milk. At $4.55 a cup, more than a warm cup of milk with little coffee would be nice.
Food and service was amazing! I order the edamame and tempura veggie roll with spicy mayo. The mayo had kick which I loved, most aren't spicy. Def will be back on my visit to St. Louis.

Wow! Amazing We had the coconut shrimp Appetizer - I had the eggplant tofu basil dish, my husband had the garlic chicken and it was wonderful! Great dog friendly patio - thank you for that!! We had a wonderful dinner! Highly recommend!

I went to this place the other day as I had not been in a long time, and now I remember why. They attempt to keep things in small batches but because it is not that busy it sits. Everything is fried or in a heavy sauce. Not for the calorie counters.
The people working there are rude, and you can tell they don't want to work there. I find it easier to go to the dunkin by the turn pike. That one is ran much nicer.
I will never go back here... very dissatisfied and a lot of money down the drain The Botox did not even last a month so I agree with other clients that it's watered down and not worth the money

Stopped in tonight for dinner while in town at a conference. Ordered the cheese breadsticks, which were really good and had fresh basil on top. Ordered the pizza with pepperoni, jalepenos, and pineapple and it was meh. Service was a bit slow, and it looked like there was only one server for several tables.

Service was ok, not very friendly at least not our server. Speed was good. BBQ sauce was watery and your sandwich basically comes dripping not my idea of good BBQ. Meat was ok. Also came with pickle slices which we don't like and no mention of it from waitress or on menu. Fries were good and cheese muffins were excellent.
I used MP a while back & I was very pleased with the finished work! My jeepie has never looked so good.
Staff were extremely rude. A man who identified himself as Kenny was very rude to our friends and made us feel very unwelcome. We will not come again and recommend people go to other bars.

We went to his place for father's day. Our waitress was quick to greet us and wish me a happy father's day. The food was a little slow to arrive, but otherwise quite tasty. My son was not a fan, but what 11 year old would be.

Bad customer service... get to the hotel at 11am and are promised a hotel room....get the callback 4 hours later room is ready to find out they forgot we checked in and get a crappy room off in the distance.

Come with an appetite. Portions are very large. I ordered the cinnamon roll french toast it's in the etceteras column. It should have a heading all its own. Manager came by and said it's his favorite and that they put fresh squeezed OJ into their batter! It's so good

A great place to get a straight razor shave, a hair cut and they will even give you a beer ! The staff is super friendly and the shop is always spotless. I recommend an appointment but they do also take walk ins as well. Take my word for it you will not be disappointed!
Schnucks had their "ice cream social" advertised today. It consisted of a girl at a booth playing on her phone with two melted Dixie cups with one bite in each of ice cream. WOW
While the airport is clean and staff is friendly, for a town that has some of the best food in the world, the airport food is awful. There is little choice and very low quality.

I've been there twice now. Both times had lousy service. Waited an hour to receive our food. One guest left because he had to take care of something and couldn't wait any longer. When we did get our food, it tasted burned. I couldn't finish. The drinks were worth it, but I'll never order food there again.

Here for 1/2 priced sushi and a little girl talk...it's not bad and the 1/2 price sushi made it better...the rolls were thin and not as meaty...I would come back for 1/2 priced but not for regular priced sushi....

7-20 A friend went to pickup our order and she commented that none of the employees were wearing masks or gloves in the drive-thru. Isn't it mandatory in Tucson right now? Sad that McDonald's is flouting the rules.

Philadelphia Intl' gets a bad rap, in my opinion. My experiences here have been generally no worse than many major airports and certainly better than several such as O'Hare. I did not find it filthy as several have stated. I have not experienced excessive waits. I have not run into rude customer service agents. Maybe I have just hit them on good days.
Food was 3.5 stars, service was 1 star. They lost our sushi order, food delivery was slow, waiting to get check was slower and waiting to pay was the slowest
Not a good place to stay when on the road for work. Hotel wireless is abysmal (if you can even get connected). I won't be coming back.

Great food, fast service and the restaurant was clean. Staff very polite and helpful. I have not tried the buffet, I've only ordered take-out, definitely will try the buffet next time! They also accept the Axxess card.
Service was great, escargot and dessert were excellent. Salad poor. Champagne by the glass at $25 was rip off and sneaky.

Ordered at 7:15pm - arrived at 9:00pm I was told there would be a 45 min to 1hr delivery time. I called after waiting 1hr and 15 mins and was told it had just left for delivery. I live 4 blocks from the pizza restaurant.

Another attempt at Mexican food in Edmonton failed. The shrimp tacos are lacking, it seemed like the shrimp were thawed and put on the tortilla with zero flavour. The drinks were delicious and the ambience was enjoyable.

Pretty underwhelming. Got a meatball sub. Meatballs were super hot, so I almost got my tongue burned which is never a fun feeling. The meatballs were kinda bland, but other than that, its a decent place for a somewhat good quick bite during work.
Did Alice in Wonderland theme. 75 minutes instead of the standard 60. Just so well done. Worth driving from 2 hours away if you are that far away. You have to use multiple senses (not taste).
Ordered their special Italian hoagies with spinach and they were awesome.Will definitely go back there again and again
Good food and fast polite service. However, $8.00 for a three piece tender meal is CRAZY!! It's almost 25% higher in price than other Popeyes in the region.

I got the Reuben sandwich and couldn't stop eating it. It was so good. I was there with two non-vegetarians who don't know a lot about vegan food and they both loved their lunch too. Also got a cookie for later which was delicious. I'm excited to go back.

It was just ok this time. 3 of 4 had the signature burger and they were happy. I had the chicken fried chicken and it was tasty. The turnip greens, not so much. They had too much of whatever meat they used and they were kind of cold as was the mac and cheese. Service was just ok.
Super fresh and super tasty hoagies! Totally hit the spot after a day full of walking and exploring Philadelphia.

Dined in the main room as well as drank in the basement. I prefer Reilly's as a bar than restaurant -- bartenders are attentive and drink selection is adequate. The bar will appeal to all tastes/wallets, from Coors and whiskey for $5 to 'craft' cocktails (that probably take too long to make when it's busy) for $12.
Great little Thai place on the West Bank. My wife and I come here often for lunch. Quick service and very reasonable prices.
6$ cheap booze shots in plastic cups. No glass of course. Bad attitude service. Dirty, old, smelly. Deep bottom if dive bars. Not recommended. Suggest to avoid.
Great for bringing the dog along! Food was decent. Service was a bit slow considering there was like NO one there. Mediocre x3
Disappointing! Food and service. Limited menu and the staff needs a refresher in basics.
Meh.....with all these great reviews and location of the place, I was expecting a lot more flavor. Food was ok. At least I can say I tried it. Definitely my first and last time eating here.
I understand Covid , but no coffee in rooms, no food in building . It's a joke. Feels like pure cost savings

This place is nice for happy hour . They make a good drink. The food is average , better then the last 2 owners. The staff always seems confused. Often one person is really doing most of the work and the others look confused. Probably a training issue.

Cars are disgusting and always have trash in them and smell like smoke. When you have an issue that's their fault they require you to resolve it and then submit for reimbursement. Worst customer service and they don't do anything to try and make your experience a better one. Business accounts are a joke. I assume personal accounts are just as bad.
I had lunch with a friend. The food and service were excellent. If you like Ethiopian food you owe it to yourself to try this.

Food is always pretty fresh. My biggest pet peeve are the prices. Ever since they went with the club Savor where you get 50% off, people who do not have the club Savor, the prices have gone up considerably. Get rid of Club Savor and bring your prices back down to normal.
TOO SLOOOOOOOOOOOW. We ordered at 6:30 pm but the food did not come up when it was 7:10！
I have always curious about this place since I had seen it in Vegas.Pretty casual inexpensive place to go with family & friends.They open at 5:30 am.The food taste are good.The service are okay.

We each enjoyed a flight( 4 5oz pours @ $10 ea) if our favorite style plus a guest cider. The atmosphere is nothing much. A very small room with some music playing. No food offering except some cookies in a jar. Not a bad stop on a brewery tour up college ave.
I was pretty disappointed by their offering only one type of pre-made juice blend, but it turned out to be delicious. I just wish it was more of an actual juice bar.

Staff was great! Super friendly super attentive. Especially to our large party. The reason I say two stars is the food was very underwhelming. I ordered skirt steak. And for the price there were only three small slices of steak which was not pleasing. I would visit again for the bar and the atmosphere. Not to sit and eat.
Worst fish and chips I have EVER had. The fish was flat with as much outside coating as there was fish. It was dry and flavorless. Do not order this dish!!!
It's a small restaurant so the line outside is to be expected. We waited about 30 minutes to get in. The food is simple and good. Price is average for the area. The walls covered with local art.

Unscrupulous salespeople. Harold is a sneaky snake who doesn't tell you he's adding their extended warranty and charges you for it anyway. Delivery window was a joke. Quality is no better than Ikea but costs as much if not more. Unsure how they're still in business.
Food is mediocre and service is equally unremarkable. Keep walking by this place.
Service was good. Food was awful. If you like hard prefrozen desserts and overly cooked beef sliders. This would be the place.
I crave Fazoli's every so often and I'm never disappointed! Skip the drive-through if you have time and dine inside. Why? Because they bring around free bread sticks right to your table! Yum!
Cool old-timey feel in this restaurant which has a plethora/variety of chicken salads. Reasonably priced and well worth it.

Delicious drinks and pretty interior! Close from the Jefferson station! One thing I disliked was the waiting time to take the order and to make the drinks. WAY TO SLOW. And there were plenty of employees behind the counter. Also, there was a bunch of young Chinese teenagers, way to hype and "too cool" HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAH

We love this place. It's not about one person taking care of you. The entire staff takes care of you. The food is great. Definitely try the croissant French toast with cinnamon and powdered sugar. Thanks to the entire staff for their ensuring our experience was the best!
overrated! sushi is just okay, nothing surprise.. and small portions too. With this price range, I can have something better near the city.

Truly the worst cup of boba I have ever had. The boba was hard and they all stuck together so nothing was coming up the straw. When I walked in the employee working did not even greet me and just continued to sweep the floors. I stood at the register for a while without even being asked if I need anything.

Food is generally OK but it's very pricey. It's nice they have some gluten-free options however some of the items on the menu are a little heavy. Last week I had the stirfry and the sauce was so sick I could barely eat it. Practice is decent anytime you go there.

I tried Wang Gang three times and I only enjoyed the food once. I just don't like that when I order something it's not what I thought it was. The food is just ok, not great. I won't go back. They made their low mein with Egg noodles not good. The orange chicken is not good.

One month after opening, the service remains gracious, but the quality of food appears to be inconsistent, with a recent mid-afternoon visit seeing me get cold chicken from a tub reheated on the griddle. It just wasn't the same. When prices are high, you should avoid doing stuff like that. I won't be in a hurry to return.

Loved the food. I had Chile Colorado that about melted my fillings. My wife had Pollo Azteca , sort of like chicken fajitas covered with queso. Service was fast and friendly. I'm not a foodie who can vouch for how authentic any Mexican food is but I know what I like and I liked El Ray Azteca!
Great spot! Chicken was nice and seasoned too. Perfect for a quick bite , you won't be dissappointed
Slow to give bread. Seems like they are constantly out of prime rib early in the evening. Would not rush back for overcooked steak.

Peel has a nice atmosphere, great food and great service at the Edwardsville location. I would definitely recommend the Proscuitto Involtini. Yum! I give the bad rating because of the carry-out policy. That is, they don't do carry-out. When you call and ask, you're met with a, "Sit at the bar and order at least ONE drink, then place an order." Really?!
Really not impressed. Waited 45 minutes to get my order to receive dry ribs. No moisture. Best thing on my plate was the beaked beans. Wish it was much better.

Went here for lunch my niece and I the place has a mildew smell . I guess because it's very old. This place is in a great location but needs to be updated. The food was just okay not worth going back twice. The waitress and hostess were very nice. I didn't take any pictures of the food it just wasn't worth it..
I enjoyed the food from Big Ed's Alley Inn. It was not breathtaking, but above average with good flavor.

Would give this 0 stars if I could. Taking 2 hours for a meal and I'm still waiting for food. It's honestly terrible and I wouldn't not recommend coming here if you have more than one person to feed. The food isn't good and was cooked like shit. Please don't come here if you like food.

Horrible evil owner !!! Our 5 year old needed to go to the bathroom, and said we had to pay $0.25. !!! What a horrible person!! Shame on you!! You are a bad evil man ! Avoid this place like the plague!!
Go here for dinner NOT Lunch. Dinner is really good and service was good. Lunch was the exact opposite. Steaks were cooked perfectly and the saladbar was pretty extensive. Try the snapper soup.
We had Pappardelle Alfredo and Lasagna. Both fab. I asked for extra garlic in my Alfredo. It's well worth a trip here.

If I could give zero stars I would. Food was terrible, service was terrible, not only do the servers know nothing about the menu they were also out of 2 of the 4 things we ordered...at 615pm.... on a Saturday?!

Second time I've gone there on my lunch break at 4 pm and the pizza is so gross. Only because you can tell it's been sitting for a while. Very dry. Really bummed out. Thought I might give it another try. I think I'll stick to peter piper pizza directly next door my my work. At least it's not dry and tastes like cardboard
The food is god awful. I spent $72 on wings, seafood mac n cheese and yams only for it to be pure garbage. Never again.

Parisian Style with Incredible gluten free yummy cakes!! It's a Heaven on Earth and tres Chic ambiance. Loved everything here, cappuccino, berry chocolate cake, lemonade.....it's not only delicious is also pretty.

ok, so i should have eaten here but didn't...so my loss...but they did have a decent pour of jameson w a water back that i enjoyed for a few minutes prior to my flight!! will need to check out their food on my next trip to the right coast!!
I rated them high for the tofu sandwich and grits. Negative 1 star because there was no AC! But any place serving vegetarian options in this town should be supported!
they were a bit messy and i had to pay extra for multiple colors, the matte top, and the shape, would not recommend.
wow what total twats, most miserable group of people ive ever had the displeasure of encountering. employees are complete @$$holes!

Bring a calculator you will need it, they have a very confusing pricing system. The older the date on the tag the more of a percentage is taken off. It is really annoying trying to figure out what the prices are on each item. There are some good buys in the store but not much.
Great place to watch NFL football. Would love to see more beer specials but overall a great atmosphere. And, the wings are pretty good.
