Just okay. If you need a place to come and get a fancy cocktail then this is your place. Do not expect great service, but if you are coming in for one drink and then moving on this would be a good place to start.
We decided to mix it up from RedCrest. I didn't know that I'd be dining from the Acme frozen food aisle. If I wanted what the Sysco truck was offering I would have called them. The wings were ok.
The best sushi in Tucson. Very fresh food. Great service. Wonderful atmosphere. The lady even insisted that we get dessert so she have us free ice cream.
My favorite grocery shopping place in Philly. Everything is always fresh. Employees are very professional. Love their bakery products. And prices are good for what you get.

I was surprised by the options there's quite a bit. The passion fruit tea with apple boba is really good and for a large it's $3.50, a small is $3.00. I highly recommend this place the banana milk tea is also really good.
IT was decent Nice wings and the girl was Nice and if I had to choose i whould do it agian

Rustic French furnishings with a glorious atrium for dining. I went there for lunch and had the escargot appetizer and the potato leek soup. Both were good enough to rub in my hair. (That's a mighty GOOD thing.)
Awesome spring rolls, my pho was pretty good too, gave three stars because I got food poisoning from the beef afterwards but hey can't complain too much

Been to several other Great Clips and this one was the most rushed. It might have been the stylist - I forgot her name - Matilda or Mality... something like that but I sensed that she was eager to get rid of me even though there was nobody waiting.

This walmart can get the job done (if they have what you're looking for in stock).. A lot of things are scattered all about and a lot of things are out of stock. They're also only opened until 11 which is really inconvenient. If you need something specific and you know somewhere else has it, I'd suggest you go there.
Roast Beef Poboy or bust... its all about the bread and how many napkins you use. i used plenty of napkins and the bread was delicious

Their margaritas are premade and stored in a large bucket that sits OPEN in the sink behind the bar. We only saw this after we ordered. Margarita was very sour and did not taste fresh. Did not order any food after seeing that. Bar was very dirty as well.

Came here for restaurant week, my wife and I got the mussels, crostini, and filets. The service was excellent and the restaurant had a nice atmosphere. The food was mediocre, not bad but not great. The drinks were a little watered down and expensive.
I love Ethiopian food from around the US but this is my favorite spot. The vegetarian combo platter is amazing and the owners always make me feel like family
Food was ok. However, drinks were fantastic! We would definitely come here again when we're craving lobster rolls... The experience wasn't mind blowing, like Sidney Street Cafe.
I think Main Street Burger has the BEST burgers!! They are perfectly seasoned and compliment the toppings well. I would definitely recommend!

Really small greek platter for 9.99. The greek salad is a much better choice. The dining room staff was very attentive while extremely busy. What gets me is the manager (shaved head, shirt, tie and jacket). Sits at counter. He doesn't lend a needed hand to any of his employees. Get off your bum and help out.
The food here was lukewarm. It's super busy . I wouldn't come back I like piping hot food where it's burning my mouth

Good drinks. Good people. The back area where you can smoke is very cute. However, I'm not a smoker so it was a work in progress. The inside area vibe is very dive bar like. The vibe from inside to outside is drastically different. This was our first stop for drinks post dinner.

Delicious garlic Parmesan boneless wings! These are not your run of the mill processed boneless wings. Instead, Big Daddy's hand breads these succulent babies! Pair those with an ice cold beer, the cardinals game (with volume) and a delightful bartender and you have yourself a magical little evening.

Great place to chill with a group of peeps or a few drinks with a date. Didn't think it was all that great. Some of the food is way too salty. Some of the bartenders aren't too personable if you ask me.
Stepping inside Reading Terminal is like stepping into another world. Its so cool, with such a variety of shops and restaurants, and everything is uniquely amazing. I cant get enough of this place!
There is no hot water for pedicure service. It says a lot about what they offer. If you would like to get a decent service, don't come to this place.

A wonderful experience!! My niece is Vegan and ensuring she has a wonderful dining experience is extremely important to me. Carmo offers an extensive menu for all diners. The atmosphere is light, airy and comfortable. You will always find an amazing dish.
I hadn't heard of this restaurant until two weeks ago. Since then I'd heard of it 3 times. So, I had to check it out. So glad I did. Not what I expected...even better.
Food is not beyond belief but edible. Cocktails -Comme ci comme ça. But awesome location and view! Right on the beach! Live music

After enjoying Esau's for years in Santa Barbara and mourning their closing I finally rediscovered this breakfast gem in Carpinteria a few years ago. Bring your appetite here and enjoy their monster plates of omelettes, scrambles and pancakes. Old fashioned hash browns and fresh ingredients make this a memorable spot. The waitresses are great and the bloody marys spicy!

Worst pad Thai we ever had. There wasn't really a strong flavor or sauce, just noodles and chicken and broccoli. There was also tofu in it which we hadn't requested, which we thought was strange. The Panang curry was soupy and the peppers still had their seeds in them. we wonder if the normal cook was out.
I gave 3 stars just for speed of service.. The food is always cold, 5 out of 6 times it's a guarantee. Not much to choose from near my work, if there was I would for sure stop going here.

This place is even nicer now street the massive remodel. Gone are the enclosed bars on tthe ends. They have been replaced by much more open bar areas that are much more inviting. They javr also embraced the craft beer movement as they now have 30 drafts (you old-timers need not worry as they still have the macrobeers on tap)
Armando is the best in customer service! He was amazing. He was on his lunch, but took the time to look at our car and help us! What a gem!

you people can stop e mailing me after reading all the reviews i don't think i would want to live at your place at all. sounds like the place belongs in the hood. so take me off your list, i'll be looking else wear. not one review was good something is very wrong!!!!!

I very rarely leave reviews, but I had a cold brew with oat milk. They need to check the expiration date on their oat milk and cold brew because wow it was awful. Took two sips and threw it away. Really weird sour taste.

Disgusting. Do not stay at this hotel! Unfortunately we did not read reviews before we booked. Our room was filthy and had bed bugs! This was noted on a review 3 weeks before we stayed there, so they had to have been aware this was an ongoing problem. Our floor was supposed to be a non-smoking floor, but clearly was not. Very rude staff.
Was brought here on a culinary tour of New Orleans and tried a brisket po boy. Loved it! So filling and tasty.
Didn't realize this was part of a chain when I went there. The sandwich was ok, the slaw was really limp.
Good for most special needs kids, but did not work out for us. Seemed insensitive to our situation.

Kittens are adorable and the folks who work there love their jobs. Who wouldn't? Only downside is when some people selfishly monopolize the cats and it's sometimes frustrating. Nevertheless even just watching them is a treat and it's for a good cause benefiting the rescue agency giving them a safe place to be until they can get their forever homes.

The food is good but not great, which is hard when you're surrounded by great restaurants on Passyunk Ave. I have never had a bad meal but I always leave disappointed as I have high expectations of their pizza. Good beer list, South Philly vibe. A good place to watch a game or have a beer.

This places gave my roomate and I diarrhea for days : ( , my food wasn't bad but I like real Chinese food better. Plus it's too over priced. Sorry, not a fan, I even tried to give it a second chance and got sick again. Silly me.
I returned later that day bc the wash didn't clean my truck successfully. They allowed me through again without hesitation.
Wonderful old-school barber shop with friendly barbers. I've been going here for years and will continue to do so.

We stopped in to this place on a whim as we were passing thru the area. Tastefully decorated interior presenting a cozy, quaint, and cultural feel. Excellent 5 star service, the waitress couldn't have done better. Perfectly perportioned dishes, that were well seasoned. Spice level was right on the ball. I would happily repeat.

you will never want another honda if you have to take your car here for service. This place is a nightmare. if you read other sites for information the people here saying how great they are clearly have been paid off. HORRID. buy a toyota.
Such amazing Oyster Po Boys! So good and such a landmark in one of my favorite cities! Delicious crab cakes. :)
Solid happy hour prices. All the sliders are delicious the rest is frozen food basically reheated. The service is atrocious and I will never be back because of it.
Very mediocre food. Spent 28 dollars and my veal Parmesan was soggy and the spaghetti was mushy. The lasagna is ok but overall not worth the money.

Today Wednesday April the 22 th 2020 . At 4:17 pm . The guy that works here . Has the worst attitude ever ! Very rude , very unprofessional . He is almost telling people : I am so miserable , don't come back here !!
I ordered a meal, and It said it would be here around 1:26, then it finally got here at 3:10. Kinda of cold too.
Giordano's of Chicago's is always 5 stars and one of my favorites. Had it in ORLANDO as well and it was 4 stars. Indy 2 stars at best. Maybe we caught them on a bad day.
Some of the best food I've had so far! Grilled shrimp Poboys was fantastic. Best red beans and rice so far. Only downside is the bathroom is absolutely terrifying.
Good place to watch sports. Beer and drinks are always good (especially the mule) and food is great. Always crowded so plan on waiting for a big game or busy weekend.

NY Style Pizza?! That's a laugh! Unlike most of the other reviews, my pizza came relatively fast, but it really is NOTHING AT ALL like NY pizza. If you have to eat late this is an option, but make sure your expectations are frozen pizza style NOT NY pizza.
Mediocre buffet food with an above average hibachi grill. Stick to the Asian fare and the hibachi grill and you will be ok. Don't bother with the American food options.

IMPORTANT!!! My friend and I went to try jimmys sushi the other day for lunch, but they are only open TUESDAY and FRIDAY for lunch. So we want back for dinner... and it was great! But just incase anyone is lookin for lunch on a mon, wed, or thurs... go somewhere else
Friendly service and great pizza! Definitely a place to return to when I'm in town! Plus the decor is super cool!

Horrible customer service. The people on the phone did not want to offer any information regarding their prosperities and acted as if calling them was an inconvenience. Loved the property but will be staying away from this management company
This was my first time staying at the Bay Palms. I was very satisfied with the room and the staff. Will definitely stay there again.

NOPE. Indistinguishable in texture and flavor from the freezer-burned ice cream at the grocery store, except this stuff is $7 +tip for half a pint. Total waste of money and time. Professional staff and clean space, but there are so many better places for ice cream in Philly.

A good bowl of ramen on a cool evening is perfect! Add some spice, just enough to get your nose running and you know you're going to hime with a smile on your face a nice warmth all over. I wish they offered the pork diced, not just sliced. Plus my wife prefers vegetarian option and that's a bit limited to only 1 bowl.
I will never recommend Lyft to anyone, I waited at the end of my driveway for 1 hour.They sent me a message that said they're going to charged me 5$,.Needless to say he never showed up.

This place is so cool! First of all I hate queso on nachos. But their queso is extraordinary! Omg so good. Also, they have the computer game at the bar, plus board games too! I could hang here for hours. Very laid back place.

I just ordered from Cin Cin and the food was absolutely disgusting. Extremely dry and was not what I expected it to taste like. I will never EVER order from them again. So disappointed in them. Next time I will be ordering from Yu Hsiang Gardens. I should have ordered from them in the first place. Lesson learned.

We are return guests and have never been disappointed! Our server was new to La Strada but was excellent. Food always excellent, their speciality Mushroom ravioli is worth the trip in itself, to die for. We both had the Organge Roughy and it melted in your mouth. Greeted by manager, Michael who immediately makes you feel like an old friend!

The owner took my order and was very welcoming. We actually chatted for quite some time:-) I had the Tandoori Mixed Grill, Saag Paneer, naan, and Mango Lassi. Everything was FANTASTIC! Totally worth the short wait. I will be back to try some of their other items.
Our family loves this place! Their pizza is AMAZING and nothing comes even close. It is a bit more on the pricy side but that's ok, because it tastes that good!

The chicken is good but unfortunately not great! The sides do not taste homemade. Different strokes for different folks. It was not terrible it was OK. If you decide to go here please be reminded its a cash only place. My family only had the chicken

The place looks a little daunting from the outside. But after walking I'm the walking in, we were greeted pretty fast. Our waitress was nice and attentive. The food was really good! I would definitely eat here again.

Forgot the drinks so waited a while. Then forgot the portion of the food so waited again. And wasn't good. Mediocre food. We got white mussels. French soup and wings. Nothing was done to accommodate the issues. Was hoping to be new local hang but def not coming back
Great poboys! Definitely recommend anyone to come here if they are visiting NOLA. A little on the dirtier side, but can't expect much from a restaurant out in this district.
Grease is not a seasoning. Season your meat, PLEASE. Very bland. Service was eh. Such an attitude about everything. No water, other than bottles? Hate that. Condiments and such are alright.
Great customer service. Very happy with my sandals they truly recommend what you need and don't try to over sell everything

The IPA has a very nice front-end twang. I would give it four stars. The smoked Chicken club, however, came on bread that was slightly stale and had too little chicken. I would give the sandwich one star. I don't think I'd come back here for lunch, but maybe I'd give it another chance for drinks and appetizers...

First time here w my conference group of 30+ people. They accomodated us in a large side room w good views outside. All meals ordered were excellent. Our server 'Maci' did a great job of meeting or dining needs! Look fwd to coming back.

This place is like a roller coaster. .. dirty spoons, forgotten order, no I'm sorry..shouting caaapuucino instead of bringing it to the table after waiting like a fool... was $2 tip on $12 bill too little? I don't know but it will only get smaller next time, if there will be a next time. .. I guess it is time for another reboot...
Generous portions. Food is always good-breakfast and lunch. The downside- usually crowded and loud. A bit over priced
Every time I visit New Orleans, I absolutely must have breakfast at Surrey's. The shrimp and grits are so good I have dreams about them.

Food was just ok. Waitress was very friendly just a little slow. Will likely not try again. Price was good but compared to "who dats " that has southern food also there's no comparison. I will likely not eat again.
Great place, great food. Not much parking - figure on the street somewhere. Always busy. Would recommend.
These guys were fair and kind and even showed me what was wrong with my car before fixing it. I recommend this shop to everyone

comedian was....... whatever it was free. two item minimum. waitress tried to play me i ask for a water with my two food items and she was like trying to push me to buy a bottled water... I'm like tap honey... tap will work just fine.
Terrible people. They do horrible work then don't honor their warranty on anything. Don't expect a phone call or email or any amount of courtesy from anyone on staff.
With so many similar dining/drinking choices in the area, I'll pass this by just because the parking here is so ridiculous.
Tried to get a seat I could see a lot seats open said the did not have the staff to service

Unfortunately, this place has gotten so popular that the quality of work has diminished. The wait is so long that I don't understand why they don't have 2 working. Go upstairs to the other lady if you have to wait
I had the arepas with cheese, and accompanying chimi churri style salad, made with red onions and cabbage. Muy Bueno! I have not tried there Cuban yet. But I will when I come back.

Disappointing. This used to be epic but weather it is new ownership or just a change of recipes for economic reasons nothing is as good as it used to be. In the past it was worth the drive and higher priced items but not anymore.
These guys are cheat. They don't know how to treat customers. Avoid going there if you don't want to spoil your afternoon/evening.

I know I shouldn't be this excited, but I eat here again and again and so far so good. Must haves: House special Chow fun, Spareribs, Hot and Sour Soup, and anything in Garlic Sauce Avoid: Egg drop soup, dumplings Quick delivery too!

I really liked coming here and the owner, Kenny is super sweet. Last time I was in however, I noticed the techs weren't using clean/sanitized utensils. The tech I went yo went straight from to the next person. Breaks my hesrt because I love the chairs, people and the drinks they offer.
It's been a while since I've been here but the pizza is average. I do like to eat in here as it has a cozy "local" feel and they have a variety of beers.

Beef ribs were undercooked with unmelted cartilage and tendons. Couldn't eat 'em. Pork ribs not much better. Not meaty, overly spicy rub. Four sauces were ho hum. There's much better barbecue to be had around town.

Great dining experience and atmosphere the spicy complimentary red potatoes were tasty. I orded the 1/2 seafood platter and this baby was Huge. Tons of food for the money the average couple can share this meal S/N my wife and I are not average.:) My only complaint is the fish and shrimp were slightly bland but the tarter sauce was great.

I had Michael work on my 1988 Volvo 240 DL. It's hard to find someone who know's how to work on these cars but Michael has been working on them since the 80'. I would highly recommend anyone who needs their old Volvo worked on to go to Michaels. He was recommended to me by the Revolve Store, just down the street.

Excellent food. Simple pizza parlor style menu with awesome alternatives to the Italian pie! Great mellow ambiance, super cool indie music on the speakers and super adequate service. The flatbread appetizers were amazing, and perfectly proportioned and the salads were gigantic! Great beer options as well! I will definitely be coming back again!

This is the first establishment I've been to in a post pandemic world where the employees were not even attempting to wear a mask; not around the chin or not covering the nose, just nowhere in sight. Not even a plastic divider between the customer and the 2 employees mouths. Great smoothies though.

What's not to like? It's a malt shop. They have ice cream. Of course it's good. It is local and probably family owned. There are lots of suggested sundaes listed on a menu. Service is fast. There are only outside tables.
This location is not closed. I just called to verify, they did remodel. But are opened again for business!
Right across from the mall, but it's a pain in the ass to try and cross Wetmore.

It was pretty disappointing after all the 5 star reviews and beautiful pictures. We drove 20 minutes to try the lemon chocolate cake and it was a quarter of the size of the Yelp photo. The cafe is beautiful but this visit left me disappointed and dissatisfied.
It's Walmart. What do you expect? Busy on weekends, ok on weekdays. People walking around like zombies. The usual.

The chicken and waffles were phenomenal. I would recommend getting the gravy separate to keep your waffles from getting soggy. Loved the spicy syrup. I would definitely recommend this place. The other people at my table had omelets and a salmon spinach salad. They were also delicious.

Fantastic bar, serving excellent vegetarian fare. Every drink I've gotten here has been stellar, and there is a neighborhood feel to it as well. I've gone to a couple of local events too, including a philadelphia film festival event in which there was Q&A and movie recommendations, and you got to speak to some of the volunteers. A gem of an institution in Philly.
I wanted to like this place. The atmosphere is nice. But my stir fry was way too salty. Couldn't take the dish for all of the soy sauce.

I dont even know what this place was thinking when they started it! The ingredients for the burritos is crazy?!?! Im not a fan. When the guy made my burrito he ripped the tortilla 3 times before he had to DOUBLE RAP my burrito... It was quite nasty. NOT A FAN
This place was Amazing! Had dinner with a girlfriend here the other night. I had the melt in your mouth sea bass. Excellent!
This is my favorite restaurant in the city. The food is always perfect, the patio is awesome on a nice night and the cocktails rocktails. It can only be rivaled, never beaten.

Try the enchiladas for breakfast...delicious ! The sauce is a perfect blend of spicy & smoky. My husband and I keep trying different things on menu & so far we haven't been disappointed. It does get busy & packed so be prepared. Service & food is excellent so worth the wait. Once you order the food does arrive promptly
The staff is so friendly. The coffee always fresh. The staff are a little quirky, cute, and funny.

Tried this place on a busy day, so maybe a slower time is better. Waited 48 minutes for food and it was just friend shrimp and fries. Overpriced and isn't a place that I would recommend to other tourists in the area.

Great food. It's labeled as a bakery, and they can do fancy cakes, and have a good selection of other items, including the best Napoleons in Tampa. They also have a savory food area, with great sandwiches, takeaway items, and a superb Smoked Gouda Mac n Cheese.

Well, after months of the change for Ubers/Lyft, it is worse in that area. Traffic backed up and shuttles have to wait excessively due to that traffic. At times, when no security in that area, the drivers won't stop for walking across. No and loss of control.

When in the other day after I had unsuccessfully tried to get in with Ricco's for a few days. Didn't have to wait and the guys were really friendly. Got a nice fade from Chuck, he definitely put some work into it. Standard Port Richmond price and a benevolent atmosphere. I'll be going back.

This place is inconsiderate of customers and will tell customers that the wait time is 5 hours. DO NOT WASTE your time going to this restaurant as they don't indicate on their website that they can only sit 4 customers. Not a good restaurant to go to.

I loved the burger here but they increased their prices on everything! The burger I want is $16 bucks. Tried the philly cheesesteak with an egg on it. It was good but not that good. I'll go to other places nearby and get the same great food. Always have long breakfast lines too. Wish it was more affordable, then I would go more often.

Just don't get all the hype about this place. The decor is cute, but the noise level inside is insane. We sat outside and it was nice. The pizza (gf crust Buffalo Chicken) was just so so. Barely any topping and charged a fortune for a mediocre gf crust. So many better options for pizza in STL.

Metro Diner was not what it was cracked up to be. I was excited to have another breakfast diner in the area, but was disappointed with the service and the food cost for quality. The service was slow and the waitress couldn't answer most common questions from the menu. I ordered biscuits and sausage gravy and I don't think it was worth over $10.
Great pizza. They always get my order right and done in the time promised. They also have a drive-thur at this location which is nice when you have kids in the car.

A lot of health code violations here. Place is not clean. Workers playing with their hair, touching their cell phones, etc while working in the kitchen. This is my first visit to this location, definitely won't be back. It's best to go to the one in the French Quarter or somewhere else
Had to wait 15+ minutes for a pharmacist to answer the drive-up window along with rude commentary from their assistant.
I had to wait a little longer but I'd rather be safe than sorry . I t takes time to do things right especially in these troubling times

Used to be good, now the Crab Rangoon is always way over cooked, even after repeatedly asking them to not do so. And if you look behind the counter, it's absolutely disgusting. I can not bring my self to eat there any more.

Service was great, food was ok! Mostly just giving the two stars because we got a straw in our water and it was annoying. The East Nashvillians care about our oceans and straws are so unnecessary! Please start serving straws only upon request. Thanks, Burger Up, you rule!

I try going to Scotty's about every 6 months and it's always the same. Bad and slow service. Esp during lunch - wish this place was better. We ordered the most cliche thing on their menu - buffalo wrap and waited 45 mins for cold soggy wraps :(
Another try ...anothe flop....there are few business men in this industry , mostly cooks, some good some bad this place was a winner wayback as the General lafayette and never recovers
This place is great, I love the food and service. There are a lot of meats to choose from and the waitress are aware of all your needs.
A four star Buffet , clean, well lit, restaurant , tonight the seafood delight was wonderful
It's pretty good! My family comes in here a lot, and they always have good customer service! Their breakfast is great too. A nice quaint restaurant in the North End to try out

This place is VERY slick. Kimpton is the king of Boutique Hotels and while my experience was pretty much limited to the valet and lobby the free coffee was a welcome site on a cold Philadelphia morning. Would definitely consider staying there or suggesting it to a friend needing a place to crash.
I love Delta they are never late great perks and points i fly every week and i tell you this amazing customer service makes a difference

I was really disappointed with Maffiozas this past time I went. There was old pizza under our table and my friend got grease on her dress because the table wasn't wiped down. The waiter got my order wrong and the pizza had no sauce. I'm not sure how this place stays in business.
Don't stop here services sucks unprofessional always shorts staff managers never want to helps consumers...zero left for this place

Great place. Easy to locate. We are from out of town and we're looking for a local yummy place. FOUND IT! Fair prices. Service good but not great ( wanted more water but once food served no one came back to our table). Food was GREAT. Will go back this trip I'm sure!

Ordered through an app for pick up during lunch They wanted to charge $3.00 additional to deep fry my roll, I don't care if I was a millionaire I wouldn't pay $3.00 to deep fry any sushi roll that is already $17.00. So for they they have lost a customer and I'm also letting everyone know not to ask to deep fry your roll.

This place is wonderful and Im going back today. Friday night dinner we shared a tender and flavorful chicken marinated in yogurt that was incredible. OUr lamb curry was delightfully flavorful without being too intense, these cooks know what they are doing. Everything was delicious.

I had to book something last minute and Joe the owner was very responsive. He answered all my questions and gave me a quote right away. Moving was quick and easy. They had all the equipments needed including cushions and plastic wrap to protect my furniture. I Would definitely recommend Flex Box and will call them again if I ever move in the future!

The absolute worst experience I've ever had. Served me raw chicken that caused food poisoning so severe I almost wound up in the hospital. I will never eat Chick-fil-A again because of this ordeal nor will I forget the trauma of how sick this location's food made me.

Cozy little pizzeria. Good and friendly service in spite of the busy lunch rush. Ordered a pepperoni pizza which was decent but nothing compared to pizza back home (New York City). Also had cheese fries that had potential to be awesome if it wasn't too salty. I was annoyed at the flies that kept circulating around the food as we ate.

Nice atmosphere, average food. My husband and I went here for a date night and both enjoyed our drinks and appetizer, but were disappointed in our main courses (a burger for him and chicken sandwich for me). I don't think we will be returning.

This restaurant simply does not live up to expectations. The service was o.k, the entertainment cheesy and the food - well below expectations. It's like the entire business needs a revamp - from seating to finish. I would've disappointed if it was moderately priced. But, it's very high priced. My recommendation is to go elsewhere.
It's Applebees. typically decent pub type food service is usually good.

Won't ever go back! They won't honor there online prices. Ordered their online special of 3+ special for 20.99 but they would not honor the special or even discount any of our order. I guess management is always right at that particular store.

Great food, New Orleans smallest portions. Petite filet is only 5oz. A martini is smaller than my 4 year olds tea set. Side portions are smaller than a cocktail napkin. Vet y disappointing based on the price point. Never had such small quantities of food

Came in to upgrade two lines and get a new line received wonderful service from Mariela. She was very patient with us and was knowledgeable of everything we asked. Thank you for giving us wonderful service we definitely left happy with our purchase!!!
Absolutely love this place! The pizza is amazing. Especially love one of the chefs, Matt! We love eating here
This is a great location. I have enjoyed the property many times for the rodeos and bull riding competitions. The stables are very well kept. Always good times to be had here.
Food: Less than mediocre Beer: mediocre Service: mediocre Basically here for the Tv's because of the Final Four
The seating arrangement is uncomfortable in the 600 section. The whole arrangement is a bit dome structure so everything is pretty much circcular arranged.
GrillSmith is a great local place to stop for dinner or drinks and appetizers. Their selection of side are healthier than most places and made fresh. ie spinach, cauliflower.
The food was horrible did not taste like middle eastern food to me it was the worst place that I got a gryo at will not be going there did not like the food I've ate at better places.
Atmosphere is nice but food does not live up to expectations at all. Went with a numerous people who all felt the same about their dishes.

We popped in here because it was the first coffee shop we spotted while exploring Santa Barbara. The barista wasn't particularly friendly or welcoming. My decaf Americano was passable; my husband's latte tasted like there wasn't espresso in it. Skip this. You can do much better in Santa Barbara for coffee.
The drink waitresses in the casino are HIGHLY rude! No customer service skills whatsoever. You girls are not escorts where you run the show! Take your bad attitude and fake tits somewhere else.

Decided to give this place another try after our last visit which was horrendous. Service is still horrendous. More mad at my brother for making me give it another try and not just going to a much better diner like Lampost Diner. But after last night I think my brother has given up on Phily Diner too. Service here has become a joke.
Really good food but a little overpriced. I like that you can substitute chicken on any of the burgers too. I do wish they had more indoor seating.

Food was good but service not so much! She was Not around most the time and was sitting behind the station but gave me attitude when I was trying to get her attention saying she was all over the restaurant when indeed was not!

I'm a fan BUT NOT on the weekend. Avoid going here on weekend unless you set aside 60-90 minutes to wait for food and taking chance of not getting a table. Not enough tables to accommodate its popularity. I agree w/ Yelper Kal (the post right before mine).

The corner location and volume here draw the crowds, but the restroom attendants and urinals where your shoulders touch your neighbors' sent us on our way almost as soon as we entered. Much more of a 20-something college-town bar, hence the gimmicky, misleading name I suppose..
I paid the $168 on 4/17/14. Kathy told me I was paid in full. Today in the mailbox I get ANOTHER bill for $138! johnson denal is like a turd that wont flush

Worst Service Ever! Everytime I've been there; my order took too long, and it came out wrong. The Drive-Through is even worse; the Order-Taker "Cierra" is a B........h and has a nasty disposition towards customers. I tried to talk to the Manager about it, and he was clueless. Don't waste your time or money in this place.
Paying $8 + tax for a beer in Tarpon Springs is the most expensive beer I ever had. Never again. These places need to close down permanently. Period.

ERose makes my absolute favorite smoothie: "Dark magic"! All of their smoothies and açaí bowls are delicious. The staff are always friendly and the shop is always clean! I've been to their downtown location as well and it's equally as good!

I love this place's food. It's always flavorful and exciting. My issue is I never know when they are open. The website says one thing, the door says one thing and then you go and they are closed. The last time I went for lunch we waited 1.5 hours for our main dishes. I want you to survive... but things have to improve!
As a truck driver I in the N.E I stop in every now & they always great food. Breakfast or dinner any time of the day.

Ordered a Cuban sandwich and two stuffed potatoes. The sandwich was terrible, the only good thing about it was the bread. The potatoes were dry, with too much potato to filling. I far prefer the "airport" or Floridian sandwiches.
The pastries look beautiful and taste delicious but I do not think they are worth the outrageous $$$$. They are just too over priced.

I have been coming to our bar since they opened and i have to say the service is always amazing. Drink specials and the food is to die for. Truly a gem in reno. Never a cover and a great environment every time. Play pool, darts, good music. A must visit in reno!!!
Got the spicy fried chicken and japchae in the couple times I've been here. Really good food and my server Paula was attentive and came by often to see if we needed anything. Would go back

Went to Aldi to get a ham wife gets coupon from work always go to Aldi on rock hill in Bensalem this time manager stated that won't take the coupon pissed off for life I will never shop at Aldi again.
Love the food, love the staff, a great addition to Carpinteria's limited selection of good hang outs.
Service was great but food was under seasoned and bland. This was our second time and the food did not deliver unfortunately.

I usually stay here over the DoubleTree, but not anymore. Nighttime staff actually asked me if I wanted my Gold points or the complimentary snacks. Really? Three rooms 2-3 nights every other week for a year and I can't get a water and chips? Take my business elsewhere. Recent stay and another Hampton totally impressed...here not even close.
this place is fantabulous. Why else would one drive 6 miles to partake? Reasonable. Good ice cream and seating outside. Its a summer tradition for me.

Delicious! Lunch buffet had many items authentic and freshly made. I'm so happy we stopped here for lunch today! Owner was kind and friendly, restaurant is clean and tastefully decorated! I would reccomend for excellent curry and butter chicken.

This was a "surprise" birthday dinner. Quick rundown: the baked potato was cold, steak was overcooked and the evening was a huge disappointment. Many others may like the decor, etc. but I just thought the place felt dingy and outdated. For the price Ruth's Chris, Ocean Prime and Flemings are much better options plus they are nearby.

Sunday we went in looking for furniture, and Kevin jump right in and help us out right away he answered all I'll questions and we ended up purchasing an three piece leather set . thanks Kevin Harris very pleasant person ..

This is my first time eating here, stopped in after a concert. The atmosphere here is amazing.. they make you feel so welcome. The food was DELICIOUS. We orderd the jalapeño burger & it was fire .. also, amazing cocktails, and the wings were to die for. The service is great, everyone is so nice! Definitely recommend.. & will definitely come back!
The bartender put her fingers in my drink. Then when she was called out for it, my entire group was kicked out.

Spence was wear I got my fiancés engagement ring. The fact is the the service was great not to pushy but there when we needed it. The selection was great. I don't know much about pricing but they seemed good. Also the ring up keep program is very good. We will be getting our wedding bands from here too!
Just average. Pedicure chipped after two days.The shop was not very clean. And over booked so took way too long
The lobster bisque is great and the cream spinach is awesome
Is a place very nice with a good service, but I explained what I want and they still cut so much more that I was asking,
The place is amazing, the food is 7out of 10, it's a buffet what can expect. The service is impeccable and the atmosphere is pure New Orleans!

This place is awesome....think your buddies basement if your buddy was ever actually cool enough to stock it with beer. Tons of good events and beer/wine choices for sipping there or for carry out. Kid/dog friendly. Live music on the patio on weekends.
Was delivered quickly. They did mess up my order. Not bad for delivery Chinese food in Southern NJ.
Every single time they charge A different price and then the manager will argue with you about it. "$10 extra because they filed the side of your nail" 10/10 would never recommend . Go anywhere else

We enjoyed our Date night at the White Horse Winery. The atmosphere was warm and inviting. The hosts were absolutely professional, and very nice. The place wasn't loud and there is some outside seating.

A little disappointing. Food is good as always but the last few times here service has been rough, especially this last time where we had to ask where the appetizer was, where the pizza was, where the pasta was. And not very full. Great place back on McMullen booth. Lost a lot of luster on 4th.

Really liked their subs and tomato bisque soup. It's a full service italian-ish delicatessen with meals to go, wine, milk, beer, breads, etc...complements Mazzaro's Market on a small scale. Very nice and attentive staff. I've only gone once so stay tuned. Off the beaten path unless you live near Gandy Blvd.

After being a customer of ServiceMark for past 25 years, having two complete systems put in and maintaining a service contract all that time, after their recent merger with Horizon AC they could not give me a service appt for my contracted system checkup for 70 days. Guess they have too many customers! Will have to look for another company.
Good Tex-Mex food. Easy options for gluten-free required diners. Easy to order take out too.very busy on Saturday night.

Love taking my kids to this place because of the huge portions and flavorful foods. The nachos are smoothered in ooey, gooey cheesey deliciousness; the best in Tampa Bay. My son loves their over stuffed burritos. Their tacos are extremely tasty too.

Terrible customer service. I can see why they have not claimed their profile on here after reading the other reviews. Customer service is rude and unhelpful. They do not care about their customers. I was very disappointed that my Credit Union sold out to this company. Read the other reviews, they are all true.

Fantastic meat pies and baked goods! The sausage rolls are just like what we got back in England but without the pricey plane ticket! The owners are super nice too. Happy to support local small business.

Yummy! Been here twice already. Their cobb salad is bomb. So are their nachos chiquitos. Service is quick, and the food is filling but doesn't leave me feeling gross afterward. I like their outside eating area. It's quiet, and there's a nice view of the mountains

I love this place. The margaritas are on point! Get the monster and you're good to go. Nice for girls night drinks. Actually, good for any night of drinking. . Food is horrendous though lol. I like the crab dip. That's about it. In many opinion, the drinks keeps this place alive.

My favorite breakfast spot in all of New Orleans! Their Andouille hash cakes and Chicken and Waffles are incredible. The staff goes above and beyond, and our belly's are always happy when we leave! It is also my three year old daughters favorite place to eat. Prime location, and never had something on the menu I didn't love!

My first time going! Everything was delicious but I have to say that fresh, soft french bread was the best part and their brussels sprouts were pretty bangin!! Love the atmosphere and art work of course too. Can't go wrong with DrBob!!
First place I ate while visiting Philly. The lamb gyros were tasty. Lots of meat, done perfectly! Definitely recommend them for a quick bite
Worst Macy's EVER! I could count the shoes available on my fingers. There is never anyone around to help you and the store doesn't carry any contemporary brands, at all.
We tried Lasagna and More for the first time tonight and it was delicious! We will definitely be back- gonna be a regular for us. Glad to know it's here! Excellent!
Been here twice now and both times it was a big let down. Waited for a table when several were empty, food was just ok and they just don't listen to what you requested.
hella outside the town off the freeway... but whatever 60 beers on tap via LCD screen. taste the #30!!!!!! old skool feel outside, when u come in-nice contemporary look
Food is what I call old people Mexican food, meaning it's bland and in my opinion boring.

Just order 2 slices of pizza and it was horrible, cold cheese was like it was a day old pizza. This was the second time I order slices of pizza, first time everything was perfect crispy, hot and delicious. Second time was as no one could care less.
Excellent fried chicken, awesome donuts and really good fries. They have kept up to their standards as usual.

Two stars only because the food and beer selection is really good! Terrible service on a Wednesday night when they aren't even busy though and apathetic management will cause me to never darken their doorstep again or recommend their establishment to anyone. It's really a pity because the food is actually quite good!

I was treated by Sheena Worton last year. Her professionalism and natural caring personality made me feel immediately comfortable; her treatment was exceptional, so much so that I have not had any issues since that time. I highly recommend Sheena and Cura. Carol G

I give two stars because the service was excellent but the food is another story. Ordered the charred octopus octopus and it took me about 30 minutes to chew. The black ink pasta was bland. Would not recommend this place.
The food wasn't that great I ordered a burrito and the tortilla got so soggy I just couldn't finish.
Stealing menus and menu photos from a completely different and well KNOWN restaurant is not a good look! They are frauds and they are ok with it. Disgusting.
Didn't eat anything but the Muffaletta, but the ambiance was nice, the Abita was cold, and the service was friendly.

Very clean, modern atmosphere, but as a vegetarian menu is very limited. They cannot modify any menu items. It is as it is on the menu. Panda Express or your local Chinese delivery place is about the same or better. This was a one time visit for me.

Nice park with lots of trail options. Quick drive from philly, a nice alternative to wissahickon. Trails were pretty muddy after snow this week, but were overall well marked. Very dog friendly park, lots of people out for a casual stroll on a Sunday. Not difficult terrain.

Terrible company to work for. Since you are salaried they own you. This is not a M-F 8-5 job as they say in the job description. You may think you have a weekend off wrong. They will tell you that you need to answer your phone when you think you are off.
The Brunch was fantastic! Some of the best fried Chicken I've ever had. Staff was great. Also stole a bite of pancakes and they were incredible.

Expensive and rude service. Spent $15 for 3 piece of whiting fish. I used to go all the time but after the last visit I will not return. They wouldn't even give me hot sauce after I just spend over $25 for 2 meals. They dont care about the loyal customers.
Really, really delicious but somewhat overpriced. A great choice for a special occasion :)

If I could give this place ZERO stars I would. What a garbage establishment. I'm so upset that I even came in contact with this nasty roach contaminated place. Please go anywhere else. I'm trying not to throw up as I type.

Two of the three things that we ordered was OK. However I ordered the avocado which in the picture was displayed as chopped up and served with flatbread. What I end up getting was maybe about a half of a small avocado that was brown with no flatbread. I couldn't eat it it just didn't look appetizing.

As others have mentioned - insanely priced. But friendly, almost never a line, and in the neighborhood. Also, they have pretty decent hours. You'll never really find a deal here, but for one-off shopping they do the trick.
Their poke bowl is fresh and delicious! I Highly recommend that. But other stuff are just so so.
This is the worst KFC I have ever been to. The place looks like it hasn't been cleaned in 3 days. The chicken was rubbery. The guy that took my order was standoffish and mechanical.
Hands down the best bakery in Edmonton. Since it's so close to work I got probably 3 times a week; always have something new for me to try.

Called to order delivery and was on the phone for over 10 minutes repeating my address over and over again. I practically was screaming so the lady could hear me properly. My address is simple and can easily be found on google maps but this lady had an extremely difficult time hearing or understanding me. Terrible customer service!

This place is a joke. So many machines are broken but still take your money. They have about 3 people working so there's no one to help. Search near and far for 15 mins to find someone to get you a quarter back? No thanks.
Excellent aye aye captain- eggs Benedict with salmon, the hollandaise sauce was made fresh and delish! We will be back to try additional menu items.

My wife lived in Nashville and introduced me to this place and it did not disappoint! We were immediately seated, greeted by our waitress and given warm, fresh biscuits!! The biscuits were THE BEST I've ever had!!! I was blown away by the service, friendliness, and high-quality food! This is a MUST while visiting Nashville!

Quality ingredients, but staff is a mess and unorganized. I have bought two things on separate occasions- farmhouse salad (didn't receive chicken breast in salad), and a strawberry Oreo Shake (was only Oreo). Sucks that something was left off BOTH times I've visited :(

i really wanted to love this place, i did. i had the duck po-boy this weekend, which i had been looking forward to, and i was so disappointed. in a word, it was bland, bland, bland. very sad. i will consider giving this place another chance and amend my review accordingly.
Pulled pork is fatty and tasteless, the cole slaw has to much vinegar and looks like vomit.

Pizza was late and cold, sent wrong dipping sauces, driver was pissed off when I questioned why he was having me sign a receipt with a blank line for a tip...the tip and delivery fee was worked into the bill to begin with.

No complaints from me. The wouldn't say the girls are all 10s but what can you really ask for. At leash here the food is decent compared to the hooters they put out of business. Girls are very friendly and work very hard for the tips they receive. I'll have no problem coming here again in the future.
This was my first time trying beignets and they have me wanting to move to New Orleans! Her beignets were sooooo good! I can't even!
This place was trash fr super taxed for some boof ass fish rather go to azian and shiii
It was ok... not the best that I have had during my visit to NOLA. I didn't care for the seafood gumbo, it tasted as if it was missing some type of seasoning.
Not the same place. Use to be the best wings in south jersey, now they are below average. Nice people working there, just low quality food.

Really awesome bagel shop! I go here often while I'm visiting my parents because it's right down the street. I went here the other morning before work at 6 am and the gentleman behind the counter opened the door for me and my bagel was great as always! I recommend Pop's!
Raised their prices again. Huge ice chunks have become consistent. Still the best snoball game in the east though.
This restaurant literally smells like raw sewage. The odor is so strong I am getting nauseous at the table.

Disclaimer: I thought this establishment was The Alley, a popular Taiwanese milk tea shop, but it's not. However, I tried the Jasmine Lychee Tea and the Golden Pineapple Tea. Both were quite refreshing and tasty. I would say it's one of the better iced tea options in Chinatown. The establishment is overall clean and employees friendly!

Apparently this restuarant lacks the knowledge of what goes on a traditional Gyro . I had more pickles than any other condiment on my Gyro which shouldnt have pickles on it at all in the first place . Also , there were no onions.

Had the hot spicy chicken. Order taker warned me it would be spicy, which is typically nonsense as spice is subjective. She was right. Great spice and hotness. May have even had a sweaty brow upon finishing. Cooked to perfection. Chicken was still juicy. Will be back.
Ordered medium rare steak. Came well done. Next steak was raw. Not a good experience. Received apology. Expected better. Did not enjoy meal

Fabulous tanning experience. The ladies that work here are wonderful and do a phenomenal job. My only experience has been with the tanning, and It always comes out perfect. Gorgeous color that surprisingly lasts for quite some time. They even offer touchups within a few days. Highly recommend.
Worst bar on the planet. Anyone that revolves their establishment around PBR wants to watch the world burn. I reward you no points and may God have mercy on your soul.

Beer tasted like domestics. Crowd was a bunch of designer d bags wearing Michael Kors bags. The styling and craftsmanship of the tables, and the general Design was aesthetically pleasing, but that was the only positive thing I could find about this place. $6 each beer also for acrid nonsense.

Great atmosphere, mediocre food, mediocre to awful cocktails, ok service, and overpriced. I really want this place to be good bc it looks cool and I love Latin food, but it's not. I've been twice, bc I was hoping my first experience was an off night, but it was equally as bad the second time. Don't waste your money.

The sushi here was good, but I've had better. The prices seemed too high for what you are getting. I ordered the "mistake roll" and I believe the "sunset roll"...both yummy, but as I said, there's better sushi around Indy.

The only car wash in the Vail/Rita ranch area. This place has gone downhill in a heart beat. The drive thru wash doesn't clean your vehicle at all. The vacuums are old, the spray has low water pressure.

I've been here twice and both times got the pineapple pizza. After the first time I ate the next day I was as sick as a dog, thought to give it another try. So i went last night and again woke up with the worst stomach ache.... don't think i will be going again
I belong to a nationwide organization where almost everyone has business cards. The cards from Allegra are every bit as professional looking as those costing a lot more. Ask for Debra!!!
Not authentic Mexican food. Delivery was fast but food was cold. Had to microwave it.

Beer selection was alright and the staff was really friendly. The food was pretty average. I had a burger, some rib tips and some of the pulled pork and they were all pretty good but nothing special. The sides were better than the entrees with good Mac and cheese, fries and baked potatoe

The best coffee on the east coast, if not in the country. I've never had any attitude from the baristas, and I'm wondering what exactly would warrant this treatment. I've had nothing but polite and helpful service.
Personally, I found the sushi a bit disappointing. It wasn't bad. It's just that I think the sushi at Matoi, Yoko's, and Soho is better.

Saved our trip with ready made meals. Line was quiet long due to covid so be sure to check Google traffic ahead of time. I love all my trader Joe treats- plantain chips, truffle ravioli, hot habinaro salsa, and the wine selection (I squeal). So amazing!

sometimes we have nice cashiers. more often we have a cashier who seems unhappy and short with us. lines are usually pretty rough and it seems that they're understaffed. a few weeks back, there were at least 10 people ahead of us in line...on a friday afternoon. instances like that have me going to albertsons more and more.
The one star is because the food is good. The service is horrendous. Go to the one in Metairie. Bad Dino g experience here.
Good atmosphere. Nice waitresses. Cool place to go. Just don't eat the wings very bad experience that went on for days. Food manager terrible, had no clue very immature.
When your brother suggests a place he saw on the Food Network, just say no. Food was soggy and bland. The floor was sticky. Another bad sign the place was empty on a friday.

The chicken was really bad quality and rubbery. Waiters didn't really pay any attention to us when we needed them. Drinks came out after the food even though we ordered them first. We were charged for items we weren't received. There are much better and cheaper ramen places all over Chinatown and I think the atmosphere is what carries this place.
The food tastes good, but its just bland. It is just I completely agree with Dave P. It is good food, don't get me wrong, but its not good mexican food.

Food here is horrible...I tried giving them ein fit if the doubt but enough is enough. I can not walk into this place ever again. It's terrible how this can represent Vietnamese food. It's a disgrace. Move on and far away people, cause this one is a stinker!

Visiting Tucson for the first time. We did not realize that everything closes early. Found this place and tried their carne azada as everyone mentioned it. I found the steak to be ok, but everything else was not great. The beans were too greasy for me. I expected more from this place based on the reviews :/
Great place to eat some good food, have a couple drinks, and watch sports! Very friendly and attentive service. Enjoyed the burger with crab very much!

Had a chicken burrito, it was ok. First visit to this place, tourists from MO. Definitely a small hole in the wall. We almost left because there wasn't a table available. Luckily someone was leaving. This is authentic Mexican food.
Decent food selection with a wide variety of options. They have a good lunch special that will only cost you $7.95. The sushi and hibachi grill were surprisingly good.

The food is good, beautiful place. But the DJ on Saturday is absolutely horrible. He completely does not read the room and is blasting techno and rave music in a relaxing beach restaurant, everyone is annoyed.

seeing Rebirth on a Tuesday was maybe the highlight of the entire trip. They went on at 1030 and ended after 1 with a small break in between. great show. cheap beers. i'd get there early to stake out a spot. $15 cover. worth it.
Great sandwich! The grocery is great, too - it has a lot of high-end hard to find items.

The food is OK. The two stars I gave are for the level of health of their dishes and the dressings they make, which are good. Every single time I come in here I am met with poor service and I am hungry within an hour. It's a last resort for me.
Food is ok. Prices are AWFUL. way too high for "diner food"! Decor is dated for being "new". Won't be returning.

Maryann and Andrew were wonderful advisors, keeping us informed of the market and providing honest assessments of our property. They took the stress out of the equation. Hopefully there won't be a need to sell again for ages but we would not hesitate to seek their representation if needed!
This place as every type of shoe you could want... It really is a shoe lovers paradise... Make sure you check out the clearance area in the back of the store for some great deals...

I was impressed with the speed and overall quality of service. My smoothie was perfection and Dershan was a great addition to the staff. He put a smile on my face and made it a pleasure to do business. I will be returning to this location.
Eating one of the best pastrami on rye that I've had in a very long time! Highly recommend!

Just was put on hold for 30 minutes. I called back and Kaitlin hung up on me. My wife called back and she hung up on her. Called back again and asked Kaitlin to speak with a manager...she hung up on her again....smh

First time trying Korean food so I was a bit nervous but this place was soooo delicious! I can't wait to come back and try the soups when it starts getting cold! Our server was also so sweet so that's always a plus. :)
Service was good for take out. Pizza was ok. The chicken ranch was pretty good the Brooklyn was ok. Nothing too great but got the job done.

Worst one ever I have been too. Too loud, too slow, workers who don't seem to care. One worker even had his earbuds in while working. Restrooms were bad which is usually a good indication of how the restaurant is run.

Tables are all directly next to large bar area and it is EXTREMELY loud - you cannot hear the people at your own table. We had 8:00 reservation but were not seated until nearly 8:45. Food was served around 9:15. Food was OK - some peoples' dinners were very good, others just OK.

I absolutely love coming to Essent Spa!!! Everyone is so friendly and accommodating. I have been getting facials done with Lis for a couple months now and my skin has never looked better!!! I would highly recommend her, she is definitely a Pro at her craft!!! Do your self a favor and schedule an appointment, you won't be disappointed!!!
Decent Italian food for west county area. Nice place, only 30 minute wait on early evening Saturday for 8 people. Took a while to get food but Everything was tasty though. Need more parking.

We had a very good - but quick - lunch here. It was pretty cold and seating was in the shade (not their fault, of course) but indoors seemed a bit crowed to us. My husband had shrimp tacos and I had the quiche and salad special. Everything was very good and the portions were decent sized. Definitely recommend.

The sandwiches we got were too salty and only really tasted of soy sauce. Definitely needed more veggies in there and the meat was pretty tough. It also took about 25 minutes to get sandwiches when I was the only one in there.

Showed up at the end of a cardinals game an hour before close. We were told that we cold not bring in the kids personal pizza that Fredbird gave my son as a promotion at the game if we wanted to eat at their ""fine establishment". Fifth and last visit!
Food tasted to commercial! The drinks were good, and the bread is great! Good atmosphere! Little to pricey for the quality of food
We decided to try a new place in the area. The food was great, the portions large. Even the margarita was huge! Free desert as well. We'll be coming back.
So dirty . Does not wear hair nets and they do not wash they hands . Hair in my sandwich

Cannot beat $5 carne asada burrito specials on Mondays! It is a big burrito with beans and rice. There is also a $10 any burrito + beer special as well. We had the carne asada and brisket burrito and both were delicious. Plenty of salsa, hot sauce, and bbq sauce to dress it up. I will be back for more!

Weird waiter. Very slow service. Two hours for basic truck food. Cheap though, large portions. Drinks were reasonable and good. It's like Applebee's had a baby with Outback. Don't order dessert unless you have an hour to kill.

This open air bar can be enjoyed by new beer drinkers and beer experts alike. I highly recommend trying a few brews with the tasters. They had an amazing selection for Stouts and IPAs. After walking along the beach and you start to feel thirsty for a drink, then this is the place to land.

This was my go to KFC growing up in Goleta. I'm not around Calle Real Center much anymore, but it's nice to go grab some food to go every now and then. If you don't have enough money or if you are on a college budget, Albertson's Chicken Dinner Deal isn't too shabby either.

Visited Friendly's with my 5 year old for dinner. My expectations weren't too high but I went anyways. Our waitress was kind and attentive although she was clearly busy. Our food came out in a reasonable amount of time and was definitely edible. This is a good option if you are taking kids out for dinner. My main feedback to them is cleanliness.
Ordered there 2 pie special that's reasonably priced pizza came hot and the taste very good! I will order again and again.
Ok motel. It's just that if you walk around your room barefooted, the bottoms of your feet will turn black. THE FLOORS ARE ABSOLUTELY FILTHY. FILTHY. FILTHY. FILTHY. Did I mention FILTHY!

So good! I ordered the crab cake sandwich, which came with the side of golden reef chantillí mashed potatoes. They were both really good!! And I got the black sand which was a chocolate avocado mousse with cool whip and crushed Oreos. Divine!! I would definitely go back. Check their pop-up Hours on their website! Thanks for a great meal!
Poor customer service and unfriendly

the good is good but i never have a good experience. Every time i go they mess up my order, forget my sauce, or something. today i went and showed my coupon i received from their app the lady said "he already got it" then proceeded to charge me full price when i was supposed to have a couple dollars off.
Not a good place to study or work - they recently removed all electrical outlets. Not a friendly move in a college town.
Food was poor at best. Had the Louisana shrimp and kids had ribs and pizza. Both were barely edible. First and last visit.
Absolutely love their sandwiches! The guy at the cashier today was very nice and accommodating! Great service!
Best oysters on the half shell EVER! Very friendly staff! Great cocktail choices...the Rum Chata shots were delectable! I would definitely recommend a stop at the Blind Pelican!!

Had the flafel wrap, the flafel was very dry, and scarce, mostly lettuce and tomato. I will go back and try a different sandwich next time to see if that's any better. If not there is so many places down by the beach to get outstanding sandwiches. They need to step it up some notches.
The kitchen was not quick. I waited 15 minutes for my food. The one by my house is much quicker. The cashier was not friendly.
The cannolis were great- both the plain and pistachio ones.

Been to this place several times. Not much competition in the area for any food places much less chinese. While I dont consider myself a chinese food snob by any stretch, this place is ok but not slap your gramma good either. Apparently you cannot say the word Chi-com in your review or the SF snowflake review board will get offended. Yelp on!

Friendly staff. Food is good but nothing special. The bread and butter is super fantastic along with a bucket full of peanuts for the table is pretty sweet. They have a call ahead seating which is convenient. My gf loves this place and I know if I want a consistent good meal I will suggest this place to score some brownie points, haha.
Horrible employees that treat you very disrespectful! Avoid at all cost! Everything is So distrusting inside

I got the Sui Generis Conquistador 1513 whiskey for my fiance and he absolutely loves it! The women helping us out was friendly and happy to answer all of our questions. I will definitely be back to try more of Fish Hawk's amazing products.

Awesome! Flight was delayed so my "laptop bag shoulder" was painful and tight. Saw Sandy at the Massage Bar and she is a magician!! She found the exact spot and loosened everything up so I was able to be comfortable on the flight home. If you're ever in Nashville in terminal B, be sure to see Sandy! You won't be disappointed!
We came to eat here. The food was good the service was not so great, nice comfy environment. I would come back just for the tasty food!

Went back again with a girlfriend on a Friday night for Happy Hour, redeemed 2nd Groupon, had 2 orders of the tuna poke, an order of chicken satay and 3 or 4 vodka mojitos... great service and fun much younger hip atmosphere!

Avoid at all costs. The worst customer service I've experienced not just in New Orleans along the entire Gulf Coast. From the hostess to the manager, we walked out. This restaurant perpetuates an atmosphere of rudeness, condescending, & aggressive behavior. This place was the worst decision of Mardi Gras 2019. Go somewhere where they're friendly & happy to have your business!

Went here for the first time and would definitely go back. Great drinks and happy hour menu. Had the 24oz margarita and two tacos. Not strong but it was tasty and their happy hour menu is excellent. Next time I'll try their full menu. Bartender and company were friendly. Great atmosphere!

Went at 12:30om and they were out of nearly everything. Very disappointing. Had bought a $50 gift certificate for $25 (plus $4 service charge). Ordered two burgers with fries, shrimp and fries and it came to about $54. Will not be going back.

No. Just dont bother. The viet food here is terrible. Pho broth might as well be msg broth... grilled chicken tastes like it was pre-made and then reheated. If i had it my way id go to Philly for Vietfood- LeViet... If you cant make it to Philly and want to stay in NJ and avoid the toll... then go to Pho So 1.
I had the taro milk tea with grass jelly. The flavor was perfect because usually the taro flavor is very heavy but there was very light n the perfect sweetness
Are they still open?? Tried to call on July 3rd, but phone was either busy or went unanswered

Atrocious service. Worst service I've ever seen in a restaurant in Santa Barbara county, and I've lived here for 20 years. Decently authentic food, but very low quality. Took a ridiculously long time, water tastes funky, chicken was more bone than meat. NEVER go here unless you want to feel like you are in a third world country.
This place is your basic seafood joint. Good clam chowder and friendly service. A little slow in the service area but it was a decent experience. Needs a make-over to compete.
Best Pizza in New Tampa and the chicken wings are pretty good too all with a FAIR price that's important too. Actually we may go pick a pizza up from there tonight....yum
Called Busto Plumbing because I needed a new water heater. Never got a call back. When they look at their year end numbers they will probably blame the economy not their lack of customer service.
Good pie and friendly staff. It has a nice patio too.

Friday morning, not crowded a very modest single order. Took forever to get a drip coffee and a breakfast sandwich. Absolutely no excuse having just one employee who seems absolutely overwhelmed with 3 customers at 9 am on a weekday in a busy downtown Tampa location.

No caption needed this was in a iced caramel macchiato Look like someone shaved in it. Had to wait almost a month to talk to a manager on the phone because no one was in at the time and only wanted to give me one free drink.

Man these guys are price gouging big time. They want $179 to replace a iPhone Screen with an aftermarket piece of glass. Couple of phone calls and I found a place that does it for $99. Be very careful. They're counting on you not shopping.
Not bad, not great. I would eat the food again if it was bought for me. Otherwise I think it's a little overpriced for the amount they give you.
By far my favorite sandwich that we've eaten in Philly! Roasted pork with sharp provolone, greens and sweet and hot peppers!

Went back this weekend and tried my sandwich over on jalapeno cheese bread. Much better. However, i still think its pricey for a sandwich. Not that its not worth the quality, you just dont expect it to cost that much coming out of a shell gas station.
The falafel here is the best I have ever had. Crispy hot and light! I am always so conflicted as to what to get here...I love it all, but really the Falafel is some of the best I have ever had!!!
Cute little breakfast place. We tried the breakfast sandwich and the toast with scrambled egg and salmon. Also a side of potatoes. All very tasty. Service was good.
Overpriced as heck but food was alright. Really think there is no reason for the prices. It's not a suit and tie place.
The duck was imitation duck not the real thing. The fried rice was good, I was just highly dissatisfied with receiving a pricey fake version of duck.
It's good but quality has seemed to fallen off a little lately. The stew is watery now. I dunno if they haven't been cooking it long enough. I still enjoyed my meal.
The food items look like they have been sitting around awhile. For the money you could go to table 3 and have a nice meal. Needs thorough concept makeover.
Warning, the parking stalls are tiny!!! Good luck finding a place that won't get you door dings because no one can park between the lines. Also the SB parking Nazis are absolute a-holes there.
Boise has a lot of pizza joints and I'm so glad we chose this one! Great pizza with crispy crust and a nice little salad bar. I love the funky atmosphere.
Always enjoy their sandwiches and desserts. My favorite sandwich is the Goudalicious. One of the best places eat in the area IMO.
$2.50 cleaned, pressed and starched shirts. 5% discount if you pay when you drop off your garments. They accept plastic! What's not to love?
Very nice lounge for de stress before or after a flight. Cocktails or beers as well as something to bite.I like the service too.

These guys know exactly what they're doing! Honest, friendly, knowledgeable, and trustworthy! They installed a brand new k&n air filter system and did a super job on my new 2016 Charger ScatPack!Thank you for a job well done! Plus, they did extensive work on my 1998 Dodge Dakota R/T and I never had a problem with the results!

Nope. They do have McConnell's ice cream and that's the one thing going for it. But their brownies are dry as fuck and some of the cookies have tasted weird too. I guess if you just went in for a scoop of ice cream it'd be a yummy experience.

One of the top 3 or 4 breakfast spots in Nashville. My favorite is the Farmer's Benedict, which isn't really a benedict at all. Two biscuits, with your choice of meat, covered in gravy and topped with eggs. Delicious. The OJ is freshly squeezed, and they'll bring you your own pot of coffee. I've never had a bad meal at Le Peep.

Quick pit stop with coworkers to pick up some odds and ends for the next day's work. Clean, consistent Target, we were ble to zero in on what we needed and check on and go on. Nice thing about big box stores across the US

This is great place to play golf. If the weather is cold the heaters outside dont do the job so bundle up. A lot of people came today and just left because of the cold. The wait service was really nice and accommodating.

I am so sad to say that we are very disappointed with our meal. We ordered delivery. Pad Thai and Red Chicken Curry. The pad thai was flavorless, and the red curry was so thin and runny and again, not a lot of flavor. The Tom Kha soup decent. We were so disappointed that we threw it out and ordered from another place.
Lynn was our server. Cheerful happy and nice. Had the lumberjack breakfast with coffee. Great place and close of freeway.
Going to make this short and sweet, I agree with some of the others, very nice people, otherwise it's average, not bad and not great, just average .
I work in the mall so I decided to give this place a shot. I ordered my pizza, picked it up and it was cold. Just cold. Won't be doing that again.
Really good fun vibe nice food. Don't think you can go wrong if you want to find something for one night in Santa Barbara
Trendy nice place, great selection of beer. The staff could not have been nicer. But .... The menu is just ok. Over priced for Mac and cheese.
This Marksman location is smaller but it's nice because you can go in on a Sunday and not have to worry about a line to wait and use the range. The staff is really nice and helpful :)
Only giving this target 4 stars because it's better than the metairie one. It's usually a little more stocked and has more baby stuff in the store as well.
My Food Seems To Be Delivered On Time & Hot But TOUGH & OVER COOKED!! Annoyed Gonna chill off of Springs for a while.
Very nice store and love what they stand for, but they customer service can be somewhat very dry!
Wow, some of the if not the best donuts I've ever had. Apple fritter was unreal with a Salted Caramel cream stick to top it off. Phenomenal.
Tried this Italian restaurant yesterday, pasta-good! Barnes-good! Panini-good, desserts-good! It is BYOB, and service is good! Will come back soon!

This is our "default" pizza place. It's not consistent - sometimes we only have toppings in the middle of the pizza, several times they have gotten our order wrong, they aren't the friendliest, but lucky for them we like the taste of their pizza over most others in the area. All that said, still my go to choice for pizza.

Not good for large parties, pizza was bland, place was way too loud and service was slow. None of the food was terrible but it certainly wasn't good. No one in our party of ten was impressed. Definitely overpriced. Pizza could have used more time in the oven.
My favorite place for pizza in the TBA. Service time and quality can vary depending on how busy but super friendly!

Delicious pizza and beer. Buffalo Chicken Pizza and the Jalapeño Bacon Chicken Popper Pizza were awesome. We ordered the cauliflower but it never came out. Staff was friendly but service was a little slow. Great outdoor seating was a huge plus.

I got the delux bagel on herb cheese. yum-o! but it's totally something a 10 year old could make at home. it had avocado, cheese, onions, and sundried tomato cream cheese. very simple, but good! it's quite expensive for a bagel. $6!

The food was ok. The lobster was over cooked and had little meat. The filet was overcooked and well done when it was to be medium rare. The shrimp was delicious! The charbroiled oysters were good. Interesting experience.

Definitely not one of Hertz's flagship locations. Unless you really need a car in NOLA, I would skip the rental and just pay the cab fare to hotel. Save yourself on the headache of parking fees. Everything we wanted to do was within walking distance.

Last night a friend and l went to gyros on 34th so and 18th ave the food was cold. l think lm done gyros on 34st so and 18th ave. when l got up this morning to look at my bill it said 27.21..so l go look at my card it said 32.71 they had swipes my card twice never no more..ASSHOLDS

One word describes what Happy China... a one time favorite of mine has become in the past year. NASTY. I would not recommend this restaurant to my worse enemy. Food is not fresh and restroom is very bad. I can't believe the place has gone downhill so much.
Don't get the nachos. Nachos obviously aren't traditional Mexican food, but these were made with cheese sauce and poor quality chicken.
Awesome staff. Got my order in a hurry. Super clean establishment. Pizzas and breadsticks are some of my favorites.

Sat at the bar for five minutes on a Saturday with only two other people at the bar and no one ever greeted or spoke to us. We eventually left. There was a server at the end of the bar standing there on her phone the whole time...
I do not know if we were there on an off night, but our food was bland and badly done. The Mahi Mahi dish particularly noteworthy for all the wrong reasons.
Darling little place! Downfall is that it is super tiny. But the fall spice latte was delish!!! Service was friendly.
Had not been in a while but it popped in my head for carry out...the Tenders are awesome (I had buffalo style), think I got an old batch of fries though. Definitely will hit it up again...

This place has pretty good burgers the customer service needs work that may be why I'm giving it a 3 I would have much enjoyed this burger at home but oh my lanta this burger is huge!!!!!! It was very yummy!
Tried it for a second time and had a similar experience. The presentation is incredible but the actual taste of each meal was underwhelming.
Todd is the worst cashier employed there. Horrible attitude and everything he does shows he hates his job and customers.
Pretty much read Ellen F's review. Decent though for the Gulch halloween party. Otherwise.....blah.

Unfortunately found an unpleasant piece of nothing edible in one of our side dishes. Sometimes you grow too large to maintain the quality of the original intended product. With so many great options in New Orleans, I will not be returning to this restaurant.

My acrylic keeps coming off in chunks! I'm going in today to get it fixed and plan on advising that if they don't stop giving me bad nails I'm gonna find somewhere else to go. Got Shellac one day and it was coming off the next day. Had to go back to get that fixed.
You definitely have to try the berry sangria! Delicious!! I had the loaded baked potato with a Cesar salad. The beef brisket on top of the potato was so good!!! We will definitely be back again!!
