Very fun! We did the 28 hole golf and it was very challenging for both of us! The course is well maintained and the staff are very friendly!
Celebrating wife's birthday. 9 of us. Excellent service! Good always predictably excellent. Not at all disappointed. We all had great fun and great food.

Affordable rooms, if you're to tired to drive. Sinks are not usable more than 2 min. Continental breakfast are ok. Place is kinda old, but front desk lady was really nice. This place is good for for pit stop.

There was no one at the door when we arrived. We waited about 5 minutes before someone helped us; which was not the hostess. No idea where he/she was??? After we were seated we wanted 15 minutes when we left because the waitress had still not bothered to show up at our table!!! I will not be going back!!!

Delicious and Derisive. If you love gelato, and also want to feel like you're bothering the employees by walking in the door, this is the place for you. Best gelato in terms of flavor, variety and consistency. The other consistent with this location is the rude staff who couldn't be bothered to smile or act friendly.

Excellent meal! This was one of our first few experiences dining outside during the pandemic. Sampan's staff did such a great job making us feel welcomed and comfortable. The food was delicious. Loved the edamame dumplings and the Kobe satay. The shrimp pad thai is the best in town!

My colleagues and I had a great dinner at Fogo. I have been here several times and always enjoyed both the food and service. Tonight I took out my leadership team to Fogo both for the first time and they both loved it. Thanks
Haven't been here in awhile, so must go again. But delicious from my past few experiences. The service is great, and so is the food! Especially for prices. Now I'm in the mood for some guac!
Simply amazing food ! Excelente costumer service ! Super fresh Venezuelan and Lebanese food
Whenever your dining needs call for overspending on mediocre tex mex food, consider Johnny Manana's.
I really want to like this place but after 3 times of being told over an hour wait over the course of 5 months when half the tables are empty, it's just frustrating.
Came in for a friends birthday for the $5 sangria. Service took awhile but the drinks were pretty good.
Stopped in while sight seeing the staff was very friendly and had plenty of advice. Loved this store

This place is soooooo nice. My husband and I come here whenever we can, and always sit in the beer garden. Even during the summer, nights in the garden stay nice and cool-- its very peaceful, even with a bunch of other customers around. You really can't screw up good beer, burgers, and globe lights. Thanks for creating a happy oasis in Nashville, Pharmacy~

Bad experience. Ordered what I thought was a real Italian beef sandwich. It was soggy,tasteless and expensive. What a confusing place. I thought this was a sit down restaurant. It is not. It reminded me of a college food station.

was greeted by a very rude lady behind the counter who saw the clothes I was bringing in and said "you know today isnt an exchange day, right?" ...obviously not if I was trying to bring in clothes. what a rude way to lose a customer.. how was I to know they only exchange clothes on certain days?

Slowest starbucks. Went to drive thru today and it was bad service again. One time I waited several minutes for someone to just come on speaker at the drive-thru but ended up driving away. Told myself never to go back after that and I absolutely will never go back now.

Ava was great. She gave me an awesome deep tissue massage working on my trigger points. Gave me a lot of relief with my tense muscles in my neck and lower back. She is very knowledgeable and gave great tips of things I can do at home to help with pain relief between sessions.
Food was okay, (bacon was raw) but once I got my food my server, Jeremy, would not stop by my table. Have to try somewhere else next time. Can not wait for all the Steak'n Shake will close!!!

The vermicelli bowl was pretty good. Service was fast and good. The restaurant was clean as well. However, the I didn't like the Pho here that much - generous amount of meat but the broth wasn't as flavorful as I hoped it to be.
Whenever you're in New Orleans you have to get Manchu chicken wings and oysters. It is yummy!!! My only down fall is they don't have a seating area.
These are the best tacos in New Orleans. Hands down. Also a fan of the Margaritas and ranch water. I wish the salsa and queso had more heat, but the guacamole is on point.

Stumpled upon this cafe during a leisure drive through very scenic NJ & PA. VERY excited but quickly let down. Inside is nice but I payed the price. BLT was A-OK although my date ate lots of sour soup.

I love Margaritas and they have a few fun ones to try. Another thing I love is Guacamole and they make it fresh right there. It is so delicious. I had their appetizer taco we tried different ones and they were all quite yummy. It is a little pricey but very delicious!
Great place for food and music. Listened to Daniel Bell and had a great time. Recommend anyone looking for a good pizza. They serve the same food upstairs as well.

If you like pretentious lines, then step on up (just not in). Checked open tile for reservations, but it was wide open. Walk up 15 minutes later and they are quoting a 20 minute wait. Next time I'll just float the reservation, if there is a "next time".

Setting an appointment was easy, everything else was bad. They are horribly understaffed, so prepare for an ordeal even if you have an appointment. Or go to labcorp across the street- way more painless.
Machines ate my money. Credit card readers don't work on any of the vacuums. Very frustrating. Seriously, how difficult is it to manage a self-service carwash?

Excellent takeout, inspired by Craig Laban's Instagram on Christmas. Got the assorted mushrooms dry pot (cut the heat on everything else and really good), diced chicken with hot pepper, and shredded pork in garlic sauce (which comes with a different kind of mushroom). Plenty for 2; only didn't realize I needed to order rice separately.

this place was really cool to visit. lots of history in those planes. do the bone yard tour if you're really into planes/history/etc. i agree with dan k's review of them lacking a snack shop. it gets really hot walking around outside, so bring some water with you if you can.

I went here with my family after we found out Bahama Breeze had an hour wait. I ordered the fish & chips. The fish was hot, fresh and delicious. My husband and son ordered the same thing and there was no complaints from them. The atmosphere was a little loud, but the waitress was friendly and helpful. I will definitely eat here again soon!

I wasn't quite sure what to expect when coming here. Well the burger wasn't too shabby just extremely messy with a shit load of their devine sauce. I got the Poutine Burger. The fries were pretty dang good, nice and crispy with just the right amount of salt.

Very nice bar atmosphere for happy hour and delicious food. I had a steak and my husband had the sea bass and both were excellent. The service was terrific as well. If you're looking for a nice dinner or drinks this is a good choice in the Tampa area!
Went into Backstage for a couple drinks. The service was fast and the staff was super friendly. if your looking for a place to enjoy some drinks i definitely recommend this place.
How are the prices so much higher than Creason's? It certainly can't be attributed to a difference in the cost of rent. Gouging artists seems like an unethical business model.

Philly cheesesteak and a wide selection of beer. We had the classic Philly cheesesteak and also the spicy version of it. Half and half of these two are probably the best as only eating one kind could get boring.

I'm a Marriott Reward Member, and have never posted a Yelp review before. But my stay here was bad enough to merit my first post. Customer service was poor, there was no TV remote in my room, and the bar/restaurant was understaffed. Plus, no internet. Definitely don't eat there, but also don't stay.
Went last night. The pizza was outstanding. We enjoyed the salad. Very fresh, lots of different greens, homemade balsamic dressing. Very cheap and we will be returning.

Sorry StraightUp Solar for the late update. Thank you for realizing that your contract and sales reps promises were not adequately reflected in your contract. Thank you for taking responsibility to repair a simple part which never needed to have been discussed on yelp.
Sadly my second experience here is as bad as the first. Very slow service When we were served. It seems like the food may have sat a while before it was served.I think they need more servers

Not as good as everyone says. The meat is chopped to small and it almost seems like ground beef the whiz is alright but I've had much better. It's alright but nothing special. Briantos in orlando Florida has the greatest cheese steaks known to man

I've lived in the Tampa Bay Area for a few years and have tried countless nails salons and pinky's is the BEST! The staff goes above and beyond to make sure I am taken care of. Their work is always flawless.
Real crab in the ragoons! From a spoiled Thai girl, not bad and I loved the atmosphere! Try the Thai fried rice but pass on the spring rolls.

This location always carries the items I need. I never have an issue with the store, organization or not carrying the products I need. The only negative I can share is at times they never have enough cashiers on hand to handle the lines that build at certain times. Other than that, this location is close, convenient, easy to get to, etc.
Slacks is my go to place when I don't know what to cook. I've even cater with them. They never disappoint.
Had my daughter's 11 birthday at Canvas Mixers. They all had a great time. Will definitely go again.
Edit: would not recommend. Nails lasted ONE week and I had to get them fixed wlsewhere
My husband and I went here for a mani/pedi. We were both very pleased with the wonderful service. I highly recommend this place.

Cool small atmosphere and very creative taco combinations. I love that any combinations of food can be served in either tacos, burritos, wet burritos, nachos, or a salad. I tried the Ace high, and the double mesa tacos, and I was very impressed. I cant wait to come back and try something else. Make sure to ask for corn tortillas with your tacos.
This place is a Vegans delight. However I am not Vegan but still the food here shines. After 2 hours after eating here, I get Chronic Farting. My cat even wants out.
Been in st pete 8 days and we've tried many places but this has been the best by far. The grouper is amazing!!!

The sushi and appetizers were very good. However, the hostess was not very accommodating when we entered the restaurant. The service was average. I would recommend this restaurant a couple, but not for more than two people.
This place is awesome. 1) Pool table is free 2) Good food - try the quesofundido 3) GREAT BEER SELECTION 4) Beer to-do 5) Awesome staff

Zero stars if i could. I went after the bar for my first ever cheesesteak. BAD IDEA. The lady at the window was not impressed with how stoked i was and handed me a cold steak n cheese. Chewy, cold and too much cheese wiz. Woof. My mistake.

This place is horrific. The rooms are remarkably bad...filthy, ripped furniture, sticky rugs, moldy...its that bad. We upgraded to a lager suite hoping for a better experience...no luck. I still can't believe this hotel is a part of the SPG brand. Unfortunately, the Aloft is getting bad too..

Thee most unorganized business I've been to in a long time. 4th vehicle in line, skipped 3 or 4 times. I worker per car and there were only 4 workers. Probably 10 cars there. You do the math! 1 1/2 hrs at a car wash, no thanks

Is zero stars an option? Really, really, really awful. I could go into more detail, but everything was so bad that it would take me all night, and I'm probably going to need to vomit soon anyway. If you like hair on your hamachi, give this place a try.
WHAT?????? 2 ice cream cones for $18. I bought two gyro sandwiches for less than that an hour ago. What a rip off. And the ice cream: NOTHING spectacular. STAY AWAY.
Sold out of Tamiflu. Annoying but I guess stuff happens. They are the closest to my home so not too bad. Cashiers are good and knowledgeable. I wish they opened earlier and stayed open later though.

Not bad for being a cheap hotel. The room was clean, the decor updated and the bed was comfortable. The location is within easy walking distance to town and the beach. What else do you need for $60 a night?

Convenient location in a nice neighborhood. Coffee is amazing! Specials are impressive. My boyfriend and I split two specials: lemon curd and blueberry French toast and roasted tomato polenta with grilled flank steak and eggs your way. Also had a side of homefries with peppers and onions. Delicious! Looking forward to visiting again.
Stumbled into this spot and really enjoyed ourselves! Great sushi, tasty skewers, and a killer sake deal. Kind of like a sports bar, only with sushi and an anime vibe. Definitely recommend!

Reservation is almost impossible to make, but when there experience is unbelievable. Favorite tapas dish was wild mushrooms - very tasty! Service is great though I do understand that they want to turn tables over ASAP. It is not cheap for Philly, but a great deal if you are used to NYC pricing. Definitely worth visiting this gem in the heart of old city.

We went for this world "famous" ham and were sorely disappointed. It was terrible, just bland and way overrated. I have had better ham at IHOP. Everything else was just okay. Nothing to stand in a long line for and the prices were a little pricey for this counter service restaurant
Such an awesome place! Love the atmosphere but especially the food! Excellent dishes! I recommend the Lagniappe or the Catfish Court Boullion!

Just say Overpriced Bait ! Nasty ! Do not waste your time eating at this place ! The Wait Staff is incredibly rude ! This place isn't gonna last long ! I ordered the Crab Legs ! Overpriced and tiny portions for both of us ! The fish was a overcooked Mrs Paul's fakelet ! Yuck ! Mushy and burnt on the outside !
Very solid sushi BYO place. The lead sushi guy makes sure you are taken care of and some of the offerings are unique. No complaints and we've been back several times.
I like their coconut soup & pad thai. It was tasty! The sushi was good too, their specialty rolls are saucy.
Got Covid here. -10/10 do not recommend I thought I'd be okay outside at their outdoor bars but the people were packed in like sardines.

The food was OK. The service was pretty good. Many of the selections looked alike. The sushi was fair. The desserts were good. Overally, just an average, run-of-the-mill Chinese buffet. Nothing special.
I received a message that they're planning to reopen soon, putting everyone's health at risk. Not ok!
I never ordered from Five Guys before. The two ladies working the register helped me figure out what to order and were so great! Kenya and Jakeira! The food is good too! Thanks
This place is easily the best Mexican food in all of Reno and surrounding areas... Authentic is an understatement... this is a must try
BWW is ok. I love sports, and bar games and they do this well. But the atmosphere is a bit off for me. It's simply too bright. The food is average at best.
Had horrible service on multiple occasions from employee "Ian". Burnt my pepperoni bagel melt to a hard unedible rock. Beware of this deli worker!
Our usual take out place. We really like the food and the service and speed are excellent. We usually get the two entrees but we could split one if we agreed on what to eat.

Called, very rude. I asked what kind of wings they have and he didn't even say hold on just hit the button on me. The pictures of the menu on here are not what they have so don't even ask. Treated me like they didn't want me as a customer
Good food, great prices. The staff wasn't so friendly and the ordering process can be confusing. A must see, but don't kill yourself trying.

Learned a lesson about the food at this joint. It's only worthwhile on Friday. They only cook the food on that day. By Saturday it's been stored at room temperature for 24 hrs. This revelation can only be concluded when the weather cools off. What I get is served at the 60 degree temp.that I visited on that day.
Quck service on to go orders, quality of food was average. Inside seems a little small but manageable. Its typical pizza food.

Pretty standard Steak n' Shake restaurant and fare. Love the milkshakes, but who doesn't?! Usually the service is ok but last 2 times I went, the staff was too busy fighting with each other to wait on customers, including the manager. Not a good impression.

I've been here before and enjoyed the food. This time however, we found a cockroach on our table. I immediately lost my appetite. We told the staff about this, showed them the cockroach and they didn't seem overly concerned. We still had to pay full price for our meal... Let's just say we won't be back.

Good service, server was nice but with super duper weak drinks. Live band played great island tunes. However even when ordering top shelf, tender must have put a thimble full of spirits in it, but charged one & done prices. Will not repeat this visit nor bring anyone here with these embarrassing kool-aid drinks.

Meh. Was not impressed with their selection of handles at all. Country music blaring the whole time and no food. Also, bartender kept calling me ma'am which made me feel like an old lady. On the upside: VERY clean. Great layout with plenty of outdoor seating. Will stick to Brass Tap or WOB Brandon.

The sushi was bland and overpriced for being so. The steak and chicken meal was decent but again way overpriced especially given the portion size. All in all, a pretty disappointing experience to my stomach and wallet. Much better sushi places around Nashville
Morgan is great! They fit me in on short notice and my blowout looked amazing. Definitely the best blowout I have had yet.
We'll appointed spa in Land O Lakes I tried the peppermint pedi and it was good not great. My mom has a mani and pedi and Jill Did a fantastic job. Next time I will request Jill.

Here for brunch. The eggs Benedict (Just a Benny in the menu) were perfection. The shrimp po-boy was also delicious...lightly breaded shrimp so you can taste the seafood. Great service! Friendly and funny!
Best fried chicken Wings in the city with a spicy Cajun season. I recommend the fries and salad. The shrimp fried rice is horrible!

Crab & Shrimp Salad was very good. The employees are nice and they do check on you if it's not to busy. They are very busy at lunch time during mild weather in the evening's.. I will be back for more SUP! JKKUHL LLC..

Service was great, the food was almost horrible. It wasn't that bad, but wasn't great like when several years ago I went there. Cold inside, you can tell the owner was skimping on the heat. Guess its going downhill. Most likely will not be back-several other great diners.

Normally a Great taco place. Good unusual tacos and friendly people. This review is only for the gnarly nachos. I got them with chicken. The chicken was boiled, about a tablespoon of Pico and a little cheese and sour cream and a good amount of chips and black beans. Very disappointing and no flavor. In my opinion they should stick to their awesome tacos.
I asked to use the restroom, the guy told me to go behind a dumpster. Absolutely disgusting

Stopped in for breakfast. Nice and clean. Pleasant staff. The sausage and egg breakfast sandwich had: - great bread. - small and overly salty sausage. - the smallest slice of cheddar cheese that I have ever seen.
Delicious, just like mom's cooking service is excellent. My kids love and requested for this place once a week
Nice atmosphere. The pasta portions are huge. I had their pasta carbonara. Good, but more saucy/watery then most Italian places make it. Thin crust pizza was pretty good.

First, really great service! Second, great simple boba! I tried it hot for the first time and it was delicious. They also have combo options to try an appetizer and a dessert along with your entree and all 3 were very delicious! My friend got the Yakisoba noddles and they were amazing! We'll definitely be coming back:)
I know they like long, specific reviews here, but too bad. All I'm saying is - try the crawdads!
I have shopped all the Murphy's for 22 years and have not had a problem. I like the smaller store. You are in and out quicker.
Suuuuuuper slow drive thru. The chicken sandwich is quite delicious though. Almost as good as Chick-fil-A.

The place is always busy, so get there super early. The food is good but overpriced. If you have a lot of money and a lot of time and you want some good pizza, you should check out pizza delicious--- you're sure to see some hot hipsters while you wait .
Not very clean, floor was slippery like wax was on it. Some kid even slid into my ankle and scratched it at the trash can. Food was good however. Probably won't dine in ever, but would do take out.

The place is small, the food portions are even smaller. However the price is way too much for what you get. As we sat in the restaurant the door was left wide open so we can see the dishwasher, and waitress eating in the back. We will not be going back. Not worth it at all.
Right now I am craving there Caesar salad... And I dont even like Caesar salds! So yeah it was gooood! Ok prices. Pretty good food and service. I love the ambiance. Never had a bad time there!
Nicole is awesome and very talented! Would definitely go back here to see her! They are all super nice wish I never tried to try something new by going other places!
If you like South American food this is your place, a local place right in Collingswood. I had a spicy chicken stew which was very unique. The desserts are homemade. The best part it is a BYOB!

Went there for lunch average service the pizza was ok not mean or anything like that just not really friendly either. A bit pricey at $3 a slice..they are not huge slices. The crust on the pizza was good the toppings were ok maybe a just a tad cold due to it being really cold in the dining room.

I came in at 330. The place closed at 4. They started turning the lights off as well as the tv at 345. I guess that's there way of telling me and my guest to leave. It was dark and they didn't say anything. So fucking rude.

Total Wine & More is not so "total." They have an very limited selection of fruit wines (blueberry, blackberry, etc). And I just found out they stopped carrying my Tree of Life Pomegranate wine. The employees are very helpful, though.
They did a great job on car. It looks great! The owner was very thorough and went over all the shades they provide. Definitely recommend
the bahn mi were excellent with very flavorful pork. the bun was good, not great.
They were very good. I had to do nothing they did it all. Only thing is they aren't good with communication. I had to call them for everything. Other than that they were great.

Excellent food! Very fresh. We had the ceviche trilogy and the Andino bowl - both were great. The owner was very friendly and helped us choose what to get. Our waitress was nice, but didn't come check on us, refill our water, or remove dirty dishes. Despite this, we'll definitely be back.

PORTION RIP OFF!!!!! Friendly staff, nice place. BUT the portion to price ratio is honestly a rip off. Not to mention the drinks. No fries with A $16 BURGER?? You hungry? They fail to tell you the mushroom malfatti is an incredibly small portion. Good food but no generosity.
Delicious as always! I'm not sure how they maintain consistency between locations but they have figured it out. Wether we are in Texas Utah Nevada or California that are on point!
Very clicky bar. Very unfriendly and I would never recommend this place to anyone unless you want to get in a fight!!!
I love this gym, it is always clean and has a nice variety of equipment to use! Even at peak hours it still isn't bad, unlike fitness connection, that place is a nightmare

Very good Mediterranean food!! The service was good! The falafel lunch entree was tasty and filling, although the falafel might have been a bit over fried. The kofte lunch entree was a little disappointing but it wasn't bad. The food quantity is great. It was the baklava that was outstanding and made this a four star review!!!

I really really wanted to give this place a second try so I ordered again today. I ordered crab cheese fries from Uber eats and guess what it was missing? The crab. I couldn't believe it. I literally just had cheese fries. They don't answer the phone and I just wasted my money. Don't order from here it isn't worth it.
We always get delivery, and it's super fast and good. I feel like everything is fresh and pretty healthy. Our go-to Chinese take out!

this is a TERRIBLE place, if I could give this a negative one star I would. the service is terrible, the managers are disrespectful and rude, the management is unorganized and needs work & I will never be returning. don't waste your time coming into the panera on 96th
It was ok...not great but ok. Meat was tender and flavorful. The cheesy potatoes were greasy, but if you drain them they tasted pretty good. Don't get the baked beans...they taste scorched.
George and Zach the plumbers went above and beyond my expectation! they're responsive, polite, and affordable. they will be my go-to people! Thank you Res-Com plumbing
The service was great but the food was poor quality, the chicken on my chicken fettuccine was dry, and my meal was over priced. I won't be coming here again.
Food was ok not bad. Drinks were better. Thing is, everyone was super rude! I will never go back to this shithole. Spend your money somewhere else. Y me vale verga!

The environment was nice, but the food was sup par. We ordered chicken parm to share, there was no side dish. The menu did not say a la cart. We ordered dessert to go, chocolate cake & cheese cake , we both took one bite & threw it away. I would not recommend this restaurant,
Atmosphere was very quiet. The food was mediocre and our server was extremely slow. We were one of the two tables in the dining room so it was disappointing how long it took.

I had an Asian Salad here while on a layover at the Philadelphia Airport. It wasn't the best and it was very pricey. The dressing was a little too spicy for my taste buds and I like spicy. I would suggest you get dressing on the side. I really have nothing further to say...

Great drink selection. Poor service. You order through an iPad, no problem. But then the bartenders never check on you to make sure everything is okay. They just stand in a group behind the bar complaining loudly about their problems and how they aren't getting enough tips. Maybe smile and ask your guests if they need anything?

Food is pretty go but the service and timeliness of the food is not acceptable. Either you need to staff better or find a new manager because the amount of time spent waiting on food is absolutely not right
I ordered a muffin and it was really dry. The cashier messed up one of our orders so she gave us a free drink, which is nice.
The food was amazing. The food was hot and fresh. Dede provided great service. Will return again...
Thoroughly enjoyed the crab fries. The were hot and fresh right from the fryer.. Had the buffalo wings and stopped after 2. They were way too salty! My date enjoyed the snow crab legs.

I went here on the recommendation of a coworker and I now owe him one. This place is a small Mexican grocery store BUT they also have a cafe/grill there where they make some awesome tacos and quesadas. Do not let the look of this place deceive you; the food is very good and very cheap! I am looking forward to coming back soon.
We have been there so many times and have always had great food and good service. Fish sandwich is outstanding as are the hamburgers ----my husband always liked the fried chicken!
Not a half bad neighborhood bar. The patio was pretty nice, drinks were just alright though. Tables were hard to come by.

Pretty cool bar with a bit of everything. There are pool tables and darts, special beer pong tables, and even a dance floor space. Haven't tried the food, the overall my experience was good. Happy Hour prices were very cheap.
Are we not open for business anymore? Multiple times I've went there during normal business hours and they are either completely closed or the lobby is closed.

Went to the Philadelphia location. The one star is not a critique of the chiropractor. Andrew was perfectly fine. I gave 1 star because it is literally in the middle of the staff office in a CrossFit gym. No door. No privacy. Very weird. Maybe works for some, but not me.

Great place...Was visiting Philly for the weekend with some friends and we went there multiple times the pizza was so good! Friendly staff and the slices really are huge. Def a spot to check out in the Old City area!
I had the greatest experience at Dr. Dukes! Office staff is friendly and very helpful. Would highly recommend. 10/10! Big fan of their massage chairs too!

The food was excellent. The Tostones were seasoned to perfection. The Chivo Guizado(Stewed Goat) was delicious. Service was good. I would definitely come back. Very nice to have good ethnic food options in the neighborhood.
I have been trying to get here for years! I was not disappointed. The fried chicken and yams were great. I'm not used to sugar in greens but it wasn't bad. The peach cobbler will bring me back.
Chile rellenos in the Tucson Area rated according to the Homeland Security Advisory System with three word descriptors. Crossroads Restaurant: an oval plate. Yellow See photos.
Building is nice and looks like a great place BUT WHEN you get the food it is horrible. All oily food and poor quality. Pollo Tropical or Taco Bell next door is a better option. Dont go!

So slow.... If you are in a hurry I recommend going somewhere else. I thought because I was the only person in the lobby and the fact that 6+ employees were there it would be quicker today. But if you have time to wait it is worth it.
A hot spot of a little gem! Plenty is whiskey and creative drinks flowing.. Always an interesting crowd, the charm of the Burg! By the way, the good us amazing and great happy hour specials:::
I seriously love this place. Every time I'm in SB, I make a trip here. Their burgers are awesome. Love the truffle fries too!

Dinner tonight sucked! If Jason is your waiter run immediately!! Do not expect the impotent bald headed manager to actually do anything, you will be sadly disappointed. This place is all hype and no substance. Worst service in downtown St Pete. There are much better options on Beach Dr. This place needs to disappear quickly.

Cap'n Cats is one of my favorite restaurants in south Jersey, and my go-to place for my birthday dinner. Their fried seafood platter is great and I dig all the local and historical stuff on their walls.
These guys use ROBOCALLS to get customers. Mine came in at 8:10 AM on a Saturday. I went through the system long enough to find out who the contractor is.
Call in on Monday morning and wait 20 minutes, good ole FMFCU.
Great atmosphere, it feels like a log cabin in the middle of the city. They have a respectable bourb

First off, I am a fish expert. And I order the grouper picata And the fish was not absolutely not grouper. I am certain it was tilapia. This place has once again let me down. You can't fool a native Floridian when I comes to fish.
Awful service. Didn't satisfy a basic request that was made days ago. Don't come here if you need any accommodation.
The best pizza I have ever had! Would defenitly go back and also has great service.
I enjoyed a really tasty dinner with friends and my 3 year old son. The food, staff, and music absolutely fabulous!
I had out of towners that wanted imos. It took over an hour, and the pizza was barely warm. On of my guests were looking forward to the hot cheese. Might be my last order from Imos

Very nice, relaxed place for breakfast. Benedict perfect, omelette great. I know my review is short but sometimes no need to extrapolate on goodness. Do go, won't regret it. Service us wonderful and attentive, prices normal for breakfast. Close to downtown.

they did a good job cleaning but quoted $180 on the phone, $370 in person, ok fine it was dirty, but then they called a third person , didn't warn that it would cost more , then the final bill was $600 before tip. im not crazy about that. they cleaned fine, i would have them back with the sharp time limit.

I had been there for snacks on a weekend evening. Ordered Bhelpuri, Dabeli and Chai. The Chai and Dabeli were decent. But the Bhelpuri was very bad. It was very soggy. The tables looked a bit dirty. I would not return back to this place.
Best tacos in Santa Barbara! Make sure to wash them down with the watermelon juice drink

I have difficulty finding anything good to say about the Saints.... So I won't...The Saints have been pretty consistent at being bad throughout the years....And although they've had a winning season here and there over the last several years, they struggle to be consistently good... The thing I dislike the most about the Saints is the ever-annoying "who dat" chant....
Great place clean and good service 5/5 stars would recommend screw Gamestop because game traders has more.

Place is ok for a cheap drink of PBR for a dollar during their happy hour. They also have a decent amount of beer on tap and bottle. It is not the cleanest looking place though. I did see a dead roach in the display case on the wall.
I went with a big group and we had to wait forever almost an hour because they don't take reservations. No food is worth that kind of wait.

I have a customer who has been recommending Shish Kabob to me for a couple years. Finally had the chance to grab a quick lunch here last week. I didn't realize it would be a buffet style. Not usually a fan of buffets but that's ok. The food was good!
If you been to one Walgreens, then you have seen what they all look like. They all carry the same stuff. Some of it good, and some really cheap stuff.
Very Cool place to grab a couple of drinks and appetizers. The Nacho Mama and Taco sampler plater were both excellent. Can't wait to return for dinner.
Wow! This was one of the best meals I have eaten. All of the flavors were amazing. Outstanding service. Well worth the cost. We enjoyed a Sunday brunch.

We like to come to this location after church, but have become progressively more disappointed with the food and service. People waiting over 20 minutes for their food, serving raw burgers and not serving customers in order of arrival.
Always fast and courteous service. They have notary service a few days a week. Call ahead to confirm schedule.

For a restaurant located in a neighborhood, really bad idea to take chicken fingers and fries off the menu. I know it is still on kids menu, but some 15 year olds still prefer that to anything else. Just lost a once a month customer. Applebees is just down the road!
this place is crap the price is crap the service is crap the meat is spoiled there are always empty shelves the sushi is crap and the manager is a total female dog.
Good pizza and wings. Key to the wings to go is to get them extra crispy with the sauce on the side. Love Bella's food and the beer selection is pretty solid.

Really good for people not looking to wait extra long for breakfast but still want something good. It's affordable and the staff is friendly. You may have to stand in a small line for no more than a couple minutes since this place is favored by locals.

Love this place - Sharon does my hair every time and she is GREAT! Pays close attention to all of my requests and has a great sense of humor, too. The rest of her team is so friendly and they do a great job making everyone feel at home. Sharon is a great owner!
Great sandwiches made on grilled Formica bread Atmosphere very nice and clean. Location is also a big plus ... Close to major shopping area

Burgers are spot on, my favorite in St. Pete, although my fiance prefers The Burg Bar (quite the in house rivalry we've got going on). We both agree that Engine No. 9's apps and desserts are delicious. They also have a substantial selection of beer. I only wish they had more tables, especially more room for parties greater than four.
Poor customer service. Food that I ordered was wrong. When we ask for our check our sever said "...can't you see I am busy" Sorry I will not return.
No thank you. Service is nothing special. Design was nothing like picture. Overpriced. Curious to see how long gel will last. Did not even clean cuticles up!!
Time: Friday Happy Hour Scene: a cluster of loud middle aged men Pros: Philadelphia Brewing Co on tap Cons: is that a cigar I smell?

Tried to go here but was rushed at as soon as I opened the door telling me that they were closing. It was 8:50 pm and they were supposed to be open until midnight. Totally put a bad taste in my mouth and I will not be returning.
Nice place for hiking with the kids. The membership is a great deal. We love visiting the pond to see frogs, fish, turtles and even snakes.

One of the few STL coffee shops where the taste of the coffee beats Starbucks. Also, the service and the decor are great. You can browse through design magazines while sipping on hot coffee. Also has free Wifi and free events--we went to a harp concert recently and loved it! (Wish they stayed open later)
Fast and friendly service. Not from around the area so I was unsure what to order, but the employee I talked to gave great advice. Got the Cuban and loved it! Chill spot to eat and great food.
Excellent food, flavor packed. Delivery was reasonable time. Reasonably priced portions. Definitely suggest getting a couple dishes and sharing!

Went back since this was only nearby eatery Indifference of staff and poor attitude still reigns just fewer four letter Words and the y do not curse the customers. What an improvement. Maybe they watched The burger Scene with OfficerFarver in super troopers. Nasty staff Nediocre food. Cold or lukewarm coffee.

This has been my go to spot for years because it was non-smoking long before a smoking ban existed in saint louis. The brisket or fish tacos are my favorites but everything on the menu is pretty tasty. Cocktail museum is fun for trying out something different. The service is always great.
super relaxing experience here. Amy was my tech and she was great! i will definitely be returning in the future!!

Used to be obsessed with these burgers and amazing flavor. Now, they are gritty and difficult to enjoy. Staff was friendly, at least. Wasn't easy to finish my burger this time, so realistically I won't be back. Bummer.

Love the menu, good wholesome breakfast fare. Healthier options as well. They also have nitro cold brew now. Filling, good portions, friendly staff, nice atmosphere. Feels like our new local breakfast spot. Most importantly food was made to order!!! Not sitting under warming lamps like keke's or first watch!!!!

I went there on March 8th to get 2 new tires after visiting the N. Dale Mabry location. The manager was great. Ordered the tires I needed (at a significantly lower price) and installed them that day. I did not experience the poor service here that others have mentioned. I did, however, receive piss poor service from the N. Dale Mabry location.

Overall, a very nice place. We enjoyed our food and the service and staff was great. I had the crazy burrito and although the flavor profile was excellent, it was quite dry. We will certainly return and try some additional menu items.

I won't go back. I needed a relaxing spa experience. It wasn't that, for sure. The arm on the chair was broken. The massager wasn't working. The technician acted like it was a race to finish as quickly as possible. She was rough and her "foot massage" was a joke. Speed rubbing with no pressure. I went to relax and left annoyed.

Always a pleasure coming here. My favorites are the Bordeaux and Atchafalaya pizzas! With an order of feta fries! Finish up with sangria and a slice from one of Debbie's doberge cakes and you are set for life!

It's a very large, downtown conference center hotel. The in-room internet is extremely slow and requires you to pay extra on top of already expensive rooms. It's comfortable, but I'd call the rooms pretty average for the price.

Previous review was unfair they were on COVID protocol and Google didn't update. Went on Friday with Brittany and she is fiesty but honest! Sound was great! Next time in Nashville will come back! Also has food!
I gotta say that I did not enjoy my coffee flavored sugar water. Admittedly, I didn't expect great things. But eh.

Had to come down and try it since we're bar rescue fiends! The pizza was awesome and we'll definitely be back for more! The second state punch was on my list to try and I didn't like it too much, but I don't know if she made it very well. Cool atmosphere but the staff could be a little friendlier.

This Pizza Hut is extremely slow, two hours to wait for pizza. When I got it it was cold. I'm sure that other Pizza Hut's aren't this slow. I did receive a text when the pizza was delivered which was two hours later and that is 120 minutes. Their information states 80 to 90 minutes. By all accounts this should be free.
Eden was awesome. She gave us the scope on the area. The cajun omelette was great. Diner menu look awesome. I will come back for sure!

It's the bogo day, and the wait time was about 45 minutes. Everyone works hard and still very friendly. However, my drinks were very disappointed. I ordered extra hot and got them warm. Also, the drinks were less than 3/4 full. So I brought one drink and break it into two cups???

So we did not have alcohol and I know they are known for the Hurricane. Our server Brandy was awesome. Just the food wasn't that great. Pulled pork sandwich was way too much sauce and the bread was fairly dry, and raw onions. . . Nah. Seafood cakes were pretty blah too.

We called an order in for a scheduled time and then waited 45 minutes for "curbside" service. If the staff is limited perhaps they should have waited to open their doors for dine-in service. Obviously staff was not trained so that falls on the managers head. Extremely disappointing!!!

This is our first visit to Vedge since the Covid19 pandemic changed our lives. The food was once again fabulous and merits all the glowing reviews it has received over the years! This time I want to commend the management and staff for their careful attention to strict sanitization and masking protocols which made for a safe and welcoming dining experience for everyone!
The store was fairly clean and spacious, but the selection itself was nothing to spend your time searching through. Organizing by size or color at least would help.

Charming little Italian restaurant on a quaint-feeling main road. The food was very tasty. I had a pesto burger with fresh mozzarella, and I was not at all disappointed. This was a creative take on a food I frequently eat. I would certainly return.
Ambience, classic, beignets, mimosas, water.... this place is on point new Orleans. Save your time and come here.
The worst brisket ever!! Totally dried out and cold. Furthermore the staff working the meat could careless. Would never recommend this to anyone

On a whim we ordered Chinese and it was reliable! Crab Rangoon was on point, spring rolls were OK but everything else was what was expected! That's probably the best review for Chinese take out you can hope for. Reliable

Trash...garbage...just a few words that come to mind concerning quality of service. Customer service is literally the worst I've experienced and I was once a Comcast customer! Rates have continued to increase regularly, if you have a second option-- TAKE IT.

So my coworker told me about this place and how great it is, so of course I had to check it out. He was completely right, this place was great and their Cubans are on point! The price is extremely reasonable.
Jumped through hoops to make an appointment here but never got a call back. I sent them all the information they requested and even stopped by. I eventually gave up.

Bartenders are horrible. The girls are too young and inexperienced. They give you attitudes if you ask them questions. The food is great. I feel bad for Lee Roy. If he saw this at his bar he would be ashamed.

My wife and I went here for our anniversary. It's fairly expensive and the menu is highly creative sometimes too creative for our tastes. The waiter was well versed on each dish and paired wines for each course. We definitely will go back in the future.
Slow rude service. From slamming the coffee cup on the table and complaining about working 70hrs a week. Food barely warm.

The reason i rated it a 1 was because the food is great but the customer service is shit, everyone always has an attitude and every time i order food there i always don't get what i ordered. But i wouldn't recommend coming to this Salem's maybe if they had Chick-fil-A customer service I'd go there lol
Here, super friendly people will bring you great curry!
The food is just average. The service is not consistent. This restaurant is good for kids

Review of the fish and chips: very good. The fish is crispy on the outside and moist on the inside. They are served with some malt vinegar and tartar sauce on the side, and taste pretty great! A small side of chips accompany the fish, thick cut and lightly salted. Nice!

This is a nice hamburger joint. I got a cheeseburger and for 2.25 more you get fries and a drink. I think fries come with the option of onion rings. I'll compare this to In N Out, it's more expensive, and doesn't taste as good. But it has a nice beachy atmosphere, oh free refills

A fun place to listen to live music and eat a basic, bland brunch. The band wasn't too loud and was very fun to listen to! The hash browns were mushy and unseasoned. The eggs Benedict was fine but nothing to rant about. Bottomless mimosas for $17 was a great deal!
Consistently delicious. High quality, perfectly prepared and excellent service. If you like Indian food this is a must try.
don't use yelp waitlist for first watch in villanova. it doesn't work here. it would be nice if they removed themselves from using the waitlist feature. the food is still good.
Wonderful hotel. Great rooms, good service and nice location! Fitness center was okay- could have been nicer, but they have all the machines you need. Restaurant for lunch was excellent!

Super Cucas is my all time favorite Mexican place. This was were I had my first California burrito 6 years ago and I haven't had a better one since. Roy the manager is a total badass and deals with so many drunks everyday, but is always smiling and laughing. I love this place!
Really bad customer services. They really don't value their frequent customer!! Wouldn't go there again!

It was ok, the burger was great but not worth 6 buck for just a single burger with no cheese. Fries are just like white castles and we got a large drink. Burger, fries and drink 11.00. Not my style. Burger was great. You be the judge.

I absolutely love this place. The staff is very nice and understanding toward young moms who are bringing their infant kids, they offer variety of classes, some of which are super helpful. The ambiance is relaxing and the postnatal yoga instructor was amazing.

Really nice acrylics but they were kinda impatient with me. They were super sarcastic which confused me and for a first time acrylic do-er I didn't appreciate that. A lot of color options and really good quality.
For what this is - a Garden Inn - this is a nice hotel.

Not the same as the other Hooters I've been to. Defiantly a different product coming out of the kitchen. The greeter had to put her head down on the podium on our war out. Tired I assume? Kinda funny to see at 3 pm on a weekday.
Went for an oil change and a safety recall....took 5hrs so if you go there make sure you have PLENTY of time

Still five stars. Always a great experience. Courtyard great place for conversation. Excellent free breakfast - shout out to Mr. Duane and his staff for his good food, friendly, family-type service with New Orleans style. Great location for parade goers and Mardi Gras krewe riders with super easy access to load in and disbanding. Highly recommended.
Came here for dim sum with the family. Maybe I'm comparing it to LA but there there doesn't seem to have that much flavor.
I thought it was just as good as the other location on Grand...I went on a Saturday morning and it wasn't very crowded so we were seated right away and the food was excellent as usual.

Offering sit in dining. This restaurant is located in the same building as the Bloom market. The restaurant is beautifully decorated with wood tones and has a cottage feel to it. I got the split pea soup with a salad. Delicious and simple. Service was prompt and courteous and the menu had a lot of variety. Definitely a good place for brunch and breakfast.

Ordered takeout for here and the service was very fast and efficient!! The food was OUTSTANDING, I generally do not order burgers from restaurants; but read reviews and tried it out. Glad I did!! Fries would have been better in the restaurant, not there fault!!

Stopped in on a Sunday morning without a reservation. They were able to squeeze us in which was great. Our drinks were okay but the food was great. Our waiter was a little off but the manger or owner kept coming by to check on us and was very helpful!
I don't know what I was expecting, it looked and smelled terrific but it did not go down well. I'd rather chain up for a pizza than Red Brick it.
My husband and I both had bagels and they were ok. The lox bagel was super salty. I ended up taking all the toppings off and just eating the bagel with cream cheese. Service was good.
It's what you expect you go to a McDonald's. Not gourmet but quick and easy. Facility was very clean but clearly steps in automation have removed the human element.

If you're looking for a little dive place with great food which doesn't have a line of tourists around this is your spot. Had the crabmeat and shrimp casserole and it was amazing. They have different items for each day of the week which is cool since you don't have to decide from too many good dishes at once.
This was THE BEAT CORNBREAD I've EVER had! The cook is so nice & friendly! The food was delicious. I HIGHLY recommend trying this place out!

everything was wonderful - staff, food, setting! we got there at just the right time as there was a huge line as we left - only down for me but that's because im a picky eater was the bacon really wasn't bacon. However my normal eating friend had the banana foster pancakes and is in love! you wont regret the choice

Writing this review sitting in the restaurant. Food is good, excellent biryani. Here for the second time, just for biryani Service STINKS. Misorganized, slow, and actually waiting for a dahi sev chat for over 20 mins. The preparation for this takes less than 1 min how can one take 20 mins for this. Delivered in 24 mins finally

O.K. Slice. This busy spot probably was worthy of just a brief review, because it isn't a top tier pizza,.... but it is also NOT a bottom tier pizza. I'll get into a bit more detail given the slew of negative comments. This pizza is decent, and would be worthy of another stop if I was nearby.

Restaurant did not appear all that busy, but it took well over an hour before our main courses arrived. I ordered the filet and asked for the sauce to be on the side, it didn't come that way. Filet was ok, I have had worse, and I have had better. The decor is very nice, as was our server.

The owner picked apart my trade, (which your not supposed to do in this business) refused us to test drive a Jeep, wanted 4000 down without knowing I have an 816 credit score. He gave the impression that he was better than me, very condescending!

I tried this salon because of the goods reviews, but unfortunately, my experience was very disappointing. I went back, so Laura could fix it and she messed my hair up even more. Can't say she was even friendly about it.

I've been to several locations over the years but this is the best! Must see my personal fav Brittany! She's knowledgeable, experienced and always in the best of fun moods ! Don't take my appointment time but make your own!
First time going hear. Expensive, and mediocre taste. Probably won't be coming back. If it was half the price it might be worth it. But I can think of a bunch more restaurants that are better.
Did not allow my service dog inside. Security insisted on "papers," which is never a requirement nor is it legal to request them.

I just had my first laser hair appointment at Santori and it was amazing! The Wayne location is very very clean and the staff was so professional and experienced. My technician was Meghan and she was so personable and welcoming and made the whole experience very comfortable!
Cute little place right next to the Sunken Gardens. Convenient dessert parlor to take the kids after an afternoon outdoors.

I'm really not impressed with Miller's. Yes they have cheap drinks, but they are VERY weak. The food is not great and actually overpriced. I understand stopping here for happy hour now and again. However, there are much better options.

The guy Hispanic waiter is a total waste. Took ten minutes to take my order because he was to busy talking to friends. It took another 15 minutes after I requested my check from a different waitress to get me my check. Terrible service.
The food is off the hook and if you like a great drink, get Raul's top shelf Margarita!!!!
I attending an open mike event, drank good red wine (a zinfandel) and had the cheese plate. Everything was delicious and the evening was most enjoyable.

I travel from DE because I know the food will always be good! They portions are huge and the price is right. If you want good Jamaican food this is the place to get it from. They also make all sorts of health drinks on site. Staff is friendly and service is prompt.
Great food, too bad it's so dark and loud. Wonderful truffled mac&cheese with crispy prosciutto...good enough to make up for the lousy atmosphere.
A great 'go to' Chinese. Not fancy but competently prepared standard Chinese fare. If you're looking for some crispy Spring Rolls and Sesame Chicken then this is the place you want to try.

This place is ridiculous, they lie about traffic and it looks a hot mess. Still an extreme amount of construction going on, just a total mess. No free parking, so add on a fee for that. Ridiculous, do not recommend for anyone to come all the way out here.
6 Shrimp for $12.99 - no thank you. Burger had no seasoning, Fish n Chips were soggy with oil. We've been here prior with no issues. Hope it gets better.

I'm so happy they started to deliver breakfast. They may be the only restaurant that does in Landsdowne and I'm grateful. The staff is always pleasant and friendly. The coffee needs improvement. The breakfast sandwiches taste great!

Ordered the "scorch" chicken tenders. If you like it smothered in seasonings to where you can't even taste the hot chicken flavoring, this is your place. Literally half an inch thick in SEASONING. Not sauce. Was a disappointment, especially with all the rave reviews. Will stick to The Stillery from now on for hot chicken!
Food: 3.5 Decor: 2.5 Ambiance: 3 Service: 3 Value: 3 Their chicken cheesesteak is fantastic. Every other aspect of this place is very average.
Food average Service slow but friendly Can't beat live music with breakfast (prohibition jazz & blues)

Beautiful restaurant that was super private and served wonderful food. Honestly it was just a little snooty for my taste. Everyone who worked there sort of walked around with their noses in the air. It just felt stuffy. Great for a romantic evening.

Food is OK, its not the greatest, the smoothies are better. One suggestion is to improve your service, I usually go on my lunch break and end up waiting to have my order taken, even if there is no line. The service is just too slow.
Our first visit. Food is great ..hot and minimal wait time. Friendly atmosphere. Menu includes burgers, chicken, chili dogs . Will be back in spring to try out their ice cream menu.

Taste like sh!t. They're nothing worth bragging about. I could make a better sandwich at my house. For the price I just paid..$8 I'll keep my foot long subway chips and drink. People only claim to like them cause Brees has something to do with the franchise.
Nice looking 20-30somethings crowd, but tap list is short and lacks character. Nothing that you wouldn't find at Applebee's. Disappointed...
The most authentic Chinese food you can get in this area. Great food, reasonable prices, service is so-so. Will be coming back.

It's refreshing to find a restaurant in Tucson that has actual green lettuce. I don't think it's as fresh as it should be, but it's definitely a better salad option than what you would get at most other restaurants in this city. The pasta/baked goods/dessert is good.

I wish I would've read the reviews on yelp. I would have avoided this place. Poor service for an Aveda salon. The person that did the facial that was the bright spot, but you're better off going to the Aveda salon downtown.
A very interesting place for a quick meal. Would recommend Curried Goat. Definitely a very unique small restaurant in downtown Carmel.

Beautiful location. Have to sit outside Don't notice any problems with staff as others noted. Clam chowder is excellent. Had calimari sandwich and it was ok. Little too much on sandwich to really taste calimari. Better when I removed things. Wife thought cashew chick salad was ok. Brought kids. Basic kids menu. Overall good experience

Large party dinner during the EMS Expo. Food was ok - Shrimp and Grits and hubs had fried shrimp dinner. Servers were slow and missed items. A super loud, heavy drinking party was 1 table over and drowning out conversation. Would I come back??? Probably only if we stayed in the hotel again!
I called in to order food and there was a drunk person that answered and repeatedly said that I was calling into Taco Bell. Very professional.

Do not get the Pot Roast or the Brisket with gravy on top. Both tasted terrible. The staff and atmosphere was nice though. The rest of the table had mixed reactions ranging from average to bad. Go somewhere else if you can. The prices aren't worth it.

Cannot believe how no one at this establishment will admit there mistake. Broke my tooth while eating here, was told that they would take care of it, and all I have gotten is no response! Way to go! Impressive

Went to brauhouse for a late drink and cocktail. Hours posted were til 2am. But showed up at around 12:05 to see that the bar was already closed. I would expect that the bar be open to its posted hours.
Had a family Christmas here with 18 people and everyone loved it and ur right next to a bunch of things and get to stare over the water.

Ok airport some sections seem old and need to be updated!! Not a lot of charging stations for electronics like most airports! Didn't have a bad experience, everyone was very helpful if needed anything and security lines didn't take forever to get through.

It was raining all day so we decided to do something inside. The whole bottom floor is dedicated to Katrina and the whole top floor to Mardi Gras. I was hoping to see more city history. If say skip it and do some historic home tours instead.

Love the park but I dont go here often anymore since they threatened to give me a fine for not picking up after my dog. She went nearcthe woods off the sidewalk and their were no signs or trash cans either. The stars are for the park not the park employees.

One star so I could even write a review, Ill never go back thrown out not only by myself but a United States marine for backing now President Trump..this place gives you boxed pasta? From an Italian? Don't go here period! God bless President Trump and The United States Of America. .low grade dog food.
The food is rarely right. Last time I was there, i ordered 4 cheese Mac and cheese. It came and had no cheese. Sent it back. Service was great though.
BEST FROZEN YOGURT EVER! Hidden in a plaza but great froyo! Plus, I love the penguin decor!! Make sure you sign up for the rewards and they'll text you coupons!

This place was recommended locally and I found it rated good to excellent here. I was not impressed. I would call it just ok. The food quality was mediocre and the bbq (I had the beef brisquit) was just ok.
Owner is a liar and a cheat. Don't go there. One of the worst people I have ever dealt with
Our butter chicken was lacking flavor but they were so nice when we picked up our carry out. We will for sure try it again. I love that they are in the neighborhood.

This is by far the best place to go to eat some charbroiled oysters! It is more on the expensive side, but you get what you pay for. Love the atmosphere and the employees are always great! Go here very often to eat some oysters and wouldn't pick any other place!
Their General Tso Tofu is something I will order whenever I am near this restaurant.
We have been to continental numerous times and generally like it. Tonight the service was painfully slow and inattentive. Disappointed, especially since it was a birthday dinner.

The yogurt is great and the kids love it. The folks that work here aren't sure what to do if your card won't swipe though. I asked the young lady to enter the numbers on the card manually and she automatically seemed annoyed.

One of the most delicious pizzas I have ever eaten! This place ranks up there with pizzas from Italia and New York. Fresh and savory ingredients from dough to cheese to toppings. Loved it! A must try in Boise.
I'm pissed! I ordered a burrito meal and even tho I don't get much on it they made it as small as possible. Then not to mention they forgot my chips but gave me the salsa on the side
New to area trying new places. They have Speedy delivery and nice people. Sadly the food is gross though.
Nothing special. Nothing made me go "damn". Tried ordering over the phone. They hung up on me mid order. Fuk u. Never going back there again. Don't place an order over the phone
Excellent trip! Went on the 3:30 cruise, you get to go on a private beach & see dolphins ! Well worth the money ! Highly recommend! Best tour in Tarpon Springs

Tucson Cosmetics is the only place I would go for Botox. Dr Rubbani is a perfectionist and I always love my results. It's always an improvement but looks natural. I never look overdone. My favorite is using Botox to do a lip lift. My lips look fuller and pouter and without fillers. This new location is gorgeous and all the team are sweethearts too.
So the food is decent but we have been here twice and both times the service sucked! It took so long for anyone to even greet us and get our drinks order. Basically you'll be waiting around a lot!!!

Fusion is an awful restaurant the food is bad and the people are worse if you want a terrible dining experience go to this restaurant. I got very sick every time I ate their food don't eat at this restaurant!

Very tasty!! Donuts are only available until they run out. I was a little surprised by the few times they already ran out of the kinds I liked seeing as they only have donuts and chicken. But the food is good. If they ever have the wings you should try them! Best wings in the area.
Good sandwiches...love the outdoor patio when there is live music. Wish that there were people to wait on. You rather than having to get up and run in to order food and drinks.
Every time I come to this McDonald's their shake machine never works there a sweet tea taste horrible and is very dirty inside around the drink machine most of the employees or rude

I must say, this is a nice salon. Very clean and consistent. The girls that work there are friendly and always get me right in. They have great beds and the spray tan I had before I started tanning was the cheapest around, which was very nice! It's in a great location for getting your tan in before or after the gym too.

The food was very delicious but unfortunately I found a couple of hairs in my food. The restaurant did take off more than the entree amount off the receipt but I would not choose to go back. Normally I don't care about finding a hair in my food, but multiple hairs is not good.

Complete bullshit! Pay for an entire year of services UPFRONT and then because the office can't manage properly, I get a call to reschedule my appt...poorly ran! Will definitely miss Aryzona and her fantastic job she always provides for me and several of my friends!! Take your money elsewhere, maybe another European office?!
Sarah the tour guide and Marie the mule were wonderful. The tour was so intriguing and fun!

Fun stop on the road back to LBI! Great service and classic food. Got a hearty tuna salad sandwich which was enough to split. Coffee was good and nice and hot and our waitress was awesome. But the soft serve is where it's at! Incredibly thick and very delicious. Make sure to stop if you're passing by!
One of my favorite natural spots. Great place to run or walk in every season. I always feel safe there and I've been there at various times and days.
Don't get to this side of town often but I'm glad I made it out here. Solid food and good coffee. Employees friendly and engaging.
The food was either cooked the wrong way or just bad but I got terribly sick soon after I ate there last night.
Amazing food and amazing service!!! Loved the outside seating and the crawfish Were delish. Can't wait to visit again when I'm in town.
Pretty good cheese steak. The roll with the sesame seeds was a bit overwhelming and not really soft.
Victory is a great addition to the Kennett Square area. The space gets great natural light and it's the perfect place to have a beer.
Ehhhhhhhh not very thrilled being from the middle east myself. I hate to say it but Moaz has better falafel. Food looks like it needs CPR. Service was great.

Food was mediocre and not hot. Mind you it wasn't cold by the time we waited 45 minutes for our meal, but it definitely wasn't hot. Not only did we wait almost an hour for our food, the wait for the check seems to be just as long. Save yourself from the wait; go somewhere else.

Bait and switch here all the time. Online inventory is a joke. "Let's put all these deals online that show we have them, say you have to pick it up in the store, and then not have it!!!" Employees then laugh and say "Can I interest you in something that costs $100 more?" Hahahaha, joke is on me, I'm done with you Target.

I hadn't been here in years and certainly will not be returning any time soon. You're better off at Taco Bell. The food was cold and soggy and the service was at most a D+. I only gave it two stars for the atmosphere.

Headed there to watch a Green Bay Packers game and had a great experience watching the game on the upstairs projector with the sound on. Also a great group of Packer fans there as well. I'll be back to check out another Packers game there in the coming weeks!
I think this place is now my favorite pizza place in Wesley Chapel area. Thin crust is my favorite. Anyway you like it, they make it!

Okay, the food isn't spectacular, but: (a) Neither is it terrible (though it's been a couple of years since I've been, so things may have changed. (b) This place is open very late. (c) They have karaoke. (d) They have salsa dancing. So on some level El Mofongazo is a bit of a personal nirvana, but yes - the food could be better.
Lunch here was good. Place is very clean and so were the restrooms. Waiter was good and gave us a small discount. Food is very delicious. I recommend the egg rolls and the crab cake!

To be fair, every Mcdonalds I've ever been to for the past 50 years has always left me feeling it was the worst McDonalds on the planet. This one is near my house and did not disappoint as being horrible. They got a second star only because they have an aesthetically pleasing drive through.
This is a fantastic addition to the Northwest side! The happy hour offers great pricing on drinks and some food. The atmosphere is laid back and fun and there's always a different mix of people.

Great food and a surprise operatic serenade! We had our son with us - who at the time was 7mons old. The staff accommodated us nicely considering he was asleep in his carseat. We hope to go back again without out little guy who is now walking and wont sit for more than 20mins.

I went to a wedding reception here recently, and it's mostly for the rich and snooty people who like to flaunt that they are rich; they may not think of themselves as snooty, but most whom I encountered matched my definition of snooty. Food was mediocre. So I was not impressed.
Unfortunately service sucked and food sucked. Have been in before and enjoyed the place. Tonight it was awful. Waited forever for cold over cooked food. Won't be back.

The overall taste of the lunch buffet is good, and there are a good variety of dishes. Unfortunately, the meat in all the chicken dishes was pretty dry. The tea and bread included are excellent. The waiters were professional and helpful. The seating at the booths was very tight.
Very good Thai. Decent service and pleasant dining space. I will be back.

They served us seafood, and it was hella juicy. The food was hot and delicious. My only complaints were that we made a reservation, and did not get seated until 30 minutes after the reservation time and it took about 45 minutes for our food to come out after ordering. We went on a Friday night, and it was really busy.
Average burger - comparable to smash burger ! Good spot for a quick bit to eat. Good service aswell :)

Went here for the restaurant week. The food was underwhelming. The ink rice squid dish was very salty, shrimp was not good at all as it smelt like chlorine. Everything we had was just okay. The price and taste ratio wasn't good. Will not go here again.

This was awesome! Found it while we were randomly driving around St. Bernard parish looking for Christmas trees. We were hungry and this did not disappoint at All. The roast, alligator sausage, and grilled seafood platter were all amazing. Service was slowish, but that's fine. I'll definitely try to come back.

It doesn't matter how awesome you are it's 2020 u don't get to charge for Wi-Fi. It's akin to charging extra for a toilet. It's base line expected. Staff is awesome rooms are great. But doesn't matter when I'm paying 400 plus a night and get cut arched for Wi-Fi. It's just sooooo generic for a high end hotel to do.
Wow, just wow. Had them swap out my battery and this is what I saw when I noticed rattling under the hood. Bolt is snapped. Battery is clean but everything else is a mess
What did I just drink?? My smoothie came with the added protein. 10 minutes later I still can't get some weird, metallic taste out of my mouth. Bad. Yuck

The best of the best. I enjoy everything at this restaurant from service, the decor to the quality of the food. The broth of the ramen was so rich and flavorful. I got the Supreme combo B which I thought was so valuable. My favorite appetizer was the fried oysters. 10/10 perfect.

This place used to be official, although not as good as their south st location. Quality has definitely gone down and they are decent at best compared to others in the area like Steve's. I have since stopped going here
On time. Great price and great results! Thank you.I will definitely be using you again!!

I had a craving for chicken flautas, and this was the closest place around. I paid $11.00 for a plate which included beans, rice and three flautas. I was disappointed with the flautas. When I bit into them, they were mushy, I then realized that they were potato and chicken flautas. They had more potato than chicken. If you want chicken flautas, go elsewhere.

This restaurant was great for breakfast but they served my vegan pancakes with cold butter and they did not warm up the syrup. They did not have vegan bacon. However, Golden Standard down the street does have vegan bacon and their spread and syrup is nice and warmed.
Sweet & intimate venue. A great place to see a show - in the always unique and impressive Murphy Art Bldg. Will always go to see/hear some killer live music.
Food is always delicious here. Service can be a hit or a miss at times depending on your server. I'd recommend sitting at the bar if you want quick service!
This place is killer. The Cheddar Bacon Ale is my favorite soup in Nashville! The nachos are huge and delicious! The service staff is friendly and swift. The Parking sucks but there is valet.

This place is in downtown Reno is old as hell a piñata hanging in the middle of the room old frames realy old fashioned with tables that u have to share with other people salsa bar available the tacos are not that tasty

Had a tour guide from AB recommend this place since we were going to Molly's later in the evening. Fantastic margaritas, queso, and salsa. Didn't much care for my tacos/rice, but my boyfriend loved his burrito. Place was packed so we sat at the bar and service was kind of slow. All in all, not a bad experience, but not amazing either.

Awesome beer selection!! Small place to pick up a quick meal and discover old fashioned sodas. I've gotten the cuban and the cheese/steak subs. My favorite would be the cuban, the steak n cheese could have been a little bit more melted but still delicious. Nice little hidden treasure in the USF area.

Excellent Food and Service! My first time here from Camarillo. Came for a bday and it was a great choice...Jambalaya, soft shell crab po boy, fucille chicken, ceasar salad were all delicious! Our servers, Alyssa, Valeria and Mondo were excellent and helped make the experience even better. Thank you!

My Dad worked on the construction crew that built the dome in the 70s. When I was little I thought he built it all by himself. I've seen sporting events, concerts, and conventions within. And, yes, Saints fans do get loud.
This was ok. I had high expectations because of all the high reviews, but would definitely try another place before coming here again. I had the sesame chicken with hot and spicy soup.
Average tasting pizza but with an above average amount of toppings. Pizza is slow to make but prices are reasonable.

The restroom they had was terrible. It has no lock and the stall door had no lock either. It had no toilet paper in there. The staff are okay and there sandwiches are okay but I hated my experience with their restroom.

The mild was far too spicy. The paratha was frozen. And the aloo gobi I ordered was sliced potato in a brown sauce, nothing like any aloo gobi I've had before. Overall I think the food here is terrible and not worth it.

Samples, samples, samples, samples!!!! Everything here is great and I love the free samples. A few of my favorite items: - underwear; the Felina brand is great! - sun-dried tomatoes; great price and so tasty - individual servings of guacamole - cheapest portobello mushrooms around - cheese selection! - thin crust pizza kits with sauce packets included
This restaurant failed to proceed my order 2 times at took 15 minutes to make my food.
All I have to say is wow! Great craft beer, friendly staff, and awesome atmosphere! Lovely, fun crowd; great place to hang out with good friends. I highly recommend checking out Tindall Road Brewery!

Like it here but I don't like that on weekends the bunch menu is too late. Walked out the first time because we did not know. And now today we were going to go out for lunch and remembered we could only get brunch. I don't like that!
This is the worst wait I've ever seen at dmv. They enacted the texting and it's as bad as Obamacare

We order here at least once a week. The sushi is usually fresh (we had one bad experience with the salmon sashimi). The shrimp, scallops, and broccoli with black pepper sauce is a must try! The house special wonton soup is pretty good also. A neighborhood restaurant with reliably good food.
I'm a fan of the Asian Noodles selection, I recommend giving those a try. Overall, Noodles & Company is a pretty decent option if you need a fairly quick and healthy meal.
The food was okay. The food was not warm, thus the 3 stars. The waitress was a little slow, it was very busy so I'm sure she did the best she could. The overall taste was typical IHOP food.
The drink, Gangster Paradise was amazing! I'd go back for this drink any day.... the small plates were underwhelming and expensive. I'll probably pass on dinner next time.

Got a pizza to go tonight. Nothing fancy, just cheese. Boy, do they know how to make pizza! This is NY quality pizza! Cheesy, a little oily like I get on Long Island. Super hot! So good! We'll be back!

We splits the chicken fajitas. They were delicious with yellow tomatoes and a variety of colored peppers. Salsa was delicious along with chips. Service was friendly and timely. The inside is beautiful & great for a datenight. They have out door dining in the front and back. The back tables face the outdoor fountains. Shops, Barnes&noble, Starbucks all within walking distance. Great location.

Long check in lines, cafe lines and buffet line. These stopped me from returning to the cafe or even trying the buffet. Filtered internet - In thousands of hotel stays this is a first for me. Clean room and decently updated. Comfy bed. I will not return.

Easily the best pizza place in Warrington. Best quality & best pricing. 11 inch pizza for $7 is insanely cheap but the quality of the pizza is better than any other place in Warrington. Highly recommend for a cool weekend spot if you're in the mood for good pizza.
Worst machaca and eggs I've ever had. All wet. The buffet swarmed with patrons like ants. This place is a fire hazard. Had to settle for it bc Mi Nidito was closed.

I paid $92 for an office plant that was illustrated as being potted in a beautiful toile ceramic pot. Not only was the pot plain black, but it was not even the same plant as in the picture. I am very disappointed after spending almost $100 on this.

This is my favorite Mexican restaurant on the south side. The food is good, quick, and cheap. I'm picky about my chips and salsa (funny that my favorite part is free, right?), and theirs are both good. Plus, they have good specials on super-huge beers. Can't beat that!

Venezia is excellent and my first choice for home made Italian meals. Their ingredients are always fresh and tasty. This is my favourite and only place for pasta dishes and pizza. They have been serving the Yardley community for the last 30 years from the same location. I strongly recommend that you visit Nick and enjoy his delicious dishes. Michael M.
Great gooey butter variety but mediocre staff :-( could be a little friendlier
Chef Menteur sandwich was extremely greasy to the point where I only took one bite. Bloody Mary was nasty. Cheese curds were decent. Fries were bad. Everything was overpriced.
I am in pain, not able to walk without pain or sleep. Yet in trying to get a diagnostic appointment today, I was told I had to wait until August 21st.... over 3 months away. Patient care?
