It takes multiple calls for maintenance to fix problems, regardless of what the problem is. Rent has gone up every year I've been here and maintenance & other services quality has gone down. Parking sucks and the dumpster areas are disgusting.

I've had better cheesesteaks. In fact, most cheesesteaks I've had are better. Meat was dry yet greasy with some gristle. Bread so-so. At least you can look across at the neon extravaganza that is Geno's while you wait in line. Which you shouldn't. Unless you just really want to say you ate at Pat's.

Taco Bell is one of my go-to guilty pleasures, but I'll never come to this one again. It took 25 minutes for me to get from the drive-trough speaker to the window. Inexcusable. The franchisee needs to take note and whip this one into shape. You can't survive on location alone.

Friday nights at Seascapes used to be so awesome when DJ Patrick would come out and all of the kids would dance, play and sing karaoke!! Just hasn't been the same since they did away with it. But the bartenders are awesome!!

Just tried this for dinner tonight, I've been trying to find a Chinese place I really like in the area and I think this is my favorite so far! We got Hunan chicken & General tso's and I liked them both but general tso's was better. Crab Rangoon was pretty good as well! I'll definitely be back
terrible customer service. rude. i will never go there again. capriotti's makes great sandwiches, and it is a shame the wrong people are running this one.
I love what you do for the city, but the building seems like a big waste of space. Not really a tourist draw?
The owner is a prick! This place is horrible and I wouldn't recommend it to my enemies.. Stay away and warn others!! Customer service is a word not in their vocabulary.
Ordered to go. Waited in line for 20 minutes. Didn't get sauce or utensils. Found a bone and an entire cartilaginous joint in my pulled chicken sandwich.
Enjoyed the Gyro and one of the best Old Fashion drinks I've had. The restaurant was a little dark and loud, but a good atmosphere overall.

Dr. Taban did an amazing job on my eyes. He is very knowledgeable and patient. He explained everything in detail and showed me pictures of possible results. My eyes look better than I expected and recovery was minimal. His staff is also very nice and professional.
Love this place! Quality products that make great gifts. The smell of the lavender is very relaxing. The view from the farm is nice too, with the lake below.
Great shop, friendly service, and they have a range! One of my favorite things about this store is that when you buy a gun they give a free pass to the range!
Was excited to try this place and seen it was open on yelp, came here today at 10:30am after checking out Grand Sierra hotel. It was closed... idk why their yelp says their open.

Great food and drinks but the service was a bit odd. The server was not very accommodating when we had questions about the menu due to allergies but the manager stepped in and helped a lot. We had two tables and the second table had a smoother and pleasant experience. Overall a good place.
A great salon, but I liked it a bit better when Mr. Reynard's busy scissors still clipped there.

I'm giving the three stars due to atmosphere and service. Service was awesome. The hummus and pita bread were delicious! The stuffed eggplant was not at all my thing. It had a funky taste. It's in a cool, hipster neighborhood, and looks great all around. I wouldn't care for the food again though.

Well Uncle Bill's has been around for spell and I have enjoyed it every time I went the food is tasty the services are nice the menu and prices are fair and the atmosphere is clean and relaxing. It's kid and family friendly so go give them a try and see what you think.Yes I recommend Uncle Bill's Pancake and Dinner.

The food was delicious however the wait on food was over 45 minutes and we should have known better than to get the desserts to go because they took 25 minutes. How banana pudding take 25 minutes? Highly recommend the food but be prepared to wait

This was my first time trying Raising Cane's and I enjoyed the chicken fingers with the cane's sauce. I'm not a big fan of coleslaw and Texas toast in general so only ordered the chicken fingers. I like the seasoning they put on the chicken and the sauce is so good!
Dirty & Gross, if you want Applebee's don't eat at this location! Much cleaner locations not too much further down the road!
This classic local joint is actually one of the few places that is open in Fountain Square past 10PM during the week. Although I haven't eaten here, their cocktails and beer selection are great!

My experience with this truck is mixed. Veg couscous seemed healthy but was pretty bland. Smoked salmon sandwich (with egg, radish, caviar) was great. Service can be very slow at times -- sometimes he chats for extended periods with certain people.

This location is not the same food as the Manchester location. Wings were old dry and had no flavor. The mac and cheese was sweet!!?? Not good at all even the cornbread was dry. Total disappointment and waste of money. I threw it away. Sad because it used to be good. Especially on west Florissant. Don't bother eating here.

Had both the regular fried chicken and hot chicken sandwiches. Both were amazing! Also loved the sides - mac and cheese and coleslaw. Fries are a winner too. Plus, service was outstanding - staff was friendly and helpful and the entire restaurant was incredibly clean.
I just left I got a double bacon cheeseburger and a side of fries and the lady at the window warn me that the burger was Big needless to say I needed help to eat it all Lmao
Beautiful views as expected but we could see nothing of significance. Our food was pretty good but pricey again as expected. I'd recommend going here with friends once but no need to frequent.

WONDERFUL healthy food that only tastes decadent, Comfort Food is a weekly stop for my husband and myself. Kind of wish they'd change up the menu more often -- but what they serve never misses the mark.

Had the best croissants here! We ordered the chocolate, plain and the almond croissants. The almond were my favorite, it was buttery and flaky and the filling was absolutely delicious. Also got the chai latte with vanilla and it tastes really good too. Must stop for breakfast if you're at Santa Barbara!!

Always excited when we have time to get Nekter together. It's always a joy for us. Today was disappointing. Vibe was so unpleasant. No happiness, no excitement, no welcome atmosphere. Was so hot inside too. Our bowls were warm, melting & runny. We said "Thank You!" No response.
Food was delicious. Service was a little slow, but it was a Saturday night. All the staff was very friendly though. Pan seared scallops were amazing! Oh and the 1/2 price bottles of win is nice!

This is the slowest McDonald's. Everytime we go To the drive-through it is a significant weight. Right now it was almost 10 minutes. Then when our food came, it was cold. I thought when they added the 2nd drive-through line it would be better, what somehow it seemed to have gotten worse
Try the Crawfish Mac & Cheese, amazing. Friendly staff. Would def try this place again.
The pastrami sandwiches are fantastic! Guy Fieri's recommendation works out again! What a great find. I just wish the service was a bit speedier.
Not going back. Used to be our regular spot. Recently while chewing my Aloo kati roll, a metallic wire came out while biting into it. This was a scary experience.
We ordered the bar burgers and wings.. 14 dollars for fries, 4 mini sliders and 5 wings.. 2 out of the 4 sliders were basically thrown together and one wing was deformed. The fries were good though.
Delicious BBQ with a diverse set of sides. Beer was warmer than I prefer with a limited selection. Special list was impressive for every night of the week!
I am always at this location to get something for either my dogs, cat, rabbit or fish, Everyone is always helpful and friendly. I am ALWAYS greeted when I walk in the store. Always a nice experience.

Wonderful lunch! Recommended to us by the Sales Associate in Dillard's. She said the fish is the best and she was right. My husband was unsure what to order so we read a review about the bam bam shrimp. He ordered the taco with them and he said it was delicious. The service by Christina was excellent. I would highly recommend this restaurant.

Im only giving this a four star, cause only tried one thing. The ham and cheese crousant. Which was excellent! Just a quick stop on way thru town to visit grandkids. We will be returning with them. The person that helped me was very nice and the selection of donuts impresive.

Horrible! I ordered delivery and waited 1.5 hours. I called 3 times over 45 minutes and the lady kept saying the delivery person was out but nothing. By the time I got my food it was COLD and SOGGY! Also, the lady on the phone argued with me about how long I waited! HORRIBLE

A beautifully restored venue. Nice size for performances. Unfortunately, downtown Wilmington has fallen on hard times. Good restaurant, the Chelsea Tavern, is immediately across the street. This is about as far as I would want to walk in this area after dark.
Love love love this place!!! The food is super good and service is amazing. I got the Las Vegas roll and it was delicious!

I found out why this place has such good reviews. Divey little restaurant on a hip street, where I had probably the best vegetable biryani I've ever eaten. And a pretty good Turkish coffee. Friendly, personable service. With a pretty generous tip, my total came to $20. Try the masala sauce on the side....no matter what you order. :)

Second time eating here. Our server was Louisa, great service. I ordered the El Sombrero it was very tasty. Ribeye with peppers, onions and cheese, served with guacamole and rice. My husband had the beef flauntas, he was very happy and said he would definitely come back.

What a wonderful restaurant for a special occasion like an anniversary or even a sunset celebration. We had to wait only 10 minutes. Janet was very attentive. The entire staff were very knowledgeable about each course. We had the scallop duo for appetizer, the ahi tuna for the main course, and the flourless chocolate dessert. Everything was exceptional.

Angie did such an amazing job helping me coordinate a deep clean with very specific needs. Once she and her team arrived, they got right to work and made the space really sparkle! Every single thing in the place looked like new! I will definitely use this company in the future.

Owner Tony is a complete condescending ass, to us as customers & to his employees. We were 1 of 2 tables. I'd hate to see how he treats people when they are actually busy!! Food was great but we'll NEVER give him our money again!!!
The salsa and chingalingas are delicious, highly recommend ordering the appetizer!! Servers were always nice. Mango margarita was also great.

Food is delicious. But had to go with three stars because of the service is super slow. They cater to their regulars and won't make eye contact with you hoping you don't ask for something...like water...never got it..asked 3 times...and the place wasn't even busy
Mislead drink. Thought I was getting an IPA and got a sour. Asked if I can change it out and was told "no". Not coming back.
Pretty terrible pedicure. The massage was like 30 seconds of light stroking which was odd. Polish was kind of clumpy and overall not a great experience.

A good burger was tainted by how I saw a manager (later found out it was the owner named Zach) treat a waitress. She must have been in her teens and he berated her. As a customer, completely off-putting and I will not be returning to this establishment.
Red Robin removed the Boca Burger from their menu in order "to save a buck". As long as they remain "Boca Burger free", they will be dead to me. Dead to me! DEEEAAAAD TOOOO MEEEEEE!

There is not much to say about Gray's is a must if you are in the mooresville area. I love the atmosphere, service is pretty good, the people are very nice and the setting and layout is also great. Food wise is alot of sodium but overall you will walk out from Gray's pleased.
Worst oyster ever had. Not fresh and it's not cheap either... I rather spent more money for better quality oysters ...

Always have to stop by here and get a frozen alcoholic beverage with an extra shot. I'm im little upset that the pina colada was out of order so I couldn't get my go to mix. So I got the strawberry daiquiri mixed with blue raspberry. Not too bad

Went here for a quick lunch for one. THe service left much to be desired but my meal was Wonderful! I ordered the chef salad with beets, goat cheese, onion and an egg and a small plate of the scallops. WOW! Truly an enjoyable lunch.

This was our second visit to this restaurant. While the quiche that I ate was great, the green salad that came with it was so salty I couldn't eat it. When I mentioned this to the server, there was no offer of replacement or compensation. Also I never got a refill on my iced tea. Likely will not go back again.

Didn't notice there were no prices and didn't think to check Yelp. It's just ice cream, right? We ordered four waffle cones and were told $32.00. Should have handed them back. My wife couldn't even eat her butter pecan. Thought it was terrible. I ate mine while I took her down the street to Candy Kitchen. Rip off.
Great Food, Great Staff And Great Views! Came Here To Celebrate Mother's Day Early... Never Disappoints.

Just went out to dinner here with my Pastors. Ordered a variety of items, and our server mentioned portions are good sized. That was a lie, portions were tiny. And the hen was recommended and it was terrible. The food all was extremely salty, and we waited for over an hour for our food. Would not be going back.

I want to give them a lower score but it's my own damn fault. An overly long line for an extraordinarily average cup of anything. Not only do they mark their products up 900% but they'll argue over the verbiage of small, medium, and large. It's my own fault that I need a coffee this hard.

I've only been here once but I can say this : This place knows how to mix cocktails! The service was also very friendly and not snobby or exclusive at all. It's a bit bright for a lounge and not super romantic but I don't care. The next time I need something made well I'm there.
I recently got a haircut from Lora. And she did a perfect job! Thank you, I'll be back.
All the negative reviews are so spot on. James convinced me otherwise and boy was I wrong to trust him. His team never arrived. Left me stranded. And kept my $100 deposit.
One of my favorite brunch spots to go. This restaurant has everything you want: quality and performance. I was highly satisfied by the food and service.

Fun! A nice place to stroll. Plenty to discover. Was there on a very busy afternoon. But everyone in attendance was in the spirit of the place, even strangers were enjoying each others reactions to the sculpture. Great for a date or family outing. Bring your camera, in addition to the sculpture there is gorgeous landscaping and live peacocks - plenty of photo ops.

Always meh. Slow service. Food edible. Slightly overpriced for the quality. I can go to mcdonalds if I want some iceberg lettuce and canned oranges as a salad. I've given it about 5 chances. Don't think I'm going back. It's not even worth the convenience.

I wonder if I dined at the same place as the other reviewers... Our food was forgettable and overpriced, the service was lousy, and the establishment was very, very dirty. Won't return. Better food at TGI Fridays.

My favorite spot in Indy for some good comfort food :) the staff is always very friendly and although the wait seems daunting sometimes it never takes as long as they say it's going to take to get a table.

Boy has this place gone downhill. Used to be a great place to take friends and business associates for lunch or dinner but no more. Food is bland and service is weak. Got our order wrong which is hard considering we only ordered two dishes. Restaurant was cold and the chairs were old and worn out looking. Not going back.
Ok. That's it. The food was ok, the service was less than ok. The salsa and cheese dip were expensive but good. All in all it's an adequate Mexican restaurant that I won't be returning to.
This is just super cheap food it was awful they put fish sticks in tacos and says it was fish tacos. The burritos were dry and they put green chilly in there enchalatas.

I really wanted to like this place because the indoor set up is really cool. The food was very subpar. The rooftop bar was nice and heated. The singers were great. Unfortunately the food is why my review is low
Good to see Latin American cuisine in a upscale environment. The service was great the visual presentation of our meal was superb, however the food was pleasing yet could have been refined.

Food was great... if service would have been better would have rated much better. Disappointed in the service in that they clearly didn't have enough help to handle the business. The waiter was working his butt off, and was great... just spread too thin...

Sad to say the the State Street store was lacking good taste AND actually charged extra for a cone + $1.00! The server was nice but never mentioned the xtra fee. Another chink in our armor. Come on America.
This place has pretty good sushi rolls and we had the Hawaiian fried rice, which was okay. I liked the big pineapple chunks in it, but didn't care for the raisins. I've had better sushi...

Stopped in for a salad. We both ordered the salad with tuna, tuna was more like soup than typical tuna salad. Not a place I would recommend for a salad but the breakfast I saw passing by looked very good. Don't think I'll be back.
I order from Keystone an embarrassing number of days per week. The food is always good and delivery is prompt.
Went for brunch with the girls on a Sunday. Had the waffles & french toast, champagne sangria. All delish, especially the french toast!! Waffles were kind of small in portion, but nicely done.

I would give this place no stars if I could. The service sucked and I didn't care for my drink and they wouldn't allow me to order something different. All in all it was an awful experience and a waste of money.

I'm the furthest thing from a hipster, but I do like to have a haircut that isn't fratty or like every other guy in the office. Michael is hands-down the best I've found in Nashville - or Vegas or NYC or any other place I've lived. He's super attentive and works well with my wavy/curly hair. And - free neck trims in between cuts!
Great spot! Friendly staff! Bowling is fun. Cocktails great. Food was super.

Such a below average sushi restaurant, sadly. The service today was unfriendly & the girl seemed like she really couldn't be bothered to help me. My husbands sushi was also definitely gone off (dynamite/scallop) which we didn't realize until we were all the way back in Santa Barbara.

Oh Noshville...you have been good in the past..what happened..take the nosh Benedict off the menu...sent the meal back for under cooked eggs, returned under cooked again (clear whites running on bagel)..still not cooked. I hate to give two stars..but must

Where is the chicken? We ordered the chicken and beignets and the fried chicken... It was all bones.. Very little meat. The plain fried chicken had a great taste but the nashville hot was cold and soggy.. We loved the fried chicken skins but they are very rich and salty.. Maxed out at 1 1/2 pieces.
I've eaten lots of Chinese food in my life. The food at that place is just disgusting.
Great people, always friendly and a cute dog! They are always honest and don't try to sell you shit you don't need. They are very accommodating and helpful!
Very happy to see them go. Last time I went staff was pretty unfriendly and didn't pay much attention to me the entire time. Then I find out the owner was a huge racist anyway.

you really can't go wrong with this place! I used to be a regular but started going to Nam Phuong more simply because my mom love their wraps. However, this place is definitely the place to come for authentic Pho.

I only stop here for coffee after racquetball. (Sometimes 1/2 a donut). Good customer service every time. Small sitting area, and odd parking lot. I don't care for donuts, so I can't say anything good or bad about them. Again, excellent customer service.

No. It's not worth it. Resist it and spend your $120-150 somewhere else. It's not like Reno is like LV where it's hard to drive down the road for good food. I guess if you're drunk then by all means eat here. It's a fun experience I guess, but nothing felt satisfying.

Great spot for Po-Boys and Gumbo, however the dining room is a bit tired and cramped. I am sure that many consider this to be part of the charm, but when you're in there you don't get the sense you're in an overly "clean" establishment. That's my only critique though, as the food is worth it.
The bruschetta is absolutely amazing! We ordered a second order after eating the first,

Between waiting at the terminal and the ride it took 45 minutes from when I picked up my bag to when I got to the ticket counter. It seems close to the airport but it really isn't. Literally watched all the other rental vans circle several times before I got on the thrifty van

Don't go here if you are dairy sensitive. While their website lists several options of dairy free sorbets they only have one and will insist a cone is the wrong choice so your friends will eat ice cream and you will watch.

The food was not as good as I'd hoped. Had shrimp enchiladas. The guacamole had a discoloration likely from the avocados staying. The service was very friendly. I would try a different dish if I return.

Ben was our guide, knowledgeable and fun. Went out of his way to show us places that were not included in the tour. Called ahead of time to check on pick up and drop off location. We recommend. 1.5 hour is enough to tour Nashville.
We have a lot of favorites in Boise, but Barbacoa ranks right up there as far as consistently serving good food and not leaving disappointed.
Great people and great place! I love the compression and IRT, the Cryo is amazing as well!

I ordered a venti caramel macchiato with 5 shots. The girl who made mine put only four then proceeded to pour out some of the coffee on top because it was too full on top of that. Paid for two shots I didn't even get.

Had 2 panes broken window panes replaced. They came out and got the measurements,ordered the replacement glass and everything was completed. The two installers were very professional and took great care in removal and replacement of the windows. Great job. Highly recommended
Great experience last night.drinks, food, and service were great. It does get loud so it may not be great for business dinner.
Cool looking place but food is not that great. I purchased the loop sling and it was basic, nothing to brag about. The service was okay.

The service is great and in a good location near the reading market. Ask for the specials. We had a wonderful experience with their sushi. However the ramen was not what we expected. One small piece of pork inside and the taste was normal.
A Amazing as always! Service was excellent and food was incredible! Can't wait for the summer menu!
I called Yellow cab at 1.52 on Sunday afternoon. An hour later i called and was told they were busy. Skip the cabs and use Lyft. Much friendlier and less expensive.

Wonderful place that just opened. I got the deluxe organic mani pedi. She took her time massaging my feet and legs and even cut my cuticles without any pain. Comfortable, clean and attentive. Give them a try!
poor quality of food and quantity is small. perhaps Covid hit this place hard. Disappointed

Very overrated! Food was bland. Bread & soup were the only things with flavor. Husband's choice for anniversary meal & Mother's Day. Won't let him choose again. Turkey slider from Arby's is was better.
I would only come here if i wanted a quick pho bowl. The broth has very little flavor. Almost water like. There is no tendons. Which is a no no.

Cool place, not the average beach stuff. Not a lot of "junk", it's more of the name brand type fair and their branded merch. Prices on Olukai, Hurley etc are on average with other places. Don't pass it up when you drive by, go ahead and stop in.

I highly recommend this practice for dental care. They're extremely competent, caring and knowledgeable. Especially now, under COVID restrictions, they are taking all necessary precautions to keep themselves and their patients safe.
Is a nice inexpensive store wouldn't recommend car charges they don't last that long but they do have a lot of inexpensive knickknacks
Great food and service. Noisy dining room makes it hard to have a conversation and can overwhelm some kiddos. We also enjoy getting their take-out.

So just your regular Starbucks coffee shop with the usual stuff. I spent a whole afternoon here doing some paperwork after a weekend of working overtime in Tampa. Baristas were polite and attentive. This shop was always crowded because it is near USF. Store did look like it needed som TLC and floor was dusty.

Make a reservation to what's soon to be one of your favorite places to eat, shop, and hangout. The ambiance is calming and beautiful. The service is perfect. You're well attended but, never feel rushed. Everything is a delicious treat with infused butters, herb mayonnaises, and fresh local ingredients. I look forward to planning a visit during one of their many chef hosted events.

We were pretty disappointed with this place. All of the salsas, and the carnitas, were weirdly sweet, and the sides really lacked flavor and seasoning. Our server was nice, and the drinks looked really good, but the food wasn't that good so we probably won't go again.

Crystal is awesome and the entire staff makes you feel like a rock star. I already booked my next appointment. This place is worth the little extra money I was spending for my hair. Make a Sunday afternoon of it. You can sip wine as they bring you a hot towel and a snack.
Just stopped in for food and coffee. The falafel and latte were very good. We'll be sure to come back and try the games!

After a few visits on different days of the week, I highly recommend avoiding weekend mornings. Not only is the place very busy, but the noise level from the added guests and guest management is so loud that it is difficult to have a conversation.

"Dang, that's good," was my reaction from bite one and it continued throughout the entire sampler platter, all the way through to one very full stomach. It was hard to not go back immediately for dinner the very next night. Highly recommend.

This place appears to be closed, maybe permanently? Sign on the door said hours were different from what's listed here. Looked in the window & nothing in display cases either. Maybe it's just a down time for them... I'm not from here so, I guess I'll never really know
Classic diner cuisine with the modern touch. Great staff, excellent food and service. My only complaint is that it gets awfully loud in there. Too many hard surfaces.
I went to this Coffee bar several weeks ago and was not happy with both the service (extremely long wait) and the taste of the drinks received.

Did not enjoy, tried a variety of things. Everything either grossly under-seasoned or too much five spice. The chicken was crispy. That's about it. Also, cashier was not wearing a mask in the middle of the COVID pandemic. The plexi glass doesn't count!

Great for Happy Hour! Drinks are okay with traditional Mexican food with no frills. Ordered a variety of tacos and was no impressed. Food was mediocre and have had better elsewhere. This is a place you go to for drinks before eating elsewhere.

Takes forever if you get tenders, and the building needs better air conditioning. But the chicken is very spicy and tasted amazing. I tried Hattie B's beforehand and this is wayyy more authentic and tasty.

James Campo is as good as it gets! I had a broken tooth and I was in unspeakable pain. I called them around 9 am... I was in the chair around 11...and out of pain around 11:45. The staff is great and made me feel very comfortable. I recommend this dentist office to anyone!
Custom bowl is the way to go! Double the tuna, toppings, and the Hawaiian Shoya sauce to top it off. I got an extra drizzle of spicy mayo on top. Woowee
Great Spot! Mamas is one of the best breakfast places i have ever been too! Food came really fast on one of the busiest days I have seen. The food came in 5 minutes and is a definite recommend!
Great Mexican eatery. Likely the best Mexican restaurant I've ever been to in my life. The food is laid out very neatly and the restaurant is very clean as well. You won't regret eating here.
This hotel was expensive but worth the splurge! It's especially worth it if your paying with points. All of the staff are super helpful. Our room had an amazing view. Also close to French Quarter.

Decent food, but after three times of having them forget my take out order, I won't be back and can't recommend this experience to anyone. Sad, because it is a good deli, if they don't forget your order.
The food was good but the service was terrible. The entire staff had a bad attitude. I wouldn't recommend this for anyone.
The staff here is friendly and attentive, the kitchen makes amazing food. My favorite is the pulled pork sandwich. Try the chop 40
amazing tacos!! and awesome travel advice! amazing staff! vegan and vegetarian options! delicious!

Take a step back in time in this classic diner with counter service seating. Crispy edge flattop burgers, golden fries / onion rings, and root beer in a frosty mug. Cash only. An American icon on Route 66 for a reason. Stop in the mid afternoon to avoid the rush and enjoy every bite!
We got breakfast here, and it was very good. I love their chicken burrito. They also have a gluten free bun which is really nice. If back in Reno we will eat here again.
This gym is close to home and it has good equipment. I just wish they had better hours for those of us that work.

Usually my go to spot for late night fried food on the way home. I think they are under new management though, which sucks. They rarely have beef patties anymore and now it is .50 cents, used to be free, for any sauce packet, aside from hot sauce. I have hot sauce at home, just give me the honey mustard I so desire.

Short wait, but organized process - with a bar next door for Bloody Mary's! Great service. Bananas Foster French toast is sweet but delicious. Eggs Stella were great. Breakfast with a view of Jackson Square - doesn't get more New Orleans than that.

Convenient location but this store allows dogs even if they aren't service animals. This is a health code violation and when you mention it to management they get upset. I only go where when I'm in a hurry.

Man, so looking forward to some sandwiches and the sauces today 6/6/20 at 1040am. Drove 10 miles to and 10 miles back home to find no sauces in the bag. Should have double checked at the window but didn't think they would have forgotten the Fil-A and honey mustard sauces. Arrghhhhh
Food was decent, nice size dishes but a tad bit pricey. Liked that they had vegetarian options besides just beans & rice.

Brooklyn pie is out of this world. However their service is incredibly slow, both when eating in or taking out. And they often mess up take-out orders. Maybe now that the new restaurant is open they can focus on improving their customer service.

We just moved to the area and this business was highly recommended. Our dog became ill before we scheduled a wellness visit. We called and the vet saw us right away. They were caring and knowledgeable. Took care of our dog quickly and efficiently. I will be going back for wellness visits for both of my dogs.

We visited from out of town and wanted to try a variety of Blackstone beers. However, we were told they do not do flights of beer on Saturdays due to how busy they get. An hour later, an entire table was able to order a flight.
This place is so freaking good! You're able customize your order and make special request. The cheese bread is fantastic. The tea is yummy too.

The food here is definitely not authentic, but it gets the job done. The drinks are overpriced and mediocre. The best part about this restaurant is the location. It's a great place to catch up with friends sitting at an outside table while enjoying the sites of the city.
Posting on behalf of my Husband: convenient fast food, cheap prices . Get a lot for your buck. Burgers aren't seasoned to well but when you're in a hurry it beats nothing.

First time customer, food was average tasting for my preference. Lemon pepper wings seasoned good but had some hard like rocks particles attached and Lobster mac minus the lobster and I paid a 5$ up charged with the $10+ wings. Punch flavor drink was good but@ 3.99 per bottle. Not sure if I would return to buy anything more. $20+
Staff was negligent, but the food and drinks were good! I ordered the Hibiscus Kiss tea, a butter croissant, and a glazed donut. The croissant wasn't very good, but the tea and donut were great

Five stars for 'quality', 1 star for portion size. Seriously, rolls are the width of a nickel and the fish portions are as big as a postage stamp. Its really quite insulting. Was still hungry after 3 rolls! Can't even finish one Omega 3 roll at Sushi Teri, its packed with so much fresh salmon and yellowtail.

This place is an average Japanese Restaurant. I have eaten on both the hibachi and regular side and have experienced average tasting meals compared to similar style places. Do not order scallops whatever you do...they can't seem to cook them right and they are not fresh. Definitely frozen. Why pay $18 for frozen scallops? Also had Yakisoba...and it was OK...not great.

This is my second and last visit here. Can't comment on the food because we never got it. In fact the drink took longer than most places take with there paella so we left. Another couple was complaining to the manager about the service as we left. Unfortunate because I liked their cod and lamb tapas last time.
Old theater with uncomfortable seats, poor customer service and dirty bathroom. Won't come if I have other options
Got the chicken parm which was good and then your typical side salad but when I opened the cake it had mold on it!!
I continue to give them a chance but the last time we spent $70 on barely edible subpar food. Their roti canai is more like chinese pizza.
Good food.. I really love the cheesesteak eggrolls, but why are they $12 !!? Its 2 small rolls. A burger is $14 and comes with fries, cole slaw, and a pickle.

My friend and I grabbed a quick bite and listen to live country music which was nice. I did not appreciate the shock i received once the bill arrived. Two orders of breakfast potatoes and 2 glasses of sangria $42.28. We were charged $30 a glass. An entire bottle in NY is less than $20.00. How is this possible?
Had an average experience here other than Angie, who was way below average. Condescending towards anxious patients - DO NOT see Angie unless you love the dentist and don't get nervous.

Tried this restaurant for the second time tonight. It's a cocktail, desert place only either before a night out or after, wouldn't really recommend this place in its current set up. Staff are friendly, food is ok.

This Place is Dirty, you can NEVER get through on the telephone and when you do, they're nasty and un-helpful. Any other medical supply place would be better! I will NEVER deal with Bennett again!! Ever!!

Out of town, stopped in for a quick cut. I stopped in when he had opening (he had a pretty full afternoon so appointments recommended). Great service. Really happy with the cut. Rich was friendly and had some great tips for places to visit while in town. Definitely recommend him.
The coffee here is so good. I am hooked. I also appreciate the service and feel that it is personal. The atmosphere of both coffee shops is well designed and beautiful.
Definitely the best Toasted Ravioli's in town as many others have mentioned! Our go to restaurant for them and good salad!

This was my third visist I really wanted to like it here. First was great second left me with a bruised toe and and ingrown toe. Third visit was such a disappointment. Hate my nails and tried to tell them them tries to fix but I cannot wait to get them off buyer beware price does not meet wzpectatoons
Great atmosphere, delicious food and fabulous service! Ordered the cioppino, redfish and pimento cheese hushpuppies (free with yelp check-in).
Quiet and beautiful little space to eat some great food. Coffee is not very great but snacks here was awesome!

Hot food and fresh fruit...uhm yeah thank you. Did I mention the best eggs Benedict (Robin Hood Benedict) around town? the crepes trio was fresh and delightful. Our sever was sweet and our coffees stayed full. I highly recommend this place for your morning breakfast joint.

huge space - super greasy food = not sure I would come back again They did have good drink specials but other than that nothing to write home about. The food was super greasy and nothing special. If I am in the CBD I feel like there are plenty of other options that taste better.

Gumbo was terrific. Duck was a little undercooked but was still very tasty. Cocktails were well done. Server was garbage. Spoke to everyone around us and apparently found us boring and not worth engaging conversationally.

Perfect location to go for a date night or when in the mood for some great sushi! Their lobster mac & cheese will leave you craving for more! Not to mention their filet mignon quesadillas are delicious! If ever in the soho area you fed want to give them a try!
This facility closed in 2015 and was replaced by the Hanson Fitness and Lifestyle Center on the other side of the Van Vliet Complex.

the day and age of big box stores.....saving those pennies...uh-huh! Even for those hippier than thou Karmel Kids who love to shop.......so true......Meijer is good for doubling coupons for the groceries. Selection of stuff is good....seafood is fine. The staff(the ones we talk to anyway) knows where something is if it cant be found.
We use to eat at Ruby Tuesday at Tyrone Blvd and few times we ate there we have a terrible time the waiter was rude and service was terrible will never eat there again

After two more recent visits - things seem to have turned around at the Old Rock House. The bar staff has been friendly and seem to care about service. What a relief, I really enjoy their line ups now I can get drunk too!

Every time I go to Popeyes in Kenner on Williams and Loyola lately they are either closed or their computers are down. If they happen to be open, their out of everything. Its like their only open to pay their crappy employees, not to do business!

So when you say you are open at 6:00, am that doesn't mean you should be walking across the parking lot to open up at 6:15 am! So, I am officially done with this place! Some of us have to be on time to work, especially those of us that are health care workers.
The food here is rather expensive for what you actually will eat. The sausage patties were nasty and tasted like they were old. The restrooms are filthy and need cleaned.
Excellent, traditional Mexican food...BYOB. They have real Queso here...the kind with the sausage in it!

Good clean diner operating 24-7 on the White Horse Pike (aka: the place where businesses go to die). The Stratford Diner is your go-to establishment for late night post-Patco munchies, Sunday brunch, and/or 12pm hangover breakfasts. I usually just go for the scrapple. Nice and crisp on the outside and soft and mushy on the inside. The perfect compliment to some over easy eggs.
Had the salad rolls for lunch can't go wrong with this dish. Chicken vermicelli bowl was light on the chicken but was tasty. Doan's is clean and has a nice decor.
I love this place! I come here when travelling for work. It has a "local" bar feel. The staff doesn't turnover very often. The food is good and the portion sizes are good. I love free cookie day!

I'm sitting in the restaurant right now. Got seated quickly, waitress took our order quickly and got us drinks and salads. Everything is fine. EXCEPT FOR THE MANAGEMENT BEING CHEAP BASTARDS ABOUT THE FREAKING BISCUITS! I mean really, what the heck?
Great wings for cheap! We get 4 different types on Friday nights and they're so yummy. The mango habanero and garlic buffalo are our top 2 favorites!

When you compare the modern city hall. With the past two it can't hold a candle to them. The 1950ls building is outdated and depressing. Looks like a spooky abandoned hotel. Just failing apart. The former City Hall is way more aesthetically pleasing.

let's say you have a love for variety, but no idea how to layout, organize, or reliably stock a store, nor any interest in learning. your crazy grocery store might just manage to persist in a food desert, no matter what your prices. especially if you're open 24 hours. mardi gras zone!

Ambiance blows, cocktails sweet. The waitress was very nice and did everything perfectly. We should have steered clear of bourbon st. Altogether, but food was pretty good. Hubby said crawfish boil could have been fresher. I had the redfish crab seemed a little stale that they topped it with. Not a fan
The server was nice and did the best he could to service our table. The food was sub par, but you can't expect much more from a diner . It's cheap eats for people who are not looking for fine dining.
Split the Peacemaker with a friend, and it was really good! The fried oysters were crunchy and not chewy. The remoulade sauce was delish! Nice little sandwich shop on Magazine!
Best Thai in Tucson. Spicy pad Thai - yum. The best item is not even on the menu - ask for the Nam Tuk (sp) so hot spicy and yummy.
Good brews. 10 dollar pitchers every Wednesday. Other than that special, it's 5 dollars per pint every other day. Oh yeah, a very large selection of brews compared to most places.

Food was good enough. It's kinda like b.d.s Mongolian grill only not as good. Kids eat free on Tuesdays and Thursdays (with the purchase of an adult entree). Service was fairly slow. All in all not bad.

The wings and appetizers were great and service was fast but we had a terrible experience with a man who we think is a regular blocked the handicap ramp and became very vocal towards a handicap man unable to enter the restaurant. Very sad!

Tracey Morris of Ella and Louie is simply the best! She is easy to work with and did an amazing job for my wedding, even with my limited budget. She is creative and offers advice and ideas which really helped me narrow down my vision. She understands each person's individual style and makes the perfect bouquets for them. I cannot recommend her enough!

3 years after my tint application on my Mazda 3...my back window is now completey bubbled and looks terrible. I have made numerous calls to this business (no response to my voicemails) over the past 3 weeks and have also reached out via Yelp with no response.
If Robin Williams had eaten at P&P even once, he would still be with us today.
Just look at what they serve soup with flies enjoy If u like paying for low quality food in a high price come to WTR Weekend pool parties are cool though

The SB farmers market bowl tasted pretty bad. It was literally a bowl of raw spinach two eggs and majority mushrooms. I am very disappointed to say the least. However, the crispy potatoes and the coffee may be a redeeming factor in my decision to return. Nice staff too.
Placed a take-out order, the pineapple rice as well as Kung pow chicken both have shrimp in it which I'm allergic to. Called to get a refund and they were very uncooperative. Would not recommend

Good stuff in their cases. Staff was totally uninteresting and just looking at who's next in line (no one in our case). Because of that, I'd be willing to try other spots. If the competitive staff is engaging, they get my return business. Can't say that about this spot.

Went to the new location in Oakville. Pulled pork was very well done and juicy. However only one kind of sauce for everything. Actual homemade fries. But they were very over cooked. Overall we will be back earlier in the day. Very limited menu as the day goes. Half the menu was sold out by time we came. Which is a great sign.

Excellent pub. The Jameson BBQ Burger was to die for! My husband's Buffalo Chicken Sandwich was equally delicious. Our waiter, Joey, could not have been better. Brought me 3 beer samples to make sure I got the one I really like, Will return again and again.

I went to oakley's grill and tried to put a tip on my credit card and was told by the cashier to please give cash because the manager keeps the tips and does not share with the workers. I find this to be horrendous behavior by the manager. It also sounds illegal. That tip is for the workers not him

I've only been to Doson one other time for Wonton soup & Vietnamese spring rolls and it was great. Came here again and the food was great, of course, (Pho) but the server couldn't crack a smile if her life depended on it, much less make eye contact. I'm not much for service, but I didn't get a friendly vibe.

We got in just before a rush and just after Shane sent most everyone home. Shane is a loudmouth, he's verbally abusive to his co-workers, he was swearing and dropping F bombs almost the entire time we were there. He was throwing dishes, utensils and food. Shane would be better served working night security at a graveyard. Worst WH experience EVER!

Very nice place. Great beer selection, and they actually print the prices on the beer menu - a rarity. We were there at lunch time Food was delicious and served hot. Service was friendly and attentive.

This is the one part of I-275 where you can count on traffic moving at a good pace. When you arrive on land in Hillsborough County you will be greeted by gridlock at virtually any hour of the day or night. The road is overall atrocious, but the bridge section is nice and has a great view

Took my car in for basic oil change and tires. The staff was nice. No major issues with the service until I took my car home and found I was missing lug nuts on my back tires. They apologized but totally unacceptable.

Drinks are great but the bartender has terrible customer service. Doesn't greet you and then wants to argue with you when she screws up your order, not once bit twice! Money or respect has no race but each time I visit she makes it out as if it does! Only between 3 and 7pm the chic that serves customer service SUX!!!!!
Brunch today- delicious food but TERRIBLE service, to the point that it ruined the entire experience. So disappointed! Would never go back.
This Safeway is in need of many things. An upgrade, better selection, restocked shelves, better meat selection, just to name few. Oh, and a deep clean would help.

Have been here a few times. Wings are always very good. Nachos were great, sandwiches OK but served Philly Steak on some soft bread that broke apart as soon as I picked it up. Would have been good on an Italian roll.
I wish I could give it 0. I was playing for the girls when I called and NO ONE ANSWERED!! THE NERVE never CALLING again
Super knowledgeable staff and quick, friendly service. Technician answered all of my questions and explained everything thoroughly. Thank you!
#23 is yummy with some chili sauce that's not labeled. Server was really nice and helpful. Love this place!

Pat's has very good quality food for a pizza place. Try the stuffed cheese steak pizza. Excellent. Rustic sandwiches are very hearty and have interesting fillings. Pizza is good too. NIce place to stop and have an inexpensive meal. Delivery is quick also.

Look. This place is a three dimensional non-sequitur. Albeit dark. It reminded Philippe of bars he used to frequent in colonial French Southeast Asia, but alas it was Caribbean. The julep was fine. The silver tongue was fine, but when his personality-less uber driver showed up, it was time to move on.
Below average pizza, greasy fries, and very slow service when we were the only table.

Still loving Austin - almost three years now that he's walking my pooches. He always comes, always leaves a note, and always take great care of my house and my pups. I love how I can schedule him in advance or sometimes last minute. He's the best!
Okay sushi the restaurant gives me a feeling that don't don't clean up very well and the service is kind of blah Upside it's on magazine so you can sit out side but I don't really care for the food
Terrible place. Showed up with 12 girls. Wouldn't let one of us in because she had a backpack. Despite the dozens of backpacks seen inside. Epic fail.
Actually, there was no unexpected procedure. I heard him in the hallway talking about nonsense for 30 minutes.

The waiter gave my steak to my friend and tried to give me his steak, it's whatever but his was a trash chip steak and mine was a 45 Dollar New York strip, I agreed to take the steak back after my friend had taken 4 bites out of it, but then they still made me pay full price for the steak. Trash

I absolutely adore Rook. The menu was fresh and had something for everyone. My only wish is that there were a bit more menu options but I understand and appreciate the refined menu! Both the food and the cocktails were solid 5's. Can't wait to go back and get a shirt!

My problem with this place isn't unique for restaurants in Nashville, which I consider a culinary wasteland. That problem is consistency. Go one time and get a great meal. Go back and order the same dish again and it 's absolute crap. That's a deal killer for me where restaurants are concerned.

The absolute worst service possible. Been here many many many times. Gave them multiple chances to be better. Ordered food and waited over 45 minutes for one sushi roll. And then came out wrong. Went back to get fixed. Took another 30 min and eventually we told them we didn't want it and left. Do not go here. TRUST ME

Roast beef sandwiches were amazing just what I was looking for... The service was good but I was bit disappointed with the paper plates and plastic silver ware. If dinning in I expected more that plastic and paper products for my food to be served in.
Nice beer selection, outdoor dog friendly seating and good food. The inside restaurant is beautiful and it seems like a great place to watch sports (large projector screen with TV above the bar).
It's good food. Could be overrated. Decent flavours on everything down to the crawfish but nothing special. I'll give it a second try soon and see what's up.

The hotel is awesome. I would give the room 5 star and the food as well. The casino .... slots are too tight. I've played at a lot of casinos in my lifetime and I've seen none as tight as Atlantis. I will not come back again because of this.

We used the drive through; which was crowded but no reason to hand out a very burnt bun. I have added 2 photos. My son refused to eat his fish sandwich because of the burnt bun. Our burgers were fine. Just disappointed today with this.

It was ok. The ham is not as good as I thought it would be. They have an interesting way of ordering and getting your food, and that's fine, but the wait staff treats you like you're stupid because you don't catch on right away.

Very disappointed with the new menu. We work in Clayton and used to frequent for lunch on a regular basis. I feel the menu has declined as has the food itself. Last two times we've done carry out our orders have been wrong. As a previous review stated, just nothing special.

Performers and music lovers alike, avoid this venue at all costs. They DO NOT pay touring acts, and double-dip charging customers for show entrance when they've already bought tickets. Shady business practices like this are the benchmark of a short-lived venue.

Love the vibe and the decor. It smells a little old and musty. The bartender was great. The Scorpion was awesome but a little too sweet for excess consumption. Monkey Balls(steak tipss) were amaaazzziiinnnnnggg! I will visit this place again
Lunch was awesome - not crowded, so everything was served really fast. The food was really good and the service was great. Definitely a recommended stop.
Fun, eccentric and delicious! My ode to Milktooth: Quirky and wondrous Boozy brunch with old friends Ancient grain porridge!

This place is awesome! Finely crafted menu, generous pour on the cocktails, superb wine list, attentive staff inviting outdoor seating and did I mention my favorite menu item: "Breakfast for Dinner?". Truly one of the best burgers in Tucson and the Fish #2 is consistently excellent. Go, don't hesitate, just go.
Food was great. Waitress was terrible. She knew nothing about the menu or how the food was prepared. She really needed to know how to say more than ummmmmmm let me check on that for you.

Come on, b.b. go, you're messing with us, right? In essence, Korean fast food. I haven't been to Giwa, but my heart does lie with Koreana. Same concept, but cheaper, friendlier, and way better food. If you really feel the need to pay $10 for bibimbap, go to Miran.
Big fan of double knot, I had high expectations that weren't met. Great atmosphere but food wasn't up to what I was expecting.
Received a full set of pink and white. They weren't bad just a couple were crooked. I'm sure this can get fixed at time of fill.
Staff was friendly but food was subpar. The brisket and steak in the pho was tough and almost inedible. Vegetables looked old. Was not impressed.

Service was okay. The din of conversation and music is Food was good. The seasoning was wonderful. Back again a few months later. Service was good, place was crowded. Server attentive and pleasant. Food was once again good.
The lesser-traveled side of the King of Prussia Mall....lots of nice stores (Banana Republic, GAP, etc. etc.) and plenty of space to move around.

The calamari and the view were great but that's the extent of positive in our most recent experience. Service was frustratingly inattentive and other than the appetizer, food was abysmal (salad without dressing or much taste; grouper that tasted fishy; crab Mac and cheese that actually smelled like crab gone bad). $100 of stunning mediocrity.

I've been a member here a few years and visit regularly. Staff is great, prices are competitive, and facility is nice. I've also been a member at two other ranges and there's a reason I renew here. Couldn't recommend more. Keep up the excellent service!

No one speaks very much English and unless you order one of their set combos they have no Idea what you're saying. For what you're paying it's great. The chow mein is really filling. I like the sweet and sour chicken too.

The menu selections were mostly beef. The mango glazed chicken was small, over cooked. There was no written indication on the menu that the mango was like a pico with raw onions. The rice was dry and overly salty. Broccoli was overly salty and peppery.

This place is way over rated and over priced. A random stop in here proved to be the last time we ever eat here. The food was lacking in taste and the people working there are completely rude, minus the nice lady that was covering our area. She offered and carried my mothers tray for her, and was very attentive to our refills.

New to yoga, but wanting to get into the practice. Finished my 3rd class in 5 days and I really Love it so far. The instructors are wonderful and it is a great atmosphere. Will be buying additional classes after my first week
Love the people that work here! Glad to see a business that understands its clientele and works hard to keep them happy. #targetgirl4life

Very friendly. Clean. If there is a line it goes so fast. Sangria is amazing they don't put any ice!!!! Food is amazing have not had a bad dish yet. Been there like 8 times lunch and dinner. Chips are hot salsa is a Generous amount. Just amazing
Stopped by again for our annual visit. Great Mexican food for this area. Have enjoyed their food since they opened.

This store is a mix of overpriced, horrible condition for the price cabinets and some random well priced finds. It really depends on what your looking for. You might find it, it might be worth paying a bit more for new, you could score. I'd check again if looking for something, but I wouldn't have high hopes of finding it.

Very good Mexican food and plenty of it. Huge menu options to choose from, you're gonna find something you want. Service can be hit and miss sometimes but nothing that would keep me away from eating here. Prices are reasonable for the amount of food you get. Nice addition to the eastside. Now, pass the chips and salsa!
Iove everything here! Especially their chile verde! Also best horchata in reno. I do wish they had hotter hot sauce. But it's still delicious!
A bit pricier than other places but their sushi tastes fresher than your average joint to make up for it. I have only been here one for lunch but I would come here again to try more
I just went in for a quote. $20 higher than the one I went to last in Pinellas Park. No place for customers to wait and very dirty looking. I just left.
I've had lots of great macarons. These ain't it. Very very mediocre. Also got a brownie and I'm pretty sure she just threw it in the microwave before serving it.

OMG!!! Are you freaking kidding me??? $40 for crappy ass hot dog and 2 large Caramelos and one small caramelo??? I've had better at any south side truck for half of what you are charging!!! Canelo you should be ashamed. Never ever again !!!!!! Oh yeah and our CaRamelos where burnt as well!!

I'm not a vegan, but if I knew how to cook like this I could be. I have no idea how they do what they do without meat or dairy, but it's amazing. I can't wait to see their butternut squash items back on the menu. One of the best restaurants in St. Louis!

I was craving beignets and didn't want to stand in line for that other place so I thought I'd give them a try. My beignets were a tad over cooked and a lot of dough. The taste was good but you could tell that they rushed them out. The caramel iced coffee was good and sweet which was a plus.
This is such a cute quaint bakery, but we were told an item would only take four minutes and we waited over 30 minutes. Had high hopes and one of the barista's was really rude.
Brunch was a real disappointment. As a NOLA native, I just wanted to try the place for its history and name. Unfortunately, there is not much left. What a shame.
Really good wood fired pizza, huge/great salad, and awesome beer selection.

This place was seriously so delightful. The staff was beyond nice. L & Pierre were ridiculously personable. I lack enough positive adjectives to describe how great the customer service was here. I had the lavender scone which was quite nice. The coffee was also piping hot and tasty. The décor inside was very attractive also.

Not sure what is going on with this nursery, think it must have changed hands or management or something...Overall plant selection is down, and we couldn't find anyone to help us for at least 35 mins! Indoor plants look good, but not the nursery it was a few years ago

I had a bad haircut here. As another reviewer wrote, everything is a la Carte, so style after cut is extra (and I did not know this). Went home with wet hair having no idea what the actual shape would be. I'll be wearing my hair in a clip until I get it fixed elsewhere.

Good sports bars are hard to come by in the French Quarter. Decent food and lots of TVs with good sight lines. There's really no reason to come unless your watching a game but if you want to watch a game this is the best place around.
Wow, this Bertucci's has gone downhill! Dirty glasses. Indifferent service. Meh food. For chain Italian, go down the street to Carrabba"s. For pizza, cross the street for Taconnelli's.

I agree with one reviewer. Bring back the corn!!!!!!!!!! Also, fix the app the lines are long and the app ordering would be convenient but the app has a bug or something because I'm still waiting on the email to confirm my email and it still hasn't been sent after 2 days. But love the cobb salad just would love it more with corn

Amazing food and will always go back for the low prices and freshness. Favorites are river run, California sunrise, and any of the tempura rolls. All of them are amazing though! Keto friendly friends can have the sashimi salad which is very filling and has a variety of fish added on top!
Went through the drive-through this morning and had a very unpleasant employee first time at the Chick-fil-A that I have had that happen I guess he was having a bad day
The food was good and portions average. What I was not expecting was the extremely high prices. I did not feel the value was there.
Fast service for Hardee's. The ribeye steak and egg biscuit is my new favorite

Nice ambient, but food is too expensive for quality. Ordered fettuccine alferdo with chicken $18 ( swamped in souce and low quality chicken); small side salad of ice lettus, tomatos and cucumbers for additional $6. With a diet coke, a total of $29 with tax for a relatively low quality food.
Food is okay. Typical New Orleans bar. Everyone smokes. Inside and outside. There's no getting away from it.

Wanted to give this place another try but won't be back. Take out mussels were ice cold and served in a box so all the juice got out. Pad See You was not good but worst of all was the sushi--distinctly old and metallic tasting. A $50 disappointment.
Oyster Po Boy with what seemed to be stale hard bread, definitely not the fresh New Orleans sourced bread as advertised. Service was good, but disappointed in the sandwich.

Love this Bravo! Great pizza, I usually get plain. Today my eating. Partners had sausage and pepperoni, and ranch bacon. They enjoyed their slices too. Owner is nice and service is quick. Might be the best pizza in the area.

We booked room online through Orbitz.. We waited for check in 2.5 hours standing in a line... Thousands of people checking in, they only have 5 customer service counters... I don't recommend this hotel to any one..

Terrible service. Also the fact that they're ON BOURBON, people buy drinks from your establishment and refuse to give out tap water is OUTRAGEOUS. there are way too many places to patronize. I'm FROM HERE. I own an established restaurant where people ask for recommendations, trust me, this won't be recommended.

Rooms are clean, bars and restaurants are walking distance. Shopping about 3 miles away... Didn't give them 5 stars only because the walls are super thin and can hear everything and everyone around you.

If icould give this place a negative star i would. Asked for a water cup because iwas going to bee sick from their horrible service and the guy denied me a lemon. They deserve to be shut down with their inconsiderate foreign workers
I get my Botox here and really like it. Everyone has been really nice and my results have been great. Just started Retin A and I'm excited to see it work its magic. Highly recccommend them.

Very mediocre Mexican food. Got trio fajitas. Not very much food for the price and no guac or salsa on the plate either. Plate had a few onions and tons of peppers. Chipotle is better. Would not go back.

I had never had or witnessed a problem, but today I witnessed worker RITA say something blatantly RACIST to a customer who was polite and quiet and causing no problems. FIRE RITA. She is rough and RUDE and RACIST.

Apple walnut is a delightfully delicious. The atmosphere is pleasant. I will even go as far as saying it feels "home-y." Service is excellent and food is fantastic. If you like breakfast foods, I would most definitely recommend coming here!

Nothing special here, I had the roast pork white.... I've had better.. They have an extensive list of drafts... If you just want to get out of the house for a minute Its not a bad place... The barmaid was very pleasant ...so they get two stars!

We stopped in to try out new restaurants and we were not disappointed. Not only was the food beyond exceptional, our server was fantastic! Her name was Kim and she was knowledgeable and funny, which we really enjoyed! Highly recommend this restaurant and kudos to Kim!
Awesome wonton soup. Ordered from the combo section. Fried rice was average. Chicken was a little burnt. Egg roll was good.

Not only was the food overpriced but I live less than 2 miles away and had to pay an insane delivery charge, on top of that, the margarita pizza I ordered not only was insulting to look at because it WAS NOT a margarita pizza, it was bland as hell and gross. Never again. Ewww.
There is a reason why it's so close to the hospital!!!! Blowing it out both ends!!! Gross Disgusting My farts are now considered a lethal weapon!!!
Friendly staff but hotel is really old and outdated. Breakfast is marginal... Pick another la Quinta if you want some more luxury, if you just need a place to crash for a night then this is perfect.

One more place of the list of "must go to" of NOLA. The walls are filled with interesting write-ups full of history and TONS of business cards- you'll see! I tried one of their many classic/specialty drinks, The Pimm's Cup and it was fantastic! The bartenders were very knowledgeable and precise at making fantastic concoctions!
Honestly the food is great but $9.25 for a tuna melt with no side or anything - too expensive. Add a bag of Cheetos! It'll cost like $0.25 and make the price seem more reasonable.
Really nice staff, with food that's less than. I didn't finish my chilaquiles, and wouldn't advise anyone begin their own.

It's okay. Nothing special, needs to be remodeled badly. It's very authentic in some ways but not in others. The guacamole sucked, but the salsa is out of this world. The margaritas taste like Gatorade.

I've been ordering from this location for months without issue, and then tonight I try to order and I click the cash option at checkout, only to be told that my order exceeds the $9 cash limit for the store. What the actual f*ck?! Who delivers anything for less than $10? This is absolutely ridiculous. Never again.

Food was good but, I thought it was a little overpriced for the quality. I wished you could make a reservation instead of the long wait thankfully, there is fun things to do on the riverfront this time of year. However, the presentation of the dishes were great and the staff was friendly.

In a great location, however it does make it a bit more touristy. The food was just ok, I've had a better Cuban sandwich in Seattle. The lobster and crab croquettes are stuffed with meat, very little filler. However the bread coating wasn't the best. FANTASTIC mojitos!! If I didn't have to drive I would've gotten a pitcher for myself.
Just avoid this place. Below average food, way below average service!!!!!!!! Very disappointed to say the least.

I'm glad they have made it thru Covid but my bartender never works anymore. Well not hours that I can see her. I don't care for the ones that are here at night. Can't come on Sunday. I will just go back to my old bar. Sad I loved this bar and spent a lot of time and money here. Before and during Covid.
Delicious! Pancakes and Belgian waffles are fresh and fluffy. Staff is fast and friendly. It gets pretty busy at times, but the waitlist through Yelp is awesome.

If you do ClickList- don't come early. I thought coming a little early would work out. No. I've waited 45 minutes. It was supposed to have been ready 20 minutes ago. Very annoyed. I could have been done shopping by now.
Do not get the lemon pepper chicken, extremely too salty!!! Couldn't even finish it. Fries were good.

Delicious food- absolutely horrible service. We literally asked for bread 4 times. Came after our meal. Martini had something in it and the olives were old. Drinks and meals for the four of us came at all different times .
Come on in and try their empanadas. It feels like you're in Colombia. It's a lovely presence. The staff are kind and hospitable.

Love purebread & Maureen is amazing. She takes the time to get to know the regulars and really goes out of her way to make sure the customer leaves happy! Thanks for so many yummy breakfasts, lunches & coffee :)
The Awsome Potroast is, well, awesome. Our server, Edward, is very attentive. Glad to be back and have decent quality and great service.
We've only come for breakfast, but it's a go-to place with solid food and great bloody Mary's. Breakfast may not be quite the same as Petunia's, but is a decent replacement.
My ten year old is interested in learning guitar. We stopped in and Emily was absolutely perfect, patient, kind and insightful as she walked us through some decisions!!!!!!!
Food was bad. Like they haven't updated the menu since the late 90s. Service was good, beer was beer. There was nothing particularly special about this place. They neeeeed to refresh the menu!
Had their cuban and was pleasantly surprised at how good it was. Lot's of TVs so I got my hockey fill while I was down on business. Will definately head back next year.

The owner of this restaurant-- Aaron Teitelbaum-- essentially accused me of lying about whether a zuchinni-potato pancake had been included with my entree. It had not and I had no reason to lie about it. The four of us spent well over $300-- are you serious? Food was OK otherwise, but the owner embarrassed me and almost spoiled the night.

I got the mole enchiladas, and the sauce was way too sweet! Almost like the poured sugar in the sauce, too. Rice had zero flavor, and the beans were very very salty. My father ordered fajitas, and it too lacked flavor. But they do have a Nice atmosphere.

WOW talk about blown away!! The food was amazing, the spinning tunes were kept rocking all night, and the service was fantastic. I am looking forward to warmer days when we can hang on the beautiful patio next to the garden. Big fan of this place.
Still mediocre. Lots of TVs. Typical bar food, though not cheap if you are there outside of happy hour. I don't make a point of going here, but if I have to, it's okay.

Not many vegetarian options, so that's a huge sad point :( . Love the ambiance, very rustic chic. We had drinks at the outside bar, nice and small. Not great for large parties, as I think it would ruin the vibe for smaller groups, but overall it's nice, give it a shot!!
I have to say, I received excellent care. Dr. Ostrom was quick, kind, and helped me out! I'm unsure why all the negative reviews, they were great!

Tonight, Saturday night, my friends and I decided to eat at a Mexican restaurant. We called to make sure they were open and when we showed up at 9pm the man who greated us said they were closed. He said when they are slow they close early, they keep this up and they will closed permanently.
Enjoyed interacting with Joshua during the purchase process, he was very knowledgeable and helpful .I would definitely consider returning to Serra because of how Joshua treated us.

Holy crap, this has got to be the worst Dry Cleaners I've ever used! They have managed to break buttons on almost every shirt I own. We've complained repeatedly for months and they keep damaging the shirts. This isn't rocket science, what kind of moron is running this business? If there were more cleaners in Fenton this place would already be out of business!!!!!!!
Went to the show room. No one was there to show us patio doors. We left and no one cared. Horrible customer service!!

disappointed used to go to fatburger back in the day, when lovee lived in so cal and went to the beach everyday. pricey, fried, grisly burgers, i had to order a size up cause they were outta of the size lovee wanted insert sad face here.
We tried the 6 macaroons and also Fruity Pebble ice cream. All the items we had was ok. It lacked a punch of flavor. Also had a fake flavor aftertaste.
First time this evening based on friend's recommendation. Service decent. Average sushi. Spicy tuna not spicy. Menus are dirty.
Met a customer there for lunch. Good service, food was fresh, and was reasonably priced. Absolutely nothing to complain about.

The classic Arnold vibe is currently lost as you enter through a construction zone. Hopefully it'll be finished soon. Always dig roast beef day...classic meat-n-3 cafeteria-style line and cramped seating.

Good beer selection... Not a fun place to hang out... Like the other location, good beer doesn't make up for bad service, sub par food, and a horrible bar set up... I would almost call this place a dive bar...

From Arizona and found this place on Yelp. Decided to try it and glad we did. The steak was so flavorful and delicious! The chips were fresh and salsa was tasty too. Definitely recommend anything with the carne asada in it.

NTB worked me in early in the afternoon. They started on my vans service immediately. NTB has a very nice and clean waiting room with free coffee, television, work station and WiFi. NTB is easily accessible from the main road. I am very glad I found them as I am in this area at least once a month.
I waited 30 minutes for my food. The previous time I was there they didn't put hush puppies in any of the four meals I purchased. She I called yo there she said yeah we were out.
hair in pizza, not the best customer service , wouldn't even help us find somewhere for our group of 6 to sit down and eat.
It was a touch much more than I like to spend on middle of the road . The chips are so good . Service was amazing.

Had 2 grilled Reuben's w/potato salad, $10 each. It took well over 1/2 hour. The sandwiches had a good taste but hardly any meat. Potato salad was good & nice portion. Fries were ok. Not worth $24.00. And draft beer was warm. Plenty of TV's to watch. I won't be going back anytime soon.
Good... not Great Not a brick oven in sight 3 pizzas Plain cheese Pepperoni Sausage $49 Seriously?

Do Gouda Shaved New York steak, smoked Gouda, sweet onion marmalade, red onion, greens, sourdough. This is my favorite thing to order here. It's quick and easy and they have good sandwiches if you're in the mood for one.
I'll have to go back for something other than smoothies. The two I got were SO heavy on the bananas! I'll update this review when I try other items.

Staff was very attentive , and pleasant . I ordered takeout and it was ready in a timely matter . The sushi was good . It was not the most impressive sushi , however it was good . Will eat there again .
Good place. I like the beer and food, but the food takes a LONG time to come out even when they aren't very busy. Speed it up a bit! It's hard to fit it into a lunch hour.

I had read many reviews online and decided to purchase a groupon. Sadly, I was quite disappointed. Our server was top notch but the food was not what I was anticipating. The calamari was tasteless and my pasta sauce was runny and bland.

So nice to have a second Sonic location! This is centrally located and convenient. I love their coney and regular hot dogs and cherry limeades are so refreshing. Ice cream and shakes are such great desserts to end your meal! Also love the retro feel here.

Pizza is good here. Like that fact that you can add several toppings for one price. The sauce is good, i had the classic red but will be back to try the white sauce. Crust and toppings were great and cooked perfectly. I also tried the cinnamon rolls... They were spectacular. This place is definitely worth checking out.
Beverages are great. My only complaint; if you order an iced drink ask for light ice. They fill the ENTIRE cup up with ice and your drink will be gone in a few sips

Absolutely love this place, even through its about 35 minutes from home! Music is always spot on, and friendly folks. And the hotdogs where do i begin... You could probably try a different one each time and still not try them all. My two go to dogs are the gorilla and the storm tropper! check them out!
Was there last weekend. The service was terrible! Food came out cold. With all the good restaurants in New Orleans, I would avoid this one for sure!

Quick delivery for my tasty grilled chicken club with medium cut fries. My guests enjoyed their food also--buffalo chicken cheesesteak and turkey club. I would order delivery again, good stuff and no complaints.

Overpriced and overrated. My family and I ordered the French toast, and we thought it was just mediocre and slightly dry. Lack of a hint of orange that was stated in the menu. For the $9+ for that, I expected more. At least the coffee was good.
A hidden gem. Very good food all made fresh. Friendly staff. Will be coming back for sure
Very creative and flavorful menu. Nothing else like it in New Orleans. Love their salsas and the tuna tataki stack. Always fresh and always excellent
Love this place. Great beer, food and entertainment! Plus they have pups on the patio every Sunday afternoon!

Being new to yoga I was a little nervous about going to Sweet Peace my first time. I had nothing to be nervous about...the teachers were kind and patient with me and I left feeling not only relaxed and happy, but feeling like one of the family. The price is just right and they run specials quite often. I won't go anywhere else!

The best, left all the rest in the dirt, huevoes rancheros on the planet. Fun group of Tucson misfit waiters and waitresses that are not lost for words. "Their matra is Elegant dinning elsewhere, please eat and leave" All in fun of course. Good portions, great quality mexican. Be sure to check out the specials.

We are visiting from Seattle for our year wedding anniversary and had to enjoy biscuits! What an awesome choice this was! We had great service and it was delicious -- the only negative was the coffee but being from Seattle we may have impossible standards. Thanks to the great staff at Biscuit Love for a wonderful meal!
Weak. Definitely not worth the wait. Fun ideas, but not a place for a meal. Extremely limited menu. The food quality beyond milkshakes was below average.
Frozen yogurt and toppings are good but service is HORRIBLE!! Wish the service was just as good as the flavors. The cashier could at least pretend to enjoy her job. Very disappointed in the service!

Inferior quality,food is not fresh,beef tough,chicken tasted like yesterday as did the collard greens,salad questionable,lentils tasteless.all in all save your palate and cook some fresh lentil soup at home with fresh baked chicken. I couldn't even finish my meal and absolutely would not consider a doggie bag.
Skip the $90.00 VIP tour. Major rip off. Not much more than the $19.00 daytime tour.

Located in the heart of downtown Indy, the Westin is a nice hotel option. Clean rooms, nice amenities and a friendly staff make this a good selection for those not looking to break the bank. Walking distance from Lucas Oil Stadium and Bankers Life Fieldhouse as well as the Red Garter and Chick-fil-a.
The second star is only because the service is good. Don't get me wrong, service is very important to me but what do you mainly go to a restaurant for? The...food...is...crap. Any other questions?

Was here on May 5th 6 o'clock and the bar was horrible Takes 20 minutes to get a dang 1800 shaken margarita Had to cancel my 2nd order because I was finished with my food...ordered drink before food came
