How this place is still in business is a complete mystery. Someone must not mind losing money every month or it's a front for something else. The service is horrendous and the food ain't much better. I've never had the bubble tea so maybe that's what keeps it afloat.

Long line moved pretty quick. Something that you want to check out. But there are better historic destinations in town. At the end if the exhibit is the Liberty Bell. Now elbow some room for that pic.

The food was delicious! it was extremely busy. They got a few food items mixed up, but it was understandable considering the number of people there vs the number of servers. Would definitely go back in the future!
It's hard to believe the job on my daughter's nails was done by a "professional." What a mess. Also a gel mani & regular pedi took a little over 1/2 hour.
Coffee was good, avocado toast was good. I think it's near a college as I felt like an outsider. Hipster vibe, college-aged crowd. I would go back.
I've had lots of good pastries at Morenos, but the cookies I had were awful. I couldn't believe it. Terrible. The prices are very high.
Complete disaster. Staff is apathetic, rude, and completely ignore mobile pickup orders, then acts annoyed when you ask them to make the order 15 minutes after it's supposed to have been ready.

My calzone was mostly uncooked. If I wasn't so tired, I would have gone back to return It. Unfortunately I ordered it to go and I was back at my hotel before I realized it was uneatable . Check your order before you walk out or maybe, go elsewhere...

Stopped in to have a refreshing margarita. My sister-in-law and I both got the skinny margarita s- omg! It was so awful!!! Our husbands got the casa margarita and they hated it! None of us could finish our drinks. We decided not to get food. Sooooo disappointing. Go to 5Agaves in Old Hickory -- so good!! And a lot cheaper!!!!

We really like this place, including the atmosphere. Pastas and lamb were very good, and we loved the cream brûlée and teramisu. They also make some unique drink you are sure to enjoy. The only thing I didn't like was the eggplant nipolian.... It was so so.... I expected something much better.
used to be amazing. last 3 times I went for breakfast/lunch, it was NOT the same. and the bathrooms= DISGUSTING!

Not impressed. Apparently this is under new ownership. The prices were very expensive and our lane messed up a handful of times. Eventually we had to switch lanes and they didn't even let us start a new game. After all of that we weren't offered a discount or even a "sorry". The place was deserted and now it makes sense why.

The pizza was flavorless and the waitress tried to tell me it was because of what I ordered. Shouldn't all the pizzas have flavor? Absolutely never going back. Can't believe this was the owner/chefs claims to fame- go to Napolese for craft pizza it never fails!

Great looking cigar lounge with solid selection. Cool bar area that also has comfy leather couches if wanted. There's also a living room like second floor which looked fun. Friendly staff and overall a great 3 hour experience for a stogie and a few pours of bourbon. Can't wait to return.
This little joint is worth the try. Dinner was on point. Calamari crispy and the lobster garlic noodles were a delectable delight.
Wtf. Valet farted in my car before giving it back to me. Disgusting. My wife almost threw up. Never again.

Nice stopping place on way to gate.. they have seating outside of bar... it was crowded. The woman working the tables was very friendly. Got a cold beer and fish/chips... the fish was actually pretty good.. fries also... worth the stop, no regrets.

The nachos plate was very big and filled with toppings! Was not a fan of their pico de gallo on the grilled beef tacos, but the beef itself was very flavorful and char perfectly! The staff were very friendly and our waitress was very quick! The setting of the restaurant was very fun and cool to look around.
Really you close at 8 in Reno??? I don't even get off my job till then. Disappointed...you guys used to close at ten and i was a regular definitely lost my business and tons of others.
Dang! too expensive! $4.52 for a 12 oz latte (and that was after they applied a 10% discount for knowing the code word of the day!)

My favorite brunch spot. They have the greatest biscuit with sausage gravy, one of my favorite breakfast meals. I always get that with a side of homefries. Ideal time to go is during the week, the weekends = a reeeeally, reeeeeally long wait.

Maybe they were old but the cupcakes I ate were dry and not sweet enough. I had a vanilla. My son had a cookies and cream. Even he said the frosting was hard. Like a dried out middle of an Oreo. And my cake ball was gelatinous. Other two kids enjoyed their whoopsie pies. Cashier was very nice.
Quality has declined. Hours are not always consistent. The fancy coffee machine they used to have is long gone (not that I drink coffee, but it seemed important).

Went back here since it's been awhile EVEN WORSE. Driving through the drive through I get greeted with "what u want" followed by huh what u say, what food u want. Than they completely got my order wrong and finally when it was corrected I got a burger no bun. Thanks Wendy for another awesome experience
They change their name again. It's no longer Blue Moon Pizza and Gyro. This place has had several name changes.

Don't waste your time. The menu is confusing for a reason. Everything is al a carte. I spent $40 on a happy hour item, an entree, and a side, and still left hungry. The place was very noisy and WAY OVERPRICED.
Staff was very friendly. The place was clean and smelled nice. But they really don't put enough cream cheese on these bagels.

This place used to be good..... I am kind of disappointed now. Coffee was burnt. Blueberry pancakes were chewy and blueberries tasted frozen... Eggs Benedict was OK, but hash browns tasted fake....... Service was friendly and prompt. Outdoor seating available. Two People... Breakfast was $30. They really need to get on their game if they want to compete with the French Bakery next door.......
Waiting for food from last 45 mins after giving order. Pathetic place with foul smell and grumpy owner

This place is extremely unsanitary!!!! They do not clean their electric tools at all. The man cut me twice and when i asked if he cleaned them he said once a week. Im actually disgusted. This is extremely dangerous and unethical and against nail salon policies. When i asked another employee about it he said i cant control what he does at his station.

The girl who took my order didn't say anything to me!! Not even "hi" when I walked up or "thank you" when I gave her the money. I said both of those things to her though. Seriously people, it's not good customer service when the customer is the only one being friendly.

Nice food, with a comfortable ambiance. The quotes on the glasses are a very nice touch, and it makes somewhere that you want to keep coming back to. The service is fast and the staff is friendly making it somewhere that works to get away for a work lunch or a dinner with friends.

If you dont love this place, then it is you who is the problem. Pearl Cafe is life. The food is fresh and consistent. Portions are generous. Staff is friendly and attentive. More places should be like this!

Awesome experience at Tint World! I called and talked to John about my situation. He was able to get my issue resolved rapidly with my Viper Remote Start/Alarm system. I intend to go back to them long term as needed for any future work based on my experience. Highly Recommended!
This was our first visit to Tiny's and we weren't impressed. The burger and fries were okay, we expected more flavor. The staff was friendly but nothing special.

One of the best lunch experiences I've had in a long time. Everything is made fresh daily. Very quick and unbelievably friendly service. If you're in the area looking for a quick bite gotta stop here!
Have been eating these burgers and enjoying the best milk shakes anywhere since they were located in Springfield - a fav for 40 years!
First time having a pimms cup. Awesome!

Ok so worse service ever!!!! The bartender don't know how to make a drink to save your life and don't pay attention to you until you start flagging money their way. The foood is horrible and the service is worse. The crowd that goes there at night is very sketchy I feel at risk of my life when I'm there at night

I have had a storage unit here for several years. It is very convenient to access, usually very clean and I always feel safe. Recently I requested a smaller storage unit and the manager, Tiffany was able to provide one rather quickly. Deb H.
Walked in from the start they were very unorganized and rude they got my order wrong and took forever they weren't wearing gloves either very unsanitary!
Good little spot after so many failing at this location . I go for the homemade soup!
Over priced and uncomfortable. You will sit in always chairs and tables. Don't like this place one bit.
Food was descent a little overpriced, but shill good. Service was moderate, server was friendly, but took forever to get us the bill.
Great dinner, service and experience. Definitely well managed now and overall atmosphere was upbeat, professional and friendly!!
Incredible food and the price is right. Huge serving for $7. Falafel plate is the best I've ever had
Five stars all day Charlie's on the blvd by far I would put it head to head with a pizza and if will destroy anyoneeee I mean anyone
Only 2 stars because everyone was nice other than that food was too salty and uncooked. I'm the type to not bother so I did not say anything, but, never again.

My first time here...So I ordered one of their steak rice bowl options and I opened at home and to my surprise no cheese. It's about $13 for this plate and all I got was steak, lettuce beans and onions. Not happy at all. Hostess was nice, that's all about it. Plate was decent but would have liked it more with the cheese.

We received a coupon for a free pizza which was shrewd marketing since we didn't know they existed. Our pizza was amazing! Sauce was excellent, you get to choose your own toppings at no additional cost and the wood-fired touch was really special. We're thrilled that they're so environmentally conscious and that, plus the great pizza and friendly staff, means we'll definitely return.
Almost a four star but no provision for those waiting. Their orders went from good to bad. Service mediocre at best. No intention of returning.

Food is generally pretty good but service rarely is. Sometimes music is played too loud to have a conversation. Recently they were out of mozzarella sticks. I didn't even know that could happen at an Italian restaurant.
I'd give it 5 stars except they continue to keep the sexist signs up. Seriously, guys, it's 2017. Take down the signs. Men vacuum too and women don't need their husband's permission to spend money.

I recommend bugmaster Pest Control to my real estate clients for there initial home inspections, and continued service for their pest control and Lawn Service needs. Joshua Guy is an excellent representative for this company.

This is what I get for coming here. I haven't eaten Taco Bell In years, but was out of options last night. This was over $5. A "Nacho bell grande". I would have rather played the lottery. Thanks for reminding me I never have to eat at a Taco Bell again

Ordered and it never came. Called the restaurant no one ever answered and no updated on Grubhub either. No way to figure out what happened. Pregnant and angry. Not a good combo. Should've read the 20 other people who didn't get their orders delivered until 3 hours later or I never would have ordered.

Although the place was almost empty, the service was extremely slow. Staff were friendly and the place was clean, just slow. Gulf shrimp was good, but a bit salty. The gumbo ya-ya is quite tasty. Will not return.
I received an email from management that showed they really care and they actually read my post. For that reason as well as previously positive experiences. I am adjusting my rating to a 3
These people rip you off. They give a price and then charge you more for lesser quality than you picked out.

Paid for house cleaning with the possibility of bi-weekly cleanings going forward. She cleaned a few rooms & said she would be back the following morning to finish the job. That was 3 weeks ago. She hasn't responded to numerous phone calls and emails.

The food was excellent all around. One snow crab platter, one spicy fried grouper, one fried shrimp. Wedge salad and fried pickles apps. Then the wait. 25 minutes between "how was your dinner " and "what would you like for dessert ?" Other than that things were excellent but no excuse for forgetting about us when a couple of big groups arrived.

The service at this place was great, the cook came to talk to us, we were allowed to eat outside and napkins were brought to us...but the pizza wasn't good pizza. It tasted like a frozen pizza. We couldn't even finish it, and after paying for two slices at $8.50, we went somewhere else.
Simple. Straightforward. Delicious. Hummus is smooth and flavorful. Toppings add just the right pop. Wash it down with a craft beer and you're all set. Go often.
Fabulous! Ate my Guinness dog before I could take a pic, it was amazing. Bacon, onion, cheese, mustard...holy moly it's good, just get it lol
The oysters were amazing! I wish we would have ate more of them! The only think I didn't like was the French fries but that isn't what we came for! The bacon oyster po boy was really good!
Had the Jambalaya added shrimp looked to be out of a can salad size . Nothing at all special about it for $14. Looked like a Micro Wave kitchen.
BEST. BBQ. IN. NASHVILLE. I've come here every time I've been in town. I've had BBQ from some other places in Nashville, but this place is hands down the best. Their sides and meat can't be beat.

This was great. Became a huge fan of Colombian food on two trips there a few years ago. Now I can finally get some of that incredible food here in town. Neat atmosphere, friendly service, great arepas. Can't wait to try the San Cochol!

Great massage for a great price! $1/min The place itself is in a shopping center and inside the atmosphere is good but not perfect, I wish it was more of a zen feel. However, the massage itself was great, they had low relaxing spa music playing in the background.
It's was good for about the first bite cause I've never had it before , but then it start making me sick.....I literally got sick
Disinterested service. Slow food preparation. Food was good but not great. Looks like besh set this place up and has never come back.
Passed my bar on Turkish food, as a vegetarian there were many delicious options. Price seemed very reasonable, service great, environment warm and music appropriate for dining experience. Thank you!
Just ate here for first time. Great healthy choices. Definitely will return. Highly recommend.
Pizza felt and tasted like frozen, the so called giant sub, was lame.. half a regular sub..bland. I got a slice of cheesecake and even that was dull..waste of money..

Service was quick, accurate and friendly. We sat outside where you can catch all the action on the river docks. The beer was cold and the food was hot and fresh. At the table we had fish n fries, grilled cheese, fish spread and jalapeño poppers. All good, we'll be back.

They were super nice BUT my provolone wasn't even melted and the steak was cold... fries were good but that's it. We drove from NY to try a Philly cheesesteak and with Geno's across the street we choose wrong

Ok get your PR food fix for this place! I had the white rice, red beans. A super soft steak and onions and just right done maduros. Also has a home made pastelito carne. Outstanding flavor and these folks know how to cook.
Oh, How I long for your greasy goodness. This place is a lost treasure for mid city.
I cohere for the latte, and it's the best latte you're going to get in Ventura and Santa Barbara Counties. I cannot drive by this place without stopping for their latte.
Ladies they have really good bras for a cheap price that holds really good on those women in a size D our DD

My dinner was one star. Wife's was 3 stars. Taking the average. Dirty in the dining area. My meat was gristly. Service good. Will not return. The old place, the Eagle Diner, was much better. Cleaner, homier decor. That is all.

Came very quickly to our house, fixed our garage in 20 minutes, and were friendly. Great costumer service and pretty good pricing. We didn't have to pay for the service call but the price was a bit much for the small amount of work. Anyways, it is a great service provider and I would use them again!
Simply but good food for a decent price. The interior is dated and forgettable.
Great Seafood Chow Mein! They do not use spaghetti noodles! The waitress was very nice with a smile that could light up the darkest day. Very beautiful!
3.5 stars. the place is nice, fancy and very clean. manager is really friendly. the pho was ok, had better.
We came from Northern NJ and yelped this diner. Food and service was excellent. Thank you yelp, So glad I yelped.

Nothing's really special about this place. They have you write your order on a bag. Food is ok. They do have their own brand of chips that were tasty. I'm more of a fan of Jimmy Johns. I won't go out of my way to go back.

Love this place!!!! I have been here a few times now and just love it! Staff are friendly and ask how our meal was. Service was fast. I had the chicken Munro loved it. Atmosphere is quite which i really like Wish they had a patio setting.....
Best bike shop in the Princeton area hands down. I wish it were a bit closer but I don't have anytime for the 2 bike shops actually in Princeton. Knapp's is worth the extra driving time.

Tried the Catfish combo with Cajun Fries, Calamari and Crab Cakes. Will return to try a seafood boil bag next time. I heard the Mr and Mrs Crab sauce was great. Dee, my waitress, was very friendly, welcoming and personable. Food came out quickly. No complaints

Always packed. Decent food with decent price... Clam Chowder is good Calamari is not bad... Baked clams are too butter and mayo... Fish and chips are..... Small potion and small pieces. Too much butter... We will try with Mac's fish and chips on state st. Today!
We had some awesome stone crab claws here this weekend. They are in season now and served here fresh at a reasonable price. This is a fun restaurant that specializes in fresh seafood, I like it.
Nothing but good reviews here. I come every Sunday, Tanya makes great drinks, and the staff let me turn off the table light to make it easier on my eyes. Keep it up

First time here. Great food and huge portions. Home style potatoes were amazing. Crisp bacon, eggs fried just right and fluffy pancakes. Our server was very efficient and friendly. The manager even came over to ask if we enjoyed our first time there. We will return.

Had the spicy maple praline donut. Not too sweet or oily, but did not get the 'spicy' part and the maple frosting was brittle and kept crumbling off the donut. I guess it's kind of an artisan donut so it still tasted good but I feel not worth its price or title.
I like their deli specials, but there's no way that their hoagie dip is worth the price they charge! I've had better!
Just got a call from Watson's office saying they would not authorize a prescription refill because I owe them 10.00. The prescription is one that I have to have.

Ordered "the goat chili cheese pepper jack dog" that came with pepper jack cheese, chili, lettuce, tomatoes, onions, bell peppers, black olives, jalapeños, relish, sour cream, ranch and spicy mustard. I didnt know if all that would go together, it really does yum, and love the bun bread and beef dog.
Friendly staff...sometimes drive thru is backed up. They deliver through UberEats. Download the UberEats app and enter code UE-uaduw for $10 off first order!! Delivery available 24 hours

Breakfast here this morning. Buffet food was room temperature or cold. The sausage was cooked, but cold. The ham was room temperature, as were the potatoes. The only thing that was hot was the omelet that the gentleman cooked right in front of me.
Awesome!! I have a lot of issues and I have been to many different dentists and he has given me the best experience. He knows what he's doing.
We were seated quickly the waitress was very nice. it's a very nice clean friendly atmosphere and a cheeseburger and french fries were outstanding....

Walked in to a backed first floor yet still greeted by the hostess and given instructions that floors 2 and 6 have openings to sit at the bars. Food was decent and was prepared rather quickly, nice bartenders, and fairly priced.

I contacted Mr Hawkins for direction in regard to a legal matter and he seemed very arrogant & condescending! He essentially dismissed me at "hello" and was more concerned about getting his fees than providing the services he advertised.... Would NEVER recommend this attorney to anyone!

I have never had bad food from here. Basic italian shop fare...great for easy weekend bites. Stop by for a quick slice or call ahead for an order- because they are always busy! Sail in with your order confirmation number and sail out. Easy, Easy. A great neighborhood place.
Great coffee and owned by great people! Food options available for Gluten Free people!

I went to safelite to replace my window on my new 2015 van,they charged my insurance $800,replaced my window with a strange looking aftermarket windshield,I was told it was my fault ,one fast talking expert after another,also chiped my car paint,I would not come here again,go elsewhere,not like tv commercials

We have always enjoyed a meal here but they changed the menu! Our waiter said it changed about a week ago. I had a difficult time finding something appealing on the menu. Found the wings and went with them. Wait staff was great....beer was good but food .. I miss the old menu.

I've been using this location for years. Not only do they provide full service on glasses they also repair your glasses for Free..The staff is always friendly and always professional. I always feel at ease when shopping or their for repair which is often.I always sleep with my glasses on..
My food was under average but my friend had better. The price was high for the amount we got. The worse of all was the service because we weren't asked even once if we would need anything.

I was walking on the street and saw this place, looked it up on yelp and it had ok reviews. I ordered the poke bowl which tasted very good but for $13 it was very small. Also got the nachos but they were only ok, tortilla chips were kinda soggy. The service was good her name was Lila.

Ordered from Skip The Dishes, never again Worst order we've ever received Crab Rangoon was burnt, missing items, rolls we ordered weren't what we ordered I suggest you get off Skip The Dishes if you can't fulfill orders correctly
This store is consistently clean and the employees are always very helpful! The organics section is ok for a Kroger although in my personal opinion they could offer more. Just a suggestion.
Slow....... been waiting over 2 hours for our order, had to go to another vendor to get tacos to tie us over.... won't be back. A warning would have been nice.

I have never been to a Perkins before but everyone seemed so nice! We got seated right away and the manager tom took our order. The cheeseburger fries were amazing!! Tom was so nice and funny! He even gave us pie to go!
Great spot with a nice outdoor patio. I love so many of the dishes here I can't pick a favorite! They also have a great chai latte
Took my car for servicing a while ago and they didn't do what they promised to do. Very unprofessional establishment. Josh was the only professional person that worked there.

Great music and great food for a music venue. Had the grilled shrimp basket.. cajun style. Always smart to book a table in advance since it is a popular place just a few blocks off broadway in Printers Alley. Ask for when Sista Ruth is playing for a real experience!

I usually love this chain but this particular location was the worst service I have ever experienced. We ordered beers and sat for 45 min before getting anything. I was very disappointed in this service and will never go back.

El Vez is notoriously packed and a favorite of many. However, I feel it's overrated. Mexican is one of my favorite types of food and it feels very...basic...here. There's nothing that tastes authentic and the salsa (a Mexican restaurant staple) is meh. The vibe inside is really cool, but I feel the name carries more weight than the food inside.
Why aren't there prices posted for all the items? Shelves never organized, employees will not help you. Ratchet all around.

stopped by for breakfast, nice spanking clean restaurant. Service was quick and friendly. Good cup of coffee! Omelette looked great like in an ad, but wasn't tasty. Homefries not homefries but deep fried. Bottom line is this place lacks the omami of a diner. Pay less attention to presentation, and more to taste and flavor
Really great coffee here and a very cool location, and good service as well. The only downside is that the pastry/food selection isn't that great, which could make it a 5 star spot.
The dolmades was pretty bad, it had a weird tang. My husband was served his meal while I sat waiting and waiting for my pizza. We finally got up and left. Our server really didn't care at all.

Nothing special. Lazy today! Just a cheap and cheerful pizza afternoon. Probably going to wash it down with a few brews. Little Caesars always lives up to expectations because I don't expect much. Price is right and its ready or will be ready for you in minutes. Tonight's choice is the Three Meat. Not too shabby!

Get the black and gold - french vanilla and chicory ice cream with hunks of oreos and chocolate chips! They only have it during football season. With inspiration like this, it is now wonder why the Saints are on a roll.

Went in to buy a few things-got in line to pay-there was only one person at the cashier and she didn't seem to know what to do-after some time I left and so did several others.I was told this has happened several times

Liked the atmosphere. Had a salad. I won't be back because what I wanted was a vegan burger, but was told their vegetarian​ burger contains egg. Two stars for vegans, four or five stars for most, thus I have rated in the middle.

Anthony is phenomenal. He replaced the windshield on my 2019 MINI Cooper convertible. Impeccable work using all OE parts, and worked with my insurance company to boot. Don't hesitate, just call and make your appointment! Seriously, 5 stars isn't enough.

stopped in here early sunday afternoon and it was great...semi divey.....great friendly bartender (sorry but I forget her name) ...she was great...nice clientele....cozy and comfortable.....place is small with the smallest toilet that I have ever seen in the city...but clean...lol.....the beers were cold and svc. was quick....next time I get into town I want to stop in for lunch....the food looked good

$9 bottle of a 12oz.Weyerbacher IPA. $7 Sangria in a little wine glass filled with ice. It took it 10 minutes for the server to tell us they were out of the first beer choice. Very disappointed. Cute patio though.
I've eaten here at least 50 times over the years. It always seemed very clean and well run. Obviously I was wrong and won't be going back.

This place is funky and fun! Awesome Northeast Philly gem :) Love the food. Very accommodating for large parties! They also offer Sunday brunch that I would highly recommend, they have a lot of those things on the menu you would see on Food Network and wonder...where can I get fried chicken wrapped in pancakes? Three Monkeys Cafe!

I came back and tried the regular cheeseburger and loved it. We sat inside this time and had the best service at lunch time. I brought my friend for his first visit, and he said it was the best burger he'd had in town in a long, long time. So I'm upgrading from 3 to 4 stars.

this place replicates real southern charm. family style eating. southern style cooking. it's hard to keep the portions small on your plate. and there are sooo many options. sides, sides, and more sides! my favorite was the corn side. fried chicken, gravy smothered chicken. this place was so good my friends went here two nights in a row.

Hit the spot. Minutes from our hotel, friendly and attentive staff, delicious food - I shared the baked lasagna with my 3 year old son and he was licking his fingers. We will come back the next time we are in st. Louis
I love this place. The food the atmosphere. The nachos are damn good. Everything is good. This place is just go

Worse branch ever. Be prepared to wait at the drive thru a minimum of 20 minutes. They will make the genius call to have ONE teller working at lunchtime on a Friday. Also- always check your deposit slips. They seem to have a habit of keying in the wrong amounts.
Do not order eggs Benedict here. They are not equipped. Having choices doesn't make it good. The enticing photos on yelp are 2 years old.
We ate there last summer; we were the only customers for over an hour (it was around 7pm). It now (October) looks like it is closed.

Went to get a cocktail on a Monday night. I was wearing my mask, a friend I was with cannot wear a mask, medical condition. We were told, while it is 50 degrees, to enjoy our drinks outside with no heaters on their patio. We politely declined.

Nearly choked on the cloud of toxic chemicals they used to clean the room. Sure enough, I woke with a headache the next morning. Glad some people like it. For $109, I expect some attention to this aspect in this day and age.

Excellent food but the waitress was extremely rude and unfriendly. We have eaten there many time and have always had good service. The waitress today was the worst hostess that we have ever encountered. She needs to get a different job or she will scare off all of the locals.

We had the brisket and pulled pork sandwich. Excellent bun to meat ratio good. Next time we will try ribs. Service was good and place was clean. Very close run with 4 rivers. Definitely better than holy hog which is in the top 10 BBQ'S place and shouldn't be

Saga Toya has a nice and diverse selection of product, but the store is a disorganized mess with product in random spots all over. It almost feels like the owners don't even try to figure out what to do with their space. Prices are well above market value

Just relocated from Virginia and was worried about finding a new Nail salon. Not only did she do an Excellent job, the newly opened salon has state of the art decor, products and service.... Even put a heat wrap on my neck to relax, complimentary drinks and wine . AAA+
Not so good.no pappy.honey butter ugh. Too spicy.need to try at night. Arnolds is always good.Sean Brock may do better in Charleston?

Stopped in here based on reviews on Yelp, ribs were not what I would expect.....tough, hard, not what ribs should be.......you want them to fall of the bone, far from what I expected, probably won't go back, service was good but the food was disappointing

I ask for queso dip for dipping. They don't carry it. I ask for frozen margarita. They don't have it. 2 strikes. I order a quesadilla it was dry. Had nothing to dip it in. Only very few chicken and melted cheese. I am still very hungry
Ms Moons Bulgogi Rice Bowl is a sure fire hit. Italian Baked Mac & Cheese will not disappoint. Music was entertaining and service great (Keefe - thank you!)

This has got to be the most under-rated ride in the park. Every time I ride this coaster I'm completely taken aback by how intense it is. The drop is not so high, but the loops and spins are ferocious. The best part is that there is hardly ever a line.
OMG. Great breakfast find a block and a half off the streetcar line in the Garden District.

I intend to avoid this walgreens whenever possible. Went last night and was again subject to rude behavior and snippy comments from staff. Also had another visit where cashier called my friend "cheap" because an item rang up $5 more than what we saw displayed and we decided not to keep it. Really can't think of anything positive to note except it's convenient location.

GREAT sushi, fair prices and they deliver. The only reason for 4 stars is that the place is tiny and kind of claustrophobic. The spare decor seems to make it a little spacier, but 12 feet across can only seem so large.

Service was excellent , food came out quick, oysters were good but my lobster was over cooked and tough. My husbands short rib was cold which they promptly fixed. The brownie ala mode was good. I'm giving 3 stars because we left feeling like it was meh. Nothing there really blew our minds.

Unreal. $70.00 in us currency. Not including cash tip . And really. DO NOT order from here. Simple order and it's a nothing. No sauce for crab meat ragoons, nor for the steamed dumplings . Chicken lo mein. Seriously . No chicken. ‍

Bump 1 star, and that is because I like looking at the sorority girls who frequent here. I realize the price is based on weight, and so maybe I am just greedy but I feel like the its just too much money for the amount of yogurt that I get. Maybe they need some sort of bulk/volume discount?
It was an okay hotel. Staff wasn't rude but not overly friendly either. Good size rooms, nice location but room could have been cleaner.

Waitress wasn't very friendly when I asked about best options from the menu, she asked if I read the menu. I wanted to be pointed in the right direction to order seafood along with the other meats, didn't get that. Good food though. Just didn't feel welcome.

This is the CVS I usually go to - it has a decent size parking lot and a drive thru. The pharmacist is super friendly and chatty, which can back fire when you are in a rush. They need self-serve stations so you can get through faster or more staff at the cash register.

Love their food! But it is really noisy so if you have a large group probably isn't the best place to go for a visit. We met for book club and really hard to talk. Everyone had good fOod and liked the place
I'm not an expert on pho, but had the chicken pho here a few times and it was pretty good. Last time i went there, I got pretty bad food poisoning there so won't be going back again.

The good: the ambience/decorations and the service. The bad: the fettuccine was overcooked and the ravioli was too salty. Overall: This place has a lot of potential, but I feel like they try to do too much (Italian, Steak, and Mediterranean?) They should limit their menu options and focus on getting the basics right (e.g. cooking times and seasoning).
All I can say is this... Please bring a SBCR to south orange county.. We love you SBCR!!!

I love this vet. I have taken my dog here several times, and my dog is completely neurotic but they always treat us really well. I also tend to be pretty nervous for my dog every time I have to take him to the vet so it's nice that they are always really friendly and efficient.
Friendly, yes, helpful no. Been a customer for 45 years. They have done nothing to earn my continued loyalty.

Low incoming housing hotel. The clientele represents section 8. A drastic change pre Covid. Loud, vulgar, & scary. The staff is unprofessional. There was trash overflowing in the vending room for three days. The hallways were not vacuumed for three days and there was trash. Totally unsanitary for even by a one star chain. This used to be a upscale hotel. Not Now !!!

Honestly. ... The most over-priced products And insincere staff in the area. Bought a product that said "instantly" and tried to convince me that meant to wait a week because the overpriced fish died. Unwilling to help. Rude personnel, except Keith.
I got a gel mani and a regular pedicure they were well done with a nice massage and friendly chatter the place was clean. I'm glad I found this place to stop in on my trip to gencon.
Serious no messing around Rich's gelato. The dark chocolate is out rages and then Atilla as well

Burgers are great. Locally sourced beef a great idea. But...then combine that with battered waffle fries. Strange combo. Fresh cut fries and this place would be great. This may be an indy thing. East and west coast similar concept restaurants would have fresh cut potatoes.
Omg ! Cheesesteak with cooper sharp .... phenomenal .... that upside down jawn .... wow .. so good
had half pepperoni half cheese pizza , crust was awesome , sauce was alright , cheese was good , pepperoni was amazing! actually one of the best pepperoni meat i ever had.
I drive 10 miles to get to Blue Sage. It is worth the trip! Large portions. Cooked to perfection. Always new items on the menu. It never gets boring.

Took the tour of Grand Old Opry. It was overpriced at $25.00 for 45 minutes, poorly organized and forgettable. The constantly repeating video made it difficult to hear the tour guide. This is definitely not a must-see stop in Nashville, Go to the Ryman and the Country Music Museum instead and save your money.
Nice people but usually understaffed. Drive thru is agonizingly slow. Much slower than the Starbucks at 96th and Meridian.
Shaved seitan was good though a little dry. Could maybe use some pickles or more veggies. I got a side of hot sauce which was green and vinegary but not spicy. Cool spot though. Love the interior.
Ordered takeout during COVID. Meal was horrible. Chicken parmigiana small piece and totally dried out. Caesar salad had way too much grated cheese.
Overcooked food, has the feeling of a careless kitchen. Pleasant service does not make up for it.

Wonderful water ice! Went to concert and wanted water ice on a hot summer night. Thankfully they're open until midnight. I got mango. Friend got chocolate. Other dessert offerings looked amazing too. Will go there again if in the area.
Be careful ordering on the app. This location is temporarily closed, but the app still let me place an order for this location.

It was the BEST place we tried during our trip. It was so awesome we went there twice!! Highly recommend the Shrimp Tchefuncte and the crab cheesecake (more like a quiche) Loved the atmosphere and the service.

Absolutely regret eating here. Completely flavorless. Crawfish étouffée, fries, and shrimp poboy were all disgusting...salt couldn't even fix it. Never ever come here. At least $40 for the most disappointing meal I've had in New Orleans. I'd give them 0 stars if I could.
Lettuce wraps were great as usual. Sushi rolls - no - obviously made in advance and refrigerated yuck. Will return again for non-sushi items.

Slow service, Mens bathroom was gross, wet floors, paper towels all over the vanity and floor because the garbage receptacle was over flowing, server was a C- at best. Love Red Robin for decent food and quick service. This location was a disappointment. Still a patron in other locations, as I have never experienced this at any Red Robin, just this location so far.

If you're looking for some good vegan/vegetarian food this is an excellent spot to hit up. My only complaint and reason for 4 stars, is I often find this place fairly quiet when I go, but feel rushed by the staff to leave. Overall excellent food, but not a spot to savor a fresh squeezed juice and check emails.

I'm totally addicted to these fruity delicious treats. I've tried a bunch of smoothies now and they do not disappoint. Add some greek yogurt! I am a sucker for a cool smoothie. The downside is, if you check out the nutritional value, it is a TON of sugar so that's a bit scary. The staff is always friendly.

Tasty and cute decor inside, but lack of vegetarian options makes it unlikely that I will return. I've been to other ramen/noodle places with amazing vegetarian and vegan options! Unfortunate that cheu doesn't accommodate much.

Can't say more about loving this place. Just wish you could get takeout by the slice. A little pricey but definitely worth it for the quality. The crudo is my all-time fave. It is DELICIOUS and such fresh ingredients. Great for a group or a date to sit outside on a nice evening. They should get some pasta dishes too.

Can i say shitty on yelp? Well that's what this place is. Shit-tastic. I've given it too many tries. I thought when they first opened that they were experiencing growing pains. Nope. This is it. Bad service and bad food. The only redeemable factor is the ambience and location. Besides that just go to Courtesy Diner on Hampton. Much better.

This is our second time dining here and it is excellent! The food is fresh and tastes like your grandmother made each dish. The restaurant is spotless and so clean. For dessert, the Tres Leche cake was amazing! I would recommend that you try this little jewel in Riverside.

We were visiting from Los Angeles - took my 94 year old dad and 92 year old mom here for dinner. Fantastic food HUGE portions. Thankyou Vinny's for allowing us "corkage" for a bottle of Italian Barolo that we brought with us. Lol we had to explain to the waitress what a "corkage fee" means! Service was terrific.

Do not waste your time here. You can get a better slice for a 1/3 of the price at any local pizza place. Also, what constitutes a museum? Having a poster with a pizza on it and a TMNT action figure? Tourist trap with rude employees who seem like they just got done smoking a joint.

I am not sure why this is not five stars on yelp. Went here with my friends last night and it was amazing. Ordered chicken tikka masala and chicken achari both of which were very good! Service was great as well. Will definitely be going back.
The staff here is always really friendly, the portions are big, and most importantly the food is excellent. I always bring family here when they visit for breakfast and brunch.
Food was pretty good, prices seemed in line with other higher end restaurants. Wine list was pretty solid, but by no means the best in town. New menu sounds like it will have some good changes.

We were there this morning. Breakfast special was $5.39 for eggs, juice, & coffee or tea. But, since my friend didn't want the juice (which saved them money), they charged her $5.99 for the eggs PLUS $1.99 extra for the tea. Besides, the food was just ok, nothing special. No, we won't go back.

Great fun for kids and families; try to get there as early as possible though. Around lunch-time on a Saturday things get a little crazy. Be prepared for copious amounts of strollers. Practice maneuvering before going. :-)

One of my favorite Irvington places. Lots of good, authentic staple items and on weekends they have a nice assortment of prepared foods for carry out. Carnitas, chicken, whole fish, ceviche, cocktail and other goodies. Prices are very reasonable and quality good.
My experience with safe embrace was absolutely amazing. Amanda was my caseworker and she was great, understanding and helpful. Thank you for all your help.
Food's good but the service is slower than a snail's pace. This place has the highest concentration of apathetic waiters in Tucson.

Food is quite delicious but this is not a place to go if you are expecting a quite night of good conversation. Environment was quite loud and area is drafty. This is a great place for a wine night with friends.
Chelsea was great! She was professional and communicated well throughout the service. Very satisfied!

The food was not good and they charged $2.50 just to add sour cream and cheese and the baked potato. The burger was bland and the restaurant is dimmed in the inside. The monsoon was yummy but if you're in the mood for a good burger I would recommend 5 Guys instead.
Everytime i come here its a rude person at the cashier. My car isnt even clean when it comes out. I dont know maybe just me.
The spring roll was served with oyster sauce and peanuts, really disappointing also its is 90% vegatables and one shrimp in each roll..... they are not very appetizing.

First time here today and I'll definitely be back! I had the jerk chicken meal and my husband had jerk ribs. It was so yummy! The shrimp were spicy and tender. The ribs were hearty and fall off the bone tender. And did I mention the rice and peas! Service was on point. Food was prepared quickly. Ambiance was nice. I'll definitely be back!
Cute place. Very efficient. Kept things clean. Ordered the BYOBreakfast. The biscuits were amazing!! Eggs were great!! All was delicious. Will be back!!

Soup-like custard and long lines for what? This St. Louis tradition has truly lost it's edge. They need to rethink their business model on service and quality of the finished product. Very disappointed.
Definitely not some place I'd recommend the food is not in not interesting overpriced service is slow would not recommend for a family outing definitely not the place

I always recommend Christopher's to anyone in the area looking for a great place for lunch or dinner. The burgers are amazing, and it has a great feel to the place. I've never had bad service here, or a bad meal. They have brunch too!

The Customer Service is confusing and then when you ask them questions they get an attitude. The information they provide is not consistent and I even told a Representative this and they just shrugged it off. I had to hang up on them because I knew it wasn't going anywhere.
Love making this one of my stops when I'm in center city.

Lunch today was a difficult process. Sat for a long time waiting to place order. Sat a total of 45 minutes before we finally got our appetizer. How long does hummus take! One minute later we got entrees. Service not good. Bread on tuna melt burnt. At least burgers were good and fries were great b
Delicious BBQ. Awesome tequila selection. Killer cheddar grits.
Need to work on their bar drinks. I'm not a drinker but they are lacking in this department.

Wanted to try a new hibachi place, and this place is definitely the spot. Prices are reasonable and not too expensive. Sushi selection is plenty. Definitely will be going back for more. Hibachi, the show is good, only difference is no shrimp but still was good
The only thing that I will say is that this is the first time that I can remember that I have never left a tip no matter how poor the food or service was.

The girls working there were really nice and informative. My custom tan came out wonderfully the following morning after my shower! Can't wait to go to Florida looking fierce and bronzed. As a girl who is very fair, this spray tan gave me that little boost that made me beach ready.

Love it!!!!!!!! So much I drive for them they treat the people who drive like humans I used Lyft and had great experiences here in Tucson. Try it!!!! I'm not promoting lol But interested in getting free rides and some extra money for driving or using Lyft My code is SHANNON630951

Not a bad place to go after an exam or to work on group projects. The food takes to long to get to you and might be under or over cooked. Getting a drink takes a while since there is usually only one person working the bar and they are not hired based on speed.

Accross the street from our hotel we thought we would try it our lst night as we were pretty wiped out from walking and the heat. Everyone ordered something different-sushi and chinese. Food was average and oresentation lacking for the sushi. Servers were kind of clueless but since they are open pasr 9 it worked!
It was a fantastic first dental visit for my son. I look forward to our next appointment! Best of all, so does my son! Many thanks!

Was a little warm inside today (ac needs a doctor visit) BUT the staff is "bangin" and the coffee is good and strong! My meal was perfect and quick enough but not so fast I could sip my java. Will be back...a lot of regs with big smiles!

I don't understand the hype. What we got may technically be a beignet, I guess. I would call it more of a friettelle. Plenty of powdered sugar for sure but no jam/jelly, no selection other than your drink or who many orders you want. Not really worth the wait... should be Cafe du Meh.
Great food. Prices a little steep. Service varies with waiter.
Excellent food, great service, nice atmosphere. One of my favorite places for Mexican food in Tucson.

Only tried this place once and did not get the cut that I asked for. I wanted a whole new look, but only got a trim. I could not convince the stylist that I wanted several inches cut off of the length.

I really like Pizza Hut Pan Pizza. PAN CRUST. Nothing else. So when this location opened I was pretty excited. I have ordered from this location three times, being very specific and ensuring they heard me when I ordered a pan crust. Each time, I have gotten hand-tossed. Also, they never put enough sauce. No thanks. I'll take the longer trip to Upper Darby.
3 stars just for having High Life Light and tater tots. Pretty decent place, but the DJs suck. The service has been pretty good the times I've been.

This place is DIRTY. I have been here three times and do not like it. The massage chairs don't work properly. The front desk is not welcoming. Their color choices are very limited. But what gets to me is how dirty this place is. Nail dust everywhere! Yikes

This was an Au Bon Pain in the F Terminal area. It is rather small. All I wanted was some iced tea--diet Snapple did the trick--and a bottle of water for my wife. Very convenient to where we waited for our connecting flight. Au Bon Pain is a quick stop.
They didn't have anyone out front for about 10 mins and then proceeded to tell me that they didn't have a certain product on their menu until I pointed directly to it. Dirty, not fast, not worth it.

Nice place with great staff. Grabbed a quick lunch. Suggest the sampler appetizer which included fried shrimp, alligator, and crawfish. Awesome white chocolate bread pudding and I typically don't eat bread pudding.

This restaurant could be much better. I go there for crab legs and oysters on the half shell, but there is this Chinese lady that keeps the supply low so I just find myself another place to eat. The place could also be a bit cleaner.

Not overly impressed. The only thing I really wanted was the buffalo chicken panini, which they were out of so I got the chicken and pepper jack panini. The chicken was HORRIBLE. Not sure where they got it but you could tell it was bulk frozen stuff. Wont be returning. Bottom line; Go somewhere else.
Amazing food but service is kind of all over the place, especially for take out. People yelling each other and seeming confused. Hmm...

Was rather dissapointed, the pasta tasted aggressively store bought. The Bolognese, although there was nothing wrong with it, just tasted strange, not horrible, but not what you'd expect or want. Priced the same as other nearby Italian options, but in my opinion does not deliver the same quality of cuisine.
If you're at the bar here be sure to avoid Edwin. I placed my order and he decided he needed to do 7 other things first. And very rude

Just left from picking up a pizza and every single employee had their mask under their nose and one on their chin. They even had a sign saying must wear to enter. If you have sign then why aren't the employees wearing them properly. I love their pizza but the mask thing is really disappointing.
Awful place. Terrible staff. Terrible clientele. They only have bottled water. Real douche bag place.
I absolutely would not recommend this place. We went for brunch, their prices are decent but not for the food. There are many other brunch spots that are worth it, however this is not one of them.

Would give zero if I could. Slimy thieves. Unhelpful beyond belief. Tack on extra things just for shits and giggles. Service reps don't know anything. Looking to to take advantage of every job that walks in the door. Go someplace else. Go someplace else. Go someplace else.
We purchased our baby girl last Wednesday and have been in complete and total awe with our baby!! This place does not disappoint! Highly recommended....reasonably priced when other pet places aren't

Great for students! I got 3 months membership plus 20 dollar gift certificate to vertical ventures all for 100$. The self bellaying walls are the best for beginners and they have a tread wall to really help you test your endurance. Go Bulls!!!

As a serious chocolate addict, I was excited about this place. I think it's pretty great, but I did expect more from the menu...well, more than eight desserts. I guess it's not fair to compare this to Bailey's Chocolate Bar, since there is an entire candy counter as well. The pot de creme is fantastic. I paired that with some roasted cashews. Heavenly.

Went there for a drink and a snack... The pomegranate Mojito...it isn't on the menu but they did a bang up job making it! We had a second round! I tried the Cauliflower tomato soup... It was amazing but spicy. There is such thing as too spicy!! I think the chef has dead taste buds! What a cool divey place! Loved our waiter
The place is fine, but it's a dive bar not a "gin joint". They can't even make a negroni. Don't be fooled.

Got the full ribs with two fried corn and this is the best best best ribs I've ever had in my life! We were lucky there was not really long line when we got there but I will definitely drive all the way from Dallas to St. Louis again just for this!

This place was recommended to us by our tour guide. Stating we had to try their french onion soup. So of coursed I ordered. It was a no for me. The soup was sooo salty, I couldn't stand it. I ordered a burger, super dry. Seating was quick, service was great, but the food is a no.

Well I've only been to the restaurant side twice with my kids I have never entered the bar food is pretty good depending on what you are getting prices aren't too bad and the kids enjoyed the food as well service isn't bad I find them pleasant I'd say it's worth trying their quesadilla are very humongous
This review is just for the restroom. The only reason there Is a 2nd star is bc I'm sure someone had intentions on coming back to clean it up. That was me giving them the benefit of the doubt.

This is the perfect antidote to the French Quarter bar scene. Classy, fun and the food was amazing! The grilled octopus was the best thing we had, and the rest was great. Small plates are large enough to share for a meal for two people. The craft cocktails were an interesting addition. Try the Flu Cocktail!
Yelped and we found this super random place. I liked the veggie sandwich loaded with good veggies. Kids had the tri tip cooked on the patio right there!

I love their poke's and today I tried their poke burrito which was amazing. I love the fact that they started cooking tempura right after I order, so it was not a stuff that has waited but rather very fresh. Very good choice for a healthy fast-food
Do not judge a book by it's cover with this dive. The food is delicious!! Quickly becoming our go-to spot for Mexican food. Great service, portion size, cost, all of it makes for a win-win
I have traveled to Italy, New York, and Chicago just to eat pizza. This place tasted and looked exactly like frozen pizza, never again! I am doing your a favor.

Honest, reasonably priced, and just an all around great guy. I well be recommending Don to every one I know. Don has a one man shop so he won't be able to do the full replumbing of our house that we will be needing soon, but I highly recommend him for any run-of-the-mill plumbing needs. It's rare to find service this good.

Great breakfast with four different orders. Only two of us finished our meals. Most large enough to share. Short rib Benedict was the star. Grits are also excellent! Server excellent. Prices in the $12 - $15 range plus coffee charge.
Dr. Offer has terrible administrative staff working in her office. The people who schedule her appointments are so rude- that I won't be back.
Very nice cute place. Not the cleanest bathroom. Cheesesteak was a little ordinary and small. But i would go back to try other items on the menu.
I like to go Indy vs Starbucks. My drink is an Iced Mocha. It was on the sickly sweet side. They made the drink incorrectly the first time. You will probably get a better coffee faster at Starbucks.

The quiche is savory, warm, flaky-crusted and generously portioned. The atmosphere is charming without trying too hard. THE MUSIC SUCKS UNLESS YOU'RE 12 YEARS OLD. Piebird, for the love of your customers who love your food, TURN DOWN THAT BAD RADIO STATION. Then I'll give you 5 stars.

I know I should not really complain about a free attraction, but it ended it being a wasted trip as we did not see any manatees. The one saving moment was checking out the sting rays. The kids got edgy after 30 minutes of staring and waiting for manatees but ended up seeing nothing (insert sad face).
Wonderful food is fantastic service was amazing The drink suggestions and selection are great

I ordered the chicken enchilada. ..but unfortunately it only had 3 tiny pieces of chicken. Grandma had the combination platter and it was okay. I really wanted a better authentic tasting plate for Tucson but it was lacking in flavor...however the staff was exceptional!!

Stood and waited with a party of 5 while they seated about 12 other people that didn't have reservations. There was an open clean table right next to the front door. They must have something against tattooed people or something here.

BYOB. Mushroom crepes are delicious. Great place if you like pasta. I deducted 1 star because one time we were told at the door that there were no tables available and then the server rudely pushed my girlfriend out of the way to get to menus.
Only good place in edmonton I've been to. Over priced and stupid that you have to pay for what you don't eat. $2.50 for a can of soda?! Unheard of!
Relaxed and funny owner, quality Mediterranean food and prices not reflecting the quality of the food. Yes, my whole family recommends y'all dining at Olive. -Russ
Jimmy gives the best foot massages! Request him for any pedicure needs. I suggest getting the paraffin wax pedicure or OPI.

Super agitated. I ordered online and it doesn't tell you through the check out process that they don't accept credit cards. I only learned that gem after waiting for my order to be completed after 30 minutes. If you go, it's cash only. They might have saved money by not accepting credit cards, but they lost more than they saved.

What an experience. The potatoes and green beans cold and the salmon burned. Wait we only had the waitress visit 3 times: take the order deliver the check and refill the drinks. My beer sat 5 minutes waiting for delivery and the meal took too long. There are very few patrons. It will be awhile before I return.
Great food at a great price. Staff is very friendly and knows the menu well. I recommend trying this place out if you are on the east side of Indy!
I ordered online and it said pick up at 600pm. So I get there around 6 o'clock. But I didn't leave till 645 , I should have just got a table to sit and eat there. Food great but service bad sorry
Sadly, this place is yet another casualty of our poor economy. It is now closed with no prospect that it will re-open.

AMAZING!!! I lived in Mexico for two years and loved the food!! This restaurant is AUTHENTIC MEXICAN FOOD! First class! The hostesses were very rude with us but the server was AMAZING! So happy the hostesses were not the waitresses!

Managed to lose the keys on a car I had in storage. He came to the facility at the appointed time, and worked quickly and efficiently and generated a new set of keys. Can't say enough about the service - quick and the price was reasonable.

It just never disappoints! You know you'll get a good meal, it's my family's go-to for after church lunches. This week I had Parmesean-crusted cod served over a spicy marinara with grilled zucchini. Healthy, yummy, perfectly cooked, and just-right portion. I'll take it!

Standard Thai food, not the best I have ever had but not bad either. I found my dishes to be a little on the bland side. Ordered the Pad Thai and Pineapple Cashew Rice. Its convenient and only Thai in the Fairmount/Brewertytown neighborhood.

I've pretty much reviewed Starbucks at several locations. THIS one provides me with the healthy alternative while I'm obviously at TIA! This is where I discovered the "Skinny Latte!" If I'm at TIA, you can find me here!

Great fries and rings, but you can only get your burger cooked well done "for health reasons!" My friends, if you don't have more faith in your product then you have to nuke it to keep from getting the customers sick, your in the wrong business!

Visited one Friday evening, and we ordered guac, salsa, and chips and some sandwiches. The guacamole was sour tasting, and the salsa was awful. Salsa had way to much garlic in it. I am giving 3 stars because the fish sandwich was surprisingly good, and the ambience is very nice.
Really cool bar! A little dive-y but great food and decent beer selection!
Excellent service and attentiveness. Fish and chips are and safe choice and the ambiance is breathtaking

This was my 2nd visit. We went for breakfast and the food was ok but the coffee was very weak! We were seated by someone who was very blah! The waitress was ok. Upon leaving we had to wait for the workers to finish their conversation! I probably won't go back!
This is the worst place to get fast food. Chicken was gross and it took an hour to get our food. Go somewhere else

"Deals" are not actually much better at this place unless you're buying an entire set of tires. The customer service was average. Often times I was made to wait for a phone caller or another customer. Face time with a staff member was short and not very thorough. Did do a good job of scheduling me for a same-day appt.
Room was great. Concierge lounge was okay. Location was convenient for business, but not much close by as far as restaurants/bars.

For the $$, keep waking past this place. Was surprised that we didn't need a reservation on a beautiful Saturday evening. I know why. Don't eat here if you have high blood pressure, so much salt that I could t finish my Cowboy pork chop or my wife's chicken soup, I mean chicken penne. Very disappointed.

Talk about money hungry, these guys are just looking to exploit customers, friend of mine told me about his bad experience but I came anyways to look at some cars and the prices they ask for are ridiculous and they don't like people taking them for inspection. (No wonder)
So good and free water too... always a classic dessert spot for friends and family to visit ‍

Pros- great breads and sandwiches. Cons - Very slow staff. Poor service. Waited in line for 5 minutes with no one at the counter, tried to order a coffee and was told they were closed. I realize they just opened but there needs to be a lot of work done with the staff and process.

I'm not as impressed with this place as I hoped I would be. I don't like shoestring fries cuz you have to eat them with a folk and who eats fries with a folk? They're burgers get a bit soggy half way through eating them.

While my beef sandwich was pretty good, the size of the chicken sandwich and fries was a little ridiculous. Couldn't ever quite get the attention of our waitress, and only saw her once throughout the evening. Lots of outdoor eating space though and a cool area.
I liked the kung pao tofu but rest of the food was average . The quantity of food isn't much so you might actually want to order one main course per person if you are starving .
Food is really great but they are just not easy to work with when planning an event. Their demeanor outweighs their yummy food.

I've been to Martine's before and it has been great, but was very disappointed with my lunch last month. Most of us got salads and they were all priced over ten dollars and we were all hungry when we left. Not a lot to them and surely not worth the money. Beautiful place and nice people, but expensive for what you get.
Elana who works at the minute clinic is great. Very helpful looking up records, providing information and gave two shots, flu and TDAP that did not hurt at all.
The Margarita was strong....that is the best I can say.
Yuck. Just yuck. From the black curly hair on the all of shower, to the large beatle in the bed. Place needs repairs and painting. Ewe

The sponge cake, cheesecake and mouse( I have had the coffee) are delicious but service is absolutely a fail. Not sure what it is I feel as if I am bothering them when giving order. Not friendly and not helpful. I would hire a different team for the front end of my business who looks happy to see customers.

Favorite place to go my favorite server no longer works there and I miss the great treatment but food wise if you're on a budget go also they know me when I call because I literally order the same thing this place is great
Here's something that might help some of you out: http://www.nolo.com/legal-encyclopedia/tenants-right-break-rental-lease-arizona.html

Got a solid cheesesteak here with bell peppers and onions. Tender steak, lots of cheese, nice bun. Seems like an old local standby type of place. Not sure about the pizza, but i would guess the cheesesteaks are the better bet.
Not bad. Not great. Overpriced, mediocre food. Good cocktails, but slow coming. Beautiful place, friendly service, but overall not worth going out of your way for unless you really like pianos.
Great place for our local pro teams and college gear! Plenty of merchandise from flip flops to jerseys, purses to bracelets. They've even got dog stuff. #gogators

Service was good but food was mediocre. My biscuit was burnt although the middle was great and western omelet was mostly just eggs. Prices are ok overall but some things seem a bit expensive for what you get.
I like the place, I just think their highlight is their happy hour. The was ok and so was the service. The location to Howard Ave just makes it more enticing to head their instead.

Excellent food wonderful staff and clean environment! This business has been around for at least 20 years and provide authentic Persian food with quality ingredients. Never a disappointment. A variety of options for vegetarians as well as carnivores! Best time to visit is for lunch buffet.

This was a really good place to get good Mexican food in the city, but something has gone wrong. The food was very bland. The beans tasted of nothing but lard , no salt. The rice was plain and flavorless. It was extremely disappointing to the point that we will not try them again. They apparently changed hands.
This was such a disappointment the menu was not interesting and boring. Service was ok we wish we would have gone back to Mr Ed's in the garden district for dinner
If you like frozen crab cakes heated up in a microwave and frozen tasteless unidentifiable fish heated up in a fryer then this is the place for you.

Occasionally I will get a coffee or bagel here. The whole wheat ones (bagels) are pretty good though small. The coffee is sometimes decent. I think the quiche can be good, but it is often oily. I do like the couches and the ambiance of the place.
Comcast customer service is horrible! Continually transferred overseas, then hung up on, two days problem still not resolved, and can't get a technician out for days.
Was in town on a business trip, a coworker recommended this place. I wash surprised at the quality of food.....I had the Turkey Burger, it was probably the best Turkey Burger ever!
Aweful service! Just my boyfriend and I and the service was Aweful plus the food was cold. We will never go back!

A nice place to go with friends, hang out and enjoy some music. The people who come to this place count on it as a home away from home. The food was delicious and the portion sizes were huge. The age range is 50+ but it is a great place for anyone.

I really wanted to love this place.. Very charming, nice staff and great location right by the cable car. The room was very large also. However, I would not stay there again because it was super dirty and run down. We even spotted a cockroach running across the carpet on our last night...

Came here today. I had a better experience...Had the cup of gumbo with okra and sausage. Loved the roux. It wasn't a dark one. I also got a small shrimp remoulade salad. The shrimp were tiny and not a regular size shrimp, but had plenty. The remoulade sauce was fantastic. Service still was a little slow.

Visiting New Orleans and Being vegetarian, I knew that our chances of finding really good food were not the best. Bit this place had great reviews so we checked it out. The black eyed peas with the fried plantains and coconut rice were delicious. The atmosphere was authentic, as far as I could tell.

From beginning to end an amazing experience. I had the Crab Cake Strip Steak special the steak was presented medium rare as requested and was delicious the crab cake was moist and tasty. It included lobster risotto and asparagus both of which were outstanding. The rest of my party was equally impressed with the experience.The waitstaff was very attentive.

Not the best meal we had on vacation... but it was not terrible either. It is a good location to soak up some of the alcohol you consume on bourbon though. Moderately priced food, staff was nice, nice layout, and my po boy was pretty darn tasty. I thought the Jambalaya could've been a bigger portion for what you pay for.
Avoid unless you are going to die from hunger.

I never heard back from them after I responded to their request for more info. Can only assume they weren't concerned with making it right, only with looking better on Yelp. Still recommend you take your business elsewhere.

I usually enjoy going to sonic they have the best slushees, but today I ordered the chicken sandwich and it was cold like it had been sitting out all day. I asked for another sandwich but they took so long to bring it out I had left. Not sure what happened Friday but the service was horrible

Great atmosphere and amazing food. I had to give Delachaise only 3 stars because of the confusing situation when you first enter the restaurant and the terrible service received. The bartenders are friendly and helpful, but service definitely needs some help. Atmosphere is great and romantic.
The owner eventually contacted me after discovering the mishap. The item was delivered as described.

Awful customer service or lack thereof. Kids run this location. Waited 25+ minutes today for a simple bowl. Wasn't busy. Customers weren't served in order. New faces didn't seem to know what they're doing. One girl kept touching her face. You don't do that and serve food. Giving up on this location. Not worth it anymore. Disappointing.
Ehhh...it's fine. It bothers me when I have the first flight out and they don't have a single coffee shop open.
I got a to go order of strips...idk what they thought this was, but 35 bux on food that doesn't look appetizing BLOWS. The Bonchon in nyc little Korea has clearly spoiled me.

Have been wanting to try Vito's for a long time. Unfortunately, it wasn't worth the wait. Ordinary pizza, dried out salad and salad toppings, but soggy croutons. Bruschetta on untoasted bread (?) Service was fine, the order was correct, and they don't use styrofoam. But, the food wasn't good.

This restaurant is by far one of the worse in Philadelphia I've ever been to. they do NOT CARE about the Quality of their food! I received Burt bacon although Door Dash gave me my money back. this restaurant needs learn that poor quality isn't acceptable!
Delicious food for anyone. Nice little spot where the focus is good food and comfy time with loved ones. Has a very homey feel being that it's a house-turned-restaurant. Great place.

Standard chick-fil-a great food. Most of the staff were fast / good but when I asked for a standard drink refil they were a bit slow / rude about it. Also the playplace for kids was a bit wild / too small. Otherwise chick-fil-a is always good ;)

Tastykake central. For all my east coast friends and family Frankie's takes me back. If you want a proper cheesesteak this place is a must. This is authentic as it gets. Strike up a conversation with the staff and you will not be disappointed.

The food at ThE Ridge was wonderful. I had ribs and brisket, mac and cheese ( and no one makes like my mother, but thIs was close) and slaw. Normally I'm not a huge fan of burnt ends, but I am at The Ridge.

As much as I want to love this place you never leave with the warm fuzzy feeling you'd expect from what feels like it should be a neighborhood haunt. Like the smoked meats but BBQ sauce could be improved.

This is a very nice small cafe with a clean, pleasant atmosphere and excellent food. A very wide range of authentic mexican dishes. I had the carne asada torta which was excellent. Also a bakery. I noticed some home made canneloni and tiramisu in the chilled case I will have to try.
Dump. Dirty, lack of choice and high prices. Go anywhere but here. Kroger DXM or Whole Foods

Pulled into dealership needing bulb for Fiat headlight-assured us they could help us-3 hours later-we said get our car-not only did they not have bulb but no work order was entered -kept telling us they were waiting on bulb!!!! If I could give zero stars I would.

Kudos for Hakata & Akamaru ramen, though having a bit less spice would make the best ramen bowls in Philly. I suppose the Shoyu & Shio Ramen are also gud. Will be back to try them out! They also have Japanese cream soda.
The worst service EVER! I ordered to eat in the restaurant and they had me waiting for almost an hour and then say it was a takeout order! I'll never come here again! UPDATE...the food...yuck!!!
Quick lunch spot with great flavor! Stopped in for pad thai (hot) and it was delicious.

Really wanted to like this place, he dumped a ton of money into it obviously and an awesome view ,but so sad, my wife and I were treated like pigs.....would be hard to go back if Justin invited us himself. Menu looked pretty great but unfortunately our money was not wanted...... assume you need an agent to make sure you get decent service here....

Definitely a solid pizza place. We had the Bayou Blue with extra cheese. It was absolutely amazing. The server was attentive, polite, and quick. I have been here before and seems like a very consistent place to eat. I will be back soon.

after my original review, i haven't revisited the place but the management did take time to contact me about my review. he insisted that i advise him of when i intend to revisit. i find that commitment and attention very admiring. i do intend to revisit, this time hoping of course that my mind has been changed.

Stopped here this past week and order two chili & cheese dogs and a coke. The dogs were decent but I had better down south. There was hardly any chili on the dogs. Plus the CASH ONLY thing really bothers me. Yes there is an on site atm machine but expect to pay a ~3 dollar surcharge depending on your bank.
Great food but we had to sit outside because it was too hot inside. They need to get this fixed. More stars if I could have eaten inside.
This is somewhere fresh to hang out for drinks and have a good time. I can't say anything about the food having not tried it. I'd suggest this bar for sporting events or cocktails with friends.
Gumbo was good. Burger was average. Dessert (cheesecake to go) was insulting. Service was pretty slow and got drink order wrong plus had to be reminded about our dessert order.

Worst experience ever, very disrespectful sales associate I have ever seen, nasty attitude, not helpful at all. Wanted to buy a Jeep and I changed my mind for a long time. I will never put a feet into this place, I don't recommend it at all if I could put 0 starts that will be my review.
Cute atmosphere but the BLT sandwich was extremely bland and almost nothing on it. The cappuccino was practically just foam with a splash of espresso

Decent prices but small portions. To fill me up, I have to spend about $12-15 on okay food. I would rather spend that money elsewhere. I visited there about 6 months ago and it was much better. I will say the baba ganush (spelling) is really good as well as customer service.
Intimate size club with great service and very funny comics. Great place for couples to go and spend a date night

I give it a 2 because there cd collection is alright, and the DVD's are okay, but my inner nerd screams at the prices.... and the video games? Same issue I have with Game City, they do not know their prices and will gouge you (in fact they're owned by the same person)
Creative and generous portions-you can always do with one less entree than you think-even a complimentary birthday cake slice!!

Tucson Mall location has very poor service..... ask for a napkin, you better be prepared to ask for how many you want. They seemed frustrated with themselves and customers even though I was only 1 out of the 3 customers they had..... I won't be visiting this location any longer.

There are a couple of good Mexican restaurants in the area but this one impressed me. It has a nice decor and tasty margaritas as well as delicious food. I had enchiladas. They do have an appetizer where they make guacamole at your table with custom ingredients but I didn't get that this time.

We received a flyer at our office the other day, so we decided to try it. The servings were large, and the food was good. The main complaint was that I ordered the garlic parmesan fries, and there was very little parmesan and no garlic at all.
Horrible place and people, so many drug deals going in and out constantly, a blight on Grand Central.

Poor service. Staff could not work TVs or figure out NFL ticket. Do not go there to watch a game. Never got to order food because service poor. No wonder only 3 people at the bar when we left on a Sunday afternoon.

Our waitress overall was attentive and helpful however for the restaurant and management itself would get zero stars if possible. It's not hard to give valuable customer service (especially if it's a slow night) and after working in the restaurant industry I can personally say my family and I will never be back.

Covid is not an excuse anymore! Attempted drive thru where your kept hostage...knowing better. Seeing how backed up it was...Dont enter! You can never get out! They curb you in line....so I just went elsewhere. Chick fila is keeping their in dining closed.... Drive thru is more profitable... Covid is just an excuse.

The Jazz house is nice the music is excellent drinks are ok 6 drinks 87.00 and to get a seat 40.00 yes that was a bomber however it was great very expensive date with the hubby it was our Anniversary visiting from South Carolina
very nice Italian restaurant little pricey but good and, it's even better when it's walking distance.some good wine,beer and, service.

Great comfort food! Service was excellent! I ordered a suggestion of the waitress and she nailed it from start to finish! I had the breaded pork chop, mashed potatoes and green beans, followed up with a strawberry milkshake. Awesome!

Really nice little getaway, clearly marked short hikes or you can walk along the beach which gets a bit rocky so watch your step but you can easily get back in to the trails and loop your way back! Love it here will definitely be going back such diverse landscape
