Starters....drunken shrimp are a MUST!!! The Key Lime Cider is awesome!!! Today's fish was Wahoo and Mahi...we had seafood cakes and Quesadillas and tacos.... ALLLLL Were amazing!!!! But again...Drunken shrimp....STUPID GOOD!!!!!

My wife and I have repeatedly gone to LARK and the food and folks are the BEST...and if that isn't enough, the team at LARK also, every time, go to great effort to make sure we are comfortable and taken care of as if we mattered, now that's rare enough. And certainly reason enough to enjoy LARK, over and over.

Pizza good for Cesar's but no free red peppers? They give them away in Chula Vista cal not in tucson? This store selling hot pepper jars for 2.99$ how much for same in 99cent store in same strip mall? Is this kosher with little Cesar franchise? What would mr illich say?
the steak and primerib were amazing. sides are enough for two brynn our server was awesome. the crem brule cheescake was the bomb
Will be giving it another try! Hoping service and food will be better after they have been open a little longer. Remodel to building and space is beautiful!

Falafel appetizer was OK. Grape leaves weren't bad, but weren't good either. Gyro didn't have much meat in it and was a little on the dry side. If you really needed mediterranean food in the quarter I suppose you'd be OK here, but you're far better off at Mona's or Lebanon's if you're willing to make the trek uptown.

Had an appointment at 12 was late because GPS couldn't find it. Waited for an hour and a half for them to tell me what I already knew that I needed new brake pads and they didn't fix them because I had another appointment at 2 that I was late for. Horrible will never go here again.

I got the redfish meal, which was pretty good, and the hurricane, which was a disappointment in that it tasted like weak sugar-water. Not really much to say otherwise. The waiter messed up both of my friends orders.
location is permanently closed and has been reported to yelp. needs to be removed. yelp please remove this location so others don't think that there is a kmart at this location...
The make a decent vegan sandwich, and the soup isn't bad. (If you tell them to make it really spicy, they really will make it spicy.) The vegan sandwich could have a little more flavor, though!
Good lunch spot for downtown or before a game and great for stopping for a drink on the way to a game.

Food would be so much better if it was actually hot! Second time I come here and the food is cold. The hostess sucks. They take too long to seat you. And the waitresses are all weird. The managers are scary. No wonder why this place has gone to $h!t. There definitely won't be a third time.
What an awful place! Gross and dirty. Don't even think there is a manager in there. Probably worst restaurant in the main line.

I am an indian and I love Indian food but If you are of Asian origin dont go to this place on Friday nights. I found the waiters to be very discriminating against our skin color and waited long hours before someone came by and served. I had a bad time with my family and swear that I will never visit this place.

The repair man had no idea what he was doing. After 4 visits he was unable to repair our dishwasher. Called a competitor who repaired the machine in the first visit. This business is a rip off and should not be allowed to over services.

Ordered a phone online. Made an appointment to pick it up. Arrived- 1 person working; 10 customers waiting. They WOULD NOT give me my preordered, prepaid phone- told me I had to wait my turn- with an appointment! Verizon gaining a new customer. Why make an appointment and do their work online to be treated like this? Avoid at all costs!

First, they are a predatory lender. They made a horrible mess of our property and did considerable property damage, for which I had to make them reimburse me or remedy their damage. They then neatly rolled their losses over by saying they had to buy additional materials for the job. I am still reeling over the lousy job, and considering legal action.

RC Willeys should have had the same brand so those of us who did have to get a replacement would be able to get the same or similar mattress. They didn't even try to do right when I had no choice but to get the inferior mattress, or spend an extra $1000. No excuses. They should have had what I needed.

Overpriced drinks and nowhere to park. Drink "specials" are comparable to the ballpark. Service lacklaster unless you're dressed to impress. Good place to walk by to go to another bar. I'd rather go to another bar in the area.

Oh man, so good. My first KFC (Korean Fried Chicken) experience was at the Philly location. They're double fried, super crispy on the outside and juicy on the inside. I love the spicy and garlic soy. The atmosphere is lacking at this location, but the chicken is just as good. Also, this location is BYOB.

We visited Chema's for lunch before a movie in Sparks. I really liked the owner, loved the chips and thin salsa as a previous reviewer described. Service was prompt and friendly. My margarita was okay, premade mix instead of freshly made. My partner's shredded pollo was cooked to perfection. My kids loved the rice and beans. I think place has great potential.
Very good quality way overpriced. Selection baked goods and menu very limited options. Very popular with SB yuppie crowd
Place is awesome great food and good priced. Every time I come into town I stop in. Clean fast and fresh.

I got in contact with the manager and although it did take around 3 months, he was very accommodating, understanding, and professional. Leaving the reveiw at 3 stars for now as the issue has not yet been resolved, but the manager did say he is looking into it so I'm feeling better about it.

Ice cream to the max -- like you time warped back to the 1930's. Go and fill your belly, and if you are like me, your shirt will probably get chocolate on it too. Beware, they only take cash and the ice cream portions are HUMONGOUS! To life, to life, to ice cream!
Dr. Tom & Sharon are absolutely wonderful. Reasonable prices and excellent service. My cats love going to see them.
Not so much. Service was uncaring, slow and inattentive. Received salad, appetizer and entree all at once. Steak under cooked. Did I mention that service sucked.
Such a nice , elegant place to relax and have drinks. Quiet and relaxing atmosphere . Love the decor and restrooms. Staff is friendly and attentive. Nice jazz music during the week.

I sent my application out from the west coast back in November. I called over 2 weeks ago to the # and was told my passport is being processed @ the NO office. They have my # and email, there are no notes about any errors, it's just taking so long.

Come for the atmosphere of one of the most unique restaurants in StL. Come for a beer and to hang out with friends. Lots of fun and memorable. If you're only looking for a typical hamburger and fries menu, you won't be disappointed. If you're looking for great food and diverse options, go elsewhere and then stop and see this StL landmark.

I kept hearing how good this restaurant is from other local food sites I follow. Finally got around to trying it. The place was tired looking and not clean. Wanted to leave right away but decided to give it a try. The only reason I gave it two stars was due to our friendly waitress. The food was bland and underwhelming.

Fish is not fresh at all. Took almost an hour to prepare my order. Order was wrong; I asked for no wontons or red onion. It came out with both. Avocado is brown and contain pieces of the pit. Item doesn't match menu description at all. Overpriced, especially considering the poor quality of food.
Came here with my fiancé on a whim and it did not disappoint. 1$ hard-boiled eggs, reusable metal straws (which you can buy!), great coffee. Overall, my fiancé and I agree "that this place slaps!"
This used to be a great car wash, but no more. They leave the car open to air dry and collect bugs. Water spots galore. Windows agree not cleaned and left streaked in sun light. Poor service.

Best thing about this place? Drive-thru window with breadsticks ready to go! Seriously, this place is so close to our house that I can leave, pick up an order of sticks with cheese, and be home enjoying them all within about five minutes. If that's not the American Dream then I don't know what is.
Yummmmmm!!! I really enjoyed the fried okra! It was their first night- service was on-point. Very good food, nice atmosphere, good prices. Our server Deondre was the BEST!

Vrey, very ordinary Mexicn restaurant . Atmosphere 75 Service 70 Food 70 Value 75 ( Only because the prices were reasonable) Skip it unless you must eat Mexican in Dunedin. Just too many other local Mexican restaurants worth the visit.

Not sure what happened to this restaurant, but I won't be returning. The last few take out orders (breakfast and dinner) have been horrible. The last breakfast order was missing the country gravy. Called, spoke with manager, he was to credit the meal, however, that never happened. Honestly, it isn't about the money. I will just not return.

What a relief to have a brightly colored, open and breezy cafe amid the dark, enclosed dens of bars and music clubs on Frenchmen. I have yet to try anything here I didn't like. I only wish they'd use all that space to add a water cooler!

Don't even expect a "here you go"-they are rude, but what can be expected? It's fast food...the chicken box satisfied my snack need-where are the chik-fil-a staff when u need them to say, "my pleasure"??

Spent over $300.00 for the most disgusting breakfast ever. Bacon, sausage and potatoes precooked. Meats and corn beef hash extra greasy too. Potatoes black and hard, ( couldn't eat with a fork). Pancakes rubbery (microwaved), French toast wet on the inside. Hair in eggs and potatoes. Only good part was the water. Everyones meal had something disgusting. Terrible, will never eat there again.
I thought it was terrible and it cost me 28 bucks for a large pie and order of fries...not a fan.
The pho they serve is okay, their service is slow, and the environment is awful. You know a restaurant is excellent when you're a minority and this restaurant does not have that.

PROS -food was outstanding- pickled shrimp/shrimp salad with chicken wings flavor, etc. -for a good cause CONS -took long time to get water and to be greeted -never received menus so got menus ourselves
Classic and tasty. If you want something just plain ol good, hit this place up. Nothing fancy or special here, just solid good breakfast.
A little detour if you're headed N or S on 65, but does the trick. Food options seemed limited--all I saw was a steak-n-shake and it was around the corner.
Soo I went here one time and that will be the last. The waitress was on her cell phone texting and they got our entire tables order messed up .. The phone was alright nothing to brag about..

My shrimp pad Thai with added peanuts was delicious, the shrimp was very fresh. The decor is elegant and cozy., super clean! The waitress was welcoming, attentive and explained menu items for me. I look forward to coming back and trying a new Asian-style food.
Worst customer service ever. Rude! Jolee does good nails but lady next to her is downright rude. Even if you have appointments they will sometimes make you wait. I'll never go back
Best smokehouse we've ever been too! We come back every time we are in the area. All the way from Michigan!
Had miso ramen there last night. It had way too much salt. Otherwise, the food is decent.
Bands leave early and the drink menu was not able to be found, nice concept and all but poorly executed

Food is good but I was charge 18$ for less than 4 ounces of salmon. That's ridiculous! The string beans are spicy and the Mac and cheese was burnt so I guess it was the bottom of the pan. It sucks cuz it sounded like a great platter online.

The country breakfast with eggs over easy was amazing. Their sausage gravy is excellent, full of flavor. My wife had the Alaskan omelet that she loved. The presentation, the whole experience was great. I would highly recommend. If we are back in the area we will be back for sure.
Service is good but No frozen drinks and no American Express. Last time for me. No pina coladas in New Orleans? Seriously?
Rooms are nice but it really inconvenient that two elevators are down. I've waited 30 minutes just to get on one elevator. I finally get downstairs and Starbucks closed earlier.
Endless options for Breakfast, good service and decent quality. it's rare to find a place that makes so many different breakfast items.

The ribs are amazing and really, claims that they are the best ribs around are totally accurate. But my favorite BBQ is pulled chicken and their pulled chicken is not very good. It hardly tastes like it was even kissed by smoke.

There was a long line when we arrived but the employees at the counter did everything they could to keep it moving. The rental and return process was simple and I would use them again! Plus their prices were significantly lower than other rental companies at BNA

Tried the food today in the Pythian market. The chicken was great. The waffle however crumbled when you cut it and had the texture of a legit biscuit. It was a 1 star for me. Extremely over priced at the Pythian.
These are the largest hoagie's I've ever seen, Plenty of meat and veggies fresh and tasty along with excellent and friendly service, Can't beat this spot best bang for your buck city wide.
I love pizza and think Theo's is the best in the city. I like both locations and the couple of tables outside at each. Crispy crust with great flavored sauce.

Grabbed takeout, orders the 6pc har gow ($5) and the salt and pepper squid ($11) with rice. The har gow was pretty good but I wasn't a fan of the squid. It wasn't very salty or peppery, and tasted more like breading.
Great place to hang out before class at the U of A. Love the Banana Nut Muffin! Coffee isn't to bad there either!
Really just 'meh' Mexican. Why are there no truly delicious Mexi restaurants in H-ville?

Selection is ok, all Sam's have different items due to their demographic surroundings. Which us why the west county has more higher end items than south county. The line configuration for the gas pumps can be annoying your first few time using the pumps at this location.

They say they take DHL packages on their website so they can bring you in. In actuality they do NOT take DHL and it is a waste of time. Then when you tell them it is misleading to have it on their website they swear at you and follow you out of the door.

I got the Thai Tea Smoothie with Boba (tapioca) My first time here. Taste good. They didn't have chocolate flavor, which is what I usually get at Boba Tea spots. So this is my first time getting this flavor.

I have been going to this place since I moved over a year ago. Love the late hours and service. I usually go before bed after a very long stressful day at work. Prices are fair but it helps that they offer coupons from time to time. A+++
Mall is ok bathrooms are disgusting is an understatement!! Every time I come here no matter what time of day the bathrooms are so gross!! I turn around an go into one if the dept stores an use theirs

Take a pass on the Fish Sandwich. Does not look like the photo on the counter: plump, juicy and moist. Just the opposite. Dry, thin and mostly batter. The slice of orange cheese was cold, not melted. Sauce was covering 1/2 the top bun. Get the burger.

Although I miss the old location, the new bigger location means getting a table on a Friday night is no longer an hour+ ordeal. New menu additions are awesome and well executed. Melograno is easily one of the top italian restaurants in Philly! And it's BYOB! YUM.
MANAGEMENT! Train you staff to be CUSTOMER driven, not task driven. Without customers there will be no tasks. You lost 2 today.

Best deviled crabs in town, bar none! Do your self a favor and treat yourself to the food at this hidden gem. Big salads, big sandwiches, small price tags. Friendly atmosphere great food run by a great family!

Their food used to be sooo good, but it really changed. Their portions got smaller and it's expensive. Their chipotle chicken things used to be delicious. Lol I got my first allergic reaction from their salmon, but I always ate salmon which was weird. I still don't know what could've caused it but it was definitely from here. :/

Place is great on Sundays. $1 beers and 50 cent wings. However, Fridays and Saturdays after 7pm, it's a trashy hip-hop club with free beer after a cover. Anyway, it's a go to hangout spot on Sundays but I avoid at all costs on Fridays and saturdays.

I absolutely LOVE Michelle! She moved so quickly in helping me get my mortgage loan. I could not believe how easy she made the process. As a first time home buyer I was a little nervous, until I met Michelle! Cannot say enough about her personally & professionally. I have a new friend out of the deal as well!

Place your order first thing in the morning and give them most of the day to get it ready, if your lucky you'll only have to wait 45 mins when you come to pick it up later on. Shut down already and reopen under new mgmt. Never going to this location again.

Great food, fantastic service, lovely setting. Happy hour! Couldn't be happier! Yep this place hasn't disappointed. I don't normally really frequent the CBD, but when I do, this is a favorite spot. Great for meeting in a central location and I always suggest it. Great oysters. Great burger. Hats off to these guys.

Don't waste your time. I called and was not helped and was hung up on twice. I literally just needed someone to fix my fridge and would've paid anything for them to do it, but the lady on the phone wrote me off and even said whatever. I will make sure nobody I know goes here! You should too.
It's Starbucks. You know what you are going to get. This location is fine. Very convenient of you are in the mall here. Family liked it.

First time here for dinner. It is only 2 miles from the house so wanted to try it out. My girlfriend and I both enjoyed it and will be back. There were plenty of crab legs. My only problem was in finding the place. Google sent me to the wrong shopping plaza. Look for the green lights.

This place is sketchy at best. Lets just say, people don't come here for the food or service. The jambalaya was a pile of mushy goop. The bloody mary's (their specialty) were un-bearably salty, almost like drinking sea water. We let the bartender know and his response was 'We'll still charge you. We don't want people coming in here sampling drinks.' Really?

Small & quaint. This place has recently been renovated and is located in a quiet spot very close to the harbor. We stayed for one night and found it to be very comfortable. Wireless internet access, plenty of soap and shampoo, and a flat screen TV made this place feel like home!

Pretty mediocre food and overpriced for what you get. Not that there are many fine dining establishments in Hockessin. And the crowds a weird mix of a meat market crowd at the bar and families with one to many children trying to get what they figure is upscale cuisine in the restarant. I think I'll pass...twice!
The kibby is amazing and the pita is to DIE for. I love that combo and it is now my staple fair. I am not a falafel fan but they make a falafel that I can eat.

This place has a great selection of options! My team mates are everything from vegan, to veg, to keto, to lactose intolerant- one of the few spots we can go for lunch where everyone is happy. The prices are great and the portions are large also.
Been here twice. Food is great but the service is ok especially considering the price of this place!

Very interesting tour with a wonderful, knowledgeable guide. Forgot his name. Unfortunately, half of house was being renovated so didn't see bedrooms or upstairs at all. This should have been mentioned when I purchased tickets online, may have waited to see after renovation.
I can't understand why they have to put the bread at the bottom shelves right in front of all the people's groins. I could see their body touching the bread. It's just disgusting!

I guess I'm on that perpetual search for a sports bar that has great food and a tasteful looking service staff. Well, the search does not end with Cheerleaders. Like a reviewer before, it reminds one of a RAM clone, mediocre food, dreadful service, and little other reason to entice one to return and spend their hard earned cash. Avoid if you can.
Pizza was good and pricing was reasonable. We had the pepperoni and carried it out. My kids enjoyed it but it lost a lot when reheated the next day!

Robin Barnes is truly a delight to listen to in the Grill Room as you sip a cocktail and enjoy the classic ambiance of the chic lounge area. I would highly recommend for anyone whether you are a local or a visitor to visit and listen to Robin Barnes entertain you with her fabulous repertoire of music.
Simple fast great results. Detailing is just above and beyond. There is a reason why there are long lines for this car wash. Can't beat the value.

This is a brunch review only. I was very disappointed. The unlimited brunch at 400 Beach was extremely underwhelming, akin to low quality hotel breakfast with poor options. The saving grace is the omelette station and the spacious seating.

I recommend this restaurant, the food is good & nice atmosphere. I compare the taste of the food to the high end restaurant like chimas in center city for half the price just a little less fancy but they have byob so you can bring a crew and have a good time

Get the Meshuggah Salad and add the curried chicken salad. It is amazing. Pair it with a honey match latte and you've got yourself a nice little afternoon lunch. I haven't tried anything else because I keep getting the same thing every time I go.

Sure, you could totally do worse for barbecue, but why? I've been patronizing Sonny's for years (in particular this location) and I have noticed a sharp decline in the quality of the food and the service over the years.

This is more of a 3.5 star :) Clean! 2 tv's with the World Cup! Friendly service good at refills! Had a special where we ordered two large pizzas for medium price. Decent prices! Hawaiian yummy! Combo very good! Nice deep dish crust! Group of 8 and they put two tables together for us! Lobby was practically empty.
I get lunch here at least twice a week, every week. Its always good quality, tastes fresh. Not terribly expensive, and they deliver quick. Perfect for people stuck at work and hungry.

WINGS...Best in Manayunk/Rox!!! Without a doubt!! Just go there for the wings and beer! Their other selection is a hit or miss for food. The service is just OK... A trendy/local bar! Go just for the wings and you will be a happy camper! Side note....they only except cash.... so be prepared! or pay $3 at the atm!

The food was excellent. We had to remind our server we were there and after she got over a little attitude (with the help of our southern charm) the rest of the time was great! Great lunch and dinner place. They serve breakfast which looked appetizing but I've never eaten so I can't give all opinion. Desserts are tasty.., especially the carrot cake!
So so. The drinks are fine. The pastries are unimpressive and obviously made elsewhere. Bought a slice of cheesecake for 3.50 and it was awful. Wifi is slow.
Really good meal. Flash fried oysters are AMAZING! PO boy and shrimp and grits were good.

I really loved this place, until I got a nasty toe infection after a pedicure. Not to be gross but there was so much pus, well ewww. Here's the kicker, it got so bad that I needed IV antibiotics. OK so that's pretty bad in itself. If they're not sanitizing their instruments I just can't be part of that anymore.
The Biscuit Love Truck was at the Yazoo Brewery on 5/24/12 to feed a mass of hungry Vette Barn members. I had the Princess with the hot chicken & sweet tea. Boy was it good!

There is MOLD in the apartment bed BUGSs . REPAIRS NOT FINISHED IN 1 yrs time. Many unexplained breaking in and entering . Many missing items. ? The Manager s try to ENTER tenants apartment s WITHOUT PERMISSION permission and for no reason violating the 48 hour notice LAW. THEY Threatened to call Cops to let them in.WORST NASTIEST APARTMENT EVER.
Love this place! Had take out from here and every item was pacaked to perfection. Lasagna was awesome! Also the other entrees were superb. Thank you Maggiano!

I've been coming in as of late due to my boyfriends love for dive bars. Barringer's has a feel to it that makes you believe you are walking into a place of comfort. They won't gouge you with prices and they will remember your face. Great local place serving up great bar food. I love the games in the back as well.

This is from someone who has good pho in LA on a regular basis. Was good, but has SIGNIFICANTLY gone downhill. Luke warm soup and lacking flavor. Day old, dried pork in my bahn mi. The bread was hard, crumbly, and totally dry. I really liked it at first, but now it's meh and won't go back.

i go to silver legacy twice a year. once in summer and once in winter. i never get treated with care. both staff and especially reservation receptionist never tend to my needs. they are such a big casino they dont care if you stay there are dont stay there, they are still making billions. gunna try a different casino from now on!!!

Save your money and book a walking/bike tour or something. 50 bucks per person only to get to the sites and you can't get off the bus. The driver took us to places that were closed. I really feel cheated. Myself and others that were on the tour fell asleep: half way through everyone just wanted to catch an Uber back to their hotels.

Went here after an outdoor outing. My husband and I split the two fish dishes and they were amazing! Service was awesome, we were served right away even though there was more than a couple of games playing. We met great people and had a charactiture drawn while we say and drank. I would definitely go back!
This is a must visit. The food is out of this world. The staff is amazing and friendly. What are you waiting for?! Go asap!
This was a great special dinner! I wish we had found this place earlier.good food good value well done!

I like the food but their service can definitely be a negative. They gave me something I didn't order, which of course happens. But instead of apologizing or fixing the issue, they told me I was wrong. I am very confident I didn't order something I am allergic to. In any case, the situation could have been handled better.

This is the worst Walmart I've ever been to. Everyday the isles are stacked with pallets making movement cluttered. The inventory is horrible. Logistically there is no reason you are out of product for weeks. The shelves are empty and the isles are full of boxes everyday. You need to replace the manager. This is a very busy Walmart to be so poorly ran.
If you want something subtle and refined, this is not the place. If you want to shoot up your cholesterol by 200% for no particular reason, this is the place.

Friendly service but the food was disappointing unfortunately. Rice was overcooked and tasted old, bean sprouts were not fresh. The sashimi was good as well as the tempura but for the price I won't be going back.

It's in a great location and has great views, but the service is slow, calamaris were way to salty, fries were way too salty as well and the steak was not seasoned enough. Service was very slow and not the best either.

Amazing service! I've gone to see Alba for a couple things and I can't recommend her enough. She's super friendly and gets things done quickly. So glad I now have someone to rely on for all my phone needs!
If you make a mistake and cancel your pizza and it's not delivered and you don't sign anything, you still have to pay for it. Consumer robbery
Standard fare for Reno/Sparks. Servers were awesome and very friendly, and that was about it. The avocado on the rolls were black; unacceptable when you're paying $18 for lunch.
Significantly over-priced. The food was good and unique, but the service, atmosphere and portion sizes were not up to par with the price point.
Very clean. Attendant on site. Washer and dryers in excellent working order. Lots of large and extra large machines. It's a hidden gem. Look behind the Roman pharmacy. Excepts credit cards.

Geno's steaks are average at best. I usually stop by after the bars close. Pro's: Its quick and not too expensive. They support the Police, Fire & EMS services. Con's: They don't have too much meat in the sandwich's and they are very plain tasting. There are many, less famous places that offer way better cheese steaks.
Waste of time and money! Paid $34 and still have dust and crumbs on dash and center console. $4 car wash across the street is a better deal!
Amazing birria and salsa. I got the tacos and they were the perfect portion. My boyfriend got a burrito and it was big enough to take home for a second meal.
By far the best po boys in NOLA! There's something for everyone! Even us vegetarians. Fried pickles and the caprese are my favorite.

Just finshed lunch buffet at this restaurant. Most of the trays are empty and no one bothers to fill them..pathetic service..pathetic food nothing is fresh everything is re heated and that is so clearly understood .

My absolute favorite place for Sushi!! My boys love it and they are treated well every time we go. They are happy to take custom orders as part of the AYCE price and always have a smile and hello when we walk in the door.
Don't ever get the quesadilla. It's like ordering a flat burrito with no ingredients. What a crock of shit.

I would say I received bad service, but I actually received no service. The burgers are ok, but not nearly worth the price. Past Perfect is a block away and serves much better food for the same money.
Simple, yummy breakfast sandwiches and good prices! We're in a hotel a block away and the online order for pickup was the perfect way to deal with our hangovers this morning.
The post office, from what I can tell is fine. The lines are long, probably due to not having an automated machine. Other than that, it's cool.
As far as dim sum goes, it doesn't get much better than here in Philadelphia. It's a very modern and pleasant atmosphere and the staff and very helpful and friendly. The food never disappoints.

Friendly place with reasonable prices and excellent donated merchandise. Sometimes the pieces on the racks are outdated, but they are always in good, barely-worn shape. The remodeled interior adds a boutique appeal, and it's helpful that there are more dressing rooms, but I agree with other reviewers: there is less in stock/on display now.
Yummy wood fired pizzas. The crust has a great consistency with the wood fired crisp outside and soft and chewy inside. The toppings are simple and delicious! Can't wait to try more pies!!

Little less impressive than I thought. Build and decor was plain. Service was lacking. Server was rude, slow and disinterested in serving. Bartender delivered drinks and later found out that she lied about what she served us. Food was cold. Wish for better from this ownership group.

Gross food!!! Sweet and sour chicken with no chicken in it or rock hard chicken. Lemon chicken had something unrecognizable in it. Vegetable lo mein tasted like dirt. Restaurant was Very dirty. Walls were filthy, floors gross. Just a very unpleasent experience. WILL NOT BE EATING THERE AGAIN!!!! If I could give them zero stars I would!!!!
Good food but nothing really special. Will not return. Was hungry after and ate stuff out of the fridge. A small sandwich for $9.

I've been there for both lunch and dinner several times. All of my meal met expectation. I read some of these reviews and people are expecting the meal to be equal to that of Burns and priced like McDonalds. This is a great beer and burger joint with some very good meals at a good price.
good setting, one craft beer on tap, occasional entertainment. comfortable... just don't order the food, as Charles would say 'it's turrbull!'

Just got there for the food, the workers are rude and lazy..been there several times probably about 45 minutes till closing and would take 20+ minutes to make or they would simply say they are out of food, also they ruin orders a lot. Better off driving a little bit down the road to another Popeyes

I want to like this place but pretty gross when the cook is taking orders and handling money with the same rubber gloves he cooks with. Cant say that happens all the time but last time I was there that is what I witnessed.
SPICIEST food in philly. Crushes Han Dynasty, not even a contest.

The food and drinks were delicious - however, we had to wait 1.5 hours to be seated without reservations and the bill for 2 people (drinks, appetizers, entrees, etc) was way over $100 I recommend making reservations and filling up on the free biscuits if you're on a budget

We must have come here on an off night. Off the three appetizers and 7 entrees we ordered only a few of the items were good. The meat was over done, the entrees were bland, and the appetizers were nothing special. I have two stars for the service and drinks which were good.
I wish there was a McAlister's Deli near me. It's a good solid inexpensive restaurant. Great place to get good sandwiches. Very clean establishment. Quick meals. Sour pickles!!
Solid restaurant, but didn't blow me away. - Sweet bread was really good - Pasta was nothing to be excited over - The drinks were really good
Orders take out, got a burger platter. I've gotten it there before and it was amazing! This time I got it, the bottoms of the bun was completely soggy it was disgusting. I couldn't even. Ugh!!
Slow service and un-attentive bartenders. Food was good but they got my order wrong had to correct. F-terminal needs a real bar-pub!
Nice little place. The Caesar salad was very good. The ravioli and margarita pizza equally tasty. The service was a little underwhelming.

While the atmosphere is nice, the food is disappointing. $34 bought a dry piece of halibut and what seemed like dehydrated super salty mushrooms on the side. Salads to start were soggy. A shame given its charming setting.

I always get eggs and potatoes (hard to mess up). I wanted to try the grits this morning - worst decision ever! I told the lady half grits and half potatoes so she served lil bit of both But i was charged full price! The grits tasted like throw up and flowed onto my eggs and potatoes - yuk! Also the waitresses are mean!
Reasonably good food with great selection on the menu. Just average good food nothing spectacular. I would come back again.
Had an amazing meal here this weekend. Food was great, ambiance and service were even better! Beautiful restaurant. Will definitely be going back!!

Carnitas nachos were bomb and the hostesses were sweetie pies but everything else was grossly mediocre. E didn't receive side plates for our apprtizers. Our med-rare burgers were well done. Only one of my kids received a spoon for his pasta. Our drinks went infilled. Our server checked in ya only once. Our high expectations were essentially crushed.
Really good burger. Maybe a dozen burger coices and a decent beer list. Good service. But it was a bit over priced. I expected a larger burger for the price.

Not going to get your favorite non-coffee options here (matcha, chai) but the coffee is damn good. A great, strong, brew to keep me up all day. Also a great study spot, with both indoor and outdoor seating options, in a quiet part of the rittenhouse/grad hospital boundary. They need to get a little more adventurous with the drinks, but I'll still be back!

Great location. Don't see how this place will survive with food like this. Tacos were kid size. Ingredients were mediocre. Refried beans were pretty horrible served in a condiment cup. Not good. Salsa wasn't good. Tasted old & Processed. Presentation wasn't good. Hard to even give this place a 2.

No stars. DO NOT COME HERE IF YOU ARENT WHITE. There is no bull to ride. You can only look at it. 100,000 security guards. I was watched the whole night by security guards. (Even in the restroom) disrespectful asf. DO NOT COME HERE. Not worth your time or money.

I'm confused by the hype. It was ok but the baked goods were generic and the coffee was just okay. It is a quiet courtyard and the prices were affordable. It was a passable stop but not worth revisiting.

The food was good.. nothing wrong with the food... but the place feels like it's got no soul.. it feels like to much art and not enough something....Cant put my finger on it...maybe they will get there... happy hour wine was great! great location, good service, good food...

Fun little place to go for a sonoran dog. Old fasioned style sodas, ouside seating with heaters if needed. But the quisadilla was pathetic, small cubes of chicken and almost no cheese and not even hot so it wasn't melted. Staff can be rude. Seems dirty, food on the floor, trash laying around. Had been tacos on a food truck before.

We stopped by for a bit and I ordered the meatloaf. It was thin, dry, crunchy and horrible to the taste. No kind of sauce what so ever, it shouldn't have been sent out for someone to eat. Maybe then out back and buried.
Nice selection of seasonal items. Decent prices. But old and dirty. I spent over $100 and tried to sign up for rewards program; but, cashier said his register was too old to sign me up.

Terrible. Waited an hour outside. Waited 10 minutes for a server. Waited for drinks. Brought all the food at once then had an attitude because we did t have silverware. Had the sampler of Red Beans, Jambalaya and Crawfish Etoufee. . Had to get my own crackers and the jambalaya was refrigerator cold. WTH??
Excellent service from curb to room!! Airport shuttle every 15 min!! Nice bar and concierge lounge.

As someone who has worked in the food industry for many years, I normally never like to comment on a resstaurant based on one experience. Unfortunately this was a must, bad service from the start with my interaction with the cashier to my disappointment with the quality of the pizza. Cheap tasting ingredients and bad customer service. Do not recommend in the slightest.

I was on the phone with them waiting for 12 minutes and hearing the same monotonous recording over and over and.....after my life started passing rapidly in my fading mind I hung up and went elsewhere for sustenance. And so it goes.
For a quick pie or local streak sandwich, this is the best in old city area. Fries are great, wings are average. Be sure to try the soup of the day!
They have nice tile, but they are quite rude if you call to order something. In person, the service is okay, but they're terrible on the phone.
One hour for delivery. Then the response is sorry it's Saturday. Funny story is I order on Saturday's all the time. Good thing I'm no longer working in arnold after this week.
Hair cuts are only $8 but you will pay more to have it fixed somewhere else. I made the mistake of going back after 3 years same result.
For the music, it's great. The venue itself is small, overcrowded, and has insanely over-priced poor quality drinks. There's better options around.

Great neighborhood diner with excellent service, especially Laura, who literally remembers our names like we live in a Friends episode. We recommend: the grouper plate, the breakfast platter, the turkey club, the loaded fries, the sweet potato pancake, the hangover, and the chocolate shakes.
Great fresh food that was brought to us VERY quickly. Tried the oysters, beer boiled shrimp, scallop ceviche, and seaweed salad. It was all great.
Between smelling alcohol on the breathe of the owner, and rude overall behavior from the employees, I will never come here again and I advise you not too as well!

They have kids meals and most kids will want milk but they don't have any on their menu. My grandson is 2. So he says he'd like lemonade but then their lemonade is out. Really!? Several tables I noticed were dirty too and it wasn't a busy time of the day.

Maybe don't go on a Monday. We were seated over a half hour after our reservation without any recognition from the staff. The plating was inconsistent--including an oyster dish without oysters. The wait staff was not familiar with the menu. Come for the history...don't stay for the dinner.
The food is great but customer service is horrible. The first time I went they stole my sisters phone. The second time they told a customer to shut up. The person who said it was the manager.

Love love love some Taco Mamacita! Tacos n sides always rock! General homeboy has to be the best ever- but it's gotta be HOT! The new seasonal poblano, garlic, tomatillo salsa is tasty and just the right hot. By hot, I mean the Siracha on my taco was a bit like ketchup. If you like hot get this salsa!

I wish I could give them zero stars!!!! If you want roaches in your food or on your table and etc. Well this is the place for you! I'mma guy and I was about to scream when a roach popes out of the condiment holder! PLEASE EVERYONE DO NOT EAT HERE! I will not be coming back EVER!!!!
Food is just lousy. Nothing authentic or special about any menu items. Also, zero seafood offerings. Cute place. Good service. Overpriced.
Update on the earlier review- the hipster grandpa sweater dude was on American Idol last nite!
Maybe a little rough around the edges, but they have a great beer selection, friendly service and their ribs on Thursday nights are really, really good.

The front desk Manager (Melissa) is kind of rude and disrespectful. But the good news about this place is, It has a very refreshing and clean pool, a complementary breakfast and clean and comfy cozy rooms.

Wow! Excellent meat! I had lean brisket and pulled pork! The Louisiana sauce with the brisket was awesome. My sides were one of each loved the sweet potato and coleslaw and loved the baked potatoes.... The baked beans were good but I like the ones I cook better..... The men who worked here were so helpful and awesome! Thanks Brice!
Average food - grocery store burgers, bland fried potatoes - just spuds, no pepper, onions or seasoning. Be prepared for a very noisy bar with loud music, plastic forks and plastic plates!
Always a fun crowd come for Quizzo on Monday with the terrific Patrick Hamilton as the Quizzo quizzer and stay for the awesome bar staff! Great food too and happy hour specials!
Our meal was ok. Over price on my opinion. I loved the vibe and the dj. Our sever spoke too low and we couldn't hear him.
Yum Yum !!! The original Philly cheese steak , and south Philly what a BLAST !!

Unbelievable I asked for extra sour cream and got an entire gallon on my bowl. Everything is ice cold. What a shame and a waste. Sure wish the smart butt on the line who did this got a laugh. Never again

This Rack was just Ok. Usually I can find great deals, but this one did not have great stuff. Alot of the household items in accessories were broken, yet still on shelves. Seems hit or miss, but was disappointed to not find deals here.
They are pricey but the experience you're getting is that of every nail salon. My acrylic nail broke less than 24 hours after my appointment. I'll stick to my regular place thank you.
Since Covid we're only had takeout; we've long considered this a hidden gem - one of the best Thai places in Reno, with good considerate service.
Wow amazing find, great quality fish and flavors. Even better than many sit down places.
Nothing of extreme note either way. Food was decent, pricing was decent and service was decent.
Food is mediocre and pricy. I stopped going there 11yrs ago and got to see why on mother's day. I would never try this place again. All I see is old fokes
Restaurant is nearly empty. Service sucks. Waited 10 to 15 mi utes for waiter and even longer for drinks. Probably won't be back.

Love love love me some warm cookies and Insomnia really delivers in warmth and flavor. I've tried the chocolate chunk, peanut butter and mint chocolate chip which were all delish. The mint chocolate chip was like eating a warm, soft and chewy Girl Scout thin mint cookie. I'm glad I don't live near this place.
Good food. Bossy staff. Service was okay but not great. Concerning black mold on ceiling on 2nd floor.

Do not order from this restaurant through Waitr. For dine in they are fine, every time I've ordered through Waitr it tastes like someone dragged my food across the bathroom floor...it literally tastes like disinfectant.

I had the tenderloin sandwich, which was enormous and delicious. My husband had pork steak. We both enjoyed our meals; however, if you are not a drinker the drinks from the tap do taste like they have alcohol in them. Perhaps the tap could be checked since even the slight bit of alcohol did bother my husband's stomach.

Just renewed my lease for another year here. One of the better bang for your buck options if you are looking for a complex that has more to offer. Kamilah and the maintenance staff are amazing and make living here a lot easier!

Our food from here was good but not great. The falafel had good flavor but wasn't crispy on the outside, which led us to believe it was perhaps premade in bulk. The owner had also run out of tzatziki which was disappointing but understandable given the difficulties businesses are facing.
Gizmoe loved this place. Cheaper than petsmart, especially when they don't listen to me. I will bring Guzmoe back here. His groomer did such a great job!

We had AYCE sushi. The rolls were pretty good. The problem is you have to like cucumber since about 80% of the rolls have it. Some of them had lots of rice and just the littlest amount of filling. The service was good and the drinks were reasonably priced.

Ok, Comcast service sucks, we get it. But the building itself (the Comcast center) houses the largest TV in the world. It's all LEDs, no projector involved. Their lobby is open late, and was a nice place to stop before turning in to the hotel for the night. There's not much to do here, but the TV is definitely something to see...nay, experience.
Why get rid of the cinnamon raisin biscuits? They were the best thing on the menu. The new ones are horrid.
lovely little shop...recently changed hands, so it looks a little different, but it is still the best place for vintage jewelry on 4th Ave.

Roast beef has always been perfect. It is almost a 5 star sandwich. If your looking for looks and staff that wear suits and sparkling clean building, not your place. It is a bar that has above average food.
I like that it's quick and simple. They are very nice and helpful. The food has been very consistent every time I have been and I wouldn't come back if I didn't like it. I would recommend this place
Great beer selection but the food is kinda boring and overrated. Clunky layout too. Not all that bad but not all that great.
this is my everyday Dunkin BUT the past 3 weeks ive been getting Burnt iced coffee!! if i wasnt on my way to work id go back and complain! one more time and ill try a different dunkin

The menu sounded good but tasted terrible. The service was terrible. I had to ask twice for water, and we waited forever for our food. Cute place and nice people. They have the right idea, but poor execution.
I blew out a tire and the service here was unbelievable! They were honest and made the entire experience simple and extremely quick! I will be coming back as well as suggesting it to others.

Sadly this place has been bought over by non Greek owners. The menu has already changed adding some Asian options. Ran out of some regular menu items. Goodbye Greekville. Give it some time before it changes altogether...

This wawa is very rude and unprofessional. The ATM inside scams, pick up on your information and freezes. The store manager Pete is very rude and racist. I would not go to this wawa for anything else. People are not treated fair. The cashiers are mean and nasty

Sorry St. Joes prep owner, this OHara girl thinks the onions could be smaller sized. Reduce them down a bit more too so the sandwich isnt so wet and might be a bit better. You were the highlight of the visit ;)
The burger was good but the fries were lacking the five guys quality. The place was busy but still got served in a decent amount of time. The staff were friendly and the meal was good.

Got my glasses repaired in less than 15 minutes! Who knew ? I've even had these for 3 years and she was so nice to me like I purchased them last week! Great service. I'm thrilled they were fixed quickly and didn't cost me a dime. Love it. Thank you!
Charbroiled oysters were delicious. Service was ok. I was not impressed with the menu at all.
For what they served, it was a little too pricey for my taste. I loved the Mediterranean feel to it. The food was excellent, don't get me wrong, but it was over priced.

What happened to this place? Wait staff is terrible. Rude, slow, and loud. I could hear them over the movie that was playing. Food is sub par. Drinks that are on the menu aren't available. It's always messy and dirty. Restrooms are filthy. My last visit for sure. So many other places to choose from.

This place sucks!!! Missing the old owners with their crazy clown decor, but had awesome homemade food and tastes fresh! Service sucks along with the food; stale bread and sub par lasagna... addressing all my fellow military members go to Sally Oneals off of Howard, better service and excellent quality of food.

Nice looking rooms that are clean with lovely staff. However, the beds are ROCKS even those with the feather toppers for the beds. So hard! If that is what you like it is a 5 star if not it is 3. I would have kept staying there if the beds were better. Never again!

I've had bad service before but nothing as bad as service at Bibo coffee. Smug, snide, rude and otherwise non service oriented. I guess the customer is never right here, and I've tried 2 locations. Not only will I never enter their establishment again, I will make sure that clients, colleagues and friends know not to as well.

.These 2 brothers offer a terrific service that I enthusiastically recommend. I had a large collection of boxes and packing that Clutter removed quickly, efficiently and at a fair, competitive and reasonable price. I recommend them highly.

This was the first time I tried eating there for dinner and I liked it. I got there philly cheeses stake and it was filling but there fries had no taste to them. I love there donuts and I will go back for those but I won't eat there again for dinner or lunch.

Another great rolled ice cream shop in the city! It's usually pretty busy but they also deliver on Grubhub and ubereats! Love their menu and flavor options and they have quite a few topping options. They also have mochi in a little freezer for purchase.
The new sound system is great. Nice selection of beverages. Really interesting exhibits. Smoke free. My favorite Boise venue. Go see shows here.
Friendly service, good drinks . Only thing is they closed early everyday while I was visiting which is understandable due to lack of employees. overall good location, I would recommend.

It was busy this morning. Ate breakfast service was slow but they have a sign with a warning that everything is cooked to order. First, nice outdoor patio, the atmosphere and staff are crunchy. Bottom line is the food was very good. Did not have the yogurt or milk shakes but they looked delicious.

I've been a few times and have experienced consistently good food and service. The margarita was mixed well and there is a good selection of Mexican beers on tap. The food is cooked well. There's a family restaurant feel to the place, which is nice. It's definitely worth trying.

I just wanted to give credit to this restaurant for a yummy lunch and a great waiter. Tim was awesome. He was kind and efficient. He anticipated our needs without us asking. He was attentive without hovering. Couldn't have asked for a better experience. Thank you

Love this place best donairs in Edmonton and area I think lovely staff owner is very friendly been coming there for 12 years now whenever any of my friends are looking for a good Donair I recommend this place
Straight forward food. Fairly popular, open late. Tavern and music venus in the back, but a 16+ place.

Had the pork shoulder sandwich with beans and Mac and cheese. The pork itself was a bit dry, and the person I went with said it wasn't as good as normal. Many sauces to choose from though. Mac and cheese was solid, and the baked beans were good as well. The establishment itself wasn't the cleanest, but that didn't impede on our experience.

The Southern is a pretty good place to have a meal. The service is quite good, the drinks and the food are excellent BUT the vibe is a little too Brentwood for me. The oysters are so fresh and tasty that I half expected a boat out back!
Little bit chilly if you're sitting at the bar....but other than that....the service is great and the drinks are great. Besides being a little slow on service everything was perfect.
Good food but the crappy attitude of owner and staff and sub par service always ruins the experience....3 strikes now, I am out!

Seriously great fast food, friendly service, and they deliver. 5 stars for the delicious Crispy HipCity Ranch chick'n sandwich, which is a solid value at $8.50. 5 stars for the green lemonade. 4 stars for the interesting banana whip, which is a sort of whipped frozen banana. Well done y'all.

The food is not bad, but it's not that good, either. This is a very basic meat-and-three. But it features "Brentwood pricing," which wrecks it. I won't spend $10 on basic meat and veg. And the vibe? Geriatric at best. Think Piccadilly Cafeteria and you've got it!

Got Mexican and shrimp tempura roll to go and looked like old rolls and not like others I've had at other places also Had seaweed salad which was good BUT I GOT FOOD POISONING. Ate there before didn't have a problem but this time I did. If it don't look good don't eat it.
We stayed here for the SB Seafood Fest. It's no-frills & delivers on that. The location is decent, but that's really the only selling point.

El Pique is a hidden gem. This place is authentic, and serves only high quality Mexican food. Good prices, friendly staff, quick service, and extensive menu gives this place a max rating. Never disappoints! The quality of the food, especially for the price, trumps Moes southwest grill or any other chain Mexican food joint. This is true Mexican food, and will not disappoint.

Service was a little slow, the place was a bit crowded for only two servers. A third would make for much quicker service and less confusion. The food was good and the servings were generous. Over all a pretty good experience.

Missed Chopstix which used to be here, new owner has a broader menu offering and better lunch combo pricing/value. Garlic chicken was flavorful w/plentiful vegetables, fried rice was very good. Egg roll and crab rangoon starters good but a bit greasy for me. Others in group enjoyed their meals. Glad to have better local option back here, hope they succeed!
Consistently great burgers. My favorite is the Zinburger. The fries are excellent. I am tempted by the desserts but always too full to try them. Kids menu items keeps our kids happy.
the Mama Fama punch was really good. i had the goat...it was adequately satisfying. and the plantains were perfect, but then again, i love plantains nearly any way i can get em.
Not impressed by any part of the meal. Tried many things. Soups were awful, food very bland overall.

Only one person working the registers but it's close to 9pm so that could possibly be why. It's a huge target but a lot of stuff I was looking for was out of stock or the wrong price sticker was under the product.

This Mexican restaurant carries one of my all-time favorite Mexican dishes: The Camarones Potro. This dish has scallops, shrimp, spinach, and onions. But, that's not what makes this dish so delicious. The special sauce they pour over all the seafood & veggies is the secret to this amazing dish! As for drinks, their spicy margaritas are a must try!
Apparently, no more challah bread supply on Fridays (or at all) .. :( Disappointing.

Dr. Gammon is inexperienced (maybe because very young), unhelpful, and seems to only care about getting his time's worth (money) from patients in short 10 minute appointments. He doesn't come off as having a kind disposition either.. All makes for not being worth your money, time, and hope for getting an accurate treatment.

They deleted my legitimate bad review here. The staff is awful. They will be in a group as you walk in and say snide, rude underhand insults. Leaving you with a bad taste in your mouth leaving this facility. I went to spectrum much better atmosphere with with respectful, well mannered staff. 1 star for the rude staff here.

Ordered ice cream to go. It took them 15 minutes to scoop it with the girl checking on it three times. They then brought it out in bowls when we'd ordered it to go. Had a movie to catch so we just left. Unacceptable for an order-at-the-counter.
Words can not express. I would stop typing there but I have to have so many words in a review before it will let me post.
Don't even bother to come here. This place sucks. I bought a product that sucks and they won't take it back. Stay away!

Horrible!!!! Had the sampler beer 1.0..... Not a drinkable beer out of ten. Not trying to be overly critical but very bad. Food was only ok. The building and decor of the place is cool but doesn't make up for the beer.

4.5 stars for a good lunch and ambiance. 0 stars for our waiter Owen. He was horrible and unworthy of a tip. Never once checked on us, asked if we wanted refills or dessert, nada. I noticed other tables being ignored by him and another waitress, so it seemed to be a pervasive issue.
I love their Spicy Brazilian bowl with steak and chargrilled chicken. Always fresh and always cooked to perfection. And the coconut avocado rice is perfect in any bowl.

In my quest to eat as much Thai food as possible, this ranks up there with Erawan. the only reason it didn't get a 5 stars: the Thai iced tea lacked sugar (which is a very important ingredient in that drink) and the food took quite a while to come out. but the curry was AMAZING and I will definitely be back!
Wonderful haircut they offered some great products and used something I haven't seen before a type of scissors on fingers that was cool.

Wasn't to impressed with customer service. Was my first time in and the kid at front was new he said it was his second night so he struggled why I'm asking about specials all I get is stares from a couple employees in the back they finally came up but with the attitudes and the stares I almost left.

I go here like once a week and it's so good every time. Their Roxbury Road is my current favorite. Staff is always super friendly too which is a plus! The only reason for 4 stars is that it's very pricey for ice cream, but regardless, I'll be back!
Second screw up. Avoid this place. I ordered 1 box combo and a coke as shown in the receipt. They gave me just chicken for a to go order. I'll be talking to management as this is the second time.

I took my roommate here tonight. In her words, "It was over-priced at not that good. I wouldn't event want to go again even if was half-price sushi." Yes, the place is modern and upscale, but the sushi portions are very small.
Bad food and service, sorry. The food had no taste nor flavor. Also no guacamole or queso with the tacos. The meat was flavorless.
This place is really boring with a really bad management and the bouncers don't know how to check ids( I'm from NY)
I left a review at the end of 2013. These reviews are either read and ignored or not read at all. I've had no contact at all from this shoddy hotel.

Food is wonderful, but the service is not great. Went for brunch to get bottomless mimosas, but only was "allowed" to drink 3. The atmosphere is quirky and wonderful, but overall the restaurant is a bit overpriced.
The place is great for the children, but the staff is very disorganized which makes me think twice before coming over again.

The lady behind the counter today was cold and far from friendly.I wanted to buy more items but she made it out to be like I was bothering her.The place was adorable. What we did try was excellent .Would love to have tried more.

Strange as it may seem, don't go here for the beignets. They're too greasy, and just sit in your stomach. Head over to Cafe du Monde instead. But do come here for breakfast or lunch. It's a cute place, and the food is good.
Waited at the drive thru for 15 minutes for four bland, dry and ugly asada tacos and a watered down Horchata. :(

Ben helped me move from my Center City office to my suburban home, and everything went perfectly. He and his partner were professional, friendly, punctual and safe. And so quick! I couldn't ask for more. Highly recommend.

Food tastes microwaved, pool games are average, the late night bartender is a younger who should probably be far far from customers waging dishes, Patrons are ahhhh well If you have all your teeth you may not fit in.

I love their Island Bowl so much! Had a chance to enjoy a bowl while on a weekend getaway & since I've been back home, I can't stop thinking about it. Lol will definitely visit again when I'm in town or in LA (because I've already looked up all the locations lol)

I win the coming back to this place based purely on the attitude of the technician. RUDE is an understatement regarding the red bearded jerk with glasses. This company should get rid of employees who don't know how to talk to a paying customer.

i almost got arrested for peeing in the grass here. Damn. I gotta stop acting like a 2 year old. Nice pile of park. I like it. I used to come here and talk to my girlfriend when she wasn't my girlfriend.
Breakfast is very good. Lunch and dinner aren't worth it. We've tried lunch and dinner a couple of times and keep getting disappointed.
The food was bland and way over priced. The portion size only added insult to the injury of the prices. Definitely not worth the money I spent. Service was ok.

This is our go to breakfast on Saturday mornings. Friendly service. If you go at the right time the wait is shorter. The food is good but I think it's overpriced. Overall it's a gem for breakfast/lunch place.
Love all of the live music and yummy food! If the airport is a taste of what the city has to offer then I'm really looking forward to checking it out!

Lobby and staff was amazing. But our room was dated and falling apart and dusty. Waited for ever for sheets for sofa bed that was falling apart. We upgrade to a suite. For the money I expect it to be better quality. This hotel definitely needs updating.

Ok food, cute place right on the beach. Small and easily over crowded. The staff is constantly rude. They do not smile and are not kind nor helpful. I have been going there are years and I have never had good customer service.

The service was good even towards the end of their business hours. The food was plentiful and tasty. The chef was entertaining and catered to my niece and nephew - the chef enjoyed keeping a smile on the kids faces. PS: We didn't have a reservations and was seated instantly. Again this was towards the end of their business hours.

Couldn't even bite the chicken it was so rough. I have never had chicken that had this texture. It was unbearable. Staff was oblivious to what was going on. I would never recommend or go back. Expensive for very cheap quality "chicken" (if it even was chicken)....
Good. Smelled funny when we first walked. Food was good. Tater tots are on point. Their 'cucumber salad' was fresh. But it's right by my house so it's def a repeat visit location.

Our family decided to try this place out and honestly I thought the price was very expensive, presentations look great but taste was just ok, wasn't bad but not worth the price...Staff was nice, the place was clean but everything was pricey.

Had Thanksgiving celebration here. Awesome food. Some of the best holiday food I've ever eaten. Service is professional and courteous. The view of the channel is fun and the huge picture windows add to a very relaxed meal. Prices are not too high at all.
Food was alright. Nothing rave about, but I'm not that big on that kind of food anyway. The tres leche was good as was the flan. :) server was very nice
I will keep this very simple. Larry provides the best cut in Indianapolis. A great barbershop feel and experience coupled with a very reasonable price makes Bogie's a no-brainer.

bubble tea review only: I got the coconut milk tea and I was expecting a more rich taste and texture. the tea is not rich but more watery if anything. it also isn't very sweet. my friend let me drink his (mocha, coconut, almond chiller) and it was almost bitter. I wouldn't really recommend this place to anyone with high hopes.

Excellent service, food, juice and smoothies. Great addition to Charlotte Ave. The only negative is the kids menu food was too "adult" tasting for my little ones and prices are tad high. Despite this, I will be visiting again.
I like coming here when I want a good shrimp taco or brisket quesadilla. They are always busy. There are big screen tv to watch the Cards or Blues game. Tgey also have trivia night too.

Pricey for what I got, a bowl of chowder & a burger with fries & 2 beers ($37 + tip). Active wait staff delivers great service. This was my second visit, but somehow I'm not in the mood yet for a third.

Horrible. Does not respond to maintenance requests (took half of our lease to solve a simple plumbing issue) and generally does not care about the tenants, short of filling vacant rooms. Don't lease from them if you've got the money to avoid them.
Note that Endangered Species is no longer run by Jon and I think the chocolate production has moved to Indiana.
Why write a review when Andrew C has said everything there needs to be said about this place- its late 2007 now Andrew- and the prices are actually not as expensive as you recalled-
Chocolate mousse cake was something I can get at any supermarket. Other than that, delicious. Will come back.
I was contacted by someone who said they would rectify my situation. I followed their instructions and never heard back!
Fast service great fries farmer market excellent loaded with pound's of veggies. Ok I may exaggerated on the pound's but it was a lot.

Use to go here years ago, but our work group broke up. Went back and it was like we never left. The food was good and the service was great. Lots of TVs around the bar showing plenty of sports. I am not a beer drinker, but my coworkers and friends are and they like the variety of beers.
It's ok, just ok. Fish is not great but not horrible. Sushi rice is not good , doesn't taste right and hard. Miso soup is very diluted.

I always order burritos at Mexican restaurants, it's my go to dish. Their shrimp burritos are out of this world. My mouth is watering just thinking about them now- if you like shrimp and burritos you'd be dumb to not order this dish.
Great new place to add to our take out rotation. The food portions are generous and the menu items are unique as well as delicious.
This restraunt was amazing!! It felt like you were in Italy! I had the salmon and it was the best I ever had!!! So amazing staff was so nice and such a cool atmosphere . Would def go back!

Super clean tools and professional staff. Very thorough pedicure. They fit me in for a last minute pedicure an hour before closing. My only complaint is that they didn't offer water or anything when I arrived, and it was hot out!

Went here on a recommendation. I love gyros, especially the meat. I ordered a gyro with fries. There was only one thin, small slice of meat, hidden at the bottom, covered with too many onions, too little tomatoes and hardly any tzikki sauce. The flavor of the meat was not impressive either. I wouldn't go back.

Probably still the worst Starbucks I've been too. They make you wait a 20min long line just to be told that they're out of what you want to get regardless of what time of day. Manager is rude and no help either.

Tony's pizza is really to die for. Fresh dough, true wood fired brick oven, oh my goodness good ingredients. When he makes it, his nutella pudding is amazing (call ahead day before and he'll whip you up a batch). Highly recommend this hidden gem in Ardmore. You won't regret it.
Delicious shrimp pho. They don't skimp out on takeout portions either. In person service is usually slow though.

Lunch for 3 was almost $40.00. My "large size" chicken w/ noodle dish had 4 tiny pieces of chicken in it. And it was overcooked. The meal did NOT come with a smile; none could be found among the entire, almost angry looking staff. Won't be going back.
Quick in and out. On top of that a very good sandwich. The jerk chicken and the tuna melt, which my wife devoured, were delicious. I will definitely return. Prices are reasonable.
Such horrible customer service. Everyone behind the counter was RUDE. I'd have to agree....I was extremely disappointed by the amount of store-bought juice going into my smoothie!!!!!

Each night has a different special. Happy hour is buy one get one free draft beers. Got to tasty bold city Dukes brown ale totally delicious got to try it. Had the southwest chicken that was pretty good comes with tons of cheese and bacon. Mondays and Tuesdays kids eat free with the adult meal.

My sister ordered some take out for me and I'm not impressed. She got me roast pork over rice and veg. The pork was super super dry and lacking flavor and the sauce over the rice was flavorless and as were the veggies. It came with a side of soup which I'm not even gonna try. Don't think I'll dine in anytime soon.

They wanted another $10 to drop off a FedEx package that I had already pre-paid FedEx 10.50 to ship on the first place. I confirmed the location is owned by FedEx and not an independent franchisee. Don't use this place on general principal. No way to treat the few customers they still have. Avoid.
Pretty decent toco place. Wasn't wowed but the combinations were different and delicious. Would love more of a fresh taste.

I go here once a month or so to get away from the office. Nothing spectacular, but reasonably priced and filling. Fast, friendly service. Broad menu of all things Chinese. It will remain part of my rotation.

Was not impressed at all. Not genuine sushi, I could've gotten something like this at albertsons. Definitely not for people who like to get sushi a lot and is more geared towards hungry college students that don't care as much about food.

Nice little place that I've seen for years but have never visited because I'm generally smart about my food choices. But I tasted my friend's "French crawler", a sort of braided it twisted donut and I'm so glad we had already driven away from the bakery or I'd have had one too!

They used to have consistently good food. Lately you never know what you will get and they've created a $15.00 minimum order for delivery. (excluding fees.) I would order a $5.00 sandwich for myself and now I need to eat like a pig to get a sandwich! I will never order from this joint again.
Very marginal Three King's burger with bacon and very little blue cheese. The sweet potato fries were good and the service was fabulous--leaves room for improvement.

What everyone is saying is true! Took a chance and bought a few dishes from this stand. Four dollars is the average price for almost every dish. The portion size was too much for me, difficult time finishing it, but well worth $8! I would definitely go back here, not only to save money, but because it is that good...
I had this place delivered to us at work from uber eats. It did take 2 hours. We warmed up the food and it was still awful. I will not be ordering again.

Family hosted a wedding shower for us here that was amazing. The staff really went out of their way to accommodate vegetarians and those with gluten allergies. The food was delicious and the service was outstanding. One of our favorite places, and we'll be back!
Very pathetic piece of delivery. They asked for 45 mins time for to-go order and made me wait for 20 mins in the restaurant taking 1:05 hr to make just 2 Biriyani. Horrible piece of service.
When we arrived we were told 35-40 minute wait. After an hour we decided to take our business elsewhere. Let's hope they clean house and turn this establishment around. So sad...

Price gouging of the worst kind. No idea why any Condo Management Company would ever pick them. They are thieves. Stay away if you have any alternate option. Otherwise they have you over the barrel to charge whatever preposterous amounts they feel like charging. Highway robbery. They are overdue for a class action suit.
This course has been completely redone ever since the new owners took over and the tired drunk is gone. Highly recommend playing this course. Only will take about 2 hours to play 9 holes.

Fraudsters. Selling above MSRP on new vehicles plus adding $2000 addendum fees on all new and used vehicles . Disgusting and just pure greed .Dealerships profits are higher now then pre-covid. Take it over leave attitude. Please don't throw your hard earning money away . Be smart .

Visited Philly for a few weeks and figured I needed some authentic cheesesteaks before I left. I tried a few places in the city, but this one took the cake! It has an old school feel with the best steaks in town!

Posted hours say opens at 12:00 on Wednesday. I drove up from the 9th W/D pocketful of cash eager to be spent there and arrived after 12:30 on Wednesday to find door locked. No response to knock nor phone calls. Voicemail greeting says they don't listen to voicemail. They waste my time and precious fuel. I glad I spend no money there. Poopy businesspeople
Fresh, delicious, consistent! Wish they'd have blue corn chips more often.

Negro mole was bad. The chicken was very tough. It seemed like a chicken breast boiled in plain water with sauce over the top. I should have read the reviews before I went. The chicken was only warm and the sauce ladled over was also cool. The rice wasn't good and the beans over salted. Disappointing meal. 2 stars for the service.
Super friendly and helpful staff. Lots of vegan options and the cashew mylk is made in house. The coffee is delicious! You won't be disappointed :)
Awesome service and delicious food. Andrew and Shelby and so great! Best thing is the cheese and salami platter with the beer samples!

Okay....service is fine. But then you don't get your bill and they send you to collections. This has happened to us twice now. If you call and ask that they try at least to send you a bill, they claim they tried. Then they hang up on you. Thanks!!!!!
Here for three days and came back for seconds. Definitely need to text ahead to avoid the 90+ minute wait.
Nice park and that's what it is...a park for sports and families but not a great place if you are a trail runner. Too crowded and flat.
I wish I didn't have to give any stars. When for lunch on Sunday and had the Salad bar and got food poisoning .
Can't beat buck a shuck oysters. All the seafood was very fresh and tasty. The cocktails are flavorful and definitely pack a punch. This is a terrific place to go for happy hour.

This place smelled and I don't really think that fruits and vegetables were that fresh, reminded me of Walmarts produce. I don't really have much to say here, shocker! It was a small store so the options seemed limited. New to the area and this was just closer to my hotel but not close to my new apartment so I probably wouldn't go back.

Y'all are rude as hell all the time and your cheddar biscuits are never cooked through! Get over yourselves! Just cause y'all Donald Link don't make you the best to treat people like crap cause they walk in a few minutes early! Ok!!!!!

Stopped by here twice on a road trip. Shop was clean and well kept. Both times the staff was pleasant, welcoming and professional. This is definitely one of the better Starbucks we've been two (hence why we went twice!).
Huge oysters when I was there. Great service! Had a muffuletta (half). It was all very tasty!
The old theater is now a discount theater ($2 showings). A new location (Carmike 12) has opened a few miles up Route 100. Let's hope the ownership will care for this location.
Perfect combination of atmosphere and food experience. Best tap selection any where in the French quarter. The fries are a must and the pork chop is ridiculously juicy. Great experience all around.
To be fair I came for happy hour and got two drinks and pickle chips. All mediocre in my opinion. Plus many better happy hours around the city

Great lunch specials! It can be kind of busy at lunch time so if you are restricted on time it may not be a good choice but the lunch specials are decently priced and are more than enough food. Make sure you get a tiramisu (even if it's to go"!
Pizza was very good when talking about texture, cheese, and sauce. I loved this one but can't say it really hits the top for me.
Burger and fries awesome... they were out of fried shrimp and roast beef! Spicy potatoes were not good at all! Oyster poboy wasn't bad but will not back.
I had the Cuban. It was below average, but the beer selection is good. Wouldn't be bad for game day as they do crank up the sound.
This summer I ate 3 times at the Parc. I loved the hamburger and fries the best, plus the view. It will always be a place I will stop for lunch while in Philly.
We used to come here a lot but really disappointed with the sub par service. Waited forever for waitor, queso was delayed, empty drinks and food was subpar. Don't plan on returning
Probably the most expensive thrift store I've ever walked into. They had a faded glory button priced at 18.99$. What a rip off!

The prices were crazy for a working class neighborhood. You would think this was a beach location. Buttered bagel was $1.90 with tax. Dunkin Donuts $1.35 with tax. Muffins were about $2.50 . Ridiculously high. I bought the buttered bagel and it was only ok. Sorry, but to say the prices are reasonable is unfair. They are even higher than Einsteins.
Stopped in for a quick espresso and stayed for their berry smoothie. Not too sweet, not too bland just right.

I am typically a huge fan of The Juice Bar but today I visited the Brentwood location (I typically go to the one in Belle Meade) and paid $10 for a stale almond butter sandwich and a water. I wished I would have just ordered a juice.

Had an amazing time at Ichibans last night! There was 10 in our party and Alvin our chef took really great care of us. The night would not of been so memorable with out him. Thanks again and definitely will be coming back soon!
Worst ever hotel!! Razors on ground by steps. Bathtub unusable. AC leaked on room floor. Noisy neighbors. Right on main road. Checked out after an hour.
As a Publix employee I was appalled by the lack of Carry out services, a clean parking lot, and prepackaged sandwiches. Did not help find an item in fact said try another store :/
They left grease stains on my carpet and on the rims of my car. They don't care about other peoples property.

Love the experience so far. I walked in. Had questions. Ms Jill answered them very well and clearly that I walked out with a unit. It was what I needed to get my 2017 on track on getting my things organized. Love the customer service they give and renting is very easy process.
