I can foresee very great long relationship with this business.

Really great place to grab a few drinks & catch up with friends or even have a nice intimate date. Plenty of creative handcrafted cocktails & options of all sorts of liquor, beer & wine. It's pretty dimmed inside but there's various seating with a beautiful bar as well as an outside patio. Service is also great, would definitely recommend!
Very cool ambiance. LOVED the beet fries and mushroom dumplings! Not crazy about the steamed pancake with avacado only bcuz I get weird about textures. Still- I ate everything!!
Food is really great. Service is very slow. Staff seems stressed and overworked. Uber is interfering with their ability to service their sit down customers.
Long wait, mediocre white people food and pricy. Also customer service is very poor. Plus the music doesn't go well with the vibe. Overall go somewhere else and don't waste your money.

Huge portions! I've never been able to finish a small sandwich of theirs in one sitting because they are stuffed with meat. They have more variety in pizza and sandwiches than every other pizza joint in the area. Probably my favorite pizza in the neighborhood.

Love my new door! Installed and cleaned up completely in under 3 hours. The only reason I have only 4 stars is they are a little high priced. They gave me 4 keys for the new lock. Installed by Mike he is fantastic! Everybody with the company really knows a the product.
easy place to meetup afterwork. food wasn't a standout for me. they do have brewery tours. pool tables, patio.

Dissatisfied with their customer service. I had an appointment scheduled and I was treated like a walk in. I had an appointment with Muskan but S. Sharma ended up doing my eyebrows. S. Sharma did my eyebrows twice and they just never come out even. That is why the appointment was scheduled to be done by Muskan. Disappointed they do not honor appointments.

The service here is really good we got seated right away and our waiter was really nice. The food look delicious and the vibes of the place is very modern. Sat right next to the boardwalk and it looks beautiful. Totally recommend!
Love the organic, no pink slime aspect but the burger was small and over cooked. The fries were over cooked and tasted oily. No plan to return.

Grading a cheesesteak is a lot like grading any of your poops. Sure some are more impressive than others but its all just shit you dont want inside your body. With that in mind Ill give it my best shot... Pats is not as terrible as genos. So there.

Hate to say....but NOT coming back. I know my review will be an anomaly....but I've been here twice in two months....not a good experience either time. Music awesome....people that work there...not so much..... Nuff said.

Ordered the Philly cheese steak with chez-wiz combi meal. Service 2 was slow but it was the peak of the lunch hour. The sandwhich was bland and tge bread wasn't fresh. The fries were great, fresh hand cut and seasoned just right. The bread wasnt as fresh as I like and would have been better grilled.

Raylene and her team are amazing!! They came in and cleaned up our house post-party and had it back to "normal" so that there was no evidence a party even took place! Thank you so much for your attentiveness, attention to detail, and quality work!
We waited 20 minutes to order then 30 minutes later we noticed all the other tables had their food and we did not. We walked out and will not be returning. Sucks for them. We are good tippers

Well, it's a certainly a good deal. Staying here certainly ensures you'll keep your trip cost low. It's a good place to come with friends and party. We had adjoining rooms and the party went on and one and no one ever called and complained. The room had a nice view of the mountains.
I wondered why they had two dozen brown eggs for five dollars when I got home I found out. Over six eggs broken between the two cartons.

Did I just come on a bad night? Everything was disgusting. Every. Single. Dish. Fried chicken= disgusting. Veal = disgusting. Stuffed baked potato (how in the name of all that is good and decent in this world could anyone ruin a baked potato??) Go to Willie Mae's Scotch House instead.

A classic "go-to" relaxed, casual venue. Ron's menu is quite extensive, most of which is highly palatable. I frequently enjoy the Stromboli and pizza. My strong recommendation, however, is to try their homemade desserts - especially the cheesecake.
I'll agree with Rich H. when he says that Tacos 46 are totally legit. You should totally come find out why on your next Taco Tuesday...and save room for chips & guac!

Without question, this is the slowest Starbucks I have ever been to. I have now been standing for 20 minutes, awaiting two drinks that I have already paid for. Given the expected holiday demand, this location is extremely inefficient. FIND ANOTHER LOCATION!
